Genesis1:1 Xoossi koyro salonne sa7a medhdhides. 
Genesis1:2 He wode sa7ay lo7i giigibeennanne aykkoyka baynda mela dees; ciimmasohota dhumay goozi oykkides; Xoossa Ayanay haaththafe bollara may7i uttides. 
Genesis1:3 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Poo7o gido» giin poo7o gidides." 
Genesis1:4 Poo7oy lo7o gididayssa Xoossi be7idi poo7o dhumappe shaakkides. 
Genesis1:5 Xoossi poo7oza, «Gallas», dhumaza, «Omars» gi sunththides. Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika koyro gallassa." 
Genesis1:6 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Bollara diza haaththaa garsara diza haaththaafe shaakkiza salo gufanththoy hano» giin hanides. Xoossi salo gufanththo giigsidi, salo gufanththofe bollara diza haaththaa garsara diza haaththaafe shaakkides." 
Genesis1:7  
Genesis1:8 Xoossi he gufanththoza, «Salo» gi sunththides. Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika nam7anththo gallassa." 
Genesis1:9 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Saloppe garsara diza haaththi issison shiiqi eelliko mela biittay qoncco» giin hanides." 
Genesis1:10 Xoossi he mela sohoza, «Biitta» gi sunththides; qasse issison eellida haaththaa, «Abba» gi sunththides; histtidi Xoossi hessi lo7o gididayssa be7ides." 
Genesis1:11 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi, «Biittay miththinne maata mokiso; zereththa ayfera diza miththinne zereththa ayfera diza teeriza mith dumma dumma qommo mokiso» giin hanides." 
Genesis1:12 Hessa gishshas biittay miththinne maata dumma dumma qommon mokisiin Xoossi hessi lo7o gididayssa be7ides. 
Genesis1:13 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika heedzdzanththo gallassa. 
Genesis1:14 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Gallas qammafe shaakkanaas poo7oti salo gufanththon gidetto; istti gallas, wodenne layth erisetto;" 
Genesis1:15 biitta bollan poo7isana mala istti salo gufanththon poo7etto» giin hanides. 
Genesis1:16 Xoossi nam7u gita poo7ota, gitatizayssi gallas poo7ana malanne guuxxizayssi omars poo7ana mala medhdhides; xoolinttetakka medhdhides." 
Genesis1:17 Xoossi istta ha biitta bollan poo7isana mala, gallassinne qamma haarana malanne poo7oza dhumappe shaakkana mala, salo gufanththon istta woththides. Histtidi Xoossi hessi lo7o gididayssa be7ides." 
Genesis1:18  
Genesis1:19 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika oydanththo gallassa. 
Genesis1:20 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Shemppora diza dumma dumma medheteththati haaththa giddon daretto; kafotikka biittafe bollaranne salo gufanththofe garsara piradhdhetto» gides." 
Genesis1:21 Histtidi Xoossi abban diza gita do7ata, haaththa giddon woxxi qaaxxiza medheteththata ubbaa, kafo ubbaa dumma dumma qommon medhdhides. Hessika lo7o gididayssa Xoossi be7ides." 
Genesis1:22 Xoossi isttas, «Yelettite; darite; abba haaththaa kumite; kafoykka biitta bollan coratto» gi anjjides." 
Genesis1:23 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika ichchashanththo gallassa. 
Genesis1:24 Hessafe guye Xoossi, «Shemppora diza medheteththati ba qommon qommon meheti, biittara gooshettiza medheteththatinne do7ati ba qommon qommon biitta bolla kezetto» giin hanides." 
Genesis1:25 Xoossi do7ata istta qommon qommon, mehetakka istta qommon qommoninne biittara gooshettiza medheteththatakka ubbaa istta qommon qommon medhdhides; hessika lo7o gididayssa Xoossi be7ides." 
Genesis1:26 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi, «Ane as nu leemison nuna misatissidi medhdhoos; istti abba moleta, salo kafota, meheta, biitta bolla woxxi qaaxxiza medheteththata ubbaa haaretto» gides." 
Genesis1:27 Hessaththo Xoossi as ba leemison bana misatissidi medhdhides; izi istta addenne macca ooththi medhdhides. 
Genesis1:28 Xoossi isttas, «Yelettite; corattite; hayssa biittaa kumitenne haarite; abba mole, salo kafotanne biitta bolla woxxi qaaxxiza, shemppora diza medheteththata ubbaa haarite» gi anjjides." 
Genesis1:29 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi, «Be7ite! Tani ha biitta ubbaa bollan zereththa ayfera diza miththinne zereththa ayfera diza teeriza mith ubbaa inttes immadis; isttika inttes miza quma gidetto." 
Genesis1:30 Qasseka ha biittaa bolla diza mehenne do7a ubbaas, salo kafotas ubbaas, biittara gooshettiza medheteththata ubbaassinne shemppora paxa diza medheteththata ubbaas miza miish gidana mala, cilila miththinne maata kumeth immadis» giin hanides." 
Genesis1:31 Xoossi ba medhdhidayssa ubbaaka xeellidi daro lo7o gididayssa be7ides. Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika usuppunththa gallassa. 
Genesis2:1 Salo bollanne sa7a bolla dizay wuri hayssaththo oosetti polettides. 
Genesis2:2 Xoossi ba ooththida ooso usuppunththa gallas polidi ba ooththida ooso ubbaafe laappunththa gallas shempides. 
Genesis2:3 Qasse Xoossi laappunththa gallassaa anjjidessinne dumma gallas ooththides; ays giikko Xoossi ba ooththiza ooso wursidi shempiday he gallassanna. 
Genesis2:4 Saloynne sa7ay medhettiday hessa malanna. GODAY sa7anne salo medhdhida wode," 
Genesis2:5 sa7a bollan maatay, miththi, ay miishshika mokkibeenna; ays giikko GODAY ira bukisibeenna; qasse biitta ooththiza asikka medhettibeenna." 
Genesis2:6 Gidikkoka haaththi biittafe pude maacotti kezidi biitta ubbaa irxxisees. 
Genesis2:7 Hessafe guye GODAY biittafe issi as medhdhidi iza siidhen de7o shemppo punnin addezi shemppora dizaade gidides. 
Genesis2:8 Kase GODAY arshey mokkiza baggara Edene geetettizason lo7oso giigsidi ba medhdhida addeza heen woththides. 
Genesis2:9 GODAY xeellanaas lo7iza, maanaaska mal7iza dumma dumma qommo mith biittafe mokisides; Edene giddon de7o immiza miththi dees; hessaththoka lo7onne iita erisiza mith woththides." 
Genesis2:10 Gannate ushshiza shaafa haaththi Edeneppe goggees. Edeneppe kezidaappe guye, oyddu shaafa gidi shaakettees." 
Genesis2:11 Koyro shaafaa sunththi Pisoone; Pisooney worqqay diza Hawila geetettiza biittaa yuusho ubbaan goggees. 
Genesis2:12 He biittaa worqqay geeshsha worqqa; qasse al7o shittoynne keehi lo7iza shuchchi heen dees. 
Genesis2:13 Nam7anththo shaafaa sunththi Giyoone; Giyooney Tophphiya biitta yuusho ubbaan goggees. 
Genesis2:14 Heedzdzanththo shaafaa sunththi Xegroose; Xegroosey Asooreppe arshey mokkiza baggara goggees; qasse oydanththo shaafay Efiraaxise geetettees. 
Genesis2:15 Addezi Edenen ooththana malanne naagana mala GODAA Xoossay iza efi woththides. 
Genesis2:16 Histtidi GODAA Xoossay addeza, «Edene miththa teera ubbaafe neni maana giikko ma;" 
Genesis2:17 gido attiin lo7onne iita erisiza miththay teerappe mooppa; ays giikko neni izippe mida gallas tumu hayqqana» gi azazides. 
Genesis2:18 Hessafe guye GODAA Xoossay, «Addezi barkka dizayssi lo7o deenna; tani izas injjetiza maado as medhdhana» gides." 
Genesis2:19 GODAA Xoossay kase meheta do7ata salo kafota ubbaa biittafe medhdhides; qasse addezi istta ay giidi sunththanakko siyanaas izakko ehiin addezi shemppora diza medheteththata ubbaa sunththida sunththay isttas sunth gidi attides. 
Genesis2:20 Hessaththo addezi meheta, salo kafotanne, do7ata ubbaa sunththides; gido attiin Addaames injjetiza maado asi beettibeenna." 
Genesis2:21 Hessa gishshas GODAA Xoossay addeza dhisko dhiskisidi, izi dhiskon dishin iza mille meqeththatappe issaa ekkidi he sohozan asho kunththides." 
Genesis2:22 GODAA Xoossay addezappe ekkida meqeththaa maccas medhdhidi izo addezakko ehides. 
Genesis2:23 Ehiin addezi, «Hekko! Ha meqeththaya ta meqeththafe, ha ashoyakka ta ashoppe ekettidaaro; izakka attumasappe ekettida gishshas, maccas geetettu» gides." 
Genesis2:24 Hessa gishshas asi ba aawaanne ba aayo aggees; ba machcheyra issife dees; istti nam7ay issi asho. 
Genesis2:25 Addezinne iza machcheya nam7ayka paxa kallo deettes; gido attiin issay issaas yeellati erettenna. 
Genesis3:1 Shooshshay GODAA Xoossay medhdhida do7a ubbaafe aadhdhida genanchcha; issi gallas shooshshay he maccassayo, «Xoossi tumu inttena, ‹Edenen diza miththa ayfe ubbaafekka moopite› gidee?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis3:2 Maccassaya shooshshas zaarada, «Gidenna! Xoossi hessaththo gibeena; nuni Edenen diza miththata ayfe maanaas dandayoos; gido attiin Xoossi nuna, ‹Edene giddon diza miththaa ayfe moopite; bochchofte; histtontta aggiko intte hayqqana› gides» gadus." 
Genesis3:3  
Genesis3:4 Shooshshay maccassayo, «Gidenna! Intte tuma hayqqeketa;" 
Genesis3:5 Xoossi hessa giday he miththay ayfe intte miikko intte ayfey doyettiin, Xoossa mala intte lo7onne iita shaakki eranayssa izi eriza gishshassa» gides." 
Genesis3:6 Maccassaya he miththaa ayfey maanaas mal7izayssa, xeellanaas lo7izayssa, qasse asi aadho erateth demmanaas amosizaaz gididayssa beyada he miththaa ayfeppe ekkada madus; qasse banara diza ba azinaaska hessafe immiin izikka mides." 
Genesis3:7 Mida wode istta nam7aa ayfeykka doyettiin istti baas paxa kallo dizayssa eridi balase geetettiza miththa hayth sikkidi ba xeessan gixxida. 
Genesis3:8 Omarsa wode, Edene giddon GODAA Xoossay hemettishin, iza cenggurssaa addezinne iza machcheya siyidi GODAA Xoossaafe Edene miththa giddon qotettida." 
Genesis3:9 Gido attiin GODAA Xoossay addeza xeygidi, «Addaame awan day?» gides." 
Genesis3:10 Addezikka, «Edene giddon ne cenggurssaa siyada tani kallo diza gishshas babbada qotettadis» gides." 
Genesis3:11 GODAA Xoossay iza, «Neni kallo daasa giidi nees yootiday oonee? Tani nena, ‹Mooppa› gaada azazida miththaa ayfeppe madii?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis3:12 Izikka, «Tanara daana mala ne immida maccassaya he miththaa ayfeppe taas immiin madis» gides." 
Genesis3:13 GODAA Xoossay hessafe guye maccassayo, «Neni hessa ays ooththadii?» gi oychchides. Maccassayakka, «Tana shooshshay baleththiin madis» gadus." 
Genesis3:14 GODAA Xoossay hessafe guye shooshshaa, «Neni hayssa ooththida gishshas, mehe ubbaanne do7a ubbaa garsan ne xallay qanggettidaaza! Neni ne ulon biittara gooshettana; ne de7o layth ubbaankka biitta gudulla laacca." 
Genesis3:15 Tani neessinne maccassays, ne zereththassinne izi zereththas giddon morkketeth medhdhana; izi ne hu7e qoxxana; nenikka iza qirphe dukkana» gides." 
Genesis3:16 Maccassayokka GODAA Xoossay, «Ne shaaraza aginan neni daro tuggatana; qasse neni wolqqama miixan nayta yelana. Gidikkoka neni ne azinara aqanaas amottana; izikka nena haarana» gides." 
Genesis3:17 Addaamekka GODAA Xoossay, «Neni ne machchey qaala siyida gishshas tani nena, ‹He miththaa ayfe mooppa› gaada azazida miththaa ayfeppe neni mida gishshas, «Ne geedon biittay qanggettidaaz gido! Neni ne de7o layth ubbaan gita daaburan biitta ooththada maana." 
Genesis3:18 Biittay nees agunththinne kindichcho mokisana; neni biittafe mokkidayssa maana. 
Genesis3:19 Neni biittan simmana gakkanaas daaburan ne cawa gussa ooththada maana; neni biittafe medhettida gishshas biittan simmandasa» gides. 
Genesis3:20 Addaamey ba machchiyo Hewaano gi sunththides; ays giikko iza asa ubbaas aayo. 
Genesis3:21 GODAA Xoossay Addaamessinne iza machcheys ite giigsidi istta mayzides. 
Genesis3:22 Hessafe guye GODAA Xoossay, «Histtiin asi nuuppe issaade mala lo7onne iita erizaade gidides; izi ba kushe yeddidi de7o immiza miththaafe ekkidi qasse montta malanne mernaas paxa de7ontta mala teqettanaas koshshees» gides." 
Genesis3:23 Hessa gishshas izi ba medhettida biittaa ooththana mala, GODAA Xoossay Edeneppe iza kessides." 
Genesis3:24 Iza kessidi, de7o miththaako efiza oge naagana mala, kirube geetettiza kiitanchchatanne popol7u gi aadhdhi aadhdhi wodhdhiza tama laco misatiza giththa mashsha Edeneppe arshey mokkiza baggara woththides." 
Genesis4:1 Addaamey ba machcho Hewaanira aqiin iza shaarada attuma naa yeladus; «GODAY tana maaddiin attuma naa demmadis» gashe iza Qayeele ga sunththadus. 
Genesis4:2 Qasse iza isha Aabeelekka yeladus. Aabeeli dorsa heenththanchcha; Qayeeley biitta goshshanchcha. 
Genesis4:3 Undenna wodeppe guye Qayeeley ba gaden mokkida kaththaafe Godaas yarsho shiishshides. 
Genesis4:4 Gido attiin Aabeeli ba dorsata giddon koyro yelettida laaqqatappe issaa ekki shukkidi ashozappe handaza yarshides; GODAY Aabeelenne iza yarshoza ekkides. 
Genesis4:5 Qayeelenne iza yarsho ekkibeenna; hessa gishshas Qayeeley keehi yiillotides; ba ayfesokka iissides. 
Genesis4:6 Histtiin GODAY Qayeele, «Ays yiillotay? Ne ayfesoy ays dhumidee?" 
Genesis4:7 Ne lo7o ooththidaa gididaakko Xoossi ne yarsho ekkenneeshin? Neni lo7o ooththontta ixxiko nagaray ne karen nena naagees; nagaray nena haarana koyees; neni iza xoonana bessees» gides. 
Genesis4:8 Hessafe guye Qayeeley ba isha Aabeele, «Ane gede dembaso boos» gides. Biidi istti demban dishin Qayeeley ba isha Aabeele bolla dendidi wodhides." 
Genesis4:9 GODAY Qayeele, «Ne ishay Aabeeli awan dizee?» gi oychchides. Qayeeley zaaridi, «Ta erikke; ta ishaa naagizay taneyee?» gides." 
Genesis4:10 GODAY Qayeele, «Hessa ays ooththadii? Beya; ne ishaa suuththi biittafe pude taakko waassees." 
Genesis4:11 Ne kusheppe ne ishaa suuththaa ekkidi mittanaas doona doyda biittaa bolla ha7i neni qanggettadasa. 
Genesis4:12 Neni ooththiinkka biittay nees kath immenna; bete asa mala neni biitta bollan toylattana» gides. 
Genesis4:13 Qayeeley GODAA, «Ne tana qaxxayiza qixaate tani mulekka dandaykke." 
Genesis4:14 Hekko neni tana hach ha biittafe yedeththaasa; tani ne sinththafe qotettana; bete asa mala tani biitta bolla toylattana; tana demmiday oonikka wodhana» gides. 
Genesis4:15 GODAY iza, «Nena oonikka wodhenna; wodhikko ne halo tani laappun kushe kessana» gides; hessa gishshas demmiday oonikka iza wodhontta mala GODAY iza bolla malata woththides." 
Genesis4:16 Qayeeley GODAA sinththafe kezidi Edene baggafe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Noode geetettiza biittan de7ides. 
Genesis4:17 Qayeeley ba machcheyra aqiin iza shaarada Heenooke yeladus; he wode Qayeeley katama giigsidi he katamaa ba naaza sunththan, «Heenooke» gi sunththides." 
Genesis4:18 Heenookey Iraade yelides; Iraadey Mahuyaa7eele yelides; Mahuyaa7eeley Matusa7eele yelides; Matusa7eeley Laameeke yelides. 
Genesis4:19 Laameekey Aadonne Xiilo geetettiza nam7u machcheta dawuth ekkides. 
Genesis4:20 Aaday Yaabaale yeladus; Yaabaaley mehe haarishe yuuyi yuuyi dunkaanen diza asata aawa. 
Genesis4:21 Iza ishaa sunththi Yuubaale; Yuubaaley qasse diith diixxizanne susul7e punniza asata ubbata aawa; 
Genesis4:22 Xiilay qasse Tubaaliqayne geetettiza naa yeladus; Tubaaliqayney xarqimalappenne biratappe dumma dumma miishshata qoxxizaadde. Tubaaliqayne michcheya Naa7imo geetettawus. 
Genesis4:23 Issi gallas Laameekey ba machcheta, «Ta machcheto Aadee, Xiilee siyite! Ane tani yootizayssa ezgite. Issi asi tana wadhdhi madunththida gishshas tani iza wodhadis; ee, tani he tana madunxissida wodallaza wodhadis." 
Genesis4:24 Qayeele halo kessanaas laappun kushe koshshiko Laameeke halo kessanaas laappun tammanne laappun kushe koshshees» gides. 
Genesis4:25 Addaamey ba machcheyra aqiin hara naa yeladus. Yelada «Qayeeley wodhida Aabeele gishshas Xoossi taas hara naa immides» gashe iza Seete gaada sunththadus. 
Genesis4:26 Seeteykka attuma naa yelidi iza, «Heenoose» gi sunththides. Asay he wode GODAA sunth xeygidi goyno oykkides." 
Genesis5:1 Addaame zereththi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettides; Xoossi as medhdhida gallas bana misatissidi medhdhides. 
Genesis5:2 Addenne maccas ooththi medhdhidi istta anjjides. Istta medhdhidi as gi sunththides. 
Genesis5:3 Addaamey 130 layth de7idi bana misatiza attuma naa yelidi iza, «Seete» gi sunththides." 
Genesis5:4 Addaamey Seete yelidaappe guye 800 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:5 Addaamey mulera 930 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:6 Seetey 105 layth de7idi Heenoose yelides; 
Genesis5:7 Seetey Heenoose yelidaappe guye 807 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:8 Seetey mulera 912 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:9 Heenoosey 90 layth de7idi Qaynaane yelides; 
Genesis5:10 Heenoosey Qaynaane yelidaappe guye 815 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:11 Heenoosey mulera 905 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:12 Qaynaaney 70 layth de7idi Malal7eele yelides; 
Genesis5:13 Qaynaaney Malal7eele yelidaappe guye 840 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:14 Qaynaaney mulera 910 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:15 Malal7eeley 65 layth de7idi Yaareede yelides; 
Genesis5:16 Malal7eeley Yaareede yelidaappe guye 830 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:17 Malal7eeley mulera 895 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:18 Yaareedey 162 layth de7idi Heenooke yelides; 
Genesis5:19 Yaareedey Heenooke yelidaappe guye 800 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:20 Yaareedey mulera 962 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:21 Heenookey 65 layth de7idi Maatusaala yelides; 
Genesis5:22 Maatusaala yelidaappe guye Heenookey 300 layth Xoossa ufayssishe de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:23 Heenookey mulera 365 layth de7ides; 
Genesis5:24 Izi Xoossa ufayssishe diin Xoossi iza ekkida gishshas beettontta dhaydes. 
Genesis5:25 Maatusaalay 187 layth de7idi Laameeke yelides; 
Genesis5:26 Maatusaalay Laameeke yelidaappe guye, 782 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides." 
Genesis5:27 Maatusaalay mulera 969 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:28 Laameekey 182 layth de7idi attuma naa yelidi," 
Genesis5:29 «Ha naazi GODAY qanggida biitta bollan nuna nu daaburappe shempisana» giidi Nohe gi sunththides. 
Genesis5:30 Laameekey Nohe yelidaappe guye 595 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis5:31 Laameekey mulera 777 layth de7idi hayqqides. 
Genesis5:32 Nohey 500 layth de7idi Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete yelides." 
Genesis6:1 Asi biitta bolla darida wode asas macca nayti yelettida; 
Genesis6:2 «Xoossa nayta» geetettiza medheteththati asa macca nayti medho lo7o gididayssa be7idi isttafe ba dooridayta machcho ekkida. 
Genesis6:3 GODAY, «Asi hayqqizaaza; iza layththayka 120 layththafe darenna; hessa gishshas ta Ayanay asa naa bolla mernaas deenna» gides." 
Genesis6:4 He wodenne hessafe guye Xoossa nayti asa macca nayta machcho ekkiin nayti yelettida wode wogga wolqqama asati biitta bollan deettes. Isttika beni wode olas minonne erettida asa. 
Genesis6:5 GODAY he wode biitta bollan diza asaa iitateththi daridayssanne istti ba wozinan qoppizayssi wuri ubba wodekka iita xalala gididayssa be7ides; 
Genesis6:6 GODAY as ha biitta bollan medhdhida gishshas modhettides; ba wozinan keehi seelettides. 
Genesis6:7 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Tani medhdhida asaa ha biitta bollafe ubbaa dhayssana; asa, mehe, do7a, biittara gooshettiza medheteththatanne kafota dhayssana; ays giikko tani istta medhdhida gishshas mishettadis» gides." 
Genesis6:8 Gido attiin Nohey GODAA sinththan sabettides. 
Genesis6:9 Nohey hanidayssi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettides. Nohey xillo asa; izi ba woden diza asaa giddon suure asa; Nohey Xoossara giiga duus de7ides. 
Genesis6:10 Nohey Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete geetettiza heedzdzu attuma nayta yelides." 
Genesis6:11 He wode biitta bolla diza asi wuri Xoossa sinththan tunides; biittay wuri makkallan kumides. 
Genesis6:12 Xoossi duge biitta xeellishin biitta bolla diza asay wuri tunidayssa be7ides. 
Genesis6:13 Hessa gishshas Xoossi Nohe, «Tani asa ubbaa dhayssana gays; asa gaason biittay makkallan kumida gishshas tani tumappe asanne biitta bolla dizaaz ubbaa dhayssana." 
Genesis6:14 Hessa gishshas mino miththafe nees markabe keexxa; he markabeza giddon kifile ooththa; histtada soo baggaranne kare baggara shidan meesha. 
Genesis6:15 Markabeza keexxashe iza adussateththi 300 wadha, gomppay 50 wadha, pude dhoqqateththi 133 wadha histta ooththa." 
Genesis6:16 Markabezas kaara medhdha; kaaraappenne godaappe giddon issi wadha gidizaso doya agga; pengeza markabezas millera kessa; markabeza heedzdzu pooqe kessa keexxa. 
Genesis6:17 «Tani saloppe garsan shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaa dhayssanaas ha biitta bollan dhayssa haath yeddiko biittan dizayssi wuri dhayana. 
Genesis6:18 Gido attiin tani nenara caaqettana. Neni, ne machchiya, ne naytinne ne nayta machcheti nenara markabezan gelandeta." 
Genesis6:19 Istti nenara paxa daana mala shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaafe qommon qommon addenne macca nam7u nam7u histtada markabeza giddo gelththa. 
Genesis6:20 Dumma dumma qommo kafotappe, dumma dumma qommo mehetappenne biittara gooshettiza dumma dumma qommo medheteththatappe ubbaafe nam7u nam7u gididi shemppora paxa attana mala neekko yaana." 
Genesis6:21 Qasse neninne nenara dizayti maana mala dumma dumma qommo kath efada markabeza giddo gelththa» gi azazides. 
Genesis6:22 Nohey ubbaaka Xoossi azazida mala ooththides. 
Genesis7:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Nohe, «Neni hayssa ha wode yeletaa giddon xillo gididayssa ta be7ida gishshas neni neso asaa ubbaara markabeza giddo gela." 
Genesis7:2 Neni geesh gidida mehenne do7a ubbaafe iza qommofe qommofe addenne macca laappun laappun, geesh gidontta mehenne do7a ubbaafe iza qommofe qommofe issi addenne issi macca qasse kafotappe iza qommofe qommofe addenne macca laappun laappun, biitta ubbaa bollan dumma dumma zereththay paxa daana mala nenara ekka gela." 
Genesis7:3  
Genesis7:4 Ays giikko laappun gallassafe guye tani oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma biitta bollan ira bukisana; histtada tani medhdhida medheta ubbaa biitta bollafe dhayssana» gides. 
Genesis7:5 Nohey GODAY iza azazidayssa ubbaa ooththides. 
Genesis7:6 Dhaysa haaththi biitta bolla yiza wode Nohes layththay usuppun xeeta. 
Genesis7:7 Nohe, iza attuma nayti, iza machcheyanne iza nayta machcheti dhayssa haaththaafe attanaas markabeza giddo gelida." 
Genesis7:8 Geeshsha meheppenne do7appe, geesh gidontta meheppenne do7appe, kafoppenne biittara gooshettiza ubbaafe," 
Genesis7:9 Xoossi Nohe azazida malakka addenne macca nam7u nam7u gididi Nohekko markabeza giddo geliin," 
Genesis7:10 laappun gallassafe guye dhayssa haaththi biitta bolla yides. 
Genesis7:11 Nohes usuppun xeetu layth gidishin nam7anththo aginan tammanne laappunththa gallassan he gallassankka biitta giddon diza gita ciimma pulttoy wuri dhuuqqides; salon diza haaththa maskootetikka doyetti wodhdhida. 
Genesis7:12 Iray biitta bollan oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu omars bukkides. 
Genesis7:13 He gallassan Noheynne iza attuma nayti, Seemey, Kaameynne Yaafeetey, Nohe machcheyanne iza nayta heedzdzata machcheti issife markabeza giddo gelida." 
Genesis7:14 Isttanne do7a ubbaafe ba qommon qommon, mehe ubbaafekka ba qommon qommon, biittara gooshettizayata ubbaafe ba qommon qommon, kafo ubbaafe ba qommon qommon isttara issife gelida." 
Genesis7:15 Shemppora paxa dizayti wuri nam7u nam7u gididi Nohekko markabezan gelida; 
Genesis7:16 Xoossay Nohe azazida mala medheta ubbaafe addenne macca gididi markabeza giddo geliin Nohey giddon dishin GODAY markabeza penge gordides. 
Genesis7:17 Dhayssa haaththi oyddu tammu gallas biitta bolla bukkishe gam7ides; haaththi daridi, markabeza biittafe pude denththides." 
Genesis7:18 Haaththay biitta bollan keehi dariin markabezi haaththaa bollan tookettides. 
Genesis7:19 Saloppe garsara diza dhoqqa zumati wuri mitettana gakkanaas haaththay biitta bollan keehi wolqqafe darides. 
Genesis7:20 Haaththay zumata xeerappe aadhdhidi 15 wadha gakkanaas dhoqqu gides. 
Genesis7:21 Histtiin biitta bollan shemppora paxa qaaxxiza medheteththati wuri, kafoy, mehey, do7ay, biitta bollan woxxi qaxxizaynne asi wuri hayqqides." 
Genesis7:22 Biitta bollan diza siidhera shempizay wurikka hayqqides. 
Genesis7:23 Ha biittan paxa dizay wuri asi, meheynne do7ay, biittara gooshettiza medheteththinne salo kafoti wurikka biittafe pitetti dhayiin Noheynne izara markabe giddon dizayti xalla attida." 
Genesis7:24 Haaththayka 150 gallas gakkanaas biitta bollan gam7ides. 
Genesis8:1 Gido attiin Xoossi Nohe, izara markabeza giddon diza do7anne mehe ubbaa qoppidi biitta bollan carko carkissiin haaththay wodhdhi wodhdhi bides." 
Genesis8:2 Qasse biitta giddon diza ciimma pulttoynne salon diza haaththa maskooteti gordettida; iraykka salon teqettides. 
Genesis8:3 Histtiin haaththay wodhdhi wodhdhi bides; he 150 gallassafe guye haaththay wodhdhides. 
Genesis8:4 Haaththay wodhdhiin markabezi laappunththa aginan tammanne laappunththa gallassan Araraate geetettiza zuma bolla shempides. 
Genesis8:5 Haaththay tammanththo agina gakkanaaska wodhdhi wodhdhi bides; tammanththo aginan koyro gallas zumatas hu7ey beettides. 
Genesis8:6 Oyddu tammu gallassafe guye Nohey ba keexxida markabeza maskooteza doydi," 
Genesis8:7 issi quuro kare kessi yeddiin quurozi haaththi biitta bollafe melana gakkanaas yaanne haa piradhdhishe gam7ides. 
Genesis8:8 Qasse Nohey haaththi biitta bollafe wodhdhi wuridaakko beyanaas issi haraphphe kare yeddides. 
Genesis8:9 Gido attiin he haraphpheya haaththi biitta ubbaa bollan ha7ikka diza gishshas shempizaso demmabeekku; hessa gishshas simmada markabeza giddon diza Nohekko yiin izi ba kushe yeddidi baakko markabeza giddo ekkides. 
Genesis8:10 Qasseka hara laappun gallas gam7idi ha7ikka haraphpheyo markabeza giddofe kessi yeddides. 
Genesis8:11 He haraphpheya gadey qammishin izakko simma yashe wogara xeerappe cilila hayth duuththada doonan saxxa ekka yida gishshas haaththi biitta bollafe wodhdhidayssa Nohey erides. 
Genesis8:12 Qasse Nohey hara laappun gallas gam7idi he haraphpheyo zaari yeddides; gido attiin he haraphpheya izakko simma yabeekku. 
Genesis8:13 Nohey 601 layth de7iin koyro aginan koyro gallas haaththi biitta bollafe xoskides; Nohey markabeza kaaraa qaari xeellidi gadey xoskidayssa be7ides. 
Genesis8:14 Nam7anththo aginan nam7u tammanne laappunththa gallassan biittay mulera melides. 
Genesis8:15 He wode Xoossi Nohe hizgi azazides," 
Genesis8:16 «Neni ne machcho, ne naytanne ne nayta machcheta ekkada markabezappe keza." 
Genesis8:17 Istti yeletti daridi corattana mala shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaafe nenara dizayta, kafota, meheta, do7atanne biittara gooshettizayta ubbaa nenara kessa» gides." 
Genesis8:18 Nohey ba naytara, ba machcheyranne ba nayta machchetara markabeza giddofe kezides." 
Genesis8:19 Mehey, do7ay, biittara gooshettiza medheteththi, kafoynne biitta bollan woxxi qaaxxiza miishshi wuri ba qommon qommon markabeza giddofe kezides." 
Genesis8:20 Hessafe guye Nohey GODAAS yarshizaso keelidi geeshsha mehe ubbaafenne geeshsha kafo ubbaafe ekkidi yarshizason xuuggidi yarshides. 
Genesis8:21 Histtiin GODAY yarshoza peeno sawizayssa singidi ba wozinan, «Yelagateththafe doommiin asi wozinan qoppizayssi wuri iita gidikkoka tani asa gishshas gaada nam7anththo mulekka ha biitta qanggike. Qasse tani ha7i ooththida mala paxa diza medheteth ubbaa nam7anththo mulekka dhayssike." 
Genesis8:22 Ha biittay diza wode ubbaan zereththa wodeynne maxa wodey mooceynne hombey, boneynne balgoy, gallassinne qammay ubba wodekka paccenna» gides." 
Genesis9:1 Xoossi Nohenne iza nayta, «Yelettite; corattite; biitta ubbaa kumite." 
Genesis9:2 Biitta do7ati, kafoti, biittan woxxi qaaxxiza miishshatinne abba giddon diza moleti wuri inttes yayettonne dagammetto; istti intte shenen detto." 
Genesis9:3 Ta inttes biittafe mokkiza dumma dumma kaththata immida malakka shemppora paxa diza medheteththati wuri inttes quma gidana. 
Genesis9:4 Shemppoy suuththa giddon diza gishshas suuththi izappe gukkontta asho moopite. 
Genesis9:5 Tani intte shemppoy izan diza intte suuth meheppenne do7a ubbaafe tumu ta oychchana; qasse asa ubbaafekka iza mala asa suuth oychchana. 
Genesis9:6 Xoossi as bana misatissidi medhdhida gishshas asa suuth gussiza oonakka gidikko iza suuththika asa kushen gukkana. 
Genesis9:7 Intte yelettite; corattitenne; biitta bolla keehi darite» gi anjjides. 
Genesis9:8 Hessafe guye Xoossi Nohenne izara diza iza nayta hizgides; 
Genesis9:9 «Histtiin ha7i tani ta caaqo inttenara, inttefe guye intte zereththaranne nenara shemppora diza medheteththatara caaqettadis; ee! Tani ta caaqo kafora, mehera, biitta do7a ubbaaranne markabeppe inttenara kezida paxa diza medheteth ubbaara caaqettadis." 
Genesis9:10  
Genesis9:11 Tani inttenara caaqettadis; hayssafe sinththan paxa dizay wuri dhayssiza haaththan mulekka dhayenna; ha biittaa dhayssiza haaththi hayssafe guye mulekka deenna» gides. 
Genesis9:12 Qasseka Xoossi, «Tani taappenne inttefe, inttenara diza paxa medheteththatas ubbaafe giddon yaana yeleta ubbaara caaqettiza caaqozas malatay hayssa;" 
Genesis9:13 tani ta zuulla salo bolla essana; izi taappenne ha biitta bolla diza medheteththafe giddon diza caaqozas malata gidana. 
Genesis9:14 Tani biittafe bollan shaara ehida wodenne shaara bollan zuullay beettida wode," 
Genesis9:15 ‹Paxa diza medheteth ubbaa dhayssanaas hayssafe sinththan mulekka dhayssa haaththi yeenna› gaada taappenne inttefe paxa diza dumma dumma qommo medheteththata ubbaafe giddon caaqqida ta qaalaa ta qoppana. 
Genesis9:16 Zuullay shaara bolla beettida wode aydekka tani iza beyada taappe Xoossaafenne ha biittaa bollan paxa diza dumma dumma qommo medheteththa ubbaafe giddon caaqo gelida mernaa caaqo qaalaa ta hassa7ana» gides. 
Genesis9:17 Xoossi Nohe, «Tani taappenne ha biitta bollan paxa diza ubbaafe giddon caaqqida caaqozas malatay hayssa» gides." 
Genesis9:18 Markabezappe kezida Nohe nayti Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete; Kaamey Kanaane aawa." 
Genesis9:19 Hayti heedzdzayka Nohe nayta; biitta ubbaan diza asay isttafe yelettides. 
Genesis9:20 Nohey goshshanchcha; izi woyne mith toketh oykkides. 
Genesis9:21 Issi gallas izi woyneppe oosettida cajje uyi maththottidi ba Dunkaaneza giddon paxa kallo ichchides. 
Genesis9:22 Kanaane aawa Kaamey ba aawaa kalloteth be7idi kare kezidi ba ishata nam7atas yootides. 
Genesis9:23 Gido attiin Seemeynne Yaafeetey may7o ekkidi nam7ayka ba hashe hashe bolla gaththi oykkidi gundiguth hemetti gelidi ba aawa kalloteth kammida; istti ba aawaa kalloteth be7ontta mala ba ayfeso guye zaarida. 
Genesis9:24 Nohey maththoy aadhdhiin beeggidi ubbaafe kaalo naazi ba bolla ooththidayssa eridi," 
Genesis9:25 «Kanaaney qanggettidaaz gido! Izi ba ishata aylletas aylle gido!» gides. 
Genesis9:26 Qasseka Nohey, «GODAY, Seeme Xoossi galatetto! Kanaaney Seeme aylle gido!" 
Genesis9:27 Xoossi Yaafeete biitta aasso! Yaafeete zereththati Seeme zereththatara detto! Kanaaney Yaafeete aylle gido!» gides. 
Genesis9:28 Dhayssa haaththafe guye Nohey 350 layth de7ides. 
Genesis9:29 Nohey mulera 950 layth deyidi hayqqides. 
Genesis10:1 Nohe nayta, Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa; dhayssa haaththaafe guye isttas attuma nayti yelettida." 
Genesis10:2 Yaafeete attuma nayti Goomere, Maagooge, Maadaye, Yaawaane, Tubaale, Mesheekenne Tiraase," 
Genesis10:3 Goomere attuma nayti Ashkenaaze, Irafaatenne Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Yaawaane attuma nayti Elishe, Tarseese, Kiitimenne Eroode." 
Genesis10:5 Haytanttafe abba doonan diza asay wuri ba biittan biittan, ba qaalan qaalan, ba qommon qommoninne, ba kawoteththan kawoteththan shaakettides." 
Genesis10:6 Kaame attuma nayti Kuushe, Gibxe, Puuxenne Kanaane." 
Genesis10:7 Kuushe attuma nayti Seeba, Hawila, Saabite, Eraa7imenne Sabiteka. Eraa7ime attuma nayti Saabanne Dadaane." 
Genesis10:8 Kuushey Namuruude yelides; Namuruudey biitta bollan koyro wolqqama olanchcha gidides; 
Genesis10:9 GODAA sinththankka izi wolqqama shankkanchcha gidides; hessa gishshas, «Namuruude mala GODAA sinththan wolqqama shankkanchcha gida» geetettees." 
Genesis10:10 Iza kawoteththan koyro katamati Sana7oore biittan diza Baabiloone, Ereeke, Akkaadenne Kalanahe." 
Genesis10:11 Izi he biittaafe Asoore biidi Nannawe, Erahoobotenne Kaalahe katamata ooththides; qasse Nannaweppenne Kaalaheppe giddon diza Ereseene geetettiza gita katamakka ooththides." 
Genesis10:12  
Genesis10:13 Gibxey Luudimeta, Anaameta, Lahaabeta, Naftuheta, Phaxirooseta, Kaasiluhetanne Filisxeemeta yelida Kaftooreta aawa." 
Genesis10:14  
Genesis10:15 Kanaaney ba bayra naaza Sidoona, Keexeta, Yaabuseta, Amooreta, Gergeseta aawa;" 
Genesis10:16  
Genesis10:17 qasseka Hiiweta, Arqeta, Siineta," 
Genesis10:18 Arwaadeta, Xamaaretanne Hamaateta aawa. Hessafe guye Kanaane zereththati biitta bolla laalettida." 
Genesis10:19 Kanaane biitta zaway Sidoonappe doommidi Geraarenne Gaazara kanththidi, Sodoomenne Gamoora, Adaamanne Xaboyme kanththi biidi Lasha7ere gakkees." 
Genesis10:20 Kaame attuma nayti ba qommon qommon, ba qaalan qaalan, ba biittan biittaninne ba kawoteththan kawoteththan xaafettidayti haytantta." 
Genesis10:21 Seemes nayti yelettida; izi Yaafeetes bayra ishanne Eboore nayta ubbaas mayza. 
Genesis10:22 Seeme attuma nayti Elaame, Asoore, Arfaakiside, Luudenne Aaraame." 
Genesis10:23 Aaraame attuma nayti Uuxe, Huule, Geterenne Meeshe." 
Genesis10:24 Arfaakisidey Sheelahe yelides. Sheelahey Eboore yelides. 
Genesis10:25 Eboores nam7u attuma nayti yelettida; biittan diza asay iza woden shaakettida gishshas issaa sunththi Peeleege geetettides; iza ishaza sunththi Yoqixaane geetettees. 
Genesis10:26 Yoqixaaney nayta yelides; isttika Almodaade, Shelefe, Haxarmaawete, Yerahe," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoraame, Uzaale, Diiqile," 
Genesis10:28 Oobaale, Abima7eele, Saaba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofire, Hawilanne Yobaabe; haytanti wurikka Yoqixaane attuma nayta." 
Genesis10:30 Istti de7ida biittay arshey mokkiza baggara diza zuma Meesheppe biidi Safaare gakkees. 
Genesis10:31 Seeme attuma nayti ba qommon qommon, ba qaalan qaalan, ba biittan biittaninne ba kawoteththan kawoteththan xaafettidayti haytantta." 
Genesis10:32 Haytanti ba qommon qommoninne ba kawoteththan kawoteththan xaafettida Nohe attuma nayta zereththata; dhayssa haaththafe simmiin kawoteththati haytanttafe biitta ubbaa bolla laalettida. 
Genesis11:1 Biitta bollan diza asi wuri koyro issi doonanne issi qaala haasayees. 
Genesis11:2 Asay arshey mokkiza bagga simmidi bishe Sana7oore geetettiza biittan issi dembaso demmidi heen uttides. 
Genesis11:3 Istti issoy issaa, «Haa yiite; xuube medhdhidi ane taman xuuggoos» giidi istta shuchcha gishshas xuube, urqqa gishshas shida" 
Genesis11:4 ekkidi, «Haa yiite! Nu sunth xeygisanaassinne qasse nuni ha biitta ubbaa bollan laalettontta mala issi gita katamanne xeeray pude salo gakkiza issi gimbe ane keexxoos» gida." 
Genesis11:5 Gido attiin GODAY asay keexxida gita katamazanne gimbeza beyanaas duge wodhdhidi," 
Genesis11:6 «Hekko istti issi asa! Qasse istti wurikka issi qaalan haasayeettes; istti ha7i hayssa ooso oykkidaappe guye, istti baas ooththanaas qoppidayssa istta digganay deenna." 
Genesis11:7 Haa yiite! Ane nu duge wodhdhidi istti issoy issaa qaala erontta mala istta qaala walakkoos» gides. 
Genesis11:8 Hessa gishshas GODAY istta hessafe biitta ubbaa bollan laalliin istti he gita katama ooththizayssa aggaagida. 
Genesis11:9 GODAY biitta asaa qaalaa heen walakkida gishshas he katamaya Baabile geetettadus. GODAY istta hessafe biitta ubbaa bollan laallides. 
Genesis11:10 Seeme zereththi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssa; dhayssa haaththi simmiin nam7u layththafe guye Seemes layththay 100 gidiin Seemey Arfaakiside yelides. 
Genesis11:11 Seemey Arfaakiside yelidaappe guye 500 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytakka macca naytakka yelides. 
Genesis11:12 Arfaakisidey 35 layth de7idi Sheelahe yelides; 
Genesis11:13 Arfaakisidey Sheelahe yelidaappe guye 403 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca naytakka yelides. 
Genesis11:14 Sheelahey 30 layth de7idi Eboore yelides; 
Genesis11:15 Sheelahey Eboore yelidaappe guye 403 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:16 Eboorey heedzdzu tammanne oyddu layth de7idi Peeleege yelides; 
Genesis11:17 Eboorey Peeleege yelidaappe guye 430 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:18 Peeleegey 30 layth de7idi Era7e yelides; 
Genesis11:19 Peeleegey Era7e yelidaappe guye 209 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:20 Era7ey 32 layth de7idi Saruge yelides; 
Genesis11:21 Era7ey Saruge yelidaappe guye 207 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:22 Sarugey 30 layth de7idi Naakoore yelides; 
Genesis11:23 Sarugey Naakoore yelidaappe guye 200 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:24 Naakoorey 29 layth de7idi Taara yelides. 
Genesis11:25 Naakoorey Taara yelidaappe guye 119 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
Genesis11:26 Taaray 70 layth de7idi Abraame, Naakoorenne Haaraane yelides." 
Genesis11:27 Taara yeletay hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssa; Taaray Abraame, Naakoorenne Haaraane yeliin Haaraaney Looxe yelides." 
Genesis11:28 Haaraaney ba aaway Taaray paxa dishin ba yelettida Kaladaaweta biittan Uure geetettiza gita katamaan hayqqides. 
Genesis11:29 Abraameynne Naakoorey nam7ayka machchida; Abraame machchey sunththi Soora; qasse Naakoore machchey sunththi Milka; Milkay Haaraane naa; Haaraaney Milkissinne Yiskaanissi aawa. 
Genesis11:30 Sooray maynne; izis nay baawa. 
Genesis11:31 Taaray ba naa Abraame, ba naaza Haaraane naa Looxenne ba naa Abraame machcho Soora ekkidi keziin istti issife Kanaane biitta baanaas Uure geetettiza Kaladaaweta katamappe dendida; gido attiin istti Kaaraane geetettiza katama gakkanaas biidi heen de7ida." 
Genesis11:32 Taaray 205 layth de7idi Kaaraanen hayqqides. 
Genesis12:1 GODAY Abraame, «Ne dereppe, ne dabbotappenne ne aawa keeththa asaappe shaakettada tani nena bessiza biitta ba." 
Genesis12:2 «Tani nena gita kawoteth ooththana; qasseka anjjana; Ne sunththaa gitasana; nekka haratas anjjo gidana. 
Genesis12:3 Nena anjjizayta ta anjjana; nena qanggizaytakka ta qanggana; biitta bolla diza asi wuri ne baggara anjjettana» gides. 
Genesis12:4 Abraamey GODAY izas yootida mala dendi bides; Looxeykka izara bides; Abraamey Kaaraane dereppe bishin izas layththay laapun tammanne ichchasha. 
Genesis12:5 Abraamey ba machchiyo Soora, ba isha naa Looxe, Kaaraanen istti demmida aylletanne heen shiishshida bantta aqota ubbaa ekkidi Kanaane biitta bides." 
Genesis12:6 Abraamey he biittan Seekeemen Moore geetettizason diza gita miththaako gakkanaas bides; he wode Kanaane asati he biittan deettes. 
Genesis12:7 GODAY Abraames qonccidi, «Ha biittaa tani ne zereththas immana» gides; izi baas qonccida GODAAS he sohon yarsho yarshizaso keexxidi goynnides." 
Genesis12:8 Hessafe dendidi Beeteleppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza zumatizaso biidi heen Beetele arshey wulliza baggan aggidi qasse Aye geetettiza katama arshey mokkiza bagga aggidi giddon ba dunkaane tolides; heenkka GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso keexxidi GODAA sunththaa xeygides. 
Genesis12:9 Hessafe guye Abraamey heeppe dendi biidi Negebe geetettiza bazzo gakkides. 
Genesis12:10 He wode Kanaane biittan koshay dendiin koshazi keehi iita gidida gishshas Abraamey kosha wode aaththanaas duge Gibxe wodhdhides. 
Genesis12:11 Gibxe gelana hanishin Abraamey ba machchiyo Soora, «Siya! Ne daro mala lo7o maccas gididayssa ta erays." 
Genesis12:12 Gibxe asay nena be7iza wode isttas, ‹Hanna iza machcho› giidi nena aggidi tana wodhana." 
Genesis12:13 Hessa gishshas istti taas ne gaason kiyana malanne qasse ne gaason ta hayqqontta attana mala neni, ‹Ta izas michcho› ga» gides." 
Genesis12:14 Abraamey Gibxe biitta gelida wode Gibxe asati he maccassaya daro mala lo7o maccas gididayssa be7ida. 
Genesis12:15 Qasse Gibxe kawos ooththiza halaqatikka izo be7idi kawo sinththan izo nashshida; histtidi izo kawoso efida. 
Genesis12:16 Histtiin izi geedon kawoy Abraame lo7o ayfen xeellidi Abraames dorsatanne boorata, adde haretanne macca hareta, adde aylletanne macca aylleta, gaamellatakka immides." 
Genesis12:17 Gido attiin GODAY Abraame machcheyo Soora geedon Gibxe kawo bollanne izaso asaa bolla bosha yeddides. 
Genesis12:18 Histtiin kawozi Abraame xeygidi, «Neni hayssa ays ta bolla ooththadii? Iza ne machcho gididayssa ays taas yootabeekkii?" 
Genesis12:19 Ta izo machcho ekkana mala, ‹Iza ta michcho› gaada aazas wordotadii? Hekko hanno ne machcheyo ekkada ba!» gides." 
Genesis12:20 Kawozikka ba aylleta Abraame iza machcheyranne izas dizaaz ubbaa kessidi yeddana mala azaziin aylleti istta dereppe kessi yeddida. 
Genesis13:1 Hessa gishshas Abraamey ba machcheyranne baas dizaaz ubbaara Gibxeppe Negebe bazzo bides; Looxeykka izara bides. 
Genesis13:2 Abraamey he wode mehen, biraninne worqqan daro duretides." 
Genesis13:3 Izi Negebeppe dendidi Beetele gakkanaas bides; Beeteleppenne Ayeppe giddon diza dere bides; hesoykka izi koyro ba dunkaane tolidi," 
Genesis13:4 yarsho shiishshanaas keexxidaso; heenkka Abraamey GODAA sunth xeygides. 
Genesis13:5 Abraamera yuuyiza Looxeska daro miizi, dorsi, deyshinne dunkaaney dees." 
Genesis13:6 Gido attiin isttas daro mehey diza gishshassinne istti issife daanaas isttas biittay xuummida gishshas issife daanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Genesis13:7 Hessa geedon Abraame wude heemmizayta giddoninne Looxe wude heemmizayta giddon ooshshi medhettides; he wode Kanaanetinne Paarizeti he biittan deettes. 
Genesis13:8 Histtiin Abraamey Looxes, «Nuni ishantta gidida gishshas, nu giddon, ta mehe heemmizayta giddoninne ne mehe heemmizayta giddon oosh medhdhofa." 
Genesis13:9 Biittay wuri ne sinththan deennee? Ane nuni shaakettoos; neni hadirsa bagga biikko, tani ushachcha bagga baana; neni ushachcha bagga biikko tani hadirsa bagga baana» gides." 
Genesis13:10 Looxey yuuyi aadhdhi xeellidi Yordaanoose shoobbay biidi Zo7aare gakkanaas GODAA gannate woykko Gibxe biitta mala daro haaththi dizayssa be7ides. (Hessika GODAY Sodoomenne Gamoora geetettiza katamata dhayssanaappe kase.) 
Genesis13:11 Hessa gishshas Looxey baas Yordaanoose shoobba ubbaa dooridi arshey mokkiza baggara bida gishshas istti ba garsan shaakettida. 
Genesis13:12 Abraamey Kanaane biittan de7ides; Looxey gidikko shoobban diza gita katamata giddon uttidi Sodoome katama matan ba Dunkaaneza tolides. 
Genesis13:13 He wode Sodoome asay iitanne GODAA sinththan pala nagara ooththizayta. 
Genesis13:14 Looxey Abraameppe shaakettidaappe guye GODAY Abraame, «Dhoqqu gaada neni dizasoppe arshey mokkiza bagganne geliza bagga qasse dugeha bagganne pudeha bagga xeella." 
Genesis13:15 Hayssa neni xeelliza biitta ubbaa ta neessinne ne zereththas mernaas immana. 
Genesis13:16 Tani ne zereth biitta ace mala darsana; oonikka biitta ace taybana dandaykko ne zereththika taybettana. 
Genesis13:17 Dendada biitta bolla pudenne duge, yaanne ha yuuya xeella; gaasoykka tani hayssa biittaa nees immana» gides." 
Genesis13:18 Histtiin Abraamey ba Dunkaaneza shoddidi, Kebroonen Mamire geetettizason diza gita miththaa achchan de7anaas bides. Heenkka GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso keexxides." 
Genesis14:1 He wode Sana7oore Kawoy Amiraafeeley, Eelaasaare kawoy Aryookey, Elaame kawoy Kadorlaa7oomereynne ayzaabe kawo Tidi7aaley oyddati," 
Genesis14:2 Sodoome kawo Beera7era, Gamoora kawo Birshara, Adaama kawo Shin7aabera, Xaboyme kawo Shemebeereynne (Zo7aare geetettiza) Beela kawora olettanaas bida." 
Genesis14:3 Ha ichchashu kawoti gaaggidi issi bagga gididi, (Hayqo Abba geetettiza) Siddime shoobban shiiqida." 
Genesis14:4 Istti kase tammanne nam7u layth Kadorlaa7oomeres haarettida; gido attiin tammanne heedzdzanththo layththan iza bolla makkallida. 
Genesis14:5 Tammanne oydanththo layththan Kadorlaa7oomereynne izara zuppetida kawoti ba olanchchata ekki biidi, Astaroote-Qarnaymen diza Erafaymeta, Haaman diza Zuuzetanne Shaawe-Qiriyaataymen diza Eemime geetettiza dereta olidi xoonida." 
Genesis14:6 Hoore biitta asatakka Seyre zuma bolla olidi bazzo achchan diza Elparaane geetettizaso gakkanaas gooddida. 
Genesis14:7 Hessafe guye simmidi En-Mishipaaxe yida. (Ha7i he derey Qaadeese geetettees.) Istti Amaaleeqeta biitta qasse Haxaxoone Taamaare geetettizason diza Amoore asaa ubbaa olidi xoonida. 
Genesis14:8 Hessafe simmiin, Sodoome kawoy, Gamoora kawoy, Adaama kawoy, Xaboyme kawoynne (Zo7aare geetettiza) Beela kawoy dendidi Siidime shoobban olas salfida." 
Genesis14:9 Hayti wuri Elaame kawora, ayzaabeta kawora, Sana7oore kaworanne Eelaasaare kawora (ha ichchashu kawoti oyddu kawotara) olettida." 
Genesis14:10 He wode Siidime shoobban, shida oykkiza daro ollay dees. Sodoome kawoynne Gamoora kawoy ba ola asaara olappe baqatishin, isttafe guuththati he ollatan kundida; gido attiin attidayti pude zuma bolla baqatida." 
Genesis14:11 Oyddu kawoti Sodoomenne Gamoora katamata aqotanne miza kath ubbaa bonqqi ekki bida. 
Genesis14:12 Abraame isha nay Looxey, Sodoomen diza gishshas izakka iza aqotaakka ubbaa ekki bida." 
Genesis14:13 Hessafe guye issi asi kessi ekkidi baqati yiidi Ibraawe Abraames hessa yootides; Abraamey he wode Eshkoolenne Aneere isha Amoore dere as Mamire wola achchan dees; istti wurikka ola zaaranaas Abraamera caaqettida. 
Genesis14:14 Abraamey ba dabboy di7ettidayssa siyida wode ola eriza bason yelettida heedzdzu xeetanne tammanne osppun asaa denththides; he oyddu kawota kaallidi Daane geetettiza katama gakkanaas bides. 
Genesis14:15 Heen omarsan ba asaa cugan cugan shaakkidi, ba morkketara olettidi xoonides; histtidi Damasqofe bolla baggara diza Hoobbe geetettizaso gakkanaas gooddides." 
Genesis14:16 Abraameykka ba dabbo Looxenne iza aqota ubbaa kase di7ettida maccassaanne hara asaakka woththi ekkides. 
Genesis14:17 Abraamey Kadorlaa7oomerenne izara zuppetida kawota xoonidi simmidaappe guye, Sodoome kawoy, (kawota shoobba geetettiza) Shaaweha shoobbaan iza mokkanaas kezides." 
Genesis14:18 He wode, Saaleme kawoy Malkexeedeqey ukeththinne woyne ushshu ekki yides; izikka Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa qeese." 
Genesis14:19 Izi Abraame hizgi anjjides; «Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossi salonne sa7a medhdhidayssi Abraame anjjo. 
Genesis14:20 Qasse Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossi, Ne morkketa ne kushen aaththi immidayssi galatetto» gides. Abraamey ubbaafe tammaafe issi kushe kessidi Malkexeedeqes immides." 
Genesis14:21 Sodoome kawoy Abraame, «Ta asaa taas zaarada ne di7ida meheza ubbaa nees ekka» gides." 
Genesis14:22 Gido attiin Abraamey Sodoome kawo, «Tani GODAAS, Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaas, salonne sa7a medhdhidayssas, ta kushe denththada caaqqaychchadis." 
Genesis14:23 Ta asay midayssafenne tanara bida Aneere, Eshkoolenne Mamire gakkizayssafe attiin neni, ‹Abraame tani duresadis gontta mala tani neyssafe haray atto issi miish woykko caamma kirekka ta ekkike; istti bana gakkizayssa ekketto› gees» gides." 
Genesis14:24  
Genesis15:1 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay ajjuutan Abraamekko yiidi, «Abraame, babbofa! Tani nees gondalle; ne anjjoy keehi gita» gides." 
Genesis15:2 Abraamey, «Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Taas mulekka nay baynda gishshas neni immiza imotay taas ayssee? Damasqo dere as El7ezeerey tana laattana» gides." 
Genesis15:3 Qasseka Abraamey, «Neni taas aykko naa immabeekka; hessa gishshas tason diza aylley tana laattanaas dees» gides." 
Genesis15:4 GODAA qaalay izakko yiidi, «Hayssi aylley nena laattenna; neeppe yelettiday nena laattana» gides." 
Genesis15:5 Hessafe guye GODAY Abraame kare kessidi, «Pude salo xeella; neni xoolintteta taybanaas dandaykko tayba; ne zereththayka hayssa mala gidana» gides." 
Genesis15:6 Abraameykka GODAA ammanides; iza ammanoykka Xilloteththan qoodettides. 
Genesis15:7 Qasseka GODAY iza, «Ne hayssa biittaa laattana mala ta nees immanaas Uure geetettiza Kaladaaweta katamappe nena kessa ehida GODAY tana diikkinaa?» gides." 
Genesis15:8 Gido attiin Abraamey iza, «Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Tani hayssa biittaa laattanayssa aazan eroo?» gides." 
Genesis15:9 GODAYKKA iza, «Heedzdzu layththa us, heedzdzu layththa deysh, heedzdzu layththa dorsa laaqqanne nam7u qommo haraphpheta taas ekka ya» gides." 
Genesis15:10 Izi heyta ubbata izas ekki efi shukkidi giddon nam7u nam7u kessi shaakkidi issaa issaa ginan woththides; gido attiin kafota nam7u kessibeenna. 
Genesis15:11 He wode ankko kafoti he ashoza bolla uttiin Abraamey istta gooddides. 
Genesis15:12 Arshey wulliza wode Abraame wolqqama dhiskoy oykkiin daganththiza girdi gida dhumay iza bolla dhumides. 
Genesis15:13 Histtiin GODAY izas, «Ne zereththay hara biittan bete gidi daanayssa neni tumappe era; istti aylletidi 400 layth yedhetti haarettana." 
Genesis15:14 Ayllesidi istta haariza kawoteththaa ta qaxxayana; hessafe guye istti daro aqora he biittaafe kezana. 
Genesis15:15 Neni gidikko ne aawatakko saron baana; ne keeha cimmada hayqqananne moogettana. 
Genesis15:16 Oydanththo yeletan ne zereththay ha biitta simmana; ays giikko Amoore dere asaa nagaray buro kumontta gishshassa» gides. 
Genesis15:17 Arshey wulliin gadey dhumidaappe guye cooce tama lacoynne cuway beettidi he nam7u nam7u kezi shaakettida ashota giddora kanththides. 
Genesis15:18 He gallas GODAY Abraames, «Gibxe shaafappe doommidi Efiraaxise geetettiza gita shaafaa gakkanaas ha biittaa tani ne zereththaas immadis." 
Genesis15:19 Heytikka Qenaaweta, Qenaazeta, Qadimooneta, Hiiteta, Paarizeta, Erafaymeta, Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Gergesetanne Yaabuseta biitta» gi caaqqides." 
Genesis15:20  
Genesis15:21  
Genesis16:1 Abraame machcheya Sooray izas ha7ikka naa yelabeekku; gido attiin izis Gibxeppe yida Aggaaro geetettiza issi aylleya dawus. 
Genesis16:2 Hessa gishshas Sooray Abraame xeygada, «Beya! GODAY tana yelo diggides. Neni baada, ta aylleyra aqa; oonee erizay, tani izi baggara naa aayo gidanaakkonne» gadus; histtiin Abraamey Soora qaala siyides." 
Genesis16:3 Abraamey Kanaane biittan tammu layth uttidaappe guye Abraame machcheya Sooray Gibxeppe ehida ba aylleyo Aggaaro, ba azina Abraames machcho histta immadus." 
Genesis16:4 Abraameykka Aggaaro ekkiin iza qanththatadus; iza baas shaaray attidayssa erida wode ba godatteyo leqqadus. 
Genesis16:5 He wode Sooray Abraame, «Ta qohettiza qohoy nena gakko; tani ta aylleyo nees immiin iza ha7i baas shaaray attidayssa erada tana leqqawus. Neessinne taas Xoossi pirdo» gadus." 
Genesis16:6 Abraameykka Soora, «Hanno beya! Ne aylleya ne kushen dawus; neni izo nena lo7idaaz ooththa» gides; hessafe guye Sooray Aggaaro qohiin iza kezada izippe betadus." 
Genesis16:7 GODAA kiitanchchay Aggaaro bazzon pultto haaththa achchan demmides; he pulttoy Shuura geetettiza biitta efiza oge matan dees. 
Genesis16:8 Izikka Aggaaro, «Hanne Soora aylle Aggaaree! Awappe yadii? Qasse awa bay?» gi oychchides. Iza, «Tani ta godatteyo Soorappe bete bays» gadus." 
Genesis16:9 GODAA kiitanchchayka izis, «Neni ne godatteyko guye simma baada izis haaretta» gides" 
Genesis16:10 Qasseka Xoossa kiitanchchay izo, «Ne zereth taybanaas dandayettonttayssa keena tani darsana» gides." 
Genesis16:11 Qasseka GODAA kiitanchchay izo, «Ha7i neni qanththatadasa; neni attuma naa yelana; yelada iza Isma7eele gaada sunththana; gaasoykka Xoossi ne waasaa siyides." 
Genesis16:12 Izi bazzon yeda diza hare mala gidana; asa ubbaara izi eqettana; qasse asi wurikka izara eqettana; izi ba ishata ubbaara ixetti daana» gides. 
Genesis16:13 Aggaarakka, «Tani tana be7izayssa be7ada paxa attanee?» gaada iza baas haasayda GODAA, «Neni tana be7iza Xoossa» ga sunththadus." 
Genesis16:14 Hessa gishshas he pultto ollay, «Tana Be7iza De7o Xoossa pultto» geetettides; he ollay ha7i gakkanaas Qaadeeseppenne Baareedeppe giddon dees." 
Genesis16:15 Aggaara Abraames attuma naa yeladus; Abraamey Aggaara yelida naaza Isma7eele gi sunththides. 
Genesis16:16 Aggaara Isma7eele Abraames yelida wode Abraame layththay 86. 
Genesis17:1 Abraame layththi uddufun tammanne uddufun gidishin GODAY izas qonccidi, «Tani Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa; ne ta sinththan suure hemetta." 
Genesis17:2 Tani taappenne neeppe giddon diza caaqo qaalaa minththana; tani ne zereththaa keeha darsana!» gides. 
Genesis17:3 Abraamey biittan duge gufannidi hu7ey biitta bochchiin izi Xoossas ziggiin Xoossi izas," 
Genesis17:4 «Ha7i ta nenara caaqqiza caaqoy hayssa; neni daro kawoteththatas aawa gidana. 
Genesis17:5 Hachchife guye ne sunththi Abraame geetettenna; gido attiin ne sunththi Abrahaame geetettana; aazas giikko tani nena daro kawoteththatas aawa ooththadis. 
Genesis17:6 Tani nena keeha darsana; tani nena daro kawoteth histtana; kawotikka neeppe kezana. 
Genesis17:7 Tani taappenne neeppe, neeppe guye ne zereththa giddon, yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas ta gelida caaqo qaala minththana; ha caaqoykka tani neessinne neeppe guye ne zereththas Xoos gidana." 
Genesis17:8 Ha7i neni bete gidada diza Kanaane derey wuri neessinne neeppe guye ne zereththas mernaas laata biitta gidana mala tani immana; qasse tani istta Xoos gidana» gides. 
Genesis17:9 Qasseka Xoossi Abrahaame, «Nekka neeppe guye ne zereththayka, yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas ta caaqo qaalaa naagite." 
Genesis17:10 Taappenne neeppe, neeppe guye ne zereththa giddon intte naagana ta caaqo qaalay hayssa; intte giddon diza attumas ubbay qaxxaretto." 
Genesis17:11 Intte shurte qaxxaretteeta; hayssi taassinne inttes giddon diza caaqo qaalaas malata gidana. 
Genesis17:12 Intte giddon sinththafe yelettana adde nayti wuri yelettida osppunththa gallas qaxxarettanaas koshshees; neson yelettidayta gidiin, woykko allagappe miishshan shamettida aylleta gidiin ne zereth gidontta addetakka qaxxaranaas koshshees." 
Genesis17:13 Neson yelettidaytinne ne miishshan shamettidayti qaxxarettetto; hayssi intte ashon diza ta caaqoy mernaa caaqo gidana. 
Genesis17:14 Qaxxarettontta attumasi wuri ba asaappe shaakettidi dhayo; gaasoykka izi ta caaqo qaalaa naagibeenna» gides. 
Genesis17:15 Qasseka Xoossi Abrahaame, «Ne machchey sunththaa Soora gooppa; hayssafe guye izi sunththi Saara geetetto." 
Genesis17:16 Tani izo anjjana; tani izippe nees tumappe attuma naa immana; izo tani anjjana; iza kawoteththatas aayo gidana; kawoti izippe yelettana» gides. 
Genesis17:17 Abrahaamey biitta bolla gufannidi ba wozinan miiccishe, «100 layththa asi tumu naa yelanee? Qasse izis layththay uddufun tammu gidida Saaray buro naa yelanee?» gi qoppides." 
Genesis17:18 Abrahaamey Xoossaas, «Ne Isma7eele taas anjjidaakko ay mala lo7oshin!» gides." 
Genesis17:19 Xoossayka izas, «Hanenna! Ne machcheya Saaray nees attuma naa tumappe yelana; neni iza Yisaaqa gaada sunththana; izappe guye iza zereththas mernaa caaqo gidana mala ta izara caaqo qaala gelana." 
Genesis17:20 Isma7eeles gidikko ne oychchidayssa ta siyadis; tani izakka anjjana; tani iza darsana; iza zereththaa keeha darsana; izi tammanne nam7u kawota yelana; tani iza zereththaa gita kawoteth kessana. 
Genesis17:21 Gido attiin tani ta caaqo qaalaa layth hanni wode Saaray nees yelana naaza Yisaaqara caaqettana» gides. 
Genesis17:22 Xoossi Abrahaamera haasaydi wursidaappe guye, Abrahaameppe shaakettidi pude bides." 
Genesis17:23 He gallassankka Abrahaamey ba naa Isma7eele bason yelettidayta ubbaa, ba miishshan shammidayta ubbaanne bason diza attumas ubbaa, Xoossi izas yootida mala qaxxarides." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahaamey qaxxarettishin izas layththay uddufun tammanne uddufuna. 
Genesis17:25 Iza naa Isma7eeley qaxxarettishin izas layththay tammanne heedzdza. 
Genesis17:26 Abrahaameynne iza naa Isma7eeley nam7atikka issi gallas qaxxarettida. 
Genesis17:27 Abrahaameson diza attumasay wuri iza soon yelettidaytinne miishshan shamettidayti wurikka izara qaxxarettida. 
Genesis18:1 Seeta gallas Abrahaamey Mamiren diza gita miththata garsan ba dunkaane pengen utti dishin GODAY izas qonccides. 
Genesis18:2 Abrahaamey dhoqqu gi xeellidi heedzdzu asati eqqidayta be7idi istta mokki ekkanaas ba Dunkaaneza pengefe dendidi woxxi bides; he gakki biittan hokkidi istta sinththan ziggides. 
Genesis18:3 Ziggi simmidi, «Abeet ta godoo! Ne tana ne aylleza bonchchizaa gidikko taso gelontta aadhdha booppa." 
Genesis18:4 Ha7i intte toho meeccana toho haaththi yiikko intte toho meecettidi hayssa miththaa kuwan shempi ekkite. 
Genesis18:5 Intte ha7i taakko intte ayllezakko yida gishshas shempi ekkidi intte bizaso baana mala tani inttes miza miish ane ehays» gides. Istti, «Daro lo7o; neni giza mala ooththa» gida." 
Genesis18:6 Abrahaamey Dunkaaneza giddo Saarakko eesoti biidi, «Eesotada liiqo dhiillezappe heedzdzu kere gidizayssa ekka munuqada uketh uukka» gides." 
Genesis18:7 Qasse Abrahaamey ba wudezaakko woxxi biidi lo7o anqara mar dooridi issi aylles immiin izi eeson shukkidi giigsides. 
Genesis18:8 Histtiin Abrahaamey meqo maaththinne giigsida maraa ashoza imaththata sinth aaththides; istti mishin izi he miththaa garsan istta achchan eqqides. 
Genesis18:9 Istti iza, «Ne machcheya Saaray awanee?» gi oychchiin izi, «Henin dunkaane giddon dawus» gides." 
Genesis18:10 GODAY izas, «Tani yiza layth hanni wode tumu neekko simmana; he wode ne machchiya Saaray attuma naa nees yelana» gides. Saaraykka izappe guye baggara dunkaaneza sinththan dashe hessa siyadus." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahaameynne Saaray keehi cimmida; Saaraska maccassatas yiza wogay aggides. 
Genesis18:12 Hessa gishshas Saaray ba wozinan, «Tani ha7i cimmidaappe guye, ta azinaykka cimmidaappe guye hayssi ufayssay taas hananee?» gaada miiccadus." 
Genesis18:13 He wode GODAY Abrahaame, « ‹Tani cimmaychidaappe guye tumu naa yelanee?› gaada Saaray aazas miiccadee?" 
Genesis18:14 GODAAS dandayettontta miishshi tumu dizee? Ta gida mala yiza layth hanni wode ta neekko yaana; he wode Saaray attuma naa yelana» gides. 
Genesis18:15 Saaray keeha babbida gishshas, «Tani miiccabeekke» gaada lahottadus. Gido attiin izi, «Ee, neni tuma miiccadasa» gides." 
Genesis18:16 Hessafe guye asati baana dendishe Sodoome katama duge zaari xeellida; Abrahaameykka istta moyzishe isttara bides. 
Genesis18:17 He wode GODAY, «Tani ta ooththana gizayssa Abrahaameppe qottanee?" 
Genesis18:18 Abrahaamey tumappe gitanne wolqqama kawoteth gidana; ha biitta asi wuri iza baggara anjjettana. 
Genesis18:19 Xilloteththinne suure ooso ooththidi GODAA oge naagana mala ba naytanne baappe guye ba soo asaa izi zorana mala tani iza dooradis; hessika GODAY Abrahaames immana gidayssa ubbaa polanaassa» gides. 
Genesis18:20 GODAY Abrahaame, «Sodoomenne Gamoora waasoy keehi darida gishshassinne istta nagaray keehi deexxida gishshas istti ooththidayssi taakko gakkida waaso mala iitakkonne iita gidonttaakko ane tani duge wodhdha beyays» gides." 
Genesis18:21  
Genesis18:22 Hessafe guye nam7u asati Sodoome simmi bida; gido attiin Abrahaamey GODAA sinththan eqqida mala dees. 
Genesis18:23 He wode Abrahaamey izakko shiiqidi, «Tumu neni xillota iitatara gaththa dhayssanee?" 
Genesis18:24 He gita katamaan 50 xilloti diikko neni istta dhayssanee? Neni izan diza 50 xillota gishshas he katamaa maarkkii? 
Genesis18:25 Xillota wordotara gaththa wodhizayssinne xillotanne wordota issi ayfen xeellizayssi hessi neeppe haakko; ha biitta ubbaa bolla pirdiza neni xillo pirdikii?» gides. 
Genesis18:26 GODAYKKA, «He Sodoome katamaan 50 xilloti diikko he katamaa ubbaa istta gishshas tani ubbaa maarana» gides." 
Genesis18:27 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey, «Tani biittanne bidinththakoshin ta Godaara xalada haasaya oykkadis." 
Genesis18:28 Ichchashu tammu xillotappe ichchashati pacciko neni he paccida ichchashata gishshas he katamaa ubbaa dhayssanee?» gides. GODAYKKA, «Tani heen oyddu tammanne ichchash xillota demmiko he katamaa dhayssike» gides." 
Genesis18:29 Abrahaamey zaareththidikka, «Heen 40 xilloti xalla beettikochchii?» gides. Izikka, «Tani he oyddu tammata gishshas he katamaa dhayssike» gides." 
Genesis18:30 Hessafe guye izi, «Ta Godoo! Ne ta bolla hanqettofa; tani gujjadakka oychchays; heen 30 xilloti xalla beettikochchii?» gides. GODAY, «Tani heen 30 xillo as demmiko he katamaa dhayssike» gides." 
Genesis18:31 Qasseka Abrahaamey, «Tani Godaara xalateththan haasaya doommadis; heen 20 xilloti xalla beettikochchii?» gides. GODAY, «He nam7u tammata gishshas dhayssike» gides." 
Genesis18:32 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey, «Ta Godoo! Ne ta bolla hanqettofa; tani mexi issito haasayays; heen 10 xilloy beettikochchii?» gides. GODAY, «He tammata gishshas tani he katamaa dhayssike» gides." 
Genesis18:33 GODAY Abrahaamera haasaya wursidaappe guye bides; Abrahaameykka baso simmides. 
Genesis19:1 He nam7u kiitanchchati omars Sodoome katama gakkiza wode Looxey he katamaa pengen uttides. Looxey istta be7idi isttara gaagganaas dendi biidi ba hu7e duge biitta gaththi ziggidi," 
Genesis19:2 «Ta godatoo! Intte aylle taso haa yerketi; intte toho meecetti aqidi wonto maaladora dendidi intte bizaso beeta» gides. Isttika, «Akkay bookko; nuni hayssa katamaa dubbushan aqana» gida." 
Genesis19:3 Gido attiin izi istta keehi shoobbida gishshas izara biidi iza soo gelida; izikka isttas uketh uukkidi kawo aaththiin istti mida. 
Genesis19:4 Istti ichchontta dishin Sodoome katamaa attumasay wuri naytappe cima gakkanaas issaadeyka attontta yiidi keeththaa yuuyi aadhdhida. 
Genesis19:5 Isttika Looxe xeygidi, «Hach omars neso yida asati awan dizoo? Nuni isttara aqana mala istta nuukko kare kessa» gida." 
Genesis19:6 Looxey isttara gaagganaas kare kezidi sohon diza asata bolla kareza guye zaari gordidi," 
Genesis19:7 isttas, «Ta ishatoo! Hayssa iita ooso ooththofte." 
Genesis19:8 Taas adde gelontta nam7u geela7o macca nayti deettes; tani istta inttes kare kessiko intte istta inttena lo7ida mala ooththana dandayeeta; gido attiin hayta asata bolla aykkoka ooththofte; ays giikko istti ta keeth gelidi ta imath gidida» gides. 
Genesis19:9 Asati iza, «Nu sinththafe kichcha!» qasseka, «Hayssi addezi ha biittan bete as gidi uttidi ha7i nu bolla pirdanaas kajjalees; ha7i nuni istta bolla ooththana qoppida iitaappe aadhdhida iita ne bolla ooththana» gida. Looxekka guye sugi yeggidi pengeza menththanaas matida." 
Genesis19:10 Gido attiin he nam7u asati ba kushe kare yeddidi Looxe soo goochchi gelththidi kareza zaari gordida. 
Genesis19:11 Hessafe guye istti keeththaa pengen diza asaa guuththafe gita gakkanaas qooqisiin istti pengeza demmanaas koyishe daaburda. 
Genesis19:12 He nam7u asati Looxe, «Nees hayssa katamaa garsan diza attuma naa woykko macca naa gidiin ne nayta ekkanaas giigsidaytikka diikko woykko hara dabboy diikko istta hayssafe kessa." 
Genesis19:13 Ays giikko nuni hayssa katamaa dhayssana goos; ha deraa nagaray keehi daro gididayssa GODAY be7ida gishshas hayssa katamaa dhayssanaas nuna kiittides» gida. 
Genesis19:14 Hessa gishshas Looxey ba macca nayta ekkanaas giigsidaytakko biidi isttas, «GODAY ha katamaa dhayssana giza gishshas Eleli dendidi hayssafe kezi kichchite» gides; gido attiin iza macca nayta giigsidayti izi qidhe gees gi qoppida." 
Genesis19:15 Gadey wonttana gishin he kiitanchchati Looxe, «Denda! Ne machchiyonne hayssan diza ne nam7u macca nayta ekkada eeson keza! Kezontta ixxiko, hanna katamaya pirdettiza wode nenikka dhayana» giidi eesosida." 
Genesis19:16 Gido attiin Looxey shinniin GODAY isttas qadhettida gishshas kiitanchchati iza kushe, iza machchey kushenne macca nayta nam7ata kushe oykkidi he katamaappe istta kessida." 
Genesis19:17 Kiitanchchati istta katamaappe kessida malakka kiitanchchatappe issay, «Intte shemppo ekkidi baqatite! Guye xeellofte! Qasse hayssa shoobbaan awanka eqqofte! Zumaakko woxxite! Histtontta ixxiko intte dhayana» gides." 
Genesis19:18 Gido attiin Looxey isttas, «Ta godatoo! Hessaththo gidoppo!" 
Genesis19:19 Tani intte aylley intte sinththan sabettida gishshas tana ashshanaas taas daro qadhettideta; gidikkoka hayssi bashshay tana gakkidi dhayssiko hayqqana gishshas tani pude zumaakko baqatanaas dandaykke. 
Genesis19:20 Be7ite! Baqati biidi attanaas matan issi guuththa katamay dawus; ta shemppo ashshanaas hee baqatoo? Iza qeeri katama deekkee?» gides. 
Genesis19:21 Gido attiin kiitanchchay, «Ee gido! Tani ne woosaa siyadis; tani neni giza katamayo dhayssike." 
Genesis19:22 Hessa gishshas gede eeson baqata; neni gede gakkanaas tani aykkoka ooththanaas dandaykke» gides; histtiin he katamay sunththi Zo7aare geetettides. 
Genesis19:23 Looxey Zo7aare gakkishin buro xalqqey caarides. 
Genesis19:24 He wode GODAY tamanne xuuggiza diine Sodoome bollanne Gamoora bolla saloppe bukisides. 
Genesis19:25 Hessaththo ooththidi GODAY he zullen diza katamatanne zullen dizaaz ubbaa he katamata giddon diza asaa ubbaanne he biittan diza miththinne maata ubbaa xuuggi dhayssides. 
Genesis19:26 Gido attiin Looxe machchiya guye xeellada maxine shuch gidadus. 
Genesis19:27 Wonteththa gallas Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi GODAA sinththan kase izi eqqidaso simmi bides. 
Genesis19:28 Izi Sodoomenne Gamoora he shoobbaan diza biitta ubbaa duge xeelliza wode wolqqama cuway xuussa tama mala he biittaafe tullu gizayssa be7ides. 
Genesis19:29 Xoossi he shoobban diza katamata dhayssida wode, Abrahaame qoppidi Looxey kase diza katamata dhayssida wode Looxe dhayssafe ashshides." 
Genesis19:30 Looxey Zo7aaren de7anaas babbida gishshas ba macca nayta nam7atara zuma bolla kezidi gongolo giddon de7ides. 
Genesis19:31 Issi gallas bayra naya kaaloyo, «Nu aaway cimmides; biitta bolla diza woga mala nunara zin7anaas hayssa biittaan mulekka attumay deenna." 
Genesis19:32 Hessa gishshas haa ya; woyne ushshu nu aawa ushshi maththosoos; histtidi izara aqidi ane nu aawappe nuus zereth essoos» gadus. 
Genesis19:33 He gallassa omarsika ba aawaa woyne ushshu ushshidaappe guye bayraya gelada izara zin7adus; iza izara zin7iza wodekka dendiza wodekka izi eribeenna. 
Genesis19:34 Wonteththa gallas bayraya kaaloyo, «Siya! Qamma tani nu aawara aqadis; hach omars qasse woyne ushshu ushshiko neni gelada izara aqa; histtidi nuni nu aawappe nuus zereth essoos» gadus." 
Genesis19:35 He gallas qamma qasseka woyne ushshu iza ushshidaappe guye kaaloya gelada izara aqadus; iza izara aqada denda biza wode izi eribeenna. 
Genesis19:36 Histtidi Looxe macca nayti nam7atikka ba aawaas qanththatida. 
Genesis19:37 Bayraya attuma naa yeladus; sunththaaka Mo7aabe gaada sunththadus; izikka hach gakkanaas Mo7aabetas aawa. 
Genesis19:38 Qasse kaaloyakka attuma naa yeladus; sunththaaka Beeni-Aame gaada sunththadus; izikka hach gakkanaas Amoonetas aawa. 
Genesis20:1 Abrahaamey Mamireppe dendidi Negebe geetettiza biitta biidi Qaadeesenne Shuura geetettiza katamatappe giddon de7ides; Geraare biittan guuththa wode gam7ides. 
Genesis20:2 Heen Abrahaamey ba machchiyo Saara, «Iza taas michcho» giin Geraare kawo Abimelekkey kiittidi Saara baso efides." 
Genesis20:3 Gido attiin Xoossi issi gallassa omars agumon Abimelekkeko yiidi, «Neni ehida maccassay geedon ne hayqqana; iza asa machcho» gides." 
Genesis20:4 Gido attiin Abimelekkey izira aqibeenna; hessa gishshas, «Ta godoo! Neni, tani, ta kawoteththayka nena qohontta dishin nuna coo dhayssanee?" 
Genesis20:5 Izi, ‹Iza ta michcho› gibeennee? Qasse iza, ‹Izi ta isha› gabeekkee? Tani hayssa tumu wozinappe ooththadis» gides." 
Genesis20:6 Hessafe guye Xoossi agumon izas, «Ee, neni ne wozina geeshshateththan ooththidayssa tani erada neni izo bochchontta malanne ta sinththan nagara ooththontta mala nena tani teqqadis." 
Genesis20:7 Ha7i hanno maccassayo izi azinaas zaara; gaasoykka izi nabe gidida gishshas izi nees Xoossaa woossiko neni paxana; gido attiin ne izo zaarontta ixxiko neninne nees dizaazi wuri hayqqanayssa tumappe ne era» gides. 
Genesis20:8 Abimelekkey wonteththa gallas maalado ba kawoteththan diza shuumeta ubbaa xeygidi ha yo7oza ubbaa isttas yootiin istti keehi babbida. 
Genesis20:9 Histtiin Abimelekkey Abrahaame xeygidi, «Neni nu bolla ay ooththadii? Neni ta bollanne ta kawoteththaa bolla hayssa mala qoho ehanaas tani nees ay iita miish ooththadinaa? Neni ta bolla oosettanaas bessontta iita ooththadasa» gides." 
Genesis20:10 Qasseka Abimelekkey Abrahaame, «Nena hayssa oosisiday aazee?» gi oychchiin," 
Genesis20:11 Abrahaamey, « ‹Xoossas babbiza issi asikka ha deren baawa; qasseka ta machchey geedon istti tana wodhana› gaada qoppida gishshassa." 
Genesis20:12 Izakka ta aawa naa gidida gishshas taas michcho; taas aayi naa gidontta gishshas ta izo machcho ekkadis. 
Genesis20:13 Xoossi tana ta aawa keeththafe kessida wode tani izis nuni bida biittan ubbaan neni taas ooththana kiyateththi, ‹Izi taas isha› gaada yoota gadis» gides." 
Genesis20:14 Hessafe guye Abimelekkey dors, miiz, macca aylletanne attuma aylleta ehidi Abrahaames immides; qasse iza machchiyo Saarakka izas zaarides." 
Genesis20:15 Abimelekkey, «Hekko ta biittay ne sinththan dees; nena lo7izason da» gides." 
Genesis20:16 Saaraska, «Tani ne ishaas issi shii saqile bira immadis; hayssi hekko nenara dizayta ubbaa sinththan neni xillo gididayssa erisana» gides." 
Genesis20:17 GODAY Abrahaame machcheyo Saara geedon Abimelekke keeththa asa ubbaa yeliza ulo makkarssida gishshas Abrahaamey Xoossaa woossiin Abimelekkey iza machcheyanne iza macca aylleti naa yelana mala Xoossi istta paththides. 
Genesis20:18  
Genesis21:1 GODAY Saara qoppides; kase izis yootida malakka ooththides. 
Genesis21:2 Saaray shaarada cimateththan Abrahaames Xoossi gida wodey gakkiin attuma naa yeladus. 
Genesis21:3 Saaray izas yelida naaza sunththaa Abrahaamey, «Yisaaqa» gi sunththides." 
Genesis21:4 Abrahaamey naaza Yisaaqa Xoossi bana azazida mala yelettidaappe osppunththa gallas qaxxarides. 
Genesis21:5 Iza naa Yisaaqi izas yelettida wode Abrahaames layththay xeeta. 
Genesis21:6 Saaray, «Xoossi tana miichchides; qasse hayssa siyizay wuri tanara miiccana» gadus." 
Genesis21:7 Qasseka Saaray, «Abrahaames Saaray naa yelananne dhanththana giidi qoppiday oonee? Gidikkoka tani ha7i izas izi cimmida woden naa yeladis» gadus." 
Genesis21:8 Guuththa naazi diccidi dhanth duuxxides; Yisaaqi dhanththafe duuxxida gallas Abrahaamey gita diggisa diggisides. 
Genesis21:9 Gibxeppe yida Aggaara Abrahaames yelida naazi Isma7eeley Yisaaqa leqqizayssa Saaray be7ada," 
Genesis21:10 Abrahaame, «Hanno aylley naazi ta naa Yisaaqara mulekka laattontta gishshas aylleyonne izi naaza kessa goodda» gadus." 
Genesis21:11 Ha yo7ozi ba naaza bochchiza gishshas Abrahaamey daroppe metotettides. 
Genesis21:12 Gido attiin Xoossi Abrahaame, «Ne zereththay Yisaaqa baggara xeygettanayssa gishshas aylley gishshassinne izi naaza gishshas daro metotoppa; Saaray nees yootizayssa ubbaa siya." 
Genesis21:13 Qasse tani izi ne zereth gidida gishshas aylley naaza kawoteth histtana» gides. 
Genesis21:14 Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi guuththa kaththinne koddan haath ekkidi Aggaaro hashen toossidi izi naazakka izis immidi kessi yeddides; iza baada Bersaabehe geetettiza bazzon toylattadus. 
Genesis21:15 Haaththayka koddaafe wuriin iza, «Ta naazi hayqqishin uttada ta iza be7ikke» gaada naaza buura garsan woththada 200 wadha gidizaso mala baada heen uttadus; heenkka izakko simma uttada ba qaala dhoqqu histta yeekkadus." 
Genesis21:16  
Genesis21:17 Xoossi naaza waaso siyides; saloppe Xoossa kiitanchchay Aggaaro xeygidi, «Aggaaree! Waanadii? Xoossi naazi ichchidason yeekkizayssa siyida gishshas babbofa;" 
Genesis21:18 denda eqqa; naaza denththada ne kushen oykka; tani iza gita kawoteth histtana» gides. 
Genesis21:19 Xoossi izis haaththa olla bessiin baada koddan haath kunththadus; naazakka ushshadus. 
Genesis21:20 Xoossi naazara dees; naazikka diccidi bazzo biittan wondafe dukkiza as gidides. 
Genesis21:21 Izi Paaraane bazzon de7ishin iza aaya izas machcho Gibxeppe ekkadus. 
Genesis21:22 He wode Abimelekkey ba wottadarata halaqa Pikoolera Abrahaamekko biidi, «Neni ooththiza ubbaan Xoossi nenara dees." 
Genesis21:23 Neni ta bolla woykko ta nayta bolla woykko ta zereththa bolla baleththon gene ooththontta mala ha7i hayssan Xoossa sinththan taas caaqqa; tani nees ne kiyidayssaththo nenikka taassinne neni imaththateththan diza hayssa biittazas lo7o ooththa» gides. 
Genesis21:24 Abrahaamey, «Tani caaqqays» gides." 
Genesis21:25 He wode Abrahaamey Abimelekke aylleti ekkida haaththa olla gishshas Abimelekkes magannides. 
Genesis21:26 Gido attiin Abimelekkey, «Hessa ooni ooththidaakko tani erikke; nenikka qasse taas yootabeekka; tani hach gakkanaas hessa siyabeekke» gides." 
Genesis21:27 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey dorsatanne miizata ehidi Abimelekkes immiin istti nam7ay caaqettida. 
Genesis21:28 Abrahaamey meheta giddofe laappun uzzi dorsata shaakkides. 
Genesis21:29 Abimelekkey Abrahaame, «Ha neni shaakkida laappun uzzota ays shaakkadii?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis21:30 Abrahaamey, «Tani hayssa haaththa ollaa bookkidayssas markka gidana mala hayta laappun uzzota taappe ekka» gides." 
Genesis21:31 Heen he nam7u asati caaqettida gishshas he sohoy Bersaabehe geetettides. 
Genesis21:32 Bersaabehen caaqo caaqettidayssafe guye Abimelekkeynne iza wottadarata halaqa Pikooley dendidi Filisxeeme biitta simmida. 
Genesis21:33 Abrahaamey Bersaabehen Tamarssike geetettiza mith tokkidi heen GODAA Mernaa Xoossa xeygidi goynnides. 
Genesis21:34 Abrahaamey Filisxeeme biittan daro wode imaththateththan de7ides. 
Genesis22:1 Hessafe guye Xoossi Abrahaame paaccides; Xoossi, «Abrahaamee!» gi xeygiin Abrahaamey, «Yee!» gi koyides." 
Genesis22:2 Xoossi, «Neni siiqiza ne mexi issi naaza Yisaaqa ekkada Mooriya geetettiza biitta ba; baada heen tani nees bessiza issi zuma bollan iza xuugettiza yarsho ooththada taas yarsha» gides." 
Genesis22:3 Wonteththa gallas Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi hare caanides; ba aylletappe nam7atanne ba naa Yisaaqa banara ekkidi xuuggiza yarshos gidiza mith qeri ekkidi Xoossi izas yootidaso baanaas dendides. 
Genesis22:4 Bishe heedzdzanththa gallas Abrahaamey dhoqqu giidi yarsho yarshanasoza haahon be7ides. 
Genesis22:5 Abrahaamey ba aylleta, «Intte harezara hayssan diishshite; taninne ta naazi gede biidi Xoossas goynnidi intteko haa simmana» gides." 
Genesis22:6 Abrahaamey yarsho miththaa denththidi naaza Yisaaqa toossidi baas tamanne shuka mashsha oykkides; istti nam7ay issife bishin," 
Genesis22:7 Yisaaqi ba aawa Abrahaame, «Aabboo!» gides. Abrahaameykka, «Yee! Ta naazoo!» giin Yisaaqi, «Tamaynne miththi dees shin yarshettana dorsay awanee?» gides." 
Genesis22:8 Abrahaameykka, «Ta naazoo! Yarshettana dorsaa Xoossi giigsana» gides; histtiin istti nam7ay issife bida." 
Genesis22:9 Istti Xoossi izas yootidaso gakkida wode Abrahaamey yarsho yarshizaso heen giigsidi miththaa korides; ba naa Yisaaqa qachchidi he miththaa bollan shukkanaas ishisides. 
Genesis22:10 Abrahaamey ba naaza shukkanaas kushe yeddidi mashsha ekkides. 
Genesis22:11 Gido attiin GODAA kiitanchchay saloppe iza, «Abrahaamee! Abrahaamee!» gi xeygiin izi, «Yee!» gi koyiin," 
Genesis22:12 «Naaza bolla ne kushe woththofa; iza aykkoka ooththofa; neni ne mexi issi naazakka tana diggontta gishshas neni Xoossas yayyiza as gididayssa tani ha7i eradis» gides. 
Genesis22:13 Abrahaamey dhoqqu giidi xeellishin kacey turan oykettida dharsho be7ides; Abrahaamey biidi he dharshoza ekkidi xuugettiza yarsho yarshides. 
Genesis22:14 Hessa gishshas Abrahaamey he sohoza, «GODAY immizaso» gi sunththides; hach gakkanaaska he sohozi, «GODAY zuma bollan immana» geetettees." 
Genesis22:15 GODAA kiitanchchay saloppe nam7anththo Abrahaame xeygidi," 
Genesis22:16 «Tani nees tanan caaqqays; neni hayssa ooththida gishshas ne mexi issi naazakka tana diggontta gishshas," 
Genesis22:17 tani nena tumu anjjana; ne zereththaaka tani salo xoolintte malanne abba doonan diza ace mala ooththada darsana; ne zereththati ba morkketa katamata laattana. 
Genesis22:18 Neni taas azazettida gishshas ha kawoteththay wuri ne zereththa baggara anjjettana» gides. 
Genesis22:19 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey ba aylletakko simmiin istti wuri issife Bersaabehe dendi bida. Abrahaamey Bersaabehen de7ides. 
Genesis22:20 Hessafe simmiin Abrahaames, «Milkay ne isha Naakoores nayta yeladus." 
Genesis22:21 Isttika, bayra naa Uuxe, Uuxe ishata Buuze," 
Genesis22:22 Aaraame aawa Qamu7eele, Keesade, Haazo, Pildaase, Yidilaafe, Baatu7eele geetetteettes." 
Genesis22:23 Heyta he osppun naytakka Milka Abrahaame isha Naakoores yeladus; Baatu7eeli Irbiqa yelides. 
Genesis22:24 Erehimo geetettiza iza garadeya qasse Xebaahe, Gehaame, Tehaashanne Makisa yeladus» gi yootida." 
Genesis23:1 Saaray 127 layth de7idaappe guye," 
Genesis23:2 iza Kanaane biittan diza (Kebroone geetettiza) Qiriyaate-Arba7e katamaan hayqqiin Abrahaamey Saaras yeekkidessinne kayottides. 
Genesis23:3 Abrahaamey ba machchey aha achchafe Hiitetakko biidi," 
Genesis23:4 «Tani intte giddon imaththa; ta machcheyo mooganaas taas intte gadeppe moogoso bayzerketii!» gides. 
Genesis23:5 Hiiteti izas, «Godoo! Nuni nena yootizayssa siya; neni nu giddon gita asa; neni ne machchey aha nu duufoppe nena lo7idaason mooga; neni ne machchey aha mooganaas ba duufo oonikka nena diggenna» gi zaarida." 
Genesis23:6  
Genesis23:7 Abrahaamey dendi eqqidi Hiiteta halaqata sinththan ziggides. 
Genesis23:8 Izi isttas, «Intte tana, ‹Ne machchey aha mooga› giikko siyite; Xoohaare naa Efroones iza gadeza gaxan diza Makipheele geetettiza gongoloza taas duufos bayzana mala kumeththa waagan nuna zal7iserketii» gides." 
Genesis23:9  
Genesis23:10 He wode Efrooney katama pengen shiiqida ba asaa Hiiteta giddon dees; hessa gishshas Hiiteti wuri siyishin Abrahaames," 
Genesis23:11 «Hessa mala gidenna; ta godoo! Ta yootizayssa siya; tani gadezakka iza giddon diza gongolozakka ta nees hayssa asaa sinththan immadis; nekka ne machchey ahaa mooga» gides. 
Genesis23:12 Abrahaamey halaqata sinththan qasseka ziggidi," 
Genesis23:13 asay siyishin Efroone, «Ta yootizayssa siyarkkii! Tani he gadezas waaga qanxxana; ne taappe ekkarkkii! Heen tani ta machchey aha moogana» gides." 
Genesis23:14 Efrooney Abrahaames zaaridi, «Ta godoo! Tani yootizayssa siya; gadezi 400 saqile bira xalla kessiza gade gidida gishshas hayssi ne giddoninne ta giddon aykkoka gidenna; ne machchey aha izan mooga» gides." 
Genesis23:15  
Genesis23:16 Abrahaamey Hiite asay siyishin Efrooney gida waaga 400 saqile bira Efroones immides. 
Genesis23:17 Mamire katamaa achchan Makipheelen diza Efroone gaden diza gongoloynne he gaden diza miththay wuri," 
Genesis23:18 katamaa pengen shiiqida Hiite asaa ubbaa sinththan wogan Abrahaame gade gidides. 
Genesis23:19 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey ba machcho Saara ahaa Kanaane biittan (Kebroone geetettiza) Mamire katama achchan diza gongolon moogides. 
Genesis23:20 Hessa gishshas he gadezinne gadezan diza gongolozi Hiiteta sinththan wogan Abrahaames gidides. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahaamey daro cimmides; GODAY iza ubbaankka anjjides. 
Genesis24:2 Abrahaamey baso as ubbaas halaqatizayssanne izappe garsara iza aqota ubbaa ayssiza aylleza, «Ne kushe ta gulbate bolla woththada caaqqa." 
Genesis24:3 Tani istta giddon diza Kanaane macca naytappe ne ta naas machcho oychchontta mala salo sa7a medhdhida Xoossaan ta nees caaqqays; 
Genesis24:4 gido attiin ta yelettida biitta ta dabbotakko baada, ta naa Yisaaqas machcho oychcha» gides." 
Genesis24:5 Iza oosanchchazi, «Maccassaya tanara yaanaas dosontta ixxiko naaza neni yida biittaa guye zaara efoo?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis24:6 Abrahaamey, «Ta naaza gede guye zaara efontta mala naagetta!" 
Genesis24:7 GODAA salo Xoossay tana ta aawa sohoppenne ta yelettida biittaafe kessidayssi taas, ‹Ne zereththas tani hayssa biittaa immana› gi caaqqidayssi neni ta naas heeppe machcho demmana mala izi ba kiitanchcha neeppe sinththe kiittana." 
Genesis24:8 Maccassaya nenara guye yaanaas dosontta ixxiko hayssi tani nena caaqeththida caaqoy nees gometoppo; naaza guye mulekka efoppa» gides. 
Genesis24:9 Hessa gishshas oosanchchazi ba godaa Abrahaame wodira bolla ba kushe woththi caaqqides. 
Genesis24:10 Hessafe guye oosanchchazi ba godaa gaamellatappe tammata ekkidi ba godaa miishshafekka muuruta muuruta ekkidi bides; Mesphexoomiya geetettiza biittan diza Naakoore katama gakkides. 
Genesis24:11 Omarsa wode maccassi haath duuqqanaas yishin katamaappe gaxan haaththa olla achchan ba gaamellata gulbatissidi," 
Genesis24:12 «GODAWU! Ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossoo! Hach tani qoppada yidayssa taas injjesa; qasse ta godaa Abrahaames kiya ooththa. 
Genesis24:13 Beya! Tani hayssa pultto haaththa achchan eqqadis; ha katama asaa macca nayti haath duuqqanaas haa yeettes. 
Genesis24:14 Tani, ‹Ane otoza ziqqi histtada tana haath ushsha› giza wode, izakka, ‹Hekko uya! Qasse ne gaamellatakka tani ushshana› gizaara hinna ne aylle; Yisaaqas neni dooridaaro gidu; neni ta godaas kiya ooththidayssa tani hessan erana» gi woossides." 
Genesis24:15 Buro izi woosa wursontta dishin Irbiqay haaththa oto tookka ekkada puttu gadus; izo Baatu7eeli yelides; Baatu7eeli Milka naa; Milkay Abrahaame isha Naakoore machcho. 
Genesis24:16 Irbiqay daro mala lo7onne gelontta geela7o. Duge wodhdhada pulttozappe ba oto haath kunththada kezadus. 
Genesis24:17 He aylley izikko woxxi biidi izo, «Ne otozappe tana guuththa haath ushsharkkii!» gides." 
Genesis24:18 Iza, «Ero ta godoo! Uya» gadus. Eesotada otoza ba hasheppe woththada geddi histta oykkada iza ushshadus." 
Genesis24:19 Iza ushshidayssafe guye, «Ne gaamellatikka alana gakkanaas tani isttas haath duuqqana» gadus." 
Genesis24:20 Attida haaththe eeson haaththa gonggen tigada duuqqanaas haaththa ollay dizaso woxxadus; gaamellati wuri alana gakkanaas haaththaa ollafe duuqqa duuqqa ehada haaththa gonggen tigada ushshadus. 
Genesis24:21 Izi qoppidi yida qofaa GODAY injjesidaakko erana mala addezi co7u giidi izo xeellees. 
Genesis24:22 Gaamellati haath uyi simmiin addezi ichchash giraame bagga gidiza worqqa sagayotanne 100 giraame gidiza nam7u worqqa sagayota," 
Genesis24:23 kessidi izo, «Neni oona naa? Ane taas yoota; ne aawa soon nuus aqizasoy daanee?» gides."
