Genesis24:24 Iza, «Tani Milkay Naakoores yelida Baatu7eele naa." 
Genesis24:25 Nuson gidiza happaynne bassoy dees; qasse intteska aqizasoy dees» gadus. 
Genesis24:26 Addezi gulbatidi GODAAS goynnishe," 
Genesis24:27 «Ba kiyateththaanne ba tumaa ta godaappe haassontta ta godaa Abrahaame GODAA Xoossay galatetto! Tani yishin GODAA Xoossay tana ta godaa dabbotaso kaaleththides» gides. 
Genesis24:28 Naya woxxa baada, ba aayeyson diza asaas hanidayssa yootadus." 
Genesis24:29 Irbiqas Laaba geetettiza ishay dees; Laabay kare kezidi haaththa pultto achchan diza addezakko woxxides. 
Genesis24:30 Qalabatenne ba michchey kushen diza sagayota be7ida malanne Irbiqay addezi bana gidayssa yootiin siyida mala kezi biidi addezi gaamellatara pulttoza achchan eqqidayssa demmides. 
Genesis24:31 Iza, «Haysso GODAY nena anjjidaysso haa ya! Neni hayssan karen ays eqqadii? Tani nees keeththinne gaamellataska soo giigsadis» gides." 
Genesis24:32 Hessa gishshas addezi soo gelides; Laabay gaamellata caanaa birshidi happanne basso gaamellatas yeggides. Izassinne izara diza asatas toho haath ehides. 
Genesis24:33 Qumakka iza sinth aaththides; izi, «Tana ehida guddaa inttes yootontta dashe kath miikke» gides. Laabay, «Histtiko yoota» gides." 
Genesis24:34 Hessa gishshas izi, «Tani Abrahaame aylle." 
Genesis24:35 GODAY ta godaa Abrahaame keehi anjjiin izi duretides; dors, miiz, bira, worqqa, attuma aylleta, macca aylleta, gaamellatanne, hareta izas immides." 
Genesis24:36 Ta godaa machchiya Saaray ba cimateththa layththan izas attuma naa yeliin izi baas dizaaz ubbaa izas immides. 
Genesis24:37 Ta goday tana hayssaththo caaqisides; ‹Tani diza Kanaane biitta macca naytappe ta naazas machcho oychchofa; 
Genesis24:38 ta aawa asaakko ta zereththaako baada ta naazas machcho oychcha› gides. 
Genesis24:39 Tanikka ta godawu, ‹Naya tanara yaanaas dosontta ixxikochchii?› gadis." 
Genesis24:40 Izi, ‹GODAY tani iza sinththan suure hemettida Xoossi nenara ba kiitanchcha kiittana; neni ta nees ta aawa asaappe, ta zaretappe machcho demmana mala, ne biza oge ubbaa lo7eththana." 
Genesis24:41 Neni ta zaretakko biin istti nees izo immontta ixxiko he wode nees caaqoy gomettenna› gides. 
Genesis24:42 «Tani hach hayssa pulttozaakko yida wode GODAWU! Ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossoo! Ne shene gidikko tani biza qofaza injjesa. 
Genesis24:43 Be7a; tani ha pulttoza achchan eqqadis; geela7o issiniya haaththe duuqqanaas yiikko tani izo, ‹Tana ne otozappe guuththa haath ushsharkkii!› gaana." 
Genesis24:44 Histtiko iza tana, ‹Ero uya› qasse, ‹Ne gaamellataska tani haath duuqqana› gizaara Xoossi ta GODAY nees dooridaaro gidu." 
Genesis24:45 «Tani ta wozinan woossizayssa wursontta dishin Irbiqay ba oto hashen tookka ekkada puttu gadus; duge pulttaako wodhdhada haath duuqqadus; tani izo, ‹Tana haath ushsharkkii!› gadis." 
Genesis24:46 «Iza eeson ba hasheppe otoza woththada, ‹Hekko uya! Qasse tani ne gaamellata ushshana› gadus; tanikka uyadis; qasse ta gaamellatakka ushshadus." 
Genesis24:47 «Tani izo, ‹Neni oona naa?› ga oychchadis. «Iza, ‹Tani Milkay Naakoores yelida Baatu7eele naa› gadus. «Tanikka izi kushen qalabate aaththadis." 
Genesis24:48 Hessafe guye tani gulbatada GODAAS goynnadis; tani GODAA ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossa, ta godaa isha nayo iza nees ekkanaas tana likke oge kaaleththidayssa galatays." 
Genesis24:49 Ha7ikka intte ta godaas kiyana malanne ammanettanaa gidikko taas yootite; hessi hanenna giikkoka taas yootite; hessafe guye tani hananayssa ta erays» gides. 
Genesis24:50 Laabaynne Baatu7eeli, «Ha qofazi GODAAPPE yides; nuni nees gede haa gaanaas dandayokko." 
Genesis24:51 Irbiqa hanno beya; ekkada ba! GODAY gida mala ne godaa naazas machcho gidu» gida. 
Genesis24:52 Abrahaame aylley istti gizayssa siyida mala biittan gulbatidi Xoossas goynnides. 
Genesis24:53 Ashkarazi bira alleqonne worqqaa alleqo, may7oka kessidi Irbiqas immides; qasse al7o miishshata izi ishassinne izi aayeys immides." 
Genesis24:54 Hessafe guye izikka izara dizayti midanne uyida; histtidi heen aqida; istti maalado wonttara dendiin, «Tana ta godaakko moyzite» gides." 
Genesis24:55 Gido attiin izi ishaynne izi aaya, «Naya issi tammu gallassa mala nunara takku; hessafe guye iza baana» gida." 
Genesis24:56 Izi gidikko, «GODAY tani yidayssa injjesiin intte tana gam7isopite; tani ta godaakko baana mala tana moyzite» gides." 
Genesis24:57 Isttika, «Nayo xeygidi ane nu izo oychchoos» gida." 
Genesis24:58 Hessa gishshas Irbiqa xeygidi, «Ha addezara baanee?» gi oychchida. Izakka, «Ee; tani baana» gadus." 
Genesis24:59 Histtiin istti ba michcheyo Irbiqa izo dichchizaarira, Abrahaame ayllezaranne iza asatara moyzida." 
Genesis24:60 Istti Irbiqa, «Nu michcheye Irbiqaa! Coratta biitta kuma; ne zereththi ba morkketa katamata laattetto» gi anjjida." 
Genesis24:61 Hessafe guye Irbiqaynne izi garadeti dendidi gaamellata toggidi addezara bida; histtiin ayllezi Irbiqa ekkidi bides. 
Genesis24:62 He wode Yisaaqi, «Tana Be7iza De7o Xoossaa Pultto» giza pulttoza mata biidi, Negebe bazzon dees." 
Genesis24:63 Issi gallassa omars Yisaaqi ba wozinan qoppidi demba kezidi yuuyishe izi dhoqqu gi xeelliza wode gaamellati yizayta be7ides. 
Genesis24:64 Irbiqaykka dhoqqu histta xeellada Yisaaqa beyada gaamellaa bollafe wodhdhadus. 
Genesis24:65 Wodhdhada aylleza, «Nunara gaagganaas sekki dembara haa yiza addey oonee?» gadus. Ashkarazi, «Izi ta godaa deennee» gides; iza ba shaasheza ekkada gullunttadus." 
Genesis24:66 Qasse ayllezi ba ooththidayssa ubbaa Yisaaqas yootides. 
Genesis24:67 Yisaaqi Irbiqa ba aayey Saara dunkaanen efidi izo machcho ekkides; izakka izas machcho gidadus; histtiin izi izo siiqidessinne ba aayey hayqon kayottizayssafe minettides. 
Genesis25:1 Qasse Abrahaamey Keexura geetettiza hara machcho ekkides. 
Genesis25:2 Iza Zimiraane, Yoqishaane, Medaane, Midiyaane, Yishibaaqenne Shuha izas yeladus." 
Genesis25:3 Yoqishaaney Saabanne Dadaane yelides; Dadaaney Asooreta, Lexuusetanne Le7aameta yelides." 
Genesis25:4 Midiyaane nayti Eefa, Efere, Heenooke, Abida7enne Elda7e. Hayti wurikka Keexura nayta." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahaamey ba haaro ubbaa Yisaaqa laatissides. 
Genesis25:6 Gido attiin izi buro paxa dishe ba garadetappe yelida naytas baas dizayssafe woytides. Woytidi ba naa Yisaaqappe istta shaakkidi arshey mokkiza baggara diza dere yeddides. 
Genesis25:7 Abrahaamey mulera 175 layth de7ides. 
Genesis25:8 Abrahaamey daro wode de7idi lo7o cima cimmidi hayqqides. 
Genesis25:9 Iza nayti Yisaaqinne Isma7eeley iza Makipheele geetettiza gongolo duufon moogida; he gongolozi Mamire achchan Hiite Xoohaare naa Efroone gaden dees. 
Genesis25:10 Hessika Abrahaamey Hiitetappe shammida gade. Abrahaamey ba machchiya Saaray moogettidason moogettides. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahaamey hayqqidaappe guye Xoossi iza naa Yisaaqa anjjides. He wode Yisaaqi, «Tana Be7iza De7o Xoossaa Pultto» geetettiza pultto achchan dees." 
Genesis25:12 Saara aylleya Gibxeppe yida Aggaara Abrahaames yelida naaza Isma7eele yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. 
Genesis25:13 Isma7eele nayti ba sunththaninne ba yeleta maaran haytantta; heytanttika Nebayoote, Qeedaare, Adibi7eele, Mibisaame," 
Genesis25:14 Mishima7e, Duuma, Maase," 
Genesis25:15 Hadaade, Teema, Yixure, Nafishaanenne Qeedima." 
Genesis25:16 Isma7eele nayti haytantta; istta sunththi istta mooththaaninne dizason dizason hayssa; isttas 12 zarkke halaqati deettes. 
Genesis25:17 Isma7eeley mulera 137 layth de7idi hayqqides; hayqqidi ba aawatan gaaggides. 
Genesis25:18 Isma7eele zereththi Gibxeppe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Hawilappenne Shuurappe giddon Asoore efiza oge achchan de7ida. Istti ba ishata ubbatara morkketeththan de7ida. 
Genesis25:19 Abrahaame naa Yisaaqa yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelides. 
Genesis25:20 Yisaaqas layththay 40 gidida wode Irbiqa ekkides; iza Mesphexoomiyan diza Aaraame Baatu7eele nayonne Aaraame dere as Laaba michcho. 
Genesis25:21 Yisaaqi ba machchiya maynne gidida gishshas izis GODAA woossiin GODAY iza woosaa siyides; histtiin iza machchiya Irbiqaykka qanththatadus. 
Genesis25:22 Gido attiin izi ulo giddon diza nayti mentte gidida gishshas issoy issaara sugettida; histtiin iza, «Hayssi ta bolla ays hanizee?» gadus. Hessa gishshas Xoossaa oychchana biin," 
Genesis25:23 GODAY izis, «Ne ulon nam7u kawoteththi dees; qasse ne ulon diza nam7u dere asati issoy issaafe shaakettana; issi dere asay hankkoytappe minnana; qasse bayray kaalozas haarettana» gides." 
Genesis25:24 Izis yelo wodey gakkiin iza 2 attuma nayta mentte yeladus. 
Genesis25:25 Koyro yelettidayssi aarissa; iza bollayka wuri iske xalla; hessa gishshas istti iza Eesawe gi sunththida. 
Genesis25:26 Hessafe guye, iza ishay yelettishe Eesawe toho oykki yelettides; hessa gishshas iza Yaaqoobe gi sunththida. Irbiqay istta yelida wode, Yisaaqas layththay usuppun tammu layththi gidides." 
Genesis25:27 Nayti diccida; Eesawey shankka eriza bazzo as gidides; gido attiin Yaaqoobey dunkaanen diza ashke as gidides. 
Genesis25:28 Yisaaqi Eesawe siiqides; ays giikko izi shankkatidayssafe maanaas dosides; gido attiin Irbiqay Yaaqoobe siiqadus. 
Genesis25:29 Issi wode Yaaqoobey woxe kaththishin Eesawe gafay wodhishin, bazzofe yides." 
Genesis25:30 Eesawey Yaaqoobe, «Tana hayssa zo7o woxezappe miza; tana gafay wodhees» gides. (Hessa gishshas qasse iza sunththi Eedoome geetettides.)" 
Genesis25:31 Yaaqoobey iza, «Koyro taas ne bayrateththaa bayza» gides." 
Genesis25:32 Histtiin Eesawey, «Hekko! Ta hayqqana gays hanna ta bayrateththaya tana ay maaddanee?» gides." 
Genesis25:33 Yaaqoobey zaaridi, «Ane taas koyro neni caaqqa» gides; hizgiin izi caaqqides; ba bayrateththaaka Yaaqoobes bayzides." 
Genesis25:34 Hessafe simmiin Yaaqoobey Eesawes buddenanne misira woxe immiin izi midessinne uyides; hessafe guye dendidi bides; Eesawey ba bayrateththaa kadhides. 
Genesis26:1 He biittan kase Abrahaame woden diza koshaappe hara koshay dendides; histtiin Yisaaqi Filisxeeme kawo Abimelekkeko Geraare bides. 
Genesis26:2 GODAY Yisaaqas qonccidi, «Gibxe biitta duge booppa; tani nees yootiza biittan de7a." 
Genesis26:3 Ha biittan guuththa wode uttaashsha; tani nenara gidana; nena anjjana; ays giikko hayssa biittaa ubbaa tani neessinne ne zereththaas immana; tani ne aawa Abrahaames caaqo gelida ufayssa qaalaa minththana. 
Genesis26:4 Ne zereththaa tani salo xoolintte mala darsana; hayssa biitta ubbaa ta isttas immana; biitta asay ubbay ne zereththaa baggara anjjettana. 
Genesis26:5 Gaasoykka Abrahaamey ta qaalaa siyidi azazettides; ta izas yootidayssa izi ubbaa naagida gishshassa» gides. 
Genesis26:6 Hessa gishshas Yisaaqi Geraaren de7ides. 
Genesis26:7 He biitta asay Irbiqa gishshas denththidi Yisaaqa, «Hanna nees aazee?» gi oychchida. Izikka Irbiqay keeha mala lo7o gidida gishshas, «Tani iza ta machcho giikko ha asay izi geedon tana wodhanakkonne» gi babbida gishshas, «Hanna taas michcho» gides." 
Genesis26:8 Yisaaqi heen daro wode didaappe guye Filisxeeme kawo Abimelekkey maskootera duge xeellidi Yisaaqi ba machcho Irbiqara idimettishe kaa7ishin be7ides. 
Genesis26:9 Hessa gishshas Abimelekkey Yisaaqa xeygisidi, «Hekko iza nees machcho! Neni ays izo ta michcho gadii?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Iza ta machcho giikko izi gaason asay tana wodhana gaada babbida gishshas gadis» gides." 
Genesis26:10 Histtiin Abimelekkey, «Hayssi neni nu bolla ooththidayssi aazee? Ta asaappe issi asi ne machcheyra aqidaakko nu bolla gome ehashe aggadasa» gides." 
Genesis26:11 Hessa gishshas Abimelekkey ba asaa ubbaa, «Ha addeza woykko iza machcho bochchizay oonikka tumu hayqqo» gi azazides." 
Genesis26:12 Yisaaqi he biittan kath zeriin GODAY iza anjjida gishshas he layththan xeetu kushe shiishshides. 
Genesis26:13 Izas aqotay dari dari bida gishshas keehi duretides. 
Genesis26:14 Yisaaqas dorsi, miiza wudeynne aylleti keehi darida gishshas Filisxeeme asay iza miqqaynides." 
Genesis26:15 Hessa gishshas iza aawa Abrahaame woden iza aawaa aylleti bookkida haaththa olla ubbaa Filisxeeme asay biitta zaaridi kunththides. 
Genesis26:16 He wode Abimelekkey Yisaaqa, «Nuuppe shaakettada ba; neni nuuppe aadhdha minnadasa» gides." 
Genesis26:17 Hizgiin Yisaaqi heeppe dendidi Geraare shoobbaa biidi dunkaane tokkidi heen de7ides. 
Genesis26:18 Abrahaamey paxa dishe bookissida haaththa ollata Abrahaamey hayqqidaappe guye Filisxeeme asay tuccida haaththa ollata Yisaaqi qasseka bookkana mala ooththidi kase iza aaway sunththida sunththaan xeygides. 
Genesis26:19 Yisaaqa aylleti shoobban haaththa olla bookkishe bookkiza ollaafe pulttiza haath demmida. 
Genesis26:20 Gido attiin Geraaren mehe heemmizayti Yisaaqa mehe heemmizaytara, «Haaththay nuyssa» gi ooyettida. Istti izara palamettida gishshas Yisaaqi he haaththa ollaa, «Eseqe» gi sunththides." 
Genesis26:21 Hessafe guye istti hara haaththa ollaka bookkida; gido attiin istti he haaththa ollaa geedonkka ooyettida; hessa gishshas izi he haaththa ollaa, «Siixina» gi sunththides." 
Genesis26:22 Hessafe guuth haraso aadhdhi hara haaththa olla bookissides; iza gaason oonikka ooyettibeenna; «Xoossi ha7i nuus aassides; nuni ha biittan darana» giidi iza, «Oroboote» gi sunththides." 
Genesis26:23 Hessafe guye Yisaaqi pude Bersaabehe geetettizaso kezides. 
Genesis26:24 Hee bida gallas qammara GODAY izas qonccidi, «Tani ne aawa Abrahaame Xoossa; tani nenara diza gishshas babbofa! Tani nena anjjana; ta aylle Abrahaame gishshas ne zereththaa ta darsana» gides." 
Genesis26:25 Yisaaqi heen yarshizaso keexxidi GODAA sunth xeygides; heen izi ba dunkaaneza tokkides; qasse heen iza aylleti haaththa olla bookkida. 
Genesis26:26 Hessafe guye Abimelekkey bana zoriza Ahuzaatanne ba wottadarata halaqa Pikoole ekkidi Geraareppe Yisaaqakko yides. 
Genesis26:27 Yisaaqi isttas, «Intte kase tana ixxidi intte biittafe kessi yeddidi ha7i qasse taakko ay ekkana yidetii?» gides." 
Genesis26:28 Istti iza, «GODAY nenara dizayssa tumu nuni qonccen be7idos; hessa gishshas nuussinne nees giddon caaqo qaalay de7ana koshshees goos." 
Genesis26:29 Gido attiin nuni nees kiyateth xalla ooththidi nena saroteththan moyzidos; hessaththoka neni nu bolla iita miish ooththontta mala ane nenara caaqo caaqettoos; ha7i nena GODAY anjjidayssi qonccides» gida. 
Genesis26:30 He wode Yisaaqi isttas gibira giigsiin midanne uyida. 
Genesis26:31 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi istti issoy issaara caaqettida. Yisaaqi istta moyziin istti izappe saron shaakettidi bida. 
Genesis26:32 He gallas Yisaaqa aylleti yiidi ba bookkida haaththa ollaa gishshas, «Nuni haath demmidos» gi izas yootida." 
Genesis26:33 Izi he haaththa ollaa, «Saabehe» gi sunththides; hessa gishshas he katamaa sunththi hach gakkanaas Bersaabehe geetettees." 
Genesis26:34 Eesawe layththi 40 gidida wode Bi7eere naa Yooditonne Eeloone naa Baasemaato machcho ekkides; istti nam7ayka Hiite biitta asa. 
Genesis26:35 Isttika Yisaaqanne Irbiqa mishisishe de7ida. 
Genesis27:1 Yisaaqi cimmiin iza ayfey xeelo ixxida wode baas bayra naaza Eesawe xeygidi iza, «Ta naazoo!» gides. Histtiin izi, «Yee!» gi koyides." 
Genesis27:2 Izikka, «Beya! Ha7i tani cimadis; tani ayde hayqqanaakkonne ta hayqqana gallas erikke." 
Genesis27:3 Hessa gishshas ha7i ne izara shankkatiza toora ekkada bazzo baada do7a shankkatada taas asho ekkada ya. 
Genesis27:4 Ta dosiza mal7o quma kaththada taas aaththa; hessika tani hayqqanaappe kase nena anjjanaassa» gides. 
Genesis27:5 Irbiqay Yisaaqi ba naa Eesawes yootizayssa he wode siyadus; Eesawey do7a shankkatidi ehanaas bazzo biin," 
Genesis27:6 Irbiqay ba naaza Yaaqoobe, «Ne aaway ne ishaa Eesawe," 
Genesis27:7 ‹Do7a shankkata ehada ta maana mala taas mal7o quma kaththa; histtiko ta hayqqontta dashe GODAA sinththan nena anjjana› gishin tani siyadis. 
Genesis27:8 Ta naazoo! Ha7i tani nena azazizayssa lo7eththada siya. 
Genesis27:9 Wudeza gars baada nam7u anqara deysha laaqqata taas ekkada ya; ne ehikko tani ne aawaas mal7o quma izi dosiza mala kaththana. 
Genesis27:10 Ne aaway miidi hayqqontta dishe miidi nena anjjana mala ehada miza» gadus. 
Genesis27:11 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey ba aayo Irbiqas, «Ta isha Eesawe bollan iskey dees; gido attiin ta bollay liiqo." 
Genesis27:12 Ta aaway tana oykki beykkochii? Tani iza cimmizaa izas misatikko tani anjjo aggada qanggeththa ta bolla ehanaakko» gides. 
Genesis27:13 Iza aayeya iza, «Ta naazoo! He qanggeththay tana gakko. Tani nees yootizayssa ne ooththa; baada deysha laaqqata taas ekka ya» gadus." 
Genesis27:14 Izi ehidi ba aayeys immiin aayeya mal7o quma iza aaway dosida mala mal7eththa kaththadus. 
Genesis27:15 Hessafe guye Irbiqay soon ba achchan diza ba bayra naa Eesawe lo7o may7o ehada kaalo naaza Yaaqoobe mayzadus. 
Genesis27:16 Qasse he deyshata ite iza kusheninne iza qoodhen mayzadus. 
Genesis27:17 Histtada ba kaththida mal7o qumaanne ukeththaa ba naa Yaaqoobe kushen woththadus. 
Genesis27:18 Histtiin izi ba aawaakko bi gelidi, «Ta aawawu!» gides. Izikka, «Yee! Ta naazoo! Neni oonee?» gides." 
Genesis27:19 Yaaqoobey ba aawaas, «Tani ne bayra naa Eesawe; neni tana azazida mala tani ooththadis; suurada, tani shankkata ehidayssa ma; histtada tana anjja» gides." 
Genesis27:20 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe, «Ta naazoo! Wostta eeson demmadii?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «GODAY ne Xoossi tana maaddiina» gides." 
Genesis27:21 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe, «Ta naazoo! Neni tumu ta naa Eesawekkonne tani nena oykka be7anaas ane taakko haa shiiqa» gides." 
Genesis27:22 Yaaqoobey ba aawa Yisaaqakko shiiqiin oykki be7idi, «Hayssi qaalay Yaaqoobe qaala shin kushey Eesawe kushe» gides." 
Genesis27:23 Iza kushey iza ishaa Eesawe kusheththo iskera diza gishshas erontta iza anjjides. 
Genesis27:24 Iza, «Tumu neni ta naa Eesawee?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Ee tanakko!» gides." 
Genesis27:25 Izikka, «Ta naazoo! Tani neni shankkatidayssa maanaas haa aaththa; maada tani nena anjjana» gides. Yaaqoobey aaththiin izi mides; woyne ushshaaka ehiin uyides." 
Genesis27:26 Hessafe guye iza aawa Yisaaqi, «Ta naazoo! Haa shiiqada tana yeera» gides." 
Genesis27:27 Yaaqoobey shiiqidi iza yeerides; Yisaaqi iza may7o singi siyidi, «Ta naaza peenoy GODAY anjjida goshsha mala sawees." 
Genesis27:28 Xoossi salo iranne sa7a anjjo, kaththinne ooraththa woyne ushshu palahissidi nees immo." 
Genesis27:29 Kawoteththati nees haarettetto; asi wuri nees gulbato; neni ne ishatas godaa gida; ne aayey zereththi nees gulbato; nena qanggizay qanggettidaaz gido; nena anjjizay anjjettidayssa gido» gides. 
Genesis27:30 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe anjji wursidaappe guye Yaaqoobey ba aawa Yisaaqa sinththafe kezida mala Eesawey shankkafe puttu gides. 
Genesis27:31 Izikka qasse mal7o qumaa kaththidi ba aawaas aaththides; aaththidi iza, «Ta aawawu! Suurada hayssa tani shankkatidayssafe ma; histtada tana anjja» gides." 
Genesis27:32 Histtiin aaway Yisaaqi iza, «Ne oonee?» gi oychchides. Izi, «Tani nees bayra naaza Eesawe» gides." 
Genesis27:33 Yisaaqi dagammidi kokkorishe, «Histtiin do7a shankkatidayssa ekkidi taas aaththiday oonee? Tani ha7i neni yaanaappe sinththe maada iza anjjadis; tumukka izi anjjettidayssa gidana» gides." 
Genesis27:34 Eesawey ba aawaa qaala siyida mala ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtadi daro camo yeeho yeekkidi ba aawaa, «Tana anjja; ta aawawu tanakka anjja!» gides." 
Genesis27:35 Gido attiin izi, «Ne ishay yiidi tana cimmidi ne anjjo ekkichchides» gides." 
Genesis27:36 Eesawey, «Iza eridi Yaaqoobe gi sunththides; izi tana cimmishin hayssi nam7anththo; izi ta bayrateththaa ekkides; qasse ha7ikka ta anjjo ekkides» gides; qasse zaaridi ba aawaa, «Neni taas anjjofe aykkoka ashshabeekkii?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis27:37 Yisaaqi Eesawes, «Tani iza ne bolla godatana mala, iza ishati izas ooththana mala, kaththinne woyne ushshi palahana mala anjjadis; histtiin ta naazoo ta nees ha7i ay ooththana dandayazinaa?» gides." 
Genesis27:38 Eesawey ba aawaa, «Ta aawawu nees dizay issi anjjo xallaa? Ta aawawu! Tanakka anjjarkkii!» gides. Hessafe guye Eesawey ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi yeekkides." 
Genesis27:39 Iza aawa Yisaaqi zaaridi, «Ne dizasoy ha sa7a dureteththaafe haakkana; salo iraykka nees bukkenna." 
Genesis27:40 Neni ne giththa mashshan aqana; neni ne ishaas haarettana; gido attiin neni izara eqettiko iza qambara ne morgefe diggana» gides. 
Genesis27:41 Aaway Yaaqoobe anjjida gishshas Eesawey Yaaqoobe keehi ixxides; izi ba wozinara, «Ta aaway hayqqana matides; izi hayqqida mala ta ishaa Yaaqoobe ta wodhana» gides." 
Genesis27:42 Giddotiin Irbiqay hayssa ba bayra naaza Eesawe qaala siyida gishshas ba kaalo naa Yaaqoobe xeygisa ehada, «Ne ishay Eesawey nena wodhidi halo kessanaas koyees." 
Genesis27:43 Ha7ikka ta naazoo, tani nees yootizayssa ooththa. Denda! Dendada Kaaraanen diza ta isha Laabakko baqata!" 
Genesis27:44 Histtada ne ishaa hanqoy dochchana gakkanaas imaththateththan izara daashsha. 
Genesis27:45 Ne ishay nees hanqettizayssa izi aggiza wodenne ne iza bolla ooththidayssa izi baliza wode tani kiittada nena heeppe ehisana; tani issi gallas inttefe nam7atappe mela attana mala koykke» gadus. 
Genesis27:46 Hessafe guye Irbiqay Yisaaqa, «Eesawey ekkida Hiiteta macca nayta geedon duussay tana iitees; qasse Yaaqoobeykka heyta mala Hiiteta macca naytappe machcho ekkiko tani hekko hayqqanaas koyays» gadus." 
Genesis28:1 Hessa gishshas Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe xeygidi, «Kanaane asaa macca naytappe nees machcho ekkofa." 
Genesis28:2 Dendada ne aayey aawa Baatu7eelekko, Mesphexoomiya biitta baada heeppe ne aayey isha Laaba macca naytappe issiniyo nees machcho ekka." 
Genesis28:3 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossi nena anjjo; izi nees daro nayta immo; nena daro deres aawa histto. 
Genesis28:4 Abrahaame anjjida mala nenanne ne zereth Xoossi anjjo; hayssa Abrahaamey immida biittanne nekka imaththateththan de7ida biittaa nees immo» azazides. 
Genesis28:5 Histtiin Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe yeddiin Yaaqoobey Mesphexoomiya biitta Laabakko bides. Laabay Yaaqoobenne Eesawe yelida Irbiqas ishanne Aaraame biitta as Baatu7eele naa. 
Genesis28:6 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe anjjidayssa heeppe machcho ekkanaas Mesphexoomiya biitta iza yeddidayssa qasseka izi Yaaqoobe anjjida wode, «Kanaane maccas ekkofa» gi azazidayssa siyides;" 
Genesis28:7 Yaaqoobeykka ba aawassinne ba aayeys azazettidi Mesphexoomiya biitta bidayssa Eesawey erides. 
Genesis28:8 Eesawey iza aawa Yisaaqay Kanaane macca nayta ay mala ixxizaakkonne hessan erides. 
Genesis28:9 Hessa gishshas Eesawey Abrahaame naa Isma7eelekko biidi iza nayo Mahilaato ba machchey bolla gujji ekkides. Izakka Nebayoote michcho. 
Genesis28:10 Yaaqoobey Bersaabeheppe Kaaraane baanaas dendides. 
Genesis28:11 Izi issi soo gakkishin arshey wulliin heen aqides; he soon diza shuchchatappe issi shuch ekki borkotidi heen dhiskides. 
Genesis28:12 Agumozan biittan eqqidi xeeray pude salo gakkiza yangare be7ides; yangareza bolla Xoossa kiitanchchati duge wodhdhishininne pude kezishin be7ides. 
Genesis28:13 Yangarezas bolla xeeran GODAY eqqidi iza, «Tani GODAA ne aawa Abrahaame Xoossa, Yisaaqa Xoossa. Ha ne ichchida biittaa ta neessinne ne zereththas immana." 
Genesis28:14 Ne zereththay biitta ace mala darana; isttika oyddu bagga gakkana; biitta bollan diza asi wuri ne baggaranne ne zereththa baggara anjjettana. 
Genesis28:15 Tani nenara days; neni bizaso ubbaan tani nena naagana; qasse tani nena ha biitta guye zaarada ehana; tani nees ooththana gidayssa ooththana; nenakka yeggike» gides. 
Genesis28:16 Yaaqoobey dhiskofe beeggidi, «Tani erabeekkefe attiin GODAY tumu hayssan dees» gides." 
Genesis28:17 Izi babbidi, «Hayssi ay mala babisizasoo! Hayssi Xoossa Keeththafe attiin haraso deenna; hayssi salo penge» gides." 
Genesis28:18 Yaaqoobey wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi ba borkotida shuchchaa ekkidi tuussa mala essidi Xoossas dummasanaas iza bolla zayte gussides. 
Genesis28:19 Yaaqoobey he sohoza Beetele gi sunththides; he katamaya hessafe kase Looza geetettawus. 
Genesis28:20 Yaaqoobey, «Ne tanara gidada ta biza ogen ne tana naagikko taas miza qumanne may7o ne immiko ta aawa soo saron ne tana zaarikko neni GODAY ta Xoossa gidana." 
Genesis28:21  
Genesis28:22 Tani tuussa mala essida ha shuchchay Xoossa keeth gidana; neni taas immiza ubbaafe tammaafe issi kushe tani nees immana» gi adinettides. 
Genesis29:1 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey dendi biidi arshey mokkiza baggara diza asata dere gakkides. 
Genesis29:2 Histtidi issi demban haaththa ollay dizayssa be7ides; heedzdzu cuga dorsi qasse he haaththa olla achchan ichchides; ays giikko wudey wuri haath uyizay he ollazappe; he haaththa ollaa doona tuchcha shuchchayka gita. 
Genesis29:3 Dorsa wudey wuri heen shiiqida wode wudeza heemmizayti haaththa olla doonappe he shuchchaa genderisidi dorsaa ushsheettes. Ushshidi he shuchchaa haaththa ollaan zaaridi tucceettes. 
Genesis29:4 Yaaqoobey isttas, «Haytoo! Intte awappe yidetii?» gi oychchides. Isttika, «Nuni Kaaraaneppe yidos» gi yootiin," 
Genesis29:5 izi, «Naakoores naaza naa Laaba ereetii?» gides. Isttika, «Ee, iza nu eroos» gida." 
Genesis29:6 Yaaqoobey isttas, «Izi lo7o dizee?» gi oychchiin, «Ee, lo7okko; iza naa Eraheelo dors ekka yizaaro hanno beya» gida." 
Genesis29:7 Histtiin Yaaqoobey isttas, «Be7ite! Arshey ha7i dhoqqan dees; mehe soo shiishshiza wodey buro gakkibeenna; dorsata haath ushshidi efi heemmiishshite» gides." 
Genesis29:8 Gido attiin isttas, «Mehey wuri shiiqana gakkanaas, shuchchaa haaththa ollaza doonappe genderisana gakkanaas nuni ushshanaas dandayokko; hessafe guye nuni mehaa ushshana» gida." 
Genesis29:9 Izi buro haasayan dishin dorsata heemmizay izo gidida gishshas Laaba naya Eraheela ba aawaa dorsata laagga ekkada gakka wodhadus. 
Genesis29:10 Yaaqoobey ba aayey isha Laaba naa Eraheeli dorsata be7ida wode biidi ollaa doonappe shuchchaa genderisidi ba aayey ishaa dorsata haath ushshides. 
Genesis29:11 Yaaqoobey Eraheelo yeeridi ufayssafe dendidayssan ba qaala dhoqqisidi yeekkides. 
Genesis29:12 Yaaqoobey izis aawa dabbonne Irbiqa naa gididayssa Eraheelis yootiin iza woxxa baada ba aawaas yootadus. 
Genesis29:13 Laabay ba michchey naa Yaaqoobe wore siyida mala izara gaagganaas woxxides; woxxi gakkidi iza idimmi yeeri ekkidi ba soo efides; heen Yaaqoobey ba hanidayssa ubbaa Laabas yootides. 
Genesis29:14 Laabay iza, «Neni tumu ta ashonne ta suuththa» gides. Yaaqoobey izara issi agina kumeth uttides." 
Genesis29:15 Hessafe guye Laabay iza, «Neni taas dabbo gidida gishshas taas coo mela ooththanee? Ane nees ay qanxxanaas bessizaakko taas yoota» gides." 
Genesis29:16 Laabas nam7u macca nayti deettes; bayray sunththi Liya, kaaloya Eraheelo." 
Genesis29:17 Liya ayfey shola; Eraheeli ayfey gidikko lo7o. 
Genesis29:18 Yaaqoobey Eraheelo siiqida gishshas, «Tani nees kaalo nayo Eraheeli gishshas nees laappun layth ooththana» gides." 
Genesis29:19 Laabay, «Izo hara asas immanaappe nees immizayssi lo7o; neni tanara hayssan deya» gides." 
Genesis29:20 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey Eraheelo ekkanaas laappun layth ooththides; gido attiin izi izo siiqiza gishshas izas wodezi keehi qaanth misatides. 
Genesis29:21 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Laaba, «Ta machcho taas imma; ta wodey wurides; tani izo ekkana koyays» gides." 
Genesis29:22 Hessa gishshas Laabay heen diza ubba asaa xeygi shiishshidi, bullachcha kessides." 
Genesis29:23 Gido attiin gadey qammiin izi ba naa Liya efidi Yaaqoobes immides; Yaaqoobeykka izo ekkides. 
Genesis29:24 Qasse Laabay ba aylleyo Zilfo ba naa Liyas aylle gidana mala immides. 
Genesis29:25 Gadey wontiin xeelliza wode hekko Liya gidadus! Histtiin Yaaqoobey Laaba, «Hayssi neni ta bolla ooththidayssi aazee? Tani nees ooththiday Eraheeli gishshas deennee? Tana ays cimmadii?» gides." 
Genesis29:26 Laabay iza, «Nu biittan bayraya dishin kaaloyo azinaas immizayssi woga deenna." 
Genesis29:27 He mishirateththa saamintta ubbaa wursa; qasse kaalotizaarokka nuni nees immana; hessafe guye hara laappun layth taas ooththaasa» gides. 
Genesis29:28 Yaaqoobey hessaththo hanidi he saaminttaa wursides; hessafe guye Laabay ba nayo Eraheelo izas immides. 
Genesis29:29 Qasse Laabay ba aylleyo Biliha ba naa Eraheelis aylle gidana mala immides. 
Genesis29:30 Yaaqoobey Eraheelokka ekkides; Eraheelo Liyappe aaththi siiqides; hara laappun layth Laabas ooththides. 
Genesis29:31 Yaaqoobey Liya Eraheeli mala siiqonttayssa be7idi GODAY izis yeliza uloza doydes; gido attiin Eraheelis nay baa. 
Genesis29:32 Liyay shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza sunththaaka Oroobeele ga sunththadus; ays giikko iza, «GODAY ta meto be7ides; ha7i tumu tana ta azinay siiqana» gadus." 
Genesis29:33 Iza qasseka shaarada ha7ikka attuma naa yeladus; iza, «GODAY tani dosettonttayssa be7ida gishshas taas hayssaka gujjides» gaada iza Simoona ga sunththadus." 
Genesis29:34 Iza qasseka shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza, «Tani izas heedzdzu attuma nayta yelida gishshas ta azinay ba wozina taakko zaarana» gaada iza Lewe ga sunththadus." 
Genesis29:35 Iza qasseka qanththatada attuma naa yelada iza, «Hi7a tani GODAA galatana» gadus; hessa gishshas iza Yuhuda ga sunththadus; hessafe guye yelo essadus." 
Genesis30:1 Eraheela Yaaqoobes nay izippe yelettonttayssa erada ba michchey bolla qanaatadus; hessa gishshas iza Yaaqoobe, «Taas naa imma; ixxis giikko ta hayqqana» gadus." 
Genesis30:2 Yaaqoobey Eraheeli bolla hanqettidi, «Tana nees yelo digganaas Xoossa gadii?» gides." 
Genesis30:3 Izakka, «Ta aylleyo Biliha hinno be7a; iza ta gishshas yelana mala neni izo ekka; histtiko izi baggara tanikka naa aayo gidana» gadus." 
Genesis30:4 Eraheela ba aylleyo Biliha machcho histti ekkana mala izas immiin Yaaqoobey izo ekkides. 
Genesis30:5 Biliha shaarada attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus. 
Genesis30:6 Histtiin Eraheela, «Xoossi taas pirdides; ta woosaakka siyidi taas attuma naa immides» gadus; hessa gishshas yelettida naaza, «Daane» ga sunththadus." 
Genesis30:7 Eraheeli aylleya Biliha qasseka shaarada Yaaqoobes nam7anththo attuma naa yeladus. 
Genesis30:8 Eraheelakka, «Tani ta michcheyra wolqqama baaxe baaxetada xoonadis» gashe naaza Niftaaleme ga sunththadus." 
Genesis30:9 Liyay baas yeloy eqqidayssa beyada ba aylleyo Zilfo efada Yaaqoobes machcho histta immadus. 
Genesis30:10 Liya aylle Zilfa Yaaqoobes attuma naa yeladus. 
Genesis30:11 Liyaykka, «Hayssi ay mala lo7o qaadaa!» gashe naaza Gaade gaada sunththadus." 
Genesis30:12 Liya aylleya Zilfay Yaaqoobes nam7anththo attuma naa yeladus. 
Genesis30:13 Liyaykka, «Tani keeha ufayettadis! Maccassayka tana ufayettizaaro gaana» gadus; hessa gishshas iza naaza Aaseere ga sunththadus." 
Genesis30:14 Gistte maxa aginan Oroobeeley gade giddo biidi inkoye teera demmidi ba aayo Liyas ehides; Eraheela Liya, «Ne nay ehida inkoyezappe ane taas imma» gadus." 
Genesis30:15 Gido attiin, «Ne ta azinaza taappe woththa ekkidayssi gidontta ixxiin qasse ta naaza inkoyeza ekkanee?» gadus. Eraheelakka, «Histtiko ne naaza inkoyeza gishshas Yaaqoobey hachcha qamma nenara aqo» gadus." 
Genesis30:16 He gallassa omars Yaaqoobey oososoppe simmishin Liyay iza mokkanaas kezada, «Neni tanara aqana koshshees; ays giikko tani ta naa inkoyezan nena kiras ekkaychchadis» giin izi he gallassa omars izira aqides." 
Genesis30:17 Xoossi Liya woosa siyides; hessa gishshas iza qanththatada ichchashanththo attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus. 
Genesis30:18 Liyaykka, «Tani ta aylleyo ta azinaas immida gishshas Xoossi hessa kira taas qanxxides» gashe naaza Yisakoore gaada sunththadus." 
Genesis30:19 Liyay qasseka shaarada usuppunththa attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus. 
Genesis30:20 Liyay, «Xoossi taas al7o imota immides; tani ta azinaas usuppun nayta yelida gishshas ha7i izi tana bonchchana» gadus. Hessa gishshas iza naaza Zaabiloone ga sunththadus." 
Genesis30:21 Hessafe guye issi macca naa yelada izo Diina ga sunththadus. 
Genesis30:22 Xoossi Eraheelo qoppides; izi woosaakka siyidi izis yeliza ulo doydes. 
Genesis30:23 Izakka shaarada attuma naa yeladus; «Xoossi ta yeella taappe denththides; 
Genesis30:24 GODAY taas hara attuma naakka gujjerennee!» gashe naaza Yooseefe ga sunththadus. 
Genesis30:25 Eraheela Yooseefe yelidaappe guye Yaaqoobey Laaba, «Tani ta aawa biitta simmana mala tana moyza." 
Genesis30:26 Tani istta gishshas nees ooththida ta machchetanne ta nayta taas imma; tani baana; ays giikko tani nees ay mala ooththidaakko ne eraasa» gides. 
Genesis30:27 Qasse Laabay izas, «Tani nees issi miish yootays; GODAY ne geedon tana anjjidayssa ta beyadis." 
Genesis30:28 Ne ekkana damoza taas yoota; tani nees iza qanxxana» gides. 
Genesis30:29 Yaaqoobey, «Tani nees wostta ooththidaakko ne meheykka waani yelettidaakko neni eraasa." 
Genesis30:30 Tani yaanaappe kase nees diza guuththay ha7i keehi darides; ta aadhdhida ubbason GODAY nena anjjides; gido attiin ha7i tani taso asaas ayde ooththoo?» gides. 
Genesis30:31 Laabay, «Tani nees ay immoo?» gi iza oychchiin, Yaaqoobey, «Taas aykkoka immofa; gido attiin neni taas issi miish ooththiko tani ne wudeza qasseka heemmananne naagana." 
Genesis30:32 Tani hach ne mehe ubbaa giddora aadhdhana; heen ne dorsaafe masara woykko puncara ubbaa, dorsa laaqqa kareththata ubbaa, deyshafe puncaranne masara gididayta ubbaa ta shaakkana; heytantti ta damoza gidetto." 
Genesis30:33 Hessa gishshas ta xilloteththi neni taas qanxxida damozaa taybanaas sinththafe ne yiza wode erettana; ta deyshaafe xalaqa gidonttay woykko kareth gidontta issi laaqqay ta achchan beettiko kaysotida mala qoodetto» gides. 
Genesis30:34 Laabay, «Ne gida mala gido» gides." 
Genesis30:35 He gallassika Laabay xalaqa gidida orgeta ubbaa, xalaqa gidida macca deyshetanne kareththa dorsa laaqqata ubbaa kessidi heemmana mala ba attuma naytas immides." 
Genesis30:36 Histtidi he mehezara heedzdzu gallassa oge Yaaqoobeppe haakki bides; gido attiin Yaaqoobey attida Laaba meheta heenth gelides. 
Genesis30:37 Yaaqoobey miththafe qaye guufe kessidi baggaa poqqidi baggaa poqqontta aggidi guufeza baggaa kareth, baggaa booth histtidi warardes." 
Genesis30:38 Mehey haaththe uyana yiza ubba wode meheti haath uyiza gongge giddon guufeta woththides; meheteth kezida meheti haath uyanaas yiza wode," 
Genesis30:39 he guufeta sinththan mehettida; isttika masara, xalaqanne battaka laaqqata yelida." 
Genesis30:40 Yaaqoobey laaqqata mehetappe shaakkidi dumma woththides; attida meheta masaranne xalaqa gididayta Laaba mehe sinth zaarides; hessaththo Yaaqoobey ba mehe Laaba mehera walakettontta mala dumma shaakki woththides. 
Genesis30:41 Gooba mino macca dorsatinne deyshati meheteth keziza wode ayde gidiinkka istti he guufeta achchan mehettana mala Yaaqoobey he guufeta haaththa gongge giddon meheta sinththan woththides. 
Genesis30:42 Guufeza laafa meheta sinththan woththenna; hessa gishshas laafa laafa meheti Laabas gidiin goobizayti Yaaqoobes gidida. 
Genesis30:43 Hessaththo hanidi Yaaqoobey keehi duretidi, daro mehe wude, macca aylletanne attuma aylleta, daro gaamellatanne hareta haarides." 
Genesis31:1 Laaba attuma nayti ba giddon, «Yaaqoobey nu aawa haaro ubbaa ekkides; hayssi ubbay izi shiishshida aqotay nu aawappe beettidaaza» gi haasayshin Yaaqoobey siyides." 
Genesis31:2 Yaaqoobey Laaba ayfesoy izas kase mala gidonttayssa be7ides. 
Genesis31:3 He wode GODAY Yaaqoobe, «Neni ne aawata biitta ne dabbotakko guye simma; tani nenara gidana» gides." 
Genesis31:4 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey Eraheelonne Liya ba mehey dizaso yaana mala kiittidi xeygisides. 
Genesis31:5 Izi isttas, «Intte aawa ayfesoy taas kaseyssa mala gidonttayssa tani be7adis; gido attiin ta aawa Xoossi tanara dees." 
Genesis31:6 Tani ta kumeththa wolqqafe intte aawaas ooththidayssa intte ereeta. 
Genesis31:7 Gido attiin intte aaway tana cimmidi ta damoza tammuto laammi laammi yeggides; gidikkoka izi tana qohontta mala Xoossi iza diggides. 
Genesis31:8 Izi, ‹Masara dorsatinne deyshati ne damoza gidana› giin wude meheti wuri masara xalla yelida; qasse izi, ‹Xalaqa dorsatinne deyshatikka ne damoza gidana› giin mehey wuri xalaqa yelides." 
Genesis31:9 Xoossi hayssaththo intte aawappe woththi ekkidi intte aawa mehe taas immides. 
Genesis31:10 «Meheti meheteth keziza aginan agumora meheta mehessiza deysha orgeti masara, xalaqanne battaka gididayssa beyadis." 
Genesis31:11 Xoossa kiitanchchay agumon tana, ‹Yaaqoobee!› gi xeygiin tani, ‹Yee!› gaada koyadis." 
Genesis31:12 Izikka tana, ‹Dhoqqu gaada meheta mehetissiza deysha orgeti wuri masaranne xalaqa gididayssa beya; gaasoykka Laabay ne bolla ooththizayssa ubbaa ta beyadis." 
Genesis31:13 Neni shuch essada zayte iza bolla tigada adinida Beetele Xoossi tana; ha7i dendada ha biittafe kezada elelada guye ne yelettida biitta simma› » gides. 
Genesis31:14 Hessafe guye Eraheelanne Liyay izas, «Nu aawayssafe nuna gakkanay aazee?" 
Genesis31:15 Izi nuna allaga mala xeellees deennee? Izi nuna bayzi ekkides; bayzidi ekkida mishakka baas mi dhayssides. 
Genesis31:16 Xoossi nu aawappe woththi ekkidi nees immida mehey wuri tumukka nuussanne nu naytayssa; hessa gishshas Xoossi nees yootidayssa ubbaa ooththa» gida. 
Genesis31:17 Histtiin Yaaqoobey Kanaane biittan diza ba aawa Yisaaqakko baanaas dendides; izi ba naytanne ba machcheta gaamella togisides; baas diza mehe ubbaa sinththe aaththi laaggidi Mesphexoomiyan dishe izi shiishshida haaro ubbaa ekki bides. 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Laabay ba dorsata iskeza qanxxanaas bichchidaashe Eraheela ba aawa eeqa misleta kaysadus. 
Genesis31:20 Yaaqoobeykka ba baqatizayssa Aaraame dere asi gidida Laabas yootontta baleththi bides. 
Genesis31:21 Izi baas dizaaz ubbaa shiishshi ekki baqatidi Efiraaxise Shaafaa pinnidi Gala7aade geetettiza gezze biitta bides. 
Genesis31:22 Yaaqoobey baqati bidayssa Laabay heedzdzanththo gallas siyides. 
Genesis31:23 Ba dabbota banara ekkidi laappun gallassa oge Yaaqoobe guye kaallidi kaallidi Gala7aade geetettiza gezze biittan iza gakki oykkides. 
Genesis31:24 He gallassa omars Xoossi Aaraame Laabakko agumora yiidi, «Neni Yaaqoobe bolla iita gidiin kiya gidiinkka haasayontta mala naageeta!» gides." 
Genesis31:25 Laabay gakkiza wode Yaaqoobey Gala7aade gezzen dunkaani uttides; qasse Laabaynne iza dabboti heen dunkaane tokkida. 
Genesis31:26 Hessafe guye Laabay Yaaqoobe, «Neni hayssaththo ays ooththadii? Neni tana cimmada ta macca nayta olan di7ettida mala laaggada kessadasa." 
Genesis31:27 Neni ays qotan taappe kessa ekkada tana cimmadii? Tani karabeninne diiththan ufayssa yeththan nena moyzana mala taas ays yootabeekkii? 
Genesis31:28 Neni haray atto ta nayta naytanne ta macca nayta tani yeera ekkontta mala diggadasa; neni balla ooso ooththadasa. 
Genesis31:29 Tani nena qohanaas taas wolqqay dees; gido attiin ne aawa Xoossi qamma omars tana, ‹Yaaqoobe bolla iita gidiin kiya gidiinkka issi miish ne haasayontta mala naagetta!› giidi taas yootides." 
Genesis31:30 Ha7i gidikkoka neni ne aawa soo baanaas keeha laamotida gishshas ke7adasa; gido attiin taso eeqa misleta aazas kaysadii?» gides. 
Genesis31:31 Yaaqoobey Laaba, «Neni ne nayta taappe wolqqan woththa ekkanaakko gaada babbida gishshas hayssaththo ooththadis." 
Genesis31:32 Gido attiin ne misleta oykkida as oonakka neni demmiko he uray hayqqo! Nees gidida miishshi ta achchan beettiko nu dabboti beyishin koyada demmiko nees ekka» gides; gaasoykka Yaaqoobey Eraheela eeqa misleta kaysidayssa eribeenna. 
Genesis31:33 Hessa gishshas Laabay Yaaqoobe dunkaane giddo, Liya dunkaane giddonne nam7u aylleta dunkaane giddo gelides; gido attiin aykkoka demmibeenna; Liya dunkaanaappe kezidi Eraheeli dunkaane giddo gelides." 
Genesis31:34 Eraheela ba aawa eeqa misleta ekkada gaamella koora garsan qottada, iza bolla uttadus. Laabay dunkaanan dizayssa ubbaa pilggidi koyides; gido attiin aykkoka demmibeenna." 
Genesis31:35 Eraheela ba aawa, «Ta aawawu! Tana hanqettofa; tani nees eqqana dandaykke; taas maccassa wogay yides» gadus. Izi ubbason koyides; gido attiin eeqa misleta demmibeenna." 
Genesis31:36 Yaaqoobey Laaba bolla hanqettidi, «Tani ay mooradinaa? Hessa sire ne tana kaallanaas tani ooththida nagaray aazee?" 
Genesis31:37 Ha7i neni ta miishshaa ubbaa pilggada koyadasashin ay demmadii? Istti neeppenne taappe ooni wordoko pirdana mala ha yo7oza ta dabbota sinththaninne ne dabbota sinththan woththa. 
Genesis31:38 «Tani nenara nam7u tammu layth kumeth de7adis; ne dorsinne deysha gidiin awucaybeenna; woykko ne meheppe galth mabeekke. 
Genesis31:39 Do7ay wodhidayssaka ubbaa ta bolla qoodadis attiin nees ehabeekke; gallas gidiin omars kaysoy ekkidayssa tana qanxxisadasa. 
Genesis31:40 Gallas awa seelay, omars kenchchoy tana qohides; dhiskoyka ta ayfeppe dhaydes." 
Genesis31:41 Tani hayssaththo ne soon nam7u tammu layth de7adis; ne macca naa nam7ata gishshas 14 layth, attida usuppun layth ne immida meheta gishshas nees ooththashe de7adis; gido attiin neni ta damoza tammuto laamma laamma yeggadasa." 
Genesis31:42 Ta aawati Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi goynnida Xoossi tanara gidonttaakko ne tana mela kushe kessa yeddanakoshin Xoossi ta waayenne ta daabura be7idi qamma omars nena hanqides» gides. 
Genesis31:43 Laabay Yaaqoobe, «Ne machcheti ta macca nayta; istti yelida naytikka ta nayta; mehezikka ta mehe; nees dizaazi wurikka tayssa; hach ha macca nayta tayta bollanne istti yelida nayta bolla ay ooththanaas dandayazinaa?" 
Genesis31:44 Ane ha7i haa ya; neninne tani caaqettoos; hayssi neeppenne taappe giddon markka gido» gides. 
Genesis31:45 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey issi shuch ekkidi tuussa mala essides. 
Genesis31:46 Izi ba dabbotakka, «Shuch shiishshite» gides; histtiin istti shuch shiishshidi korida; he shuchcha koraa achchanka kath mida." 
Genesis31:47 Laabay he shuchcha koraa, Yigaar-Sahaaduta gi sunththides; qasse Yaaqoobey iza Gal7eede gi sunththides." 
Genesis31:48 Laabay, «Ha keelay neeppenne taappe giddon hach markka» gides; hessa gishshas iza sunththay Gal7eede geetettides." 
Genesis31:49 Qasse izi he shuchcha tuussaa Mixiphpha gi sunththides; ays giikko Laabay, «Nuni issay issaafe haakkidi diza wode GODAY ne giddoninne ta giddon gididi naago." 
Genesis31:50 Neni ta macca nayta qohiko, woykko neni ta macca nayta bolla hara maccassata ekkiko nunara ha7i oonikka baynda aggikokka ne giddoninne ta giddon Xoossay markka gididayssa era» gides." 
Genesis31:51 Laabay qasseka Yaaqoobes, «Keelettida shuchchaa hayssa beya; qasse tani neeppenne taappe giddon essida shuchcha tuussa hayssa beya." 
Genesis31:52 Tani ne bolla gene ooththanaas ha keelappe neekko kanththontta mala nenikka ta bolla gene ooththanaas ha keelappenne ha shuchchaa tuussaafe kanththontta mala ha shuchcha koraynne ha shuchcha tuussay markka. 
Genesis31:53 Abrahaame Xoossi, Naakoore Xoossi, istta aawa Xoossi, izi nu giddon pirdo» gides. Yaaqoobey ba aawa Yisaaqi goynnida Xoossa sunththan caaqqides." 
Genesis31:54 Yaaqoobey zumaa bollan yarsho yarshides; ba dabbotakka quma maanaas xeygides; istti miidi heen zuma bollan aqida. 
Genesis31:55 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara Laabay dendidi ba nayta naytanne ba macca nayta anjjidinne yeeri ekkidi guye ba soo simmides. 
Genesis32:1 Yaaqoobey dendidi sinththe bishin Xoossa kiitanchchati izara gaaggida. 
Genesis32:2 Yaaqoobey istta be7idi, «Hayssi Xoossi aqizaso» gishe he sohoza Mahanayme gi sunththides." 
Genesis32:3 Yaaqoobey Seyre geetettizason Eedoome biittan diza ba isha Eesawekko baappe sinththe kiita yeddides. 
Genesis32:4 Izi istta bolla kiita, «Intte ta godaa Eesawes gaana miishshi hayssa; ‹Ne aylle Yaaqoobey, tani Laaba achchan hanno gakkanaas gam7adis." 
Genesis32:5 Taas miizi, harey, dorsi, deyshi, adde aylletinne macca aylleti deettes; ha7i tani ha kiitaa ta godaas kiittizay taas lo7o qoppana mala ga kiittadis› gides» gi kiittides." 
Genesis32:6 Kiitettidayti Yaaqoobekko simmidi izas, «Nuni ne isha Eesawekko bidos; ha7i izi qasse nenara gaagganaas yees; izarakka 400 asi dees» gida." 
Genesis32:7 Yaaqoobey babbidi shoobbides; banara diza asaa 2 cugan cugan shaakkidi ba dorsaa, deyshaa, miizaanne gaamellaa 2 cugan cugan shaakkides." 
Genesis32:8 Izi, «Eesawey yiidi issi cuga oli ekkizaa gidikko attida cugay kessi ekkanaakko» gi qoppides." 
Genesis32:9 He wode Yaaqoobey, «Abeet Xoossawu! Ta aawa Abrahaame Xoossawu, ta aawa Yisaaqa Xoossawu, tana, ‹Ne dabbotakko ne dere simma; tani nees lo7o ooththana› gidaso," 
Genesis32:10 neni ne ayllezas ooththida kiyateththaassinne ammaneteththaas ubbaas tani bessontta asa. Tani haa Yordaanoose shaafa pinniza wode taas issi guufeyppe attiin kushen haray deenna; gido attiin ha7i tani nam7u cuga dere gidadis. 
Genesis32:11 Ta nena woossays; ta ishaa Eesawe kusheppe tana ashsha; gaasoykka izi yiidi tananne ta nayta aayeta istta naytara dhayssanaakko gaada babbadis. 
Genesis32:12 Gido attiin neni tana, ‹Tani nees tumu lo7o ooththana; tani ne zereththay taybettanaas dandayettontta abba shaamintta mala ooththana› gidayssa qoppa» gi woossides." 
Genesis32:13 He gallassa omars izi heen aqiday baas diza ubbaafe ba isha Eesawes immanaassa. 
Genesis32:14 Izikka 200 macca deyshatanne nam7u tammu deysha orgeta, 200 macca dorsatanne 200 dharshota, 300 dhanththiza gaamellatanne istta maratara, 40 miizata, 10 korma boorata, 20 macca haretanne 10 wodalla hareta qori kessides." 
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Heyta istti wuden wuden shaakki shaakki ba aylleta kushen woththidi aylletas, «Taappe sinththati biite; wudeza issaa issaafe haassi haassi laaggite» gides." 
Genesis32:17 Ubbaafe sinththan bizayssa, «Ta isha Eesawey nenara gaaggidi nena, ‹Ne oonee? Awa bay? Ne sinththan diza mehey wuri oonassee?› gi oychchizaa gidikko," 
Genesis32:18 ‹Neni izas hayti ne aylle Yaaqoobessa; izi hayta yeddidaykka ta godaa Eesawes immanaassa; qasse izikka nuuppe guyera yees› ga» gi azazides. 
Genesis32:19 Qasseka nam7anththonne heedzdzanththo cugatassinne wudeza kaalliza hara ubbatas hayssaththo, «Intte Eesawera gaaggiza wode hayssaththoka geeta;" 
Genesis32:20 ‹Ne aylle Yaaqoobey nuuppe guyera yees› gontta aggofte» gides; izi hessaththo giday, «Tani taappe sinththe immanaas kiittidayssan iza hanqo doshisana; hessafe guye tani izara gaaggiza wode izi tana mokki ekkanaakko oonee erizay» gi qoppides." 
Genesis32:21 Hessa gishshas ba immizayssa baappe sinththasi yeddides; gido attiin izi ba hu7es he gallassa omars heen ba dizason aqides. 
Genesis32:22 He gallassa omars Yaaqoobey dendidi, ba nam7u machcheta, ba nam7u aylleta ba nayta tammanne issineta ekkidi Yaabooqe geetettiza shaafa gakkides; izi isttanne baas dizayta ubbaa pinththi yeddides;" 
Genesis32:23  
Genesis32:24 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey barkka heen attides. He wode issi asi gadey wonttana gakkanaas izara baaxetides. 
Genesis32:25 He addezi iza xoonanaas dandayettonttayssa be7idi Yaaqoobes wodira bochchiin iza wodiray doccides. 
Genesis32:26 Histtiin he addezi iza, «Gadey wonttana gees tana yedda» gides. Gido attiin Yaaqoobey iza, «Ne tana anjjontta yeddike» gides." 
Genesis32:27 Addezikka iza, «Ne sunththi oonee?» gi oychchiin izi, «Yaaqoobe» gi zaarides." 
Genesis32:28 Addezikka iza, «Hayssafe sinththan ne sunththi Isra7eele geetetto attiin Yaaqoobe geetettofo; ays giikko neni Xoossaranne asara baaxetada xoonadasa» gides." 
Genesis32:29 Yaaqoobey iza, «Ne sunththi oonee?» gi oychchides. Addezikka, «Neni ta sunththu ays oychchay?» gi simmidi iza heen anjjides." 
Genesis32:30 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey he sohoza Phin7eele gi sunththides; ays giikko izi, «Tani Xoossaa ta ayfera be7ada hayqqontta attadis» gides." 
Genesis32:31 Izi Panu7eeleppe dendiza wode iza bolla xalqqey kezides; izi ba wodiraa gishshas wobbides. 
Genesis32:32 Yaaqoobe wodiray deshettida gishshas Isra7eele asay hach gakkanaaska geda giddon diza paashsha asho mi erettenna. 
Genesis33:1 Yaaqoobey dhoqqu gi xeellidi Eesawey 400 as banara ekki yizayssa be7ides; hessa gishshas nayta Liyas, Eraheelissinne nam7u aylletas shaakki shaakki immides." 
Genesis33:2 Ashkaratanne istta nayta sinththan Liyanne izi nayta isttafe guyen Eraheelonne Yooseefe wurseththan woththides. 
Genesis33:3 Gido attiin izi ba baggara ubbaafe sinththe aadhdhidi ba ishaakko matida wode laappunto ziggides. 
Genesis33:4 Eesawey gidikko izara gaagganaas woxxidi iza qoodhe bolla xaaxettidi yeerides; nam7atikka yeekkida. 
Genesis33:5 Hessafe guye Eesawey dhoqqu gi xeellidi maccassatanne nayta be7idi, «Ha nenara dizayti oonanttee?» gi oychchides. Yaaqoobey izas, «Hayti Xoossi ne aylles taas ba kiyateththan immida nayta» gides." 
Genesis33:6 Hessafe guye aylleti ba naytara shiiqidi iza sinththan ziggida. 
Genesis33:7 Kaallidi Liyaynne izi nayti yiidi ziggida; wurseththan Yooseefeynne Eraheela yiidi ziggida. 
Genesis33:8 Eesawey, «Sinththan tanara gaaggida mehey wuri aaza mehee?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Ta godoo! Hayssi ne tana ufayssan mokka ekkanaassa» gides." 
Genesis33:9 Eesawey, «Ta ishoo! Taas daro haaroy dees; ne miishshi nees gido» gides." 
Genesis33:10 Yaaqoobey, «Akkay, ha7i ne tana mokka ekkanaa gidikko ta nees immizayssa ekka; ne tana siiqon mokka ekkishin ta be7idayssa Xoossa ayfeso be7ida mala qoodays." 
Genesis33:11 Xoossi ba kiyateththan ubbaa kunththi taas immida gishshas koshshizaazi ubbay taas dees; ta nees immizayssa ekkarkkii» giidi Yaaqoobey minththi shoobbida gishshas Eesawey izi gidayssa ekkides. 
Genesis33:12 Hessafe guye Eesawey, «Denda ane boos; tanikka inttenara issife baana» gides." 
Genesis33:13 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey iza, «Ta godoo! Ne be7iza mala nayti shugo gididayssa ne eraasa; qasse tani galo maratanne guuththa laaqqata dhanththiza dorsatanne miizata naagana koshshees; istti elle elle laaggiko meheti wuri issi gallas hayqqi wurana." 
Genesis33:14 Hessa gishshas ta godoo neni taappe sinththatada ba; ta sinththan diza meheynne nayti hemettana dandayza keena hemettidi nenara Seyren gayttana» gides. 
Genesis33:15 Eesawey iza, «Histtiko tani ta asaappe guuththata nees ashshays» gides. Gido attiin Yaaqoobey iza, «Hessi ayssee? Tani ta godaa sinththan bonchchettidayssi taas gidana» gides." 
Genesis33:16 Hessa gishshas Eesawey he gallas Seyre simmi bides. 
Genesis33:17 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey Sukoote bides; heen baas keeth keexxides; ba mehetaska aqizaso giigsides; hessa gishshas he sohoza Sukoote gi sunththides. 
Genesis33:18 Yaaqoobey Mesphexoomiyappe simmida wode Kanaane biittan diza Seekeeme giza katama saron gakkides; katamays sinththa baggara diza dembaan dunkaani uttides. 
Genesis33:19 Ba Dunkaaneza tolida gadeza Seekeeme aawa Emoore naytappe 100 saqile biran shammides. 
Genesis33:20 Heen yarshosoho keexxidi iza, «Xoossi Isra7eele Xoossa» gi sunththides." 
Genesis34:1 Liyay Yaaqoobes yelida naya Diinay he wode Seekeeme dere maccassa beyanaas kezadus. 
Genesis34:2 He biittaa haariza Hiiwey Emoore naa Seekeemey izo wolqqara oykkidi laymatides. 
Genesis34:3 Hessafe guye iza wozinay izin ekettides; izikka nayo keehi dosida gishshas siiqo qaalan baleththides. 
Genesis34:4 Seekeemey ba aawa Emoore, «Taas hanno nayo machcho oychcharkkii!» gides." 
Genesis34:5 Yaaqoobey ba naa Diinay moorettidayssa siyida wode iza attuma nayti mehera bazzon diza gishshas istti yaana gakkanaas co7u gides. 
Genesis34:6 Hessafe guye Seekeeme aawa Emoorey Yaaqoobera haasayanaas yides. 
Genesis34:7 Yaaqoobe attuma nayti he hanidayssa siyida mala ba dizasoppe yiidi ceecidanne shenetida; ays giikko Seekeemey Isra7eele naa bolla ooththanaas bessontta ooso ooththida gishshas daro hanqettida. 
Genesis34:8 Gido attiin Emoorey isttas, «Ta naa Seekeemey intte nayo diina daro siiqiza gishshas hayyana izo izas machcho immerketii!" 
Genesis34:9 Nunara ekettitenne gelettite; intte macca nayta nuus immite; nu macca naytakka inttes ekkite. 
Genesis34:10 Intte nu giddon uttana dandayeeta; derey keehi aaho; izan de7ite; zal7ite; izan aqo kessite» gides. 
Genesis34:11 He wode Seekeemey Diina aawaanne izi ishata, «Tani intte ta gizayssa kunththizaa gidikko intte oychchizayssa ay gidikkoka ta immana." 
Genesis34:12 Intte koyta koykko immana; imota koykko intte koyidayssa keena ta immana shin nayo ta ekkana mala ero giite» gides. 
Genesis34:13 Ba michcheyo Diina Seekeemey tunisida gishshas Yaaqoobe attuma nayti Seekeemessinne iza aawa Emoores wordo yootida; 
Genesis34:14 isttika isttas, «Nuni hessa mala miish ooththana dandayokko; nuni nu michcheyo qaxxarettontta asas immiko hayssi nuna kawushshiza miishsha." 
Genesis34:15 Nuni intte issi miish ooththiko inttes, ‹Ero› gaana; hessika aazee giikko intte biittaa attuma asay wuri nu mala qaxxarettiko." 
Genesis34:16 Nuni nu macca nayta inttes immana intte macca naytakka nuus ekkana; nu intte giddon uttidi inttenara issi dere gidana. 
Genesis34:17 Intte qaxxarettanaas koyonttaa gidikko nuni nu michcheyo ekkidi baana» gida. 
Genesis34:18 Histtiin istti gidayssi Emooressinne iza naa Seekeemes lo7o misatides. 
Genesis34:19 Ba aawa keeththan diza ubbaafe aadhdhi bonchchettida Seekeemey Yaaqoobe nayin ufayettida gishshas istti gidayssa ooththanaas gam7ibeenna. 
Genesis34:20 He wode Emooreynne iza naa Seekeemey ba asaas yootanaas ba diza katama simmi biidi," 
Genesis34:21 «Ha asati nunara siga; istti nu biittan dettonne zal7etto; nu derey keehi aaho; istta macca nayta nuni ekkana; isttika nu macca nayta ekketto. 
Genesis34:22 Gido attiin nunara istti issi asa mala de7anaas nuni issi miish ooththanaas koshshees; hessika istti qaxxarettida mala nu attuma asay wuri qaxxarettiko hanana. 
Genesis34:23 Nuni hessaththo ooththiko istta miizay, istta aqoynne istta mehey wuri nuus deennee? Hessa gishshas ane nuni istti goyssa ero goos; isttika nunara daana» gida." 
Genesis34:24 Katamaa dubbushan shiiqida asay wuri Emooressinne iza naa Seekeemes, «Ero» gida. Histtiin he katama attumasay wuri qaxxarettides." 
Genesis34:25 Heedzdzanththo gallas istti wuri ba qaxxara madunththaa sakettishin, Yaaqoobe attuma naytappe Diina ishati, Simooninne Lewey giththa mashsha ekkidi oonikka erontta katamaa gelidi, adde gididayta ubbaa wodhida." 
Genesis34:26 Emoorenne iza naa Seekeeme giththa mashshan wodhidi ba michcheyo Diina Seekeeme sooppe kessi ekkidi bida. 
Genesis34:27 Yaaqoobe attuma naytikka ahata bollara yedhetti aadhdhidi ba michcheyo Diino tunisida katamaa bonqqida. 
Genesis34:28 Istta dors, deysh, miiz, hare, qasseka katamaa giddon dizayssanne gaxan dizayssa ubbaa ekkida." 
Genesis34:29 Istta mehetanne istta machcheta guuththa naytara ubbaa di7i ekki bida; keeththan dizayssaka ubbaa bonqqida. 
Genesis34:30 Yaaqoobey Simoonanne Lewe, «Intte ta bolla meto ehichchideta; ha biittan diza Kanaanetinne Paarizeti tana ixxana; nuni qoodan guuththa; istti issife gididi ta bolla worajjiko taninne taso asay dhayana» gides." 
Genesis34:31 Gido attiin isttas, «Histtiin izi nu michcheyo layma maccassa mala ooththanaas bessizee?» gida." 
Genesis35:1 Hessafe guye Xoossi Yaaqoobe, «Dendada pude Beetele baada heen de7a; neni ne isha Eesaweppe baqatiza wode nees qonccida Xoossaas heen yarsho yarshizaso giigsa» gides." 
Genesis35:2 Yaaqoobeykka baso asaanne banara diza asaa ubbaa, «Intte giddon diza allaga eeqa misleta diggite; intte bolla geeshshite; intte may7oka laammite." 
Genesis35:3 Ane dendidi pude Beetele boos; ta metotida gallas tani gizaa siyidi tani bida ubbason tanara gidida Xoossaas tani heen yarsho yarshizaso giigsana» gides. 
Genesis35:4 Hessa gishshas istti ba achchan diza hara dere asaa eeqa misleta ubbaanne ba hayththan diza gutichcha ubbaa kessidi Yaaqoobes immiin Yaaqoobey heyta Seekeemen diza wolaa garsan moogides. 
Genesis35:5 Hessafe guye istta yuushon diza katama ubba asaa bolla Xoossafe dagamaynne yashshateththi wodhdhida gishshas Yaaqoobeynne iza attuma nayti dendidi bishin oonikka istta oykkanaas kaallibeenna. 
Genesis35:6 Yaaqoobeynne izara diza asay wuri Kanaane biittan diza Beetele geetettiza Looza gakkida. 
Genesis35:7 Heen izi yarsho yarshizaso keexxidi he sohoza Eli-Beetele gi sunththides; ays giikko izi ba ishaappe baqatidi biza wode Xoossi izas qonccida soho gidida gishshassa. 
Genesis35:8 Irbiqa dichchida Dibooray heen hayqqada Beeteleppe duge baggara diza wolaa garsan iza moogettadus; hessa gishshas he miththaa sunththi Alem-Bakute geetettides. 
Genesis35:9 Yaaqoobey Mesphexoomiyappe simmidaappe guye Xoossi izas qasseka qonccidi iza anjjides; 
Genesis35:10 Xoossi iza, «Ha7i gakkanaas ne sunththi Yaaqoobe; gido attiin hayssafe guye mulekka Yaaqoobe geetettaka; ne sunththi Isra7eele geetettana» giidi izi iza Isra7eele gi sunththides." 
Genesis35:11 Qasse Xoossi Yaaqoobe, «Tani Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa; neni yeletta; coratta; dereynne dere maabaray neeppe kezana; kawotikka ne gulbateppe kezana." 
Genesis35:12 Tani Abrahaamessinne Yisaaqas immida biittaa qasse nees immana; neeppe guyekka tani ha biittaa ne zereththas immana» gides. 
Genesis35:13 Hessafe guye Xoossi izara haasayda sohoppe pude bides. 
Genesis35:14 Yaaqoobey Xoossi banara haasayda sohon shuch essidi iza bolla ushsha yarsho gussides; zaytekka iza bolla tigides. 
Genesis35:15 Yaaqoobey Xoossi banara haasayda sohoza, «Beetele» gi sunththides." 
Genesis35:16 Istti hessafe guye Beeteleppe dendi Efraata gakkanaas guuth ashshida mala Eraheelo wolqqama miixay oykkides. 
Genesis35:17 Miixay izo waayisiin izo yelissizaara, «Babbofa; hayssika attuma naa» gadus." 
Genesis35:18 Gido attiin iza hayqqa shemppo kezishin ba naa Beeni-Oone ga sunththadus; Yaaqoobey iza Biniyaame gi sunththides. 
Genesis35:19 Hessafe guye Eraheela hayqqada Beeteliheeme giza Efraata efiza oge doonan moogettadus. 
Genesis35:20 Yaaqoobey izi duufon hawulte shuch essides; he hawulte shuchchay hach gakkanaaska Eraheeli duufo malata gidi dees. 
Genesis35:21 Isra7eeley heeppe dendidi Edera gimbefe he pinththan ba Dunkaaneza tokkides. 
Genesis35:22 Isra7eeley he biittan dishin Oroobeeley biidi ba aawaas yelida aylle Bilihara zin7ides; Isra7eeleykka ha yo7oza siyides. Yaaqoobe attuma nayti tammanne nam7a. Isttika," 
Genesis35:23 Liya nayti Yaaqoobe bayra naa Oroobeele, Simoona, Lewe, Yuhuda, Yisakoorenne Zaabiloone." 
Genesis35:24 Eraheeli attuma nayti Yooseefenne Biniyaame. 
Genesis35:25 Eraheeli aylle Biliha attuma nayti Daanenne Niftaaleme. 
Genesis35:26 Liya osanchcha Zilfi attuma nayti Gaadenne Aaseere. Hayti Masophexoomyan Yaaqoobes yelettida iza attuma nayta. 
Genesis35:27 Yaaqoobey ba aaway dizaso Mamire geetettizaso yides; hessika Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi kase deyida Qiriyaate-Arba7e woykko Kebroone geetettizaso. 
Genesis35:28 Yisaaqi 180 layth de7ides; 
Genesis35:29 izi daro wode de7idi keehi cimmi hayqqidi ba aawatan gaaggides; iza nayti Eesaweynne Yaaqoobey iza moogida. 
Genesis36:1 Eedoome geetettiza Eesawe yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. 
Genesis36:2 Eesawey Kanaane biitta macca naytappe baas machcho ekkides; isttika Hiite Eeloone naa Aada, Hiiweya Xiba7oone naa Aanay yelida Oholibaamenne" 
Genesis36:3 Isma7eele naa Nebayooti michchiyo Baasemaato. 
Genesis36:4 Aaday Eesawes Elfaaze yeladus; Baasemaatayakka Era7u7eele yeladus; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibaame Ya7uushe, Ya7ilaamenne Qoore yeladus; Kanaane biittan Eesawes yelettida attuma nayti haytantta." 
Genesis36:6 Eesawey ba machcheta, ba attuma naytanne macca nayta, baso as ubbaa ba miizatanne ba mehe ubbaa Kanaane biittan izi haaridayssa ubbaa ekkidi ba isha Yaaqoobeppe haakki bides." 
Genesis36:7 Istta haaroy darida gishshas istti issife de7anaas dandaybeettenna; mehey isttas darida gishshas istti diza derey istta nam7atas gidanaas dandaybeenna. 
Genesis36:8 Histtiin Eedoome geetettiza Eesawey Seyre geetettiza gezzen uttides. 
Genesis36:9 Seyre geetettiza gezze biittan diza Eedoometa aawa Eesawe yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. 
Genesis36:10 Eesawe attuma nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa; hessatikka Eesawe machcho Aada naa Elfaazenne Eesawe machcho Baasemaati naa Era7u7eele. 
Genesis36:11 Elfaaze nayti Temaane, Omaare, Xefo, Ga7itaamenne Qenaaze." 
Genesis36:12 Qasse Eesawe naa Elfaazes Teminaa7e geetettiza aylley dawus; izakka Elfaazes Amaaleeqe yeladus; hayti Eesawe machcho Aadis naa nayta. 
Genesis36:13 Era7u7eele attuma nayti Nahaate, Zaraahe, Shammahanne Miizahe; hayti Eesawe machchiyo Baasemaatis naa nayta." 
Genesis36:14 Xiba7oones naaza naa Aanay yelida Oholibaami attuma nayti hayta; iza Eesawes Ya7uushe, Ya7ilaamenne Qoore yeladus." 
Genesis36:15 Eesawe yeletaa zereththa halaqati hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. Eesawes bayra naa Elfaaze attuma naytas halaqa gididayti Temaane, Omaare, Xefo, Qenaaze," 
Genesis36:16 Qoore, Ga7itaamenne Amaaleeqe; Eedoome biittan Elfaazey yelida halaqati hayta; hayti wuri Aadis naa nayta." 
Genesis36:17 Eesawe naa Era7u7eele attuma naytas halaqa gididayti Nahaate, Zaraahe, Shammahanne Miizahe; Eedoome biittan Era7u7eeley yelida halaqati hayta; istti Eesawe machcho Baasemaatis naa nayta." 
Genesis36:18 Eesawe machchiyo Oholibaami attuma naytas halaqa gididayti Ya7uushe, Ya7ilaamenne Qoore; istti Aana naa, Eesawe machchiyo Oholibaamippe yelettida halaqata." 
Genesis36:19 Hayti Eedoome geetettiza Eesawe attuma naytassinne istta zereththatas halaqata. 
Genesis36:20 Eedoome biittan diza Hoore Seyre attuma nayti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; heytikka Looxaane, Shobaale, Xiba7oone, Aana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoone, Exeerenne Dishaane; isttika Eedoome biittan diza Seyre attuma nayti, Hooreta halaqata." 
Genesis36:22 Looxaane attuma nayti Hoorenne Hemaane; Looxaane michchiya Teminaa7o. 
Genesis36:23 Shobaale attuma nayti Aliwaane, Manahaate, Eebaale, Shefanne Oonname." 
Genesis36:24 Xiba7oone attuma nayti Aayanne Aana; Aanaykka bazzon ba aawa Xiba7oone hareta heemmishe xabala haath demmidayssa. 
Genesis36:25 Aana nay Dishoone; naya qasse Oholibaamo. 
Genesis36:26 Dishoone attuma nayti Hemdaane, Eshibaane, Yitiraanenne Kaaraane." 
Genesis36:27 Exeere attuma nayti Bilihaane, Za7iwaanenne Aqaane." 
Genesis36:28 Dishaane attuma nayti Uuxenne Araane. 
Genesis36:29 Hooreta halaqati haytantta; Looxaane, Shobaale, Xiba7oone, Aana," 
Genesis36:30 Dishoone, Exeerenne Dishaane. Hayti Seyre biittan ba qommon qommon shaakettida Hooreta halaqata." 
Genesis36:31 Isra7eelen kawoy kawotanaappe kase Eedoome biittan kawotida kawoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. 
Genesis36:32 Bi7oore naa Beelay Eedoomen kawotides; iza katamaa sunththi Dinaabe geetettees. 
Genesis36:33 Beelay hayqqiin Booxirappe yida Zaraahe nay Yobaabey kawotides. 
Genesis36:34 Yobaabey hayqqiin Temaane biittafe yida Hushamey kawotides. 
Genesis36:35 Hushamey hayqqiin Midiyaame asata Mo7aabe biittan xoonida Badaade naa Hadaadey, kawotides; iza katamaa sunththi Awite geetettides." 
Genesis36:36 Hadaadey hayqqiin Maasireeqeppe yida Samilay kawotides. 
Genesis36:37 Samilay hayqqiin shaafa achchan diza Erahooboteppe yida Sha7uley kawotides. 
Genesis36:38 Sha7uley hayqqiin Akiboore naa Ba7aali-Hanaaney kawotides. 
Genesis36:39 Akiboore naa Ba7aali-Hanaaney hayqqiin Hadaarey kawotides; iza katamaa sunththi Paa7u geetettees; iza machchiya Mezahaabe nayo Maxireeda yelida Mahexabi7eelo geetettawus. 
Genesis36:40 Eesawe yeleta halaqati ba qommon qommon ba sunththan sunththan haytantta; Teminaa7e, Aliwa, Yeteete," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibaame, Eela, Pinoone," 
Genesis36:42 Qenaaze, Temaane, Mibizaare," 
Genesis36:43 Magidi7eelenne Iraame. Haytanti ba haariza biittan, ba dizason Eedoome halaqata. Hayssi Eesawey Eedoometa aawa." 
Genesis37:1 Yaaqoobey kase ba aaway deyida Kanaane biittan uttides. 
Genesis37:2 Yaaqoobe nayti hanidayssi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssa. Yooseefey 17 layththa naa gidida wode ba aawaa aylletappe, Bilihappenne Zilfife yelettida ba ishatara ba aawa meheta heemmees; he wode izi ba aawaas istti ooththida iita miish ehi yootees." 
Genesis37:3 Isra7eeley Yooseefe cimateththan yelida gishshas hankko attuma nayta ubbaafe aaththi siiqees; izi izas alleqo may7o giigsides. 
Genesis37:4 Iza ishati istta aaway iza isttafe aaththi siiqizayssa be7idi istti iza ixxidi lo7o qaalan izara haasayanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Genesis37:5 Yooseefey agumo agumettidi ba ishatas yootides; isttika iza gede gujji ixxida. 
Genesis37:6 Izi isttas, «Tani agumettida agumo siyite." 
Genesis37:7 Nuni gade giddon kaththa mirqqe mirqqishin ta mirqqeya dendada sitti ga eqqadus; intte mirqqeti gidikko yuuyi aadhdhidi ta mirqqeysi ziggida» gides. 
Genesis37:8 Iza ishati iza, «Neni nu bolla kawotana hanay? Woykko nuna tumu haarana hanay?» gida; istti iza agumoza gishshassinne izi isttas yootida qaalaa gishshas kaseppe iza aaththi ixxida." 
Genesis37:9 Qasseka Yooseefey hara agumo agumettidi ba ishanttas yootides; «Siyite; tani hara agumokka agumettadis; he agumozan arshey, aginaynne 11 xoolintteti taas ziggishin be7adis» gides." 
Genesis37:10 He izi be7ida agumoza ba aawassinne ba ishatas yootiin iza aaway iza, «Hayssi neni agumettidayssi ay agumoo? Tumu tani, ne aayeyanne ne ishati yiidi ne sinththan sa7an gufannidi nees zigganee?» gi hanqettides." 
Genesis37:11 Iza ishati iza miqqaynida; gido attiin iza aaway ha yo7oza ba wozinan woththidi naagides. 
Genesis37:12 Issi gallas iza ishati Seekeeme achchan ba aawaa meheta heemmanaas biin," 
Genesis37:13 Isra7eeley Yooseefe, «Ne ishati Seekeemen mehe heemmizayssa ne eraasa; haa ya; ta nena isttako kiittana» gides. Yooseefeykka, «Ero» gides." 
Genesis37:14 Yaaqoobeykka, «Baada ne ishatinne mehey saro dizaakko be7a yaada istta hanota taas yoota» giidi iza Kebroone shoobba kiittiin izi Seekeeme bides." 
Genesis37:15 Heen demba giddon izi gede haa simerettishin issi asi iza demmidi, «Naazoo! Ay koyay?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis37:16 Izikka, «Ta ishata koyays; istti mehe heemmizasohoy awakko taas yootarkkii!» gides." 
Genesis37:17 Histtiin addezi, «Hessafe dendichchida; isttas, ‹Nuni Dootaane boos› gishin siyadis» gides; hessa gishshas Yooseefey ba ishata guye biidi istta Dootaanen demmides." 
Genesis37:18 Gido attiin izi haahon dishin istti iza be7ida; izi isttako gakkontta dishin istti iza wodhanaas maqettida. 
Genesis37:19 Issoy issaas, «Be7ite! Agumo goday yees." 
Genesis37:20 Haa yiite! Iza wodhidi ha ollatappe issaa giddo yeggoos. Hessafe guye, ‹Iita do7ay iza mides› gaana; histtidi iza agumoy polettiin ane be7ana» gida." 
Genesis37:21 Oroobeeley hessa siyidi istta kusheppe iza ashshanaas koyidi, «Iza wodho wodhdhoko;" 
Genesis37:22 Suuth gussofte; iza intte bazzon diza ha ollaa giddo yeggite; iza bolla kushe woththofte» gides. Oroobeeley iza istta kusheppe ashshidi guye iza aawaakko yeddanaas qoppides. 
Genesis37:23 Yooseefey ba ishataakko gakkida wode izi may7ida alleqo may7o izappe qaari ekkida; 
Genesis37:24 iza efidi haaththi baynda mela ollan yeggida. 
Genesis37:25 Istti ba qumaa maanaas uttidaashe Isma7eele dere asati Gibxe baanaas Gala7aadeppe yizayta dhoqqu giidi be7ida; istti ba gaamellan sawo, balasaane geetettiza dhalenne karbbe caani woththida." 
Genesis37:26 Yuhuday ba ishata, «Nuni nu ishaa wodhidi iza suuththaa qottiko nuna ay maaddanee?" 
Genesis37:27 Haa yiite; iza Isma7eeletas bayzoos; iza bolla nu kushe woththoko; gaasoykka izi nu ishanne nu asho.» Histtiin iza ishati wurikka ero gida. 
Genesis37:28 Hessa gishshas Midiyaame biitta zal7anchchati hessara aadhdhishin iza ishati Yooseefe ollaafe kessidi Isma7eele asatas 20 biras bayziin istti Yooseefe Gibxe biitta efida. 
Genesis37:29 Oroobeeley ollaako simmidi Yooseefey heen bayndayssa be7ida wode ceecidi ba may7o daakkides 
Genesis37:30 Izi guye ba ishataakko biidi, «Naazi heen baawa; ha7i ta awa simma boo!» gides." 
Genesis37:31 Hessafe guye istti issi deysh ekki shukkidi Yooseefe may7o suuththan maadhida. 
Genesis37:32 Iza aleqo may7oza aawaakko efidi aawaas, «Nuni hayssa demmi ekkidos; hayssi ne naaza may7okkonne harakko ane xeella» gida." 
Genesis37:33 Aawaykka may7ozi Yooseefeyssa gididayssa eridi, «Ee hayssi ta naaza may7o! Iita do7ay iza michchides; tumukka Yooseefe do7ay puuzereththi montta aggenna» gides." 
Genesis37:34 Yaaqoobeykka mishettidi ba may7o peedhi yeggides; maaqa may7idi daro wode gakkanaas ba naazas yeekkides. 
Genesis37:35 Iza attuma naytinne macca nayti wuri iza minththeththanaas izakko yida; gido attiin izi minettontta ixxidi, «Hanenna! Tani yeekkada ta naakko baada duufon gelana» giidi iza aaway izas yeekkides." 
Genesis37:36 He wode Midiyaame biitta asati Yooseefe Gibxe kawo oosanchcha Phixifaaras Gibxen bayzida; Phixifaaraykka zabeta halaqa. 
Genesis38:1 He wode Yuhuday ba ishatappe shaakettidi Adulaame geetettiza katamaan diza Hiira geetettiza addezara de7ana bides. 
Genesis38:2 Heen Yuhuday Shu7a geetettiza Kanaane dere macca naa be7ides. Izikka izo machcho ekkidi izira de7ides. 
Genesis38:3 Iza izas shaarada attuma naa yelada Eera ga sunththadus. 
Genesis38:4 Qasseka shaarada attuma naa yelada Oonaane ga sunththadus. 
Genesis38:5 Qasse gujjadakka attuma naa yelada iza Seela ga sunththadus. Izakka iza Akizaabe geetettiza biittan yeladus. 
Genesis38:6 Yuhuday ba bayra naaza Eera Ti7imaaro machcho ekisides. 
Genesis38:7 Yuhuda bayra naa Eeray GODAA sinththan iita as gidida gishshas GODAY iza wodhides. 
Genesis38:8 Yuhuday Oonaane, «Ne ishaza machcho laattada izas laata naa yelada iza sunth xeygisa» gides." 
Genesis38:9 Gido attiin Oonaaney yelettiza nayti baas gidonttayssa eridi ba ishaa machcheyra aqiza wode aydekka ba ishaas nay yelettontta mala ba zereththaa biittan gussees. 
Genesis38:10 Izi ooththidayssi GODAA sinththan para gidida gishshas GODAY izakka wodhides. 
Genesis38:11 Hessafe guye Yuhuday ba naa machcho Ti7imaaro, «Ta nayee Seelay diccana gakkanaas ne aawaa soo baada am7eteththan daashsha» gides. Hessa izi aazas gidee? giikko, «Seelay ba ishata mala hayqqanaakko» giidi hirgida gishshassa. Hessa gishshas Ti7imaara baada ba aawa soon de7adus." 
Genesis38:12 Daro wodeppe guye Shu7a naya, Yuhuda machchiya hayqqadus. Yuhuday kayotti aaththidaappe guye ba lagge Adulaame dere as Hiira geetettizayssara ba dorsa iske qanxxiza asati dizaso Temina bides." 
Genesis38:13 Asay Ti7imaaris, «Beya; ne bolloy Yuhuday ba dorsata iske qanxxanaas Temina bees» gi yootides." 
Genesis38:14 Iza ba am7eteththa may7oza qaarada bana baleththanaas goos ekka gullunttada Temina efiza oge doonan diza Enayme katama pengen uttadus. Hessa iza ooththiday Seelay diccidi gakkinkka iza izas machcho gidanaas ekkonttayssa erida gishshassa. 
Genesis38:15 Iza ba ayfeso gulluntta uttida gishshas Yuhuday izo be7idi layma maccas giidi qoppides. 
Genesis38:16 Ba naa machcho gididayssa erontta dishe oge gaxa izikko shiiqidi izo, «Tanara zin7arkkii!» gides. Histtiin iza, «Tani nenara zin7iko neni taas ay immanee?» ga oychchadus." 
Genesis38:17 Izikka, «Tani ta meheppe issi deysha laaqqa nees yeddana» gides. Izakka, «Neni hessa taas yeddana gakkanaas ay oyththanee?» gadus." 
Genesis38:18 Izi, «Ay oyththoo?» gi iza oychchides. Izakka, «Ne maatame qalabateza iza qachchizayssaranne ne kushen diza guufeza oyththa» giin izi heyta immidi izira zin7iin iza izas shaaradus." 
Genesis38:19 Iza hessafe dendada bidaappe guye ba gullunttida goossaza qaarada ba am7eteththa may7o may7adus. 
Genesis38:20 Yuhuday ba oyththidayssa izippe zaari ekkanaas deysha laaqqa ba lagge Adulaame bolla izis yeddides; gido attiin izi izo demmibeenna. 
Genesis38:21 Izi he biitta asaa, «Enayme katamaan oge doonan uttida layma maccassaya awa badee?» gi oychchides. Asay, «Layma maccassi hayssan mulekka baawa» gides." 
Genesis38:22 Izikka Yuhudakko simmidi iza, «Tani izo demmabeekke; hessafekka bollara he biitta asay, ‹Layma maccassi hayssan mulekka di erenna› gida» gides." 
Genesis38:23 Histtiin Yuhuday, «Ba oykkidayssa baas ekku; histtontta aggiko asi nuna miiccana. Histtiin tani izis deysha laaqqa yeddadis; gido attiin neni izo demmabeekka» gides." 
Genesis38:24 Heedzdzu aginappe guye asay, «Ne naa machchiya Ti7imaara laymatada shaaradus» giidi Yuhudas yootides. Yuhudaykka, «Izo kare kessidi taman xuuggite» gides." 
Genesis38:25 Izo kare kessiza wode, «Tani shaariday ha miishshata godaassa; beya; hayssa maatame qalabateza iza qachchizayssanne hayssi guufezi oonayssako erana dandaykko era» gaada ba bollos kiita yeddadus." 
Genesis38:26 Yuhuday he miishshata eridi, «Taappe iza xillo; gaasoykka tani izo ta naa Seelas ekkabeekke» gides. Hessafe guye izi izira nam7anththo zin7ibeenna." 
Genesis38:27 Iza yelana haniza wode izi ulon mentte attuma nayti deettes. 
Genesis38:28 Iza maarettishin isttafe issay ba kushe kessiin yelissizaara, «Be7ite; hayssi koyro kezees» gaada zo7o qacina iza kushen qachchadus." 
Genesis38:29 Gido attiin izi ba kushe guye ekkida wode iza ishay yelettiin iza, «Neni waana sinththata kezadii!» gadus. Hessa gishshas iza Paareese ga sunththadus." 
Genesis38:30 Hessafe guye iza kushen zo7o qacinay qashetti diza Paareese ishay yelettiin sunththay Zaraahe geetettides. 
Genesis39:1 Isma7eele asati Yooseefe Gibxe efiin Gibxe kawo oosanchchatappe Phixifaara geetettiza zabeta halaqay Yooseefe Isma7eeletappe shammides. 
Genesis39:2 GODAY Yooseefera diza gishshas izi ooththizayssa ubbaa izas injjesides; izikka ba godaa soon Gibxen de7ides. 
Genesis39:3 GODAYKKA izara de7izayssanne GODAY izi ooththidayssa ubbaa izas injjesidayssa Phixifaaray be7idi," 
Genesis39:4 Yooseefe dosides. Yooseefeykka iza oosanchcha gidides. Phixifaaray iza ba keeththa asaa bolla sunththidi baas dizaaz ubbaa iza kushen woththides. 
Genesis39:5 Phixifaaray ba keeththan dizayssa ubbaa bollanne ba aqota ubbaa bolla sunththida wodeppe doommiin GODAY Gibxe addeza keeth Yooseefe geedon anjjides. GODAA anjjoy Phixifaara soon gidiin karen diza miish ubbaa bolla wodhdhides. 
Genesis39:6 Hessa gishshas baas diza ubbaa Yooseefes sheedhdhides; izi ba miza kaththaafe attiin hara Yooseefe kushen yeggides. Yooseefey yegalththinne mala lo7o asa. 
Genesis39:7 Guuththa wodeppe guye iza goda machcheya Yooseefe cadda xeellada, «Haa ya; tanara zin7a» gadus." 
Genesis39:8 Gido attiin izi ixxides; ba godaa machcheys, «Beya! Ta goday bason diza ubbaa taas sheedhdhidi aazaska hirgenna; baas dizayssa ubbaa ta kushen woththides." 
Genesis39:9 Hason taappe aadhdhizay deenna; neni iza machcho gidida gishshas nena xalla attiin ta goday taas immontta miishshi baawa. Histtiin tani hayssa mala iita miish Xoossa sinththan wostta ooththoo?» gides. 
Genesis39:10 Iza ubba wode Yooseefe saleththinkka izi eemo immibeenna; izira ishech attiin izikko shiiqanawukka koyibeenna. 
Genesis39:11 Issi gallas izi ba ooso ooththanaas soo gelishin soo aylletappe oonikka soon baawa. 
Genesis39:12 Izakka Yooseefe may7o shiishsha oykkada, «Tanara zin7a» gadus. Gido attiin izi ba may7o izi kushen yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezides." 
Genesis39:13 Yooseefey ba may7o izi kushen yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezidayssa iza be7ada," 
Genesis39:14 ba soo aylleta xeygada isttas, «Be7ite! Ta azinay ehida Ibraawe addezi tana kawushshishe aggides; izi tanara zin7anaas haa soo gelides; gido attiin tani ta qaala dhoqqisada waassadis." 
Genesis39:15 Histtiin izi ba may7o ta achchan yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezides» gadus. 
Genesis39:16 Keeththa aaway yaana gakkanaas iza Yooseefe may7oza ba achchan woththadus. 
Genesis39:17 Hessafe guye iza izas, «Hessi neni nuus ehida Ibraawe aylley tanara zin7anaas taakko gelides;" 
Genesis39:18 Gido attiin tani ta qaala dhoqqisada waassiin izi ba may7o ta achchan yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezides» gadus. 
Genesis39:19 Keeththa aaway machcheyo, «Ne aylley tana hayssaththo ooththides» gaada yootida qaalaa siyidi daro hanqettides." 
Genesis39:20 Izikka Yooseefe efidi kawo qasho asay diza qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Genesis39:21 Gido attiin Yooseefey heen qasho keeththan diza wode GODAY izara dees. Xoossi qasho keeththan izara diza ba kiyateth izas darssides. Qasseka qasho keeththa halaqaza sinththan izas bonchcho immides. 
Genesis39:22 Histtiin qasho keeththaa halaqay qasho asaa ubbaa Yooseefe kushen woththides; heen oosettizayssa ubbaa bolla aawatizay iza. 
Genesis39:23 GODAY Yooseefera gididi izi ooththiza ubbaa polisiza gishshas woyne keeththaa alaafey Yooseefe alaafeteththan diza ay miishshaska waanandeesha giidi hirgi erenna. 
Genesis40:1 Guuththa wodeppe guye Gibxe kawo ushshu duuqqizayta alaafeynne quma kaththizayta alaafey ba godaa Gibxe kawo qohida. 
Genesis40:2 Kawoy ushshu duuqqizayta halaqanne quma kaththizayta halaqata nam7ata bolla keehi hanqettides. 
Genesis40:3 Hessa gishshas zabeta halaqaza keeththan Yooseefey qashettida woyne keeththan yeggides. 
Genesis40:4 Zabeta halaqay istta Yooseefes sheedhdhiin izi isttas koshshiza miishshan maaddides; isttika qasho keeth gelidi guuth gam7ida mala," 
Genesis40:5 Gibxe kawos ushshu duuqqizayta halaqaynne quma kaththizayta halaqay, nam7ayka qasho keeththan dishe issi qamma omars baas baas agumo agumettida. Nam7ata agumo birsheththika dumma dumma." 
Genesis40:6 Yooseefey maalado isttako gelida wode istti muuzotti uttidayta be7ides. 
Genesis40:7 Hessa gishshas ba godaa qasho keeththan banara diza kawo oosanchchata, «Hach intte ayfesoy aazas dhumidee?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis40:8 Isttika izas, «Nuni nam7ay agumo agumettidos; gido attiin nuus birshiza asi dhaydes» gida. Yooseefeykka isttas, «Agumo birshizay Xoossa gidennee? Intte agumoza ane taas yootite» gides." 
Genesis40:9 Histtiin ushshu duuqqizayta halaqay ba agumo Yooseefes, «Tani ta agumon issi woyne mith ta sinththan dizayssa be7adis." 
Genesis40:10 Qasse he woyne miththaas heedzdzu haggay dees. Heerakka aacada ciiyadus; lo7eththa wurcada ayfadus. 
Genesis40:11 He wode Paaroone ushshaa xuu7ay ta kushen dees; tanikka woyneza ayfe maxada xuu7aza giddon gum7ada ushshaa Paaroones immadis» gi yootides. 
Genesis40:12 Histtiin Yooseefeykka zaaridi, «Hessa birsheththi hayssa; heedzdzu haggati heedzdzu gallassata." 
Genesis40:13 Heedzdzu gallassata giddon kawoy nena denththidi izi nena kase ne diza alaafeteththan woththana; kase neni ushshu duuqqiza wode ooththida mala neni kawo wancaa iza kushen woththana. 
Genesis40:14 Gido attiin nees wodey lo7ida wode tana baloppa; taaska kiya; ta gishshas kawos yootada ha qasho keeththaafe tana kesisa; 
Genesis40:15 gaasoykka tana Ibraaweta biittafe wolqqara shammi ehida; gido attiin hayssaththo tana qashos gaththiza miish aykkoka ooththabeekke» gides. 
Genesis40:16 Kath kaththizayta halaqay Yooseefey ushshu duuqqizayta agumo lo7eththi birshidayssa be7idi Yooseefes, «Tanikka agumo agumettadis; hessika, ‹Ta hu7en heedzdzu masoobe tookka oykkadis." 
Genesis40:17 Bolla bagga masooben Gibxe kawos uukettida dumma dumma qumay dees. Gido attiin kafoti hessa ta hu7en diza masoobezappe mida› » gi yootides. 
Genesis40:18 Histtiin Yooseefey, «Hessa birsheththay hayssa; heedzdzu masoobeti heedzdzu gallassata." 
Genesis40:19 Heedzdzu gallassata giddon kawoy nena denththidi ne qoodhe muucidi miththa bolla kaqisana; ne ashokka kafoti maana» gides. 
Genesis40:20 Heedzdzanththo gallas Gibxe kawoy ba yelettida gallas ba kawoteththan diza shuumeta ubbaas gibira giigsides. Ushshu duuqqizayta halaqanne kath kaththizayta halaqaa qasho keeththaafe kessidi ba shuumeta sinththan essides. 
Genesis40:21 Ushshu duuqqizayta halaqaza kase iza shuumeteththan zaariin izi kawo kushen wanca woththides. 
Genesis40:22 Gido attiin kawozi kath kaththizayta halaqaa Yooseefey iza agumo birshida mala iza kaqisides. 
Genesis40:23 Ushshu duuqqizayta halaqay gidikko Yooseefe qoppontta dogi aggides. 
Genesis41:1 Nam7u layth kumeth aadhdhida wode Gibxe kawoy agumo agumettides; agumora izi Abbaye shaafaa doonan eqqi dishin," 
Genesis41:2 laappun ordenne modhdho miizati Abbaye shaafappe kezidi shaafaa achchan maata mishin be7ides. 
Genesis41:3 Isttafe kaallidi hara laappun mala iitanne gilqa miizati Abbaye shaafappe kezidi shaafaza doonan diza modhdho miizata achchan eqqida. 
Genesis41:4 He medho iitanne gilqa miizati laappun ordenne modhdho miizata mittishin be7ides. Hessafe guye kawoy dhiskofe beeggides. 
Genesis41:5 Izi qasseka dhiskidi nam7anththo agumettidi laappun lo7onne muuruta tiyati issi maqa bolla diccidayssa be7ides. 
Genesis41:6 Isttafe kaallidi ayfe laafanne carkon shullidi melida laappun tiyati kezida. 
Genesis41:7 He laafa ayfe tiyati lo7onne muuruta tiyata mittida. Hessafe guye kawozi beeggidi agumo gididayssa erides. 
Genesis41:8 Gadey wontishin iza wozinay shirotdes; hessa gishshas Gibxen diza bitanchchatassinne era asata ubbaas kiittidi xeygisides; kawoy isttas ba agumoza yootides; gido attiin izas he agumoza birshanaas dandayza asi beettibeenna. 
Genesis41:9 He wode ushshu duuqqizayta halaqay Gibxe kawos, «Tani ta mooro hach qoppays." 
Genesis41:10 Issito kawoy ba aylles hanqettidi tananne kath kaththizayta halaqaza qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Genesis41:11 Nuni heen dishe nuus nuus agumo agumettidos; agumozaska dumma dumma birsheththi dees. 
Genesis41:12 He wode zabeta halaqaza aylle gidida issi Ibraawe panththi nunara qasho keeththan dees. Nuni nu agumo izas yootiin izi nuus hu7en hu7en nu agumo birshides. 
Genesis41:13 Histtiin he yo7oti izi nuus birshida mala hanida. Hessi aazee giikko tani kase ta alaafeteththan simmadis; hankkoyssi gidikko kaqettides» gides.
