Genesis41:14 Histtiin Gibxe kawoy Yooseefe kiittidi xeygisides. Istti iza qasho keeththafe eeson ekki yiin ba hu7e meedettidi may7o laammidi kawozaakko gelides. 
Genesis41:15 Kawoy Yooseefe, «Ta agumettida agumoza birshanaas oonikka dandaybeenna. Gido attiin tani, ‹Yooseefey agumo siyikko birshanaas dandayees› gizaaz siyadis» gides." 
Genesis41:16 Histtiin Yooseefey, «Tani hessa dandaykke; gido attiin Xoossay kawos lo7o birsheth immana» gides." 
Genesis41:17 Kawoykka, «Tani ta agumon Abbaye haaththa shaafaa doonan eqqidishin," 
Genesis41:18 Laappun gitanne modhdho miizati Abbaye shaafappe kezidi haaththaa doonan maata mishin. 
Genesis41:19 Qasseka isttafe hara laappun medha iita, gilqanne laafa miizati shaafappe kezida; tani hessa mala medha iita miiz Gibxe biittan mulekka be7a erikke." 
Genesis41:20 Medha iitanne laafa miizati koyroyta laappun modhdho miizata mitti aggida. 
Genesis41:21 Gido attiin istti mittidaappe guyekka istta medhay kase malakka iiti uttida gishshas istti mittidayssa asi eranaas dandaybeenna. Hessafe guye tani dhiskofe beeggadis. 
Genesis41:22 «Qasseka agumora laappun lo7onne muuruta tiyati issi maqa bolla diccidayta be7adis. 
Genesis41:23 Qasseka isttafe hara ayfe laafanne carkon shullida laappun tiyati kezida. 
Genesis41:24 He shulli uttida tiyati laappun lo7o tiyata mittida. Tani ha agumoza marotas yootadis; gido attiin taas agumoza birshiza asi beettibeenna» gides. 
Genesis41:25 Hessafe guye Yooseefey Gibxe kawoza, «Nam7ayka ne be7ida agumota birsheththayka issino. Xoossi ba ooththana hanizayssa kawos qonccisides." 
Genesis41:26 He laappun lo7o miizati laappun layththata; qasse laappun lo7o tiyati laappun layththata; nam7ayka issi mala. 
Genesis41:27 He laappun medha iitanne laafa miizati laappun layththata; qasse carkon shullida paththontta laappun tiyati laappun kosha layththata. 
Genesis41:28 «Tani kawos yootida malakka Xoossi ba ooththana hanizayssa kawos bessides. 
Genesis41:29 Laappun daro kalo layththati Gibxe biittas ubbaas yaana; 
Genesis41:30 Gido attiin laappun kosha layththati izappe kaallidi yaana. He wode Gibxe kaloy wuri dogettana; biittay koshan shocettana. 
Genesis41:31 Kalo layththatappe guye yiza gafa layththati keehi iita gidida gishshas kase kaloy mulekka qofettontta attana. 
Genesis41:32 Nam7uto kawos he agumoy beettiday aazassee giikko hayssa yo7oza Xoossi minththidi kuuyida gishshassa; Xoossi hessa eeson ooththana. 
Genesis41:33 «Ha7i hekko eeson kawoy aadho erateththinne akeekay diza as koyidi Gibxe biittan sunththo. 
Genesis41:34 Hessaththoka laappun kalo layththatappe ichchashanththo kushe shiishshiza alaafeta kawoy shuumo. 
Genesis41:35 Istti yiza kalo layththatan kath shiishshidi kawo aawateththan minjjetto; he kaththaaka katamatan naagetto. 
Genesis41:36 Biittay koshan qohettontta mala ha kaththay Gibxe biittan laappun layththan dendana koshaas minjjettidi de7o» gides. 
Genesis41:37 Histtiin ha yo7ozi Gibxe kawossinne iza oosanchchatas lo7o gididi beettides. 
Genesis41:38 Hessa gishshas kawoy isttas, «Nuni Xoossa Ayanara diza hayssa mala hara as oona demmanee?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis41:39 Hessafe guye kawoy Yooseefe, «Xoossi hayssa ubbaa nena erisida gishshas ne mala aadho erateththinne akeekay diza asi oonikka baawa." 
Genesis41:40 Tani nena ta keeththan shuumays; ta asay wuri nees azazettana; tani neeppe aadhdhanay ta kawoteththa algan xalla gidana» gides. 
Genesis41:41 Hessa gishshas kawoy Yooseefe, «Beya! Tani nena Gibxe biitta ubbaa bollan shuumadis» gides." 
Genesis41:42 Hessafe guye kawoy ba kawoteththa qalabate ba biradhdhefe kessidi Yooseefe biradhdhen aaththides; qasseka Laynoppe dadettida may7o mayzidi iza qoodhenkka worqqa loota aaththides. 
Genesis41:43 Kawoy ba nam7anththo para-gaareza Yooseefe togisides; aylletikka, «Ziggite! Ziggite!» giidi izappe sinththara bida. Hessaththo ooththidi kawoy iza Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla shuumides." 
Genesis41:44 Hessafe guye kawoy Yooseefe, «Tani kawo! Gido attiin neni qaaxxa gontta Gibxe biitta ubbaan oonikka kushe woykko toho qaaththenna» gides." 
Genesis41:45 Kawoy Yooseefe, «Xaafinaate-Pa7inaahe» gi sunththides; izi izas Oona geetettiza katama qeese Phixifaara nayo Asinaato machcho immides. Histtiin Yooseefey kumeththa Gibxe biittaa yuuyi xeellides." 
Genesis41:46 Yooseefey Gibxe kawos ooththanaas doommiza wode izas layththay heedzdzu tamma. Qasse Yooseefey kawo sinththafe kezidi Gibxe biitta ubbaa yuuyi xeellides. 
Genesis41:47 He laappun kalo layththatan biittay keehi daro kath immides. 
Genesis41:48 Yooseefey Gibxe biittan he laappun kalo layththaa kath ubbaa shiishshidi katamatan minjjides. Issi issi katamata yuushon kaxxida kath ubbaa he kataman kataman minjjides. 
Genesis41:49 Yooseefey abba shaamintta mala daro kath minjjides; kaththay wogappe dariin makkanaas dandaybeenna gishshas makki makki qolizayssa aggaagides. 
Genesis41:50 Laappun kosha layththay yaanaappe kase Oona geetettiza katamaa qeese Phixifaara nayo Asinaatippe Yooseefey nam7u attuma nayta yelides. 
Genesis41:51 Yooseefey, «Xoossi tana ta metonne ta aawa soo asa ubbaa dogissides» gishe ba koyro naaza Minaase gi sunththides." 
Genesis41:52 Nam7anththo naazakka, «Xoossi taas ta tuggatida biittan tana ayfissides» gishe Efreeme gi sunththides." 
Genesis41:53 Gibxe biittan diza he laappun kalo layththati wurida. 
Genesis41:54 Qasse Yooseefey kaseti yootida mala laappun kosha layththati doommida. Hara biitta ubbaan koshay dendides; gido attiin Gibxe biitta ubbaan kaththi dees. 
Genesis41:55 Gibxe derey wuri koshattida wode asay, «Kath imma» gi kawos waassiin kawozi Gibxe asaa ubbaa, «Yooseefekko biidi izi yootizayssa ooththite» gides." 
Genesis41:56 Koshay Gibxe biittaa ubbaa gakkida wode Yooseefey kath minjjida keeththata ubbaa doydi kath Gibxe asaas bayzisides; gaasoykka koshay kumeththa Gibxen minnides. 
Genesis41:57 Sa7a ubbaan koshay suullida gishshas biittan diza asay wuri kath Yooseefeppe shammanaas Gibxe yides. 
Genesis42:1 Yaaqoobey Gibxen kaththi dizayssa siyidi ba attuma nayta, «Intte issoy issaara aazas xeeletteetii?" 
Genesis42:2 Be7ite! Gibxen kaththi dizayssa tani siyadis; duge Gibxe biidi nu hayqqontta paxa daana mala heeppe kath nuus shammi ehite» gides. 
Genesis42:3 Hessa gishshas Yooseefe ishati tammati kath shammanaas duge Gibxe bida. 
Genesis42:4 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey Yooseefe ishaa Biniyaame izi qohettanaakko giidi qoppida gishshas iza ishatara yeddibeenna. 
Genesis42:5 Kanaane biittan wolqqama koshay diza gishshas kath shammana bizaytara Isra7eele attuma nayti Gibxe bida. 
Genesis42:6 He wode Yooseefey he biittaa ayssizaadenne biittan diza asaa ubbaas kath bayzisizay iza gidida gishshas Yooseefe ishati gakkida mala, ba hu7e biittan gaththidi izas ziggida." 
Genesis42:7 Yooseefey ba ishata be7ida mala erides shin izi istta erontta asa mala hanqo qaalan istta, «Intte awappe yidetii?» gi oychchides. Isttika, «Kath shammanaas, Kanaane biittafe yidos» gida." 
Genesis42:8 Yooseefey ba ishata erides; istti gidikko iza eribeettenna. 
Genesis42:9 Heerakka Yooseefey istta gishshas agumettida agumoza qoppidi isttas, «Intte dere xomosiza asa; intte nu biittan naagey leppiza baggay awayssako xeellanaas yideta» gides." 
Genesis42:10 Histtiin istti, «Nu godoo! Nuni dere xomosiza as gidokko; nuni ne aylleti kath shammanaas yidos." 
Genesis42:11 Nu wurikka issi aawa nayta. Nuni ne aylleti ammanettiza asa» gida. 
Genesis42:12 Histtiin Yooseefey isttas, «Gidekketa! Intte nu biittan naagoy leppiza baggay awayssako xomosi xeellana yideta» gides." 
Genesis42:13 Gido attiin istti, «Nuni ne aylleti tammanne nam7u ishatanne Kanaane biittan diza issi aawa nayta. Wurseththa kaaloy ha7i nu aawara dees; issoy gidikko dhaydes» gida." 
Genesis42:14 Yooseefey isttas, «Tani inttes yootida malakka intte biitta xomosizayta." 
Genesis42:15 Qasse intte paacettanay hayssana; tumuppe kawoy beyiin! Intte wurseththa kaalo ishay haa yontta ixxiko intte hayssafe beekketa. 
Genesis42:16 Intte yootizayssi tumukkonne paaccanaas, inttefe issaade kiittite; izi intte ishaa ekki yo; attidayti qasho keeththan gam7eeta. Hessa mala gidontta aggiko kawoy beyiin! intte yuuyi yuuyi dere xomosiza asa»" 
Genesis42:17 giidi istta heedzdzu gallassas qasho keeththan yeggides. 
Genesis42:18 Heedzdzanththo gallassan Yooseefey isttas, «Tani Xoossas babbiza asa; intte issi miish ooththiko intte shemppo ashsheeta." 
Genesis42:19 Intte tumukka ammanettiza as gidikko intte ishatappe issoy hayssan qasho keeththan do; attidayti gafida intteso asaas kath ekki biite; 
Genesis42:20 Gido attiin intte qaalay tumu gidana malanne intte hayqqontta mala intte intte wurseththa kaalo ishaa taakko ekki yaanaas koshshees» gides. Isttika ha yo7ozan ero gida. 
Genesis42:21 Istti issoy issaa, «Tumu nu ooththida geney nuna gakkides. Izi ba shemppos hanizaazi ixxiin nuna shoobbiza wode nuni siyishe ixxidos; ha waayey nuna gakkiday hessa gishshassa» gida." 
Genesis42:22 Oroobeeley, «Tani inttena, ‹Naaza bolla nagara ooththofte› gaada yootadis; gido attiin intte siyontta ixxideta. Histtiin ha7i iza suuththaa gomey nuna mootees» gides." 
Genesis42:23 Istti gizayssa Yooseefey erizayssa istti akeekibeettenna; ays giikko izi isttara wokkalen haasayees. 
Genesis42:24 Izi isttafe shaaketti guye simmidi yeekkides; gido attiin qasse isttako simmidi istta haasayssides. Izi Simoona isttafe duuththi ashshidi istti be7ishin iza qachchides. 
Genesis42:25 Yooseefey ba aylleta, «Kath istta ogoro kunththite; istta biraakka zaaridi istta ogoron ogoron yeggite; qasse isttas oge shinqe immite» gi azazides." 
Genesis42:26 Istti izi gida mala ooththidaappe guye Yooseefe ishati kaththaa ba haretan caanidi dendi bida. 
Genesis42:27 Istti oge bolla qamma aqanaas shempidason isttafe issay ba harezas kaththaafe yegganaas ba ogoro birshidi, ogoroza doonan diza ba biraa demmides." 
Genesis42:28 Izi ba ishata, «Ta biray taas simmides; tuma hayssa be7ite! Ta ogoron dees» gides. Istti dagammidi kokkorishe issoy issaakko simmidi, «Xoossi aazas nu bolla hayssa ooththidee?» gida." 
Genesis42:29 Istti Kanaane biittan diza ba aawa Yaaqoobekko soo simmi yiidi ba bolla gakkidayssa ubbaa izas yootida. 
Genesis42:30 Istti izas, «He biittays godaa gidida addezi nuna babisides; hessafe guye izi nuna he biittaa yuuyi yuuyi xomosi xeelliza asa mala ooththi godatides." 
Genesis42:31 Gido attiin nuni izas, ‹Nu ammanettiza asa; dere xomosi xeelliza as gidokko." 
Genesis42:32 Nuni tammanne nam7u ishati issi aawa nayta; issoy dhaydes; wurseththa kaaloy Kanaane biittan ha7i nu aawara dees› gi yootidos. 
Genesis42:33 Histtiin he biittays godaa gidida addezi nuna, ‹Intte ammanettiza as gididayssa tani hayssan erana; intte ishatappe issaa haan ta achchan yeggidi gafida intte soo asaas kath ekki biite." 
Genesis42:34 Intte dere yuuyi yuuyi xomosizaade gidontta, ammanettiza as gididayssa tani erana mala, intte wurseththa kaalo ishaa taakko ekki yiite. Histtiko tani haan attida intte ishaa inttes zaara immana; intteka ha biittan zal7ana dandayeeta› gides» gida." 
Genesis42:35 Istti ba ogoroppe ogoroppe kaththaa qolidi ba ogoron ogoron biray qashora uttidayssa demmida. Isttinne istta aaway he qashora diza biraa be7idi babbida. 
Genesis42:36 Istta aawa Yaaqoobey isttas, «Intte tana ta naytappe mela kessideta; Yooseefey baawa, Simooni baawa; qasse intte Biniyaame efana koyeeta. Wuri taas dhuma girdi gides» gides." 
Genesis42:37 Hessafe guye Oroobeeley ba aawaa, «Tani Biniyaame nees zaara ehontta aggiko ta attuma nayta nam7atakka wodha; tana ammanettada iza ta kushen imma; qasse tani iza zaarada ehana» gides." 
Genesis42:38 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey isttas, «Ta naazi inttenara duge beenna; iza ishay hayqqiin attiday iza xalla; intte efishin ogen iita miishshi iza gakkizaa gidikko intte tana yeehoranne muuzora duufon efana» gides." 
Genesis43:1 Ha7ikka koshay Kanaane biittan minnides. 
Genesis43:2 Histtiin istti Gibxeppe ehida kaththay mulera wuriin istta aaway, «Qasseka guye biidi nuus guuththa kath shammite» gides." 
Genesis43:3 Gido attiin Yuhuday izas, «He addezi nuna, ‹Intte isha inttenara ekki yontta aggiko ta ayfeso nam7anththo be7ekketa› giidi lo7eththi yootides." 
Genesis43:4 Neni nu ishaa nunara yeddiko nuni duge biidi nees kath shammana. 
Genesis43:5 Gido attiin neni iza yeddontta ixxiko nuni duge bookko; ays giikko he addezi nuna, ‹Intte isha inttenara ehontta aggiko intte ta ayfeso nam7anththo be7ekketa› gides» gides." 
Genesis43:6 Isra7eeleykka, «Intte, ‹Nuus hara ishay dees› gi yootidi hayssa ha metoza ta bolla ays ehidetii?» gides." 
Genesis43:7 Isttika izas, «He addezi nu gishshassinne nuso asaa gishshas lo7eththi oychchides. Izi nuna, ‹Intte aaway ha7ikka paxa dizee? Inttes hara ishay dizee?› gi oychchiin nuni izi oychchida oyshozas zaaro immidos. Izikka nuna, ‹Intte ishaa duge haa ekki yiite› gaanayssa nuni aazan erinoo?» gida." 
Genesis43:8 Yuhuday ba aawa Isra7eele, «Nunikka, nenikka, nu naytikka hayqqontta paxa daana mala naaza tanara yedda; nuni ha7i elelidi baana." 
Genesis43:9 Naaza nuus ta waaseteththan imma; iza gishshas tana oychcha; tani iza nees lo7ora zaara ehontta aggiko ta diza wode ubbaan ta oyshettana. 
Genesis43:10 Nuni haan gam7onttaako hanni wode nam7anththo gede gakkidi ha simmana shin» gides. 
Genesis43:11 Hessafe guye istta aawa Isra7eeley isttas, «Hessa gidikko histtite; he addezas kushe genththo miish nu biittan mokkiza miish ubbaafe lo7izayssa doorite; hessika shitto, ees, sawo, karbbe, miththa ayfeta intte ogoron yeggi ekki biite." 
Genesis43:12 Intte ogoro doonan simmida birazi baletan simmidaaz gidana dandayza gishshas biraakka nam7u kushe histti ekki biite. 
Genesis43:13 Qasse intte ishaakka ekkidi he addezakko eeson guye biite. 
Genesis43:14 Izi hankko intte ishaa yeddana mala Biniyaameykka inttenara simmi yaana mala Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay he addezi inttes qadhettana mala ooththo; tani gidikko ta naytappe mela attikonne attays» gides. 
Genesis43:15 Hessa gishshas he asati kushe genththo kase biraas nam7u kushe qasse Biniyaame ekkidi duge Gibxe biidi Yooseefe sinth shiiqida. 
Genesis43:16 Yooseefey ba ishatara Biniyaame be7idi ba keeththa halaqaza, «Ha asata taso ekkada ba; hachcha gallas istti tanara quma maana mala mehe shukkada giigsa» gi azazides." 
Genesis43:17 Histtiin izi Yooseefey izas yootida mala he asata Yooseefeso efides. 
Genesis43:18 Asati Yooseefe soo bida gishshas babbida; isttas, «Istti nuna hayssa ehiday koyro nu ogorora simmi bida biraa gishshas gidontta aggenna; izi nuna qohanaas aylleteththan haaranaassinne nu hareta ekkanaas hanees» gi qoppida." 
Genesis43:19 Hessa gishshas istti Yooseefe keeththaa penge gakkidi keeththaa halaqaza," 
Genesis43:20 «Nu godoo! Nuni koyro kath shammanaas haa yidos; 
Genesis43:21 simmidi bishe nu aqizaason omars nu ogoro ogoro nu birshiin nu biray paccontta nu ogoro ogoro doonan dizayssa demmidos; hessa gishshas ha7i nuni iza guye ekki yidos. 
Genesis43:22 Qasse nuni kath shammanaas hara biraakka ekki yidos. Nu biraa nu ogoro ogoro doonan ooni woththidaakko nu erokko» gi haasayssida. 
Genesis43:23 Histtiin izi isttas, «Aykkoy baa hessas babofte! Intte Xoossi intte aawa Xoossi intte ogoro giddon inttes bira immides; tani intte biraa ekkadis» gides. Hessafe guye Simoona isttako kessides." 
Genesis43:24 He addezi he asata Yooseefe soo efidi istta tohos haath ehiin ba toho meecettida. Istta haretaska harqqo immides. 
Genesis43:25 Yooseefera quma maana mala isttas yootettida gishshas Yooseefey yaana gakkanaas izas immana kushe genththo giigsida. 
Genesis43:26 Yooseefey baso gelida mala istti ba giigsida kushe genththoza izas immidi iza sinththan ba hu7e duge biittan gaththi ziggida. 
Genesis43:27 Izi istta saroteth oychchi simmidi, «Intte taas yootida intte cima aaway lo7i dizee? Ha7ikka izi paxa dizee?» gides." 
Genesis43:28 Histtiin istti, «Ee, ne aylley nu aaway ha7ikka paxa dees; izi lo7okko» gi hokki izas ziggida." 
Genesis43:29 Izi ba aayey naa Biniyaame be7idi isttas, «Intte yootida intte wurseththa kaalo ishay hayssee?» gides. Qasse izi Biniyaame, «Ta naazoo Xoossi nena anjjo» gides." 
Genesis43:30 Yooseefey ba ishaa be7iin izas yeehoy dandayettontta ixxiin yeekkanaas issife issiso pooqqides. Izi ba dumma qol7a gelidi heen yeekkides. 
Genesis43:31 Izi ba ayfeso meecetti simmi kezidi barkka bana minththeththidi, «Quma haa aaththite!» gides." 
Genesis43:32 Histtiin istti izas dumma, iza ishatas dumma, heen izara miza Gibxe asatas dumma aaththida; ays giikko Gibxe asay Ibraawe asaara issife mi erettenna. Hessika Gibxe biitta asaas tunateththa." 
Genesis43:33 Istti Yooseefe sinththan bayray ba bayrateththaa mala kaaloy ba kaaloteththa mala maaran uttida. Istti issoy issaa xeellidi istta wostti utissidaakko be7idi malalettida. 
Genesis43:34 Yooseefey ba gishaappe isttas qumaa gishiza wode, Biniyaame gakkidayssi haratayssafe ichchashu kushe darees; histtiin istti ufayettishe izara midanne uyida." 
Genesis44:1 Yooseefey ba keeththaa halaqazas, «Neni ha asata ogoroy ekkiza keena kath isttas kunththa; istta bira ubbaa istta ogoro ogoro doonan woththa;" 
Genesis44:2 Histtada wurseththa kaaloza ogoro doonan ta bira wancanne iza kaththa biraa woththa» gi azaziin izi Yooseefey gida mala ooththides. 
Genesis44:3 Gadey wontishin he asati ba hareta ekkidi baana mala moyzida. 
Genesis44:4 Istti he katamappe kezidi haakki biichchontta dishin Yooseefey ba keeththaa halaqaas, «Denda! Ha asata guye kaalla; neni ba istta gakkada, ‹Intte ays kiya gishshas iita zaaridetii?›" 
Genesis44:5 ‹Ays ta godaa bira wanca kaysidetii? Hayssi ta goday uyizayssanne qasse xuura miish demmiza wanca gidennee? Hayssi intte ooththidayssi gita qoho› ga» gides. He wode Gibxe biitta asati wanca garsan diza ushshaa be7idi sinththafe aazi hananaakko ereettes. 
Genesis44:6 Histtiin izi istta guyera gakkidi izi gida malakka isttas yootides. 
Genesis44:7 Gido attiin istti, «Nu goday aazas hayssa mala qaala nu bolla haasayzee? Hessa mala miish oosoy nuuppe ne aylletappe haakko!" 
Genesis44:8 Haray attoshin hayssafe kase nu ogoro doonappe demmida biraa Kanaane biittafe guye nees nu zaari ehidayssa ne eraasa. Histtiin ha7i nuni ne godaa sooppe wosttidi bira woykko worqqa kaysizonii? 
Genesis44:9 Ne aylleta nu giddofe he wancay izakkon beettidaadey hayqqo; qasse attida nuni nu godaas aylle gidana» gida. 
Genesis44:10 Izi isttas, «Hessa mala gidikko lo7o; intte gida mala gido; wancaza ekkida uray oonikka ta aylle gidana; hankko attida intte gidikko sarora baana» gides." 
Genesis44:11 Hessafe guye istti eeson ba ogoro ogoro woththi birshida. 
Genesis44:12 Halaqazikka ubbaafe bayratizayssa ogoroppe doommidi wurseththa kaalozayssa gakkanaas koyides; he wancazakka Biniyaame ogoro giddofe demmides. 
Genesis44:13 Histtiin istti muuzottidi ba may7o daakkida; ba ogoro ogoro ba haretan caanidi guye katamaa simmida. 
Genesis44:14 Yuhuday ba ishatara Yooseefekko geliza wode Yooseefey soon dizayssa demmidi istti iza sinththan gufannida. 
Genesis44:15 Yooseefey isttas, «Intte ay pala miish ooththidetii? Ta mala asi xuura miishshi hessaththo demmizayssa erekketiyee?» gides." 
Genesis44:16 Histtiin Yuhuday, «Nu godaas nu ay gaanee? Nuni ay haasayanee? Woykko nuni xilloteth wostti bessanee? Xoossi ne aylleta mooro qonccisides. Histtiin nunakka gidiin he wancay izappe beettidayssika gidiin ta godaas aylle gidana» gides." 
Genesis44:17 Gido attiin Yooseefey, «Hessa mala miish oosoy taappe haakko; ta bira wancazi izappe beettida addezi xalla ta aylle gidana. Histtiko intte intte aawaakko guye saron simmite» gides." 
Genesis44:18 Histtiin Yuhuday izakko shiiqidi iza, «Ta godoo! Tani issi qaala haasayana mala nena woossays; ne kawo Paaroone mala gidikkoka tana ne aylleza bolla hanqettofa." 
Genesis44:19 Neni ta goday nuna ne aylleta, ‹Inttes aaway dizee woykko ishay dizee?› ga oychchadasa." 
Genesis44:20 Nunikka, ‹Nuus cimmida aaway dees; izi cimmidi yelida kaalo naykka dees; he naaza ishay hayqqides; ba aayeeys issi iza xallay attides; aawaykka iza keehi siiqees› gi nees yootidos." 
Genesis44:21 «Nekka ne aylletas nuus, ‹Tani iza beyana mala taas ekki yiite› gadasa." 
Genesis44:22 Nuni nu godaas nees, ‹Ee naazi ba aawappe shaakettanaas dandayenna; shaakettiko iza aaway hayqqana› gidos." 
Genesis44:23 Gido attiin neni ne aylleta, ‹Intte kaalo ishay inttenara duge yontta ixxiko nam7anththo ta ayfeso beyekketa› gadasa." 
Genesis44:24 Nuni ne aylleti nu aawaakko simmi bida wode ne nu goday nuus gidayssa izas yootidos. 
Genesis44:25 «Nu aaway, ‹Ha7ikka simmi guye biidi guuththa kath gujji shammite› giin," 
Genesis44:26 Nuni izas, ‹Nuus kaalo ishay nunara biikkofe attiin guye baanaas dandayokko; ays giikko nu kaalo ishay nunara bontta gidikko nuni he addeza ayfeso beyanaas dandayokko› gidos." 
Genesis44:27 «Histtiin nu aaway ne aylleta nuna, ‹Ta machcha Eraheela taas nam7u attuma nayta yelidayssa intte ereeta;" 
Genesis44:28 Isttafe issoy taappe shaaketti biin tumu iza do7ay puuzereththi mides; hach gakkanaaska tani iza beyabeekke. 
Genesis44:29 Hayssa qasse intte taappe shaakki efiin iita miishshi iza gakkiko intte cimateththan ta bolla ehiza mishay tana wodhana› » gides. 
Genesis44:30 «Hessa gishshas ha7i ta ne aylley guye ta aawaakko biza wode ta aaway naaza ba shemppo mala siiqizayssi, naazi nunara donttayssa beykko hayqqana. Nuni ne aylleti nu aawaa cimateth kayora duufon yeggana." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Tani ne aylley naaza ta waaseteththan ekka yadis; tani iza, ‹Aabboo, tani iza nees saron zaarada ehontta aggiko ta layththa kumeththan ta oyshettana!› ga yoota woththadis." 
Genesis44:33 «Hessa gishshas tani ne aylley ta godaas naaza gishshas aylletada haan attiin naazi ba ishatara guye simmo. 
Genesis44:34 Naazi baynda tani waanada guye ta aawaakko simma boo? Hanenna; ta aaway mishettana miishshaa tana bessofa» gides. 
Genesis45:1 He wode Yooseefey he asaa ubbaa sinththan genccana dandayontta gishshas, «Asa ubbaa ta sinththafe kessite» gi waassides. Hessa gishshas Yooseefey bana ba ishatas erisishin ishatappe attiin haray izara oonikka deenna." 
Genesis45:2 Izi ba qaala dhoqqisidi Gibxe asay iza siyana gakkanaas waassi yeekkides. Kawoza soo asaykka he woreza siyides. 
Genesis45:3 Yooseefey ba ishatas, «Tani Yooseefekko! Ta aaway hanno gakkanaas paxa dizee?» gi oychchides. Gido attiin iza ishati daro dagammida gishshas izas malthe zaaranaas dandaybeettenna." 
Genesis45:4 Histtiin Yooseefey ba ishatas, «Taakko haa shiiqite» gides. Isttika izakko shiiqiin izi isttas, «Tani intte Gibxe biittas bayzida intte ishaa Yooseefekko," 
Genesis45:5 Xoossi tana inttefe sinththe kiittiday asa shemppo ashshanaas gidida gishshas intte tana haa bayzidayssas zil7ettofte. 
Genesis45:6 Koshay ha biittaa geliin hayssi nam7anththo layththa; qasse sinththafe yiza ichchashu layththata giddon asay biitta goyidi kath shiishshanaas dandayenna. 
Genesis45:7 Gido attiin tani inttes zereth biitta bolla ashshana malanne intte shemppo hayssa mala gita atoteththan ashshana mala, Xoossi tana inttefe sinththe ha kiittides." 
Genesis45:8 Hessa gishshas tana haa kiittiday Xoossaa attiin inttena deekketa. Xoossi tana Gibxe kawos aawa, iza aqo ubbaas godaanne Gibxe biitta haarizaade ooththides» gides." 
Genesis45:9 «Ha7i eeson guye ta aawaakko biidi izas ne naa Yooseefey, ‹Xoossi tana Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla godaa kessides; hessa gishshas gam7ontta taakko haa ya." 
Genesis45:10 Neni ta matan Geeseme biittan ne naytara, nayta naytara, dorsatara, mehetara, nees diza ubbaara haan daandeta." 
Genesis45:11 Buroppe ichchashu kosha layththati deettes; nena neso asaanne ne mehe koshay gakkontta mala tani nena mizana› gees giite» gides. 
Genesis45:12 Qasseka Yooseefey isttas, «Ha inttenara haasayzayssi tumu tani Yooseefe gididayssa intteka, ta ishaa Biniyaameykka intte ayfen be7eeta." 
Genesis45:13 Taas Gibxe biittan diza bonchcho intte be7idayssa ubbaa ta aawaas yootite; eesonkka haa duge ekki yiite» gides. 
Genesis45:14 Histtidi ba ishaa Biniyaame idimmi oykkidi yeekkides; Biniyaameykka ba ishaa idimmi oykkidi yeekkides. 
Genesis45:15 Yooseefeykka yeekkishe ba ishata ubbaa yeeri yeeri ekkides. Hessafe guye iza ishati izara haasaya oykkida. 
Genesis45:16 Yooseefe ishata yuussa worey kawo Paaroone keeth gakkida wode kawoynne iza oosanchchati ufayettida. 
Genesis45:17 Kawoy Yooseefe, «Neni ne ishata, ‹Intte mehe caanidi Kanaane biitta simmite;" 
Genesis45:18 Histtidi intte aawaanne intte soo asaa ekkidi guye taakko haa ehite. Tani inttes Gibxe biittan ubbasoppe lo7izaso immana; isttika ha biittaa modhdho kaachana› ga. 
Genesis45:19 Qasseka neni ne ishata, ‹Para-gaareza intte naytassinne intte maccassatas Gibxeppe ekki biidi intte aawaakka ekki yiite." 
Genesis45:20 Gibxe biittan diza ubbaafe aadhdhi lo7iza miish inttes gidana gishshas inttes diza haaro ekki yaana qoppofte› ga yoota» gides. 
Genesis45:21 Histtiin Yaaqoobe nayti gida mala ooththida. Yooseefeykka kawoy azazida mala para-gaaretanne oges gidiza shinqe isttas immides. 
Genesis45:22 Isttas ubbaasikka hu7en hu7en ooraththa may7o immides; gido attiin Biniyaames heedzdzu xeetu saqile biranne ichchashu kumeththa may7o immides. 
Genesis45:23 Izikka ba aawaas Gibxen diza ubbaafe lo7izayssa tammu haren caanidi, qasse oges kath, ukeththinne hara shinqe tammu macca haretan caanidi yeddides." 
Genesis45:24 Yooseefey ba ishata moyzides. Istti bishin izi isttas, «Bishe ogen intte garsan ooyettofte» gides." 
Genesis45:25 Istti Gibxeppe kezidi bida; Kanaane biitta biidi ba aawa Yaaqoobekko gakkida. 
Genesis45:26 Istti izas, «Yooseefey paxa dees! Qasseka izi Gibxe biitta ubbaa haarees» giin Yaaqoobe wozinay dagammida gishshas istta ammanibeenna." 
Genesis45:27 Gido attiin istti Yooseefey baas yootidayssa ubbaa izas yootininne iza ekki ehana mala Yooseefey kiittida para-gaareta izi beyiin, istta aawa Yaaqoobes shemppoy simmides." 
Genesis45:28 Yaaqoobeykka, «Hessi taas gidana; ta naazi Yooseefey hanno gakkanaas paxa dees! Tani hayqqanaappe sinththan baada iza beyana» gides." 
Genesis46:1 Isra7eeley baas dizayssa ubbaa ekki dendidi Bersaabehe gakkides. Heenkka izi ba aawa Yisaaqa Xoossaas yarsho shiishshides. 
Genesis46:2 Xoossi omars agumora iza, «Yaaqoobe, Yaaqoobe» gi xeygiin izi, «Yee!» gi koyides." 
Genesis46:3 «Tani Xoossay ne aawa Xoossa; neni duge Gibxe baanaas babbofa; ays giikko tani nena heen gita kawoteth kessana. 
Genesis46:4 Tani nenara issife Gibxe baana; qasse tani ne zereththaa heeppe kessana. Yooseefey ba kushera ne hayqqishin nena shiishshana» gides. 
Genesis46:5 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Bersaabeheppe dendides; Yaaqoobe attuma nayti ba aawa Yaaqoobe, ba naytanne ba machcheta Gibxe kawoy isttas kiittida para-gaare togisi ekki bida." 
Genesis46:6 Istti Kanaane biittan haarida aqonne mehe ubbaa ekki bida. Yaaqoobeynne iza zereththi wuri izara Gibxe bides. 
Genesis46:7 Izikka ba zereth ubbaa ba attuma nayta, ba macca naytanne nayta nayta ubbaa banara Gibxe ekki bides." 
Genesis46:8 Yaaqoobera Gibxe biitta bida Isra7eele nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. Yaaqoobe bayra nay Oroobeele; 
Genesis46:9 Oroobeele attuma nayti Heenooke, Paalu, Hexiroomenne Karme." 
Genesis46:10 Simoona attuma nayti Yimu7eele, Yaamine, Ohaade, Yaakine, Xoohaarenne Kanaane maccassay naa Sa7oole." 
Genesis46:11 Lewe attuma nayti Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare." 
Genesis46:12 Yuhuda attuma nayti Eera, Oonaane, Seela, Paareesenne Zaraahe; gido attiin Eeraynne Oonaaney Kanaane biittan hayqqida. Paareese attuma nayti Hexiroomenne Hamule." 
Genesis46:13 Yisakoore attuma nayti Tola, Puuwa, Yaashubenne Shimiroone." 
Genesis46:14 Zaabiloone attuma nayti Sereede, Eeloonenne Yaahile7eele." 
Genesis46:15 Hayti Liyay Mesphexoomiyan Yaaqoobes yelida attuma nayta; izi macca naya Diino. Hayti iza naytinne nayta nayti mulera heedzdzu tammanne heedzdza. 
Genesis46:16 Gaade attuma nayti Xafoone, Hagge, Shuune, Exiboone, Ere, Aroodenne Ar7eele." 
Genesis46:17 Aaseere attuma nayti Yimine, Yishiwa, Yishiwenne Barihe; istta michcheyakka Seraho. Barihe attuma nayti Heeberenne Malkki7eele." 
Genesis46:18 Laabay ba naa Liyas immida Zilfay Yaaqoobes yelida nayti nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera tammanne usuppuna. 
Genesis46:19 Yaaqoobe machcheyo Eraheeli attuma nayti Yooseefenne Biniyaame. 
Genesis46:20 Oona geetettiza katama qeese Phixifaara naya Asinaata Yooseefes Gibxen Minaasenne Efreeme yeladus. 
Genesis46:21 Biniyaame nayti Beela, Bekere, Ashibeele, Geera, Na7imaane, Eehe, Orooshe, Muppiime, Huppimenne Araade." 
Genesis46:22 Yaaqoobes yelettida Eraheeli attuma naytinne nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera tammanne oydda. 
Genesis46:23 Daane attuma nay Hushime. 
Genesis46:24 Niftaaleme attuma nayti Yahixele, Gune, Yexirenne Sheleme" 
Genesis46:25 Laabay ba naa Eraheelis immida Bilihay Yaaqoobes yelida naytinne nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera laappuna. 
Genesis46:26 Yaaqoobera Gibxe bida naytinne nayta nayti, iza nayta machcheta gujjontta mulera usuppun tammanne usuppuna." 
Genesis46:27 Gibxen Yooseefes yelettida nam7u nayta gujjiin Gibxe bida Yaaqoobe soo asay mulera laappun tamma. 
Genesis46:28 Sinththati biidi Geeseme biittan bana mokkana mala Yaaqoobey Yuhuda baappe sinththe Yooseefekko yeddides; istti Geeseme gakkida wode," 
Genesis46:29 Yooseefey ba para-gaareza giigsidi ba aawaa Yaaqoobera gaagganaas Geeseme bides. Yooseefey ba aawa demmida mala idimmi oykkidi daro saate yeekkides. 
Genesis46:30 Isra7eeley Yooseefe, «Neni paxa dishin tani ne ayfeso be7ida gishshas hi7a tani hayqqiko metenna» gides." 
Genesis46:31 Hessafe guye Yooseefey ba ishatassinne ba aawa soo asatas, «Tani Gibxe kawozaakko baada izas, ‹Kanaane biittan diza ta ishatinne ta aawa soo asay taakko yida." 
Genesis46:32 Istti miizinne dorsa haarizayta; istti banara ba dorsata, ba miizatanne baas dizayssa ubbaa ekki yida› gaana." 
Genesis46:33 Kawoy inttena xeygidi, ‹Intte oosoy aazee?› gi oychchiko," 
Genesis46:34 intte izas, ‹Nuni ne aylleti naateththafe doommidi nu aawata malakka mehe heemmoos› giite. Histtiko izi inttena Geeseme biittan woththana; ays giikko dorsa heenththanchchay wuri Gibxe asaa achchan kadhettidayta» gides." 
Genesis47:1 Yooseefey gelidi Gibxe kawos, «Ta aawaynne ta ishati ba dorsatara, ba miizatara baas dizaaz ubbaa ekkidi Kanaane biittafe yiidi, ha7i Geeseme biittan deettes» gi yootides." 
Genesis47:2 Izi ba ishatappe ichchashata dooridi kawoza sinth aaththides. 
Genesis47:3 Kawoy he ishata, «Intte oosoy aazee?» gi oychchiin istti kawozas, «Nuni ne aylleti nu aawataththo dorsa heemmoos» gi yootida." 
Genesis47:4 Qasse istti izas, «Kanaane biittan koshay darida gishshas nuus ne aylleta mehetas miza miishshi aykkoka baynda gishshas, nuni hayssan imaththateththan daana yidos; shoobbe nuna ne aylleta Geesemen woththarkkii!» gida." 
Genesis47:5 Kawoy Yooseefe, «Ne aawaynne ne ishati neekko yida." 
Genesis47:6 Histtiin Gibxe derey ne kushen dees gidennee; ha biittan ubbaafe aadhdhidi lo7izason ne aawaanne ne ishata woththa; istti Geeseme biittan detto. Istta giddofe dumma erateththi dizayta ne erizaa gidikko heyta ta meheta bolla shuuma» gides. 
Genesis47:7 Hessafe guye Yooseefey ba aawaa Yaaqoobe gelththidi kawo sinth aaththides. Yaaqoobey Gibxe kawo anjjides. 
Genesis47:8 Kawoykka Yaaqoobe, «Nees aappun layththee?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis47:9 Yaaqoobey kawozas, «Tani yuuya yuuya deyida layththay 130; ta layththay beni ta aawati yuuyi yuuyi deyida layththatappe guuththanne metoy darida layththa» gides." 
Genesis47:10 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey kawoza anjjidi iza sinththafe kare kezides. 
Genesis47:11 Yooseefey ba aawaanne ba ishata Gibxe biittan woththides; kawoy azazida mala Gibxe biittan Eraamise achchan diza ubbasoppe aadhdhidi lo7iza gade isttas immides. 
Genesis47:12 Yooseefey qasse ba aawaas, ba ishatassinne ba aawa soo asaa ubbaas istta nayta qooda mala kath immides." 
Genesis47:13 Gidikkoka koshay darida gishshas biitta ubbaa bolla kaththi dhaydes. He koshaan Gibxe dereynne Kanaane derey nam7ayka qohettida. 
Genesis47:14 Yooseefey Gibxe kath bayzidi Gibxeninne Kanaane biittan diza miish ubbaa shiishshidi Gibxe kawo keeth gelththides. 
Genesis47:15 Gibxe miishshaynne Kanaane miishshay ubbay wuriin Gibxe asay wuri Yooseefekko yiidi iza, «Nuus kath imma; nu miishshay wurida gishshas nuni ne dishin ays hayqqizonii?» gida." 
Genesis47:16 Histtiin Yooseefey isttas, «Intte mehe ekki yiite; intte miishshay wuridaa gidikko tani kath inttes mehera laammana» gides." 
Genesis47:17 Hessa gishshas istti ba mehe Yooseefes ehiin Yooseefey istta para, dorsa, deyshe, miizinne hare kaththara laammides; izi he layth istta mehe ubbaara kath laammi laammi mizi shaachchides." 
Genesis47:18 He layththay wuriin nam7anththo layththan istti izakko yiidi izas, «Nuni nu godaappe qottiza miishshi deenna; nu miishshay wurides; nuus diza mehekka ubbaa nees sheedhdhidos; nu godaas nees nunateththafenne nu gadeppe attiin nu immana miishshi haray deenna." 
Genesis47:19 Ne dishin nu ays hayqqizonii? Nu gadeykka ays dhayzee? Nunakka nu gadezakka kaththara laamma; nuni kawos aylletana; nu gadeykka izas gido; nuni hayqqontta de7on daana malanne nu gadeykka oxxontta mala zereth nuus imma» gida. 
Genesis47:20 Yooseefey Gibxe biitta ubbaa kawos shammides. Gibxeti wuri koshay minnida gishshas ba gadeza bayziin gadezi kawos gidides. 
Genesis47:21 Yooseefey Gibxe asa ubbaa ha gaxappe doommidi he gaxa gakkanaas kawos aylle kessides. 
Genesis47:22 Gidikkoka kawoy qeesetas kath immiza gishshas qeeseta gade shammibeenna. Hessa gishshas qeeseti ba gade bayzibeettenna. 
Genesis47:23 Yooseefey asaa, «Histtiin hach tani inttenanne intte gade kawos shammida gishshas zereth ekkidi intte gaden gaden zerite." 
Genesis47:24 Gido attiin kath maxi gelththiza wode kaththaafe ichchashu kusheppe issi kushe kawos immite. Ichchash kusheppe attida oyddu kushezi intte gades zereth, intteso asaassinne intte naytas quma gido» gides." 
Genesis47:25 Histtiin istti, «Neni nuna ashshadasa! Nu godaa sinththan nuni nashettidaa gidikko nu kawos aylle gidana» gida." 
Genesis47:26 Hessa gishshas Yooseefey Gibxe biittan kaxxida kaththaas ichchash kusheppe issi kushe kawos immizayssi woga gidana mala ooththides. He wogazikka hach gakkanaas eqqi dees. Kawos gidontta gadey qeeseta gade xalla. 
Genesis47:27 Isra7eeleti Gibxe biittan Geeseme geetettizason uttida; istti heen aqota demmida; istti yelettidanne daro corattida. 
Genesis47:28 Yaaqoobey Gibxe biittan 17 layth de7ides. Yaaqoobey de7ida layththay issi xeetanne oyddu tammanne laappuna. 
Genesis47:29 Yaaqoobes hayqo wodey matiin ba naa Yooseefe xeygisidi, «Tani ne sinththan sabettidaa gidikko ne kushe ta gulbate bolla woththada neni taas kiyattanaassinne ammanettanaas ane caaqqa. Tana Gibxen moogoppa." 
Genesis47:30 Gido attiin tani ta aawatan gaaggiza wode tana Gibxeppe efada istti moogettidason mooga» gides. Histtiin Yooseefey, «Tani nena neni gida mala ooththana» gides." 
Genesis47:31 Yaaqoobey iza, «Ane taas caaqqa» gides. Yooseefeykka izas caaqqides; hessafe guye Yaaqoobey ba hiixan gufannidi Xoossas goynnides." 
Genesis48:1 Hessafe guye asay Yooseefes, «Ne aaway sakettees» gi yootiin izi ba nam7u attuma nayta Minaasenne Efreeme ekki bides." 
Genesis48:2 Asay Yaaqoobe, «Beya! Ne nay Yooseefey neekko yides» giin Isra7eeley minettidi ba hiixa bolla dendi uttides." 
Genesis48:3 Yaaqoobey Yooseefe, «Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossi Kanaane biittan Looza geetettizason taas qonccidi heen tana anjjides." 
Genesis48:4 Izi tana, ‹Ta nees yelo immana ne yelotakka darsana; tani nena daro dere histtana. Ha biittaa tani neeppe guye ne zereththas mernaas laata biitta histta immana› gides." 
Genesis48:5 «Histtiin ha7i ne nam7u attuma nayti tani neekko hayssa yaanaappe kase Gibxen nees yelettidayti tayta; Efreemeynne Minaasey taas Oroobeelenne Simoona mala. 
Genesis48:6 Isttafe guye nees yelettidayti ne nayta; istti laattana derey Efreemenne Minaase sunththan summo. 
Genesis48:7 Tani Mesphexoomiyappe simmishin Efraata geetettiza dere gakkana gishin Eraheela Kanaane biittan hayqqiin tani izo Beeteliheeme geetettiza Efraata efiza oge doonan moogadis» gides. 
Genesis48:8 Isra7eeley Yooseefe attuma nayta nam7ata be7idi, «Hayti oonee?» gi oychchides." 
Genesis48:9 Yooseefeykka ba aawaas, «Hayti Xoossi taas haan hayssan immida ta nayta» gides. Histtiin Isra7eeley, «Ta istta anjjana mala taakko haa shiishsha» gides." 
Genesis48:10 Yaaqoobey cimmiin iza ayfey daaburda gishshas demmanaas dandaybeenna. Hessa gishshas Yooseefey ba attuma nayta izakko shiishshiin iza aaway istta idimmidi yeerides. 
Genesis48:11 Yaaqoobey Yooseefe, «Tani ne ayfeso beyana gaada qoppabeekke; gido attiin Xoossi hekko ne naytakka tana bessides» gides." 
Genesis48:12 Yooseefey istta Yaaqoobe gulbate bollafe denththidi ba hu7e biitta gaththi ziggides. 
Genesis48:13 Yooseefey ba nam7u attuma nayta ekkidi Efreeme ba ushachcha baggan Yaaqoobes hadirsa baggara, Minaase ba hadirsa baggan Yaaqoobes ushachcha baggara izakko shiishshides." 
Genesis48:14 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey ba kushe yaanne haa qaaseththi aaththidi ba ushachcha kushe kaalo naaza Efreeme hu7e bolla, ba hadirsa kushe bayra naaza Minaase hu7e bolla woththides." 
Genesis48:15 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Yooseefe, «Ta aawati Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi iza sinththan suuren de7ida Xoossi, ta de7o ubbaan hach gakkanaas tana heemmida Xoossi," 
Genesis48:16 iita miishsha ubbaafe tana ashshida kiitanchchay, ha nayta anjjo. Ta sunththaynne ta aawata Abrahaamenne Yisaaqa sunththay isttan xeygetto. Istti biitta bollan corattetto» gi anjjides." 
Genesis48:17 Yooseefey ba aaway ba ushachcha kushe Efreeme hu7e bolla woththidayssa dosibeenna. Hessa gishshas Efreeme hu7e bollafe denththidi Minaase hu7e bolla woththanaas ba aawa kushe oykkides. 
Genesis48:18 Yooseefey ba aawaas, «Aabboo hessaththo deenna! Bayray hayssa gidontta gishshas ne ushachcha kushe hayssa bolla woththa» gides." 
Genesis48:19 Gido attiin iza aaway ixxidi izas, «Ta naazoo! Ta erays; izikka gita dere gidana. Gidikkoka kaalo ishay izappe aadhdhi gitatana; iza zereththayka daro gita kawoteth gidana» gides." 
Genesis48:20 Izi he gallas istta anjjidi, «Isra7eele nayti anjjo anjjiza wode, ‹Xoossi inttena Efreeme malanne Minaase mala ooththo› giidi intte sunththan anjjana» gides. Histtidi Efreeme Minaaseppe sinththe aaththides." 
Genesis48:21 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Yooseefe, «Ta hayqqana gays; gido attiin Xoossi inttenara gidana; qasse izi intte aawata biitta inttena guye zaarana." 
Genesis48:22 Qasse nena ne ishatara gakkiza biittaafe gisha darssada nees immays; hessika tani Amooretappe ta mashshaninne tooran ola ekkida biitta» gides. 
Genesis49:1 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey ba attuma nayta xeygidi, «Sinththafe inttes hananayssa tani inttes yootana mala haa shiiqite." 
Genesis49:2 «Intteno Yaaqoobe naytoo! Issife haa shiiqidi siyite; intte aaway Isra7eeley inttes yootizayssa ezgite. 
Genesis49:3 «Oroobeele ta naa bayrazoo, neni ta wolqqa; ta minoteththas koyro; neni bonchchonkka wolqqankka ubbaafe aadhdhaasa." 
Genesis49:4 Neni bixalay baynda para mala; ne dosidaa hanaasa; neni ne aawa hiith kezadasa; ne aawa hiiththaaka tunisadasa. Hessa gishshas halaqateththi nees bessenna. 
Genesis49:5 «Simooninne Lewey ishantta; istti iita ooththanaas mashshanne toora ekkeettes. 
Genesis49:6 Tani istta zoreteththan gelikke; tani istta shiiqosonkka uttike. Ays giikko istti ba hanqon as wodhidanne bana ekka ekka giin boorata gildayi qanxxida. 
Genesis49:7 Istta iita hanqoynne istta meqeththa iitateththi qanggettidaaz gido! Tani istta Yaaqoobe asaa giddon laallana; Isra7eele biittan dharccana. 
Genesis49:8 «Yuhuda ne ishati nena galatana; neni ne morkketa morge naaqqa oykkana; ne aawa nayti nees hokkidi ziggana. 
Genesis49:9 Yuhuda neni wodalla gaammo mala; ta naazoo! Neni shankkati oykkidi, cogotti ichchida gaammo mala. Neni asi bana bosheththanaas koyontta macca gaammo mala." 
Genesis49:10 Dere haarizaadey yaana gakkanaashe, kawoteththaa algay Yuhudappe, halaqateththa guufey iza keeththafe shaakettenna. Qasse dere asay izas azazettana." 
Genesis49:11 Izi ba hare kaththa giddon ba hare gutteka doorettida kaththan qachchana. Izi ba haath woyne ushshan, ba may7o qasse woyne maadhan meeccana." 
Genesis49:12 Iza ayfey woyne ushshafe aadhdhi zo7ana; iza achchayka maaththafe aadhdhi boottana. 
Genesis49:13 «Zaabilooney abba doonan daana; iza biittay daro markabetas shemposo gidana; iza zaway Sidoona gakkana. 
Genesis49:14 «Yisakoorey nam7u goday go7ettiza mino hare mala. 
Genesis49:15 Izi ba shempizasoy lo7o gididayssanne ba derey ufayssizaaz gididayssa be7idi, tooho tookkanaas ba zokko ziqqi histtidi, aylleteththa ooso ooththana." 
Genesis49:16 «Daaney Isra7eele qommotappe issaas pirdiza daanna gidana. 
Genesis49:17 Daaney para toggidaadey guye kundana mala para qirphe dukkiza oge doonan diza haso shooshsha. 
Genesis49:18 «Abeet Godoo! Ta ne maado naagays. 
Genesis49:19 «Gaadey bonqqizaytan deshettana; gido attiin izikka istta geedo kaallidi istta bonqqana. 
Genesis49:20 «Aaseere maadday aakkana; kawotas izi lo7o quma immana. 
Genesis49:21 «Niftaalemey qashettontta yeda diza, lo7o laaqqata yeliza genessa." 
Genesis49:22 «Yooseefey melontta pultto haaththa achchan tokettada, izi ayfey lasha bollara alalettana gakkanaas ayfe immiza miththay mala." 
Genesis49:23 Wondafeza dukkizayti iza bolla worajjida; ba wondafenkka gooddi gooddi caddeettes. 
Genesis49:24 Gido attiin Yaaqoobe Godaa Xoossa wolqqan iza heemmiza Isra7eele zaallan iza wondafey minnides; iza mino qeseykka pilatides. 
Genesis49:25 Nena maaddiza ne aawa Xoossan Ubbaa Dandayzayssaninne nena anjjiza Xoossan pude bollafe beettiza maadoninne garsa biittafe beettizan anjjon qasseka aayi uloppenne dhanththafe beettiza anjjon nena anjjana. 
Genesis49:26 Ne aawa anjjoy beni wodeppe hanno gakkanaas minni diza zumatappenne mernaa zumata ubbaafe aadhdhees. Hessa gishshas hayssi ha anjjoy wurikka Yooseefe gakko. Ba ishata bolla halaqa gidida Yooseefe bolla wodhdho. 
Genesis49:27 «Biniyaamey bonqqiza kana suyte mala. Ba shankkatidayssa maalado mees; ba di7idayssa omars gishereththees» gides. 
Genesis49:28 Hayti tammanne nam7u Isra7eele qommota; qasse istta aaway istta issaa issaa istta hano mala isttas bessiza anjjo hessaththo anjjides. 
Genesis49:29 Hessafe guye izi isttas, «Tani ta aawatan gaaggana gays; tana Hiite as Efroone gaden diza gongolon, ta aawatara moogite." 
Genesis49:30 Hessika Kanaane biittan, Mamire achchan diza Makipheele geetettiza gongolo; hayssika Abrahaamey moogos Hiite as Efrooneppe gadaara gaththi shammida gongolo." 
Genesis49:31 Abrahaameynne iza machcheya Saaray heen moogettida; Yisaaqinne iza machcheya Irbiqaykka heen moogettida; tani qasse Liya heen moogadis. 
Genesis49:32 He gadezinne izan diza gongoloy Hiitetappe shamettidayssa» gi azazides. 
Genesis49:33 Yaaqoobey ba naytas azazo wursidaappe guye ba toho pude ba hiixan shiishshi ekkidi hayqqidi ba aawatan gaaggides. 
Genesis50:1 Yooseefey ba aawaa aha bolla kundidi yeekkidessinne iza yeerides. 
Genesis50:2 Hessafe guye Yooseefey dhale shiishshiza ba oosanchchata ba aawa Isra7eele aha sawiza shitto tiydi melissana mala azaziin istti tiydi melissida. 
Genesis50:3 Shitto tiyoy xalla 40 gallas kumeth wursides; ays giikko hayssi tiyoy wonakka oyddu tammu gallas ekkees. Gibxe asati izas laappun tammu gallas yeekkida. 
Genesis50:4 Yeeho gallassati aadhdhiin Yooseefey Gibxe kawo keeththaa asata, «Tani intte sinththan sabettidaa gidikko kawos hizgi yootite;" 
Genesis50:5 Ta aaway tana issi caaqo caaqisides; izi tana, ‹Tani hayqqana hanays; tani taas Kanaane biittan woocida gongolo duufon tana mooga› gides. Hessa gishshas, ‹Ha7i tani pude baada ta aawa moogana mala yeddarkkii! Hessafe guye tani simmana› » gides." 
Genesis50:6 Histtiin kawoy, «Izi nena caaqisida mala pude baada ne aawa mooga» gides." 
Genesis50:7 Yooseefey ba aawa mooganaas pude bides. Kawoza oosanchchati wuri, iza kawoteththa keeththan diza gita asay wuri Gibxe biittan diza gita asay wuri Yooseefe kaallidi bides." 
Genesis50:8 Qasse Yooseefe soo asay wuri iza ishatinne iza aawa soo asay izara biin; istta naytinne mehey xalla Geesemen attida. 
Genesis50:9 Para-gaaretikka toga asaykka izara pude bides; iza kaallidi bida asay keehi daro. 
Genesis50:10 Istti Yordaanoose shaafaa achchan diza Axaade geetettiza bale gakkidi ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi izas zilalidanne yeekkida; heen Yooseefey ba aawa yeehon laappun gallas uttides. 
Genesis50:11 He biittan diza Kanaane asati Axaade geetettiza yeeho balen he yeehoza be7idi, «Gibxe asay ay misha yeeho yeekkizoo!» gida. Hessa gishshas Yordaanoose achchan diza he soy, Gibxeta yeeho geetettides." 
Genesis50:12 Yaaqoobe nayti ba aaway istta azazida mala ooththida; 
Genesis50:13 Iza ahaa Kanaane biitta efidi Mamire achchan diza Makipheele geetettiza gongolon, Abrahaamey Hiite as Efrooneppe moogos shammida gaden iza moogida." 
Genesis50:14 Yooseefey ba aawa moogidaappe guye, ba ishatanne iza aawa mooganaas izara bida hara asata ubbaara Gibxe simmides." 
Genesis50:15 Istta aaway hayqqidayssa be7idi, Yooseefe ishati ba garsan, «Ooni erizee Yooseefey nuna ba ulon morkkidi nuni izas ooththida iita miish ubbaas halo kessana koykko, nuni waananee?» gida." 
Genesis50:16 Hessa gishshas Yooseefekko kiita, «Ne aaway hayqqanaappe kase;" 
Genesis50:17 Intte Yooseefe, ‹Neni ne ishata nagaranne istti nena qohida iita qohoza hayyana atto ga› giidi yootite gides. Hessa gishshas ha7i hayyana, nu nagaraa, ne aawa Xoossa aylleta nagaraa atto ga» gida. He kiitay izakko gakkiin, Yooseefey yeekkides." 
Genesis50:18 Hessafe guye iza ishati barkka izakko biidi iza sinththan gufannidi, «Nuni ne aylleta» gida." 
Genesis50:19 Gido attiin Yooseefey isttas, «Babbofte; tana inttes Xoossa gidetiyee?" 
Genesis50:20 Intte taas iitanaas ooththideta shin hayssi daro asay hayqqontta attana mala Xoossi lo7os hayssa ooththides. 
Genesis50:21 Hessa gishshas hekko intte babofte; tani inttenanne intte nayta mizana» giidi, izi istta minththeththidi lo7o qaalan haasayides." 
Genesis50:22 Yooseefey ba aawa soo asaa ubbaara Gibxen gam7ides; izi 110 layth de7ides. 
Genesis50:23 Efreeme nayta, heedzdzanththo yeleta gakkanaas be7ides; qasse Minaase naa Maakire naytakka izi ba naa mala histtides." 
Genesis50:24 Hessafe guye Yooseefey ba ishata, «Tani hayqqana gays; gido attiin Xoossi inttena maaddanaas tumu wochchana; izi inttena ha biittafe kessidi Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes immana giidi caaqqida biittaa zaari efana» gides." 
Genesis50:25 Yooseefey Isra7eele nayta, «Xoossi inttena maaddanaas tumu xomosiza wode, intte ta meqeththa ha biittafe pude ekki biite» giidi caaqechides." 
Genesis50:26 Yooseefey 110 layth de7idi hayqqiin, istti shitton iza aha tiydi melissidaappe guye Gibxe biittan wongire giddon woththida." 
Exodus1:1 Baso asa ubbaa ekki Yaaqoobera Gibxe bida Yaaqoobe nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli xaafettides. 
Exodus1:2 Isttika Oroobeele, Simoona, Lewe, Yuhuda," 
Exodus1:3 Yisakoore, Zaabiloone, Biniyaame," 
Exodus1:4 Daane, Niftaaleme, Gaadenne Aaseere." 
Exodus1:5 Yaaqoobe zereththati mulera laappun tamma; Yooseefey kasetidi Gibxe biidi heen dees. 
Exodus1:6 Yooseefey, iza ishatinne he yeletay wurikka hayqqides;" 
Exodus1:7 gido attiin Isra7eele zereththati yelettidi keehi darida; he biittaa kumana gakkanaas istti keehi corattida. 
Exodus1:8 Hessafe guye Yooseefe erontta ooraththa kawoy Gibxe biittan dendides. 
Exodus1:9 Izi ba asaa, «Be7ite; hayti Isra7eele asay nuuppe keehi daridanne wolqqamida." 
Exodus1:10 Haa yiite, ane nuni istta hiillan oykkoos; histtontta aggiko istti kaseppe gede dari dari baana. Geelli gida olay dendiko istti nu morkketara gaaggidi nuna olananne biittaa yeggidi baana» gides." 
Exodus1:11 Hessa gishshas deexo ooson istta tuggasana mala istta bolla halaqata doorida. Isttika kawos Piitoomenne Eraamise geetettiza dumma dumma minjja miishshata woththiza katamata keexxida. 
Exodus1:12 Gido attiin Gibxe asay istta keehi waayisida wode istti gujetti gujetti yelettidanne biitta gakkida. Hessa gishshas Gibxe asay Isra7eele nayta ixxides. 
Exodus1:13 Hessa gishshas istta daro daabursiza ooson waayisida. 
Exodus1:14 Wolqqama ooson, simintoninne xuube medhon, qasse goshshe goyson, istta duussan un7eththida; daabursiza ooso ubbaa qadhetay baynda istta oosisida." 
Exodus1:15 Gibxe kawoy Ibraawe maccassata yelissiza Sipooronne Puuho geetettiza nam7u maccassatas," 
Exodus1:16 «Ibraawe maccassati yeliza wode intte yelissishin yelettidayssi attuma naa gidikko wodhite; gido attiin macca naa gidikko wodhopite» 
Exodus1:17 Gido attiin Yelissizayti Xoossas babbidi Gibxe kawoy istta azazida mala ooththibeettenna; wodhontta attuma nayta paxa aggida. 
Exodus1:18 Hessafe guye Gibxe kawoy he yelissizayta xeygidi, «Intte ays hayssaththo ooththidetii? Attuma nayta ays paxa aggidetii?» gi oychchides." 
Exodus1:19 Yelissizayti zaaridi, «Ibraawe maccassati Gibxe maccassata mala gidettenna; istti mino gidida gishshas yelissizayti gakkanaappe sinththatidi yelichcheettes» gida." 
Exodus1:20 Hessa gishshas Xoossi yelissizaytas kiyides. Asaa qoodaykka gujetti gujetti biidi kaseyssafe gede daridesinne minnides. 
Exodus1:21 Qasse yelissizayti Xoossas babbida gishshas Xoossi isttas yelo immi anjjides. 
Exodus1:22 Hessafe guye kawoy ba asaa ubbaa, «Ibraawetappe yelettiza adde naa ubbaa Nayle geetettiza Shaafa haaththan olite; gido attiin macca nay yelettiko paxa aggite» giidi azazides." 
Exodus2:1 He wode issi Lewe qommo gidida addey Lewe macca nayo machcho ekkides; 
Exodus2:2 iza qanththatada adde naa yeladus. Naazikka mala lo7o naa gididayssa beyada heedzdzu agina qottadus. 
Exodus2:3 Gido attiin iza hessafe daro qottanaas dandayonttayssa erada, shaccafe keeshe izas daddada shidan meeshada, naaza iza giddon woththada Nayle shaafa doonan duureessa geetettiza maata giddon woththadus." 
Exodus2:4 Iza michcheya iza bolla aazi hananaakko beyanaas haahon eqqada xeellawus. 
Exodus2:5 Gibxe kawo naya bolla meecettanaas Nayle shaafa wodhdhadus; izi macca aylletikka haaththa doonan yaanne haa hemetteettes; iza keesheza duureessa geetettiza maata giddon beyada, baada ekkada yaana mala ba aylleyo kiittadus;" 
Exodus2:6 keesheza doyada he guuththa naaza beyadus. Izi yeekkiza gishshas izas qadhettada, «Hayssi Ibraaweta guuththa naytappe issaa gidontta aggenna» gadus." 
Exodus2:7 He wode iza michcheya kawaa nayo, «Nees ha naaza dhanththanaas Ibraawetappe issi maccas ehanaas boo?» gaada oychchadus." 
Exodus2:8 Histtiin iza, «Ee, ba» gadus. Naya baada he naaza aayo ehadus." 
Exodus2:9 Kawoza naya he maccassayo, «Hayssa naaza efada taas dhanththaashsha; tani nees damoza qanxxana» gadus. Maccassaya naaza efada dhanththa dichchadus." 
Exodus2:10 Naazi dicciin kawo naykko iza ehiin izi izis naa gidides; «Tani iza haaththafe kessadis» gaada iza Muse ga sunththadus. 
Exodus2:11 Musey diccidi gita gididi issi gallas ba asay dizaso biidi istti deexo ooso ooththishin be7ides. Issi Gibxe biitta asi iza asata Ibraawetappe issaa wadhdhishin be7ides. 
Exodus2:12 Izi yaanne haa xeelliin oonikka bayndayssa be7idi he Gibxe addeza wodhidi ace giddon kaashi qottides. 
Exodus2:13 Wonteththa gallas kezidi nam7u Ibraaweti ba garsan wadhettizayta be7ides. Qohizayssa izi, «Neni ne as gidida Ibraaweza ays wadhdhay?» gi oychchides." 
Exodus2:14 He addezikka, «Nena nu bolla godaanne daanna histtiday oonee? Neni Gibxe addeza wodhidayssa mala tanakka wodhana qoppay?» giin Musey, «Tani ooththidayssi erettichchides» gi babbides." 
Exodus2:15 Kawozi hessa siyidi Muse wodhanaas koyides; gido attiin Musey kawaappe betidi Midiyaame biittan daanaas biidi issi haaththa olla doonan uttides. 
Exodus2:16 He wode issi Midiyaame qeeses laappun macca nayti deettes; istti he haaththa ollaako ba aawaa dorsata haath ushshanaas yiidi gonggen haath duuqqi kunththida. 
Exodus2:17 Heemmizayti yiidi macca nayta gooddida; gido attiin Musey dendi eqqidi istta ashshidessinne istta dorsata haath ushshides. 
Exodus2:18 Istti ba aawa Yootorekko biin izi, «Hach waani eeson yidetii?» gi oychchides." 
Exodus2:19 Istti zaaridi, «Issi Gibxe biitta adde dayssi nuna mehe heemmizaytappe ashshides; qasseka nuus haaththeka duuqqidi nu dorsatakka ushshides» gida." 
Exodus2:20 Histtiin izi ba macca nayta, «Ha7i izi awan dizee? Intte he addeza ays heen aggidetii? Ane iza xeygite; yiidi kath mo» gides." 
Exodus2:21 Museykka he addezara heen daanaas dosides; addezikka ba nayo Xipooro Muses machcho histti immides. 
Exodus2:22 Xipoora adde naa yeliin Musey naaza, «Tani asa biittan bete asa» gishe Gershoome gi sunththides." 
Exodus2:23 Musey Midiyaame biittan diza daro layththata garsan Gibxe kawoy hayqqides. Isra7eele asay ba aylleteththafe dendidayssan oolidanne waassida; aylleteththa waayey dariin istti waassida waasoy pude Xoossako gakkides. 
Exodus2:24 Xoossi istta oolezanne istta waasoza siyidi izi Abrahaamera, Yisaaqaranne Yaaqoobera caaqqida caaqo qaalaa yuushshi qoppides." 
Exodus2:25 Hessa gishshas Xoossi Isra7eele nayta xeellidi istta hanoteth qoppides. 
Exodus3:1 Musey Midiyaame biitta qeese, ba bollo Yootore dorsata heemmees; izi dorsata laaggi ekki biidi bazzo biitta gaxa gakkanaas efidi Siina geetettiza Xoossa zumaakko gakkides." 
Exodus3:2 Heen Xoossa kiitanchchay qeeri wora giddon eexxiza tama laco giddon izas beettides; wora giddon tama lacoy diikkoka tamay woraa monttayssa Musey be7ides. 
Exodus3:3 Hessa gishshas Musey, «Tani gede baada ays woray taman meetettonttaako hayssa ooraththa miish ane beyays» gi qoppides." 
Exodus3:4 Izi beyanaas gede bishin Xoossi be7idi woraa giddon dishe iza, «Musee! Musee!» gi xeygides. Museykka, «Yee!» gi koyides." 
Exodus3:5 Xoossi iza, «Haa shiiqoppa; neni eqqidasoy geesh gidida gishshas ne tohon diza caammaa kessa» gides." 
Exodus3:6 Qasseka Xoossay iza, «Tani ne aawata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe Xoossa» gides. Histtiin Musey Xoossaa xeellanaas babbida gishshas ba ayfeso kammides." 
Exodus3:7 Qasseka GODAY, «Tani Gibxe biittan ta asay waayiza waaye lo7eththa beyada, istti ba godatappe dendidayssan waassiza waaso siyadissinne istta waaye eradis." 
Exodus3:8 Hessa gishshas tani istta Gibxe biitta asata kusheppe ashshanaasinne he biittafe istta kessada, aahonne lo7o biitta efanaas haa duge wodhdhadis. He biittay maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta; ha7i he biittan Kanaaneti, Hiiteti, Amooreti, Paarizeti, Hiiwetinne Yaabuseta geetettiza asati deettes." 
Exodus3:9 Ha7i Isra7eele nayta waasoy taakko gakkides; Gibxe biitta asati istta qohiza qohokka ta beyadis; 
Exodus3:10 hessa gishshas ha7i ba; ta asata, Isra7eele nayta Gibxeppe kessana mala, Gibxe kawozaakko tani nena kiittays» gides." 
Exodus3:11 Gido attiin Musey Xoossaas, «Kawozaakko baanaassinne Isra7eele nayta Gibxeppe kessanaas tani oonee?» gides." 
Exodus3:12 Xoossika iza, «Tani nenara gidana; qasse tani nena kiittidayssas malatay hayssa; neni he asaa Gibxeppe kessida wode hayssa zuma bollan intte taas Xoossas goynnana» gides." 
Exodus3:13 Musey Xoossaas, «Gido attiin tani Isra7eele naytakko baada isttas, ‹Intte aawata Xoossi tana intteko kiittides› giikko, istti tana, ‹Iza sunththi oonee?› gi oychchiko he wode tani isttas ay ga yootanee?» gides." 
Exodus3:14 Xoossika Muses, « ‹Tani tanakko; hessa gishshas kasekka ha7ikka diza Xoossi tana intteko kiittides› gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus3:15 Qasse Xoossi Muses, «Neni Isra7eele naytas, ‹GODAY intte aawata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne, Yaaqoobe Xoossi izi tana intteko kiittides› ga yoota; hayssi yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas tani erettiza ta sunththa." 
Exodus3:16 «Hee baada Isra7eele cimata shiishshada GODAA intte aawata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe Xoossi taas qonccidi, ‹Tani intteko yadis; Gibxen intte bolla aazi oosettidaakko tani beyadis." 
Exodus3:17 Tani inttena Gibxe biittaa waayeppe kessada pude maaththinne eessi goggiza Kanaaneta, Hiiteta, Amooreta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta biitta efana gadis› gides» gaada yoota." 
Exodus3:18 «Isra7eele cimati ne qaala siyana; hessafe guye neninne he cimati Gibxe kawozaakko biidi izas, ‹GODAA Ibraaweta Xoossay nuus qonccides. Ha7i nuni heedzdzu gallassa oge bazzo biidi GODAAS nu Xoossaas yarsho yarshana mala nuna yedda› giite." 
Exodus3:19 Gido attiin ta wolqqara yedisontta dishin Gibxe kawoy inttena yeddonttayssa tani erays. 
Exodus3:20 Hessa gishshas tani ta kushe yeddada istta giddon tani ooththiza ta malaatata ubbaan Gibxe asaa shocana. Hessafe guye izi inttena yeddana. 
Exodus3:21 «Intte ke7iza wode Gibxe asay inttes kiyana mala ta ooththana gishshas ke7ishe mela kushe ke7ekketa. 
Exodus3:22 Ibraawe maccassati wuri ba guta Gibxe maccassatanne ba soon diza Gibxe maccassata oonakkoka gidiin biidi bira, worqqanne adde naytinne macca nayti may7ana may7ota, ‹Immite› gi oychchana. Hessaththo ooththidi intte Gibxe asaa aqo ubbaa buuri ekkidi kezana» gides." 
Exodus4:1 Museykka GODAAS, «Istti tana ammanontta ixxiko woykko tani yootizayssa siyontta ixxidi, ‹GODAY nees qonccibeenna› giikko ta waanoo?» gides." 
Exodus4:2 GODAY iza, «Hessi ne kushen dizay aazee?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Guufekko» gides." 
Exodus4:3 GODAYKKA iza, «Ane iza gaden yegga» gides. Musey he guufeza gaden yeggiin shoosh gidides; histtiin Musey izappe woxxi kichchides." 
Exodus4:4 Hessafe guye GODAY iza, «Ne kushe yeddada shooshshaa goyna oykka» gides. Musey yeddidi shooshshaa goyna oykkiin shooshshazi iza kushen simmidi guufe gidides." 
Exodus4:5 GODAY, «Hayssi hanidayssi ne aawata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe Xoossi nees qonccidayssa istti ammanana malassa» gides." 
Exodus4:6 Qasseka GODAY iza, «Ne kushe ne shophpha giddo gelththa» giin Musey ba kushe ba shophpha giddo gelththides; izi ba kusheza shophphaafe kessiza wode kushezi qaaratidi shachcha mala booxxides." 
Exodus4:7 GODAY iza, «Ne kushe ne shophpha giddo zaara gelththa» gides. Histtiin Musey ba kushe ba shophpha giddo zaari gelththi kessiza wode iza kushey simmidi hankko bollaa mala gidides." 
Exodus4:8 Qasseka GODAY izas, «Istti nena ammanontta aggiko koyro malaataa ammanontta ixxiko, nam7anththoza ammanana." 
Exodus4:9 Gido attiin istti Xoossi ooththiza ha nam7u malaatata ammanontta aggiko woykko neni yootizayssa siyontta ixxiko, Nayle shaafappe haath duuqqa ekkada biitta bolla gussa; neni shaafaappe ekkida haaththi biitta bolla suuth gidana» gides." 
Exodus4:10 Gido attiin Musey GODAAS, «Abeet Godoo! Tani hayssafe kasekka, woykko neni ne ayllezas taas yootoosoppe haa simmiinkka tani lo7eththa haasayanaas dandayontta as gidikkinaa?» gides." 
Exodus4:11 GODAY izas, «Asas doona medhdhiday oonee? As duude, woykko tulle ooththizay oonee? Xeelanne qooqe ooththizay oonee? Tana GODAA gidikkinaa?" 
Exodus4:12 Neni ha7i ba; ne haasayana mala ta nenara gidananne nena maaddana; neni yootanayssaka ta nena tamaarsana» gides. 
Exodus4:13 Gido attiin Musey GODAA, «Abeet Godoo! Hayssa ooththanaas hara as kiittarkkii!» gides." 
Exodus4:14 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse bolla keehi hanqettidi iza, «Lewe baggafe gidida ne isha Aarooney dees gidennee? Izi lo7o haasayana dandayzayssa tani erays; ha7i izi nenara gaagganaas yishe oge bollan dees; izi nena be7idi ufayettana." 
Exodus4:15 Neni izas yoota; izi yootana qaalaakka ne iza erisa; tani inttena nam7atakka haasayan maaddananne intte ooththanayssa tamaarsana. 
Exodus4:16 Izi asaas ne gishshas yootana; hessika izi nees ne doona mala gidiin ne izas haasayza Xoossa mala gidana guussa. 
Exodus4:17 Malaatata izan ooththanaas neni hayssa guufeza ekka» gides. 
Exodus4:18 Hessafe guye Musey ba bollo, Yootorekko simmi biidi, «Hanno gakkanaas asay paxa dizaakko beyanaas tani guye ta asaakko Gibxe boo?» gides. Yootoreykka Muse, «Ee ba; saron gakka» gides." 
Exodus4:19 Musey Midiyaame biittan dishin GODAY iza, «Nena wodhanaas koyida asati wuri hayqqida gishshas guye Gibxe biitta simma ba» gides." 
Exodus4:20 Musey ba machchiyonne ba attuma nayta hare togisi ekkidi guye Gibxe simmishe Xoossa guufe oykki bides. 
Exodus4:21 GODAY Muse, «Neni Gibxe simmada biza wode tani nees immida wolqqan neni ooththana malaatata ubbaa Gibxe kawo Paaroone sinththan neni ooththanayssa baloppa. Histtiinkka izi asaa yeddontta mala tani iza wozina muumisana." 
Exodus4:22 He wode tani GODAY gizayssa kawaas: Isra7eeley taas bayra naa; 
Exodus4:23 Ta naazi taas goynnanaas ne yeddana mala tani nees yootadis shin neni iza yeddontta ixxadasa; hessa gishshas, ‹Tani nees bayra naaza wodhana› gides gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus4:24 Oge bolla imaththi shempizason GODAY Musera gaaggidi iza wodhanaas koyides. 
Exodus4:25 Iza machchiya Xipooray qara shuch ekkada ba naaza qaxxaradus. Qaxxarada he shurteza Muse toho bochchada Muse, «Neni taas tumu suuththa mishira» gadus." 
Exodus4:26 Hessa gishshas GODAY iza wodhontta aggides. He wode qaxxaraa gaason izas, «Neni taas suuththa mishira» gadus." 
Exodus4:27 GODAY Aaroone, «Neni Musera gaagganaas bazzo ba» giin izi biidi Musera Xoossa zumaa bolla gaaggidi iza yeerides." 
Exodus4:28 Hessafe guye Musey GODAY ba bolla kiittida qaala ubbaa qasseka ooththana mala bana azazida malaatata ubbaa Aaroones yootides. 
Exodus4:29 Museynne Aarooney biidi Isra7eele cimata ubbaa issi bolla shiishshida. 
Exodus4:30 Aarooney GODAY Muses yootida qaala ubbaa isttas yootidessinne malaatata he asaa sinththan ooththides. 
Exodus4:31 Isttika ammanida. GODAY isttako yidayssanne istta waaye be7idayssa siyida mala biitta bolla gufanni goynnida. 
Exodus5:1 Hessafe guye Museynne Aarooney Gibxe kawozaakko biidi izas, «GODAY, Isra7eele Xoossi, ‹Ta asay taas bazzon ba7aale bonchchana mala yedda› gides» gida." 
Exodus5:2 Histtiin kawozi, «Tani izas azazettada Isra7eele yeddanaas he GODAY izi oonee? Tani Godaa erikke; Isra7eelekka yeddike» gides." 
Exodus5:3 Hessafe guye Museynne Aarooney, «Ibraaweta Xoossi nunara gaaggides. Ha7i nuni GODAAS, nu Xoossaas yarsho yarshanaas heedzdzu gallassa oge bazzo giddo baanaas nuna yeddarkkii! Histtontta aggiko izi nuna iita hargen woykko olan wodhana» gida." 
Exodus5:4 Gido attiin Gibxe kawoy, «Inttenoo! Muse! Aaroonee! Asaa ays ooso diggeetii? Simmidi intte oosos biite» gides." 
Exodus5:5 Kawozikka, «Hekko be7ite, ha biittan asay corattides; qasse intte asaa ooso diggeeta» gides." 
Exodus5:6 He gallas kawoy Isra7eele asaa garsafe asaa oosisizaytanne isttafe bollara diza Gibxe halaqata hizgi azazides. 
Exodus5:7 «Hara wodeyssa mala xuube ooththiza uttula asaas ehi immofte; istti uttula baappe koyidi shiishshetto; 
Exodus5:8 Gido attiin istti qoodan kaseyssa gina xuube medhdhidi sheedhdhana mala azazite; kase qoodaappe pacisopite; ays giikko istti azalla; isttas, ‹Nuni nu Xoossaas yarsho yarshana mala nuna yedda› giidi waassizay hessassa." 
Exodus5:9 Istti ooson sheekkana malanne wordo haasaya siyontta aggana mala isttas ooso deexeththite» gides. 
Exodus5:10 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asaa garsafe asaa oosisizaytinne isttafe bollara diza Gibxe halaqati kezidi asaas, «Kawozi, ‹Hayssafe guye ta inttes uttula mulekka immike." 
Exodus5:11 Intte uttula demmana dandayzasoppe intte baggara koyi ehite shin intte kase sheedhdhiza xuube qooday mulekka paccofo› gides» gida. 
Exodus5:12 Histtiin asay uttula shiishshanaas Gibxe biitta ubbaan laalettides. 
Exodus5:13 Gibxe halaqati isttas, «Kase inttes uttula immiza wode intte hach hach ooththizayssa mala ooththite» giidi istta bolla godatida." 
Exodus5:14 Isra7eele nayta oosisizaytas waanna halaqati, «Intte kase ooththizayssa mala xuube qamma woykko hach ays ooththi wursibeekketii?» gi oychchidi wadhdhida" 
Exodus5:15 Hessafe guye Isra7eele naytappe doorettidi asaa oosisizayti biidi kawozas waassida; istti izas, «Nuni ne aylleta gidishin nu bolla hayssaththo aazas ooththay?" 
Exodus5:16 Ne aylletas nuus uttula imettenna; gido attiin, ‹Xuubeza medhdhite› giidi nuna ne aylleta wadhdheettes shin balay ne asaa bolla dees» gida." 
Exodus5:17 Gido attiin kawozi istta, «Ha azallati! Intte azallata! Hessa gishshassa intte zaari zaaridi, ‹Nuni GODAAS yarshanaas baana nuna yedda› geeta." 
Exodus5:18 Ha7i biidi ooththite; istti inttes aykko galabaka immettenna; gido attiin intte kaseyssafe pacisontta xuubeza medhdhite» gides. 
Exodus5:19 Isra7eele naytappe doorettidi asaa oosisizayti, «Intte hach hach medhdhiza xuube qooda kaseyssafe pacisopite» gida giin istti meton gelidayssa erida." 
Exodus5:20 Istti kawoza sinththafe kezidi Museynne Aarooney isttara gaagganaas naagizayta demmida. 
Exodus5:21 Istti, «Xoossi inttena xeello! Intte bolla izi pirdo! Intte nuna kawoninne iza oosanchchatan ixisideta; qasse istti nuna wodhana mala, mashsha isttas immideta» gida." 
Exodus5:22 Musey GODAAKKO simmidi, «Godoo, neni ha asaa bolla meto ays ehadii? Neni tana kiittiday hayssassee?" 
Exodus5:23 Tani ne sunththan kawaas haasayanaas bida wodeppe doommiin izi ha asaa bolla meto ehides. Qasse nenikka ne asaa mule ashshabeekka» gides. 
Exodus6:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Tani Gibxe kawo bolla ooththanayssa neni ha7i beyana; ta wolqqama qese gaason izi istta yeddana; ta wolqqama qeseppe dendidayssan izi istta ba biittafe kessi gooddana» gides." 
Exodus6:2 Xoossi qasseka Muses, «Tani GODAA;" 
Exodus6:3 tani Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa gidada Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes qonccadis shin tani, ‹GODAA› geetettiza ta sunththan tanateththaa istta erisabeekke." 
Exodus6:4 Qasse tani isttas istti bete gididi de7ida Kanaane biittaa isttas immanaas ta isttara caaqettadis. 
Exodus6:5 Qasseka Gibxe asay aylle histti waayisida Isra7eele nayta waaso siyada ta gelida caaqo qaala qoppadis. 
Exodus6:6 «Hessa gishshas neni Isra7eele naytas, ‹Tani GODAA; tani inttena Gibxe asaa qohoppe kessana; tani inttena istta aylleteththafekka goochcha kessana; qasse tani inttena ta gita wolqqaninne dumma dumma pirdan wozzana." 
Exodus6:7 Tani inttena ta dere histtana; tani intte Xoossaa gidana. He wode ta inttena Gibxe asaa aylleteththafe kessida intte GODAA Mernaa Xoossaa gididayssa intte erana. 
Exodus6:8 Qasse tani inttena Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes immana gaada ta kushe denththada caaqqida biitta ehana; he biittaa tani inttes intte gade histta immana; tani GODAA› ga» gides." 
Exodus6:9 Musey hessa Isra7eele naytas yootides shin istti ufays qanxxida gishshassinne iita aylleteththafe dendidayssan istta wozinay meqqida gishshas istti iza qaalaa siyibeettenna. 
Exodus6:10 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse," 
Exodus6:11 «Hee baada Gibxe kawaas, ‹Isra7eele nayta ne biittafe kessa yedda› gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus6:12 Gido attiin Musey GODAAS, «Isra7eele nayti tayssa siyontta ixxida shin tani doonay birshontta as gidishin kawoy ta gizayssa wostti siyanee?» gides." 
Exodus6:13 GODAY Musenne Aaroone, «Biidi intte Isra7eele asaa Gibxeppe kessana mala tani inttena yeddidayssa Isra7eele asaassinne Gibxe kawos yootite» gi azazides." 
Exodus6:14 Hayssafe kaalli dizayti istta keeththa keeththa halaqata. Isra7eeles bayra naa Oroobeele attuma nayti, Heenooke, Paalu, Hexiroomenne Karme; haytanti Oroobeele qommota. Istta soo asata halaqati hayta." 
Exodus6:15 Qasse Simoona attuma nayti, Yimu7eele, Yaamine, Ohaade, Yaakine, Xoohaarenne Kanaane biitta maccassatappe yelettida Sa7oole; hayti Simoona qommota." 
Exodus6:16 Lewe baggati ba yeleta maaraa mala Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare. Lewey 137 layth de7ides." 
Exodus6:17 Gershoone attuma nayti ba qommon qommon Libinanne Shim7e geetetteetes. 
Exodus6:18 Qaheete attuma nayti Amiraame, Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele. Qa7aatey 133 layth de7ides." 
Exodus6:19 Meraare attuma nayti Mahilenne Mushe geetettizayta. Ba Yeleta maaran Lewe zareti haytantta. 
Exodus6:20 Amiraamey ba aawaa michcheyo Yokaabedo machcho ekkides. Izakka izas Aaroonenne Muse yeladus. Amiraamey 137 layth de7ides. 
Exodus6:21 Yixihaare attuma nayti, Qoore, Nefegenne Zikire." 
Exodus6:22 Uzi7eele attuma nayti, Misha7eele, Elxafaanenne Siitire." 
Exodus6:23 Aarooney Aminadaabe nayo, Ne7asoone michcheyo Elisheebo machcho ekkides. Histtiin iza izas Nadaabe, Abihu, El7ezeerenne Itamaare yeladus." 
Exodus6:24 Qoore attuma nayti, Assire, Hilqaananne Abiyaasaafe; haytanti Qoore qommotas aawata." 
Exodus6:25 Aaroone naa El7ezeerey Puti7eele naytappe issiniyo machcho ekkides; izakka izas Finihaase yeladus. Haytanti ba qommon qommon Lewe keeththa asaa halaqata. 
Exodus6:26 GODAY, «Gibxe biittafe Isra7eele nayta istta cugan cugan kessite» giidi azaziday hayta Musenne Aaroone." 
Exodus6:27 Isra7eele nayta Gibxe biittafe kessizayssa Gibxe kawaas yootidayti Musenne Aaroone. 
Exodus6:28 GODAY Gibxen Muses yootiza wode izas," 
Exodus6:29 «Tani GODAA; tani nees yootizayssa ubbaa neni Gibxe kawaas yoota» gides. 
Exodus6:30 Musey qasse GODAAS, «Tani doonay birshontta as gidida gishshas kawoy tani yootizayssa wostti siyanee?» gides." 
Exodus7:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Beya; tani nena Gibxe kawaas Xoossa mala ooththadis; ne isha Aarooney ne doona gididi ne gishshas haasayana;" 
Exodus7:2 tani nena azazidayssa ubbaa ne isha Aaroones yootandassa; kawozi Isra7eele nayta ba biittafe kessi yeddana mala izi yootana. 
Exodus7:3 Gido attiin tani kawoza wozina minththana; tani Gibxe biittan ta malaatanne maalalissiza miish darsa ooththikokka," 
Exodus7:4 izi intte yootizayssa siyenna. He wode tani ta kushe Gibxe asaa bolla denththana; tani ta dereta Isra7eele nayta wolqqama pirdan Gibxeppe kessana. 
Exodus7:5 Qasse Gibxeti tani ta qese Gibxe asaa bolla denththada Isra7eele nayta istta giddofe kessiza wode tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana» gides. 
Exodus7:6 Museynne Aarooney GODAY istta azazida mala ooththida. 
Exodus7:7 Istti kawozas yootiza wode Muses layththay osppun tamma; Aarooney qasse 83 layththa asa. 
Exodus7:8 GODAY Musenne Aaroone," 
Exodus7:9 «Kawoy inttena, ‹Ane malaata tana bessite› giikko neni Aaroone, ‹Ne guufaa ekkada kawoza sinththan yegga› ga; histtiko izi shoosh gidana» gides." 
Exodus7:10 Histtiin Museynne Aarooney kawozaakko gelidi GODAY istta azazida mala ooththida; Aarooney ba guufe kawoza sinththaninne daannata sinththan yeggiin guufezi shoosh gidides. 
Exodus7:11 Hessafe guye kawozi daro eranchchatanne bitizayta xeygisiin Gibxe dere marotikka ba deren hessaththo ooththida. 
Exodus7:12 Istti wurikka ba guufe guufe gaden yeggiin guufeti wurikka shoosh gidida shin Aaroone guufeya istta guufeta ubbaa mittadus. 
Exodus7:13 Gidikkoka GODAY yootida mala kawoza wozinay minnida gishshas izi istta yo7o siyontta ixxides. 
Exodus7:14 GODAY Muses, «Kawoza wozinay muumiin asaa izi yeddontta ixxida gishshas," 
Exodus7:15 kawozi shaafa biza wode maaladora neni izakko baada izara gaaggana mala Abbaye shaafaa doonan eqqa; hee bashe shooshshan laamettida guufeza oykka ekkada ba. 
Exodus7:16 Neni iza, ‹GODAA Ibraaweta Xoossay nena, «Bazzon taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda» giidi tana neekko kiittides shin hanno gakkanaas neni ero gabeekka." 
Exodus7:17 GODAY, «Tani GODAA gididayssa neni hayssan erana» gides. Tani Abbaye shaafa haaththaa ta kushen diza guufezan shocikko haaththay suuththan laamettana." 
Exodus7:18 Abbaye shaafaa moleykka hayqqana; shaafaykka xinqqana; Gibxeti he shaafa haaththaa uyanaas dandayettenna› gaada yoota» gides. 
Exodus7:19 GODAY Muses, «Neni Aaroones, ‹Ne guufe oykkada Gibxe haaththata bolla, shaafata bolla, zara haaththata bollanne eellida haaththi dizaso ubbaa bolla ne kushe piddisa› ga; izi ba kushe piddisikko haaththi wuri suuththan laamettana; Gibxe biitta ubbaan, haray attoshin, miththafenne shuchchafe wooci kessida haath tigiza miishshata ubbaan suuththi kumana» gides." 
Exodus7:20 Museynne Aarooney GODAY azazida mala ooththida. Kawoza sinththaninne daannata sinththan Aarooney ba guufeza denththidi shaafa haaththaa shociin haaththi wuri suuththan laamettides. 
Exodus7:21 He shaafa haaththaa giddon diza moleti hayqqida; shaafa haaththi keehi xinqqida gishshas Gibxe asay uyanaas dandaybeenna. Gibxe biittay kumeth suuth xalla gidides. 
Exodus7:22 Gido attiin Gibxe maroti ba biittan izaththoka ooththida; GODAY yootida malakka kawoza wozinay minnida gishshas Museynne Aarooney yootidayssa siyontta ixxides. 
Exodus7:23 Hessafe guye kawozi hessas aykko babbontta dishe ba soo simmi bides. 
Exodus7:24 Gibxe asay wuri Abbaye shaafa haaththaa uyanaas dandayontta gishshas, uyiza haath demmanaas Abbaye shaafaa achchan olla bookkida." 
Exodus7:25 GODAY haaththaa suuththan laammiin laappun gallas gidides. 
Exodus8:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse, «Gibxe kawaakko baada, ‹GODAY nena hizgees ga; taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda;" 
Exodus8:2 neni istta yeddontta ixxiko tani ne biitta ubbaa mooriza ooqqars yeddana. 
Exodus8:3 Abbaye shaafan ooqqarsi kumi aadhdhidi ne soo, ne aqiza soo, ne arsa bolla, daannata keeththa giddo gelana; ne asaa bolla kezana; ne coocen ne munuqa gonggetankka gelana." 
Exodus8:4 Ooqqarsati ne bolla, ne asaa bollanne daannata ubbaa bolla kezana› gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus8:5 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse, «Neni Aaroone, ‹Ne guufeza ekkada, shaafata bolla, zara haaththata bollanne eellida haaththata bolla ne kushe piddisada ooqqarsi Gibxe biitta bolla kezana mala ooththa› gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus8:6 Histtiin Aarooney Gibxe haaththata bolla ba kushe piddisiin ooqqarsi kezidi Gibxe biitta may7ides. 
Exodus8:7 Gido attiin marotikka bantta biittan Gibxen ooqqarsi kezana mala izaththoka ooththida. 
Exodus8:8 Kawozi Musenne Aaroone xeygisidi, «Hayssa ooqqarsaa taappenne ta asaa bollafe diggana mala GODAA intte woossite; histtiko GODAAS yarshana mala tani asaa yeddana» gides." 
Exodus8:9 Histtiin Musey kawoza, «Kawoo nees too! Ooqqarsi neeppenne ne sooppe dhaydi Abbaye shaafan xalla attana mala tani nees, daannatassinne ne asaas woossana gallas ne yoota» gides." 
Exodus8:10 Histtiin kawozi, «Wonto gido» gides. Museykka, «GODAA nu Xoossa malay oonikka bayndayssa neni erana mala ne gida mala ooththana." 
Exodus8:11 He ooqqarsay neeppe, ne keeththafe, daannatappenne ne asaappe dhayana; istti Abbaye shaafan xalla attana» gides." 
Exodus8:12 Museynne Aarooney kawaa achchafe kezidi kawoza bolla izi ehida ooqqarsata gishshas Musey GODAAKKO waassides. 
Exodus8:13 GODAYKKA Musey oychchida mala ooththides; ooqqarsi soon, kareninne demban dizayssi wuri hayqqides." 
Exodus8:14 Gibxe asay ooqqarsaa shiishshi shiishshidi korides; biittayka xinqqon zeeqqides. 
Exodus8:15 Gido attiin kawozi guuththa peeqa demmida wode ba wozina minththides; GODAY yootida malakka izi Museynne Aarooney yootida yo7oza siyontta ixxides. 
Exodus8:16 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse, «Neni Aaroones, ‹Ne guufezara, biitta gudulla shoca› ga; izi shocikko Gibxe biitta ubbaan gudullay cuuch gidana» gides." 
Exodus8:17 Histtiin istti hessaththo ooththida; Aarooney ba guufe ekkidi guufezara biitta gudullaa shociin asanne mehe ubbaa bolla cuuchchi kezides. Gibxe biittan ha gaxappe heni gaxa gakkanaas gudullay wuri cuuch gidides. 
Exodus8:18 Marotikka ba bitan izaththo ooththanaas paacciin isttas dandayetibeenna. Cuuchchay asa bollanne mehe bolla kumides. 
Exodus8:19 Marotikka kawozas, «Hayssi Xoossa oosokko!» gida. Gido attiin kawoza wozinay minnides; GODAY gida malakka izi istti yootizayssa siyontta ixxides." 
Exodus8:20 GODAY Muses, «Wontta maaladora dendada, kawozi shaafa bishin izara gaaggada neni iza, ‹GODAY taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda;" 
Exodus8:21 neni ta asaa yeddontta ixxiko, tani ne bolla, daannata bolla, ne asaa bollanne ne keeththata giddo wolqqama boxe yeddana; Gibxe asaa keeththaninne istti diza biitta ubbaan boxey kumana." 
Exodus8:22 Gido attiin tani GODAY ha biittan dizayssa neni erana mala he gallas ta asay diza Geeseme biittan boxey gakkontta mala tani teqqada istta biittaa naagana. 
Exodus8:23 Tani ne asaappe ta asaa dumma shaakkana; hayssan malaata wonto ooththana› gides gaada yoota» gides. 
Exodus8:24 Hessafe guye GODAY gida mala ooththides; kawoza sooninne iza daannata soon daro wolqqama boxey kumides; kumeththa Gibxe biitta ubbaa iissides. 
Exodus8:25 He wode kawozi Musenne Aaroone xeygisidi, «Biite; hayssa ha biittan intte Xoossaas yarshite» gides." 
Exodus8:26 Gido attiin Musey, «Hessi lo7o deenna; nuni GODAA nu Xoossaas shiishshiza yarshoti Gibxe asaas tuna miish gidana; nuni istta tunisiza yarshota istti xeellishin yarshiko, istti nuna shuchchan caddettennee?" 
Exodus8:27 Nuni GODAA nu Xoossaas yarshota shiishshanaas izi nuna azazida mala heedzdzu gallassa oge bazzo baanaas koshshees» gides. 
Exodus8:28 Histtiin kawozi, «GODAA intte Xoossaas intte bazzo biidi yarshana mala tani inttena yeddana shin intte haakki boopite; ha7i taas woossite» gides." 
Exodus8:29 Musey, «Tani ne achchafe kezida mala GODAA woossana; ha wolqqama boxey wonto kawozappe, daannatappenne iza asaappe kichchana. Gido attiin GODAAS yarshanaas asaa yeddontta ixxanaas kawoy nuna zaari cimmontta mala qoppo» gides." 
Exodus8:30 Hessafe guye Musey kawoza achchafe kezidi GODAA woossides. 
Exodus8:31 Musey oychchida mala GODAY ooththides; boxey kawozappe, daannatappenne iza asaappe issinokka attontta kichchides." 
Exodus8:32 Gido attiin ha7ikka kawaa wozinay minnida gishshas izi asaa yeddontta ixxides. 
Exodus9:1 GODAY Muse, «Gibxe kawozaakko baada GODAA Ibraaweta Xoossay nena, ‹Taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda;" 
Exodus9:2 Neni yeddontta ixxizaa gidikko," 
Exodus9:3 heemettizason diza ne meheta bolla, parata bolla, hareta bolla, gaamellata bolla, miizata bolla, dorsata bollanne deyshata bolla wolqqama harge yeddana." 
Exodus9:4 Gido attiin tani GODAY Isra7eele meheta giddoninne Gibxe asaa meheta giddon shaakoteth medhdhana. Isra7eele asaa mehetappe issoyka hayqqenna› ga» gides. 
Exodus9:5 GODAY wode baridi, «Tani wonto hayssa ha biitta bolla ooththana» gides." 
Exodus9:6 Wonteththa gallas GODAY hessa ooththides. Gibxe asaa mehey wuri hayqqides shin Isra7eele asaa meheppe issinakka hayqqabeekku. 
Exodus9:7 Kawozi ha yo7oza paaccanaas as kiittidi Isra7eele nayta meheppe, haray attoshin pexi issinakka hayqqonttayssa erides. Gidikkoka kawoza wozinay minnidasoppe simmontta ixxida gishshas asaa yeddontta ixxides." 
Exodus9:8 Hessafe guye GODAY, Musenne Aaroone, «Kushe kunththidi cooceppe bidinththa kuucci ekkidi Musey kawozi xeellishin hessa pude carko bolla laallo;" 
Exodus9:9 hayssi Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla gudulla gidana; Gibxe biitta ubbaan asa bollanne mehe bolla kixay wodhdhana» gides. 
Exodus9:10 Histtiin istti cooceppe bidinth ekkidi kawoza sinththan eqqida; Musey hessa pude carkon laalliin asaa bollanne mehe bolla giiyiza kixay kezides. 
Exodus9:11 Marotikka istta bollanne Gibxe asaa ubbaa bolla wodhdhida kixay eqo diggiin Muse sinththan eqqanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Exodus9:12 Gido attiin GODAY Muses gida malakka kawoza wozina minththida gishshas Museynne Aarooney yootizayssa kawozi siyontta ixxides. 
Exodus9:13 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Wonto wontta maaladora denda baada kawozara gaaggada iza Ibraaweta GODAY nena, ‹Taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda." 
Exodus9:14 Ne yeddontta ixxiko ne bolla, daannata bollanne ne asaa bolla ta wolqqama hanqo ha7i yeddana; hessankka biitta bollan ta malay bayndayssa neni erana." 
Exodus9:15 Tani hanno gakkanaas ta kushe yeddada nenanne ne asaa iita hargen qohidaakko ha biittaa bollafe pitta dhayssanakkoshin. 
Exodus9:16 Tani nena paxa woththiday nena ta wolqqa bessanaassinne ta sunththi biitta ubbaa bollan xeygettana malassa. 
Exodus9:17 Neni ha7ikka otorettada ta asaa yeddontta ixxadasa. 
Exodus9:18 Hessa gishshas tani wonto hanni wode Gibxey Gibxe gidoosoppe hach gakkanaas bukki erontta wolqqama shach bukisana. 
Exodus9:19 Ha7i neni ne mehenne gaden nees dizaaz ubbaa soo gelththana mala azaza; ays giikko soo gelontta buro gaden diza asa ubbaa bollanne mehe ubbaa bolla shachchi bukkidi wodhana› gides ga» gides. 
Exodus9:20 Kawozi sunththida daannatappe GODAA qaalaas babbidayti ba aylletanne ba mehe eesotidi soo gelththida. 
Exodus9:21 Gido attiin GODAA qaala kadhidayti ba aylletanne ba mehe karen aggaagida. 
Exodus9:22 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Gibxe biitta ubbaa bollan, asaa bolla, mehe bollanne biittafe mokkiza ubbaa bolla shachchi bukkana mala ne kushe salo denththa» gides." 
Exodus9:23 Musey ba guufe pude salo denththida mala, GODAY dadanne shach yeddides; wolqqanththika duge biitta bolla wolqqamides. GODAY Gibxe biittan shach bukisides." 
Exodus9:24 Shachchay bukkides; wolqqanththika wolqqamides; Gibxe derey dere gidoosoppe haa simmiin Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla wodhdhida shachcha ubbaafe hayssi aadhdhiza iita shachcha. 
Exodus9:25 He shachchay Gibxe biitta ubbaan gaden diza ubbaa, asakka mehekka shocides; biittafe mokkidaaz ubbaa duge zaaridi shocides; miththika ubbaa menththereththides." 
Exodus9:26 Isra7eele nayti diza Geeseme biittay xalla shachchi bukkontta attides. 
Exodus9:27 Kawoykka Musenne Aaroone xeygisidi, «Ha7i hekko, tani nagara ooththadis; GODAY xillo; taninne ta asay wordo."
