Exodus9:28 Dadaynne shachchi nu bolla darida gishshas nuus GODAA woossite. Tani inttena yeddana; hekko hayssafe sinththan intte hayssan gam7eketa» gides. 
Exodus9:29 Museykka izas, «Tani ha katamaappe keza baada woossanaas ta kushe GODAAKKO miccana; histtiko daday aggana; qasse shachchayka bukkenna; hessankka biittay GODAAS gididayssa neni erana." 
Exodus9:30 Gido attiin neninne daannati GODAA Xoossaas ha7ikka babbonttayssa tani erays» gides. 
Exodus9:31 Ciiyida kaththaynne tiyattida kaththay wuri dhaydes; gido attiin ciiyonttanne tiyattontta buro gakkiza kaththaa shachchay qohibeenna. 
Exodus9:32  
Exodus9:33 Hessafe guye Musey kawoza achchafe dendidi katamappe gaxa kezidi ba kushe GODAAKKO miccides; histtiin dadaynne shachchay eqqides; iraykka biitta bolla bukkizayssa aggides. 
Exodus9:34 Gido attiin kawozi iray, shachchaynne daday aggidayssa be7ida wode qasseka nagara ooththides; izinne daannatikka bantta wozina minththida." 
Exodus9:35 GODAY Muse doonara haasayda malakka kawaa wozinay minniin Isra7eele nayta yeddontta ixxides. 
Exodus10:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Gibxe kawaakko guye simma ba; ays giikko tani Gibxe asaa wostta qaxxaydaakkonne malaata istta giddon wostta ooththidaakko intte intte naytassinne intte nayta naytas yootana mala, qasse intteka tani GODAA gididayssa erana mala, ta malaata istta giddon ooththanaas iza wozinanne daannata wozina minththa woththadis» gides." 
Exodus10:2  
Exodus10:3 Histtiin Museynne Aarooney kawozaakko gelidi, «GODAA Ibraaweta Xoossi nena, ‹Ne nenateththaa ta sinththan kawushshontta ixxizay awude gakkanaassee? Ha7i taas goynnana mala ta asaa yedda." 
Exodus10:4 Neni istta yeddontta ixxiko wonto ta ne biittaa bolla boole yeddana. 
Exodus10:5 Boolezi oonikka be7ontta mala biittaa may7ana. Inttes shachchaafe attida guuththa miishshi, gaden dicciza miththika ubbaa maana." 
Exodus10:6 Ne keeththatan, daannata keeththaninne Gibxe asa ubbaa keeththan kumana; hayssi ne aawati, woykko ne mayzati ha biittaa bolla doosoppe hanno gakkanaas mulekka beyi erontta miishsha› gides» gida. Hessafe guye Musey kawoza sinththafe kezi bides." 
Exodus10:7 Kawozi sunththida daannatikka kawoza, «Hayssi addezi nuus ayde gakkanaas dhuphe gidanee? Istti GODAA ba Xoossaas goynnana mala neni asaa yedda; Gibxe derey dhaydayssa neni ha7ikka yuushsha qoppikii?» gida." 
Exodus10:8 Hessa gishshas kawozi Musenne Aaroone xeygisi guye zaaridi, «Biite; GODAA intte Xoossaas goynnite shin bizayti oonanttee?» gides." 
Exodus10:9 Histtiin Musey, «Nuni nu qeeri naytara cimatara, nu attuma naytara macca naytara, nu mehaaranne miiza wudetara issife baana; ays giikko nuni bizason GODAAS ba7aale bonchchanaas koshshees» gides." 
Exodus10:10 Kawozi, «Intte maccassataranne intte naytara baana mala ta inttena yeddana; GODAY inttenara gido; gido attiin intte intte wozinan gene qoppideta." 
Exodus10:11 Hessa gishshas hanenna; intte, ‹Nu biidi GODAAS goynnana mala nuna yedda› gishe gam7ida gishshas attumasay xalla biidi GODAAS goynnite» gides. Hessafe guye Musenne Aaroone kawoza sinththafe kessi gooddida." 
Exodus10:12 GODAY Muses, «Booley Gibxe biitta bolla yaana mala shachchaafe attidi dicciza ubbaa lim7i histti wursana mala, ne kushe Gibxe biittaa bolla piddisa» gides." 
Exodus10:13 Musey ba oykkida guufaa Gibxe biitta bolla dhoqqu histti denththiin, he wode gallassinne qamma GODAY arshey mokkiza baggafe wolqqama carko biitta ubbaa bolla yeddides; gadey wontishin he carkoy boole ekki yides." 
Exodus10:14 Booley Gibxe biitta kumeththi may7ides. Hayssa lagge boole boshay he biittaan hayssafe kase hanibeenna; hayssafe sinththankka iza malay hanenna. 
Exodus10:15 Biittay karexxana gakkanaas boolezi biitta ubbaa may7ides. Shachchafe attidi biitta bolla diccizaazanne miththa bollan diza ayfe ubbaa lim7i histti mides. Hessa gishshas miththa hayththi woykko gaden diza cilila miishshi wuri Gibxe biitta ubbason aykkoyka attibeenna. 
Exodus10:16 Kawozikka Musenne Aaroone eeson xeygisidi, «GODAA intte Xoossanne inttena tani qohadis." 
Exodus10:17 Hekko intte tana wurseththa maaro maarite. Ha iita boshaa taappe diggana mala GODAA intte Xoossaa woossite» gides. 
Exodus10:18 Musey kawoza achchafe kezidi GODAA woossides. 
Exodus10:19 GODAYKKA arshey mokkiza baggara yida carkoza arshey wulliza baggara yida wolqqama carkon laammiin booleza tookki ekki efidi, Zo7o abbaan yeggides. Gibxe biitta kumeththaan issi booleykka attibeenna." 
Exodus10:20 Gidikkoka GODAY kawoza wozina minththida gishshas Isra7eele nayta yeddontta ixxides. 
Exodus10:21 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Gibxe biittan girdi gida dhumay dhumana mala ne kushe pude salo denththa» gides." 
Exodus10:22 Musey ba kushe pude salo denththiin Gibxe biitta ubbaan heedzdzu gallas kumeth girdi gida dhumay dhumides. 
Exodus10:23 He heedzdzu gallassatan asi oonikka issoy issaa be7ontta, woykko sooppe kare kezontta gam7ides. Gido attiin Isra7eele nayti dizaso ubbaan isttas poo7oy dees." 
Exodus10:24 Kawozi Muse xeygisidi, «Biite; biidi GODAAS goynnite; intte maccassayka intte naytikka inttenara baana dandayeettes. Intte meheta gidikko haan aggi biite» gides." 
Exodus10:25 Gido attiin Musey izas, «Nuni xuuggidi yarshiza yarsho GODAA nu Xoossaas shiishshana mala mehe immada yeddanaas koshshees." 
Exodus10:26 Issi xugunththika attontta dishin nu mehey wurikka nunara baanaas bessees. Nuni gede gakkontta dishe mehaappe awayssa awayssa yarshanaakko ha7i eranaas dandayokko. GODAA nu Xoossaas, yarshos he mehaappe dooridi ekkanaas koshshees» gides." 
Exodus10:27 Gido attiin GODAY kawoza wozina minththida gishshas izi istta yeddanaas koyibeenna. 
Exodus10:28 Hessafe guye kawozi Muse, «Ta achchafe kichcha! Nam7anththo ta sinththan beettashe nena era! Nam7anththo ta ayfeso ne be7ida gallas ne hayqqana» gides." 
Exodus10:29 Histtiin Musey izas, «Tumukka; neni gida mala tani nena nam7anththo mulekka beykke» gides." 
Exodus11:1 GODAY Muses, «Tani Gibxe kawaa bollanne iza asaa bolla issi hara bosha yeddana; hessafe guye izi inttena ha biittaafe kessi yeddana; kessidi izi inttena issaade ashshontta ubbaa gooddi kessana." 
Exodus11:2 Isra7eele asay maccay addey ba shoorotappe birappenne worqqafe oosettida miishshata oychchi ekkana mala isttas yoota» gides. 
Exodus11:3 GODAYKKA Gibxe asay Isra7eele asaas kiyateth ooththana mala ooththides. Qasse Musey ba baggara Gibxe biittan kawoy sunththida daannataninne asan keehi daro bonchchettida asa mala xeelettides. 
Exodus11:4 Musey kawozas, «GODAY, ‹Giddi giddoth tani Gibxe biittan hemettana;" 
Exodus11:5 Gibxe biittan diza attuma nay, kawoteththa algan uttida kawaas bayra naappe doommidi, woxan gaacciza aylley bayra naa gakkanaaska bayra yelettida meheykka attontta wuri hayqqana." 
Exodus11:6 Gibxe biitta ubbaan hayssafe kase gidiin woykko sinththafekka hanontta yeehoy yeekettana. 
Exodus11:7 Gido attiin Isra7eele nayta giddon asa bolla woykko mehe bolla asi attoshin kanaykka boccenna› gides. He wode GODAY Gibxessinne Isra7eele naytas giddon shaakoteth medhdhanayssa intte erana. 
Exodus11:8 Ne sunththida daannati wuri taakko yiidi, ta sinththan gufanni ziggidi, ‹Kezada barkkii! Nena kaalliza asay wurikka bo!› gaana. Hessafe guye tani baana» gides. Musey daro hanqettidi iza sinththafe kezidi bides." 
Exodus11:9 GODAY Muses, «Ta malalisiza miish Gibxe biittan gujja gujja ooththana mala kawoy intte yootizayssa siyenna» gi kase yooti woththides." 
Exodus11:10 Museynne Aarooney hayta malaatata ubbaa kawoza sinththan ooththikoka GODAY kawoza wozina minththida gishshas izi Isra7eele nayta ba dereppe yeddontta ixxides. 
Exodus12:1 Gibxe biittan GODAY Musenne Aaroone hizgides; 
Exodus12:2 «Ha aginay inttes layththas koyro agina gido; 
Exodus12:3 Isra7eele asaa ubbaas hayssa ha wogaza yootite; hayssi aginay gelida tammanththa gallas, issi issi asi ba soo asas issi laaqqa doori ekko." 
Exodus12:4 He keeththa asaa qooday laaqqaza ubbaa maanaas guuxxizaa gidikko izaadey baas matattiza guta ba soo asaa mala qoodidi issaadey issaadey mi wursanayssa shaakki eretto. 
Exodus12:5 Intte doori ekkana laaqqay yelettiin issi layth gididi iza bolla aykko borey baynda adde laaqqa gido. Intte laaqqaza dorsafe woykko deyshafe ekkanaas dandayeeta. 
Exodus12:6 Ha aginay tammanne oydanththo gallas gidana gakkanaas istta naagite; he gallas arshey wullishin Isra7eele maabara asay wuri istta shukkanaas koshshees. 
Exodus12:7 Shukkidi suuththafe ekkidi istta ashoza miza keeththas qosilaththaanne qoreza bolla tiyetto. 
Exodus12:8 Ashoza he gallas qammaka taman xiixidi, cammiza bonccoranne irshoy baynda uukettida ukeththara metto." 
Exodus12:9 Ashoza qaye woykko doyssidi moopite; hu7eza; gedata; qanththa ashozakka ubbaa xiixidi miite. 
Exodus12:10 He ashozappe gadey wonttana gakkanaas aykkoka ashshofte. Wonttana gakkanaas attidaazi diikko taman xuuggana koshshees. 
Exodus12:11 Miish, oges gidiza may7o may7idi, intte caamma tohon aaththidi intte guufe intte kushen oykkidi eeson miite; hayssi tana GODAA intte bonchchiza Paaziga yarsho." 
Exodus12:12 «Tani he gallas qammara Gibxe biittara hemettashe bayra yelettida, asekka mehekka ubbaa wodhana. Gibxe eeqata ubbaa bollaka tani pirdana; tani GODAA gidikkinaa?" 
Exodus12:13 He suuththay intte diza keeththata erisiza malata gidana. Tani he suuththaa be7iza wode inttena agga aadhdhana; tani Gibxe biittaa boshan shociza wode intte bolla aykko boshaykka gakkenna. 
Exodus12:14 «He gallassay tani GODAY inttes ooththidayssa qoppi qoppi bonchchiza gallas gido; intte zereththi wuri GODAA ba7aale bonchcho; hayssa inttes woga histtidi mernaas bonchchite. 
Exodus12:15 «Laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy gelontta uketh miite; koyro gallas intte sooppe irsho diggite. He koyro gallassafe doommidi laappunththa gallas gakkanaas, irshora diza uketh miza asi oonikka Isra7eele asaa giddofe shaaketti dhayo." 
Exodus12:16 Koyro gallas geeshsha duulata shiiqite; hara geeshsha duulata qasse laappunththa gallas shiiqite; asay wuri maanaas quma kaththofe attiin he gallassata ubbaan aykkoka ooththofte; intte ooththana miishshi hessa xalla. 
Exodus12:17 «Tani inttena Isra7eele nayta Gibxe biittafe kessiday he gallas gidida gishshas Ukeththa ba7aale bonchchite. He gallassa ba7aaleza naa naas attontta woga histti bonchchite. 
Exodus12:18 Koyro aginan he aginaas tammanne oydanththa gallassa omarsafe doommidi nam7u tammanne issinththa gallassa omarsa gakkanaas irshoy gelontta uketh miite. 
Exodus12:19 Laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy intte soon beettofo; irshoy gelida kath miza asi bete asi gidiin woykko he dere as oonakka gidiin hessaadey Isra7eele maabara giddofe dhayo. 
Exodus12:20 Irshoy gelidaaz aykkoka moopite; intte dizason awanka irshoy gelontta uketh maanaas bessees.» 
Exodus12:21 Hessafe guye Musey Isra7eele cimata ubbaa xeygisidi, «Intte biidi intte soo asaas Paaziga yarshos laaqqa ekki shukkite." 
Exodus12:22 Hisophphe geetettiza maata hayththafe danki ekkidi keren diza suuththaan gelththi kessidi, he suuththaa nam7u qosilaththataninne qoreta bolla tiyite; inttefe issi asikka gadey wonttana gakkanaas ba keeththafe kare kezoppo." 
Exodus12:23 GODAY Gibxe bayra nayta wodhanaas he biittara hemettiza wode suuth keeththa qosilaththataninne qoreta bolla be7idi karera aadhdhi baana; wodhizayssi intte soo gelidi inttena wodhontta mala iza GODAY diggana. 
Exodus12:24 «Intte hayssa azazoza inttessinne intte zereththas mernaas woga histtidi azazettite. 
Exodus12:25 GODAY kase immana giidi caaqqida qaala mala izi immiza biittaa intte geliza wode ha wogaa naagite. 
Exodus12:26 Intte nayti inttena, ‹Hayssa ha wogazas birsheththi aazee?› gi oychchiko," 
Exodus12:27 intte isttas, ‹Hayssi GODAA bonchchanaas yarshiza Paaziga yarsho; ays giikko GODAY Gibxe biittan Isra7eele asaa keeth aggi aadhdhidi Gibxe asaa wodhidi nuna ashshida gishshassa› giite» gides. Hessafe guye asay biitta bolla gufanni goynnides." 
Exodus12:28 Isra7eele asay biidi GODAY Musenne Aaroone azazida mala ooththides. 
Exodus12:29 Giddi giddoththan GODAY Gibxen bayra yelettida ubbaa kawoteththa algan uttiza kawo bayra naappe doommidi, qasho keeththan diza di7ettida asaa bayra naa gakkanaas, qasse bayra yelettida mehe ubbaa dippi histtides." 
Exodus12:30 Kawoy, izi sunththida daannatinne Gibxe biitta asay wuri qammara beeggides. Gibxe biittan asi hayqqontta keeththi mulekka baynda gishshas asay qaala dhoqqu histtidi daro waassi yeekkides." 
Exodus12:31 He gallassa omars kawozi Musenne Aaroone xeygisidi, «Dendite! Intteka intte asaykka ta asaa giddofe kezite! Biidi intte oychchida malakka GODAAS goynnite!" 
Exodus12:32 Intte gida malakka intte mehe; intte deyshinne dors ubbaa ekkidi biite! Qasse tanakka anjjite» gides. 
Exodus12:33 Isra7eele asay ba biittafe eeson kezana mala Gibxe asay dirbasides. Ays giikko istti, «Kezontta ixxiko nuni wurikka wurana» gida." 
Exodus12:34 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay irshoy gelontta munuqa keren kunththi may7on xaaxidi hashen tookkides. 
Exodus12:35 Isra7eele asay Musey istta azazida mala, Gibxe asaa bira, worqqanne may7o, «Immite» gi oychchides." 
Exodus12:36 GODAY Gibxe asaa sinththan Isra7eele asay sabettana mala ooththida gishshas Gibxe asay istta oychchidayssa ubbaa immida. Hessaththo histtidi istta Gibxe asata aqo buuri ekki bida. 
Exodus12:37 Isra7eele asay Eraamise geetettiza katamappe dendidi Sukoote geetettizaso gakkanaas bides. Asay naytanne maccassaa gujjontta qoodiin tohon hemettiza attuma asay 600,000 gidides." 
Exodus12:38 Qasse isttara daro hara dere asay, keehi daro mehe, dorsinne deysh ekki kezides." 
Exodus12:39 Gibxeppe istti ekki kezida irshoy gelontta munuqappe uketh uukkida; ays giikko istta Gibxeppe eeson kessida gishshas baas shinqe kaththanaassinne munuqay dendiin uukkana wode istta gaththibeenna. 
Exodus12:40 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittan deyida layththay wuri oyddu xeetanne heedzdzu tamma. 
Exodus12:41 He oyddu xeetanne heedzdzu tammu layththay wuriza he wurseththa gallassan GODAA asay wuri Gibxe biittafe kezides. 
Exodus12:42 Gibxe biittafe omarsa wode GODAY ba asaa kessishe naagida gishshas he qammay naa naa gakkanaas, Isra7eele asay wuri beeggi naagidi aqiza GODAAS dummatida qamma." 
Exodus12:43 GODAY Musenne Aaroone, «Paaziga bonchchiza wogay hayssa; hara dere asi izappe oonikka mulera mooppo." 
Exodus12:44 Intte miishshan shammida aylley oonikka intte iza qaxxaridaappe guye izappe maanaas koshshees. 
Exodus12:45 Gido attiin guuththa wodes inttenara imaththateththan gam7izaynne une ooththiza hara dere asi izappe mooppo. 
Exodus12:46 «Ha Paaziga yarshoza intte issi keeththan miite; intte he ashozappe aykkoka kare kessofte. Meqeththatappe issinokka menththofte. 
Exodus12:47 Isra7eele maabaray wuri Paaziga yarsho bonchchanaas koshshees. 
Exodus12:48 «Bete yiidi intte giddon diza asi GODAA Paaziga yarsho bonchchanaas koykko ba soon adde gidida asa ubbaa qaxxaro. Hessafe guye izi he biittan yelettida asa mala shiiqidi Paaziga yarsho bonchchanaas bessees. Gido attiin qaxxarettontta asi mulekka izappe mooppo. 
Exodus12:49 Intte biittan yelettidayssaska gidiin intte giddon bete gididi dizayssaska gidiin hayssi wogay ubbaas issino» gides. 
Exodus12:50 Histtiin Isra7eele asay wuri GODAY Musenne Aaroone azazida malakka ooththides. 
Exodus12:51 He gallassankka GODAY Isra7eele nayta istta cugan cugan Gibxe biittafe kessides. 
Exodus13:1 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Exodus13:2 «Adde gidi koyro yelettida ubbaa taas dummasa. Isra7eele asaa giddon koyro yelettida bayray wuri mehe gidiin as gidiin wurikka taassa.» 
Exodus13:3 Hessafe guye Musey asaa, «Gibxeppe, aylleteththa biittafe intte kezida gallassaya hanno gallassayo gididayssa yuushshi qoppite; ays giikko GODAY ba wolqqama qesen inttena kessides; hessa gishshas irshoy gelida kath aykkoka moopite." 
Exodus13:4 Intte ha gallassayn Abibe geetettiza aginan kezideta. 
Exodus13:5 GODAY Kanaaneta, Hiiteta, Amooreta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta geetettiza dereta biittaa inttena gaththiza wode intte ha bonchcho gallassaa ha aginan bonchcheeta. He biittay GODAY inttes immana mala kase intte aawatas caaqqi woththida biitta. He biittay maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta." 
Exodus13:6 Intte laappun gallas irshoy gelontta uketh maana; laappunththa gallas GODAAS ba7aale histti bonchcheeta. 
Exodus13:7 He laappun gallassatan irshoy gelontta uketh intte maana; intte giddon irshora dizay aykkoyka beettofo; ne biitta zawan awankka irshoy mulekka dooppo. 
Exodus13:8 «He gallas neni ne naytas, ‹Tani hayssa ooththizay tani Gibxeppe keziza wode GODAY taas ooththidayssa zaari qoppanaassa› ga yoota." 
Exodus13:9 GODAY inttena ba wolqqama kushen Gibxeppe kessida gishshas, GODAA wogay intte doonappe shaakettontta mala, hayssi ba7aalezi intte kushe bolla qashettidanne intte liiphen woththiin qofsiza miishsha mala gidana." 
Exodus13:10 Hessa gishshas intte ha wogaa woththidi layththan layththan ha gallassan bonchchite. 
Exodus13:11 «GODAY inttessinne kase intte aawatas immanaas caaqqida mala, izi inttena Kanaaneta biitta gelththidi, he biittaa inttes immiza wode," 
Exodus13:12 attuma gidi yelettida bayra ubbaa GODAAS dummasite; ne mehe garsan adde gididi bayra yelettiday wuri GODAASSA. 
Exodus13:13 Bayra yelettiza hare mar ubbaa laaqqara laammada wozza; laammada wozzontta ixxiko iza morgen shoca wodha. Ne nayta giddon attuma gidi bayra yelettidayta ubbaa wozza. 
Exodus13:14 Wodeppe ne nay nena, ‹Hayssi aaza wogaa?› gi oychchiko, neni izas, ‹GODAY nuna ba wolqqama qesen aylleteththa biitta Gibxeppe kessides;" 
Exodus13:15 Gibxe kawoy ba wozina minththidi nuna yeddontta ixxiin GODAY Gibxe biittan diza bayra ubbaa, asappe doommidi mehe bayra gakkanaas wodhides. Tani aayi uloppe koyro yelettida adde mehe ubbaa GODAAS yarshizayssinne bayra gidida attuma nayta ubbaa wozzizayssi hessassa› ga." 
Exodus13:16 GODAY nuna ba wolqqama qesen Gibxeppe kessidayssas, hayssi inttes kushen qachchida malatanne liiphe bolla woththida malata mala gidana» gides." 
Exodus13:17 Kawoy asaa yeddida wode Xoossi istta Filisxeeme biittara kanththisiza ogey mata shin he ogezara efibeenna; gaasoykka Xoossi, «Asay ola beykko ba qofaa laammidi guye Gibxe simmanaakko» giidi qoppides." 
Exodus13:18 Hessa gishshas Xoossi asaa bazzo ogera yuushshidi, Zo7o abbaako kaaleththides. Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe olas giigettida asa mala giigettidi Gibxeppe kezides." 
Exodus13:19 Yooseefey Isra7eele asaa, «Xoossi tumappe inttena maaddana yaana; he wode intte ta meqeththaa hayssafe inttenara ekki biite» giidi caaqeththi woththida gishshas Musey iza meqeththaa banara ekki bides." 
Exodus13:20 Istti Sukooteppe dendidi bazzo doonan diza Etaame geetettizason uttida. 
Exodus13:21 Istti gallassika qammaka hemettana mala GODAY istta oge bessanaas tuussa mala eqqida shaaran gallas, tuussa mala eqqida taman omars istta kaaleththides." 
Exodus13:22 Gallas tuussa mala eqqida shaaray, omars tuussa mala eqqida tamay asaa sinththafe ubba wode shaakettibeenna." 
Exodus14:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Istti guye simmidi Migidooleppenne abbaafe giddon, Pihaahiroote achchan uttana mala deraas yoota; istti abba achchan Ba7aali-Xafoone sinththan bazzaan uttetto." 
Exodus14:2  
Exodus14:3 Gibxe Kawoy, ‹Bazzon ogey gordetti dhayiin Isra7eele asay bizaso dhaydi coo toylattees› giidi qoppana." 
Exodus14:4 Tani kawoza wozina minththana; izi istta gooddana; tani kawoza baggaranne iza olanchchata ubbaa baggara bonchchettana; Gibxe asaykka tani GODAA gididayssa erana» gides. Histtiin Isra7eele asay izi yootida mala ooththides. 
Exodus14:5 Asay kessi ekki bidayssa Gibxe kawos yootiin, izikka daannata Isra7eele nayta gishshas qoppida ba qofaa laammidi, «Nuni hayssaththo aazas ooththidonii? Nuni Isra7eele nayta yeddidi istti nuus ooththiza wolqqafe mela attidos» gida." 
Exodus14:6 Hessa gishshas kawozi ba para-gaareza kooridi olanchchata banara ekki bides. 
Exodus14:7 Izi ubbaafe aadhdhiza 600 para-gaareta, qasse Gibxe biittan diza para-gaareta ubbaa bollaka ola halaqata woththi ekki bides." 
Exodus14:8 GODAY Gibxe biitta kawo wozina minththiin minoteththara buro buussa bolla diza Isra7eele asaa gooddides. 
Exodus14:9 Gibxe asay kawo para-gaareti wuri para asatinne olanchchati Isra7eele nayta kaalli gooddida. Abbaa doonan Ba7aali-Xafoone sinththan diza Pihaahiroote achchan istti utti dishin demmida. 
Exodus14:10 Kawozi matigdiin Isra7eele asay guye xeelliza wode, Gibxe asay istta guyera kaalli yizayssa be7idinne daroppe babbidi GODAAS waassida." 
Exodus14:11 Istti Muses, «Neni nuna Gibxe biittan nuus duufoy dhayiin bazzon hayqqana mala kessadii? Nuna Gibxeppe aazas ehadii?" 
Exodus14:12 Nuni Gibxen dishe, ‹Nuna agga; nuni Gibxe asaas haarettana› giidi nees yootibeekkonii? Bazzon hayqqanaappe isttas haarettizayssi nuus lo7okkoshin» gida." 
Exodus14:13 Musey asaa, «Babbofte; minni eqqite; GODAY hach inttena ashshanayssa intte beyana. Hach intte be7iza Gibxe asaa nam7anththo mulekka be7ekketa." 
Exodus14:14 Intte gishshas GODAY olettana; inttefe koyettizay co7u guus xalala» gides. 
Exodus14:15 GODAY Muse, «Neni taakko ays waassay? Isra7eele asay gede sinththe baana mala yoota." 
Exodus14:16 Isra7eele asay mela biitta bollara abbaa pinni baana mala ne guufe denththadanne ne kushe abbaa bolla piddisada haaththaa nam7u kessa shaakka. 
Exodus14:17 Tani Gibxe asa wozina minththiko istti intte guye kaallidi abban gelana. Tani kawozanne iza olanchchata ubbaa bolla, iza para-gaaretanne toga asata bolla taas bonchcho demmana." 
Exodus14:18 Tani kawoza baggara iza para-gaareta baggaranne iza toga asata baggara taas bonchcho demmida wode tani GODAA gididayssa Gibxe asay erana» gides. 
Exodus14:19 Hessafe guye kase Isra7eele asaa sinththara biza Xoossa kiitanchchay asaappe guye aadhdhi eqqides. Tuussa mala shaaraykka istta sinththafe guye bagga yuuyidi," 
Exodus14:20 Gibxe asaassinne Isra7eele naytas giddon aadhdhi eqqides. He shaaray omars issi baggara dhumisidi hankko baggara poo7isides; histtiin omars kumeth issoy issaakko shiiqana dandaybeettenna. 
Exodus14:21 Hessafe guye Musey abbaa bollan ba kushe piddisides; GODAY he gallassa omars kumeth arshey mokkiza baggafe wolqqama carko yeddidi, abbaa shaakki shaakkidi mela biitta kessides. Haaththayka nam7an shaakettides." 
Exodus14:22 Isra7eele asay abbaa giddon mela biittara hemettidi haaththi isttas ushachcharanne hadirsara goda mala eqqiin bida. 
Exodus14:23 Gibxe asay kawo parati wuri, para-gaaretinne toga asay istta gooddi ekkidi abbaa giddo gelida." 
Exodus14:24 Buro bazzoy zo7anaappe kasetidi GODAY tamaninne tuussa mala shaaran gididi, Gibxe olanchchata xeellida wode istta wozinay dhaydes." 
Exodus14:25 GODAY istta para-gaareta toho qachchi oykkida gishshas laagoy bana waayisiin Gibxe asay, «GODAY istta maaddidi Gibxe oliza gishshas ane nuni Isra7eele asaappe baqatoos» gida." 
Exodus14:26 GODAY Muse, «Haaththay Gibxe asaa bolla, istta para-gaareta bollanne toga asata bolla guye goggana mala ne kushe abbaa bolla piddisa» gides." 
Exodus14:27 Musey ba kushe abbaa bolla piddisides; gadey wontishin abbay kase ba diza soho guye simmides; Gibxe asay gede iza giddo baqatishin GODAY Gibxe asaa heen abbaa giddon yeggides. 
Exodus14:28 Haaththay guye simmidi para-gaareta toga asatanne Isra7eele nayta kaallidi abban gelida kawo olanchchata mule mitti aggides; isttafe issaadeyka attibeenna. 
Exodus14:29 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay haaththi isttas ushachcharanne hadirsara goda mala eqqi dishin abbaa giddora mela biitta bollara hemetti bides. 
Exodus14:30 GODAY he gallas Isra7eele asaa Gibxe asaa kusheppe hayssaththo ashshides. Qasse Isra7eele asay Gibxe asaa aha abba doonan be7ides. 
Exodus14:31 GODAY Gibxe asa bolla bessida gita wolqqaa be7idi Isra7eele asay GODAAS babbidessinne izanne iza aylle Musekka ammanides. 
Exodus15:1 He wode Museynne Isra7eele asay hayssa mazamureza GODAAS yexxides; «Bonchchon izi keehi dhoqqu dhoqqu gida gishshas, tani GODAAS mazamure yexxana. Paranne para toggida asaa abba giddon yeggides." 
Exodus15:2 GODAY taas wolqqanne mazamure; izi tana ashshides. Izi ta Xoossa; tani iza sabbana. Izi ta aawa Xoossa; tani iza dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana. 
Exodus15:3 GODAY olanchcha; iza sunththika GODAA. 
Exodus15:4 Gibxe kawo para-gaaretanne iza olanchchata abban wursides; ubbaafe aadhdhi doorettida Gibxe kawo halaqati, Zo7o abbaan mitettida." 
Exodus15:5 Ciimma haaththi istta kammides; istti shuchchaththo ciimman mitettida. 
Exodus15:6 «Abeet GODAWU! Ne ushachcha kushey wolqqan goobides; GODAWU ne wolqqama ushachcha kushey morkke menththereththides. 
Exodus15:7 Ne gita wolqqaan nenara eqettidayta kundisadasa. Eexxiza ne hanqo ne yeddadasa, izikka istta gafe mala mides." 
Exodus15:8 Ne peenoy haaththaa pude essi doorides. Goggiza haaththika goda mala minni eqqides; ciimma giddon diza haaththi abbaa giddon irkkides. 
Exodus15:9 «Morkkey ceeqettishe, ‹Tani istta yedeththa oykkana. Tani istta haaro shaakkada, ta koyidayssa ubbaa ekkana. Tani ta giththa mashsha shoddada, istta dhayssana› gides." 
Exodus15:10 Gido attiin neni istta ne peenon punniin, abbay istta kammides. Istti wolqqama haaththan biratay mitettiza mala mitettida." 
Exodus15:11 «Abeet GODAWU! Eeqa xoossata giddon ne malay oonee? Geeshshateththan bonchchettizay, bonchchon babisizaynne, malalisiza miish ooththizay ne malay oonee?" 
Exodus15:12 Neni ne ushachcha kushe piddisadasa, biittayka istta mittides." 
Exodus15:13 «Ne wozzida ne asaa wurontta ne siiqon kaaleththadasa. Neni ne wolqqan istta ne aqiza geeshsha soo gelththadasa. 
Exodus15:14 Dere asay hessa siyidi kokkorides. Filisxeeme biitta asatakka hirga miixay oykkides. 
Exodus15:15 He wode Eedoome biitta halaqati dagammida. Mo7aabe biitta haarizayti hirgan kokkorida. Kanaane dere asay wuri seerides. 
Exodus15:16 Abeet GODAWU! Dagamaynne hirgay istta oykkana. Istti ne wolqqa gitateth be7idi, ne asay aadhdhana gakkanaas, neni wozzida asay aadhdhana gakkanaas, shuchcha mala toletti eqqana." 
Exodus15:17 Neni istta ehada, nees buzo biittan diza zuma hu7en tokkana. Abeet Mernaa Godoo, he sohoy neni nees deyanaas ooththida sohokko. Abeet GODAWU! He geeshsha sohoy neni ne kushen minththa essida sohokko." 
Exodus15:18 GODAY mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas kawotana.» 
Exodus15:19 Gibxe kawo parati wuri, para-gaaretinne toga asati abbaan gelida wode GODAY istta bolla abba haaththaa guye zaari ehides; gido attiin Isra7eele asay abbaa giddora mela biitta bollara hemettidi pinnides." 
Exodus15:20 Aaroone michcheya, nabe Maarama karabe ekkadus; maccassay wuri karabe baqqidi yexxishenne guppishe izo kaallides." 
Exodus15:21 Maarama isttas mazamureza yexxashe, «GODAY keehi dhoqqu dhoqqu gida gishshas izas yexxite. Paranne para toggidayta izi abban olides» ga yexxadus." 
Exodus15:22 Hessafe guye Musey Isra7eele asaa Zo7o abbaafe pinththiin istti Shuura geetettiza bazzo bida. He bazzon istti haath demmontta heedzdzu gallas hemettida. 
Exodus15:23 Istti Maara geetettizaso gakkida wode Maara haaththi camo gidida gishshas uyana dandaybeettenna; hessa gishshas he sohoy Maara geetettides. 
Exodus15:24 Asaykka, «Nuni ay uyanee?» giidi Muse bolla zuuzumides." 
Exodus15:25 Musey GODAAS waassiin GODAY iza issi mith bessides; Musey he miththaa haaththaan yeggiin haaththay mal7ides. Heen GODAY isttas woganne maara kessidessinne istta paaccides. 
Exodus15:26 Izi isttas, «GODAA intte Xoossay yootizayssa intte lo7eththi siyikko, iza ayfe sinththan lo7o ooththiko, intte iza azazo wozinan woththi naagikko, iza wogaakka ubbaa naagikko, tani Gibxe asaa bolla ehida hargefe issaaka intte bolla ehikke; gaasoykka tani inttena paththiza GODAA» gides." 
Exodus15:27 Hessafe istti tammanne nam7u haaththa pulttotinne laappun tammu zamba miththati dizaso Eelaame yiidi heen haaththa doonan uttida. 
Exodus16:1 Gibxeppe kezida nam7anththo aginan, tammanne ichchashanththo gallassan Isra7eele asaa maabaray kumeth Elaameppe dendi biidi Eelaameppenne Siinappe giddon diza Siine geetettiza bazzo yida." 
Exodus16:2 Isra7eele asaa maabaray wuri bazzon Muse bollanne Aaroone bolla zuuzumides; 
Exodus16:3 «GODAY nuna Gibxe biittan ba kushen wodhidaakko lo7okkoshin! Heen nuni asho miza kereza yuuyi aadhdhi uttidi nuni koyida mala kath kalli midos; gido attiin intte nuna heeppe kessidi hayssa deraa ubbaa gafan wodhanaas haa bazzo ehideta» gida. 
Exodus16:4 Histtiin GODAY Muses, «Tani inttes saloppe miza kath bukisana; asay ubba gallassika kezidi hachchis hachchis gidanaaz xalala maxana koshshees. Asay ta azazo kaallizaakkonne kaallonttaako tani istta hessan paacca xeellana." 
Exodus16:5 Usuppunththo gallas istti hara wode maxizayssas nam7u kushe maxidi kaththetto» gides. 
Exodus16:6 Hessa gishshas Museynne Aarooney Isra7eele asa ubbaas, «Inttena Gibxe biittafe kessiday GODAA gididayssa hach omars intte erana." 
Exodus16:7 Qasse iza bolla intte zuuzumidayssa izi siyida gishshas maalado intte GODAA bonchcho beyana. Intte nu bolla zuuzumanaas nuni oonee?» gida. 
Exodus16:8 Hessafe guye Musey, «Intte iza bolla zuuzumidayssa izi siyida gishshas izi inttes maanaas omars asho immiko intte koyida mala miza ukeththaaka ubbaa inttes maalado immana. Nu oonee? Intte GODAA bolla zuuzumideta attiin nu bolla zuuzumibeekketa» gida." 
Exodus16:9 Musey Aaroones, «Neni Isra7eele asaa maabara ubbaa, ‹GODAY intte zuuzunththaa siyida gishshas GODAA sinth shiiqite› ga yoota» gides." 
Exodus16:10 Aarooney Isra7eele asaa maabara ubbaas yootida mala asay bazzo simmi xeellishin heen GODAA bonchchoy shaarara qonccidayssa be7ida. 
Exodus16:11 GODAY Muses, «Tani Isra7eele nayta zuuzunththaa siyadis; neni isttas, ‹Intte omarsa wode asho maana; maalado uketh kallana; he wode tani GODAA intte Xoossaa gididayssa intte erana› gaada yoota» gides." 
Exodus16:12  
Exodus16:13 He gallassa omarsa wode kurachoti yiidi Isra7eele asay dizason kumida; qasse maalado istti dizaso yuushon xaazay may7i uttides. 
Exodus16:14 Xaazay xoskishin biitta bollan booththa shach misatiza liiqo miishshi beettides. 
Exodus16:15 Isra7eele asay hessa be7idi ba garsan issoy issaa, «Hayssi aazee?» gida. Ays giikko istti izi aazakko eribeettenna. Histtiin Musey isttas, «Inttes maanaas GODAY immida kaththi hayssako." 
Exodus16:16 GODAY, ‹Asay issoy issoy baas maanaas koshshiza mala shiishsho; intte soo asaas hu7en hu7en issi issi kilonne bagga ekkite› gi azazides» gides." 
Exodus16:17 Isra7eele asay Musey isttas yootida mala ooththides; baggay darssidi baggay qasse guuththidi shiishshida. 
Exodus16:18 Shiishshidi istti makkiin darssidi shiishshidayssas palahibeenna; guuth shiishshidayssaska paccibeenna; wurikka issoy issoy baas gidiza mala shiishshides. 
Exodus16:19 Hessafe guye Musey isttas, «Oonikka izappe wontos ashshofo» gides." 
Exodus16:20 Gidikkoka isttafe baggay Musey yootizayssa ekkontta aggidi attidayssa wonto maalado gakkanaas woththida; woththidayssika guxunidi xinqqides. Hessa gishshas Musey istta hanqettides. 
Exodus16:21 Maalado maalado asay wuri baas koshshizayssa lagge shiishshides; arshey michchiza wode biittan attidayssi maayides. 
Exodus16:22 Usuppunththa gallassan istti kaseyssas nam7u kushe issi issi asas heedzdzu kilo shiishshida. Histtiin maabara halaqati wuri yiidi hessa Muses yootida. 
Exodus16:23 Izi isttas, «GODAY azazidayssi hayssa; wontoy shemppo gallassa, GODAAS geeshsha sambata. Hessa gishshas intte uukkanayssa uukkite; intte doyssanayssaka doyssite; palahidayssa wontos ashshite» gides." 
Exodus16:24 Hessa gishshas istti Musey azazida mala wontos woththiin xinqqibeenna woykko guxunibeenna. 
Exodus16:25 Wonteththa gallas Musey isttas, «Hayssa hach mi wursite; ays giikko hach GODAA Sambata; intte iza hach demban demmeketa." 
Exodus16:26 Intte usuppun gallassan iza shiishshite; gido attiin laappunththa gallassay sambata gidida gishshas aykkoyka deenna» gides. 
Exodus16:27 Gido attiin issi issi asati laappunththa gallassan shiishshanaas kezida shin aykkoka demmibeettenna. 
Exodus16:28 GODAY Muses, «Intte ta azazotanne ta wogata naagoza ayde gakkanaas ixxanee?" 
Exodus16:29 Ta inttes Sambata immidayssa akeekite; usuppunththa gallassan ta inttes nam7u gallassas kath immizayssi hessa gishshassa. Laappunththa gallas wurikka ba dizason dizason taakko; oonikka awakka booppo» gides. 
Exodus16:30 Hessa gishshas asay laappunththa gallassan shempides. 
Exodus16:31 Isra7eele asay he kaththaza manna gi sunththides. Izikka deebbo ayfe mala gididi booththa; eessara uukettida ukeththa mala mal7ees. 
Exodus16:32 Musey Isra7eele asaas, «GODAY azazidayssi hayssa, ‹Tani inttena Gibxe biittafe kessida wode, bazzon mizida kaththaa istti beyana mala, mannafe issi issi kilonne bagga intte sinththafe yaana yeletatas ashshi woththite› gi azazides» gides." 
Exodus16:33 Histtiin Musey Aaroone, «Issi xaaro ekkada issi kilonne bagga gidiza manna izan qola; histtada yaana yeletatas minjjana mala GODAA sinththan woththa» gides." 
Exodus16:34 GODAY Muse azazida mala minjjanaas, Aarooney mannaa GODAA markka Taabotaa sinththan woththides." 
Exodus16:35 Isra7eele asay ba daana biitta bi gakkanaas oyddu tammu layth kumeth manna mida; Istti Kanaane biitta zawa gakkanaas manna mishe de7ida. 
Exodus16:36 Issi kiloynne baggay he wode makkiza gita maka miishshas tammaafe issi kushekko. 
Exodus17:1 Isra7eele maabaray wuri GODAY azazida mala Siina geetettiza bazzofe dendi biidi Erafidime geetettizason uttides; gido attiin asaas uyanaas haaththi heen beettibeenna. 
Exodus17:2 Hessa gishshas istti Musera ooyettidi iza, «Nuus uyana haath imma» gida. Musey zaaridi, «Intte tanara ays ooyetteetii? GODAA intte ays paacceetii?» gides." 
Exodus17:3 Gido attiin asay heen saamettidi Muse bolla zuuzumides. Istti, «Neni nuna, nu naytanne nu mehe saamon wodhdhanaas Gibxeppe ays kessadii?» giidi Muse bolla gugumida." 
Exodus17:4 Histtiin Musey, «Tani ha asaa wosttoo? Istti tana shuchchan caddana geettes» giidi GODAAKKO waassides." 
Exodus17:5 GODAY Muse, «Isra7eele asaa cimatappe nenara ekkada, kase neni Abbaye Shaafa haaththaa izara shocida guufeza ne kushen oykkada asaappe sinth ba." 
Exodus17:6 Tani Siina zuman diza zaallaa bolla heen ne sinththan eqqada naagana; neni he zaallaa shoca; asay uyana mala haaththi izappe kezana» giin Musey Isra7eele cimata sinththan izi gida mala ooththides. 
Exodus17:7 Isra7eele asay, «GODAY nu giddon dizeyee? Deennee?» gi GODAA paaccidi ooyettida gishshas he sohoza Musey Maasanne Mariiba gi sunththides." 
Exodus17:8 Amaaleeqe asay yiidi Erafidimen Isra7eele nayta olides. 
Exodus17:9 Musey Iyaaso, «Neni nuus asaa garsafe issi issi as doora ekkada wonto Amaaleeqetara olettana keza; tanikka Xoossa guufe oykkada dhoqqasohon eqqana» gides." 
Exodus17:10 Iyaasoy Musey gida mala, Amaaleeqetara olettides. Musey, Aarooneynne Huurey dhoqqaso kezida." 
Exodus17:11 Musey ba kushe pude denththishin Isra7eele asay xoonees shin izi ba kushe ziqqisishin Amaaleeqe asay xoonees. 
Exodus17:12 Muse kushey ixettishin Aarooneynne Huurey shuch ekki ehidi Muse iza bolla utisida. Istti issoy issi baggara ushachcha kushaa issoy issi baggara hadirsa kushaa dhoqqu histti oykkida. Histtiin arshey wullana gakkanaas iza kushey dhoqqu gi gam7ides. 
Exodus17:13 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy Amaaleeqe olanchchatanne Amaaleeqe asaa giththa mashshan xoonides. 
Exodus17:14 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Tani Amaaleeqe asay qofettontta mala istta biitta bollafe kumeth dhayssana. Hayssi ubba wode qofettana mala maxaafan xaafada Iyaasos nababa sissontta aggofa» gides." 
Exodus17:15 Museykka yarsho yarshizaso ooththidi, «GODAY ta Bandira» gi sunththides." 
Exodus17:16 Qasseka, «Tumappe GODAY ba kushe denththidi yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas Amaaleeqetara olettanaas caaqqides» gides." 
Exodus18:1 Midiyaame biitta qeese, Muse bollo Yootorey, Xoossay Musessinne iza asaa Isra7eele naytas ooththidayssa hessika GODAY istta Gibxe biittafe kessidayssa ubbaa siyides." 
Exodus18:2 He wode Muse bollo Yootorey, Musey guye zaari moyzida Muse machcheyo Xipooronne izi nam7u nayta banara ekki yides. Museykka, «Tani asa biittan bete as gidadis» gishe bayra naaza Gershoome gi sunththides." 
Exodus18:3  
Exodus18:4 Qasseka, «Ta aawaa Xoossi tana maaddides; izi tana Gibxe kawo toorappe ashshides» gishe Nam7anththo naaza El7ezeere gi sunththides." 
Exodus18:5 Muse bollo Yootorey Muse attuma naytaranne Muse machcheyra gididi bazzon Xoossa zuma achchan diza Musekko yides. 
Exodus18:6 Izi, «Tani ne bollo Yootorey, ne machcheyranne izi nayta nam7atara neekko he boos» giidi kiita Musekko yeddides." 
Exodus18:7 Hessa gishshas Musey ba bollozara gaagganaas kezidi hokkidi iza yeerides. Istti issoy issaa saroththidaappe guye Muse dunkaane giddo gelida. 
Exodus18:8 GODAY Isra7eele asaa gishshas Gibxe kawo bollanne Gibxe asaa bolla ooththidayssa, oge bolla istta gakkida daaburanne GODAY istta ashshidayssa ubbaa Musey ba bollozas yootides." 
Exodus18:9 Isra7eele asaa, Gibxe asaa kusheppe ashshanaas GODAY ooththida lo7o ooso ubbaa siyidi Yootorey ufayettides." 
Exodus18:10 «Inttena Gibxe asaa kusheppenne kawo Paaroone kusheppe ashshida GODAY ba asaa Gibxe asaa kusheppe kessi ekkidayssi izi galatetto. 
Exodus18:11 Izi Isra7eele asaa bolla otorettidaytas hayssa ooththida gishshas GODAY hara eeqa xoossata ubbaafe gooba gididayssa tani ha7i eradis» gides. 
Exodus18:12 Hessafe guye Muse bollo Yootorey xuugettiza yarsho qasseka hara yarshota Xoossas shiishshides. Aarooneynne Isra7eele cimati wuri Xoossa sinththan Muse bollozara kath maanaas yida. 
Exodus18:13 Wonteththa gallas Musey asaas pirdanaas uttiin asay iza sinththan yiidi yiidi eqqiza gishshas Musey maaladoppe omarsa wode gakkanaas uttides. 
Exodus18:14 Muse bolloy Musey asaas ooththizayssa ubbaa be7idi, «Neni ha asaas ooththizayssi hayssi aazee? Hayssi asay wuri maaladoppe doommidi omarsa wode gakkanaas ne sinththan yiidi yiidi eqqishin, maadoy baynda asa mala neni nerkka ays pirdas uttadii?» gides." 
Exodus18:15 Histtiin Musey ba bollozas, «Asay Xoossa shene oychchanaas taakko yiza gishshassa." 
Exodus18:16 Istta giddon yo7oy diikko taakko yeettes; tanikka istta giddon diza yo7o pirdays; Xoossa maaraanne wogaa istta erisays» gides. 
Exodus18:17 Yootoreykka, «Hayssi neni ooththizayssi lo7o deenna." 
Exodus18:18 Neninne nenara diza asay daabura xalala daabureeta; hayssi oosozi nees daro deexo; neni hayssa nerkka ooththanaas dandayakka. 
Exodus18:19 Ane ha7i ta nena zorays! Ta yootizayssa siya; Xoossi nenara gido. Neni ha asaa gishshas Xoossa sinththan eqqa; asaza yo7okka Xoossako shiishsha. 
Exodus18:20 Xoossa maaraanne wogaa istta neni tamaarsa; istti waani daanaakko istti ooththana ooso istta bessa. 
Exodus18:21 Qasse asa ubbaa giddofe era asata, Xoossas babbizayta, ammanettidaytanne matta7e ixxizayta doorada isttafe asaas shaalaqata, mato halaqata, hamsa halaqatanne asira halaqata histta sunththa." 
Exodus18:22 Istti ubba wode asaas pirdetto; gido attiin deexo yo7o ubbaa neekko ehetto; waayisontta yo7o ubbaa istti heen wursetto. Istti nenara gishettiza gishshas toohoy nees kawuyana. 
Exodus18:23 Neni hessaththo ooththiko hayssi Xoossa shene gidikko neni daro daaburakka. Qasse ha asay wurikka ba yo7oy polettiin ufayssan ba soo ba soo baana» gides. 
Exodus18:24 Musey ba bolloza qaala siyides; izi gidayssa ubbaaka ooththides. 
Exodus18:25 Musey Isra7eele ubbaa giddofe era asata dooridi asaa kaaleththiza shaalaqata, mato halaqata, hamsa halaqatanne asira halaqata histti sunththides." 
Exodus18:26 Isttika asaas ubba wode pirdida; bana deexxida yo7oza Musekko ehida shin deexxontta yo7oza ubbaa barkka wursida. 
Exodus18:27 Hessafe guye Musey ba bollo Yootore moyziin Yootorey guye ba dere simmides. 
Exodus19:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxeppe kezida heedzdzanththo aginan koyro gallas Siina bazzo gakkides. 
Exodus19:2 Istti Erafidimeppe dendidi Siina bazzo biidi bazzon diza zumaa sinththan uttida. 
Exodus19:3 Museykka Xoossaako pude zumaa bolla keziin GODAY zumaa bolla dishe iza xeygidi, «Neni Yaaqoobe keeththa as gidida Isra7eele naytas hizga yoota;" 
Exodus19:4 ‹Tani Gibxe asaa bolla ay ooththidaakko qasse golle kafoy ba naa ba qefen tookkiza mala tani inttena wostta tookkada taakko ehidaakko intte intte ayfera beyideta. 
Exodus19:5 Histtiin ha7i intte taas kumeth azazettiko, intte ta caaqo qaalaa naagikko, kumeththa deraa garsan intte taas buzo dere gidana. Biittay wuri taas gidikkoka," 
Exodus19:6 intte ta kawoteththaas dumma shaakettida qeesetanne dumma dere gidana;› Neni Isra7eele naytas yootana qaalay hayssa» gides. 
Exodus19:7 Histtiin Musey zumaa bollafe duge asaakko wodhidi dere cimata xeygi shiishshidi GODAY yoota gida qaalata ubbaa isttas yootides. 
Exodus19:8 Asay wuri issi qaalan gididi, «GODAY gidayssa ubbaa nu ooththana» giin Musey istti gidayssa GODAAKKO ekki bides." 
Exodus19:9 GODAY Muse, «Tani nenara haasayshin asay siyana malanne istti nenan ubba wodekka ammanettana mala, tani neekko wolqqama shaarara yaana» gides. Hessafe guye Musey asay gidayssa GODAAS yootides." 
Exodus19:10 GODAY Muses, «Neni asaakko baada hachchinne wonto istta geeshsha. Istti ba may7o meeccidi," 
Exodus19:11 heedzdzanththo gallassas giigettetto. Gaasoykka heedzdzanththo gallassan asay wuri beyishin tani GODAY Siina zuma bolla wodhdhana. 
Exodus19:12 Neni asay dizaso yuushon asaas zawa woththada isttas, ‹Zuma bolla pude kezontta mala woykko zumaa xapho bochchontta mala inttena erite. Zuma bochchiday oonikka tumappe hayqqanaas bessees." 
Exodus19:13 As woykko mehe gidiin zawa pinni aadhdhiko oonikka ba kushen iza bochchontta shuchchan caddidi woykko wondafen dukkidi wodho› gees. Zaye goochchi punniko istti pude zumaa bolla kezana dandayeettes» gides. 
Exodus19:14 Musey zumaappe asaakko duge wodhdhidaappe guye asaa geeshshiin asay ba may7o meeccides. 
Exodus19:15 Asaakka, «Heedzdzanththo gallassas giigettite; maccassara aqopite» gides." 
Exodus19:16 Heedzdzanththo gallas maalado dada giirissi siyettides. Wolqqanththa poo7oynne wolqqama shaaray zumaa bolla beettides; Zayey punettiza daro wolqqama giirissi siyettides. Hessa gishshas asay wuri ba dizason babbidi kokkorides. 
Exodus19:17 Museykka asaa Xoossara gaththanaas asay dizasoppe kessiin asay zumaa achchan eqqides. 
Exodus19:18 GODAY Siina zumaa bolla tamara wodhdhida gishshas gita cooceppe keziza mala cuway tullu gi kezidi zumaa kumeth kammides; zumazi kumeth keehi qaaxxides. 
Exodus19:19 Zayeza giirissayka keehi dari dari bida wode Musey haasayiin haasayiin Xoossi izas zaari zaaridi qaalan haasaydes. 
Exodus19:20 GODAY kase Siina zumaa bolla wodhdhida wode Muse pude zumaa hu7e xeygiin Musey pude kezides. 
Exodus19:21 GODAY iza, «Neni duge baada asay beyana giidi haa taakko zawa aadhdhontta malanne isttafe daroti hayqqontta mala asaa hanqa." 
Exodus19:22 Haray attoshin ta mata shiiqiza qeesetikka ubba wode bana geeshshanaas koshshees; histtontta ixxiko GODAY istta qaxxayana» gides. 
Exodus19:23 Musey GODAAS, «Asay zumaa bolla pude yaanaas dandayenna; ays giikko neni ne hu7en, ‹Ha sohoza geeshsha mala dummasada, ha zumaa achchan zawa woththite› gaada nuus yoota woththadasa» gides." 
Exodus19:24 Histtiin GODAY iza, «Neni duge ha7i elle wodhdhada pude keza. Aarooneykka nenara yo. Qeesetanne asaa ta qaxxayontta mala istti zawa pinnidi pude taakko yoopetto» gides." 
Exodus19:25 Hessa gishshas Musey duge asaakko wodhdhidi GODAY gidayssa isttas yootides. 
Exodus20:1 GODAY haasayda qaalati ubbay hayssafe kaallizayta; 
Exodus20:2 «Nena Gibxeppe aylleteththa biittafe kessida GODAA ne Xoossay tana. 
Exodus20:3 «Taappe attiin hara eeqa xoossatas goynnofa. 
Exodus20:4 «Bolla salon diza miish gidiin, woykko garsa sa7an diza miish gidiin, woykko biittafe garsan haaththa giddon diza miish gidiin aykkoka misatissada nees misle histtada medhdhofa." 
Exodus20:5 Isttas hokkofanne isttas goynnofa. Ays giikko tani GODAA ne Xoossay qanaatiza Xoossako; tana ixxizayta aawata nagara gishshas nayta heedzdzanththo yeletanne oydanththo yeleta gakkanaas qaxxayays. 
Exodus20:6 Qasse tani tana siiqizaytassinne ta azazo naagizaytas daro shii yeleteth gakkanaas tani ta siiqo bessiza Xoossa. 
Exodus20:7 «GODAA ne Xoossaa sunth hadan denththofa; ays giikko GODAA ne Xoossay ba sunth hadan denththizayta qaxxayana. 
Exodus20:8 «Sambata gallassa hara gallassatappe dummasada naaga. 
Exodus20:9 Ne ooththiza ooso ubbaa usuppun gallassatan ooththa. 
Exodus20:10 Gido attiin laappunththa gallassay GODAA ne Xoossaas Sambata. He gallas aykko oosokka ooththofa; neni woykko ne attuma nay, woykko ne macca nay, woykko ne attuma aylley, woykko ne macca aylley, woykko ne miizay, woykko ne deren diidi nees ooththiza hara dere as gidiin he gallassan ay oosokka ooththofte." 
Exodus20:11 Ays giikko usuppun gallassan GODAY salo, sa7a, abbanne istta giddon diza ubbaa medhdhidi laappunththa gallas shempides. Hessa gishshas GODAY Sambata gallassaa anjjidessinne dummasides." 
Exodus20:12 «GODAA ne Xoossay nees immiza biittan ne daro layth daana mala, ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha." 
Exodus20:13 «As wodhoppa. 
Exodus20:14 «Laymatoppa. 
Exodus20:15 «Kaysotoppa. 
Exodus20:16 «Oona bollaka wordo markkattofa. 
Exodus20:17 «Asa keeth amottofa; asa machcho woykko iza aylle woykko iza aylleyo woykko iza boora woykko iza hare woykko izas diza ay miishshika amottofa» gides. 
Exodus20:18 Asay wuri daday giirizayssanne zayey zayetizayssa siyidi qasse wolqqanththi wolqqamizayssanne zumay cuwattizayssa be7idi kokkorishe haahon eqqides. 
Exodus20:19 Asay Muses, «Nuni hayqqontta mala Xoossi nunara haasayoppo; neni nuus yoota; nuni siyana» gida." 
Exodus20:20 Musey asaas, «Xoossi inttena paaccanaas, iza yashshi intte wozinan kumiin intte nagara ooththontta mala yida gishshas babbofte» gides." 
Exodus20:21 Asay haahon eqqi dishin Musey Xoossi dizaso wolqqama shaara dhumaakko shiiqides. 
Exodus20:22 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse, «Isra7eele asaas, ‹Tani saloppe inttes haasayshin intte intte ayfera be7ideta." 
Exodus20:23 Taappe attiin hara xoossi inttes dooppo; birappe woykko worqqafe inttes eeqa xoossata medhdhidi goynnofte. 
Exodus20:24 « ‹Neni taas yarsho yarshizaso urqqafe medhdhada xuugettiza yarshota, issifeteththa yarshota, ne dorsatappe, ne deyshatappenne ne mehetappe iza bolla yarsha. Ta sunththi qofettana mala, intte ooththidaso ubbaa soho yaada ta inttena anjjana." 
Exodus20:25 Neni taas yarsho yarshizaso shuchchafe ooththizaa gidikko masettida shuchchafe ooththofa; ays giikko neni massiza biratan iza bochchiko ne iza tunisaasa. 
Exodus20:26 Taas yarsho yarshizaso pude kezanaas yangare medhdhada iza bolla kezoppa; gaasoykka neni keziza wode ne kalloteththi beettana› gaada yoota» gides. 
Exodus21:1 «Neni Isra7eele naytas immana wogay hayssa. 
Exodus21:2 Neni Isra7eele nayta garsafe aylle shammiko izi nees usuppun layth ooththo; gido attiin laappunththa layththan izi aykkoka qanxxontta aylleteththafe coo mela yedetto. 
Exodus21:3 Izi barkka yidaa gidikko barkka bo; ba machcheyra yidaa gidikko iza machcheyakka izara bu. 
Exodus21:4 Iza goday izas machcho ekkidaa gidikko machcheya izas adde nayta woykko macca nayta yelidaa gidikko, he maccassayanne izi nayti iza godaas attiko izi barkka kezi bo." 
Exodus21:5 Gido attiin he aylley, ‹Tani ta godaa, ta machchiyonne ta nayta siiqays; tani aylleteththafe kezikke› giikko," 
Exodus21:6 iza goday iza pirdiza asa sinth aaththo; hessafe guye keeththa penge woykko penge qosilaththaako iza efidi iza hayth goonththan lukko. Histtiko izi ba de7o layth ubbaan izas aylle gidana. 
Exodus21:7 «Asi ba macca nayo aylleteththas bayzikko adde aylleti aylleteththafe keziza mala iza kezuppu. 
Exodus21:8 Iza bana dooridi efida godaa ufayssontta ixxiko izi goday izo wozzisanaas koshshees. Izi izis ammanettontta aggida gishshas izo allagas bayzana bessenna. 
Exodus21:9 Izi izo ba naas ekkanaas koykko ba macca naas ooththiza mala izis bessizayssa ooththo. 
Exodus21:10 Izi baas hara machcho ekkiko koyro machcheys quma woykko may7o pacisoppo; qasse izira aqo aggofo. 
Exodus21:11 Izi hayta heedzdzata izis immontta ixxiko aykko miishsheyka qanxxettontta aylleteththafe kezada bu. 
Exodus21:12 «As wodhida asi hayqqanaas bessees. 
Exodus21:13 Xoossa shene gidi uttiin qoppontta dishe as wodhidaadey tani giigsidaso bete bo. 
Exodus21:14 Gido attiin as wodhana qoppidi erishe hara as wodhikko hessaadey attanaas giidi he ta giigsida taas yarsho shiishshizaso yiikko yarshizasohozappe haraso efada wodha. 
Exodus21:15 «Ba aawa woykko ba aayo wadhdhiza asi oonikka hayqqo. 
Exodus21:16 «Asa wolqqan oykkidi bayzizaadey woykko wolqqan oykkiin asi iza kushen beettidaadey hayqqanaas bessees. 
Exodus21:17 «Ba aawa woykko ba aayo cayizaadey hayqqo. 
Exodus21:18 «Nam7u asati ba garsan ooyettiko, issoy issaa shuchchara caddiko woykko kushera icciko he qohettidaadezi hayqqontta hargidi hiixan ichchiko," 
Exodus21:19 hessafe dendidi guufera kare giddon hemettiko, he qohidayssi qaxxayettontta attees; gidikkoka izi iza ooso teqqida gishshas miishshe qanxxanaassinne izi paxana gakkanaas iza xeellanaas koshshees." 
Exodus21:20 «Asi ba attuma aylle woykko macca aylleyo guufen shocikko he shochchaa geedon heerakka iza kushen hayqqiko shocidayssi qaxxayettanaas bessees. 
Exodus21:21 Gido attiin he qohettidayssi issi gallas woykko nam7u gallas gakkanaas hayqqontta aggiko he ayllezi iza miish gidida gishshas izi qaxxayettenna. 
Exodus21:22 «Nam7u asati ba garsan issoy issaara ooyettishe qanththara diza maccassayo boshas gaththiko, hessafe hara iita miish izi bolla gaththontta aggiko, izi bolla qoho gaththidaadey he maccassay azinay oychchidayssa daannati pirdiko ay miishsheka qanxxo." 
Exodus21:23 Gido attiin izis boshay darikko shemppo gishshas shemppo," 
Exodus21:24 ayfe gishshas ayfe, achcha gishshas achcha, kushe gishshas kushe, toho gishshas toho," 
Exodus21:25 xuussa gishshas xuus, madunththa gishshas madunth, qoo7o gishshas qoo7o ekkanaas bessees." 
Exodus21:26 «Issi asi attuma woykko macca aylle ayfe shoci toyssiko he ayfeza gishshas aylleteththafe kessi yeddo. 
Exodus21:27 Hessaththoka ba aylley woykko ba aylleza ach menththiko he achchaa gishshas aylleteththafe kessi yeddo. 
Exodus21:28 «Booray maccas woykko attumas icci wodhikko, he booray shuchchan cadetti hayqqo; iza ashoy meetettofo. Gido attiin boora goday qaxxayettofo." 
Exodus21:29 Gido attiin booray kasekka icciza boora gidikko, asay booraza godaas yootidishin booraa goday booraa qachchontta aggiko, booray adde woykko macca as wodhikko he booray shuchchan cadetti hayqqo; qasse booraza godaykka hayqqo." 
Exodus21:30 Gido attiin izi cigo qanxxana mala oyshettiko istti oychchidayssa ay gidikkoka qanxxidi ba shemppo wozzo. 
Exodus21:31 Booray attuma naa woykko macca naa icci wodhikko pirday issi mala gido. 
Exodus21:32 Booray attuma aylle woykko macca aylleyo icci wodhikko booraa goday aylleza godaas heedzdzu tammu bira ciggo; booraykka shuchchan cadettidi hayqqo. 
Exodus21:33 «Issi asi olla kama qaarikko woykko olla bookkidi kammontta aggiko, booray woykko harey he ollaan wulliko," 
Exodus21:34 he ollaza goday meheza waaga qanxxo. Izi meheza godaas waaga qanxxidi hayqeththaa baas ekko. 
Exodus21:35 «Issi asa booray hara asa boora icci wodhikko, icci wodhida paxa booraa bayzidi iza miishshanne hayqqida booraza ashoza giddon gina shaakki ekketto." 
Exodus21:36 Gido attiin he booray icciza boora gididayssi kaseti erettishin, iza goday iza qachchontta aggiko, iza goday booraa gishshas boora qanxxidi he hayqqidayssa baas ekko." 
Exodus22:1 «Issi asi boora woykko dorsa kaysoti ekkidi shukkiko, woykko bayzi ekkiko, issi boora gishshas ichchashu boora, issi dorsa gishshas oyddu dors qanxxo." 
Exodus22:2 «Kaysoy keeth bookkishe oykettidi shocetti hayqqiko shocidayssi suuth gussida gishshas oychchettenna. 
Exodus22:3 Gido attiin hessi gadey wonti geyiin hanizaa gidikko izi he gukkida suuththaa acon oyshettees. Kaysozi kaysotidayssa qanxxo; gido attiin izas aykkoyka bayndaa gidikko kaysotidayssa qanxxanaas izi bayzetto. 
Exodus22:4 Izi kaysotida mehey paxa dishe iza kushen beettiko, boora woykko hare woykko dorsa gidikkoka izi ba kaysotidayssas nam7u kushe qanxxo." 
Exodus22:5 «Issi asi ba mehe demban woykko ayfey meetettiza miththa giddon heemmishe, meheta hara asa kaththan la7a yeddi heemmiko, izi ba kaththaafe woykko ayfey meetettiza ba miththa ubbaafe lo7izayssa afilaama qanxxo." 
Exodus22:6 «Issi asi buuraa xuuggiko tamay dendidi buuraza wursidi dooren diza kath woykko eqon diza kaththaa mulera mizaa gidikko koyro tama oyththida addezi afilaama qanxxo. 
Exodus22:7 «Issi asi bira woykko hara miish naagissanaas ba shooros hadara immiko, shoorozasoppe he miishshaa kaysotida kaysozi oykettiko, kaysozi he miishshas nam7u kushe qanxxo." 
Exodus22:8 Gido attiin kaysozi beettontta ixxiko, hadara ekkida addezi pirdizaytakko shiiqidi hadara miishsha izi miishshaa monttayssas caaqqo." 
Exodus22:9 «Asi ay mootonkka boora geedon, woykko hare geedon, woykko dorsa geedon, woykko may7o geedon, woykko hara dhayda miishsha geedon, ‹Hayssi tayssa› giidi mootettiko, nam7u baggayka ba yo7oza pirdizayta sinth aaththetto; pirdizayti wordosida asi hankkoyssas nam7u kushe qanxxo." 
Exodus22:10 «Asi ba shooros hare, woykko boora, woykko dorsa, woykko hara ay mehekka hadara immiin oonikka be7ontta hayqqiko, woykko qohettiko, woykko asi bonqqi efikko," 
Exodus22:11 hadaraaddey ba shooro meheza bochchonttayssas GODAA sinththan caaqqiko, istta giddon diza yo7ozi wurees. He meheza goday caaqoza ekko; qanxxisanaas bessenna." 
Exodus22:12 Gido attiin mehezi hadaraaddefe kaysotettidaa gidikko mehaaddes qanxxo. 
Exodus22:13 He meheza do7ay midaa gidikko, markka gidana mala do7ay mishin attidayssafe ekki ehi besso; histtidi meetettida meheza gishshas qanxxofo." 
Exodus22:14 «Asi ba shooroppe mehe garxxi ekkiko iza goday bayndason he mehey qohettiko woykko hayqqiko he meheza gishshas qanxxo. 
Exodus22:15 Gido attiin iza goday izara diikko, garxxidayssi qanxxofo; kiras ekkidaa gidikko kiras ciggiza miishshay acozas qanxxo gido." 
Exodus22:16 «Issi asi azinas giigontta geela7oyo baleththidi izira zin7izaa gidikko izo cilooshidi baas machcho ekko. 
Exodus22:17 Izi aaway izo izas immontta ixxiko, geela7oyo ekkiza asi cilooshas imettiza miishshaa keena bira izi aawaas immo." 
Exodus22:18 «Bita bitiza maccas paxa woththofa. 
Exodus22:19 «Mehera gaaggiza asi oonikka hayqqo. 
Exodus22:20 «GODAAS xalalappe attiin hara xoossas shukki yarshiza asi oonikka hayqqi dhayo. 
Exodus22:21 «Betidi yida as qohopite, woykko waayisopite; gaasoykka intteka Gibxe biittan bete gididi de7ideta." 
Exodus22:22 Azinay hayqqida am7eyonne aaway woykko aaya hayqqida naa waayisopite. 
Exodus22:23 Intte istta waayisiin istti taakko waassiko tani istta waaso tumappe siyana; 
Exodus22:24 he wode ta hanqoy intte bolla dendana; tani inttena mashshan wursana; intte machcheti am7eta intte naytikka aaway baynda yi7o nayta gidana. 
Exodus22:25 «Intte giddon diza ta asaas issi manqo asas miishshe tal7iko, ba miish dichchas immiza asa mala hanopite; neni yelo iza oychchofa." 
Exodus22:26 Neni issi miishsha gishshas ne lagge may7o oykkiko arshey wullontta dishin izas zaara. 
Exodus22:27 Aazas giikko izi ba kallo kammizay izin xalla; hara ay may7idi aqanaas dandayzee? Izi taas waassiko ta mishettiza gishshas izas siyananne iza maaddana. 
Exodus22:28 «Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala haasayoppa, woykko dere ayssizaade qanggofa." 
Exodus22:29 «Ne kaththa xeera, woyne miththa ayfe xeeranne wogara zayte taas yarsho shiishsha. Neni ne attuma nayta giddon bayratiza naa taas immanaas bessees." 
Exodus22:30 Boorappe, deyshafenne dorsafekka hessaththo ooththa. Istti laappun gallassay gakkanaas, ba aayira aayira gam7etto; osppunththa gallas istta taas imma." 
Exodus22:31 «Intte taas geeshsha as gidanaas koshshees; hessa gishshas do7ay demban wodhida woykko dafi daakkida mehe asho kanas yeggite attiin moopite. 
Exodus23:1 «Wordo yo7o laallofa; wordo markkattada iita as maaddofa. 
Exodus23:2 «Iita miish ooththanaas daro asa kaallofa; pirda mirqqanaas daro asaara gidada markkattofa. 
Exodus23:3 Manqo asi pirdaso shiiqikko iza manqoteth be7ada maadda pirdofa. 
Exodus23:4 «Ne morkke booray woykko harey dhaydayssa demmiko izaades zaara imma. 
Exodus23:5 Nena ixxiza asas harey caanara kundi dishin be7ikko izara maadettada denththa attiin heen agaagoppa. 
Exodus23:6 «Pirdas dubbushan shiiqada, manqo asa pirda wobbisoppa." 
Exodus23:7 Wordo mooto siyoppa; geesh woykko xillo as hayqos aaththa immofa; ays giikko mooro ooththidaade tani mela yeddike. 
Exodus23:8 «Matta7e ekkofa; aazas giikko matta7ey xeellizayta ayfe qooqiseessinne xillota qaala mirqqees. 
Exodus23:9 «Hara dereppe yida bete as qohoppite; bete as gideththi ay mala deexxizaakko intte ereeta; ays giikko intte intte hu7en bete gididi Gibxe biittan de7ideta. 
Exodus23:10 «Usuppun layth gakkanaas ne goyada zerida kaththa maxa shiishsha. 
Exodus23:11 Laappunththa layththan gadeza goyontta shaachcha; histtiko ne dere garsan diza manqoti hessafe maana kath demmana; qasse isttafe attizayssa do7ati maana. Neni ne woyne tokkiza gade bollanne zayte immiza wogara miththa gade bollaka hessaththo ooththa. 
Exodus23:12 «Usuppun gallas ne ooso ooththa; ne booraynne ne harey shempana malanne neson yelettida aylleynne bete asi, shempana mala, laappunththa gallas ooso ooththofa." 
Exodus23:13 «Tani inttena gidayssa ubbaa minththidi ooththite; hara xoossata sunth xeygopitenne istta woossofte. 
Exodus23:14 «Layththan heedzdzuto intte taas ba7aale bonchchite. 
Exodus23:15 Abibe geetettiza aginan barettida gallassan ukeththa ba7aale bonchchite; ays giikko intte Gibxeppe keziday he aginanna. Tani inttena azazida mala laappun gallas irshoy gelontta uketh miite. «Inttefe issaadeyka ta sinththan mela kushe beettofo. 
Exodus23:16 «Qasse intte intte gaden zeriin, koyro gakkida kath maxiza wode, kaththa xeera shiishshiza ba7aale bonchchite. «Qasseka layththaa wurseththan, kath ubbaa shiishshi wursiza wode, kaththa shiisho ba7aale bonchchite." 
Exodus23:17 Addeti wuri ubbaa Haariza GODAA ta sinth layththan heedzdzuto yetto. 
Exodus23:18 «Neni yarsho suuth taas shiishshashe irshora uukettida ukeththara shiishshofa. He ba7aaleza bonchchiza gallas yarshettida moodheppe maalados aykkoyka attofo. 
Exodus23:19 Ne gaden bayra kaxxida kaththa ubbaafe lo7izayssa GODAA ne Xoossaa soo ekka ya. Deyshsha laaqqa iza aayey maaththan doyssofa. 
Exodus23:20 «Ne ogen nena naagana malanne tani nees giigsidaso nena efana mala, tani kiitanchcha ne sinththara yeddana." 
Exodus23:21 Izi yootizayssa ero gaada izas azazetta; iza bolla makkallofa; ta iza kiittida gishshas intte nagara ooththiko inttes izi atto geenna. 
Exodus23:22 Izi yootizayssa intte lo7eththi siyikko, tani yootizayssa ubbaa ooththiko intte morkketa ubbaa tani morkkana; inttenara eqettizaytara tanikka eqettana." 
Exodus23:23 Ta kiitanchchay inttefe sinththe biidi, inttena Amooreta biitta, Hiiteta biitta, Paarizeta biitta, Kanaaneta biitta, Hiiweta biittanne Yaabuseta biitta efana. Tani istta mulera dhayssana." 
Exodus23:24 Istta eeqata sinththan hokkofte, woykko goynnofte, woykko istta hano qullofte. Intte istta dhayssanaassinne tuussa mala eqqi diza istta shuchcha eeqata menththereththanaas bessees." 
Exodus23:25 GODAA intte Xoossaas goynnite; histtiko, izi inttena kaththaninne haaththan anjjana; ta intte giddofe harge diggana." 
Exodus23:26 Intte biittan ay maccasika boshettennanne maynenna. Tani intte daana layth adussana. 
Exodus23:27 «Inttenara gaaggiza dereta ubbaa daganththana mala tani ta yashshateth intte sinththara yeddana; intte morkketi wuri inttes zokko zaaridi, baqatana mala ta ooththana." 
Exodus23:28 Tani inttefe sinththara kazhe yeddada Hiiweta, Kanaanetanne Hiiteta goodda kessana." 
Exodus23:29 Gido attiin biittay kallo attontta malanne do7ay darontta mala, ta istta issi layththa garsan gooddike." 
Exodus23:30 Gido attiin intte qoodan daridi, he biittaa laattana gakkanaas, tani istta guuth guuth goodda kessana." 
Exodus23:31 Tani intte zawaa Zo7o abbaafe Mediteraane abbaa gakkanaas, bazzofe Efiraaxise shaafaa gaththana. He biittan dizaaz ubbaa tani intte kushen aaththa immana; intteka istta intte sinththafe gooddi kessana." 
Exodus23:32 Isttara woykko istta eeqa xoossatara caaqon gelopite. 
Exodus23:33 Istta intte biittan woththofte; intte histtontta aggiko istti inttena ta bolla nagara oosisana; ays giikko istta eeqatas goynnizayssi tumappe inttes narxa gidana» gides. 
Exodus24:1 GODAY Muse, «Neni, Aarooney, Nadaabey, Abihuynne Isra7eeleppe laappun tammu dere halaqati GODAAKKO zuma bolla pude kezidi haahon eqqidi taas goynnite." 
Exodus24:2 Gido attiin neni nerkka taakko shiiqa; harati ta mata shiiqopetto. Qasse asaykka nenara pude kezoppo» gides. 
Exodus24:3 Musey yiidi GODAA qaalanne iza woga ubbaa asaas yootiin asay wuri issi qaalan, «GODAY yootidayssa ubbaa nuni ooththana» gides." 
Exodus24:4 Musey GODAY yootidayssa ubbaa xaafides. Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi zumaa garsan yarshizaso giigsidi Isra7eele asaa tammanne nam7u qommota sunththan tammanne nam7u shuch tuussa mala essides. 
Exodus24:5 Izi Isra7eele asaappe naateththa attuma nayta kiittiin, istti biidi GODAAS mirgota xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho histti yarshida." 
Exodus24:6 Musey suuththaafe baggaa ekkidi keretan qolides; attida suuththaa yarsho yarshiza sohozan cacafides. 
Exodus24:7 Hessafe guye Caaqo Qaala Maxaafaa ekkidi asaas dhoqqu histtidi nababiin asay, «GODAY yootidayssa ubbaa nuni ooththananne azazettana» gides." 
Exodus24:8 Museykka keretan attida suuththaa ekkidi asaa bolla wuxxidi asaa, «Be7ite, hayssi GODAY hayta qaalata inttes immishe inttenara woththida caaqo suuththa» gides." 
Exodus24:9 Hessafe guye Musey, Aarooney, Nadaabey, Abihuynne Isra7eele halaqatappe laappun tammati pude kezidi," 
Exodus24:10 Isra7eele Xoossaa be7ida; istti be7oyssika iza tohoppe garsara salo mala geeyi uttida simpere geetettiza shuchchafe oosettida miish misatiza wuyge dizayssako. 
Exodus24:11 Gido attiin Xoossi Isra7eele asaa halaqata wodhibeenna; istti Xoossaa be7ida; iza sinththan midanne uyida. 
Exodus24:12 GODAY Muses, «Neni taakko zumaa bolla pude haa ya; haa taakko kezada haan gam7a; histtiko neni wogaa tamaarsana mala tani wogaanne azazo iza bolla xaafida lochcha shuchchata nees immana» gides." 
Exodus24:13 Hessafe guye Musey ba aylle Iyaasora baana keziin Musey pude Xoossa zumaa bolla kezides. 
Exodus24:14 Isra7eele asaa halaqata izi, «Nuni intteko simmanaashe gakkanaas hayssan diishshite; Aarooneynne Huurey haan inttenara deettes; yo7oy diza asi oonikka isttako bo» gides." 
Exodus24:15 Musey zumaa bolla pude keziin Xoossa shaaray zumaa kammides. 
Exodus24:16 GODAA bonchchoyka Siina zumaa bolla wodhdhi gam7ides; usuppun gallas gakkanaas shaarazi zumaa goozi oykkides; laappunththa gallassan shaaraa giddora GODAY Muse xeygides. 
Exodus24:17 Isra7eele naytas GODAA bonchchoy zumaa xeeran eexxiza tama misatidi beettides. 
Exodus24:18 Hessafe guye Musey he shaaraa giddo gelidi pude zumaa bolla kezidi heen oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma gam7ides. 
Exodus25:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Exodus25:2 «Taas imota ehana mala neni Isra7eele naytas yoota; taas immanaas iza wozinay iza imma imma giin immiza asa imota ubbaa ne taas ekka. 
Exodus25:3 Intte isttafe ekkana imotay haytantta; worqqa, bira, xarqimala," 
Exodus25:4 salo misatiza qacina, ochcha teera misatiza qacina, xeeqa zo7o qacinanne booththa liiqo layno, deysha iske," 
Exodus25:5 dharsho ite zo7o qalamen yeggi kessidayssa, abbaa giddon diza issi do7a galba, odoro mith," 
Exodus25:6 xomppes wogara zayte, tiyettiza zaytessinne exaanes sawissiza qimame," 
Exodus25:7 eefudeninne tira bollan diza kiiseta giddon woththiza margide geetettiza shuchchatanne hara al7o shuchchata. 
Exodus25:8 «Histtidi tani istta giddon aqana mala istti taas dumma goynniza soo giigsetto. 
Exodus25:9 Xoossa Dunkaanezanne iza giddon diza miishshata tani nena bessiza leemisoza mala ooththite. 
Exodus25:10 «Istti odoro miththafe adussateththay nam7u wadhanne bagga, gomppay issi wadhanne bagga, dhoqqateththay qasse issi wadhanne bagga gidiza Taabota ooththetto." 
Exodus25:11 Soo baggaanne kare baggaa walakay baynda worqqan meesha; iza yuuyi aadhdhanaas bolla bagga xanxaa worqqara yuushsha aaththa ooththa. 
Exodus25:12 Taabotaas oyddu worqqa sagayota ooththada oyddu tohotan issi baggara nam7u sagayota, qasse hankko baggara nam7u sagayota aaththa." 
Exodus25:13 Hessafe guye odoro miththafe tooho miththata kessada worqqa tiya. 
Exodus25:14 Taabotaa tookkana mala Taabotaza millen diza sagayotan tooho miththata gelththa. 
Exodus25:15 Tooho miththati Taabotaa sagayota giddon detto; istti heeppe mulekka kezopetto. 
Exodus25:16 Tani nees immiza caaqo qaala markka taabotaa giddon woththa. 
Exodus25:17 «Harara walakettontta worqqafe xalala nam7u wadhanne bagga aduqqiza, issi wadhanne bagga aakkiza maaroteththa kama ooththa." 
Exodus25:18 Kamaza xeera nam7u baggara qoxxada nam7u kirubeta worqqafe ooththa. 
Exodus25:19 Issi kirubeza issi bagga gaxan, nam7anththo kirubeza hankko bagga gaxan nam7atakka maaroteththaa kamazara gaththa ooththa." 
Exodus25:20 Kirubeti ba qefe denththidi maaroteththa kamaa bollara kammetto; qasse issoy issaakko simmi uttidi kamazakko xeelletto. 
Exodus25:21 Tani nees immiza caaqo qaala markka Taabotaa giddon woththa; qasse kamaza Taabotaas bolla baggara woththa. 
Exodus25:22 Caaqo qaala markkay izan diza Taabotaa kamaa bolla diza nam7u kirubetappe giddon tani nenara gaaggada Isra7eele asaas immiza azazo ubbaa heen ta nees immana. 
Exodus25:23 «Odoro miththafe adussateththay nam7u wadha, gomppay issi wadha, dhoqqateththay qasse issi wadhanne bagga gidiza issi xaraphpheeza ooththa." 
Exodus25:24 Histtada walakay baynda worqqan tiya; qasse iza yuushon worqqa xanxa yuushsha aaththa. 
Exodus25:25 Hessaththoka qasse aahoteththi tadhdhako gidiza xanxa iza bolla yuushsha aaththa. Histtada iza bolla worqqa balxxanth yuushsha aaththa. 
Exodus25:26 Xaraphpheezazas oyddu worqqa sagayota medhdhada, xaraphpheeza tohoti diza oyddu baggara oyththa." 
Exodus25:27 Xaraphpheeza tookkanaas tooho mith iza giddora aaththiza sagayoti xaraphpheezazas xanxa matan detto. 
Exodus25:28 He tookkiza miththata odoro miththafe kessada, worqqa tiyada isttara xaraphpheezaza tookka." 
Exodus25:29 Hessaththoka qasse saanetanne pil7ota, duuqqana xaarotanne kereta walakay baynda worqqafe ooththa." 
Exodus25:30 Ta sinth aadhdhiza geeshsha ukeththay ubba wodekka xaraphpheeza bollafe dhayoppo. 
Exodus25:31 «Worqqafe xalla qoxxada xomppe istta bolla woththiza ballata kessa; qasseka iza qoxxada xomppezi izan eqqiza toho, giddo toomanne toomaza kureta, dhemotanne ciishshata ubbaa ooththa." 
Exodus25:32 Issi millera heedzdzu ballati, issi millera qasseka heedzdzu ballati issi bolla usuppun haggati izas detto." 
Exodus25:33 Usuppun ballataska issaas issaas dhemoynne ciishshay izan diza ochcholoone geetettiza miththa ciish misatiza heedzdzu kureti detto. 
Exodus25:34 Xomppeza giddo toomay, dhemotinne ciishshati izan diza ochcholoone geetettiza miththa ciish misatiza oyddu kureti detto." 
Exodus25:35 Nam7ay nam7ay issife waaththan diza heedzdzu ballatappe garsara issi issi dhemoy de7o. 
Exodus25:36 Dhemotinne ballati wuri giddo toomazappe qoxettidi walakay baynda worqqafe oosettetto. 
Exodus25:37 «Hessafe guye Xomppe woththizasozas laappun eexxizaso giigsada xomppeti sinththa bagga poo7ana mala oyththa. 
Exodus25:38 Xomppeza bolla eexxishe qaammida shalota kessiza qaphetanne xiixa woththiza saaneta walakay baynda worqqafe ooththa. 
Exodus25:39 Xomppezinne iza miishshati wuri heedzdzu tammanne ichchashu kilo giraame gidiza walakay baynda worqqafe oosettetto. 
Exodus25:40 Tani nena zumaa bolla bessida leemisoza kaallada akeekan ooththa. 
Exodus26:1 «Qasse lo7eththi suqettida booththa laynoppe dadettida tammu magalashata dunkaaneza giddon giigsa. Qasseka salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinara he magalashata bolla issi hiillan kirubeta misle oosisa." 
Exodus26:2 Magalashati wuri issi gina gidetto; issaa issaa adussateththay nam7u tammanne osppun wadha; gomppay qasse oyddu wadha gido. 
Exodus26:3 Ichchashu magalashata issife gaththa sikka; hankko attida ichchashu magalashatakka isttaththoka ooththa. 
Exodus26:4 Issife gaaggi sikettida magalashatappe gaxan diza magalashaas balxxanththa bolla salo misatiza carqqafe siidhe ooththa; qasse issife gaaggidi sikettida hankko magalashaankka hessaththo ooththa. 
Exodus26:5 Issife gaaggida issi magalashaa bolla ichchashu tammu siidhe misatiza miish, qasse issife gaaggida hankko magalashaa bollaka ichchash tammu siidhe misatiza miish ooththa; he siidhe misatiza miishshati wurikka he baggaranne ha baggara issay issaara ginan detto." 
Exodus26:6 Hessafe guye worqqafe ichchash tammu qapheta medhdhada giddo dunkaanezi issino gidana mala, he magalashata manxakotan issaa issaara oyseththa." 
Exodus26:7 «Giddo Dunkaaneza bollara hara dunkaane ooththanaas tammanne issi magalashata deysha iskefe dadda. 
Exodus26:8 Tammanne issi magalashatikka issi gina gidetto; issi issi magalasha adussateththay heedzdzu tammu wadha, gomppay qasse oyddu wadha gido." 
Exodus26:9 Ichchashu magalashata issi baggara usuppun magalashata qasse hankko baggaara gaththa sikka. Usuppunththa magalashay sinththara soo bagga simmi qalam7etto. 
Exodus26:10 Gaththi sikkida magalashatappe issi magalashaa gaxan ichchash tammu siidhe misatiza miishshata ooththa; qasse gaththi sikkida hankko magalashatappe wurseththa magalashaa balxxanththa bolla ichchash tammu siidhe misatiza miishshata ooththa. 
Exodus26:11 Xarqimalappe ichchashu tammu qapheta ooththada, qanggo misatiza miishshata giddo gelththa; histtada bolla dunkaaneza issife gaththa oyththa. Histtiko ha nam7u oykettida kamati issino gidana." 
Exodus26:12 Bolla dunkaaneza magalashatappe palahida bagga magalashay giddo dunkaanezas guyera alaletto. 
Exodus26:13 Bolla Dunkaaneza magalashati nam7u baggarakka issi issi wadha mala palahidi heera haara alalettidi giddo dunkaaneza kammana mala nam7u bagga millera alaletto. 
Exodus26:14 «Bolla bagga dunkaaneza bollara kammanaas zo7o qalamen geli kezida dharsho ite giigsa; qasse iza bollara kammanaas haaththa giddo do7a galbafe hara kama giigsa. 
Exodus26:15 «Giddo Dunkaaneza tole miththata odoro miththafe ooththa. 
Exodus26:16 Issi issi tole miththas adussateththay tammu wadha, gomppay issi wadhanne bagga gido." 
Exodus26:17 Issi tole miththas issi bolla oyketti uttida nam7u tohota ooththa. Giddo Dunkaaneza tole miththata ubbaaka hessaththo ooththa; 
Exodus26:18 Giddo Dunkaanezas duge baggara nam7u tammu tole miththata kessada," 
Exodus26:19 issi issi tole miththas nam7u eqoso, mulera oyddu tammu eqoso birappe giigsa." 
Exodus26:20 Giddo Dunkaanezas pudeha baggara, nam7u tammu tole miththata kessada," 
Exodus26:21 issi issi tole miththas nam7u eqoso, mulera oyddu tammu eqoso birappe giigsa." 
Exodus26:22 Qasse giddo Dunkaanezas guyera arshey wulliza baggara usuppun tole miththata kessada," 
Exodus26:23 guye baggara diza zoozetas nam7u tole miththata giigsa. 
Exodus26:24 Guye baggara diza tole miththati wuri xaphoppe xeeraa gakkanaas issi bolla gaaggi oykettidi, xeeran issoy issaara sagayon oyketetto; hessaththoka nam7u zoozeta bolla diza nam7u tole miththatikka hara tole miththatara oyketetto." 
Exodus26:25 Issi issi tole miththas garsara nam7u nam7u tole eqosoy de7o; mulera osppun tole miththatinne birappe oosettida tammanne usuppun eqosoy deyo. 
Exodus26:26 «Qasse meega miththata odoro miththafe kessa. Giddo Dunkaanezas issi bagga millen diza tole miththatas ichchashu meega miththata," 
Exodus26:27 qasse hankko bagga millen diza tole miththatas ha7ikka ichchashu meega miththata giigsa. Hessaththoka giddo Dunkaanezas guyera arshey wulliza baggara diza tole miththatas ichchashu meega miththata giigsa. 
Exodus26:28 Giddo meega miththati tole miththatas giddora ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas kanththi kezanaas bessees. 
Exodus26:29 «Tole miththata worqqan tiyada meega miththati istta giddora aadhdhiza sagayota worqqafe ooththa; qasse meega miththatakka worqqan tiya. 
Exodus26:30 Giddo dunkaaneza tani nena zumaa bollan bessida leemisoza mala tokka. 
Exodus26:31 «Salo misatizappe, ochcha teera misatiza qacinappenne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i suqettida liiqo laynoppe issi magalasha ooththa; he magalashaza bolla kirubeta misle sikki medhdhiza hiillan oosisa." 
Exodus26:32 Histtada odoro miththafe oosettidi worqqan tiyettida oyddu eqo miththata bolla diza worqqafe oosettida kaqotan kaqqa. He oyddu eqo miththati birappe oosettida eqosotan geletto. 
Exodus26:33 He magalashaza giddo dunkaaneza kaaran diza qaphetappe garsara kaqqada, Caaqo qaalaas markka gidida taabotaa magalashazappe gaaththa baggara woththa; histtiko he magalashazi geesh geetettiza sohoza ubbaafe dummatiza qol7aafe giddon shaakkana." 
Exodus26:34 Maaroteththa kama ubbaafe dummatida qol7an diza caaqo qaalaas markka gidida taabotaa bolla woththa. 
Exodus26:35 Xaraphpheezaza magalashaappe karera pude baggara woththa; xomppe woththiza ballaa qasse iza ginan duge baggara woththa. 
Exodus26:36 «Dunkaanezan geliza pengezas salo misatiza qacinappe, ochcha teera misatiza qacinappe, xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i suqettida liiqo laynoppe xilpen alleqissi oosettida magalasha giigsa." 
Exodus26:37 Magalashazas ichchashu eqo miththata odoro miththafe kessada, worqqan tiya; istta kaqotikka worqqafe oosettidaa gidetto; eqo miththatas xarqimalappe oosettida ichchashu eqoso giigsa." 
Exodus27:1 «Odoro miththafe yarshizaso ooththa. He yarshizasoza dhoqqateththay heedzdzu wadha; gomppaynne adussateththay issi mala, ichchashu ichchashu wadha gididi oyddu zoozera deyo." 
Exodus27:2 Oyddu zoozeta wurseththa gaxan gaxan issi issi kace medhdha; kaceti yarshosozappe oosettetto. Histtada yarshizasoza xarqimala tiya. 
Exodus27:3 Izan go7ettiza miishshata, Bidinth kaashiza miishshata, kaashettida bidinththaa kessiza miishshata, kereta, asho xiixiza konccetanne tama kaachizanne kessiza miishshata ubbaa xarqimalappe ooththa." 
Exodus27:4 Histtada izas xarqimalappe zayzare mala miishshinne oyddu gulata bollan oyddu sagayota ooththa. 
Exodus27:5 Histtada yarshizasozas dabba bolla woththa. 
Exodus27:6 Odoro miththafe yarshizasozas tooho miththata kessada xarqimala tiya. 
Exodus27:7 Yarshizasoza tookkiza wode maaddana mala he tooho miththatas nam7u millera diza sagayotan aaththa. 
Exodus27:8 Tani nena zumaa bollan bessida mala yarshizasoza sanqqafe ooththada giddoza doya agga. 
Exodus27:9 «Xoossa Dunkaaneza gibbe lo7i dadettida liiqo laynoppe magalashata giigsa. Duge baggara diza magalashata adussateththay xeetu wadha gido. 
Exodus27:10 Izas nam7u tammu eqo miththatinne eqo miththati isttan eqqiza nam7u tammu eqosota xarqimalappe ooththa; istta hu7en qasse kaqotanne tore miththata hu7e bolla gita sagayota birappe ooththa. 
Exodus27:11 Hessaththoka pude bagga adussateththay xeetu wadha; qasse nam7u tammu tore miththatinne eqo miththatas nam7u tammu xarqimalappe oosettida eqosoti detto. Histtada birappe oosettida kaqotanne eqo miththatas hu7e bolla gita sagayota woththa. 
Exodus27:12 Arshey wulliza baggara aakoteththay ichchashu tammu wadha gido; tammu tore miththatinne tore miththatas tammu eqosoti diza magalashati izas detto. 
Exodus27:13 Qasse arshey mokkiza baggara aakoteththay ichchashu tammu wadha gididi," 
Exodus27:14 pengezappe issi baggara tammanne ichchashu wadha aduqqiza magalashati detto; isttas heedzdzu eqo miththatinne isttan eqqiza heedzdzu eqosoti detto. 
Exodus27:15 Hessaththoka hankko baggara tammanne ichchashu wadha aduqqiza magalashati detto; isttas heedzdzu eqo miththatinne isttan eqqiza heedzdzu eqosoti detto. 
Exodus27:16 «Pengezas nam7u tammu wadha aduqqiza magalasha salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i suqettida laynoppe dadettida, xilpen lo7ida magalasha giigsa. Iza tuuqi oykkanaas oyddu eqo miththatinne tore miththati isttan eqqiza oyddu eqosota giigsa." 
Exodus27:17 «Gibbeza yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza eqo miththata ubbaas birappe oosettida gita sagayoti, kaqotinne, xarqimalappe oosettida eqosoti detto." 
Exodus27:18 Gibbeza adussateththay xeetu wadha, aakoteththay ichchash tammu wadha gido; dhoqqateththay ichchashu wadha gidida lo7i suqetti dadettida laynoppe oosettida magalashati detto; qasseka xarqimalappe oosettida eqosoti detto." 
Exodus27:19 «Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosos go7ettiza miishshati, Dunkaanezanne gibbeza tole dhishketi wurikka xarqimalappe oosettetto." 
Exodus27:20 «Xomppey to7ontta eexxishe daana mala izas koshshiza zayte wogara miththa ayfe caddi gum7idi xillo zayte nees ehana mala Isra7eele nayta azaza. 
Exodus27:21 Aarooneynne iza attuma nayti xomppey GODAA sinththan qammida gadey wonttana gakkanaas poo7ana mala, Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddon, caaqo qaalaas markkay iza giddon diza taabotaa sinththan diza magalashaappe karera eeththetto. Hayssi Isra7eele asaas mernaas woga gidi de7o." 
Exodus28:1 «Ne isha Aaroonenne iza attuma nayta Nadaabe, Abihu, El7ezeerenne Itamaare neekko ekka ya; istti qeese gididi taas ooththana mala Isra7eele asaa giddofe istta dummasa." 
Exodus28:2 Izas bonchchonne lo7oteth immana mala ne isha Aaroones dumma may7o giigsa. 
Exodus28:3 Tani dumma dumma erateth immida kushe hiilla eriza as ubbaa xeygada Aaroones may7o giigsana mala yoota; izikka qeese gididi taas ooththanaas dummato. 
Exodus28:4 Istti giigsana may7otikka haytanttako; tira kiise, eefude, eefudeppe garsara may7iza hara may7o, qasseka ubbaafe garsara may7iza adussa may7o, goossenne dancco. Ne ishay Aarooneynne iza attuma nayti qeese gididi taas ooththishe dumma may7ota may7ana mala, may7o giigsetto." 
Exodus28:5 Kushe hiillateth erizaytikka he may7ota giigsanaas, worqqa, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinanne liiqo layno ekki ooththetto." 
Exodus28:6 «Eefude geetettiza may7o worqqafe, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizaa, xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i suqettida liiqo laynoppe kushe hiillati alleqissi giigsetto." 
Exodus28:7 Izas hashera duge wodhdhiza nam7u kaqoti detto; isttika biidi eefude may7ozara issife hara oyththiza miishshara dabba bolla oykettidi issino gidetto. 
Exodus28:8 Hiillay lo7eththidi daddida danccoyka eefudeza mala worqqafe, salo misatiza ochcha teera misatizaa, xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i baqettida laynoppe eefudezara issife oyketti dadetto." 
Exodus28:9 «Margide geetettiza nam7u shuchchata ekkada Isra7eele nayta sunth istta bolla wooca xaafa. 
Exodus28:10 Istta yeleta maaraa mala issi shuchchaa bolla usuppun sunth, hankko shuchchaa bolla qasse attida usuppunata sunth wooca xaafa." 
Exodus28:11 Hiillanchchay maatame bolla sunth wooci xaafiza mala, he nam7u shuchchata bolla Isra7eele nayta sunththu wooca xaafada yuuyi aadhdhanaas worqqafe giigettida miishsha giddon woththa." 
Exodus28:12 Histtada tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zereththata qofsizaaz gidana mala ha nam7u shuchchata eefudezara oyththada hashe bolla woththa; histtiko GODAA sinththan ubba wode qofettana mala ha sunththata Aarooney ba hashe bolla tookko. 
Exodus28:13 Shuchchata woththanaas worqqafe dooqetti giigida macarata ooththa. 
Exodus28:14 Qasse walakay baynda worqqafe wodoro mala dooqettida nam7u orde sansalatata giigsada, shuchchata woththanaas worqqafe dooqetti giigettida macaratara gaththa oyeseththa." 
Exodus28:15 «GODAA sheney aazakkonne iza oychchidi eriza tira kiise kushe hiillanchchan oosisa. He tira kiise eefude daddida mala, worqqafe, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne lo7i suqettida laynoppe dadda." 
Exodus28:16 Izas adussateththaynne aahoteththay dakkoti qalam7ettidi issi tadhdhako gido. 
Exodus28:17 Hessafe guye iza bolla oyddu maaran al7o shuchchata woththa; koyro maaran sardiyoone, tophaaziyoonenne phoolliza inqqu." 
Exodus28:18 Nam7anththo maaran baluure, simperenne almaaze geetettiza al7o shuchchata;" 
Exodus28:19 heedzdzanththo maaran yaakintte, kelqedoonenne ametesxinoose;" 
Exodus28:20 oydanththo maaran birille, margide, yasphiide. Haytanti wuri shuchchata woththanaas worqqafe dooqetti giigida macarata bolla uttetto." 
Exodus28:21 Isra7eele qommota sunththaa qooda mala, shuchchata qoodaykka tammanne nam7u gido; issaa issaa bolla maatame mala woocettidi tammanne nam7u zereththata sunththi he shuchchatan xaafetto." 
Exodus28:22 «Tira kiises walakay baynda worqqafe wodoro mala dooqettida orde sansalatata ooththa. 
Exodus28:23 Nam7u yiich worqqafe giigsada tira kiises qommo gaxa xeerara gaththada oyththa woththa. 
Exodus28:24 He nam7u worqqa sansalatata tira kiisetas xeeratan diza sagayotara gaththa oyththa. 
Exodus28:25 He sansalatatas hankko bagga xeeraa qasse eefudezas sinththa baggara, hashe bolla diza shuchchata woththanaas worqqafe dooqetti giigida macaratara gaththa oyseththa."
