Exodus28:26 Qasseka nam7u worqqa yiichchata giigsada, eefudeppe kaalli diza tira kiisetas gaaththa baggara diza nam7u xeeratan aaththa." 
Exodus28:27 Hessaththoka worqqafe hara nam7u yiichchata giigsada eefudezas sinththa baggara, hashe bolla diza kaqozappe garsa baggara, eefude danccizasoppe qommora sikoy gaaggizaso achchan istta oyththa." 
Exodus28:28 Tira kiisen diza sagayota eefudezan diza sagayotara gaththidi salo misatiza suqeththan danccozara gaththa qachcha; histtiko tira kiisezi xeessafe bollara diza gishshas qashoy leppenna. 
Exodus28:29 «Aarooney ubbaafe dumma qol7aa geliza wode he tira kiisen diza Isra7eele qommota sunththata tookko. Histtiko hayssi GODAA sinththan ubba wode hassa7ettana. 
Exodus28:30 Qasse Urimenne Tumime geetettizayta tira kiisetan yegga. Aarooney GODAA sinth aadhdhishe ba tiran woththi ekki gelo. GODAA sheney aazakkonne Isra7eele asaa erisana mala, izi GODAA sinththan ooththanaas geliza ubba wode tira kiiseppe dhayssofo." 
Exodus28:31 «Eefudezappe bollara may7ettiza adussa may7o salo misatiza carqqafe xalla giigsa. 
Exodus28:32 He adussa may7ozas hu7ey gelizaso giigsa. Hu7ey kezizasozi daakettontta mala soo bagga qalam7ada yuushsha aaththa sikka. 
Exodus28:33 Adussa may7ozas garsa bagga maccaraa yuushon salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappe, oroomaane geetettiza miththa ayfe misleta medhdha. Histtada istta giddon worqqafe oosettida daalata walakan woththa." 
Exodus28:34 Worqqa daalatinne oroomaane miththa ayfe misleti he adussa may7o garsa bagga xeeran yuuyi aadhdhanaas walakan detto. 
Exodus28:35 Aarooney qeeseteththan ooththiza wode ha adussa may7oza may7o; GODAA sinth ubbaafe dumma qol7a geliza wodenne keziza wode daalay giirana. Izi he may7oza may7iko hayqqenna. 
Exodus28:36 Walakay baynda worqqafe issi alleqo giigsada maatame wooci kessiza mala iza bolla woocada, ‹GODAAS geesh gidi dummatides› gaada xaafa." 
Exodus28:37 Histtada hu7en goossa bolla salo misatiza qacinan goossazas sinththa baggara oyththa kaqqa. 
Exodus28:38 Histtidi Aarooney iza ba liiphen woththo; heen Isra7eele asay GODAAS imota immishe moorida miishshi diikkoka he mooroza Aarooney tookko. Asay ehizayssa GODAY ekkana mala izi he xaafettidayssa ubba wodekka ba liiphen woththanaas koshshees. 
Exodus28:39 «Aaroone shamize lee7e laynoppe dadda; hu7en xaaxiza goossaka laynoppe giigsa. Qasse danccozakka xilpen alleqissada sikissa. 
Exodus28:40 Aaroone naytas bonchchonne alleqo gidana mala, shamizeta, danccotanne hu7en xaaxiza goossata giigsa." 
Exodus28:41 Neni ha may7ota ne isha Aaroonenne iza nayta mayzidaappe guye, istti qeeseteththan taas ooththana mala istta wogara zayte tiya; tiyada istti qeese gididi taas ooththana mala istta dummasa." 
Exodus28:42 Istta kalloy kamettana mala garsara gixxiza gith, xeessaafe biidi wodira gakkanaas kammizaaz, liiqo layno qacinappe giigsa." 
Exodus28:43 Aarooneynne iza nayti Xoossa Dunkaane giddo geliza wode woykko gibbe giddon qeeseteththan ooththanaas yarsho yarshizaso shiiqiza wode hayta may7ota may7etto. Hessaththo hankko istti bantta bolla qohonne hayqo ehettenna. Hayssi Aaroonessinne iza zereththatas mernaas woga gido. 
Exodus29:1 «Aarooneynne iza nayti qeese gididi taas ooththana mala neni istta dummasanaas ooththa; wosoy baynda issi mirgonne nam7u dharshota ekka. 
Exodus29:2 Lo7o gistte dhiille ekkada irsho yeggontta uketh uukka; qasseka irsho yeggontta zayten guuththa uketh uukka; hessaththoka irsho yeggontta qeeri uketh uukkada zayte tiya. 
Exodus29:3 Neni heyta leematen woththada, mirgoza nam7u dharshotara issife taas shiishsha." 
Exodus29:4 «Histtada Aaroonenne iza nayta Xoossa Dunkaaneza penge ehada haaththan meecca. 
Exodus29:5 Hessafe guye may7ota ekkada, shamize, eefudeppe bollara may7iza adussa may7o, eefudenne tira kiise Aaroone mayzada eefudeza hiillan dadettida danccon danccisa." 
Exodus29:6 Goossaza iza hu7en goozisada, ‹GODAAS geesh gidi dummatides› geetetti xaafettida alleqoza goossa bolla woththa." 
Exodus29:7 Tiyiza zaytekka ekkada iza hu7en tigada tiya. 
Exodus29:8 Iza naytakka ehada shamizeta mayza. 
Exodus29:9 Goossaka istta hu7en goozisa. Hessafe guye Aaroonenne iza nayta dancco danccisa. Qeeseteththay isttas mernaa ooso woga gido; hessaththo histtada Aaroonenne iza nayta qeese histta. 
Exodus29:10 «Ne taas mirgo Xoossa Dunkaane sinth ehikko Aarooneynne iza nayti iza hu7e bolla ba kushe woththiko," 
Exodus29:11 wofanoza heen GODAA sinththan shukka. 
Exodus29:12 Wofanoza suuththan ne biradhdhe gelththa kessada, yarshizasoza bollan diza kaceta tiya; tiyishin attida suuththaa yarshizasozappe garsa baggara gussa." 
Exodus29:13 Hessafe guye marace kammida moodhe, tirezara oyketti diza asho, nam7u kilahotanne istta kammida handaa ekkada, yarshizasohoza bolla woththada xuugga." 
Exodus29:14 Gido attiin mirgoza asho, galbaanne maraceza, meetettontta ashota asi dizasohoppe haraso efada nagara yarsho gidana mala xuugga;" 
Exodus29:15 «Nam7u dharshotappe issaa ne ekkiko Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththetto. 
Exodus29:16 Shukkada suuththaa yarshizasoza mille bolla ubba baggara wuxxa. 
Exodus29:17 Dharshoza asho qanxxereththada, qanththa ashonne tohota meeccada hu7ezaranne hankko attida ashaara issi bolla woththa." 
Exodus29:18 Hessafe guye dharshoza mulera yarshizasohoza bolla xuugga; hessi GODAAS taman xuugettiza sawo tunnu giza yarshoko. 
Exodus29:19 «Qasse hankko dharshoza ne ekkiko Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththetto. 
Exodus29:20 He dharshoza shukkada iza suuththaafe guuththara ekkada, Aaroonessinne iza naytas ushachcha hayththata xeera, ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhetanne ushachcha toho manththa biradhdheta tiya; hessafe guye attida suuththaa yarshizaso mille bolla Ubbasora wuxxa." 
Exodus29:21 Yarshizason diza suuththaafenne tiyettiza zaytezappe ginara ekkada, Aaroone bollanne iza may7o bolla, iza nayta bollanne istta may7o bolla wuxxa; histtiko izi iza naytinne, istta may7oy GODAA oosos dummatana." 
Exodus29:22 «Ha dharshozappe goynazanne izan diza tolthoza, marace bollan diza moodhe, tirezara oyketti diza asho, nam7u kilahota, istta kammi oykkida handaaranne ushachcha gedaara neni ekka; hayssi qeeseteththa sunth immiza wode shukettiza dorsa." 
Exodus29:23 GODAA sinththan woththida irshoy gelontta ukeththaafe issino, zaytey walakettontta ukeththaafe issino, zaytera uukkida issi komponne issi qeeri kompa ekka." 
Exodus29:24 Neni ha kaththaa ubbaa Aaroone kusheninne iza nayta kushen woththiko istti yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histtidi GODAA sinththan shiishshetto. 
Exodus29:25 Hessafe guye neni istta kusheppe heyta ekkada, yarshizasoza bolla woththada, xuugettiza yarshora issife gaththada, GODAAS sawo tunnu gaana mala, yarshizasoza bolla taman xuugga." 
Exodus29:26 Aarooney qeese gididi summiza wode shukkida dharshoza angaso ekkada GODAA sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histta qaaseththa; hayssi inttena gakkiza gisha gidana. 
Exodus29:27 «He shukettida dharshoza ashoppe yarsho ooththidi yaanne haa qaaseththida angasozanne GODAA sinth shiiqida gedaa dummasa. Hessika Aaroone gishanne iza nayta gisha gidana. 
Exodus29:28 Isra7eele asay GODAAS shiishshiza issifeteththa yarshozappe angasozanne gedaza ubba wodekka Aaroonessinne iza attuma nayta gakkiza gisha gido. Ays giikko hayssi Isra7eele asay GODAAS shiishshiza imota. 
Exodus29:29 «Aaroone qeeseteththaa dumma may7oy izappe guye iza zereththaas gido; istti tiyettidi qeese gidiza wode he may7oza may7etto. 
Exodus29:30 Iza naytappe izasohon qeese gididi dummatida sohozan ooththanaas Xoossa dunkaane yida attuma nay he may7oza laappun gallas gakkanaas may7o. 
Exodus29:31 «Aarooneynne iza nayti qeeseteththan sunththanaas shukettida dharshaa asho ekkada dumma sohozan doyssa. 
Exodus29:32 Aarooneynne iza nayti dharshoza ashaa leematen diza ukeththara Xoossa Dunkaane pengen metto. 
Exodus29:33 Istti qeese gididi summiza wodenne dummatiza wode istta nagaray atto geetettana mala yarshettida he yarshota metto. Gido attiin he yarshoti geesh gidida gishshas hara asi oonikka mooppo. 
Exodus29:34 Qeeseteththan sunththanaas shukkida dharshoza ashoppe woykko ukeththaafe maalado gakkanaas palahidi aqikko dumma gidida gishshas taman xuugetto attiin meetettofo. 
Exodus29:35 «Hessaththo histtada Laappun gallas gakkanaas tani nena azazida mala Aaroonenne iza nayta qeese histtada sunththa. 
Exodus29:36 «Nagaray atto geetettana mala hach hach nagara gishshas issi mirgo yarsha. Hessankka yarshizasoza geeshsha; histtada yarshizasoza dummaththanaas zayte tiya. 
Exodus29:37 Yarshizasoza nagara geesho wogaa laappun gallas gakkanaas wursada iza dummaththa. Histtiko yarshizasozi dumma geeshshasoho gidana. Iza bochchizaadey ubbay geesh gidana bessees. 
Exodus29:38 «Yarshizason neni hach hach shiishshana yarshoy hayssa; Yelettiin issi layth kumontta nam7u adde laaqqa yarsha. 
Exodus29:39 Adde laaqqatappe issaa maalado, qasse nam7anththoza omarsa wode yarsha." 
Exodus29:40 Koyro dharsho laaqqa issi kilonne bagga lo7o gistte dhiille issi litiro gum7ettida zayten munuqada yarsha; issi litiro woyne ushshu ushsha yarsho histtada yarsha. 
Exodus29:41 Nam7anththo dharsho laaqqaza omarsa wode yarsha. Maaladoyssa gina dhiille, zaytenne woyne ushshu shiishsha. Hessika GODAAS taman xuugettidi sawo tunnu giza yarsho gidana." 
Exodus29:42 «Ha xuugettiza yarshoy yiza yeleta ubbaan Xoossa Dunkaaneza pengen GODAA sinththan pacey baynda yarshettanaas koshshees. Tani inttenara gaagganaynne nees haasayanay heenkko. 
Exodus29:43 Qasse heen tani Isra7eele naytara gaaggananne ta bonchchoyka he sohoza dumma soho histtana. 
Exodus29:44 «Hessa gishshas tani Xoossa Dunkaanezanne yarshizasoza dummasana; Aarooneynne iza nayti taas qeese gididi ooththana mala tani istta dummasana. 
Exodus29:45 Histtada tani Isra7eele nayta giddon de7ana; qasse tani istta Xoossaa gidana. 
Exodus29:46 Tani istta giddon de7ana mala Gibxeppe istta kessida GODAA istta Xoossaa gididayssa istti erana. Ee, tani GODAA istta Xoossaa." 
Exodus30:1 «Exaane cuwasi yarshizaso odoro miththafe giigsa; 
Exodus30:2 izas oyddu zoozey deyo; adussateththay issi wadha, aahoteththay issi wadha, dhoqqateththay qasse nam7u wadha gido; kacetikka izara issi bolla oyketti oosettetto." 
Exodus30:3 Izas bolla baggaa, oyddu milletanne kaceta ubbaa walakay baynda worqqan tiya; iza yuushonkka worqqa balxxanth yuushsha aaththa." 
Exodus30:4 He balxxanththafe garsara exaane cuwasi yarshizasozas worqqafe nam7u qanggota ooththada he baggaranne ha baggara oyseththa. Heyti tookkiza wode tooho miththata gelththanaassa. 
Exodus30:5 Tooho miththata odoro miththafe kessada worqqan tiya. 
Exodus30:6 Ha yarshizasoza Caaqo qaalaa markkay izan diza Taabotaa sinththan kaqettida magalashaappe kare baggara, Caaqo qaala markka bollan diza atto geetettiza sohoza kama ginara woththa. Hessika tani nenara gaaggizaso." 
Exodus30:7 «Aarooney maalado maalado xomppeta giigsanaas yiza wode sawiza exaane yarshizasozan cuwaso. 
Exodus30:8 Aarooney omarsa wode xomppeta poo7isiza wode, zaareththidikka exaane cuwaso; histtiko exaaney GODAA sinththan yiza yeletaas ubba wode cuwattana." 
Exodus30:9 Ha yarshizasozan hara digettida exaanekka, woykko xuugettiza yarsho, woykko kaththa yarsho yarshofa; ushsha yarshoka iza bolla tigoppa." 
Exodus30:10 Aarooney layththan issito nagarappe maarettanaas shukkiza mehe suuth ekkidi he yarshizasoza bolla diza kaceta bolla tiyo. Histtidi geesho wogaa polo. Ha wogay sinththara yaana wodeta ubbaan layththan layththan ooththetto. Hessaththo ha yarshizasozi GODAAS dumma geeyidaso gido» gides. 
Exodus30:11 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Exodus30:12 «Neni Isra7eele attuma asaa taybiza wode, issi issi asi taybettidi ba shemppo ashshanaas GODAAS miishshe immo; histtiko neni istta taybiza wode asa bolla boshay yeenna." 
Exodus30:13 Taybettida attuma asay hu7en hu7en Xoossa Dunkaanen erettida maka miishsha mala koshshiza miish qanxxo. Issi issi asi baas diza mala immo. 
Exodus30:14 Qoodan geliza attuma asaa layththay nam7u tammu kumidaynne hessafe bollay wuri GODAAS imota eho. 
Exodus30:15 Intte intte shemppo ashshanaas GODAAS imota immishin, dureykka manqoyka issi mala immanaappe attiin, durey darssidi woykko manqoy guuththidi immofo." 
Exodus30:16 Ba shemppo ashshanaas immiza miishshe Isra7eele asaappe ekkada Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosos peyshsha. Ha miishshay intte shemppo wozzanaas, GODAA sinththan Isra7eele asaa gishshas hassa7issizaaz gidana» gides." 
Exodus30:17 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Exodus30:18 «Meechcha kerezanne kereza iza bolla woththiza miish xarqimalappe medhdha. Xoossa Dunkaanezappenne yarshizasozappe giddon woththada izan haath tiga. 
Exodus30:19 He haaththaan Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushenne ba toho meecettetto. 
Exodus30:20 Istti hayqqontta mala Xoossa Dunkaanezan gelshe aydekka he haaththan meecettetto. Qasse GODAAS taman yarsho yarshanaas yarshizaso mata shiiqiza wode," 
Exodus30:21 istti hayqqontta mala ba kushenne ba toho meecettetto. Hayssi Aaroonessinne iza zereththatas, yiza yeleta ubbaas mernaa woga gido» gides." 
Exodus30:22 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Exodus30:23 «Lo7o qimameta, heytikka usuppun kilo goggiza karbbe, heedzdzu kilo sawiza qarafa, heedzdzu kilo sawiza gucachcha maatanne" 
Exodus30:24 usuppun kilo burgude ekka. Hayssi wurikka Xoossa Dunkaanen erettida meezaanen meezaanettidaa gido. Hessa bollaka oyddu litiro wogara zayte gujja ekka. 
Exodus30:25 Heytantta shitto ooththiza mala walakkada sawiza geeshshateththas tiyettiza dumma zayte giigsa. 
Exodus30:26 Histtada Xoossa Dunkaaneza, Caaqo qaalaa markkay izan diza Taabotaa," 
Exodus30:27 xaraphpheezanne izan go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa, xomppe woththiza ballaanne iza miishshata, exaane cuwasi yarshizasoza," 
Exodus30:28 xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasozanne izan go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa, meechcha kerenne iza woththizasoza ubbaa tiya." 
Exodus30:29 Istti keehi geesh gidana mala neni istta dummasa; istta bochchizay wurikka geesh gidanaas bessees. 
Exodus30:30 «Qasseka Aarooneynne iza nayti qeese gididi taas ooththana mala istta tiyada dummasa; 
Exodus30:31 Isra7eele asaas, ‹Hayssi buro yaana yeletaska tiyettiza geeshsha zayte gido." 
Exodus30:32 Ha zayteza hara as tiyoppa; qasse hara zayte hessaththo giigsofa. Izi dumma gidida gishshas intteka iza dummateth erite. 
Exodus30:33 Hayssa mala shitto giigsiza asinne tiyettanaas bessontta hara as tiyiza asi oonikka ba asaa garsafe dhayo› ga» gides. 
Exodus30:34 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Sawiza qimameta, miththa uzas, helelon diza shitto, sawiza shidanne harara walakettontta exaane ekka; istta ubbaa meezaaneykka issi gina gido." 
Exodus30:35 Shitto mala walakettida exaane ooththada isttan go7etta; walakay baynda geeshshinne dumma gidana mala izan maxine yegga. 
Exodus30:36 Izappe ekkada liiqisa cadda; histtada tani nenara gaaggiza Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddon Caaqo qaala markkay izan diza Taabotaa sinththan exaane cuwasi yarshizasoza bolla woththa. Izi nees ubbaafe aadhdhida geesh gidana. 
Exodus30:37 Hayssa giigsidayssaththo hara exaane giigsofte. Hessi taas dumma geesh gididayssa ne era. 
Exodus30:38 Hessa misatizaaz giigsidi iza sawo singidi ufayettanaas koyza asi diikko izi ba asaa garsafe dhayo» gides. 
Exodus31:1 Qasseka GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Exodus31:2 «Beya; tani Yuhuda zereth gidida Uures naaza naa, Huurey naa, Basli7eele dooradis." 
Exodus31:3 Iza tani ta Ayanan; hiillateththan, akeekaninne ooso ubbaa ooththiza erateththan kunththadis." 
Exodus31:4 Hessika izi qoppi qoppidi hiillateththan, worqqafe, birappenne xarqimalappe dumma dumma miish ooththanaassa." 
Exodus31:5 Hessaththoka al7o shuch massi massidi giigsanaas, mith massanaassinne heytantta ubbaa ooththanaassa." 
Exodus31:6 «Hessa bollaka qasse iza maaddana mala, Daane zereth gidida Ahisaameke naa Eelaabe dooradis. Tani nena azazidayssa ubbaa istti ooththana mala, kushe hiillateth erizayta ubbaas erateth immadis." 
Exodus31:7 Istti ooththanayssi Xoossa Dunkaane, Caaqo qaalay izan diza Taabotaanne Taabotaza bolla woththiza atoteththa kama, Xoossa Dunkaaneza ooththanaas go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa," 
Exodus31:8 xaraphpheezanne iza miishshata, walakay baynda worqqafe oosettida xomppe iza bolla woththiza miish ubbaara, exaane cuwasi yarshizasoza," 
Exodus31:9 xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasozanne iza miishshata ubbaara, meecettiza kerenne keraa iza bolla woththiza miishshara," 
Exodus31:10 dadetti oosettida carqqata, qeese Aarooney may7iza dumma may7o, iza attuma nayti qeeseteththa ooso ooththishe may7ana may7o," 
Exodus31:11 qasse tiyettiza zaytenne geeshsha sozas sawo tunnu giza exaane. Istti hayssa ubbaa tani nena azazida mala ooththana» gides. 
Exodus31:12 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse," 
Exodus31:13 «Neni Isra7eele asaas, ‹Ta Sambataa lo7eththi naagite. Hessi tani GODAY inttena taas dumma histtada dooridayssa bessizaaz gididi yaana yeleta ubbaas taappenne inttefe giddon malata gidana." 
Exodus31:14 Inttes he gallassay dumma gidida gishshas Sambata naagite. Iza tunisiza asi mule hayqqanaas bessees; he gallassan ooso ooththizay oonikka ba asaa garsafe dhayo. 
Exodus31:15 Usuppun gallassatan intte ooso ooththite; gido attiin laappunththa gallassay taas GODAAS dummatida shempo Sambata; he gallassaan ooththizaadey oonikka mulera hayqqanaas bessees. 
Exodus31:16 Isra7eele asay he Sambata gallassaa naa naas mernaas malata histtidi naago. 
Exodus31:17 Tani usuppun gallassatan salonne sa7a medhdhada laappunththa gallassan ooso aggada shempida gishshas, taassinne Isra7eele naytas giddon hayssi mernaas caaqo gidana› ga» gides." 
Exodus31:18 GODAY Musera Siina zumaa bolla haasayzayssa wursida mala izi ba biradhdhen xaafida tammu azazota oykkida nam7u masettida shuchchata Muses immides. 
Exodus32:1 Musey zumaappe wodhdhontta keehi gam7idayssa be7idi asay Aaroone yuushon shiiqidi, «Ane Haa ya; neni nuna kaaleththiza eeqa xoossata nuus medhdha. Gibxe biittaafe nuna kessida Musey gidikko izi waanidaakko nu erokko!» gida." 
Exodus32:2 Histtiin Aarooney isttas, «Intte machcheta hayththan, intte attuma nayta hayththaninne macca nayta hayththan diza worqqaa kessidi taas ha ekki yiite» gides." 
Exodus32:3 Hessafe guye asay wuri ba hayththa worqqaa kessidi Aaroones ehides. 
Exodus32:4 Izi hessa istta kusheppe ekkidi taman seerisidaappe guye qoxxiza miishshan qoxxidi mara misle medhdhides. Hessafe guye asaykka, «Isra7eele asawu! Nuna Gibxe biittafe kessida nu xoossati haytantta» gides" 
Exodus32:5 Aarooney hessa be7idi mara misleza sinththan yarshizaso giigsidi, «Wonto GODAAS ba7aale gallas gidana» gi awajjides." 
Exodus32:6 Hessa gishshas wonteththa gallas asay wonttara dendidi xuugettiza yarshotanne issifeteththa yarshota yarshides. Histtidi asay maanaassinne uyanaas uttides. Mi uyi simmidi qasse duranaassinne guppanaas dendides. 
Exodus32:7 Histtiin GODAY Muses, «Ne Gibxeppe kessa ehida ne asay nagara ooththidi banateththaa tunisida gishshas eeson duge wodhdha." 
Exodus32:8 Tani istta azazida ogeppe istti eeson sher7i giichchida. Worqqa seerisidayssa mara misatissidi, baas eeqa xoossata medhdhidi izas goynnidanne yarshida. Qasseka, ‹Isra7eele asawu! Nuna Gibxe biittafe kessida nu xoossati haytantta› gida." 
Exodus32:9 «Tani ha asaa beyadis; istti bantta wozina muumida asa. 
Exodus32:10 Ha7i ta hanqoy istta bolla eexxi keziin tani istta dhayssanayssa neni tana diggofa. Hessafe qasse ta nena gita kawoteth histtana» gides. 
Exodus32:11 Gido attiin Musey GODAA ba Xoossaa, «Abeet Godoo! Neni ne gita wolqqaninne ne mino qesen Gibxeppe kessada ehida ne asaa bolla hessaththo aazas hanqettay?" 
Exodus32:12 Gibxe asay, ‹Izi istta zumata bollan wodhanaassinne biittafe pitti dhayssanaas iita qofan kessides› ays geetettay? Neni ne wolqqama hanqofe simma; asaa dhayssanaas qoppidayssa agga." 
Exodus32:13 Ne aylleta Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe qoppa; neni isttas, ‹Tani intte zereth salo xoolintte mala darsana; tani inttes immana gida biittaa ubbaaka intte zereththatas immana; istti he biittaa mernaas laattana› gaada neni ne sunththan caaqqida qaalaa yuushsha qoppa» giidi gaannatides." 
Exodus32:14 Hessa gishshas GODAY ba asaa bolla iita miish ehanaas qoppidayssa aggides. 
Exodus32:15 Hessafe guye Musey zumaa bollafe duge wodhdhishe tammu azazoti istta bolla nam7u baggara xaafetti uttida nam7u maseththa shuchchata ba kushen oykki ekki yides. 
Exodus32:16 He masettida shuchchata giigsiday Xoossa; shuchchata bolla woocidi xaafidaykka Xoossa. 
Exodus32:17 Iyaasoy asay wocamizayssa siyidi Muses, «Asay dizason ola waasoy siyettees» gides." 
Exodus32:18 Museykka zaaridi, «Tani siyizayssi hayssi yeththafe attiin, olan xoonidayta qaala woykko xoonettidayta qaala deenna» gides." 
Exodus32:19 Musey derezi dizaso matishe mara misleza sinththan asay durishininne guppishin be7idi keehi hanqettidi masettida shuchchata zuma garsan bollafe yeggidi menththereththides. 
Exodus32:20 Asay medhdhida maraakka ekkidi taman xuuggides; hessafe guye liiqisi gaacci haaththan maadhidi Isra7eele asay uyana mala ooththides. 
Exodus32:21 Hessafe guye, Musey Aaroone, «Ha asay nena wosttiin neni istta hayssa mala gita nagara ooththana mala kaaleththadii?» gides." 
Exodus32:22 Aarooneykka zaaridi, «Ta godoo, hanqettofa! Hayssi asay iita ooththanaas ay mala koyzaakko ne eraasa." 
Exodus32:23 Istti tana, ‹Nuna kaaleththiza eeqa xoossata nuus medhdha. Ays giikko nuna Gibxeppe kessi ehida Musey izi waanidaakko nu erokko!› gida." 
Exodus32:24 Histtiin tani isttas, ‹Intte bolla diza worqqaa kessidi hammite› gadis; hessafe guye istti taas immida worqqaa tani taman yeggiin hayssi maray kezides» gides." 
Exodus32:25 Aarooney asaa la7a yeddi aggiin asay ba morkketa sinththan kawuyidi kadhettanayssa Musey be7ides. 
Exodus32:26 Hessa gishshas Musey asay dunkaanidi dizaso geliza pengen eqqidi, «GODAA bagga gidida asi oonikka taakko ha yo!» giin Lewe qommoti wuri izakko shiiqida." 
Exodus32:27 Hessafe guye izi isttas, «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Asay wuri ba giththa mashsha ba xeessan xeessan gixxidi asay dunkaanidason gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas, asaa giddon yaanne haa simerettidi ba isha, ba laggenne ba shooro wodho› » gides." 
Exodus32:28 Lewe qommoti Musey azazida mala ooththida; he gallas asaappe heedzdzu shii gidiza asi hayqqides. 
Exodus32:29 Hessafe guye Musey Lewe qommota, «Hach intte GODAAS dummatideta; ays giikko intte intte naytanne intte ishata wodhanaas azazettidi wodhdhideta; hach GODAY inttena anjjides» gides." 
Exodus32:30 Wonteththa gallas Musey asaa, «Intte gita nagara ooththideta shin ha7i tani GODAAKKO pude zumaa bolla kezana; ta intte nagara atto giissanaakko oonee erizay» gides." 
Exodus32:31 Histtiin Musey GODAAKKO simmi biidi, «Hayssi asay gita nagara ooththides; istti baas worqqafe eeqa xoos medhdhida." 
Exodus32:32 Gido attiin Abeet Godoo! Ha7i istta nagara atto ga; akkay giikko neni xaafida mazgabaappe ta sunththaa qucca digga» gides. 
Exodus32:33 Histtiin GODAY zaaridi Muses, «Tani ta mazgabaappe ta bolla nagara ooththida asata sunththaa quccana." 
Exodus32:34 Ha7i baada ha asaa tani nees yootida soo kaaleththa; ta kiitanchchayka nena kaaleththana; gido attiin qaxxayana wodey gakkishin istta nagaraa gishshas ta istta qaxxayana» gides. 
Exodus32:35 Aarooney worqqafe mara misle medhdhana mala asay iza waayisida gishshassinne izi medhdhida gishshas GODAY istta bolla bosha yeddides. 
Exodus33:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses, «Neninne ne Gibxeppe kessida asay hayssafe dendidi, ‹Tani intte zereththatas immana› ga woththida biittaa biite. He biittay tani Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes immana gaada kase caaqqa woththidayssa." 
Exodus33:2 Tani inttefe sinththara kiitanchcha kiittada, Kanaaneta, Amooreta, Hiiteta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta gooddana." 
Exodus33:3 Maaththinne eessi goggiza he biittaa biite. Gido attiin intte wozina muume as gidida gishshas tani inttena ogen dhayssontta mala ta inttenara biikke» gides. 
Exodus33:4 Asay hessa iita yo7oza siyidi keehi yeekkides. He wodeppe doommidi asay wurikka alleqos aaththizayssa aggides. 
Exodus33:5 Gaasoykka GODAY Muses, «Isra7eele asaas, ‹Intte wozina muumida asa. Haray attoshin guuththa wode ta inttenara issife bizaakko tani inttena dhayssana. Ha7i intte alleqo kessichite; histtiko tani intte bolla ay ooththanaakko intte beyana› ga» gi yooti woththides." 
Exodus33:6 Isra7eele asay Siina zumaappe doommidi ba alleqo miishshaa kessi woththides. 
Exodus33:7 Musey Dunkaaneza ekki efidi asay dunkaanidasoppe haassi tolides. Dunkaanezi, «Gaytoteththa Dunkaane» geetetti summides. GODAA oychchanaas koyzay wuri he gayteththa dunkaaney dizaso bees." 
Exodus33:8 Musey he dunkaanezakko bida wode aydekka asay wuri ba dunkaaneza pengen pengen eqqidi Musey dunkaanezan gelana gakkanaas iza xeellees. 
Exodus33:9 Musey gayteththa dunkaaneza giddo gelida wode tuussa mala shaaray duge wodhdhiin GODAY Musera haasayshe dunkaaneza pengen gam7ees. 
Exodus33:10 Tuussa mala shaaraza dunkaaneza pengen be7ida ubba wode, asay wuri ba pengen pengen eqqidi dizasohon dishe GODAAS goynnees." 
Exodus33:11 Asi ba laggera haasayza mala GODAY Musera sinththan eqqidi haasayees. Hessafe guye Musey dunkaaney dizaso guye simmees shin iza maaddiza naateththa naa, Nawe naa Iyaasoy gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe shaakettenna." 
Exodus33:12 Musey GODAAS, «Neni tana, ‹Hayssa asaa kaaleththa› gadasashin tanara neni oona kiittizaakko tana erisabeekka. Neni, ‹Tani nena ne sunththan erays; neni ta sinththan sabettida asa› gadasa." 
Exodus33:13 Ne sinththan ta sabettidaa gidikko tani nena erana malanne sinththafekka ne sinththan sabettashe daana mala, ne oge tana tamaarsa. Ha asay ne asa gididayssa qoppa» gides." 
Exodus33:14 Histtiin GODAY zaaridi, «Tani nenara baana; tani nena shempisana» gides." 
Exodus33:15 Histtiin Musey iza, «Neni nunara bonttaa gidikko hayssafe nuna kessofa." 
Exodus33:16 Neni nunara bontta ixxiko tananinne ne asaan neni sabettidayssa asay wuri wostti eranee? Biitta bolla diza hara asa ubbaafe tananne ne asaa dummasizay hara miishshi aazee?» gides. 
Exodus33:17 Histtiin GODAY Muse, «Ta nenan sabettida gishshassinne nena ne sunththan eriza gishshas neni tana oychchidayssa qasseka tani ooththana» gides." 
Exodus33:18 Histtiin Musey, «Histtiko ne gita bonchchoza tana bessarkkii?» gides." 
Exodus33:19 GODAY, «Tani ta lo7eteththaa ubbaa ne sinththara aaththana; ta geeshsha sunththaaka ne achchan awajjana. Tani GODAA; tani maaranaas koyzayta maarana; qasse mishettanaas koyzaytaska mishettana." 
Exodus33:20 Gido attiin neni ta ayfeso beyakka; ays giikko oonikka tana be7idi paxa attenna» gides. 
Exodus33:21 Hessafe guye GODAY, «Neni ta achchan eqqanaas zaalla bolla eqqanasoy hayssan dees." 
Exodus33:22 Ta bonchchoy aadhdhi biza wode tani nena zaalla za7a giddon woththana. Aadhdhana gakkanaas ta kushen nena kammana. 
Exodus33:23 Hessafe guye tani ta kushe diggiko neni ta zokko beyanashin ta ayfesoy beettanaas bessenna» gides. 
Exodus34:1 GODAY Muses, «Koyroyta misatiza nam7u shuchchata massa giigsa; histtiko tani he masettida shuchchata bolla kase neni menththida shuchchata bollan diza qaalata xaafana." 
Exodus34:2 Wonto maalado pude Siina zumaa bolla kezanaas giigetta; histtada tanara heen zumaa bollan gaagga. 
Exodus34:3 Nenara oonikka kezoppo; woykko zumaa bolla awanka beettofo; haray attoshin dorsi woykko mehe wudeykka zumaa sinththan heemettofo» gides. 
Exodus34:4 Hessa gishshas Musey koyro shuchchata misatiza nam7u shuchchata massidi GODAY azazida mala, shuchchata ba kushen oykki ekkidi, maalado wonttara pude Siina zumaa bolla kezides." 
Exodus34:5 Keziin GODAY shaarara duge wodhdhi izara heen eqqidi ba sunththaa, «GODAA» gi erisides." 
Exodus34:6 GODAY Muse sinththara, «Tani GODAY qadhetaynne maarotay kumida Xoossa, hanqettanaas gam7iza, mernaas siiqizanne ammaneteththay darida Xoossa." 
Exodus34:7 Tani ta mernaa siiqoza shii yelet gakkanaas naagays; iitateth, makkallanne nagara atto gays. Gidikkoka moorizaade qaxxayontta aggike; aawata nagara gishshas naytanne nayta nayta, heedzdzanththo yeletanne oydanththo yeleta gakkanaas qaxxayays» gi awajjishe aadhdhides." 
Exodus34:8 Histtiin Musey heerakka biitta bolla gufanni goynnidi," 
Exodus34:9 «Abeet Godoo! Neni tanan ufayettidaa gidikko ne nunara issife baana mala ta nena woossays. Hayssi asay wozina muume gidikkoka nu iitateththaanne nu nagaraa atto gaada nuna ne as histta» gides. 
Exodus34:10 Histtiin GODAY, «Tani inttenara caaqo geladis; hayssafe kase biitta bolla diza kawoteth ubbaan hani erontta malalisiza miish ne asa ubbaa sinththan ooththana; tani GODAY inttes ooththiza oosoy ay mala malalisizaazakko neni istta giddon diza asay beyana." 
Exodus34:11 Hach tani inttena azaziza azazo naagite; intte sinththafe Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Hiiteta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta tani gooddana." 
Exodus34:12 Istti inttes narxa gidontta mala intte biza biittan diza asaara caaqo caaqettofte. 
Exodus34:13 Istti yarshizasohota laallite; istti goynniza shuchchatakka menththereththite; qasse Asheero geetettiza istta macca eeqa xoossay misletakka menththereththi yeggite. 
Exodus34:14 Tani GODAY qanaatiza Xoossa gidiza gishshas taappe attiin hara eeqa xoossatas goynnofte. 
Exodus34:15 «He biittan diza asatara ay caaqokka caaqettofte; ays giikko istti tanan ammanettontta ixxidi ba eeqata kaalliza wodenne isttas yarshiza wode istti inttena xeygikko intte istta yarsho maana. 
Exodus34:16 Qasse intte istta macca naytappe dooridi intte attuma naytas ekkana; he wode he macca nayti tanan ammanettontta ixxidi ba eeqa xoossaa kaallidi intte attuma nayti istta kallana mala ooththana. 
Exodus34:17 «Inttes goynnana eeqa xoossata aazappeka seerisidi medhdhofte. 
Exodus34:18 «Ukeththa Ba7aale bonchchite; tani inttena azazida mala laappun gallassas irshoy gelontta uukettida uketh miite; hessaka intte Gibxeppe kezida Abibe aginan ooththite. 
Exodus34:19 «Uloppe bayra yelettiza attuma nay wuri taassa; intte mehe ubbaafekka boora gidiin, woykko dorsa gidiin bayray taassa;" 
Exodus34:20 koyro yelettida hare mar, dorsa laaqqara laammada wozza; wozzontta ixxiko iza qoodhe mirqqa wodha. Ne naytappe bayra yelettida attuma naa ubbaa wozza. «Oonikka immiza miish oykkontta mela kushe ta sinththan beettofo." 
Exodus34:21 «Usuppun gallas ooththite shin laappunththa gallas shempite; goshsha wode gidiin woykko maxa wodenkka laappunththa gallassan shempite. 
Exodus34:22 «Gistte xeera intte maxiza wode kaththa shiisho Ba7aale bonchchite; he layththa wurseththa kath shiishshiza wodekka daase Ba7aale bonchchite. 
Exodus34:23 Isra7eele attuma asay wuri GODAA Ubbaa Haariza Isra7eele Xoossaa sinththan layththan heedzdzuto beettetto. 
Exodus34:24 Dumma dumma dereta tani intte sinththafe yedeththa kessana; histtada intte zawaa tani aassana. GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan intte layththan heedzdzaa beettanaas pude keziza wode oonikka intte biitta amottenna. 
Exodus34:25 «Intte taas suuththa yarsho yarshiza wode irsho yeggidi uukkida ukeththara yarshofte. Paaziga bonchchiza gallassas yarshida yarshofe maalados aykkoyka attofo. 
Exodus34:26 «Intte gaden bayra kaxxida kaththaafe koyro xeeraa GODAA intte Xoossaa keeth ehite. «Deyshsha laaqqa iza aayey maaththan doyssofte» gides. 
Exodus34:27 GODAY Muses, «Tani nenaranne Isra7eele asaara caaqo caaqettizay ha qaalati giza mala gidida gishshas ha qaalata xaafa» gides." 
Exodus34:28 Musey kath monttanne haaththe uyontta oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma GODAARA heen gam7idi caaqo qaala gidida tammu azazota masettida shuchcha bolla xaafides. 
Exodus34:29 Musey nam7u masettida shuchchata ba kushen oykkidi Siina zumaappe duge wodhdhida wode, izi GODAARA haasayshe gam7ida gishshas iza ayfesoy xolqides; gido attiin izi hessa eribeenna." 
Exodus34:30 Aarooneynne Isra7eele asay wuri Muse xeellidi iza ayfesoy xolqizayssa be7idi izakko shiiqanaas babbida. 
Exodus34:31 Gido attiin Musey istta xeygiin Aarooneynne dereza kaaleththiza halaqati wuri izakko yiin izi istta haasayssides. 
Exodus34:32 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay wuri izakko shiiqiin GODAY izas Siina zumaa bolla immida azazota ubbaa izi isttas immides. 
Exodus34:33 Musey isttas yooti wursidi ba ayfeso naxalan kammides. 
Exodus34:34 Gido attiin Musey GODAA sinth izara haasayanaas gaytoteththa dunkaane giddo geliza wode naxalaa ba ayfesoppe qaarees. Heeppe kezidi GODAY azazidayssa Isra7eele asaas yootees. 
Exodus34:35 Musey yootiza wode Isra7eele asay iza ayfesoy xolqizayssa be7ides. Hessa gishshas Musey GODAARA haasayana baana gakkanaas ba ayfeso zaareththidikka naxalan kammees. 
Exodus35:1 Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa shiishshidi, «Intte ooththana mala GODAY azazidayssi hayssafe kaalli dizayssa." 
Exodus35:2 Saamintta giddon usuppun gallas xalala ooso ooththite; gido attiin laappunththa gallassay inttes dumma gallassa; GODAASKA shempo Sambata. He gallas ay oosokka ooththiza asi oonikka hayqqanaas bessees. 
Exodus35:3 Sambata gallassan intte soon soon tama eeththofte» gides. 
Exodus35:4 Musey Isra7eele maabaraas kumeththaas, «GODAY inttena hizgi azazides." 
Exodus35:5 Inttes dizayssafe GODAAS imota ehite; GODAAS imota ehanaas koyzay oonikka worqqa, biraa, xarqimala," 
Exodus35:6 salo misatiza qacina, ochcha teera misatiza qacina, xeeqa zo7o qacinanne liiqo layno, deysha anttasha," 
Exodus35:7 zo7o qalamen geli kezida dharsho ite, qaacettida galba, odoro mith," 
Exodus35:8 xomppes wogara zayte, tiyettiza zaytenne exaane sawiza qimame," 
Exodus35:9 eefudenne tira kiisen woththiza margide geetettiza shuchchatanne hara xolqiza al7o shuchchata eho. 
Exodus35:10 «Intte giddon diza kushe hiillanchchay ubbay yiidi GODAY azazidayssa ubbaa ooththo. 
Exodus35:11 Xoossa Dunkaaneza, Dunkaanezas soo baggaranne kare baggara kammiza dunkaane, qapheta, tole miththata, gorde miththata, tuussatanne isttan eqqiza tohota," 
Exodus35:12 Taabotaanne iza tookkiza toho miththata, atto geetettiza kamanne Taabotaa kammiza magalasha," 
Exodus35:13 xaraphpheezaza, iza tookkiza tooho miththataranne izas koshshiza miishshata ubbaa, GODAA sinththan woththiza dumma ukeththa;" 
Exodus35:14 xomppe iza bolla woththiza miishshaa izas koshshiza miishshatara, xomppeta, xomppe zayte," 
Exodus35:15 exaane cuwasizasozanne iza tookkiza tooho miththata, tiyettiza zaytenne sawiza exaane, Xoossa Dunkaaneza penge magalasha," 
Exodus35:16 xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasonne xarqimalappe oosettida zayzareza, iza tookkiza tooho miththatanne izas koshshiza miishshata ubbaa, xarqimalappe oosettida meechcha kerenne iza woththizaso," 
Exodus35:17 dunkaanaas kare bagga wuyge magalashata, tuussatanne istta tohota, dunkaanaas kare bagga wuyge geliza pengeza magalasha," 
Exodus35:18 Xoossa dunkaaneza toliza dhishketa, dunkaanaas kare bagga wuyge dhishketanne istta wodorota," 
Exodus35:19 qeeseti dummasozan ooththishe may7anaas dadettida may7ota, qeese Aarooneynne iza nayti qeeseteththa ooso ooththishe may7iza may7ota ooththana» gides." 
Exodus35:20 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay wuri Muse sinththafe kezi bides. 
Exodus35:21 Immanaas koyidaytinne istta wozinay istta imma imma gidayti wuri yiidi Xoossa dunkaanezas, iza giddon oosettiza oosossinne geeshsha may7o ubbaas koshshiza miish ubbaa ehida." 
Exodus35:22 Immana koyza attumaynne maccay wuri yiidi worqqafe oosettida alleqota, hayththa worqqa, sagayo, qoodhen aaththiza xangalatanne worqqa alleqota ehidi GODAAS yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histti shiishshida." 
Exodus35:23 Salo misatiza qacinay, ochcha teera misatiza qacinay, xeeqa zo7o qacinay, woykko layno geetettiza liiqo qacinay, woykko deysha anttashayay, zo7o qalamen geli kezida dharsho itey, woykko qaacettida galbay diza asi wuri ehides." 
Exodus35:24 Bira woykko xarqimala immanaas dandayzay wuri ba imota GODAAS immides; qasse odoro miththi diza asay wuri dumma dumma oosos odoro mith ehides. 
Exodus35:25 Kushe hiilla eriza maccassay wuri ba kushen suqida salo misatiza qacina, ochcha teera misatiza qacina, xeeqa zo7o qacinanne liiqo layno ehides." 
Exodus35:26 Qasseka imota immanaas koyida maccassay wuri deysha anttasha daddi ehida. 
Exodus35:27 Halaqati eefudenne tira kiisen woththiza margidenne hara bonchchettida shuchchata ehida. 
Exodus35:28 Qasseka xomppes, sawiza exaanessinne tiyettanaas wogara zaytenne qimame ehida." 
Exodus35:29 Isra7eele asay wuri attumaynne maccay, istti ooththana mala GODAY Muse baggara azazida oosos gidiza imota ubbaa ba dosan GODAAS ehides." 
Exodus35:30 Musey Isra7eele asaas, «Be7ite; GODAY Yuhuda qommofe Uures naaza naa, Huurey naa Basli7eele doorides." 
Exodus35:31 GODAY iza Xoossa Ayanan, aadho eran, akeekaninne ooso ubbaa ooththiza erateththan kunththides." 
Exodus35:32 Hessika hiillan ooso qoppi kessidi worqqafe, birappenne xarqimalappe dumma dumma miish ooththanaassa." 
Exodus35:33 Hessaththoka al7o shuch massi giigsanaassa; qasseka mith massanaassinne dumma dumma ooso hiillan ooththanaassa. 
Exodus35:34 Hessa bollaka qasse izassinne Daane qommofe Ahisaameke naa Eelaabes, hara as tamaarssiza erateth immides." 
Exodus35:35 Istti ubba qommo ooso ooththana mala, hiillan ooththizayta, ooso qofa kessizayta, salo misatiza qacinan, ochcha teera misatiza qacinan, xeeqa zo7o qacinaninne layno qacinan alleqissi daddizayta gidana mala, GODAY istta erateththan kunththides. Istti wurikka ubba qommo ooso eriza eranchcha gidida." 
Exodus36:1 «Hessa gishshas Basli7eeley, Eelaabeynne Xoossa Dunkaane ooththana mala GODAY erateth immida asay wuri GODAY azazida mala istti ooththana» gides." 
Exodus36:2 Hessafe guye Musey Basli7eele, Eelaabenne GODAY dumma erateth immidayta ooso ooththanaas yaana koyzayta ubbaa xeygidi shiishshides." 
Exodus36:3 Shiiqidayti Isra7eele asay Xoossa Dunkaane ooththanaas ehida imota ubbaa Museppe ekkida. Qasse asay ba dosan coo immiza imota maalado maalado gujji gujjidi eho aggibeenna. 
Exodus36:4 Histtiin Xoossa Dunkaaneza ooththiza erateththi kumida asay wuri ba ooththizayssa aggi Musekko biidi," 
Exodus36:5 «Asay GODAY azazida oosos koshshizayssafe bollara daro ehon dees» gida. 
Exodus36:6 Histtiin Musey ba dunkaanen dunkaanen diza asaas, «Nam7anththo oonakka gidiin Xoossa Dunkaane oosos immiza imota ehoppo» gi yootiin asay ehizayssa aggaagides." 
Exodus36:7 Gaasoykka istti ehida imotay ooso ubbaa ooththanaas gidi palahana. 
Exodus36:8 Oosoza ooththizayta giddofe hiillaa darzayti wuri liiqo laynoppenne salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappe dadettida tammu magalashatappe Xoossa Dunkaaneza giigsida. He magalashata bolla bollara issi hiillanchchay kirubeta misle sikkides." 
Exodus36:9 Magalashati wuri issi gina gididi adussateththay nam7u tammanne osppun wadha; aahoteththay oyddu wadha. 
Exodus36:10 Ichchashu magalashata issife gaththi sikkida; qasse hankko attida ichchashu magalashatakka izaththoka ooththida. 
Exodus36:11 Issife gaththi sikkida magalashatappe issi magalashaas wurseththa gaxan salo misatiza carqqafe siidhe medhdhida. Qasse issife gaaggi sikettida hankko magalashatankka hessaththoka ooththida. 
Exodus36:12 Istti issife gaaggida issi magalasha bolla ichchashu tammu siidheta, qasse issife gaaggida hankko magalashata bollaka ichchashu tammu siidheta medhdhida. He siidheti wurikka issoy issaara ginan deettes." 
Exodus36:13 Hessafe guye worqqafe ichchashu tammu qapheta medhdhidi Dunkaanezi issino gidana mala, he magalashata gaxaa gaxaa he qaphetan gaththi oyseththida." 
Exodus36:14 Xoossa Dunkaaneza bollara kammiza dunkaanezas tammanne issi magalashata deysha anttashappe daddida. 
Exodus36:15 Tammanne issi magalashatikka issi gina; issi issi magalashaas adussateththi heedzdzu tammu wadha, aahoteththi oyddu wadha." 
Exodus36:16 Ichchashu magalashata issi baggara, usuppun magalashata qasse hankko baggara gaththidi sikkida." 
Exodus36:17 Hessafe guye gaththi sikkida magalashatappe issi magalasha gaxan ichchashu tammu siidheta medhdhida. Qasseka gaththi sikkida hankko magalashatappe wurseththa magalashaza gaxan ichchashu tammu siidheta medhdhida. 
Exodus36:18 Nam7u baggara diza magalashata gaththi issi kama ooththanaas xarqimalappe ichchashu tammu qapheta medhdhida. 
Exodus36:19 Hessafe guye Dunkaaneza kammanaas zo7o qalamen yeggi kessida dharsho ite giigsida; qasse iza bollara kammanaas qaacettida galba giigsida. 
Exodus36:20 Xoossa Dunkaane tole miththata luule gidida odoro miththafe kessida. 
Exodus36:21 Issi issi tole miththaas adussateththay tammu wadha; aahoteththay issi wadhanne bagga. 
Exodus36:22 Issi issi tole issaa issaara gaththi oyseththiza nam7u tole medhdhida. Xoossa Dunkaaneza tole miththata wursika hessaththo ooththida. 
Exodus36:23 Xoossa Dunkaanezas tohoso baggara nam7u tammu tole miththata medhdhidi," 
Exodus36:24 Issi issi tole miththas nam7u toho, mulera oyddu tammu toho birappe giigsida." 
Exodus36:25 Xoossa Dunkaanezas hu7eso baggara nam7u tammu tole miththata medhdhidi," 
Exodus36:26 Issi issi tole miththas nam7u toho, mulera oyddu tammu toho birappe giigsida." 
Exodus36:27 Xoossa Dunkaanezas guye gaxan duge baggara usuppun tole miththata medhdhida. 
Exodus36:28 Xoossa Dunkaaneza guye gaxan diza zoozetas nam7u tole miththata giigsida. 
Exodus36:29 Ha nam7u zoozetan diza toleti xaphoppe xeera gakkanaashe nam7u gidi biidi xeeran issi sagayon geli oykettida. Istti nam7ayka hessaththo oosettida. 
Exodus36:30 Hessa gishshas issi issi tole miththas garsara nam7u nam7u tohoti deettes; mulera osppun xagagatinne birappe oosettida tammanne usuppun tohoti deettes. 
Exodus36:31 Qasse istti odoro miththafe tammanne ichchashu kare gordiza mith kessida; isttafe Xoossa Dunkaanezas issi bagga millen diza tole miththatas ichchashu gordiza miththata," 
Exodus36:32 qasse hankko bagga millen diza tole miththatas ichchashu gordiza miththata giigsida. Hessaththoka Xoossa Dunkaanezas guye baggara arshey wulliza baggara wurseththa gaxan diza tole miththatas ichchashu gordiza miththata medhdhida. 
Exodus36:33 Giddora gordiza miththati xagagatas giddo ginara, ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas kanththi kezana mala ooththida." 
Exodus36:34 Tole miththaa worqqan tiydi gordiza miththati aadhdhiza sagayota worqqafe medhdhida; qasse gordiza miththata worqqan tiyda. 
Exodus36:35 Salo misatiza qacinappe, ochcha teera misatiza qacinappe, xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe issi magalasha ooththida. He magalashaza bolla issi hiillay kirubeta misle sikkides." 
Exodus36:36 Magalashaas oyddu tuussata odoro miththafe giigsidi worqqan tiyda. Histtidi worqqafe kaqota isttas giigsida. Qasse tuussata essiza oyddu tohota birappe medhdhida. 
Exodus36:37 Xoossa Dunkaane geliza pengezas salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe dadettida, xilpen aleqettida magalasha giigsida." 
Exodus36:38 Qasse isttas ichchashu kaqotara diza ichchashu tuussata ooththida. Tuussata xeeraanne ciro qachchizayta worqqan tiyda. Qasse tuussati eqqana mala ichchashu toho xarqimalappe medhdhida. 
Exodus37:1 Basli7eeley odoro miththaafe Taabota giigsides. Taabotaas adussateththay nam7u wadhanne bagga; aahoteththay issi wadhanne baggaa; dhoqqateththay issi wadhanne baggaa. 
Exodus37:2 Taabotaa giigsidi soo bagganne kare baggaa walakay baynda worqqan meeshides; iza yuuyi aadhdhanaas dancco worqqara yuushshi aaththides. 
Exodus37:3 Qasse oyddu worqqa sagayota seerisidi Taabotaas oyddu tohotan, issi baggara nam7u sagayota, qasse hankko baggara nam7u sagayota aaththides." 
Exodus37:4 Histtidi odoro miththafe tooho miththata kessidi isttaka worqqan meeshides. 
Exodus37:5 Taabotaa tookkanaas Taabotaa millen diza sagayotan tooho miththata aaththides. 
Exodus37:6 Walakay baynda worqqafe nam7u wadhanne baggaa aduqqiza, issi wadhanne baggaa aakkiza atto geetettiza sohoza kama medhdhides." 
Exodus37:7 Kamatas wurseththa nam7u bagga gaxan nam7u kirubeta qoxettida worqqafe medhdhides. 
Exodus37:8 Issi kirubeza issi bagga gaxan, nam7anththo kirubeza hankko bagga gaxan, nam7atakka kamazara gaththi oyseththi medhdhides." 
Exodus37:9 Kirubeti ba qefe denththidi atto geetettiza sohoza kammiza kama ba qefen kammi woththida; qasse issoy issaara xeelettana mala ooththides. 
Exodus37:10 Qasse adussateththay nam7u wadha, aahoteththay issi wadha, dhoqqateththay issi wadhanne bagga gidida xaraphpheeza odoro miththafe medhdhidi," 
Exodus37:11 walakay baynda worqqan meeshides. Iza yuuyi aadhdhanaas worqqa kifafe yuushshi aaththides. 
Exodus37:12 Hessaththoka aahoteththay tadhdhako gidiza kifafe iza bolla yuushshi aaththides. Histtidi iza yuuyi aadhdhanaas worqqa dancco yuushshi aaththides. 
Exodus37:13 Histtidi Taabotaa tookkanaas giigiza oyddu worqqa sagayota medhdhidi oyddu tohoti tokettida oyddu zoozetara oyseththides. 
Exodus37:14 Xaraphpheezaza tookkanaas tooho miththata istta giddora aaththiza sagayoti xaraphpheezaza xanxa bolla medhettida. 
Exodus37:15 Xaraphpheezaza tookkiza tooho miththaa odoro miththafe kessidi worqqan meeshides. 
Exodus37:16 Hessaththoka xaraphpheeza bolla woththiza dumma dumma miishshata walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhides; heytikka saanetanne cilfata, qasse ushsha yarsho isttan seerisiza keretanne xuu7ata." 
Exodus37:17 Hessafe guye Basli7eeley xomppe woththizasoza qoxettida walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhides; xomppezi izan eqqiza toho, qasse giddo toomaakka ubbaa qoxettida worqqafe medhdhides. Iza kureta, iza dhemotanne iza ciishshata ubbaa izara issife oyseththi medhdhides." 
Exodus37:18 Millera usuppun ballata medhdhides; heedzdzu haggata issi baggara, qasse heedzdzu haggata hankko baggara kessides." 
Exodus37:19 Usuppun haggataska hu7en hu7en issi issi dhemotinne ciishshati diza, ochcholoone ciish misatiza wanca medhdhides;" 
Exodus37:20 xomppe woththizasozas giddo toomay, dhemotinne ciishshati diza ochcholoone ciishshe misatiza oyddu wancan alleqetti uttides." 
Exodus37:21 Nam7ay nam7ay issife waaththan diza heedzdzu ballatanne garsara issi issi dhemoy dees. 
Exodus37:22 Dhemotinne haggati wuri xomppe woththizasozara issife oyketti issino gididi walakay baynda worqqafe qoxetti medhettida. 
Exodus37:23 Izi qasse xomppe woththizasozas laappun xomppeta, xomppe toyssiza qaphetanne qapheta woththizaso walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhides." 
Exodus37:24 Xomppeza woththizasozanne izan go7ettiza miish ubbaa medhdhanaas heedzdzu tammanne ichchash kilo gidiza walakay baynda worqqa wursides. 
Exodus37:25 Hessaththoka qasse exaane cuwasizasoza odoro miththafe medhdhides. Izas oyddu gulay dees; adussateththay issi wadha; aahoteththay issi wadha, dhoqqateththay nam7u wadha. Iza kacetikka izara issino gididi oyketti medhettidayta." 
Exodus37:26 Izas bolla baggaza, oyddu milletanne iza kaceta walakay baynda worqqan meeshidi iza yuushshi aaththanaas xanxaza worqqafe ooththides." 
Exodus37:27 He worqqa xanxaafe garsara exaane cuwasizasozas worqqafe nam7u sagayota medhdhides; histtidi he baggaranne ha baggara nam7u nam7u oyththides. Heyti tookkiza wode tooho miththata aaththanaas maaddanaassa. 
Exodus37:28 Tooho miththata odoro miththafe kessidi istta worqqan meeshides. 
Exodus37:29 Qasse dummatida tiyettiza zaytenne sawo tunnu giza lo7o exaane, shitto mala giigsides." 
Exodus38:1 Odoro miththafe xuugettiza yarsho yarshizaso ooththides. He yarshizasoza dhoqqateththay heedzdzu wadha, aahoteththaynne adussateththay issi gina, ichchashu ichchashu wadha gididi oyddu gulay dizayssa ooththides." 
Exodus38:2 Oyddu gulata wurseththa xeeran xeeran issi issi kace medhdhides. He kaceti yarshizasozara issife oykettidi oosettida. Histtidi yarshizasoza xarqimalara meeshides. 
Exodus38:3 Izan go7ettiza miishshata, bidinth kessiza saaneta, akaafata, kereta, asho konccetanne bonqo tama oykkiza kon7a ubbaa xarqimalappe medhdhides." 
Exodus38:4 Histtidi xarqimalappe zayzare yarshizasozas giigsidi yarshizasozas duge giddo ginan diza xanxazas garsa baggara woththides. 
Exodus38:5 Xarqimalappe medhdhida zayzarezas oyddu gulan tooho miththata aaththanaas oyddu qanggota medhdhides. 
Exodus38:6 Odoro miththafe yarshizasoza tooho miththata kessidi xarqimalan meeshides. 
Exodus38:7 Yarshizasoza tookkiza wode maaddana mala tooho miththata nam7u millera diza qanggotan aaththides. Yarshizasoza giddo doy7a aggidi sanqqafe medhdhides. 
Exodus38:8 Xarqimalappe meechcha kerenne kereza woththizaso medhdhides; he xarqimalazikka Xoossa Dunkaaneza pengen ooththiza maccassati ehida xarqimala mastooteppe ekettides. 
Exodus38:9 Hessafe guye dubbushasoza giigsides. Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyges tohoso bagga adussateththaa xeetu wadha ooththidi, liiqo laynoppe dadettida magalasha giigsides." 
Exodus38:10 Izas xarqimalappe nam7u tammu tuussatanne tuussati izan eqqiza xarqimala toho ooththides; istta hu7en qasse birappe medhettida istta bolla kaqqizaytanne tuussata hu7en qachchizayta ooththides. 
Exodus38:11 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygezas hu7eso baggaa adussateththay xeetu wadha; qasse nam7u tammu tuussatinne he tuussatas nam7u tammu xarqimala tohoti deettes. Qasseka birappe oosettida istta bolla kaqqizaytinne tuussata hu7en qachchizayti deettes. 
Exodus38:12 Arshey wullizaso baggara diza dubbushaa aahoteththi ichchashu tammu wadha gididi tammu tuussatinne tuussatas tammu tohoti diza magalashata giigsides; he tuussata hu7en birappe medhettida istta bolla kaqotanne tuussatas hu7en qachchizayta ooththides. 
Exodus38:13 Qasse arshey mokkiza baggara diza dubbushaso aahoteththi ichchash tammu wadha. 
Exodus38:14 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza gelizasoppe issi baggara tammanne ichchash wadha aduqqiza magalashati, isttas heedzdzu tuussatinne tuussatas heedzdzu tohoti deettes." 
Exodus38:15 Hessaththoka Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza gelizasoppe hankko baggara tammanne ichchashu wadha aduqqiza magalashati, isttas heedzdzu tuussatinne tuussatas heedzdzu tohoti deettes." 
Exodus38:16 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza yuushon diza magalashati wuri liiqo laynoppe dadettida. 
Exodus38:17 He tuussatas tohoy xarqimalappe, kaqotinne tuussatas hu7en qachchizayti birappe oosettida; istta hu7ey biran meeshettides. Hessa gishshas dubbushasoza yuushon diza tuussata ubbaa hu7en birappe oosettida qachchiza miishshati deettes." 
Exodus38:18 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza gelizason kaqqiza magalashay salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe dadettidi xilpen alleqissi giigsidaaza. Izas adussateththay nam7u tammu wadha; dhoqqateththay Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza magalashata mala ichchashu wadha." 
Exodus38:19 Izaskka xarqimalappe oosettida oyddu tuussatinne tuussatas oyddu tohoti deettes. Istta kaqotinne tuussatas hu7en qachchiza miishshati birappe oosettida; istta xeeratikka biran meeshettida. 
Exodus38:20 Xoossa Dunkaaneza dhishketinne iza yuushon diza Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygeza dhishketi wuri xarqimalappe oosettidayta. 
Exodus38:21 Xoossa Dunkaanezas go7ettida miishshata Lewe qommoti mazgaban xaafida. He miishshata qeese Aaroone naa Itamaare daannateththa garsan diza Leweti mazgaban xaafana mala Musey azazides. 
Exodus38:22 Biniyaame zereth gidida Uures naaza naa, Uure naa, Basli7eeley GODAY Muse azazidayssa ubbaa ooththides." 
Exodus38:23 Daane zereth gidida Ahisaameke naa Eelaabey izara dees; izi kushe hiillanchchanne oosos koyro qofa kessizaadeko; qasse salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinaninne liiqo laynon dadidi xilpen alleqissiza asa." 
Exodus38:24 Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosos GODAAS yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza yarshos imettida worqqay Xoossa Dunkaanen erettida meezaanen woththiin 1,000 kilo gidides." 
Exodus38:25 Taybon diza maabara asaappe beettida biray Xoossa Dunkaanen erettida meezaanen woththiin 3,430 kilo gidides." 
Exodus38:26 Asaa taybiza wode taybettida attumasay wuri issaadey hu7en hu7en immidayssi Xoossa Dunkaanen erettida meezaanen woththiin usuppun giraame mala gidides. Taybettida asay nam7u tammu layth kumidaynne nam7u tammaafe bollara dizay mulera 603,550." 
Exodus38:27 Xoossa Dunkaaneza magalashata essida xeetu tohoti 3,400 kilo gidiza biran oosettida. Hessika issi issi tohos 34 kilo tigettiza bira." 
Exodus38:28 Attida heedzdzu tammu kilo biraa tuussata bolla kaqoso medhdhanaas, tuussatas hu7e bolla meeshanaassinne istta hu7en qachchiza miishshata medhdhanaas go7ettida." 
Exodus38:29 Hessaththoka asay GODAAS yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshanaas ehida xarqimala yarshoy 2,425 kilo gidides." 
Exodus38:30 He xarqimalappe Xoossa Dunkaaneza gelizason eqqiza tuussatas tohoy, xarqimalappe oosettida yarshizaso geetettiza yarshizasozi, iza giddon woththida xarqimala zayzareynne iza giddon go7ettiza dumma dumma miishshay wuri medhettides." 
Exodus38:31 Hessaththoka qasse Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge yuushon diza dirsa giddo gelizaso pengen eqqida tohoy, qasse Xoossa Dunkaanezanne iza yuushon diza Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge dirsay tolettida dhishketi wuri he xarqimalaappe medhettida." 
Exodus39:1 Qeeseti Xoossa Dunkaanen ooththiza wode may7ana may7o, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappe daddida. Aaroone qeeseteththaa may7oka GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththida." 
Exodus39:2 Qasse istti eefude worqqafe, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe daddida." 
Exodus39:3 Istti worqqa qoxxi lee7isidi, izappe qarari qararidi qacina kessida. Histtidi salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinanne liiqo layno gaththidi kushe hiillanchchati daddida." 
Exodus39:4 Nam7u baggay gaaggidi issino gidana mala nam7u hashe bolla gaththidi oyththiza carqqa giigsida. 
Exodus39:5 GODAY Muse azazida mala hiillay alleqissidi daddida danccoyka eefudera issife gididi, worqqafe salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe dadettides." 
Exodus39:6 Istti margide geetettiza nam7u shuchchata giigsidi worqqafe medhdhida shuchchu oykkizayssa bolla maarara woththida. Maatafa bolla sunth wooci xaafiza mala he shuchchata bolla Isra7eele nayta sunth woocidi xaafida. 
Exodus39:7 GODAY Muse azazida mala tammanne nam7u Isra7eele qommota hassa7issizaaz gidana mala, ha tammanne nam7u shuchchata eefudezara oyththidi hashe kaqoza bolla woththida." 
Exodus39:8 Istti tiran woththiza kiise kushe hiillan ooththida. He tiran woththiza kiiseza eefude worqqafe daddida mala, salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe daddida." 
Exodus39:9 Izas oyddu xeeray dees; dhoqqateththaynne aahoteththay issi issi tadhdhako. 
Exodus39:10 Hessafe guye iza bolla oyddu maaran al7o shuchchata woththida; koyro maaraan woththida shuchchay sardiyoone, tophaaziyoonenne xolqiza inqqu;" 
Exodus39:11 nam7anththo maaran baluure, simpere almaaze geetettiza al7o shuchchata;" 
Exodus39:12 heedzdzanththo maaran yaakintte, kelqedoonenne ametesxinoose;" 
Exodus39:13 oydanththo maaran birille, margidenne yasphiide. Heyta ubbaa worqqafe oosettida shuchchu oykkizayssa bolla woththida." 
Exodus39:14 Isra7eele nayta sunththaa qooda mala, shuchchata qoodaykka tammanne nam7a; issay issay maatame mala woocettidi tammanne nam7u qommota sunththi he shuchchata bolla xaafettides." 
Exodus39:15 Tiran diza kiisezas wodoro mala dooqettida sansalataa walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhida. 
Exodus39:16 Nam7u worqqafe medhdhida shuchchu oykkizaytanne nam7u worqqa migidota medhdhidi tiran woththiza kiisezas qommo gaxa xeerata gaththi oyththida. 
Exodus39:17 He nam7u worqqa sansalatata tiran woththiza kiisezas xeeran diza migidotara gaththi oyseththida. 
Exodus39:18 He sansalatatas hankko bagga xeeraa qasse eefudezas sinththa baggara, hashe kaqo bolla diza shuch oykkizaytara gaththi qachchida." 
Exodus39:19 Qasseka nam7u worqqa midigata medhdhidi eefudeppe kaalli diza tira kiisezas soo baggara diza nam7u xeeratan aaththida. 
Exodus39:20 Hessaththoka worqqafe hara nam7u migidota medhdhidi, eefudezas sinththa baggara, hashe kaqozappe garsa baggara eefude xeessan qachchizayssafe qommora, sikoy gaaggizaso achchan istta oyththida." 
Exodus39:21 GODAY Muse azazida mala tira kiisen diza migidota eefudezan diza migidotara gaththidi, salo misatiza suqeththan qachchida gishshas tira kiisezi xeessafe bollara diza gishshas, qashoy dol7enna." 
Exodus39:22 Eefudezappe bollara may7iza qamisa istti mulera salo misatiza carqqafe giigsida; hessika shemmaane oosokko. 
Exodus39:23 He qamisazas qoodhe aaththizaso medhdhida; qoodhesoy daakettontta mala, soo bagga qalam7idi yuushshi aaththi sikkida." 
Exodus39:24 Istta qamisazas duge bagga maccara yuushon salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe oroomaane geetettiza miththa ayfe teera misleta medhdhida." 
Exodus39:25 Qasseka worqqafe daalata medhdhidi qamisatas duge bagga xeera yuushshi aaththidi oroomaane misleta giddon aaththi aaththi walakkida. 
Exodus39:26 GODAY Muses azazida mala istti Xoossa Dunkaane ooso ooththishe may7ana mala qamisazas duge bagga maccara yuushshi aaththidi daalanne oroomaane teera misle walakki aaththida. 
Exodus39:27 GODAY Muse azazida mala istti Aaroonessinne iza naytas shemmaaney daddida liiqo laynoppe qolleta giigsida. 
Exodus39:28 Qasse hu7en xaaxiza shaasheta, qoobetanne garsara may7iza may7ota liiqo laynoppe daddidi giigsida." 
Exodus39:29 Hessaththoka qasse istti salo misatiza, ochcha teera misatizanne xeeqa zo7o qacinappenne liiqo laynoppe daddidi kushe hiillan alleqissidi dancco giigsida." 
Exodus39:30 Istti akilile misle walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhidi maatame bolla woociza mala iza bolla, «GODAAS geesh gididi dummatides» gizayssa wooci xaafida." 
Exodus39:31 Hessafe guye hu7e goossa bolla kaqqana mala, GODAY Muse azazida mala salo misatiza baqeth izan aaththidi qachchida." 
Exodus39:32 Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosoy wuri mulera polettides. Isra7eele asay ubbaa GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththides. 
Exodus39:33 Hessafe guye istti Xoossa Dunkaaneza mulera ekkidi Musekko ehida; hessika dunkaanezanne iza miishshaza ubbaa, qapheta, tole miththata, penge gordiza miththata, tuussatanne istti eqqiza tohota," 
Exodus39:34 bollara kammanaas dharshoza ite zo7o qalamen yeggi kessidayssa, qaacettida galba, genththiza magalasha," 
Exodus39:35 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa, iza tookkiza tooho miththata, atto geetettiza kamaa," 
Exodus39:36 xaraphpheezanne iza miishshe ubbaa GODAA sinththan woththiza geeshsha ukeththaa," 
Exodus39:37 walakay baynda worqqafe oosettida xomppe woththizasozanne izan maaran diza xomppeta, istta miishshata ubbaanne xomppe zayte," 
Exodus39:38 worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasizasoza, tiyettiza zayte, sawiza exaane, Xoossa Dunkaane penge magalasha," 
Exodus39:39 xarqimalappe ooththida yarshizasoza, xarqimala zayzareza, iza tookkiza tooho mith, iza miishshata ubbaa, meechcha kerenne kereza iza bolla woththiza miishshata," 
Exodus39:40 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge godaa genththiza magalashata, iza tuussata, istti eqqiza tohota, Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge geliza pengeta magalashata, Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge wodorotanne dhishketa, Xoossa Dunkaanezas koshshiza miishshata ubba;" 
Exodus39:41 Qeeseti Geeshsha soon ooththidi may7anaas dadettida may7ota, Aarooneynne iza nayti qeeseteththan ooththishe may7iza may7ota." 
Exodus39:42 Isra7eele asay oosoza ubbaa GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththides. 
Exodus39:43 Musey oosoza xomosi xeellidi istta GODAY azazida mala ooththidayssa be7ides. Hessa gishshas Musey istta anjjides. 
Exodus40:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse," 
Exodus40:2 «Koyro aginan koyro gallas, neni Xoossa Dunkaane tola." 
Exodus40:3 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa iza giddon woththada Taabotaza magalashan genththa. 
Exodus40:4 Xaraphpheezaa gelththada iza bolla wodhdhanaas koshshiza miishshata ubbaa iza bolla woththa. Histtada xomppeta iza bolla woththiza miishshaza soo gelththada iza bolla xomppeta woththa. 
Exodus40:5 Worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasizasoza Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan woththada, Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddo geliza penge magalashaza kaqqa." 
Exodus40:6 «Xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoza Xoossa Dunkaanezi geliza penge sinththan woththa. 
Exodus40:7 Izan meecettiza kereza Xoossa Dunkaanezappenne yarshizasozappe giddon woththada haaththe izan tiga. 
Exodus40:8 Xoossa Dunkaanezappe karera yuushsha aaththada Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge giigsada dubbushaa gelizason magalasha kaqqa. 
Exodus40:9 «Tiyettiza zayteza ekkada Xoossa Dunkaanezanne iza giddon dizayssa ubbaa tiya; izanne iza giddon go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa dummasa; histtiko izi geesh gidana. 
Exodus40:10 Hessafe guye xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasonne izas go7ettiza miishshaa ubbaa tiya; yarshizasoza dummasa; histtiko izi ubbaafe aadhdhida geesh gidana. 
Exodus40:11 Meechcha kerezanne kereza iza bolla woththiza miishshata tiyada istta dummasa. 
Exodus40:12 «Neni Aaroonenne iza nayta Xoossa Dunkaanezi geliza penge ehada haaththan meecca. 
Exodus40:13 Hessafe guye qeeseteththa may7oza Aaroone mayzada izi taas qeeseteththan ooththana mala iza tiyada dummasa. 
Exodus40:14 Iza attuma naytakka ehada qolle mayza. 
Exodus40:15 Istti taas qeeseteththan ooththana mala, istta aawaa tiyda mala, isttaka tiya. Istta tiyeteththankka isttanne istta yeletay wuri qeese gididi ooththana mala ta ooththana» gides." 
Exodus40:16 Musey ubbaaka GODAY bana azazida mala ooththides. 
Exodus40:17 Hessa gishshas Gibxeppe istti kezida nam7anththo layththan, koyro aginan koyro gallassan Xoossa Dunkaaney tolettides." 
Exodus40:18 Musey Xoossa Dunkaaneza essiza wode Dunkaaneza toho istta sohon sohon woththides; tole miththatanne tuussaa aaththides; gordiza miththatakka gelththides. 
Exodus40:19 Hessafe guye Musey GODAY azazida mala dunkaaneza tolidi iza bollara kama kammides. 
Exodus40:20 Histtidi tammu azazoti xaafettida masettida shuchchata efidi Taabotaza giddon woththides; tookkiza tooho miththata Taabotaan aaththides; maaroteththa kamaakka Taabotaa bolla woththides. 
Exodus40:21 Hessafe guye Taabotaza Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddo gelththides; genththiza magalashaa kaqqidi, GODAY azazida mala Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza kammides." 
Exodus40:22 GODAY Muse azazida mala, Musey xaraphpheezaza Xoossa Dunkaanezan gelththidi, magalashaappe karera hu7esora woththidi," 
Exodus40:23 iza bolla GODAA sinththan woththiza geeshsha uketh giigsides. 
Exodus40:24 GODAY Muse azazida mala, xomppe woththizasoza Xoossa Dunkaane giddo gelththidi, xaraphpheezas sinththa baggara, Xoossa Dunkaanezas tohosora woththides;" 
Exodus40:25 qasse xomppeta GODAA sinththan oyththides. 
Exodus40:26 GODAY azazida mala, worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasizasoza Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddo gelththidi magalashazas sinththa baggara woththidi," 
Exodus40:27 iza bolla sawiza exaane cuwasides. 
Exodus40:28 Hessafe guye Xoossa Dunkaaneza pengen magalashaa kaqqides. 
Exodus40:29 Xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoza Xoossa Dunkaane gelizaso penge achchan woththides; iza bolla xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarsho GODAY azazida mala yarshides. 
Exodus40:30 Meechcha kereza Xoossa Dunkaanezappenne yarshizasozappe giddon woththides. Histtidi meecettanaas haaththe izan tigides. 
Exodus40:31 Musey, Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushenne ba toho izan meecettida." 
Exodus40:32 GODAY Muse azazida mala, istti Xoossa Dunkaanen geliza wode woykko yarshizaso shiiqiza wode aydekka meecetteettes." 
Exodus40:33 Xoossa Dunkaanen yarshizaso yuushshi aaththidi dubbusha giigsides; he dubbushaa pengen magalasha kaqqides. Hessaththo histtidi Musey oosoza polides. 
Exodus40:34 Hessafe guye shaaray Xoossa Dunkaaneza kammides; GODAA bonchchoyka iza kumides. 
Exodus40:35 Shaaray Xoossa Dunkaaneza bolla uttida gishshassinne GODAA bonchchoy iza giddon kumida gishshas Musey iza giddo gelanaas dandaybeenna. 
Exodus40:36 Isra7eele asay ba oge ubbaan, he shaaray Xoossa Dunkaanezappe dendiza wode aydekka iza kaallidi beettes." 
Exodus40:37 Gido attiin he shaaray dendontta ixxiko izi dendana gallassay gakkanaas isttika qaaxxettenna. 
Exodus40:38 Istta oge ubbaan GODAA shaaray Isra7eele asay wuri be7ishin, gallas gallas Xoossa Dunkaane kammeessinne qamma qamma qasse tamay he shaaraa giddon eexxees." 
Leviticus1:1 GODAY Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon dishe Muse xeygidi hizgi azazides," 
Leviticus1:2 «Isra7eele asay GODAAS yarsho shiishshiza wode istti naagana wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa; issi issi asi miizappe gidiin dorsafe woykko deyshafe gidiin ay qommo yarshoka shiishshiza wode," 
Leviticus1:3 hessika miizappe issaa xuugettiza yarshos shiishshanaas koykko issi boreykka iza bolla baynda mirgo boora dooridi eho; histtiko izi GODAA ufayssiza yarsho gidana mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen shiishsho. 
Leviticus1:4 Xuugettiza yarsho shiishshizaadey ba shiishshiza booraa hu7e bolla ba kushe woththo; he yarshozikka iza nagaraa wursanaas GODAY ekkiza lo7o yarsho gidana. 
Leviticus1:5 Hessaadey mirgoza heen GODAA sinththan shukko; histtiko Aaroone zereththatappe gidida qeeseti booraza suuththaa GODAAS shiishshetto; Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen geliza penge baggara diza yarsho yarshizasoza bolla lanqera yuuyi aadhdhanaas suuththaa wuxxetto. 
Leviticus1:6 Hessafe guye he yarshoza shiishshizayssi he shukettida meheza galbaa shooqidi kesso; ashoza qommon qommon qanxxereththo. 
Leviticus1:7 Qeese Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti yarsho yarshizasoza bolla mith gophidi tama eeththetto. 
Leviticus1:8 Qeeseza Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti he meheza ashoza qommon qommon shaakkidi hu7ezanne handaza gujjidi yarsho shiishshizason korettida miththaa bolla woththetto. 
Leviticus1:9 He yarshoza shiishshizayssi he meheza qanththa ashozanne guye gedata haaththan meecco; qeesezi yarshoza ubbaa yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hayssa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees. 
Leviticus1:10 «Izaadey ba dorsafe woykko ba deyshafe issaa xuugettiza yarshos shiishshana koykko issi borey iza bolla baynda dharsho woykko orge gido. 
Leviticus1:11 Hessaka yarsho shiishshizasozappe pudeha baggara Xoossa sinththan shukko; Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti suuththaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto. 
Leviticus1:12 He yarshaa shiishshizaadey he shukkida ashoza qommon qommon qanxxi kessidaappe guye he oosozas doorettida qeesey he kessida ashoza ubbaa hu7ezanne handazakka issife yarsho yarshizason gophettidi taman eexxiza miththaa bolla woththo; 
Leviticus1:13 Addezi he mehezas qanththa ashozanne nam7u gedata haaththan meecco; qeesezikka hessa ubbaa GODAAS yarsho ooththi shiishshidi yarsho shiishshizasoza bolla ubbaa xuuggo; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy Xoossaa ufayssees. 
Leviticus1:14 «Issaadey GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho kafoppe shiishshana koykko haraphphe ciye woykko waanose geetettiza kafoppe gidanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus1:15 Qeesezikka he kafoza ekkidi gede yarshozaso shiishshidi kafoza qoodhe mirqqo; yarshoza shiishshida tamaan iza xuuggo; suuththika yarshoy iza bolla shiiqizayssa millera duge xoketto. 
Leviticus1:16 Baallezanne qanththa ashoza dumma shaakkidi yarsho iza bolla shiishshizasozappe arshey mokkiza baggara bidinththi qolettizason yegetto. 
Leviticus1:17 Qefeta oykkidi nam7u kessi phalqidi ashoza mulera shaakki yeggontta dishe yarsho shiishshizasoza bolla diza tamaan mulera xuuggo; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees. 
Leviticus2:1 «Ay asikka Xoossas kaththa yarsho shiishshiza wode liiqo dhiille shiishshana bessees; he dhiilleza bolla wogara zaytenne exaane gujjo; 
Leviticus2:2 Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetakko ekki yo; he wode iza ooso taray gakkida qeesey he dhiillezappe ba kuphpha kumeththa zaytezanne exaaneza ekkidi wurikka Xoossas shiiqidayssa erisanaas yarsho shiishshizayssa bolla taman xuuggo; hessa mala kaththa yarsho sawoy Xoossaa ufayssees. 
Leviticus2:3 Kaththa yarshofe attida dhiilley Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetas imetto; hessika Xoossas shiiqida yarshofe shaaketti ekettida gishshas haratappe keehi dummatees. 
Leviticus2:4 «Yarshozi ukeththi uukettiza bashen uukettidaa gidikkoka irshoy bochchonttaaz gido; izikka wogara miththa zaytera walakettidi liiqo dhiillera uukettida qeeri uketh woykko zayten gindetti uukettida uketh gidanaas bessees. 
Leviticus2:5 «Yarshozi tama coocen kompettidaaz gidikko irshoy bochchontta wogara miththa zaytey gujettidi liiqo dhiillefe giigettidaaz gido. 
Leviticus2:6 Ne ukeththaza basereththada iza bolla wogara miththa zayte gussada kaththa yarsho shiishsha. 
Leviticus2:7 «Yarshozi qeeri bashen uukettida ukeththa mala gidikko wogara miththa zaytey izan gujetti munuqettida liiqo dhiillefe giigidaaz gido. 
Leviticus2:8 Kaththa Yarsho Xoossas imettiza yarsho histta qeesezas imma; qeesezikka yarsho yarshizason yarsho. 
Leviticus2:9 Qeesezi hessa he yarshozappe baggaa ekkidi ubbaa GODAY izi shiishshidayssa yuushshi qoppana mala yarsho yarshizason diza tamaan xuuggo; hayssa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees. 
Leviticus2:10 Yarshishin attidayssi qasse qeesetas imetto; hessika GODAAS shiiqida yarshofe shaaketti ekettida gishshas haratappe keehi dummatees. 
Leviticus2:11 «GODAAS xuugetti yarshettiza kaththa yarshora shiiqiza irsho gidiin woykko ees gidikkoka ne taman xuugganaas bessontta gishshas ne GODAAS shiishshiza kaththa yarshon ubbaan aykko irshoyka izan geloppo. 
Leviticus2:12 Layththan layththan kath shiishshiza wode koyro maxettida kaththaafe xeera yarsho ooththidi GODAAS ekki yiite; he yarshozi yarsho yarshizasozan taman xuugettofo. 
Leviticus2:13 Ay qommo kaththa yarshonkka maxiney dhayoppo; hessi neni ne Xoossaara caaqettida caaqo qaalaas malata; hessa gishshas ne shiishshiza kaththa yarsho ubbaa maxinera mal7inththa ooththa. 
Leviticus2:14 Kath shiishshiza koyro aginan kaththa xeera ne shiishshiza wode caacettidi shigechchettida tiya gido. 
Leviticus2:15 Hayssi kaththa yarsho gidida gishshas iza bolla wogara miththa zaytenne exaane gujja. 
Leviticus2:16 Qeesezikka he yarshozappe bagga ekkidi izi GODAAS shiiqidaaz gididayssa akeekissana mala zaytezakka, exaanezakka ubbaa kaththara issife xuuggo." 
Leviticus3:1 «Ay asikka saroteththa gishshas ba meheppe GODAAS issifeteththa yarsho shiishshiza wode iza bolla wosoy baynda mirgo woykko macca miiz dooridi eho. 
Leviticus3:2 Yarsho ehizaadey yarshos izi shiishshiza meheza bolla ba kushe woththidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge matan shukko; Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarshoy yarshettizasoza milleza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto. 
Leviticus3:3 Issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza yarshozappe GODAAS taman xuugettiza yarsho gidi shiiqanayti qanththa ashota goozi oykkida handaa kumeth," 
Leviticus3:4 kilahotanne istta bolla diza handaa hessaththoka tire goozi oykkida handatappe doorettidayta. 
Leviticus3:5 Qeeseti hessa ubbaa hara xuugettiza yarshora gaththi yarsho yarshizason xuugetto; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees. 
Leviticus3:6 «Issifeteththas shiiqiza yarshoy dorsafe woykko deyshafe gidikko adde woykko macca gididi istta bolla wosoy bayndayta gidetto. 
Leviticus3:7 Issi asi GODAAS shiishshiza yarshoy dorsa laaqqa gidikko," 
Leviticus3:8 ba kusheza laaqqaa hu7e bolla woththidi Dunkaaneza penge bolla shukko; qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla milleza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto. 
Leviticus3:9 Issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza yarshozappe GODAAS taman xuugettiza yarsho gidi shiiqanayti handazanne zokko meqeththa garsafe qanxxettida goyna ubbaa, qanththa asho goozi oykkida handa ubbaa," 
Leviticus3:10 kilahotanne istta goozi oykkida handa ubbaa qasse tire kammi oykkida lo7o handa ubbaa," 
Leviticus3:11 qeesezikka hessa ubbaa GODAAS kaththa yarsho histti shiishshidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo. 
Leviticus3:12 «Issi asi GODAAS yarsho deyshe shiishshizaa gidikko," 
Leviticus3:13 ba kushe deyshaza hu7e bolla woththidi Dunkaaneza sinththan shukko; qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarshoy yarshettizasoza bolla milleza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto. 
Leviticus3:14 He shukettida ashozappe hayssafe kaalliza asho qommota kaththa yarsho ooththidi GODAAS shiishshetto; heytikka qanththa asho kammiza handa ubbaa," 
Leviticus3:15 kilahotanne istta goozi oykkida handaa, qasseka tire kammi oykkida lo7o handazappe ekketto." 
Leviticus3:16 Qeesezikka hessa taman xuugetti sawiza yarsho ooththidi yarsho yarshizason xuuggo; handay wuri GODAAS shaakettidi dummato. 
Leviticus3:17 Isra7eele naytappe handa mizaadey woykko mehe suuth uyizaadey dooppo; hessi wuri Isra7eele nayti dizasoninne istti diza wode ubbaan mernaas eqqi diza woga gido.» 
Leviticus4:1 Xoossi Muse hizgi azazides; 
Leviticus4:2 «Neni Isra7eele naytas yootanayssi hayssa; oonikka erontta baleteththan nagara ooththiko woykko erontta GODAA azazotappe issaa moorikko hayssafe kaalliza wogaa naago! 
Leviticus4:3 «He wode tiyettida qeesey nagara ooththidi derezi nagara ooththidaa misatissi beettiko iza bolla issi wosoykka baynda issi mirgo boora ehidi ba nagaraa gishshas GODAAS yarsho shiishsho. 
Leviticus4:4 Kormaza dunkaaneza penge ehidi ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththidi GODAA sinththan shukko. 
Leviticus4:5 Hessafe guye qeeseta halaqay he booraza suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi gede dunkaaneza giddo gelo; 
Leviticus4:6 GODAA Keeththa magalashaas sinththa baggara eqqidi ba biradhdhe suuththaan gelththi gelththi kessidi laappunto gakkanaas wuxxo. 
Leviticus4:7 Izappe guuththa suuth ekkidi Dunkaaneza giddon exaane yarshizasozan oyddu baggara diza dhemota bolla woththo; hankko attida suuththaa dunkaanezan geliza penge baggara xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizaso garsan gusso. 
Leviticus4:8 He mirgoza handaza ubbaa, qanththa asho kammi oykkida handazakka," 
Leviticus4:9 kilahotakka istta goozi oykkida handazanne hessaththoka tire kammi oykkida moodhezappe doorettidayssa ekko. 
Leviticus4:10 Qeeseta halaqay hessa ubbaa ekkidi xuugettiza yarshoy shiiqiza yarshosoza bolla xuuggo; oosozikka issifeteththas yarshoy shiiqiza meheza handafe ekkidi xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza mala hano. 
Leviticus4:11 Gido attiin galbaza, ashoza, hu7ezanne tohota, maracezaranne qanththa asho," 
Leviticus4:12 heeraappe gede kare kesso; gede bidinth kessi qolizaaso, tunonttaso efidi miththi shiishshidi taman xuuggo." 
Leviticus4:13 «Isra7eele asay erontta bala ooththiko woykko erontta GODAA azazoppe issino mooridaa gidikko he nagaraykka asaappe geemmiko," 
Leviticus4:14 he oosettida nagaray erettida mala heerakka derezi he nagaraa gishshas yarshos issi mirgo eho; izakka asay Gaytoteththa Dunkaane sinththe shiishsho. 
Leviticus4:15 Deraa halaqati bantta kushe mirgoza hu7e bolla woththiin heen boorazi GODAA sinththan shuketto. 
Leviticus4:16 Tiyettida qeesey he mirgoza suuththafe guuththara ekkidi gede Dunkaanezan gelo; 
Leviticus4:17 GODAA Keeththa magalashaas sinththa baggara gididi ba kushe biradhdheta laappunto suuththan gelththi gelththi kessidi Xoossa sinththan wuxxo. 
Leviticus4:18 Qasseka guuththa suuth ekkidi Dunkaane giddon diza exaane iza bolla yarshizasozas oyddu baggara diza dhemota bolla woththo; attida suuththaa qasse gede Dunkaanen gelizason xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso. 
Leviticus4:19 Hessafe qasse he mirgo moodheza ubbaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo. 
Leviticus4:20 Oosozi wurikka nagara gishshas shiiqiza mirgo yarshizayssaththo ooththetto; tiyettida Qeesezi deraappe nagara diggana; deraasikka atto geetettana. 
Leviticus4:21 Hessafe guye mirgoza asay dizasoppe gede kare kessidi ba nagaraa gishshas shiishshida mirgoza kase xuuggoyssaththo xuuggo; hessika dereza nagarappe geeshshiza yarsho gidana. 
Leviticus4:22 «Nagara ooththidaadeynne erontta dishe baleteththan GODAA ba Xoossaa azazotappe issiniyo mooridaadey izi dere kaaleththizaade gidikko," 
Leviticus4:23 ba ooththida nagara izi erida mala heerakka issi borey iza bolla baynda deysha orge ba nagarappe maarettanaas yarsho shiishsho. 
Leviticus4:24 Ba kushe deyshaa hu7e bolla woththidi yarsho yarshizasozappe pudeha baggara xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason GODAA sinththan shukko. Hessika nagara diggiza yarsho gidana. 
Leviticus4:25 Qeesezi he shukettida meheza suuththan ba biradhdheta gelththi gelththi kessidi oyddu baggara diza dhemota tiyo; izappe attida suuththa yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso. 
Leviticus4:26 Handaza ubbaa yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; he oosoy kase issifeteththa yarshos shiishshida meheta handa xuuggoyssaththo ooththetto; hessaththo qeesezi dereza kaaleththizaade nagara wursanaas yarsho shiishsho; izaskka atto geetettana. 
Leviticus4:27 «Nagara ooththidaadeynne erontta dishe baleteththan GODAA azazotappe issiniyo mooridaadey hankko deraa giddofe gidikko," 
Leviticus4:28 ba ooththida nagara izi erida mala heerakka izi bolla issi boreykka baynda macca deysh ba nagaraa gishshas shiishsho. 
Leviticus4:29 Ba kushe he deyshay hu7e bolla woththo; yarsho yarshizasoppe pudeha baggara xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason shukko. 
Leviticus4:30 Qeesezikka he shukettida deyshay suuththan ba biradhdheta gelththi gelththi kessidi oyddu baggara diza dhemota tiyo; izappe attida suuththaa yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso. 
Leviticus4:31 Issifeteththas shiiqiza yarshos shiiqiza meheta moodhe bollara shooqi kessizayssaththo hayssa ha meheza moodheka ubbaa bollara shooqi digo; sawozi GODAA ufayssiza yarsho ooththidi yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessaththo qeesezi he addeza nagara izappe digganaas yarsho shiishsho; izaadeska atto geetettana. 
Leviticus4:32 «He addezi ba nagarappe maarettanaas yarshos dors shiishshana koykko izi bolla aykko borey baynda macca dors shiishsho. 
Leviticus4:33 Izaadeyka dorsay hu7e bolla ba kushe woththo; yarsho yarshizasoppe pudeha baggan xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason shukko. 
Leviticus4:34 Qeesezi qasse dorsay suuththan ba biradhdhe gelththi gelththi kessidi yarsho yarshizasozas oyddu baggara diza dhemota suuththara tiyo; izappe attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizaso garsan gusso. 
Leviticus4:35 Hessafe kaallidi issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza meheta moodhe shooqi ekkizayssa mala ha dorsay moodheka ubbaa shooqi digo; hessaka GODAAS shiiqiza kaththa yarshos shiishshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessaththo qeesezi he addeza nagara izappe digganaas yarsho shiishsho; izaadeska atto geetettana. 
Leviticus5:1 «Issaadey ba be7ida miishshe markkattana mala pirda pirdizaso xeygettidi ba be7idayssa woykko ba erizayssa markkattontta ixxiko hessi izas nagara gidana; hessa gishshas izaadey oyshettana. 
Leviticus5:2 «Ay asikka erontta dishe wogan digettida do7ata bawuta, meheta bawuta woykko tiran biittara gooshettiza medheteththata bawuta bochchidaadey tunees; hessika izaades nagara gidees." 
Leviticus5:3 «Ay asikka erontta dishin asappe goggi kezidi tunisiza miish bochchiko izaadey hessa erida gallassafe doommidi izas nagara gidees. 
Leviticus5:4 «Ay asikka iitas gidiin kiyas gidiin yuushshi qoppontta coo mela adina adinettiko izaadey ooththida mooroza zaari akeekida wodeppe doommidi izaades nagara gidana. 
Leviticus5:5 «Ay asikka hayta ha miishshatappe issaan qohi beettiko ba nagara qonccisi paaxanaas bessees. 
Leviticus5:6 Izaadey ba nagaraa gishshas macca dors woykko macca deysh yarshanaas eho; qeeseykka izappe ekkidi izaade nagara wursanaas GODAA sinththan yarsho. 
Leviticus5:7 «Ay asikka ba ooththida nagara gishshas dors woykko deyshe shiishshanaas dandayonttaaz gidikko nam7u haraphpheta woykko haraphphe ciyeta ehidi issiniyo nagara yarshos nam7anththayokka xuugettiza yarshos Xoossa sinth shiishsho. 
Leviticus5:8 Ehidi qeesezas immo; qeesezikka qoho yarshos shiiqiza kafoy qoodhe qanxxontta mirqqidi qoho yarshos shiishsho. 
Leviticus5:9 Suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi yarsho yarshozasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxo; attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizaso garsan wuxxo; hessika nagara wurso yarsho gidana. 
Leviticus5:10 Hankko attida kafoyo diza wogaa mala xuugettiza yarsho histti shiishsho; hessaththo ooththidi qeesezi izaade nagaraa wursanaas yarsho; iita ooththidaades iza nagaray atto geetettana. 
Leviticus5:11 Izaadey nam7u haraphpheta shiishshanaas dandayonttayssa gidikko ba nagaraa gishshas issi kilo liiqo dhiille eho; hessika nagara yarshos gidiza gishshas wogara zaytey woykko exaaney izan gujettofo. 
Leviticus5:12 Izakka ehidi qeesezas immo; qeesezikka he dhiillezappe ba kushen kuphphati ekkidi GODAAS shiiqiza kaththa yarshora issife gaththi hassa7issanaas yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessika nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarsho. 
Leviticus5:13 Ay asikka haytantta mala nagaratappe issaa ooththiko qeesezi hessa mala ooththidi izaadey ooththida nagaraa wursanaas yarsho shiishsho; hessaadeska atto geetettana; hankko attida dhiilley kaththa yarshoy qeesezas attiza mala izas gido.» 
Leviticus5:14 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus5:15 «Ay asikka GODAAS immanaas bessizayssa erontta aggidi immontta aggiko izas nagara gidida gishshas issi wosoy iza bolla baynda dharsho qohos gidiza yarsho GODAAS shiishsho; iza waaga heregaykka kase Xoossa Keeththan erettida herega mala gido; hessika qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarsho.
