Leviticus5:16 GODAAS immanaas bessishin izaadey immontta aggidayssa ciggo; hessafekka bollara hayssa ha heregaas ichchashaappe issi kushe gujjidi qeesezikka izi ehida dharshaara gaaggidi nagara yarsho ooththidi ehidaade nagara wursana; he mooro ooththidayssi atto geetettana. 
Leviticus5:17 «Ay asikka erontta dishe GODAY ooththofte gida azazotappe issiniyo moorikko izaades nagara; he nagaraa gishshas izaadey oyshettana. 
Leviticus5:18 Izaadeyka ba moorida mooroza gishshas ba meheta giddofe iza bolla issi wosoy baynda dharsho qeesezakko eho; izi ehidayssa wogay kase qoho yarshos ciggiza waaga kessizaaz gido; qeesezikka hessaththo asi erontta ooththida mooroza geeshsho; izaadeyka maarettana. 
Leviticus5:19 Hessika qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarsho; izaadeyka GODAA sinththan mooro ooththida gishshas nagaranchcha.» 
Leviticus6:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus6:2 «Oonikka asi izas hadara woykko tal7e immida miish kaddidi ba lagge baleththon nagara ooththidi hessan GODAA mishisikko woykko asa miishshe bonqqi ekkiko woykko baleththiko," 
Leviticus6:3 woykko asappe wodhdhi dhayda miishshe demmi ekkidi ta beyabeekke gi wordora caaqqiko asi ooththiza ha moorota ubbaafe issineyn qohikko," 
Leviticus6:4 ay asikka hayssa mala nagara ooththiko izi kayson ekkidayssa izas hadara imettidayssa woykko dhayiin demmi ekkidayssa zaaro. 
Leviticus6:5 Wordora caaqqi ekkidayssa ubbaa qoho yarsho shiishshiza wode kase ba ekkoyssa bolla ichchashaappe issi kushe gujjidi zaaro. 
Leviticus6:6 Ba qohidayssas eda gidana mala iza bolla issi wosoy baynda dharsho GODAAS yarshana mala qeesekko eho; iza wogaykka kase qoho yarshos cigettiza waaga kessizaaz gido. 
Leviticus6:7 Qeesezikka he addeza nagara diggana mala GODAA sinththan yarsho; izaadeska atto geetettana.» 
Leviticus6:8 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus6:9 «Neni Aaroonessinne iza naytas istti naagana mala ne isttas immana azazoy hayssafe kaallizayssa; xuugettiza yarshoy pacey baynda gadey wonttana gakkanaas yarshizasoza bolla ubba wode tamay eexxishe aqo. 
Leviticus6:10 Qeesezi laynoppe dadettida qamisanne sure may7idi xuugettiza yarshoza tamay midayssafe guye attida bidinththaa heeppe yarsho yarshizasozappe mille baggara qolo. 
Leviticus6:11 Hessafe guye ba may7ida may7o laammidi bidinththaza tookki ekkidi asi dizasoppe gede kare kessidi maarara lo7oson qolo. 
Leviticus6:12 Yarshizaso bolla diza tamay to7ontta ubba wode eexxishe do; aydekka to7oppo; qeesezikka wontta wontta taman mith gujjo; iza bolla xuugettiza yarsho ubba wode giigsi woththidi issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza handa xuuggo. 
Leviticus6:13 Yarsho yarshizasoza bolla diza tamay ubba wode to7ontta eexxanaas bessees. 
Leviticus6:14 «Kaththa yarsho shiisho gishshas woththida wogati hayssafe kaallizayta; Aaroone baggafe gidida qeesezi kaththa yarsho yarshizaso sinththa baggara Xoossas yarsho. 
Leviticus6:15 Kaaleththidi zaytera diza liiqo dhiille kuphphati ekkidinne kaththa yarsho bolla diza exaaneza ubbaa denththidi GODAAS shiishshidayssa erisana mala yarsho shiishshizaso bolla xuuggo; hessa sawoykka GODAA ufayssiza yarsho gidana. 
Leviticus6:16 Hessafe attidayssa qeeseti metto; izankka irshoy gelontta dishin uukkidi GODAY woosettiza geeshsha dunkaanaasi sinththa baggara diza dembaa bolla metto. 
Leviticus6:17 Hessika izan irshoy gelontta uukettanaas bessees; tani GODAY taman xuugettiza kaththa yarshofe hayssa istta gisha histta immadis; hessika nagara gishshassinne qoho gishshas shiishshiza yarsho mala wurikka keehi dummatidaaza. 
Leviticus6:18 Wode wodenaas Aaroone zereththaafe attuma gidi yelettiday wuri GODAAS shiiqiza yarshofe shaakettidi dumma izas gisha imettidayssi hessi izas gisha gidida gishshas izi ba gisha maanaas dandayees; oonikka hessa he yarshoza bochchidaadey GODAAS dummatidaade gidana bessees.» 
Leviticus6:19 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus6:20 «Aarooney woykko iza zereththati qeeseteththan shuumettiza gallas istti Xoossas shiishshana kaththa yarshoy ubba wode issi kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille kaththa yarsho ooththidi GODAAS shiishshetto; hessafe baggaa maalado, baggaa omars yarshetto." 
Leviticus6:21 Zayten lo7eththi munuqettidi bashen uuketto. Hessafe guye kaththa yarshoza basereththidi sawozi GODAA ufayssiza sawo gidana mala Xoossas shiiqo. 
Leviticus6:22 Hayssafe yaana layththatan qeese gididi ooththiza Aaroone zereththi wurikka hayssa ha wogaa polo; hayssi Xoossas shiiqiza yarsho gididi mulera xuugetto. 
Leviticus6:23 Qeesezi shiishshiza kaththa yarshozi kumeth xuugetto attiin asi izappe mooppo.» 
Leviticus6:24 GODAY Muse hizgi azazides," 
Leviticus6:25 «Aaroonessinne iza naytas ne hizga yoota, ‹Nagara gishshas yarshettiza yarsho wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa, Xuugettiza yarsho mehey shukettizason nagara gishshas yarshettiza yarsho meheykka heen GODAA sinththan shuketto; hessika keehi dumma yarsho." 
Leviticus6:26 He yarshozakka shiishshiza qeesezi dummatidason Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezi diza gibbeza giddon diza dembaan ashoza mo. 
Leviticus6:27 As gidiin hara ay miishshika he ashoza bochchiko dummatana; he meheza suuththi iza bolla pinxida ay may7oyka Xoossas dummatidason meecetto. 
Leviticus6:28 He ashoy izan doysettida mana miishshi meqqo; ashoy xarqimala biratan doysettiko he xarqimala biratazi qiicettidi haaththan meecetto. 
Leviticus6:29 Qeeseta zereththafe gidida attuma naa ubbay hessa he yarshozappe mo; hessika keehi dumma yarsho. 
Leviticus6:30 Gido attiin nagara geeshos oosettiza wogan suuththay Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddo gelidaa gidikko he meheza ashozi taman xuugetto attiin meetettofo. 
Leviticus7:1 « ‹Keehi dumma gidida gishshas qoho gaason shiiqiza yarsho wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa," 
Leviticus7:2 qoho Yarshos shiiqida mehey xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason heen shuketto; suuththaaka yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxetto. 
Leviticus7:3 Moodhe ubbaa shiishsho; hessika goyna handa, qanththa asho goozi oykkida moodhey," 
Leviticus7:4 kilahota, istta kammi oykkida moodhetanne hessaththoka tire kammi oykkida moodheta issi bolla yarshetto." 
Leviticus7:5 Yarsho yarshizason diza moodhe ubbaa qeesezi Xoossas taman xuuggi yarsho; hessika qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarsho. 
Leviticus7:6 Qeeseta zereth gidida attuma asi ubbay he yarshoza asho mo; gido attiin he yarshozi dumma gidida gishshas izas dumma giigettidaason mo. 
Leviticus7:7 « ‹Nagara wursanaas shiiqiza yarshossinne qohos shiiqiza yarsho giddon nam7ataska ooththiza issi wogay dees; hessika he shukettiza meheza ashoy yarshoza shiishshiza qeesezas maana mala izas imettees. 
Leviticus7:8 Xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheza galbay shooqettidi yarshoza yarshida qeesezas imettees. 
Leviticus7:9 Tama coocen kompettida kaththa yarshoy wuri woykko doyssiza miishshan doysettidaazinne bashen uukettida kaththa yarsho ubbay yarsho shiishshiza qeesezas imetto. 
Leviticus7:10 Zayten munuqettidaaz gidikko woykko coo munuqettontta kaththa yarsho ubbay Aaroone zereththatappe gidida qeesetas ubbaas imetto; isttika iza ba garsan issi gina gishetti ekketto. 
Leviticus7:11 « ‹Asi GODAAS shiishshiza issifeteththa yarsho wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Leviticus7:12 issi asi GODAAS galata yarsho shiishshana koykko ba ehiza galata yarshozara irshoy izan gelontta zayten munuqetti uukettida uketh, irshoy izan gelontta lee7en uukettidi zayten tiyettida uketh, liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida uketh yarsho." 
Leviticus7:13 Galatas shiiqiza issifeteththa yarshozara gaththi imotas gidana mala irshon munuqetti uukettida uketh shiishsho. 
Leviticus7:14 Uukettida dumma dumma qommo ukeththatappe issi issi uketh GODAAS dumma yarsho histti shiishsho; he issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza suuththaa ekkidi yarsho shiishshizasoza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxiza qeesezas gisha gido. 
Leviticus7:15 Galatas shiiqiza issifeteththa yarshozas shiiqiza ashoy he yarshettiza gallas meetetto attiin hara gallassas attofo. 
Leviticus7:16 Issi asi shiishshiza yarshoy adina gaso woykko ba dosan coo immiza issifeteththa yarsho gidikko he yarshozi shiiqida gallas meetetto; izappe attida ubbay wonteththa gallas meetetto. 
Leviticus7:17 Hessafekka tirpidi heedzdzanththo gallas gakkanaas attida ashoy taman xuugetto; 
Leviticus7:18 Heedzdzanththo gallas gakkanaas attida ay ashoykka meetettizaa gidikko he yarshoza shiishshidaade yarshozi ekettenna; yarshozi yarshettida mala qoodettenna; he yarshoyka tuna gidi qoodettana; he ashoza midaadey ba nagaran oyshettana. 
Leviticus7:19 « ‹Tuna gididaazara boshettida ashoy taman xuugetto attiin meetettofo; hankko tunontta attida ashoza woga mala bana geeshshateththan naagidaaddey mo. 
Leviticus7:20 Gido attiin geesh gidontta ay asikka Xoossas shiiqiza issifeteththa yarsho ashoza miikko GODAA deraa giddofe shaaketti kichcho. 
Leviticus7:21 Ay asikka geesh gidontta miish woykko medosatanne goggiza tuna miish bochchidi issifeteththas shiiqiza yarsho asho miikko hessaadey GODAA deraa giddofe shaaketti dhayo.› » 
Leviticus7:22 GODAY Muses," 
Leviticus7:23 «Neni Isra7eele asaas, ‹Boora woykko miiza moodhe, dorsa moodhe woykko deysha moodhe moopite." 
Leviticus7:24 Bawuta hayqqida mehe moodhey woykko do7ay wodhida mehe moodhey hara oosos eketto attiin ay asikka iza mooppo. 
Leviticus7:25 Xuugetti GODAAS yarsho shiiqiza mehe moodhe mizaadey oonikka Xoossa deraa giddofe shaaketti dhayo. 
Leviticus7:26 Intte awan diikkoka intte dizason kafo suuth woykko mehe suuth uyopite; 
Leviticus7:27 Suuth uyizaadey oonikka Xoossa dere giddofe shaaketti dhayo› gi yootides» gides. 
Leviticus7:28 GODAY Muses," 
Leviticus7:29 «Neni Isra7eele asaas, ‹Ay asikka issifeteththa yarsho shiishshizaa gidikko izappe baggaa shaakkidi GODAAS dumma yarsho histti eho." 
Leviticus7:30 He izi ehoyssaka GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho histti shiishsho; moodhezakka angasozara GODAA sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza yarsho histti shiishsho. 
Leviticus7:31 Qeesezi qasse moodheza yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; angasozi gidikko qeesetas imetto. 
Leviticus7:32 Intte issifeteththa yarshozappe ushachcha missaa qeesezas gisha histti immite; 
Leviticus7:33 issifeteththa yarshoza suuththaanne moodheza shiishshiza qeesezi ushachcha missaa ba gisha histti ekko. 
Leviticus7:34 Isra7eele asaa issifeteththa yarshofe yaanne haa qaaseththida angasozanne yarshos shiishshida missaa ekkada qeese Aaroonessinne iza attuma naytas immadis; hessika ubba wode Isra7eele asaappe isttas gisha gidana mala immadis› gaada yoota» gides. 
Leviticus7:35 Hayssika GODAY Aaroonenne iza nayta qeese histti shuumida gallas GODAAS shiiqidi xuugettiza yarshofe qeeseta gisha gidana mala shaakkidaaza. 
Leviticus7:36 He gallassika istti tiyettida; GODAY hessa he yarshettizayssafe qeesetas immana mala Isra7eele asaa azazides; hessika guyeppe yaana wode ubbaan Isra7eele naytas istta gisha histti immana mala ooththides. 
Leviticus7:37 Hessa gishshas xuugettiza yarsho gishshassinne kaththa yarsho gishshas, nagarappe maaroteththas shiiqiza yarsho gishshassinne qoho gishshas, eda yarsho gishshas, qeeseteththa gishshas shiiqiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho polanaas woththida wogati haytantta." 
Leviticus7:38 Heytikka bazzon Siina zuma bolla Isra7eele nayti yarsho shiishshana mala azazida wode he gallas GODAY Muses hayta azazota immides. 
Leviticus8:1 GODAY Muses," 
Leviticus8:2 «Aaroonenne iza attuma nayta, qeeseteththa may7ozakka, tiyettiza zayteza, nagara geeshos shiiqiza korma boora, nam7u dharshonne irshoy gelontta uukettida ukeththi izan diza leemateza isttara ekka ya." 
Leviticus8:3 Kumeththa Isra7eele nayta xeygada Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen shiishsha» gides. 
Leviticus8:4 Museykka GODAY izas yootida mala ooththides; dereykka Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen shiiqides. 
Leviticus8:5 Museykka deraas, «Oosettana mala GODAY azazoyssi hayssako!» gides." 
Leviticus8:6 Museykka Aaroonenne iza attuma nayta deraa sinth shiishshidi haaththan meeccides. 
Leviticus8:7 Aaroone qamisaa mala adussa may7o mayzidi, kabborteka iza bolla gophi mayzidi dancco danccisides; hessa bollaka eefude geetettiza may7o mayzidi izakka dumma hiillateththan oosettida qabatton oyseththidi danccides." 
Leviticus8:8 Eefude geetettiza may7ozas tira bolla kiisey sikettidi Urimenne Tumime geetettizayta iza giddon woththides. 
Leviticus8:9 Iza hu7e bollaka goosse xaaxi woththidi he xaaththa goossa bolla sinththa baggara GODAY Muses yootida mala worqqafe oosettida seeloy geeshshateththas malata gidana mala kallachcha iza bolla woththides. 
Leviticus8:10 Hessafe guye Musey tiyettiza zayteza ekkidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezanne izan diza ubbaa tiydi GODAA oosos dummasides. 
Leviticus8:11 Zaytezappe guuththara ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla laappunto wuxxides; qasseka GODAA oosos dummatana mala yarsho yarshizasozanne iza oosos giigettida miishshata kumeththaa bolla hessaththoka izan meecettiza saanezanne saaneza iza bolla woththizayssa bollaka wuxxides. 
Leviticus8:12 Tiyettiza zayteza Aaroone hu7en gussidi GODAA oosos iza dummasides. 
Leviticus8:13 Kaaleththidikka Musey GODAY iza azazida mala Aaroone attuma nayta sinth shiishshidi adussa may7o mayzides; xeessan qabatto danccisidi istta hu7en qoobe woththides. 
Leviticus8:14 Hessafe guye Musey nagara gishshas yarshanaas korma boora ehides; Aarooneynne iza nayti korma booraza bolla ba kushe woththida. 
Leviticus8:15 Museykka booraza shukkides; booraa suuththan ba biradhdhe gelththidi yarsho yarshizasozas oyddu baggan diza dhemota tiydi geeshshides; hessafe attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizasoza garsan gussides; hessa malan yarsho yarshizasoza GODAAS shaakki dummasides. 
Leviticus8:16 Musey shukettida meheza qanththa ashoza bolla diza moodheza ubbaa, tire kammi oykkida moodheza, kilahotanne istta kammi oykkida moodheza ubbaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides." 
Leviticus8:17 Kormaza ashoppe attidayssanne maraceza ekkidi GODAY iza azazida mala asay dizasoppe gede haassidi xuuggides. 
Leviticus8:18 Hessafe guye Musey xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza dorsa dharsho ehiin Aarooneynne iza nayti dharshoza hu7e bolla ba kushe woththida. 
Leviticus8:19 Museykka dharshaa shukkides; suuththaaka yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxides. 
Leviticus8:20 Dharshoza ashaa qommon qommon qanxxidi kessides; hu7eza, qommon qommon qanxxettida ashotanne moodheza xuuggides." 
Leviticus8:21 GODAY iza azazida mala Musey qanththa ashotanne tohota haaththan meeccides; he dharshoza asho ubbaa GODAAS taman xuugetti sawiza yarsho ooththidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides. 
Leviticus8:22 Hessafe kaallidi Musey qeeseteththa sunththas nam7anththo dharshoza ehides; Aarooneynne iza attuma nayti ba kushe dharshaa hu7e bolla woththida. 
Leviticus8:23 Musey dharshaa shukkides; suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi Aaroones ushachcha hayththa xeera, ushachcha manththa biradhdhenne ushachcha toho manththa biradhdhe tiydes." 
Leviticus8:24 Qasseka Aaroone nayta deraa sinth shiishshidi istta ushachcha hayththata xeeranne ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhetanne ushachcha tohota manththa biradhdheta tiydes; hessafe tirpida suuththaa yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxides. 
Leviticus8:25 Handa, goyna, qanththa asho kammi oykkida moodhe ubbaa, tire kammi oykkida moodhe, kilahotakka, kilahota bolla diza moodhezanne ushachcha misseza ekkides." 
Leviticus8:26 Irshoy bochchontta GODAAS dumma ukeththi izan diza leematezappe issi daabbo ekkides; hessaththoka zayten munuqetti uukettida daabboy izan diza leematezappe issi daabbonne lee7e uketh ekkidi moodheza bollanne ushachcha missaa bolla woththides. 
Leviticus8:27 He kaththaa ubbaa ekkidi Aaroone kusheninne iza nayta kushen oyththides; isttika oykkidi yaanne haa qaaseththidi GODAAS yarsho shiishshida. 
Leviticus8:28 Hessafe qasse Musey istta kusheppe ekkidi qeeseteththa yarsho gidana mala shiiqidi xuugettiza yarshofe bollara woththidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla woththidi xuuggides; hessika iza sawoy GODAA ufayssiza kaththa yarsho. 
Leviticus8:29 Musey qasseka angasoza ekkidi yaanne haa qaaseththidi GODAAS shiishshides; Musey ubbaaka GODAY iza azazida mala qeeseteththa sunth summanaas shiishshiza dharshofe Muse gishay hessa. 
Leviticus8:30 Musey tiyettiza zayteppenne yarsho yarshizasozan diza suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi Aaroone bolla, Aaroone nayta bollanne qasseka istta may7o bolla wuxxides; hessa malan Musey isttanne istta may7o ubbaa GODAAS dummasides." 
Leviticus8:31 Musey Aaroonenne iza attuma naytas, «Ashoza Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen doyssite; Aarooneynne iza nayti maana mala GODAY azazidayssa qeeseteththa sunth summiza wode yarsho izara shiishshiza leematen diza ukeththaara heen miite." 
Leviticus8:32 Ashozappe woykko ukeththazappe tirpiko taman xuuggite. 
Leviticus8:33 Intte qeeseteththa sunth summiza wogay polettanaas laappun gallas ekkiza gishshas he laappun gallassay wurana gakkanaas Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengefe kichchofte. 
Leviticus8:34 Inttena nagarappe geeshshanaas hayssa hach nu ooththida wogaa polana mala Xoossay nuna azazides. 
Leviticus8:35 Hessa gishshas GODAY azazidayssa polanaas laappun gallas kumeth gallassinne omars Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengefe kichchofte; GODAA wogaakka naagite; histtontta aggiko intte hayqqana; tana GODAY azazida wogay hayssa» gides. 
Leviticus8:36 Aarooneynne iza nayti Muse baggara GODAY azazidayssa ubbaa polida. 
Leviticus9:1 Osppunththa gallassan Musey Aaroone, iza attuma naytanne Isra7eele asaa kaaleththiza cimata xeygides;" 
Leviticus9:2 Aaroonekka, «Issi wosoykka istta bolla baynda issi mirgonne issi dharsho ekkada mirgoza nagara gishshas yarshiza yarsho dharshoza xuugettiza yarsho histta GODAAS yarsha." 
Leviticus9:3 Hessafe guye Isra7eele nayta nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarshos deysha orgenne istta bolla aykko wosoy baynda issi layththa mararanne issi layththa dorsa laaqqa xuugettiza yarshos ehana mala yoota. 
Leviticus9:4 Qasseka issi kormanne issi dorsa laaqqa issifeteththa yarshos ehetto; heytantta zayten gindettida kaththa yarshora GODAAS yarsho shiishshetto; hessa ubbaa ooththetto; gaasoykka Xoossi isttas hach qonccana» gides. 
Leviticus9:5 Isttika Musey istta azazidayssa ubbaa Dunkaaneza penge ehida; asay wurikka GODAA sinththan shiiqi eqqides. 
Leviticus9:6 Musey isttas, «GODAA bonchchoy inttes qonccana mala intte ooththanaas GODAY inttena azazida azazoy hayssa» gides." 
Leviticus9:7 Qasseka Musey Aaroones, «Gede yarshoy yarshettizaso shiiqada ne nagaranne dereza nagara wursanaas shiiqiza yarshonne xuugettiza yarsho yarsha; hessa ubbaa GODAY dereza nagara wursana mala izi nena azazida mala shiishsha» gides." 
Leviticus9:8 Aarooneykka yarsho yarshizaso biidi koyro ba nagaraa gishshas shiiqiza yarshos shiiqiza mirgoza shukkides. 
Leviticus9:9 Iza nayti suuththaa izas ehida; izikka suuththaan ba biradhdhe gelththi kessidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla diza dhemota suuth tiydes; attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizaso garsan gussides. 
Leviticus9:10 Hessafe kaaleththidi moodheza, kilahotanne tire kammi oykkida moodheta ekkidi GODAY Muse azazida mala yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides." 
Leviticus9:11 Ashozanne galbaza qasse asay dizasoppe gede haraso haassidi xuuggides. 
Leviticus9:12 Hessafe guye Aarooney xuugettiza yarshos shukkides; histtiin iza nayti suuththaa izas ehida; izikka suuththaza ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxides. 
Leviticus9:13 Iza nayti xuugettiza yarshos shukettida ashoza qommon qommon hu7ezara gaththi izas ehi immida; izikka hessa ubbaa yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides. 
Leviticus9:14 Hessafe qasseka qanththa ashozanne guye tohota haaththan meeccidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuugettiza yarshozara issife gaththi xuugettizason xuuggides. 
Leviticus9:15 Hessafe kaaleththidi Aarooney dereza nagaraa gishshas shukettiza deysha orge ekki shukkidi ba nagara gishshas yarshidayssaththo yarshides. 
Leviticus9:16 Xuugettiza yarshoza ehidi kase diza wogaa mala yarshides. 
Leviticus9:17 Kaththa yarshozakka shiishshides; dhiillezappe kuphpha kumeth ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides; hessika xuugettiza yarshos maalado maalado shiiqiza yarshoza bolla gujettidi shiiqides. 
Leviticus9:18 Korma booraanne dharshoza shukkidi dereza gishshas issifeteththa yarsho shiishshides; iza naytikka suuththaa izas ehida; izikka suuththaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxides. 
Leviticus9:19 Aarooneykka korma booraa moodheza, dharshaa moodheza, ubbaaka goyna tolthoza, qanththa asho kammi oykkida moodhezanne tire kammi oykkida moodheza doorettidayssa tiretanne istta bolla diza moodheza ekkidi," 
Leviticus9:20 he meheta angaso xeera bolla woththida; Aarooney moodheza ubbaaka yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggides. 
Leviticus9:21 Angasotanne ushachcha geda ashota Musey azazida mala yaanne haa qaaseththidi GODAAS dumma yarsho histti shiishshides. 
Leviticus9:22 Aarooney nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarsho, xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa gishshas shiiqiza yarsho yarshidaappe guye ba kushe dhoqqu histtidi deraa anjjidi wodhdhides." 
Leviticus9:23 Museynne Aarooney Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddo gelida; heeppe kezishe dereza anjjida; GODAA bonchchoy asa ubbaas qonccides. 
Leviticus9:24 Asay qoppontta dishin GODAA achchafe kiitettida tamay yiidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla diza yarshos shiiqida handaza ubbaa mides; derezikka wuri hessa be7idi ilili gidessinne wurikka hokki goynnides. 
Leviticus10:1 Nadaabeynne Abihu geetettiza Aaroone naa nam7ati issoy issoy baas baas exaane cuwasiza xinna ekkidi bonqo tama izan gujjida; qasseka exaanekka izan gujjidi GODAAS shiishshida; he istti ekkida tamay GODAAS dummatida tama gidontta gishshas istti hessa mala tama shiishshana mala GODAY istta azazibeenna. 
Leviticus10:2 Istti qoppontta Xoossa achchafe yida tamay istta mida gishshas istti GODAA sinththan hayqqida. 
Leviticus10:3 Musey qasse Aaroones, «GODAY, ‹Ta sinththe shiiqidi taas ooththizaytas tani ta geeshshateththaa qonccisana; tanikka ta dereza achchan bonchchettidaade gidana› giidi izi asaa kase qofsidayssi hayssa» gides. Aarooneykka ay zaarokka immontta co7u gides." 
Leviticus10:4 Museykka Aaroones aawaa isha Uzi7eele nayta Misha7eelenne Elxafaane xeygidi, «Haa yiite! Hayssa intte ishata ahaa geeshsha Dunkaaneppe denththidi asi dizasoppe gede haraso efte» gides." 
Leviticus10:5 Isttika qeeseteththa may7oza hayqqidayta aha bollafe kessontta dishe biidi Musey azazida mala asata ahaa asay dizasoppe gede haraso efida. 
Leviticus10:6 Hessafe kaallidi Musey Aaroones, iza naa El7ezeeressinne Itamaares, «Intte hayqqontta malanne GODAA hanqoy deraa bolla yontta mala hayqqidaytas mishettidi intte hu7e buucofte; intte may7oka daakkofte; gido attiin hankko Isra7eele nayti GODAA achchafe yida taman hayqqidaytas yeekkana dandayeettes." 
Leviticus10:7 Intte GODAY azaziin tiyettiza tiyo zayten tiyettida gishshas intte hayqqontta mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengefe kare kezopite» gides. Isttika Musey azazida mala hanida. 
Leviticus10:8 GODAY Aaroones hizgides," 
Leviticus10:9 «Neninne ne nayti woyneppe oosettida ushshu woykko hara maththosiza ushshu uyidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan intte gelontta mala naagettite; histtontta aggiko intte hayqqana; hayssi ha wogazi inttefekka guyen yaana yeleta ubbaa matankka mernaas naagettanaas bessees. 
Leviticus10:10 Intte dummatidaytanne dummatonttayta, geeshshinne tuna gididayta giddon diza dummateththaa shaakki eranaas bessees." 
Leviticus10:11 Ta inttes Muse baggara immida woga ubbaa Isra7eele nayta tamaarsite.» 
Leviticus10:12 Museykka Aaroonenne attida iza naa nam7ata El7ezeerenne Itamaares, «GODAAS taman xuugetti shiiqida kaththaafe ekkidi irshoy bochchontta uketh uukkite; izikka keehi dummatida yarsho gidida gishshas yarsho yarshizasoza achchan miite." 
Leviticus10:13 GODAAS taman xuugetti shiiqiza kaththa yarshofe shaakettidi inttessinne intte naytas imettida gisha gidida gishshas intte iza GODAAS dummatidason miite; intte hessaththo histtana mala Xoossi tana azazides. 
Leviticus10:14 Gido attiin yaanne haa qaaseththon dumma yarsho gididi GODAAS shiiqidaappe guye qeeseta gisha gidana mala geetettida gishshas angasozanne misseza neninne ne keeththan diza ne macca nayti maandeta; hessa he wogaakka GODAAS dummatidason maandeta; hessika Isra7eele asay issifeteththaa gishshas shiishshiza yarsho ubbaafe shaaketti neessinne ne naytas imettides. 
Leviticus10:15 Shiiqida missezanne angasoza GODAA sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza yarshoza mala qaaseththanaas ehetto; hessika GODAY azazida mala mernaas neessinne ne naytas gisha gido» gides. 
Leviticus10:16 Musey nagara gishshas shiiqida yarshos shiiqida deyshaa oychchi siyidi izi xuugettidayssa erides; hessa gishshas Musey El7ezeere bollanne Itamaare bolla hanqettidi," 
Leviticus10:17 «Intte nagaraa gishshas shiiqida yarshoza Xoossas dummatidason aazas mibeekketii? Yarshozi GODAAS keehi dumma; izi derezappe nagaranne qoho wursana mala GODAY hessa inttes immidaaza. 
Leviticus10:18 Suuththazi gede GODAAS dummatida dunkaanezan gelontta gishshassinne ta inttena azazida mala intte he dummatidason shiiqida yarshoza intte maanaas bessees» gides. 
Leviticus10:19 Aarooneykka Muses, «Nagara gishshas shiiqiza xuugettiza yarsho hekko hach asay Xoossa sinth ekki yides; tanakka hayssa mala metoy gakkides; histtiin hach nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarshoza ta midaakko GODAY ufayettanashin attidee?» gides;" 
Leviticus10:20 Museykka hessa siyidi izi zaarida qaalan ufayettides. 
Leviticus11:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Leviticus11:2 «Hayssa Isra7eele naytas yootite, ‹Biitta bolla diza do7atappenne mehetappe intte maanayti hayssafe kaalli dizayta," 
Leviticus11:3 Toho qinccifilley phalqeththatanne banchikizayta miite. 
Leviticus11:4 « ‹Gido attiin banchikizayta gidi uttidi qinccifilley phalqettonttayta woykko banchikonttayta gidi uttidi qinccifilley phalqettidayta moopite; gaamellay banchikees shin qinccifilley phalqettontta gishshas izi inttes tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:5 Guppaley banchikees shin qinccifilley phalqettontta gishshas izi inttes tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:6 Harbaynoy banchikeessishin qinccifilley phalqettontta gishshas izi inttes tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:7 Guddunththika moopite; iza qinccifilley phalqeth gidikkoka izi banchikontta gishshas inttes tuna gidi qoodetto. 
Leviticus11:8 Heytantti tuna gidida gishshas istta asho moopite; haray attoshin istta ahakka bochchofte. 
Leviticus11:9 « ‹Abba giddoninne shaafa haaththata giddon diza medheteththata abba giddofe qefeynne poqo mala galbay diza ubbaa miite. 
Leviticus11:10 Abba giddoninne shaafa haaththa giddon diza medheteththatappenne shemppora paxa diza hara medheteththata ubbaa giddofe qefeynne poqettiza galbay baynda ubbay inttes tuna gidida gishshas moopite. 
Leviticus11:11 Heytantti tuna gidida gishshas istta asho moopite; haray attoshin istta ahakka bochchofte. 
Leviticus11:12 Hessa gishshas haaththa giddon diza qefeynne poqettiza galbay istta bolla baynda medheteththati wurikka intte achchan ixettidayta gidetto. 
Leviticus11:13 « ‹Kafotappe hayssafe kaallizayti tuna gidida gishshas moopite. Heytanttika golle, qoollo, wole" 
Leviticus11:14 Xilo, dumma dumma qommo phircota." 
Leviticus11:15 Dumma dumma quurota 
Leviticus11:16 Yanchcha, cancce gutto, haaththa kafo, gace zare ubbaa," 
Leviticus11:17 Gutto, biya, yindare" 
Leviticus11:18 woyno, haaththa kafo, ankko," 
Leviticus11:19 zigile, saabissa geetettiza haaththa kafo zare ubbaa, jinjilaate geetettiza kafonne wurkawurkko." 
Leviticus11:20 « ‹Qefey dishin oyddu tohora qaaxxiza medheteththati wurikka tunata; 
Leviticus11:21 Heytantta giddofe guppanaas maaddiza geday diza medheteththata miite; 
Leviticus11:22 Heytikka boole zareta, xingota zaretanne gumbaro zare ubbaa." 
Leviticus11:23 Hinko qefey dishin oyddu tohora hemettiza medheteththata intte tuna mala qoodite. 
Leviticus11:24 « ‹Hayssafe kaalli dizayta bochchidaadey wuri omars gakkanaas tuna gidana. 
Leviticus11:25 « ‹Heytantta aha denththidaadey wurikka ba may7o haaththan meecco; meeccikokka omars gakkanaas izaadey tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:26 « ‹Qinccifilley isttas dishin phalqettonttaytinne banchikontta mehey wurikka inttes tuna gidana; heytantta bochchidaadey wurikka tunees. 
Leviticus11:27 Oyddu tohora dizaytappe qinccifilley baynda kanten hemettizayti wurikka intte achchan tunata gidetto; istta ahaa bochchidaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gido; 
Leviticus11:28 Heytantta aha denththidaadey wurikka ba may7o haaththan meecco; meeccikokka omars gakkanaas izaadey tuna gido; isttika intte achchan tuna. 
Leviticus11:29 « ‹Biittara gooshettizayta giddofe hayssafe kaallizayti inttes tuna gidetto; giroy, ecerey, zarey, korchchey, haylashoy, geeggey, wakkalaynne, shaaqanchchay inttes tuna gidetto." 
Leviticus11:30  
Leviticus11:31 Biittara gooshettiza ubbatappe tuna gididayti haytantta; istta gidiin woykko istta aha bochchizaadey wuri omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:32 Istta ahay iza bolla wodhdhida miishshi wurikka tunees; hessika miththafe oosettida miishshati, may7oti, galba, karaxiite, ogoronne heytantta misatiza haratakka gujjees; istta aha bochchida miishshi wurikka haaththan gelidi gam7o; omars gakkanaas tuna gididi hessafe guye geesh gido." 
Leviticus11:33 Heytantta ahay mana miishshaa giddon gelikko he miishshaa giddon diza miishshi wurikka tuniza gishshas he mana miishshaza wodhite. 
Leviticus11:34 He mana miishshaafe haaththi iza bolla xokettida kaththi wurikka tuna gidees; izan diza uyettiza miishshika tuna gidees. 
Leviticus11:35 Ay ahaykka bochchida miishshi wurikka tuna gidida gishshas iza ixxite; mani medhdhida cooce gidiin otoy meqqo. 
Leviticus11:36 Heytantta ahay hara ubbaa tunisizaaz gidikkoka pultto haaththenne haaththi diza olla tunisenna. 
Leviticus11:37 Zereththas uttida kaththa bolla wodhdhiko zereththay tunenna. 
Leviticus11:38 Gidikkoka zereththa bolla haaththi gukki simmiin ahay bochchiko he zereththay hessafe guye tuna gidees. 
Leviticus11:39 « ‹Meetettiza mehe garsafe awaysikka hayqqiin he hayqeththaa bochchidaadey omars gakkanaas tuna. 
Leviticus11:40 Ay asikka he hayqeththaafe miikko ba may7o meecco; omars gakkanaas tuna gido; ay asikka he hayqeththa ahaa tookkiko ba may7o meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas izaadey tuna gido. 
Leviticus11:41 « ‹Biittara gooshettiza ay medheteththati wurikka intte achchan meetettonttaazinne ixettidaaz gidetto. 
Leviticus11:42 Tiran gooshettiza, oyddu tohora bizayta, woykko daro tohoy dizayta ubbaaka moopite; istti intte matankka ixettidayta gidetto." 
Leviticus11:43 Heytanttafe awayssaka miidi inttena tunisopite. 
Leviticus11:44 Tani GODAA intte Xoossaa; tani harappe dumma gidida gishshas intteka dumma gidite; ba tiran gooshettizayta miidi intterkka inttena tunisopite. 
Leviticus11:45 Inttes GODAA gidanaas Gibxeppe inttena kaaleththa kessiday intte Xoossay tana; hessa gishshas tani dumma gidida mala intteka dumma gidite. 
Leviticus11:46 « ‹Meheta, do7ata, kafota, haaththa giddoninne biitta bolla tiran gooshettiza medheteththata ubbaa gishshas imettida wogay hayssa;" 
Leviticus11:47 Wodhdhida wogaa mala geeshshatanne geesh gidonttayta giddon diza dummateth shaakki eranaas hessika meetettizaytanne meetettonttayta giddon diza dummateththaa shaakki eranaas intte lo7eththi naagettite.› » 
Leviticus12:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus12:2 «Isra7eele asaas, ‹Maccassi shaarada attuma naa yelikko kase maccassa wogay izi bolla beettida wode hanizayssaththo laappun gallas gakkanaas iza tuna gidawus." 
Leviticus12:3 Yelettida naazi osppunththa gallas qaxxarettanaas bessees. 
Leviticus12:4 Hessafe guye gacino suuththay izippe eqqana gakkanaassinne iza yeloosofe 33 gallas gakkanaas Xoossas dummatida ay miishshika bochchanaas bessenna; hessika iza geeyza wodey wurontta dishin Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddo geluppu. 
Leviticus12:5 « ‹Hessaththoka issi maccassi macca naa yelikko kase bolla qitay izi bolla beettida wode hanizayssatho 14 gallas gakkanaas tuna gidawus; hessafe guye suuththay izippe simmiin iza yeloosofe 66 gallas gakkanaas gam7u. 
Leviticus12:6 « ‹Iza geeyza gallassati wuriza wode attuma naa gishshas gidiin woykko macca naa gishshas xuugettiza yarshos issi layththa laaqqanne nagarappe geeyanaas shiiqiza yarshos haraphphe woykko haraphphe ciye Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge ehada heen ooththiza qeeses immu. 
Leviticus12:7 Qeesezikka iza immizayssa izippe ekkidi GODAAS yarsho shiishsho; maccassayakka iza yelishin izippe gukkida suuththaafe geeyawus; hayssi attuma naa woykko macca naa yeliza maccassas wodhdhida woga. 
Leviticus12:8 Yelida maccassaya dorsa laaqqa ehanaas dandayonttaaro gidikko nam7u haraphpheta woykko nam7u waanoseta ehu; nam7atappe issoy xuugettiza yarshos, hankkoyssi nagara geeshos yarsho shiiqo; qeesezikka izo nagarappe geeshsho; hessafe guye iza geesh gidana› gees.»" 
Leviticus13:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Leviticus13:2 «Ay asikka izaade bolla kixay woykko shimpey woykko illiway izaade bolla beettidi qaachcha harge mala kaseppe gede dari dari biikko izaade gede qeese Aaroonekko woykko qeese gidida iza naytappe issaakko efetto. 
Leviticus13:3 Qeesezikka he madunththaa lo7eththi xeello; he madunththaa heeran diza iskey booxxizaaz gidikkonne madunththazi duge ollati beettiko hessi daro iita hara asa bolla aadhdhiza galba harge; qeesezi kase wogaa mala izaadey tuna gididayssa asaas eriso. 
Leviticus13:4 Gido attiin madunththazi booxxidi duge ollatontta aggikonne iza heeran diza iskezikka booxxontta aggiko qeesezi hessaade laappun gallas gakkanaas soon kare ba bolla gordi barkka gam7ana mala ooththo. 
Leviticus13:5 Laappunththo gallas qeesezi iza qasseka paacci xeello; izi iza paaccishin madunththay kaseppe aykkoka dummateth bessontta aggiko ha7ikka hara laappun gallas izi ba keeththan kare ba bolla gordi uttana mala ooththo. 
Leviticus13:6 Laappun gallassafe guye qeesezi iza qasseka paacci xeello; izi paacci xeellishin madunththay gede dich aggidi kaseppe guuxxi beettiko he madunththay deexo gidonttayssa izas yootidi wogaan dizayssa mala izi geesh gididayssa iza eriso; izaadeyka wogay giza mala geeyanaas ba may7oza haaththan meecco. 
Leviticus13:7 Hessika qeesezi izi geesh gididayssa paaccidi izaades erisidaappe guye qasseka madunththay kaseppe aakki aakki biikko hessaadey qasseka qeesezakko shiiqo. 
Leviticus13:8 Qeesezi qasseka paacco; madunththay kaseppe aakkiko iita galba harge gidida gishshas wogan diza mala izaadey iita galba harganchcha gididayssa eriso. 
Leviticus13:9 «Oonikka izaade ashoza galba bolla keziza hargey oykkiko hessaade qeesekko ehetto. 
Leviticus13:10 Qeesezikka he izaade bollay uzazizaakko lo7eththi xeellidi izaade asateththa bolla diza isketa booththiza kixa gidikko kixazi uzazidinne he uzassay dizason dizaa gidikko," 
Leviticus13:11 hessi iita bolla galba harge gidiza gishshas qeesey he harganchchazi tuna gididayssa izas yooto; izi tunidayssi erettida gishshas hessa mala asi karey gordettiin keeththan gam7anaas bessenna. 
Leviticus13:12 He galba hargezi izaade bolla toho xugunththafe biidi hu7e iske gakkanaas ubbaa gakkiko," 
Leviticus13:13 qeesezi qasseka paacci xeellidi hargezi izaades kumeththa asateththaa gakki may7idaa gidikko qeesezi hessaade woga mala geesh gididayssa eriso; gaasoykka iza bollay kumeth laamettidi booth gidida gishshas izaadey geeshsha. 
Leviticus13:14 Gido attiin madunththay zaari uzazidi zo7o asho giddofe bessiko hessaadey tuna gidees. 
Leviticus13:15 Qeesey qasseka zaari paacci xeellishin madunththay uzazishin zo7o asho beykko izaadey tuna; izi tuna gididayssa izas eriso; gaasoykka hargezi hara asa bolla aadhdhiza harge gidida gishshas hessaadey tuna. 
Leviticus13:16 Madunththay paxidi boottizaaz gidikko hessaadey qasseka qeesekko bo. 
Leviticus13:17 Qeeseykka paacci xeellidi madunththay booxxi bessiko qeeseykka hessaadey geesh gididayssa izas yooto; izaadeyka geesh gidana. 
Leviticus13:18 «Issaadey kase kixay iza bolla kezidi paxikko," 
Leviticus13:19 qasse gam7ishe kase madunththay dizason booththa kixay woykko zo7o illiway keziko izaadey qeesekko bo. 
Leviticus13:20 Qeesezi lo7eththi xeellidi madunththay duge asho giddo geli beettiko iza heeran diza iskey booxxi bessiko hessaadey tuna gididayssa iza eriso; gaasoykka hessi kixa oykkidayssi ba baggara iita galba harge. 
Leviticus13:21 Gidikkoka qeesezi paacci xeelliin galba bolla diza iskey boottontta aggikonne hankko asateththaa galbaafe ollati bessonttaaz gidikko qalame dummateththa gishshas qeesey hessaadey laappun gallas gakkanaas karey gordettiin keeththan gam7ana mala ooththo. 
Leviticus13:22 Madunththay dizasoy kaseppe aakki aakki biikko hessaadey asa bolla aadhdhiza iita hargen oykettida gishshas izi tuna gididayssa izas qeesezi yooto. 
Leviticus13:23 Gido attiin illiwazi kaseppe aakki aakki bontta aggidi kase ba dizason diikko kase kixay paxidaso attiin harge deenna; qeesezi izi geesh gididayssa eriso. 
Leviticus13:24 Kase iza tamay midaadey diikko he izi taman meetettidasoy booththa illiwa woykko zo7anaadan hani bessiko," 
Leviticus13:25 Qeesezi iza paacci xeello; he illiway dizason mokkida iskey booth gidikkonne hankko iza achchan diza galbaafe duge ashon gelikko hessi taman xuugeteththa gaason asappe asan aadhdhiza iita galba harge; hessa gishshas qeesey hessaadey tunidayssa izas eriso. 
Leviticus13:26 Iza bolla mokkida iskezi booththa isken laamettontta aggikonne madunththazi duge ashon gelontta aggidi shoolloti shoolloti biikko qeesezi lo7eththi be7idi laappun gallas gakkanaas kare iza bolla gordi woththo. 
Leviticus13:27 Qasseka laappunththa gallas paacci xeello; izi kaseppe aakki aakki biikko hessi iita galba harge; hessa gishshas hessaadey tuna gididayssa qeesezi iza eriso. 
Leviticus13:28 Madunththay dizasoy qasse kaseppe aykkoka aakkontta aggikonne paxi paxi biikko izi tamay midaso attiin hara gidenna; hessa gishshas hessaadey wogaa mala geesh gididayssa qeesey iza eriso. 
Leviticus13:29 «Adde gidiin maccas gidiin hu7e bolla woykko shagala bolla madunththi diikko," 
Leviticus13:30 qeesezi he madunththaa paacci xeellishin madunththay duge ashon gelikko iza bolla diza iskey galal7o mala gididi lee7i bessiko hessi hu7e woykko buuchcha qaacisi goo7issiza daro iita galba harge gidida gishshas hessaadey tuna gididayssa qeesezi iza eriso. 
Leviticus13:31 Qasseka qeesey paacci xeellishin madunththay hankko iza achchan diza galbaafe duge ollati bessontta aggiko, iza bolla diza iskey lo7o gidontta aggiko hessaade laappun gallas gakkanaas kare gordidi keeththan woththo." 
Leviticus13:32 Laappunththo gallas qasseka qeesezi izaade paacci xeello; kaseppe aakki aakki bontta aggiko qooruma misatiza iskeyka baynda aggikonne madunththazi duge ashon gelontta aggiko," 
Leviticus13:33 Hessaadey madunththaa yuuyi aadhdhi diza iskeza ubbaa meedetto; qeeseykka iza qasseka laappun gallas gakkanaas karey iza bolla gordettiin gam7ana mala ooththo. 
Leviticus13:34 Laappunththo gallas qeesezi qasseka he madunththaa paacci xeello; madunththay kaseppe aakki aakki bontta aggikonne asho mi ollasontta aggiko hessaadey diza wogaa mala gididayssa iza eriso; izaadeyka ba may7o meeccidi geesh gido. 
Leviticus13:35 Gido attiin izi geesh gididayssa qonccisidaappe guye madunththay kaseppe aakki aakki biikko," 
Leviticus13:36 qeesezi qasseka paacci xeello; madunththay addaka kaseppe aakkidaa gidikko iskey qoorumikko woykko qoorumontta aggikokka izaadey tuna. 
Leviticus13:37 Gido attiin qeesezi beyishin madunththay kaseppe aakki aakki bontta aggikonne lo7o iskey mokkiko madunththay paxidayssanne izaadey geeyidayssa qeesezi iza eriso. 
Leviticus13:38 «Maccas gidiin woykko adde gidiin issaade bolla illiway kezikko," 
Leviticus13:39 qeesezi he illiway dizaadeza paacci xeello; illiway dizasoy coo mela puqqa booth gidontta aggiko iza daro qohontta coo mela bollara galba bolla kezida shimpe gidida gishshas hessaadey diza wogaa mala izi geeshsha. 
Leviticus13:40 «Issaades hu7e iskey guye baggara woykko sinththa baggara bo7atikko hessaade bo7ay iza tunisenna. 
Leviticus13:41  
Leviticus13:42 Gido attiin iza bo7aa bolla woykko liiphe bolla zo7i bessiza booththa madunththi beettiko hessi iita hara asa bolla aadhdhiza galba harge. 
Leviticus13:43 Qeesezi hessaade paacci xeellishin hessi hara asa bolla aadhdhiza galba harge misatidi zo7i bessiza booththa madunth gidikko," 
Leviticus13:44 Hessaadey hara asa bolla aadhdhiza iita hargen oykettida gishshas izaadey tuna gididayssa qeesezi izaade eriso. 
Leviticus13:45 Hessa mala hargey iza bolla dizaadey daakeththa may7o may7o; ba hu7ekka pixoppo; ba doona kammidi, ‹Tani tunakko! Tani tunakko!› gishe waasso." 
Leviticus13:46 He hargezi iza bolla diza wode ubbaan izi tuna; hessa gishshas izi asi dizasoppe gede haraso haakkidi barkka de7o. 
Leviticus13:47 «Asa bolla harge gaththiza buuqay dorsa iskefe oosettida may7o bolla woykko ay qommo may7o bollaka harpan dadettida may7o bolla woykko kushen oosettida galba may7o woykko galbafe oosettida may7o bolla beettiko," 
Leviticus13:48  
Leviticus13:49 he hargezas malay maata mala cilili bessiko woykko zo7i bessiko hessi issaafe issaan aadhdhiza harge gidida gishshas qeesezi iza beyo. 
Leviticus13:50 Qeesezi he hargeza lo7eththi xeellidi he may7ota ubbaaka laappun gallas gakkanaas issi keeththan gelththi dumma woththo. 
Leviticus13:51 Laappunththo gallas qasseka paacci xeellishin asa bolla harge gaththiza buuqazi kaseyssafe dari beettiko hessa mala may7ozi tuna. 
Leviticus13:52 Hessa mala may7o buuqay asa bolla harge gaththiza gishshas qeesezi shiishshidi he buuqa may7ota taman xuuggo. 
Leviticus13:53 «Qeesezi zaari paacci xeellishin buuqazi kaseppe ha darontta aggiko may7oza haaththan meeccana mala azazo; he meecettida may7oza laappun gallas gakkanaas shaakki woththo. 
Leviticus13:54  
Leviticus13:55 Hessafe qasseka xeellishin kaseppe buuqay gujettontta aggikonne buuqaza medhay kaseppe laamettontta aggiko ha7ikka izi tuna; kaseyssa bolla giddora, karera buuqazi gujettiko he may7ozi taman xuugetto." 
Leviticus13:56 Gido attiin may7oza meecci simmidaappe qeesezi qasseka zaari be7iza wode buuqazi kaseppe duge guuxxiko buuqazi dizasoyo xalla iita may7ofe gidiin woykko afala gidiin daakki kesso. 
Leviticus13:57 Buuqazi qasseka beettiko hessi gede dari dari biza gishshas he may7ozi xuugetto. 
Leviticus13:58 Ay may7onne galbafe oosettida ay miish meeccishin buuqazi izappe dhaykko qasseka meecco; hessafe guye wogay giza mala may7ozi geesh gidana.» 
Leviticus13:59 Hayssi dorsa iskefe oosettida may7o bolla woykko ay qommo may7o bolla woykko harpan dadettida woykko kushen oosettida may7o bolla, galba woykko galbafe oosettida may7o bolla asa bolla harge gaththiza buuqay beettiko he may7ozi geesh woykko tuna gididayssa erisiza wogay hayssafe bollan dizayssa." 
Leviticus14:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus14:2 «Issaadey asateththa bolla diza iita galba hargefe paxidaappe guye geesho wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa; izi geesh gididayssa izaades yootettiza gallas hessaadey qeesekko baana mala izas yootetto. 
Leviticus14:3 He izas yootettida qeesezi asi dizasoppe gede haraso kessidi baakko yidayssa lo7eththi xeello; izaadey hargezappe paxidaa gidikko," 
Leviticus14:4 qeesezi paxa diza nam7u geeshsha kafotanne ziga mith, zo7o xilata, hisophphe miththa hayth gujji ekki yaana mala azazo." 
Leviticus14:5 Hessafe guye qeesezi kafotappe issaa pultto haaththi izan diza guuqa kere bolla shukettana mala azazo. 
Leviticus14:6 Hankko paxa diza kafoza efidi ziga miththara, zo7o xilataranne hisophphe miththa bonccora issife gaththi kase shukettida kafoza suuththan gelththi kesso." 
Leviticus14:7 Suuththaaka asateththa bolla diza galba hargefe paxizaade bolla laappunto wuxxo; hessafe guye izi geesh gididayssa iza eriso; hankko paxa diza kafozakka gede haraso kessidi demban piradhdhana mala yeddo. 
Leviticus14:8 «Iita galba hargefe paxidaadey ba may7o meecco; ba bolla diza iske ubbaa meedetto; ba bollaka meecetto; wogay giza mala izi geesh gidana; hessafe guye asi dizaso gelanaas dandayees; gido attiin laappun gallas gakkanaas izi ba dunkaanaappe karen de7o. 
Leviticus14:9 Laappunththo gallas qasseka ba hu7e, ba buuchchinne ba deemo, hara awanka ba asateththa bolla diza iske ubbaa meedetto; ba may7o haaththan meecconne ba bollaka meecetto; hessafe guye izi geesh gidana." 
Leviticus14:10 «Osppunththa gallas issi wosoykka istta bolla baynda nam7u dorsa laaqqatanne issi layththa uzzo eho; kaththa yarsho gishshas wogara miththa zayten munuqettida heedzdzu kilo dhiillenne issi litiro zaytes heedzdzanththo kushe wogara miththa zayte eho. 
Leviticus14:11 Qeesezikka addezi izi ehida ubbaara issi bolla Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen GODAA sinth shiishsho. 
Leviticus14:12 «Hessafe guye nam7u qeeri dharshotappe issaa ekkidi issi litiros heedzdzanththo kushe gidiza wogara zaytera issife gaththi ekkidi qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarsho histti shiishsho; qeesezi he yarshozakka yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histti GODAA sinththan qaaseththi shiishsho. 
Leviticus14:13 Laaqqazakka nagara yarshossinne xuugettiza yarshos shukkiza geeshshasohon shukko; gaasoykka qoho gishshas yarshoy nagara wursanaas shiiqiza yarsho mala qeesezas gisha gidana; izikka keehi dumma. 
Leviticus14:14 Qeesezi qoho yarshos shiiqiza suuththafe guuththara ekkidi he geeyzaades ushachcha hayththa xeera izas ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhenne ushachcha toho manththa biradhdhe tiyo. 
Leviticus14:15 Qeesezi wogara miththa zaytezappe guuththara ekkidi ba hadirsa kushe qaa7an tigo. 
Leviticus14:16 Ba ushachcha kushe xeeran guuththara ekkidi Xoossa sinththan laappunto wuxxo. 
Leviticus14:17 Ba kushe qaa7an attida zaytezappe guuththara ekkidi geeyzaades ushachcha hayththa xeera, ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhenne ushachcha toho manththa biradhdhe tiyo." 
Leviticus14:18 Ba kushe qaa7an attida zaytezakka geeyzaade hu7en gusso; qeesey izaade nagara geeshsho. 
Leviticus14:19 «Hessafe guye qeesezi ba tunateththafe geeyzaade nagara wursanaas shiiqida mehe shukko. 
Leviticus14:20 Qasseka qeesezi he xuugettiza yarshoza kaththa yarshozara issife yarsho yarshizasoza bolla woththidi xuuggo; hessa mala ooson izaade nagarappe maarisees; izaadeyka geesh gidees. 
Leviticus14:21 «Izaadey hessa ubbaa ehanaas dandayontta manqo gidikko Godaa sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththidi ba nagara wursanaas issi dharsho laaqqa ehidi qoho yarsho gishshas shiishsho; qasse kaththa yarshozaska wogara miththa zayten munuqettida issi kilo liiqo dhiille kaththa yarshos eho; hessaththoka issi litiros heedzdzanththo kushe gidiza zayte eho. 
Leviticus14:22 Qasseka iza wolqqay dandayda mala nam7u haraphpheta woykko nam7u waanosetappe issaa nagara gishshas yarshos, nam7anththoza qasse xuugettiza yarshos eho." 
Leviticus14:23 «Geesho wogay polettiza osppunththa gallas heyta ubbaa ehidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen GODAA sinththan qeeses immo. 
Leviticus14:24 Qeesezikka qoho yarshos shiiqiza dorsa laaqqanne wogara miththa zayteza ekkidi yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho ooththi GODAA sinththan yarsho. 
Leviticus14:25 Qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarshos shiiqida dorsa laaqqa shukko; suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi geeyzaades ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhe, ushachcha toho manththa biradhdhenne ushachcha hayththa xeera tiyo." 
Leviticus14:26 Qeesezi zaytezappe guuththara ba hadirsa kushe qaa7an tigo. 
Leviticus14:27 Ba ushachcha kushe biradhdhen guuththara bochchidi Xoossa sinththan laappunto wuxxo. 
Leviticus14:28 Ba kushe qaa7an tigida zayteppe guuththara ekkidi qoho yarsho suuththan bochchidaason hessika geeyzaades ushachcha hayththa xeera, ushachcha kushe manththa biradhdhe xeera, ushachcha toho manththa biradhdhe xeera boshiso." 
Leviticus14:29 Qeesezi ba kushen attida zayteza addeza hu7en gusso; hessaththo ooththidi geesho woga GODAA sinththan polo. 
Leviticus14:30 Hessafe guye haraphpheta woykko waanoseta geeyzaade wolqqay gaththida keena qeesezi yarsho. 
Leviticus14:31 Heytanttafe issaa nagaras shiiqiza yarshos nam7anththoza qasse xuugettiza yarshos kaththa yarshora gaththi shiishsho; qeesezi ubbaaka hayssa malan geeyzaade nagarappe geeshsho. 
Leviticus14:32 Asappe gede hara asan aadhdhiza iita galba hargefe geeyanaas koshshiza woga polanaas dandayontta manqo asas diza wogay hayssa» gides. 
Leviticus14:33 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Leviticus14:34 «Tani inttes immiza Kanaane biitta intte geliza wode issi keeththan tani buuqa yeggiko," 
Leviticus14:35 he keeththaadey biidi qeeseza, ‹Tason ay iita hargey dizaakko› giidi yooto." 
Leviticus14:36 Soon diza miish ubbay tuna geetettontta mala qeesezi he iita hargaa beyanaas gelanaappe kasetidi soon diza miish ubbaa kare kessana mala azazo; hessafe guye qeesezi xeellanaas keeththaa giddo gelo. 
Leviticus14:37 Hargeza lo7eththi paacci xeelliza wode keeththaa lukki lukki miza hargezas medhay maata mala cilila woykko zo7o woykko puncarka misati beettiko," 
Leviticus14:38 qeesezi he keeththaafe kezidi keeththay laappun gallas gakkanaas gordettana mala ooththo. 
Leviticus14:39 Qeesezi laappunththa gallas simmidi qasseka xeello; hargezi kaseppe gede dari dari biikko," 
Leviticus14:40 hargey istta bolla beettida shuchchati keeththaafe woocetti kezidi katamappe gede karen diza tuna miish yegettizason yegettana mala azazo. 
Leviticus14:41 Hessafe guye keeththaas soo bagga giiridi he giireththaza katamappe kare baggara tuna miish yeggizason yeggana mala azazo. 
Leviticus14:42 Hessafe guye kase shuchchata sohon hara ooraththa shuchchi geliin he keeththan hara ooraththa urqqay meeshetto. 
Leviticus14:43 «Shuchchati digettiin qasseka urqqaaka qoqofidi hara urqqan meeshi ooraththidaappe guye he hargeza malatay qasseka simmi beettiko," 
Leviticus14:44 qeesezi simmi biidi beyo; hargezi kaseppe gede aakki aakki biza mala gidikko he hargey issaafe issaan aadhdhiza iita harge gidida gishshas he keeththay tuna. 
Leviticus14:45 Hessa gishshas he keeththay laalettanaas bessees; he keeththaa shuchchay, miththaynne miishshi, urqqay wurikka katamappe gede kare tuna miishshi yegettizason yegetto." 
Leviticus14:46 Gordettidaappe guye he keeththan gelida asi wurikka omars gakkanaas tuna gidees. 
Leviticus14:47 He keeththan ichchidaadey woykko kath midaadey ba may7o meecco. 
Leviticus14:48 «Keeththay qasseka ooraxidi meeshettidaappe guye qeesezi yiidi xeellishin hargezi kaseppe aakki aakki bontta aggiko, hargeza malatay dhayda gishshas, he keeththay geesh gidida gishshas qeesezi keeththa aawaa eriso." 
Leviticus14:49 He keeththaa geeshshanaas nam7u kafo, Libaanoose ziga, zo7o xilatanne hisophphe geetettiza miththa hayth eho." 
Leviticus14:50 Kafotappe issaa pultto haaththi izan diza guuqa keren shukko; 
Leviticus14:51 hessafe guye ziga mith, hisophphe miththa hayth, zo7o xilatanne paxa diza kafoza issife gaththi ekkidi guuqa keren diza pultto haaththaninne hankko shukettida kafoza suuththan gelththi kessidi keeththaza laappunto araco." 
Leviticus14:52 Qeesezi hessaththo histtidi he keeththaa kafoza suuththan, pultto haaththan, paxa diza kafon, ziga miththan, hisophphe miththa hayththaninne zo7o xilatan geeshsho." 
Leviticus14:53 Hessafe guye paxa diza kafoza izi piradhdhi baana mala gede demba kessi yeddo; hessaththo ooththidi keeththaa geeshshiza wogaa polikko keeththayka geesh gidees.» 
Leviticus14:54 Hayssi ha wogazi issaafe issaan aadhdhiza galba bolla keziza ay harges, qaachcha harges," 
Leviticus14:55 may7o bollanne keeththa bolla issaafe issaan aadhdhi aadhdhi yiza harges," 
Leviticus14:56 kixa harges, badhinttessinne illiwa harges," 
Leviticus14:57 hayssi ay miishshika tuna woykko geesh gididayssa shaakki erisanaassinne issaafe issaan aadhdhiza iita harge woykko buuqa geeshshanaas diza woga. 
Leviticus15:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Leviticus15:2 «Ay asaska izaade asateththafe goggiza miishshi diikko hessaadey tuna gaada Isra7eele asaas yoota. 
Leviticus15:3 Asateththafe goggi kezizayssi aggontta ixxiko woykko gogeththaa aggikokka hessaadey tuna. 
Leviticus15:4 «Hessaadey iza bolla ichchida hiiththi, uttida ay miishshika tuna gidees." 
Leviticus15:5 Hiixaza bochchida ay asikka ba may7onne ba bolla haaththan meecco; gidikkoka hessaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:6 Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza asi uttidasohon uttida ay asikka ba may7onne ba bolla haaththan meecco; gidikkoka hessaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:7 «Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza as bochchiday ay asikka ba may7onne ba bolla haaththan meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:8 «Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza asi hankko paxa diza asa bolla cuch cuttiko he cuchchay iza bochchida asi ba may7onne ba bolla haaththan meecco; gidikkoka hessaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:9 «Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza asi uttida koora ubbay tuna; 
Leviticus15:10 hessaadey iza bolla uttida miish bochchida asi ubbay omars gakkanaas tuna; gido attiin he tunida issi miishshatappe issaa denththida ay asikka ba may7onne ba bolla meecco; gidikkoka izi omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:11 «Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza asi ba kushe meecettontta dishe hara bochchiko he boshettidaadey ba may7onne ba bolla haaththan meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:12 Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza as bochchida mana miishshi meqqo; miththafe oosettida miishshi wurikka haaththan meecetto. 
Leviticus15:13 «Asateththafe tunisiza miishshi goggi keziza asi he hargezappe paxikko kase diza mala ba paxidayssa erisanaas laappun gallas gakkanaas gam7iishsho; hessafe guye ba may7o meecco; qasseka ba bolla xillo gidida pultto haaththan meecetto; histtidi geesh gido. 
Leviticus15:14 Osppunththa gallas nam7u haraphpheta woykko nam7u haraphphe ciyeta Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge efidi GODAA sinththan qeesezas immo. 
Leviticus15:15 Qeesezikka haraphpheta ekkidi issaa nagara wursos yarsho, hankkoyssa qasse xuugettiza yarsho histti yarsho; hessaththo histtidi qeesezi hessaade goggi keziza miishshas geeyza wogaa GODAA sinththan polo." 
Leviticus15:16 «Ay asikka iza attumateththafe zereththi gukkiko izi ba bolla meecetto; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:17 Zereththay iza bolla gukkida ay may7o gidiin woykko galba gidikko haaththan meecetto; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:18 Addey maccassara zin7i dendidaappe guye nam7ayka bantta bolla haaththan meecettetto; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gidetto. 
Leviticus15:19 «Maccassas aginan aginan yiza wogay beettiko laappun gallas gakkanaas iza tuna gidu; izo bochchiza ay asikka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:20 Maccassas aginan aginan diza wogay yiza wode iza uttizasoynne ichchidasoy ubbay tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:21 Iza ichchida hiixa bochchida ay asikka ba may7onne ba bolla meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido; 
Leviticus15:22 iza uttida ay miishshika bochchidaadey ba may7onne ba bolla meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:23 Iza ichchidaso woykko uttidaso miish bochchida ay asikka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:24 Aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay yiza wode izira zin7iza ay addeyka izi mala tuna gidiza gishshas laappun gallas gakkanaas tuna gido; izi ichchiza hiixay tuna gidees. 
Leviticus15:25 Issi maccassas aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay gukkiza wodeppe daro gallas gukkiko woykko aginan aginan beettiza wodezappe bollara aggontta suuththi gukkiko he suuththay eqqana gakkanaas iza tuna gidawus. 
Leviticus15:26 He wode iza ichchida hiixa gidiin woykko iza iza bolla uttida miishshi aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay diza wode haniza mala ubba wode tuna. 
Leviticus15:27 Heyta bochchida ay asikka tunida gishshas ba may7onne ba bolla meecco; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido. 
Leviticus15:28 «Izippe gukkiza suuththay eqqiko he suuththay eqqoo gallassafe biidi laappun gallas gakkanaas gam7ada hessafe guye wogay giza mala geeyu. 
Leviticus15:29 Osppunththa gallas nam7u haraphpheta woykko nam7u waanoseta Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge ekka yaada qeesezas immu. 
Leviticus15:30 Qeesezikka issaa nagarappe geeshshiza yarshos nam7anththozakka xuugettiza yarshos shiishsho; histtidi he maccassayo tunateththafe geeshshiza woga polo. 
Leviticus15:31 «Heen istta giddon diza Gaytoteththa Dunkaane tunisidi hayqqontta mala Isra7eele nayta tunisiza miishshafe naagite.» 
Leviticus15:32 Tunisiza miishshi iza asateththafe goggi kezizaadessinne iza attumateththafe zereththi gukkizaades," 
Leviticus15:33 qasseka aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay beettiza maccassas woykko adde gidiin macca gidiin tunisiza miishshi istta asateththafe goggiza wode woykko geeyontta maccassara zin7iza attumasaas wodhdhida wogay hessa. 
Leviticus16:1 Aaroone attuma naa nam7ati bessontta tama GODAA sinth ekki shiiqida gishshas hayqqida; hessafe guye GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus16:2 «Ne isha Aarooney Taabotaa bollan diza atto gizasoza kammizayssa sinththan magalashaappe guye baggara diza keehi dumma geetettizasoza ba shene mala ubba wode gelontta mala izas yoota; izi ubba wode ba shenen gelizaa gidikko hayqqana; gaasoykka tani shaara giddora atto gizasoza kamaa bolla qonccays. 
Leviticus16:3 «Aarooney nagarappe maareththiza yarshos issi mirgo booranne qasse xuugettiza yarshos issi dharsho ekkidi keehi dumma geetettizasoza gelo. 
Leviticus16:4 Aarooney keehi dumma geetettizaso gelanaappe kase may7oti dumma gidida gishshas ba bolla meecettidi qeeseteththa may7o may7o; hessika laynoppe oosettida qamisanne sure may7o; hessaththoka laynoppe oosettida qabatton gixxo; laynoppe oosettida goosseka goozo. 
Leviticus16:5 «Isra7eele nayta maabaray nagara gishshas shiishshiza yarshos nam7u deysha orgenne xuugettiza yarshos issi dharsho Aaroones ehetto. 
Leviticus16:6 Aarooney baassinne baso asaa nagara wursanaas issi korma boora yarshos shiishsho. 
Leviticus16:7 Hessafe guye he nam7u deysha orgeta gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen GODAA sinth efo. 
Leviticus16:8 Histtidi he nam7u orgeta bolla izi saama yeggo; heytappe issoy, ‹GODAA› nam7anththozi, ‹Azazeele› giza malatay diza shuchchata orgeta bolla yeggo." 
Leviticus16:9 GODAAS giza malatay iza bolla wodhdhida deyshaza nagarappe geeshshiza yarshos shukko. 
Leviticus16:10 Azazeeles giza malatay iza bolla wodhdhida deyshazi shukettontta paxa GODAAS shiiqo; dereza nagara tookkidi duge bazzo yedetto. 
Leviticus16:11 «Aarooneykka korma booraza ba nagara wursanaassinne baso asaa nagara wursanaas yarsho shukko. 
Leviticus16:12 Qasse GODAA sinththan diza yarsho yarshizasoppe exaane cuwasiza miishsha kumeththa bonqonne liiqi gaacettida nam7u zolle sawiza exaane ekkidi magalasha giddon diza keehi dumma gidida kifile eho. 
Leviticus16:13 Exaaneza heen GODAA sinththan taman yeggo; izi iza be7idi hayqqontta mala exaaneza cuway Taabotaa kammizayssa ubbaa genththo. 
Leviticus16:14 Kormaza suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi izan ba biradhdhe gelththi gelththidi Taabotaa kamaza bolla sinththa baggara araco; hessaththoka izappe guuththara Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan laappunto wuxxo. 
Leviticus16:15 «Hessafe guye hankko dereza nagaraa gishshas shukettiza deyshaa shukko; iza suuththaa keehi dumma geetettiza kifileza gelththidi kase kormaza suuththaa ooththoyssaththo atto gizaso Taabotaa kamaza bollaninne izas sinththa baggara laappunto wuxxo. 
Leviticus16:16 Hessaththoka ooththidi keehi dumma gidida kifileza Isra7eele nayta tunateththafenne istta nagara ubbaafe geeshshanaas geesho woga polo; kase istti tuna miish ooththishin istta giddon diza Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezakka hessaththo geeshsho. 
Leviticus16:17 Geesho woga polanaas Aarooney keehi dumma geetettiza kifileza gelidi ba nagara gishshas, baso asaa nagara gishshassinne Isra7eele dere nagaraa gishshas yarsho shiishshi maarisidi kezana gakkanaas ay asikka Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon dooppo." 
Leviticus16:18 Hessafe kaallidi izi GODAA sinththan yarsho yarshizaso kezidi geeshsho; korma suuththafenne deysha suuththafe guuththara ekkidi yarsho yarshizasozan yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza dhemota tiyo. 
Leviticus16:19 Qasse Isra7eele nayta tunateththafe yarsho yarshizasoza geeshshanaassinne dummasanaas suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi ba biradhdhe xeeran yarsho yarshizasoza bolla laappunto wuxxo. 
Leviticus16:20 «Aarooney keehi dumma geetettizaso, Gaytoteththa Dunkaanenne yarsho yarshizasoza geesho woga polidaappe guye shukettontta attida baqa deyshaa ekkidi GODAAS shiishsho." 
Leviticus16:21 Ba kushe nam7ata deyshaa hu7e bolla woththidi dereza nagaraa, iitateththaanne makkallateththaa ubbaa paaxo; deyshaza hu7e bolla yuushshi pittishe deraa nagara iza bolla woththo; hessafe guye kase deyshaza efanaas giigetti uttidaade bolla duge bazzo yeddetto." 
Leviticus16:22 Hessika deyshay asa ubbaa nagara ubbaa tookkidi ay asikka bayndaso duge bazzo haassi yeddo. 
Leviticus16:23 «Aarooneykka gaytoteththa dunkaanaa giddo gelo; gede keehi dumma geetettiza kifileza gelanaappe kasetidi izi kase may7ida qeeseteththa may7oza heen qaari woththo. 
Leviticus16:24 Ba bolla heen geeshshasohon meecettidi ba kase may7iza may7o; heeppe kezidi ba nagara wursanaassinne deraa nagara wursanaas xuugettiza yarsho shiishsho. 
Leviticus16:25 Nagara wursanaas shiiqida meheza moodhe yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo. 
Leviticus16:26 «Bazzo yedettiza deyshaa duge bazzo laaggi efidaadey guye asay dizaso simmi gelanaappe kasetidi ba may7o meecco; ba bollaka meecetto; hessafe guye asay dizaso gelo. 
Leviticus16:27 Nagara gishshas yarshettana shiiqidaytanne nagara geeshshanaas istta suuththi keehi dumma kifile geetettizaso gelida kormazanne deyshaza ashoy, galbazinne tocey attontta asi dizasoppe gede haraso biidi xuugetto." 
Leviticus16:28 Hessa ubbaa xuuggizaadey xuuggidi asi dizaso simmi gelanaappe kasetidi ba may7o haaththan meecco; ba bollaka meecetto. 
Leviticus16:29 «Hayssafe kaallidi inttes imettiza wogata hayssafe guye yaana layththatan ubbaan laamettontta eqqi diza woga histtidi naagite; layththafe laappunththa aginay gelida tammanththo gallas Isra7eele dere asaynne istta garsan diza hara dere asay xooma xoomanaas bessees; he gallas ay oosoykka oosettofo. 
Leviticus16:30 He gallas intte nagaray kichchana malanne intte geeyana mala geesho wogay polettiza gishshas intte GODAA sinththan intte nagara ubbaafe geeyidayta gidana. 
Leviticus16:31 He gallassay xooma gallassinne shempo shempiza sambata gallas gido; hessika mernaa woga gido; 
Leviticus16:32 Ba aawa sohon qeeseta halaqa gidanaas tiyettidanne shuumettida qeesey nagara ubbaa woga polanaas ba qeeseteththa may7oza may7idi polo. 
Leviticus16:33 Izikka keehi dumma kifileza, yarsho yarshizasoza, Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza; qeesetanne Isra7eele asaa ubbaa nagara wurso." 
Leviticus16:34 Isra7eele asaa nagara ubbaa woga intte layththan layththan issito polana mala hessi inttes mernaas laamettontta woga gido.» Hessaththo GODAY iza azazida mala Musey ooththides. 
Leviticus17:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus17:2 « ‹GODAY azazida azazoy hayssa› gaada Aaroones, iza naytassinne Isra7eele asi ubbay diza heeran yoota;" 
Leviticus17:3 woykko ba diza heerappe karen boora woykko dors woykko deyshe yarsho shukkidi," 
Leviticus17:4 GODAAS dummatidason Xoossas yarshanaas Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge ehontta aggiko hessaadey suuththaa coo hada gussida mala qoodettidi dere giddofe shaaketti goodetto. 
Leviticus17:5 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele nayti ay mehe gidiin coo demban shukkontta GODAA sinth Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge ehetto; meheta Dunkaane penge ehidi qeesezas immetto; qeesezikka issifeteththa yarsho histti shukko. 
Leviticus17:6 Qeesezikka suuththaa Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen diza GODAAS yarsho yarshizasoza bolla wuxxo; GODAA ufayssiza lo7o sawo gidana mala moodheza taman xuuggo. 
Leviticus17:7 Isra7eele nayti istta ammanoppe haassiza daydanththatas yarsho ooththidi ba mehe beettooson beettooson yarshos shukkanaas bessenna; hessika isttassinne isttafe guye yeleta ubbaas mernaa woga gidi de7o. 
Leviticus17:8 «Ne isttas, ‹Isra7eele naytappe gidiin woykko isttara diza hara dere as gidiin Dunkaaneza pengefe attiin harason awanka GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho woykko hara yarsho yarshiko hessaadey GODAA deretara qoodettanaas bessenna› ga yoota." 
Leviticus17:9  
Leviticus17:10 «Isra7eele as gididay oonikka woykko Isra7eele naytara issife diza hara dere asi suuth uyikko hessaadey ta achchan ixettidaade gidees; tani hessaade iza dere garsafe shaakka dhayssana. 
Leviticus17:11 Shemppora paxa diza medheteth ubbaas shemppoy suuththa giddon dees; hessa gishshas asa nagara wursanaas gukkiza suuththi wurikka yarsho yarshizasoza bolla gukkana mala immadis; asa shemppo nagarappe maarisizay suuththa. 
Leviticus17:12 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asaa, ‹Inttefe woykko intte giddon diza hara dere asappe oonikka suuth uyoppo› gays." 
Leviticus17:13 «Isra7eele naytappe woykko isttara diza hara dere asappe oonikka ashoy meetettana mala imettida mehe gidiin woykko wora do7a woykko kafo shankkati oykkidi iza suuththaa biitta bolla gussidi biitta iza bolla kammo. 
Leviticus17:14 Gaasoykka asho may7ida ubbaa shemppoy suuththa giddon dees; hessa gishshas tani Isra7eele asaa, ‹Asho may7ida medheta ubbaa shemppoy iza suuththa giddon diza gishshas suuth moopite; midaadey oonikka ba dere giddofe shaaketti dhayo› gays." 
Leviticus17:15 «Isra7eele naytappe woykko hara dere asappe oonikka bawuti hayqqidaaz woykko do7ay wodhida mehe asho miikko ba may7o meecco; ba bolla meecetto; gidikkoka omars gakkanaas tuna gido; hessafe guye geesh gido. 
Leviticus17:16 Ba may7o meeccontta aggikonne ba bolla meecettontta aggiko hessaadey nagara ooththida gishshas ba nagaran oyshettana.» 
Leviticus18:1 GODAY Muses hizgi yootides; 
Leviticus18:2 «Isra7eele naytas, ‹Tani GODAA intte Xoossaa;" 
Leviticus18:3 kase intte heen de7ida Gibxe biitta asay woykko buro ta inttena gelththana Kanaane biittan diza dere asay ooththiza shaattiza ooso intte ooththoftenne istta hano kaallofte. 
Leviticus18:4 Ta wogata naagite; ta azazotakka polite; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus18:5 Ta azazotanne wogata naagite; hessantta naagiza asi ba shemppo ashshana; tani GODAA› ga yoota. 
Leviticus18:6 «Inttefe oonikka baas asho dabbora laymatoppo; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus18:7 «Ne aayeyra laymatada ne aawa kawushshofa; nees aayo gidida gishshas izira laymatoppa. 
Leviticus18:8 «Ne aawaas hara machchetarakka laymatada ne aawa yeellachchofa. 
Leviticus18:9 «Ne michcheyra laymatoppa; hessaththoka nenara issife diccidaaro gidiin woykko harason diccidaaro gidiin ne aaway yelida hara machchi naa woykko ne aaya hara azinas yelida macca nayra laymatoppa. 
Leviticus18:10 «Nees yeella gidontta mala nees naaza nayra, woykko nees nay nayra laymatoppa." 
Leviticus18:11 «Ne aawaas hara machcha yelida ne michcheyra zin7ofa; gaasoykka iza nees michcho. 
Leviticus18:12 «Ne aawa michcheyra zin7ofa; gaasoykka iza nees michcho. 
Leviticus18:13 Ne aayey michcheyrakka zin7ofa; gaasoykka iza ne aayeys asho dabbo. 
Leviticus18:14 «Ne aawa isha machchira zin7ofa; gaasoykka iza nees aawa machchi mala. 
Leviticus18:15 «Ne naaza machcheyra zin7ofa; iza nees naaza machcho gidida gishshas izira zin7ofa. 
Leviticus18:16 Ne isha machcheyra zin7ofa; gaasoykka iza nees isha machcho; hessi ne isha kawushshiza miishsha. 
Leviticus18:17 «Aayeyranne nayra zin7ofa; izis nay naaza nayranne nays nay nayra zin7ofa; isttika izas mata dabbo gidida gishshas hessaththo hanoy kawushshateththa. 
Leviticus18:18 «Ne machchiya paxa dishin izi michchiyo dawuth ekkofa; izirakka laymatoppa. 
Leviticus18:19 «Aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay yiza wode maccassara zin7ofa. 
Leviticus18:20 «Hara asa machchira zin7ada nerkka nena tunisoppa. 
Leviticus18:21 «Ne naytappe oonakka molooke geetettiza eeqas xuugettiza yarsho ooththa immofa; gaasoykka ne Xoossaa sunth tunisoppa; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus18:22 «GODAA sinththan ixettida miish gidida gishshas maccassara zin7iza mala addera zin7ofa. 
Leviticus18:23 «Adde gidiin woykko maccassi mehera parattidi banateththaa tunisoppo; hessa mala hanoy kawushshateththa. 
Leviticus18:24 «GODAY nena istta dere gelththanaas ne sinththafe diggana; hankko asay barkka ba ooson bana tunisidayssa mala istti ooththiza iita oosotappe issineynka inttena tunisopite. 
Leviticus18:25 Istta oosoy biitta tunisida gishshas tani he biittayo izi nagara gishshas qaxxayadis; biittayakka ba giddon diza asaa kessa cuttadus. 
Leviticus18:26 Intte gidikko ta azazotanne ta woga naagite; Isra7eele asaappe woykko intte giddon diza hara biitta asappe oonikka hayssa mala ay oosokka ooththofte. 
Leviticus18:27 Inttefe kase he biittayn diza asati heyta mala harassiza miish ooththida gishshas biittaya tunadus. 
Leviticus18:28 Intte hessaththo ooththiko biittaya kase inttefe sinththan diza kawoteththata cuttidayssaththo inttenakka cuttana. 
Leviticus18:29 «Hayta harassiza iita oosotappe issineyokka ooththizaadey ba dere asaa giddofe shaaketti dhayo. 
Leviticus18:30 Hessa gishshas inttefe kase sinththan biitta bolla diza asati ooththida tuna oosota ubbaa ooththidi intte tunontta mala ta azazota naagite; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa.» 
Leviticus19:1 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus19:2 «Hayssa Isra7eele naytas yoota, ‹Tani GODAY intte Xoossay dumma gidida mala intteka dumma gidite." 
Leviticus19:3 « ‹Inttefe oonikka attontta ba aawaanne ba aayo bonchcho; ta inttena azazida mala Sambata gallassata bonchcho; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:4 « ‹Tana aggidi eeqatas goynnofte; woykko eeqa Xoossata biratappe seerisidi inttes medhdhofte; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:5 « ‹Intte issifeteththa yarsho GODAAS shiishshiza wode he yarshoy intte gishshas ekettana bessiza mala yarshite. 
Leviticus19:6 Yarshoza shiishshida gallas woykko wonteththa gallas meetettanaas bessees; heedzdzanththo gallas gakkanaas gam7ida yarshoy wurikka taman xuugetto. 
Leviticus19:7 Heedzdzanththo gallassan iza miikko hessi tuna; hessa gishshas tani he yarshoza ekkike. 
Leviticus19:8 Izappe midaadey oonikka taas dummatidayssa hada miishsha mala qoodida gishshas izi ba nagaran oyshettana; hessaadey ba dere asaa giddofe shaaketti dhayo. 
Leviticus19:9 « ‹Intte maxa wode intte kath maxishin gaxa bolla diza kath maxopite; intte maxishin geedon attida puushechcho maxanaas guye simmofte. 
Leviticus19:10 Neni ne woyne miththa ayfe maxishin hagga giddon qotetti attidayssa woykko gaden qoqofettidayssa qora ekkanaas guye simmofa; heytantta ubbaa manqotassinne bete yidaytas aggaaga; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:11 « ‹Kaysotopite; as baleththofte; wordo haasayopite; 
Leviticus19:12 « ‹Ta sunththan wordora caaqqofte; wordo caaqqidi intte Xoossa sunththaa tunisopite; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:13 « ‹As baleththofa; woykko asa miishshe bonqqa ekkofa; miishshe immana gaada ne ooso oosisidaades miishshaa immontta dashe ne achchan issi qammaka ayssofa. 
Leviticus19:14 « ‹Siyenna gaada tulle cayoppa; qooqey dhuphettidi kundana mala iza sinththan dhuphizaaz woththofa; ne Xoossas yayya; tani GODAA ne Xoossa. 
Leviticus19:15 « ‹Neni pirda pirdiza wode pirda geellasoppa; manqo iza manqoteththa gishshas maadda pirdofa; gita asatas dumma bonchcho immofa; dere asaakka dumma maadda pirdofa; asa ubbaas tumu pirda pirda. 
Leviticus19:16 « ‹Neni asa giddon zigirs ekkada yuuyoppa; ne shooroza hayqos gaththiza ay miishshika ooththofa; tani ne GODAA. 
Leviticus19:17 « ‹Ne isha ne wozinan ixxofa; iza gaason nees nagara gidontta mala ne shooroza hanqa. 
Leviticus19:18 « ‹As ubbaa ne nena siiqiza mala siiqa attiin ay asa bollaka ne ulon lancce oykkada halo kessofa; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus19:19 « ‹Ta azazota naagite; dumma dumma qommo meheta issi bolla gaththi mehetisofte; nam7u qommo kaththa zereth walakkidi issi bolla zeropite; nam7u qommo miishshafe dadettida may7o may7ofte. 
Leviticus19:20 « ‹Issaadey hara asara giigetta uttida aylleyra laymatikko izakka ba aylleteththafe wozzettonttaaro gidikko izaadey qaxxayetto; gidikkoka iza wozzettontta gishshas nam7ayka hayqqofetto. 
Leviticus19:21 Hessa mala qoho gaththidaadey qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarshos issi dharsho gaytoteththa dunkaane penge GODAA sinth eho. 
Leviticus19:22 Qeesezikka hessaade nagara wursanaas Xoossa sinththan qoho yarshos imettida dharshoza shiishsho; izaade nagaraykka atto geetettana. 
Leviticus19:23 « ‹Intte Kanaane gelidi ayfe ayfiza mith tokkiko he ayfe ayfiza miththaya ayfe doommoosofe biidi heedzdzu layth gakkanaas immiza ayfey meetettontta digettidayssa erite; he layththatan he miththata ayfe moopite. 
Leviticus19:24 Oydanththo layththa bolla he miththaa ayfey ubbay GODAAS galatas shiishshiza yarsho gido. 
Leviticus19:25 Ichchashanththo layththan qasse miththaa ayfeza inttes miite; intte hessaththo histtiko ayfe ayfiza intte miththay woden woden inttes immiza ayfey kaseppe gede gujetti gujetti baana; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:26 « ‹Suuththara diza ay ashokka moopite; maroththoftenne bita bitopite. 
Leviticus19:27 « ‹Intte hu7e binana garsara yuushshi aaththidi qanxxofte; intte buuchchaaka qaanththan qanxxofte. 
Leviticus19:28 « ‹Intte asateththa bolla niqse cach caddofte; woykko asi hayqqiko izas mishettidi intte bolla qanxxi madunththofte; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus19:29 « ‹Biittaya laymaninne tunateththan kumontta mala ne nayo laymateththa oosos aaththa immada kawushshofa. 
Leviticus19:30 Ta Sambata gallassata naagite; ta keeththaa bonchchite; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus19:31 « ‹Moytille haasayssizayta woykko iita ayanata haasayssizayta zore oychchofa; intte tunontta mala istta koyopite; tani GODAY intte Xoossa. 
Leviticus19:32 « ‹Neeppe cimmidaade beykko ne uttidasohoppe denda eqqada bonchcha; taas Xoossas yashshateththan azazetta; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus19:33 « ‹Hara biittafe yiidi intte giddon diza asata qohopite. 
Leviticus19:34 Intte intte dere asas ooththiza mala isttaskka lo7o ooththite; intte inttena siiqiza mala isttaka siiqite; kase intteka Gibxe biittan beteta gididayssa yuushshi qopite; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus19:35 « ‹Maka miishshen gidiin woykko meezaanen woykko wadha miishshan as cimmofte. 
Leviticus19:36 As cimmontta tumu meezaaney, maka miishshinne mixe miishshi inttes de7o; tani inttena Gibxeppe kessida GODAA intte Xoossa." 
Leviticus19:37 « ‹Ta inttes immida ta azazotanne ta wogata ubbaa naagitenne ooththite; tani intte GODAA.› » 
Leviticus20:1 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus20:2 «Isra7eele nayta, ‹Inttena gidikkonne intte giddon diza hara dere asatappe oonikka molooke geetetti xeygettiza eeqa xoossas ba naytappe issaa aaththi immi beettiko kumeththa Isra7eele dere asay hessaade shuchchan caddi wodho." 
Leviticus20:3 Oonikka ba naytappe issaade molookes aaththi immidi ta keeththaa tunisida gishshassinne geeshshaa sunththaa tayssa kawushshida gishshas ta hessaade bolla qixaate yeddana; hessafe guye ta izaades morkke gidada dere giddofe iza shaakka dhayssana. 
Leviticus20:4 Iza dere asay izaadey ooththoyssa ubbaaka wudettontta bessi aggikonne wodhontta aggiko," 
Leviticus20:5 tani ta baggara hessaadenne izaadeso asaa qasseka taas ammanettontta molookes goynnon izara issife gididayta ubbaa bolla iita hanqo yeddana; hessafe guye heytantta tani istta istta dereza giddofe shaakka dhayssana. 
Leviticus20:6 « ‹Oonikka isttafe zore oychchanaas moytille xeygizaytakkonne marotakko biikko hessaade bolla ta iita hanqo yeddana; hessafe guye hessaade tani iza dere giddofe shaakka dhayssana. 
Leviticus20:7 « ‹Intte asateth ubbaa geeshshite; dummatite; gaasoykka tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus20:8 Ta azazoyo naagitenne polite; gaasoykka tani inttena taas dummasida intte GODAA. 
Leviticus20:9 « ‹Ba aawa woykko ba aayo cayizaadey hayqon qaxxayetto; izi hayqon qaxxayettizay ba mooronna. 
Leviticus20:10 « ‹Issi asi hara asa machchira laymatikko he laymatida addezaranne maccassayra nam7ayka hayqon qaxxayettetto. 
Leviticus20:11 Issi asi ba aawa machchira laymatikko ba aawa kawushshida gishshas he laymatidayti nam7ayka hayqon qaxxayettetto; istti hayqon qaxxayettizay ba moorida mooronna. 
Leviticus20:12 Issi asi baas naaza machchira laymatikko he laymatidayti nam7ayka hayqon qaxxayettetto; asho dabboteth layman tunisida gishshas istti hayqon qaxxayettizay ba moorida mooronna. 
Leviticus20:13 « ‹Issi asi maccara zin7iza mala addey addera zin7iko nam7ayka yeellachchiza miish ooththida gishshas hayqon qaxxayettetto; istti hayqon qaxxayettizay ba moorida mooronna. 
Leviticus20:14 « ‹Issi asi aayeyonne nayo machcho ekkiko heytantti ooththida harassiza hanoza gishshas heedzdzayka taman xuugetti hayqqetto; heytantta mala iita hanoy intte giddon polettanaas bessenna. 
Leviticus20:15 « ‹Ay asikka mehera paratikko izaadeynne he mehezi nam7ay hayqqetto. 
Leviticus20:16 « ‹Issi maccassi mehera paratikko izanne he iza parattida mehey nam7ay hayqqetto; istti hayqqizay ba moorida mooronna. 
Leviticus20:17 « ‹Issi asi ba michchiyo, baas aayi nayo woykko aawa nayo machcho ekkiko hessi yeellachchizaaza; hessa gishshas istti bantta dere giddofe shaaketti dhayetto; ba ooththida mooro gishshas ba qixaate ekketto." 
Leviticus20:18 « ‹Issi asi aginan aginan beettiza maccassa wogay beettida maccassara zin7iko izaadey izi kalloteth qaarida gishshassinne izakka ba kalloteththaa qaara bessida gishshas nam7ayka bantta dere giddofe shaaketti dhayetto. 
Leviticus20:19 « ‹Ay asikka ba aawa michchira woykko ba aayi michchira zin7ofo; hessaththo ooththizaa gidikko nam7ayka bantta dabboteththa kawushshiza gishshas ba moorida mooron oyshettana. 
Leviticus20:20 « ‹Ay asikka ba aawa isha machchira woykko ba aayey isha machchira laymatikko ba aawa isha machcho woykko ba aayi isha yeellasida gishshas laymatidayti nam7ayka oyshettananne yeloy baynda attana. 
Leviticus20:21 Ay asikka ba isha machcho ekkizaa gidikko hessi tuna ooththees; ba ishaza bonchcho kawushshida gishshas nam7ayka naa yelontta attana. 
Leviticus20:22 « ‹Ta inttena izin gelththana Kanaane biittaya inttena cutta diggontta mala intte ta azazotanne ta wogata naagitenne polite. 
Leviticus20:23 Tani intte sinththafe dhayssiza kawoteththata lose woga kaallofte; istti heytantta ubbaa ooththida gishshas ta istta shaatettadis. 
Leviticus20:24 Ta qasse izippe maaththinne eessi goggiza he cilila biittayo inttena gelththanaas caaqqadis; izokka ta inttes immana; hankko dereppe intte taas shaakettidayta gidana mala ooththiday tana GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus20:25 « ‹Hessa gishshas intte geesh gidida mehetanne kafota tuna gididaytappe lo7eththidi shaakki erite; tani haytanti inttes tuna ga woththida mehetan, kafotaninne biitta bolla qaaxxiza ay miishshankka inttena tunisopite." 
Leviticus20:26 Intte taas dumma shaakettidayta gidite; gaasoykka tani GODAY dumma Xoossa; intte ta dereta gidana mala Ayzaabeta giddofe tani inttena taas dummasa shaakkadis. 
Leviticus20:27 « ‹Ay asikka intte giddofe moytille xeygizaa woykko marotizaade gidikko izi shuchchan cadetti hayqo; hessaththo ooththizaadey ay asikka hayqon qaxxayettizay ba ooththida mooronna› ga yoota.» 
Leviticus21:1 GODAY Muses, «Aaroone naytas qeesetas, ‹Inttefe oonikka ba dabbota garsafe asi hayqqiko izaade aha bochchidi bana tunisoppo." 
Leviticus21:2 Mata dabbotappe aaya woykko aaway woykko ba nay woykko ba ishay hayqqiko," 
Leviticus21:3 hessaththoka azina gelontta ixxada diza michcheya hayqqiko istta aha bochchanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus21:4 Gido attiin geloninne ekon dabbotidayti aha bochchidi bana tunisopetto. 
Leviticus21:5 « ‹Qeesetappe oonikka hayqqidaades mishettidi ba hu7e binana buucoppo; ba buuchcheka buucoppo; ba bollaka qaaci madunththofo. 
Leviticus21:6 Qeesey wurikka taas dumma gido; bantta Xoossaa sunththaa tunisopetto; gaasoykka istti Xoossas taman xuugettiza yarshonne GODAAS kaththa yarsho shiishshizayta gidida gishshas istti geesh gidetto. 
Leviticus21:7 « ‹Qeese gididaadey layma maccas woykko geela7oteththi ekettida geela7oyo woykko gela kezida maccas machcho ekkofo; gaasoykka qeeseti Xoossas dummatidayta; 
Leviticus21:8 qeesey intte Xoossas kaththa yarsho shiishshizayssa gidida gishshas izi hara asappe dumma gido; tani inttena geeshshiza intte GODAY geeshsha; izikka geesh gido. 
Leviticus21:9 Qeese macca nay laymatikko iza ba aawaa kawushshida gishshas taman xuugetta hayqqu. 
Leviticus21:10 « ‹Qeeseta halaqay izi ba hu7e tiyettiza zaytey tiyettida gishshassinne qeeseteththa may7o may7ana mala dummatidaade gidida gishshas asi hayqqiko hayqqidaades izi mishettizayssa erisanaas ba hu7e binana buucoppo; ba may7oka daakkofo. 
Leviticus21:11 Ahay dizasokka izi geloppo; haray attoshin ba aawa woykko ba aayey ahakka bochchidi bana tunisoppo. 
Leviticus21:12 Iza dummasanaas tiyda Xoossa zaytey iza bolla diza gishshas qeesey Xoossa Keeththafe kezi biidi Xoossa Keeththaa tunisoppo. 
Leviticus21:13 « ‹Qeesey ekkana machcha geela7o gidu. 
Leviticus21:14 Azinay hayqqidaaro woykko gela kezidaaro woykko layma maccas ekkofo; gelontta geela7o xalla ba dere asaa giddofe doori ekko.
