Leviticus21:15 Hessaththo histtontta aggiko izi ba dere giddon ba nayta tunisana; iza dumma shaakkida GODAY tana Xoossaa› ga yoota» gides. 
Leviticus21:16 GODAY Muse hizgi azazides; 
Leviticus21:17 «Aaroones, ‹Ne qommotappe iza asateththaa bolla wosoy dizaadey oonikka taas yarsho shiishshofo; hayssi ha wogay buro sinththafe yaana yeletan ubbaan naagetti de7o." 
Leviticus21:18 Pace asateththi dizaadey oonikka hessika qooqey woykko wobbey woykko medho iitay woykko asateththay borsizaadey," 
Leviticus21:19 kushey woykko tohoy silidaadey," 
Leviticus21:20 zokko quunay woykko dinkey, ayfey sakkizaadey woykko iza bolla uzazizaazi dizaadey woykko shuufay kaththa yarsho taas shiishshanaas bessenna." 
Leviticus21:21 Aaroone zereth kumeththaa giddofe asateththa bolla wosoy diza asi oonikka xuugettiza yarshonne yarsho ba GODAAS yarshanaas yooppo. 
Leviticus21:22 Hessa mala asi nam7u qommo kaththa yarshota maanaas dandayees; heytikka dummatida kaththinne keehi dummatida yarsho kaththa. 
Leviticus21:23 Gidikkoka iza asateththan borey diza gishshas ta keeththaa tunisontta mala izaadey gede yarsho yarshizaso woykko gede magalashakko shiiqoppo; gaasoykka istta dumma ooththa shaakkiday tana Xoossa› gaada yoota.» 
Leviticus21:24 Museykka hessa ubbaa Aaroonessinne Aaroone naytas kumeththa Isra7eele dere asaas yootides. 
Leviticus22:1 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus22:2 «Aaroonessinne iza naytas, ‹Intte harappe dumma gidida ta sunththaa tunisontta mala Isra7eele nayti taas dummasidi shiishshiza yarsho ubbaa bonchchora ekkidi geeshshateththan naagite; tani GODAA." 
Leviticus22:3 « ‹Intte zereththafe tunidaadey Isra7eele nayti taas dumma shaakki immida miish xalateththan bochchidaadey ta sinththafe dhayana; hayssi ha wogay hayssafe guye sinththara yaana yeleta ubbaan naagetto; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus22:4 « ‹Aaroone zereththatappe ay asikka iza bolla asappe asan aadhdhiza galba hargey dizaadey woykko iza asateththafe goggi keziza miishshi dizaadey oonikka geeyana gakkanaas Xoossas dummatida miish mooppo; ahay bochchiin tunida miish bochchidaadey woykko iza bollafe zereththa haaththi xokettizaade bochchidaadey," 
Leviticus22:5 hessaththoka biittara gooshettizaytanne ay miishshankka tunida as bochchidaadey," 
Leviticus22:6 hessa mala ay tuna miishshika bochchidaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gidees; hessafe guye izi ba bolla haaththan meecettontta dishe Xoossas dummatida kath mooppo. 
Leviticus22:7 Arshey wullidaappe guye qasse izi geesh gidees; hessafe guye dumma gidida kaththa yarshoza izas quma gidida gishshas maanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus22:8 Bawuti hayqqidaazinne do7ay wodhida mehe asho mooppo; izi hessa mizaaz gidikko tunees; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus22:9 « ‹Qeeseti tani isttas immida wogaa naagetto; istti naagontta aggiko geesh gidida ta azazotas azazettontta ixxida gishshas isttas qoho gidiin istti hayqqana; istta dummasa shaakkiday tana GODAA. 
Leviticus22:10 « ‹Taas dummatida yarshofe maanaas dandayzay qeesetanne isttaso as xalla attiin hara asi izappe mooppo; qeesera imaththi woykko oosos qaxxarettidi izara dizaadeyka mooppo. 
Leviticus22:11 Gido attiin qeesey ba miishshan shammida aylley woykko soon yelettida aylley qeeseza gishaappe mo. 
Leviticus22:12 Qeese gidontta hara as gelida qeeseza naya Xoossas dummatida yarshofe muuppu. 
Leviticus22:13 Gido attiin naa yelontta dishin izi azinay hayqqidaara woykko ba azinappe anjjettada ba aawa soo simmada diza qeese naya kase iza naateteththa wode ooththiza mala ba aawa gishaappe mu; gidikkoka qeeseso asappe attiin hara asi dummatida yarsho kaththaafe mooppo. 
Leviticus22:14 « ‹Qeeseso as gidonttaadey oonikka erontta dishe GODAAS dummatidi imettida miish miikko he izi midayssa kumeththa wogaa xeetappe nam7u kushe gujjidi qeesezas qanxxo. 
Leviticus22:15 Isra7eele nayti Xoossas immiza dumma yarshota qeeseti tunisanaas bessenna. 
Leviticus22:16 Hessika izappe maanaas bessonttaades qeeseti immiko he midaades mooro gididi izaade bolla hanqo gaththana; imotata ubbaa taas dummasiday tana GODAA› ga yoota.» 
Leviticus22:17 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus22:18 «Aaroones iza naytassinne Isra7eele dere ubbaas, ‹Isra7eele as gididay woykko Isra7eele nayta giddon diza imaththa asi adina gaththanaas woykko izi coo ufayssan mela immiza xuugettiza yarsho shiishshiko," 
Leviticus22:19 iza yarshoy ekettana mala issi borey iza bolla baynda korma boorappe, dharshofenne deysha orgefe gido." 
Leviticus22:20 Iza bolla wosoy diza mehe intte shiishshiko GODAY hessa ekkenna. 
Leviticus22:21 « ‹Qasse oona gidikkoka ba adina gaththanaas issifeteththa yarsho GODAAS yarshiza wode woykko ba dosan ba mehetappe kiyateththa imota immizaa gidikko he imotaa ekkana mala izi immiza meheza bolla aykko wosoy bayndaaz gido. 
Leviticus22:22 Qooqe woykko meqo woykko qiisha woykko giiyza madunththara dizaa woykko gaaranda woykko shattora diza mehe GODAAS yarsho shiishshofa; hessantta mala mehe yarsho yarshizasozan xuugettiza yarsho histta yarshofa. 
Leviticus22:23 Izas medheteththi wogay baynda adussa woykko qaanth gidida mehe ba dosan immiza kiyateththa imota gididi shiiqanaas dandayees; gido attiin adina gasos shiishshanaas dandayenna. 
Leviticus22:24 Sangettida woykko dhiiqettida mehe GODAAS yarsho shiishshofte; intte biittan heytantta mala yarshofte. 
Leviticus22:25 Allaga asappe imettida mehe Xoossas yarsho shiishshofte; heytantta mala meheti borey diza mala qoodettiza gishshas istti ekkettettenna› ga yoota.» 
Leviticus22:26 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus22:27 «Miiza mari woykko dorsa laaqqay woykko deysha laaqqay yelettiko laappun gallas gakkanaas ba aayppe shaakettofo; gido attiin osppunththa gallassafe oykkidi xuugettiza yarshos shiiqanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus22:28 Miiz izi marara, dors izi laaqqara issi gallas yarshos shukkofte." 
Leviticus22:29 «Intte GODAAS galata yarsho yarshiza wode intte shiishshiza galatazi ekettana mala ooththi shiishshite. 
Leviticus22:30 Intte shiishshidayssafe aykkoka wontos ashshontta he gallas ubbaa michchite; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus22:31 «Intte ta azazota naagitenne ooththite; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus22:32 Ta geeshsha sunththaa tunisopite; ta geeshshateththaa kumeththa Isra7eele asay eridi tana bonchcho; inttena dummasiday tana GODAA. 
Leviticus22:33 Intte Xoossaa gidanaas inttena Gibxe biittafe kessiday tana; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa.» 
Leviticus23:1 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus23:2 «Isra7eele asaas Dumma shiiqo gi awajjidi intte bonchchanaas bessiza doorettida ba7aaleti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; 
Leviticus23:3 «Intte inttes ooththanaas usuppun gallassati deettes; laappunththa gallassay gidikko inttes shempiza Sambata gallassa; he gallas intte Xoossa goynnanaas shiiqite attiin ay oosokka ooththofte; intte dizaso ubbaan hessi intte Xoossa bonchchana Sambata gallassa. 
Leviticus23:4 «Isttas wodhdhida woden geeshsha shiiqo ooththi awajjidi intte bonchchanaas bessiza GODAA ba7aaleti hayssafe kaallizayta," 
Leviticus23:5 GODAY izan bonchchettiza paaziga ba7aaley koyro aginay gelida tammanne oydanththo gallas arshey wulliin gadey lem7i lem7ishin oykettees. 
Leviticus23:6 He aginazan tammanne ichchashanththo gallas ukeththa ba7aaley oykettees; hessafe guye laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy gelontta uketh miite. 
Leviticus23:7 He gallassatappe koyro gallas Xoossa goynnanaas shiiqite; he gallas intte ooso ooththofte. 
Leviticus23:8 Laappun gallas gakkanaas xuugettiza yarsho GODAAS shiishshite; intte ooso aggidi laappunththa gallas GODAA goynnanaas shiiqite.» 
Leviticus23:9 GODAY Muse hizgides," 
Leviticus23:10 «Isra7eele asaas tani inttes immiza biittaa gelidi intte kath shiishshiza wode kaththa xeera qeesekko ehite. 
Leviticus23:11 GODAA sinththan intte shiishshizayssi ekettana mala qeesezi qasse kaththaa xeeraa ekkidi yaanne haa qaaththiza yarsho histti Xoossas shiishsho; qeesezi he xeera kaththaa yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histti shiishshanaas bessizay Sambata gallassafe wonteththa gallas gido. 
Leviticus23:12 Intte he yarsho shiishshiza gallas iza bolla borey baynda issi layththa dharsho laaqqa xuugettiza yarsho ooththidi issi bolla Xoossas shiishshite. 
Leviticus23:13 Izara issife wogara miththa zayten munuqettida nam7u kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille kaththa yarsho histti shiishshite; hessika iza sawoy GODAA ufayssiza xuugettiza yarsho gidana; izara issife issi litiro gidiza woyne ushshu imota shiishshite. 
Leviticus23:14 Intte heyta GODAAS immanaappe koyro gakkida kaththa ayfe qaye gidiin woykko shaash woykko uketh uukkidi moopite; hayssa ha wogaza intte dizaso ubbaan guyeppe yaana intte yeletas eqqi diza mernaa woga gido. 
Leviticus23:15 «Intte GODAAS yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza yarsho yarshida Sambata gallassa wonteththafe doommidi laappun Sambata qoodite; 
Leviticus23:16 Laappunththa sambatappe guye ichchash tammanththo gallas qasseka hara ooraththa kaththa yarsho GODAAS shiishshite. 
Leviticus23:17 Nam7u kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille intte sooppe irshon munuqetti uukettida nam7u uketh yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histti ekki yiite; hessika oorath shiiqiza kaththaa gishshas Xoossas shiiqiza kaththa yarsho gido. 
Leviticus23:18 He ukeththaarakka issife istta bolla wosoy baynda issi layth gidiza laappun dharsho laaqqata issi korma boorara nam7u dharshota shiishshite; kaththa yarshozaranne woyne ushsha yarshozara issife GODAAS xuugettiza yarshonne sawo tunnu giza yarsho histti shiishshite. 
Leviticus23:19 Qasseka nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarshos issi deysha orge, issifeteththa yarshos issi layth dharsho laaqqa nam7ata yarshos shiishshite." 
Leviticus23:20 Qeesey ukeththaa nam7u laaqqatara yaanne haa qaaseththidi GODAAS dumma yarsho histti shiishsho; hessika qeeseta gisha gido; heyti he imotati harappe dumma imota. 
Leviticus23:21 He gallas awajja awajjidi GODAA goynnanaas issi bolla shiiqite attiin hara ooso ooththofte; hayssi intte dizaso ubbaan inttefe guyera yiza yeletas mernaas eqqi diza woga gido. 
Leviticus23:22 Intte intte biittan kath shiishshiza wode dhassa bolla diza kaththaa maxopite; maxishin guyen attidayssa maxanaas guye simmofte; guyen attidayssi manqotassinne hara biittafe bete yida asatas atto; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa.» 
Leviticus23:23 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus23:24 «Isra7eele asaas laappunththa aginay gelida koyro gallassay inttes shempo gallas gido; he wode zayey punettishin intte GODAA goynnanaas shiiqiza dumma shiiqo gido. 
Leviticus23:25 He gallas GODAAS taman xuugettiza kaththa yarsho shiishshite attiin he gallas aykkoka ooththofte.» 
Leviticus23:26 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus23:27 «Laappunththo aginay gelidaappe guye tammanththa gallassay nagarappe maareteththa gallassa; he gallas ay kaththika moopite; GODAA goynnanaas shiiqite; Xoossas taman xuugettiza yarsho shiishshite. 
Leviticus23:28 He gallassay GODAA intte Xoossa sinththan asa nagara wurso gallas gidida gishshas he gallas aykkoka ooththofte. 
Leviticus23:29 He gallas banateththaa kawushshidi maarettontta ay asikka deraa giddofe shaaketti dhayo. 
Leviticus23:30 He gallas ay ooso gidiin ooththizaade tani iza iza deraa giddofe shaakka dhayssana; 
Leviticus23:31 Hessa gishshas he gallas intte ay oosokka ooththofte; hayssi ha wogazi intte dizaso ubbaan inttefe guye yaana intte yeletaas eqqi diza mernaa woga gido. 
Leviticus23:32 He aginay gelida uddufunththo gallassa omarsafe biidi tammanththo gallassa omars gakkanaas inttenateththaa kawushshidi he gallassaa Sambata histti bonchchite.» 
Leviticus23:33 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus23:34 «GODAAS Daase ba7aaley laappunththa aginay gelida tammanne ichchashanththo gallassafe doommidi laappun gallas gakkanaas bonchchetto. 
Leviticus23:35 He gallassatappe koyro gallas GODAA goynnanaas shiiqite attiin ay oosokka ooththofte. 
Leviticus23:36 Laappun gallassatan issaan issaan GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho shiishshite; osppunththa gallas qasseka GODAA goynnanaas shiiqite; GODAAS xuugettiza kaththa yarsho yarshite; he gallassay intte shiiqoza wursiza gallas gidida gishshas he gallas aykkoka ooththofte. 
Leviticus23:37 «Intte taman xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarsho qasse hara yarshota ubbaanne ushsha yarsho koshshiza keena woththida gallassan GODAAS shiishshanaas intte geeshsha shiiqo ooththidi awajjanaas bessiza GODAAS doorettida ba7aaleti haytantta. 
Leviticus23:38 Hayti ha yarshoti GODAA Sambata gallassatan intte shiishshizaytappe Xoossas immiza imotatappe adina gaththizaytappenne intte intte dosan coo immizaytappe bollara gujjidi intte immiza imotata. 
Leviticus23:39 «Intte kath shiishshidaappe guye laappunththa aginay gelida tammanne ichchashanththa gallas koyrora hayssa ufayssa ba7aaleza GODAA sinththan laappun gallas gakkanaas bonchchite; koyro gallassinne osppunththa gallassay inttes dumma shemppo gallas gido. 
Leviticus23:40 He koyro gallas intte biittan kaxxiza lo7o miththa ayfeppe, zamba hayth, cilila miththa hagganne haaththinaage miththa hagga oykkidi GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan ufayettishe laappun gallas gakkanaas ba7aale ooththite." 
Leviticus23:41 Hayssaka layththan layththan laappunththa aginan laappun gallas gakkanaas GODAA sinththan bonchchite; hayssi ha wogay inttes naa naa gakkanaas mernaa woga gidi bonchchetto. 
Leviticus23:42 Kumeththa Isra7eele derey laappun gallas gakkanaas daasen utto. 
Leviticus23:43 Hayssanka tani Isra7eele nayta Gibxe biittafe kessida wode istti daasen uttana mala ta ooththidayssa inttefe guye yiza yeletay erana. Tani GODAA intte Xoossaa.» 
Leviticus23:44 Musey hayssaththo ooththidi GODAA ba7aaleta bonchchiza wogaa Isra7eele asaa erisides. 
Leviticus24:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus24:2 «Dunkaanezan pacey baynda poo7ana mala ooththanaas wogara miththafe gum7i xillisi kessida zayte Isra7eele dere asay nees ehana mala azaza. 
Leviticus24:3 Aarooney omars omars xomppeza oyseththo; hessika Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon diza Caaqo Qaala Taabotazappe sinththa baggara diza magalashaappe kare baggara GODAA sinththan gadey wonttana gakkanaas poo7ishe aqo; hayssi ha wogazi sinththafe yaana yeletaas mernaa woga gido. 
Leviticus24:4 Aarooney he xomppeta woththiza walakay baynda worqqafe oosettida ballaza bolla diza xomppeti pacey baynda GODAA sinththan poo7ana mala naago. 
Leviticus24:5 «Tammanne nam7u kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille ekkada tammanne nam7u uketh uukka. 
Leviticus24:6 Ukeththatappe usuppunata bollara walakay baynda worqqan tiyettida xaraphpheeza bolla issi baggara woththa; qasse hankko usuppunata hankko baggara diza maaddaa bolla maaran maaran woththa. 
Leviticus24:7 GODAAS taman xuugetti yarshettiza kaththa yarsho gididayssa qofsanaas muuruta exaane nam7u baggarakka woththa. 
Leviticus24:8 Hayssa ha ukeththaza Sambatan Sambatan ubba wode Aarooney GODAA sinththan Isra7eele asaa gishshas woththo; hayssi Isra7eele asay pacey baynda ooththana mala bessiza caaqo qaala. 
Leviticus24:9 Ukeththay Aaroonessinne iza zereththatas gisha gido; istti ukeththaa GODAAS dummatidason metto; hessika GODAAS taman xuugetti shiiqiza yarshotappe keehi dummatida Aaroonessinne iza zereththatas imettida gisha gido.» 
Leviticus24:10 Aayi baggara Isra7eele, aawa baggara Gibxe dere as gidida issaadey dees; izikka issi gallas ba diza heeran diza issi Isra7eele as gididaarira ooyettides." 
Leviticus24:11 He aayey baggara Isra7eele as gididayssi ooyettishe GODAA sunth cayides; histtiin izaade Musekko ehida; he addeza aaya Daane baggafe gidida Dibraye naa Shalomito geetettawus. 
Leviticus24:12 Istti iza bolla ay qixaate yegganaas bessizaakko GODAY isttas yootana gakkanaas iza qasho keeththan yeggida. 
Leviticus24:13 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus24:14 «He addeza asay dizasoppe gede haraso kessa; izi Xoossa cayishin siyida ubbay hessaadey mooro ooththidayssa markkattanaas issoy issoy ba kushe he addeza hu7e bolla woththo; hessafe kaallidi kumeththa Isra7eele derey iza shuchchan caddi wodho. 
Leviticus24:15 Tana Xoossaa cayida ay asikka hessaththoka ba qixaate ekko. 
Leviticus24:16 GODAA cayida ay as gidiinkka derey ubbay iza shuchchan caddi wodho; Isra7eele as gidiin woykko Isra7eele dere garsan diza hara dere as gidiin GODAA cayidaadey shuchchan cadetti hayqqo. 
Leviticus24:17 «Ase wodhidaadey oonikka hayqon qaxxayetto. 
Leviticus24:18 Asa mehe wodhidaadey iza mala mehe qanxxo; hessi he waagazi shemppo gishshas shemppo qanxxiza woga. 
Leviticus24:19 «Ay asikka hara asa bolla qoho gaththiko izaadey qoho gaththidayssa mala qohoy he gaththidaade bolla gakko. 
Leviticus24:20 Meqeth menththidaades meqeththi meqqo; ayfe toyssidaades ayfey to7o; ach menththidaades achchi meqqo; hara asa bolla ay qohokka gaththidaades izi gaththida qohoza malay iza bolla gakko. 
Leviticus24:21 Mehe wodhidaadey mehe qanxxo; ase wodhidaadey gidikko hayqon qaxxayetto. 
Leviticus24:22 Hayssi wogazi inttes Isra7eele naytas gidiin woykko intte giddon diza hara dere asaa ubbaassa; gaasoykka tani GODAA intte Xoossaa.» 
Leviticus24:23 Musey hessa ubbaa derezas yooti polidaappe guye he Xoossaa cayida addeza asi dizasoppe haraso kessidi shuchchara caddi wodhida; hessaththoka Isra7eele asay GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththida. 
Leviticus25:1 GODAY Siina zuma bollan Muse hizgi azazides," 
Leviticus25:2 «Ne Isra7eele asaas, ‹Tani inttes immiza biitta intte geliza wode laappunththa laappunththa layththan biitta goyontta shaachchi shempison Xoossa bonchchite." 
Leviticus25:3 Usuppun layath kumeth goyitenne zerite; woyne miththay lo7eththi ayfana mala qirxite; ayfekka maxi shiishshite. 
Leviticus25:4 Gido attiin laappunththa layththay taas Xoossaas dumma gidiin biittay shemppo demmiza layth gido; he layth biitta goyopite; woyne miththayka ayfana mala qirxofte. 
Leviticus25:5 Intte zerontta azabba caarida kaththaa inttes maxi shiishshofte; he layththay biittaya mulera shempiza layththa. 
Leviticus25:6 He layth iza aykkoka goyontta aggikokka biittaya inttes intte aylletasinne inttes miishshara ooththizaytas; qasseka hara dereppe yiidi inttenara diza hara yeletatas mizaaz gido. 
Leviticus25:7 Intte mehetassinne intte biitta bolla diza do7atassara meetettizaaz biittaya immana; he iza immizayssi ubbay isttas meetettizaaz gido. 
Leviticus25:8 « ‹Laappunto laappun layth qooda; he layththata qooday oyddu tammanne uddufun layth gidees; 
Leviticus25:9 Laappunththo aginay gelidaappe tammanththa gallas bonchchettiza nagarappe maareteththa gallas kumeththa biittaa bolla zaye zayanaade yeddite. 
Leviticus25:10 Hessaththoka ichchash tammanththo layththaa dummasi shaakkidi biittay bolla dizaytas ubbaas wozzeteth awajjite; hayssafe kase bayzettida gadey kase bayzidaades woykko izaade qommos simmo; aylleteththan bayzettida aylleyka kase ba asaakko simmo. 
Leviticus25:11 He layth goshshe goyidi zereth zeropite; zereth zerontta coo azabba kaxxida kath woykko qirxettontta ayfida woyne miththa ayfe maxi shiishshofte. 
Leviticus25:12 He layththay kumeth inttes dumma shaakettida layth gido; kase intte zerontta coo barkka kaxxida kath xalla miite. 
Leviticus25:13 « ‹Hayssafe kase bayzettida gadey ubbay he wozzo layththan gadaades simmo. 
Leviticus25:14 Hessa gishshas ne asho gidida Isra7eele asaa neni gade bayzidaaz gidikko woykko ne haa nees shammidaaz gidikko gene ooso ooththofa. 
Leviticus25:15 Gadeza waagay heregettanaas bessizay sinththafe biittay simmiza layththay gakkanaappe kase he gadey immana dandayza kaththa qoppi hereganaas bessees. 
Leviticus25:16 Layththay daro gidikko heregaykka daro gido; layththay guuth gidikko heregaykka guuth gido; gadey bayzettiza waagay gadezi immiza kaththaa mala gido. 
Leviticus25:17 Issi Isra7eele asi hara Isra7eele as qohoppo; intte intte Xoossaas yayyite; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus25:18 « ‹Intte intte biittaa bolla saron de7ana mala Xoossa woga ubbaa bonchchite. 
Leviticus25:19 Biittaya inttes gidana kath immana; intteka izippe kallana gakkanaas maana; saroteththanka de7ana. 
Leviticus25:20 « ‹Gido attiin laappunththa layththan goshshe goyonttanne kath zerontta maxontta ay maanee?› giidi oychchiza asi dontta aggenna. 
Leviticus25:21 Usuppunththa layththatan biittayo anjjana; histtiko iza inttes heedzdzu layththas gidana kath immana. 
Leviticus25:22 Osppunththa layththankka goshshe goyishe intte kase shiishshida kaththaa maana; hessa he kaththaa uddufunththa layththan bone kath intte shiishshana gakkanaas izappe maana. 
Leviticus25:23 « ‹Gadey wozzettontta mala bayzanaas bessenna; gaasoykka biittay taassa attiin iza inttes gidukku; intte imaththatanne bete asata mala. 
Leviticus25:24 « ‹Biittay bayzettiko he bayzizaadey he biittaa zaari wozzanayssi erettidaaz gido. 
Leviticus25:25 Isra7eele asaappe issaadey metoppe attanaas ba gade bayzikko izas matiza dabboy he bayzettida gadaa wozzo. 
Leviticus25:26 Izas wozziza mata dabboy dontta aggiko izaadey gam7ishe miishshe demmidi zaari wozzanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus25:27 Hessa wozzanaas izi dandayza wode ba bayzida wodezappe doommidi diza layththaa qoodidi attida layththata miishshaa shammidaades zaaro; hessafe guye kase ba gadeza zaari ekko. 
Leviticus25:28 Qasseka gadeza wozzanaas gidiza miishshi izas dontta aggiko izi bayzida gadey wozzettiza layththay gakkanaas shammidaade kushen de7o; wozzettiza layththay gakkishin gadey gadaades simmo; gadaadeyka gede ba gaden simmo. 
Leviticus25:29 « ‹Issi asi gimbey gimbettida katama giddon diza keeth bayzidaa gidikko izi bayzidaappe issi layththa garsan zaari wozzanaas dandayees; izi zaari wozzana dandayzay issi layththa garsan xalla. 
Leviticus25:30 Gidikkoka issi layththa garsan zaari wozzanaas dandayontta aggiko hara wode zaari wozzisiza wogay izas deenna; keeththay shammidaades woykko iza naa naas haaro gidi attees; bayzettida miishshay wozzettiza layththankka bayzidaades keeththay simmenna. 
Leviticus25:31 Gimbey gimbettontta coo dere garsan diza keeththati bayzettidaappe guye goshsha biitta mala qoodettidi keeththa goday zaari wozzanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus25:32 « ‹Gido attiin Lewe nayti baas imettida katamatan diza ba keeththata ba koyida ay wodekka wozzanaas dandayeettes. 
Leviticus25:33 Hayti katamatan issi Lewe qommoy keeth bayzikko qasse zaari wozzanaas izi dandayontta aggiko bayzettida miish wozzo layththan izas simmo; gaasoykka Lewe qommoti ba katamatan keexxida keeththati Isra7eele nayta giddon ay wode gakkanaaska isttassa. 
Leviticus25:34 Qasseka istti katamata yuushon diza mehey heemettiza biittay mulekka bayzettofo; he biittay ay wodekka isttassa. 
Leviticus25:35 « ‹Ne bagga Isra7eele asaappe issaadey manqidi bana ayssanaas dandayonttaade gidikko imaththa gidida woykko bete asi ne achchan daana mala ne maaddizayssaththo izakka maadda. 
Leviticus25:36 Ne bagga gidida Isra7eele asi nenara daana mala izappe dich mooppa; ne Xoossas yayya. 
Leviticus25:37 Ne izas tal7e immiko izappe dich oychchofa; ne kath izas wodhera bayzoppa. 
Leviticus25:38 Nena Kanaane biitta laatissanaas nees GODAA gidanaas Gibxe biittafe kessida Xoossay tana. 
Leviticus25:39 « ‹Ne bagga gidida Isra7eele asaappe issaadey manqoteththaafe dendidayssan aylle mala nees haarettanaas bana bayzikko ne iza aylle mala oosisoppa. 
Leviticus25:40 Ne iza ne matan diza imaththa mala woykko miishshas ooththiza oosanchcha mala qooda; izikka ichchashu tammu layth gakkanaas nees ooththo. 
Leviticus25:41 Hessafe guye ba naytara neeppe shaaketti gede baso asakkonne ba duussaso simmo. 
Leviticus25:42 Isra7eele asaa ta Gibxe biittafe kessida ta oosanchchata gidida gishshas istti aylle mala bayzettofetto. 
Leviticus25:43 Ne istta wolqqara haaroppa; ne Xoossaas yayya. 
Leviticus25:44 « ‹Nees attumanne macca aylleti de7ana mala koykko ne yuushon diza Ayzaabeta giddofe shamma ekka. 
Leviticus25:45 Qasseka intte biittan diza bete asatappenne intte biittan yelettida asatappe shammanaas dandayeeta; istti inttes haaro gidetto. 
Leviticus25:46 Heytan intte intte nayta laatissanaas dandayeeta; istti de7iza layththa ubbaan intte naytas ooththizayta gidana; intte qommo gidida Isra7eele as wolqqara haaropite. 
Leviticus25:47 « ‹Intte giddon diza hara dere asaappe issaadey dure gidikko intte bagga gidida Isra7eele naytappe manqo gididay bana hara dere dures woykko izaso asaappe issaades bana aylleteththas aaththi immiko," 
Leviticus25:48 izi bayzettidaappe guye simmidi nam7anththo wozzettanaas dandayees; hessa gishshas iza ishatappe issaadey iza wozzo. 
Leviticus25:49 Iza aawaa ishay woykko iza aawaa isha nay woykko izas mata dabbotappe issaadey iza zaari wozzanaas dandayees; izaadey baas gidiza miishshe shiishshidaa gidikko ba miishshara wozzettanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus25:50 Izi bana haaridaadera issife gididi izi bana barkka bayzida layththaafe doommidi wozzeteththa layththaa gakkanaas diza layththaa qoodo; iza wozzisiza miishshay he layththata qooda gido; izi bana haarizayssara gam7ida wode waagay issi asi ooththidi demmiza kira miishsha keena gido. 
Leviticus25:51 Wozzo layththay gakkanaas buro daro layththati attidaa gidikko ba bayzettida waagaappe he attida layththaa qoodan bana wozziza waagaa qanxxo. 
Leviticus25:52 He attida layththati guuth gidikko ba haarettiin attida layththaa qoodidi bana wozziza waaga qanxxo. 
Leviticus25:53 Izi layththafe layth gakkanaas une ooththiza asa mala bana haaridaadera de7oppe attiin iza wolqqara haaranaas bessenna. 
Leviticus25:54 « ‹Hessaththo hanidi wozzettanaas dandayontta aggiko sinththafe yaana aylleteththafe wozzettiza layththan izinne iza nayti mela yedettetto. 
Leviticus25:55 Isra7eele asay taas aylletanne tani Gibxe biittafe kessida ta oosanchchata; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus26:1 « ‹Intte izas goynnana mala inttes aykkoka eeqa medhdhofte; hessaththoka misle woykko hawulte woykko shuchchafe masetti kezida tuus essofte; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus26:2 « ‹Sambata gallassata naagite; ta keeththaa bonchchite; tani GODAA. 
Leviticus26:3 « ‹Intte ta wogan diikkonne ta azazotakka naagikko," 
Leviticus26:4 tani inttes ira wodera bukisana; biittayakka kath darsa immana; ayfe immiza miththatikka darssi ayfana. 
Leviticus26:5 Intte kaththay keehi daro gidida gishshas intte buro shiisho bolla dishin woyne miththa ayfe qanxxiza wodey gakkana; intte woyne miththa ayfe qanxxidi shiishshi wursontta dishin kath zeriza wodey gakkana; intte kath kalli maana; intte biittankka saroteththan daana. 
Leviticus26:6 « ‹Intte biittas saroteth immana; oonaska babbontta intte woppu gi aqana; iita do7ata intte dereppe ta diggana; hayssafe guye intte deren olay deenna. 
Leviticus26:7 Intte intte morkketa gooddana; isttika intte sinththan mashshan hayqqana. 
Leviticus26:8 Inttefe ichchash asi xeetu as, xeetay qasse 10,000 as gooddana; intte morkkey intte sinththan mashshan wurana." 
Leviticus26:9 « ‹Tani ta sinth intteko zaarana; histtada inttena darsana; ta inttes gelida caaqo qaalaa naagana. 
Leviticus26:10 Kaththay inttes layththafe layth gaththana; hessafe dendidayssan oorath gakkida kath gelththanaas zilayththa kaththaafe attidayssa haraso kesseeta. 
Leviticus26:11 Tani intte giddon deyana; ta inttena shaatettike. 
Leviticus26:12 Tani ubba wode intte giddon simerettana; tani intte Xoos gidana; intteka ta dereta gidana. 
Leviticus26:13 Intte aylleteththan haarettontta mala Gibxe biittafe inttena kessiday tani GODAA intte Xoossaa; tani intte aylleteththa qambara menththada intte dhoqqu giidi baana mala ooththadis. 
Leviticus26:14 « ‹Gido attiin intte ta gizaaz siyontta ixxiko ha azazota ubbaa ooththontta aggiko," 
Leviticus26:15 ta wogaanne ta azazota intte kadhizaa gidikko ta inttenara caaqettida caaqoza intte laalliko," 
Leviticus26:16 he wode tani intte bolla hayssa ehana; gita dagama, gilqateth, ayfe boljesizaaz, asateththa gilqisizaaz qoxo harge ta intte bolla ehana; intte zereth zeranaashin coo mela hada gidana; gaasoykka intte zeridayssa intte morkketi maana." 
Leviticus26:17 Tani intte bolla hanqon dendiza gishshas intte xoonettana; intte ixxiza intte morkketi inttena haarana; oonikka inttena gooddontta intte intterkka baqatana. 
Leviticus26:18 « ‹Hessi wurikka intte bolla gakkidaappe guyekka intte taas azazettontta ixxiko ta intte bolla yeggana qixaateza laappun kushe darsana. 
Leviticus26:19 Intte otoroteththaa wolqqa ta menththana; inttefe bollara saloza birata mala ooththana; intte biittaaka xarqimalaththo ooththana. 
Leviticus26:20 Intte wolqqay coo hada wurana; gaasoykka intte biittay kath immenna; miththatikka ayfettenna. 
Leviticus26:21 « ‹Ha7ikka intte taas ixxis giidi azazettontta aggiko tani intte bolla intte nagaraa keena qixaateza laappun kushe darsana. 
Leviticus26:22 Iita do7ata ta intte giddo yeddana; he do7ati intte nayta wadhdhana; intte miizatakka ubbaa dhayssana; inttefe guuththa asati xalla attana; kase intte hemettiza ogey samana. 
Leviticus26:23 « ‹Hayssi ha qixaatezi intte bolla gakkidaappe guyekka intte ta gizayssa siyontta ixxidi ta bolla intte eqeteth darssiko," 
Leviticus26:24 he wode tanikka inttes morkke gidana; intte nagara gishshas ta inttena laappun dakko qaxxayana. 
Leviticus26:25 Intte tanara caaqqida qaalaa laallida gishshas ta inttena qaxxayanaas intte bolla ola yeddana; intte intte katamatan shiiqiza wode ta intte giddon iita harge kiittana; intte morkketas intte aadhdhi imettana. 
Leviticus26:26 Intte kaththaa tani dhayssiza wode tammu maccassati wuri issi bashen uukkana; izokka maka miishshan geeddari geeddari ekkana; intteka miidi kalleketa. 
Leviticus26:27 « ‹Hayssi ubbay intte bolla gakkiin intte taas azazettontta ixxidi ta bolla makkalli makkalli biikko," 
Leviticus26:28 ta intte bolla hanqon dendana; intte nagaraa gishshas ta inttena laappun dakko qaxxayana. 
Leviticus26:29 Intte kosha daroppe dendidayssan intte nayta asho maana. 
Leviticus26:30 Dhoqqasohon diza intte goynniza eeqa xoossata tani dhayssana; intte exaane yarsho izan shiishshizasoza ta laallana; intte ahaa intte eeqata bolla ta yeggana; ta shemppiya inttena shaatettana. 
Leviticus26:31 Ta intte katamata laallana; intte goynnizasota ta kays histtana; sawiza intte yarshoza ta ekkike. 
Leviticus26:32 Intte biittaa mulera ta dhayssana; heen diza intte morkketi malalettana gakkanaas biittayo ta asi bayndaso histtana. 
Leviticus26:33 Ta intte bolla ola ehada inttena Ayzaabeta giddon laallana; tani ta mashsha kessada inttena gooddana; intte kawoteththay asi baynda biitta gidana; intte katamatikka laalettana. 
Leviticus26:34 Intte intte morkketa biittan diza wode intte biittay kays gidiza gishshas shemppo demmada Sambata layththatan ufayettana. 
Leviticus26:35 Intte biittaya kase intte izin dishin Sambata demmonttaara asay dhayda wode iza shemppo demmana. 
Leviticus26:36 « ‹Intte bete biittan dizayti wurikka carkoy qaaththiza qonashe giiris siyidi dagaman piradhdhi baqatana mala ta ooththana; morkkey olason gooddiin woxxiza mala intte woxxana; ay morkkeyka intte achchan baynda intte dhuphetti kundana. 
Leviticus26:37 Oonikka inttena gooddontta intte intterkka issoy issaara qaxetti kundana; intte intte morkketara eqetti olettanaas dandayekketa. 
Leviticus26:38 Intte bete biidi he deren hayqqana; intte intte morkketa kawoteththan mitetti attana. 
Leviticus26:39 Intte morkketa deren hayqqontta attidayti qasse intte nagaraninne kase intte aawata nagara geedon heen gilqi attana. 
Leviticus26:40 « ‹Gido attiin intte taas ammanettontta aggidayssanne ta bolla makkallida intte nagaraanne intte aawata nagaraa intte paaxikko," 
Leviticus26:41 tani inttes morkke gidada inttena gede intte morkketa biitta yeddana mala tana oosisida intte nagaraa intte paaxikko muumida intte wozinaa intte kawushshidi intte nagaraappe intte simmiko," 
Leviticus26:42 Abrahaamera, Yisaaqaranne Yaaqoobera ta caaqqida caaqo qaalaa qoppana; biittayokka ta qoppana." 
Leviticus26:43 Istti yeggi bida gishshas biittaya asi baynda bazzo gidadus; he wode izin asi baynda bazzo gidada ba Sambata ufayssan bonchchana; istti ta wogaanne ta azazoza kawushshida gishshas istti ooththida nagaraa gishshas qaxxayettana. 
Leviticus26:44 Gidikkoka istti ba morkketa deren diza wode istta mulera dhayssike gaada ta caaqqida qaalaa mabeekke; ta inttena aggaagikke; ta inttena harassetike; tani GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Leviticus26:45 Tani istta Xoossaa gidana gaada Ayzaabe asay beyishin Gibxe biittafe kessida istta aawatara caaqqida caaqoza ta qoppana; tani GODAA› gees.» 
Leviticus26:46 Isra7eele deraas yootana mala Musey Siina zumaa bolla dishin Xoossi izas immida wogati, maaratinne azazoti haytantta." 
Leviticus27:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Leviticus27:2 «Isra7eele asaas, ‹Ay asikka GODAAS as immanaas adinettiin he adinay polettiko he immana gi adinettidayssa wozzanaas adina wogay," 
Leviticus27:3 hessaade layththay nam7u tammaafe biidi usuppun tammu kumida attuma as gidikko GODAA Keeththan erettida meezaanen meezaanettidi ichchash tammu gidiza saqile bira qanxxo. 
Leviticus27:4 Macca gidikko heedzdzu tammu saqile bira gido; 
Leviticus27:5 qasseka ichchash layththafe biidi nam7u tammu layth gakkanaas diza attuma naa gidikko nam7u tammu saqile bira, macca naa gidikko tammu saqile bira qanxxo;" 
Leviticus27:6 issi aginappe biidi ichchash layth gakkanaas diza attuma naa gidikko ichchash saqile bira qanxxo; he layththata giddon diza macca naas gidikko heedzdzu saqile bira qanxxo. 
Leviticus27:7 Hessaththoka layththay usuppun tammaafe bollara diza attuma as gidikko tammanne ichchash saqile bira, macca gidikko tammu saqile bira qanxxo." 
Leviticus27:8 Adina adinettidaadey hayssa ha heregettoyssa qanxxanaas dandayontta keehi manqo gidikko izi ba immana gi adinidayssa qeeseza sinth ekki yo; qeesezikka adinettidaade xeelli be7idi izaade wolqqa keena herego. 
Leviticus27:9 « ‹Adina adinettidayssi Xoossas yarshanaas bessiza mehe gidikko hessa mala mehey Xoossas dumma gidida gishshas wozzettenna. 
Leviticus27:10 Adina adinettidaadey ba adinettida meheza hara mehen laammofo; gido attiin iitazakka lo7o mehen laammizaa gidikko izi kase ehoyssara nam7ayka Xoossas dummatidayta gidetto. 
Leviticus27:11 Izaadey immizayssi Xoossas yarshettanaas bessontta mehe gidikko he meheza ehidaadey meheza qeesekko eho. 
Leviticus27:12 Qeesezi he meheza iitateththinne iza lo7eteth caddi xeellidi izi kessana waaga yooto; he izi gida waagay izi gida mala hano. 
Leviticus27:13 He meheza goday meheza zaari miishshara shammana koykko he meheza waaga bolla xeetappe nam7u tammu kushe gujjidi shammo. 
Leviticus27:14 « ‹Issaadey ba keeth GODAAS dumma imota immiko qeeseta halaqay keeththay iitakkonne lo7okko iza hanoteth caddi xeelli heregidi waaga yooto; he qeesezi heregida waagay keeththaas herega gido. 
Leviticus27:15 Kase keeththaa goday he keeththaa zaari wozzana koykko heregettida waaga xeetappe nam7u tammu kushe bollara gujjidi keeththaa baas ekko. 
Leviticus27:16 « ‹Issaadey ba gadeppe shaakki GODAAS dumma imota immiko biittay immiza kaththaa mala heregetto; hessika issi kilo bangga gishshas ichchash tammu saqile biray qanxxetto. 
Leviticus27:17 Gadeza goday kase gadeza immiday wozzo layththa ba7aaleppe guye gidikko gades kase wodhdhida wogay laamettenna. 
Leviticus27:18 Izaadey gadaa immiday ichchash tammanththo layththaafe guye gidikko qeesezi hereganay yiza ichchash tammanththo layth gakkanaas diza attida layththaa qoodidi herego; miishshaafe ashshi ciggo. 
Leviticus27:19 Gadeza immidaadey zaari wozzana koykko kase gadezi heregettida waaga bolla xeetappe nam7u kushe gujjidi zaari wozzo. 
Leviticus27:20 Kase gadey ba gadaa Xoossafe miishshan wozzanaappe sinththan hara asas bayzidaa gidikko qasse he gadeza nam7anththo zaari wozzana wogay izas deenna. 
Leviticus27:21 Wozzo layththan gadey simmiza wode he gadezi gidikko GODAAS dummatidi qeeseta laata gade gidi atto. 
Leviticus27:22 « ‹Issaadey hara asappe shammi ekkida gade Xoossas immana koykko," 
Leviticus27:23 kaalli yiza wozzo layth gakkanaas gadezi kessana waaga qeesezi herego; he gallas he heregettida miish gadaadey qanxxo; he miishshayka Xoossa oosos dummatidaaz gidana. 
Leviticus27:24 Wozzo layththa ba7aaley gakkiza wode he gadeza koyro laatan ekkidi bayzidaades gadezi simmo. 
Leviticus27:25 He heregaza waagay GODAA Keeththan erettida meezaanen meezaanettidi nam7u tammu saqile gido. 
Leviticus27:26 « ‹Koyro bayra yelettida mehey izi kasekka GODAAS gidida gishshas oonikka iza Xoossas mela kiyateth immanaas dandayenna; galo mar gidiin woykko dorsanne deysha laaqqati kasetidi Xoossas dummatidayta. 
Leviticus27:27 Iza bolla wosoy diza mehenne yarsho shiishshanaas bessontta mehe gidikko he meheza goday iza heregettida waagaa bolla xeetaappe nam7u tammu kushe gujjidi zaari wozzi ekkanaas dandayees; iza goday wozzi ekkanaas koyontta ixxiko he heregettida waagaan hara asas bayzetto. 
Leviticus27:28 « ‹Issaadey ba godaas baas dizayssafe as gidiin woykko mehe, gidiin woykko gade gidiin kumeththara dumma shaakkidaappe guye mulekka bayzanaassinne zaari wozzanaas bessenna." 
Leviticus27:29 « ‹Asa giddofe shaakettidi deyana mala pirdettidaadey wozzettofo; izaadey hayqqanaas bessees. 
Leviticus27:30 « ‹Biittafe mokkiza kath gidiin woykko miththa ayfe gidiin tammaafe issoy Xoossas dummatida asraata. 
Leviticus27:31 Hessafe awayssaka baas wozzi ekkanaas koyzaadey he miishshay bayzettiza waagaas xeetappe nam7u tammu kushe gujjidi shammanaas dandayees. 
Leviticus27:32 Soo mehetappe tammaafe issay Xoossa gisha; mehey taybettishin tammanththay tammanththay GODAAS dumma shaakettidaaza. 
Leviticus27:33 Tammanththa mehey iita gidiin woykko lo7o gidiin dooroppo; woykko harara laammofo; laammizaa gidikko koyroyssinne laame imettidayssara nam7ayka GODAAS dummatidaaz gideettes attiin zaari wozzanaas dandayenna› ga yoota.» 
Leviticus27:34 Siina zumaa bolla GODAY Muse baggara Isra7eele asaa azazida azazoti haytantta. 
Numbers1:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxeppe kezida nam7anththo layththan nam7anththa aginay doommida koyro gallas istti Siina bazzon dishin GODAY Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddon Musera gayttidi," 
Numbers1:2 «Attumasaa issaa issaa sunththan sunththan xaafada Isra7eele asaa qommon qommoninne zarkken zarkken qooda. 
Numbers1:3 Neninne Aarooney isttas layththay nam7u tammunne izappe bollara diza oletti dandayana attumasata istta maaran maaran qoodite. 
Numbers1:4 Dumma dumma zarkketappe istta kaaleththiza isttas aawatiza korapinneti inttenara gidetto. 
Numbers1:5 Inttena maaddanayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayta, Oroobeele zarkkefe Shaadure naa Elxuure," 
Numbers1:6 Simoona zarkkefe Xurshadaye naa Salum7eele," 
Numbers1:7 Yuhuda zarkkefe Aminadaabe naa Ne7asoone," 
Numbers1:8 Yisakoore zarkkefe Xu7aare naa Natina7eele," 
Numbers1:9 Zaabiloone zarkkefe Heloone naa Elyaabe," 
Numbers1:10 Yooseefe naytappe Efreeme qommoti Amihuude naa Elshama Minaase naytappe Pedaxuure naa Gamal7eele," 
Numbers1:11 Biniyaame zarkkefe Gidi7oone naa Abidaane 
Numbers1:12 Daane zarkkefe Amishadaye naa Ahi7ezeere," 
Numbers1:13 Aaseere zarkkefe Okra naa Fagu7eele," 
Numbers1:14 Gaade zarkkefe Da7u7eele naa Elyaasaafe," 
Numbers1:15 Niftaaleme zarkkefe Enaane naa Ahire» gi yootides. 
Numbers1:16 Maabaraa garsafe zarkkefe zarkkefe Isra7eele asaa kaaleththanaas doorettida korapinneti haytantta. 
Numbers1:17 Museynne Aarooney hayta bantta sunththan xaafettidayta ekkida. 
Numbers1:18 Nam7anththo aginay doommida koyro gallas maabaraza kumeth issi bolla shiishshidi zarkken zarkkeninne dabbon dabbon shiishshidaappe guye dereza qoodida; yelettiin layththay nam7u tammu kumidaytanne hessafekka bollara gidida attumasaa istta sunththan sunththan mazgabi qoodida. 
Numbers1:19 Hessaththoka Musey GODAY azazida mala Siina bazzon dereza qoodides. 
Numbers1:20 Ola olettanaas dandayzayta layththay nam7u tammaanne hessafekka bollara dizayti bantta zarkkefe zarkkefe qoodettida; addeta qooday hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Numbers1:21 Oroobeele zarkkefe 46,500," 
Numbers1:22 Simoona zarkkefe 59,300," 
Numbers1:23  
Numbers1:24 Gaade zarkkefe 45,650" 
Numbers1:25  
Numbers1:26 Yuhuda zarkkefe 74,600," 
Numbers1:27  
Numbers1:28 Yisakoore zarkkefe 54,400," 
Numbers1:29  
Numbers1:30 Zaabiloone zarkkefe 57,400," 
Numbers1:31  
Numbers1:32 Yooseefe naa Efreeme zarkkefe 40,500," 
Numbers1:33  
Numbers1:34 Yooseefe naa Minaase zarkkefe 32,200," 
Numbers1:35  
Numbers1:36 Biniyaame zarkkefe 35,400," 
Numbers1:37  
Numbers1:38 Daane zarkkefe 62,700," 
Numbers1:39  
Numbers1:40 Aaseere zarkkefe 41,500," 
Numbers1:41  
Numbers1:42 Niftaaleme zarkkefe 53,400." 
Numbers1:43  
Numbers1:44 Musey, Aarooneynne tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zarkketa korapinneti qoodida attuma asay haytantta;" 
Numbers1:45 olas baana dandayza addeti ubbay isttas layththay nam7u tammanne hessafekka bollara dizayti ba zarkken zarkken qoodettida. 
Numbers1:46 Heyta qooday issi bolla 603,550 gidides." 
Numbers1:47 Gido attiin hankko zarkketara Lewe zarkketi qoodettibeettenna. 
Numbers1:48 Kase GODAY Muses," 
Numbers1:49 «Ne Isra7eele attuma asaa qoodashe Lewe zarkketa isttara gaththa qoodoppa. 
Numbers1:50 Lewe zarkketi gidikko Gaytoteththa Dunkaanenne iza giddon go7ettiza miishshaa bolla alaafeteth imma; istti Dunkaanezanne iza giddon go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa tookketto; dunkaana giddon ooththetto; iza yuushon dunkaani uttetto. 
Numbers1:51 Intte kase dunkaani dizasoppe dendi biza wode Lewe zarkketi xalala Dunkaaneza shoddi laallidi istti shempiza ooraththason isttaka tokketto; isttafe attiin dunkaanaakko shiiqiza ay asikka hayqon qaxxayetto. 
Numbers1:52 Hankko attida Isra7eele asay ba butten butteninne ba diza gutan gutan ba bandira bandira tokketto. 
Numbers1:53 Gido attiin ay asikka dunkaanaakko shiiqidi tana hanqeththidi Isra7eele deraa dhaysisontta mala Lewe zarkketi he Dunkaaneza yuushon dunkaanidi naagetto» gides. 
Numbers1:54 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay GODAY Muse azazida mala ubbaaka ooththida. 
Numbers2:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Numbers2:2 «Isra7eele asay ba bagga bagga asaa erisiza malatanne bantta zarkke zarkke erisiza bandira kaallidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe guuththara haakkidi iza yuushon dunkaano.» 
Numbers2:3 Arshey mokkiza baggara Yuhuda zarkketi uttetto; Yuhuda zarkke kaaleththanay Aminadaabe naa Ne7asoone. 
Numbers2:4 Izi kaaleththiza asaa qooday 74,600." 
Numbers2:5 Yuhuda zarkketappe kaallidi Yisakoore qommoti istta matan dunkaani uttetto; Yisakoore zarkketa kaaleththanay Xu7aare naa Natina7eele. 
Numbers2:6 He izappe garsara diza asaa qooday 54,400." 
Numbers2:7 Yisakoore zarkketappe kaallidi Zaabiloone zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; Zaabiloone zarkketa kaaleththanay Heloone naa Elyaabe. 
Numbers2:8 Izas diza asaa qooday 57,400." 
Numbers2:9 Ba zarkken zarkken gididi Yuhuda zarkketi dunkaanida baggara uttida asaa qooday kumeth 186,400; asaappe sinth bizay hayssa ha buttezan diza asaa." 
Numbers2:10 Dugeha baggara Oroobeele zarkketi ba baggata erisiza malata garsan dunkaani uttetto; Oroobeele zarkketa kaaleththizay Shaadure naa Elxuure. 
Numbers2:11 Istta qooday 46,500." 
Numbers2:12 Oroobeele zarkketappe kaallidi Simoona zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; istta kaaleththanay Xurshadaye naa Salum7eele. 
Numbers2:13 Istta qooday 59,300." 
Numbers2:14 Isttafe kaallidi Gaade zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; Gaade zarkketa kaaleththanay Era7u7eele naa Elyaasaafe. 
Numbers2:15 Heytantta qooday 45,650." 
Numbers2:16 Istti ba zarkken zarkken gididi Oroobeeley dunkaani uttida baggara dunkaanida asaa qooday kumeth 151,450 gidides; Yuhuda buttezappe kaallidi nam7anththora bizay Oroobeele butteza." 
Numbers2:17 Koyro nam7u buttetappenne wurseththa nam7u buttetappe giddon Lewe baggati Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza tookkidi betto; issi issi buttey ba qommoy shaaketti erettana mala dumma malata garsan bantta tara tara naagidi betto. 
Numbers2:18 Arshey wulliza baggara Efreeme zarkketi ba baggata erisiza mala garsan dunkaani uttetto; Efreeme zarkke kaaleththanay Amihuude naa Elshama. 
Numbers2:19 Isttas qooday 40,500." 
Numbers2:20 Efreeme zarkketappe kaallidi Minaase zarkketi dunkaanetto; Minaase zarkketa kaaleththanay Pedaxuure naa Gamal7eele. 
Numbers2:21 Istta qooday 32,200." 
Numbers2:22 Isttafe kaallidi Biniyaame zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; Biniyaame zarkketa kaaleththanay Gidi7oone naa Abidaane. 
Numbers2:23 He istta qooday 35,400." 
Numbers2:24 Istti ba zarkken zarkken gididi Efreeme zarkketi dunkaani uttida baggara dunkaanida asaa qooday 108,100 gidides; Oroobeele butteza kaallidi heedzdzanththon Efreeme buttey bo." 
Numbers2:25 Pudeha baggara Daane zarkketi ba baggata erisiza malata garsan dunkaani uttetto; Daane qommota kaaleththana halaqay Amishadaye naa Ahi7ezeere. 
Numbers2:26 Istta qooday 62,700." 
Numbers2:27 Daane zarkketappe kaallidi Aaseere zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; Aaseere zarkketa kaaleththana halaqay Okra naa Fagu7eele. 
Numbers2:28 Istta qooday 41,500." 
Numbers2:29 Isttafe kaallidi Niftaaleme zarkketi dunkaani uttetto; Niftaaleme zarkketa kaaleththana halaqay Enaane naa Ahire. 
Numbers2:30 Heytantta qooday 53,400." 
Numbers2:31 Istti ba zarkken zarkken gididi Daane zarkketi dunkaani uttida baggara dunkaanida asaa qooday kumeth 157,600 gidides. Hessaththoka Daane zarkketi wurseththan oydanththo maaran betto." 
Numbers2:32 Isra7eele asay bason basoninne ba zarkken zarkken mazgabettidayta qooday issi bolla 603,550 gidides." 
Numbers2:33 Lewe zarkketi gidikko GODAY kase Muse azazida mala hankko Isra7eele asaara qoodettibeettenna. 
Numbers2:34 Hessa malan Isra7eele asay GODAY kase Muse azazida mala ooththida; istta zarkketappe issoy issoy ba bandira bandira kaalli kaalli dunkaani uttides; issoy issoy ba soo asaara issife hemettees. 
Numbers3:1 GODAY Muse Siina zuma bolla haasayssiza wode Aaroone yeletaynne Muse yeletay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; 
Numbers3:2 Aaroones oyddu attuma nayti deettes; heytikka bayrazi Nadaabe gidishin hankkoyti Abihu, El7ezeerenne Itamaare." 
Numbers3:3 Heyti qeeseteththan ooththana mala tiyettidanne summida. 
Numbers3:4 Gido attiin istta garsafe Nadaabeynne Abihuy Siina bazzon GODAA sinththan bessontta tama ehidi eeththida gishshas GODAA hanqon boshetti hayqqida; Isttas nay baynda gishshas El7ezeereynne Itamaarey xalla istta aawa Aarooney shemppora paxa diza wode ubbaan qeeseteththan ooththida. 
Numbers3:5 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers3:6 «Neni Lewe zarkketa shiishshada istti qeese Aaroone ooson maaddana mala woththa. 
Numbers3:7 Istti Aaroonenne kumeththa maabaraa Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon ooththi maadon ba oosoza ooththi poletto. 
Numbers3:8 Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon diza ooso miishshatas istta alaafe gidetto; Dunkaaneza giddon Isra7eele asaas oosettiza ooso ooththi poletto. 
Numbers3:9 Isra7eele asaa ubbaafe istti shaakettidi Aaroonenne iza nayta ooson maaddana mala Lewe zarkketa woththa. 
Numbers3:10 Qeeseteththa oosoza istti polana mala Aaroonenne iza nayta ne sunththa; isttafe attiin hara asi hayssa ha oosoza ooththanaas Gaytoteththa dunkaanezakko shiiqizaa gidikko izaadey hayqon qaxxayetto.» 
Numbers3:11 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers3:12 «Hekko Lewe qommoti taas haggazizayta; tani Gibxe dere asaa bayra wursa wodhida wode Isra7eele asaappe issaafe issaafe yelettida bayranne istta meheta bayrata kumeth taas dummasadis; gido attiin ha7i qasse bayra gidi yelettida attuma nayta sohon Lewe zarkketa tani taas dooradis; istti taas ooththizayta gidana; tani GODAA.» 
Numbers3:13  
Numbers3:14 GODAY Muses Siina zumaa bolla hizgides," 
Numbers3:15 «Lewe zareta istta istta zarkken zarkkeninne istta qommon qommon qooda; yelettiin izas issi agina kumidayssanne hessafe bollara diza attuma naa wursaka qooda.» 
Numbers3:16 Museykka GODAY iza azazida mala qoodides. 
Numbers3:17 Lewes heedzdzu attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare geetetteettes." 
Numbers3:18 Gershoone zarkketi Libinanne Shim7e geetetteettes. 
Numbers3:19 Qa7aate zarkketi Amiraame Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele geetetteettes" 
Numbers3:20 Meraare zarkketi Mahilenne Mushe geetetteettes; heytantti ba sunththan sunththan ba keeththa asaas aawatizayta. 
Numbers3:21 Libinanne Shim7e keeththa asay Gershoone zarkken qoodettida. 
Numbers3:22 Yelettiin issi agina gidida naappe doommidi mazgabettida attumasaa qooday 7,500." 
Numbers3:23 Gershoone baggati Dunkaanezappe guye baggara arshey wulliza baggara dunkaanida. 
Numbers3:24 Gershoone baggata kaaleththizay La7eele naa Elyaasaafe. 
Numbers3:25 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen Gershoone zarkketa alaafeteththi, Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza kamatanne penge bolla qaaphettiza magalashata," 
Numbers3:26 Gibbeza giddo magalashata, Dunkaanezanne yarsho yarshizasoza yuuyi aadhdhida gibbeza pengaa magalasha toletanne hessaththoka heytanttas gidiza miishshata ubbata naago." 
Numbers3:27 Amiraame, Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele soo asay Qa7aate zarkken qoodettida." 
Numbers3:28 Yelettiin issi aginanne hessafe bollara gidida attumasaa qooday 8,600; heytantti Gaytoteththa dunkaaneza naageettes." 
Numbers3:29 Qa7aate zarkketi Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe guyera dugeha baggara dunkaanida. 
Numbers3:30 Qa7aate qommota kaaleththiza korapinney Uzi7eele naa Elxafaane. 
Numbers3:31 Istta alaafeteththi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa bolla, maadda iza bolla woththiza xaraphpheeza bolla, xomppe iza bolla woththizayssa bolla, yarsho iza bolla yarshizayssa bolla, qeeseti dumma qol7azan go7ettiza miishshata bolla, gede Dunkaanezas ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a gelizaso baggara diza magalashaa gidishin kumeth hayta ha miishshata bolla isttas naagana alaafeteththi dees." 
Numbers3:32 Lewe zarkke ubbaa halaqay qeese Aaroone naa El7ezeere; izi dummatida qol7an ooththizayta ubbaa bolla alaafe. 
Numbers3:33 Mahile soo asaynne Mushe soo asay Meraare zarkkera issino gidida; heyti Meraare zarkken qoodettida. 
Numbers3:34 Yelettiin issi agina gidida guuththa naappe doommidi qoodettida attumasaa qooday usupun xeetanne nam7u xeeta. 
Numbers3:35 Meraare zarkketa kaaleththizay Xuri7eele naa Abi7eele; istti Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe pudeha baggara dunkaani uttida. 
Numbers3:36 Istta alaafeteththi Dunkaaneza toleta, kolatata, tuussatanne tuussata isttan essiza tohota, hessaththoka hara oosos go7ettiza miishshata bollanne heytanttas bessiza oosota ooththana alaafeteththi dees." 
Numbers3:37 Hessaththoka gibbeza yuushon diza tuussata, Dunkaaneza toleta, dhishketanne tole wodorota bolla alaafeteththi dees." 
Numbers3:38 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe arshey mokkiza baggara dunkaani uttanayti Muse, Aaroonenne iza nayta; Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddon Isra7eele asaa gishshas oosettiza ay ooso gidikkoka he oosoza woga polisiza alaafey istta gidetto; haray oonikka gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaane keeththazakko shiiqikko hayqon qaxxayetto." 
Numbers3:39 GODAY istta azazida mala Museynne Aarooney yelettiin issi agina gidida naappe doommidi asay ba keeththan keeththan mazgabida Lewe qommotappe attuma nayti kumeth 22,000 gidida." 
Numbers3:40 GODAY Muses, «Isra7eelen bayra gidi yelettida attuma naytas layththay issi aginanne hessafe bollara gididayta qoodada istta sunththaa xaafa." 
Numbers3:41 Isra7eele asaa bayra nayta ubbaa saama Lewe nayta, hessaththoka Isra7eele asaa mehe bayra ubbaa saama Lewe qommota mehe ekka; Tani GODAA» gides." 
Numbers3:42 Museykka bana GODAY azazida mala Isra7eele asaa garsan bayra gidi yelettidayta ubbaa qoodides. 
Numbers3:43 Istti yelettiin issi aginanne hessafe bollara gidida bayra attuma nayta ubbaa istta sunththan sunththan qoodiin istta qooday 22,273 gidides." 
Numbers3:44 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers3:45 «Hessa gishshas bayra giidi yelettida Isra7eele asaa attuma nayta sohon Leweta ne taas shaakka; hessaththoka Isra7eele asaa mehe bayra sohon Leweta mehe taas dummasa; tani GODAA. 
Numbers3:46 Isra7eele asay yelida bayra nayta qooday Lewe qommotappe 273 gidi dariza gishshas heyta tirpa attuma nayta miishshan wozza. 
Numbers3:47 Issaa issaa wozzanaas Gaytoteththa Dunkaane meezaaneza mala ichchashu Saqile bira ekka; 
Numbers3:48 He attida wozzo miishshaa Aaroonessinne iza naytas imma.» 
Numbers3:49 Museykka Lewe qommotan wozzettidaytappe bollara tirpida 273 asata gishshas shiiqida wozzo miishshaa ekkides. 
Numbers3:50 Isra7eele asaa bayratappe Gaytoteththa Dunkaane meezaaneza mala miishshaa 1,365 saqile bira ekkides." 
Numbers3:51 GODAY azazida mala Musey wozzo miishshaa Aaroonessinne iza naytas immides. 
Numbers4:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides," 
Numbers4:2 «Lewe nayta giddofe Qa7aate zareta istta soo asaan asaan istta mata dabbon dabbon qooda. 
Numbers4:3 Gaytoteththa dunkaanezan ooththanaas dandayzayta, istta layththi heedzdzu tammaafe biidi ichchashu tammu gakkanaas diza attumasata ubbaa mazgaba." 
Numbers4:4 Istti ooththana oosoy Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon diza ubbaafe dumma geeshsha miishshata naago gidana. 
Numbers4:5 Asay ba dizasoppe dendi bishin Aarooneynne iza nayti dunkaanezan gelidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza sinththan diza magalashaa duge woththidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza izan xaaxetto. 
Numbers4:6 Iza kammanaas qaacettida galbaa magalashaza bollara woththidi hessa bolla mulera salo mala kareththa may7o iza bolla miccidi mayzetto; histtidi tooho miththata qalabate lukozan gelththetto. 
Numbers4:7 «GODAAS shiiqiza dumma ukeththaa iza bolla woththiza gabateza salo misatiza kareththa carqqan kammetto; Gabateza bolla shel7eta, Cilfata, xuu7atanne woyne ushshu duuqqiza miishshatanne uketh ubba wode pacey baynda iza bolla woththetto." 
Numbers4:8 Hessa ubbaa zo7o carqqan kammidi bollara qaacettida galba mayzetto; isttan tookkiza tooho miththata qalabate lukozan gelththetto. 
Numbers4:9 «Salo misatiza kareththa carqqaza ekkidi xomppe iza bolla woththizayssanne xomppeta, qaphetanne bidinth woththiza kon7ata, hessaththoka zayte woththiza miishshata ubbaa issi bolla kammetto." 
Numbers4:10 Xomppezanne xomppezas koshshiza miishshata ubbaaka iza kammiza galban xaaxidi izara tookkiza halaa bolla woththetto. 
Numbers4:11 «Kaaleththidi worqqafe oosettida yarsho yarshizayssa bolla salo misatiza carqqan kammidi qaacettida galbaa bollara mayzidi tooho miththata izan gelththetto. 
Numbers4:12 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa ekkidi salo mala kareththa carqqan kammetto; qaacettida lee7e galba iza bollara kammidi tooho miththaa bolla woththetto. 
Numbers4:13 Bidinththaza yarsho yarshizasoza bollafe pittidi yarsho yarshizasoza ochcha teera misatiza carqqan kammetto. 
Numbers4:14 Yarsho yarshizasozan ooththanaas go7ettiza miishshata heytikka hulaleta, menxota, tama kaashiza miishshatanne guuqa saaneta iza bolla woththetto; qaacettida lee7e galba iza bolla kammidi tooho miththata izan gelththetto." 
Numbers4:15 Istti ba diza heeraappe dendi bishin Aarooneynne iza nayti geeshsha miishshatanne he miishshati isttan go7ettiza miishshata ubbaaka kammidaappe guye Qa7aate nayti yiidi tooketto; gido attiin istti hayqqontta mala he geeshsha miishshata kushen bochchanaas bessenna; hessa gishshas Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezi dendiza wode hessi wurikka Qa7aate nayta alaafeteththa. 
Numbers4:16 «Qeeseza Aaroone naa El7ezeerey xomppeza zayte lo7o sawo sawiza exaane, ubba wode shiiqiza kaththa yarshozaninne tiyettiza zayteza bolla izas alaafeteththi de7o; hessaththoka Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezanne iza giddonkka diza geeshsha miishshata ubbaa naago.»" 
Numbers4:17 GODAY Musenne Aaroone hizgides," 
Numbers4:18 «Qa7aate nayti Lewe qommota giddofe dhayana mala ooththofte. 
Numbers4:19 Gede ubbaafe dumma geeshsha miishshatakko shiiqidi istti hayqqontta mala istta Aarooneynne iza nayti Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen gelidi asaas issaas issaas oosonne izaade tooho shaakki immetto. 
Numbers4:20 Gido attiin istti hayqqontta mala Qa7aate nayti Dunkaaneza giddo gelidi beyanaas guuththa wodeska xeellopetto.» 
Numbers4:21 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers4:22 «Lewe zarkketa garsafe Gershoone nayta istta dabbon dabboninne istta yeletan yeletan qooda. 
Numbers4:23 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththanaas dandayzayta heedzdzu tammu layththafe biidi ichchashu tammu layth gakkanaas diza attumasata ubbaa qooda. 
Numbers4:24 «Dumma dumma miishshata tookkana alaafeteththi isttas dees. 
Numbers4:25 Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza soo baggaranne kare baggara kammiza bollarakka iza bolla kammiza qaacettida lee7e galbaanne geloso pengezakka tookketto. 
Numbers4:26 Hessaththoka Dunkaanezanne yarsho yarshosoho gibbeza yuuyi aadhdhida magalashata, tole wodorota, gibbe gelizaso penge magalashatanne heytantta ooththanaas giigettida miishshatakka istti tookketto; heyta he miishshatas gidiza ay oosokka istti poletto." 
Numbers4:27 Gershoone nayti ooththiza ooso gidiin woykko tooho gidiin Aarooneynne iza nayti istta azazida mala ooththetto; istti tookkanaas bessiza miishshaa kumeth ne isttas gisha imma. 
Numbers4:28 Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon Gershoone nayta oosoy hessa; istta ooso qeese Aaroone naa Itamaarey xeelli oosiso. 
Numbers4:29 «Lewe zarkkefe gidida Meraare nayta istta zarkken zarkkeninne istta yeletan yeletan qooda. 
Numbers4:30 Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddon ooththanaas dandayzayta isttas layththay 30 layththafe biidi 50 layth gakkanaas diza attumasata ubbaa qooda. 
Numbers4:31 Istti tookkanaas bessizay Dunkaaneza toletanne toleta giddora gelizayta, tuussata; Dunkaanezi izan tolettiza miishshata." 
Numbers4:32 Hessaththoka Dunkaaneza yuushon diza demban eqqiza tuussata tohota; toleta wodorotanne heyta ubbatas koshshiza miishshata; issi issi asi tookkanaas bessiza miishshay iza sunththan sunththan izas utto. 
Numbers4:33 Qeese Aaroone naa Itamaarey oosoza naagetti oosisanaas Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddon Meraare nayta soo asaa oosoy hayssa.» 
Numbers4:34 Musey, Aarooneynne dereza halaqati Qa7aate zereththata istta zarkken zarkkeninne istta dabbon dabbon qoodida." 
Numbers4:35 Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon ooththanaas ooson gelidayta kumeth 30 layththafe biidi 50 layth gididayta qoodida. 
Numbers4:36 Qoodettida asay 2,750 gidides." 
Numbers4:37 GODAY kase Muse azazida mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththidayti Museynne Aarooney qoodida Qa7aate soo asay haytantta. 
Numbers4:38 Ba zarkken zarkkeninne ba dabbon dabbon qoodettida Gershoone nayti," 
Numbers4:39 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththana gelanaas dandayzaytas layththay heedzdzu tammaafe biidi ichchashu tammu layth gakkanaas dizayti wurikka," 
Numbers4:40 nam7u shiyanne usuppun xeetanne heedzdzu tamma. 
Numbers4:41 GODAY Muse azazida mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththidaytinne Museynne Aarooney qoodida Gershoone nayti haytantta. 
Numbers4:42 Ba zarkken zarkkeninne ba dabbon dabbon qoodettida Meraare nayti," 
Numbers4:43 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththana gelanaas dandayzaytas layththay heedzdzu tammaafe biidi ichchashu tammu layth gakkanaas dizayti wurikka," 
Numbers4:44 heedzdzu shiyanne nam7u xeeta. 
Numbers4:45 GODAY Muse azazida mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan haggaziza Museynne Aarooney qoodida Meraare nayti haytantta. 
Numbers4:46 Musey, Aarooneynne Isra7eele halaqati istta qommon qommoninne istta zarkken zarkken qoodida Lewe nayti," 
Numbers4:47 heedzdzu tammu layththafe doommidi 50 layth gakkanaas dizayti Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon oosoza ooththanaas ooththiza miishshata tookkanaas gelidayti," 
Numbers4:48 mulera istta qooday 8,580." 
Numbers4:49 Hessa malan issi issi asi GODAY Muse azazida mala qoodettides; hessaththoka GODAY Muses immida azazo mala issi issi asi tookkanaas alaafeteth ekkides. 
Numbers5:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers5:2 «Inchchirachcha hargey iza bolla dizaade woykko iza bollaafe haaththa malay goggizaade woykko aha bochchidi tunidaade ubbaa Isra7eele asay ba diza gutappe kare kessana mala azaza. 
Numbers5:3 Tani isttara diza istta guta istti tunisontta mala heyta geeyontta asata ubbaa adde gidiin macca gidiin intte giddofe kessi gooddite.» 
Numbers5:4 GODAY Muse azazida mala Isra7eele asay ba gutappe istta kessi gooddides. 
Numbers5:5 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers5:6 «Neni Isra7eele asaas, maccafe gidiin attumasappe ay asikka GODAAS ammanettonttaade gidi beettidi ay asa bollaka qoho gaththiko hessaadey qohanchcha." 
Numbers5:7 Izi ba nagara paaxo; ba qohoza gishshas qanxxettiza miishshaa bolla xeetappe nam7u tammu kushe gujjidi qohettidaades eho. 
Numbers5:8 Gido attiin he qohettidaadey hayqqidaa gidikkonne edaa ekkanaas izas mata dabboy bayndaa gidikko he eday GODAASSA; he edatiza eday qohidaade nagara wursana shiiqiza yarshos immiza dharshozara issife qeesezas imetto. 
Numbers5:9 Hessa malan Isra7eele asay GODAAS immiza dumma imotay wurikka he imotaa ekkiza qeesezas gido. 
Numbers5:10 Issi issi asi GODAAS immiza dumma imotay he imotaa immidaadessa; gido attiin izi qeesezas immizaa gidikko he miishshay qeesezassa.» 
Numbers5:11 Hessafe guye GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers5:12 «Isra7eele asaappe issaade machcha ba azinaas ammanettontta aggada kare kare giikko," 
Numbers5:13 hara addera zin7iko, qasseka iza ooththida tuna oosoy qonccontta azinappe geemmidaa gidikko, izi bolla markkattiza asi beettontta aggiin izi tunateththay qonccontta aggiko," 
Numbers5:14 iza tunida gishshas izi azinay izo sidhanaas dandayees; woykko iza tunontta dishin izi qanaaten kumida gishshas ba machcho sidhana dandayees. 
Numbers5:15 Hessaadey ba machchiyo qeesekko ekki eho; he maccassay gishshas koyettiza issi kilo bangga dhiille yarshos ekki yo; hayssi qanaates shiiqiza kaththa yarshoy qoho qofsizaaz gidiza gishshas zayte iza bolla gussofo; exaanekka iza bolla woththofo. 
Numbers5:16 «Qeesezi maccassayo efidi GODAA sinththan esso. 
Numbers5:17 Geeshsha haath xaaron duuqqi ekko; Gaytoteththa Dunkaane wuygeppe guuththa biitta ekkidi he haaththaan gujjo. 
Numbers5:18 Qeesezi maccassayo GODAA sinththan esso; izi goosse birsho; qanaates shiiqiza kaththa yarshoza izi kushen woththo; qasse he qeesezi qanggeth ehiza camo haath xaarora ba kushen oykko. 
Numbers5:19 Qeesezi izo hizgi caaqeththo; neni ne azinara dishin hara addey nenara aqontta gidikkonne neni nena tunisontta gidikko qanggeth ehiza hayssi camo haaththay nees gometoppo. 
Numbers5:20 Gido attiin neni ne azinappe hara addera zin7ada tunidaa gidikko," 
Numbers5:21 ‹GODAY nees yela ulo melisonne ne ulo puuriso! Ne dereza garsan nena caaqossinne qanggeththas kesso. 
Numbers5:22 Hayssi haaththazi gede ne bolla giddo gelidi ne uloza puuriso! Nees yela uloza gundiso!› Maccassayakka, ‹Amiin! GODAY ta bolla hessaththo ooththo› ga zaaru." 
Numbers5:23 «Hessafe guye qeesezi hessa he qanggeththa qaala xaaththa maxaafan xaafo; he xaafoyssaka camo haaththazi diza xaarozan yeggi meecco. 
Numbers5:24 Izi maccassayo iita sako oyththiza camo haaththaa izo ushshanaappe sinththan," 
Numbers5:25 qeesezi maccassayfe yarsho dhiilleza ekkidi GODAAS yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza dumma yarsho gidana mala yarsho yarshizasoza bolla shiishsho. 
Numbers5:26 Hessafe guye kaththa yarsho issi zolla dhiille ekkidi qofso yarsho gidana mala yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; wurseththan he maccassayo he haaththaa ushsho. 
Numbers5:27 Maccassaya bana tunisada ba azinaas diza ammaneteththaa pacinchchidaa gidikko qanggeth ehiza haaththaa iza uyiza wode izi bolla giddon wolqqama sako ehana; hessika izi uloy puurana; izis yela uloy gundana; izi sunththi izi dereza giddon qanggettidaaz gidi attana. 
Numbers5:28 Gido attiin iza aykko moorokka ooththonttaa gidikko izi bolla aykko qohoykka gakkenna; iza naytakka yelana. 
Numbers5:29 «Issaadey ba machcho laymateththan sidhiza wode ooththana wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa; iza kare kare gaada hara addera zin7ada tunidaa gidikko," 
Numbers5:30 woykko issi asi ba machcho coo mela sidhizaa gidikko iza GODAA sinththan eqqana mala ooththo. 
Numbers5:31 Izi azinazikka qohoppe geesh gidana; maccassaya laymata beettidaa gidikko qasse iza ba qohoza gaason ba bolla gakkiza pirda ekkana.» 
Numbers6:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers6:2 «Isra7eele asaas, ‹Macca gidiin woykko adde gidiin ay asikka bana GODAAS dummasanaas adina adinettiko," 
Numbers6:3 hessaadey woyne ushshu woykko hara maththosiza ushshu uyoppo; woyneppe woykko harappe oosettida caala woykko maththosiza ushshu izi uyoppo; woyne miththa ayfeppe tiya gidiin woykko mela gidiin mooppo. 
Numbers6:4 Izi bana dummasidi diza woden woyne miththa hagga bolla diza ayfe gidiin woykko poqo mooppo. 
Numbers6:5 « ‹Izi naaziraaweteththas adinettida wodey wurana gakkanaas izaade hu7e binana magallay bochchofo; izi bana GODAAS dummasida wodey polettana gakkanaas izi dummatidaade gididi ba hu7e binana dichcho. 
Numbers6:6 Izi naaziraawe gidi diza wode ubbaan hayqqida ahaakko shiiqoppo. 
Numbers6:7 Izi ba Godaas bana dummasida malatay iza hu7e bolla diza gishshas izas aaway woykko aaya woykko izas ishay woykko michcha hayqqiko istta aha bochchidi izi bana tunisoppo. 
Numbers6:8 Izi bana Naaziraawe ooththida wode ubbaan izi GODAAS dummatida asa. 
Numbers6:9 « ‹Izi qoppontta dishin issaadey iza achchan hayqqidi kase dummati diza iza hu7e binana tunisikko izi laappunththa gallas ba hu7e binana meedetti buluso. 
Numbers6:10 Osppunththa gallas nam7u haraphpheta woykko haraphphe ciyeta Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen diza qeesezakko eho. 
Numbers6:11 Qeesezikka issi haraphpheza nagara yarshos nam7anththoza qasse xuugettiza yarshos shiishsho; gaasoykka izi aha mata shiiqidi tunida gishshas qeesezi iza nagaraa wursana; he gallassika naaziraawey ba hu7e iskeza nam7anththo GODAAS dummaso. 
Numbers6:12 Izi naaziraaweteththan ooththanaas bana GODAAS nam7anththo dummaso; GODAAS dummatida he iza iskezi tunida gishshas hessafe kase izi naaziraaweteththan gam7ida wodey izas qoodan gelenna; izi ba qohoza gishshas issi layththa dharsho laaqqa eho. 
Numbers6:13 « ‹Issi naaziraawey ba naaziraaweteththa adina ubba wode izi polana wogay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; izi gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen geliza pengezakko biidi," 
Numbers6:14 heen ba yarsho GODAAS shiishsho; hessika xuugettiza yarshos issi layth kumida dharsho laaqqa, nagara yarshos issi layth kumida uzzi dors, hessaththoka issifeteththa yarshos wosoy baynda dharsho shiishsho." 
Numbers6:15 Qasse kaththa yarshonne ushsha yarsho isttara issife yarshanaas eho; he leematezan kaththa yarshoy irshoy izan gelonttayssa gido; qasse liiqo dhiille zayten munuqi uukkida orde ukeththinne zayten tiyettida lee7e uketh eho. 
Numbers6:16 « ‹Qeesezikka hessa ubbaa nagara yarshonne xuugettiza yarsho ooththidi GODAA sinth shiishsho. 
Numbers6:17 Dharshozanne leematera irshoy izan gelontta ukeththata issifeteththa yarsho ooththidi GODAAS shiishsho; qasse hessara issife gaththidi kaththa yarshonne ushsha yarsho yarsho. 
Numbers6:18 « ‹Hessafe guye Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan geliza penge bolla he naaziraawezi GODAAS adinettida ba hu7e binana meedettidi issifeteththa yarshoy xuugettiza taman yeggo. 
Numbers6:19 « ‹Bana Godaas dummasida naaziraawey ba hu7e binana meedettidaappe guye qeesezi doysettida dharshoza missa asho, irshoy gelontta uukettida orde ukeththinne lee7e uketh leemateppe ekkidi he naaziraaweza kushen woththo." 
Numbers6:20 Hessafe guye qeesezi ubbaa ekkidi GODAA sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histti shiishsho; heytikka GODAAS dummatida yarsho; he qaaseththida angasoynne missazi qeesezas gido; hessafe guye naaziraawezi woyne ushshu uyanaas dandayees. 
Numbers6:21 « ‹Hessa gishshas GODAAS bana dummasanaas adinida naaziraawes wodhdhida wogay bana Godaas yarshanaas koshshiza yarshotappe bollara aaththi geppiko izi qaala gelida mala ba adinaa polanaas bessees ga yoota› gees.» 
Numbers6:22 GODAY Muses hizgides; 
Numbers6:23 «Aarooneynne iza nayti Isra7eele deraa anjjishe hizgi anjjetto," 
Numbers6:24 ‹GODAY nena anjjo; izi nena naago; 
Numbers6:25 GODAY ba ayfeso poo7o nees qoncciso; izi nees qadhetto. 
Numbers6:26 GODAY nena ba maaroteththa ayfen xeello; ba saroteththka izi nees immo› gaada yoota.» 
Numbers6:27 Qasseka GODAY, «Istti Isra7eele asaa ta sunththan anjjiza wode tani istta anjjana» gides." 
Numbers7:1 Musey Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza toli giigida wode Dunkaanezanne izan go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa, yarsho yarshizasozanne izan go7ettiza miishshata tiydi dummasides." 
Numbers7:2 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizayti, deraa qoodiza wode istta bolla alaafeteththi diza korapinneti wuri ba yarsho yarsho GODAAS shiishshida." 
Numbers7:3 Istti shiishshida yarshoti nam7u nam7u halaqata sunththan issi para-gaare, hessaththoka issi issi halaqa sunththan issi issi boora; he istti shiishshida yarshoti issi bolla usuppun para-gaaretanne tamman nam7u boorata; heyta he yarshotakka Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza sinththan shiishshida." 
Numbers7:4 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers7:5 «Hayti miishshati Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan dumma dumma oosos isttan go7ettana mala hayta yarsho miishshata isttafe ekkada, dumma dumma oosos isttas koshshiza mala shaakkada Lewetas imma.»" 
Numbers7:6 Hessa gishshas Musey para-gaaretanne boorata ekkidi Lewetas immides. 
Numbers7:7 Gershoone zarkketas oosos koshshiza nam7u para-gaaretanne oyddu boorata immides. 
Numbers7:8 Qasseka Meraare zarkketas oyddu para-gaaretanne osppun boorata immides; heytantta oosoy polettanay Aaroone naa Itamaare alaafeteththanna. 
Numbers7:9 Isttas diza alaafeteththi geeshsha miishshata ba hashen tookkiza gishshas Musey Qa7aate zarkketas para-gaareta gidiin woykko booratakka immibeenna. 
Numbers7:10 Yarsho yarshizasoza Musey tiydi geeshshida gallas halaqati yarsho yarshizasoza anjjisanaas bantta imota ehidi yarsho yarshizasoza sinththan shiishshida. 
Numbers7:11 GODAY Muses, «Tammanne nam7u gallassatan tammanne nam7u halaqati pacey baynda issoy issoy issi issi gallas anjjiso ba7aales gidiza yarsho hu7en hu7en shiishshana mala yoota» gides." 
Numbers7:12 Koyro gallas Yuhuda qommota garsafe Aminadaabe naa Ne7asooney shiishshides. 
Numbers7:13 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta; erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kath yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:14 Izan exaaney kumi uttida 10 saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfa. 
Numbers7:15 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:16 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:17 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Aminadaabe naa Ne7asooney shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:18 Nam7anththo gallas Yisakoore zarkketa garsafe Xu7aare naa Natina7eeley shiishshides. 
Numbers7:19 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin xeetanne heedzdzu tammu saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne laappun tammu saqile guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumi uttides." 
Numbers7:20 Izan exaaney kumi uttida tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfa. 
Numbers7:21 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo; issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:22 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:23 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Xu7aare naa Natina7eeley shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:24 Heedzdzanththo gallas Zaabiloone zarkketa garsafe Heloone naa Elyaabey shiishshides. 
Numbers7:25 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin xeetanne heedzdzu tammu saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne laappun tammu saqile guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:26 Izan exaaney kumi uttida tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfa. 
Numbers7:27 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo; issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:28 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:29 Issifeteththa yarshos 5 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Heloone naa Elyaabey shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:30 Oydanththo gallas Oroobeele qommota garsafe Shaadure naa Elxuurey shiishshides. 
Numbers7:31 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7anka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqay kumi uttides." 
Numbers7:32 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:33 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:34 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:35 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Shaadure naa Elxuurey shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:36 Ichchashanththo gallas Simoona qommota garsafe Xurshadaye naa Salum7eeley shiishshides. 
Numbers7:37 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:38 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:39 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:40 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:41 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida ichchashu dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Xurshadaye naa Salum7eeley shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:42 Usuppunththo gallas Gaade zarkketa garsafe Da7u7eele naa Elyaasaafey shiishshides. 
Numbers7:43 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanawu liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:44 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:45 xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:46 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:47 Issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Da7u7eele naa Elyaasaafey shiishshida yarshota." 
Numbers7:48 Laappunththo gallas Efreeme zarkketa garsafe Amihuude naa Elshamay shiishshides. 
Numbers7:49 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:50 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:51 xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:52 nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:53 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Amihuude naa Elshama yarshota." 
Numbers7:54 Osppunththa gallas Minaase zarkketa garsafe Pedaxuure naa Gamal7eeley shiishshides. 
Numbers7:55 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:56 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:57 xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:58 Nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:59 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Pedaxuure naa Gamal7eele yarshota." 
Numbers7:60 Uddufunththo gallas Biniyaame zarkketa garsafe Gidi7oone naa Abidaaney shiishshides. 
Numbers7:61 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:62 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:63 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:64 nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:65 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Gidi7oone naa Abidaane yarshota." 
Numbers7:66 Tammanththo gallas Daane qommota garsafe Amishadaye naa Ahi7ezeerey shiishshides. 
Numbers7:67 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:68 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:69 Xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:70 nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:71 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Amishadaye naa Ahi7ezeere yarshota." 
Numbers7:72 Tammanne issinththa gallas Aaseere qommota garsafe Okra naa Fagu7eeley shiishshides. 
Numbers7:73 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:74 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:75 xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:76 nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:77 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Okra naa Fagu7eele yarshota." 
Numbers7:78 Tammanne nam7anththa gallas Niftaaleme zarkketa garsafe Enaane naa Ahirey shiishshides. 
Numbers7:79 Izi shiishshida yarshotikka hayssafe kaallizayta, erettida meezaanen woththiin 130 saqile birappe oosettida issi picca saanenne 70 saqile issi guuqa saane, nam7ayka kaththa yarsho shiishshanaas liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqan kumida." 
Numbers7:80 Izan exaaney kumi uttida issi tammu saqile worqqafe oosettida cilfata," 
Numbers7:81 xuugettiza yarshos issi mirgo, issi dharsho, issi layththa dharsho laaqqa," 
Numbers7:82 nagara yarshos issi deysha orge," 
Numbers7:83 issifeteththa yarshos 2 boorata, 5 dharshota, 5 deysha orgetanne layth kumida 5 dharsho laaqqata; heyti wuri Enaane naa Ahire yarshota." 
Numbers7:84 Yarsho yarshizasoza tiydi geeshshida gallas halaqati yarshosoza anjjiso gaason shiishshida imotay haytantta; birappe oosettida 12 picca saaneta, birappe oosettida 12 guuqa saanetanne worqqafe oosettida isttan exaane woththiza 12 kereta." 
Numbers7:85 Birappe oosettida issi issi kerey 130 saqile gidi deexxees; birappe oosettida issi issi quule mala saaney 7 saqile gidi deexxees; birappe oosettida keretinne quule mala saaneti Xoossa Keeththa meezaanen woththiza wode ubbay issi bolla 2,400 saqile gidida." 
Numbers7:86 Worqqafe oosettida exaaney istta kumi uttida tammanne nam7u shaatetti GODAA Keeththa meezaanen woththiza wode issoy issoy 10 saqile gidishin ubbay issi bolla 120 saqile gidides. 
Numbers7:87 Kaththa yarshora issife xuugettiza yarshos shiiqida mehe qooday 12 boorata, 12 dharshotanne layth kumida 12 dharsho laaqqata; qasse istti nagara yarshos shiishshiday 12 deysha orgeta." 
Numbers7:88 Issifeteththa yarshos shiiqida mehe qooday 24 boora, 60 dharsho, 60 deysha orgenne layth kumida 60 dharsho laaqqa; yarsho yarshizasozi tiyetti geeyidaappe guye anjjiso ba7aales imettida imotati haytantta." 
Numbers7:89 Musey GODAARA haasayanaas gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan geliin atoteth demmanaas shiiqizason Taabotaa kama bolla diza nam7u Kirubeta giddora GODAY izas haasayza qaala siyidi izikka izara haasayettides. 
Numbers8:1 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers8:2 « ‹Neni Aaroones laappun xomppeta istta bolla woththiza wode xomppeti xomppe istta bolla woththiza ballatas sinththa baggara dizaso poo7isana› gaada yoota.» 
Numbers8:3 Aarooneykka GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththides; xomppeta istta bolla woththiza ballatappe sinththa baggara dizasoza poo7isana mala giigsi woththides. 
Numbers8:4 Xomppeta istta bolla woththiza ballati garsa tohosoppe doommidi ciishshe misatiza ballata xeera gakkanaas qoxettida worqqafe oosettida; heytikka GODAY Muse bessida mala xomppe istta bolla woththiza ballata leemison oosettida. 
Numbers8:5 GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Numbers8:6 «Hankko attida Isra7eele deraa garsafe Lewe qommota dumma shaakkada geeshsha. 
Numbers8:7 Geesho wogas giigettida haaththan istta araca; istti bantta bolla diza iske ubbaa meedettanaassinne ba may7oka meeccidi bana geeshshana mala ooththa. 
Numbers8:8 Hessafe kaallidi issi mirgonne kaththa yarshos gidiza liiqo dhiillefe zayten munuqettida munuqa ekki betto; nekka nagara yarshos shiiqiza issi mirgo ekka ba. 
Numbers8:9 Hessafe guye ne Isra7eele asaa shiishshada Leweti Gaytoteththa Dunkaanaas sinththa baggara GODAA sinththan essa.
