Deuteronomy5:1 Museykka Isra7eele asaa ubbaa issi bolla xeygidi, «Isra7eele asawu! Tani hach inttes immiza wogaanne maaraa ane wozinan woththi siyite; istta lo7eththi tamaartenne minththi naagite." 
Deuteronomy5:2 GODAA nu Xoossay Siina zumaa bolla nunara caaqo qaala gelides. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Izi caaqqidaykka nu aawatara xalla gidontta ha7i shemppora paxa diza nunarakka caaqettides. 
Deuteronomy5:4 Heen he zumaa bolla eexxiza tama giddon dishe GODAY inttena qonccera haasayssides. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Intte tamazas babbidi pude zumaa bolla kezanaas yayyida gishshas tanikka he wode GODAY gizayssa ubbaa inttes yootanaas inttessinne GODAAS giddon eqqadis. «Izikka taas," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‹Neni kase aylleteththan haaretta diza Gibxe dereppe nena wozza ekkiday tana GODAA ne Xoossaa. 
Deuteronomy5:7 « ‹Taappe attiin hara Xoossi nees dooppo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 « ‹Salon gidiin sa7an, woykko biitta garsan diza haaththa giddon dizaytappe awoyssaka nees misle medhdhada Xoossa mala goynnofa." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Tani GODAA ne Xoossay keeha qanaatiza Xoossa; hessa gishshas masetti oosettida ay eeqa xoossataska goynnofanne ziggofa; tani tana ixxizayta wursa qaxxayays; istta zereththatakka heedzdzanththonne oydanththo yeleta gakkanaas tani qaxxayana. 
Deuteronomy5:10 Tana dosizaytassinne ta azazota naagizaytas gidikko shii yeleta gakkanaas ta kiyateththaanne ta siiqo ta istta bessana. 
Deuteronomy5:11 « ‹Tana ne GODAA sunththaa hadan xeygoppa; ta sunththaa hadan xeygizayta ta qaxxayontta aggike. 
Deuteronomy5:12 « ‹Tani GODAY ne Xoossay nena azazida mala sambata gallassa dummasada bonchcha. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Neni ooththiza ooso ubbaa usuppun gallassatan ooththa. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Laappunththo gallassay gidikko taas ne GODAAS dumma shemppo gallassa; he gallas ay oosokka ooththofa; nena gidiin woykko ne nayta gidiin nees ooththizaytikka, ne meheykka, ne deren bete asata gidikkoka he gallas aykkoka ooththofte; ne shempizayssaththo isttika shempetto." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Neni Gibxe biittan de7iza wode aylle gidada de7idayssa akeeka; qasseka GODAA ne Xoossay ba mino qeseninne ba micettida kushen nena heeppe kessidayssa dogoppa; sambata gallassa ne bonchchana mala GODAA ne Xoossay azaziday hessassa. 
Deuteronomy5:16 « ‹Tani GODAA ne Xoossay nena azazida mala ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha; ne hessaththo ooththiko GODAA ne Xoossay nees immiza biittayn ne layththi aduqqananne nees injjetana. 
Deuteronomy5:17 « ‹As wodhoppa; 
Deuteronomy5:18 « ‹Laymatoppa; 
Deuteronomy5:19 « ‹Kaysotoppa; 
Deuteronomy5:20 « ‹Oona bollaka wordo markkattofa; 
Deuteronomy5:21 « ‹Asa machcho, asa keeth, asa xinxxo, asa oosanchchata, asa mehe, asa hare gidiin hara ay aqotakka ubbaa amottofa› gides." 
Deuteronomy5:22 «Intte issi bolla shiiqidason GODAY zumaa bolla dishe inttes ubbaas immida azazoti hayta; taman, girdi gida dhumaninne shaara giddon dishe gita cenggurssan izi inttes yootida azazoti hayta xalla; izi heytakka nam7u shuchchata bolla wooci xaafidi taas immides." 
Deuteronomy5:23 «Zumazi taman xuugettiza wodenne dhuma giddofe cenggurssa intte siyida wode inttena kaaleththizaytinne intte korapinneti taakko yiidi," 
Deuteronomy5:24 ‹GODAA nuni Xoossa cenggurssaa tama giddofe siyida wode GODAA nu Xoossay ba gitateththinne ba bonchcho nuna qonccen bessides; Xoossi asara haasaydaappe guyen asi hayqqontta shemppora paxa de7ana dandayzayssa nu hach beydos. 
Deuteronomy5:25 Hayssafe guye GODAA nu Xoossaa cenggurssaa nu siyizaa gidikko nu hayqqana; he wolqqama tamay nuna dhayssana dandayees; histtiin nuni ays hayqqizonii? 
Deuteronomy5:26 De7o Xoossay tama giddon dishe yootiin nu siyida mala iza cenggurssa siyidi hayqqontta shemppora paxa attida asi daanee? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Hessa gishshas neni izakko shiiqada GODAA nu Xoossay gizayssa ubbaa siya; hessafe guye ne siyidayssa ubbaa nuus yaada yoota; nunikka iza siyidi azazettana› gideta. 
Deuteronomy5:28 «Xoossayka intte hessa gishin siyidi taas, ‹Ha asati nees yootidayssa ubbaa tani siyadis; istti gidayssi ubbay likke." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Isttassinne istta zereththatas mernaas ubbaa miishshi lo7o gidana mala istti taas yayyanaassinne ta azazota ubba wode naaganaas hayssa mala wozinay dizaakko ay mala lo7ooshaa! 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ha7ikka neni baada istti ba dunkaanen dunkaanen simmana mala isttas yoota. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Neni gidikko haan ta achchan eqqa; tani ta wogata, azazotanne maarata ubbaa nees immana; tani isttas immiza dereyin istti ha azazota, wogatanne maarata naagana mala dereza tamaarsa› gides." 
Deuteronomy5:32 «Isra7eele asawu! GODAA intte Xoossay inttena azazidayssa ubbaa polanaas giigettite; isttafe issinoyokka menththofte. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Ubba miishshi inttes lo7o gidana malanne intte laattana biittayn inttes layththay aduqqana mala Xoossi inttena azazidayssa ubbaa polite» gides. 
Deuteronomy6:1 Intte pinni biidi laattanaas biza biittaan intte ooththana malanne tani inttena tamaarsana mala GODAA intte Xoossay tana azazida azazoti, wogatinne maarati hayta." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Intte he biittayn adussa layth daana mala intte, intte naytinne intte nayta nayti bantti diza wode ubbaan Xoossas yayyanaassinne ta immida azazota, maaratanne wogata ubbaa naaganaas bessees." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Intteno Isra7eele asawu! Ubba miishshi inttes lo7o gidana mala, GODAA intte aawata Xoossay inttes gidayssaththo maaththinne eessi goggiza biittaan intte keehi corattana mala ha azazota siyitenne minni ooththite." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Isra7eele asatoo! Intte hayssa akeekite! GODAA nu Xoossay izi xalla Xoossa. 
Deuteronomy6:5 GODAA ne Xoossaa ne kumeththa wozinappe, ne kumeththa shemppofenne ne kumeththa wolqqafe siiqa." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Hach ta nena azazida azazota wozinan woththa. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Hayta azazota ne nayta tamaarsa; neni neson uttiza wode gidiin oge bashekka, ichchiza wode gidiin beeggiza wode ubbaan haytantta akeekashe yuushsha qoppa." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Nees malata gidana mala ne kushe bolla qachcha qasseka ne piidhe bolla woththa. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Ne keeththa qosilaththa bollanne gibbe penge bolla xaafa. 
Deuteronomy6:10 GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte aawatas Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobeska caaqqida qaalaa mala inttena izi he biittayo gelththiza wode kase intte keexxontta gitanne lo7iza katamati diza biittayo laatissana." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Intte laattanay intte keexxontta lo7o miishshan kumida keeththata, intte bookkontta haaththa ollata, intte tokkontta woyne miththatanne wogara miththata; heytantta izi inttes immiza wode," 
Deuteronomy6:12 kase intte aylleteththan deyida Gibxe dereppe inttena wozzi kessida GODAA intte balontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Intte GODA Xoossaas yayyite; izas xalla goynnitenne iza sunththan xalla caaqqite. 
Deuteronomy6:14 Intte yuushon diza hara dere asay goynniza eeqa xoossatas goynnofte; 
Deuteronomy6:15 Gaasoykka intte giddon de7iza GODAA intte Xoossay qanaatiza Xoossa; hessa gishshas iza hanqoy intte bollan tama mala eexxi kezana; izikka inttena biitta bollafekka mulera dippi histti dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy6:16 Kase intte Maasan ooththidayssaththo GODAA intte Xoossaa paaccofte. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Izi inttena azazida azazota, wogatanne maarata ubbaa lo7eththi naagite." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Inttes ubba miishshi lo7o gidana mala GODAA sinththan intte suurenne lo7o ooththite; histtiko inttes immanaas GODAY intte aawatas qaala gelida he lo7o biittayo intte laattana. 
Deuteronomy6:19 Izi inttes hidota qaala gelida mala intte intte morkketa gooddi dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Guyeppe yaana wodetan intte nayti, «GODAA nu Xoossay hayta azazota, wogatanne maarata birsheththay aazee?» gi oychchana." 
Deuteronomy6:21 He wode intte qasse isttas, «Kase nuni Gibxe kawos aylletidos shin Xoossay nuna ba gita wolqqaan wozzi kessides." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Gibxe asaa, istta kawozanne istta shuumeta keehi qohiza gita malaatata izi ooththizayssa nuni nu ayfera be7idos." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Kase nu aawata laatissanaas immida hidota qaalaa mala nuna ha biittayo laatissanaas Gibxeppe wozzi kessidi haa ehides. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Hessafe guye hach hanidayssaththo nuus ubba wodekka lo7o gidana malanne nuni shemppora paxa de7ana mala, nuni azazota, wogatanne maarata naagana malanne GODAA nu Xoossaas yayyana mala azazides." 
Deuteronomy6:25 GODAA nu Xoossay nuna azazida mala iza azazota ubbaa nu naagikko hessi nuus xilloteth gidana» giite. 
Deuteronomy7:1 GODAA intte Xoossay intte laattanaas biza biittayo inttena gelththiza wode qasseka inttefe wolqqamizanne minniza laappun kawoteththata heytikka Hiiteta, Gergeseta, Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta intte sinththafe dhoqalli dhayssana." 
Deuteronomy7:2 GODAA intte Xoossay he dereta intte kushen aaththi immiin intte istta xooniza wode istta kumeth suppu histti dhayssite attiin isttara ay qaalakka gelopitenne isttas qadhettofte. 
Deuteronomy7:3 Isttara ekettoftenne gelettofte; intte macca nayta istta attuma naytas immofte; istta macca naytakka intte attuma naytas ekkofte. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Gaasoykka intte hessaththo ooththontta aggiko istti intte nayta GODAA kaallizasoppe betissidi eeqa xoossata kaallana mala ooththana; he wode GODAA hanqoy eexxi kezananne izi inttena heerakka eeson dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy7:5 Hessa gishshas intte istti yarsho yarshizasoza laallite; istti goynniza tuussa malata shuchchata kinchchereththi yeggite; Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossay misleza tinchchereththi yeggite; masetti giigida eeqa xoossata misletakka taman xuuggite. 
Deuteronomy7:6 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena baas gidana mala doorida dumma dere; biitta bolla diza dere ubbaafe intte izas dumma dere gidana mala doorettideta. 
Deuteronomy7:7 GODAY inttena siiqidaynne dooriday intte hara asaappe qoodan dariza gishshas gidenna; intte hara deraappe qoodan keehi guuththata. 
Deuteronomy7:8 Gido attiin GODAY inttena siiqida gishshassinne kase intte aawatas gelida hidota qaala naaganaas koyida gishshas izi inttena Gibxe kawos aylleteththan diza Gibxe biittafe ba gita wolqqan wozzidi kessides. 
Deuteronomy7:9 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossay mulera ammanettida Xoossaa gididayssa intte yuushshi qopite; izi ba caaqqida qaalaa naagees; iza dosizaytassinne iza azazo polizaytas ubbaas shii yeleta gakkanaas izi ba mernaa siiqo bessana. 
Deuteronomy7:10 Gido attiin bana ixxizayta ba halo kessana; istta bolla ba halo kessanaas gam7enna. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Hessa gishshas ta hach inttena azaziza azazota, wogatanne maarata lo7eththi naagite." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Intte ha azazota, wogatanne maarata siyidi lo7eththi naagikko GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte aawatas gelida caaqo qaalanne ba mernaa siiqo intteska minththana." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Izi inttena siiqana; anjjananne qoodan darsana; qasseka izi intte aawatas caaqqida biittayn intte yelota, intte biittay immiza ayfeta, kaththaa, woynenne wogara zayte, intte mehetanne dorsa wudeta ubbaa darssidi anjjana." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Intte mala anjjettida derey alame bolla mulekka deenna; intte giddofe macca gidiin woykko attumas gidiin hessaththoka intte meheta giddon maynney beettenna. 
Deuteronomy7:15 GODAY harge ubbaafe inttena naagana; intte kase Gibxen dishe be7ida iita hargetappe awoyssaka intte bolla ehenna; gido attiin izi bana ixxizayta bolla he hargeta ehana. 
Deuteronomy7:16 GODAA intte Xoossay intte kushen aaththi immida dereta ubbaasikka qadhettontta dhayssite; inttes woximade gidontta mala istta eeqa xoossatas goynnofte. 
Deuteronomy7:17 Intte intte wozinan, «Ha kawoteththati nuuppe minneettes; histtiin nu istta wostti dhayssanee?» giidi qoppontta aggeketa." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Gido attiin intte isttas yayyofte; GODAA intte Xoossay Gibxe kawo bollanne he dere asaa ubbaa bolla ooththidayssa yuushshi qopite. 
Deuteronomy7:19 GODAA intte Xoossay inttena Gibxeppe kessiza wode ooththida gita boshata, malaatata, malalisiza miishshata, iza mino qesetanne micettida kusheta intte intte ayfen be7ideta; ha7i intte yayyiza asa ubbaa bollankka GODAA intte Xoossay hessaththo ooththana." 
Deuteronomy7:20 GODAA intte Xoossay istta giddon shiro denththana; inttefe baqatidi qotettidaytikka heera dhayana. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Hessa gishshas he deretas babofte; GODAA intte Xoossay inttenara dees; izi gitanne yashissiza Xoossa. 
Deuteronomy7:22 GODAA intte Xoossay hayta kawoteththata guuththara guuththara shoddi kessana; intte istta ubbaa issito dhayssofte; intte issito dhayssiko biitta bolla do7ay daridi inttena waayisana. 
Deuteronomy7:23 GODAA intte Xoossay intte morkketa intte kushen aaththi immana; istti ubbay wurana gakkanaas izi istta garsan shiro denththana. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Qasseka istta kawota izi intte kushen aaththi immana; intte istta sunththaa mulera biittafe dhayssana; intte istta dhayssana gakkanaas inttenara eqetti dandayana ay asikka deenna. 
Deuteronomy7:25 Istta eeqa xoossata ubbaa taman xuuggite; he eeqa xoossata bolla diza worqqanne bira amottidi inttes ekkofte; GODAA intte Xoossay eeqa xoossatas goyno ixxiza gishshas intte ekkiko izi inttes woximade gidana. 
Deuteronomy7:26 Ha tunida eeqa xoossata intteso gelththofte; intte intteso gelththiko istti dhayzayssaththo intteka dhayana; istti dhayanaas bessiza gishshas intte istta ixxitenne harasettite. 
Deuteronomy8:1 Intte shemppora paxa daana mala, intte qooday darana malanne GODAY kase intte aawatas immanaas caaqqida biittayo laattanaas intte dandayana mala hach ta inttes immiza azazoyo ammanettidi naagite." 
Deuteronomy8:2 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida azazota intte naagizaakkonne naagonttaakko intte wozinan diza qofa eranaas, inttena paaccanaassinne inttena ashkesanaas oyddu tammu layth kumeth meto giddora aaththidi izi inttena wostti wostti kaaleththidaakko ane yuushshi qopite." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Asi Xoossa doonappe keziza qaalan attiin kaththan xalla shemppora paxa daanaas dandayonttayssa tamaarsanaas inttena gafisides; intteninne intte aawati erontta manna mizides. 
Deuteronomy8:4 He oyddu tammu layththata garsan intte may7ida may7oy wuribeenna; hemeththa daron intte tohoy kixxibeenna. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Aaway ba naa seerizayssaththo GODAA intte Xoossay inttena seerizayssa yuushshi qopite. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Iza kaallishenne izas yayyishe GODAA intte Xoossaa azazota naagite. 
Deuteronomy8:7 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena shoobbafenne zumbullatappe pultti goggiza qeeri shaafatinne pulttiza pulttoti diza lo7o biittaa gelththanaas ehides. 
Deuteronomy8:8 He biittaya gistteynne banggay, woyneynne balasey, oroomaaneynne wogara ayfey, qasseka eessi kumida biitta." 
Deuteronomy8:9 He biittayakka intte pacey baynda kath miza biittanne inttes aykkoyka paccontta biitta; he biittayn diza shuchchatappe biratay, zumbullafe xarqimalay beettees." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Intte miidi kallana; histtidi izi inttes immida lo7o biittay gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa intte galatana. 
Deuteronomy8:11 Intte GODAA intte Xoossaa dogidi tani hach inttes immiza azazota, wogatanne maarata moorontta mala naagettite." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Intte miidi kalliza wodenne lo7o keeth keexxi uttiza wode," 
Deuteronomy8:13 miizinne dorsay, biraynne worqqay qasseka hara aqotati inttes dariza wode," 
Deuteronomy8:14 intte wozinay otorettontta malanne intte Gibxeppe aylleteththa biittafe inttena wozzi kessida GODAA intte Xoossaa balontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy8:15 Marze shooshshaynne masimasoy kumida keehi hirgisiza bazzora inttena kaaleththides; izi inttes mela bazzon mino zaallafe haaththe pulttisides. 
Deuteronomy8:16 Inttena ashkesanaasinne paaccanaas wurseththankka lo7o gidana mala kase intte aawati mi erontta manna bazzo biittan inttes immides. 
Deuteronomy8:17 Hessa gishshas, «Nuni nu wolqqaninne nu minoteththan duretidos» gi qoppofte." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Intte durettana mala inttes wolqqanne minoteth immiday GODAA intte Xoossaa gididayssa yuushshi qopite; izi hessaththo ooththiday kase intte aawatas gelida caaqo qaala minththanaassa. 
Deuteronomy8:19 GODAA intte Xoossaa intte dogidi eeqa xoossatas goynniko, isttas haggazanaas intte sinth intte isttako zaarikko, addaka intte dhayanayssa hach ta inttena haara erisays." 
Deuteronomy8:20 GODAA intte Xoossaas intte azazettontta ixxiko intte gede sinththe sinththe bishin intte sinththan diza kawoteththata dhayssizayssa mala inttenakka dhoqalli dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy9:1 Intteno Isra7eele dere asawu! Siyite; intte inttefe gitatizanne wolqqamiza kawoteththata qasse isttas dirsa gimbey salo gakkida gita katamatakka laattanaas hach Yordaanoose pinneeta. 
Deuteronomy9:2 He biittaan diza asay geesanne gubba gitatanne keehi minota; isttas, «Ooninne Enaaqe zereththatara eqettanaas dandayenna» gishin intte siyideta." 
Deuteronomy9:3 Gido attiin tama mala xuuggiza GODAA intte Xoossay izi inttefe sinththara bishin intte hach be7ana; intte gede sinththe sinththe gujjishin izi istta xooni xooni baana; hessa gishshas izi inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala intte istta dhoqallidi eeson gooddi dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy9:4 GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte sinththafe gooddidaappe guye intte, «GODAY nuna ha biittaa ehiday nuni lo7o ooso ooththida gishshassa» giidi qoppofte; GODAY istta intte sinththafe gooddi kessizay istta iitateththaa gishshassa." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Intte istta biittaa laattana mala GODAA intte Xoossay isttas aaththi immizay intte xillonne suure ooththida gishshas gidenna; istti iitata gidida gishshassinne Xoossay kase intte aawatas Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes immida hidota qaalaa naaganaas koyida gishshas istta shoddi gooddana." 
Deuteronomy9:6 GODAA intte Xoossay ha lo7o biittaa inttena laatissizay intte xilloteththaa gishshas gidenna; gaasoykka intte wozinay muume. 
Deuteronomy9:7 GODAA intte Xoossaa bazzon intte wostti hanqeththidaakko balopite; intte Gibxeppe kezida gallassafe doommidi hanno gakkanaas intte GODAA intte Xoossaa bolla makkallideta. 
Deuteronomy9:8 Siina bazzon izi inttena dhayssanaas dendana gakkanaas GODAA keehi hanqeththideta. 
Deuteronomy9:9 GODAY inttenara caaqettida qaalay istta bolla xaafettida shuchchata ekkanaas tani pude zumaa bolla kezada heen aykkoka monttanne uyontta oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma gama7adis. 
Deuteronomy9:10 Hessafe guye intte he zumaa garsan shiiqiin GODAY tama giddofe haasayshin intte siyida qaala izi ba kushera istta bolla xaafida nam7u lochcha shuchchata taas immides. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Oyddu tammu gallassafenne oyddu tammu omarsafe guye GODAA caaqo qaalay istta bolla xaafettida nam7u lochcha shuchchata taas immides. 
Deuteronomy9:12 Hessafe guye GODAY taas, «Ne eeson zumaa bollafe duge wodhdha; neni Gibxeppe kaaleththa kessida asay iita miish ooththidi tunides; ta isttas immida azazotappe eeson kare kezidi banttas goynnanaas eeqa xoossata medhdhida» gides." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Qasseka GODAY taas, «Hayssi derezi wozina muumenne makkalla gididayssa ta erays." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Tani istta dhayssanayssanne istta sunththaaka biitta bollafe qucca dhayssanayssa tana diggofa; nena isttafe minnizayssanne corattiza kawoteth kessana» gides. 
Deuteronomy9:15 Hessa gishshas caaqo qaalazi xaafettida nam7u lochcha shuchchata nam7u kushen oykkida mala zumaa bollafe simmada duge wodhdhadis; he wode tama lacoy zumaa bolla lacees. 
Deuteronomy9:16 Intteka GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida azazota menththidi kare kezideta; worqqafe seerisidi medhdhida mara misleza inttes eeqa xoos ooththideta; hessan intte intte GODAA bolla makkallidayssa ta be7adis. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Hessa gaason azazoti istta bolla xaafettida lochcha shuchchata ta intte sinththan bollafe yeggada menththereththadis. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Hessafe guye intte keehi iita nagara ooththidi GODAA hanqeththida gaason tani oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma gakkanaas aykkoka monttanne uyontta GODAA sinththan gufannada gam7adis. 
Deuteronomy9:19 Izi inttena keehi hanqettidi dhayssanaas dendida gishshas GODAY hanqiza gita hanqozi tana babisides; gidikkoka GODAY zaaridi ta woosa siyides. 
Deuteronomy9:20 GODAY Aaroonekka dhayssanaas iza bolla keehi hanqettides; hessa gishshas izaskka woossadis. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Tani intte medhdhida he nagaran kumida mara misleza ekkada taman xuuggadis; izakka kinchchereththa gudulla mala liiqisada zumaa bollafe duge goggiza haaththan yeggadis. 
Deuteronomy9:22 Intte qasseka Tabeeren, Maasaninne Kibroote-Hatta7aaben intte GODAA hanqeththideta." 
Deuteronomy9:23 GODAY inttena, «Biite! Ta inttes immida hidota biittayo laattite» giidi inttena Qaadeese Barineppe kiittida wode intte iza bolla makkallideta attiin izan ammanettibeekketa; iza qaalaska azazettibeekketa." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ta inttena eroosofe hanno gakkanaas intte GODAA bolla makkallida mala deeta. 
Deuteronomy9:25 GODAY, «Tani istta dhayssana» giidi yootida gishshas tani he oyddu tammu gallassatanne oyddu tammu qammata GODAA sinththan gufannada gam7adis." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tani woossashe, «Ubbaafe dhoqqa GODAWU! Neni ne gita wolqqaninne ne mino qesen wozzada Gibxeppe kessida ne dereza dhayssofarkkii!" 
Deuteronomy9:27 Kase ne oosanchchata Abrahaame, Yisaaqanne Yaaqoobe qoparkkii; hayssa deraa wozina muumeteththaa, iitateththaanne; nagaraa ubbaa qoodoparkkii!» ga woossadis." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Ne histtontta aggiko nuna he dere asay, «GODAY istta gelththana giidi hidota immida biittayo gelththanaas dandayontta gishshassinne izi istta ixxida gishshas bazzo biittan istta wodhanaas kessides» giidi miiccana." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Gido attiin ha asay neni ne gita wolqqaninne ne mino qesen nees gidana mala ne doora kessida dere. 
Deuteronomy10:1 Hessafe guye GODAY tana, «Hayssafe kase meqqida lochcha shuchchata mala hara nam7u shuch massa giigsa; istta woththanaas Taabotaa miththafe medhdha; histtada pude ha zuma hu7e keza." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ne kase menththida lochcha shuchchata bolla xaafettida azazota qasseka tani izara xaafana; nenikka istta Taabotaza giddon woththa» gides. 
Deuteronomy10:3 Hessa gishshas tani odoro miththafe Taabota giigsadis; kaseyta misatiza nam7u lochcha shuchchata massa ekkada pude zumaa bolla kezadis. 
Deuteronomy10:4 Intte zumaa garsan shiiqi dishin GODAY tama giddon dishe inttes qonccisida tammu azazota kaseyssaththoka ha7i lochcha shuchchata bolla xaafidi taas immides. 
Deuteronomy10:5 Hessafe guye tani zumaa bollafe duge wodhdhada GODAY tana azazida mala he masettida lochcha shuchchata ta giigsida Taabotaa giddon woththadis; he gallassafe hanno gakkanaas heen iza giddon deettes. 
Deuteronomy10:6 [Isra7eele asay Bi7erooti-Beeni-Yaqine asatas haaththa ollay dizasoppe Moseere bida; Aarooneykka hayqqidi heen moogettides; izasohon iza naa El7ezeerey qeese gidides. 
Deuteronomy10:7 Asay hessafe dendidi gede Gudigoda bides; heeppeka Yoxbaate geetettiza goggiza haaththi dizaso bides. 
Deuteronomy10:8 He wode Lewe qommoti Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkana mala, GODAA sinththan eqqidi izas ooththana malanne asaakka GODAA sunththan anjjana mala shuumides; hach gakkanaas Lewe qommota oosoy hessa." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Hessa gaason Lewe qommoti hankko qommotara gishettanaas xinxxoy imettonttayssi hessassa; intte GODAY isttas yootida malakka istta xinxxoy GODAA intte Xoossaa.] 
Deuteronomy10:10 Tani kaseyssaththo woossashe oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma gakkanaas gam7adis; GODAY ha7ikka ta woosaa siyidi inttena dhayssontta shemppora paxa woththides. 
Deuteronomy10:11 Hessafe guye izi tana, «Ha7i ne ba! Tani kase istta aawatas immida hidota qaalaa mala istti he biittayo laattana mala deraa kaaleththa» gides." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Isra7eele asawu! GODAY inttefe koyzay hayssafe kaallizayssa; GODAA intte Xoossaa yayyite; iza oge kaallite; iza siiqite; kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe izas ooththite. 
Deuteronomy10:13 Inttes lo7ana mala tani hach inttes immiza GODAA azazotanne wogata naagite. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Saloynne saloppe bollan diza saloti, biittaynne biitta bolla diza ubbay GODAASSA." 
Deuteronomy10:15 GODAY kase intte aawata keehi siiqida gaason inttena ayzaabeta giddofe doorides; intteka hach gakkanaas izas doorettida dere gidideta. 
Deuteronomy10:16 Hessa gishshas ane hayssafe guye intte wozina muumisopitenne intte wozina iitateththaa diggidi GODAAS azazettite. 
Deuteronomy10:17 GODAA intte Xoossay xoossa geetettiza ubbaafe bolla; godatas Godaa; izi gita, minonne yashshiza Xoossa; izi maaddi pirdontta Xoossanne maganxo ekkontta Xoossa." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Izi yi7otassinne am7etas pirdees; izi deraa giddon diza bete asata dosiza gishshas kaththinne may7o isttas immees. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Hessaththoka intte kase Gibxe biittan bete as gidida gishshas intteka intte giddon diza bete asata siiqite. 
Deuteronomy10:20 GODAA intte Xoossaas yayyite; izas xalla goynnite; izan ammanettidi iza sunththan caaqqite. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Intte Xoossay iza; izi inttes ooththida gitanne malalisiza miishshata ubbaa intte intte ayfen be7ida gishshas ubba wode iza galatite. 
Deuteronomy10:22 Beni intte aawati duge Gibxe wodhdhiza wode isttas qooday laappun tammu xalla; ha7i gidikko GODAA intte Xoossay intte qooda salo xoolintte mala darssides. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa siiqite; izi inttefe koyza iza wogaa, maaraanne azazota ubba wode polite." 
Deuteronomy11:2 GODAA intte Xoossaa seeraza hessika iza gitateththaa, iza wolqqaanne izas diza maataa be7idaynne erizay intte nayta gidontta inttena gididayssa yuushshi qopite." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Malaatatanne izi Gibxe kawo bollanne kumeththa deraa bolla ooththida gita oosota intte intte ayfera be7ideta. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Qasse istti inttena kaallidi yedeththida wode GODAY Gibxe biitta olanchchata, istta paratanne para-gaareta Zo7o abbaan mitissidi hach gakkanaas istta mulera dhayssidayssa be7ideta." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Intte bazzofe dendidi haa hayssa gakkanaas GODAY inttes ay ooththidaakko intte ereeta. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Oroobeele qommotappe Elyaabe naa Daataanenne Abraame bolla izi ooththoyssa yuushshi qopite; Isra7eele nayti beyishin biittaya doyettada istta, isttaso asaa, istta dunkaanenne istta haaro ubbaa mittadus." 
Deuteronomy11:7 GODAY ooththida ha gita oosota ubbaa intte intte ayfera be7ideta. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Histtiko intte pinnidi laattana biittayo oykkanaas intte wolqqa demmana mala tani hach inttes immiza azazota ubbaa naagite. 
Deuteronomy11:9 Intte iza azazota naagikko GODAY kase intte aawatassinne istta zereththatas immanaas caaqqida eessinne maaththi kumida he lo7o biittayn intte daro layth daana. 
Deuteronomy11:10 Intte laattanaas gelana biittaya intte kezidi yida Gibxe biittaa mala gidukku; Gibxen intte kath zeridaappe guye haaththi kaththa giddo baana mala zaraza intte tohon yedhdhi yedhdhi besseeta. 
Deuteronomy11:11 Gido attiin intte Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi laattana biittaya izin zumatinne shoobbati diza gishshas iza ira haath uyiza biitta. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Hanno ha biittayo lo7eththi oykkizaynne layth kumeth naagizay GODAA intte Xoossa. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa siiqite; kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe izas ooththite; tani hach inttes immiza azazota polite. 
Deuteronomy11:14 Intte hessaththo ooththiko intte kaththaa, woynenne zayte pacey baynda shiishshana mala GODAY inttes badhdhesa iranne balgo ira woden woden bukisana." 
Deuteronomy11:15 GODAY intte mehetas maata darsana; inttes koshshiza kath immiin intte kallana. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Intte GODAAPPE haakkidi eeqa xoossatas ooththanaassinne goynnanaas guye simmontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Intte naagettontta aggiko GODAA hanqoy intte bolla eexxi kezana; iray bukkontta malanne biittay kath immontta mala izi salo gordana; intteka GODAY inttes immida lo7o biittayfe eeson dhayana. 
Deuteronomy11:18 Intte ha azazota ubba wode intte wozinaninne intte qofan woththite; inttes malata gidana mala istta intte qesen qachchite; qasseka inttes liiphe bollaka oyththite. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Intte nayta tamaarsite; intteson uttishe woykko ogen hemettishekka woykko shempizason gidiinkka woykko ooso ubbaan istta gishshas haasayettite. 
Deuteronomy11:20 Intte keeththa penge qosilaththa bollanne intte gibbe penge bolla xaafi woththite. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Intte hessaththo ooththiko intte GODAY kase intte aawatas immanaas caaqqida biittay bolla intte layththaynne intte nayta layththay sa7appe biidi salo gakkana keena aduqqana. 
Deuteronomy11:22 GODAA intte Xoossaa siiqanaas, iza oge ubbaa kaallanaassinne izan ammanettanaas tani hach inttes immiza azazota minththidi naagite." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Intte hessaththo ooththiko GODAY hayta intte sinththan diza kawoteththata ubbaa kessi gooddana; inttenikka corateththaninne wolqqan inttefe mino gidida dereta biittaa laattana. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Intte tohon intte yedhdhida biittay wurikka inttes gidana; intte zaway dugeha baggara diza bazzaafe biidi pudeha baggara diza Libaanoose zumaa gakkana; qasseka arshey mokkiza baggara Efiraaxise shaafappe biidi arshey wulliza baggara diza Mediteraane abba gakkana. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Inttenara ay asikka eqettanaas dandayenna; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala intte bizaso ubbaan asay inttena be7idi dagammana malanne yayyana mala ooththana. 
Deuteronomy11:26 Hekko! Tani hach anjjofenne qanggeththafe issaa intte doorana mala intte sinththan woththadis. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Ta hach inttes immiza GODAA intte Xoossaa azazota naagikko intte anjjettana. 
Deuteronomy11:28 Gido attiin tani inttena hach azaziza GODAA intte Xoossa azazota naagontta ixxidi intte erontta hara eeqa xoossata goynnanaas iza ogeppe kare ke7izaa gidikko intte qanggettana. 
Deuteronomy11:29 GODAA intte Xoossay intte laattana biza biittayo laatissida wode anjjoza Garizaane zumaa bolla qasseka qanggeththa Eebaale zumaa bolla awajja. 
Deuteronomy11:30 He zumati Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara Araben diza Kanaane biittan Gelgela katamappe sinththa baggara diza Moore miththa achchan deettes. 
Deuteronomy11:31 Intte heen daana mala GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida biittayo laattanaas intte Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi laattiza wode," 
Deuteronomy11:32 ta inttes hach immiza wogaanne maaraa ubbaa lo7eththi naagite. 
Deuteronomy12:1 GODAA intte aawata Xoossay inttes immiza biittaa bolla diza wode intte naagana wogatinne maarati haytantta; 
Deuteronomy12:2 intte laattana biittayn diza kawoteththay zumata bolla, zumbullata bollanne daashsha miththata garsan bantta eeqa xoossatas goynnizasota mulera dhayssite." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Istti yarsho yarshizasohota laalli dhayssite; shuchchafe oosettidi tuussa mala eqqida eeqa xoossata ubbaa liiqisite; Asheero geetetta xeygettiza eeqa xoossay misleta ubbaa taman xuuggite; masetti giigida istta eeqa xoossata ubbaa menththereththi yeggite; istta sunththaaka biittafe dhayssite. 
Deuteronomy12:4 Intte GODAA intte Xoossaas ayzaabeti bantta eeqa xoossatas goynnizayssaththo goynnofte. 
Deuteronomy12:5 GODAA intte Xoossay daanaassinne iza sunththay heen xeygettana mala ubba qommota giddon izi dooridasoza koyidi hee biite. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Xuugettiza yarshota, hara yarshota, intte asraata, intte muxuwaata, intte adinettida adinata, intte dosidi immiza imotatanne intte mehaappe bayrata hee ehite." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Heen GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan intte maana; qasse intte intte wolqqan ooththi kessida ubbaaninne GODAA intte Xoossay inttena anjjida ubbaan intte intteso asaara ufayettana. 
Deuteronomy12:8 Intte hanno gakkanaas intte shene mala ooththishe gam7ideta; he wode hessaththo ooththeketa. 
Deuteronomy12:9 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiin intte shempidi daana biittayo buro gelibeekketa. 
Deuteronomy12:10 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immana biittayn daanaas intte Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnana; intte yuushon dooddi uttida morkketappe inttena izi shempisana; intteka heen woppu gi daana. 
Deuteronomy12:11 He wode GODAA intte Xoossay ba sunththay xeygettana mala dooridaso tani inttena azaziza ubbaa, xuugettiza yarshota, hara yarshota, intte asraata, intte muxuwaata, intte adinettida adina ubbaa ehandeta." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Intte macca naytaranne intte attuma naytara, inttes ooththiza maccassataranne attumasatara, inttenara xinxxo gishetti ekkontta bantta bantta kataman katamaan diza Lewe qommotara GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan intte ufayettana." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Intte Xoossas xuuggi yarshiza yarsho beettooson coo yarshontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Intte intte zereththati dizaso ubbaafe issaan GODAY dooridason xalla xuugettiza yarsho yarshite; tani inttena azaziza miish ubbaaka heen ooththite. 
Deuteronomy12:15 Gidikkoka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena anjjida keena intte katamatappe awayssankka intte meheppe, woykko gaarappe woykko genessafe shukkidi intte koyida keena maana dandayeeta; ha ashozappe wogay giza mala geeyida asi gidiin woykko geeyontta asi ubbay maana dandayees." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Gido attiin istta suuth moopite; suuththaza haaththa mala duge gaden gussite. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Intte intte kaththaafe, woyne ushshaafenne wogara zayteppe immiza asraata, intte miizatappe, dorsatappe, deyshatappe bayra, GODAAS intte immanaas adinettida adina ubbaanne intte intte dosan miish ubbaaka intte dizaso awanka moopite." 
Deuteronomy12:18 GODAA intte Xoossay dooridason intte macca naytaranne attuma naytara, intte macca aylletaranne attuma aylletara, hessaththoka intte katamatan diza Lewe qommotara issife GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan miite; intte daaburdi shiishshida miish ubbaan GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan heen ufayettana." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Intte intte biittan diza wode ubbaan Lewe qommota yeggi aggontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy12:20 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes caaqqida qaala mala intte zawa aassiza wode inttena asho amosiko intte koyida keena maana dandayeeta. 
Deuteronomy12:21 GODAA intte Xoossay ba sunththay xeygettana mala dooridasoy inttefe haakon diikko inttena izi azazida mala miizatappe, dorsatappe shukkidi intte diza katamatan intte koyida keena ashoza maana dandayeeta." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Wogay giza mala geeshsha as gidiin woykko geeyontta as gidiin oonikka gaara asho woykko genessa asho miza mala he ashoza maanaas dandayees. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Gido attiin shemppoy suuththan diza gishshas suuththara diza asho montta mala naagettite; hessa gishshas shemppo suuththara gaththi moopite. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Suuththaa mela gaden gussite attiin moopite. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Inttessinne intte naytas lo7o gidana mala suuth moopite; intte hessaththo ooththiko Xoossi ufayettana. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Hessa gishshas intte GODAA intte Xoossaas immanaas dummasidayssanne adinettidayssa ekkidi doorettidaso efte. 
Deuteronomy12:27 Xuugettiza yarshoza, ashaanne suuththaa ubbaa GODAA intte Xoossaas yarsho yarshizasoza bolla shiishshite; suuththaza GODAA intte Xoossas yarsho yarshizasohota bolla gussite; ashoza gidikko intte miite." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Inttessinne intte naytas mernaas lo7o gidana mala izi inttena azaziza azazota lo7eththi naagite; intte hessaththo ooththiko GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan lo7onne suure gidida ooso ooththeeta. 
Deuteronomy12:29 Intte laattanaas biza kawoteththata GODAA intte Xoossay intte sinththafe dhayssiza wodenne intteka istta biittaa laattidi de7iza wode," 
Deuteronomy12:30 istti intte sinththafe dhaydaappe guye, «Hayti ha kawoteththati bantta eeqa xoossatas wostti goynnizoo? Nunikka isttayssaththo ooththana» giidi woximaden oykettontta mala naagettite." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Intte GODAA intte Xoossaas goynniza goynoy ayzaabeti goynniza goyno mala gidanaas bessenna; istti ba eeqa xoossatas goynnishe ooththiza oosoti ubbay keehi shaattizaazinne GODAA matan ixettidaaza; gaasoykka istti ba yelida naytakka bantta eeqa xoossatas yarsho ooththidi taman xuuggeettes. 
Deuteronomy12:32 Hessa gishshas ta inttena azazida azazo ubbaa ooththite; istta bolla aykkoka gujjofte; qasseka isttafe issinokka pacisopite. 
Deuteronomy13:1 Intte giddofe kaayiza asi woykko agumo agumettiza asi, «Tani gita malaata woykko malalisiza miish ooththana» giikko," 
Deuteronomy13:2 izi yootida gita malataynne malalisiza miish ubbay tumukka polettiin izi inttena, «Ane intte erontta hara xoossatas goynnoos» giikko," 
Deuteronomy13:3 GODAA intte Xoossay intte iza kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe dosizaakko eranaas koyidi he kaayizayssa yeddida gishshas izi gizayssa mulekka siyopite. 
Deuteronomy13:4 GODAA intte Xoossaa kaallite; izas xalla yayyite; iza azazota naagite; iza qaala siyite; izas xalla goynnite; inttes izara diza issifeteththi mino gido. 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kase intte aylleteththan diza Gibxeppe inttena wozzi kessidi ashshida GODAA intte Xoossaa bolla intte makkallana mala agumo yootizaade woykko ta nabe giza ubbaa wodhite; hessa mala asati GODAA intte Xoossay inttena minni eqqana mala azazida ogeppe kare kessanaas qoppeettes; hessa gishshas hayta iitata intte giddofe diggite. 
Deuteronomy13:6 Intte aayi naa ishay, intte attuma naytinne intte macca nayti, intte siiqiza intte machcheti, intte siiqiza intte laggeti inttena, «Kase intteninne intte aawati goynni erontta xoossas ane goynnoos» giikko," 
Deuteronomy13:7 biittas ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas diza intte yuusho ubbaan mataninne haakon diza ubbaa asay goynniza xoossatas, «Biidi ane isttas goynnoos» giidi baleththiko," 
Deuteronomy13:8 intte hessa mala asatas eeno goopite; istti gizayssaka siyopite; hessa mala asatas qadhettidi istta ashshanaas dafettofte. 
Deuteronomy13:9 Sidhontta istta wodhite; hessa mala as koyrottidi intte caddite; harati inttefe kaallidi shuchchara caddetto. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Intte kase Gibxe biittan aylleteththan dizasoppe inttena wozzi kessida GODAA intte Xoossaafe inttena haassanaas koyida gishshas hessaadey hayqqana gakkanaas shuchchan kurakkite. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay ubbay hessa siyidi babbana; hessa gishshas hessa mala iita ooso nam7anththo oonikka ooththenna. 
Deuteronomy13:12 GODAA intte Xoossay intte daana mala inttes immiza katamatappe issaan intte diza wode," 
Deuteronomy13:13 intte asaa giddofe iitati dendidi asaa, «Ane biidi intte erontta xoossatas goynnoos» giidi baleththishin siyikko," 
Deuteronomy13:14 intte hessa he yo7oza oychchite; minththika qorite; hayssi iita hanoy intte giddon oosettidayssi tumu gidikko," 
Deuteronomy13:15 he katamayn diza asaa ubbaa mashshan siifi dhayssite; he katamayonne izin diza mehaa kumeth ashshontta dhayssite. 
Deuteronomy13:16 He katamayn diza asaa aqota ubbaa ekkidi he katamay giddon diza dubbushan shiishshi doorite; histtidi GODAA intte Xoossaas yarsho ooththidi taman xuuggite; he katamaya nam7anththo simma eqqontta mala mernaas laaletta attu. 
Deuteronomy13:17 Piila miishshafe aykkoyka intte kushen beettofo; histtiko GODAY ba wolqqama hanqofe simmidi inttena maarana; izi inttes qadhettana; kase intte aawatas gelida qaala mala intte qooda darsana. 
Deuteronomy13:18 Gaasoykka tani hach inttena azaziza azazo ubbaa intte naagidi GODAA intte Xoossaas azazettiko, qasse GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththankka suure ooso ooththiko he izi gelida hidota qaalay inttes tumu polettana." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Intte GODAA intte Xoossa nayta; hessa gishshas hayqqida asas mishettidi intte bolla qaaci madunththofte; intte hu7e binanakka buucofte. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Gaasoykka intte, GODAA intte Xoossaas dumma dere; GODAY biitta bolla diza dere ubbaafe intte izas dumma dere gidana mala izi inttena baas doorides." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Tuna gididaaz ay miishsheka moopite. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Hessa gishshas maana mala inttes imettida medosati hekko hayssafe kaalli dizayta; kacera dizaytappe miiz, dorsinne deysh," 
Deuteronomy14:5 genessa, doge, wusha, wora deysh, cofosho, gaara, cagonne bihore miite." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Qinccifilley phalqettidaytanne banchikizayta ubbaa miite. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Gido attiin qinccafilley phalqettonttaytanne banchikonttayta moopite; heytikka gaamella, harbaynonne guppale moopite; heytantta mala medosati banchikizaa gidikkoka istta qinccifilley muume gidida gishshas tuna gidi qoodetteettes." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Gudunththa qinccifilley phalqeth gidikkoka banchikontta gishshas izi hankko tunatara issife qoodettees; haytantta mala medosata moopitenne isttas ahakka bochchofte. 
Deuteronomy14:9 Haaththa giddon diza medheteththa ubbaafe qefera dizaytanne poqoy dizayta ubbaa miite. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Gido attiin haaththa giddon medheteththa ubbaafe qefeynne poqoy bayndayta moopite; heyti inttes tuna gidetto. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Kafotappe geeshshata miite. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Meetettanaas bessonttayti golle, qoollo, ankko," 
Deuteronomy14:13 dumma dumma xilotanne woleta," 
Deuteronomy14:14 dumma dumma quurota," 
Deuteronomy14:15 yanchcha, cancce gutto, haaththa kafo, gace zare ubbaa," 
Deuteronomy14:16 gutto, hazo, woyino" 
Deuteronomy14:17 bazzo gutto, ankko, biya," 
Deuteronomy14:18 zigile, saabissa geetettiza haaththa kafo zare ubbaa, jinjilaate geetettiza kafonne wurkawurkko." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Qefera diza qeeri medheteththati ubbay inttes tuna gidida gishshas istta moopite. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Gido attiin istta giddofe geeshshata miite. 
Deuteronomy14:21 GODAA intte Xoossaas intte dummatida dere gidida gishshas bawuti hayqqida mehe asho moopite; hara dereppe yiidi intte giddon dizayti maana giikko diggofte; woykko hara dere asas bayzana dandayeeta. Deyshsha laaqqa iza aayey maaththan doyssofte. 
Deuteronomy14:22 Intte layththan layththan goyidi demmiza kaththafe tammaafe issi kushe dumma shaakki woththite. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Intte ubba wode GODAA intte Xoossaa bonchcho taamarana mala izi ba sunththi xeygettana mala dooridason intte kaththaa, woyne ushshaanne zayte asraata, intte dorsatappenne mehetappe koyro yelettidayta GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan miite." 
Deuteronomy14:24 GODAA intte Xoossay ba sunththi xeygettana mala dooridasozi intte dizasoppe keehi haaho gidikko GODAA Xoossay inttena anjjana mala intte intte asraataa he tookki ekkidi baanaas dandayontta ixxiko," 
Deuteronomy14:25 he intte kessida asraata bayzidi miishsheza GODAY dooridasoza miishshe ekkidi biite. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Histtidi heen he asraataa miishshaara intte koyida miish, miiz gidiin woykko dors, woyne ushshu gidiin woykko lo7o mino ushshu intte koyida mala shammidi intteso asa ubbaara mishe GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan ufayettite." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Hessa intte ooththiza wode intte katamaan diza Lewe qommota gishan gakkida xinxxoy baynda gishshas intte istta yeggi aggofte. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Heedzdzanththo layththan layththan ubba wode intte kaththafe kessiza dumma asraata intte diza katamatan shiishshite. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Hessaka intte katamatan diza xinxxoy baynda Leweti, beteti, aaway baynda naytinne am7eti yiidi meto; intte hessaththo ooththizaa gidikko GODAA intte Xoossay intte ooso ubbaan inttena anjjana." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Laappunththa laappunththa layththa wurseththan inttefe tal7idaytas acoza isttas aggaagite. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Aggishe histti aggite; ba bagga Isra7eele asaas miishshe tal7idaadey wuri ba tal7idayssa izaades maaro; GODAY acoy maarettiza layththa giidi awajjida gishshas ba tal7ida miishshaa zaari ekkanaas koyoppo. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Hara kare dere asas intte tal7ida miishshey diikko inttes zaarana mala oychchana dandayeeta; inttes isha Isra7eele asatappe inttefe miishshe tal7iday diikko isttas aggaagite. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Hach ta inttena azaziza azazota ubbaan GODAA intte Xoossaas intte azazettizayta gidikko GODAA intte Xoossi inttena keehi anjjana gishshas izi inttes xinxxo histti immiza biittayn intte garsan manqoy deenna. 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes hidota qaalaa mala inttena anjjana; intte daro deretas tal7anashin isttafe oonappeka tal7e haa ekkeeta; qasseka intte kawoteththata haarana attiin oonikka inttena haarenna. 
Deuteronomy15:7 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biittaan intte diza katamata ubbaan Isra7eele asaappe issaadey metotishin be7ikko izi intte bagga gidida gishshas izas meqeth iitopite; qasse iza maaddanaappe intte kushe guye ekkofte. 
Deuteronomy15:8 Intte kushe miccidi izas koshshizaaz ubbaa modhettontta tal7ite. 
Deuteronomy15:9 «Aco qanxxofe maariza laappunththa layththay gakkides» giidi metotanchcha intte ishata tal7e diggofte; hessa mala iita qofay intte wozinan geloppo; manqo gidida intte ishatas intte tal7ontta ixxiko istti pude Xoossaako waassiin inttes gome gidontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy15:10 Intte izas coo kiyateth immite; intte izas immishe intte wozinan modhettontta immite; histtiko intte ooso ubbaaninne intte kushey bochchida miish ubbaan GODAA intte Xoossay inttena anjjana. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ay wode gidiinkka biitta bolla metotanchchaynne manqoy diza gishshas intte deren diza manqotassinne metotanchchatas intte kiyateth ooththana mala ta azazays. 
Deuteronomy15:12 Adde gidiin macca gidiin ne bagga gidida Isra7eele asaappe issi asi ayllettanaas bana nees bayzikko izi nees usuppun layth ooththidaappe guye laappunththa layththan iza aylleteththafe kessa yedda. 
Deuteronomy15:13 Neni aylleteththafe iza kessa yeddiza wode mela kushe yeddofa. 
Deuteronomy15:14 GODAA ne Xoossay nees immida anjjofe, dorsatappe, kaththafenne woyne ayfeppe izas kiyateththan immada yedda." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Intteka kase Gibxe biittan aylle gididayssanne GODAA intte Xoossay inttena heeppe wozzidayssa dogopte; tani inttena hach azazizay hessassa. 
Deuteronomy15:16 Gido attiin he ayllezi nenanne neso asaa dosida gishshassinne nenara duussi izas lo7o gidida gishshas, «Ta neeppe shaakettana koykke» giikko," 
Deuteronomy15:17 neni iza neso penge efada iza hayththaa ne penge sanqqa bolla woththada wosfera lukka; Hessafe guye izi ba de7o layth ubbaan nees aylle gido; qasseka aylle gidiza maccassaska hessaththo ooththa. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Ne iza aylleteththafe kessa yeddiza wode, «Hayssi taas qoho» gaada qoppofa; gaasoykka izi ha usuppun layththaan miishshas ooththiza asi ooththiza oosoppe dakko darssidi nees ooththides; hessa gishshas ne hessaththo ooththiko GODAA ne Xoossay ne ooththiza ooso ubbaan nena anjjana." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Neni ne mehaappenne ne dorsa wudaappe bayra yelettida adde ubbaa GODAA ne Xoossaas dummasa; istta aykkoska go7ettofa; hessaththoka dorsa wudaappe bayra yelettidayta iskeka qanxxofa. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Neninne neso asay GODAA ne Xoossay dooridasohon GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan layththan layththan heyta miite. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Gido attiin ne yarshiza meheta bolla wosoy beettiko, hessika toho sila woykko qooqe, qasseka hara iita borizaazi istta bolla diikko hessantta GODAA ne Xoossaas yarsho shiishshofa." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Heytantta mala meheta heen intteson maanaas dandayeeta; wogay giza mala geeshsha as gidiin woykko tuna as gidiin genessa ashonne gaara asho miza mala maana dandayeeta. 
Deuteronomy15:23 Gido attiin istta suuththaa haaththa mala wora gussite attiin moopite. 
Deuteronomy16:1 GODAA intte Xoossay inttena Abibe aginan omarsara Gibxeppe kessides; hessa gishshas Abibe aginan GODAA intte Xoossaa Paaziga ba7aale bonchchite. 
Deuteronomy16:2 GODAA intte Xoossay ba sunththi xeygettana mala dooridason intte iza bonchchana mala intte meheppe, woykko dorsafe issaa Paaziga ba7aalen yarsho shiishshite." 
Deuteronomy16:3 He yarsho kaththaa intte miza wode irshoy izan gelida kath moopite; hessaththoka kase intte eeson Gibxeppe keziza wode ooththoyssa mala laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy izan gelontta waaye uketh miite; hessika intte daro meto be7idi Gibxe biittafe kezida gallassaa inttena qofsana. 
Deuteronomy16:4 Laappun gallas gakkanaas intte deren ay asa keeththankka irshoy dooppo; intte koyro gallassa omars yarshos shukkida asho ubbay he gallas meetetti wurana bessees. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Intte Paaziga yarsho GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza ay katamatankka coo shukkofte. 
Deuteronomy16:6 Gido attiin GODAA intte Xoossay ba sunththay xeygettana mala dooridason xalla shukkite; shukkishe arshey wulliza wode intte kase Gibxeppe kezida gallassayonne saateyo naagidi shukkite. 
Deuteronomy16:7 He shukkida ashoza GODAA intte Xoossay dooridason xiixi miite; wonteththa gallas gede intte dunkaanen dunkaanen simmite. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Usuppun gallas irshoy izan gelontta uketh miite; Laappunththo gallas GODAA intte Xoossaas goynnanaas issiso shiiqite; he gallas ay oosokka ooththofte. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Intte kath shiishshanaas koyro doommida gallassafe biidi laappun saamintta kumeth qoodite. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Hessafe guye GODAA intte Xoossay inttena anjjida keena intte intte dosan imota ehidi GODAA intte Xoossaas kaththa shiisho ba7aale bonchchite. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Hessan intte intte attuma naytaranne intte macca naytara, intte attuma aylletaranne macca aylletara, intte katamaan diza Lewetaranne bete asatara, intte giddon diza yi7otaranne am7etara ubbay GODAA intte Xoossi ba sunththi xeygettana mala dooridason ufayettite." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Kase intte Gibxen aylle gididayssa yuushshi qoppidi hayta wogata lo7eththi naagite. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Intte kath baleppe gelththidaappe guye qasseka woyne gum7izasohoppe ekkidaappe guye laappun gallas gakkanaas daase ba7aale bonchchite. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Hessan intte, intte attuma naytaranne intte macca naytara, intte attuma aylletanne macca aylletara, intte katamaan diza Lewetaranne bete asatara, intte giddon diza yi7otaranne am7etara ubbay ufayettite." 
Deuteronomy16:15 GODAA intte Xoossay dooridason laappun gallas gakkanaas izas ba7aale bonchchite; GODAA intte Xoossay intte kaththaanne intte ooththiza ooso ubbaan inttena anjjana; izan intte ufayettana. 
Deuteronomy16:16 Intte biittan diza attuma as gidida ubbay layththan heedzdzuto Paaziga ba7aale wode, kaththa shiisho ba7aale wodenne daase ba7aale wode GODAA intte Xoossay izi dooridaso iza sinth shiiqo; ba7aaleza bonchchana yishe oonikka coo mela kushe GODAA sinth yooppo." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Issi issi asi ekki yaana imotay GODAA intte Xoossay izaade anjjida keena gido. 
Deuteronomy16:18 Intte zareti ubbay GODAA intte Xoossay immiza katamatan ubbaan intte daannatanne halaqata sunththite; isttika asaas xillo pirda pirdetto. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Pirda geellasoppa; asa ayfeso beyada maadda pirdofa; baleththofa; maganxo mooppa; gaasoykka maganxoy aadho eranchchata ayfe qooqisees; xillota qaalakka bokkisees. 
Deuteronomy16:20 Intte shemppora paxa daana malanne GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biitta intte laattana mala xillonne suure pirda pirdite. 
Deuteronomy16:21 GODAA intte Xoossaas intte yarshizaso achchan miththafe oosettida Asheeri misle essofte. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Qasseka GODAA intte Xoossay ixxiza goyno shuch essofte. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Intte intte mehe garsafe wosoy woykko pacey dizaaz boora gidiin woykko dorsa GODAA intte Xoossaas yarsho shiishshofte; hessi GODAA achchan ixettida miishsha. 
Deuteronomy17:2 Intte GODAY inttes immiza katamatappe issineyn diza macca gidiin adde gidiin caaqo qaalaa menththidi GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan iita miish ooththi beettiko," 
Deuteronomy17:3 qasseka ta azazo yedhdhi aadhdhidi hara xoossatas goynniko woykko arshes, aginassinne xoolinttetas goynniko," 
Deuteronomy17:4 heytantta mala hanota intte siyikko he yo7oza pilggi qorite; hessa mala iita yo7oti Isra7eele asaa giddon oosettidayssi tumu gidikko," 
Deuteronomy17:5 he iita ooththidaade woykko ooththidaaro katama giddofe gede haraso efidi shuchchan kurakki wodhite. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Hessika nam7u markkay woykko heedzdzu markkay izaade bolla markkattidaappe guye gido; gido attiin issi asi xalla markkattida markkan ay asikka hayqqofo. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Markkati koyrottidi shuchchan caddetto; hessafe guye hankko dere ubbay caddo; hessaththo ooththidi intte giddofe iita ubbaa diggite. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Intte intte katamatan pirdanaas keehi deexxiza shemppo gishshas shiiqiza mooto, shochcha mooto, qasse, «Taas bessees» giza aqota mooto gidiinkka dendiko he wode GODAA intte Xoossay dooridaso eeson ehite." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Lewe qommotappe qeese gididaytassinne he wode daanna gididi pirdizayssas yo7oza shiishshite; he yo7oza istti pirdetto. 
Deuteronomy17:10 GODAY dooridason gididi istti inttes pirdiza pirda mala ooththite; intte polana mala istti immiza azazota naagetti polite. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Istti inttena tamaarsida wogaanne pirda mala ooththite; istti pirdida pirdafe hadirsinne ushach goopite. 
Deuteronomy17:12 GODAA intte Xoossaas ooththiza daannaas woykko qeeses azazettontta ixxidi otorettiza asi diikko hessaadey hayqqo; hessaththo ooththidi heytantta misatiza iita miishshata ubbaa Isra7eele deraa giddofe diggite. 
Deuteronomy17:13 Hessafe guye asi wuri hessa siyidi babbana; nam7anththo hessa mala iita ooso ooththanaas xalana asi deenna. 
Deuteronomy17:14 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biittayo geli laattidi heen duus doommiza wode, «Nuna yuuyi aadhdhida kawoteththatas kawoy dizayssaththo nunikka nuus kawo kawoththana» giikko," 
Deuteronomy17:15 intte kawoththanay GODAA intte Xoossay inttes dooridaade gididayssa erite; hessi intte asaa giddofe doorettidayssa giddofe attiin hara biitta as intte bolla kawosopite. 
Deuteronomy17:16 He kawozi daro para baas shiishshanaas bessenna; GODAY asay Gibxe simmontta mala azazida gishshas heeppe para shammanaas asaa yeddofo. 
Deuteronomy17:17 Iza wozina baleththontta mala kawoy cora machcho ekkofo; worqqanne biraakka darssi shiishshofo. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Izi ba kawoteththa algan uttiza wode Xoossa woga maxaafa Lewe qommo gidida qeeseta matappe baas duuqqi ekko. 
Deuteronomy17:19 He maxaafaza ba matan woththidi ba de7o layth ubbaan nababo; izi histtiko GODAA ba Xoossaa bonchchonne he maxaafan xaafettida wogatanne maarata keehi naagettidinne ammanettidi polo taamarana. 
Deuteronomy17:20 Histtiko izi ba wozinan, «Tani ta laggetappe aadhdhays» giidi Isra7eele asaa bolla otorettenna; GODAA ba Xoossaa wogappe hadirsinne ushach geenna; izi daro layth kawotana; iza naytikka Isra7eele biittan daro layth kawotana." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Lewetappe qeesetinne qasseka kumeththa Lewe qommoti hankko attida Isra7eele asaara biitta gishettiza wogay isttas baynda gishshas istti GODAAS yarshanaas shiishshiza yarshofe miidi detto. 
Deuteronomy18:2 Istta ishata Isra7eele asaa garsan isttas xinxxo gadey dooppo; izi isttas immida hidota qaala mala GODAY isttas xinxxo. 
Deuteronomy18:3 Wofano gidiin woykko dorsa yarshos shiishshiza wode qeeseti missata, banqilatanne ganjjeta ekketto." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Intte kaththafe xeera, woyne ushshafenne wogara zayteppe xeera, dorsa iskefe koyro qanxxettidayssa isttas immite." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Mernaas qeeseteththan ooththana mala hara qommota giddofe GODAA intte Xoossay Lewe qommota baas doorides. 
Deuteronomy18:6 Lewe qommotappe issi asi kase ba diza Isra7eele katamappe GODAY dooridaso baanaas daro amoy izas diikko," 
Deuteronomy18:7 biidi heen kase haggaziza Lewe qommoti ooththizayssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan ooththo. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Qasse ba aawa aqo bayziin bana gakkidayssa ekkidaa gidikkoka qeeseti go7ettizayssa ubbaa isttara gina gishetti ekko. 
Deuteronomy18:9 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biittaa intte geliza wode he biittan diza kawoteththay ooththiza tuna ooso ooththofte. 
Deuteronomy18:10 Ba attuma naa woykko macca naa yarshos giidi taman xuuggiza ay asikka intte giddon dooppo; bitizay, marace xeellizay, muurennizaynne maroy intte giddon dooppo." 
Deuteronomy18:11 Qasseka daggamizaadey (gojizay), woykko moytille xeygizaadey woykko iita ayanatara haasayzaadey, woykko hayqqida asata ayanara haasayzaadey intte giddon dooppo." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Hessantta mala ooththiza ay asikka GODAA matan ixettidaade; istti hessa mala tuna ooththida gishshas GODAA intte Xoossay he kawoteththata intte sinththafe dhoqalli dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy18:13 GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan mulera intte ammanettizayta gidanaas bessees. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Ha intte laattanaas biza biittaan diza kawoteththati muurennizaytinne marace xeellizayti yootizayssa siyizayta. Intte gidikko hessaththo ooththontta mala GODAA intte Xoossay inttena diggides. 
Deuteronomy18:15 GODAA intte Xoossay intte zareppe ta mala nabe denththana; intte izi inttes yootizayssa siyidi azazettite. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Intte Siina zuma bolla shiiqida wode GODAA intte Xoossaa, «Nuni hayqqontta mala GODAA nu Xoossaa cenggurssaa zaari siyokko; qasseka ha wolqqama tamaakka nam7anththo be7okko» giidi oychchideta." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Hessa gishshas GODAY taas, «Istti oychchiza oyshay likke» gides." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Tani istta zareta giddofe isttas ne mala nabe denththana; izi haasayana qaala ta izas immana; ta azazizayssa ubbaa izi inttes yootana. 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ta sunththan yootiza he nabeza qaala siyontta as ta qaxxayana. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Gido attiin ta iza azazontta xalateththan ta sunththan yootiza nabey woykko eeqa xoossata sunththan yootiza nabey hayqqo. 
Deuteronomy18:21 Intte, «Nabey yootiza tinbite qaalay GODAAPPE gidonttayssa ta aazan shaakka eranee?» gi oychchana dandayeeta." 
Deuteronomy18:22 He nabezi yootiday GODAA sunththan yootiin izi yootida qaalay polettontta aggiko hessi GODAY yootonttayssa gididayssa ereeta; he nabezi wordo haasayda gishshas izas yayyofte. 
Deuteronomy19:1 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biittan diza kawoteththata dhayssidi intte istta katamataninne keeththatan de7o doommiza wode," 
Deuteronomy19:2 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes xinxxo ooththidi immiza biittan diza katamatappe heedzdzu katamata inttes shaakkite. 
Deuteronomy19:3 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes xinxxo ooththidi immiza biittaa heedzdzu kessi shaakkite; histtidi ase wodhida asi oonikka he katamatappe issaan baqati attana mala hee efi gaththiza oge giigsite. 
Deuteronomy19:4 Issi asi kase izara morkketeththi bayndaade wodhana gi qoppontta dingate as wodhikko hessaadey katamatappe issineyn bi gelidi ba shemppo ashsho. 
Deuteronomy19:5 Leemisos nam7u asati mith qanxxana bidason istti mith qanxxishin miththaa qanxxiza beyixezi woykko kalttazi tuutezappe qoppontta koletti biidi izara dizaadeza wodhikko, he beyixey iza kusheppe koletti bi wodhidaadezi he heedzdzu katamatappe issi katamayo bi geli ba shemppo ashsho." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Qotetti attiza katamay eeson gakettontta haakoson dizaa gidikko ogey aduqqida gaason suuth azarizaadey keehi hanqettidi gooddi gakkidi hayqqanaas bessonttayssa wodhanaas dandayees; gaasoykka izi ba shooro wodhiday morkketeththi diza gishshas gidenna. 
Deuteronomy19:7 Intte heedzdzu katamata dumma shaakkana mala ta inttena azazizay hessa gishshassa. 
Deuteronomy19:8 GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte aawatas gelida hidota qaalaa mala izi intte zawa aassiko," 
Deuteronomy19:9 hach ta inttena azazidayssa ubbaa intte polikko, GODAA intte Xoossaka siiqikko qasse iza ogen biikko izi inttes hanno biittayo immiza gishshas asi isttan baqati biidi attana mala hara heedzdzu katamata gujji giigsite." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Intte hessaththo ooththiza gaasoykka intte izin daana mala GODAA intte Xoossay inttes xinxxo histti immiza biittayn xillo suuththi gukkontta malanne intteka suuththa acon oyshettontta malassa. 
Deuteronomy19:11 Gidikkoka issi asi morkketeththan dendidi geeman zamadi uttidi qadhetay baynda as wodhidaappe guye ba shemppo ashshanaas he katamatappe issineyn baqati biikko," 
Deuteronomy19:12 izi diza katamaa cimati izi baqati bida katamaappe as kiitti ehisidi hayqqidayssa suuth azarizaades aaththi immetto. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Izas aykkoka qadhettofte; inttes ubba miishshi lo7o gidana mala shemppo wodhizayta Isra7eele giddofe dhayssite. 
Deuteronomy19:14 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza xinxxon beni asati inttessinne intte shooros giddon essida zawa shoddofte. 
Deuteronomy19:15 Asi moorida mooro shaakki eranaas issi markkay xalla gidenna; nam7u woykko heedzdzu markkay markkattana bessees. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Issi iita asi hara as wordora mootikko," 
Deuteronomy19:17 nam7atikka he wode GODAA sinththan ooththiza qeeseta sinththaninne pirdiza daannata sinththan eqqetto. 
Deuteronomy19:18 He pirdizaytikka he yo7oza lo7eththi pilggi xeelletto; he markkattizaadezi ba ishaza bolla wordora markkattidayssi tumu gidikko," 
Deuteronomy19:19 izi he mootoza ba ishaa qaxxayssanaas qoppida qixaatezan ba hu7es qaxxayetto; histtidi hessa mala iita ooththizayssa intte giddofe diggite. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Histtiko hara asay hessa siyidi babbana; hessa mala iita oosoy intte giddon oosettenna. 
Deuteronomy19:21 Hessa mala iita ooththizaytas mulekka qadhettofte; shemppo wodhidaade wodhite; ayfe toyssidaades ayfe toyssite; ach menththidaades ach menththite; kushe menththidaades kushe menththite; toho menththidaades toho menththite. 
Deuteronomy20:1 Intte intte morkketa olana bishin para-gaaretinne toga asati inttefe daro gidikko hessa be7idi dagammofte; gaasoykka inttena Gibxeppe kessida GODAA intte Xoossay inttenara diza gishshas babbofte. 
Deuteronomy20:2 Intte ola doommanaappe sinththatidi qeesezi ola asaakko shiiqidi," 
Deuteronomy20:3 «Isra7eele asawu! Haa ezgite! Intte hach intte morkketara olettanaas beeta; intte wozinay dagammofonne babbofo; istta sinththan kokkoropitenne shirotopite. 
Deuteronomy20:4 GODAA intte Xoossay intte morkketa olanaas inttenara biza gishshas izi inttena xoonisana» go. 
Deuteronomy20:5 Hessafe kaallidi ola asaa kaaleththizayti olanchchatas, «Ooraththa keeth keexxidi gelontta asi intte garsan diikko izi olaso bi hayqqiin hara asi iza keeththan gelontta mala baso guye simmo." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Woykko woyne tokkidi iza ayfe shiishshontta asi diikko izi olan hayqqiin hara asi iza woyne ayfe baas shiishshidi ufayettontta mala izi baso simmo. 
Deuteronomy20:7 Machcho ekkana giigsi woththida asi olan hayqqiin hara asi izo ekkontta mala izi baso simmo» getto. 
Deuteronomy20:8 Ola asaa kaaleththizayti, «Wozinay babbiza asi intte garsan diikko hankko ola asaa wozina hirgisontta mala izi baso simmo» getto." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ola asaa kaaleththizayti hessa yooti wursidaappe guye ola asaa butten butten shaakkidi issi issi buttes kaaleththizayta dooretto. 
Deuteronomy20:10 Issi katama olanaas biidi intte isttako matiza wode koyrottidi saron istti kushe immana mala oychchite. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Istti inttena saron mokki ekkidi bantta gimbe penge doydi inttena gelththiko he katamaan diza asay ubbay inttes haggazonne deexo ooso ooththo. 
Deuteronomy20:12 Gido attiin he katamaa asay inttes saron ba kushe immontta ixxidi inttenara olettana koykko istta katamaa dooddite. 
Deuteronomy20:13 GODAA intte Xoossay he katamayo intte kushen aaththi immiza wode he katamayn diza attumasaa ubbaa wodhite. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Gido attiin maccassatanne guuththa nayta, mehenne he katamayn diza aqota ubbaa inttes di7i ekkite; qasse GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza intte morkketa aqota inttes go7ettite." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Qasseka intte dizasoppe haakki diza katamatakka intte oykkiza wode hayssafe kaallizayssa ooththite. 
Deuteronomy20:16 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes aaththi immida biitta bolla asaa intte oli oykkizaa gidikko asa ubbaa wodhite. 
Deuteronomy20:17 GODAY intte Xoossay inttena azazida mala Hiiteta, Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta ubbaa wodhite." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Intte histtontta aggiko istti bantta eeqa xoossatas goynniza tuna ooso intte ooththana mala inttena tamaarsana; hessan GODAA intte Xoossaa bolla nagara ooththana. 
Deuteronomy20:19 Intte katamaa oykkanaas dooddi daro gallas olettishe gam7iza wode izan diza ayfe immiza miththata ayfe intte maana dandayza gishshas istta qanxxofte; istti ayfe ayfiza miththafe attiin asara olettiza as gidettenna; he demban diza miththata qanxxofte. 
Deuteronomy20:20 Hankko ayfe ayfontta miththata gidikko istta qanxxereththi yeggidi he katamaya kundana gakkanaas giddoththi naagana dandayeeta. 
Deuteronomy21:1 Intte laattana mala GODAA intte Xoossi inttes immiza biittayn ooni wodhidaakko erettontta asa ahay coo demban kundi beettiko," 
Deuteronomy21:2 intte daannatinne intte cimati biidi ahazi dizasoppe doommidi he heeran diza katamata gakkanaas diza haahoteththaa wadhdhetto. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Hessafe guye ahazi dizasos matiza katamayn diza kaaleththizayti oosos gakkontta buro qambaray izi morge bolla wodhdhontta issi ussu dooretto. 
Deuteronomy21:4 He ussiyo mulekka goyetti eronttaso, ay atakiltey toketti eronttasonne goggiza haaththi diza shoobba efidi heen ussay morge mirqqi menththetto." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Histtidi GODAA intte Xoossay ba sinththan ooththana mala, ba sunththan anjjana mala, mootonne shemppo daafa gelidi shaakki pirdana mala GODAA intte Xoossay Lewe naytappe doorida qeeseti ahazi dizaso mata betto." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Hessafe guye ahazi dizaso matan diza katamayo kaaleththiza cimati morge mirqqi menththida ussay bolla bantta kushe meecettetto. 
Deuteronomy21:7 Histtidi, «Hayssa nu wodhibeekko; ooni wodhidaakkoka nu beyibeekko." 
Deuteronomy21:8 GODAWU! Neni Gibxeppe wozzada kessida ne dere Isra7eele nagaraa wursa; nunakka maara; hayssa gukkida xillo suuththaa gishshas nuna oychchofa» getto. 
Deuteronomy21:9 Intte GODAA sinththan suure miish ooththidi xillo suuththi gukkida nagaraa intte giddofe diggite. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Ne morkketara ne olettanaas keziin GODAA ne Xoossi istta ne kushen aaththi immiin ne istta di7ida wode," 
Deuteronomy21:11 he di7ettidayta giddon mala lo7o maccas demmada izo nees machcho ekkanaas koykko," 
Deuteronomy21:12 izo neni neso ehikko iza ba hu7e meedettu; qasse ba xugunth iiru. 
Deuteronomy21:13 Kase iza di7etta yashe may7ida may7o laammu; issi agina gakkanaas neson uttada olan hayqqida ba aayssinne ba aawaas yeekku; hessafe guye izo nees machcho ekka. 
Deuteronomy21:14 Guyeppe neni izin ufayettontta aggiko izo anjja yeddanaas dandayaasa; kase izo wolqqara ekkiday nena gidida gishshas zaarada bayzanaassinne aylle mala qoodanaas bessenna. 
Deuteronomy21:15 Issi asi nam7u machcho ekkidi isttafe issineyo dosidi issineyo ixxiko he nam7atikka izas attuma nayta yelikko he yelettida naytappe bayrazi izi ixxizaari naa gidikko," 
Deuteronomy21:16 izi ba haaro ba naytas gishiza wode izi ixxizaarippe yelettida bayra naaza bayrateththaa kadhidi ba dosizaarippe yelettida naazas maaddidi aaththi immanaas bessenna. 
Deuteronomy21:17 Bayra naazi izi siiqontta machcheyfe yelettikokka izi izas koyro yelo gidida gishshas hankko naytappe aaththidi nam7u kushe aaththi immidi izi bayra gididayssa eriso. 
Deuteronomy21:18 Aawassinne aayis azazettontta ixxidi istti muriinkka simmontta ixxida makkallanchchanne wozina muume nay isttas diikko," 
Deuteronomy21:19 aayanne aaway bantti diza katamata garsan cimati pirdizaso ekki betto. 
Deuteronomy21:20 «Hayssi nu naazi wozina muume; makkallanchcha; nuus azazettenna; maththotteessinne miish coo dhayssees» gi cimatas yootetto. 
Deuteronomy21:21 He katamayn diza attuma asay ubbay iza shuchchan caddi wodhetto; intte hessaththo histtiko intte garsafe iita miishshi dhayana; Isra7eele deren dizay wuri hessa siyidi yayyana. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Issi asi ba ooththida gita mooro gaason miththa bolla kaqetti hayqqana mala pirdettiko," 
Deuteronomy21:23 miththa bolla kaqetti hayqqida asi Xoossi qanggidaade gidida gishshas iza ahay miththa bolla kaqetti aqopo; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biitta tunisontta mala hayqqida ahaza he gallas moogite. 
Deuteronomy22:1 Isra7eele asaa booray woykko dorsi dhaydi wora bishin intte demmiko co7u gi aadhdhofte; iza godaas laagga efa imma. 
Deuteronomy22:2 Gido attiin mehaaddey dizasoy haaho gidikko woykko he mehaaddey oonakko ne erontta aggiko meheza neso ekkada ba; mehaaddey koyishe yiikko izayssa izas zaara. 
Deuteronomy22:3 May7o gidiin woykko hare gidiin woykko hara ay miishshika ne bagga Isra7eele asaappe dhayiin ne demmidaa gidikko zaarada izaades imma. 
Deuteronomy22:4 Ne bagga Isra7eele asaas harey woykko booray ogen kundiin ne be7idaa gidikko maaddada denththa attiin be7ashe yegga aadhdhofa. 
Deuteronomy22:5 GODAA intte Xoossay hessaththo ooththizayta ixxiza gishshas maccati attumasata may7o, attumasati maccassata may7o may7ofetto." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ne oge bishin kafoy ba keeththan miththa bolla woykko biitta bolla yelida ciyeta woykko phuuphphulle haphpha diza kafo ne demmidaa kafoyo ciyetara gaththa neso efoppa. 
Deuteronomy22:7 Ciyeta neso ekka baanaas dandayaasa; aayeyo gidikko iza piradhdha baana mala yedda; neni hessaththo ooththiko nees lo7o gidananne ne daro layth daana. 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ne ooraththa keeth keexxashe he keeththaa kaarappe asi kundidi suuththa acon nena oyshisontta mala keeththaa kaara bolla teqe woththa. 
Deuteronomy22:9 Neni woyne mith tokkashe iza giddon hara zereth zeroppa; ne hara zerikko woyne miththaa ayfeppe gidiin woykko hara ne zeroo kaththaafe go7ettanaas dandayakka. 
Deuteronomy22:10 Booranne hare issife issi qambaran waaxa goyoppa. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Suufeppenne puuttofe walaketti dadettida may7o may7ofa. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Ne may7ana may7os oyddu baggarakka macara medhdha. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Issi asi machcho ekkida mala izira aqi simmidi izo ixxiko," 
Deuteronomy22:14 «Hanno maccassayo ekkadis shin izis geela7oteththa wogay baawa» giidi wordora izi sunththu moorikko," 
Deuteronomy22:15 he nayo yelidayti naya geela7o gididayssas markka ehidi he katamaan diza cimata bessetto. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Nay aaway isttas, «Tani ta nayo hayssa addezas immadis shin ha7i izi izo ixxidayssa qonccisides." 
Deuteronomy22:17 ‹Ne nays geela7oteththi baawa› giidi ta nay sunththu moorides; ta nays geela7oteththi dizayssas hayssi markka» giidi he dere kaaleththizayta sinththan izi izo ekkishin may7o bolla gukkida suuththara diza malata carqqaza besso. 
Deuteronomy22:18 He katamayo kaaleththizayti addeza shoci qaxxayetto. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Qasseka izi Isra7eele naytappe geela7oteththara diza issiney sunththu moorida gishshas issi xeetu saqile bira nay aawaas magaco qanxxo; hessafe guye nayakka izas machcho gidu; izi shemppora paxa diza layth ubbaan izo anjji yeddanaas dandayenna. 
Deuteronomy22:20 Gido attiin izi gidayssi tumu gidi beettiko qasse iza geela7o gididayssa qonccisiza malatay baynda aggiko," 
Deuteronomy22:21 iza ba aawa soon dashe laymatada Isra7eele asaa yeellachchiza ooso ooththida gishshas izo izi aawa keeththa kare efetto; he katamaan diza asay izo shuchchara caddi wodho; hessaththo histtidi intte giddofe iita miish diggite. 
Deuteronomy22:22 Issi asi hara asa machchira zin7i beettiko nam7ayka hayqqetto; hessaththo histtidi intte giddofe iita miish diggite. 
Deuteronomy22:23 Ay asikka katama giddon azina gelana giiga uttida geela7oyra zin7idi beettiko," 
Deuteronomy22:24 nam7atakka he katamayppe kare kessidi shuchchan caddi wodhite; geela7oya katama giddon dashe, «Tana ashshite» gaada waassontta gishshas hayqqanaas bessees; qasse addezi hara asara giiga dizaarira zin7idi woga menththida gishshas hayqqanaas bessees; hessaththo histtidi intte giddofe iita miish diggite." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Issi asi hara asas giiga uttida geela7oyo iza diza katamappe harason demmi wolqqaththidi izi geela7oteththaa ekkidaa gidikko hessaadey xalla hayqqo. 
Deuteronomy22:26 Naya hayqos gaththiza nagara ooththontta gishshas izo bochchofte; hayssa mala oosoy issi asi genera ba laggeza shemppo wodhizayssara issi gina. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Hessika he addezi hara asas giigetta uttida geela7oya ba diza katamappe karen dishin demmidi izo oykkida gishshassinne iza waassidaakkoka izo ashshana asi baynda gishshassa. 
Deuteronomy22:28 Ay asikka hara asara giigettontta geela7oyra zin7ishe oykettiko," 
Deuteronomy22:29 nay aawaas ichchash tammu saqile bira qanxxidi izo baas machcho histto; wolqqan izira zin7ida gishshas hayqqana gakkanaaska izo anjji yeddanaas dandayenna. 
Deuteronomy22:30 Oonikka ba aawa machcho ekkidi woykko izira zin7idi ba aawa yeellasoppo. 
Deuteronomy23:1 Sangettida asi woykko qaaratettida asi GODAA dere duulatan beettofo. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Laggeththon yelettidaynne iza zereththi biidi tammanththo gakkanaas GODAA asa shiiqon geloppo. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Amoonenne Mo7aabe zereththati wurikka tammanththa yeleta gakkanaas GODAA asaa duulatan geloppetto. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Gaasoykka intte Gibxeppe kezidi yishin istti inttena kaththinne haath diggida; qasse Mesphexoomiya biittan Patoore katamaan diza Bi7oore naa Balaamey inttena qanggana mala miishshan shammida. 
Deuteronomy23:5 Gido attiin GODAA intte Xoossay inttena siiqiza gishshas Balaamey qanggiza qanggeththaa siyibeenna; izi qanggida qanggeththaa anjjon laammides. 
Deuteronomy23:6 He dere asati duretidi saron daana mala istta maaddofte. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Istti inttes dabbo gidida gishshas Eedoome asaa kadhidi ixxofte; qasse intte Gibxe biittan kase bete gididi de7ida gishshas Gibxe asatakka ixxofte. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Istta zereththi heedzdzanththo yeletappe doommidi GODAA asaa shiiqon walakettana dandayees. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Intte olas kezidi dunkaani uttidasohon inttena tunisiza miishshafe naagettite. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Issi asi omars agumora maallay iza bolla gukkiko asi diza heeraappe haraso biidi heen takko. 
Deuteronomy23:11 Omarsa wode ba bolla meecettidi arshey wullishin kase ba dizaso simmo. 
Deuteronomy23:12 Sheesh uttizaso intte dizaso heerappe karen giigsite. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Intte sheesh uttanaaso bookkanaassinne biitta zaari kammanaas go7iza miish intte ola massarara gaththi issife oykkite. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena naaganaassinne intte morkketa intte kushen aaththi immanaas intte guta giddon hemetettiza gishshas iza shaattiza miish be7idi guye simmontta mala intte diza heeray geesh gidana bessees. 
Deuteronomy23:15 Ba godaappe baqatidi neekko yida aylle zaarada iza godaas immofa. 
Deuteronomy23:16 Izi intte katamatappe ba koyidason inttenara de7o; iza un7eththofte. 
Deuteronomy23:17 Isra7eele asaappe ooninne attuma gidiin woykko macca gidiin eeqa xoossatas goynnizayti ooththizayssa mala laymatopite. 
Deuteronomy23:18 GODAA intte Xoossay layma ixxiza gishshas adde gidiin woykko maccassi laymateththan demmida miish adina gaso giidi GODAA intte Xoossa keeth ehopetto. 
Deuteronomy23:19 Ne zare gidida Isra7eele asaas miishshe, kath woykko hara miish tal7ada zaarashe dich ekkofa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Hara biitta asaappe dichcha ekkanaas dandayaasa; gido attiin ne bagga gidida Isra7eele asaas dichchas tal7ofa; histtiko ne baada laattana biittayn GODAA ne Xoossay nena ubba baggarakka anjjana. 
Deuteronomy23:21 GODAA ne Xoossaas ne immana gaada adinettida miish gaththanaas gam7ofa; ne gida qaalaa ne polana mala GODAA ne Xoossi koyees; ne adinettida qaala gaththontta ixxiko hessi nees nagara gidees. 
Deuteronomy23:22 GODAA ne Xoossaas ne immana gaada adinettontta aggiko hessi nees nagara gidenna. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Gido attiin GODAA ne Xoossas ne dosan immana gaada ne gelida mala ne inxarsafe kezidayssa pola. 
Deuteronomy23:24 Asi tokkida woyne miththa giddora kanththa bashe ne koyida keena izappe maanaas dandayaasa; gido attiin ay miishshankka yeggada neso efoppa. 
Deuteronomy23:25 Asa kaththa giddora aadhdha bashe tiyappe xupha maana dandayaasa; gido attiin maxa ekkada neso booppa. 
Deuteronomy24:1 Issi asi machcho ekki simmidaappe guye izi bolla issi iita miish demmidi izo ixxiko izo anjji yeddishe izis waraqata xaafi immidi yeddo. 
Deuteronomy24:2 Izasoppe kezada hara azina gelikko," 
Deuteronomy24:3 he nam7anththo azinaykka izo dosontta ixxidi izis waraqata xaafi immidi ba sooppe izo kessi yeddiko, woykko izo ekkida he nam7anththo azinazi hayqqiko;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 iza tunida gishshas koyro anjji yeddida azinazi nam7anththo izo zaaridi ekkofo; hessi GODAA matan ixettidayssa; qasse intteka GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida biittan hayssa mala nagara ooththofte. 
Deuteronomy24:5 Mata wode machcho ekkida asi olas booppo; hara deexo oosokka iza oosisopite. Issi layththi aadhdhana gakkanaas bason gam7idi bananne ba ekkida machchiyo ufaysso. 
Deuteronomy24:6 Neni issaades miishshe tal7e tal7ashe kath gaacciza woxa woykko woxa mayde izappe oyththo ekkofa. Hessaththo oosoy asa shemppo oysora gina. 
Deuteronomy24:7 Ba isha gidida Isra7eele asaa garsafe dhanka barsi efidi baas aylle ooththizay woykko hara asas aylleteththas aaththi bayzizaadey oonikka hayqo. Hessaththo histtidi iita ooso intte giddofe diggite. 
Deuteronomy24:8 Issaafe issaan aadhdhiza galba hargefe keehi naagettite; tani istta azazida mala Lewe qommo gidida qeeseti inttes immiza wogata lo7eththi naagite. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Intte Gibxeppe kezi yishin GODAA intte Xoossi Maarami bolla ooththidayssa yuushshi qopite. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Neni issaades issi miishshe tal7e immashe izi nena oyththiza miish ekkanaas izaade soo geloppa. 
Deuteronomy24:11 Neni karen dishin izaadey ba kushera nees oyso eho. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Izaadey manqo gidikko ne oyso ekkada iza afala ne soon ayssofa. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Izi may7i aqana mala arshey wullontta dishin izas zaara; izikka nena galatana; hessi nees GODAA ne Xoossaa achchan xilloteththan qoodettana. 
Deuteronomy24:14 Ne bagga gidida Isra7eele asaappe gidiin woykko hara dereppe bete yiidi metotida manqo asi nees ooththiko, izaade wolqqa coo mela nees go7ettofa." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Izi hach ooththidayssa hach ekkanaas minththi koyza gishshas arshey wullontta dishin qanxxa; histtontta aggiko metotanchchay neeppe dendoyssan GODAAS waassiko nees nagara gidana. 
Deuteronomy24:16 Nayti moorida mooron yelidayti, qasse yelidayti moorida mooron istta nayti hayqon qaxxayettanaas bessenna; issoy issoy ba moorida mooroza gishshas hayqon qaxxayetto." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Hara biitta asatassinne yi7o naytas pirda geellasoppa; am7ey may7o iza tal7e ekkida miishsha gishshas gaada oyso ekkofa. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Kase intte Gibxe biittan aylleteththan de7idayssanne intte GODAA Xoossay inttena wozzi kessidayssa yuushshi qopite; tanikka hayta ha azazota inttes immizay hessassa. 
Deuteronomy24:19 Neni maxida kaththaa shiishshiin baletti guye attida mirqqey diikko iza ekkanaas guye simmofa; hessa hara biittafe yida bete asatas, yi7otassinne am7etas heen aggaaga. Ne hessaththo ooththiko ne ooththiza ooso ubbaan GODAA ne Xoossay nena anjjana." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Neni wogara miththa ayfe issito maxidaappe guye geedon attidayssa ekkanaas nam7anththo guye simmofa. Hessa hara biittafe bete yidaytas, yi7o naytassinne am7etas aggaaga." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Neni woyne miththa ayfe issito maxidaappe guye geedon attidayssa ekkanaas nam7anththo guye simmofa; hessa hara biittafe bete yidaytas, yi7o naytassinne am7etas aggaaga." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Nekka kase Gibxe biittan aylle gididayssa baloppa; tanikka hayta ha azazota inttes immizay hessassa. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Nam7u asati ba garsan palamettidi pirdaso biikko qohettidayssa ne xillo; qohidayssa, «Ne wordo» giidi pirdizayti pirdetto." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Qohidayssi garafetti qaxxayettanaas bessizaa gidikko pirdizayti izi zaqullidi garafettana mala azazetto; hessafe guye mooranchchay pirdizayta sinththan ba mooro keena garafetto. 
Deuteronomy25:3 Izi oyddu tammuto shocetto attiin hessafe aadho shocettanaas bessenna; hessafe bollara garafettiko ne ishazi ne sinththan kawuyana. 
Deuteronomy25:4 Kath booran bukkashe bukkiza boora doona qachchofa. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Issife de7iza ishanttafe issoy naa yelontta hayqqiko iza machcha kare baada allaga as geluppu; izi azinaa ishay izo laattidi izis koshshiza ubbaa kunththo. 
Deuteronomy25:6 Qasseka isttafe yelettida koyro nay Isra7eele biittan hayqqidaade sunththay dhayontta mala kase hayqqida ishaas naa gido. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Gido attiin izi ba ishaa machcheyo ayssanaas koyontta aggiko iza katama pengen uttida cimataakko baada, «Ta azinaa ishay ba ishaa sunththi Isra7eelen de7ana mala koyibeenna; tana ekkike giidi taas koshshiza miish kunththontta ixxides» gaada magannu." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Hessafe guye he katamayo kaaleththiza cimati addeza baakko xeygidi iza oychchetto. Izi ha7ikka maccassayo ekkontta ixxiko," 
Deuteronomy25:9 he hayqqidayssa machcheya he katamayo kaaleththiza cimata sinththi shiiqada he addeza tohoppe issi caamma shoddada iza ayfeson cuch cuttada, «Ba ishaas zereththi de7ana mala koyontta asa bolla hayssa mala kawushshateththi gakkanaas bessees» gu." 
Deuteronomy25:10 He addeza zarey Isra7eele asaa giddon, «Iza tohoppe caammay shodettidaade soo asata» geetetti kawushshan xeygettishe de7ana." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Nam7u asati wadhettishin isttafe issaa machcheya yaada ba azina ashshanaas ba kushe yeddada hankkoyssa attumateththa oykkiko," 
Deuteronomy25:12 he maccassay kushey maaroy baynda qanxxetto. 
Deuteronomy25:13 As baleththanaas gitanne guth gidida nam7u qommo geeddara miishshi ne matan dooppo. 
Deuteronomy25:14 As baleththanaas adussenne qaanth gidida nam7u qommo wadha miishshi ne soon dooppo. 
Deuteronomy25:15 GODAA ne Xoossay nees immana biittayn neni adussa wode de7ana mala ammanththizanne likke gidida geeddara miishshinne wadha miishshi nees do. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Geeddara miishshaninne wadha miishshan wordora as baleththiza asata ubbaa GODAA ne Xoossay ixxees. 
Deuteronomy25:17 Intte Gibxe biittafe kezi bishin Amaaleeqe asay intte bolla gaththida qohoza balopite.
