Deuteronomy25:18 Istti Xoossas yayyontta asa; intte ogen inttenara eqettida; intte hemettishin daaburdi guye attida asaa ubbaa wodhida. 
Deuteronomy25:19 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossay he biittayo inttena laatissidi inttena yuuyi aadhdhida intte morkketa ubbaafe shempisiza wode asi istta biitta bolla zaari qoppontta mala Amaaleeqe asaa wursa dhayssa; hessa mulekka baloppa. 
Deuteronomy26:1 GODAA ne Xoossay nena laatissana biittayo ne gela uttiza wode," 
Deuteronomy26:2 GODAA ne Xoossay nees immiza biittan mokkida kath ubbaafe xeera keeshera GODAA ne Xoossay ba sunththi hessan xeygettana mala dooridaso ekka ba. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Histtada he woden aawateththan ooththiza qeesezakko baada, «GODAA ne Xoossay nuus immana giidi kase nu aawatas caaqqida biittayo ta gelidayssa ne GODAA sinththan hach markkattays» ga." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Qeesezikka kaththara diza keesheza ekkidi GODAA ne Xoossas yarsho shiishshizasozas sinththa baggan woththo. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Hessafe guye neni GODAA ne Xoossaa sinththan, «Ta aaway kase coo yuuyi yuuyi diza Aaraame dere asa; izi qoodan guuththa asatara Gibxe wodhdhidi de7ishe heen gita wolqqamanne qoodan cora kawoteth gidides." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Gibxe asay gidikko nuus meqeth iitidi nuna un7eththidanne deexo ooso nu bolla caanida. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Histtiin nuni GODAA nu aawata Xoossako waassidos; izikka nu waasoza siyidi nu waayeza, nu daaburazanne nuni qohettidayssa be7ides." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Histtidi GODAY ba wolqqama qeseninne ba micettida kushen, gita dagaman, malataninne malalisiza ooraththa miish ooththidi Gibxe biittafe nuna kessides." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Nuna haa hayssa ehidi hanno maaththinne eessi izin kumida modhdho biittayo laatissides. 
Deuteronomy26:10 Hessa gishshas hekko tanikka izi taas immida gaden kaxxida kaththaafe xeera izas ekka yadis» gaada keesheza woththada GODAA ne Xoossaa sinththan hokka goynna. 
Deuteronomy26:11 Neessinne ne soo asaas GODAA ne Xoossay immida lo7o miishshaan ufayettidi GODAA galatite; Lewetinne intte giddon de7iza bete asati ubbayka inttenara ufayetetto. 
Deuteronomy26:12 Asraata kessiza heedzdzanththo layththan layththan mokkida kath ubbaafe asraata kessa wursidaappe guye ne katamaan de7iza Lewetas, bete asatas, yi7otassinne am7etas ne katamaan istti kalli maana mala imma." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Hessafe guye GODAA ne Xoossaa sinththan, «Ne azazida mala tani tasoppe nees dummatidayssa Lewe qommotas, bete asatas, yi7otassinne am7etas immadis; tani ne azazotappe issinokka menththabeekke; qasse issinokka doga aggabeekke." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Asi hayqqiin kayottashe izappe mabeekke; tani geeyontta dashe izappe aykkoka mabeekke; hayqqida asa gishshas shiiqiza yarshoska izappe aykkoka shiishshabeekke. Tani GODAA ta Xoossaas azazettadis; qasse neni tana azazida ubbaa poladis. 
Deuteronomy26:15 Neni salon de7iza geeshsha sohoppe haa duge xeella; ne dere Isra7eelenne kase nu aawatas ne immana gaada caaqqida mala nuus immida ha maaththinne eessi goggiza biittayo anjja» ga. 
Deuteronomy26:16 GODAA ne Xoossaa wogatanne maarata ne naagana mala hekko hach nena azazides; hessa gishshas neni kumeththa shemppofenne kumeththa wozinappe naaga. 
Deuteronomy26:17 GODAY nees Xoossaa gididayssa ne iza ogen baanayssa, iza wogaa, iza azazotanne iza maaraa neni polanayssa hach erisadasa." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Qasse GODAYKKA ba gelida qaalaa mala neni izas dumma as gididayssa, izas xinxxo gididayssanne neni iza azazo ubbaa naaganayssa erisides." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Neni hessa ooththiko izi medhdhida asa ubbaafe bollara galatan, sunththaninne bonchchon gita kawoteth ooththana; izi gelida caaqo qaalaa mala izas dumma dere ooththanayssa nees erisides." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Hessafe guye Musey Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizaytara derezas, «Tani inttes hach immiza azazota ubbaa naagite." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Intte Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immiza biittayo geliza wode amarda gita shuchchata essidi istta noora tiyite. 
Deuteronomy27:3 Kase GODAA intte aawata Xoossay eessinne maaththi kumida biittayo inttes immanaas caaqqida qaalaa mala he biittayo oykkanaas intte pinnida wode ha woga qaalata lochcha shuchchata bolla xaafte. 
Deuteronomy27:4 Intte Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi ta inttena hach azazida mala he shuchchata Eebaale zumaa bolla essidi istta bolla noora tiyite. 
Deuteronomy27:5 Heen GODAA intte Xoossaas biratay bochchontta shuchchata ekkidi yarsho yarshizaso giigsite. 
Deuteronomy27:6 GODAA intte Xoossaas yarsho yarshizaso masettontta shuchchafe ooththidi iza bollan GODAA intte Xoossaas xuugetti shiiqiza yarsho shiishshite. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Issifeteththa yarsho shiishshidi heen GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan ufayettishe miite. 
Deuteronomy27:8 He shuchchata bolla Xoossa wogata ubbaa nababettana mala qonccisi xaafte» gi azazides. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Museykka Lewe qommotappe qeesetara gididi Isra7eele asaa ubbaas, «Isra7eele asawu tani gizayssa wozinan woththa siya; hekko hach neni GODAA ne Xoossaa dere gidadasa." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Hessa gishshas tani nees hach immiza azazotanne wogata ne wursa naagada GODAA ne Xoossaa qaalas azazetta» gides. 
Deuteronomy27:11 He gallas Musey Isra7eele deraa hizgi azazides," 
Deuteronomy27:12 «Intte Yordaanoose pinnidaappe guye dereza anjjanaas Garizaane zumaa bolla eqqanaas bessizayti Simoona, Lewe, Yuhuda, Yisakoore, Yooseefe qommotanne Biniyaame qommota." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Dereza qangganaas Eebaale zumaa bolla eqqanaas bessizayti Oroobeele, Gaade, Aaseere, Zaabiloone, Daane qommotanne Niftaaleme qommota.»" 
Deuteronomy27:14 Lewe qommoti ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi hayssafe kaalliza qaalaa Isra7eele asa ubbaas getto. 
Deuteronomy27:15 «GODAY eeqa xoossatas goyno ixxiza gishshas, miththafe massidi shuchchafe qoxxidinne birata seerisidi eeqa xoos giigsidi geeman goynnizaadey oonikka qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:16 «Ba aawa woykko ba aayo kawushshizaadey qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:17 «Dhas shoddizaadey wuri qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:18 «Qooqe as hadirsa oge kaaleththiza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:19 «Bete asata, yi7o naytanne am7eta pirda geellasi pirdiza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:20 «Ba aawa machchira zin7idi ba aawa bonchcho kawushshiza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:21 «Ay meherakka parattizaadey qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:22 «Ba michcheyra woykko ba aayi nayra woykko ba aawa nayra zin7iza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin» go." 
Deuteronomy27:23 «Ba bolloteyra zin7iza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin» go." 
Deuteronomy27:24 «Geemason zamadi uttidi ase wodhiza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:25 «Miishshan shamettidi xillo shemppo wodhiza ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy27:26 «Hayta ha woga qaalata naagontta ubbay qanggettidaade gido!» Derezi wurikka, «Amiin!» go." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Neni GODAA ne Xoossaas azazettiko hach ta nees immiza azazota ne ubbaa ammanettada naagikko izi nena biitta bolla diza kawoteththata ubbaafe bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana. 
Deuteronomy28:2 Neni GODAA ne Xoossaas azazettiko hayssafe kaalliza anjjoti wurikka neyta gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:3 Neni katamaninne gaxaren anjjettida as gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Ne nayti, ne biittan diza kaththa ayfey, ne miizati, dorsatinne deyshati ubbay anjjettana." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Ne kaththa gootaraynne maadday anjjettana. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Neni geladakka kezadakka anjjettana. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Ne morkketi ne bolla meto gaththiza wode GODAY istta ne sinththan kundisana; istti ne bolla issi baggara yaana; gido attiin laappun ogera neeppe baqatana. 
Deuteronomy28:8 GODAY ne kushey oykkida ubbaanne ne gootara ubbaa anjjana; qasse izi nees immida biittankka nena anjjana. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Neni GODAA ne Xoossaas azazettikonne ne iza azazota ubbaa polikko izi nees caaqqida qaalaa mala izi nena baas dumma shaakettida dere histtana. 
Deuteronomy28:10 Hessafe guye biitta bolla diza derey wurikka GODAA sunththi nenan xeygettizayssa be7idi nees yayyana. 
Deuteronomy28:11 GODAY nees immanaas kase ne aawatas caaqqida biittaa bolla nees daro nayta, daro mehenne keehi daro kath immana." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Ne kushe ooso ubbaa anjjanaassinne GODAY ne biittaas ira wodera bukisanaas ba minjja keeththaa, salo penge nees doyana; qasse neni daro kawoteththatas tal7anaappe attiin ooppeka haa tal7e ekkaka." 
Deuteronomy28:13 GODAY nena hu7e histtanappe attiin goyna histtenna; hach tani nees immiza ne GODAA azazo siyada hessa neni minththada kaalliko neni ubbaafe bolla gidanaappe attiin garse gidakka. 
Deuteronomy28:14 Tani nees hach immida ha azazotappe kare kezada eeqa xoossatas goynnanaassinne isttas ooththanaas bessenna. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Qasse neni GODAA ne Xoossaas azazettontta ixxiko, tani nees immiza wogatanne azazota ne ammanettada naagontta ixxiko hayssafe kaalliza qanggeththati ne bolla gakkananne nena ekki baana." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Neni katamaninne gaxaren qanggettidaade gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Ne kaththa gootaraynne maadday qanggettidaazi gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Ne nayti, ne biittan diza kaththa ayfey, ne miizati, dorsatinne deyshati ubbay qanggettidaaz gidana." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Neni geladakka kezadakka qanggettidaade gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Neni iita ooson GODAA aggida gishshas ne ooththiza ooson ubbaan ne mulera dhayana gakkanaas qanggeth, hirganne kawushshateth GODAY ne bolla ehana." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Neni laattanaas gelana biittayfe nena mulera dhayssana gakkanaas neeppe kichchontta iita harge GODAY ne bolla yeddana. 
Deuteronomy28:22 GODAY nena gilqateththan, mishoninne qoxon, madunththan, xuuggiza awaninne koshan nena dhayssana; ne kaththaa dhayssanaas kutul7enne lobe ne bolla yeddana." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Neeppe bollara ne ginan de7iza saloy xarqimala gidana; ne biittayka birata mala gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:24 GODAY ne biittan bukkiza iraa buuhenne gudulla kessana; neni biittafe dhayana gakkanaas gudullay saloppe duge bukkana. 
Deuteronomy28:25 GODAY ne morkketa sinththan neni xoonettana mala ooththana; neni istta bolla issi ogera baanashin isttafe attanaas laappunasora baqatana; biitta bolla diza kawoteththati ubbay ne bolla gakkizayssa be7idi hirgan kokkorana. 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ne ahay salo kafotassinne bazzo do7atas quma gidana; istta gooddana asikka deenna. 
Deuteronomy28:27 GODAY nena paxontta Gibxe dere hargen, kixan, giiyiza madunththaninne puuso hargen shocanna." 
Deuteronomy28:28 GODAY nena gooshshan, qooqeteththaninne dagaman yeggana." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Gallassa seetan neni qooqey tattafettiza mala tattafettana; ne ooththiza ubbay nees giigontta ixxana; neni ne de7o ubbaan un7etashenne bonqqettashe daana; nena maaddiza asekka demmaka. 
Deuteronomy28:30 Neni machcho ekkanaas geela7o giigsana; gido attiin hara asi izo dafi ekkana; ne keeth keexxanashin izan daakka; neni woyne mith tokkanashin iza ayfe go7ettaka. 
Deuteronomy28:31 Ne ayfey xeellishin ne mehe hara asi shukkana; gido attiin he ashozappe aykkoka maakka; ne harey neeppe bonqqetti ekettana; gido attiin nees guye simmenna; ne dorsati ne morkkes imettana; hessafe ashshanaas nena maaddanay deenna. 
Deuteronomy28:32 Ne ayfe sinththan ne attuma naytinne macca nayti hara kawoteththas imettana; istti simmiin be7ana gaada ne xeellishin ne ayfey doljumana; hessa digganaas nees ay wolqqayka deenna. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Ne biittaa kaththa ayfenne ne daabura kessida ubbaa hara dere asi maana; neni ne de7o ubbaan un7ettidaadenne qohettidaade gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Neni ayfen be7iza ubbay nena gooshshana. 
Deuteronomy28:35 GODAY nees toho xugunththafe biidi hu7e binana gakkanaas miza paxontta iita madunththaninne kixan ne suulenne ne wodira shocanna. 
Deuteronomy28:36 GODAY nenanne neni ne bolla kawosana kawoza ha biittafe denththidi kase neninne ne aawati erontta hara kawoteth efana; intte heen miththafenne shuchchafe oosettida eeqa xoossatas goynnana. 
Deuteronomy28:37 GODAY neni laaletta biza kawoteththata ubbaa giddon nena qilccas, miichchassinne kadhes kessana." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Ne gaden ne daro kath zerana shin booley mishin attida guuththa kath shiishshana. 
Deuteronomy28:39 Neni woyne mith tokkanashin iza ayfeza go7ettaka; gaasoykka guxuney iza maana. 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ne deren awanka wogara miththi mokkanashin wodey gakkontta dishin ayfe qoqofana; hessa gishshas wogara zaytey nees deenna. 
Deuteronomy28:41 Neni macca naytanne attuma nayta yelanashin istti olan di7etti biikko ne mela attana. 
Deuteronomy28:42 Ne gaden diza miththaanne kaththaa ubbaa booley maana. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Ne wolqqay daaburi daaburi bishin ne deren diza bete asaa wolqqay minni minni baana. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Ne deren diza bete asay nees tal7e immana attiin ne isttas tal7aka; istti nees hu7e gidana; neni gidikko isttas goyna gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:45 Neni GODAA ne Xoossas azazettontta ixxida gishshassinne izi nees immida wogatanne azazota neni naagontta ixxida gishshas neni mulera dhayana gakkanaas hayti ha qanggeththati ubbay ne bolla gakkana. 
Deuteronomy28:46 Ha qanggeththati ubbay Xoossi ne bollanne ne zereththata bolla qixaates yeggida mernaas malaatanne malalisizaaz gidana. 
Deuteronomy28:47 GODAA ne Xoossay nena daro baggara anjjides; gido attiin ne galatashe ufayssan izas ooththabeekka. 
Deuteronomy28:48 Hessa gishshas neni gafan, saamon, kalloteththaninne meto ubbaan GODAY ne bolla yeddiza ne morkketas ne haarettana; GODAY nena dhayssana gakkanaas ne morgen birata qambara waaxana." 
Deuteronomy28:49 GODAY ne istta qaala erontta kawoteth haako dereppe ne bolla ehana; isttika golle kafo mala ne bolla wodhdhana. 
Deuteronomy28:50 Istti menxe iitata, cimmida asaa bonchchonttaytanne guuththa naytas mishettonttayta gidana." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Istti ne mehenne ne kath ubbaa pitti mizayta gidida gishshas neni hayqqana gakkanaas koshan waayana; istti ne dhayana gakkanaas ne kaththaafe issi ayfe, ne meheppe guuththa mari, ne dorsafe guuththa laaqqa, woyneppenne wogara miththa ayfeppe qii palakka ashshettenna." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ne biittan de7iza neni isttan ammanettiza adussanne mino dirsati ubbasora laalettana gakkanaas ne katamata ubbaa yuushon dooddidi nena un7eththana. GODAA ne Xoossay nees immida biitta ubbaa yuushon dooddi ne miixata dippi histti dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ne morkketi ne katamata dooddidi nena un7eththiin nees mizaazi dhayiin ne metotiza wode GODAA ne Xoossay nees immida ne uloppe yelettida macca naytanne attuma nayta asho dosay baynda ne maana. 
Deuteronomy28:54 Ne giddon haray atto kase kiyanne injje duussi dees geetettiza asikka ba ishaas, ba siiqiza machcheyssinne ba yelida naytas qadhettenna." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Guyen katama dooddidi un7eththida gaason maana miishshi haray baynda gishshas ba miza ba nayta ashoppe haras oonaska immenna. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Ne giddon kase injjen de7awus geetettidaara ba injje duussafe dendoyssan sa7a yedhdhanaas shaatettiza maccassayakka ba siiqiza azinaassinne ba naytas qadhettuku. 
Deuteronomy28:57 Morkkey iza de7iza katamaa dooddidi izo un7eththida gishshassinne tuggasida gishshas izis miza miishshi haray aykkoyka deenna; Hessa gishshas iza ba yelida yidhanne do7aa ba siiqiza azinaanne ba nayta gaththontta uuzettada geeman barkka maana. 
Deuteronomy28:58 Hayssa ha maxaafan xaafettida Xoossa wogaa intte lo7eththi naagontta aggiko qasse malalisizanne yashissiza GODAA intte Xoossa sunththaa intte bonchchontta aggiko," 
Deuteronomy28:59 GODAY intte bollanne intte nayta bolla babisiza bosha, simmontta bashshinne paxontta deexo harge intte bolla yeggana." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Neni Gibxe biitta bolla wodhdhiin beyada hirgida he iita hargeza ubbaa izi ne bolla yeddana; nekka he hargezappe paxakka. 
Deuteronomy28:61 GODAA wogati xaafettida ha maxaafan xaafettontta hara boshata inttena ubbaa wursana gakkanaas intte bolla yeddana. 
Deuteronomy28:62 GODAA intte Xoossaas intte azazettontta ixxida gishshas salo xoolintte mala darida inttefe guuththati xalla attana. 
Deuteronomy28:63 GODAY inttena duresanaassinne intte qooda darsanaas dosida mala qasseka inttena guuththishenne biittafe dhayssishe izi ufayettana; intteka laattanaas biza biittayfe shodettana. 
Deuteronomy28:64 GODAY nena kumeththa alamen diza asaa giddon biittas gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas laallana; heen neninne ne aawati kase goynni erontta miththafenne shuchchafe oosettida eeqa xoossatas intte goynnana. 
Deuteronomy28:65 He kawoteththata giddon intte woppa demmeketa; intte toho caammay yedhdhiza soho keena gadeykka inttes deenna; hessan GODAY inttes meto qofan xalla kumida hu7e, amon xalla daaburda ayfenne hidota qanxxiza wozina immana." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Inttes duussay ubba wode waaye xalla gidana; duussay ammanththontta gishshas intte qammanne gallas hirgishe daana. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Intte wozinan kumida hirgafenne intte ayfen be7iza palappe dendidayssan gadey wontishin intte, «Ayde qammaneesha!» qasse gadey qammishin, «Ayde wonttaneesha!» gaana." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Tani inttena, «Nam7anththo ha ogezara beekketa» gida ogezara GODAY inttena zaaridi markaben guye Gibxe yeddana. Heen intte aylle gidanaas intte morkketas inttena bayzanaas koyana; gido attiin inttena ayllesanaas shammiza as demmeketa." 
Deuteronomy29:1 GODAY Koreben Isra7eele asaara caaqettida caaqo qaalappe hara Mo7aabe deren nam7anththo caaqettanaas Muse azazida caaqo qaalati hayssafe kaallizayta. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa xeygidi, GODAY Gibxe kawo bolla, iza shuumeta bollanne ubba deraa bolla izi ooththidayssa," 
Deuteronomy29:3 he iita metota, gita malaatatanne malalisiza miishshata intte intte ayfera be7ideta." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Gido attiin hach gakkanaas GODAY inttes akeekiza wozina, xeelliza ayfenne siyiza hayth immibeenna." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Tani inttena oyddu tammu layth kumeth bazzon kaaleththishin intte may7oy ceeggibeenna; intte tohon aaththida caammayka wuribeenna. 
Deuteronomy29:6 Intte uketh mibeekketa; woyne ushshu gidiin woykko maththosiza ushshu uyibeekketa. Tani hessaththo ooththiday tani GODAA intte Xoossay intte Xoossa gididayssa intte eranaassa. 
Deuteronomy29:7 Intte hayssa haa gakkida mala Haseboone kawo Sihooneynne Baasaane kawo Aagey nuna olanaas yiin nuni istta xoonidos. 
Deuteronomy29:8 Nuni istta biittaa nuus ekkidos; Oroobeele qommotas Gaade qommotassinne Minaase qommotappe baggaytas shaakki shaakki isttas xinxxo gidana mala immidos. 
Deuteronomy29:9 Hessa gishshas intte ooththiza ooso ubbay inttes anjjettana mala hayta caaqo qaalata ubbaa minni kaallite. 
Deuteronomy29:10 Intte ubbati, inttena kaaleththizaytinne intte halaqati, intte cimatinne intte shuumeti, hessaththoka hankko Isra7eele asay ubbayka intte hach GODAA intte Xoossaa sunththan eqqideta." 
Deuteronomy29:11 Intte naytinne intte machcheti inttes mith qanxxishenne haaththe duuqqishe inttenara diza bete asatara issife eqqideta. 
Deuteronomy29:12 GODAA intte Xoossaara intte caaqettida qaalaza minththanaas hach hayssan shiiqideta. 
Deuteronomy29:13 Xoossi inttena hach ba dere histti minththana; inttessinne beni intte aawatas, Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes gelida caaqo qaalaa mala izi inttes Xoos gidana." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Tani hayssa caaqo qaala geliday inttenara xalla gidenna. 
Deuteronomy29:15 GODAA nu Xoossay hayssa ha caaqo qaala gelizay iza sunththan eqqida nunara xalla gidontta hach hayssan dontta buro yaana yeleta ubbaassara caaqqees. 
Deuteronomy29:16 Nuni Gibxen waani de7idaakkonne nu hayssa haa yishe issi issi kawoteththara waani kanththi yidaakko intte ubbayka hessa ereeta. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Istta giddon diza harassiza miishshata miththafe, shuchchafe, birappenne worqqafe oosettida eeqa xoossata intte be7ideta." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ha inttefe ooninne attuma gidiin woykko macca gidiin issi keeththa as gidiin woykko qommo gidiin GODAA nu Xoossaafe sher7i giidi hara kawoteththata xoossatas goynnontta mala naagettite; intte garsan hessa mala camonne marze gidida miish ooththiza asi doontta mala naagettite. 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ha caaqo qaalaa siyidi ba wozinan, «Tani ta shene mala diikkoka taas saroy dees» giidi bana cimmiko hessa mala asi lo7ota bollanne iitata bolla bash ehana." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Hessa mala as GODAY mulekka maarenna; GODAA hanqoy izaade bolla tama mala eexxana; hayssa ha maxaafan xaafettida qanggeththi izaade bolla wodhdhana; salo garsafe iza sunththaa GODAY dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy29:21 Hayssa wogaa maxaafan xaafettida qanggeththa qaalaa mala GODAY izaade Isra7eele asaa ubbaa garsafe dumma shaakki dhayssana. 
Deuteronomy29:22 Sinththafe yaana yeletay, intte zareynne haaho dereppe yaana hara biitta asay GODAY intte bolla ehida boshaanne metoza be7ana." 
Deuteronomy29:23 He Biittaya mulera xuugettida maxinenne diine geetettiza Bidinth gidana; issi miishshika izin tokettenna; ay miishshika izin mokkenna; izin pude dicciza miishshi beettenna; izi bolla gakkana kundeththi GODAY keehi shenetidi mulera dhayssida Sodoome malanne Gamoora mala, Adaama malanne Xaboyme mala gidana." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Kawoteththati ubbay, «GODAY ha biitta bolla hayssa aazas gaththidee? Ha wolqqama hanqozas gaaso gididay aazee?» gi oychchana." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Asay izas zaaridi, «Kase istta aawata Xoossay istta Gibxe dereppe kessida wode isttara paacetti caaqoza asay aggida gishshassa." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Qasse istti biidi kase ba erontta xoossatassinne izi isttas goynnofte gida eeqa xoossatas goynnida. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Hessa gishshas GODAY hanqettidi ha maxaafan xaafettida qanggeth ubbaa istta bolla ehides. 
Deuteronomy29:28 GODAY wolqqama hanqoninne iita boshan istta istta dereppe shoddides; hessa gishshas istti hach gakkanaas heen deettes» gaana. 
Deuteronomy29:29 Xuura yo7oti GODAA nu Xoossassa; gido attiin nuni ha woga qaalaa naagana mala qonccida yo7oti mernaas nuussinne nu naytassa. 
Deuteronomy30:1 Nam7atappe issaa intte doorana mala hach ta intte sinththan anjjonne qanggeth woththadis; GODAA intte Xoossay inttena kawoteththata giddon dishe intte iza yuushshi qoppiza wode," 
Deuteronomy30:2 Intteninne intte nayti GODAA intte Xoossako simmidi kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe tani hach inttena azazida qaalaas azazettiko," 
Deuteronomy30:3 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes qadhettananne inttefe di7ettida intte miishshaa inttes zaarana; intte kase laaletti diza dereppe zaari ehidi qasseka duresana. 
Deuteronomy30:4 Intte biitta gaxa gakkanaas laalettikokka heeppe GODAA intte Xoossay inttena issi bolla shiishshidi zaari ehana. 
Deuteronomy30:5 Hessaththo hanidi kase intte aawata biittaa intte zaari laattana; izikka inttena kase intte aawatappe aaththi duresananne intte qooda darsana. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Intte de7on daana malanne GODAA intte Xoossaa intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe siiqana mala izi inttessinne intte naytas azazettiza wozina immana. 
Deuteronomy30:7 GODAA intte Xoossay hayta ha qanggeththata ubbaa intte morkketa bollanne inttena ixxizayta bolla zaarana. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Intteka zaaridi intte GODAAS azazettana; ta inttes hach immiza iza azazota intte naagandeta. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Hessafe guye intte ooththiza ooso ubbaan GODAA intte Xoossay inttena duresana; izi inttes nayta, mehe, kaththinne miththa ayfe darsana; GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte aawata duresidi ufayettida mala inttenakka duresidi ufayettana." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Izi hessaththo ooththanaykka hayssa woga maxaafaan xaafettida azazotanne wogata intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe naagidi GODAA intte Xoossaako intte simmikonna. 
Deuteronomy30:11 Tani hach inttes immiza azazoy keehi deexo woykko inttefe haakkidaaz gidenna. 
Deuteronomy30:12 «Nuni iza siyidi azazettana mala pude salo bi ehidi nuus yootanay oonee?» giidi intte oychchontta mala hayssi wogazi bolla saloppe beettenna. 
Deuteronomy30:13 «Nuni iza siyidi azazettana mala abba pinni bi ehidi nuus yootanay oonee?» giidi intte oychchontta mala izi abba pinththafe beettenna. 
Deuteronomy30:14 Iza qaalay intte matan dees; intte iza naagana mala izi intte doonaninne intte wozinan dees. 
Deuteronomy30:15 Neni doorana mala tani hach nees de7onne lo7eteth, woykko hayqonne bash ne sinththan woththadis." 
Deuteronomy30:16 GODAA intte Xoossaa siiqana mala, iza ogen hemettana malanne iza azazota, maaratanne iza wogata naagana mala, tani hach inttes immiza GODAA intte Xoossaa azazota intte naagikko intte shemppora paxa de7ananne corattana; qasse intte laattanaas geliza biittan GODAA intte Xoossay inttena anjjana." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Gido attiin intte intte wozina Xoossafe haassidi iza qaala siyontta ixxiko, hara eeqa xoossatas goynnikonne isttas ooththiko," 
Deuteronomy30:18 intte mulera dhayanayssa hach ta inttes yootays; intte Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi laattana biittayn daro layth gam7eketa. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Tani intte sinththan de7onne hayqo, anjjonne qanggeth woththidayssas hach salonne sa7aa intte bolla markkasays; hessa gishshas intteninne intte zareti de7on de7ana mala de7o doorite." 
Deuteronomy30:20 GODAA intte Xoossaa siiqite; iza qaala siyite; izakko shiphi giite; hessaththo hanikko GODAY kase intte aawatas, Abrahaames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes immanaas caaqqida biittan intteninne intte nayti adussa layth de7ana." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Musey hayssa qaala ubbaa Isra7eele asaas yootidaappe guye," 
Deuteronomy31:2 isttas, «Hekko ha7i taas 120 layth gidida gishshas hayssafe guyen ta inttena kaaleththanaas dandaykke; hessafekka bollara tani Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnontta mala GODAY taas yooti woththides." 
Deuteronomy31:3 GODAA intte Xoossay inttefe sinththara bishe inttena kaaleththana; heen diza kawoteththata ubbaa izi dhayssiin intte istta biitta laattana; GODAY yootida mala Iyaasoy inttena kaaleththana. 
Deuteronomy31:4 GODAY Amoore dere kawota Sihoonenne Aage xoonidi istta biittaa dhayssida mala istta bollaka hessaththo ooththana. 
Deuteronomy31:5 GODAY istta inttes aaththi immana; inttenikka ta inttena azazida mala istta bolla ooththana. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Inttes murttateththinne xalateththi de7o; isttas mulekka babboftenne dagammofte; GODAA intte Xoossay inttenara dees; izi inttena yeggi aggenna» gides. 
Deuteronomy31:7 Hessafe guye Musey Iyaaso baakko xeygidi kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sinththan, «Minna; babbofa; GODAY kase istta aawata laatissana giidi caaqqida biittayo laattana mala dereza kaaleththa gelththada laatisanay nena." 
Deuteronomy31:8 GODAY nenara gididi izi nena kaaleththana; izi nena yeggenna; mulekka aggenna; hessa gishshas babbofa; hidotakka qanxxofa» gides. 
Deuteronomy31:9 Hessafe guye Musey woga xaafidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkiza qeese gidida Lewe naytassinne Isra7eele cimata ubbaas immides. 
Deuteronomy31:10 Museykka isttas, «Aco ubbaa maariza laappunththa layththan wurseththa bolla bonchchettiza daase ba7aalezan," 
Deuteronomy31:11 GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan izi kase dooridason izas goynnanaas Isra7eele asay ubbay shiiqiza wode hayssa wogaza istta sinththan nababite. 
Deuteronomy31:12 Istti ubbayka hessa siyidi GODAA intte Xoossaas yashshateth taamarana malanne hayssa wogaa qaalata ubbaa lo7eththi naagana mala maccassata, addeta, naytanne intte deren diza bete asata ubbaa issi bolla shiishshite." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Hessa malan GODAA intte Xoossaa woga kase siyi erontta intte zereththati ubbayka siyetto; qasse intte Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi laattana biittan diza wode ubbaan istti Xoossas azazeteth tamaaretto» gi azazides. 
Deuteronomy31:14 Hessafe guye Xoossay Muses, «Nees hayqo wodey gakkides; izi kaallana wogata izas ta immana mala Iyaaso xeygada izara gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezakko shiiqite» gides. Museynne Iyaasoy issife gede Gaytoteththa dunkaanezakko shiiqida." 
Deuteronomy31:15 GODAYKKA isttas Dunkaaneza pengen tuussa mala eqqida shaaran qonccides. 
Deuteronomy31:16 GODAY Muses, «Neni mata wode hayqqada ne aawatan gayttana; hessafe guye hayssi asazi ta izara caaqettida qaalaa laallana; istti tana aggaagidi layma maccassa mala he istti laattana biittaan diza eeqa xoossatas goynnana." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Hessaththo haniza wode tani istta bolla hanqettada isttafe shaakettana; ta isttas zokko zaarana; isttika ubbay dhayana; istta bolla iita metoynne boshay yaana; he wode isttas, ‹Hayssi metozi nu bolla gakkiday nu Xoossay nu giddon dontta aggiin gidennee?› gaana." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Istti eeqa xoossatas goynnidi istti ooththida nagara gishshas tani he wode isttas zokko zaarana. 
Deuteronomy31:19 «Hayssa yeththaa xaafada Isra7eele asaa tamaarsada isttika yexxana mala ooththa; hayssi yeththazi istta bolla taas markka gidana. 
Deuteronomy31:20 Tani beni istta aawatas caaqqida caaqo qaalaa mala eessinne maaththi kumida biittayo ta istta gelththana; istti heen miidinne uyidi kallidaappenne durettidaappe guye tana yeggi aggana; ta caaqo qaalaakka yeggi aggidi eeqa xoossatas goynnana. 
Deuteronomy31:21 Daro metoynne bashshi istta bolla gakkiza wode ha yeththay istta nayta doonappe kichchenna gishshas istta bolla markka gidana. Gaasoykka tani caaqqida biittaa istta buro gelththontta dashe haarakka istti qoppiza qofaa eraychchadis» gides. 
Deuteronomy31:22 Musey he gallas yeththaza xaafidi Isra7eele asaa tamaarsides. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Hessafe guye Xoossay Nawe naa Iyaaso, «Minna; xala gida; neni Isra7eele asaa kaaleththada ta kase isttas immana ga caaqqida biittayo gelththana; tanikka nenara gidana» gi azazides." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Museykka hayssa wogaa qaalata koyroppe biidi wurseth gakkanaas ubbaa xaafidaappe guyen; 
Deuteronomy31:25 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkiza Lewe qommota hizgi azazides; 
Deuteronomy31:26 «GODAA wogay izan xaafettida maxaafaa ekkidi GODAA intte Xoossaa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza achchan woththite; heen izi ba dizason dishe dereza bolla markka gidana. 
Deuteronomy31:27 Isra7eele asay ay mala makkallanchchakonne wozina muumekko ta erays; tani shemppora paxa isttara dishin istti GODAA bolla makkallizayti tani hayqqidaappe guye keehi makkallanchchata gidana. 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hessa gishshas ta isttas hayssa ubbaa yootana mala korapinnetanne dere halaqata taas shiishshite; tani istta bolla salonne sa7a markka gidana mala xeygana. 
Deuteronomy31:29 Tani hayqqidaappe guye ta inttena azazida azazoppe kare kezidi tuna ooso intte ooththanayssa ta erays; GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththidi intte iza hanqeththiko izi intte bolla bosha yeddana.» 
Deuteronomy31:30 Hessafe guye Musey kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sinththan hayta mazamure qaalata koyroppe biidi wurseth gakkanaas yootides. 
Deuteronomy32:1 Salotoo! Tani yootizayssa ezgi siyite; Sa7azoo ta doonappe keziza qaala siya. 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ta immiza timirtey ira mala bukko; ta haasayaykka xaaza mala xoketto; maata bolla loddi gi bukkiza ira mala bukko; kaththa caarechcha bolla puuse mala wodhdho. 
Deuteronomy32:3 Tani GODAA sunth awajjays; nu Xoossaa gitateth intte yootite. 
Deuteronomy32:4 «Izi nuus miixa; iza oosotikka kumeththa; Iza ogeti wurikka suure; izi balettontta ammanettida Xoossa; izi suurenne xillo Xoossa. 
Deuteronomy32:5 «Istti iza sinththan iita ooththida; istti bantta iitateththaafe dendidayssan hayssafe guye iza nayta gidettenna; istti bokkanne geella yeletata. 
Deuteronomy32:6 «Intteno eeyatoo! Qasseka wozinay bayndaytoo! Intte GODAAS immiza zaaroy hayssee? Inttena medhdhida intte aaway iza gidennee? Inttena medhdhidi hayssas gaththiday iza gidennee? 
Deuteronomy32:7 «Kase beni wodeza yuushshi qoppite; daro yeletata layththaaka akeekite; Intte aawata oychchite; istti inttes yootana; kase cimatakka oychchite; istti inttes qonccisi yootana. 
Deuteronomy32:8 «Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kawoteththatas biitta gishechchida wode, asa nayta istta zaren zaren shaakkida wode, Isra7eele asaa qooda keena kawoteththatas dhas woththides." 
Deuteronomy32:9 «Isra7eeley GODAAS gisha; Yaaqoobeykka izas buzo miishsha. 
Deuteronomy32:10 «Aykkoyka baynda bazzon carkoy punniza biittaan iza demmides; izas gondalle gidides; ba ayfe ciro mala iza naagides. 
Deuteronomy32:11 Golle kafoy ba ciyeta piradho tamaarsiza mala, ba qefe miccada gakka oykka ashshiza mala, GODAY ba qefen haphphidi istta ashshides." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Hara eeqa xoossati izara baynda GODAY iza barkka kaaleththides. 
Deuteronomy32:13 «Dhoqqa sohon iza woththides; biittafe mokkida kaththa ayfe iza mizides; zaallafe beettida ees ushshides; shuchcha biittan mokkida wogara zayte mizides. 
Deuteronomy32:14 Miizappe dorsafenne deysha wudeppe beettiza maaththaninne oys Baasaane dereppe beettiza ohala laaqqata, modhdho dharshota, wofanotanne deyshata, lo7o gistte daabbora istta mizides. Intte iza dereti zo7o woyne miththa ayfeppe, giigida woyne ushshu uyideta." 
Deuteronomy32:15 «Isra7eele asay ordidessinne makkallides. Daro miidi modhdhidessinne moollattides; bana medhdhida Xoossaa aggides; bana ashshidayssaka kawushshides. 
Deuteronomy32:16 Istti eeqa xoossatas goynnidi Xoossaa mishisida; bantta iita oosonkka iza hanqeththida. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Hayssafe kase ba eronttaytas, Xoos gidontta daydanththatas, mata wode yida xoossatas, beni istta aawati isttas goynnontta eeqatas, istti yarsho shiishshida." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Istti baas de7o immida zaallaa dogida; bana medhdhida Xoossaaka balida. 
Deuteronomy32:19 «GODAY hessa be7idi istta bolla hanqettides; istta macca naytanne istta attuma nayta diggides. 
Deuteronomy32:20 ‹Tani ta ayfeso isttafe genththana; istti geellanne ammanettontta dere gidida gishshas istta wurseththi ay gidanaakko ta co7u ga beyana.› 
Deuteronomy32:21 Tumu gidontta xoossatan tana mishisida; go7ay baynda ba eeqa xoossatan tana hanqeththida. Tanikka istta kadhettida kawoteththata istti miigettana mala ooththana. Ta istta akeekontta deretan hanqeththana. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ta hanqoy tama mala eexxana; biittanne biitta bolla diza ubbaa xuuggana; he tamay si7oole ciimmaa gakkanaas eexxana; tamazi zumaas yoch gakkanaas maana. 
Deuteronomy32:23 Tani istta bolla zaareththa zaareththa bosha ehana; Taas diza wondafe ta istta bolla wursana. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Ta ubbaa wursiza kosha istta bolla yeddana; issaafe issaan aadhdhiza iita hargeninne boshan istti wurana; meto gaththiza iita do7atanne dukkiza marzera diza shooshshata ta istta bolla yeddana. 
Deuteronomy32:25 Oge ubbaan istta nayta olay wursana; keeththa giddonkka hirgay kumana; panththatinne geela7oti, guuththa naytinne cimati ubbay wurana." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Tani istta ubbaa laallana; Hessafe guye istta hassa7ana asi deenna. 
Deuteronomy32:27 Gido attiin istta morkketi, ‹Nuni nu wolqqan istta xoonidos attiin Xoos gidenna› giidi otoreteththan ceeqettidi tana hanqeththanaakko gaada qoppays." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Isra7eele asay yuushshi qoppontta kawoteth; isttas akeekay deenna. 
Deuteronomy32:29 Istti erata gididaakko hayssa istti kasetidi qoppana; bantta wurseththankka hananayssa yuushshi qoppanashin! 
Deuteronomy32:30 Istta medhdhidayssi istta aaththi immonttaako, GODAY istta yeggi aggonttaako, Issaadey 1,000 as wostti gooddandee? Woykko nam7ati 10,000 as wostti gooddanee?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Haray attoshin nu morkketi istta xoossay laafa gididayssanne Isra7eele Xoossaa mala gidonttayssa ereettes. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Nu morkketi Sodoomenne Gamoora dere asaa mala tuna; isttika camonne marzera diza ayfe ayfiza woyne miththa mala. 
Deuteronomy32:33 Istta woyne ushshay shooshsha marze mala; qasseka haso shooshsha marze mala. 
Deuteronomy32:34 «Hayssa tani dogadinaa? Ta mazgaban xaafetti uttides. 
Deuteronomy32:35 Istta morkketa bolla halo kessanay tana; ubbaasikka ta istta ooso ooso mala immana; isttas dhayo gallassi gakkida gishshas istti dhuphettana; eesonkka dhayana.» 
Deuteronomy32:36 Isttas wolqqay daaburdayssanne isttaka maaddizay bayndayssa be7idi, GODAY ba asaas pirdana; ba aylletaskka qadhettana." 
Deuteronomy32:37 GODAY ba asaa, «Istti ammanettiza istta xoossati awan dizoo? Istti baqati attiza zaallati awan dizoo?» gi oychchana." 
Deuteronomy32:38 Istti yarshos shiishshiza tolthoza midayti, istta woyne ushsha yarshoza uyida istta eeqa xoossati ane ha7i inttena dendi maaddetto; qasseka inttes duussaso immetto." 
Deuteronomy32:39 «Tani xalla Xoos gididayssa erite; taappe hara Xoossi deenna; wodhizaykka paxa woththizaykka tana; tani madunththayssinne paththays; ta kusheppe oonikka inttena ashshenna. 
Deuteronomy32:40 Tani ta kushe pude salo denththada, ‹Ta mernaas de7ays." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Wawaci giza ta giththa mashshaa leefana; ta kushey pirdas oykkana; ta morkketa bolla halo kessana; tana ixxizaytas ta istta ooso mala isttas immana. 
Deuteronomy32:42 Morkketa halaqata, madunxidaytanne di7ettidayta suuththan ta wondafeta ta maththosana; ta giththa mashshatikka ta morkketa asho maana› ga caaqqana." 
Deuteronomy32:43 «Intteno kawoteththatoo! GODAY ba oosanchchata suuth accana; morkketa bolla halo kessana; bana ixxizayta qaxxayana; ba dereza nagara wursana; biittayokka tunateththafe geeshshana; hessa gishshas intte iza asaara issife ufayettite» giidi," 
Deuteronomy32:44 Museynne Nawe naa Iyaasoy derezi siyishin ha mazamureza yootida. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Musey hayta ha qaalata kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sissidaappe guye," 
Deuteronomy32:46 izi, «Hayssa woga qaala ubbaa intte nayti lo7eththi naagana mala, istti ooththana malanne intte nayta intte azazana mala hach ta inttes markkattiza qaala ubbaa intte wozinan woththite." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ha qaalay inttes de7oppe attiin coo mela qaalaa gidenna; ha qaala naagikko intte Yordaanoose pinnidi laattana biittankka adussa layth intte de7ana» gides. 
Deuteronomy32:48 He gallas GODAY Muses hizgides," 
Deuteronomy32:49 «Mo7aabe deren Iyarkko katama ginara diza Abaarime zumata giddofe Nebo zuma bolla keza; histtada tani Isra7eele asaas immana gida Kanaane biitta he pinththan xeella. 
Deuteronomy32:50 Ne isha Aarooney Hoore zumaa bolla hayqqidi kase hayqqida ba asatan gayttida mala nekka he zumaa bolla hayqqada ne asatan gayttana. 
Deuteronomy32:51 Intte nam7ayka Isra7eele asaa sinththan taas ammanettibeekketa; Xiine bazzon Qaadeese katamaa matan diza Mariiba haaththa achchan ta geeshshateththaa Isra7eele asaa bessibeekketa. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Hessa gishshas neni he biittayo haahon dashe be7ana attiin tani Isra7eele asaa laatissana biittayo neni gelakka.» 
Deuteronomy33:1 Xoossa as Musey hayqqanaappe kasetidi Isra7eele asaas woththida basse qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; 
Deuteronomy33:2 Musey, «GODAY Siina zumaappe yides; Eedoomeppe awa arshey nu bolla poo7ides; Paaraane zuma bollafekka nuus xolqides; izas ushachcha baggara tama lacoy dees; qooday baynda kiitanchchati izara issife deettes." 
Deuteronomy33:3 GODAWU! Neni deraa keeha siiqaasa; geeshshati ubbayka ne kushen deettes; ne toho garsan gulbati goynneettes; histtidi neeppe azazo ekkeettes. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Musey immida wogay Isra7eele asaas laata xinxxo. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Isra7eele qommoti ubbaynne deraa halaqati shiiqiin GODAY ba dere Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotides» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:6 Oroobeele qommota gishshas Musey, «Oroobeele qommoti detto attiin hayqqofetto; istta qoodaykka paccofo» gides." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Yuhuda qommota gishshas Musey, «GODAWU, Yuhuda qommota waaso siya; istti ba dabbotara issifeteththan daana mala ooththa; isttas gita wolqqa imma; istti ba morkketara olettishin neni istta maadda» gides." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Lewe qommota gishshas Musey, «Godawu! Neni istta Maasan paaccadasa; Mariiba haaththa achchan isttara palamettadasa; hessa gishshas Tumimeynne Urimey ne dosida ne oosanchchatas gido." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ne gishshas giidi istti bana yelidayta balida; ba dabbotappe shaakettida; ba ishatappe shaakettida; ba nayta aggida; ne qaalaa bonchchida; ne immida caaqo qaalaakka naagida. 
Deuteronomy33:10 Istti ne woththida maaraa Yaaqoobe, ne wogaakka Isra7eele asaa tamaarseettes; istti ne sinththan exaane cuwaseettes; xuugettiza yarshoka yarsho yarshizasoza bolla shiishsheettes." 
Deuteronomy33:11 GODAWU! Ne istta de7o anjja; istti ooththiza ooso ubbaan ne ufayetta; istta morkketa shaya ne duuththa; istta ixxizayti nam7anththo dendontta mala digga!» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:12 Biniyaame qommota gishshas Musey, «GODAY siiqida asi izan ammanetti dees; ubba gallas istta izi naagees; ba hashen tookkidi shempisees» gides." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Yooseefe qommota gishshas Musey, «GODAY saloppe bukkiza iran, biittafe pude keziza pultton intte biittaa anjjo." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Awa wode kaxxiza lo7o ayfe immo; woden woden kaxxiza kaththa ayfen kumo. 
Deuteronomy33:15 Beniisofe diza istta zumatinne zumbullati coranne lo7o ayfen anjjettetto. 
Deuteronomy33:16 Istta biittay lo7o miishshan kumo; Xuugettiza tusha giddofe qonccida GODAA kiyateththi daro; Yooseefey ba ishata giddon halaqa gidida gishshas ha anjjoti ubbay iza gakketto. 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yooseefe teemay korma boora mala yashiso; iza kaceti menththa kace mala mino gidetto; iza kaceti shiyan qoodettiza Minaase zaretanne tammu shiyan qoodettiza Efreeme zareta; he kacetan izi kawoteththata qaycana; biitta gaxa gakkanaas istta izi gooddana» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:18 Zaabiloone qommota gishshassinne Yisakoore qommota gishshas Musey, «Zaabiloone! Neni ne kessan ufayetta; Yisakoore! Nenikka ne dunkaane giddon ufayetta." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Istti dereza pude zuma bolla xeygidi heen xilloteththa yarsho yarshana; banttas aqotanne dureteth abbafenne shaaminttafe demmana» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gaade qommota gishshas Musey, «Gaade qommota zawa aassida Xoossay galatetto; Gaadey morkketa menththereththanaas gaammo mala shankkatees." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Halaqatas bessiza biittazi iza naagees; izikka lo7o biitta baas doorides; deraa kaaleththizayti shiiqida wode izi GODAA shenenne xillo pirda pirdides» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:22 Daane qommota gishshas Musey, «Daaney Baasaaneppe guppi ke7iza wodalla gaammo mala» gides." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Niftaaleme qommota gishshas Musey, «Niftaalemey GODAA matan dosettides; GODAA anjjonka kumides; iza zaway abbaafe aadhdhidi dugeha bagga gakkides» gides." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aaseere qommota gishshas Musey, «Aaseere qommoti hara qommotappe aadhdhi anjjettidayta gidetto; istti ba ishata giddon dosettidayta gidetto; istta biittay zayten kumo." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Istta katamata pengeti birataninne xarqimalan minni gordetetto; ba diza layth ubbaan istti wolqqama gidetto» gides. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Isra7eele asawu! Saloppe inttena maaddanaas ba teemara shaara bolla hemettiza intte Xoossa mala hara Xoossi deenna. 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mernaa Xoossay inttes duussaso; Mernaas diza iza qeseti inttefe garsara diidi kaafeettes; intte morkketa izi intte sinththafe gooddana; intte istta dhayssana mala izi inttena maaddana. 
Deuteronomy33:28 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Saloppe iray izin bukkiza biittayn, kaththinne woyne ushshi izin kumida biittayn hirgay baynda saron de7ana." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Isra7eele asawu! Intte ay mala anjjettida deree! GODAY ashshida intte malay oonee? Izi inttes gondallenne inttena maaddizayssa; izan intte xooniza giththa mashsha; intte morkketi intte sinththan gufannana; intteka istti goynnizasota laallana. 
Deuteronomy34:1 Musey Mo7aabeppe dendi pude Nebo zumaa bolla kezides; Iyarkkofe arshey mokkiza baggara diza pude Pizga zuma xeera gakkides; izi heen dishin GODAY Gala7aadeppe biidi Daane gakkanaas diza biitta ubbaa bessides. 
Deuteronomy34:2 Niftaaleme biitta, Efreemenne Minaase biittaa ubbaa arshey wulliza baggara diza wogga gita abbaa gaxa gakkanaas diza Yuhuda biitta," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Negebenne zambay diza Iyarkko shoobbafe biidi Zo7aare gakkanaas dizaso ubbaa bessides. 
Deuteronomy34:4 GODAY Muses, «Abraames, Yisaaqassinne Yaaqoobes, ‹Ta intte zereththata laatissana› ga caaqqida biittaya hannoko! Hekko neni ne ayfera be7ana mala ooththadis; gido attiin ne gelakka» gides." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Hessa gishshas GODAA oosanchcha Musey Mo7aabe biittan dishe GODAY izas yootida mala heen hayqqides. 
Deuteronomy34:6 GODAY Muse ahaa Mo7aabe deren diza Beeti-Pe7oore katamappe sinththan diza shoobbaan moogides; gido attiin izi moogettidaso shaakki eriza asi hach gakkanaas beettibeenna. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Musey hayqqishin izas layththay 120; gido attiin iza ayfey doljumibeenna; iza wolqqayka daaburbeenna. 
Deuteronomy34:8 Isra7eele asay Muses michay aadhdhana gakkanaas heedzdzu tammu gallas gakkanaas Mo7aabe demban kayottishe yeekkides. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ba ollan izi ooththana mala Musey Nawe naa Iyaaso bolla ba kushe woththidi shuumida gishshas Iyaasoy aadho erateththaninne ayanan kumides; Isra7eele asay Iyaasos azazettides; GODAY Muse baggara isttas immida azazozakka naagida. 
Deuteronomy34:10 Asi asara haasayza mala GODAARA haasayda Muse mala nabey Isra7eele biittan dendibeenna. 
Deuteronomy34:11 GODAY Gibxe kawozaakko, izara ooththiza halaqataakkonne kumeththa asaakko yeddidi iza baggara ooraththinne malalisiza miish ubbaa ooththida Muse mala hara nabey oonikka deenna." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa sinththan ooththidayssa mala wolqqamanne babisiza malaatata ooththida hara nabey mulekka deenna. 
Joshua1:1 GODAA aylle Musey hayqqidaappe guye GODAY Muse maaddiza Nawe naa Iyaasos," 
Joshua1:2 «Hekko ta aylle Musey hayqqides; ha7i neninne hayssi derezi dendite; tani kase Isra7eele asaas immana gida biittaa gelanaas Yordaanoose shaafa pinnite. 
Joshua1:3 Tani kase Muses immida hidota mala intte tohoy yedhdhiza biitta ubbaa ta inttes immana. 
Joshua1:4 Intte biittaa zaway bazzofe doommidi Libaanoose, wogga shaafa Efiraaxiseppe biidi Hiite dere ubbaa oykkidi arshey wulliza baggara biidi wogga abbaa gakkanaassa." 
Joshua1:5 Neni diza wode ubbaan nenara oonikka eqettana dandayenna; tani kase Musera gidida mala nenarakka gidana; mulekka ta nena yeggikenne aggike. 
Joshua1:6 «Minna! Xala gida; tani kase istta aawatas immana gaada caaqqida biittaa ha dereza kaaleththada laatisanay nena gidida gishshas minna. 
Joshua1:7 Aykkoy baa; neni mino xalla minna; ta aylle Musey nees immida wogaza ubbaa lo7eththa azazetta; ne bidaso ubbaan giiga gidana mala hadirs ushach gooppa. 
Joshua1:8 Hayssi woga Maxaafay ne doonappe shaakettofo; iza giddon dizayssa ne lo7eththa naagettada polana mala gallas gidiin omars zaara zaara qoppa; ne hessaththo ooththiko ne qoppida ubbay nees suurananne hanana. 
Joshua1:9 Neni bizason ubbaan GODAA ne Xoossay nenara diza gishshas aykkoy baa, minna, yayyofa, dagammofa gaada ta nena azazabeekkinaa!» gides." 
Joshua1:10 Hessafe kaallidi Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa," 
Joshua1:11 «Intte gede asay dizaso biidi, ‹Intte heedzdzu gallassafe guye kase GODAA intte Xoossay inttena laatissanaas inttes immiza biittayo laattanaas Yordaanoose pinnana gishshas inttes shinqe giigsite› gi yootite» gi azazides." 
Joshua1:12 Iyaasoy Oroobeele qommotas, Gaade qommotas, hessaththoka Minaase qommotappe baggaytas," 
Joshua1:13 «GODAA aylle Musey, ‹GODAA intte Xoossay inttena shempisana; hanno biittayokka izi inttes immana› gi immida azazoza akeekite." 
Joshua1:14 Intte machcheti, intte naytinne intte mehetikka kase Musey inttes Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan immidason heen diishetto; gido attiin intte ola asay ubbay kumeth ola miishshara intte baggata Isra7eele asaa maaddanaas kasetidi Yordaanoose pinnetto; intteka intte ishatara issife olaas kezite." 
Joshua1:15 Hessika GODAY istta shempisana gakkanaassinne inttes izi ooththoyssaththo isttika GODAA intte Xoossay isttas immida biittaa gakki laattana gakkanaassa; hessafe guye intte simmi yiidi arshey mokkiza baggara Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan GODAA aylle Musey inttes immida biittaa intte laattana» gides. 
Joshua1:16 Isttika Iyaasos, «Neni nuus yootoyssa nuni ubbaa polana; ne kiittizaso awakka baana." 
Joshua1:17 Nuni Muses ubba wode azazettida mala neeskka azazettana; GODAA ne Xoossay kase Musera gidida mala nenarakka izi gido! 
Joshua1:18 Nenara eqettizaadeynne nees azazettonttaade ubbay hayqqo; ne minna; aykkoy baa, ne mino minna» gida." 
Joshua2:1 Nawe naa Iyaasoy biittaa wochchiza nam7u asata Shiixime geetettizasoppe qotan kiittides; kiittishe isttas, «Biite; biidi biitta wochchite; harappeka Iyarkko katamaa dummasi wochchite» gides. Histtiin istti biidi Era7aabo geetettiza layma maccassay soo gelidi aqida." 
Joshua2:2 Histtiin Iyarkko kawoy, «Isra7eele asaappe kiitettidayti ha biitta wochchanaas omars yida» giza yo7o siyides." 
Joshua2:3 Iyarkko kawoy Era7aabikko, «Ne soo yi gelida asata kessa imma. Ays giikko istti biitta ubbaa wochchanaas yida» giza kiita yeddides." 
Joshua2:4 Gido attiin mishireya he nam7u asata qotta woththada, «Ee asati taakko yidaakkoshin istti awappe yidaakko ta erabeekke." 
Joshua2:5 Omars katama penge gordana giza wode istti kezi bida; istti awa bidaakko ta erikke; eesotidi kaallizaa gidikko intte istta oykkana» gadus. 
Joshua2:6 Gido attiin Era7aaba asata pooqe mala oosettidaso kessada micettida talbba buuxa giddon istta qotta woththadus. 
Joshua2:7 Asati xomosizayta koyanaas kezidi Yordaanoose shaafa pinth efiza oge oykkidi bida; koyzayti katamaappe kezida mala katamaa pengey gordettides. 
Joshua2:8 Wochchizayti dhiskanaappe kasetada iza isttako pude kezada isttas," 
Joshua2:9 «GODAY ha biittaa inttes immidayssa, inttes yashshateththi nunan kumidayssanne ha biittan de7iza asaa wozinay inttes hirgan seeridayssa ta erays." 
Joshua2:10 Gibxe biittafe intte kezida wode intte sinththan Zo7o abbaa GODAY wostti melissidaakko nuni siyidos; qasse Yordaanoose shaafappe arshe kessaso baggara diza Amoore biitta kawota nam7ata, Sihoonenne Aage intte wostti ubbaa dhayssidaakko nu siyidos." 
Joshua2:11 Nu hessa siyida mala nu wozinay seerides; inttes yashshateththafe dendidayssan shirotontta asi deenna; GODAA intte Xoossay bolla salonkka garsa biittankka izi Xoossa. 
Joshua2:12 Hessa gishshas tani inttes kiyida mala intteka ta aawa keeththa asaas kiyana mala taas GODAAN caaqqite; hessaska ammanththiza malata taas immite. 
Joshua2:13 Ta aawaanne ta aayiyo, ta ishatanne ta michcheta isttas shemppora diza ubbaa wodhopite; nuna hayqoppe ashshite» gadus." 
Joshua2:14 He asati, «Nu nees caaqqida qaalaa mala polontta aggiko Xoossi nuna wodho! Nu ooththidayssa ne oonaska yootontta aggiko, GODAY hanno biittayo nuus immiza wode nu nees lo7o ooththana mala caaqqoos» gida." 
Joshua2:15 Era7aaba diza keeththay katamaa dirsaara oyketti keexetti uttida gishshas asata wodoron qachchada maskootera duge woththadus. 
Joshua2:16 Era7aaba isttas, «Inttena koyzayti demmontta mala pude zumbullata bolla kezidi heen heedzdzu gallas qotettite; hessafe guye intte baanaaso biite» gadus." 
Joshua2:17 Asatikka izis, «Nuni ne biitta geliza wode ha zo7o wodoroza neni nuna kessida maskoote bolla qachchontta aggiko ne aawa, ne aayiyo, ne ishatanne neso asaa ubbaa neso ehontta aggiko neni nuna caaqisida caaqoy nuus gomettenna." 
Joshua2:18  
Joshua2:19 Oonikka ne keeththafe kare kezi oge bolla beetti hayqqiko hessi iza gome; nuni hessan oyshshettoko; gido attiin nenara soon issife dizay oonikka boshettiko iza suuththa gomey nuna gakko. 
Joshua2:20 Nu ooththizayssa ne haras yootizaa gidikko neni nuna caaqeththida caaqoy nuus gomettenna» gida. 
Joshua2:21 Izakka, «Intte gida mala hano» gaada istta moyzadus; istti bidaappe guye zo7o wodoro ba maskoote bolla qaaphadus." 
Joshua2:22 Istti pude zumbullatakko bida; goodeththizayti Iyarkko simmana gakkanaas heen heedzdzu gallas qotettida. Goodeththizayti oge ubbaan koyida shin istti demmibeettenna. 
Joshua2:23 Hessafe guye he nam7u asati zumbullatappe wodhdhi Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi Nawe naa Iyaasokko biidi bana gakkida ubbaa izas yootida. 
Joshua2:24 Istti Iyaasos, «GODAY tumappe biitta ubbaa nuus aaththi immides; qasse he biittan diza asay wuri nuus yashshateththafe dendidayssan istta wozinay seeridayssa nu be7idos» gida." 
Joshua3:1 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay maalado wonttara dendida; istti Shiixime geetettizasoppe dendidi Yordaanoose shaafaakko biidi pinnontta heen takkida. 
Joshua3:2 Heedzdzu gallassafe guye ola gadawati istti dunkaanidason gelidi," 
Joshua3:3 asaas, «GODAA intte Xoossaa Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotaanne iza tookkida Lewe zare qeeseta be7iza wode intte dunkaanidasoppe dendidi istta kaallite." 
Joshua3:4 Intte kase he ogera bi erontta gishshas intte baana oge istti inttena bessana; gido attiin Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotaakko shiiqopite; Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe 2,000 wadha gidizayssa mala haahon eqqite» gi azazo immida." 
Joshua3:5 Iyaasoy asaa, «GODAY wonto intte giddon malalisizaaz ooththana gishshas intte geeyte» gides." 
Joshua3:6 Qasseka Iyaasoy qeesetas, «Intte Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkidi asaappe sinththe aadhdhite» gi yootides; istti Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkidi deraappe sinththe sinththe bida." 
Joshua3:7 GODAY Iyaasos, «Tani Musera gidida mala nenara gidanayssa Isra7eele asay wuri erana mala hach istta sinththan tani nena dhoqqu dhoqqu ooththanaas doommana." 
Joshua3:8 Neni Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkiza qeeseta, ‹Yordaanoose shaafa doona gakkiza wode haaththan gelidi eqqite› gaada azaza» gides." 
Joshua3:9 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa, «Haa yiite; yiidi GODAA intte Xoossaa qaala siyite." 
Joshua3:10 De7o Xoossi intte giddon dizayssanne izi tumappe Kanaaneta, Hiiteta, Hiiweta, Paarizeta, Gergeseta, Amooretanne Yaabuseta intte sinththafe kessanayssa intte hessan erana." 
Joshua3:11 Sa7a ubbaa GODAA Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotay inttefe sinththatidi Yordaanoose shaafaa gelana. 
Joshua3:12 Ha7i Isra7eele zaretappe 12 asata doorite; issi issi zareppe issi issi as gido. 
Joshua3:13 Sa7a ubbaa GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseta tohoy Yordaanoose haaththaa bochchida mala pudehappe duge goggiza Yordaanoose haaththi heerakka gogeththaa aggaagana; doore mala gidi eqqaa gaana» gides. 
Joshua3:14 Asay Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnanaas ba dunkaaneppe kezida wode Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti asaappe sinththati bida. 
Joshua3:15 Kaththa shiisho woden ubbaan Yordaanoose shaafay kixxees; gidikkoka Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafa gakkidi istta tohoy haaththaa gaxa yedhdhida mala," 
Joshua3:16 goggiza haaththay eqqides; heen daro haahoson Phartaane matan diza Addaame geetettiza katamaa gakkanaas issiso shiiqidi doorettides; duge Arabe gadhan diza Maxine abban goggiza haaththi ubbay duuxxi attides; histtiin asay Iyarkko katamaa ginara pinnides. 
Joshua3:17 Isra7eele asay mela biitta yedhdhi pinniza wode asay wuri pinnana gakkanaas GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafaa giddon mela biittan eqqaa gida. 
Joshua4:1 Kawoteththay wuri Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidaappe guye GODAY Iyaaso," 
Joshua4:2 «Isra7eele asaappe 12 asata doora; issi issi qommofe issi issi as gido. 
Joshua4:3 Histtada isttas, ‹Yordaanoose shaafaa giddon qeeseta tohoy eqqidasoppe 12 shuchchata ekkite; he shuchchata tookki efidi hach intte aqizason woththite› gaada yoota» gides." 
Joshua4:4 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy Isra7eele qommotappe issi issi as ekkidi tammanne nam7u doorettidayta xeygides. 
Joshua4:5 Histtidi isttas, «GODAA intte Xoossaa Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotay dizasoho Yordaanoose shaafaa gelite; Isra7eele qommota qoodan wurikka issi issi shuch intte hashen hashen tookkite." 
Joshua4:6 Ha shuchchati GODAY hach ooththidayssa inttena hassa7issiza malata gidana; wodeppe intte nayti inttena, ‹Ha shuchchati aazee?› giidi oychchiza wode," 
Joshua4:7 intte, ‹GODAA Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotay pinniza wode Yordaanoose shaafay goggizayssa aggi eqqides; ha shuchchati he sohon hanidayssa ubbaa mernaas Isra7eele asaa hassa7issizayta› giidi isttas yootite» gides." 
Joshua4:8 Isra7eele asay Iyaasoy azazida mala ooththides; GODAY Iyaasos yootida mala Isra7eele qommota qoodan 12 shuchchata Yordaanoose shaafaa giddofe ekkida; tookki ehidi ba aqida sohon woththida. 
Joshua4:9 Iyaasoy Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseta tohoy Yordaanoose shaafa giddon eqqidaason 12 shuchchata essides; he shuchchati hach gakkanaas heen deettes. 
Joshua4:10 GODAY Iyaaso azazidayssa ubbaa asay polana gakkanaas Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafaa giddon eqqi gam7ida; Musey Iyaaso azazida azazoykka hessa; asay eesotidi shaafaa pinnides. 
Joshua4:11 Asay wuri pinnidaappe guye GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaynne qeeseti asay istta xeellishin pinnida. 
Joshua4:12 Musey azazida mala Oroobeele zareti, Gaade zaretinne Minaase zaretappe baggay ola miishshaa oykkidi Isra7eele asaappe sinththatidi pinnida." 
Joshua4:13 Qoodan 40,000 gidiza asay tooranne gondalle oykki olas giigettidi GODAA sinththan Iyarkko matan diza demba pinnida." 
Joshua4:14 He gallas GODAY Iyaaso Isra7eele asaa ubbaa sinththan dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides; asay Muse bonchchida mala Iyaasokka izi dida layth ubbaan bonchchides. 
Joshua4:15 Hessafe guye GODAY Iyaasos," 
Joshua4:16 «Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafappe kezana mala azaza» gi yootiin," 
Joshua4:17 Iyaasoy qeeseta, «Yordaanoose shaafappe kezite» gi azazides." 
Joshua4:18 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafa giddofe kezidi mela biitta istti yedhdhida mala heerakka Yordaanoose haaththay kase mala shaafaa kumidi gogeth oykkides. 
Joshua4:19 Asay koyro aginan tammanththa gallassan Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi Iyarkkon arshey mokkizaso baggara zawatiza Gelgelan dunkaanides. 
Joshua4:20 Iyaasoy Yordaanoose shaafappe ehida 12 shuchchata Gelgelan essides. 
Joshua4:21 Isra7eele asaas, «Wodeppe intte zareti ba aawata, ‹Ha shuchchati aazee?› gi oychchiza wode," 
Joshua4:22 ‹Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafaa mela biitta yedhdhidi pinnidayssa hassa7issizayssa› giidi yootite. 
Joshua4:23 Nuni pinnana gakkanaas GODAA nu Xoossay Zo7o abbaa kase nu sinththan melissida mala intteka pinnana gakkanaas GODAA intte Xoossay Yordaanoose shaafaa intte sinththan melissides. 
Joshua4:24 Hessaththo izi ooththiday sa7an diza asay wuri GODAA wolqqay ay mala gitakko eranaassinne intteka GODAAS intte Xoossaas mernaas yayyanaassa» gides. 
Joshua5:1 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara diza Amooreta kawotinne Mediteraane Abba lanqe lanqe oykkidi diza Kanaaneta kawoti wuri Isra7eele asay pinnana gakkanaas GODAY Yordaanoose shaafa haaththaa melissidayssa siyida wode istta wozinay babon seerides. Histtiin istti Isra7eele asaara eqettanaas xalibeettenna. 
Joshua5:2 He wode GODAY Iyaasos, «Salo shuchcha qara ekkada qaxxarettontta Isra7eele attuma asaa nam7anththo qaxxara» gides." 
Joshua5:3 Histtiin Iyaasoy salo shuch qarasidi Gibi7aaze Eloote geetettizason Isra7eele attumasaa qaxxarides. 
Joshua5:4 Izi hessa ooththida gaasoykka Gibxeppe kezida asan layththay olas gakkida attuma asay wuri Gibxeppe kezidaappe guye bazzon oge bolla hayqqides. 
Joshua5:5 Gibxeppe kezida attuma asay wuri qaxxarettides; gido attiin bazzon yuuyiza wode yelettida attuma naytappe issoyka qaxxarettibeenna. 
Joshua5:6 Isra7eele kawoteththay GODAAS azazettontta ixxida gishshas Gibxeppe keziza wode layththay olas gakkida attuma asay wuri hayqqidi wurana gakkanaas bazzon 40 layth yuuyides; hessan GODAY isttas, «Eessinne maaththi goggiza aradda biitta tani kase intte aawatas immana gida he biittaa intte beyekketa» gida qaalay polettanaassa." 
Joshua5:7 Hessa gishshas GODAY istta nayta isttasohon denththides; Iyaasoy qaxxara gelththidayti heytantta; istti oge bolla hemettishe diza gishshas qaxxarettibeettenna. 
Joshua5:8 Kawoteththay wuri qaxxarettidaappe guye madunththay paxana gakkanaas ba dunkaani dizason takkides. 
Joshua5:9 GODAY Iyaasos, «Hach tani Gibxeta bore inttefe genderisa diggadis» gides; histtiin he sohoza sunththay hach gakkanaas Gelgela geetettees." 
Joshua5:10 Isra7eele asay Iyarkko demban Gelgelan dunkaani dishe aginay geliin tammanne oydanththa gallassa omars Paaziga ba7aale bonchchides. 
Joshua5:11 Paazigappe guye wonteththa gallas biittan mokkida kaththa ayfeppe irshoy gelontta uukettidayssanne caacettida tiya mides. 
Joshua5:12 He biittaan mokkida kaththa ayfe mida gallas mannay yuus aggides; hessafe guye Isra7eele asaas mannay yibeenna; gido attiin he wodeppe doommidi istti Kanaanen mokkida kath mishe de7ida. 
Joshua5:13 Iyaasoy Iyarkko matan dishe dhoqqu gi xeellidi giththa mashsha shoddi oykkida issi asi iza sinththan eqqidayssa be7ides; Iyaasoy izakko shiiqidi, «Neni nu baggayee nu morkketa baggaa?» gi oychchides." 
Joshua5:14 Izikka, «Ta oona baggaka gidikke; gido attiin tani GODAA olanchchata gadawa gidida gishshas yadis» gi zaarides. Iyaasoykka sa7an gufanni goynnidi, «Ta godawu! Taas ne ayllezas ne ay yootanee?» gides." 
Joshua5:15 GODAA olanchchata gadaway, «Neni eqqidasoy geesh gidida gishshas ne tohoppe caamma kessa» gides; histtiin Iyaasoy izi azazida mala ooththides." 
Joshua6:1 Isra7eele asaas yayyida gaason Iyarkko katama dirsa pengeti gordettida; katamaa gelanaassinne katamaappe kezanaas dandayzay oonikka deenna. 
Joshua6:2 GODAY Iyaasos, «Hekko tani Iyarkko katamayo izi kawozara izi mino olanchchatarakka ne kushen aaththa immadis." 
Joshua6:3 Neninne ne olanchchati cifridi usuppun gallas gakkanaas hach hach katamaa dirsaa issito yuuyi aadhdhite. 
Joshua6:4 Qasse laappun qeeseti laappun zayeta oykkidi GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinth aadhdhetto; laappunththa gallas qeeseti zayeta punnishin olanchchati cifridi issife katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhetto. 
Joshua6:5 Hessafe guye zayey qanxxoy baynda punettizayssa siyida mala asay wuri ba qaala dhoqqu histti waasso; histtida mala katamay gimbey laalettana; asay wuri lawuhu gi ke7idi katamay giddo sitti gi gelana» gides. 
Joshua6:6 Nawe naa Iyaasoy qeeseta xeygidi, «GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkite; inttefe laappun qeeseti laappun zayeta oykkidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe sinththe aadhdhi biite» gides." 
Joshua6:7 Derezakka, «Gede sinththe biite; katamaa yuuyi aadhdhite; olanchchatikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe sinththati betto; katamayokka yuuyite» giidi azazides." 
Joshua6:8 Iyaasoy asaas haasayda mala laappun qeeseti laappun zayeta GODAA sinththan oykkidi punnishe sinththati bida; qasse GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay istta kaallides. 
Joshua6:9 Olas giigettidayti zayeta punniza qeesetappe sinththara bishin guyera naagiza olanchchati Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa kaallida; he wode zayey qanxxoy baynda punettides. 
Joshua6:10 Gido attiin Iyaasoy asaa, «Tani inttena, ‹Waassite!› gaana gallassay gakkanaas ola waaso waassofte; intte qaalay siyettofo; issi qaalakka qaattofte; ta waassite giikko he wode waassite!» gi azazides." 
Joshua6:11 Hessa gishshas GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay tookettidi he katamaa issito yuuyi aadhdhana mala ooththides; hessafe guye asay ba dunkaanidaso simmidi omars heen aqides. 
Joshua6:12 Wonteththa gallas Iyaasoy wonttatti dendides; qeesetikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida. 
Joshua6:13 Laappun zayeta oykkida laappun qeeseti sinththe aadhdhidi zayishe GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe sinththe sinththe bishe zayeza qanxxoy baynda punnida; olas giigidayti isttafe sinththara bishin guyera naagiza olanchchatikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa kaalli beettes; he wode qeeseti qanxxoy baynda zaye zayeettes. 
Joshua6:14 Nam7anththo gallas katamaa issito yuuyi aadhdhidi ba dunkaanidaso simmida; usuppun gallas gakkanaas hessaththoka ooththida. 
Joshua6:15 Laappunththa gallas bazzoy zo7ishin dendidi kaseyssaththoka katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhida; he gallas xalla katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhida. 
Joshua6:16 Laappunththo yuuyishe qeeseti zayeta punnishin Iyaasoy deraa, «GODAY hanno katamayo inttes aaththi immida gishshas waassite!" 
Joshua6:17 Katamayanne katamay giddon diza ubbay GODAAS dumma gidida gishshas izo mulera dhayssite; nuni biittayo wochchanaas kiittida asata qotta ashshida gishshas layma maccas Era7aabanne izi soon izira issife diza asi xalla attana. 
Joshua6:18 Gido attiin intte GODAAS dummatidayssafe aykkoka ekkontta mala intte hu7es naagettite; intte histtontta aggiko Isra7eeleti dunkaanidaso iitas aaththi immana; histtidi he sohoza bolla meto gaththana. 
Joshua6:19 Biraynne worqqay wuri qasse xarqimalappenne biratappe oosettida miishshati ubbay GODAAS dumma gidida gishshas GODAA minjja keeth gelo» gides. 
Joshua6:20 Hessa gishshas zayey punettiin asay waassides; zayezi punettishin derezi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi waassiin katamaa dirsay laalettides; hessafe guye asay wuri sitti giidi gede katamayo gelides. 
Joshua6:21 Katamaan shemppora paxa dizayta ubbaa oykkidi macca, attuma, nayta, cimata, miiz, dorsanne hare ubbaa qara mashshan wodhides." 
Joshua6:22 Iyaasoy biittaa wochchanaas kiitettida nam7u asata, «Layma maccas Era7aabi soo biite; histtidi intte izis caaqqida mala ane izonne izi soo asaa ubbaa qori kessite» gides." 
Joshua6:23 Hessa gishshas biittaa wochchida asati biidi Era7aabo, izi aawaa, izi aayiyo, izi ishatanne izi dabbota ubbaa qori kessida; Isra7eele asay dunkaani dizasoppe gaxara woththida." 
Joshua6:24 Hessafe guye katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa taman xuuggida; gido attiin biranne worqqa, xarqimalappenne biratappe oosettida miishshata GODAA minjja keeththan woththida." 
Joshua6:25 Qasse Iyaasoy layma maccas Era7aabo izi aawa soo asaanne izira diza dabbota ubbaa ashshides; gaasoykka Iyaasoy Iyarkko katamayo wochchanaas kiitettida asata iza kase qottada ashshida gishshassa; izi zareti hach gakkanaas Isra7eele biittan deettes. 
Joshua6:26 He wode Iyaasoy, «Hanno katamayo zaari essiza asi, ‹GODAA sinththan qanggettidaade gido. Yoch yeggiza wode izas bayra nay dhayo. Gimbeta essishin wurseththa nay dhayo› » giidi qanggides." 
Joshua6:27 Ha ubbaan GODAY Iyaasora gidides; Iyaaso goobateththa worey biitta ubbaa gakkides. 
Joshua7:1 Isra7eele asay GODAAS ammanettontta ixxidi piila miish ekkides; hessa ekkiday Akaane; Akaaney Karme naa; Karmey Zimire naa; Zimirey Yuhuda qommofe Zaraahe naa; histtiin GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides. 
Joshua7:2 Iyaasoy Beetele katamappe arshey mokkiza baggara Beeti-Awene matan diza Aye katama Iyarkkofe as kiittidi, «Gede ke7ite; Biittayokka wochchite» gides. Asatikka biidi Aye katamaa wochchida." 
Joshua7:3 Wochchida asati Iyaasokko simmi yiidi, «Aye katamaa olanaas ubba asay baanaas koshshenna; nam7u woykko heedzdzu shii as yedda; Ayen guuththa asi diza gishshas asay wuri daaburoppo» gida." 
Joshua7:4 Histtiin 3,000 gidiza asay olettanaas Aye katama bides; gido attiin asay Aye katama asaa sinththafe baqatides." 
Joshua7:5 Aye katama asay Isra7eele asaa katamaa gimbe pengefe biidi Shibaarme gakkanaas dugunththaan gooddishe shocides; isttafe 36 as wodhida; hessan asaa wozinay seeridi haaththa mala gukkides. 
Joshua7:6 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy ba may7o daakkides; histtidi GODAA Taabotaa sinththan omars gakkanaas gufannides. Isra7eele cimatikka hessa mala hanida; ba hu7enkka gudulla makkida. 
Joshua7:7 Histtiin Iyaasoy, «Aayye ana! Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Nuna Amoore asaas aaththa immada wursisanaas ays Yordaanoose shaafaa pinththada ehadii? Nu pinnontta heen attidaakko aazee dizayshin!" 
Joshua7:8 Abeet Godawu! Isra7eele asay xoonettidi ba morkketa sinththafe baqatidayssa tani ay goo? 
Joshua7:9 Kanaane asaynne ha biittan diza hara asay wuri ha yo7oza siyidi nuna dooddana; biitta bollafe nu sunth dhayssana; histtiin ne gita sunththaa gishshas gaada ne ay ooththanee?» gides. 
Joshua7:10 GODAY Iyaaso, «Denda eqqa! Ays gufannadii?" 
Joshua7:11 Isra7eele asay nagara ooththides; tani isttara caaqettida ta caaqoza menththides; istti piila miishshatappe ekkida; kaysotida; wordotida; qasse bantti ekkidayssa bantta miishshara walakkida. 
Joshua7:12 Isra7eele asay bantta morkketara eqettanaas dandayonttay hessa gaasonna; istti dhayos aadhdhi imettida gishshas bantta morkketa sinththafe guye simmi baqatida; piila miish intte giddofe intte dhayssontta aggiko hayssafe guye tani inttenara gidikke. 
Joshua7:13 «Denda! Asaa geeshsha; isttas, ‹GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay inttena: Isra7eeletoo! Piila miishshi intte giddon dees; intte hessa intte giddofe diggana gakkanaas intte morkketa sinththan eqqanaas dandayekketa; wontos inttena giigsanaas inttena geeshshite." 
Joshua7:14 Wonto mallado intte qommon qommon shiiqite; GODAY shaakkidayssi, zaren zaren, zarkken zarkken, keeththan keeththaninne hu7en hu7en sinththe kezana." 
Joshua7:15 Hessafe guye piila miishshi iza achchan beettidaadeynne izas diza ubbay taman xuugettana. Gaasoykka GODAA Caaqo Qaalaa laallidi Isra7eele giddon yeellachchiza ooso ooththida gishshassa› ga» gides. 
Joshua7:16 Iyaasoy wonteththa gallas wonttara dendidi Isra7eele asay ba qommon qommon shiiqana mala ooththides; hessafe guye Yuhuda qommoy shaakettides. 
Joshua7:17 Yuhuda qommoy shiiqiin, Zaraahe zarey shaakettides; Zaraahe zarey shiiqiin, Zimire soo asay shaakettides." 
Joshua7:18 Zimire soo asay shiiqiin, wurseththan Zimire naa, Karme naa Akaaney shaakettides." 
Joshua7:19 Histtiin Iyaasoy Akaane, «Ta naazoo! GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchcha; izas paaxa; ane neni ooththidayssa qottontta dashe taas yoota» gides." 
Joshua7:20 Akaaneykka Iyaasos, «Ee tuma! Tani GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa qohadis; tani ooththiday hayssa;" 
Joshua7:21 Di7etti yida miishshaa giddofe tani issi lo7iza Sana7oore kaabba, nam7u xeetu saqile biranne bagga kilo gidiza worqqa be7ada amottida gishshas ekkadis. Histtada ta dunkaane giddon bookkada biraa garsara hiixxa moogadis» gides." 
Joshua7:22 Histtiin Iyaasoy as kiittides; istti iza dunkaanekko woxxi biidi birazi garsara hiixetti hankko miishshatara moogettidayssa demmida. 
Joshua7:23 Kiitetti bida asati miishshaa dunkaaneza giddofe ekkidi, Iyaasokkonne Isra7eele asaakko ehidi GODAA sinththan woththida." 
Joshua7:24 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay issife Zaraahes naaza naa Karme naa Akaane, biraa, kaabbaa, worqqaa, iza attuma naytanne macca nayta, iza miizaa, haretanne dorsata, iza dunkaanenne izas dizayssa ubbaa ekkidi Akoore zulle ehides." 
Joshua7:25 Iyaasoy Akaane, «Hayssa mala meto nu bolla ays ehadii? GODAY hach ne bollaka meto ehana» gides. Histtiin Isra7eele asay wuri Akaanenne iza soo asaa shuchchan kurakki wodhidi izas diza ubbaa taman xuuggides." 
Joshua7:26 Istti Akaane bollan hach gakkanaas diza daro shuch korida. Hessafe guye GODAY yashissiza ba hanqoza zaarides; hessa gishshas hach gakkanaas he sohoy Akoore zulle geetettees. 
Joshua8:1 GODAY Iyaasos, «Yayyofa; dagammofa! Olanchchata ubbaa nenara ekkada, Aye katama baada ola. Hekko Aye katama kawo, iza deraa, iza katamaanne iza biittaa tani ne kushen aaththa immadis." 
Joshua8:2 Neni Iyarkko katamaanne iza kawoza dhayssida mala Aye katamaanne iza kawozakka dhayssana. Gido attiin bonqqida haarozanne di7ida meheza inttes ekkite. Katamaappe guye baggara zamadi naagiza olanchchata woththa» gides. 
Joshua8:3 Histtiin Iyaasoynne olanchchati ubbay Aye olanaas dendida. Iyaasoy ba olanchchata giddofe 30,000 gidiza mino olanchchata dooridi qammara yeddides." 
Joshua8:4 Iyaasoy isttas, «Siyite, katamaappe guye baggara zamadi naagite; katamaappe haakkofte; ubbayka minni naagite." 
Joshua8:5 Taninne tanara diza asa ubbay katamaykko shiiqana; he wode Aye katama asay kaseyssaththoka nunara olettana giidi nuukko kezishin nuni isttafe baqatana. 
Joshua8:6 Katamaappe istti ubbay kezana gakkanaas nuni istta sinththafe baqatana; histtida mala isttas, ‹Kaseyssaththo Isra7eeleti nu sinththafe baqateettes› gishe nu istta kaaleththidi haassi efana gakkanaas istti nuna kaallana; nunikka isttafe baqatana." 
Joshua8:7 He wode intte qotettidasoppe kezidi katamayo oykkandeta; GODAA intte Xoossay katamayo inttes aaththi immana. 
Joshua8:8 Katamayo oykkidaappe guye GODAY azazida mala taman xuuggite; be7ite tani inttena azazadis» gides. 
Joshua8:9 Histtidi Iyaasoy olanchchata yeddides; istti biidi Aye katamappe arshey wullizaso baggara diza Beetelessinne Ayes giddon zamadi naagida; gido attiin Iyaasoy he gallassa omars asaara issife aqides. 
Joshua8:10 Iyaasoy wonteththa gallas wonttara dendidi olanchchata ubbaa shiishshides; izinne Isra7eele gadawati ola asaa kaaleththidi Aye bida. 
Joshua8:11 Izara diza olanchchati ubbay katamays sinth bi matida; hessafe guye qasse Aye katamaappe pudeha baggara diza shoobbaafe he pinththan dunkaanida. 
Joshua8:12 Iyaasoy 5,000 gidana olanchchata ekkidi katamayppe arshey wulliza baggara Beeteleppenne Ayeppe giddon zamadi uttana mala ooththides." 
Joshua8:13 Katamayppe pudeha baggara diza olanchchatanne katamayppe arshey wulliza baggara zamadi uttida olanchchata ubbaa soho soho oyththides. He gallassa omars Iyaasoy duge shoobbaa wodhdhides. 
Joshua8:14 Aye dere kawoy hessa be7idi izinne iza olanchchati ubbay Isra7eele asaa olanaas Arabeppe sinththa baggara dizasoho yida. Gido attiin kawozi katamayppe guye baggara zamadi naagizayti dizayssa eribeenna. 
Joshua8:15 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay xoonettidaa misatidi bazzo simmi baqatida. 
Joshua8:16 Aye asay ubbay istta yedeththanaas xeygettida; Iyaasokka yedeththida; hessaththo ooththidi Aye asay katamaappe haakkana mala ooththida. 
Joshua8:17 Isra7eele asaa yedeththanaas Ayeppenne Beeteleppe kezontta attida attumasi deenna; katamayo doya yeggidi Isra7eele yedeththida. 
Joshua8:18 Hessafe guye GODAY Iyaasos, «Katamayo ta ne kushen aaththa immana; ne oykkida tooraa Aye bolla xonganaas malla xeella» gides. Histtiin Iyaasoy ba tooraa katamaakko zaaridi mallides." 
Joshua8:19 Iyaasoy tooraa hee zaari mallida mala kase zamadi uttida olanchchati bantti qotettidasoppe eeson kezida. Woxxi gelidi oykkida; heerakka izo taman xuuggida. 
Joshua8:20 Aye asay guye simmidi xeellishin katamayppe cuway salo kezizayssa be7ida. Bazzo baqatida Isra7eele asay istta bolla haa simmi wodhdhida gishshas isttas bizasoy dhaydes. 
Joshua8:21 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay zamadi uttida olanchchati katamaa oykkidayssanne cuway salo kezidayssa be7ida mala guye simmidi Aye asaa bolla meto yeggida. 
Joshua8:22 Zamadi uttida olanchchatikka katamayppe istta bolla kezida. Hessa gishshas Isra7eele olanchchati istta yaara haara giddoththidi dippi histtida; issi asikka attibeenna. 
Joshua8:23 Gido attiin Aye kawo xalla shemppora paxa oykkidi Iyaasokko ehida. 
Joshua8:24 Isra7eele asay Aye attuma asaa ubbaa yedeththida dembaninne bazzon issaa issaa qara mashshan wodhi wursidaappe guye simmidi katamayo biidi heen beettida as ubbaa wodhida. 
Joshua8:25 He gallas Aye asay ubbay hayqqides; hayqqida asa ubbaa qooday 12,000 gidides." 
Joshua8:26 Iyaasoy Aye katamayn diza asaa mulera dhayssana gakkanaas katamaakko malli woththida tooraa duge woththibeenna. 
Joshua8:27 Gido attiin GODAY Iyaaso azazida mala Isra7eele asay he katamayn diza medosatanne di7ida miishshata baas ekkida. 
Joshua8:28 Iyaasoy Aye katamaa xuuggides; hach gakkanaas beettiza mala mernaas bidinththa doorenne bula kessides. 
Joshua8:29 Aye dere kawo miththa bolla kaqqides; iza ahaza omars gakkanaas he miththaa bolla aggaagides; arshey wullishin Iyaasoy iza ahaa katamaa penge bolla yeggana mala azazides; iza bolla daro shuch korida; shuchchay hach gakkanaas he sohon dees. 
Joshua8:30 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Eebaale zuma bolla GODAAS Isra7eele Xoossaas yarsho yarshizasoho giigsides. 
Joshua8:31 GODAA aylle Musey Isra7eele asaa azazida malanne Muse Woga Maxaafaan xaafettida mala yarshizasohozi masettonttanne biratay bochchontta shuchchafe keelettides. Izan GODAAS xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshida. 
Joshua8:32 Iyaasoy Musey xaafida Woga Maxaafaa Isra7eele asay xeellishin shuchcha bolla wooci xaafides. 
Joshua8:33 Isra7eele asay ubbay, bete asati, cimati, shuumetinne daannati ubbay GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida Lewe zare gidida qeeseta sinththan Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe ushachcha baggaranne hadirsa baggara eqqida. GODAA aylle Musey kase azazida mala Isra7eele asaa anjjanaas isttafe bagga asay Garizaane zumaakko, bagga asay Eebaale zumaakko simmi eqqides." 
Joshua8:34 Hessafe guye Woga Maxaafaan xaafettida mala Iyaasoy Woga qaalaa anjjonne qanggeth ubbaa nababides. 
Joshua8:35 Musey azazida ubbaafe Iyaasoy nababontta aggida issi qaalaykka deenna. Kumeththa Isra7eele deraas, maccassaas, naytassinne istta giddon diza bete asatas ubbaas nababides." 
Joshua9:1 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara pude gezzen diza derey, gadhan diza derey Libaanoose gakkanaas diza gita abbaa gaxan diza Hiiteta, Amooreta, Kanaaneta, Paarizeta, Hiiwetanne Yaabuseta kawoti ubbay Isra7eele asay xoonidayssa siyida." 
Joshua9:2 Histtidi Iyaasonne Isra7eele asaa olanaas issi bolla dendi yida. 
Joshua9:3 Geba7oone asay gidikko Iyaasoy Iyarkko katamaninne Aye kataman ooththidayssa siyida wode," 
Joshua9:4 baleththanaas koyidi gal7a ogoronne woyne ushshu izan woththiza sikettida lukkamo haren caanida. 
Joshua9:5 Asati gal7anne sikettida caamma aaththida; gal7a may7oka may7ida; melidi buuqqida shinqe oykkida. 
Joshua9:6 Hessafe guye istti Iyaasoy dunkaanidaso Gelgela biidi Iyaasossinne Isra7eele asaas, «Nuni haaho biittafe yidos; ha7i nunara caaqettite» gida." 
Joshua9:7 Isra7eele asay Hiiwetas, «Intte nu matan diza asaakko nu ay eridi inttenara caaqettanee?» gida." 
Joshua9:8 Istti Iyaasos, «Nuni ne aylleta» gida. Iyaasoy, «Intte oonee? Awappe yidetii?» giidi oychchides." 
Joshua9:9 Isttika, «Nuni ne aylleti GODAA ne Xoossaa gitateth siyidi daro haaho biittafe yidos. Iza gitateththaanne izi Gibxe biittan ooththidayssa ubbaa siyidos." 
Joshua9:10 Qasse Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan diza Amoore kawota nam7ata, heytikka Haseboone kawo Sihoone, Astaroote haariza Baasaane kawo Aage bolla izi ooththidayssaka nu siyidos." 
Joshua9:11 Nu dere cimatinne nu biittan diza asay ubbay nuna, inttes oge shinqe oykkidi isttara biidi gayttite; isttas, ‹Nuni inttes aylleta gidana; intte nunara caaqettite› gida." 
Joshua9:12 «Nuni intteko yaanaas nu sooppe hayssa shinqezi ho7o dishin ekki yidos; gido attiin melidayssanne buuqqidayssa hayssa be7ite! 
Joshua9:13 Hayti eessa lukkamoti nuni kunththiza wode ooraththa; gido attiin ha7i istti waani daakettidaakko be7ite! Nu haaho oge hemettida gishshas nu may7oynne caammay wurides» gida. 
Joshua9:14 GODAA oychchontta Isra7eele asay istta shinqefe guuththara ekkides. 
Joshua9:15 Iyaasoy istti saron de7ana mala isttara caaqettides; deraa kaaleththizaytikka he caaqoza minththanaas qaala gelida. 
Joshua9:16 Isttara caaqettida heedzdzanththo gallassafe guye he asati istta dooth gididayssa Isra7eeleti siyida. 
Joshua9:17 Isra7eele asay heedzdzu gallas hemettidi Geba7oone, Kaafire, Bi7erootenne Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettiza katamata gakkides." 
Joshua9:18 Gidikkoka deraa kaaleththizayti GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththan caaqqida gishshas Isra7eeleti istta olibeettenna; kumeththa maabaraykka istta bolla zuuzumides. 
Joshua9:19 Gido attiin deraa kaaleththizayti, «Nuni GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththan caaqqida gishshas ha7i simmidi istta bolla meto gaththanaas dandayokko." 
Joshua9:20 Nuni isttas ooththana dandayzay isttas gelida caaqo qaalaa menththiin hanqoy nu bolla gakkontta mala istta wodhopite. 
Joshua9:21 Gido attiin istti kumeththa maabaraas mith mixishenne haath duuqqishe detto» gi zaarida. Hessa gishshas maabaraa kaaleththizayti gelida qaalay naagettides. 
Joshua9:22 Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata xeygidi, «Intte haan nu matan de7ishe, ‹Nuni keehi haaho biittafe yidos› giidi ays nuna baleththidetii?" 
Joshua9:23 Hessa gishshas ha7i intte qanggettidayta; guuththati ta GODAA Keeththan mith mixizanne haath duuqqiza aylleta gidana» gides. 
Joshua9:24 Istti Iyaasos, «Nuni ne aylleti GODAA ne Xoossay ha biitta ubbaa inttes immanayssanne izan diza asaa ubbaa intte sinththafe dhayssanaas ba aylle Muse azazidayssa geeshshi siyidos. Hessa gishshas inttefe dendoyssan nu shemppos hirgidi hayssa ooththidos." 
Joshua9:25 Hekko ha7i nuni ne kushen doos; nees lo7onne suure misati beettida mala nu bolla ooththa» gi zaarida. 
Joshua9:26 Histtiin Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata Isra7eeleta kusheppe ashshides; isttika wodhibeettenna. 
Joshua9:27 He gallas Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata Isra7eele maabaraassinne GODAY dooridasohon eqqida yarshosozas istti hach gakkanaas mith mixanaassinne haath duuqqana mala ooththides. 
Joshua10:1 Iyaasoy kase Iyarkko katamaa oli dhayssidinne istta kawoza wodhida mala, Aye katama olidi ubbaa dhayssidayssanne istta kawozakka wodhidayssa Yerusalaame kawo Adooni-Xeedeqey siyides. Qasse Geba7oone asay Isra7eele asaara saron de7anaas caaqettidayssanne ha7i isttara issife dizayssa siyides." 
Joshua10:2 Hessan izinne derezi dagammida; gaasoykka Geba7ooney kawota katama mala katamata ubbaafe gita katama; gomppay Aye katamayppe darees; izin diza asaykka mino olanchcha. 
Joshua10:3 Hessa gishshas Yerusalaame kawoy Adooni-Xeedeqey, Kebroone kawo Hohaames, Yarmuute kawo Phir7aames, Laakishe kawo Yaafi7assinne Egiloone kawo Dabirey," 
Joshua10:4 «Geba7oone katamaa asay Iyaasoranne Isra7eele asaara saro deyanaas caaqettida gishshas isttara olettanaas yiidi tana maadderketii!» gides.
