Joshua10:5 Hessafe guye Amooreta kawoti ichchashati Yerusalaame kawoy, Kebroone kawoy, Yarmuute kawoy, Laakishe kawoynne Egiloone kawoy ba olanchchata issife gaththidi ubbaa ekki biidi, Geba7oone katamaa dooddi oykkidi olida." 
Joshua10:6 Geba7oone asay Gelgelan dunkaanida Iyaasokko kiittidi, «Nuna ne aylleta aggofa; eeson nuukko yaada nuna ashsha. Gezze deren diza Amooreta kawoti wuri nuna olanaas ba olanchchata ubbaa shiishshi ekkidi yiza gishshas nuna ne aylleta maadda» gida." 
Joshua10:7 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy ba olanchchatanne mino asata ubbaa shiishshi ekkidi Gelgelappe kezides. 
Joshua10:8 GODAY Iyaaso, «Ne isttas yayyofa; tani istta ne kushen aaththa immadis; isttafe issaadeyka nenara eqettanaas dandayenna» gides." 
Joshua10:9 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Gelgelappe omarsara hemettishe aqidi istti akeekontta dishin istta bolla worajjides. 
Joshua10:10 GODAY Isra7eele asaa sinththan Amooreta bolla shiro yeddides; Isra7eele asay isttafe daro asaa Geba7oonen wodhides. Isra7eele asay istta Beeti-Horoone efiza oge pudunththan kaallides; Azeeqeppe biidi Maqeeda gakkanaas yedeththi wodhida. 
Joshua10:11 Beeti-Horooneppe duge Azeeqe efiza oge oykkidi istti Isra7eele asaa sinththafe baqatishin GODAY wolqqama shach saloppe istta bolla bukisides. Histtiin Isra7eele asay mashshan wodhida asaappe, shachchay wodhida asay keehippe daro." 
Joshua10:12 GODAY Amooreta Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immida gallas Isra7eele asaa sinththan Iyaasoy GODAAS, «Arshey Geba7oonen eqqo; Aginaykka Ayaaloone shoobban eqqu» gides." 
Joshua10:13 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawoteththay ba morkketa bolla halo kessana gakkanaas arshey eqqides. Aginaykka qaaxxabeekku. Hessika Yashaare Maxaafan xaafettides; arshey salos giddo addan eqqides; issi gallas kumeth arshey wullontta pe7ides. 
Joshua10:14 GODAY asa qaala siyida hessa mala gallassi hessafe kasekka guyekka hanibeenna. Tumukka GODAY Isra7eele gishshas olettides. 
Joshua10:15 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele olanchchati ubbay ba dunkaanidaso Gelgela simmida. 
Joshua10:16 He wode Amooreta kawoti ichchashati baqati biidi Maqeedan gongolo giddon qotettida. 
Joshua10:17 Iyaasoykka ichchash kawoti Maqeedan gongolo giddon qotetti dizayssa siyides. 
Joshua10:18 Iyaasoy, «Gita shuchchata genderisi efidi gongoloza gordite; histtidi naagana zabeta heen woththite." 
Joshua10:19 Intte morkketa yedeththite attiin azallofte; istta kaalli kaalli meto gaththite; istti ba katamaa bi gelontta mala diggite; hekko GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte kushen aaththi immides» gides. 
Joshua10:20 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay istta mulera dippi histtida; isttafe attida guuththati kase ba diza gimbettida katamata simmi gelida. 
Joshua10:21 Hessafe guye asay ubbay saron simmidi Iyaasoy dunkaani dizaso Maqeeda yides; Isra7eele asaa bolla issi qaalakka haasayda asi deenna. 
Joshua10:22 Iyaasoy isttas, «Gongoloza doydi he ichchash kawota kessidi taas haa ekki yiite» gides." 
Joshua10:23 Isttika he ichchash kawota Yerusalaame kawo, Kebroone kawo, Yarmuute kawo, Laakishe kawonne Egiloone kawo kessidi izakko ehida." 
Joshua10:24 Istti he kawota Iyaasokko ehiin Iyaasoy Isra7eele attuma asaa ubbaa baakko xeygidi banara diza ola gadawata, «Haa yiidi hayta kawota qoodhe bolla yedhdhi eqqite» gides. Isttika sinth aadhdhidi ba tohon kawota qoodhe bolla yedhdhi eqqida." 
Joshua10:25 Iyaasoykka isttas, «Babofte; dagammofte; minnitenne xalite; inttenara olettiza intte morkketa ubbata bolla GODAY hayssaththo ooththana» gides." 
Joshua10:26 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy ichchash kawota wodhidi ichchash miththa bolla istta ahaa kaqqides; omarsi gakkanaas istta ahay miththa bollafe wodhdhibeenna. 
Joshua10:27 Arshey wullana hanishin Iyaasoy azaziin miththaa bollafe kawota ahaa woththidi kase istti qotettida gongolozan efi yeggida. Histtidi gongoloza gita shuchchatan tuccida; he shuchchati hach gakkanaaska heen deettes. 
Joshua10:28 He gallas Iyaasoy Maqeeda katama oykkides; katamayonne izi kawoza giththa mashshan siifides; izi giddon diza asaappe issinokka ashshontta dishe dippi histtides; Iyarkko kawo bolla ooththidayssaththoka Maqeeda kawo bollaka ooththides. 
Joshua10:29 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Maqeedafe Libina biidi olida. 
Joshua10:30 GODAY he katamayonne izi kawoza Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immides; Iyaasoy katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa issinokka ashshontta giththa mashshan dippi histtides; Iyarkko kawo bolla ooththoyssaththoka Libina kawo bollaka ooththides. 
Joshua10:31 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Libinappe Laakishe bi dooddi olida. 
Joshua10:32 GODAY Laakishe Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immides; Iyaasoy he katamayo nam7anththo gallassan oykkides; izi Libinan ooththoyssaththoka hanno ha katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa giththa mashshan siifides. 
Joshua10:33 He wode Gezeere kawo Horaamey Laakishe kawo maaddanaas yides; gido attiin Iyaasoy izakka iza asaakka issino ashshontta ubbaa dippi histtides. 
Joshua10:34 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Laakisheppe Egiloone biidi he katamaa dooddi oykki olida. 
Joshua10:35 He gallas Egiloone oli oykkidi giththa mashshan dhayssida; kase Laakishen ooththida mala Egiloone katamaan diza asaa mulera dhayssida. 
Joshua10:36 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asa ubbay Egilooneppe kezi biidi Kebroone olida. 
Joshua10:37 He katamayonne katamay giddon diza miish ubbaa issinokka ashshontta giththa mashshan dippi histtida; kase Egiloonen ooththida mala hanno katamay giddon diza ubbaa mulera dippi histtida. 
Joshua10:38 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay guye simmidi Dabire olida. 
Joshua10:39 Katamayonne izi kawoza, izi heeran diza qeeri katamatakka ubbaa giththa mashshan siifida; izi giddon dizayssafe issinokka ashshontta ubbaa dippi histtida; kase Libinaninne Libina kawo bolla ooththida mala, Kebroone bolla ooththoyssaththoka Dabire bollanne izi kawoza bolla ooththida." 
Joshua10:40 Hessaththoka Iyaasoy zumbullati dariza biittaa, Negebe, arshey wulliza baggara diza gadha biittanne zuma laddeta, biitta ubbaa kawotara gaththi oykkides. GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay azazida mala biittaa bolla shemppora diza ubbaa dippi histtides; aykkoka shemppora paxa ashshibeenna." 
Joshua10:41 Iyaasoy istta Qaadeese Barineppe biidi Gaaza gakkanaas, qasse Gooshene biittafe doommidi Geba7oone gakkanaas ubbaa xooni oykkides." 
Joshua10:42 Iyaasoy issito ola kezidi he kawotanne istta biitta ubbaa xoonides. Hessika haniday GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay ba deraas olettida gishshassa. 
Joshua10:43 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay ba dunkaanidaso Gelgela simmides. 
Joshua11:1 Haxoore kawo Yaabiney Isra7eele asay xoonidayssa siyida wode, Meedoone kawo Yobaabes, Shimiroone katamaas, Akishaafe kawos kiita yeddides." 
Joshua11:2 Hessaththoka pudeha baggara shaara menththon diza kawotas, dugeha baggan Arabe kawotas, arshey wulliza baggara diza gadha kawotassinne arshey wulliza baggara Doore zuman diza kawotas kiittides." 
Joshua11:3 Qasse arshey keziza baggaranne wulliza baggara diza Kanaanetas, Amooretas, Hiitetas, Paarizetas, shaara menththon diza Yaabusetassinne Mixiphpha biittan Hermoone zumaappe garsa baggara diza Hiiwe kawotas kiittides." 
Joshua11:4 Histtiin istti ba olanchchata ubbaa denththidi daro paratanne para-gaareta issife Isra7eele olanaas ekki yida. Isttas qooday abba doonan diza ancco mala cora. 
Joshua11:5 He kawoti wuri issife ba wolqqa minththidi Isra7eele olanaas Meroome haaththaa matan dunkaanida. 
Joshua11:6 GODAY Iyaasos, «Neni isttas babbofa! Tani wonto hanni wode istta ubbaa hayqqida asa mala histta Isra7eele kushen aaththa immana. Neni istta parata ubbaa gildayana; istta para-gaaretakka taman xuuggana» gides." 
Joshua11:7 Histtiin Iyaasoynne iza olanchchati ubbay istti qoppontta dishin Meroome haaththaa matan istta bolla puttu giidi istta olida. 
Joshua11:8 GODAY istta Isra7eeleta kushen aaththi immides; histtiin Isra7eeleti istta xoonidi gita Sidoona biitta efiza ogera, Masirafoote-Mayma gakkanaas qasseka arshey mokkiza baggara Mixiphpha shoobbaa gakkanaas yedeththida. Isttafe issi asikka shemppora paxa attibeenna." 
Joshua11:9 Iyaasoy GODAY iza azazidayssa ubbaa istta bolla polides; istta paratakka gildaydes; istta para-gaaretakka taman xuuggides. 
Joshua11:10 He wode Iyaasoy guye simmidi Haxoore katamaa oykkides; he katamaa kawozakka giththa mashshan siifides; Haxoore katamaas he wode diza kawoteththata ubbaa bolla alaafeteththi dees. 
Joshua11:11 He katamaan diza asaa ubbaa giththa mashshan siifida; shemppora paxa diza ubbaa issinokka ashshontta wodhida; katamayokka taman xuuggida. 
Joshua11:12 GODAA aylle Musey azazida mala Iyaasoy he katamatanne istta kawota ubbaa dhayssides; giththa mashshankka siifides. 
Joshua11:13 Gidikkoka Iyaasoy Haxoore katamaa xuuggoyssafe attiin Isra7eele asay zumata bolla keexettida katamata xuuggibeenna. 
Joshua11:14 Isra7eele asay he katamatappe bonqqida miish ubbaanne mehe ubbaa banttas ekkida; gido attiin asaa giththa mashshan dhayssida; shemppora paxa dizaa issinokka ashshibeettenna. 
Joshua11:15 GODAY ba aylle Muse azazida mala Museykka Iyaaso azazides. Histtiin Iyaasoykka azazoza polides; GODAY Muses azazida ubbaafe izi ooththontta aggida ay miishshika deenna. 
Joshua11:16 Hessaththo histtidi Iyaasoy he biitta ubbaa gezze biitta, Negebe biitta, Gooshene biitta, arshey wullizaso baggara diza gadhanne Arabe biitta qasseka Isra7eele gezzenne gadha ubbaa shiishshi oykkides." 
Joshua11:17 Hessika Seyre gakkanaas diza Halaaqe zumaappe biidi Hermoone zumaappe dan7e baggara Libaanoose zullen Ba7aali-Gaade gakkanaas diza biitta ubbaa gakkides. Istta kawotakka ubbaa oykkidi wodhides. 
Joshua11:18 Iyaasoy daro wode he kawota ubbaara olettishe gam7ides. 
Joshua11:19 Geba7oonen diza Hiiwetappe attiin hara katamay issoynne Isra7eeletara saroteththan de7ana caaqettibeenna; Isra7eeleti ubbatakka oli oykkida. 
Joshua11:20 GODAY Muse azazida mala Iyaasoy isttas qadhettontta ubbaa wodhides. Gaasoykka istti Isra7eeletara olettana mala GODAY istta wozina dammisides. 
Joshua11:21 He wode Iyaasoy biidi, gezze biittan Kebroone katamaan, Dabire katamaan, Anaabe katamaan, Yuhudaninne Isra7eele gezze biitta ubbaan diza Enaaqe zareta ubbaanne istta katama ubbaa dhayssides." 
Joshua11:22 Isttafe guuththati xalla Gaazan, Geeteninne Ashdooden attida; gido attiin Isra7eelen shemppora paxa attida Enaaqe zereththi deenna." 
Joshua11:23 GODAY Muse azazida mala Iyaasoy biitta ubbaa oykkides; histtidi Isra7eele asaas istta qommon qommon shaakki immides; hessafe guye biittay olappe shempides. 
Joshua12:1 Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafaappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Arabe biitta ubbaa oykkidi Arnoone zullera biidi Hermoone zumaa gakkanaas diza he dere kawota xoonidi woththi ekkides. He xoonettida kawoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. 
Joshua12:2 Haseboone katamaan uttidi ayssiza Amooreta kawoy Sihoone. Izi Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere zullera kanththi biidi Amooneta zawaa Yaabooqe shaafaa gakkanaas haarides; hessi Gala7aade biittaafe baggaa gujji ekkees. 
Joshua12:3 Qasseka arshey mokkiza baggara Yordaanoose shoobbafe biidi Galila abbaa gakkanaas, Beeti-Yashimoote baggara biidi maxine abbaafe dugeha baggara diza Pizga zumaas dan7e bagga gakkanaas dizasoza haarides." 
Joshua12:4 Astarooteninne Edira7en uttidi haariza Erafayme zereththatappe wurseththa bolla kawotidayta Baasaane kawo Aage. 
Joshua12:5 Izi Hermoone zumaa, Salaaka, Baasaane biitta ubbaa, biidi Geeshuretanne Ma7ikate zawa gakkanaas, qasseka Gala7aade biittafe baggaa ekki biidi Haseboone kawo Sihoone zawa gakkanaas haarides." 
Joshua12:6 GODAA ashkara Museynne Isra7eele asay ha kawota xoonida; histtidi GODAA aylle Musey istta biittaa Oroobeele qommotas, Gaade qommotassinne Minaase qommotappe baggaytas xinxxo gidana mala shaakki immides." 
Joshua12:7 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggan diza kawota ubbaa xoonida. Heyti haariza zaway Libaanoose shoobban diza Ba7aali-Gaadeppe doommidi Seyren Halaaqe zumaa gakkees; Iyaasoy he biittata shaakkidi Isra7eele qommotas xinxxo histti immides. 
Joshua12:8 He biittati, gezze dere, arshey wullizaso baggan diza zumbullata ladde, Arabe zumata ladde, bazzo biittanne Negebe biitta. He biittati kase Hiiteti, Amooreti, Kanaaneti, Paarizeti, Hiiwetinne Yaabuseti de7iza biitta." 
Joshua12:9 Isra7eele asay xoonida kawoti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Iyarkko kawo, Beetele matan diza Aye kawo," 
Joshua12:10 Yerusalaame kawo, Kebroone kawo," 
Joshua12:11 Yarmuute kawo, Laakishe kawo," 
Joshua12:12 Egiloone kawo, Gezeere kawo," 
Joshua12:13 Dabire kawo, Beeti-Gadera kawo," 
Joshua12:14 Horma kawo, Araade kawo," 
Joshua12:15 Libina kawo, Adulaame kawo," 
Joshua12:16 Maqeeda kawo, Beetele kawo," 
Joshua12:17 Taaphphuhe kawo, Hefeere kawo," 
Joshua12:18 Afeeqe kawo, Lasharoone kawo," 
Joshua12:19 Meedoone kawo, Haxoore kawo," 
Joshua12:20 Shimiroone-Miroone kawo, Akishaafe kawo," 
Joshua12:21 Ta7inaake kawo, Magiddo kawo," 
Joshua12:22 Qaadeese kawo, Qarmeloosen diza Yoqina7aame kawo," 
Joshua12:23 Zumbullata bolla diza Doore kawo, Gelgelan diza Goyme kawo," 
Joshua12:24 Tirxxa kawo. Heyti issi bolla 31 kawota. 
Joshua13:1 Iyaasoy cimmiin izas layththay keehi bida wode GODAY, «Neni keeha cimadasa; layththayka nees keehi bides; gido attiin buro oykettontta daro biittay dees." 
Joshua13:2 Buro oykettibeenna biittati hayta; Filisxeemeta biittanne Geeshureta biitta ubbata," 
Joshua13:3 Gibxeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Shihoore shaafaappe doommidi, pudeha baggara diza Aqaroone zawa gakkanaas diza biittati wuri Kanaane biitta mala qoodetteettes. Ichchash Filisxeeme kawoti haariza katamati Gaaza, Ashdoode, Asqeloona, Geetenne Aqaroone geetettizayta gidishin heytikka Aweta biitta." 
Joshua13:4 Dugeha baggara Kanaaneta biittay wuri, Sidoonatas diza Ma7aare geetettizasoppe doommi biidi Amooreta biittan diza Afeeqe katama gakkanaas," 
Joshua13:5 Gebaaleta biitta, arshey mokkiza baggara Ba7aali-Gaadeppe biidi Hermoone zumaas dan7e baggara aadhdhi biidi Hamaate purde gakkanaas diza Libaanoose biitta ubbaa." 
Joshua13:6 «Libaanooseppe biidi Masirafoote-Mayman diza gezze deren Sidoonata biittayka oykettibeenna. Tani ta hu7es Isra7eele asaa sinththafe istta goodda kessana. Tani nena azazida mala neni ha biittata Isra7eele asaas xinxxo histta shaakka. 
Joshua13:7 Neni ha biittaa uddufun qommotassinne Minaase qommotappe baggaytas gisha» gides. 
Joshua13:8 Minaase qommotappe baggati, Oroobeele zaretinne Gaade zareti GODAA aylle Musey Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey mokkizaso baggara isttas immida biitta ekkida." 
Joshua13:9 Istta biittay Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere katamappe doommidi he shoobbaa giddon diza katamaa oykkidi Medeba geetettiza gezze dere kanththi biidi Diboone gakkees. 
Joshua13:10 Qasse Haseboonen uttidi Amooneta zawa gakkanaas haarida Amooreta kawo Sihoone katamata ubbaa gaththi oykkees. 
Joshua13:11 Hessaththoka Gala7aade biitta, Geeshureta biitta, Ma7ikate biitta, Hermoone zuma ubbaa, Baasaane biitta biidi Salaaka gakkanaas oykkees." 
Joshua13:12 Hessika Astaroote katamaninne Edira7e katamaan dishe haarida Aage kawoteththaa ubbaa oykkees; Aagey wurshe attida Erafayme zaretappe issaa. Musey he asaa xooni gooddidi istta biittaa oykkides. 
Joshua13:13 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay Geeshure asaanne Ma7ikate asaa kessi gooddontta aggida gishshas istti hach gakkanaas Isra7eele asaa giddon deettes. 
Joshua13:14 Musey Lewe qommotas xinxxo immibeenna; GODAY Muses gida mala, GODAAS Isra7eele Xoossaas taman xuugettiza yarshoy isttas xinxxo." 
Joshua13:15 Musey Oroobeele qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa. 
Joshua13:16 Istta zaway Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere katamaappenne he shoobbaa giddon diza katamaa oykkidi, Medeba gezze dere kanththi biidi," 
Joshua13:17 Haseboonenne gezze deren diza katamata ubbaa, qasse Diboone, Bamooti Ba7aale, Beeti-Ba7aali-Me7oone," 
Joshua13:18 Yahaaxe, Qidimoote, Mefa7aate," 
Joshua13:19 Qiriyaatayme, Seebama shoobbaa giddon diza zumbullaa bolla diza Xerete-Shahaare," 
Joshua13:20 Beeti-Pe7oore, Pizga dugunththatanne Beeti-Yashimoote." 
Joshua13:21 Hessika gezze biittan diza katamata ubbaanne Haseboone katamaan uttidi haarida Amooreta kawo Sihoone biitta ubbaa oykkees. Musey kawo Sihoonenne he biittan diza daannata, Eewa, Ereqeeme, Xuure, Uurenne Ereba7e geetettiza Midiyaame halaqata oli xoonides." 
Joshua13:22 Isra7eele asay olan wodhida asaappe hara, Bi7oore naa maro Balaamekka mashshan siifida." 
Joshua13:23 Oroobeele qommota zaway Yordaanoose shaafa. Oroobeele qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida katamatinne gutati heyta. 
Joshua13:24 Musey Gaade qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa. 
Joshua13:25 Istta zaway Iyaazeere, Gala7aade katamata ubbaa Eraaba achchan diza Aaro7eere gakkanaas diza Amooneta biittafe baggaa," 
Joshua13:26 Hasebooneppe biidi Eramoote-Mixiphphanne Bexoniime, Mahanaymeppe biidi Dabaare zawaa," 
Joshua13:27 arshey mokkiza baggara diza Yordaanoose shoobbaas giddon Haseboone kawo Sihoone kawoteththafe attidayta, Beeti-Haraame, Beeti-Niimire, Sukootenne Xafoone geetettiza katamata issife gaththi oykkees." 
Joshua13:28 Gaade qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida katamatinne gutati heyta. 
Joshua13:29 Musey Minaase qommotappe baggaytas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa. 
Joshua13:30 Istta zaway Mahanaymeppe doommidi Baasaane biitta ubbaa gujjidi Baasaanen diza 60 Ya7ire katamata ubbaa ekkidi Baasaane kawo Aagey haarizaso ubbaa gidishin," 
Joshua13:31 Gala7aadeppe baggaanne Baasaanen Aage kawoteththaas waanna katamata Astarootenne Edira7e gakkees. Heyti Minaase naa Maakire zaretas imettidayta gidishin heytikka Maakire naytappe baggaytas istta zarkken zarkken imettidayta. 
Joshua13:32 Yordaanooseppe he pinththan, Iyarkkofe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Mo7aabe demban diza wode Musey shaakkidi immida biittay hessa." 
Joshua13:33 Gido attiin Musey Lewe qommotas xinxxo immibeenna; kase GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay isttas yootida mala izi istta xinxxo. 
Joshua14:1 Qeese El7ezeerey, Nawe naa Iyaasoynne Isra7eele zareta korapinneti gishechchi immiin Isra7eele asay gishetti ekkidi laattida biittay hayssafe kaallizayssa." 
Joshua14:2 GODAY Muse baggara azazida mala istti gishetti ekkida biittay uddufun qommotassinne baggaytas saaman gakkides. 
Joshua14:3 Musey nam7u qommotassinne baggatas Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey mokkiza baggara diza gadeza isttas xinxxo histti immides; gido attiin Lewe qommotas istta giddon xinxxo immibeenna. 
Joshua14:4 Yooseefe nayti Minaasenne Efreeme geetettidi nam7u zarkke gidida. Musey Lewe qommotas laata biitta immibeenna; gido attiin Lewe qommotas istti diza katamatanne istti ba mehenne dorsa heemmizasoho xalla attiin hara gadey isttas imettibeenna. 
Joshua14:5 Hessa gishshas GODAY Muse azazida mala Isra7eele asay biittaa gishetti ekkida. 
Joshua14:6 Issi gallas Yuhuda asay Iyaasokko Gelgela shiiqides; isttafe Qenaaze dere as Yoofine naa Kaalebey Iyaasos, «Nuni Qaadeese Barinen dishin GODAA as Muses ne gishshassinne ta gishshas yootidayssa ne eraasa." 
Joshua14:7 GODAA aylle Musey biittayo wochchada yaana mala Qaadeese Barineppe tana kiittiza wode taas layththay 40. He wode tani izas ammanththiza yo7o ekka yadis. 
Joshua14:8 Tanara bida asati deraa wozina hirgan kunththida; tani gidikko GODAA ta Xoossaa kumeththa wozinappe kaalladis. 
Joshua14:9 He gallas Musey, ‹Neni GODAA ta Xoossaa kumeththa wozinappe kaallida gishshas ne tohoy yedhdhida biittay mernaas neessinne ne zereththas laata biitta gidana› giidi taas caaqqides." 
Joshua14:10 «GODAY ha yo7oza Muses yootoosoppe doommidi Isra7eele asay bazzo biittan toylattishin tana 45 layth naagidi shemppora paxa woththides; ha7i ta layththay 85 gidides. 
Joshua14:11 Gidikkoka ha7i taas diza minoteththay beni Musey tana kiittiza wode diza minoteththaa mala. Taas ha7ikka olettana baanaas beni wolqqaynne minoteththi dees. 
Joshua14:12 Hessa gishshas GODAY taas immana gida ha gezze biittaa ha7i taas imma. He wode Enaaqeti he biittaan dizayssanne istta katamatikka gitanne gimbettidayta gididayssa ne siyadasa; gido attiin GODAY tanara gidikko izi gida mala tani istta he biittafe yedeththana» gides. 
Joshua14:13 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Yoofine naa Kaalebe anjjidi Kebroone izas xinxxo histti immides. 
Joshua14:14 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa izi kumeththa wozinappe kaallida gishshas he gallassafe doommidi Kebrooney Qenaaze dere as Yoofine naa Kaalebes xinxxo gidides. 
Joshua14:15 Kebrooney kase Enaaqeta ubbaafe bayra gidida Arba7e sunththan Qiriyaate-Arba7e geetetta xeygettadus. Hessafe guye he biittaya olappe shempadus. 
Joshua15:1 Yuhuda qommotas istta zarkken zarkken saama yeggiin gakkida gadey biidi Eedoomera zawatidi, dugeha bagga gaxan diza Xiine geetettiza bazzo gakkees." 
Joshua15:2 Dugeha baggara istta zaway Maxine abbaas dugeha bagga xeerappe doommees. 
Joshua15:3 Akirabime purdera kanththidi, Xiine bazzora biidi Qaadeese Barine dugeha bagga gakkees. Qasse hessafe Hexiroomera kanththi pude Adaare gakkidi Qarqqaako simmees." 
Joshua15:4 Aximoonera kanththi biidi haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafan gakkidi Mediteraane abban zawatees. Dugeha baggara diza Yuhuda zaway hayssa. 
Joshua15:5 Arshey mokkizaso baggara diza zaway Maxine abba gidishin hessika Yordaanoose shaafay izan bi gelizaso gakkees. Pudeha baggara diza zaway Yordaanoose shaafay Maxine abban gelizasoppe doommidi," 
Joshua15:6 pude Beeti-Hoogile kezidi Yordaanoose shoobbafe ganna baggara kanththidi Oroobeele naa Bohaane shuchchaan zawatees. 
Joshua15:7 Histtidi zawazi Akoore shoobbafe Dabire katama pude kezidi, shoobbafe duge baggara diza Adumime purdefe sinththara kanththidi pudeha bagga Gelgelakko simmees. Qasse En-Shemishe geetettiza pulttozara kanththi biidi pude En-Roogeele geetettizaso kezees." 
Joshua15:8 Hessafe Henoome naa shoobbara kanththi biidi Yaabuseta katama Yerusalaamey dizaso dugeha baggara kanththidi Erafayme shoobbaas pudeha bagga xeerara kanththi biidi Henoome shoobbaas arshey wulliza baggara diza zumbulla xeera gakkees. 
Joshua15:9 Heeppeka zumbullaa xeerappe doommidi Nefto pulttotara kanththidi Efroone deren diza katamatakko gakkees. Hessafe qasse duge Ba7aala woykko Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettiza katamaakko wodhdhees; 
Joshua15:10 Ba7aalappe arshey wulliza baggara diza Seyre zumaakko mirqqettidi Kisaloone geetetti xeygettiza Yi7aarime zumbullas pudeha baggara diza dugunththaara duge Beeti-Shemishe wodhdhidi Temina pinnees. 
Joshua15:11 Qasse Aqaroones pudeha baggara diza dugunththaara kanththidi Shikaroonekko mirqqettidi Ba7aala zuma bollara aadhdhi biidi Yaabin7eele gakkees; hessafe guye zaway biidi abbaan eqqees. 
Joshua15:12 Arshey wulliza baggara diza zaway Mediteraane abbaa gaxa gakkees. Yuhuda qommoti ba zarkken zarkken ekkida zawati haytantta. 
Joshua15:13 GODAY iza azazida mala Iyaasoy Yuhuda gishaappe shaakkidi Kebroone geetettizaaro Qiriyaate-Arba7e Yoofine naa Kaalebes immides; Arba7ey Enaaqe Aawa. 
Joshua15:14 Kaalebeykka Enaaqe zare heedzdzata, Shashaye, Ahimaanenne Talimaye Kebrooneppe kessi gooddides." 
Joshua15:15 Hessafe guye Dabire dere bolla olas dendides; Dabire katamay kase Qiriyaate-Sefere geetettawus. 
Joshua15:16 Kaalebey, «Qiriyaate-Sefere olidi oykkizaades tani ta nayo Akisa immana» gides." 
Joshua15:17 Hessa gishshas Kaalebe isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley he katamaa olidi oykkides; histtiin Kaalebey ba nayo izas machcho immides. 
Joshua15:18 Akisay Otin7eele gelidaappe guye izi aaway izis gade immana mala ba aawaa woossana mala ba azinaas minththa yootadus; iza hareza bollafe wodhdhiin Kaalebey izo, «Ta nees ay ooththana mala koyay?» gi oychchides." 
Joshua15:19 Izakka zaarada, «Taas lo7o ooththarkkii! Neni kase taas Negeben gade immidayssaththo ha7ikka pultto haaththara diza gade taas imma» gadus. Histtiin Kaalebey izis puderanne dugera diza pultto immides." 
Joshua15:20 Yuhuda qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishshas immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa. 
Joshua15:21 Negebe heeran Eedoome zawa xeeran diza dugeha baggara diza Yuhuda qommota katamati Qabxi7eele, Edeere, Yaagure," 
Joshua15:22 Qiina, Dimoona, Adaada," 
Joshua15:23 Qaadeese, Haxoore, Yutinaane," 
Joshua15:24 Ziife, Teleme, Ba7aaloote," 
Joshua15:25 Haxoore-Hadaata, Hexiroome geetettiza Qiriyaate-Haxoore," 
Joshua15:26 Amaame, Shema7e, Molaade," 
Joshua15:27 Haxaare-Gaada, Heshmoone, Beeti-Phaleexe," 
Joshua15:28 Haxaare-Shu7aale, Bersaabehe, Biziyootiya," 
Joshua15:29 Ba7aala, Iyume, Exeeme," 
Joshua15:30 Elttolaade, Kisile, Horma," 
Joshua15:31 Xigilaage, Madimaana, Sanssaana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebawoote, Shilihiime, Ayinenne Armoone. Katamatinne gutati issi bolla nam7u tammanne uddufuna." 
Joshua15:33 Arshey wulliza baggara zumbullata tohosora dizayti Eshtta7oole, Xora7a, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Zaanohe, En-Gaanime, Taaphphuhe, Enaame," 
Joshua15:35 Yarmuute, Adulaame, Sooko, Azeeqe," 
Joshua15:36 Shaa7irayme, Aditayme, Gadeerenne Gaderootayme. Katamatinne gutati issi bolla tammanne oydda." 
Joshua15:37 Qasse Xinaane, Hadasha, Migidaala-Gaade," 
Joshua15:38 Dil7aane, Mixiphpha, Yoqiti7eele," 
Joshua15:39 Laakishe, Boxiqaate, Egiloone," 
Joshua15:40 Kaboone, Lahimaase, Kitiliishe," 
Joshua15:41 Gaderoote, Beeti-Daagone, Naa7imanne Maqeeda. Katamatinne gutati issi bolla tammanne usuppuna." 
Joshua15:42 Qasse Libina, Eteere, Ashaane," 
Joshua15:43 Yoftahe, Ashina, Nixibe," 
Joshua15:44 Qi7ila, Akiziibenne Mareesha. Katamatinne gutati issi bolla uddufuna." 
Joshua15:45 Aqarooney ba heeran diza gutatara," 
Joshua15:46 hessaththoka Aqarooneppe arshey wulliza baggara diza Ashdoode gakkanaas," 
Joshua15:47 qasse Ashdoodey ba heeran diza gutataranne Gaazappe biidi haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafa gakkanaassinne Mediteraane gaxappe haa simmiin diza katamatanne gutata. 
Joshua15:48 Zumbullata bolla diza katamatikka Shamire, Yetire, Sooko," 
Joshua15:49 Daanna, Qiriyaate-Siina woykko Dabire," 
Joshua15:50 Anaabe, Eshttamo, Aniime," 
Joshua15:51 Gooshene, Holoonenne Gilo; heyti tammanne issineti istta katamatanne istta gutata." 
Joshua15:52 Qasse Arabe, Duuma, Eshaane," 
Joshua15:53 Yaanime, Beeti-Taaphphuhe, Afeeqe," 
Joshua15:54 Humixa, Kebroone woykko Qiriyaate-Arba7enne Xi7oore; heyti uddufunati istta katamatanne istta gutata." 
Joshua15:55 Qasseka Ma7oone, Qarmeloose, Ziife, Yuuxa," 
Joshua15:56 Izra7eele, Yoqidi7aame, Zaanohe," 
Joshua15:57 Qayne, Gibi7anne Temina; heyti tammati istta katamatanne istta gutata." 
Joshua15:58 Qasse Halihuule, Beeti-Xuure, Gadoore," 
Joshua15:59 Maarate, Beeti-Anootenne Elttiqoone; heyti usuppunati istta katamatanne istta gutata." 
Joshua15:60 Hessaththoka Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettidaara Qiriyaate-Ba7aalenne Eraaba; heyti nam7ati istta katamatanne istta gutata. 
Joshua15:61 Bazzon dizayti hayssafe kaallizayta; Beeti-Arabe, Midiina, Sikaaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibishaane, Maxine katamanne En-Gaade; heyti usuppunati istta katamatanne istta gutata." 
Joshua15:63 Gido attiin Yuhuda asay Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuseta istti dizasoppe kessi gooddana dandaybeettenna; hessa gishshas Yaabuseti hach gakkanaaska Yuhuda asaara issife Yerusalaamen deettes. 
Joshua16:1 Yooseefe zareta gakkida biittay Iyarkko matan Yordaanoose shaafappe doommidi Iyarkko pulttotappe arshey mokkiza baggara bazzo kanththidi gezzetiza biittara aadhdhidi Beetele gakkees. 
Joshua16:2 Looza geetettiza Beeteleppe dendidi Axaroote geetettiza Arkketa biitta gakkees. 
Joshua16:3 Hessafe arshey wulliza baggara diza Yaafaleexeta biitta dugunththaa duge Beeti-Horoone wodhdhidi Gezeerera kanththi biidi gita Abban gelees. 
Joshua16:4 Yooseefe qommo Minaase zaretinne Efreeme zareti banttana gakkiza biittaa laattida. 
Joshua16:5 Efreeme zareta istta zarkken zarkken gakkida biittay hayssafe kaallizayssa; istta zaway arshey mokkiza baggara diza Axaroote-Adaareppe biidi ganna Beeti-Horoone gakkees. 
Joshua16:6 Heeppe biidi wogga abbaan gelees. Qasse pudeha baggara diza zaway Mikimaataateppe arshey mokkizaso bagga Taanate-Shiilora mirqqetti simmidi, arshey mokkizaso baggara diza Yaanooke gakkees." 
Joshua16:7 Yaanookeppe duge Axarootenne Naarate dugunththaa wodhdhidi Iyarkkora kanththi biidi Yordaanoose shaafaan gelees. 
Joshua16:8 Zawazi Taaphphuheppe arshey wulliza baggara biidi Qaana shaafara wodhdhi biidi Mediteraane abban gelees. Efreeme zareti ba zarkken zarkken laattida biittay hayssa. 
Joshua16:9 Hessi Minaase zareta biittafe Efreeme zaretas immida katamatanne istta gutata ubbaa gaththi oykkides. 
Joshua16:10 Hayssi ubbay haniinkka Efreeme zareti Gezeere katamaan diza Kanaane asata kessi gooddibeettenna. Kanaane asati hach gakkanaas Efreeme zaretara issife deettes. Gido attiin Efreeme zareti istta wolqqara oosiseettes. 
Joshua17:1 Minaasey Yooseefes bayra naa gidida gishshas iza zareta saaman gakkida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; Minaases bayra naazi Maakirey Gala7aadeta aaway mino olanchcha gidida gishshas Gala7aadeynne Baasaaney izas gisha gidides. 
Joshua17:2 Hessa gishshas he biittazi hankko attida Minaase zaretas Abi7eezeres, Heleeqes, Asira7eeles, Seekeemes, Hefeeres, Shamidas imettides; Yooseefe naa Minaase zarkke gidida attumati hayssafe kaalli dizayta." 
Joshua17:3 Xilofaadey Hefeere naa; Hefeerey Gala7aade naa; Gala7aadey Maakire naa; Maakirey Minaase naa. Xilofaades macca naytappe attiin attuma nay deenna; iza macca nayti Mahilo, No7o, Hogilo, Milkkonne Tirxxo geetetteettes." 
Joshua17:4 Istta qeese El7ezeerekko, Nawe naa Iyaasokkonne halaqataakko shiiqidi, «Nuni nu ishatara gade gishetti ekkana mala GODAY Muse azazides» gida. Hessa gishshas GODAY azazida mala Iyaasoy istta aawaa ishatassaranne isttasara gishechchi immides." 
Joshua17:5 Minaases Gala7aadeppenne Baasaaneppe harason tammu kezi gishettiza biittay Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara dees. 
Joshua17:6 Minaase zaretappe macca naytikka attuma naytara issife biittaa gishetti ekkida gishshas Gala7aade biittay attida Minaase zaretas gidides. 
Joshua17:7 Minaase zareta biittaa zaway Aaseere biittafe doommidi, Seekeemeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Mikimaataate gakkees. He zaway hessafe biidi dugeha baggara kanththidi En-Taaphphuhen diza derezakka gujjees." 
Joshua17:8 Taaphphuhe biittay Minaasessa; gido attiin Minaase zawan diza Taaphphuhe katamaya kase Efreeme zaretassa. 
Joshua17:9 Hessafe kaallidi iza zaway biidi Qaana shaafaan gelees. Minaase katamata giddon Efreeme katamatikka deettes; Gido attiin Minaase zaway Qaana shaafappe pudeha baggara biidi Mediteraane abban gelees. 
Joshua17:10 Dugeha baggara diza biittay Efreemessa; pudeha baggara diza biittay qasse Minaasessa. Minaase biitta zaway biidi Mediteraane abbaa gakkees; pudeha bagga zaway Aaseere gakkees; arshey mokkiza baggara diza zaway Yisakoore gakkees. 
Joshua17:11 Yisakoore biittaninne Aaseere biittan Beeti-Sha7aaney, Yibila7aamey, Doore asay, En-Doorey, Ta7inaakeynne Magiddoy ba yuushon gutatara issife Minaasessa; heedzdzanththozi Nafoote." 
Joshua17:12 Gido attiin Minaase zareti he katamata xooni oykkana dandaybeettenna. Gaasoykka Kanaane asay ba oykkida biittaa yeddoko gi murttida gishshassa. 
Joshua17:13 Isra7eele asay minnida wode Kanaane asata banttas haggazissida attiin biittaafe istta ubbaa kessi gooddibeettenna. 
Joshua17:14 Yooseefe zareti Iyaaso, «GODAY nuna anjjiin nuni qoodan cora gidishin laata biitta shaakon nuus ays issi gisha xalla immadii?» gida." 
Joshua17:15 Iyaasoykka isttas, «Intte cora gidikko Efreeme gezzey Paarizetinne Erafaymeti diza biitta biidi wora inttes qeexite» gides." 
Joshua17:16 Yooseefe zareti, «Gezze biittazi nuus gidenna; hessa bollaka demban diza Beeti-Sha7aanenne he heeran dizayti, qasse Izra7eele shoobbaan diza Kanaanetas birata para-gaareti deettes» gida." 
Joshua17:17 Iyaasoy zaaridi Yooseefe zaretas Efreeme qommotassinne Minaase qommotas, «Intte coranne keehi wolqqama; inttes issi gisha xallay gidenna." 
Joshua17:18 Hessa gishshas gezze biittayka inttessa; biidi qeexite; wurseththa gaxa gakkanaas dizayssi inttes gidana; Kanaanetas birata para-gaareti diikkoka, istti mino gidikkoka intte istta heeppe kessana» gides." 
Joshua18:1 Isra7eele maabaray wuri Seelon shiiqida; Gaytoteththa Dunkaane heen tokkida; biittayakka co7u gaada isttas haarettadus. 
Joshua18:2 Gido attiin Isra7eele asaappe gade gishay gakkontta attida laappun qommoti deettes. 
Joshua18:3 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa, «GODAA intte aawata Xoossay inttes immida biittaa laattontta ayde gakkanaas azalleetii?" 
Joshua18:4 Issi issi qommofe heedzdzu heedzdzu asata doorite. Biittaa yuuyi xeellidi issi issi qommo gakkanayssa taas xaafi immanayta ta kiittana; isttika taakko haa simmi yaana. 
Joshua18:5 Istti he biittayo laappun kessi shaakkana. Dugeha baggara Yuhuday, pudeha baggara Yooseefey baas xinxxo histti oykkana." 
Joshua18:6 Ha laappun kezi shaakettida biittaa hanota xaafidaappe guye taakko ekki yiikko tani GODAA nu Xoossaa sinththan inttes saama yeggana. 
Joshua18:7 Lewe zareti Xoossas ooththiza oosoy isttas xinxxo gidida gishshas inttenara istti biitta gishettettenna. Gaade zareti, Oroobeele zaretinne Minaase zaretappe baggay Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkizaso baggara GODAA aylle Musey isttas immida biittaa kaseti laattida» gides." 
Joshua18:8 Asay biittaa hanota pilggi xeellanaassinne xaafanaas buus doommishin Iyaasoy, «Biidi biittay hanota pilggi xeellidi paatti xaafidaappe guye haa taakko simmi yiite. Hayssan Seelon GODAA sinththan ta inttes saama yeggana» gides." 
Joshua18:9 Hessa gishshas asay biittaa yuuyi xeellides; katamatara issife laappun kessi shaakkidi xaaththa waraqatan xaafida; hessafe gede Iyaasokko Seelo simmi bida. 
Joshua18:10 Iyaasoy GODAA sinththan Seelon isttas saama yeggides; biittayo Isra7eele asaas istta qommo keena gishechchi immides. 
Joshua18:11 Koyro gishay Biniyaame qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Saaman istta gakkida biittay dizasoy Yuhuda zareta biittafenne Yooseefe zareta biittafe giddon gidishin hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Joshua18:12 Pudeha baggara istta zaway Yordaanoose shaafappe doommidi, Iyarkko pudunththaara aadhdhi biidi arshey wulliza baggara dhoqqa biittara oykkidi Beeti-Awenera kanththees." 
Joshua18:13 Hessafe dugeha baggara Looza geetettiza Beetele pudunththaara kanththidi duge baggara diza Beeti-Horooneppe dugeha baggara diza zumaa achchara kanththi biidi duge Axaroote-Adaare gakkees. 
Joshua18:14 Dugeha baggara diza zaway Beeti-Horoones sinththa baggara diza zumbullaafe doommidi, arshey wulliza baggara dugeha bagga mirqqettidi Yuhuda qommota katama gidida Qiriyaate-Ba7aale woykko Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimera kanththi bees; hessi arshey wulliza baggaas zawa." 
Joshua18:15 Dugeha baggara zaway Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimeppe doommidi Nefto pultto haaththara kanththees. 
Joshua18:16 He zawazi Erafayme shoobbaafe pudeha baggara diza Henoome naa shoobbaa ginara diza zumbullaa tohoso wodhdhees; heeppe Yaabuseta katamappe dugeha baggara diza dugunththaara Henoome zulle wodhdhidi En-Roogeelera kanththees. 
Joshua18:17 Qasse pudeha bagga mirqqettidi En-Shemishera biidi Gelilootera kanththees; hessafe Adumime purde ginara diza Oroobeele naa Bohaane shuchchaako duge wodhdhees. 
Joshua18:18 Hessafe Beeti-Arabe pudunththaara kanththidi duge Arabe wodhdhees. 
Joshua18:19 Hessafe qasse Beeti-Hoogile pudunththaafe pudeha baggara kanththidi, Yordaanoose shaafay goggi gelizaso Maxine abbaafe ganna bagga gaxa gakkees. Hessi dugeha baggaas zawa." 
Joshua18:20 Arshey mokkizaso baggara Yordaanoose shaafay zawa. Biniyaame zareti laattida biitta ubbaasikka zawati heytantta. 
Joshua18:21 Biniyaame zareti ba zarkken zarkken ekkida katamati Iyarkko, Beeti-Hoogile, Ameq-Kexixe," 
Joshua18:22 Beeti-Arabe, Zamarayme, Beetele," 
Joshua18:23 Awime, Paara, Oofira," 
Joshua18:24 Kafer-Amonaye, Oofinanne Geeba. Hayti bantta gutatara 12 katamata." 
Joshua18:25 Qasse Geba7oone, Eraama, Bi7eroote," 
Joshua18:26 Mixiphpha, Kaafire, Mooxa," 
Joshua18:27 Ereqeeme, Yirphi7eela, Teraala," 
Joshua18:28 Xela, Helefa, Yaabuseta katama Yerusalaame, Gibi7anne Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime. Hayti bantta gutatara 14 katamata. Biniyaame qommoti bantta zarkken zarkken laattida biittay hayta." 
Joshua19:1 Nam7anththo saamay Simoona qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Istta gakkida biittay Yuhuda qommoti laattida biittay istti laattida biitta giddoththi uttides. 
Joshua19:2 Istti laattida katamati Bersaabehe, Sheba7e, Molaade," 
Joshua19:3 Haxaare-Shu7aale, Baala, Exeeme," 
Joshua19:4 Elttolaade, Baatule, Horma," 
Joshua19:5 Xigilaage, Beeti-Markaboote, Haxaare-Suusa," 
Joshua19:6 Beeti-Laba7ootenne Sharuheene. Heyti ubbay 13 katamatanne istta yuushon diza gutata. 
Joshua19:7 Qasse Ayine, Armoone, Eteerenne Ashaane geetettiza oyddu katamatanne istta yuushon diza gutata." 
Joshua19:8 Ba7alaate-Ba7eere woykko Negeben diza Aramaateeme gakkanaas diza katamata yuushon diza gutata ubbaa laattida. Simoona qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida biittati heytantta. 
Joshua19:9 Yuhuda qommoti oykkida xinxxoy keehi aako gidida gishshas Simoona qommotas xinxxo gidi imettides; hessa gishshas Simoona qommoti Yuhuda qommota gishaappe gishetti ekkana dandayda. 
Joshua19:10 Heedzdzanththo saamay Zaabiloone qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Istti laattida biittaa zaway Sariide gakkees. 
Joshua19:11 Qasse hessafe biidi arshey wullizasora Maraala baggara kanththi bees; Dabasheete matara Yoqina7aame achchan diza shaafaan bi gelees. 
Joshua19:12 Hara baggara qasse Sariide katamappe arshey mokkizaso bagga simmidi Kisiloote-Taaboorera kanththi biidi Dabiraatera gede Yaafi7a bees. 
Joshua19:13 Heera gede arshey mokkiza baggara Geet-Hefeerenne Eti-Qaxine kanththi bees; heeppeka gede Armoone gakkidi Ni7a bagga mirqqettees. 
Joshua19:14 Pudeha baggara Hanatoone simmidi Yiftaahi7eele shoobbaan gakki eqqees. 
Joshua19:15 Qasseka Qaxaate, Nahilaale, Shimiroone, Idaalenne Beeteliheeme geetettiza katamatikka deettes. Istti wuri 12; istta yuushon diza gutatikka isttan gujetteettes." 
Joshua19:16 Hayti Zaabiloone qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata. 
Joshua19:17 Oydanththo saamay Yisakoore qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. 
Joshua19:18 Istta biittati hayssafe kaallizayta; Izra7eele, Kasuloote, Suneme," 
Joshua19:19 Hafara7ime, Shi7oone, Anaharaate," 
Joshua19:20 Erabite, Qisoone, Abeexe," 
Joshua19:21 Eremeete, En-Gaanime, En-Haadanne Beeti-Phaxeexe." 
Joshua19:22 He biittata zaway Taaboore, Shahaxuumenne Beeti-Shemishe bochchi biidi, Yordaanoose shaafan gelees. Istti ubbay tammanne usuppun katamata; istta yuushon diza gutatikka isttan gujetteettes." 
Joshua19:23 Hayti Yisakoore qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata. 
Joshua19:24 Ichchashanththo saamay Aaseere qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. 
Joshua19:25 Istta biittati hayssafe kaallizayta Helqaate, Hale, Bexeene, Akishaafe," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleke, Amadenne Mishaale. Arshey wullizaso baggara Qarmelooseranne Shihoore-Libinaatera zawatees." 
Joshua19:27 Qasse arshe kessaso bagga simmi Beeti-Daagonekko mirqqettidi, Zaabiloone biittaanne Yiftaahi7eele shoobbara kanththi biidi Kaabule hadirsa bolla yeggidi pudeha baggara Beeti-Emeeqenne Na7i7eele bees." 
Joshua19:28 Hessafe qasse Ebiroone, Erahoobe, Hamoonenne Qaana pudunththaa kezidi gita Sidoona gakkees." 
Joshua19:29 Zaway Eraama simmidaappe gimbettida Xiroose katamaakko mirqqetti gede Hoosa simmidi Akiziibe baggaranne Mahileebe gede Mediteraane abbaan gakki gelees. 
Joshua19:30 Heen Uma, Afeeqenne Erahoobe geetettiza katamatikka deettes. Istti ubbay 22; istta yuushon diza gutatikka isttan gujetteettes." 
Joshua19:31 Hayti Aaseere qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata. 
Joshua19:32 Usuppunththa saamay Niftaaleme qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. 
Joshua19:33 Istta zaway Heleefeppenne Zanaanimen diza gita wolappe doommidi Adaame-Neqeebe, Yaabin7eelenne Laaqume kanththi biidi Yordaanoose shaafa gelees." 
Joshua19:34 Zawazikka arshey wulliza baggara Azinoote-Taaboorekko mirqqettees; hessafe qasse Huqooqe simmidi dugeha baggara Zaabiloone biittaninne arshey geliza baggara Aaseere biittan zawatidi arshey keziza baggara Yordaanoose shaafan gelees. 
Joshua19:35 Gimbettida katamatikka Xiidime, Xeera, Hamaate, Eraaqate, Kinereete," 
Joshua19:36 Adaama, Eraama, Haxoore," 
Joshua19:37 Qaadeese, Edira7e, En-Haxoore," 
Joshua19:38 Yiroone, Migidal7eele, Horeeme, Beeti-Anaatenne Beeti-Shemishe. Istti wuri 19; istta yuushon diza gutatikka isttan gujetteettes." 
Joshua19:39 Hayti Niftaaleme qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne istta yuushon diza gutata. 
Joshua19:40 Laappunththo saamay Daane qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. 
Joshua19:41 Istti laattida biittati Xora7a, Eshtta7oole, Ir-Shemeeshe," 
Joshua19:42 Sha7albine, Ayaaloone, Yitaala," 
Joshua19:43 Eeloone, Temina, Aqaroone," 
Joshua19:44 Elteqe, Gabatoone, Ba7alaate," 
Joshua19:45 Yuhuda, Bane-Baraaqe, Geet-Ermoone," 
Joshua19:46 Meyarqqoone, Eraaqoonenne Yoophphe katama yuushon diza heerata ubbaa oykkees." 
Joshua19:47 Gido attiin Daane qommotas imettida xinxxoy isttas gidontta aggida gishshas Laysha katamaa oli oykkida; he katamaan diza asaa giththa mashshan siifi wursidi katamaa baas ekkidi heen uttida. He katamaa sunththaaka laammidi ba aawaa Daane sunththan xeygida. 
Joshua19:48 Hayti Daane qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata. 
Joshua19:49 Isra7eele asay banttana gakkida biitta ekkidaappe guye Nawe naa Iyaasos bantta biittafe xinxxo gade immida; 
Joshua19:50 GODAY azazida malanne Iyaasoy koyza mala Efreeme gezze deren diza Teminaate-Seraaha geetettiza katama izas immida. Izikka katamayo lo7eththidi baas duussaso ooththides. 
Joshua19:51 Qeese El7ezeerey, Nawe naa Iyaasoynne Isra7eele qommota korapinneti Seelon Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen GODAA sinththan saama yeggidi gishida xinxxo biittay hayssa. Istti biittaa gishereththi giigida." 
Joshua20:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Iyaaso," 
Joshua20:2 «Tani Muse baggara yootida mala asi baqati attiza katamata shaakkana mala Isra7eele asaas yoota; 
Joshua20:3 Ay asikka eronttanne akeekontta as wodhikko hee baqati biidi suuththa acoppe attana. 
Joshua20:4 As wodhiday he katamatappe issaakko baqati biidi katama geliza pengen eqqidi, hanidayssa he katama cimatas yooto. Isttika bantta katama efidi izi de7anaaso immiko izi isttara heen de7o." 
Joshua20:5 Suuth azarana koyzay iza kaallidi yiikko he katama cimati iza aaththi immofetto. Gaasoykka ba shooroza izi odi morkketeththa gishshas wodhibeenna. 
Joshua20:6 Deraa sinththan pirdas izi eqqana gakkanaassinne he woden diza qeeseta halaqay hayqqana gakkanaas he katamaan de7o. Hessafe guye baqatidi kezida katama guye simmidi ba soo gelo» gides. 
Joshua20:7 Histtiin Isra7eele asay Niftaaleme gezze dere, Galilan diza Qaadeese, Efreeme gezze deren diza Seekeemen diza shaara menththo bollanne Yuhudan shaara menththon diza Qiriyaate-Arba7e woykko Kebroone dummasida." 
Joshua20:8 Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan, Iyarkkofe arshey mokkiza baggara Oroobeele qommota xinxxo giddon bazzon dhoqqaso bolla diza Baxira, Gaade qommota xinxxofe Gala7aaden diza Eramootenne Minaase qommota xinxxofe Baasaanen diza Golaane dummasida." 
Joshua20:9 Isra7eele as ubbaassinne istta giddon diza betetas dummasida katamati hayta; erontta dishe as wodhida ay asikka deraa sinththan eqqana gakkanaas suuth azarana koyzaade kushen hayqqontta mala he katamatappe issaakko baqatanaas dandayees. 
Joshua21:1 Lewe zarkketa kaaleththizayti qeese El7ezeerekko, Nawe naa Iyaasokkonne Isra7eele zareta aawatakko shiiqida." 
Joshua21:2 Kanaane biittan diza Seelon isttas, «Nuni de7ana katamatanne nu mehe heenththasohota intte nuus immana mala GODAY kase Muse baggara azazi woththides» gida." 
Joshua21:3 Histtiin GODAY azazida mala Isra7eele asay Lewe qommotas ba laattida xinxxotappe ha katamatanne mehe heenththasohota qanxxi immida. 
Joshua21:4 Koyro saamay Qa7aate zereththatas istta zarkken zarkken kezides. Qeese Aaroone zare gidida Lewetas Yuhudappe, Simoonappenne Biniyaame qommotappe 13 katamati saaman gakkida." 
Joshua21:5 Hankko attida Qa7aate zereththatas Efreemeppe, Daaneppenne Minaases bagga qommotappe 10 katamati saaman gakkida." 
Joshua21:6 Gershoone zereththatas Yisakooreppe, Aaseereppe, Niftaalemeppenne Baasaanen diza Minaases bagga qommotappe 13 katamati saaman gakkida." 
Joshua21:7 Meraare zereththatas istta zarkken zarkken Oroobeeleppe, Gaadeppenne Zaabiloone qommotappe 10 katamati saaman gakkida." 
Joshua21:8 GODAY Muse baggara azazida mala, Isra7eele asay ha katamatanne mehe heenththasohota Lewetas saaman immida." 
Joshua21:9 Yuhudappenne Simoona qommotappe hayssafe kaalli diza katamata saaman gaththida. 
Joshua21:10 Koyro saamay Lewe qommo Qa7aateppe yelettida Aaroone zaretas keziin isttas imettida katamati hayssafe kaallizayta. 
Joshua21:11 Heytikka Yuhuda biittan gezzetizason diza Kebroone geetettiza Qiriyaate-Arba7enne iza yuushon diza mehe heenththasohota isttas immida. (Arba7ey Enaaqe Aawaa.) 
Joshua21:12 Gido attiin he katama yuushon diza mehe heenththasohotanne mooththata Yoofine naa Kaalebes xinxxo histti immida. 
Joshua21:13 Qeese Aaroone zaretas as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza Kebroonenne, Libina katamata istta mehe heenththasohora issife gaththi immida." 
Joshua21:14 Yetirenne Eshttamo7a," 
Joshua21:15 Holoonenne Dabire," 
Joshua21:16 Ayine, Yuuxa, Beeti-Shemishenne istta mehe heenththasohora issife gaththi immida. Hayti uddufun katamati Yuhuda qommotappenne Simoona qommota xinxxofe gishetti imettidayta." 
Joshua21:17 Biniyaame qommotappe Geba7oone, Geeba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoote, Almmoone geetettiza oyddu katamatanne istti mehe heemmizasohora issife gaththi immida." 
Joshua21:19 Qeese Aaroone zereththatas mehe heenththasohora issife gaththidi 13 katamata immida. 
Joshua21:20 Hankko attida Lewe naa Qa7aate zaretas Efreeme qommotappe hayssafe kaalli dizayssi saaman gakkides. 
Joshua21:21 Efreeme gezze deren diza as wodhida asi baqati biidi attizaso Seekeemenne Gezeere," 
Joshua21:22 Qibixayme, Beeti-Horoonenne istta mehe heenththasohora issife gaththidi 4 katamata immida." 
Joshua21:23 Daane qommotappe Elteqe, Gabatoone," 
Joshua21:24 Ayaaloone, Geet-Ermoonenne istta mehe heenththasohora issife gaththi 4 katamata immida." 
Joshua21:25 Minaase qommotas baggatappe Ta7inaake, Geet-Ermoone mehe heenththasohotara issife gaththi 2 katamata immida." 
Joshua21:26 Hayti 10 katamati ubbay mehe heenththasohotara issife hankko attida Qa7aate zaretas imettides. 
Joshua21:27 Minaase zareta baggatappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza, Baasaanen diza Golaane katamaa mehe heenththasohora Ba7eshtira mehe heenththasohora, nam7u katamata ubbaa ekkidi, Gershoone zare gidida hara Lewetas immida." 
Joshua21:28 Yisakoore zaretappe Qisoone mehe heenththasohora, Dabiraate mehe heenththasohora," 
Joshua21:29 Yarmuute mehe heenththasohora, En-Gaanime mehe heenththasohora, oyddu katamata ubbaa ekkidi immida." 
Joshua21:30 Aaseere zaretappe Mishaale mehe heenththasohora, Abdoone mehe heenththasohora," 
Joshua21:31 Helqaate mehe heenththasohoranne Erahoobe mehe heenththasohora, oyddu katamata ubbaa ekkidi immida." 
Joshua21:32 Hessaththoka Niftaaleme zaretappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza Galilan diza Qaadeese mehe heenththasohora, Hamooti-Doore mehe heenththasohora, Qarta mehe heenththasohora, 3 katamata ubbaa ekkidi isttas immida." 
Joshua21:33 Gershoone zareta katamatinne istta meheta heenththasohoti ubbay tammanne heedzdza. 
Joshua21:34 Attida Meraare zare gidida Lewetas imettida biittati Zaabiloone zaretappe Yoqina7aame mehe heenththasohora, Qarta mehe heenththasohora," 
Joshua21:35 Diimina mehe heenththasohora, Nahilaale mehe heenththasohora, oyddu katamata ubbaa ekkidi immida." 
Joshua21:36 Oroobeele zaretappe Baxiranne izi mehe heenththasohota, Yahaaxenne izi mehe heenththasohota," 
Joshua21:37 Qidimootenne izi mehe heenththasohota, Mefa7aatenne izi mehe heenththasohota, hayta oyddu katamata ubbaa ekkidi isttas immida." 
Joshua21:38 Qasse Gaade zaretappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza, Gala7aaden diza Eramoote mehe heenththasohora, Mahanayme mehe heenththasohora," 
Joshua21:39 Haseboone mehe heenththasohora, Iyaazeere mehe heenththasohora, hayta oyddu katamata ubbaa ekkidi isttas immida." 
Joshua21:40 Meraarey zare gidida hara Lewetas gishan gakkida katamati ubbay tammanne nam7a. 
Joshua21:41 Isra7eele asay laattida biittan diza Lewetas imettida katamati istta mehe heenththasohora ubbay issi bolla oyddu tammanne osppuna. 
Joshua21:42 He katamata ubbaa yuushon mehe heemmizasohoti deettes. Mehe heemmizasohoy baynda katamay deenna. 
Joshua21:43 Hessaththo ooththidi GODAY istta aawatas immanaas caaqqida biitta ubbaa Isra7eele asaas immides; histtiin istti laattidi heen de7ida. 
Joshua21:44 GODAY istta aawatas caaqqida mala istta yuushon diza ubbatappe istta shempisides. GODAY istta morkketa ubbaa isttas aaththi immida gishshas istta morkketappe issoyka isttara eqettanaas dandaybeenna. 
Joshua21:45 GODAY Isra7eele asaas immana gida lo7o qaala ubbaa polides attiin issoynne sa7an wodhdhi attibeenna. 
Joshua22:1 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Oroobeele qommota, Gaade qommotanne Minaase qommo baggatappe xeygides." 
Joshua22:2 Histtidi, «GODAA aylle Musey inttena azazidayssa ubbaa naagideta; qasse tanikka azazidayssa mulera polideta." 
Joshua22:3 Daro wodeppe doommidi hach gakkanaas intte intte ishata yeggibeekketa; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hadaraa polideta. 
Joshua22:4 Hekko GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala intte ishata shempisides. Hessa gishshas GODAA ashkara Musey inttes Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan immida laata biittan diza intte soo soo simmite. 
Joshua22:5 GODAA aylle Musey inttena azazida azazozanne wogaa intte naagite. GODAA intte Xoossa siiqite; iza ogeta ubbaan simerettite; iza azazota polite; izakka minththi oykkite; intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe izas ooththana mala izi immida azazotanne wogata minththi naagite» gides. 
Joshua22:6 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy istta anjji yeddiin isttika bantta soo soo simmi bida. 
Joshua22:7 Musey Minaase qommofe baggatas Baasaane biittan xinxxo immides; hankko attida baggatas Iyaasoy Yordaanooseppe arshey wulliza baggafe istta ishata giddon isttas xinxxo immides. Iyaasoy istta bantta soo soo simmana mala moyziza wode istta anjjishe," 
Joshua22:8 «Be7ite, intte ha7i daro aqota ekkidi, daro mehe wude, bira, worqqa, xarqimala, biratanne daro may7o ekkidi intte soo simmite. Hessa gishshas intte morkketappe di7ettidayssa, intte ishatara gishetti ekkite» gides." 
Joshua22:9 Hessa gishshas Oroobeele qommotinne Gaade qommoti hessaththoka Minaase qommofe baggati Isra7eele asaa Kanaanen diza Seelon aggidi kase Muse baggara GODAA azazon laata ekkida xinxxon Gala7aade simmi bida. 
Joshua22:10 Oroobeele qommoti, Gaade qommotinne Minaase qommotappe baggati Yordaanoose shaafa matan Kanaane biittan diza Gala7aade yida wode shaafa matan gita yarshosoho giigsida." 
Joshua22:11 Histtiin istti Isra7eele biittan, Kanaane zawan, Gaaden gita yarshosoho giigsidayssa hara Isra7eele asay siyida wode" 
Joshua22:12 kumeththa Isra7eele asay istta olana baanaas Seelon issife shiiqides. 
Joshua22:13 Histtidi Isra7eele asay qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaase, Gala7aade biittan diza Oroobeele qommotakko, Gaade qommotakkonne Minaase qommotappe baggataakko kiittides." 
Joshua22:14 Kumeththa Isra7eele qommota ba qommota halaqatappe issi issi as dooridi, tammu as Finihaasera gaththi yeddides. Hayti issoy issoy Isra7eele qommotappe yida bantta zarkken zarkken doorettida halaqata." 
Joshua22:15 Istti Oroobeele qommoti, Gaade qommotinne Minaase qommotappe baggati diza Gala7aade biitta biidi isttas," 
Joshua22:16 «GODAA asay kumeth inttena, ‹Isra7eele Xoossa bolla ays hayssa mala iita ooththidetii? Waanidi intte hara yarsho yarshizaso inttes giigsidetii? GODAA bolla waani makkallidetii? Iza kaallizaayssaka waanidi aggidetii?" 
Joshua22:17 Pe7ooren nuni ooththida nagaray nuus gidennee? Isra7eele deraa bolla boshay wodhdhidaa gidikkoka hach gakkanaaska nuni he nagarappe geeyibookko. 
Joshua22:18 Intte ha7ikka GODAA kaallizayssa aggidi guye guye geetii? « ‹Intte hach GODAA bolla makkalliko izi wonto kumeththa Isra7eele deraa hanqettana. 
Joshua22:19 Intte laattida biittay tunidaa gidikko GODAA Dunkaaney eqqida GODAA biitta haa yiidi, nunara gade gishetti ekkite. Gido attiin kaseppe diza GODAA nu Xoossa yarshosoppe hara yarshosoho giigsidi GODAA bolla woykko nu bolla makkallofte." 
Joshua22:20 Zaraahe naa Akaaney piila gididayssa ekkidi, nagara ooththida gishshas, kumeththa Isra7eele deraa bolla GODAA hanqoy wodhdhibeennee? Iza nagara gaason hayqqiday iza xalala gidenna› geettes» gida." 
Joshua22:21 Histtiin Oroobeele qommoti, Gaade qommotinne Minaase qommotappe baggati Isra7eele qommota halaqatas zaaridi," 
Joshua22:22 «GODAY Wolqqama Xoossay! GODAY Wolqqama Xoossay! Nuni hayssa ays ooththidaakko izi erees! Nuni ays ooththidaakko intteka erana mala koyoos. Nuni hayssa ooththiday makkallateththaninne GODAAS azazeteththa ixon gidikko, hach nuna maaropite." 
Joshua22:23 Nuni GODAA kaallizayssa aggidi xuugettiza yarsho, kaththa yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshanaas qoppidi giigsidaa gidikko, GODAY nu bolla ba halo kesso." 
Joshua22:24 Nuni hessaththo ooththiday sinththafe yaana intte zereththati nu zereththata, ‹GODAA Isra7eele Xoossara inttes aaza gaytoteththi dizee?" 
Joshua22:25 Intteno Oroobeelenne Gaade qommotoo, GODAY nu giddoninne intte giddon Yordaanoose shaafan zawa zaarida gishshas, GODAAN inttena gaththiza miishshi deenna› giidi intte zareti nu zareta GODAAS goynnontta mala teqqontta aggettenna gi hirgidos» gida." 
Joshua22:26 «Hessa gishshas, ‹Nuni nu giddon yarsho yarshizasoho ane ooththoos; gido attiin xuugettiza yarshos woykko hara yarshos gidenna› giday hessassa." 
Joshua22:27 Nuni yarshosoho giigsiday xuugettiza yarsho, issifeteththa yarshonne hara yarsho yarshidi, GODAAS iza Dunkaanen goynnizayssa hayssi yarshosohozi nu giddoninne intte giddon, qasse nuuppe kaalliza yeletata giddon markka gidana. Wodeppe intte zereththati nu zereththata, ‹Inttena GODAAN gaththizay aykkoyka deenna› gaanaas dandayettenna." 
Joshua22:28 Istti nuna woykko nu zereththata wodeppe hessaththo giikko nuni isttas zaaridi, ‹Hekko! Nu aawati GODAASSI yarshizasoho leemiso ooththidayssa be7ite. Hayssa nu aawati xuugettiza yarshonne hara yarsho yarshanaas gidontta, inttefenne nuuppe giddon markka gidana mala giigsida› gaana." 
Joshua22:29 GODAA nu Xoossa Dunkaaneza sinththan eqqida yarsho yarshizasohoppe hara, xuugettiza yarsho, kaththa yarshonne hara yarsho yarshizasoho giigsidi GODAA bolla makkalloy nuuppe haakko!» gida." 
Joshua22:30 Qeese Finihaasinne izara diza Isra7eele qommota halaqati, Oroobeele, Gaadenne Minaase qommoti yootidayssa siyidi, keehi ufayettida." 
Joshua22:31 Qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaasi Oroobeele, Gaadenne Minaase qommotas, «GODAY nu giddon dizayssa nuni hach eridos; ays giikko ha yo7oza intte GODAA bolla makkallanaas ooththibeekketa. Intte ha7i GODAA hanqofe Isra7eele asaa ashshideta» gides." 
Joshua22:32 Hessafe guye qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaasinne deraa kaaleththizayti Gala7aaden diza Oroobeelenne Gaade qommotara haasayettidaappe guye Kanaanen diza Isra7eele asaakko simmida; histtidi hanidayssa isttas yootida. 
Joshua22:33 Isra7eele asay hessa siyidi ufayssan Xoossa galatides. Qasse Oroobeele qommotinne Gaade qommoti diza biitta oli dhayssanaas baana gidayssa aggides. 
Joshua22:34 Oroobeeleynne Gaade qommoti, «GODAY izi Xoossaa gididayssas hayssi nu giddon markka» giidi yarshosohoza, «Markka» gi sunththida." 
Joshua23:1 Daro wodes GODAY Isra7eele asaa istta yuushon diza morkketa ubbaafe shempisides. He wode Iyaasoy cimmidi keehippe wode sugides. 
Joshua23:2 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa ubbaa, cimata, shuumeta, daannatanne pirdizayta issife xeygi shiishshidi, «Tani cimadis, wodeykka taas keehi bides." 
Joshua23:3 GODAA intte Xoossay intte gishshas ha kawoteththata bolla ooththida ubbaa miish intte intte ayfen beyideta. Intte gishshas olettiday GODAA intte Xoossaa. 
Joshua23:4 Be7ite, Yordaanoose shaafappe doommidi arshey wullizaso baggan Mediteraane Abba gakkanaas dizasota ubbaa, intte xoonida kawoteththatappe intte buro laattontta biittata tani intte qommotas saaman saaman wostta gishidaakko akeekite." 
Joshua23:5 GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte sinththafe istti dizasozappe istta yedeththana; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaala mala intte istta biitta laattana. 
Joshua23:6 «Minnite! Hadirsinne ushach goopite; Muse Woga Maxaafan xaafettida ubbaa naaganaassinne ooththanaas keehippe minettite. 
Joshua23:7 Hayta intte giddon attida kawoteththatara issifettofte; istta eeqa xoossata sunththa xeygopite; istta sunththan caaqqofte; isttas ooththoftenne goynnofte. 
Joshua23:8 Gido attiin hach gakkanaas intte ooththida mala GODAA intte Xoossaa minththi oykkite. 
Joshua23:9 «GODAY gitanne mino kawoteththata intte sinththafe gooddi kessides; hach gakkanaas oonikka inttenara eqettanaas dandaybeenna. 
Joshua23:10 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaala mala izi olettiza gishshas inttefe issi asi shii as yedeththana. 
Joshua23:11 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa minni siiqite. 
Joshua23:12 Gido attiin intte guye simmidi hankko attida inttenara diza kawoteththatara intte issifettiko, ekon gelon isttara issife walakettiko," 
Joshua23:13 GODAA intte Xoossay hayssafe guye intte sinththafe istta kessi gooddonttayssa intte eranaas bessees; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida ha lo7o biittayfe intte dhayana gakkanaas istti inttes woximadenne yarde gidana; intte zokkos lisso, intte ayfesikka agunth gidana." 
Joshua23:14 «Be7ite taas ha7i hayqo wodey gakkides; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o hidota ubbaafe issinokka izi ashshonttayssa intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe ereeta; izi inttes immana gida hidotay pacey baynda mulera polettides. 
Joshua23:15 Gido attiin GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o hidota ubbay mulera polettida mala GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o biittayfe inttena dhayssana gakkanaas iita miish intte bolla ehana. 
Joshua23:16 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida caaqo qaala intte laallizaa gidikko, biidi hara eqqa xoossatas haggazikkonne goynniko GODAA hanqoy intte bolla tama mala eexxi kezana; izi inttes immida lo7o biittayfe intte eeson dhayana» gides." 
Joshua24:1 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Isra7eele qommota ubbaa Seekeemen shiishshides. Cimata, kaaleththizayta, daannatanne pirdizayta ubbaa xeygides; isttika Xoossa sinth shiiqida." 
Joshua24:2 Iyaasoy deraa ubbaas, «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Kase intte aawati Abrahaamenne Naakoore aawa Taara gujjidi Efiraaxise shaafappe he pinththan de7ida; istti hara eeqa xoossatas goynnida." 
Joshua24:3 Tani gidikko intte aawa Abrahaame Efiraaxise shaafas he pinththafe ehadis; Kanaane biittankka kaaleththadis. Iza zereththatakka darsadis; Yisaaqakka izas immadis. 
Joshua24:4 Yisaaqaska Yaaqoobenne Eesawe immadis. Eesawes gezzetiza Seyre biitta xinxxo histta immadis; Yaaqoobeynne iza nayti gidikko duge Gibxe bida. 
Joshua24:5 « ‹Hessafe guye Musenne Aaroone kiittadis; ta ehida boshan Gibxeta un7eththada inttena heeppe kessadis. 
Joshua24:6 Tani intte aawata Gibxeppe kessiin Zo7o abbaako yideta; Gibxeti para-gaaretaninne toga asatan inttena Zo7o abbaa gakkanaas oykkana kaallida. 
Joshua24:7 Intte aawati maado demmanaas taakko waassida; tani isttafenne Gibxetappe giddon dhuma yeggadis; histtada abbay istta bolla simmana malanne istta mittana mala ooththadis. Tani Gibxeta bolla ooththidayssa intte intte ayfen be7ideta. Intteka bazzon daro wode de7ideta. 
Joshua24:8 « ‹Hessafe guye Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkizaso baggara diza Amooreta biitta tani inttena ehadis. Istti inttenara olettiin tani istta intte kushen aaththa immadis; tani istta intte sinththafe dhayssadis; qasse intte istta biitta laattideta. 
Joshua24:9 Hessafe guye Mo7aabe biitta kawo Xipoora naa Balaaqey Isra7eele olanaas dendides; inttena yiidi doqqana mala Bi7oore naa Balaames kiita yeddides. 
Joshua24:10 Tani gidikko Balaame siyana koyabeekke; hessa gishshas izi inttena zaari zaari anjjides; tanikka inttena Baalaaqe kusheppe ashshadis. 
Joshua24:11 « ‹Heeppe intte Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi Iyarkko yideta; Amooreti, Paarizeti, Kanaaneti, Hiiteti, Gergeseti, Hiiwetinne Yaabuseti inttenara olettida mala Iyarkko asay inttenara olettides; gido attiin tani istta intte kushen aaththa immadis." 
Joshua24:12 Inttefe sinththe kazhe kiittada isttanne Amoore kawo nam7ata intte sinththafe gooddadis. Hayssi ubbay haniday intte mashshaninne intte wondafen gidenna. 
Joshua24:13 Intte daaburontta biittanne intte keexxontta katamata tani inttes immadis; hekko intte tokkontta woyne ayfenne wogara ayfe meeta› gides. 
Joshua24:14 «Hessa gishshas ha7ikka GODAAS yayyite; kumeththa wozinappe ammaneteththan izas haarettite; kase intte aawati Efiraaxise shaafappe he pinththaninne Gibxe biittan goynnida eeqa xoossata inttefe haassite; GODAAS xalla goynnite. 
Joshua24:15 GODAAS goynoy koshshontta miish misati inttes beettiko kase intte aawati shaafappe he pinththan dishe goynnida eeqa xoossata woykko ha7i intte diza Amooreti goynniza xoossata goynnana gidikko intte goynnanayssa hach doorite; taninne ta keeththa asay gidikko GODAAS goynnana» gides. 
Joshua24:16 Histtiin asay zaaridi, «GODAA aggidi hara eeqa xoossatas goynoy nuuppe haakko!" 
Joshua24:17 Gibxe aylleteththa biittafe, nunanne nu aawata kessidi ehiday, he gita malaatata nu sinththan ooththiday, nu biza oge ubbaaninne nu kanththida kawoteththata ubbaa giddon nuna naagiday GODAA nu Xoossaa." 
Joshua24:18 Qasse GODAY he biittan diza Amooretara gujjiin deraa ubbaa nu sinththafe gooddides; hessa gishshas nuni GODAAS goynnana; izi nu Xoossa» gides. 
Joshua24:19 Iyaasoykka deraas, «Intte GODAAS goynnanaas dandayekketa; izi geeshsha Xoossa; izi qanaatiza Xoossa; izi intte makkallateththaanne intte nagaraa atto geenna." 
Joshua24:20 Intte GODAA aggidi allaga xoossatas goynniko izi inttes lo7o ooththidaappe guye simmi wodhdhidi izi intte bolla iita ooththananne inttena dhayssana» gides. 
Joshua24:21 Histtiin derezi Iyaaso, «Akkay nuni GODAAS xalla goynnana» gides." 
Joshua24:22 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy deraas, «Intte GODAAS goynnanaas doorida gishshas intte hu7es intte markka» gides. Isttika zaaridi, «Ee nuni markka!» gida." 
Joshua24:23 Iyaasoy, «Histtiko, intte giddon diza allaga xoossata diggite; intte wozinaa GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaako zaarite» gides." 
Joshua24:24 Derezikka Iyaasos, «Nuni GODAA nu Xoossas goynnana; izaskka azazettana» gida." 
Joshua24:25 He gallas Iyaasoy dereza caaqeththides; istti kaallana wogaanne maara heen Seekeemen isttas immides. 
Joshua24:26 Iyaasoy he qaalata Xoossa Woga Maxaafan xaafides. Hessafe guye issi gita shuch ekkidi Geesh gidida GODAA Dunkaaneza matan diza wola garsan essides. 
Joshua24:27 Iyaasoy kumeththa deraas, «Be7ite; GODAY nuus haasayda qaala ubbaa ha shuchchay siyida gishshas izi nu bolla markka gidana. Intte Xoossa bollan makkalliko ha shuchchay intte bolla markka gidana» gides." 
Joshua24:28 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy deraa ubbaa ba xinxxon xinxxon simmana mala moyzides. 
Joshua24:29 Hessafe guye GODAA aylle, Nawe naa Iyaasos layththay 110 gidiin hayqqides." 
Joshua24:30 Asay Ga7aashe zumaappe pudeha baggan, shaara menththon diza Efreeme deren diza iza xinxxon Teminaate-Seraahan moogides." 
Joshua24:31 Iyaasoy paxa diza wode ubbaan, Iyaasoppe simmiin de7ida asatinne GODAY Isra7eeletas ooththida ooso ubbaa eriza cimati diza wode ubbaan Isra7eele asay GODAAS goynnides." 
Joshua24:32 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe ehida Yooseefe meqeththaa Seekeemen moogida. He sohoza Yaaqoobey Seekeeme aawa Emooreppe 100 saqile biran shammides; histtiin guyeppe Yooseefe zereththatas xinxxo gidides. 
Joshua24:33 Qasseka Aaroone naa El7ezeerey hayqqides; izikka shaara menththon diza Efreeme deren iza naaza Finihaase saaman gakkida Gibi7a katamaan moogettides. 
Judges1:1 Iyaasoy hayqqidaappe guye Isra7eele asay, «Kanaane biitta asaa olanaas nu zaretappe koyrottidi kezanay oonee?» giidi GODAA oychchides." 
Judges1:2 Histtiin GODAY, «Yuhuda zareti koyrotti kezetto; tani biittaa istta kushen aaththa immadis» gides." 
Judges1:3 Yuhuda asay bantta dabbota gidida Simoona zareta, «Nuni Kanaanetara olettana mala nuna shaakkiin gakkidaso nunara aadhdhite. Hessafe guye inttena shaakon gakkidaso inttenara issife baana» gida; histtiin Simoona zaretinne Yuhuda zareti olas issife bida." 
Judges1:4 Histtiin GODAY Kanaanetanne Paarizeta istta kushen aaththi immides; Beezeqen 10,000 as wodhida." 
Judges1:5 Beezeqe geetettizason Adooni-Beezeqe demmidi izara olettida; histtidi Kanaanetanne Paarizeta xoonida. 
Judges1:6 Adooni-Beezeqey baqatishin gooddi oykkidi, izas kushe manththa biradhdhetanne toho manththa biradhdheta qanxxi qanxxi yeggida." 
Judges1:7 Histtiin Adooni-Beezeqey, «Kushe manththa biradhdhetanne toho manththa biradhdheta tani qanxxa qanxxa yeggida laappun tammu kawoti ta maaddafe wodhdhida suuppa maxi shiishshidi meettes. Kase istta bolla ta ooththida gene mala Xoossi ta bolla ooththides» gides. Iza Yerusalaame ehiin heen hayqqides." 
Judges1:8 Yuhuda asay Yerusalaame oli oykkides; histtidi asaa giththa mashshan busakki wursidi katamaa taman xuuggides. 
Judges1:9 Hessafe guye Yuhuda asay gezzen, Negebeninne he dere gadhan diza Kanaaneta olanaas bides." 
Judges1:10 Histtidi kase Qiriyaate-Arba7e geetettiza Kebroone katamaan diza Kanaaneta olida; qasse Shashaye, Ahimaanenne Talimaye geetettiza qommota xoonida." 
Judges1:11 Hessafe dendidi Yuhuda asay Dabire geetettiza katamaan diza asaa olanaas bides; Dabire katamay kase, «Qiriyaate-Sefere» geetettees." 
Judges1:12 Kaalebey, «Qiriyaate-Sefere olidi oykkizaades tani ta nayo Akisa immana» gides." 
Judges1:13 Histtiin Kaalebes kaalo isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley he katamaa olidi oykkides; Kaalebeykka ba nayo Akisa izas immides. 
Judges1:14 Akisay Otin7eele geliza wode, iza ba aawappe gade oychcha ekkana mala Otin7eeley izo zorides; histtiin iza ba toggida mehe bollafe wodhdhadus; histtiin Kaalebey izo, «Ta nees ay ooththoo?» giidi oychchides." 
Judges1:15 Izakka, «Kase ne taas immida gadey haaththi bayndaso gidida gishshas pultto haaththara diza gade taas immarkkii!» gadus. Histtiin Kaalebey izis pude baggaranne duge baggara pulttora diza gadeta immides." 
Judges1:16 Muse bollo Qenaaweza zereththati Yuhuda asaara Zambay dari diza Iyarkko katamappe dendida; histtidi Araade geetettiza katamaappe dugeha baggara, Negeben diza Yuhuda bazzo bida; histtidikka heen diza asaa giddon uttida." 
Judges1:17 Yuhuda asay Simoona asaara issife biidi, Xafaate geetettiza katamaan diza Kanaaneta oli xoonides; katamayokka mulera dhayssides. Histtidi Horma giidi sunththides." 
Judges1:18 Yuhuda asay gujjidi Gaaza, Asqeloonanne Aqaroone katamata istta yuushon diza deretakka oli oykkides." 
Judges1:19 GODAY Yuhuda asaara diza gishshas, zumati darzaaso gezze biitta istti oykkida; gido attiin gars dembati uttida biittan diza asatas biratappe oosettida ola para-gaareti diza gishshas, Yuhuda asay istta denththi gooddanaas dandaybeenna." 
Judges1:20 Musey gida malan Kebroone katamaa Kaalebes immida; histtiin Kaalebey Enaaqe zare gidida heedzdzu qommota deraappe denththi gooddides. 
Judges1:21 Gido attiin Biniyaame zareti Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuse asata deraappe denththi gooddontta aggida gishshas hach gakkanaas Yaabuseti Biniyaame zaretara Yerusalaamen issife deettes. 
Judges1:22 Yooseefe qommoti Beetele olanaas worajjida; GODAYKKA isttara dees; 
Judges1:23 Isttika Beetele katamaa yuuyi xomosiza asata kiittida; kase he katamay sunththi Looza geetettees. 
Judges1:24 Kiittiin istti katamaappe kezi biza issi addeza demmidi, «Katamaa giddo waani gelanaas dandayettizaakko nuna bessa; ne bessiko nuni nees kiyana» gida." 
Judges1:25 Histtiin izi istta bessides; hessafe guye katamaan diza asaa giththa mashshan busakkida; gido attiin he addezanne izaso asaa ubbaa shemppo ashshida. 
Judges1:26 Guyeppe he addezi Hiite geetettiza dere biidi, heen katama essides; he katamay sunththaa Looza gi sunththides; he katamayakka hach gakkanaas he sunththaan xeygettawus." 
Judges1:27 Minaase zareti, Beeti-Sha7aane, Ta7inaake, Doore, Yibila7aamenne Magiddo katamataninne istta yuushon diza mooththatan diza asata kessi gooddontta aggida gishshas Kanaaneti heen bantta de7o minththi oykkida." 
Judges1:28 Isra7eele asay minnida wode Kanaaneta baas wolqqan oosisida; gido attiin istta mulera biittafe kessi gooddibeettenna. 
Judges1:29 Efreeme zaretikka Gezeere geetettiza katamaan diza Kanaaneta kessidi gooddontta aggida gishshas Kanaane asati heen isttara issife duus doommida. 
Judges1:30 Zaabiloone zareti Qitiroone katamaninne Nahilaale katamaan diza asata kessi gooddontta aggida gishshas Kanaaneti heen isttara issife de7ida; gido attiin Zaabiloone zareti istta baas wolqqan oosisida. 
Judges1:31 Aaseere zaretikka Akkon, Sidoonan, Ahilaaben, Akiziiben, Helben, Afeeqeninne Erahooben diza asata kessi gooddibeettenna." 
Judges1:32 Kanaaneti kezontta aggida gishshas Aaseere zareti isttara heen issife de7ida. 
Judges1:33 Niftaaleme zaretikka Beeti-Shemishe katamaninne Beeti-Anaate katamaan diza asata kessidi gooddibeettenna; gido attiin Kanaanetara heen issife de7ishin Beeti-Shemishenne Beeti-Anaate katama asata baas wolqqan oosisida. 
Judges1:34 Amooreti Daane zareta pude zumati dizaso gezzefe duge dembaso wodhdhontta mala diggida. 
Judges1:35 Amooreti Hari-Hereese deren, Ayaalooninne Sha7albime geetettiza katamatan de7o minththida; gido attiin Efreeme zaretinne Minaase zareti minni minni biidi banttas wolqqan oosisida." 
Judges1:36 Amooreta dere zaway Akirabime geetettizasora aadhdhi biidi Seelara kanththidi heera aadhdhi bees. 
Judges2:1 GODAA kiitanchchay Gelgelappe Bookime biidi Isra7eele asaas, «Tani inttena Gibxeppe kessada beni intte aawaas immana gaada ta caaqqida biitta inttena gelththadis; histtada ta inttes, ‹Tani inttenara caaqqida caaqo qaalaa mulekka laammike." 
Judges2:2 Intte ha biittan diza asatara caaqo caaqettofte; istti yarshizasota laallite› gadis; gido attiin intte taas azazettibeekketa; ays hessaththo hanidetii? 
Judges2:3 Hessa gishshas tani inttena, ‹Istta tani intte sinththafe kessa gooddike; istti inttes morkke gidana; istta eeqa xoossatikka inttes narxa mala gidana› gadis» gides." 
Judges2:4 GODAA kiitanchchay hessa Isra7eele asaa ubbaas yootida wode asay ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi yeekkides. 
Judges2:5 He sohoza Bookime giidi sunththides; histtidi he sozan Xoossas yarsho yarshides. 
Judges2:6 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa yeddidaappe guye asay issoy issoy shaakkiin bana gakkiza biitta ekkanaas bides. 
Judges2:7 Iyaasoy shemppora paxa diza layththa ubbaan asay GODAAS ooththides; izi hayqqidaappe guye GODAY Isra7eele asaas ooththida gita ooso ubbaa be7ida cimata wode ubbaankka GODAAS goynnizayssa aggibeenna. 
Judges2:8 GODAA aylle Nawe naa Iyaasos layththay 110 gidiin hayqqides; 
Judges2:9 Ga7aashe dereppe pudeha baggan Efreeme deren bolla gezze biittan Teminaate-Seraaha geetettizason diza iza gaden iza moogida. 
Judges2:10 He yeleta ubbay hayqqidaappe guye GODAANNE izi Isra7eele asaas ooththida lo7o ooso ubbaa erontta ooraththa yeletay dendides. 
Judges2:11 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; Ba7aale geetettiza eeqatas goynnides. 
Judges2:12 Gibxe biittafe istta kessida GODAA, bantta aawata Xoossaa aggaagida; bantta heeran diza asati goynniza eeqatakko simmidi isttas goynnida; hessan GODAA hanqeththida." 
Judges2:13 GODAAKKA aggidi Ba7aalessinne Astarootes goynnida. 
Judges2:14 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides; worajjizayti bonqqana mala istta morkketa kushen aaththi immides; istta heeran diza morkketas istta aaththi immides; hessafe guye istti bantta morkketara eqettanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Judges2:15 Istti olas keziza wode ubbaan GODAY kase isttas caaqqi yootoyssaththo istti xoonettana mala izi istta bolla dendides; hessafe dendoyssan istti keehi waayettida. 
Judges2:16 Hessafe guye GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla worajjizayta kusheppe istta ashshiza daannata isttas denththides; 
Judges2:17 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay isttas pirdiza daannatas azazettibeenna; istti GODAAS ammanettontta ixxida; eeqa xoossatakko simmidi isttas goynnida; kase bantta aawata ogeppe kare kezida; istta aawati GODAAS azazettida mala istti azazettibeettenna. 
Judges2:18 GODAY isttas pirdiza daannata daannasida wode ubbaan izi he pirdiza daannatara issife diza gishshas he daannati shemppora paxa diza layth ubbaan istta morkketa kusheppe istta ashshides. Waayeynne tuggay istta bolla darida gaason istti waassizayssa siyidi GODAY isttas qadhettides. 
Judges2:19 Gido attiin istta kaaleththiza daannati hayqqida wode ubbaan asay guye simmidi, eeqa xoossata kaalon, isttas haggazoninne istta goynon kase istta aawati ooththida iita oosoppe aadhdhida iita ooson simmi gelida; bantta iita oosonne geella oge aggontta ixxida." 
Judges2:20 Hessa gaason GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele kawoteththaa bolla eexxi kezides; GODAY, «Ha asay tani kase istta aawatara gelida caaqo qaalaa yedhdhi aadhdhida gishshassinne taas azazettontta ixxida gishshas," 
Judges2:21 hachchife doommiin Iyaasoy hayqqida wode biittaa bollan attida kawoteththatappe issaadeka tani istta sinththafe kessa gooddike. 
Judges2:22 Ha Isra7eele asay kase bantta aawata mala ta oge kaallizaakkonne kaallonttaako tani istta paaccanaas hayssa ha dereta taas ola massara ooththada isttan go7ettana» gides. 
Judges2:23 Hessa gishshas GODAY he kawoteththa asay kezontta gam7ana mala ooththides. Izi istta eeson yedeththi kessibeenna; Iyaasoska istta aaththi immibeenna. 
Judges3:1 He wode Kanaanen ay olakka oletti erontta Isra7eele kawoteththaa paaccana mala GODAY ha asata ashshides. 
Judges3:2 Izi hessa ooththiday hayssafe kase ola oletti erontta Isra7eele yeletaa ola tamaarsanaassa. 
Judges3:3 He biittan attida asati, Filisxeeme katamata haariza ichchashata, Kanaaneta ubbaa, Sidoona katama asatanne Ba7aali-Hermoone geetettiza dereppe doommidi Hamaate gakkanaas Libaanoose zumata bolla diza Hiiweta." 
Judges3:4 GODAY Muse baggara kase Isra7eele aawatas immida azazo istti azazettizaakkonne azazettonttaako shaakki eranaas isttas paace gidana mala he attida asata heen ashshides. 
Judges3:5 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Kanaanetara, Hiiwetara, Amooretara, Paarizetara, Hiitetaranne Yaabusetara issife de7ides." 
Judges3:6 Istta macca nayta baas machcho ekkida; bantta macca naytakka istta attuma naytas immida; istta eeqa xoossataska goynnida. 
Judges3:7 Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; istti GODAA bantta Xoossa aggidi Ba7aalenne Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossatas goynnida. 
Judges3:8 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides; GODAY Masophexoomya biitta kawo Kushaan-Arishataye kushen istta aaththi immides; isttika izas osppun layth haarettida. 
Judges3:9 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay GODAAS waassida wode GODAY istta ashshanaas ashshizaade kiittides; izikka Kaalebes kaalo isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eele geetettees. 
Judges3:10 GODAA Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhiin izi Isra7eele dere ayssiza daanna gidides; izi olas kezida wode GODAY Masophexoomya biitta kawo Kushaan-Arishataye iza kushen aaththi immiin iza xoonides. 
Judges3:11 Hessa gishshas Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley hayqqana gakkanaas biittay oyddu tammu layth kumeth woppa demmides. 
Judges3:12 Isra7eele asay zaareththidikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; hessa gishshas GODAY Mo7aabe kawo Egilooney Isra7eele bolla wolqqamana mala ooththides. 
Judges3:13 Egilooney Amoonetanne Amaaleeqeta banara denththi ekki biidi Isra7eele asaa oli xoonides; Zamba katama geetettiza Iyarkko katamaakka oykkides. 
Judges3:14 Isra7eele asaykka Mo7aabe kawo Egiloones tammanne osppun layth haarettides. 
Judges3:15 Isra7eele asay GODAAKKO zaari waassida wode, istta ashshiza as kiittides; izikka Biniyaame zareppe Geera naa Ehuude geetettees; izi hadirsa kushen ooththiza asa; Isra7eele asay Ehuude Mo7aabe kawo Egiloonekko giirara kiittides." 
Judges3:16 Ehuudey nam7u baggara qarattida issi wadha gidiza giththa mashsha baas giigsides; ushachcha mille baggara may7o giddon gixxides. 
Judges3:17 Hessafe guye Mo7aabe kawo Egiloones giira ekki efidi immides; Egilooney keehi orde asa. 
Judges3:18 Ehuudey giiraza kawozas immidaappe guye giiraa tookkidi bida asata moyzides. 
Judges3:19 Gido attiin Ehuudey Gelgela matan diza masetti eqqida shuchchata matappe Egiloonekko guye simmi biidi, «Kawontoo! Tani inttes yootana xuura miishshi dees» gides. Histtiin kawoy, «Co7u ga!» gides; iza naagizayti ubbay kare kezida." 
Judges3:20 He wode kawoy pooqen diza issi carkiza kifilen barkka utti dishin Ehuudey izakko shiiqidi, «Xoossi nees yeddida kiitay dees» gides; kawozikka ba uttidasohoppe dendi eqqides." 
Judges3:21 Ehuudey hadirsa kushe yeddidi ushachcha bagga millefe giththa mashsha shoddidi kawozas ulon yeddides. 
Judges3:22 Histtiin giththa mashshaas tuutey attontta ulo giddo gelidi zokkora kanththi kezides; moodhezikka mashshaa may7ides; Ehuudey mashshaa shoddontta heen aggaagides. 
Judges3:23 Hessafe guye Ehuudey kare kezidi keeththa kare iza bolla gordi qulpides. 
Judges3:24 Ehuudey bidaappe guye kawaa aylleti yiidi pengey gordettidayssa be7ida; gido attiin kawoy giddo kifilen sheeshshas uttontta aggenna giidi qoppida. 
Judges3:25 Salettana gakkanaas karen eqqi naagida; gido attiin kawoy penge doyontta ixxiin qulpe ekkidi pengeza doyda; istta godaa ahay wuyge bolla porccu gi dizayssa be7ida. 
Judges3:26 Ashkarati heen penge bolla naagon dishin Ehuudey kessi ekkidi masetti eqqida shuchchasora aadhdhidi Seyre geetettizaso baqatides. 
Judges3:27 Izi he gakkida wode Efreeme deren bolla gezzezan Isra7eele asay olas shiiqana mala zaye punnides; asaykka iza kaallidi heeppe duge wodhdhides. 
Judges3:28 Izi isttas, «Tana kaallite; ays giikko GODAY intte morkketa, Mo7aabeta intte kushen aaththi immides» gides. Hizgiin iza kaalli wodhdhidi Yordaanoose shaafappe gede Mo7aabe pinththiza purdeza oykkidi issaadeyka heera kanththontta mala diggida." 
Judges3:29 He wode Mo7aabe asaappe tammu shii gidiza doorettida mino olanchchata wodhida; issi asikka kessi ekki attibeenna. 
Judges3:30 He gallas Isra7eele asay Mo7aabe asaa oli xoonides; hessa gaason biittay osppun tammu layth gakkanaas woppa demmides. 
Judges3:31 Ehuudeppe guye Anaate naa Shamgarey dendides; Filisxeeme dereppe usuppun xeetu as cikka guufen wodhidi Isra7eele asaa ashshides. 
Judges4:1 Ehuudey hayqqidaappe guye Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan zaareththidikka iita miish ooththides. 
Judges4:2 Hessa gishshas GODAY Haxoore geetettiza katamaan kawotida Kanaane kawo Yaabines istta aaththi immides; iza olanchchata kaaleththiza Sisaari Haroshe-Hagoye geetettiza kataman dees. 
Judges4:3 Yaabiney biratappe oosettida uddufun xeetu para-gaareti izas diza gishshassinne izi Isra7eele asaa nam7u tammu layth kumeth keehi un7eththida gishshas istti maado demmanaas GODAAKKO waassida. 
Judges4:4 He wode Laapidota machcha nabe Dibooray tinbite yootizaara Isra7eele deraa pirdiza daanna. 
Judges4:5 Izakka Efreeme deren bolla gezzen, Eraama katamaappenne Beetele katamaappe giddon diza Diboora zamba garsan uttada pirdawus; Isra7eele asay ba yo7o pirdisanaas izikko yees." 
Judges4:6 Issi gallas Diboora Abino7aame naa Baraaqe Niftaaleme biittan diza Qaadeese katamappe kiittada xeygisadus; «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nena, ‹Niftaaleme zareppenne Zaabiloone zareppe tammu shii as ekkada Taaboore zumaa bolla keza." 
Judges4:7 Yaabine olanchchata kaaleththiza Sisaara para-gaaretanne olanchchata ekkidi Qisoone shaafan nenara ola gayttanaas yaana mala tani iza denththeththana; tani iza nees aaththa immana› gi azazees» gadus. 
Judges4:8 Baraaqeykka izis, «Neni tanara biikko tani baana; neni tanara bontta aggiko tanikka biikke» gides." 
Judges4:9 Dibooraykka, «Ero, buussaa ta nenara baana; gido attiin GODAY Sisaara maccassa kushen aaththi immana gishshas ta buussay nees bonchcho gidenna» gadus; hessafe guye Dibooray dendada Baraaqera olas Qaadeese badus." 
Judges4:10 Baraaqey Niftaalemenne Zaabiloone zareta Qaadeese xeygiin tammu shii asay iza kaalli kezides; Dibooraykka izara badus.
