1Samuel15:4 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli asaa Xila7ime geetettizason shiishshidi qoodides; isttika Isra7eeleppe 200,000 wottadarata, Yuhudappe 10,000 wottadarata gidida." 
1Samuel15:5 Sa7ooli Amaaleeqeta katama biidi issi zulle giddon zamadi uttides. 
1Samuel15:6 Izikka Qenaawe dere asaa, «Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida wode intte isttas kiyattida gishshas ta isttara inttena issife dhayssontta mala Amaaleeqetappe haakkite; isttafekka shaakettite» gides. Histtiin Qenaawe asati Amaaleeqetappe shaakettida." 
1Samuel15:7 Histtiin Sa7ooli Amaaleeqeta Hawilappe denththidi arshey mokkiza baggara Gibxen diza Shuura gakkanaas olides. 
1Samuel15:8 Amaaleeqeta kawo Agaage shemppora paxa di7ides; deraa ubbaa qara mashshan siifides. 
1Samuel15:9 Gido attiin Sa7oolinne iza ola asati Agaage, lo7o dorsatanne meheta, ohala marinne laaqqa, lo7o lo7o gidida ubbaa wodhontta aggaagida; heytantta ubbaa wodhanaas koyibeettenna; gido attiin leqettidaytanne shufurota dhayssida." 
1Samuel15:10 Hayssafe guye GODAA qaalay Sameelakko yiidi," 
1Samuel15:11 «Tani Sa7oole kawoththida gishshas modhettadis; gaasoykka izi tana kaalo aggidi guye simmida gishshassinne ta azazo polontta aggida gishshassa» gides. Sameeli keehi ceecidi omars kumeth GODAAKKO waassides. 
1Samuel15:12 Sameeli wontta maaladora dendidi Sa7oolera gayttana bides; gido attiin, «Sa7ooli Qarmeloose bides; heen bana hassa7issiza hawulte essidaappe guye duge Gelgela wodhdhides» geetetti izas yootettides." 
1Samuel15:13 Sameeli Sa7oole demmiin Sa7ooli, «GODAY nena anjjo; GODAA azazo ta poladis» gides." 
1Samuel15:14 Sameeli iza, «Histtiin hayssi ta hayththan seetettiza dorsata waasoynne boorata xaagoy aazee?» gi oychchides." 
1Samuel15:15 Sa7ooli, «Ola asay Amaaleeqe asaappe di7i ehidaytakko; lo7o lo7o dorsatanne boorata GODAA ne Xoossaas yarshanaas wodhontta paxa ashshidayta; hankkoyssa gidikko mulera dhayssidos» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel15:16 Sameeli Sa7ooles, «Siya; qamma omars GODAY taas yootidayssa ane ta nees yootays» gides. Sa7oolikka, «Ero ane yoota» gides." 
1Samuel15:17 Sameeli izas, «Neni ne qofan guuth gidikkoka ne Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizaade gidabeekkii? GODAY nena tiydi Isra7eele bolla kawoththides." 
1Samuel15:18 GODAY nena, ‹Baada heyta nagaranchchata Amaaleeqe asaa mulera dhayssa; dippi histta dhayssanaashe gakkanaas ola› giidi kiittides." 
1Samuel15:19 Histtiin ne ays GODAAS azazettabeekkii? Di7oyssa shiishshanaas yorattada ays GODAA sinththan iita ooththadii?» gides. 
1Samuel15:20 Sa7ooli izas, «Tani GODAAS azazettadis; izi tana kiittida mala badis; Amaaleeqe asaa mulera dhayssada istta kawo Agaage ekka yadis." 
1Samuel15:21 Ola asay gidikko di7ettidayssafe GODAAS dummatidayta giddofe lo7o lo7o dorsatanne boorata Gelgelan GODAA ne Xoossaas yarshanaas ekkida» gides. 
1Samuel15:22 Sameeli, «GODAA qaalas azazettiin iza ufayssizayssa mala GODAY xuugettiza kaththa yarshoninne hara yarshon ufayetti erizee? Hekko azazeteththi yarshofe, ezgi sissi dharsho handafe aadhdhees." 
1Samuel15:23 Makkallay maroththo mala nagara; agga ixxay eeqa xoossas goyno mala iita; neni GODAA qaalaa kadhida gishshas izikka neni kawo gidontta mala nena kadhides» gides. 
1Samuel15:24 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli Sameelas, «Tani nagara ooththadis; GODAA azazonne ne immida wogaa mooradis; tani deraas yayyida gishshas isttas azazettadis." 
1Samuel15:25 Ha7ikka neni ta nagara atto gaana malanne GODAAS goynnanaas ne tanara issife simma baana mala ta nena woossays» gides. 
1Samuel15:26 Gido attiin Sameeli izas, «Ta nenara simma biikke; neni GODAA qaalaa kadhadasa; GODAYKKA ne Isra7eele bolla kawotontta mala nena kadhides» gides." 
1Samuel15:27 Sameeli baana guye simmishin Sa7ooli iza afala xeera oykkiin afalazi daakettides. 
1Samuel15:28 Sameeli, «GODAY hach Isra7eele kawoteth ne kusheppe daakkides; neeppe lo7iza ne shooraas aaththi immides." 
1Samuel15:29 Isra7eele bonchcho gidida GODAY wordotenna; modhettenna; gaasoykka modhettanaas izi ase gidenna» gides. 
1Samuel15:30 Sa7ooli, «Tani nagara ooththadis; gido attiin ta dereza halaqata sinththaninne Isra7eele asaa sinththan tana bonchcharkkii! GODAA ne Xoossaas goynnanaas tanara issife simmarkkii!» gides." 
1Samuel15:31 Hessa gishshas Sameeli izara issife simmides; Sa7oolikka GODAAS goynnides. 
1Samuel15:32 Hessafe guye Sameeli, «Amaaleeqe kawo Agaage taas haa ehite» gides; Agaagey, «Tumappe hayqoy hayssa mala camoo?» gi kokkorishe yides." 
1Samuel15:33 Sameelikka, «Ne mashshay maccassata yeloy baynda ashshidayssaththo ne aayakka maccassata giddon yeloy bayndaaro gidana» gishe Agaage Gelgelan GODAA sinththan qanxxereththi yeggides." 
1Samuel15:34 Hessafe guye Sameeli Eraama bides; Sa7ooli gidikko baso pude Gibi7a kezides. 
1Samuel15:35 Sameeli Sa7ooles yeekkikokka izi hayqqanaashe gakkanaas nam7anththo iza be7anaas bibeenna; GODAY Sa7oole Isra7eele bolla kawoththida gishshas modhettides. 
1Samuel16:1 GODAY Sameelas, «Isra7eele bolla kawoti dontta mala ta kadhida Sa7ooles ne awude gakkanaas yeekkanee? Beeteliheeme dere as Isseyekko ta nena kiittana gishshas bashe kacen zayte kunththa ekka ba; ta iza nayta giddofe issoy kawo gidana mala dooradis» gides." 
1Samuel16:2 Sameeli gidikko, «Sa7ooli siyikko tana wodhana; histtiin ta waana baana dandayazinaa?» gides. GODAY zaaridi, «Issi ussu ekka baada, ‹GODAAS yarshanaas yadis› ga." 
1Samuel16:3 Yarshosoho Isseye xeyga; hessafe guye ne ooththanayssa ta nena bessana; ta nees yootizaade ne tiyana» gides. 
1Samuel16:4 Sameeli GODAY gidayssa ooththides; izi Beeteliheeme gakkida wode katamaa cimati kokkorishe izara gayttanaas yida; isttika iza, «Ne saros yadii?» gi oychchida." 
1Samuel16:5 Sameelikka zaaridi, «Ee sarossa; tani GODAAS yarsho shiishshanaas yadis; intteka inttena geeshshidi tanara yarshosoho haa yiite» gides. Hessafe guye Isseyenne iza nayta dummasides; yarshosoho yaana malakka xeygides." 
1Samuel16:6 Istti hee gakkishin Sameeli Elyaabe be7idi, «Be7ite; tumukka GODAY tiydayssi GODAA sinththan eqqides» gi qoppides." 
1Samuel16:7 Gido attiin GODAY Sameela, «Tani hayssa kadhida gishshas ne izas malaa woykko geesaa xeellofa; GODAY asi xeelliza mala xeellenna; asi kare bagga hanota be7ees; GODAY gidikko wozina xeellees» gides." 
1Samuel16:8 Hessafe guye Isseyey Abinadaabe xeygidi Sameela sinththara aadhdhana mala ooththides; gido attiin Sameeli, «GODAY hayssaka dooribeenna» gides." 
1Samuel16:9 Kaallidikka Isseyey Shammaha ehides; Sameeli, «Izakka GODAY dooribeenna» gides." 
1Samuel16:10 Isseyey ba laappun nayta Sameela sinth shiishshides; gido attiin Sameeli, «GODAY haytanttaka dooribeenna» gides." 
1Samuel16:11 Hessafe guye Sameeli Isseye, «Ne nayti haytantta xallaa?» gi oychchides. Isseyeykka, «Ubbaafe kaalozi buro yibeenna; ha7i izi dorsata heemmishe dees» gi zaarides. Sameelikka, «Ane kiittada ehisa; izi yaanaashe gakkanaas nu uttoko» gides." 
1Samuel16:12 Histtiin Isseyey kiittidi ehisides; izi aarissa, ayfera lo7iza puulanchchanne mala lo7o naa. GODAY Sameelas, «Tani dooriday hayssa, dendada tiya» gides." 
1Samuel16:13 Sameelikka kacezan diza zayteza ekkidi iza ishata sinththan iza tiydes. He gallassafe doommidi GODAA Ayanay Dawite bolla keehi wolqqan wodhdhides; Sameeli guye simmi Eraama bides. 
1Samuel16:14 GODAA Ayanay Sa7ooleppe haakkida gishshas GODAAPPE azazettida iita ayanay waayisishe dees. 
1Samuel16:15 Sa7oole oosanchchati, «Be7a; GODAAPPE kiitettida iita ayanay nena waayisishe dees." 
1Samuel16:16 Hessa gishshas bagana shoci dandayza as koyana mala nu goday ba sinththan eqqiza oosanchchata azazo; histtiko GODAAPPE azazettida iita ayanay ne bolla yiza wode nees izi bagana shocana; neeskka lo7o gidana» gida. 
1Samuel16:17 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli ba ashkarata, «Bagana lo7eththi shoch dandayzaade taas koyi ehite» gides." 
1Samuel16:18 Iza oosanchchatappe issoy, «Lo7eththi bagana shoch dandayza Beeteliheeme dere as Isseye naaza be7adis; izi qaranne olanchcha, akeekanchchanne ufayssiza qaala haasayzaade; GODAYKKA izara dees» gides." 
1Samuel16:19 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli, «Ne dorsatakkon diza ne naa Dawite yedda» giidi Isseyekko qasttanneta kiittides." 
1Samuel16:20 Isseyey buddena, lukkamo kumeththa woyne ushshu hare bolla caanidi, deysha laaqqa gujji oyththidi ba naa Dawite Sa7oolekko yeddides." 
1Samuel16:21 Dawiti Sa7oolekko yiidi izas haggazo doommides; Sa7oolikka iza keehi dosides; izikka Sa7oole gondalle tookkizaade gidides. 
1Samuel16:22 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli, «Tani Dawite dosida gishshas izi matan dishe haggazana mala taas immarkkii!» giidi Isseyekko kiittides." 
1Samuel16:23 GODAAPPE azazettidi iita ayanay Sa7oole bolla yiza wode Dawiti bagana shocishin Sa7ooles lo7ees; iita ayanaykka iza bollafe haakkees. 
1Samuel17:1 Filisxeemeti ba olanchchata olas Yuhuda biittan Sookon shiishshi woththida; isttika Iskooteppenne Azeeqeppe giddon diza Efsi-Deemimen dunkaani uttida. 
1Samuel17:2 Sa7oolinne Isra7eeleti shiiqidi Eela zullen dunkaanida; Filisxeemetara olettanaas soho soho oykkida. 
1Samuel17:3 Issi bagga zumbullaza Filisxeemeti, hankko bagga zumbullaza Isra7eeleti oykkida; isttafe giddon zulley dees." 
1Samuel17:4 Geeteppe yida izas geesay usuppun wadha gidiza Golyaade geetettiza issi ola qarazi Filisxeemeta gutappe kezides. 
1Samuel17:5 Izi xarqimalappe oosettida qoobe hu7en woththides; 5,000 saqile gidi deexxiza xarqimalappe oosettida xurure may7ides." 
1Samuel17:6 Ba suulezan xarqimalappe oosettida gamballe woththidi ba hashen xarqimalappe oosettida xinqa toora oykkides. 
1Samuel17:7 Iza tooraas toomay wondiraashe mala orde; izas tooraa ayfezi laappun kilo keena deexxees; iza ola miish tookkizayssi izappe sinththan sinththan bees. 
1Samuel17:8 Golyaadey yaachchan eqqida Isra7eele asaa bolla, «Intte olas salfi keziday aazassee? Tani Filisxeeme as gidishin intte Sa7oole aylleta gidekketii? Ane intte giddofe issaade doorite; izikka ane haa ta dizaso wodhdho." 
1Samuel17:9 Izi tanara olettanaassinne tana wodhanaas dandaykko nuni inttes aylleta gidana; gido attiin tani iza xoonizaa gidikkonne iza wodhizaa gidikko intte nuus aylleta gididi haarettana» gi naacides. 
1Samuel17:10 Histtidi Filisxeeme dere addezi, «Hach tani Isra7eele olanchchatara eqettana; ane olettana as immite!» gides." 
1Samuel17:11 Sa7oolinne Isra7eele asay ubbay ha Filisxeeme addezi haasayda qaalaa siyidi keehi babbidanne dagammida. 
1Samuel17:12 Dawiti Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheemen diza Efraata dere as Isseye naa; Isseyes osppun attuma nayti deettes; izi Sa7oole kawoteththa wode cimanne wodey keehi bida asa. 
1Samuel17:13 Isseyes bayra naa heedzdzati Sa7oole kaallidi olaas bida; bayrazi Elyaabe, nam7anththozi Abinadaabe, heedzdzanththozi Shammaha." 
1Samuel17:14 Dawiti istta ubbaafe kaalo; izas bayra ishati heedzdzati Sa7oole kaallidi olaas bida. 
1Samuel17:15 Dawiti gidikko ba aawa dors heemmanaas Sa7oole matappe Beeteliheeme simerettishe dees. 
1Samuel17:16 He Filisxeeme addezi 40 gallas kumeth omarsinne maalado kezi beetti beetti simmees. 
1Samuel17:17 He wode Isseyey ba naaza Dawite, «Hayssa hallahettida tammu kilo tiyanne tammu sollo ne ishatas istti olas dunkaani uttidaso elle gaththa." 
1Samuel17:18 Hayta tammu laaluka pila istta azazizayssas issife ekka ba; ne ishati waani dizaakko be7ada istti lo7o dizayssa erisiza malata taas ekka ya. 
1Samuel17:19 Isttika Sa7ooleranne Isra7eele asaa ubbaara gididi Eela zullen Filisxeemetara olettishe deettes» gides. 
1Samuel17:20 Dawiti wonteththa gallas maaladora dorsata heemmiza asaas aggidi Isseyey iza azazida mala shinqeza ekki bides. Olanchchati olettanaas ceeqettishe soho soho oykkishin istti dunkaani uttidaso gakkides. 
1Samuel17:21 Isra7eeletinne Filisxeemeti soho soho oykkidi tiran gayttanaas zamadi utti naageettes. 
1Samuel17:22 Dawiti ba efida shinqeza naagizayssa matan woththidi asay olettizaso woxxides; ba ishata demmidi istta lo7eteth oychchides. 
1Samuel17:23 Izi isttara haasayan dishin Geeteppe yida Filisxeeme ola qara Golyaadey ola asaa giddofe kezidi kase ba losida mala balbuqishin Dawiti siyides. 
1Samuel17:24 Isra7eele asay ubbay addeza be7ida mala keehi babbidi iza sinththafe baqatides. 
1Samuel17:25 Isra7eele asay bantta giddon issoy issaara, «Hayssi ubba gallas Isra7eelera eqettizayssa be7eetii? Ha addeza wodhidaades kawoy daro aqota immana; ba nayokka izas machcho immana; iza aawa keeththaaka Isra7eelen giira qanxxisenna» gi haasayetteettes." 
1Samuel17:26 Dawiti ba achchan eqqida asata, «Ane hayssa Filisxeeme addeza wodhidi hayssa ha kawushshateththaa Isra7eele bollafe diggidaades aazi oosettanee? Qasseka de7o GODAA olanchchatara eqettanaas hayssi qaxxara qanxxettontta Filisxeemezi izi oonee?» gi oychchides." 
1Samuel17:27 Isttika izas, «Iza wodhana asas oosettanay hayssa» giidi kase haasaydayssa zaari yootida." 
1Samuel17:28 Izas bayra isha Elyaabey Dawiti asatara haasayshin siyidi, «Ays haa wodhdhadii? He amarda dorsatakka bazzon oonas agga yadii? Ne otoroteththaanne ne wozina iitateththaa ta erays; ne yiday olaa beyanaas xalla» giidi keehi hanqettides." 
1Samuel17:29 Dawiti, «Histtiin ta ay ooththadinaa? Oychchanaas dandaykkinaa?» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel17:30 Hessafe guye hara asaakko simmidi sinththan oychchoo oyshaa oychchides; asatikka sinththa asati zaarida mala izas zaarida. 
1Samuel17:31 Dawiti haasayda yo7oy Sa7oole hayththan wodhdhides; Sa7oolikka kiitti xeygides. 
1Samuel17:32 Dawitikka Sa7oole, «Hayssa Filisxeeme addezappe dendidayssan oona wozinaykka dagammofo; ne ayllezi biidi olana» gides." 
1Samuel17:33 Sa7ooli zaaridi, «Neni buro issi ayfe naa; addezi gidikko naateteththafe doommidi olara meezetida gishshas kezada ha Filisxeeme addezara eqettana dandayakka» gides." 
1Samuel17:34 Gido attiin Dawiti Sa7ooles, «Tani ne aylley ta aawa dorsata heemmiza wode gaammoy woykko zardoy yiidi wude mehaa giddofe issi dors ekki bishin," 
1Samuel17:35 tani kaalla baada iza shocada doonappe yegisays; izi ta bolla simmishin iza siixinaththaa cuulla oykkada shoca wodhays. 
1Samuel17:36 Tani ne aylley gaammonne zardo wodhadis; hayssi qaxxara qanxxetontta Filisxeemezi de7o Xoossa olanchchatara eqettida gishshas iza wurseththi isttafe issaa mala gidana. 
1Samuel17:37 Tana gaammofenne zardo achchafe ashshida GODAY ha7ikka ha Filisxeeme addeza kusheppe ashshana» gides; Sa7oolikka zaaridi, «Ba, GODAY nenara gido» gides." 
1Samuel17:38 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba ola may7o Dawite mayzides; tiran may7iza xururekka mayzides; xarqimalappe oosettida qoobe iza hu7en woththides. 
1Samuel17:39 Dawiti hessa mala ola may7o may7i erontta gishshas giththa mashshaa ola may7oza bolla danccidi hemettanaas paacci xeellides. Izikka Sa7ooles, «Hayssafe kase hayssa mala losey baynda gishshas hayssaththo hanada baanaas dandaykke» gides; hessa gishshas ola may7ota ubbaa kessi yeggides." 
1Samuel17:40 Hessafe guye ba guufeza oykkidi ichchash mulumuqqe shuchchata kanchchefe doori ekkidi ba heenththa korojon yeggides; histtidi ba yanbarshaa oykkidi Filisxeeme addezakko shiiqides. 
1Samuel17:41 Filisxeeme addezi ba gondalle tookkizayssa sinththe aaththidi Dawitekko mati mati bides. 
1Samuel17:42 Izi Dawite tishshi histti xeellishin kaysha, mala lo7onne qeeri issi ayfe naa gidida gishshas iza kadhides." 
1Samuel17:43 Filisxeeme addezi Dawite, «Laa, neni guufe ekkada ta bolla yaanaas ta nees kanee?» giidi ba eeqa xoossaa sunththan qanggides." 
1Samuel17:44 Qasseka, «Ane haa taakko ya! Ne asho ta salo kafotassinne do7atas aaththa immana» gides." 
1Samuel17:45 Dawiti Filisxeeme addezas, «Neni giththa mashsha, tooranne xinqa toora ekkada ta bolla yaasa; tani gidikko ne izara eqettida Isra7eele olanchchata Xoossan, Ubbaa Dandayza GODAA sunththan ne bolla bays." 
1Samuel17:46 Hach GODAY nena ta kushen aaththi immana; ta nena shoca yeggana; ta ne qoodhe qanxxa yeggana; hach tani Filisxeeme olanchchata aha salo kafotassinne sa7a do7atas aaththa immana; alame ubbay Isra7eelen Xoossi dizayssa erana. 
1Samuel17:47 Hayssan shiiqida ubbay GODAY ashshizay mashshan woykko tooran gidonttayssa erana; olizay GODAA gidida gishshas izi inttena ubbatakka nu kushen aaththi immana» gides. 
1Samuel17:48 Filisxeeme addezi iza shocanaas shiiqiin Dawiti izara eqettanaas gede ola demba woxxi gelides. 
1Samuel17:49 Dawiti ba kushe korojon yeddidi issi shuch ekkidi dhayqides; Filisxeemezas konkken yeggides; shuchchazi iza konkkeza torphi gelides; Filisxeeme addezikka sinththa guth kundides. 
1Samuel17:50 Hessaththo histtidi Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza shuchchaninne yanbarshan caddi wodhi xoonides. 
1Samuel17:51 Dawiti woxxi biidi addeza bolla kezi eqqides; hessafe guye Filisxeemeza mashshaa kohozappe shoddi ekkidi iza wodhidi iza qoodhekka mashshan qanxxides; Filisxeeme asay istta ola qaray hayqqidayssa be7idi baqatida. 
1Samuel17:52 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay dendi magulishe Geete pengefe denththidi Aqaroone penge gakkanaas yedeththida; Filisxeemeta ahay Shaa7iraymeppe biidi Geete gakkanaas, heeppeka biidi Aqaroone gakkanaas diza oge bolla kundides." 
1Samuel17:53 Isra7eele asay Filisxeemeta yedeththi simmidi istta gutan diza miish ubbaa bonqqides. 
1Samuel17:54 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza hu7e Yerusalaame ekki yides; gido attiin Filisxeemeta ola miishshata ba dunkaane giddon woththides. 
1Samuel17:55 Dawiti Filisxeeme addezara eqettanaas biza wode Sa7ooli be7idi ba olanchchata azaziza Abineere, «Abineere, hayssi naazi oona naa?» gi oychchides. Abineeri, «Kawoo, ne asho; ta erikke» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel17:56 Kawozi, «Ha naateththa naazi oona naakko kaaletta gakka» gides." 
1Samuel17:57 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza wodhi simmida mala Abineeri iza ekkidi kawoza sinth shiishshides. He wode Dawiti Golyaade hu7eza ba kushen oykki uttides. 
1Samuel17:58 Sa7ooli iza, «Haysso ne oona naa?» gi oychchides. Dawiti, «Tani ne aylle Beeteliheeme dere as Isseye naa» gides." 
1Samuel18:1 Dawiti Sa7oolera haasayi giigida mala Yoonataaney Dawites shemppo lagge gidides; bana mala iza siiqides. 
1Samuel18:2 He gallassafe doommidi Sa7ooli Dawite banara woththides; izi ba aawa soo bontta mala diggides. 
1Samuel18:3 Yoonataaney iza wozinappe siiqida gishshas Dawitera caaqettides. 
1Samuel18:4 Yoonataaney ba may7ida kaabbaa kessidi ba ola may7ora, ba giththa mashshaa, ba wondafezanne ba danccoza Dawites immides." 
1Samuel18:5 Sa7ooli iza kiittizaso awakka gidiin Dawiti ba kiitettidayssa bessiza mala poliza gishshas ba olanchchata bolla iza shuumides; hessi ubbaa deraanne Sa7oole ola shuumeta ufayssides. 
1Samuel18:6 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza wodhidaappe guye asay baso baso simmishin maccassati karabenne maasinqo ekkidi yexxishe, guppishenne ililishe kawo Sa7oole mokkanaas Isra7eele katamatappe kezida." 
1Samuel18:7 Maccassati, «Sa7ooli shii wodhides! Dawiti gidikko tammu shii wodhides» giidi soren yexxida." 
1Samuel18:8 Hessi iza ufayssontta aggida gishshas Sa7ooli keehi hanqettides; izikka, «Istti Dawites tammu shii, taas issi shii xalla gida! Histtiin izas kawoteththafe attiin haray aazee attiday!» gides." 
1Samuel18:9 Sa7ooli he gallassafe doommidi Dawite iita ayfen xeelo oykkides. 
1Samuel18:10 Wonteththa gallas Xoossafe azazettida iita ayanay Sa7oole bolla wodhides; he wode Dawiti kase izi ubba wode ooththizayssa mala bagana shocishin Sa7ooli bason uttidi gooshsha mala haasayshe toora oykki dees. 
1Samuel18:11 Izikka, «Dawite godaara gaththa oyseththana» gi qoppidi tooraza iza bolla xongides; Dawiti gidikko nam7uto iza sinththafe sher7i gides." 
1Samuel18:12 GODAY izappe shaakettidi Dawitera gidida gishshas Sa7ooli Dawites babbides. 
1Samuel18:13 Hessa gishshas Dawite ba achchafe haassidi shaalaqateththan shuumides. Dawitikka ola asaa kaaleththidi istta sinththan kezeessinne gelees. 
1Samuel18:14 GODAY izara diza gishshas izi ooththiza miishshi ubbay hanees. 
1Samuel18:15 Sa7oolikka Dawites ubba miishshi hanizayssa be7idaappe guye izas babbides. 
1Samuel18:16 Kumeththa Isra7eeleynne Yuhuday gidikko Dawite dosida; istta sinththan kezidi, gelidi kaaleththizay iza." 
1Samuel18:17 Sa7ooli Dawite, «Neni ola minna olettiko ta naa bayrayo Meroobo ta nees machcho immana» gides; Sa7ooli ba wozinan, «Filisxeeme asay ba kushe iza bolla woththo attiin tani iza bochchike» gi woththides." 
1Samuel18:18 Dawiti gidikko Sa7ooles, «Kawo bollo gidanaas ta oonee? Taso asay gidiin ta aawa keeththi Isra7eele asaa achchan aazee?» gides." 
1Samuel18:19 Gido attiin Sa7oole naa Merooba Dawite gelana wodey gakkishin Maholaate dere as Adir7eeles imettadus. 
1Samuel18:20 He wode Sa7oole naa Milkoola Dawite dosadus; Sa7oolikka hessa siyidi ufayettides. 
1Samuel18:21 Sa7ooli ba wozinara, «Izas woximade gidana mala, izi Filisxeemeta kushen aadhdhi imettidi dhayana mala ta izo izas immana» gi qoppides. Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli Dawite, «Hekko neni tanara bollotanaas qasseka qaada demmadasa» gides." 
1Samuel18:22 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba shuumetas, «Dawites, ‹Hekko kawozi nenan ufayettides; iza shuumetikka nena doseettes; hessa gishshas ne izas bollo gida› giidi izas xuurite» gi azazides." 
1Samuel18:23 Istti hessaka Dawites zaari zaari yootida; Dawiti gidikko, «Kawora bolloteth intte laafa miishsha mala qoodidetii? Tani keeha manqonne asa matan daro erettontta asa» gides." 
1Samuel18:24 Sa7oole shuumeti Dawiti gidayssa izas yootiin," 
1Samuel18:25 Sa7ooli, «Dawite, ‹Kawoza nayi gishshas neeppe ciloosha koyzay ba morkketa bolla halo kessanaas Filisxeeme asaappe xeetu asaa attumateth qanxxa ehada immanayssafe attiin hara koyenna› giidi yootite» gides. Sa7ooli hessa qoppiday Dawiti biidi Filisxeemeta kushen kundana mala koyza gishshassa." 
1Samuel18:26 Kawoza shuumeti hessa Dawites yootiin kawora bolloteththi iza ufayssides. Hessa gishshas barida barey aadhdhontta dishin," 
1Samuel18:27 Dawitinne izara diza asati biidi Filisxeeme asaappe nam7u xeet wodhida; kawozas bollo gidanaas qanxxi ehida attumateththaa istta qooda mala kawozas immides; hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba naa Milkoolo Dawites immides. 
1Samuel18:28 Sa7ooli GODAY Dawitera dizayssanne iza naa Milkoola Dawite siiqidayssa eridi," 
1Samuel18:29 Sa7ooli kaseppe aaththi babbides; hayqqanaashe gakkanaas izas morkke gidides. 
1Samuel18:30 Filisxeeme ola gadawati kase keziza mala olas kezeettes; Dawiti attida Sa7oole ola gadawatappe bollara xoono demmides; hessa gishshas iza sunththi keehi erettides. 
1Samuel19:1 Sa7ooli Dawite wodhana mala ba naa Yoonataanessinne ba shuumetas yootides; Yoonataaney gidikko Dawite keehi siiqees; 
1Samuel19:2 «Ta aawa Sa7ooli nena wodhanaas oge koshshan dees; ne wonto maalado qotetta attanaaso ba; heenkka takkaashsha. 
1Samuel19:3 Tanikka kezada neni diza gaden ta aawa achchan eqqana; ne gishshas ta izara haasayana; iza qofaa erada nees yootana» gides. 
1Samuel19:4 Yoonataaney ba aawa Sa7ooles, «Kawoy ba oosanchcha Dawite bolla iita miish ooththofo; izi nena qohibeenna; izi ooththidayssi nena daro go7iza miishsha." 
1Samuel19:5 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza ba shemppo bayzidi wodhides; GODAY kumeththa Isra7eeles gita xoono immides; nekka hessa be7ada ufayettadasa. Histtiin ne iza coo hada wodhanaas Dawite mala geeshsha asa bolla ays qoho ooththay?» giidi Dawite gishshas lo7eteththi yootides. 
1Samuel19:6 Sa7ooli Yoonataaney gizayssa ezgi siyidaappe guye, «De7o GODAY be7iin, Dawiti asa kushen hayqqenna» gi caaqqides." 
1Samuel19:7 Hessa gishshas Yoonataaney Dawite xeygidi haasayettida yo7ota ubbaa izas yootides; iza Sa7oolekko ehides; Dawiti kaseyssaththo iza sinththan eqqides. 
1Samuel19:8 Qasseka hara olay dendides; Dawiti Filisxeeme asaa olides; istti iza sinththafe baqatanaashe gakkanaas keehi shocides. 
1Samuel19:9 Gido attiin Sa7ooli toora oykkidi bason dishin GODAAPPE iita ayanay iza bolla wodhides; he wode Dawiti ba diith diixxees; 
1Samuel19:10 Sa7ooli iza godaara gaththi oyseththana giidi ba toora iza bolla xongides; gido attiin Dawiti sher7i giin Sa7ooli xongida tooray godan eqqides; he gallassa omars Dawiti izappe kessi ekki attides. 
1Samuel19:11 Sa7ooli Dawite keeth yuuyi aadhdhidi iza wodhana asata kiittides; Dawite machcha Milkoola gidikko, «Neni ne shemppo ashshanaas baqatontta aggiko wonto hayqqaasa» gaada minththa yootadus." 
1Samuel19:12 Milkoola Dawite maskootera kessa yeddadus; izikka kessi ekki attides. 
1Samuel19:13 Hessafe guye Milkoola eeqa misle ekkada iza hiixa bolla ishisadus; hu7esora deysha iske borkoth woththadus; may7orakka kammadus. 
1Samuel19:14 Sa7ooli Dawite oykkana asata kiitti yeddiin Milkoola, «Izi sakettees» gadus." 
1Samuel19:15 Sa7ooli asati Dawite biidi be7ana mala zaari yeddides; Sa7ooli, «Ta iza wodhana mala hiixaara iza taas haa ehite» gides." 
1Samuel19:16 Kiitettida asay izakko bi gelishin eeqa misley iza hiixa bolla ichchiin hu7esora deysha iske borkoththi dees. 
1Samuel19:17 Sa7ooli Milikoolo, «Ne histta baleththada ta morkkey taappe kessi ekkana mala aazas ooththadii?» gi oychchides. Milkoolakka, « ‹Ta kessa ekka attana mala tana maadda; akkay giikko ta nena wodhana› gides» ga zaaradus." 
1Samuel19:18 Dawiti baqati attidaappe guye gede Eraaman diza Sameelakko bides; Sa7ooli iza bolla ooththidayssa ubbaa izas yootides. Hessafe guye izinne Sameeli Newaten uttida. 
1Samuel19:19 Sa7ooleska, «Hekko Dawiti Eraaman diza Newaten dees» giidi izas yootida." 
1Samuel19:20 Hessa gishshas izi Dawite oykkanaas asata kiitti yeddides. Gido attiin nabeti shiiqidi Sameeli kaaleththishin tinbite haasayzayssa be7idi Xoossa Ayanay Sa7oole asaa bolla wodhdhiin isttika tinbite yootida. 
1Samuel19:21 Sa7oolikka hessi izas yootettida mala hara asata kiitti yeddides; isttika tinbite yootida. Sa7ooli heedzdzanththoka hara as kiitti yeddides; isttika zaaridi tinbite yootida. 
1Samuel19:22 Wurseththan izi ba hu7era Eraama bides; heeppeka Sekkun diza gita haath eelissiza ollaako gakkida mala, «Sameelinne Dawiti awan dizoo?» gi oychchides. Issi asi izas, «Eraaman diza Newaten deettes» gi yootides." 
1Samuel19:23 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli Eraaman diza Newate bides; Xoossa Ayanay iza bollaka wodhdhides. Izi biidi Newate gakkanaashe tinbite yootishe bides. 
1Samuel19:24 Izikka ba may7o kessi yeggidi Sameela sinththan tinbite yootides. Hessaththo izi kumeththa gallassinne kumeththa omars kallo ichchides. Derey iza, «Sa7ooli nabetappe issaa mala qoodettidee?» giday hessa gishshassa." 
1Samuel20:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Eraaman diza Newate zullefe Yoonataanekko baqati biidi, «Ta ay ooththadinaa? Ta ay qoho ooththadinaa? Ne aaway tana wodhanaas koyzay ta iza sinththan ay iita ooththiinee?» giidi iza oychchides." 
1Samuel20:2 Yoonataaneykka, «Hessi ne bolla mulekka hanoppo! Ne hayqqaka! Ta aaway guuth gidiin daro gidiin ay miishshika sinththati taas yootontta ooththi erenna; histtiin ta aaway hayssa taappe ays qottizee? Yo7oy hessa mala gidenna!» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel20:3 Dawitikka izas, «Tani ne sinththan bonchchettidayssa ne aaway lo7eththi erees, hessa gishshas izi ba wozinara, ‹Yoonataaney mishettontta mala hayssa eranaas bessenna› gides. Gido attiin tani De7o GODAY beyiin! Ta ne shemppon caaqqays! Taas hayqqanaas issi tanggoy xalla attides» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel20:4 Yoonataaneykka, «Ta nees ooththana mala ne koyza ay miishshika ta nees ooththana» gides." 
1Samuel20:5 Histtiin Dawiti, «Wonto agina xeero ba7aale gidida gishshas tani wonto kawora issife maanaas bessees. Gido attiin wonto peyn omars gakkanaas tani wora giddon qotettaashshana." 
1Samuel20:6 Ne aaway tana koykko, ‹Iza dabboti layththan layththan shiishshiza yarsho shiishshiza gallas gidida gishshas Dawiti ba soo asaakko Beeteliheeme baanaas piqaade tana minththi oychchides› gaada yoota." 
1Samuel20:7 Izikka, ‹Ero lo7o› giikko tana ne oosanchchaa hirgisiza miishshi deenna; izi hanqettizaa gidikko izi ta bolla iita qoppidayssa ne erana." 
1Samuel20:8 Neni gidikko taas ne ashkaraas kiyateth bessa; Tana ne ashkaraara neni GODAA sinththan caaqettida gishshas ta mooridaa gidikko tana neni wodha attiin ays ne aawaas tana aaththa immay?» gides. 
1Samuel20:9 Yoonataaneykka zaaridi, «Hayssi neeppe haakko! Ta aaway ne bolla iita qoppidayssa eridaakko ta nees waana yootikkinaa?» gides." 
1Samuel20:10 Dawitikka iza, «Ne aaway ta gishshas nees iita qaala zaarikko hessa taas ooni yootanee?» gi oychchides." 
1Samuel20:11 Yoonataaneykka izas, «Ane haa ya! Demba ke7oos!» gides; nam7ayka oykettidi kare kezida." 
1Samuel20:12 Hessafe guye Yoonataaney Dawites, «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay ta bolla markka gido; wonto tani ta aawaa pilgga oychchada wonto woykko wontoppeyna hanni wode ta nees kiittana; izi ne gishshas lo7o qoppizaa gidikko ta hessa nena erisana." 
1Samuel20:13 Gido attiin ta aaway ne bolla iita qoppiin, hessa ta nena erisontta aggikonne ne saron iza kusheppe kessa ekka baana mala ta ooththontta aggiko, ta aaway ne bolla gaththanaas qoppida iita yo7ozappe aadhdhida iita GODAY ta bolla gaththo; kase GODAY ta aawara dizayssaththo nenarakka do." 
1Samuel20:14 Nenikka tani shemppora paxa diza wode asa kushen hayqqontta mala ne taas GODAA kiyateth ooththa. 
1Samuel20:15 GODAY Dawite morkketa biitta bollafe pitti dhayssiza wodekka ne lo7o oosoy taso asaas mulekka paccofo» gides. 
1Samuel20:16 Hessa gishshas Yoonataaney, «Dawite morkketa bolla GODAY pirdo!» giidi Dawite soo asaara caaqettides." 
1Samuel20:17 Yoonataaney Dawite ba shemppo mala siiqiza gishshas, siiqoppe dendidayssan Dawite zaareththi caaqisides." 
1Samuel20:18 Hessafe qasse Yoonataaney Dawite, «Wontoy agina xeeron bonchchettiza ba7aale gallassa; ne uttizason asi dhaykko ne bayndayssi erettana." 
1Samuel20:19 Wontoppeyna omarsa wode hayssi metoy medhettida gallas kase qotettidaaso baada Eezele shuchchaa achchan takkaashsha. 
1Samuel20:20 Tani qasse issi miishsha bolla malli xeellidi xongiza asa mala heedzdzu yiish shuchchaa achchan dukkana. 
1Samuel20:21 Hessafe guye tani, ‹Yiishshata ekka ya› gaada issi naa kiittana. Naazakka, ‹Yiishshati neeppe ha baggara deettes; baada haa ekka ya› ta giikko De7o GODAY beyiin! Nena iita miishshi demmenna; metoykka deenna; kezada haa ya." 
1Samuel20:22 Gido attiin tani naazas, ‹Hekko yiishshati neeppe heni baggara deettes!› giikko, ne baana mala GODAY koyida gishshas ne bizaso ba." 
1Samuel20:23 Nuni issoy issaara haasayettida yo7oza gishshas GODAY nu giddon mernaas markka» gides. 
1Samuel20:24 Hessa gishshas Dawiti wora giddon qotettides. Agina xeeron xeeron bonchchettiza ba7aale gallas kawo Sa7ooli gibira maanaas uttides. 
1Samuel20:25 Kawozi kase ba uttizason godaa achchan uttides; Abineeri izappe kaallidi uttides; Yoonataaneykka kawozappe sinththa baggara uttides; Dawiti uttizasoy gidikko mela dees. 
1Samuel20:26 Sa7ooli, «Dawiti wogay gizayssaththo izi yiidi geeyontta mala issi meton gayttontta aggibeenna; tumappe izi geeyibeenna» giidi qoppida gishshas he gallas aykkoka qaattibeenna." 
1Samuel20:27 Agina xeero ba7aaley aadhdhiin wonteththa gallassika Dawiti uttizasoy mela dees; Histtiin Sa7ooli ba naaza Yoonataane, «Isseye nay qammaka hachchika hayssa gibiraan ays beettontta aggidee?» giidi oychchides." 
1Samuel20:28 Yoonataaneykka izas, «Dawiti Beeteliheeme baanaas tana minththi woossides." 
1Samuel20:29 Izikka, ‹Nu soo asay katama giddon yarsho yarshiza gishshassinne ta ishay tani heen beettana mala tana azazida gishshas ta baana; ne taas mishettiko ta ishata beyanaas baana mala tana yeddarkkii!› gi woossides; izi hessa gishshas kawo gibirazason beettontta aggides» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel20:30 Sa7ooli Yoonataane keehi hanqettidi, «Haysso geellanne makkallanchcha maccassay naazoo! Nees ne hu7es kawushshateth qasse ne aayeyska yeellateth gidida Isseye naazara ne laggetizayssa ta erikkinaa!" 
1Samuel20:31 Isseye nay shemppora paxa diza woden aydekka neninne ne kawoteththay minneketa. Izi hayqqana bessiza gishshas as yeddada taas haa ekka ya!» gides. 
1Samuel20:32 Yoonataaney, «Izi aazas hayqqizee? Ay mooro ooththidee?» giidi ba aawa Sa7oole oychchides." 
1Samuel20:33 Sa7oolikka Yoonataane wodhanaas ba toora iza bolla xongiin Yoonataaney iza aaway Dawite wodhanaas ba wozinan qachchi dendidayssa erides. 
1Samuel20:34 Yoonataaneykka keehi hanqettidi kaththaa miza maaddaafe dendides; iza aaway Dawite kawushshida gishshas agina xeero ba7aale bonchchida wonteththa gallas aykko kaththika mibeenna. 
1Samuel20:35 Wonteththa gallas maaladora issi qeeri naa kaaleththi ekkidi kase Dawitera barettidaso bides. 
1Samuel20:36 Naazakka, «Ne woxxa baada ta yeddiza yiishshata istti wodhdhidasoppe koya» gides; naazikka buro woththan dishin Yoonataaney issi yiish naazappe bollara sinththa aaththi yeddides." 
1Samuel20:37 Naazikka Yoonataaney yeddida yiishshazi wodhdhidaso gakkishin Yoonataaney xeygidi, «Yiishshazi neeppe aadhdhi bides deennee?» gides." 
1Samuel20:38 Izikka, «Elela! Woxxa! Eqqofa!» gi waassi yootides; naazikka yiishshata shiishshidi ba godaakko simmides." 
1Samuel20:39 Hessa he xuura yo7oza erizay Yoonataaneppenne Dawiteppe attiin naazi aykkoka eribeenna. 
1Samuel20:40 Hessafe guye Yoonataaneykka ola miishshaa he naazas immidi, «Neni hayssa ekkada gede katama simma ba» gides." 
1Samuel20:41 Naazikka bidaappe guye Dawiti shuchchafe dugeha baggara qotetti dizasoppe kezidi Yoonataane sinththan heedzdzuto duge biitta bolla gufanni ziggides. Hessafe guye issoy issaara yeerettida; nam7ayka yeekkida; Dawiti keehi yeekkides. 
1Samuel20:42 Hessafe guye Yoonataaney Dawites, « ‹Neessinne taas, ne zereththassinne ta zereththas giddon GODAY mernaas markka› giidi nu laggeteththi minnana mala nuni Xoossa sunththan caaqettida gishshas ne ha7i saron ba» gides. Hessafe guye Dawiti dendi bides; Yoonataaneykka katama simmi bides." 
1Samuel21:1 Dawiti qeese Ahimelekey dizaso Noobe bides; Ahimelekeykka kokkorishe Dawitera gayttanaas yiidi, «Nena nerkka ehiday aazee? Asi baynda ays nerkka yadii?» giidi oychchides." 
1Samuel21:2 Dawiti qeese Ahimelekes, «Kawozi, ‹Tani yiday miishsha gishshassinne tani immida azazo gishshas oonikka aykkoka eroppo› gi azazides. Tana kaallizaytara tani awan gayttanaakko isttas yoota woththadis." 
1Samuel21:3 Histtiin ha7i ne kushen aazi dizee? Ichchashu uketh woykko diza ay miishshi diikkoka taas imma?» gides. 
1Samuel21:4 Qeesezikka, «Coo asi miza kaththi takon deenna; nena kaallizayti mata wode maccassatara gayttontta banttana geeshshateththan naagidi gam7idaa gidikko hayssan Xoossas dummati uttida ukeththi dees» gides." 
1Samuel21:5 Dawitikka qeesezas zaaridi, «Kase lose gidida mala tani kezida wodeppe doommiin nuni maccassafe naagettidos; coo qeeri oosos bishekka tanara dizayti banttana geeshshateththan naageettes. Histtiin hach waanidi aadhdhennee!» gides." 
1Samuel21:6 Hessa gishshas qeesezi GODAAS dummatida ukeththaa denththidi Dawites immides; GODAA sinththafe dendidi ho7o kaththan laamettida ukeththafe attiin hara kaththi heen deenna. 
1Samuel21:7 He gallas Sa7oole oosanchchatappe mehe heemmizayta alaafezi Eedoome as Doyqey heen GODAA sinththan takkana mala woththida. 
1Samuel21:8 Dawiti Ahimeleke, «Kawoza gudday tana eesosida gishshas ta giththa mashsha gidiin woykko hara ola miish ekka yabeekke; hayssan ne achchan tooray woykko giththa mashshay deennee?» gidi oychchides." 
1Samuel21:9 Qeese Ahimelekey izas, «Neni Eela shoobbaan wodhida Filisxeeme as Golyaade mashshay haan dees; izikka eefudeppe guye baggara carqqan xaaxetti uttides; ne iza koykko ekka; izappe attiin haray ola miishshi haan deenna» gi zaarides. Dawitikka, «Iza malay haray dontta gishshas neni iza taas hamma!» gides." 
1Samuel21:10 He gallas Dawiti Sa7ooleppe baqatidi Geete dere kawo Ankusekko bides; 
1Samuel21:11 Ankuse oosanchchati, «Hayssi he biittay kawo Dawite gidennee? « ‹Sa7ooli shii wodhides; Dawiti gidikko tammu shii wodhides› gi maggulishe asay sabbidayssi hayssi iza gidennee?» gida." 
1Samuel21:12 Dawiti yo7oza ba wozinan oykkidi Geete kawo Ankuses keehi babbides. 
1Samuel21:13 Hessa gishshas istta sinththan wozinay baqettida asa mala gidides; istti iza oykkida mala katamay penge ibith qaacereththishe buuchcha bollara ba saaso gogissishe gooshsha asa mala gidides. 
1Samuel21:14 Ankusey ba oosanchchata, «Hayssa addeza ane xeellite; Izi goshshako! Histtiin ays taakko ehidetii?" 
1Samuel21:15 Izi ta achchan gooyana mala intte taakko hayssa ehiday taas hayssa mala gooshshi dhaynee? Hayssa mala asi ta keeth gelanaas bessizee?» gides. 
1Samuel22:1 Dawiti Geeteppe Adulaame gongolon bides; iza ishatinne iza aawa soo asay hessa siyidi duge izi dizaso wodhdhida. 
1Samuel22:2 Metotidayti, acora dizaytinne duussay iitidayti 400 gidana asati izakko shiiqida; izikka istta kaaleththizayssa gidides." 
1Samuel22:3 Dawiti heeppe dendidi Mo7aabe deren diza Mixiphpha bides; Mo7aabe kawos, «Xoossi taas ooththanayssa ta erana gakkanaas ta aawaynne ta aaya haa yiidi ne achchan daana mala piqaade immarkkii!» gides." 
1Samuel22:4 Izikka istta Mo7aabe kawo achchan woththides; Dawiti miixan diza layththata kumeth istti heen gam7ida. 
1Samuel22:5 Gido attiin Nabe Gaadey Dawite, «Miixan gam7ofa; Yuhuda biitta gela» gides. Hessa gishshas Dawiti dendi biidi Herete woran gelides." 
1Samuel22:6 Sa7ooli Dawitinne izara diza asay beettidayssa siyidi Gibi7a zumbulla bolla diza tamarssike geetettiza miththaa garsan ba toora kushen oykki utti dishin iza shuumeti ubbay iza yuuyi aadhdhi eqqida. 
1Samuel22:7 Sa7ooli isttas, «Intteno Biniyaame asatoo siyite! Isseye nay goshsha gadenne woyne tokkizasoho inttes tumu immanee? Izi inttena ubbatakka shaalaqatanne mato halaqata histti shuumanee?" 
1Samuel22:8 Intte ta bolla duulatiday hayssassee? Ta naazi Isseye naazara caaqettidayssa oonikka taas yootibeenna; izi hach ooththizayssa ubbaa, ta naazi ta oosanchchaza ta bolla denththeththidayssa inttefe oonikka taas mishettidi yootibeenna» gides." 
1Samuel22:9 He wode heen diza Sa7oole shuumetara eqqi diza Eedoome as Doyqey, «Isseye nay Nooben diza Ahixuube naa Ahimelekekko yishin be7adis." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelekey iza gishshas GODAA oychchides; histtidi shinqenne Filisxeeme as Golyaade giththa mashsha izas immides» gi yootides. 
1Samuel22:11 Hessafe guye kawozi qeese Ahixuube naa qeese Ahimeleke, Nooben diza qeeseta ba aawa keeththa asaa ubbaas kiita yeddi xeygiin ubbayka kawozaakko yida." 
1Samuel22:12 Sa7ooli, «Haysso Ahixuube nawu! Siya» gides. Ahimelekeykka, «Ero, ta godawu» gides." 
1Samuel22:13 Sa7oolikka, «Hach izi ta bolla ooththiza ubbaaththo, ta bolla makkallizayssaththonne ta geedon eqqizayssaththo kaththinne mashsha immidi izas Xoos woossidi Isseye naara ta bolla ays duulatidetii?» gides." 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelekey kawozas, «Kawoza bolloy, ne bonchcho zabeta azazizayssinne neso asaa achchan keehi bonchchettida Dawite misatiza ammanettida oosanchchay ne oosanchchata garsan dizay oonee?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ta izas Xoos oychchishin he gallassay koyro gallassee? Mulekka gidenna; hayssa ha yo7oza ne oosanchchay ta eriza aykko miishshi baynda gishshas kawoy tana ba oosanchchaza woykko ta aawa soo asaappe oonakka mooranchcha kessofo» gides. 
1Samuel22:16 Kawozi zaaridi izas, «Ahimelekee! Neninne ne aawa soo asay ubbay hayqqandeta!» gides." 
1Samuel22:17 Hessafe guye kawozi ba achchan eqqida zabeta, «Haytikka GODAA qeeseti Dawitera issino gididi izi baqatidayssa taas yootontta aggida gishshas istta giddoththi wodhite» gi azazides. Kawo shuumeti gidikko ba kushe GODAA qeeseta bolla denththidi shocanaas koyibeettenna." 
1Samuel22:18 Kawozi Doyqe, «Histtiko neni qeeseta giddoththada wodha» gi azazides; Eedoome as Doyqey istta giddoththi wodhides; izi he gallas eefude may7ida 85 qeeseta wodhides." 
1Samuel22:19 Qeeseta Noobe katamaan mashshan wursides; heen diza maccassatanne attumata, naytanne buro dhammizayta, hessaththoka booratanne hareta, dorsata ubbaa giththa mashshan siifides." 
1Samuel22:20 Gido attiin Ahixuube naa Ahimeleke nay Abiyaataarey kessi ekkidi Dawitekko baqatides. 
1Samuel22:21 Izikka Sa7ooli GODAA qeeseta wodhidayssa Dawites yootides. 
1Samuel22:22 Dawiti Abiyaataares zaaridi, «He wode Eedoome as Doyqey heen diza gishshas izi Sa7ooles yootanayssa ta eradis; wurida intteso asaa ubbaa gishshas ta oyshettana." 
1Samuel22:23 Ne ha7i tanara daashsha; babbofa; ne shemppo wodhana koyzaadey ta shemppo wodhana koyzaade mala; neni tanara issife saron de7andasa» gides. 
1Samuel23:1 Hessafe guye, «Filisxeeme asay Qi7ilan ola denththidi bukettiza kaththaa baleppe bonqqishe deettes» giidi Dawites yootida." 
1Samuel23:2 Dawiti, «Hayssa Filisxeeme asaa oloo?» giidi GODAA oychchides. GODAYKKA, «Ba; Filisxeemeta shoca; Qi7ilakka ashsha» gides." 
1Samuel23:3 Dawite asay gidikko, «Hayssan Yuhuda biittan dishe babboos; Filisxeeme olanchchata olanaas Qi7ila bizaa gidikko ay mala nuna babisanee?» gida." 
1Samuel23:4 Dawiti qasseka GODAA zaari oychchides; GODAYKKA izas, «Tani Filisxeeme asaa ne kushen aaththa immana; hessa gishshas ne duge Qi7ila wodhdha» gides." 
1Samuel23:5 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne iza kaallizayti Qi7ila biidi Filisxeeme asaa olida; istta mehekka di7ida; Filisxeemeta bolla gita qoho gaththida; Dawiti Qi7ila deraa ashshides. 
1Samuel23:6 Ahimeleke naa Abiyaataarey Dawitekko Qi7ila baqatishe ba kushen eefude oykki bides. 
1Samuel23:7 Dawiti Qi7ila bidayssa Sa7ooli siyidi, «Dawiti sanqqanne birata kolatati diza katama gelidayssi izi barkka bana qachchida mala gidida gishshas iza Xoossi ta kushen aaththi immides» gides." 
1Samuel23:8 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli ba olanchchata xeygidi duge Qi7ila wodhdhidi Dawitenne iza ola asaa giddoththana mala azazides. 
1Samuel23:9 Dawitikka Sa7ooli iza bolla iita qoppidayssa eridi qeese Abiyaataare, «Eefudeza hamma» gides." 
1Samuel23:10 Hessafe guye Dawiti, «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossawu! Sa7ooli Qi7ila yiidi ta gaason katamayo dhayssanaas qoppidayssa ne aylley ta lo7eththa siyadis." 
1Samuel23:11 Histtiin Qi7ila asay tana Sa7ooles aaththi immanee? Tani ne aylley siyidayssa mala Sa7ooli haa duge wodhdhanee? GODAA Isra7eele Xoossawu! Taas ne ayllezas ne yootana mala ta nena woossays» gides. GODAYKKA, «Ee izi duge wodhdhana» gides." 
1Samuel23:12 Dawiti qasseka, «Qi7ila asay tananne ta asaa Sa7ooles aaththi immanee?» gi oychchides. GODAYKKA, «Ee istti inttena aaththi immana» gides." 
1Samuel23:13 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne 600 gidiza asati Qi7ilappe dendidi baanaas dandayza ubbaso bida; Dawiti Qi7ilappe baqatoyssa Sa7ooli siyidi hee buussaa aggaagides. 
1Samuel23:14 Dawiti bazzon diza miixataninne Ziife bazzon zumbullata bolla de7ides; Sa7ooli iza ubbaa gallas kaalettees; gido attiin Xoossi Dawite izas aaththi immibeenna. 
1Samuel23:15 Dawitikka Ziife bazzon Horeeshe geetettizason dishe Sa7ooli iza wodhanaas yidayssa be7ides. 
1Samuel23:16 Sa7oole naa Yoonataaney Dawiti dizaso biidi Xoossa sunththan iza minththeththides. 
1Samuel23:17 Izikka, «Babbofa! Ta aawa Sa7ooli ba kushe ne bolla woththenna; neni Isra7eele bolla kawotana; neeppe kaallada ta nam7anththo kawo gidana; ta aawa Sa7oolikka hessa erees» gides." 
1Samuel23:18 Nam7ayka GODAA sinththan caaqettida; hessafe guye Yoonataaney baso simmi bides; Dawiti gidikko heen Horeeshen uttides. 
1Samuel23:19 Ziife asay Sa7oolekko Gibi7a kezidi, «Hekko Dawiti Yesemooneppe dugeha baggara Hakaaliya zumbulla bolla diza Horeeshe miixatan qotetti dees gidennee?" 
1Samuel23:20 Abeet kawo ha7i gidikko nena ufayssida gallas ya attiin kawozas nu iza aaththi immana doos» gida. 
1Samuel23:21 Sa7ooli isttas, «Intte taas mishettida gishshas GODAY inttena anjjo!" 
1Samuel23:22 Ha7i simmi biidi izi awan dizaakko erite; heen iza be7ida as shaakki erite; izi keehi cincca as gididayssa ta siyadis. 
1Samuel23:23 Izi qotettizasohota ubbaa be7idaappe guye qonccera bessiza hanota ekki taakko yiite; tanikka inttenara baana; izi deeth do attiin Yuhuda qommota giddon izi gelida ollafe ta gela kessana» gides. 
1Samuel23:24 Hessa gishshas asati Sa7ooleppe sinththati dendidi Ziife bida; he wode Dawitinne izara diza asati Yesemooneppe dugeha baggara Araben diza Ma7oone bazzon deettes. 
1Samuel23:25 Sa7oolinne iza asati Dawite koyana bida; Dawitikka hessa siyidi duge zaallaako wodhdhidi Ma7oone bazzon uttides. Sa7ooli hessa siyida mala Dawite gooddishe Ma7oone bazzo bi gelides. 
1Samuel23:26 Sa7ooli zumaas issi baggara gidi gooddishin Dawitinne izara diza asati zumaas hankko baggara Sa7ooleppe attanaas woxxeettes. Sa7oolinne Sa7oole olanchchati Dawitenne izara diza asata oykkanaas un7eththidashin," 
1Samuel23:27 issi asi qasttanne Sa7oolekko yiidi, «Filisxeemeti deraa bolla worajjida gishshas eeson gakka» gides." 
1Samuel23:28 Histtiin Sa7ooli Dawite gooddizayssa aggidi Filisxeemetara olettanaas bides; hessa gishshas he sohoza, «Shaaketeththa zaalla» gi sunththida." 
1Samuel23:29 Dawiti heeppe pude kezidi En-Gaade miixatan uttides. 
1Samuel24:1 Sa7ooli Filisxeemeta oli simmidaappe guye, «Be7a Dawiti En-Gaade bazzon dees» giidi izas yootida." 
1Samuel24:2 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli kumeththa Isra7eeleppe doorettida 3,000 as ekkidi Dawitenne izara diza asata koyanaas, «Wora deyshata zaalla» geetettizaso mata bides." 
1Samuel24:3 Sa7ooli oge doonan dorsati aqizaso gakkida wode heen gongolo demmidi sheesh uttana gelides; Dawitinne iza kaallizayti gongolozas giddon qotetti uttida. 
1Samuel24:4 Dawite kaallizayti Dawites, «GODAY, ‹Ne dosidayssa ooththana mala ne morkkeza ta ne kushen aaththa immana› giidi kase nees yootida gallassaya hachcha» gida. Dawiti tiran gooshetti biidi Sa7oole may7o xeerappe oonikka erontta qanxxi ekkides." 
1Samuel24:5 Gido attiin Dawiti Sa7oole may7o xeera qanxxidayssan iza wozinay keehi ceecides. 
1Samuel24:6 Asataskka, «GODAY tiyda ta godaa bolla hessa mala ooso ooththanaappenne izi tiydayssa bolla ta kushe denththanaappe GODAY tana naago» gides." 
1Samuel24:7 Dawiti asaa ha qaalan seerides; Sa7oole bollaka istti meto gaththanayssa koyibeenna; Sa7oolikka gongoloza giddofe kezi bides. 
1Samuel24:8 Hessafe guye Dawiti gongoloza giddofe kezidi Sa7oole, «Ta godaa kawoo!» gi xeygides; Sa7oolikka guye simmi xeellishin Dawiti ba kushe denththidi ziggishin be7ides;" 
1Samuel24:9 Dawiti Sa7ooles, «Asay, ‹Beya Dawiti ne bolla iita ooththana koyees› gishin ne ays istta siyay?" 
1Samuel24:10 Hach gongolo giddon nena ta kushen wostti aaththi immidaakko hekko neni ne ayfera be7adasa; issi issi asati ta nena wodhana mala denththeththida; gido attiin tani, ‹GODAY tiyda ta godaa bolla ta kushe woththike› gaada ta nees qadhettadis." 
1Samuel24:11 Ta aawawu ne may7oza xeerappe qanxxettidayssa hayssa ta kushen be7a! Nees may7o xeerappe qanxxa ekkadis attiin nena wodhabeekke. Ha7ikka tani iitateth woykko makkallateth ooththonttayssa ne era; hessa ne wozinan woththa; ta ne bolla iita ooththabeekke; neni gidikko ta shemppo dhayssanaas gooddaasa. 
1Samuel24:12 «GODAY ne giddoninne ta giddon pirdo. Neni iita ooththida gishshas GODAY ne bolla halo kesso attiin ta ne bolla kushe woththike. 
1Samuel24:13 Kase wode tossen, ‹Iita ooththizaytappe iitay kezees› geetettiza mala ha7i ta kushey nena bochchenna." 
1Samuel24:14 «Isra7eele kawoy oona bolla ke7idee? Neni oona goodday? Hayqqida kana woykko kasttolle goodday? 
1Samuel24:15 Ha7ikka nu giddon GODAY daanna gidi pirdo. Ta yo7oza xeellidi ta gishshas izi mootetto. Tanakka ne kusheppe kessi ekkidi ta tumateththaa izi qoncciso» gides. 
1Samuel24:16 Dawiti hessa haasaydi wursida mala Sa7ooli, «Ta naa Dawitee! Addafe hayssi ne qaalaa?» giidi yeekkishe oychchides." 
1Samuel24:17 Kaaleththidi Sa7ooli Dawites, «Ta ne bolla iita ooththishin ne taas lo7o ooththida gishshas ne taappe xillo." 
1Samuel24:18 Ne taas ooththida lo7o miishshi hekko taas yootadasa; GODAY tana ne kushen aaththi immides shin ne tana wodhabeekka. 
1Samuel24:19 Ba morkke demmidi iza bolla qoho gaththontta dishe yeddizay oonee? Neni hach taas ooththida kiyateththaa kushe GODAY nees zaaro. 
1Samuel24:20 Beya tumappe neni kawotanayssanne Isra7eele kawoteththi ne kushen minnanayssa ta erays. 
1Samuel24:21 Neni ta zereththata dhayssontta malanne ta sunth ta aawa keeththafe dhayssontta mala GODAA sunththan caaqqa» gides. 
1Samuel24:22 Dawitikka Sa7ooles caaqqides. Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba soo simmi bides; Dawitinne iza kaallizayti kase ba qotettiza miixan simmi ke7ida. 
1Samuel25:1 Sameeli hayqqides; kumeththa Isra7eele asay issi bolla shiiqidi izas yeekkides; hessafe guye Eraaman diza izaso efidi iza heen moogida. Hessafe guye Dawiti duge Ma7oone bazzo bides. 
1Samuel25:2 Ma7oone biittan Qarmeloosen aqotara diza issi dure asi dees; izas 1,000 deyshatinne iskey qanxxettiza 3,000 dorsati deettes." 
1Samuel25:3 Addeza sunththi Naabaale, machchey sunththi Abigaalo geetettees. Iza akeekanchchanne keeha mala lo7o maccassa; izi azinazi gidikko boozanne iita ooththiza asa. Izi Kaalebe bagga asa." 
1Samuel25:4 Dawiti bazzon dishe Naabaaley ba dorsata iske qanxxizayssa siyides. 
1Samuel25:5 Izikka tammu naateththa nayta, «Naabaalekko pude Qarmeloose kezite; ta saroka izas gaththite." 
1Samuel25:6 Izas, ‹Shemppo gam7a! Saroy nees gido; saroy neso asaassinne nees gidida ubbaas gido." 
1Samuel25:7 Ha7i neni dorsata iske qanxxizayssa tani siyadis. Ne meheza heemmizayti kase nunara diza wode ubbaan nu istta bolla aykko iitakka gaththibeekko. Istti Qarmeloosen diza wode ubbaan isttafe dhayda issi miishshika deenna. 
1Samuel25:8 Hessa neni ne oosanchchata oychcha; istti nees yootana. Hach nuni lo7o gallas yida gishshas ha naateththa nayti ne sinththan bonchchettetto. Shoobbe nena ne aylletasinne ne naa Dawites nees dandayettiza mala nuus imma› giite» gides. 
1Samuel25:9 Dawiti kiittida asati hee gakkida mala Dawite kiitaa Naabaales yootidaappe guye zaaro naago doommida. 
1Samuel25:10 Naabaaley Dawite oosanchchatas, «Dawiti izi oonee? Isseye nay izi oonee? Hayssa ha wodezan bantta godatappe baqati biza oosanchchati daro." 
1Samuel25:11 Histtiin tani ta kaththinne ta haath, ta dorsata iske qanxxizaytas ta shukkida asho istti awappe yidaakko erettontta asas tani aazas immoo?» gides." 
1Samuel25:12 Dawiti kiittida asati guye simmi biidi gakkida mala Naabaaley isttas gidayssa ubbaa Dawites yootida. 
1Samuel25:13 Dawitikka asatas, «Ane ubbatikka intte giththa mashsha gixxite» gides. Hessa gishshas ubbayka ba mashsha mashsha gixxida; Dawitikka ba mashsha gixxides. 400 gidana asi Dawitera ke7ishin 200 gidana asi istta miishshaa naaganaas guye attides." 
1Samuel25:14 Naabaale aylletappe issoy iza machcho Abigaalis, «Be7a, Dawiti ba diza bazzofe nu godaakko as sarokara gaththi yeddides. Gido attiin izi istta cash kalssides." 
1Samuel25:15 Ha asati keehi lo7o asa; nu bolla ay qohokka gaththibeettenna. Bazzon nu isttara diza wode nuus aykkoyka dhaybeenna. 
1Samuel25:16 Nuni nu meheta heemmishe isttara diza wode ubbaan gallas gidiin omars istti nuus dirsa gidida. 
1Samuel25:17 Ha7i nu godaa bollanne izaso asaa bolla metoy aalanththishe diza gishshas neni yuushsha qoppada ooththanaas bessizayssa ooththa. Izi gidikko hessa mala booza as gidida gishshas izas xali yootana issaadeyka deenna» gides. 
1Samuel25:18 Abigaala gam7ontta dashe elelada 200 sollo, 2 lukkamo kumeththa woyne ushshu, 5 dorsa asho xiixa, 17 kilo tiya caaca, 100 wurco woyne ayfenne 200 balase miththa ayfeppe uukettida qeeri uketh issi bolla shiishsha ekkada hare bolla caanadus." 
1Samuel25:19 Hessafe guye ba aylleta, «Intte taappe sinththati biite; tanikka intte guyera gakkana» gadus. Gido attiin ba azina Naabaales aykkoka Yootabeekku." 
1Samuel25:20 Iza ba hareza toggada duge zulleza wodhdhishin Dawitinne iza kaallizayti izikko duge wodhdhida; izakka istta demmadus. 
1Samuel25:21 Dawiti, «Iza miishshafe issinakka dhayontta mala hayssa addeza aqota bazzo biittan ta naagiday coo hada gidides. Ta izas lo7o ooththidayssa kushe izi taas iita zaarides." 
1Samuel25:22 Wonto maalado iza asaappe issaadeka ta shemppora paxa aggiko Xoossi ta bolla hessa mala ooththo; hessafekka aadhdhiza iita miish ooththo» gides. 
1Samuel25:23 Abigaala Dawite demmida mala heerakka hareza bollafe wodhdhada Dawite sinththan gufannada kushe denththadus. 
1Samuel25:24 Iza heen Dawite toho bolla kundada, «Ta godoo! Iza mooroy ta bolla qoodetto; shoobbe tani ne aylley nees yootana gizayssa siyarkkii!" 
1Samuel25:25 Ta godoo! Hessa booza Naabaale paxa miishshan qoodoppa! Addezas sunththaa birsheththi eeya guus gidida gishshas izikka ba sunththaa mala eeya! Eeyateththika izara gam7ides. Tani ne aylleya gidikko ne ta goday kiittida naateththata beyabeekke. 
1Samuel25:26 «Ta godoo! De7o GODAY beyiin! Ne asho. Suuth gussanaappenne nerkka ne halo kessanaappe nena naagiday GODAA. Ha7ikka ne morkketinne ta godaa qohana koyzayti ubbay Naabaale mala gidetto. 
1Samuel25:27 Ta ne aylleya ta godaas ehida ha imotay nena kaalliza ha naateththatas imetto. 
1Samuel25:28 Ta GODAY ola olettiza gishshas GODAY ta godaa kawoteththaa tumappe izi mernaas izas minththana. Hessa gishshas tana ne aylley qoho taas atto ga. Neni shemppora paxa diza wode ubbaan iitateththi neeppe beettofo. 
1Samuel25:29 Ay asikka ne shemppo dhayssanaas gooddikokka ta godaa shemppoy de7on dizayta issifeteththaa giddon GODAA ne Xoossaa matan saron naagettana. Gido attiin ne morkketa shemppo shuch yanbarshan caddiza mala caddana. 
1Samuel25:30 GODAY ta godaas immida hidota qaalaa mala lo7o miish ubbaa ooththida wodenne Isra7eele bollaka izi nena kawoththida wode," 
1Samuel25:31 neni hadan gussida suuththi woykko ne kushen neni halo kessidaazi dontta gishshas ta goday wozinan ceecana hanoynne modhettana miishshi deenna. GODAY nees lo7o ooththida wode tana ne aylleyo baloppa» gadus. 
1Samuel25:32 Dawitikka Abigaalis, «Hach ne tanara gayttana mala nena taakko kiittida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto." 
1Samuel25:33 Tani asa suuth gussontta malanne ta kushen halo kessontta mala hach ne tana naagida gishshassinne ne lo7o qofaa gishshas nenikka anjjetta. 
1Samuel25:34 Ta ne bolla meto gaththontta mala tana naagida De7o GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay beyiin! Neni hayssaththo eeson taakko yaada tana demmonttaako gadey wonttanaas Naabaales issi attuma naykka attenna» gides. 
1Samuel25:35 Hessafe guye Abgaala Dawites ehida imotaa izi kusheppe ekkidi, «Neni ne soo saron ba; ne gidayssa ta siyadis; ne tana oychchidayssa ta ooththana» gides." 
1Samuel25:36 Abigaala guye soo simma bishin Naabaaley kawo keeththan giigiza gibira mala gibira giigsidayssa beyadus. Izikka keehi maththottidi ufayssan kumi uttides. Hessa gishshas gadey wonttanaashe gakkanaas izas aykkoka yootabeekku. 
1Samuel25:37 Wonteththa gallas ushshaa maththoy iza aggidaappe guye iza hanoza ubbaa izas yootiin, iza wozinaykka keehi dagammidi co7u gides. Iza bollay shuchcha mala aha kezides." 
1Samuel25:38 Tammu gallassatappe guye GODAY boshan Naabaale shociin izi hayqqides. 
1Samuel25:39 Dawitikka Naabaaley hayqqidayssa siyida wode, «Naabaaley tana cayida gishshas taas halo kessidaynne tana ba aylleza iita ooththontta mala naagida GODAY galatetto; Naabaaley ooththida iita miish iza hu7en zaarides» gides. Hessafe guye Dawiti Abigaala iza machcho gidana mala oysha as kiittides." 
1Samuel25:40 Iza aylletikka Qarmeloose biidi Abigaalis, «Ne izas machcho gidana mala nena ekkanaas Dawiti nuna neekko kiittides» gides." 
1Samuel25:41 Izakka denda eqqada sinththa guth gufanna kushe denththada, «Hekko tani ne garadeya nees haggazanaassinne ne aylleta toho meeccanaas giiga uttadis» gadus." 
1Samuel25:42 Abigaala heerakka hare toggada ba garade ichchashata kaaleththa ekkada Dawite aylletara baada Dawites machcho gidadus. 
1Samuel25:43 Hessaththoka Dawiti Izra7eelen yelettida Ahinahoomo ekkides; nam7atikka iza machcho gidida. 
1Samuel25:44 Sa7ooli gidikko Dawite machcho ba naa Milkoolo Gaalime deren yelettida Laysha naa Palixes immides. 
1Samuel26:1 Ziife asay Sa7ooli dizaso yiidi, «Be7ite Dawiti Yesemoone ginara diza Hakaaliya zumbulla bolla qotettides» giidi yootida." 
1Samuel26:2 Hessa gishshas Sa7oolikka dendidi Isra7eele asaa garsafe doorettida 3,000 ola asata banara ekkidi Dawite kosh duge Ziife bazzo wodhdhides." 
1Samuel26:3 Sa7ooli Yesemoone ginara diza Hakaaliya zumbulla bolla oge doonan dunkaani uttides; Dawiti gidikko bazzon dees. Dawiti Sa7ooli hee gakkanaas iza kaalli yidayssa eridi," 
1Samuel26:4 xomosizayta yeddidi Sa7oole yuussaa shaakki erides. 
1Samuel26:5 Dawiti dendidi Sa7ooli dunkaani dizaso bides; Sa7oolinne iza ola asaa halaqa, Neere naa Abineeri dizaso bi be7ides. Sa7ooli ba dunkaani dizason asaa giddon dhiskon dishin iza ola asay iza giddoththi woththides." 
1Samuel26:6 Dawiti Hiite dere as Ahimelekenne Xuriya naa Iyo7aabe isha Abisaye, «Tanara duge Sa7ooli dizaso wodhdhanay oonee?» gi oychchides. Abisayeykka, «Ta nenara wodhdhana» gides." 
1Samuel26:7 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne Abisayey Sa7oole ola asay dizaso bida; istti bishin Sa7ooli heen dhiskon dees; iza tooray iza hu7eson biittan eqqi dees; Abineerinne iza olanchchati iza yuushon dhiskida. 
1Samuel26:8 Abisayey Dawites, «Xoossi hach ne morkke ne kushen yeggides; ha7i ta iza issito cadda biittara sikkays; ta nam7anththanaas aykkoka koshshenna» gides." 
1Samuel26:9 Dawiti Abisaye, «Wodhoppa; GODAY tiydaade bolla ba kushe denththidi suuththafe geesh gidida asi oonee?" 
1Samuel26:10 De7o GODAY be7iin, GODAY iza wodhana; woykko iza wodey wuriin izi hayqqana; woykko izi olan hayqqana." 
1Samuel26:11 GODAY tiydayssa bolla tani ta kushe woththanaappe GODAY tana naago! Gido attiin iza hu7eson diza tooranne haaththara dizayssa haa ekka ya, ane boos» gides." 
1Samuel26:12 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Sa7oole hu7eson diza tooranne haaththi izan diza miishshaa ekkides; hessafe guye bida; hessi hanishin be7iday, eriday woykko dhiskofe beeggiday oonikka deenna. GODAA achchafe wolqqama dhiskoy istta bolla wodhdhida gishshas ubbayka dhiskida." 
1Samuel26:13 Hessafe guye Dawiti he pinththi pinnidi zumbullaa xeeran haakki eqqides; istti nam7ay issoy issaafe keehi haakkida. 
1Samuel26:14 Dawiti ba ola asaanne Neere naa Abineere, «Abineeree! Ta nena xeygizayssa siyikkii?» gi xeygides. Abineeri izas, «Kawo bolla ne kaccanaas ne oonee?» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel26:15 Dawiti izas, «Ne mino asa; Isra7eele garsan ne malay oonee? Hekko asi ne godaa kawoza wodhanaas yides; histtiin neni ne godaa kawoza ays naagabeekkii?" 
1Samuel26:16 Ne lo7o ooththabeekka; de7o GODAY be7iin! Neninne ne asati hayqqana besseeta; gaasoykka GODAY tiyda intte godaa naagibeekketa; ane xeella; iza hu7eson diza kawo tooraynne haath oykkiza miishshazi awan dizoo?» gides. 
1Samuel26:17 Sa7ooli Dawite cenggurs gididayssa shaakki eridi, «Ta naa Dawite! Hayssi ne cenggurssee?» gides. Dawitikka, «Ta godoo, ee ta cenggurssa» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel26:18 Kaaleththidikka, «Ta goday ba oosanchcha ays gooddizee? Ay ooththadinaa? Ay qohadinaa?" 
1Samuel26:19 Ha7ikka ta godaa kawoy, ba aylleza cenggurs ezgi siyo; GODAY nena ta bolla denththeththidaa gidikko izi yarsho mo; gido attiin hayssa asi ooththidaa gidikko GODAA achchan qanggettidayta gidetto; gaasoykka, ‹Ba, baada hara eeqatas goynna› giidi GODAA achchan xinxxoy dontta mala hach yedeththida." 
1Samuel26:20 Asi zuma bolla kuracho gooddiza mala Isra7eele kawoy kasttolle koyana kezida gishshas ta suuththay GODAA sinththafe haakkidi biitta bolla gukkana mala ooththofa» gides. 
1Samuel26:21 Sa7oolikka, «Ta naa Dawitee! Ta qohadis; hach ta shemppoya ne sinththan diza gishshas hayssafe guye ta nena qohikke; addafe tani eeya ooso ooththadis; keehakka balettadis» gides." 
1Samuel26:22 Dawitikka izas, «Kawoo ne toora hayssa beya; ne naateththatappe issaadey yiidi ekko." 
1Samuel26:23 GODAY issaas issaas iza xilloteththa malanne iza ammaneteththaa mala izas qanxxo; tani gidikko hach GODAY nena ta kushen aaththi immiin tani GODAY tiydayssa bolla ta kushe denththabeekke. 
1Samuel26:24 Be7a ne shemppoy ta ayfe sinththan bonchchettida mala ta shemppiyakka GODAA sinththan bonchchettidaaro gidu; izi tana meto ubbaafe ashsho» gi zaarides. 
1Samuel26:25 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli Dawites, «Ta naa Dawite! Ne anjjettidayssa gida; ne gita miish ooththana; izikka nees hanana» gides. Hessafe guye Dawiti ba bizaso biin Sa7ooli baso simmides." 
1Samuel27:1 Dawiti gidikko ba wozinara, «Ha gallassatappe issi gallas Sa7oole kushen hayqoy taas attontta gishshas Filisxeeme dere baqatay tana ashshana; hessafe guye Sa7ooli tana Isra7eele garsafe gooddizayssa aggaagana; tanikka iza kusheppe kessa ekkana» gi qoppides." 
1Samuel27:2 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne izara diza 600 asay dendidi Geete kawo Ma7oke naa Ankusekko bida. 
1Samuel27:3 Dawitinne izara diza asay Ankuse matan de7ida; issoy issoy baso asaara dees; Dawitikka ba machcheta nam7atara Izra7eele dere maccas Ahinahoomiranne kase Naabaale machcho Qarmeloose dere maccas Abigaalira dees. 
1Samuel27:4 Sa7ooli Dawiti Geete baqatidayssa siyidi iza gooddizayssa aggaagides. 
1Samuel27:5 Hessafe guye Dawiti Ankuses, «Ne sinththan ta bonchcho demmidaa gidikko hanno dereyin diza katamatappe issineyn ta daana mala taas soho imma. Ta ne aylley ne diza katamaan nenara waana daanee?» gides." 
1Samuel27:6 Hessa gishshas he gallas Ankusey izas Xigilaage immides; he wodeppe doommiin Xigilaagey Yuhuda kawota xinxxo gidadus. 
1Samuel27:7 Dawiti Filisxeeme deren issi layththinne oyddu agina gam7ides. 
1Samuel27:8 He wode Dawitinne iza asati kezidi Geeshure, Gerizaawenne Amaaleeqe oli oykkida. Ha dereti benippe doommidi Shuurappe biidi Gibxe gakkanaas de7ida." 
1Samuel27:9 Dawiti biittayo olida wode attumas gidiin maccas biittaa bolla ashshibeenna. Gido attiin dorsata, miizata, haretanne gaamellata hessaththoka may7otakka ekki Ankusekko simmi bides." 
1Samuel27:10 Ankuseykka, «Hach oona bolla worajjidetii?» gi oychchiin Dawiti, «Yuhudappe dugeha baggara, woykko Yerahim7eeles dugeha baggara, woykko Qenaawetappe dugeha baggara dees» giza zaaro immides." 
1Samuel27:11 Dawiti, «Izi nu bolla hayssa hayssa ooththides giidi yootana» giidi qoppida gishshas attumas gidiin woykko macca shemppora paxa ashshi Geete ekki yibeenna. Izi Filisxeeme deren diza wode ubbaan hessaththo oosoy izas lose gidides." 
1Samuel27:12 Ankusey ba wozinara, «Izi ba dere Isra7eele asay iza keehippe ixxana mala ooththida gishshas izi taas mernaas oosanchcha gidana» gi qoppida gishshas Dawite ammanides." 
1Samuel28:1 He wode Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olanaas ba olanchchata shiishshides. Ankuseykka Dawite, «Neninne ne asay tanara issife olas kezanayssa erite» gides." 
1Samuel28:2 Dawitikka, «Tani ne oosanchchay ay ooththanaakko neni ne hu7era be7andasa» gides. Ankuseykka, «Ero lo7okko! Ta diza layth ubbaan ta nena taas bonchcho zabe histtana» gides." 
1Samuel28:3 He wode Sameeli hayqqi gam7ides; Isra7eele asay ubbay iza katamaan Eraaman yeekkidi moogides; Sa7ooli marotanne moytille haasayssizayta kase dereppe gooddides. 
1Samuel28:4 Filisxeeme asay issi bolla shiiqetti yiidi Sunemen uttiin Sa7ooli qasse Isra7eele asaa ubbaa shiishshidi Gilbo7a zumaa bolla uttides. 
1Samuel28:5 Sa7ooli Filisxeeme ola asaa be7idi babbides; iza wozinay keehippe hirgides. 
1Samuel28:6 Izi GODAA oychchiin GODAY izas agumon gidiin woykko Urimen woykko nabeta baggara zaaro immibeenna. 
1Samuel28:7 Sa7oolikka ba oosanchchata, «Ane hayqqida as denththiza maccas taas koyite; tani baada izo oychchana» gides. Isttika izas, «Hekko hayqqida as denththiza maccassaya En-Dooren dawus» gida." 
1Samuel28:8 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli ba may7o laammi hara may7o may7idi, ba medhakka laammidi nam7u asatara issife omars maccassayko bides; izikka izo, «Taas moytilleta oychcharkkii; ta nees yootizaade denththarkkii» gides." 
1Samuel28:9 Maccassaya gidikko, «Hekko Sa7ooli marotanne moytille denththi haasayssizayta biittafe izi wostti dhayssidaakko izi istta bolla ooththidayssa ne eraasa; histtiin ne tana wodhisanaassinne ta shemppos woximade woththanaas ays koyay?» gadus." 
1Samuel28:10 Sa7oolikka izis, «De7o GODAY be7iin hayssi ha yo7ozi ne bolla qixaate ehenna» gi caaqqides." 
1Samuel28:11 Maccassayakka, «Nees oona denththoo?» gaada oychchadus. Izikka, «Taas Sameela denththa» gides." 
1Samuel28:12 Maccassayakka Sameela be7ida mala ba qaala dhoqqu histta waassadus; Sa7ooles, «Ne Sa7oole gida uttada tana aazas baleththadii?» gadus." 
1Samuel28:13 Kawozikka, «Babbofa; ha7i nees aazee beettizay?» gides. Izakka, «Issi ayanay biittafe pude kezishin be7adis» gadus." 
1Samuel28:14 Izikka, «Izas medhay ay misatizee?» gi oychchides. Izakka, «Kaabba may7ida issi cima bitaney pude kessa bolla dees» gadus. Sa7oolikka maccassaya be7idayssi Sameela gididayssa erides; biitta bolla gufannidi izis kushe denththides." 
1Samuel28:15 Sameelikka Sa7ooles, «Tana duufoppe denththada ays shempo diggay?» gides. Sa7ooli, «Tani keeha ceecadis; Filisxeemeti tana olishe deettes; Xoossi taappe haakkides; nabeta baggara gidiin woykko agumon taas zaaribeenna. Hessa gishshas ta ay ooththana bessizaakko ne taas yootana mala nena xeygadis» gides." 
1Samuel28:16 Sameeli izas, «Histtiin GODAY neeppe haakkiko, nees izi morkke gidikko ne tana ays oychchay?" 
1Samuel28:17 GODAY ta baggara nees yootidayssa polides; GODAY ne kawoteththaa ne kusheppe woththi ekkidi ne shooro Dawites immides. 
1Samuel28:18 Neni GODAAS azazettontta aggida gishshassinne suulliza iza hanqoza ne Amaaleeqeta bolla polontta aggida gishshas GODAY hach hayssa ne bolla ooththides. 
1Samuel28:19 GODAY nenanne Isra7eeleta Filisxeemetas aaththi immana; neninne ne nayti wonto tanara gidandeta; qasseka GODAY Isra7eele olanchchata Filisxeemetas aaththi immana» gi zaarides. 
1Samuel28:20 Sameeli yootida qaalaappe dendidayssan Sa7ooli babon kumidi heerakka biitta bolla porccu gi kundides. Kumeththa gallassinne omars kath montta gishshas izas wolqqay ixxides. 
1Samuel28:21 Maccassaya Sa7oolekko yadus; izi keehi dagammidayssa beyada izas, «Hekko, tani ne oosanchchaya ne qaalaa siyadis; ta shemppo bayzada ne taas yootidayssa poladis." 
1Samuel28:22 Ha7i tani ne ashkaraya yootizayssa siyarkkii! Ne minettada baana mala hanno ta nees shiishshiza guuththa kaththiyo ma» gadus. 
1Samuel28:23 Sa7ooli, «Miikke» giidi ixxides. Gido attiin izara diza asati maccassayra gididi minththi woossiin istta qaala siyides; biitta bollafe dendidi hiixa bolla uttides." 
1Samuel28:24 Maccassaya bason ohala mari dizayssa elela ekkada shukkadus; guuththa dhiille ekka munuqadus; irshoy gelontta uketh uukkadus. 
1Samuel28:25 Histtada Sa7oolessinne izara diza asata sinth aaththadus; isttika midaappe guye he gallassa omars dendi bida. 
1Samuel29:1 Isra7eele asay Izra7eele shoobbaan diza issi pultto achchan utti dishin Filisxeeme asay bantta olanchchata ubbaa Afeeqe geetettizason shiishshides. 
1Samuel29:2 Filisxeeme ayssizayti xeetunne shii as gididi dumma dumma qoodettidi olas kezida; Dawitinne izara dizayti qasse Ankusera issife guyera kaalli bida. 
1Samuel29:3 Filisxeemeta ayssizayti istta be7idi, «Hayti Ibraawe asati hayssan ay ooththizoo?» giidi Ankuse oychchida. Ankuseykka isttas, «Hayssi Isra7eele kawo Sa7oole oosanchcha Dawite gidennee? Izi tanara duus doommiin layththi aadhdhides; izi ta gars yi geloosofe hach gakkanaas ay moorokka iza bolla demmabeekke» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel29:4 Gido attiin Filisxeemeta ayssizayti Ankuse bolla hanqettidi, «Hayssa addeza kase ne immidaso gede guye zaara yedda; olettiza wode simmi nu bolla dendontta mala nunara issife olaso baanaas bessenna; izi nu asaappe wodhidi istta hu7e qanxxi ekki bontta aggiko ba godaara waani sigettanaas dandayzee?" 
1Samuel29:5 Hayssafe kase maccassay yeththan eeddishenne sorshe, « ‹Sa7ooli shii wodhides, Dawiti tammu shii wodhides› geetetti iza gishshas yexettida Dawiti hayssa deennee?» gida." 
1Samuel29:6 Hessa gishshas Ankusey Dawite baakko xeygidi, «De7o GODAY be7iin neni taas ammanettida asa; neni taakko yida wodeppe doommiin hanno gakkanaas aykko moorokka ta ne bolla be7ontta gishshas neni tanara issife olaas kezidaakko tani ufayettana; gido attiin deraa ayssizayti nena koyibeettenna." 
1Samuel29:7 Ha7i gidikko neni guye simma saron ba; Filisxeemeta ayssizayta ufayssonttaaz ay miishshika ooththofa» gi yootides. 
1Samuel29:8 Dawitikka, «Ta godawu, ta ay iita ooththadinaa? Ta haa yida wodeppe doommiin hanno gakkanaas ne oosanchchaza bolla ay miish demmadii? Histtiin tani ta godaa kawoza morkketa ays olikkinaa?» gi oychchides." 
1Samuel29:9 Ankusey Dawites zaaridi, «Ta sinththan neni Xoossa kiitanchcha mala lo7o gididayssa ta erays; gido attiin Filisxeeme dereta ayssizayti, ‹Izi nunara olaso baanaas bessenna› gida." 
1Samuel29:10 Ha7i gidikko nenara issife yida ne godaa oosanchchatara issi bolla wonto maalado xalqqey wodhdhida mala kase intte dizaso gede guye simmi biite» gides. 
1Samuel29:11 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne izara diza asati guye Filisxeemeta dere simmanaas wonttara dendi bida; Filisxeemetikka pude Izra7eele kezida. 
1Samuel30:1 Heedzdzanththo gallas Dawitinne izara diza asay Xiqilaage gakkida; Amaaleeqe asay Negebenne Xigilaage oli oykkida; histtidi Xiqilaage xuuggida. 
1Samuel30:2 Maccassata, heen diza naateththatanne cimata ubbaa di7i efida attiin isttafe issaadeka wodhibeettenna." 
1Samuel30:3 Dawitinne izara diza asati Xiqilaage gakkida mala katamaya xuugettidayssa, istta machcheti, istta attuma naytinne istta macca nayti di7etti bidayssa erida." 
1Samuel30:4 He wode Dawitinne izara diza asati isttas qaalay shooriqana gakkanaas bantta qaalaa dhoqqu histti yeekkida. 
1Samuel30:5 Izra7eele dere as Ahinahoomanne kase Qarmeloose dere as Naabaale machcho Abigaala hayti Dawite machcho nam7atikka di7ettida. 
1Samuel30:6 Izara diza asay bantta attuma nayta gishshassinne bantta macca nayta gishshas yiillotidi iza shuchchan caddanaas zorettida; histtiin Dawiti keehi ceecides; gido attiin Dawiti GODAA ba Xoossaan minettides. 
1Samuel30:7 Hessafe guye Dawiti Ahimeleke naa qeese Abiyaataare, «Eefudeza taas haa ekka ya» gides; Abiyaataareykka eefudeza izas ehides." 
1Samuel30:8 Dawiti GODAA, «Hayta di7i efiza olanchchata kaalloo? Ta istta gakka oykkanee?» gi oychchides. GODAY izas, «Ee kaalla! Ne istta gakka oykkana; istti di7i efidayssa ne zaarana» gides." 
1Samuel30:9 Histtiin Dawitinne izara diza 600 asay Bosoore shaafa yida; guuththati Bosoore shaafan takkida. 
1Samuel30:10 Nam7u xeetu asati keehi daaburda gishshas shaafaa pinnana dandaybeettenna. Gido attiin Dawitinne izara attida 400 asay kaalli bides. 
1Samuel30:11 Isttika bazzo biittan Gibxe dere as issaa demmidi iza Dawitekko ekki yida; izas miza kaththinne uyiza haath immida. 
1Samuel30:12 Qasseka balaseppe uukettida qeeri ukeththa menththonne melida nam7u zabibe wurcota izas immida. Heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu omars aykko kaththika montta gishshassinne haaththika uyontta gishshas hayta midaappe guye izas shemppoy simmides. 
1Samuel30:13 Dawiti iza, «Ne oona oosanchchaa? Ne yiday awappee?» gi oychchides; izikka, «Tani Gibxe asa; tani issi Amaaleeqe dere asas aylle; tani sakettida gishshas heedzdzu gallassafe kase ta goday tana yeggi aggi bides." 
1Samuel30:14 Kelitetas dugeha baggara diza dere, Yuhuday ayssiza derenne Kaalebes dugeha baggara diza biittaa worajjidi Xigilaage katamaa taman xuuggidos» gi zaarides." 
1Samuel30:15 Dawitikka, «Ha7i ne tana he worajjida olanchchati dizaso kaaleththa gaththanee?» gi oychchides. Izikka Dawites zaaridi, «Ne tana wodhontta malanne ta godaas aaththa immontta mala taas Xoossan caaqqa; histtiko he worajjida olanchchati dizasota ta nena gaththana» gides." 
1Samuel30:16 Hessafe guye izi Dawite kaaleththi efi gaththishin worajjidayti Filisxeemeppenne Yuhudappe di7i ekkida daro miishshafe dendidayssan dumma dummason mishe, uyishe, yexxishenne guppishe deettes." 
1Samuel30:17 Dawiti he gallassa omarsafe doommidi wonteththa gallassa omars gakkanaas istta olides; gaamella toggidi baqatida 400 naateththatappe attiin isttafe kessi ekki attiday haray deenna. 
1Samuel30:18 Dawiti Amaaleeqe asay ekki bidayssa ubbaa yegisides; ba machcheta nam7ata woththi ekkides. 
1Samuel30:19 Dawiti guuththata gidiin gitata, attuma nayta gidiin macca nayta, di7ettidaaz gidiin hara miish, Amaaleeqeti efidayssafe issinakka paccontta zaarides." 
1Samuel30:20 Qasseka Dawiti dorsa wudeta, deysha wudeta, miiza wudeta ubbaa ekkides; asaykka, «Hayssi ubbay Dawiti di7idayssa» gishe he wude meheza hankko mehetappe sinth aaththi laaggida." 
1Samuel30:21 Hessafe guye Dawiti keehi daaburdi kaallanaas dandayontta gishshas Bosoore shaafan isttafe guye attida 200 asataakko simmi yides; isttika Dawitenne izara diza asaa mokkanaas kezida; Dawitinne izara diza asay isttako gakkida mala Dawiti istta sarokkides. 
1Samuel30:22 Gido attiin Dawite kaallizayta giddofe iita asatinne shufuro asati ubbay, «Istti nunara olaso bontta aggida gishshas nu di7i ehidayssafe isttas immoko; gido attiin istti issoy issoy ba machchetanne ba nayta ekki baanaas dandayeettes» gida." 
1Samuel30:23 Dawiti zaaridi, «Ta ishatoo! Nuna naagiday, nu bolla yida olaa nu kushen aaththi immiday GODAA; izi nuus immida miishshan intte hayssaththo ooththanaas bessenna." 
1Samuel30:24 Intte gizayssa oonee ekkanay? Ola miishshaa naagizayta gishaynne olaas bidayta gakkiza gishay dummatenna; ubbayka issi gina gishettana» gides. 
1Samuel30:25 Dawiti heedeppe doommidi hanno gakkanaas hayssa Isra7eeles woganne maara histti woththides. 
1Samuel30:26 Dawiti Xigilaage yida wode izas siiqo lagge gidida Yuhuda cimatas, «Inttes GODAA morkketappe nu di7i ekkidayssa hayssa inttes imota be7ite» giidi di7i ehoyssafe isttas shaakki yeddides." 
1Samuel30:27 Hessaka Beetelen, Eramooteppe dugeha baggan dizaytasinne Yetiren dizaytas," 
1Samuel30:28 Eri7ooren, Sifimooten, Eshttamo7anne" 
1Samuel30:29 Erakkalen dizaytas hessaththoka Yerahim7eele qommotinne Qenaaweti diza katamatan dizaytas," 
1Samuel30:30 Horman, Borasaanen, Ataken" 
1Samuel30:31 Kebroonen hessaththoka Dawitinne izara dizayti yuuyidason dizayta ubbatas yeddides. 
1Samuel31:1 He wode Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olides; Isra7eele asay istta sinththafe baqatides; daro asay Gilbo7a zumaa bolla cadetti hayqqides. 
1Samuel31:2 Filisxeeme asay qasse Sa7oolenne iza nayta kaaletti gakkidi Yoonataane, Abinadaabenne Malkeshu7a wodhida." 
1Samuel31:3 Olazi Sa7oole bolla minnides; wondafen dukkizayti iza dukkidi keehi madunththida. 
1Samuel31:4 Sa7ooli ba gondalle oykkizayssas, «Hayti qaxxarettonttayti tana caddontta malanne kawushshontta mala neni ne mashshan tana cadda» gides. Izas gondalle tookkizayssi keehi babbida gishshas caddontta ixxides. Histtiin Sa7ooli barkka ba giththa mashshaa bolla kundi hayqqides." 
1Samuel31:5 Iza gondalleza oykkizayssi Sa7ooli hayqqidayssa be7idi izikka ba giththa mashshaa bolla kundidi izara issife hayqqides. 
1Samuel31:6 Sa7oolinne iza naa heedzdzati, iza gondalle oykkizayssinne izara diza asati ubbay he gallas hayqqida." 
1Samuel31:7 Zullezappe he pinththaninne Yordaanoose shaafaappe pinththan diza Isra7eele asay, Isra7eele olanchchati baqatizayssa, Sa7oolinne iza nayti hayqqidayssa beyda wode bantta katamata yeddi baqatida; Filisxeeme asay yiidi he katamatan uttida." 
1Samuel31:8 Wonteththa gallas Filisxeeme asay hayqqida asaa bollafe ola miishshaa qaaratanaas yiza wode Sa7oolinne iza naa heedzdzati Gilbo7a zumaa bolla kundidayta be7ida. 
1Samuel31:9 Hessafe guye Sa7oole qoodhe qanxxidi, iza ola miishshaakka qaarati ekkidi, mishiraachchoza bantta eeqa xoossata keeththan keeththaninne bantta deraa giddon awajjana mala Filisxeeme dere ubbaakko qasttanne yeddida." 
1Samuel31:10 Iza ola miishshata Astaroote geetettiza eeqa xoossa keeththaan woththida; qasse iza ahaza Beeti-Saane katama gimbe bolla kaqqida. 
1Samuel31:11 Gala7aaden diza Yaabuse asay Filisxeeme asay Sa7oole bolla ooththidayssa siyida wode," 
1Samuel31:12 ola qarati ubbay omarsara Beeti-Saane bida; Sa7oole ahaanne iza nayta ahaa gimbeza bollafe woththida; histtidi Yaabuse katama ehidi tamaan xuuggida. 
1Samuel31:13 Hessafe guye istta meqeththata ekkidi Yaabusen katama giddon diza Tamarssike geetettiza miththa garsan moogida; histtidi laappun gallas xoomida. 
2Samuel1:1 Sa7ooli hayqqidaappe guye Dawiti Amaaleeqe asaa oli xoonidi simmides; Xigilaagenkka nam7u gallas gam7ides. 
2Samuel1:2 Heedzdzanththo gallas daakettida may7o may7idi ba hu7e bolla gudulla laallidi issi naateththa naa dayssi Sa7oole gutappe yides. Dawitekko gakkida mala zaqulth zirxxi giidi bonchchos kushe denththides. 
2Samuel1:3 Dawitikka iza, «Ne awappe yadii?» giidi oychchides. Izi qasse, «Tani Isra7eele asay dizasoppe kessa ekka yadis» gides." 
2Samuel1:4 Dawiti qasse iza, «Aazee waaniday ane taas ubbaa yoota» giidi oychchides. Izikka Dawites, «Asazi olasoppe baqatides; daroy kundides; Sa7oolinne iza naa Yoonataaney hayqqida» gides." 
2Samuel1:5 Hessafe guye Dawiti woreza izas yootida naaza, «Sa7oolinne iza naa Yoonataaney hayqqidayssa aazan eradii?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel1:6 Woreza izas yootida naateththa naazi izas zaaridi, «Toorontta dashe tani pude Gilbo7a zuma bolla kezadis; Sa7ooli heen ba toora bolla zemppi dishin para-gaaretinne toga asay goodereththishe iza bolla gakki wodhdhida." 
2Samuel1:7 Izikka guye simmi xeellidi tana be7idi xeygides; tanikka, ‹Ta nees ay ooththoo?› gadis." 
2Samuel1:8 «Izikka tana, ‹Ne oonee?› gi oychchides. Tanikka izas, ‹Tani Amaaleeqe asa› gaada yootadis." 
2Samuel1:9 «Izikka taas, ‹Ta hayqqanaas toqqays; gido attiin taas shemppoy kezontta ixxides; zay haa ya; tana shempisa› gides." 
2Samuel1:10 Histtiin tani izi kundichchidaappe guye izi attonttayssa erada ta izakko shiiqada iza wodhadis. Iza hu7e bolla diza kallachchazanne iza qese sagayoza ekkada hekko ta godaas ehadis» gides. 
2Samuel1:11 Hessafe guye Dawitinne izara diza asay ubbay bantta may7o daakkida. 
2Samuel1:12 Istti mashshan siifettida gishshas Sa7oolessinne iza naa Yoonataanes, GODAA olanchchatassinne kumeththa Isra7eele asaas kayottida, yeekkidanne omars gakkanaas xoomida." 
2Samuel1:13 Dawiti qasse he woreza izas ehida naateththaza, «Ne awappe yadii?» gi oychchides. Naazikka, «Tani ne deren beti diza Amaaleeqe asa naa» gides." 
2Samuel1:14 Dawiti qasse, «Histtiin neni GODAY tiydayssa dhayssanaas ne kushe waana xala denththadii?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel1:15 Hessafe guye Dawiti naateththatappe issaa xeygidi, «Neni izakko shiiqada iza wodha» gides. He naateththazi Amaaleeqeza caddi wodhides." 
2Samuel1:16 Dawitikka Amaaleeqeza, « ‹GODAY tiydayssa tani wodhadis› gaada ne bolla nerkka ne markkattida gishshas ne suuththaa gomey ne bolla gido!» gides." 
2Samuel1:17 Dawiti Sa7oole gishshassinne Yoonataane hayqo gishshas zilalishe yeekkides. 
2Samuel1:18 Qasseka, «Wondafe milas» geetettiza zilasaa Yuhuda deraa tamaarsana mala azazides. Hessi Yashaare Maxaafan xaafeti uttides." 
2Samuel1:19 «Haysso Isra7eelee! Ne bonchchoy zumbullata bolla cadetti hayqqides; ola qarati waani hayssaththo kundidoo! 
2Samuel1:20 «Filisxeeme macca nayti ufayettontta mala, qaxxarettontta asaa macca nayti ililontta mala, hayssa Geeten woresopite; Asqeloonankka awajjofte." 
2Samuel1:21 «Intteno Gilbo7a zumatoo! Intte bolla iray bukkofo; xaazaykka intte bolla dooppo; yarshos gidiza kaththi intte goshsha biittan mokkofo. Heen ola qaraza gondalley tunides; Sa7oole gondalley hayssafe guyen zayten qucettenna. 
2Samuel1:22 Yoonataane wondafey wodhontta simmi erenna; Sa7oole mashshayka morkke qanxxereththi yeggees; Wolqqamatakka menththereththi yeggees; iza morkketakka wodhides. 
2Samuel1:23 «Sa7oolinne Yoonataaney shemppora paxa dishe siiqettizaytanne qofan gayttizayta. Hayqqisheka shaakettonttayta; golle kafoppe pilatizayta; gaammofekka minnizayta. 
2Samuel1:24 «Intteno Isra7eele maccassatoo! Ochcha teera misatiza al7o qamisa inttena mayzida; intte may7oza worqqa xibaben alleqissida; Sa7ooles yeekkite. 
2Samuel1:25 «Ola qarati waani hayssa mala olason kundidoo! Yoonataaney ne zumbullata bolla cadetti hayqqides. 
2Samuel1:26 Ta isha Yoonataanee! Tani ne gishshas kayottadis; ne taas keeha al7okoshin; ne siiqoy tana malalisizaazakkoshin macca siiqoppeka keehi aadhdheeskoshin. 
2Samuel1:27 «Ola qarati waani kundidoo! Ola massaratikka waani hada gidanee!» 
2Samuel2:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti, «Tani Yuhuda katamatappe issineyn boo?» giidi GODAA oychchides. GODAYKKA, «Ee ba» gides. Dawiti zaaridi, «Katamatappe awaarin boo?» gi oychchides. GODAY qasse, «Kebroone ba» gides." 
2Samuel2:2 Histtiin Dawiti ba machcheta nam7atara Kebroone bides. Isttika Izra7eelen yelettida Ahinahoomonne Qarmeloose dere as hayqqida Naabaale machcho Abigaalo. 
2Samuel2:3 Hessaththoka Dawiti banara diza asaa isttaso asaara issife gaththi ehides. Isttika Kebroone katamatan uttida. 
2Samuel2:4 Hessafe guye Yuhuda asay Kebroone yides. Heen Dawite tiydi Yuhuda deraa bolla kawoththida. Gala7aade deren Yaabuse asay Sa7oole ahaa moogidayssa Dawites yootiin," 
2Samuel2:5 izikka Gala7aaden Yaabuse dere asaas hessa izas yootana mala qasttanne as yeddidi, «Hayssa mala ooththidi intte godaa Sa7oole moogidi intte lo7eteth bessida gishshas GODAY inttena anjjo." 
2Samuel2:6 Ha7ikka GODAY inttes ba mino siiqonne ammaneteth qoncciso; intte ooththida lo7eteththaa gishshas tanikka inttes lo7o miish ooththana.
