2Samuel2:7 Hessa gishshas minnite; goobite; intte goday Sa7ooli hayqqida gishshas Yuhuda asay tana tiydi ba bolla kawoththides» gides. 
2Samuel2:8 He wode Sa7oole ola asaa azaziza Neere naa Abineeri Sa7oole naa Iyaabuste ekkidi Mahanayme pinththides. 
2Samuel2:9 Izakka Gala7aade, Aaseere, Izra7eele, Efreeme, Biniyaame bollanne kumeththa Isra7eele bolla kawoththides." 
2Samuel2:10 Sa7oole naa Iyaabustey Isra7eele bolla kawotishin izas layththay oyddu tammu; izi nam7u layth haarides. Yuhuda asay gidikko Dawite kaallides. 
2Samuel2:11 Dawiti Kebroonen uttidi Isra7eele asaa laappun layththinne usuppun agina haarides. 
2Samuel2:12 Neere naa Abineeri Sa7oole naa Iyaabuste oosanchchatara issi bolla Mahanaymeppe dendidi Geba7oone bida. 
2Samuel2:13 Isttaka Xuriya naa Iyo7aabeynne Dawite asati ke7idi Geba7oone eele haaththa achchan gayttida. Issi baggay haaththaafe he pinththan, baggay haaththaafe ha pinththan uttida." 
2Samuel2:14 Hessafe guye Abineeri Iyo7aabes, «Ane nu baggafenne intte baggafe naateththa nayti dendidi nu sinththan ola tiran gayttetto» gides. Iyo7aabey, «Ero gayttetto» gides." 
2Samuel2:15 Hessa gishshas Biniyaame baggafe Iyaabustes tammanne nam7u asi qoodettides. Dawite baggafekka tammanne nam7u asi qoodettides. 
2Samuel2:16 Hessafe guye issoy issoy ba morkke hu7e oykkidi mashshan millera caddishe issife oyketti kundida. Hessa gishshas Geba7oonen diza he biittazi, «Mashsha biitta» geetettides." 
2Samuel2:17 He gallassa olay keehi deexo; Abineerinne Isra7eele asay Dawite asaan xoonettida. 
2Samuel2:18 Xuriya attuma naa heedzdzati Iyo7aabey, Abisayeynne Asaheeley heen deettes. Asaheeley woran diza genessa mala woththas pilata." 
2Samuel2:19 Izi Abineere oykkanaas hadirs ushach gontta iza geedora kaallides. 
2Samuel2:20 Abineeri guye simmi xeellidi, «Asaheelee! Nenee!» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Ee tanakko!» gi zaarides." 
2Samuel2:21 Histtiin Abineeri iza, «Neni ta geedoppe hadirsa bagga woykko ushachcha bagga simmada naateth issaafe iza ola massara bonqqa ekka» gides. Gido attiin Asaheeley kaalettidi iza geedoppe duuxxontta ixxides." 
2Samuel2:22 Qasseka Abineeri izas, «Ne ta geedo kaalettizayssa aggiko nees lo7o; tani nena ays biittara oyseththoo? Histtida tani ne isha Iyo7aabe ayfeso dhoqqu gaada wostta xeelloo?» gides." 
2Samuel2:23 Asaheeley gidikko iza kaaleteth aggibeenna; hessa gishshas Abineeri ba toora xeeran izas ulon caddiin toorazi izas zokkozara kanththi kezides. Asaheeley heen gade bolla kundida mala heerakka hayqqides. Oonikka Asaheeley kundi hayqqidaso gakkishe eqqi ekkees. 
2Samuel2:24 Iyo7aabeynne Abisayey gidikko Abineere kaalettida; iza goodereththishe Geba7oone bazzo efiza ogezara Aye matan diza Aama zumbulla heera gakkishin arshey wullides. 
2Samuel2:25 Hessafe Biniyaame asay Abineerekko shiiqidi zumbullaza xeeran issino gididi salfides. 
2Samuel2:26 Abineeri Iyo7aabe xeygidi, «Nuni mernaas ola olettishe daanee? Izas wurseththa gatey camo gididayssa ne waanada erontta aggadii? Ne asay ba ishata gooddizayssa aggana mala ne isttas azazo immonttay awude gakkanaassee?» gides." 
2Samuel2:27 Iyo7aabeykka zaaridi, «De7o Xoossay beyiin, ne hayssa yootontta aggidaakko asay wonttana gakkanaashe ba ishata goodo aggenna» gides." 
2Samuel2:28 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey ba zaye punnides; asaykka ubbay Isra7eele gooddizayssa aggides. Olazi hessan eqqides. 
2Samuel2:29 Abineerinne iza asay omarsara Arabera kanththi bida; heeppe Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi ubbayka Bitiroonera kanththi Mahanayme yida. 
2Samuel2:30 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Abineere gooddizayssa aggi simmidi izi dereza shiishshida wode Dawite asaa giddofe Asaheeley attiin haray tammanne uddufun asi dhaydayssi erettides. 
2Samuel2:31 Dawite asay gidikko Biniyaame asaappe Abineere kaalliza 330 as wodhides. 
2Samuel2:32 Iyo7aabeynne izara diza asay Asaheeley kundidasohoppe iza ahaa denththidi Beeteliheemen iza aawa duufon moogida. Hessafe guye omars kumeth hemettishe aqidi buro gadey wontishin Kebroone gakkida. 
2Samuel3:1 Sa7oole keeththaa giddoninne Dawite keeththaa giddon diza olay daro wode gam7ides; Dawite baggay minni minni bishin Sa7oole baggay daaburi daaburi bides. 
2Samuel3:2 Dawiti Kebroonen dishin izas usuppun attuma nayti yelettida; izas bayra naazi Izra7eele dere as Ahinahoomppe Aminooney yelettides. 
2Samuel3:3 Nam7anththo naazi Qarmeloose dere as Naabaale machcho Abigaalippe Kil7aabey yelettides; heedzdzanththo naazi Geeshure kawo Talimaye biyo Ma7ikippe Abeseloomey yelettides. 
2Samuel3:4 Oydanththo naazi Adoniyaasi Hagitippe yelettides; ichchashanththo naazi Shafaaxiyay Abixaalippe yelettides; 
2Samuel3:5 Usuppunththo naazi Dawite machcho Eglippe Yitiraamey yelettides; hayti Dawiti Kebroonen dishin izas yelettidayta. 
2Samuel3:6 Sa7oole keeththinne Dawite keeththi olettishe diza wode Abineeri Sa7oole keeththan ba wolqqa minththishe dees. 
2Samuel3:7 Sa7ooli Aaya biyo Erxifo laggeththo oykkides; Iyaabustey Abineere, «Ne ays ta aawa laggeththoyra aqadii?» gides." 
2Samuel3:8 Abineeri Iyaabuste haasayan keehi hanqettida gishshas, «Yuhuda maaddanaas tani gooshsha kanee? Hach gakkanaas tani ne aawa Sa7oole keeththaas, iza ishatassinne iza dabbotas ta ammaneteth pacinchchabeekke; nenakka Dawites aaththa immabeekke; gido attiin neni ha7i hanno ha maccassayra ta hanida miishshas tana mootay?" 
2Samuel3:9 GODAY Sa7oole keeththafe kawoteththaa woththi ekkidi Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele bollanne Yuhuda bolla Dawite kawoteththaa caaqqi woththida caaqoza ta polontta aggiko Xoossi Abineere bolla iita miish eho» gides. 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Iyaabustey Abineeres keehi babbida gishshas zaaridi issi qaala phoqqanaas dandaybeenna. 
2Samuel3:12 Hessafe guye Abineeri Dawites, «Hanna biittaya oonassee? Tanara qaala gela; be7a Isra7eele ubbay neekko simmana mala ta nena maaddana» gi yootana mala ogath yeddides." 
2Samuel3:13 Dawitikka, «Ero lo7o; ta nenara qaala gelana; gido attiin ta neeppe issi miish koyays; hessika koyro taakko yashe Sa7oole biyo Milkoolo ne taas ekka yaana mala koyays; histtontta aggiko taakko yooppa» gides." 
2Samuel3:14 Hessafe guye Dawiti, «Filisxeeme as xeetata attumateththaa ciloosha ciggada ekkida ta machcho Milkoolo taas imma» giidi Sa7oole naa Iyaabusteko ba qasttanneta kiittides." 
2Samuel3:15 Hessa gishshas Iyaabustey ba qasttanneta kiittidi izi azina Laysha naa Palti7eelesoppe kessi ekkides. 
2Samuel3:16 Izi azinay Bahirime gakkanaas yeekkishe izo kaalli bides. Hessafe guye Abineeri, «Ha7i nees gidana! Guye neso simma» gides." 
2Samuel3:17 Abineeri Isra7eele cimatara zorettishe isttas, «Kase aadhdhida woden Dawiti intte bolla kawotana mala koyideta." 
2Samuel3:18 GODAY Dawites, ‹Ta aylle Dawite baggara tani ta deraa Isra7eele istta morkketa kusheppenne Filisxeemeta kusheppe ashshana› giza hidota qaala immi woththida gishshas hayssa intte ha7ira ooththite» gides." 
2Samuel3:19 Hessaththoka Abineeri Biniyaame qommotas barkka biidi hayssa yootides; hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Biniyaame keeththa asay ubbay ooththanaas koyida ubbaa Dawites yootanaas Kebroone bides. 
2Samuel3:20 Abineeri 20 asatara Dawiti dizaso Kebroone bides; Dawitikka Abineeressinne izara diza as ubbaas gibira giigsides. 
2Samuel3:21 Hessafe guye Abineeri Dawites, «Nenara istti caaqettana mala, ne wozinaykka amottida mala ne ubbaa haarana mala eeson baada ta godaa kawozas kumeththa Isra7eele ane shiishshays» gides. Hessa gishshas Dawiti Abineere moyzides; izikka saron bides." 
2Samuel3:22 Iyo7aabeynne Dawite asay he wode daro miish di7i ekkidi olaappe simmida. Abineeri gidikko Dawiti saron iza moyzida gishshas Kebroonen deenna. 
2Samuel3:23 Iyo7aabeynne izara issife diza olanchcha ubbay hee gakkida mala Neere naa Abineeri kawozaakko yidayssa, kawozi iza moyzidayssanne izikka saron kezi bidayssa Iyo7aabey siyides." 
2Samuel3:24 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey kawozaakko gelidi, «Hayssi ne ooththidayssi aazee? Ane Abineeri ne kushen geliin waanada ne iza saron moyza yeddadii?" 
2Samuel3:25 Neere naa Abineere ne eraasa; izi yiday nena baleththanaas, ne waana kezizaakkonne gelizaakko eranaassinne ne ooththiza ubbaa wochchanaas yides» gides." 
2Samuel3:26 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Dawite achchafe kezides; Abineere ekki yaana mala as kiittides; kiitettida qasttanneti iza Seyren diza haaththa olla mata gakkishin zaarida; hessi hanishin Dawiti eribeenna. 
2Samuel3:27 Abineeri guye Kebroone simmida wode Iyo7aabey iza xalla haasayssana koyza as misatidi issi bagga sher7i histtidi gede gimbeza penge efides; heen ba isha Asaheele suuth azarana koyidi izas ulon caddi wodhides. 
2Samuel3:28 Hessafe guye Abineere wodhidayssa Dawiti siyidi, «Taninne ta kawoteththay Neere naa Abineere suuththafe GODAA sinththan mernaas geeshsha." 
2Samuel3:29 Iza suuththay Iyo7aabe hu7eninne iza aawa keeththa ubbaa bolla gido; asateththafe haaththi gogissiza hargey woykko guufen kal7atiza wobbey woykko mashshan hayqqizay woykko mizaazi dhayiin koshattizay Iyo7aabe keeththafe dhayoppo» gides. 
2Samuel3:30 Abineeri Geba7oonen olettida olaan Iyo7aabessinne Abisaye ishaa Asaheele wodhida gishshas isttika Abineere wodhida. 
2Samuel3:31 Hessafe guye Dawiti Iyo7aabessinne izara issife diza asa ubbaas, «Intte may7o daakkidi, maaqa may7idi Abineere sinththan yeekkite» gides. Dawiti ba hu7era ahaa azhabides." 
2Samuel3:32 Histtidi Abineere ahaa efidi Kebroonen moogida; kawozi Abineere duufo bolla waassi yeekkides; derezikka hessaththo yeekkides. 
2Samuel3:33 Kawozi Abineere gishshas kayo milas milalides; «Abineeree! Shufuro asa mala waana hayqqadii? 
2Samuel3:34 Ne kusheti qashettibeettenna; ne tohoti agrimooqen gelibeettenna; asi iita asa sinththan kundiza mala nekka hessaththo kundadasa.» Derezi ubbay qasse zaari yeekkides. 
2Samuel3:35 Hessafe guye dere ubbay kath doonan gelththiza wode Dawitekko yiidi izi kath maana mala minththi woossida. Gido attiin Dawiti, «Arshey wullanaashe gakkanaas kath woykko hara miish doonan ta gelththiko Xoossay hayssa mala ta bolla eho; hayssafekka aadhdhiza miish ta bolla eho» gi caaqqides." 
2Samuel3:36 Derezi ubbay hessa be7idi ufayettides; addafekka kawoza hanoy dereza ufayssides. 
2Samuel3:37 Hessaththoka he gallas derezi ubbaynne kumeththa Isra7eeley kawoza kushey Neere naa Abineere hayqon bayndayssa erides. 
2Samuel3:38 Hessafe guye kawozi ba deraas, «Hach Isra7eelen daannaynne gita asi hayqqidayssa eribeekketii?" 
2Samuel3:39 Ta tiyettida kawo gidikkoka hach ta laafateththi taas erettides; hayti Xuriya nayti taas wolqqatida. GODAY iita ooththidaades iza ooso mala immo» gides. 
2Samuel4:1 Abineeri Kebroonen hayqqidayssa Sa7oole naa Iyaabustey siyida mala keehi yayyides; Isra7eele dereykka dagammides. 
2Samuel4:2 He wode Sa7oole naa Iyaabustes kaaleththiza nam7u asati deettes; isttika Ba7aananne Erekaabe geetetteettes; istti Biniyaame qommotappe Bi7eroote dere yeleta gidida Armoone nayta; Bi7erootey Biniyaame katamatappe issiney mala qoodettawus. 
2Samuel4:3 Bi7eroote asay Geetime baqati biidi hach gakkanaas heen bete as gididi dees. 
2Samuel4:4 Sa7oole naa Yoonataanes nam7u tohoti silida issi nay dees; Sa7oole hayqoynne Yoonataane hayqo worey Izra7eeleppe izakko gakkiza wode izas layththay ichchasha. Izikka toho sila gididay he wode iza dichchizaara ekkada eeson baqatishin kundida gishshassa. Iza sunththi Memfeboste geetettees. 
2Samuel4:5 He wode Bi7eroote dere as Armoone nayti Erekaabeynne Ba7aanay Iyaabusteko baana dendida; izi gallassa shemppo ekkanaas ba hiixa bolla ishechchan dishin seeta gallas away seellishin izakko gakkida. 
2Samuel4:6 Gistte koyza as misatidi keeththa giddo gelidi izas ulon caddida. Hessafe guye Erekaabeynne iza isha Ba7aanay luushu gi kezi bida. 
2Samuel4:7 Istti soo geliday Iyaabustey ba alga kifilen ichchi dishina; istti iza caddi wodhidaappe guye iza hu7e qanxxi ekkidi kumeththa omars Arabe ogera bida. 
2Samuel4:8 Iyaabuste hu7e Dawitekko Kebroone efidi kawozas, «Nena wodhana koyza ne morkke Sa7oole naa Iyaabuste hu7e hayssa be7a; hekko GODAY hach ta godaa kawoza gishshas Sa7oole bollanne iza zereththaa bolla halo kessides» gida." 
2Samuel4:9 Dawitikka Bi7eroote dere as Armoone nayta Erekaabessinne iza isha Ba7aanas, «Tana metoppe ashshida De7o Xoossay be7iin," 
2Samuel4:10 taas mishiraachcho qaala ehidaa izas misatiin, ‹Hekko Sa7ooli hayqqides› giidi taas yootidaade oykkada Xigilaagen wodhadis. Histtiko he addezas ta immida mogotay hessa." 
2Samuel4:11 Histtiin ba keeththan ba alga bolla ichchi shempiza xillo as wodhida iita asatas iita qixaate immana bessennee? Iza suuththaa intte kusheppe accanaassinne inttena biittafe dhayssanaas taas bessennee?» gides. 
2Samuel4:12 Hessa gishshas Dawiti ba asata azaziin istti heyta wodhida; istta kushenne toho qanxxidi Kebroonen diza eele haaththa achchan kaqqida; Iyaabuste hu7e qanxxi ekkidi Kebroonen diza Abineere duufoza achchan moogida. 
2Samuel5:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay Kebroone Dawitekko biidi, «Hekko nuni ne meqeththatanne ne ashota." 
2Samuel5:2 Kase Sa7ooli nu bolla kawoti diza wode Isra7eele ola asaa kaaleththizay nena; GODAY, ‹Ta dere Isra7eele naaganay nena; istta kaaleththanay nena gidana› giidi nees yooti woththides» gida." 
2Samuel5:3 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizayti ubbay Kebroone yida; kawo Dawiti Kebroonen GODAA sinththan isttara caaqo qaala gelides; isttika Dawite tiydi Isra7eele bolla kawoththida. 
2Samuel5:4 Dawiti kawotishin izas layththay 30; izi 40 layth deraa ayssides. 
2Samuel5:5 Izi Kebroonen uttidi Yuhuda bolla laappun layththinne usuppun agina, Yerusalaamen uttidi kumeththa Isra7eele bollanne Yuhuda bolla 33 layth kawotides." 
2Samuel5:6 Kawozinne iza asay Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuse asaa olanaas hee bida. Yaabuse asaykka Dawite, «Dawiti hayssan gelana dandayenna» gi qoppida gishshas Dawites, «Haray attoshin qooqetinne wobbeti nena teqqana; hessa gishshas ne haa gelakka» gida." 
2Samuel5:7 Gido attiin Dawiti Xiyoone miixa oykkides; hinnaka ha7i Dawite katama geetettizasohoyo. 
2Samuel5:8 He gallas Dawiti, «Yaabuse asaa xoonana koyzay, Dawite morkke gidida wobbetakkonne qooqetakko gakkanaas haath pinniza purdera pudunththaa kezanaas bessees» gides; hessa gishshas, «Wobbetinne qooqeti kawo keeth gelettenna» geetettides." 
2Samuel5:9 Hessafe guye Dawiti miixayo baas duussaso histtides; izo, «Dawite katama» gi sunththides. Dawiti Miiloppe doommidi izo giddo aaththidi yuuyi aadhdhanaas gimbides." 
2Samuel5:10 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay izara diza gishshas Dawiti ubba wode minni minni bides. 
2Samuel5:11 He wode Xiroose kawo Kiraamey Dawitekko as kiita yeddides; hessaththoka ziga mith massiza hiillanchchatanne shuch massiza hiillanchchata yeddides; isttika Dawites kawo keeth keexxida. 
2Samuel5:12 GODAY Isra7eele bolla iza kawoteththaa minththidayssa, ba deraa Isra7eele gishshas iza kawoteththaa aassidayssa Dawiti erides." 
2Samuel5:13 Dawiti Kebrooneppe bidaappe guye kaseyta bolla Yerusalaamen hara laggeththota woththides; machchetakka ekkides; hara attuma naytinne macca nayti izas yelettida. 
2Samuel5:14 Izi Yerusalaamen yelida nayti, Shaamu7e, Shoobaabe, Naataane, Solomoone," 
2Samuel5:15 Iyabeheere, Elshu7e, Nefege, Naafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elshama, El7aadanne Elfaleexe geetetteettes." 
2Samuel5:17 Dawiti Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotidayssa Filisxeeme asay siyidi iza koyanaas gixxi dendides; hessa siyidi Dawiti duge ba miixa wodhdhides. 
2Samuel5:18 He wode Filisxeeme asay yiidi Erafayme shoobban laaletti dunkaanides. 
2Samuel5:19 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA, «Baada Filisxeeme asaara olettoo? Ne istta ta kushen aaththa immanee?» gi oychchides. GODAYKKA iza, «Ee ba; tumappe Filisxeemeta tani ne kushen aaththa immana» gides." 
2Samuel5:20 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Ba7aali-Paraaxime biidi Filisxeeme asaa oli xoonides; izikka, «Di7o haaththi dhuuqqi kezidi laalliza mala, GODAY ta morkketa ta sinththafe laallides» gides. Hessa gaason he sohoza sunththi Ba7aali-Paraaxime geetettides." 
2Samuel5:21 Filisxeeme asay ba eeqa xoossata yeggi aggidi baqatida gishshas Dawitinne iza kaalliza asay di7i ekki bida. 
2Samuel5:22 Filisxeeme asay qasseka yiidi Erafayme shoobban laaletti dunkaanides. 
2Samuel5:23 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA oychchides; GODAYKKA izas, «Isttafe guye baggara istta giddoththada balasaane miththaafe sinththa baggara baada isttara gaytta attiin istti dizaso sitti ga kezoppa." 
2Samuel5:24 Balasaane miththa xeera bollara ola giiris siyiza wode GODAY Filisxeeme ola asaa olanaas neeppe kaseti kezides guus gidida gishshas he wode eesotada sinth sitti ga ba» gides. 
2Samuel5:25 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAY iza azazida mala ooththides; Filisxeeme asaakka Geebappe biidi Gezeere gakkanaas gooddi gooddi shocides. 
2Samuel6:1 Qasseka Dawiti Isra7eele asaappe doorettida 30,000 as shiishshides." 
2Samuel6:2 Izinne izara diza asay ubbay kirube bolla uttida GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa ehanaas Ba7aali-Yuhuda geetettizaso bida. 
2Samuel6:3 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza ooraththa para-gaaren woththida; zumbulla bolla diza Abinadaabe keeththafe kessi ehida; para laaggizayti Aminadaabe naa Oozanne Ahiyo. 
2Samuel6:4 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotazi para-gaareza bolla dishin Ahiyoy izappe sinththara bees. 
2Samuel6:5 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay yeththan, diiththan, maasinqon, karaben, xinaaxileninne daalan baas diza wolqqa ubbaan GODAA sinththan guppida (kaa7ida)." 
2Samuel6:6 Istti Nakoone kaththa bale gakkishin boorati dhuphettida gishshas Oozay ba kushe yeddidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza oykkides. 
2Samuel6:7 Oozay hessa xalateththan ooththida gishshas GODAA hanqoy iza bolla eexxides; hessa gishshas Xoossay iza wodhides; izikka heen Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa achchan hayqqides. 
2Samuel6:8 GODAA hanqoy Ooza wodhida gishshas Dawiti muuzottidessinne ceecides; he sohozi hach gakkanaas, «Paareese-Oozaane» geetettees." 
2Samuel6:9 Dawiti he gallas GODAAS babbida gishshas, «GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay waani taakko yaanee?» gides." 
2Samuel6:10 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa banara daana mala Dawite katama ekki baana koyibeenna; hessa gishshas oge laammidi Geete dere as Abidaare soo efissides. 
2Samuel6:11 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Geete dere as Abidaare keeththan heedzdzu agina uttides; GODAY Abidaarenne izaso asaa ubbaa anjjides. 
2Samuel6:12 He wode, «Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa gaason GODAY Abidaare, izaso asaanne izas diza ubbaa anjjides» giidi Dawites yootida. Hessa gishshas Dawiti hee biidi, Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa Abidaaresoppe Dawite katama gita ufayssan efides." 
2Samuel6:13 He GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida asati usuppun tanggo bida qoodan issi booraynne issi modhdho mari yarshettees. 
2Samuel6:14 Dawiti laynoppe dadettida eefude ba xeessan gixxidi kumeththa wolqqan GODAA sinththan maggulides. 
2Samuel6:15 Hessa malan Dawitinne kumeththa Isra7eele asay ufayssan ililishenne zaye punnishe GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa pude ehida. 
2Samuel6:16 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Dawite katama gelishin Sa7oole naa Milkoola maskootera xeelladus; kawo Dawiti GODAA sinththan guppishininne durishin be7ada ba wozinara iza kadhadus. 
2Samuel6:17 Hessafe guye GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa ehidi Dawiti izas tokkida Dunkaaneza giddon izas giigsidasohozan woththida; Dawitikka xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho GODAA sinththan shiishshides. 
2Samuel6:18 Dawiti xuugettiza yarshozanne issifeteththa yarshoza shiishshidaappe guye dereza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA sunththan anjjides. 
2Samuel6:19 Isra7eele bagga gidida as ubbaas, attumasinne maccas issaas issaas issi issi uketh, issi issi muxo ashonne issi issi zabibe kompa immides; hessafe ubbayka baso baso bida." 
2Samuel6:20 Dawiti baso asaa anjjanaas baso simmi biin Sa7oole naa Milkoola iza mokkana kezada, «Hach Isra7eeleta kawoy gita asata garadeta sinththan coo laafa asa mala kallo beetoy izas bonchcho gidiinee?» gadus." 
2Samuel6:21 Dawitikka izis, «Ee, ne aawappenne ta keeththan diza ubbaafe aaththidi GODAA dere Isra7eele ayssana mala tana doorida GODAA sinththan maguladis; ha7ikka ta magulana." 
2Samuel6:22 Hessafekka bollara kaseppe aaththada tanateththaa kawushshana; hessafe aadhdhada kadhettidaade gidana; gido attiin ne kadhida garadeta sinththan ta bonchchettana» gides. 
2Samuel6:23 Sa7oole naa Milkoola hayqqanaashe gakkanaas naa yelabeekku. 
2Samuel7:1 Kawozi ba kawoteththa keeththan woppu gi uttidaappenne GODAY iza yuushon diza iza morkketappe shempisidaappe guye," 
2Samuel7:2 nabe Naataanes, «Hekko tani zigappe keexettida kawoteththa keeththan days; Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotay gidikko dunkaanen dees» gides." 
2Samuel7:3 Naataaneykka, «GODAY nenara gidida gishshas ne qoppida ubbaa ooththa» gides." 
2Samuel7:4 He gallassa omars GODAA qaalay Naataanekko yiidi," 
2Samuel7:5 «Neni baada ta aylle Dawites: Ta izan daana keeth ne keexxaka. 
2Samuel7:6 Tani Isra7eele asaa Gibxeppe kesoosofe doommada hach gakkanaas dunkaane taas aqoso histtada issisoppe haraso yuuya yuuya de7adis attiin keeththan de7abeekke. 
2Samuel7:7 Tani Isra7eele asaara bidaso ubbaan ta dere Isra7eele naagana mala ta azaziin kaaleththizaytappe issaa, ‹Ne taas ziga miththafe ays keexxabeekkii?› gidaadey dizee?" 
2Samuel7:8 «Ha7ikka ta aylle Dawites Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY: Ta dere Isra7eele ne ayssana mala ta nena denththadis; dors heemmizasohoppe ta nena ekkadis. 
2Samuel7:9 Ne bidaso ubbaan ta nenara gidadis; ne morkketa ubbaa ta ne sinththafe dhayssadis; ha7ikka istta sunththay biitta bolla keehi erettida daro gita asatappe issaa sunththa mala ta ne sunththaa dhoqqisana. 
2Samuel7:10 Izas buzo duussasoy daana mala hayssafe qaaxxontta mala ta dere Isra7eeles soho immananne minththana. Hayssafe kase hanida mala hayssafe guye iita derey istta un7eththenna. 
2Samuel7:11 Ta dere Isra7eele kaaleththizayta ta shuumida wodeppe doommidi istti iza bolla ooththidayssaththo hayssafe guye iza bolla oosettenna; hessaththoka ne morkketa ubbaafe ta nena naagana. GODAY ba hu7era keeth nees keexxanayssa izi yootees. 
2Samuel7:12 Ne layththaa wursada kase ne aawatanne gayttiza wode nena laattana zereth ta neeppe kessana; iza kawoteththaaka ta minththana. 
2Samuel7:13 Ta sunththaas keeth keexxanay iza; tanikka iza kawoteththaa mernaas minththana. 
2Samuel7:14 Ta izas aawa gidana; izikka taas naa gidana; izi mooro ooththiko as muriza guufera ta iza murana; asa nay lisson garafettiza mala ta iza garafana. 
2Samuel7:15 Ta maaroteththaa neeppe kase diza Sa7ooleppe haassidayssaththo ta izappe haassike. 
2Samuel7:16 Ne keeththaynne ne kawoteththi ta sinththan mernaas minni daana; ne kawoteththa araataykka mernaas minni daana» gides. 
2Samuel7:17 Naataaney hayssa ajjuuta qaala kumeth Dawites yootides. 
2Samuel7:18 Hayssafe guye kawo Dawiti geli GODAA sinththan uttidi, «Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Ne tana hayssas gaththanaas ta oonee? Taso asaykka aazee?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU, hayssi ne sinththan guuth gidishin ne gidikko ne ayllezasoy sinththafe hananayssa yootadasa; Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Ne asara gayttiza lose ogey hayssee?" 
2Samuel7:20 «Dawiti nena hayssafe bollara hara ay gaana dandayzee? Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU, ne aylleza ne eraasa." 
2Samuel7:21 Ne qaalaza gishshassinne ne wozina qofa mala ne hayssa gita miish ooththadasa; ne ayllezi erana mala qonccisadasa. 
2Samuel7:22 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU, ne ay mala gitaa! Mulekka nena misatizay oonikka deenna; nuni nu hayththara siyida mala neeppe attiin hara Xoossi deenna." 
2Samuel7:23 «Ba dere gidana mala iza ashshanaas Xoossi izappe sinththara bida derey, ba sunththas ooththana mala kawoteththatanne istta eeqa xoossata ba sinththafe gooddidi gitanne yashissiza malaata ooththidi Gibxeppe wozzi ekkida ne dere Isra7eele malay biitta bolla ooni dizee?" 
2Samuel7:24 Ne dereza Isra7eele mernaas nees buzo dere ooththada minththadasa; GODAWU, ne iza Xoos gidadasa." 
2Samuel7:25 «Ha7ikka GODAA Xoossawu, neni ne ayllezasinne iza keeththaas immida hidotaa mernaas naaga; ne yootida malakka pola;" 
2Samuel7:26 hessa gishshas ne sunththi mernaas gita gidana; asaykka, ‹Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY Isra7eele Xoossaa› gaana. Ne aylle Dawite keeththay ne sinththan mino gidana." 
2Samuel7:27 «Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU, Isra7eele Xoossawu, ‹Ta nees keeth keexxana› gaada hessa taas ne ayllezas qonccisadasa. Hessa gishshas ne ayllezi ha woosayo woossanaas ba wozinan xalides." 
2Samuel7:28 Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Neni Xoossa; ne qaalaykka ammanettidayssa; hayssa lo7o miish ooththanaas neni ne ayllezas hidota immadasa. 
2Samuel7:29 Izi ne sinththan mernaas minni daana mala, ha7ikka ne aylleza keeth anjjarkkii! Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Hayssa nerkka ne yootadasa; ne anjjon ne aylleza keeththi mernaas anjjettana» gides." 
2Samuel8:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Filisxeeme asaa xoonides; ba shene garsan ayssides; Metegi-Aama geetettiza katamayo Filisxeemeta kusheppe woththi ekkides. 
2Samuel8:2 Hessaththoka Dawiti Mo7aabeta xoonides; istta biitta bolla ishisidi wodoron wadhdhi xeellides; wadhdhi xeellidaytappe nam7u kushe gidizayta izi wodhiin issi kushe gidizayti paxa attida; hessa gishshas Mo7aabe asay Dawites haarettidessinne izas giirides. 
2Samuel8:3 Hessafekka hara Dawiti Efiraaxise shaafa matan diza dereza zaari oykkana biidi, Xoobba kawo Erahoobe naa Hadaadi7eezere oli xoonides." 
2Samuel8:4 Dawiti izappe 1,000 para-gaareta, 7,000 toganchchata, 20,000 olanchchata di7ides; 100 para-gaareta xalla ashshidi hankkoyta ubbaa gildayi yeddides." 
2Samuel8:5 Damasqo Aaraamen diza Xoobba kawo Hadaadi7eezere maaddanaas yida wode Dawiti isttafe 22,000 as wodhides." 
2Samuel8:6 Hessafe guye Damasqon diza Aaraamen ba ola asata kambe giigsides. Aaraame asay izas haarettidessinne giirides; GODAY Dawiti bidaso ubbaan izas xoono immides. 
2Samuel8:7 Hadaadi7eezere shuumeti oykkida worqqa gondalleta Dawiti ekkidi Yerusalaame efides. 
2Samuel8:8 Kawo Dawiti Bexahenne Berotaye geetettiza Hadaadi7eezere katamatappe keehippe daro xarqimala denththi efides. 
2Samuel8:9 Hamaate dere kawo Too7uyi Dawiti kumeththa Hadaadi7eezere ola asaa xoonidayssa siyida wode," 
2Samuel8:10 Too7uyi Hadaadi7eezerera ubba wode olettishe diza gishshas sarokanne izi Hadaadi7eezere xoonida xoono qonccisanaas ba naa Iyoraame kawo Dawitekko kiitti yeddides; izikka birappe, worqqafenne xarqimalappe oosettida miishshata ekki yides." 
2Samuel8:11 Kawo Dawiti kase ba giirissida kawotappe gelida biraninne worqqan ooththida mala hayta ha miishshatakka GODAAS dummasides. 
2Samuel8:12 Izas giirida kawoti, Eedoome, Mo7aabe, Amoone asaa, Filisxeeme asaanne Amaaleeqe asaa. Hessaththoka Xoobba kawo Erahoobe naa Hadaadi7eezereppe di7i ekkidayssa GODAAS dummasides." 
2Samuel8:13 Maxine shoobba geetettizason Dawiti Eedoome asaappe 18,000 as wodhi simmidaappe guye iza sunththay keehi nashettides." 
2Samuel8:14 Kumeththa Eedoomen olanchchata kambe giigsides; Eedoome asay ubbay Dawites haarettides; Dawiti bidaso ubbaan GODAY izas xoono immides. 
2Samuel8:15 Dawiti kumeththa Isra7eele bolla kawotides; deraas suure pirdanne woga essides. 
2Samuel8:16 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey olanchchata halaqa; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafe. 
2Samuel8:17 Qasse Ahixuube naa Saadooqeynne Abiyaataare naa Ahimelekey qeese; Sarayay xaafe. 
2Samuel8:18 Yoodahe naa Bannayay Kelite asasinne Pelite asas halaqa; Dawite attuma nayti kawoteththa keeththan zore immizayta. 
2Samuel9:1 Dawiti, «Yoonataane gishshas gaada tani izas kiyateth ooththana mala Sa7oole soo asaappe attida asi dizee?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel9:2 He wode Sa7oole soon Xiibba geetettiza issi aylley dees; izi Dawitekko baana mala izas asay yootides. Kawozikka iza, «Xiibba geetettizay nenee?» gi oychchides. Izikka, «Ee tana ne oosanchchaza» gides." 
2Samuel9:3 Kawozikka, «Xoossa kiyateth ta izas ooththana mala Sa7oole soo asaappe attida asi deennee?» gi oychchides. Xiibbayka kawozas, «Yoonataanes toho silida issi nay dees» gides." 
2Samuel9:4 Kawozikka, «Izi awan dizee?» gi oychchides; Xiibbayka, «Lodibaare geetettizason Am7eele naa Maakireson dees» gi zaarides." 
2Samuel9:5 Hessa gishshas kawo Dawiti Memfeboste Lodibaareppe Am7eele naa Maakire sooppe kiitti ehisides. 
2Samuel9:6 Sa7oole naaza Yoonataane naa Memfebostey Dawitekko yiidi iza bonchchos biitta bolla gufannidi sarokkides. Dawiti iza, «Memfebostee!» gi xeygides. Izikka, «Hekko ne oosanchchazi haan days» gides." 
2Samuel9:7 Dawitikka iza, «Babbofa; ne aawa Yoonataane gishshas gaada tani nees kiyateth ooththana; ne mayza Sa7oole biittaa mulera ta nees zaarana; neni ubba wode ta maaddafe maandasa» gides." 
2Samuel9:8 Memfebostey biitta bolla gufannidi, «Hayqqida kana mala qoodettida taas ne hayssa keena ooththanaas ne oosanchchay ta oonee?» gides." 
2Samuel9:9 Hessafe guye kawozi Sa7oole aylle Xiibba xeygidi, «Sa7oolessinne izaso asaas diza miish ubbaa ne godaa naaza naa Memfebostes immadis." 
2Samuel9:10 Neni, ne naytinne ne oosanchchati intte godaa naaza nay baas demmana mala iza gade izas goyidi kath izas gelththite; ne godaa naaza naa Memfebostey gidikko ay wodekka ta maaddafe maana» gides. He wode Xiibbas 15 attuma naytinne 20 oosanchchati deettes." 
2Samuel9:11 Hessafe guye Xiibbay kawozas, «Ta godaa kawoo! Ne oosanchcha ne azazida ubbaa ne aylley polana» gides. Hessa gishshas Memfebostey kawoza naytappe issaa mala gididi Dawite maaddafe mishe de7ides." 
2Samuel9:12 Memfebostes Mikka geetettiza issi guuththa nay dees; Xiibbaso asay ubbay Memfebostes ooththishe gam7ides. 
2Samuel9:13 Memfebostey ubba wode kawo maaddafe miza gishshas Yerusalaamen de7ides; izas nam7u tohoti sila. 
2Samuel10:1 Hessafe guye Amooneta kawoy hayqqides; iza naa Haanooney izasohon kawotides. 
2Samuel10:2 Dawitikka, «Iza aaway taas kiya ooththidayssaththo tanikka Na7oose naa Haanoones iza kushe zaarana» gi qoppides. Hessa gishshas iza aawa hayqo gishshas mishettidayssa yootana mala Dawiti as kiittides; Dawiti yeddida asati biidi Amoone dere gakkida mala," 
2Samuel10:3 Amoone dere shuumeti ba godaa Haanoone, «Dawiti baas seetettida mishaa qonccisanaas as kiittiday ne aawa bonchchanaas kiittidaa nees misatizee? Izi kiittida asati katamayo paacci xeellanaas, xomosanaassinne dhayssanaas gidennee?» gida." 
2Samuel10:4 Hessa gishshas Haanooney Dawite asata oykkidi issaa issaa buuch baggasi meedides; istti may7ida may7ozakka pude xeessa gaththi qanxxi yeddides. 
2Samuel10:5 Asati keehi yeellatidayssa Dawiti siyida gishshas as isttas kiittides; kawozi, «Intte buuchchay diccanaashe gakkanaas Iyarkkon gam7idi hessafe guye simmi yiite» gides." 
2Samuel10:6 Amoone asay Dawiti istta ixxidayssa eridi Beet-Era7aabeppenne Xoobbafe 20,000 Aaraameppe tohora biza wottadarata hessaththoka kawo Ma7ikay 1,000 asaara qasseka Xoobbafe 12,000 as qaxxarida." 
2Samuel10:7 Dawiti hessa siyidi Iyo7aabe kumeththa ola asaara gaththi yeddides. 
2Samuel10:8 Amoone asay kezidi ba katama geliza penge bolla salfen eqqides; Xoobba asay, Erahoobe asay, hessaththoka Xoobbiya asaynne Ma7ika asay demba bolla dumma salfida." 
2Samuel10:9 Iyo7aabeykka guyeranne sinththara olay bana giddoththidayssa be7idi Isra7eele garsan erettida olanchchatappe guuththata dooridi Aaraame olanchchata sinththan aaththi essides. 
2Samuel10:10 Hankko attida olanchchata ba isha Abisaye istta bolla shuumidi Amoone asaa sinththan essides. 
2Samuel10:11 Iyo7aabeykka, «Aaraame asay ta bolla minniko ne yaada tana maadda; Amoone asay ne bolla minniko ta baada nena maaddana." 
2Samuel10:12 Hessa gishshas minna! Nuni nu derezasinne nu Xoossa katamatas ane minni olettoos; GODAY bana lo7ida mala ooththo» gides. 
2Samuel10:13 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabeynne izara diza ola asay Aaraame asaa olanaas gede sinth hordofides; Aaraame asay istta sinththafe baqatides. 
2Samuel10:14 Aaraame asay baqatidayssa Amoone asay be7idi isttika Abisaye sinththafe baqatidi gede katamay giddo gelida; hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey Amoone asaa olizayssa aggaagidi guye Yerusalaame simmides. 
2Samuel10:15 Aaraame asay Isra7eele asaan xoonettidayssa be7idi qasseka issi bolla shiiqida. 
2Samuel10:16 Hadaadi7eezere asata kiittidi shaafappe he pinththan diza Aaraame asaa ehisides; isttika Hadaadi7eezere ola asaa azaziza Soobake alaafeteththan Elaame bida. 
2Samuel10:17 Dawiti hessa siyidi kumeththa Isra7eele asaa shiishshides; hessafe guye Yordaanoose pinnidi Elaame bides; Aaraame asay olas giigettidi Dawitera tiran gayttides. 
2Samuel10:18 Gido attiin istti Isra7eele sinththafe baqatida; Dawiti isttafe 700 para-gaare asatanne 40,000 tohon biza olanchchata wodhides. Hessaththo istti ola asaa azaziza Soobakekka caddi madunththida gishshas izi heen hayqqides." 
2Samuel10:19 Hadaadi7eezereppe garsara diza kawoti ubbay Isra7eele asaan xoonettidayssa be7idi Isra7eele asaara saroteth medhdhidi isttas haarettida. Hessa gishshas Aaraame asay Amoone asaa maaddanaas babbides. 
2Samuel11:1 Kawoti olas keziza ofinththa aginatan Dawiti Iyo7aabe kawo shuumetaranne kumeththa olanchchatara gaththi olas yeddides; isttika Amoone dere asaa dhayssida; Eraaba katamayo giddoththida; gido attiin he wode Dawiti Yerusalaamen attides. 
2Samuel11:2 Issi gallas bilahe wode Dawiti dhiskofe beeggidi kawo keeththa pooqe bolla kezidi simerettishe issi maccassaya ba bolla meecettishin be7ides; maccassaya keeha mala lo7o. 
2Samuel11:3 Dawiti as kiittidi maccassay gishshas oyshechchides; addezikka, «Hanna Hiite dere as Ooriyo machcho El7aame biyo Bersaabeho gidekkee?» gides." 
2Samuel11:4 Hessafe guye Dawiti as yeddidi izo baakko ehisiin izi dizaso geladus; histtiin izira zin7ides; he wode iza macca naas yiza agina wogappe geeya uttadus. 
2Samuel11:5 Maccassaya qanththatada Dawites, «Ta nees shaaradis» gashe kiita yeddadus." 
2Samuel11:6 Hessafe guye Dawiti Iyo7aabes, «Hiite dere as Ooriyo haa taakko yedda» gi kiittides; Iyo7aabeykka Ooriyo Dawitekko yeddides." 
2Samuel11:7 Ooriyoy Dawitekko yiin Dawiti Iyo7aabenne olanchchata saroteth oychchides; hessaththoka olazi waani olettizaakko iza oychchides. 
2Samuel11:8 Hessafe guye Dawiti Ooriyo, «Ane neni neso baada toho meecetta» gides; Ooriyoy kawo keeththafe moyzetti bides; kawozi mogota kath geedora izas yeddides." 
2Samuel11:9 Gido attiin Ooriyoy ba godaa oosanchchata ubbaara kawo keeththa gibbe penge bolla ichchides attiin baso bibeenna. 
2Samuel11:10 Dawiti, «Ooriyoy baso bibeenna» gizayssa siyida mala Ooriyo, «Ne buro ogeppe gelo bolla daasa diikkii? Neso ays babeekkii?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel11:11 Ooriyoykka Dawites, «Taabotay, Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay dunkaanen dishin, ta godaa Iyo7aabeynne ta godaa asay coo demba bolla dishin tani maanaassinne uyanaas qasseka ta machcheyra aqanaas waana taso boo? Intte asho! Ta hayssa mala ooththike» gides." 
2Samuel11:12 Dawitikka izas, «Ero, ne hach hayssan aqikko wonto ta nena moyzana» gides. Hessa gishshas Ooriyoy he gallassinne wonteththa gallas Yerusalaamen takkides." 
2Samuel11:13 Wonteththa gallas Dawiti ba dizason izas gibira giigsidi mizi, ushshi kalssidi iza maththosides; gadey qammishin Ooriyoy gaden ongetti diza hiixan ichchanaas iza godaa aylleti dizaso bides attiin baso bibeenna." 
2Samuel11:14 Gadey wontishin Dawiti Iyo7aabes dabdaabbe xaafidi Ooriyo bolla yeddides. 
2Samuel11:15 Dabdaabezan, «Ooriyo olay minnizason essa; heen izi cadetti hayqqana mala aggaagidi baqatite» gi xaafides." 
2Samuel11:16 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey katamayo giddoththida wode keehi eqettiza olanchchati diza miixan Ooriyo essides. 
2Samuel11:17 Katamayin diza asay kezidi Iyo7aabera ola danxxides; Dawite olanchchatappe guuththati kundida; hessaththoka Hiite dere as Ooriyoy hayqqides. 
2Samuel11:18 Iyo7aabey olason hanida ubbaa Dawites kiitti yeddides. 
2Samuel11:19 Kiitetti bizayssas, «Hayssa olaa hanotaa ne kawozas yootidaappe guye," 
2Samuel11:20 Kawozi ne bolla hanqettidi, ‹Intte olettanaas ays hessa mala katamaykko keehi shiiqidetii? Gimbeza kaarara intte bolla wondafe dukkanayssa erekketii?" 
2Samuel11:21 Yerubesheete naa Abimelekke issi maccassaya Teebeesen gimbeza kaarara woxa mayde yeddada wodhabeekkee? Histtiin intte ays hessa keena gede gimbezaakko shiiqidetii?› gi oychchiko nenikka izas zaarada, ‹Hiite dere as ne oosanchcha Ooriyoy hayqqides› gaada yoota» gides." 
2Samuel11:22 Hessa gishshas kiitettida addezi dendi bides; hee bi gakkida mala Iyo7aabey yeddida kiita ubbaa Dawites yeddides. 
2Samuel11:23 Kiitetti bidayssi Dawites, «Asati nu bolla wolqqamidi nuna olanaas demba gakkanaas yida; gido attiin nuni istta katamay penge gakkanaas gooddidos." 
2Samuel11:24 Hessafe guye wondafe dukkiza asati gimbeza bolla uttidi ne aylleta gidida nu bolla wondafe dukkida; kawoza oosanchchatappe guuththata wodhida; ne oosanchcha Hiite dere as Ooriyoykka hayqqides» gides. 
2Samuel11:25 Dawiti kiitetti yidayssas, «Neni Iyo7aabes, ‹Ay wode gidiinkka mashshay issito hessafe woykko hayssafe mees; hessa gishshas hayssa ha hanozan kayottofa; katamayo ola oykkanaassinne dhayssanaas minna› gaada minththeththa» gides." 
2Samuel11:26 Ooriyo machcheya izi azinay hayqqidayssa siyada keeha mishettada izas yeekkadus. 
2Samuel11:27 Kayoteththa wodey aadhdhidaappe guye Dawiti kiitti ehisidi izo baas machcho ekkides; iza Dawites attuma naa yeladus; gido attiin Dawiti ooththida oosoy GODAA ufayssibeenna. 
2Samuel12:1 GODAY nabe Naataane Dawitekko kiittides; izikka Dawitekko biidi, «Issi kataman nam7u asati deettes; isttafe issoy dure; hankkoyssi manqo." 
2Samuel12:2 Durezas keehi daro dorsatinne miizati deettes. 
2Samuel12:3 Gido attiin manqozas izi shammida dorsa laaqqa issineyppe attiin haray deenna; izi izo ba naytara al7isi dichchides; izara issife mawus; issife uyawus; iza ki7on ichchawus; iza izas yelo mala. 
2Samuel12:4 «Issi gallas durezaso imaththi yides; dure addezi ba dorsatappe woykko miizatappe ekkidi he imaththazas miza kath giigsana koyibeenna; gido attiin manqoza laaqqayo efidi baso yida imaththazas kaththi giigsides» gides. 
2Samuel12:5 Dawiti hessa ooththidayssa bolla keehi hanqettidi Naataanes, «De7o GODAY be7iin hayssa ooththidaades hayqoy bessees!" 
2Samuel12:6 Izi hayssa mala ooso ooththida gishshassinne qadhetay baynda gishshas he laaqqay gishshas oyddu kushe qanxxana bessees» gides. 
2Samuel12:7 Hessafe guye Naataaney Dawites zaaridi, «He bitanezi nena! GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nena, ‹Neni Isra7eele bolla kawo gidana mala ta nena tiyadis; Sa7oole kusheppeka nena ashshadis." 
2Samuel12:8 Ne godaa keeththaa ta nees immadis; ta ne godaa machchetakka ne shophpha gars gelththadis; Isra7eele keeththaanne Yuhuda keeththaa ta nees immadis; hayti ubbay nees guuxxidaakko ta nees heytappe bollara gujjanakkoshin. 
2Samuel12:9 Histtiin iza sinththan iita miish ooththada GODAA qaala ays kawushshadii? Hiite dere as Ooriyo mashshan siifadasa; iza machcheyo nees ekkadasa; izakka Amooneta mashshan wodhisadasa. 
2Samuel12:10 Neni tana kawushshida gishshassinne Hiite dere as Ooriyo machcho nees ekkida gishshas ne keeththafe mernaas mashshay shaakettenna› gees. 
2Samuel12:11 «GODAY nena, ‹Be7a ne keeththafe ne bolla iita miish ta denththana; ne ayfey be7ishin ne machcheta ekkada nees mata gidida issaades ta aaththa immana; izikka seeta gallas ne machchetara zin7ana." 
2Samuel12:12 Neni kase hayssa geeman ooththadasa; tani gidikko Isra7eele ubbaa sinththan gallas poo7oy dishin qonccisana› gees» gides. 
2Samuel12:13 Hessafe guye Dawiti Naataanes, «Tani GODAA keeha qohadis» gides; Naataaney izas zaaridi, «GODAY ne nagara wursida gishshas ne hayqqaka;" 
2Samuel12:14 Gido attiin ne hayssa ooththiin morkketi GODAA keehi kawushshana mala ne ooththida gishshas nees yelettida naazi hayqqana» gides. 
2Samuel12:15 Naataaney baso simmi bidaappe guye Ooriyo machcheya Dawites yelida naaza bolla GODAY iita harge yeggides. 
2Samuel12:16 Dawiti ba naaza gishshas Xoossaa woossidessinne xoomides. Hessafe guye gede ba kifile gelidi omars omars qanxxontta sa7a bolla ichchi aqides. 
2Samuel12:17 Iza kawoteththa keeththa cimati iza sa7appe denththanaas iza matan eqqida; izi gidikko dendontta ixxides; istti mishin aykkoka mibeenna. 
2Samuel12:18 Laappunththa gallas naazi hayqqides; Dawite oosanchchati, «Naazi paxa dishin nu yootiin nu gizaa siyibeenna; histtiin nu ha7i naaza hayqo izas wostti yootana dandayzonii? Izi barkka ba bolla qoho gaththana dandayees» gi qoppidi yootanaas babbida." 
2Samuel12:19 Iza oosanchchati garsara saasuketti haasayzayssa Dawiti be7idi naazi hayqqidayssa erides; hessa gishshas, «Naazi hayqqidee?» giidi istta oychchides. Isttika izas, «Ee hayqqides» gida." 
2Samuel12:20 He wode Dawiti sa7a bollafe dendidi, meecettidi, gorpettidinne may7o laammidaappe guye GODAA keeth bi goynnides. Hessafe guye izi ba kifile gelides; baas quma immana mala izi oychchiin immida quma mides." 
2Samuel12:21 Iza oosanchchati iza, «Hayssaththo ays ooththadii? Naazi shemppora paxa dishin xoomadasanne yeekkadasa; gido attiin naazi hayqqidaappe guye ne dendada kath madasa» gida." 
2Samuel12:22 Dawiti isttas, «Ee tuma, naazi shemppora paxa diza wode, ‹GODAY taas atto giidi naaza shemppora paxa woththanaakkon gaada xoomadissinne yeekkadis.›" 
2Samuel12:23 Ha7i gidikko naazi hayqqiin ta aazas xoomoo? Ta iza haa zaaranaas dandayazinaa? Ta izakko baana attiin izi haa taakko simmenna!» gides. 
2Samuel12:24 Hessafe guye Dawiti ba machcheyo Bersaabeho minththeththides; izikko gelidi izira aqides; izakka izas attuma naa yeladus; naaza, «Solomoone» gi sunththides; GODAYKKA iza dosides;" 
2Samuel12:25 GODAY naaza dosida gishshas iza sunththi Yididiya geetetti xeygettana mala nabe Naataane baggara qaala kiittides. 
2Samuel12:26 He wode Iyo7aabey Amooneta katama Eraaba olidi kawoteththa keeththaa miixa oykkides. 
2Samuel12:27 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Dawitekko as kiitti yeddidi, «Tani Eraaba olada haaththi diza katamayo oykkadis;" 
2Samuel12:28 Ha7i neni attida olanchchata shiishsha ekkada katamayo giddoththa oykka; ne histtontta aggiko katamayo ta oykkiko iza ta sunththan xeygettana» gides. 
2Samuel12:29 Hessa gishshas Dawiti kumeththa olanchchata shiishshi ekki biidi Eraaba oli oykkides. 
2Samuel12:30 Istta kawoza kallachchaa iza hu7eppe ekkides; he kallachchazi issi meklite worqqa gidishin bonchchettida inqqun aleqettides; Dawiti he kallachchaza ba hu7en goxxides; Dawiti katamayppe keehi daro miish di7i ekkides. 
2Samuel12:31 Heen diza deraa kessidi istta magaazen, xoylleninne kalttan go7ettidi ooso ooththana mala wolqqaththi oosisides; hessaththoka xuube medhissides. Hessa mala oosoy hara Amooneta katamata ubbaan oosettana mala ooththides. Hessafe guye Dawitinne iza olanchchati ubbay Yerusalaame simmida." 
2Samuel13:1 Dawite naa Abeseloomes Ti7imaaro geetettiza mala lo7o michcha dawus; Dawite naa Aminooney izo dosides. 
2Samuel13:2 Aminooney ba michcho Ti7imaaro dosida gaason sakettanaashe gakkanaas ceecides; iza geela7o gidida gishshas izi izira aqana dandaybeenna. 
2Samuel13:3 Aminoones Iyoonadaabe geetettiza laggey dees; izi Dawite isha Shame7e naa; Iyoonadaabey keehi gene asa. 
2Samuel13:4 Izi Aminoone, «Ne gilqa gilqa aqiza gaasoykka aazakkon taas ays yootikkii!» gi oychchides. Aminooney, «Ta isha Abeseloome michcho Ti7imaaro dosida gishshas gilqadis» gides." 
2Samuel13:5 Iyoonadaabeykka izas, «Histtiko neni, ‹Tani sakettadis› gaada hiixan keza ichcha; ne aaway nena oychchana yishin, ‹Ta michcho Ti7imaara yaada taas miza miish giigsa immidaakko tana lo7ees; kaththaaka hayssan ta xeellishin giigsada ba kushera iza tana barsana mala azazarkkii!› gaada iza oychcha» gides." 
2Samuel13:6 Histtiin Aminooney sakettida as misatidi ichchides; kawozi iza oychchana yiin Aminooney iza, «Ta michcho Ti7imaara yaada ta be7ishin sollo uukkada ba kushera tana barsana mala ta nena woossays» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel13:7 Dawiti, «Ne isha Aminooneso baada izas maana kath giigsa» giidi Ti7imaaris yootana mala kawo keeth kiittides." 
2Samuel13:8 Hessa gishshas Ti7imaara izi isha Aminooney ichchi dizaso badus; guuththa bukeeso ekkada munuqidaappe guye izi be7ishin giigsada uukkadus. 
2Samuel13:9 Hessafe guye basheza kessada solloza izas shiishshadus; gido attiin izi maana koyibeenna. Aminooney, «Ubba asaa hayssafe kessite» gides; diza asay ubbayka iza yeggi kezides." 
2Samuel13:10 Hessafe guye Aminooney Ti7imaaro, «Tana barsana mala kaththaa haa ta ichchida kifile ekka ya» gides; Ti7imaara ba giigsida qumaa ekkada ba isha Aminooney ichchida kifile geladus." 
2Samuel13:11 Gido attiin iza qumaa izas shiishshiin izi izo curpu histti oykkidi, «Ta michcheyee! Ane issife zin7oos» gides." 
2Samuel13:12 Izakka zaarada izas, «Ta ishazoo ta nena shoobbis, agga; hessi hanenna; tana wolqqara oykkofa; hayssa mala miishshi Isra7eelen oosetti erenna; hayssa yeellachchiza ooso ooththofa." 
2Samuel13:13 Ta hayssafe guye waananee? Ta kawushshateththaa tookkada ta awa gelanee? Nenikka Isra7eelen kawushsha asatappe issaa mala qoodettana gidikkii? Dicca zay kawozas yoota; izi ta nena gelontta mala diggenna» gadus. 
2Samuel13:14 Izi gidikko iza gizayssa siyana koyibeenna; izi izippe keehi mino gidida gishshas izo wolqqara oykkidi izi geela7oteththaa ekkides. 
2Samuel13:15 Hessafe guye Aminooney izo keehi ixxides; ubbaaka kase izo siiqoorippe bollara ixxides. Aminooney, «Kichcha ta achchafe keza!» gides." 
2Samuel13:16 Izakka, «Hessi hanenna! Neni tana kessa yedoy kase ne ta bolla gaththida qohozappe aaththada tana qohaasa!» gadus; izi gidikko iza gizayssa ekkibeenna." 
2Samuel13:17 Izi ba aylleza xeygidi, «Hanno maccassayo kessada karaa gorda» gides." 
2Samuel13:18 Hessa gishshas iza gelontta mala kareza gordides; he wode geela7o gidida kawo nayti may7iza alleqo may7o may7a uttadus. 
2Samuel13:19 Ti7imaara ba hu7en bidinth laalladus; alleqo may7ozakka daakkadus; hessafe guye ba hu7e baqqa oykkada yeekkashe badus. 
2Samuel13:20 Izi isha Abeseloomey izo, «Hessi ne isha Aminooney nenara takkidee? Ta michcheye ane ha7i co7u ga; izi ne isha gidida gishshas ne ceecoppa» gides. Ti7imaara ba isha Abeseloomeson sayo gida uttadus." 
2Samuel13:21 Kawo Dawiti he hanoza siyidi keehi hanqettides; 
2Samuel13:22 Abeseloomey Aminoone bolla iita gidiin lo7o gidiin issi qaalakka phoqqibeenna; gaasoykka Aminooney iza michcho Ti7imaaro kawushshida gishshas keehi ixxides. 
2Samuel13:23 Nam7u layththafe guye Abeseloomey Efreeme dhassa matan diza Ba7aali-Haxoore kataman ba dorsata iske qanxxishe heen kawo attuma nayti beettana mala xeygides. 
2Samuel13:24 Abeseloomey kawozaakko biidi, «Hekko ne aylley ba dorsata iske qanxxishe dees; hessa gishshas kawozinne iza shuumeti isttas lo7o shene gidikko taas heen beettetto» gi shoobbides." 
2Samuel13:25 Kawozikka, «Ta naazoo! Nu ubbay baanaas bessenna; nu nees tooho gidana» gides. Abeseloomey minththi woossiinkka kawozi baana koyibeenna; gido attiin iza anjjidi moyzi yeddides." 
2Samuel13:26 Abeseloomey, «Histtiko ta isha Aminooney nunara baana mala azaza» gides. Kawozi, «Izi inttenara ays baanee?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel13:27 Gido attiin Abeseloomey iza minththi woossida gishshas Dawiti Aminooneynne hankko attuma nayti ubbay izara issife baana mala ooththides. 
2Samuel13:28 Abeseloomey ba aylletas, «Aminooney woyne ushshaa uyidi maththottanaashe gakkanaas naagettite; hessafe guye tani inttena, ‹Aminoone shocite› giza wode intte iza wodhite; inttena azaziday tana gidida gishshas babbofte, minnite, xalite» gi azazides." 
2Samuel13:29 Abeseloome aylleti istta goday istta azazidayssa Aminoone bolla polida; hessafe guye kawoza nayti ubbay ba baqulo baqulo toggidi baqatida. 
2Samuel13:30 Istti buro oge bolla dishin, «Abeseloomey kawoza nayta ubbaa wodhi wursides; issaadeyka attibeenna» giza worey Dawitekko gakkides." 
2Samuel13:31 Kawozi dendi eqqidi ba may7o daakkides; biitta bolla gufannides; iza matan eqqi diza iza aylleti ubbay bantta may7o daakkida. 
2Samuel13:32 Gido attiin Dawite isha Shame7e naa Iyoonadaabey, «Kawo nayta ubbaa wodhi wursidaa misatissidi ta goday qoppofo; iza michcho Ti7imaaro wolqqanththi oykkida wodeppe doommidi Abeseloomey gixxi dendida yo7o gidida gishshas Aminooney xalla hayqqides." 
2Samuel13:33 Hayqqiday Aminoone xalla gidida gishshas, ‹Kawo nayti ubbay hayqqida› geetettidayssa kawoy ta goday ammananaas bessenna» gides." 
2Samuel13:34 Abeseloomey eeson baqatides. Zabe naagizayssi dhoqqu gi xeellishin izappe arshey wulliza baggara diza ogera daro asati zumaa millera duge wodhdhishin be7ides. Zabe naagizayssi biidi kawozas, «Horonaye baggara zumbullata tiixara asay duge bishin ta be7ays» gi yootides." 
2Samuel13:35 Iyoonadaabey Dawites, «Be7a kawo nayti yida; kase ne aylley gidayssa mala hanides» gides." 
2Samuel13:36 Izi buro yooti wursontta dishin kawoza nayti waassishenne yeekkishe gelida; hessaththoka kawozinne iza oosanchchati ubbay keehippe yeekkida. 
2Samuel13:37 Abeseloomey gangidi Geeshure kawo Amihuude naa Talimayekko bides; gido attiin Dawiti hayqqida naaza gishshas ubba wode yeekkishe gam7ides. 
2Samuel13:38 Abeseloomey gangidi Geeshure biidi heen 3 layth uttides. 
2Samuel13:39 Kawo Dawiti ba naa Aminoone hayqon gakkida kayoteththaafe minettidaappe guye Abeseloomekko baana iza wozinay dendides. 
2Samuel14:1 Kawo Dawiti Abeseloome laamotidayssa Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey erides. 
2Samuel14:2 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey issi as Tequhe kiittidi issi wozinama maccas ehisides; izo, «Neni kayottiza as misatanaas kayo may7o may7a; qibaate tiyettofa; hayqqida asas daro wode kayottashe diza maccas misata beetta." 
2Samuel14:3 Hessafe guye kawozaakko baada ta nees yootizayssa izas yoota» giidi iza yootana qaalata Iyo7aabey izis yootides. 
2Samuel14:4 Tequhe dere maccassaya kawozaakko geladus; sinththa guth gufannada bonchcho saroka immidaappe guye, «Kawonttoo tana maaddite!» gadus." 
2Samuel14:5 Kawozikka izo, «Nena aazee metiday?» gi oychchides. Izakka zaarada, «Tani tumappe azinay hayqqida am7o." 
2Samuel14:6 Taas ne aylleys nam7u attuma nayti deettes; nam7ati ba garsan issoy issaara demban ooyettida; istta ashechchizay baynda gishshas issoy hankkoyssa shoci wodhides. 
2Samuel14:7 Histtiin dabboti ubbay ne aylley bolla dendidi, ‹Ba ishaa wodhidayssa nuus haa aaththa imma; izi ba ishaa wodhida gishshas nunikka iza wodhana; hessafe guye neni laatay bayndaaro gidana› geettes; hessa gishshas taas attida issi xomppeza dhayssidi ta azinaza biitta bolla sunththi bayndanne zarey baynda dhonth kessana haneettes» gadus." 
2Samuel14:8 Kawozikka maccassayo, «Neni simma neso ba; ta ne oysha gishshas bessiza azazo immana» gides." 
2Samuel14:9 Gido attiin Tequhe dere maccassaya, «Ta godaa kawoo! Qohozi ta bollanne ta aawa keeththan gakko; kawoynne iza araatay qohoppe geeyidayta gidetto» gadus." 
2Samuel14:10 Kawozikka izis, «Oonikka ne bolla issi miish haasayzaa gidikko haa taakko ekka ya; zaari nena waayisenna» gides." 
2Samuel14:11 Iza, «Suuth accizayti ta naaza wodhidi kaseppe aadhdhiza qoho gaththontta mala kawoy GODAA ba Xoossaa woosso» gadus. Kawozikka izis, «GODAY be7iin, ne naaza hu7e iskefe issinakka boshettuku» gi caaqqides." 
2Samuel14:12 Hessafe guye maccassaya, «Ta ne aylleya ta godaas kawos issi qaala yootana mala ero garkkii!» gadus; izikka, «Ero yoota» gides." 
2Samuel14:13 Maccassaya zaarada izas, «Neni hayssa mala yo7o Xoossa deraa bolla aazas qoppadii? Kawozi dereppe goodetti bete bida ba naaza zaaribeenna; histtiin hessa izi yootishe barkka ba bolla pirdibeennee?" 
2Samuel14:14 Biittan gukkida haaththi simmonttayssaththo nuni ubbayka hayqqoos; Xoossi biittafe goodettida asi iza sinththafe baqati bidason attontta mala simmi yaana oge izas giigssees attiin iza shemppoy dhayana mala koyenna. 
2Samuel14:15 «Ha7ikka ta hayssa yiday derezi tana babisida gishshas hessa ta godaas kawos yootanaassa; ta ne aylleya, ‹Ta kawozas yootana; izikka ta oychchidayssa polanaas dandayzaa gidana." 
2Samuel14:16 Xoossi nuus immida xinxxofe tananne ta naaza shoddanaas dendida addeza kusheppe kawozi ba oosanchchayo ashshanaas eeno gaana› ga qoppadis. 
2Samuel14:17 «Ha7ikka ta ne aylleya, ‹Kawoy ta godazi lo7o iitappe shaakki eron Xoossa kiitanchcha mala gidida gishshas ta godaa kawoza qaalay tana minththeththo; GODAA ne Xoossay nenara gido› gays» gadus." 
2Samuel14:18 Hessafe guye kawozi maccassayo, «Tanikka nena oychchiza oyshatas zaaro taappe qottofa» gides. Maccassayakka, «Ero, ta goday Kawoy oychcha» gadus." 
2Samuel14:19 Kawozikka zaaridi izo, «Ha ubbaan Iyo7aabe kushey deennee?» gi oychchides. Maccassaya zaarada, «Ta godaa kawozo ne asho; ta godaa kawoy haasayda ubbaafe hadirsinne ushach gizay deenna; ee ta hayssa ubbaa haasayana mala tana azazidaynne ha ubbaa qaalay ne aylley doonan haasayettana mala tana kiittiday ne oosanchcha Iyo7aabe." 
2Samuel14:20 Ne oosanchcha Iyo7aabey hayssa ooththiday diza hanotaa laammana koyida gishshassa; gido attiin ta godaas Xoossa kiitanchchatas diza aadho erateththi diza gishshas biittay bolla haniza miish ubbaa izi erees» gadus. 
2Samuel14:21 Kawozikka Iyo7aabes, «Ero lo7o; ero; baada naateththaza Abeseloome zaara ekka ya» gides." 
2Samuel14:22 Iyo7aabeykka bonchcho saroka kawozas qonccisanaas duge biitta bolla gufannidi sarokkides; kawoza anjjides; kaaleththidi Iyo7aabey, «Kawozi ba oosanchchaza woosaa ekkida gishshas ne aylley ne sinththan teema demmidayssa hach erides» gides." 
2Samuel14:23 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Geeshure biidi Abeseloome Yerusalaame zaari ehides. 
2Samuel14:24 Kawoy gidikko, «Baso bo; izi ta ayfeso be7anaas dandayenna» gides; hessa gishshas Abeseloomey baso bides; kawoza ayfesokka be7ibeenna." 
2Samuel14:25 Abeseloome mala, mala lo7oy kumeththa Isra7eele asaa garsankka deenna; izas hu7e binanappe biidi toho xugunth gakkanaas borey deenna." 
2Samuel14:26 Hu7e iskey iza deexxishin layththan issito cakisees; cakettida binanazi kawo keeththa meezaanen woththishin 200 saqile deexxees. 
2Samuel14:27 Abeseloomes Ti7imaaro geetettiza issi macca naynne heedzdzu attuma nayti yelettida. Macca naya keeha mala lo7o. 
2Samuel14:28 Abeseloomey kawoza be7ontta Yerusalaamen nam7u layth uttides. 
2Samuel14:29 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey kawozaakko baana mala Abeseloomey xeygisides; Iyo7aabey gidikko izakko yaana koyibeenna; nam7anththoka zaaridi xeygisides; Iyo7aabey yaana koyibeenna. 
2Samuel14:30 Histtiin Abeseloomey ba aylletas, «Be7ite; Iyo7aabe gadey ta gadera dhassa; iza gaden maxa gakkida banggay dees; biidi izan tama yeddite» gides; hessa gishshas Abeseloome aylleti biidi Iyo7aabe kaththaa taman xuuggida." 
2Samuel14:31 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Abeseloomeso biidi, «Ne aylleti ays ta kaththaa taman xuuggidoo?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel14:32 Abeseloomey Iyo7aabes zaaridi, «Tani kiittiin neni yontta ixxida gishshassa; Hanno gakkanaas ta heen dizaakko taas lo7o gidana gides gaada ne kawos yootana mala, ‹Ta nena kawozaakko yeddana koyada nena haa ya› gaada xeygisadis; ha7i gidikko ta kawoza ayfeso be7ana koyays; ay mooroy ta bolla beettiko izi tana wodho» gides." 
2Samuel14:33 Iyo7aabey kawozaakko biidi hessa izas yootides; hessafe guye kawozi Abeseloome xeygisides; izikka yiidi kawoza sinththan gufannidi sarokkides; kawozikka Abeseloome yeeri ekkides. 
2Samuel15:1 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey para-gaarenne parata, hessaththoka izappe sinththara woxxanaas 50 asata baas giigsides." 
2Samuel15:2 Abeseloomey maalado wonttara dendidi katama penge gelththiza oge gaxan eqqi naagees. Ay asikka ba misha kawos magannidi pirdisana yiza wode ubbaan Abeseloomey izaade baakko xeygi xeygidi, «Ne awa katamappe yadii?» gi oychchees; he oyshettida addezikka, «Ta ne oosanchchay Isra7eele qommota garsafe issaafe yadis» gi zaarees." 
2Samuel15:3 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey izas, «Be7a! Ne maganazi likkenne bessizaaza; gido attiin kawo wokkaletappe hayssa xeellana asi nees deenna» gees." 
2Samuel15:4 Kaaleththidikka, «Tani hanno biittay bolla pirdiza daanna gida shuumettidaakko aazee dizay? Maganay woykko mootoy diza asi ubbay taakko yiidi suure pirda demmana mala ta ooththanakkoshin» gees." 
2Samuel15:5 Hessaththoka ay asikka izakko shiiqidi sarokkiza wode Abeseloomey ba kushen idimmi oykkidi yeerees. 
2Samuel15:6 Kawozaakko suure pirda demmanaas yiza Isra7eele asa ubbaakko Abeseloomey hessaththo hani hani shiiqiza gishshas Isra7eele asaa wozina ekkides. 
2Samuel15:7 Oyddu layththafe guye Abeseloomey kawoza, «Tani adinettida adina gaththanaas Kebroone baanaas taas piqaade imma." 
2Samuel15:8 Tani ne oosanchchay Aaraame deren Geeshuren dashe, ‹GODAY tana Yerusalaame zaarizaa gidikko GODAAS Kebroonen goynnana› ga adinettadis» gides." 
2Samuel15:9 Kawozi iza, «Saron ba» gides; hessa gishshas Abeseloomey Kebroone bides." 
2Samuel15:10 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey, «Intte zaye giiris siyiza wode, ‹Abeseloomey Kebroonen kawotides› giite gaana oosanchchata kumeththa Isra7eele qommota ubbaa giddon qotara woththides» gides." 
2Samuel15:11 Yerusalaameppe 200 asati izara issife bida; istti imaththateth xeygettidi ashketeththan bida attiin istti yo7oza gishshas aykkoka eriza miishshi deenna. 
2Samuel15:12 Abeseloomey yarshoza shiishshiza wode Dawite zoriza Gilo dere as Akxofeele ba biitta Giloppe izakko yaana mala kiittides; hessa gishshas seerazi minnides; Abeseloome kaallizayta qooday gujetti gujetti bides. 
2Samuel15:13 Kiitettizayssi yiidi, «Isra7eele asaa wozinay Abeseloomera dees» giidi Dawites yootides." 
2Samuel15:14 Hessafe guye Dawiti ba shuume ubbatas, «Dendite; ane baqatoos; nu histtontta aggiko nuuppe issaadeyka Abeseloome kusheppe kessi ekki attenna; ha7ira nu hayssafe kezana bessees; nu histtontta aggiko kaaletti yiidi nuna oykkiko izi nuna dhayssana; katamayokka mashshan siifana» gides." 
2Samuel15:15 Kawoza shuumetikka, «Nu kawoy koyidayssa ubbaa ooththanaas nuni ne oosanchchati giigetti uttidos» gi zaarida." 
2Samuel15:16 Kawozi baso asaa kumeththaara kezi bides; kawoteththa keeththaa naagana mala 10 laggeththota woththides. 
2Samuel15:17 Hessa gishshas kawoy kumeththa asaara haakki bidaappe guye heen issison eqqida. 
2Samuel15:18 Asay ubbay Kelitetinne Peliteti hessaththoka Geeteppe izara yida 600 asata gujjiin salfidi kawoza sinth aadhdhida. 
2Samuel15:19 Kawozi Geete dere as Ittayey, «Ne nunara ays yadii? Simmada kawo Abeseloomera issife utta; neni ne hu7es ne biittafe di7etta yida imaththa." 
2Samuel15:20 Neni ha7i zine yadasa; histtiin ta taas awa bizaakko erontta dashe ne nunara toylattana mala ays ooththoo? Ane ha7i neni ne asata ekkada guye simma; lo7eteththinne ammaneteththay nenara gido» gides. 
2Samuel15:21 Gido attiin Ittayey, «De7o GODAY be7iin, hessaththoka ta godaa kawo asho; de7o gidiin hayqo gidiin awankka ta godaa kawoy hanizayssa tani ne ayllezi hanana» gi zaarides." 
2Samuel15:22 Dawitikka Ittaye, «Histtiko sinth aadhdha ba» gides; hessa gishshas Geete dere as Ittayey ba asatanne banara diza baso asata ekki bides." 
2Samuel15:23 Derey ubbay aadhdhi biza wode he dere asay waassishe yeekkides; kawozi Qediroone zulleza pinnides; asay ubbay pinnidi bazzo biitta bides. 
2Samuel15:24 Saadooqeykka heen dees; izara issife diza Leweti ubbay Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida; isttika zaaridi Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza woththida; Abiyaataarey asay kumeth katamayo yeddi kezanaashe gakkanaas yarsho shiishshides. 
2Samuel15:25 Hessafe guye kawozi Saadooqe, «Neni Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza ekkada guye katamayo simma. Tani GODAA sinththan ayottidaa gidikko izi tana zaaridi Taabotazanne iza aqosoza ta be7ana mala gaththana." 
2Samuel15:26 Gido attiin izi, ‹Ta nenan ufayettabeekke› gizaa gidikko baas lo7o misati beettidayssa ta bolla ooththo; tani ekkanaas giigetta uttadis» gides." 
2Samuel15:27 Qasseka kawozi qeese Saadooqe, «Neni nabe gidikkii? Histtiko neni ne naa Akimaasenne Abiyaataare naa Yoonataane nenara ekkada saron guye katamayo simma; neninne Abiyaataarey nam7ati intte nayta ekkidi biite." 
2Samuel15:28 Taikka neeppe wore siyana gakkanaas bazzon diza shaafaa pinnizason naagana» gides. 
2Samuel15:29 Hessa gishshas Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa guye Yerusalaame zaaridi heen takkida. 
2Samuel15:30 Gido attiin Dawiti yeekkishe pude Dabrazayte zuma pudunththaa kezides; ba hu7e gullunttidi mela tohora dees; izara issife diza asay ubbay izayssaththo bantta hu7e gullunttidi yeekkishe pudunththaa kezeettes. 
2Samuel15:31 He wode, «Seeraa giddon Abeseloomera dizay Akxofeele» gi Dawites yootida; hessa gishshas Dawiti, «Abeet GODAWU! Akxofeele zoreza hada histtarkkii» gi woossides." 
2Samuel15:32 Dawiti derey Xoossa goynnizasoho pude zumaa kaara gakkishin Arkke dere as Hushey ba may7o daakkidi ba hu7e bolla gudulla laallidi izara gayttanaas yides. 
2Samuel15:33 Hessafe guye Dawiti iza, «Neni tanara issife biikko taas tooho gidana;" 
2Samuel15:34 gido attiin neni guye katamayo simmada Abeseloomes, ‹Ta ne aylle gidana; kase tani ne aawaas aylle gidida mala hachchika ta nees haggazana› gaada Akxofeele zore ne laallada tana maaddana." 
2Samuel15:35 Qeeseti Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey heen nenara daana deettennee? Kawo keeththafe ne siyidayssa ubbaa isttas yoota. 
2Samuel15:36 Saadooqe naa Akimaasinne Abiyaataare naa Yoonataaney nam7u attuma nayti heen isttara deettes. Ne siyiza ubbaa taas istta bolla kiita yedda» gides. 
2Samuel15:37 Hessa gishshas Dawites siiqo lagge Hushey Abeseloomey Yerusalaame gelida mala hee gakkides. 
2Samuel16:1 Dawiti zumaappe guuth aadhdhi bida mala Xiibba geetettiza Memfeboste oosanchchay 200 sollo, zabibeppe uukettida qeeri uketh xeetata, balaseppe uukettida 100 qeeri ukeththinne issi lukkamo kumeth woyne ushshi caanettida nam7u hareta laaggi ekkidi izara gayttana yides." 
2Samuel16:2 Dawiti Xiibba, «Hayssa ubbaa aazas ehadii?» gi oychchides. Xiibbayka, «Hareta kawo keeththa asati toggana mala, sollozanne ukeththata naateththati maana mala, woyne ushshaza bazzon daaburda asay uyana mala ehadis» gides." 
2Samuel16:3 Hessafe guye kawozi, «Ne godaa naazi awanee?» gi oychchides. Xiibbay zaaridi, «Izi, ‹Isra7eele asay hach ta aawa kawoteth taas zaarana› gi qoppida gishshas ha7i Yerusalaamen uttides» gides." 
2Samuel16:4 Hessafe guye kawozi Xiibbas, «Kase Memfebostes dizay ubbay hayssafe guye neessa» gides; Xiibbay, «Daro ashketeththan sinththa guth gufannada ta nees kushe denththana; kawo ta godawu ne sinththan taas ayoteththi beetto» gides." 
2Samuel16:5 Kawo Dawiti Bahirime gakkishin Sa7oole keeththa asaa qommofe issaadey puttu gides; izikka Geera naa Shim7e; izi doqqishe kezides. 
2Samuel16:6 Kawoza wottadaratinne kawo bonchcho naagiza zabeti ubbay Dawiteppe hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara dishinkka Dawite bollanne iza shuumeta bolla shuch caddides. 
2Samuel16:7 Shim7ey iza doqqishe, «Keza! Hayssafe keza! Haysso shemppo wodhidayssoo! Haysso iitazoo!" 
2Samuel16:8 Izappe ne kawoteththaa woththa ekkida Sa7oole keeththa asaa ubbaa suuththaa GODAY ne bolla zaarishe dees. GODAY ne kawoteththaa ne naa Abeseloomes aaththi immides; neni shemppo wodhida as gidida gishshas beya ne bolla metoy yides» gides. 
2Samuel16:9 Hessafe guye Xuriya naa Abisayey kawozas, «Hayssi hayqeththa kanay, kawoza ta godaa wostti doqqizee? Ta pinna baada iza qoodhe qanxxana» gides." 
2Samuel16:10 Gido attiin kawozi, «Intteno Xuriya naytoo! Inttena tanara gaththiza ay miish dizee? GODAY, ‹Dawite doqqa› giin izi tana doqqizaa gidikko, ‹Hayssa ays ooththadii?› giidi iza oychchana dandayzay oonee?» gides." 
2Samuel16:11 Hessafe guye Dawiti Abisayenne ba shuumeta ubbaa, «Ta gulbateppe kezida ta naazi tana dhayssana koykko, hayssa Biniyaame qommoza gishshas ays malaletteetii? Hessa gishshas aggaagite! GODAY iza doqqa giidi yeddidaa gidikko doqqo." 
2Samuel16:12 GODAY ta kawushshateththaa be7idi hachcha doqeththaa gishshas izi taas lo7o ooththanaakko oonee erizay» gides. 
2Samuel16:13 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne izara diza asay ba oge sinth gujjides; Shim7ey iza ginara diza laddaara bishe doqqees, shuch caddeessinne biitta iza bolla laallees." 
2Samuel16:14 Kawozinne izara issife diza asati ubbay bantti baana gi qoppidaso gakkida; keehi daaburda gishshas heen shempida. 
2Samuel16:15 He wode Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asay ubbay Yerusalaame yida; Akxofeeley izara issife dees. 
2Samuel16:16 Dawite lagge Arkke dere as Hushey Abeseloomekko yiidi, «Kawoo! Mernaas kawota! Kawoo! Mernaas kawota!» gides." 
2Samuel16:17 Abeseloomey Hushes, «Ne laggezas diza ammaneteththay nees hanno xallaa? Ne ays ne laggezara babeekkii?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel16:18 Hushey Abeseloomes zaaridi, «Hessa ta wostta ooththanee? Tani GODAAN, ha derezaninne Isra7eele asaa ubbaan doorettidaade bagga gidana; izaadera issife daana." 
2Samuel16:19 Histtiin ta iza naazas haggazontta oonas haggazoo? Ne aawaas ta haggazida mala neeskka haggazana» gides. 
2Samuel16:20 Abeseloomey Akxofeele, «Ane nuus zore imma; nu ay ooththinoo?» gides." 
2Samuel16:21 Akxofeeley izas zaaridi, «Kawo keeththaa naagana mala ne aaway aggi bida iza laggeththotara gela zin7a; hessafe guye neni ne aawaa keeha ixxidayssa kumeththa Isra7eeley siyikko nenara diza ubbata qesey minnana» gides." 
2Samuel16:22 Hessa gishshas Abeseloomes pooqe bolla dunkaane tolida; heen kumeththa Isra7eele derey be7ishin ba aawaa laggeththotara zin7ides. 
2Samuel16:23 He wode Akxofeeley immiza zorey ubbay Xoossa qaalay zorizayssa misati qoodettees; Dawitinne Abeseloomey Akxofeele zore hessaththo histti ekkeettes. 
2Samuel17:1 Hessafe guye Akxofeeley Abeseloomes, «Ne aawaa yedeththanaas 12,000 as ta doorada hach omars yeddana." 
2Samuel17:2 Izi daaburdi wolqqa ixettida wode ta iza bolla daafa yeggananne shiro yeddana; histtiko izara issife diza derey iza aggidi baqatana; tani kawoza xalla wodhana. 
2Samuel17:3 Deraa ubbaa neekko zaarana; neni koyzay issi asa hayqo gaason ubba deraa neekko zaarana mala ooththana; hessafe guye derey saron daana» gides. 
2Samuel17:4 Iza zorezi Abeseloomenne izara diza Isra7eele cimata ubbaa ufayssides. 
2Samuel17:5 Abeseloomey gidikko, «Qasse ane Arkke dere as Hushe xeygidi izi gizayssaka siyoos» gides." 
2Samuel17:6 Hushey izakko yiin Abeseloomey izas, «Akxofeeley nuus hayssa ha zoreza shiishshides; histtiin nuni iza ooththinoo? Akkay giikko ane ne qofa nuus yoota» gides." 
2Samuel17:7 Husheykka Abeseloome, «Akxofeeley nees immida zorey hanni wode nena kessi ekkenna." 
2Samuel17:8 Ne aawaynne iza olanchchati mino olanchchatanne marati izippe bonqqettichchida zardo mala istti babisizayssa nekka eraasa; hessafe bollarakka ne aaway olan keehi loohida asa; omars ba olanchchatara aqenna; 
2Samuel17:9 Hanni wode izi issi gongolo giddon woykko harason qotetti uttidaa gidana. Izi sinththatidi asaa bolla daafa yeggiin ne asatappe guuththati hayqqiko hessa siyida ubbay, ‹Abeseloome kaallida olanchchati wurida› gi haasayana." 
2Samuel17:10 Ne aaway mino olanchcha, izara issife dizaytikka ola qarata gididayssa Isra7eele asay ubbay eriza gishshas wozinay gaammo wozina mala murtta geetettida wottadaraykka babon baqibaqana." 
2Samuel17:11 «Hessa gishshas ta nena zoriza zorey hayssa; izas qooday abba shaamintta mala darida Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asay ubbay neekko shiiqikko neni ne hu7era olaa kaaleththa. 
2Samuel17:12 Histtiko izi gelidaso ubbaa gelidi iza bolla daafa yeggana; xaazay biitta bolla wodhdhiza mala nu iza bolla wodhdhana; iza gidiin izara diza asatappe issaadeyka kessi ekki attenna. 
2Samuel17:13 Izi biidi issi katamayn gelikko Isra7eeley ubbay wodoro ekki biidi issi shuchchika heen attonttaashe gakkanaas katamayo duge laalli yeggana» gides. 
2Samuel17:14 Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asay kumeth, «Akxofeele zoreppe Arkke dere as Hushe zorey lo7ees» gida; GODAY Abeseloome bolla bash ehanaas lo7o gidida Akxofeele zorey ekettontta mala ooththides." 
2Samuel17:15 Hushey qeese Saadooqenne Abiyaataare, «Akxofeeley Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele cimati ay ay ooththanaas bessizaakko istta zorides; tani gidikko hayssa hayssa ooththite ga zoradis." 
2Samuel17:16 Ha7i izas eeson kiittidi, ‹Bazzon diza shaafa purden aqontta mala, gam7ontta ne eeson pinnanaas bessees; ne histtontta aggiko kawozinne izara diza derey ubbay intte mitettana› giidi Dawites yootite» gides." 
2Samuel17:17 He wode Yoonataaneynne Akimaasi katama gelikko istti beettana En-Roogeelen naageettes; issi geela7o aylle daara hee baada isttas yootiin istti hessa efidi kawo Dawites yooteettes. 
2Samuel17:18 Gido attiin issi naateth dayssi istta be7idi Abeseloomes yootides; hessa gishshas nam7atikka eeson dendidi Bahirimen diza issi addezaso bida; addeza gibbe giddon ollay diza gishshas istti he ollaan wodhdhida. 
2Samuel17:19 He addeza machcheya micciza miish ehada iza bolla kath miccadus; hessa oonikka eribeenna. 
2Samuel17:20 Abeseloome asati he maccassayko yiidi, «Akimaasinne Yoonataaney awan dizoo?» gi oychchida. Maccassaya isttas, «Shaafaa pinni bida» gadus; isttika koyiin dhayda gishshas guye Yerusalaame simmida." 
2Samuel17:21 Asati bidaappe guye ha nam7ati ollaafe kezidi bida; kawo Dawites, «Akxofeeley ne bolla hizgi hizgi asaa denththeththiza gishshas dendada eeson gede shaafa pinna» gida." 
2Samuel17:22 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne izara issife diza derey ubbay dendi Yordaanoose pinnida; gadey wontishin Yordaanoose pinnonttay oonikka deenna. 
2Samuel17:23 Akxofeeley istti iza zoreza ekkontta ixxidayssa be7idi ba hareza caani ekkidi ba keeththi diza katama bides; baso maarasi giigsidaappe guye ba kushen cuuletti hayqqides; hessaththo hayqqidi ba aawa duufon moogettides. 
2Samuel17:24 Abeseloomey kumeththa Isra7eele asaara Yordaanoose pinnishin Dawiti Mahanayme gakkides. 
2Samuel17:25 Abeseloomey Iyo7aabe sohon Amasa olanchchata halaqa histti shuumides; Amasi Isra7eele dere as Yootore naa; Yootorey Iyo7aabe aayo, Xuriya michcho, Na7oose biyo Abigaalo machcho ekkides." 
2Samuel17:26 Isra7eeletinne Abeseloomey Gala7aaden dunkaanida. 
2Samuel17:27 Dawiti Mahanayme gakkishin Amoone katama Eraabappe yida Na7oose naa Shoobbey, Lodibaareppe yida Am7eele naa Maakirenne Erogilimeppe yida Gala7aade dere as Barziley," 
2Samuel17:28 hiixa minxaafeta, shel7etanne mana miishshata ekki yida; hessaththoka gisttenne bangga, dhiillenne tiya caaca; ba7elanne misira," 
2Samuel17:29 ees, meqa maath, dorsatanne pila Dawitesinne deraas istti maana mala ehida. Istti hessa ooththiday, «Derezi bazzo biittan koshattides; daaburdes; saamettides» gida gishshassa." 
2Samuel18:1 Dawiti banara diza deraa qoodides; istta bolla shaalaqatanne mato halaqata shuumides. 
2Samuel18:2 Hessafe guye Dawiti cigo gidiza ba olanchchata Iyo7aabe, nam7anththo cigoza Iyo7aabe isha Xuriya naa Abisaye, heedzdzanththo cigoza Geete dere as Ittaye azazon aqana mala kiittides. Kawozi ba olanchchatas, «Tumappe tanikka inttenara kezana» gides." 
2Samuel18:3 Asati gidikko iza, «Neni nunara kezanaas bessenna; nuna baqatissiza miishshi diikko asay hessa gita miishshan qoodenna; haray attoshin nuuppe baggay hayqqikokka istti wudu geettenna; neni nerkka nuuppe tammu shiyatappe aadhdhaasa; hessa gishshas neni kataman uttada nuna maaddiko lo7o» gida." 
2Samuel18:4 Kawozikka, «Inttes lo7o misati beettiza ubbaa ta ooththana» gides. Hessa gishshas derey ubbay xeetan xeetan, shiyan shiyan shaaketti shaaketti salfi keziza wode kawozi gimbeza pengen eqqi dees." 
2Samuel18:5 Kawozi Iyo7aabe, Abisanne Ittaye, «Ta gishshas giidi ta naaza Abeseloome bolla issi metokka gaththofte» gi azazides. Kawozi ba naa Abeseloome gishshas azazizaytas issaas issaas azazo immishin ubba olanchchatikka siyida." 
2Samuel18:6 Olanchchati Isra7eele olanaas salfidi kezida; olaza Efreeme wora giddon olettida. 
2Samuel18:7 Heen Isra7eele asay Dawite ola asaan xoonettides; he gallas keehi daroti hayqqida; 20,000 asi hayqqides." 
2Samuel18:8 Olay deraa garsan aakki aakki bides; he gallas olay wursidayssafe woray mitti dhayssida asay darees. 
2Samuel18:9 He wode Abeseloomey Dawite asaara toorontta dishe gayttides; Abeseloomey baqulo toggidi cippi gida haggay diza wola garsara aadhdhi bishin Abeseloome hu7e binanay haggan oykettides; izi toggida baquloya aadhdha biin izi saloppenne sa7appe giddon kaqetti attides. 
2Samuel18:10 Issaadey iza be7idi Iyo7aabes, «Hekko tani Abeseloomey wola bolla kaqetti dizayssa be7adis» gides." 
2Samuel18:11 Iyo7aabey baas yootida addezas zaaridi, «Ay gadii? Histtiin ne be7ida mala ays heerakka wodhada biittan yeggabeekkii? Ne hessaththo ooththidaakko ta nees tammu saqile biranne ola qarata qabatto immanakkoshin» gides." 
2Samuel18:12 Gido attiin addezi zaaridi, «Nuni siyishin kawozi, ‹Naateththaza Abeseloome bolla qohoy gakkontta mala ta gishshas giidi minththi naagite› giidi nena, Abisanne Ittaye azazida gishshas 1,000 saqile bira ne taas immidaakkoka tani ta kushe kawoza naaza bolla woththike." 
2Samuel18:13 Hara baggara tani ta shemppos mishettontta aggada ta iza wodhidaakko kawozappe qotetti attiza miishshi baynda gishshas neni ne baggara taakko shiiqakka» gides. 
2Samuel18:14 Iyo7aabey addezas, «Hayssafe guye hayssa mala haasayan ta nenara wode wursike» gides; 3 toora ekki biidi Abeseloomey miththa bolla kaqetti dizason buro shemppo kezontta dishin toorata xongidi izas wozina ayfen caddides." 
2Samuel18:15 Hessaththoka Iyo7aabe azhabiza tammati, Abeseloome giddoththi caddi wodhida." 
2Samuel18:16 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey zaye punnidi istta diggida gishshas olanchchati Isra7eele yedeththizayssa aggida. 
2Samuel18:17 Abeseloome wora giddo efidi ciimma ollan yeggida; gita shuchchata iza bolla doorida. He wode Isra7eele asay ubbay baso baso baqatides. 
2Samuel18:18 Abeseloomey, «Ta sunth xeygisiza nay taas deenna» giidi iza hassa7issana mala shemppora paxa diza wode kawo zulle geetettizason ba sunththan hawulte essi woththida gishshas he sohozi hach gakkanaas Abeseloome hawulte geetettees." 
2Samuel18:19 He wode Saadooqe naa Akimaasi, «GODAY iza morkketa bolla kome koxxidayssa woxxa baada tani kawozas mishiraachcho yootana» gides." 
2Samuel18:20 Iyo7aabey, «Hach mishiraachcho qaala efanay nena gidakka; kawoza nay hayqqida gishshas hach gidontta hara gallas efandasa» gides." 
2Samuel18:21 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Tophphiya dere addezas, «Ne be7idayssa baada kawozas yoota» gides; Tophphiya dere addezi Iyo7aabes kushe denththi bessidi woxxi bides." 
2Samuel18:22 Saadooqe naa Akimaasi Iyo7aabes, «Ba hanaa hano; ane zay hayssa Tophphiya addeza geedora tanikka woxxays» gides. Iyo7aabey gidikko, «Ne ays baana koyadii? Nees imota imisiza ay mishiraachcho ekkada bay?» gides." 
2Samuel18:23 Akimaasikka, «Ba hanaa hano; ta baana koyays» gides. Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey, «Histtiko woxxa!» gides. Hessafe guye Akimaasi demban diza ogezara woxxi Tophphiya dere addezappe sinththati bides." 
2Samuel18:24 Dawiti kare bagga pengefenne giddo pengefe giddon dishin zabezi dirsaa gimbe bolla diza shakko kaara kezidi kare xeellishe issi asi barkka woxxizayssa be7ides. 
2Samuel18:25 Naagizayssi xeygidi hessa kawozas yootides; Kawozikka, «Barkka yizaade gidikko lo7o mishiraachcho ekki yizaade gidana» gides; addezi mati mati yides." 
2Samuel18:26 Qasseka naagizayssi hara asi woxxishin be7ides; zabezakka xeygidi, «Hekko hara asi barkka woxxi yishe dees» gides. Kawozi, «Hessaadeyka lo7o wore ekki yizaa gidana bessees» gides." 
2Samuel18:27 Naagizayssi, «Koyroyssa woththi Saadooqe naa Akimaase woth misatees» gides. Kawozi, «Izi lo7o asa; izi mishiraachcho qaala ekkontta yeenna» gides." 
2Samuel18:28 Akimaasi keehi waassidi kawozas, «Ubba miishshika injjetides» gides; hessafe guye biitta bolla zaqulth zirxxi gides; kawozasikka kushe denththidi, «Ta godaa kawoza bolla bantta kushe denththida asata aaththi immida GODAA ne Xoossay galatetto!» gides." 
2Samuel18:29 Kawozikka iza, «Ta naa Abeseloomey lo7o dizee?» gi oychchides. Akimaasikka, «Iyo7aabey kawoza oosanchchazanne tana ne aylleza kiittishin gita shiro be7adis; gido attiin izi aazakko ta erabeekke» gides." 
2Samuel18:30 Kawozikka iza, «Ane issi bagga aadhdha eqqa» gides. Izikka aadhdhi eqqides." 
2Samuel18:31 Hessafe guye Tophphiya dere addezi gakkidi, «Ta godaa kawoo, Mishiraachcho! GODAY hach ne bolla dendida morkketa ubbaafe nena ashshides» gides." 
2Samuel18:32 Kawozikka Tophphiya dere addeza, «Ta naa Abeseloomey lo7i dizee?» gi oychchides. Tophphiya dere addezikka, «Ta godaa kawoza morkketinne nena qohana ne bolla dendiza ubbati he naateththaza mala gidetto» gides." 
2Samuel18:33 Kawozi keehi ceecides; gimbeza penge bolla diza pooqe bolla kezidi heen yeekkides; bishekka, «Ta naa Abeseloome! Ta naa Abeseloome! Ne gishshas ta hayqqarkkinaa! Ta naa Abeseloome woo! Ta naa Abeseloome woo!» gides." 
2Samuel19:1 Iyo7aabes, «Kawo Dawiti ba naa Abeseloome gishshas yeekkishenne kayottishe dees» geetetti yootettides." 
2Samuel19:2 Kawozi, «Ba naaza gishshas kayottees» gizayssa he gallas olanchchati siyida gishshas he gallassa xoonoy kumeththa olanchchata matan ceecen laametti pe7ides." 
2Samuel19:3 He gallas olappe yeellatishe katama geliza asa mala dereykka shaaphettishe katama gelides. 
2Samuel19:4 Kawozi ba ayfeso kammi woththidi, «Ta naa Abeseloome woo! Ta naa Abeseloome woo» gishe zilalides." 
2Samuel19:5 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey kawozaso gelidi, «Ne shemppo, ne attuma nayta shemppo, ne macca nayta shemppo, ne machchetanne ne laggeththota shemppo ashshida asata hach ne yeellachchadasa." 
2Samuel19:6 Nena ixxizayta ne dosaasa; qasse nena dosizayta ixxaasa; ne ola gadawatinne istta wottadarati nees aykkoka gidonttayssa hekko hach ne qonccisadasa; hach Abeseloomey shemppora paxa diin nu ubbay wuridaakko ne ufayettanayssa ta be7adis. 
2Samuel19:7 Ha7i dendada kare keza asaa minththeththa; ne kezontta ixxiko ha omarsayn issi asikka nenara gidonttayssa ta GODAA sunththan caaqqays; hessi nees naateteththafe doommiin hayssa gakkanaas ne bolla gakkida iita yo7ota ubbaafe aadho meto ne bolla gaththana» gides. 
2Samuel19:8 Hessa gishshas kawozi penge lanqen uttiin derezas, «Hekko kawozi penge lanqen uttides» geetetti yootettiin derezi ubbay kawozaakko yides. He wode kumeth Isra7eele asay baso baso baqatides." 
2Samuel19:9 Kumeththa Isra7eele qommoti, derezikka ba garsan issoy issaara marshettishe, «Kawozi nuna nu morkketa kusheppe kessi ekkides; Filisxeemeta kusheppeka nuna ashshiday iza; ha7i gidikko Abeseloome gaason dereppe baqati bides." 
2Samuel19:10 Izi nuna haarana mala nu tiyda Abeseloomey gidikko olan hayqqides. Histtiin intte kawoza simo gishshas ays co7u geetii?» gides. 
2Samuel19:11 Kawo Dawiti qeese Saadooqessinne Abiyaataares kiita yeddishe, «Yuhuda cimatas, ‹Kumeththa Isra7eelen haasayettiza yo7o ubbay kawozi dizason izas gakkida gishshas kawoza kawoteththa keeth zaaranaas intte waanidi wurseththa as gideetii?" 
2Samuel19:12 Intte ta meqeththata, ta ashotanne ta ishata; histtiin intte kawoza zaaranaas waanidi wurseththa as gideetii?› giite." 
2Samuel19:13 «Qasse Amasi, ‹Nenikka ta meqeththinne ta asho gidikkii? Hannife doommidi ne de7o wurseth gakkanaas Iyo7aabe qoodhe ta olanchchata azazizaade ooththontta aggiko Xoossi ta bolla iita miish ooththo; hessafekka aadhdhiza iita miish ta bolla eho› gides» giidi yootite." 
2Samuel19:14 Izikka Yuhuda asaa ubbaa wozina issi asa wozina mala histti di7ides; isttika izas, «Neni ne asaa ubbaara simma» giidi kiita yeddida." 
2Samuel19:15 Kawozi hessafe guye simmidi Yordaanoose gakkanaas yides. He wode Yuhuda asay kawoza ekkidi Yordaanoose pinththanaas Gelgela gakkanaas bides. 
2Samuel19:16 Bahirime dere as Geera naa Biniyaame qommo Shim7ey kawo Dawite mokkanaas Yuhuda asaara issife eeson wodhdhides. 
2Samuel19:17 Issi shii Biniyaame qommoti, hessaththoka Sa7ooleso oosanchcha Xiibbas 15 attuma naytinne 20 aylleti izara issife deettes. Hessafe guye kawozi dizaso Yordaanoose eeson wodhdhida." 
2Samuel19:18 Kawozaso asaa ehanaassinne izi koyida ubbaa ooththanaas istti zokkora pinnida. Geera naa Shim7ey Yordaanoose pinnides; kawoza sinththan gufannidi," 
2Samuel19:19 «Ta godawu ta nena qohidayssa qoodoppa; ta godaa kawo ne Yerusalaameppe kezida gallas ta ooththida mooroza maara; ne wozinan woththofa. 
2Samuel19:20 Tani ne oosanchchay ooththida nagara eriza gishshas hach ta godaa kawoza mokkanaas Yooseefe keeththa asaa ubbaafe koyrotta yadis» gides. 
2Samuel19:21 Hessafe guye Xuriya naa Abisayey, «Shim7ey GODAAN tiyettidaade izi cayida gishshas izas hayqoy bessennee?» gides." 
2Samuel19:22 Dawitikka, «Intteno Xuriya naytoo; inttenara tana aazi gaththizee? Intte hach taas morkke gidideta! Ay asikka hach Isra7eeleppe hayqqana bessizee? Hessi ta Isra7eele bolla kawotidayssa ta erida gallas gidennee?» gides." 
2Samuel19:23 Hessa gishshas kawozi Shim7e, «Neni hayqqaka» gides; hessa kawozi caaqon minththides." 
2Samuel19:24 Sa7oole naa Memfebostey kawoza mokkanaas duge wodhdhides; kawozi beti boosofe doommidi simmi yida gallas gakkanaas ba tohos bessiza miish ooththibeenna; ba buuchcheka meedettibeenna; ba may7oka meeccibeenna. 
2Samuel19:25 Izi kawoza mokkanaas Yerusalaameppe yiin kawozi iza, «Memfeboste, ne tanara aazas bontta aggadii?» gi oychchides."
