2Samuel19:26 Izikka zaaridi, «Ta godaa kawoo! Ta ne oosanchchay toho sila gidida gishshas, ‹Tani kawozara baana mala ta harey taas kooretto; ta iza bolla utta baana› gadis; gido attiin ta oosanchcha Xiibbay tana baleththides." 
2Samuel19:27 Ta godaa kawo sinththan tana ne oosanchchaza sunth moorides; ayde gidiinkka ta goday kawoy neni Xoossa kiitanchcha mala gidida gishshas nena lo7ida ubbaa ooththa. 
2Samuel19:28 Ta aawa keeththas ubbaas hayqoy bessishin neni gidikko tana ne oosanchchaza ne maaddafe mizaytara issife utisadasa; hayssafe haray taas hano gaada kawoza oychchanaas ta oonee?» gides. 
2Samuel19:29 Kawozikka, «Ne ays yo7o darsay? Neninne Xiibbay iza gadaa ubbaa intte gishetti ekkana mala ta azazadis» gides." 
2Samuel19:30 Memfebostey kawoza, «Ta godaa kawoo! Izi hashshu lo7on simmides; ubbaaka izi ekko» gides." 
2Samuel19:31 Hessaththoka Gala7aade dere as Barziley Erogilime woradappe kawoza moyzanaas izara issife Yordaanoose pinnides. 
2Samuel19:32 He wode Barziley wode sugida 80 layththa cima; izi keehi dure gidida gishshas kawozi Mahanaymen dishin izas maana miish ehides. 
2Samuel19:33 Kawozi Barzile, «Tanara pinnada Yerusalaamen issife da; ta nena heemmana» gides." 
2Samuel19:34 Barziley gidikko kawozas, «Tani kawozara Yerusalaamen ay keena layth daanaas boo?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tani ha7i 80 layththa cima; Histtiin tani iitanne kiya shaakka erana dandayanee? Hayssafe guye ne aylley mizayssanne uyizayssa mal7o shaakki eranee? Attuma nayta cenggurssinne macca nayta cenggurs ha7i ta siyana dandayanee? Histtiin ne aylley ta godaa kawozas ays bollara hara tooho gidanee? 
2Samuel19:36 Ne aylley kawozara pinnidi guuththa oge baana; kawoy hessa kushe taas zaarandee? 
2Samuel19:37 Ta diza katamaan hayqqada ta aawaanne ta aayey duufo achchan ta moogettana mala ne aylleza ne moyzikko izi simmo; gido attiin ne aylle Keme7aamey ta godaa kawozara pinno; histtiko nena lo7ida miish ne izas ooththa» gides. 
2Samuel19:38 Kawozikka, «Keme7aamey tanara pinnana; nena ufayssiza miish ubbaa ta izas ooththana; ne taappe koyza ay miishshika ta nees ooththana» gides." 
2Samuel19:39 Hessa gishshas derezi ubbay Yordaanoose pinnides; hessafe guye kawozi pinnides. Kawozi Barzile yeeri ekkidi anjjides; Barzileykka baso simmi bides. 
2Samuel19:40 Kawozi Gelgela bishin Keme7aamey izara issife bides; Yuhuda olanchchati ubbaynne Isra7eele olanchchatappe baggay kawoza azhabidi pinththida. 
2Samuel19:41 Heerakka Isra7eele asay ubbay kawozaakko yiidi, «Nu ishati Yuhuda asati kawoza garsara banttarkka izanne izaso asata, iza kaallizaytara Yordaanoose ays pinththidoo?» gida." 
2Samuel19:42 Yuhuda asay ubbay Isra7eele asaas, «Nu hayssa ooththiday kawozi nuus mata dabbo gidida gishshassa; histtiin hayssi inttena hanqeththizee? Nuni kawoppe ekki mida miishshi dizee? Nuni ay miish ekkidonii?» gida." 
2Samuel19:43 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Yuhuda asaas, «Nuna kawozappe tammu kushey gakkees; hessafe bollarakka inttefe nuus aadhdhiza maatay dees; histtiin intte nuna aazas kadhidetii? Nu kawozi simmana mala koyro oychchiday nuna gidokkonii?» gida. Gido attiin Yuhuda asay immida zaaroy Isra7eele asay immida zaaroppe keehi mino." 
2Samuel20:1 He wode Biniyaame qommota giddofe Bikire naa Sheba7e geetettiza kofa asi dees; izi zaye punnishe, «Nuus Dawitera gaytoteththi deenna; Isseye naakkon nuus xinxxoy deenna; Isra7eele asawu! Ne dunkaanen dunkaanen simma!» gi waassides." 
2Samuel20:2 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay Dawite kaddidi Bikire naa Sheba7e kaallides; gido attiin Yuhuda asay Yordaanooseppe doommidi Yerusalaame gakkanaas bantta kawozappe shaakettontta issife bida. 
2Samuel20:3 Dawiti Yerusalaamen diza ba kawoteththa keeth simmida wode ba kawoteththa keeththaa naagana mala kase izi woththi bida tammu laggeththo maccassata ekkides; istti issi keeththan naagetti daana mala naage woththides; isttas koshshiza qallabakka immides. Gido attiin isttara aqibeenna; istti hayqqanaashe gakkanaas am7i mala banttarkka dumma de7ida. 
2Samuel20:4 Hessafe guye kawozi Amasas, «Yuhuda asay ubbay heedzdzu gallassa giddon taakko yaana mala xeyga; nekka ne hu7era beetta» gides." 
2Samuel20:5 Amasi Yuhuda xeygana bides; gido attiin kawozi barida gallassatappe keehi takkides. 
2Samuel20:6 Dawiti Abisayes, «Ha7i Abeseloomeppe bollara Bikire naa Sheba7ey daro meto nu bolla gaththana koyza gishshas ne godaa wottadarata ekkada iza yedeththa; ne histtontta aggiko miixay diza katamata demmidi nuuppe kessi ekki attana» gides." 
2Samuel20:7 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabe wottadarati, Keliteti, Pelitetinne wolqqama olanchchati ubbay Abisaye azazon kezida; istti Yerusalaameppe keziday Bikire naa Sheba7e yedeththanaassa." 
2Samuel20:8 Istti Geba7oonen wogga zaalla matan dishin Amasi isttara gayttana kezides; Iyo7aabey ola may7o may7idi giththa mashsha kohozara gixxi uttides; izi sinththe tanggida mala mashshazi kohozappe kezi gaden wodhdhides. 
2Samuel20:9 Iyo7aabeykka Amasa, «Ta ishazoo ne ay mala day?» gides; histtidi Iyo7aabey yeeriza as misatidi ba ushachcha kushen Amasa buuch oykkides." 
2Samuel20:10 Gido attiin Amasi Iyo7aabe kushen mashshay dizayssa akeekontta aggida gishshas bana naagibeenna. Histtiin Iyo7aabey iza ulon caddides; iza maracey biitta bolla wololu gides; Iyo7aabey hara gujjontta dishin Amasi heerakka shemppo kezides. Hessafe guye Iyo7aabeynne iza isha Abisayey Bikire naa Sheba7e goodereththo doommida. 
2Samuel20:11 Amasa aha achchan eqqida Iyo7aabe wottadaratappe issoy, «Iyo7aabe dosizaynne Dawites gidida ubbay Iyo7aabe kaallo!» gides." 
2Samuel20:12 He wode Amasa ahay suuththan moorettidi oges giddo addan porccu gi dees. Heera aadhdhi biza wottadarati ubbay eqqi xeellishin he addezi be7idi ahaza mata gakkida wottadarati ubbay eqqi xeellizayssa akeekides; Amasa ahaza oge bollafe goshsha giddo efidi may7o iza bolla yeggides. 
2Samuel20:13 Ahazi ogeppe dendidaappe guye asay ubbay Bikire naa Sheba7e gooddanaas Iyo7aabe kaalli bides. 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba7ey Isra7eele nayta qommota ubbaa giddora kanththidi Aabeeli-Beeti-Ma7ikanne Beere dere yides. Beere asay issi bolla shiiqettidi iza kaallides. 
2Samuel20:15 Iyo7aabera diza wottadarati yiidi Aabeeli-Beeti-Ma7ikan Sheba7e giddoththida; katamappe kare baggara yuuyi aadhdhanaas gimbezas pude xeera gakkanaas biitta doorida; istti gimbeza laallanaas keehi shociza wode," 
2Samuel20:16 he katamayn issi wozinama maccassi dizaara ba qaala dhoqqu histtada «Aso siyite! Siyite! Iyo7aabes ta yootana miishshi diza gishshas izi haa yaana mala izas yootite!» gadus. 
2Samuel20:17 Iyo7aabey izikko biin maccassaya izas, «Iyo7aabey nenee?» ga oychchadus. Izikka izis zaaridi, «Ee tana» gides. Izakka izas «Histtiko tani oosanchchaya gizayssa ezga» gadus. Izi qasse, «Ero ta ezga siyays» gides." 
2Samuel20:18 Izakka zaarada izas, «Beni wode asay, ‹Zore oychchanaas Aabeele katama biite!› gees; istti gida malakka polettees." 
2Samuel20:19 He katamaya gita katama; Isra7eelen saroy kumidaaranne ammanettida katamaya izo; histtiin neni Isra7eelen aayo gididaaro dhayssana koyaasa. GODAA xinxxoyo mittanaas ays ne koyay?» gadus. 
2Samuel20:20 Iyo7aabeykka izis, «Hessi taappe haakko! Mitoynne dhaysi ha7ikka taappe haakko!" 
2Samuel20:21 Yo7oy hessa mala gidenna; heen zumazan Efreeme gezzefe Bikire naa Sheba7e geetettizayssi kawo Dawite bolla ba kushe denththides; intte he addeza xalla taas aaththi immiko tani hanno katamayo yedda baana» gides. Maccassayakka zaarada Iyo7aabes, «Addeza hu7e qanxxidi nees gimbe bollara kare yeggana» gadus." 
2Samuel20:22 Hessafe guye maccassaya cinccateththan kumida ba zore ubbaa deraakko ekka badus. Isttika Bikire naa Sheba7e hu7eza qanxxidi Iyo7aabes kare olida. Histtiin Iyo7aabey zaye punnides; asaykka katamayppe haakki bida. Ubbaa baggarakka laaletti baso baso bida. Iyo7aabey kawozaakko Yerusalaame simmi bides. 
2Samuel20:23 Iyo7aabey Isra7eele olanchchata ubbaa bolla azazizaade gidides; Yoodahe naa Bannayay qasse Keliteta bollanne Peliteta bolla halaqa gidides. 
2Samuel20:24 Adoraamey wolqqa ooso ooththizayta bolla halaqa gidides. Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafizaade gidides. 
2Samuel20:25 Sheba7ey kawo keeththas xaafe gidishin Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey qeese gidida. 
2Samuel20:26 Hessaththoka Ya7ire dere as Iray Dawite zorizaade gidides. 
2Samuel21:1 Dawite kawoteththa wode heedzdzu layth kumeth iita koshay biitta bolla dendides; hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA oychchides; GODAYKKA izas, «Sa7ooli Geba7oone asaa wodhi wursida gishshas iza bollanne izaso asaa bolla suuththa acoy dees» gides." 
2Samuel21:2 Kawozi Geba7oone asaa xeygi haasayssides; Geba7ooneti Amooretappe attidayta attiin Isra7eele dere as gidettenna; Isra7eele asay kase istti naaganaas caaqqidaa gidikkoka Sa7ooli Isra7eele asaassinne Yuhuda asaas mishettiza gishshas Geba7ooneta mulera dhayssanaas koyides. 
2Samuel21:3 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Geba7oone asaa, «Ta inttes ay ooththoo? GODAA xinxxo intte anjjana mala nagara ubbaas ta ay ooththana bessizee?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel21:4 Geba7oone asay izas zaaridi, «Sa7ooleppe gidiin izaso asaappe bira woykko worqqa oychchanaas maatay deenna; qasseka nuni Isra7eeleppe oonakka wodhanaas maatay deenna» gida. Dawitikka, «Histtiin ta inttes ay ooththoo?» gi oychchides." 
2Samuel21:5 Isttika, «Nuni laalettana malanne Isra7eele giddon awankka dontta mala nu bolla gene ooththidi nuna dhayssidaade" 
2Samuel21:6 zereththafe laappun attuma nayti nuus imettetto. Nunikka GODAAN doorettida Sa7oole dere Gibi7an GODAA sinththan istta kaqqana» gi zaarida. Histtiin kawozi, «Ero ta immana» gides." 
2Samuel21:7 Kawo Dawiti Sa7oole naa Yoonataane giddoninne ba giddon GODAA sinththan caaqettida caaqo gishshas giidi Sa7oole naaza Yoonataane naa Memfeboste hayqoppe ashshides. 
2Samuel21:8 Gido attiin kawozi Aaya biyo Erxifay Sa7ooles yelida 2 attuma nayta Armoonenne Memfeboste, isttarakka issi bolla Sa7oole biya Merooba Maholaate dere as Barzile naa Adir7eeles yelida 5 attuma nayta ekki bides." 
2Samuel21:9 Istta Geba7oone asatas aaththi immides; Geba7ooneti istta wodhidi zumbullata bolla GODAA sinththan kaqqida; laappunati issi bolla hayqqida; istti hayqqiday kaththa shiisho wode koyro gallas, banggay maxa doomettida gallassa." 
2Samuel21:10 Hessafe guye Aaya biyo Erxifay maaqa ekkada zaalla bolla dunkaanadus; kaththa shiisho koyro gallassafe biidi iray bukkanaashe gakkanaas, gallas salo kafoti bochchontta mala, omars wora do7ati bochchontta mala naagashe heen gam7adus." 
2Samuel21:11 Sa7oole laggeththoya Aaya biyo Erxifay ooththidayssa Dawiti siyida wode," 
2Samuel21:12 biidi Sa7oole meqeththaanne iza naa Yoonataane meqeththaa Yaabuse Gala7aade asaappe ekkides. Yaabuse asay, istti kaqqidasoppe Beeti-Saane dubbushappe qotara ekki bida." 
2Samuel21:13 Dawiti Sa7oole meqeththinne iza naa Yoonataane meqeth heeppe ehides. Hessaththoka he hayqqida asata meqeth shiishshida. 
2Samuel21:14 Sa7oole meqeththinne iza naa Yoonataane meqeth Biniyaame biittan Xela geetettizason iza aawa Qiise duufon moogida; kawozi azazidayssaka ubbaa ooththida. Hessafe guye biittays istti woossida woosaa Xoossi siyides. 
2Samuel21:15 Qasseka Filisxeemessinne Isra7eeles giddon olay dendides; Dawitikka ba asaara Filisxeeme asaa olanaas duge wodhdhides; izi heen daaburdes. 
2Samuel21:16 Erafaye zereththatappe issoy Eshbi-Benoobe geetettiza asi dees; izi Xarqimalappe oosettida 300 saqile deexxiza tooranne ooraththa mashsha gixxi uttides; izikka Dawite wodhana qoppides. 
2Samuel21:17 Gido attiin Xuriya naa Abisayey Dawite shemppo ashshanaas yiidi Filisxeeme addeza caddi wodhides. Hessafe guye Dawite asati, «Isra7eele xomppey to7ontta mala hayssafe guye ne nunara olaso kezana bessenna» gi caaqqida." 
2Samuel21:18 Hessafe guye Gobbe geetettizason Filisxeeme asaara olay dendides. He wode Huushe dere as Sibikayey Erafaye zereththatappe Saafe wodhides. 
2Samuel21:19 Gobben Filisxeemetara dendida hara olan Beeteliheeme dere as Jaar-Orgime naa Elyaaney izas toora toomay wondiraashe mith likkizayssa Geete dere as Golyaade wodhides. 
2Samuel21:20 Qasseka Geeten dendida olan izas issi issi kushe bollanne issi issi toho bolla usuppun biradhdhey, issi bolla nam7u tammanne oyddu biradhdheti diza issi wolqqama asi dees; izi Erafaye zereththa." 
2Samuel21:21 Izi Isra7eele asaara eqettishin Dawite isha Shim7e naa Yoonataaney iza wodhides. 
2Samuel21:22 Hayti oyddati Geeten diza Erafaye zereththata; isttika Dawite kusheninne iza asata kushen kundida. 
2Samuel22:1 GODAY Dawite iza morkketa ubbaa kusheppenne Sa7oole kusheppe ashshida wode Dawiti hayssafe kaalliza mazamure GODAA bonchchos yexxides; 
2Samuel22:2 «GODAY taas zaalla, taas miixanne tana ashshizaade." 
2Samuel22:3 Ta Xoossay ta geemettiza zaalla, taas gondallenne atoteththa kace; izi taas mino miixa; taas zempponne tana ashshizaade; ne tana makkallanchchatappe ashshaasa." 
2Samuel22:4 Galatay bessiza GODAA ta xeygays; tani ta morkketappekka attays. 
2Samuel22:5 «Hayqo dambalay tana giddoththides; dhayssiza di7oy tana mittides. 
2Samuel22:6 Si7oole wodoroy ta bolla xaaxettides; hayqo woximadey taas waaxettides. 
2Samuel22:7 Ta ceecida wode GODAA xeygadis; ta Xoossaako waassadis. Izi ba Keeththan dishe ta cenggurssaa siyides; ta waasoy iza hayththan gelides. 
2Samuel22:8 «Izi hanqettida gishshas biittaya kokkoradussinne shirotadus; salota yochchi za7idessinne qaaxxides. 
2Samuel22:9 Iza siidheppe hanqo cuway cuwattides; iza doonappe xuuggiza tamay eexxides; tama bonqoyka kezides. 
2Samuel22:10 Salota daakki wodhdhides; iza toho garsan dhippi gida shaaray dees. 
2Samuel22:11 Izi kirube bolla uttidi piradhdhides; carko qefe bolla uttidi pude paallides. 
2Samuel22:12 Dhumay iza giddoththides; dhippi gida ira shaaray iza genththides. 
2Samuel22:13 Iza sinththan diza poo7ozappe wawaci giza wolqqanththi kezides. 
2Samuel22:14 GODAY salotappe guummides; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa cenggurs sissides. 
2Samuel22:15 Ba yiishshaa dukkidi ba morkketa laallides; wolqqanth yeddidi istta shirosides. 
2Samuel22:16 GODAA seerappenne iza siidheppe keziza hanqo cuwaappe dendidayssan, abba giddon diza zulleti beettida; sa7a yochchati qonccida." 
2Samuel22:17 «Bollafe ba kushe yeddidi tana oykkides; ciimma haaththata giddofekka tana kessides. 
2Samuel22:18 Mino morkketappe, tani isttara eqettana dandayontta baaligaaratappe tana ashshides." 
2Samuel22:19 Ta metotida gallas ta bolla yida; gido attiin GODAY tana kaafides. 
2Samuel22:20 Izi tana aakoso kessides; tanan ufayettida gishshas izi ashshides. 
2Samuel22:21 «GODAY taas ta xilloteththa mala ooththees; ta xilloteththa mala taas kushe zaarides. 
2Samuel22:22 GODAA oge ta naagida gishshas tani Xoossafe sher7i gaada iita ooththabeekke. 
2Samuel22:23 Iza woga ubbay ta sinththan dees; iza maarappeka haraso simmabeekke. 
2Samuel22:24 Iza sinththan borey baynda de7adis; tanakka nagarappe naagadis. 
2Samuel22:25 GODAY ta xilloteththa mala, iza sinththan diza geeshshateththaa mala taas kushe zaarides." 
2Samuel22:26 «Ammanettidaytas nekka ammanettidayssa, suuretas neni suure gididayssa bessaasa." 
2Samuel22:27 Geeshshatas neni geesh gididayssa, makkalla asas neni makkalla gididayssa bessaasa." 
2Samuel22:28 Neni qohettida deraa ashshaasa; gido attiin ne ayfey kawushshanaas otoranchchata xeellees. 
2Samuel22:29 Abeet GODAWU! Neni taas xomppe; GODAY ta dhumaa poo7isees. 
2Samuel22:30 Ne maadon morkketa ola sinth suga suga baana; tani ta Xoossaa wolqqan gimbeza bollara xaallays. 
2Samuel22:31 «Xoossa ogey kumeththa; GODAA qaalay muuruta; izan ammanettidayta ubbaas izi gondalle. 
2Samuel22:32 GODAAPPE attiin hara Xoossi oonee? nu Xoossaafe attiin zaallay oonee? 
2Samuel22:33 Taas wolqqa immizayssi, ta ogekka suurisizayssi izi ta Xoossa." 
2Samuel22:34 Ta tohota genessa toho mala pilatisees; dhoqqasohotan tana minththi essees. 
2Samuel22:35 Ta kusheta ola tamaarssees; ta qeseti xarqimala wondafe zinqqeettes. 
2Samuel22:36 Ne atoteththa gondalle taas immadasa; ne kaafoy tana gitasides. 
2Samuel22:37 Ta tanggo aassadasa; ta tohotikka dhuphettibeettenna. 
2Samuel22:38 «Ta morkketa yedeththa dhayssadis; istti dippi gaanaashe gakkanaas guye gabeekke. 
2Samuel22:39 Mulera ta istta dhayssadis; simmidikka eqqanaas dandaybeettenna; ta toho garsankka kundida. 
2Samuel22:40 Olas taas wolqqa immadasa; tanara eqettizayta ta toho garsan ne gulbatissadasa. 
2Samuel22:41 Ta morkketi guye simmi baqatana mala ooththadasa; tana ixxizayta dhayssadasa. 
2Samuel22:42 Istti maado demmanaas waassida; gido attiin istta maaddiday deenna; istti GODAAKKO waassida; gido attiin izi isttas zaaribeenna. 
2Samuel22:43 Gudulla mala istta liiqisa gaaccadis; ogen diza urqqa mala istta gindadissinne yedhettadis. 
2Samuel22:44 «Ta derey qoppida daafaappe tana ashshadasa; kawoteththatas tana hu7e histtadasa. Ta erontta asay taas haarettides. 
2Samuel22:45 Allagati tana shoobbanaas yida; istti tana siyida mala taas azazetteettes. 
2Samuel22:46 Allagati babbida; bantta miixappe kokkorishe yida. 
2Samuel22:47 «GODAY de7o Xoossa; ta zaallay izi anjjetto; ta atoteththa zaallay ta Xoossay dhoqqu dhoqqu go. 
2Samuel22:48 Ta gishshas halo kessiza Xoossay, kawoteththata taas haarisizay iza." 
2Samuel22:49 Izi ta morkketa kusheppe tana kessees; ta morkketappe tana dhoqqu dhoqqu histtadasa; menxe iitatappe tana ashshadasa. 
2Samuel22:50 Abeet ta GODAWU! Kawoteththata giddon ta nena galatana; ne sunththaas galata mazamure ta yexxana. 
2Samuel22:51 Izi kawozas gita xoono immees; ba tiyda Dawitesinne iza zereththas, ba mernaa kiyateth bessees.»" 
2Samuel23:1 Dawiti wurseththan haasayda qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa; «Yaaqoobe Xoossaan tiyettidayssi, Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay dhoqqu dhoqqu histtida asi, Isra7eelen dosettida yeththanchchay, Isseye naa Dawite tinbite qaalay hayssa;" 
2Samuel23:2 «GODAA Ayanay ta baggara haasaydes; iza qaalay ta doonan dees. 
2Samuel23:3 Isra7eele Xoossi haasaydes; Isra7eele zaallay taas, ‹Asaa xilloteththan haarizay, Xoossa yashshateththan ayssizay," 
2Samuel23:4 izi shaaray bayndason, maalado xalqqey keziza wode diza poo7o mala; izi biitta bolla maata purccisiza xalqqe mala, iray bukki aadhdhishin ke7iza awa mala› gides." 
2Samuel23:5 «Ta keeththi Xoossa matan likke gidennee? Ubba miish giigsidinne naagidi, tanara mernaa caaqo qaala geliday iza gidennee? Ta atoteththa polo gaththanay ta amo ubbaa taas immanay iza gidennee?" 
2Samuel23:6 Gido attiin iita asati ubbay, kushen shiishshana dandayettontta agunththa mala wora wodhdhana." 
2Samuel23:7 Agunth bochchiza ubbaas, birata woykko toora tooma koshshees; istti ba dizason mulera taman xuugettana.»" 
2Samuel23:8 Dawites erettida qara asata sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; koyroyssi Tahikimoone dere as Yoshebi-Baashebete gidishin izi heedzdzu halaqatas halaqa; izikka issi olan ba toora xongidi 800 as wodhida qara. 
2Samuel23:9 Nam7anththozi Ahihohe dere as Doode naa El7ezeere; olettanaas issi bolla shiiqida Filisxeeme asay eqettiza wode Isra7eele asay baqatides; Dawitera diza heedzdzu qarata garsafe issoy iza. 
2Samuel23:10 Izi gidikko ba eqqidaso yeddibeenna; iza kushey argacanaashenne mashshara issife oykettanaashe gakkanaas Filisxeemeta olides; he gallas GODAY izas gita xoono immides. Baqati bida olanchchati hayqqida asaappe ola miishshinne may7o xalla qaaratanaas Ele7eezerekko guye simmida. 
2Samuel23:11 Heedzdzanththozi Harare dere as Aage naa Shaama; Filisxeemeti Leehan kumeth misiray zerettida gaden istti issi bolla shiiqi dishin Isra7eele olanchchati Filisxeemeta sinththafe baqatida. 
2Samuel23:12 Shaamay gidikko ba eqqidaso yeddibeenna; he olaa eqettidi Filisxeemeta wodhides; he gallas GODAY gita xoono immides. 
2Samuel23:13 Kaththa shiisho wode Filisxeeme olanchchati Erafayme zullen dunkaani uttidaashe heedzdzu tammu halaqatappe heedzdzati Dawiti dizaso Adulaame gongolo yida. 
2Samuel23:14 He wode Dawiti miixa giddon dees; Filisxeeme olanchchati Beeteliheemen deettes. 
2Samuel23:15 Dawiti laamotidi, «Beeteliheeme penge achchan diza olla haaththaafe taas oonee ehanay!» gides." 
2Samuel23:16 Hessa gishshas erettida ola qara heedzdzati Filisxeeme olanchchata giddora kanththi biidi Beeteliheeme penge achchan diza haaththa ollafe duuqqi Dawites ehida; izi gidikko GODAA sinththan yarsho histti gussides attiin uyibeenna. 
2Samuel23:17 «Abeet GODAWU! Hayssa mala ooso ta wostta ooththoo? Hayssi taappe haakko! Hayssi bantta shemppo bolla pirdida asata suuth deennee?» giidi Dawiti uyana koyibeenna; hekko erettida heedzdzu ola qarati ooththida goobateththa oosoy hessa. 
2Samuel23:18 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabe ishaa Abisayey heedzdzu erettida ola qaratas halaqa; heedzdzu xeetu asaa bolla ba toora xongidi wodhidanne ha heedzdzu qarata mala erettida gooba asa. 
2Samuel23:19 Abisayey heedzdzatappe bollara keehi erettida as gidennee? Izi isttafe gidontta aggikokka izi isttas halaqa. 
2Samuel23:20 Hara erettida qaray Qabxi7eele dere as Yoodahe naa Bannayay gita erettida ooso ooththides. Izikka nam7u erettida Mo7aabe asata wodhides; qasseka shachchi bukkida gallas olla giddo gelidi gaammo wodhides. 
2Samuel23:21 Hessaththoka issi gita Gibxe as wodhides; he Gibxe addezi ba kushen toora oykkides; gido attiin Bannayay izara olettanaas guufe oykkidi izakko bides; Gibxe addeza kusheppe iza toora woththi ekkidi iza tooran iza wodhides. 
2Samuel23:22 Yoodahe naa Bannaya goobateththi hessa; izikka erettida heedzdzu qara asata mala erettida gooba asa. 
2Samuel23:23 Izi he heedzdzu tammu asatappe aadhdhi bonchchettidaade; gido attiin erettida heedzdzu qara asata mala sabettenna. Dawiti Bannaya ba bonchcho zabeta bolla shuumides. 
2Samuel23:24 He heedzdzu tammatappe baggayta sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa. Iyo7aabe ishaa Asaheele, Beeteliheeme dere as Doode naa Elyaane," 
2Samuel23:25 Harare dere as Shammaha, Harare dere as Eliqa," 
2Samuel23:26 Palixe dere as Heleexe, Tequhe dere as Iqesha naa Ira," 
2Samuel23:27 Anatoote dere as Abi7eezere, Huushe dere as Mebunaye," 
2Samuel23:28 Ahihohe dere as Xalmoone, Naxoofe dere as Mahiraye," 
2Samuel23:29 Naxoofe dere as Ba7aana naa Helebe, Biniyaame baggafe Gibi7a dere as Eribaye naa Ittaye," 
2Samuel23:30 Piraatoone dere as Bannaya, Ga7aashe zulle as Hidaaye," 
2Samuel23:31 Arabe dere as Abi-Elboone, Barhume dere as Azimoote," 
2Samuel23:32 Shaalboone dere as Eliyaahibe, Yashene nayta, Yoonataane," 
2Samuel23:33 Harare dere as Shammaha naa, Harare dere as Sharare naa Ahi7aame," 
2Samuel23:34 Ma7ikate dere as Ahasiba naa Elfaleexe, Gilo dere as Akxofeele naa El7aame," 
2Samuel23:35 Qarmeloose dere as Hexiro, Arabe dere as Paaraye," 
2Samuel23:36 Xoobba dere as Naataane naa Yigi7aale, Gaade dere as Baane," 
2Samuel23:37 Amoone dere as Zallaqa, Xuriya naa Iyo7aabes gondalle oykkiza Bi7eroote dere as Nahiraye," 
2Samuel23:38 Yatire dere as Ira, Yatire dere as Gaareebe," 
2Samuel23:39 Hessaththoka Hiite dere as Ooriyo, istti issi bolla heedzdzu tammanne laappuna." 
2Samuel24:1 Qasseka GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla keehi hanqettides; istta bolla Dawite denththeththidi, «Ba! Isra7eele asaanne Yuhuda asaa qooda!» gides." 
2Samuel24:2 Hessa gishshas kawozi Iyo7aabenne izara diza ola asaa azazizayta, «Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele qommota ubbatakko biite; istta qooday ay keena gididaakko nu erana mala ola asata mazgabite» gides." 
2Samuel24:3 Iyo7aabey kawozas, «GODAA ne Xoossay ola asaa xeetu kushe darso; ta godaa kawo ayfey hessa gakki beyo; gido attiin ta godaa kawoy hessaththo ooththanaas ays koyidee?» gides." 
2Samuel24:4 Gidikkoka kawoza qaalay Iyo7aabenne ola asaa azazizayta xoonida gishshas Isra7eele ola asaa mazgabanaas iza sinththafe kezi bida. 
2Samuel24:5 Istti Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidaappe guye shoobbaza giddon diza katamaappe dugeha baggara diza Aaro7eere matan dunkaanida; heeppeka Gaade baggara aadhdhi Iyaazeere bida. 
2Samuel24:6 Heeppe Gala7aadenne Hiite deren diza Qaadeese asaakko bida; qasse Daani-Jaanera yuuyidi Sidoona bida. 
2Samuel24:7 Qasse Xiroose miixa, Hiiweta katamatanne Kanaaneta katamata, wurseththan Yuhudappe dugeha baggara diza Bersaabehe bida." 
2Samuel24:8 Biittayo uddufun aginanne nam7u tammu gallas ubbaa yuuyi xeellidaappe guye Yerusalaame simmida. 
2Samuel24:9 Iyo7aabey ola asaa qooda ubbaa kawoza erisides; Isra7eelen 800,000 Yuhudan 500,000 mashsha shoddi olettana dandayzati beettida." 
2Samuel24:10 Dawiti olanchchata qoodidaappe guye ba wozinara modhettidi, «Ta gita nagara ooththadis; ha7ikka GODAWU! Tana ne aylleza ne maarana mala ta nena woossays; ha7ikka GODAWU tani ne aylley gita bala ooso ooththida gishshas maararkkii?» gides." 
2Samuel24:11 Wonteththa gallas Dawiti dendanaappe sinththan GODAA qaalay Dawites ajjuuta yootiza nabey Gaadekko yiidi," 
2Samuel24:12 «Baada Dawites, ‹GODAY nena isttafe issiniyo doorana mala heedzdzu yo7ota shiishshadis; ta ne bolla ooththana mala issiniyo doora› gides» gaada yoota." 
2Samuel24:13 Gaadey Dawitekko biidi, «Ne biitta bolla heedzdzu layththa koshay yo gay? Woykko ne morkketi nena heedzdzu agina gakkanaas gooddiin baqatana koyay? Woykko ne biitta bolla heedzdzu gallas kumeth iita hargey yo gay? Hessa gishshas tana kiittidayssas ta ay zaaro immanaakko qoppa» gides." 
2Samuel24:14 Dawiti Gaades, «Tani keeha ceecadis; iza maaroteththay gita gidida gishshas GODAA kushen nu kundana attiin ta asa kushen kundike» gides." 
2Samuel24:15 Hessa gishshas GODAY he gallassa maaladoppe doommidi ba barida gallas gakkanaas Isra7eele bolla iita harge yeddides; hessa gaason Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas 70,000 asi wurides." 
2Samuel24:16 GODAA kiitanchchay Yerusalaame dippi histtidi dhayssanaas ba kushe yeddiin asaa bolla gakkida qohoy GODAA qadheththides; histtiin dereza wursiza kiitanchchaza, «Gidana! Agga!» gides. He wode GODAA kiitanchchay Yaabuse dere as Orna bale achchan eqqi dees." 
2Samuel24:17 Dawiti dereza bolla bosha gaththiza kiitanchchaza be7idi GODAAS, «Nagara ooththiday tana, balettiday tana; hayti gidikko dorsata; istti ay mooridoo? Ne kushey ta bollanne ta keeththa bolla gido» gides." 
2Samuel24:18 He gallas Gaadey Dawitekko biidi, «Pude Yaabuse dere as Orna bale kezada GODAAS yarsho yarshanaaso giigsa» gides." 
2Samuel24:19 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAY Gaade baggara izas azazida mala kezides. 
2Samuel24:20 Ornay duge simmi xeellishin kawozinne iza derezi baakko yizayssa be7ides; izi kare kezidi izas biitta bolla hokki ziggides. 
2Samuel24:21 Ornaykka, «Kawoo! Ta godawu taakko intte ayllezakko ays yidetii?» gides. Dawiti zaaridi, «Deraa bolla yaana boshay simmana mala GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso giigsanaas ne baleza shammana yadis» gides." 
2Samuel24:22 Ornaykka Dawites, «Kawoy! Ta goday bana lo7idayssa ekkidi yarsho shiishsho; xuugettiza yarshos boorati deettes; eeso miththas kath bukkiza lodanne boora qambaray dees." 
2Samuel24:23 Kawoo! Tani Ornay hayssa ubbaa kawos immays» gides; qasseka Ornay, «GODAA ne Xoossay neekko xeello» gides." 
2Samuel24:24 Kawozi gidikko Ornas, «Hessaththo hanoppo; waagaza ta nees qanxxana bessees. GODAA ta Xoossaas miishshe qanxxontta yarsho shiishshike» gides. Hessa gishshas Dawiti balezanne boorata 50 saqilen shammides." 
2Samuel24:25 Heen Dawiti yarsho yarshizaso giigsides; xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshides; hessafe guye GODAY biittay gishshas shiiqida woosaa siyides. Isra7eele bolla yida boshazi simmides. 
1Kings1:1 Kawo Dawiti keehi cimmida gishshas izas ooththizayti iza meegoppe ashshanaas may7o iza bolla koriin aykkoka iza ho7anaas dandaybeenna. 
1Kings1:2 Hessa gishshas izas ooththizayti, «Kawoo! Nenara de7ashe nena lo7eththa naagana mala issi geela7o nees koyi ehinoo? Iza nenara aqikko nena ho7ana» gida." 
1Kings1:3 Isra7eele biitta ubbaan koyidi Abishaago geetettiza issi mala lo7o geela7iyo Suneme katamappe demmidi kawozas ehida. 
1Kings1:4 Izakka keeha mala lo7o; kawozara dashe izas ooththashe iza lo7eththa oykkadus; gido attiin izi izo ekkibeenna. 
1Kings1:5 Hagiti naa Adoniyaasi, «Ta kawotana koyays» gi dendides; para-gaaretanne parata qasseka izappe sinththe sinththe baanaas 50 asata giigsides." 
1Kings1:6 Iza aawaykka, «Ays hayssaththo ooththay?» gi mulekka seeri erenna. Adoniyaasi keehippe mala lo7o asa; izi Abeseloomes kaalo isha." 
1Kings1:7 Adoniyaasi Xuriya naa Iyo7aaberanne qeese Abiyaataarera ha yo7oza zorettides; isttika iza maaddanaas qofa qachchida. 
1Kings1:8 Gido attiin qeese Saadooqey, Yoodahe naa Bannayay, nabe Naataaney, Shim7ey, Era7eynne Dawite naagiza zabeti iza qofaa ekkibeettenna." 
1Kings1:9 Issi gallas Adoniyaasi En-Roogeele katama matan Zoheleete Zaalla geetettizason dorsata, booratanne ohala marata yarshides. Kawo nayta, ba ishata kawo shuume gidida Yuhuda asata ubbaa xeygides." 
1Kings1:10 Gido attiin nabe Naataane, Bannaya, kawo naagiza zabetanne ba isha Solomoone xeygibeenna." 
1Kings1:11 Hessafe guye Naataaney Solomoone aayo Bersaabeho, «Nu godaa Dawiti erontta dishin Hagiti naa Adoniyaasi kawotidayssa ne siyabeekkii?" 
1Kings1:12 Ha7i neni ne shempponne ne naaza Solomoone shemppo wostta ashshanaakko ane ta nena zorays. 
1Kings1:13 Kawo Dawitekko baada, ‹Kawoo, ta godawu! Taas ne aylleys ne naa Solomooney taappe guyen kawotana; ta araatankka izi uttana gaada caaqqabeekkii? Histtiin Adoniyaasi waani kawotidee?› ga oychcha." 
1Kings1:14 Neni kawozara heen haasayan dishin ta gelada ne gidayssi tumu gididayssa qonccisana» gides. 
1Kings1:15 Suneme katamappe yida Abishaaga cimmida kawoza heemmiza ilpinne giddo Bersaabeha kawoza haasayssanaas geladus. 
1Kings1:16 Bersaabeha kawoza sinththan zaqullada ba kushe denththadus; qasseka iza sinththan gulbatadus. Kawozikka izo, «Ay koyay?» giidi oychchides." 
1Kings1:17 Bersaabeha izas, «Ta godawu! Taas ne aylleys, ‹Taappe guyen ne naa Solomooney kawotana; ta araatankka izi uttana› gaada GODAAN, ne Xoossan neni caaqqadasa." 
1Kings1:18 Gido attiin ha7i Adoniyaasi kawotides; neni ta goday kawoy hessa erakka. 
1Kings1:19 Izi keehi daro meheta, ohala maratanne dorsata yarshides; Yarshishe kawo nayta ubbaa, qeese Abiyaataarenne ola gadawa Iyo7aabe xeygides; gido attiin ne aylleza Solomoone xeygibeenna." 
1Kings1:20 Ta godawu, kawoo! Neeppe guye ne kawoteththa araatan ooni uttanaakko eranaas Isra7eele asaa ubbaa ayfey nena xeelli uttides." 
1Kings1:21 Histtontta aggiko ta godaa kawoy hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttiza wode taninne ta naa Solomooney mooro ooththida asa mala qoodettana» gadus. 
1Kings1:22 Bersaabeha buro kawozara haasayan dishin nabe Naataaney gakki wodhdhides. 
1Kings1:23 Kawozas, «Nabe Naataaney yides» giidi yootida; izikka kawoza sinththan gufannidi ba kushe denththides." 
1Kings1:24 Hessafe guye Naataaney, «Ta godaa kawoo! Neeppe guye Adoniyaasi kawotana malanne ne araatan uttana mala erisadii?" 
1Kings1:25 Hach izi duge biidi keehi daro meheta, ohala maratanne dorsata yarshishe kawo nayta ubbaa, ola gadawatanne qeese Abiyaataare xeygides; izi ha7i izara mishenne uyishe, ‹Kawo Adoniyaasi mernaas kawoto!› geeththa bolla deettes." 
1Kings1:26 Gido attiin tana ne aylle, qeese Saadooqe, Yoodahe naa Bannayanne ne aylle Solomoone xeygibeenna." 
1Kings1:27 Ta godaa kawoo! Neeppe guyera ne kawoteththa araatan ooni uttanaakko ne aylleta erisontta dashe hayssa Adoniyaasi kawotana mala ooththiday nenee?» gides. 
1Kings1:28 Histtiin Kawo Dawiti, «Bersaabeho taas xeygite» gides; izakka kawozi dizaso gelada iza sinththan eqqadus." 
1Kings1:29 He wode kawozi izis, «Tana meto ubbaafe ashshida de7o GODAY beyiin!" 
1Kings1:30 GODAAN, Isra7eele Xoossan tani nees caaqqida caaqoza tumu hach polana; taappe guyen ne naa Solomooney kawotana; ta kawoteththa araatan izi uttana» gi caaqqides." 
1Kings1:31 Bersaabeha kawoza sinththan gufannada ba kushe denththadus; «Ta godaa, Kawo Dawiti mernaas kawoto!» gadus." 
1Kings1:32 Hessafe guye Kawo Dawiti, «Taas qeese Saadooqe, nabe Naataanenne Yoodahe naa Bannaya xeygite» gides; histtiin istti kawoza sinth shiiqida." 
1Kings1:33 Kawozi isttas, «Ta aylleta inttenara ekki biidi ta naa Solomoone ta baqulo togisidi duge Giyoone efte." 
1Kings1:34 Heen qeese Saadooqeynne nabe Naataaney iza tiydi Isra7eele asaa bolla kawoththetto; hessafe guye zaye punnidi intte qaala dhoqqu histtidi, ‹Kawo Solomooney mernaas kawoto!› giite." 
1Kings1:35 Hessafe guye intte iza azhabidi haa pude kezite; izi yiidi ta kawoteththa araatan utto; izi ta sohon uttidi deraa aysso; tani Isra7eele deraa bollanne Yuhuda deraa bolla iza shuumadis» gides. 
1Kings1:36 Yoodahe naa Bannayay kawozas zaaridi, «Amiin! Ta godaa kawoza, GODAY, Xoossay minththo!" 
1Kings1:37 GODAY, ta godaa kawozara gidida mala Solomoonerakka gido; iza kawoteththaa araata ta godaa kawo Dawite araataappeka aaththidi gitaso» gides." 
1Kings1:38 Hessa gishshas qeese Saadooqey, nabe Naataaney, Yoodahe naa Bannayay, Kelitetinne Peliteti Solomoone Kawo Dawite baqulo togisidi duge Giyoone azhabi efida." 
1Kings1:39 Qeese Saadooqey Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneppe zayte kaceza ekkidi Solomoone tiydi kawoththides; hessafe guye zaye punnida; ubba asaykka ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Kawo Solomooney mernaas kawoto!» gida." 
1Kings1:40 Asay ubbayka iza azhabidi pude bides; istti dinke punni punni kaa7ishe keehi ufayettida; asaa homboceththan biittay qaaxxides. 
1Kings1:41 Adoniyaasinne izara diza imaththati gibira mi wursishe hessa siyida; Iyo7aabey dinkeza giirissaa siyidi, «Hayssi katamaan seetettiza giirissay aazee?» gi oychchides." 
1Kings1:42 Izi buro haasayan dishin qeese Abiyaataare naa Yoonataaney gakki wodhdhides. Histtiin Adoniyaasi, «Ane haa gela; ne mala ammanettida asi lo7o wore ekki yontta aggenna» gides." 
1Kings1:43 Yoonataaneykka zaaridi, «Chii, yo7oy mulekka hessa mala gidenna; nu goday kawo Dawiti Solomoone kawoththides." 
1Kings1:44 Iza azhabana mala kawoy qeese Saadooqe, nabe Naataane, Yoodahe naa Bannaya, Kelitetanne Peliteta izara yeddides; istti iza kawaa baqulo togisida." 
1Kings1:45 Qeese Saadooqeynne nabe Naataaney, Giyoonen iza tiydi kawoththida; heeppe istti hombocishe pude bida; hessan katamay kooshumees; ha7i intte siyiza kooshunchchay hessa." 
1Kings1:46 Hessafe bollarakka Solomooney kawoteththa araatan uttides. 
1Kings1:47 Qasse kawo shuumeti nu godaa kawo Dawitekko yiidi, ‹Ne Xoossay Solomoone sunththaa ne sunththaafe dhoqqu histto! Iza kawoteththa araataakka neyssafe aadheth histto!› giidi anjjida; histtiin kawoy ba algan dishe hokki Xoossas goynnishe," 
1Kings1:48 ‹Ta kawoteththa araatan uttidi ta sohon kawotizayssa tana hach ta ayfen bessida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto!› gides» gi yootides. 
1Kings1:49 Hessa siyidi Adoniyaasi xeygida imaththati ubbay dagammi dendidi laalettida. 
1Kings1:50 Adoniyaasi gidikko Solomoones yayyidi bi yarshizasoza kaceta oykkides. 
1Kings1:51 Hessafe guye asay Solomoones, «Adoniyaasi kawo Solomoones yayyidi yarshizasoza kaceta oykkidi, ‹Kawo Solomooney tana ba aylleza giththa mashshan wodhdhontta mala taas hach caaqqo› gees» giidi yootida." 
1Kings1:52 Solomooney zaaridi, «Izi ba hemeth lo7eththiko haray attoshin iza hu7e binanappe issinakka gaden wodhdhuku; gido attiin iza bolla iitateththi beettiko izi hayqqana» gides." 
1Kings1:53 Hessafe guye kawo Solomooney as kiittiin istti biidi iza yarsho yarshizasoppe duge woththida; histtiin Adoniyaasi yiidi Solomoones ziggides; Solomooneykka iza, «Gede neso ba» gides." 
1Kings2:1 Dawiti hayqqiza wodey matiin ba naa Solomoone xeygidi izas basse bazides; 
1Kings2:2 Dawiti, «Tani hayqqana wodey matides; hessa gishshas minna; as gida." 
1Kings2:3 GODAA ne Xoossaa azazo naaga; iza ogetan hemetta; Muse wogan xaafettida mala iza awajjata, azazota, wogatanne maarata naaga; histtiko neni ooththiza miish ubbaynne neni biza soho ubbay nees injjetana." 
1Kings2:4 GODAY taas, ‹Ne zereththati bantta oge naagikko, ta sinththan bantta kumeththa wozinappenne bantta kumeththa shemppofe ammanettidi hemettiko ne zereththafe Isra7eele kawota araatan uttiza as mulekka dhayssike› gida hidota qaala polana." 
1Kings2:5 «Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey ta bolla ooththidayssa hessaththoka Isra7eele ola gadawata nam7ata, Neere naa Abineerenne Yootore naa Amasa bolla ooththidayssa neni ne hu7era eraasa; istti ola wode wodhidayssas halo kessanaas olay baynda saro wode izi istta wodhidi he suuththaan ba xeessa qabattonne ba toho caamma tunisides." 
1Kings2:6 Ooththana bessizayssa aadho erateththan ooththa; izi ceeggidi saro duufon gelontta mala ooththa. 
1Kings2:7 «Tani ne ishaa Abeseloomeppe baqatiza wode istti taas mille gidida gishshas Gala7aade biittan diza Barzile naytas lo7o ooththa; istti ne maaddan miza asaara issife metto. 
1Kings2:8 «Tani Mahanayme bida wode tana iita qanggeth qanggida Biniyaame biittan Bahirime katamappe yida Geera naa Shim7ey nenara dizayssa hassa7a; izi tana mokkanaas Yordaanoose shaafa duge yida wode, ‹Tani nena wodhikke› gaada izas GODAAN caaqqadis." 
1Kings2:9 Gido attiin ha7i neni iza xillo asa mala qoodoppa; nees aadho erateththi diza gishshas ooththanaas bessiza yo7ota ne eraasa; iza puulunththaa suuththara duge duufon gelththa» gides. 
1Kings2:10 Hessafe guye Dawiti hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; ba kataman Yerusalaamen moogettides. 
1Kings2:11 Dawiti Kebroonen 7 layth, Yerusalaamen 33 layth, issi bolla Isra7eelen 40 layth kawotides." 
1Kings2:12 Solomooney ba aawa Dawite kawoteththa araatan uttides; iza kawoteththika keehi minnides. 
1Kings2:13 Hagiti naa Adoniyaasi Solomoone aayo Bersaabehikko bides; Bersaabeha iza, «Neni taakko saros yadii?» gaada oychchadus. Izikka izis, «Ee; saros yadis» gides." 
1Kings2:14 Qasseka gujjidi, «Ta nees yootana yo7oy dees» gides. Izakka izas, «Ane yoota» gadus." 
1Kings2:15 Adoniyaasi izis, «Kawotanaas bessizay tana gididayssanne Isra7eele asay ubbay tana ba bolla kawoththanaas ba ayfe ta bolla yeggidayssa ne eraasa. Gido attiin yo7oti GODAAPPE gidida gishshas laametti wodhdhiin kawoteththay ta ishaas yuuyides." 
1Kings2:16 Ha7i ta nena issi miish oychchiko ne taas akkay gooppa» gides. Izakka, «Ane oychcha» gadus." 
1Kings2:17 Izikka, «Kawo Solomooney ne oychchida miish akkay gontta gishshas Suneme dere maccassayo Abishaago geetettiza geela7iyo tana ekisana mala iza taas oychcharkkii!» gides." 
1Kings2:18 Bersaabehakka zaarada, «Daro lo7o; tani hessa kawozas yootana» gadus." 
1Kings2:19 Hessa gishshas Bersaabeha Adoniyaasa kiitaa yootanaas kawo Solomoonekko geliin kawozi izo mokkanaas dendi eqqidi izo sarokkidaappe guye simmidi ba kawoteththa araatan uttides. Qasse ba aayo utissanaas hara araata ehisidi izo baappe ushachcha baggara utisides. 
1Kings2:20 Iza uttidaappe guye, «Ta nena oychchiza qeeri miishshi dawus; ne izo taas ero garkkii!» gadus. Kawozikka zaaridi izis, «Ta aayee, ta nena yeellasikke; ne koyidayssa oychcha» gides." 
1Kings2:21 Izakka izas, «Suneme dereppe yida Abishaago ne isha Adoniyaasi ekkana mala izas immarkkii!» gadus." 
1Kings2:22 Kawo Solomooney zaaridi ba aayo, «Suneme dereppe yida Abishaago xalla neni Adoniyaasas ays oychchay? Izi taas bayra gidida gishshas izas ta kawoteththaaka oychchanayssa aggadasa! Hessaththoka izas xalla gidontta dishin qeese Abiyaataaressinne Xuriya naa Iyo7aabeska oychchanayssa aggadasa!» gides." 
1Kings2:23 Kawo Solomooney GODAAN caaqqidi, «Adoniyaasi hayssa oychchida gishshas tani iza wodhontta aggiko GODAY tana wodho!" 
1Kings2:24 Ha7i tana ta aawaa Dawite kawoteththa araatan utisidi ba immida hidota mala ta kawoteththaa minththida GODAY beyiin Adoniyaasi hach hayqqana!» gides. 
1Kings2:25 Hessa gishshas Kawo Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya azaziin izi biidi Adoniyaasa wodhides. 
1Kings2:26 Hessafe guye Kawo Solomooney qeese Abiyaataare, «Neni ne dere Anatoote simma ba; nees hayqoy besseesishin nena tani ha7i wodhikke. Ays giikko neni ta aawaa Dawite sinththan Ubbaa Haariza GODAA Taabotaa tookkadasa; qasse ta aawara meto ekkadasa» gides." 
1Kings2:27 GODAY Seelon qeese Eele keeththa asaa gishshas yootidayssa polanaas Solomooney Abiyaataare GODAAS qeeseteththan ooththizasoppe diggides. 
1Kings2:28 Abeseloomera gidontta Adoniyaasara issife zuppetida Iyo7aabekko ha yo7oy gakkides; histtiin Iyo7aabey GODAA Dunkaanekko baqati biidi yarshizaso kaceta oykkides. 
1Kings2:29 Iyo7aabey GODAA Dunkkaanekko baqati biidi yarshizasoza lanqen dizayssa kawo Solomoones yootida; histtiin Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya, «Baada iza wodha!» gi azazides." 
1Kings2:30 Bannayay GODAA Dunkaaneza giddo gelidi Iyo7aabe, «Kawoy nena, ‹Hayssafe keza› gees» gides. Gido attiin izi zaaridi, «Ta hayssan hayqqana attiin kezikke» gides. Bannayay kawozas, «Iyo7aabey taas immida zaaroy hessa» giidi yootides." 
1Kings2:31 Kawo Solomooney Bannaya, «Izi gida mala wodhada mooga! Histtada Iyo7aabey xillota suuth gussida gomeppe tananne ta aawaa keeththaa geeshsha." 
1Kings2:32 Ta aawa Dawiti erontta dishin Iyo7aabey nam7u asata giththa mashshan wodhida suuththa gishshas GODAY iza ooso mala izas zaarana; Isra7eele ola gadawa Neere naa Abineerinne Yuhuda ola gadawa Yootore naa Amasi istti nam7ayka izappe keehi suure asa. 
1Kings2:33 Istta suuththaa acoy mernaas Iyo7aabe bollanne iza zereththa bolla gido; gido attiin Dawite bollanne iza keeththaa asaa bolla, iza zereththata bollanne iza kawoteththa araata bolla mernaas GODAA saroy gido» gides." 
1Kings2:34 Hessa gishshas Yoodahe naa Bannayay pude kezidi Iyo7aabe wodhiin izi bazzon diza ba gaden moogettides. 
1Kings2:35 Kawo Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya Iyo7aabe sohon ola gadawa histtidi shuumides; qasse Abiyaataare sohon qeese Saadooqe shuumides. 
1Kings2:36 Hessafe guye Kawo Solomooney Shim7es kiittidi, «Nees Yerusalaamen keeth keexxada heen de7a; heeppe haraso awakka booppa." 
1Kings2:37 Neni katamaappe kezada Qediroone shoobbaa pinnida gallas hayqqanayssa era; ne suuththa gomey nena oykkana» gides. 
1Kings2:38 Shim7ey zaaridi kawozas, «Neni gizayssi lo7o; tani ne aylley neni ta goday kawoy gidayssa ta polana» gides. Izikka Yerusalaamen daro wode de7ides." 
1Kings2:39 Gido attiin heedzdzu layththafe guye Shim7e aylletappe nam7ati betidi Ma7ika naa Geete kawo Ankusekko bida; he worey, «Ne aylleti Geeten deettes» geetettidi Shim7es yootettides." 
1Kings2:40 Hessa siyidi Shim7ey ba hare koori ekkidi ba aylleta koyanaas Ankusekko Geete biidi ba aylleta ekki yides. 
1Kings2:41 Shim7ey Yerusalaameppe Geete katama biidi simmidayssa Solomooney siyidi," 
1Kings2:42 Shim7e xeygisi shiishshidi, « ‹Yerusalaameppe kezada haraso bizaa gidikko ne hayqqana› gaada GODAA sunththan caaqeththada nees minththa yootabeekkinaa? He wode neni, ‹Ne gizayssi lo7o; eeno, ta azazettana› gadasa." 
1Kings2:43 Histtiin GODAAS caaqqida caaqonne ta azazo ays naagabeekkii?» gides. 
1Kings2:44 Qasseka kawoy Shim7es, «Ta aawa Dawite bolla neni ooththida iita ooso ubbaa ne wozinay erees. Ha7i gidikko ne iita ooso mala GODAY nees zaarana." 
1Kings2:45 Gido attiin Kawo Solomooney anjjettana; Dawite kawoteththa araataykka GODAA sinththan mernaas minni daana» gides. 
1Kings2:46 Hessafe guye kawozi Yoodahe naa Bannaya azaziin biidi Shim7e wodhides. Hessa gaason kawoteththay Solomoone kushen minni de7ides. 
1Kings3:1 Solomooney Gibxe kawo Paaroonera laggetidi iza nayo machcho ekkides; kawo keeththaa, GODAA Keeththaanne Yerusalaame yuushon diza dirsaa gimbi polanaashe gakkanaas izo ehidi Dawite kataman woththides." 
1Kings3:2 GODAA sunththas Xoossa Keeth keexettanaashe gakkanaas asay yarsho zumbullata bolla shiishshees. 
1Kings3:3 Solomooney GODAA siiqees; ba aawa Dawite wogaa mala dees; gido attiin zumbullata bolla yarsho yarsheessinne exaane cuwasees. 
1Kings3:4 Geba7ooney ubbaafe aadhdhi erettida yarshosoho gidida gishshas kawo Solomooney yarsho yarshanaas hee bides; Solomooney 1,000 mehe ehidi heen xuugettiza yarsho yarshides." 
1Kings3:5 GODAY Solomoones Geba7oonen omars agumon qonccides; Xoossi izas, «Ta nees immana mala ne koyza ay miishshika tana oychcha» gides." 
1Kings3:6 Solomooney izas, «Ta aawa Dawiti ne sinththan xilloteththan, tumateththaninne suureteththa wozinan simerettida gishshas ne aylleza gita kiyateth bessadasa; neni he gita kiyateththaa aggontta hach iza kawoteththa araatan uttiza attuma naa izas immadasa." 
1Kings3:7 «Abeet GODAWU, ta Xoossawu! Neni tana ne aylleza, ta aawa Dawite sohon kawosadasa; gido attiin tani buro yelaga gidida gishshas asaa wostta ayssanaakko ta erikke." 
1Kings3:8 Tani ne aylley neni doorida asaa giddoninne qooday baynda keehi daro asaa giddon de7ays. 
1Kings3:9 Hessa gishshas tani ne asaa ayssanaas lo7onne iita shaakkada erana mala taas ne ayllezas akeekiza wozina imma; histtontta aggiko ha gita dereza ooni kaaleththana dandayzee?» gides. 
1Kings3:10 Solomooney hessa oychchida gishshas GODAY ufayettides. 
1Kings3:11 Qasseka Xoossay iza, «Neni nees layththi aduqqana mala woykko durettana mala, woykko ne morkketi hayqqana mala gidontta deraa wogara ayssanaas aadho erateth oychchida gishshas," 
1Kings3:12 hessa ne oychchidayssa ta nees immana; neeppe kase oonaska imettonttanne neeppe guye oonikka demmontta aadho erateththaninne akeekay kumida wozina ta nees immana. 
1Kings3:13 Hessafekka bollara ne de7o layththan ubbaan kawota giddon nenara ginattiza kawoy dontta mala neni tana oychchontta dureteththinne bonchcho ta nees immana. 
1Kings3:14 Ne aawa Dawiti ta ogera bida mala nekka ta ogera biikko, ta wogaanne ta azazota naagikko ne layth ta adussana» gides." 
1Kings3:15 Hessafe guye Solomooney dhiskofe beeggidi hessi agumo gididayssa akeekides; izi Yerusalaame simmi biidi GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan eqqides; xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshides. Histtidi ba shuume ubbatas gibira kessides. 
1Kings3:16 He wode layman aqiza nam7u maccassati kawo Solomoonekko yiidi iza sinththan eqqida. 
1Kings3:17 Isttafe issiniya, «Ta godoo! Taninne ha maccassaya issi keeththan doos; heen iza tanara issife dishin tani naa yeladis." 
1Kings3:18 Ta yelida heedzdzanththo gallas izakka naa yeladus; he keeththan nu nam7atappe attiin haray oonikka deenna. 
1Kings3:19 «Issi gallassa omars hanna maccassaya ba naaza bolla ichchiin naazi hayqqides. 
1Kings3:20 Histtiin iza giddoth dendada tani ne ashkariya dhiskon dishin ta naaza ta ki7oppe ekka efada ba ki7on woththadus; qasse hayqqida ba naaza ehada ta ki7on woththadus. 
1Kings3:21 Wontiin tani ta naaza dhanththanaas dendishin hayqqi beettides; gido attiin tani maalado poo7on tishshi histta xeelliin ta yeloza gidonttayssa ta eradis» gadus. 
1Kings3:22 Hankko nam7anththo maccassaya qasse, «Chii! Paxa diza naazi tayssa; hayqqida naazi neyssa» gadus. Gido attiin koyro maccassaya zaarada, «Chii! Hayqqida naazi neyssa; paxa diza naazi tayssa» gadus; istti nam7ayka kawoza sinththan hessaththo gishe palamettida." 
1Kings3:23 Kawo Solomooney isttas, «Ha maccassaya, ‹Paxa diza naazi tayssa; hayqqida nay neyssa› gawus; hankkoorakka, ‹Chii! Hayqqidayssi ne naaza; paxa diza naazi ta naaza› gawus» gides." 
1Kings3:24 Kawozikka, «Taas giththa mashsha ekki yiite» gides; histtiin istti izas giththa mashsha ehida." 
1Kings3:25 He wode kawozi, «Paxa diza naaza nam7u kessi phalqidi issi baggaa issineys, issi baggaa hankkoors immite» gi azazides." 
1Kings3:26 Paxa diza naaza aaya ba naazas keeha mishettiza gishshas kawozas, «Ta godoo! Paxa diza naaza izis immaaga! Wodhopparkkii!» gadus. Gido attiin hankkoora, «Neeskka taaska imettofo; nam7u kezi shaaketto» gadus." 
1Kings3:27 Hessafe guye kawozi, «Ha paxa diza naaza ha koyro maccassays immite; naaza wodhopite; naaza aaya hannoko!» giidi pirdides." 
1Kings3:28 Asaas xilloteththan pirdanaas izas aadho erateththay Xoossafe imettidayssa be7ida gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay kawoy pirdida pirdaa siyida wode kawozas keehippe yayyides. 
1Kings4:1 Kawo Solomooney Isra7eele biitta ubbaa bolla kawotides. 
1Kings4:2 Izi shuumida alaafeti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. Saadooqe naa Azaariyaasi qeese. 
1Kings4:3 Shiisha nayti Elihorefinaynne Akayay waanna xaafeta; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafe; 
1Kings4:4 Yoodahe naa Bannayay ola gadawa; Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey qeeseta; 
1Kings4:5 Naataane naa Azaariyaasi dere ayssizaytas alaafe; Naataane naa Zaabudey qeesenne kawos mata zoranchcha; 
1Kings4:6 Ahishaarey kawo keeththa alaafe; Abida naa Adooniraami un7ettidi wolqqa ooso ooththizayta alaafe. 
1Kings4:7 Qasse Solomoones Isra7eele biitta ubbaan tammanne nam7u dereta ayssizayti deettes; istti kawossinne kawoson diza asaa ubbaas miza kath shiishshizayta; istti taran taran layththa giddon issi issi aginas gidiza kath eheettes. 
1Kings4:8 Istta sunththinne istta ayssiza zooneti hayssafe kaallidi xaafettida. Beeni-Huurey Efreeme gezze ayssees. 
1Kings4:9 Beeni-Diqaarey Maqaxa, Sha7albime, Beeti-Shemishenne Eeloonenne Beeti-Hanaane dereta ayssees." 
1Kings4:10 Beeni-Heseedi Arubboote deren diza Sookonne Hefeere dere ubbaa ayssees. 
1Kings4:11 Beeni-Abinadaabi Naafoti-Doore biitta ayssees; izikka Solomoone nayo Xaafiti azina. 
1Kings4:12 Ahiluude naa Ba7aanay Ta7inaakenne Magiddo dere, Phartaaneppe duge biidi Izra7eelen diza Beeti-Sha7aane gakkanaas, heeppeka biidi Yoqima7aame pinnidi Aabeeli-Mahoole dere gakkanaas dizayssa ayssees." 
1Kings4:13 Beeni-Gebeeri Gala7aaden diza Eramoote dere, Gala7aaden Minaase naa Ya7ire dereta, iza yuushon gimbenne gimbe pengetan xarqimala birata kolatati diza 60 gita katamatanne Baasaane biittan diza Argoba dere ayssees." 
1Kings4:14 Iddo naa Ahinaadaabi Mahanayme dere ayssees. 
1Kings4:15 Ahima7aasi Niftaaleme dere ayssees; izi Solomoone nayo Baasemaati azina. 
1Kings4:16 Hushe naa Ba7aanay Aaseerenne Ba7aaloote dere ayssees. 
1Kings4:17 Paaruhe naa Iyoosaafixey Yisakoore dere ayssees. 
1Kings4:18 Eela naa Shim7ey Biniyaame dere ayssees. 
1Kings4:19 Uure naa Gebeeri Gala7aade biittan diza Amooreta kawo Sihoone derenne Baasaane kawo Aage dere ayssees. He dereta ubbaa ayssizayta bolla alaafeteththi diza issi asi dees. 
1Kings4:20 Yuhuda asaa qoodaynne Isra7eele asaa qooday abba shaamintta mala corattides; istti mishenne uyishe ufayssan de7ida. 
1Kings4:21 Solomooney Efiraaxise Shaafaappe doommidi Filisxeeme biittaa gakkanaas, hessafekka bollara Gibxe zawa gakkanaas diza kawoteththata ubbaa haarides; he biitta asati izas giira giirida; istti izi diza layth ubbaan izas haarettida." 
1Kings4:22 Solomoones hach hach qumas 50 konttaale muuruta dhiille, 100 konttaale dhiille," 
1Kings4:23 dhiikettida 10 boorata, yeda miza 20 booratanne 100 dorsata, istta bollaka cofoshota, gaarata, genessatanne lo7o kafota koshshees." 
1Kings4:24 Solomooney Efiraaxise Shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara diza kawoteththata ubbaa Tifisa katamappe doommidi Gaaza katama gakkanaas haarides; ba yuushon diza ubbaa deretarakka saron de7ides. 
1Kings4:25 Solomooney de7ida layth ubbaan Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas Yuhuda asaynne Isra7eele asay ubbay ba woyne tura kuwaninne ba eththaa kuwan woppan uttida. 
1Kings4:26 Solomoones para-gaareta goochchiza 40,000 paratinne 12,000 toga asati deettes." 
1Kings4:27 He zooneta ayssizayti bana gakkida aginan taran taran kawo Solomoonessinne iza maaddafe maanaas yida asaas ubbaas aykkoka pacisontta shiishsheettes. 
1Kings4:28 Qasseka gaare goochchiza paratinne hankko parati bangganne harqqo ehidi woththizason woththeettes. 
1Kings4:29 Xoossay Solomoones aadho erateth, keehi gita akeekanne zaway baynda erateth immides." 
1Kings4:30 Solomoones diza aadho erateththay arshey mokkiza baggara dizayta aadho erateththafenne Gibxetas diza aadho erateththa ubbaafekka aadheththa. 
1Kings4:31 Izi asa ubbaafe aadho eranchcha; qasse izi Ezirahe as Etaaneppe, Maahola naytappe Hemaaneppe, Kalkoleppenne Daridaappeka aadho eranchcha; iza goobateththi iza yuushon diza kawoteth ubbaan siyettides." 
1Kings4:32 Izi 3,000 leemisota haasaydes; qasseka 1,005 yeththata yexxides." 
1Kings4:33 Solomooney Libaanoose zigappe biidi keeththa gimbe bolla mokkiza hisophphe mith gakkanaas diza doozata gishshas yootides; hessaththoka meheta, do7ata, kafota, sa7ara gooshettiza medheteththata gishshassinne moleta gishshas tamaarsides." 
1Kings4:34 Iza aadho erateththaa siyida sa7a kawota ubbaafe kiitettidayti iza aadho erateththaa siyanaas yida. 
1Kings5:1 Xiroose Kawo Kiraamey Dawitera ba diza layth ubbaan siiqon gam7ida gishshas Solomooney ba aawa Dawite sohon kawotanaas tiyettidayssa siyidi ba oosanchchata Solomoonekko kiittides. 
1Kings5:2 Solomooneykka Kiraames zaaridi," 
1Kings5:3 «Ta aawaa Dawite bolla ubbasora dendida olaa gaason GODAY iza morkketa iza tohoppe garsara haarisana gakkanaas GODAA ba Xoossaa sunththaas Keeththe izi keexxana dandayontta aggidayssa ne eraasa. 
1Kings5:4 Ha7i gidikko GODAA ta Xoossay taas ubbasora saroteth immida gishshas taas morkkey woykko iita miishshi deenna. 
1Kings5:5 GODAY ta aawa Dawites, ‹Tani ne sohon ne kawoteththa araatan kawoththiza ne nay ta sunththas Keeth keexxana› gida mala tani GODAA ta Xoossaa sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanaas qoppadis." 
1Kings5:6 Hessa gishshas Libaanooseppe ziga taas qanxxiza asata azaza; ta asati ne asatara ooththana; ne asatas neni qanxxa gida damoza tani qanxxana. Sidoona asaa mala miththa qanxxo hiilla nu asay eronttayssa neni eraasa» gi kiittides. 
1Kings5:7 Kiraamey Solomoone kiitaza siyidi keehippe ufayettidi, «Ha wolqqama deraa ayssanaas Dawites aadho erateththan kumida naa immida GODAY hach galatetto» gides." 
1Kings5:8 Hessafe guye Kiraamey Solomoones, «Neni taas kiittida kiitay tana gakkides. Neni koyidayssa ubbaa tani ooththana; ziga mudeththatanne xiidda mudeththata tani nees shiishshana." 
1Kings5:9 Ta asay mudeththata Libaanooseppe duge abba mata gakkanaas miiyana; tanikka istta qachcha caanada abbaa bollara tookettidi neni malatidaso gaththada ta birshisana; neni heeppe ekkada ne baggara ta kawoteththa keeththan diza asaas miza kath yeddada ta amo kunththa» gi kiittides. 
1Kings5:10 Hessaththo ooththidi Kiraamey Solomooney koyida keena ziga mudeththatanne xiidda mudeththata ubbaa shiishshides. 
1Kings5:11 Solomooneykka kawo Kiraame kawoteththa keeththan diza asatas qallaba gidana mala 20,000 konttaale gisttenne muuruta wogara zayte 400,000 litiro layththan layththan pacey baynda Kiraames shiishshees." 
1Kings5:12 GODAY Solomoones immida hidota qaalaa mala izas aadho erateth immides. Kiraamessinne Solomoones lo7o gaytoteththi diza gishshas bantta giddon caaqettida. 
1Kings5:13 Kawo Solomooney Isra7eele asa ubbaafe 30,000 gabbarata doorides." 
1Kings5:14 Adooniraame istta bolla halaqa histti shuumides. Gabbaratakka tammu tammu shiyan shaakki heedzdzu kessides; issi issi buttey issi agina Libaanoosen ooththana malanne nam7u agina bason bason shempana mala tara oyththides. 
1Kings5:15 Solomoones tooho tookkiza 70,000 asatinne shuch qeriza 80,000 asati gezzen deettes." 
1Kings5:16 Qasseka oosoza aawateththan kaaletti oosisiza 33,000 alaafeti deettes." 
1Kings5:17 Isttika Kawo Solomooney azaziin Xoossa Keeththaas yoch gidana mala wogga muuruta shuchchata qeridi massida. 
1Kings5:18 Kushe hiillateth eriza Solomoone asati, Kiraame asatinne Gebaale asati Xoossa Keeththaas koshshiza miththinne shuch qeri giigsida." 
1Kings6:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida oyddu xeetanne osppun tammanththa layththan Solomooney Isra7eele bolla kawotida oydanththo layththan Ziife geetettiza nam7anththo aginan GODAA Keeth keexo doommides. 
1Kings6:2 Solomooney GODAAS keexxida Keeththaas adussateththay 60 wadha, gomppay 20 wadha, dhoqqateththay 30 wadha." 
1Kings6:3 Xoossa Keeththaa daaranchchaza gomppay 20 wadha gidishin izas adussateththay 10 wadha kare kezees. 
1Kings6:4 Xoossa Keeththaas soo baggara aakkidi kare baggara xuummida maskooteti deettes. 
1Kings6:5 Xoossa Keeththaa yuushon ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a kifile godaara oyseththidi hara kifileta keexxides; 
1Kings6:6 Pooqezas garsa kifileza gomppay 5 wadha, bolla nam7anththo kifileza gomppay 6 wadha, bolla heedzdzanththo kifileza gomppay 7 wadha; aykkoyka Xoossa Keeththa gimbeza kanththi gelontta mala iza yuushon kare baggara keelata keelides." 
1Kings6:7 Xoossa Keeththazi gimbettida shuchchati masetti giigiday heen ba dizason gidida gishshas Xoossa Keeththay keexettishin naariqa giirissi, kaltta giirissi woykko hara biratata giirissi Xoossa Keeththa heeran seetettibeenna." 
1Kings6:8 Pooqezas garsa kifileza geliza pengey Xoossa Keeththaafe dugeha baggara dees; heeppe pude nam7anththo pooqezanne heedzdzanththo pooqeza baanaas yedhdhi yedhdhi keziza kechchi dees. 
1Kings6:9 Hessaththo ooththidi Solomooney keeththaa keexxi polides; histtidi kaaraza soo baggara ziga sanqqan kammides. 
1Kings6:10 Qasse Xoossa keeththaa yuushon isttas dhoqqateththay ichchashu ichchashu wadha gidida kifileta keexxides; histtidi Xoossa Keeththa godaara ziga sanqqan oyseththides. 
1Kings6:11 GODAA qaalay Solomoonekko yides; 
1Kings6:12 histtidi, «Hayssa neni keexxida Xoossa Keeththaan ta wogaa, ta azazonne maaraa ne naagikko tani ne aawa Dawites immida hidota qaalaa ne baggara polana." 
1Kings6:13 Histtada tani Isra7eele asaa giddon de7ana; tani ta deraa Isra7eele yegga aggike» gides. 
1Kings6:14 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaa keexxi giigides. 
1Kings6:15 Xoossa Keeththaa godaa soo baggara ziga sanqqan kammides; wuygeza qasse xiidda sanqqafe ooththides. 
1Kings6:16 Xoossa Keeththaa giddon guye baggara 20 wadhazi Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a gidana mala wuygeppe biidi kaara gakkanaas ziga sanqqan gordides. 
1Kings6:17 He Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththa baggara diza wuygezas adussateththay 40 wadha. 
1Kings6:18 Xoossa Keeththas soo baggay pudhiza ciishshataninne ciishshata mislen aleqettides; giddo baggara ziga sanqqan kamettida gishshas mulekka gimbe shuchchi beettenna. 
1Kings6:19 Solomooney Caaqo Taabotaa woththanaas Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a giigsides. 
1Kings6:20 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aa adussateththay 20 wadha, gomppay 20 wadha, dhoqqateththay 20 wadha. Solomooney he Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aas soo baggaa muuruta worqqan meeshides; zigappe oosettida yarsho yarshizasozakka worqqan meeshides." 
1Kings6:21 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaas giddo baggaza muuruta worqqan meeshides; worqqan meeshettida Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aas sinththa baggara worqqa sansalatan aleqissides. 
1Kings6:22 Histtidi Keeththaas soo giddoza worqqan meeshides; hessaththoka Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azan diza yarshosoza muuruta worqqan meeshides. 
1Kings6:23 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azan woththanaas issaas issaas geesay 10 wadha gidiza nam7u kirube misleta wogara miththafe massidi giigsides. 
1Kings6:24 Koyro kirubeza qefey issoy ichchashu wadha; nam7anththozi ichchashu wadha; koyro qefe xeerappe biidi nam7anththo qefeza xeera gakkanaas tammu wadha. 
1Kings6:25 Nam7anththo kirubeza qefeykka tammu wadha; nam7u kirubeta medhaynne gubbay issi gina. 
1Kings6:26 Issi issi kirube geesay tammu wadha. 
1Kings6:27 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththan diza Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan kirubeta woththides; istta qefey micetti uttides; issi kirubeza qefey issi bagga godaa bochchishin hankko kirubeza qefey hankko bagga godaa bochchees; istta nam7ata qefey soo giddon issoy issaara gayttees. 
1Kings6:28 Solomooney kirubetakka worqqan meeshides. 
1Kings6:29 Ubbaafe Dummatiza Giddo Qol7aza soo baggaranne kare baggara godaa kirube misletan, zamba misletaninne ciishsha misletan alleqissides." 
1Kings6:30 Qasseka Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azanne Xoossa Keeththaa wuygeza ubbaa worqqan meeshides. 
1Kings6:31 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a gelizasozas pengeza wogara miththafe sanqqata giigsides; qosilaththatassinne qoretas ichchashu zoozey dees. 
1Kings6:32 Wogara miththafe oosettida nam7u sanqqata kirube misletan, zambata misletaninne ciishsha misletan alleqissides; heyta ubbaa worqqan meeshides." 
1Kings6:33 Hessaththoka Xoossa Keeththaa gelizaso pengezan wogarappe oosettida oyddu zoozera diza qosilath essides. 
1Kings6:34 Nam7u nam7u sanqqati maaxafan issi bolla oykettida nam7u sanqqata giigsides. 
1Kings6:35 Istta bolla kirube misleta, zamba misletanne ciishsha misleta medhdhides; he misleta muuruta worqqan meeshides." 
1Kings6:36 Xoossa Keeththan giddo wuygen masettida shuch heedzdzu maaran licides; qasse issi maaran ziga sanqqa licides. 
1Kings6:37 Solomooney kawotida oydanththo layththan, Ziife geetettiza nam7anththo aginan GODAA Keeththaa yochchi yegettides." 
1Kings6:38 Solomooney kawotida tammanne issinththa layththan, Buule geetettiza osppunththa aginan Xoossa Keeththay kase keexxanaas qoppida mala keexetti giigides; Solomooney Xoossa Keeththa laappun layththan keexxi kunththides." 
1Kings7:1 Solomooney ba keeth keexxi giiganaas 13 layth ekkides. 
1Kings7:2 Libaanoose Wora geetettiza kawoteththa keeth keexxides; he keeththaas adussateththay 100 wadha, gomppay 50 wadha geesay 30 wadha; oyddu maaran eqqida ziga tuussati tuuqi oykkida zigappe oosettida zongalththati deettes." 
1Kings7:3 Tuussati tookki oykkiza gede wodhdhiza miththati deettes; issi maara bolla 15 zongalththati deettes; heyti issi bolla oyddu tammanne ichchasha. He zongalththatappe bollara kaara kammiza ziga sanqqati deettes. 
1Kings7:4 He keeththaa maskooteti heedzdzu maaran dhoqqu gi oosettida; istti issoy issaara ginan deettes. 
1Kings7:5 Pengetassinne maskootetas oyddu zoozera diza qosilaththati deettes; maskooteti heedzdzu maaran oosettida; istti issoy issaara ginan deettes. 
1Kings7:6 Solomooney daro tuussatara diza Keeththe geetettiza keeth keexxides; he keeththaas adussateththay 50 wadha, gomppay 30 wadha; sinththa baggara tuussan uttida kaaray diza asi simerettiza daaranchchay dees." 
1Kings7:7 Qasse izi pirda pirdanaas uttiza shilota keeth keexxides; he keeththay wuygeppe biidi kaara gakkanaas ziga sanqqan gordettides. 
1Kings7:8 Pirda Keeththaafe guye baggara diza zagon kawoteththa keeththaa baas daanaso hankko keeththaa mala ooththi keexxides; Solomooney ba machcho Paaroone nayis hessa mala kawoteththa keeth keexxi immides. 
1Kings7:9 He keeththati ubbay kareppe biidi gita zagoza gakkanaas, yochchaafe biidi kaara gakkanaas ginan ginan qanxxetti masettida shuchchatan keexettida." 
1Kings7:10 Yochchazikka wodhdhiday 10 wadhaninne 8 wadhan lo7i masettida gita shuchchatanna. 
1Kings7:11 Izappe bolla baggara mixen mixen masettida lo7o shuchchatinne ziga sanqqati deettes. 
1Kings7:12 Xoossa Keeththaa wuygey yaanne haa simerettiza daaranchchaara gujjiin gita zagoza mala lo7i masettida heedzdzu yuusho shuchchan, issi yuusho ziga sanqqan gimbettides." 
1Kings7:13 Kawo Solomooney kiittidi Kiraame geetettiza as Xiroose katamappe ehisides. 
1Kings7:14 Niftaaleme qommofe gidida Kiraame aaya am7o; iza aaway Xiroose asa; xarqimala oosonkka erettida hiillanchcha; Kiraamey xarqimala qoxxiza hiillateththi diza asa; izi xarqimalappe qoxxidi kessiza ooso ubbaan akeekan, erateththaninne hiillateththan keehi loohida asa; izikka kawo Solomoonekko yiidi baas imettida ooso ubbaa ooththides." 
1Kings7:15 Kiraamey issi issi geesay 18 wadha, yuuyi aadhdhanaas ordeteththay 12 wadha gidida nam7u xarqimala tuussata ooththides." 
1Kings7:16 Hessaththoka tuussata xeeran woththanaas nam7u qustteta xarqimalappe seerisidi ooththides; issi issi qusttey ichchash wadha aduqqees. 
1Kings7:17 Tuussaa hu7en diza qusttetas alleqo gidana mala issi qusttes gite misatiza laappun sansalata ooththides. 
1Kings7:18 Tuussata bolla diza qustteta aleqissanaas issi issi gite sansalata yuushon nam7u maaran oroomaaneta oosisides; nam7u qusttetaska hessaththo ooththides. 
1Kings7:19 Daaranchchan eqqida tuussata hu7en diza qustteta adussateththay 4 wadha; istta bolla suufe ciish misatiza ciishshi dees. 
1Kings7:20 Nam7u tuussata hu7e bolla diza gite sansalatatappe kaallidi diza edzdzoy uttidasohoppe bolla baggara 200 oroomaane teera misleti nam7u maaran yuuyi aadhdhi deettes. 
1Kings7:21 Kiraamey he nam7u tuussata hee haa simerettizason Xoossa Keeththaa daaranchchan essides; dugeha baggara essida tuussaa Yaakine, pudeha baggara essidayssa Boo7eeze gi sunththides." 
1Kings7:22 Tuussata hu7en diza qustteti suufe ciish misateettes; hessa malan tuussata oosoy polettides. 
1Kings7:23 Kiraamey izas medhay edzdzo mala gita gabate xarqimalappe seerisi medhdhides; he gita gabateza doonay ha gaxaappe ya gaxa gakkanaas 10 wadha; geesay 5 wadha; yuuyi aadhdhanaas qasse 30 wadha. 
1Kings7:24 Gita gonggeza doonan kare baggara ziqqi giidi izara oyketti medhettida gose misleti deettes; he misleti nam7u maaran issi issi wadhan tammay tammay yuuyi aadhdhanaas shuuyettides. 
1Kings7:25 He gita gabatey xarqimalappe medhettida 12 boora misleta zokkon uttides; boorata misletappe heedzdzati pudeha bagga, heedzdzati arshey wulliza bagga, heedzdzati dugeha bagga, heedzdzati qasse arshey mokkiza bagga simmi uttida; gita gabatezi istta bolla uttides; isttas guye baggay giddo simmi uttides." 
1Kings7:26 He gita gonggezas ordeteththay kushe qaa7a likke; iza doonay ciishsha misatidi wanca misatees; he gita gabatezi 40,000 litiro gidiza haath oykkees." 
1Kings7:27 Kiraamey qasse dumma dumma miishshata woththiza tammu gaareta xarqimalappe medhdhides; he gaaretas issaas issaas adussateththay 4 wadha, gomppay 4 wadha, geesay 3 wadha." 
1Kings7:28 He gaareti hessaththo oosettida; pude eqqida oyddu biratata bolla piddi gida lochcha xarqimalati oyketti uttida. 
1Kings7:29 He xarqimalata bolla gaammota, booratanne kirubeta misatissidi medhdhida misleti deettes; gaammota misletappenne boorata misletappe bolla baggaranne garsa baggara qoxetti giigida ciishsha enccursa misleti deettes." 
1Kings7:30 Miishshata istta bolla woththiza xarqimalappe oosettida oyddu gaareti deettes; he gaareti genderana mala oykkida marcoti deettes; hessaththoka oyddu baggara meechcha gonggey istta bolla uttiza xarqimalappe oosettida ciishsha enccursatan alleqetti uttida. 
1Kings7:31 Meechcha gonggeza qoodhe geesay issi tadhdhako; qasse gonggeza geesay issi wadha mala; izikka edzdzo mala; gonggeza qoodhey misletan alleqetti uttides; iza tookki oykkida oyddu gulay dees attiin edzdzo deenna. 
1Kings7:32 Oyddu gaaretas issaas issaas geesay issi wadhanne bagga; he gaareti lochcha xarqimalaappe garsa baggara deettes; gaareti istta bolla miishshe woththizasotara issife marcon oyketti uttida. 
1Kings7:33 Gaareti ola para-gaare misateettes; gaareta issi bolla gaththi waaxiza marcoti, charketinne taagoti ubbayka xarqimalappe oosettida." 
1Kings7:34 He gaareta ubbaa zoozetaska istta tohosora tohosora isttara issino gidi oykettidi xarqimalappe medhettida zemppoti deettes. 
1Kings7:35 Issi issi gaareza hu7e yuushon izas geesay issi wadhas bagga pireemey dees; zemppotinne lochcha xarqimalati gaarezara oyketti issino gidi oosettida. 
1Kings7:36 Ha zemppotappenne lochcha xarqimalatappe giddon diza hankko attida sohoti ubbay kirubetan, gaammotaninne zambata misletan alleqetti uttida; qasse istta yuushoy ciishsha enccursa mislen alleqetti uttides." 
1Kings7:37 Tammu gaaretikka hessaththo oosettida; istti seeridi medhettida miishshay issino gidida gishshas istta geesaynne medhay issi mala. 
1Kings7:38 Kiraamey tammu meechcha gonggeta xarqimalappe medhdhides; issi issi gongge gomppay 4 wadha gididi, 880 litiro haath oykkees; 10 gaaretas hu7en hu7en issi issi meechcha gonggey dees." 
1Kings7:39 Kiraamey ichchash gaareta Xoossa Keeththaas pudeha baggara, ichchashata qasse Xoossa Keeththaas dugeha baggara woththides; qasse xarqimalappe oosettida gita gabateza Xoossa Keeththaafe dugeha baggara arshey mokkiza baggara gula bolla essides." 
1Kings7:40 Qasse Kiraamey xaarota, qaphetanne distteta medhdhides; histtidi kawo Solomoones GODAA Keeththa oosota hayssafe kaallizayssa mala ooththi polides." 
1Kings7:41 Heytikka nam7u tuussata; he tuussata hu7e bolla woththiza edzdzo mala oosettida nam7u qustteta, tuussata bolla diza qustteta alleqissiza nam7u gite mala sansalatata," 
1Kings7:42 qustteta bollanne tuussata bolla nam7u maaran oosettida gite mala sansalatata, alleqissiza 400 oroomaane teera misleta," 
1Kings7:43 tammu gaareta, tammu meechcha gonggeta," 
1Kings7:44 gita gonggezanne iza tookkida 12 boora misleta," 
1Kings7:45 xaarota, qaphetanne distteta. Kiraamey Kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththa oosos go7ettana mala ha miishshata ubbaa qucettidi xolqiza Xarqimalappe ooththides." 
1Kings7:46 Kawo Solomooney Sukooteppenne Phartaaneppe giddon Yordaanoose dembaan de7iza xarqimala seerisizason hayta ubbaa oosisides. 
1Kings7:47 Xarqimalappe medhettida ha miishshay ubbay keehi daro gidida gishshas Solomooney iza meezanissibeenna; hessa gishshas ha medhettida miishshati ay keena deexokko erettibeenna. 
1Kings7:48 Qasseka Solomooney GODAA Keeththa giddon go7ettana mala oosisida miishshati ubbay hayssafe kaallizayta. Worqqafe oosettida yarsho yarshizaso, GODAA sinththan woththiza ukeththati uttiza worqqa xaraphpheeza," 
1Kings7:49 ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththan ichchashati, ushachcha baggara ichchashati, hadirsa baggara eqqida worqqafe oosettida xomppe woththiza ballata, ciishshata, xomppetanne qapheta," 
1Kings7:50 xuu7ata, xomppe toyssiyizayta, xaarota, exaane istta bolla cuwasizayta, tama ekkiza miishshatanne, Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a pengetassinne Xoossa Keeththa pengetas gidiza maxaafata. Ha miishshati ubbay worqqafe oosettida." 
1Kings7:51 Kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththa ooso ubbaa polidaappe guye iza aawa Dawiti GODAAS dummasi woththida bira, worqqanne hara miishshatakka ubbaa ehidi Xoossa Keeththa miish minjjizason woththides." 
1Kings8:1 Hessafe guye kawo Solomooney Taabotaza Dawite katama Xiyooneppe kessidi Xoossa keeth ehanaas Isra7eele cimata, korapinnetanne Isra7eele keeththa asaa halaqata ba dizaso Yerusalaame katama shiishshides." 
1Kings8:2 Etaanime geetettiza laappunththa aginan Daase Ba7aaley bonchchettiza wode Isra7eele attuma asay ubbay kawo Solomoonekko shiiqides. 
1Kings8:3 Isra7eele cimati ubbay shiiqiin qeeseti Taabotaza denththi tookkida. 
1Kings8:4 Lewetinne qeeseti Taabotaa, Dunkkaanezanne iza giddon diza geeshsha miishshata ubbaa tookkidi ehida." 
1Kings8:5 Kawo Solomooneynne izara diza Isra7eele asay kumeth Taabotaa sinththan shiiqidi qoodanaas dandayettontta cora dorsatanne boorata yarshida. 
1Kings8:6 Hessafe guye qeeseti Taabotaa Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan kirube misleta qefetappe garsa baggara woththida. 
1Kings8:7 Micetti uttida kirubeta qefeti Taabotaanne Taabotaa tookkiza miththaa kammida. 
1Kings8:8 Tooho miththati keehippe adussa gidida gishshas istta xeeray Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththa baggara dishe beetteettes; gido attiin Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aas sinththa baggara gidontta hara baggara dizaytas beetettenna; istti hanno gakkanaas heen deettes. 
1Kings8:9 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida wode GODAY isttara caaqettida Siina zuma bolla Musey Taabotaa giddon woththida masettida nam7u shuchchatappe attiin haray aykko miishshika baawa. 
1Kings8:10 Qeeseti Geeshshasozappe keziin shaaray GODAA Keeth kumi uttides. 
1Kings8:11 He shaaraa giddon diza Xoossa bonchchoy sohoza kumida gishshas qeeseti bantta ooso ooththanaas dandaybeettenna. 
1Kings8:12 Hessafe guye Solomooney, «Abeet GODAWU, neni, ‹Tani dhuma shaaran de7ana› gadasa." 
1Kings8:13 Hekko tani neni izan mernaas de7ana mala gita Keeth keexxadis» gi woossides. 
1Kings8:14 Isra7eele as ubbay duulatan kumi eqqidishin kawoy isttako simmidi," 
1Kings8:15 «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto! Ta aawa Dawites ba doonan yootida hidota qaalaa ba kushen polides; he izi immida hidotay," 
1Kings8:16 ‹Ta deraa Isra7eele tani Gibxe biittafe kessida gallassafe doommiin ta sunththay izan xeygettana mala Xoossaa keeth keexxanaas Isra7eele qommota katamatappe issaaka doorabeekke; gido attiin ta deraa Isra7eele kaaleththana mala Dawite dooradis› gees. 
1Kings8:17 «Ta aawa Dawiti GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanaas ba wozinan qoppides. 
1Kings8:18 GODAY ta aawaa Dawites, ‹Neni ta sunththas Xoossa Keeth keexxanaas ne wozinan qoppidayssi lo7o;" 
1Kings8:19 gido attiin Xoossa Keeththaa keexxanay nena gidakka; ta sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanay ne gulbateppe yelettana ne naa› gides. 
1Kings8:20 «GODAY ba immida hidota qaala polides; GODAY immida hidota qaalaa mala tani ta aawaa Dawite sohon kawotada Isra7eele kawoteththa araatan uttadis. Qasseka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxadis. 
1Kings8:21 GODAY nu aawata Gibxeppe kessida wode isttara caaqettida caaqo qaalay izan diza Taabotay daanaso ta iza giddon giigsadis» gi anjjides. 
1Kings8:22 Hessafe guye Solomooney GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso sinththan kumeththa Isra7eele deraa duulatay dizason eqqidi ba kushe pude salo denththides; 
1Kings8:23 histtidi, «Abeet GODAWU, Isra7eele Xoossawu! Bolla salon woykko garsa sa7an ne mala Xoossi deenna; ba kumeththa wozinan ne sinththan minni eqqida ne oosanchchatas ne caaqqida qaalaa naagizaynne ne mino siiqoza qonccisizay nena." 
1Kings8:24 Ne ashkaraas ta aawaa Dawites neni ooththana gaada immida hidota naagadasa; neni kase ne doonan yootida hidota qaalaa ne kushen hach poladasa. 
1Kings8:25 «Ha7ikka abeet GODAWU, Isra7eele Xoossawu! Neni ne ashkaraas ta aawa Dawites, ‹Neni ta sinththan simerettida mala ne naytikka ta sinththan simerettiko ta sinththan Isra7eele kawoteththa araatan uttiza asi mulekka dhayenna› neni gida qaalaa pola." 
1Kings8:26 Ha7ikka abeet Isra7eele Xoossawu! Neni ne ashkaraas ta aawa Dawites immida hidota qaalay poletto. 
1Kings8:27 «Tumappe Xoossi sa7a bolla de7i erizee? Be7a saloy, salotappe bollan diza saloykka nena oykkana dandayenna; histtiin hayssi ta keexxida Xoossa Keeththay nees ay gidanee!" 
1Kings8:28 Gidikkoka abeet GODAWU, ta Xoossawu! Tani ne ashkaray hach woossizayssanne shoobbizayssa neni ezga." 
1Kings8:29 Neni, ‹Ta sunththay he sohon daana› gida hayssa Xoossaa keeththaa ne ayfey omarsinne gallas xeello; tani ne ashkaray hayssa keeththaako simmada woossiza woosaa neni siya." 
1Kings8:30 Tani ne ashkaraynne ne dere Isra7eeley hayssa Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi shoobbi woossiza woosaa ne siya; ne duussason salon dashe siyada nuus atto ga. 
1Kings8:31 «Issi asi ba lagge qohidi kashii giin iza caaqeththanaas ehiin hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa giddon diza yarshizasoza sinththan izi caaqqiko," 
1Kings8:32 neni salon dashe hessa siyada pola; ne aylleta giddon pirda qohidaades iza ooso mala izas zaara; xillozas iza xilloteththaa qonccisada shatumissa. 
1Kings8:33 «Ne dere Isra7eeley nena qohida gaason ba morkketan xoonettidi istti neekko simmidi ne sunththaa xeygikko ha Xoossa Keeththan nena woossikonne nena shoobbiko," 
1Kings8:34 neni salon dashe siya; ne dere Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga; histtada neni istta aawatas immida biittayo istta zaara gelththa. 
1Kings8:35 «Ne asay ne bolla ooththida nagara gaason saloy gordettiin iray bukkontta ixxiko, istti hayssa Keeththaako simmi ne sunththaa xeygi woossiko, istti bantta nagarappe simmiko neni istta woosaa salon dashe siya." 
1Kings8:36 Histtada ne ashkara Isra7eele deraa nagara atto ga; istti hemettanaas bessiza lo7o oge istta tamaarsa; hessafe guye neni ne deraa laatissida biittan ira bukisa. 
1Kings8:37 «Biittaa bollan koshay woykko iita hargey, woykko kutul7ey shocikko woykko qooykko, woykko booley, woykko gumbaroy biitta bollan yiikko, woykko morkkey istta katamata dooddiko, woykko ay bashshika woykko hargey yiikko," 
1Kings8:38 Ne dere Isra7eeleppe oonikka ba wozinan un7ettidayssa eridi ba kusheta haa Xoossa Keeththaako miccidi shoobbi woossiko," 
1Kings8:39 neni istta woosaa salon dashe siyada istta nagaraa atto ga; histtada isttas ooththa; neni xalla asa ubbaa wozina eriza gishshas izaade ooso ooso mala izas imma. 
1Kings8:40 Histtiko neni nu aawatas immida biittaan diza wode ubbaan istti nees yayyana. 
1Kings8:41 «Ne dere Isra7eele gidonttayti ne gita sunththaa gishshas siyidi haaho biittafe yida kare dere asi diikko," 
1Kings8:42 asay haahoppe yizay ne gita sunththaa gishshas, ne mino qese gishshassinne micettida ne kushe gishshas siyida gishshassa. Histtiko hayssa Xoossa Keeththaan woossanaassinne goynnanaas yiikko," 
1Kings8:43 neni ne dizason salon dashe siya; ne asati Isra7eeleti eriza mala sa7an diza asay ubbay ne sunththaa erana malanne nees yayyana mala, qasse tani keexxida ha Xoossaa keeththay nees goynoso gididayssa istti erana mala, he kare biittaa asi nena woossizayssa izas pola." 
1Kings8:44 «Ne derey bantta morkketa olana mala neni kiittidaso awakka biidi istti neni doorida ha katamaan tani ne sunththaas keexxida Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi nena GODAA woossiko," 
1Kings8:45 neni istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe siyada istta maadda. 
1Kings8:46 «Nagara ooththontta asi baynda gishshas istti nagara ooththiin neni istta bolla hanqettada morkketas istta aaththa immiin morkketikka istta di7idi haako woykko mata gidiin bantta biitta ekki efiin," 
1Kings8:47 istti ba di7ettida biittan dishe bantta wozinan nagarappe simmiko, istti heen di7etti bida deren dishe, ‹Nuni nagara ooththidos; nena qohidos; iita miishshika ooththidos› giidi nena shoobbiko," 
1Kings8:48 banttana di7idi efida morkketa biittan dishe istti bantta kumeththa wozinappenne bantta kumeththa shemppofe neekko simmiko, neni istta aawatas immida istta biittaako, neni doorida katamaykkonne tani ne sunththaas keexxida Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi nena woossiko," 
1Kings8:49 neni istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe siyada istta maadda. 
1Kings8:50 Ne derey ooththida nagaraanne nena qohida qohoza atto ga; istti di7idi efida asay isttas qadhettana mala ooththa. 
1Kings8:51 Gaasoykka istti birata seerisiza itoone tama mala gidida Gibxe biittafe neni nees shaakka kessida ne deretanne ne xinxxota. 
1Kings8:52 «Tani ne ashkaraynne ne dere Isra7eeley shoobbizayssa ne ayfey xeello; qasse istti waassiza wode aydekka neni istta waaso alla. 
1Kings8:53 Abeet GODAWU, Ta Xoossawu! Neni nu aawata Gibxeppe kessida wode ne ashkara Muse baggara yootida mala istta neni sa7an diza kawoteththata ubbaa giddofe nees xinxxo gidana mala dummasadasa» giidi woossides." 
1Kings8:54 Solomooney woosaanne shoobeththaa GODAAKKO shiishshidaappe guye ba kushe pude salo denththidi yarsho yarshizaso sinththan gulbatidasoppe dendi eqqides. 
1Kings8:55 Kumeththa Isra7eele duulata deraa ubbaas ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi," 
1Kings8:56 «Izi kase immida hidota qaalaa mala ba dere Isra7eeles shempo immida GODAAS galatay gido; izi ba ashkara Muse baggara immida hidota qaalaa ubbaa polides. 
1Kings8:57 GODAA nu Xoossay kase nu aawatara diza mala nunarakka de7o; izi nuna mulekka aggofo woykko yeggofo. 
1Kings8:58 Nuni iza ogeta ubbaan hemettana malanne izi nu aawatas immida azazota, wogatanne maarata naagana mala nu wozinaa baakko zaaro." 
1Kings8:59 Hach hach de7os koshshiza mala, GODAY tana ba ashkaraanne ba deraa Isra7eele maaddana mala, tani GODAA sinththan woossada gida ha qaalati qammanne gallas GODAA, nu Xoossaako shiiqetto." 
1Kings8:60 Hessika sa7an de7iza asay ubbay Xoossi xalla GODAA gididayssanne izappe attiin hara xoossi bayndayssa istti erana malassa. 
1Kings8:61 Hachchayssaththoka intte iza wogaan daana malanne iza azazota naagana mala GODAAS, nu Xoossaas intte wozinay ammanettizaa gido» gi anjjides." 
1Kings8:62 Hessafe guye kawozinne Isra7eele asay ubbay issife GODAA sinththan yarsho yarshida. 
1Kings8:63 Solomooney GODAAS issifeteththa yarsho yarshanaas 22,000 booratanne 120,000 dorsata shiishshides. Hessaththo ooththidi kawozinne Isra7eele asay ubbay GODAA Keeththaa anjjisida." 
1Kings8:64 Kawo Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaas sinththa baggan de7iza dembaas giddo addaa he gallas dummasides. Heen xuugettiza yarsho, kaththa yarshonne issifeteththa yarshofe handaza yarshides. Izi hessa ooththiday GODAA sinththan de7iza xarqimalappe oosettida yarsho yarshiza sohoy xuugettiza yarsho, kaththa yarshonne issifeteththa yarshofe handaza yarshanaas guuxxida gishshassa." 
1Kings8:65 He wode Solomooneynne Isra7eele asay ubbay laappun gallas Daase Ba7aale bonchchida; qasseka hara laappun gallas gujjidi issi bolla tamman oyddu gallas bonchchida; Isra7eele zawan Hamaate pinniza purdefe biidi Gibxe Shaafa gakkanaas de7iza cora asay GODAA nu Xoossaa sinththan ba7aale bonchchanaas shiiqides. 
1Kings8:66 Wonteththa gallas kawoy asaa moyzides; asay kawoza anjjidi GODAY ba aylle Dawitesinne ba asaa Isra7eeles ooththida kiyateththan wozinappe ufayettishe baso baso bides. 
1Kings9:1 Solomooney GODAA Keeththinne kawo keeth keexxi giigidi ba ooththanaas amottida amo ubbaa polidaappe guye," 
1Kings9:2 Geba7oone kataman kase qonccida mala GODAY nam7anththo izas qonccides. 
1Kings9:3 Histtidi GODAY izas, «Neni ta sinththan woossida woosaanne shoobeththaa tani siyadis; neni keexxida Xoossa Keeththay mernaas ta sunththay izan xeygettana mala ooththada tani geeshshadis; ta ayfeynne ta wozinay ubba wode ha Keeththaan daana." 
1Kings9:4 «Neni gidikko ne aawa Dawiti simerettida mala borey baynda suureteththan ta sinththan simerettiko, ta azazo ubbaa ooththikonne ta wogaanne ta maaraa ne naagikko,"
