2Kings16:17 Kawo Akaazeykka he milleranne ha millera diza sanqqata shoddi ekkides; miish iza bolla woththi yuushshiza gaareza bollafe meechcha saaneta diggides. Gita gonggeza garsa baggara tookki oykkida xarqimalappe oosettida 12 korma misleta bollafe lochcha shuchcha bolla woththides. 
2Kings16:18 Asoore kawo ufayssanaas giidi sambata gallas kawo araatay micettana mala Xoossa Keeththan dhoqqu gi oosettidasozanne kawoti GODAA Keeth gelizasoppe kare baggara diza pengeza denththides. 
2Kings16:19 Akaaze kawoteththa layththan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee? 
2Kings16:20 Akaazey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; istti moogettizason Dawite katamaan moogettides; iza naa Hizqiyaasi izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings17:1 Yuhuda kawo Akaazey kawotida tammanne nam7anththo layththan Eela naa Hose7ey Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla kawotides; 9 layththika dereza haarides. 
2Kings17:2 Izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; gido attiin izappe sinththan Isra7eelen kawotidayti ooththidayssa keena gidenna. 
2Kings17:3 Asoore kawo Saliminaasoorey izara olettanaas yides; Hose7ey izas haarettidessinne giirides. 
2Kings17:4 Hose7ey Gibxe kawo Sigoorekko kiita yeddida gishshassinne kase izi Asoore kawos layththan layththan giira giirizayssa diggida gishshas Asoore kawoy Hose7ey iza kaddidayssa erides; hessa gishshas Saliminaasoorey iza oykki qasho keeththan yeggides. 
2Kings17:5 Asoore kawoy dereza mulera worajjides. Samaariya zaari zaari heedzdzu layth giddoththides. 
2Kings17:6 Hose7ey kawotida uddufunththo layththan Asoore kawoy Samaariya oykkides. Isra7eele asaa di7i ekkidi Asoore dere denththi efides. Heytakka Alahen, Gozaan Haboore shaafa mataninne Meedoone katamatan efi woththides." 
2Kings17:7 Hayssi ubbay istta bolla gakkiday Gibxe kawo Paaroones haareteththafe kessida GODAA bantta Xoossaa istti qohida gishshassinne hara eeqa xoossatas goynnida gishshassa. 
2Kings17:8 GODAY istta sinththafe gooddi kessida kawoteththatinne Isra7eele kawoti he biittayo gelththida iita loseta istti kaallida. 
2Kings17:9 Isra7eele asay GODAA bantta Xoossaa bolla iita miish geemara ooththida; naagizasohotappe doommidi miixara giigi diza katama gakkanaas asay diza sohon ubbaan zumbullata bolla banttas goynnanasoho ooththida. 
2Kings17:10 Zumbullatinne daashsha miththati dizason dizason eeqa xoossata tuussinne asheeri misle tuus essida. 
2Kings17:11 GODAY istta sinththafe gooddi kessida kawoteththati ooththizayssaththo zumbullata bolla exaane cuwasida; GODAA hanqeththiza iita ooso ooththida. 
2Kings17:12 GODAY isttas, «Hayssa intte ooththanaas bessenna» giidi yootiinkka istti eeqa xoossatas goynnida." 
2Kings17:13 Gidikkoka GODAY isttas, «Intte biza iita ogeppe simmite! Kase intte aawati ooththanaas tani azazida wogaa malanne ta oosanchcha nabeta baggara ta inttes yootida wogaa mala ta azazotanne ta maarata naagite» giidi nabeta baggaranne ajjuuta be7iza asata baggara Isra7eelesinne Yuhudas minththi yooti woththides." 
2Kings17:14 Gido attiin istti siyibeettenna; istti GODAA bantta Xoossan ammanettontta ixxida bantta aawata mala ba wozina muumisida. 
2Kings17:15 Iza maara, izi istta aawatara gelida caaqo qaalanne izi isttas minththi yootida qaalaa kadhida; hada gidida eeqa xoossata kaallida; banttaska hada gidida; GODAY isttas, «Istti ooththizayssa intte ooththofte» giidi azaziinkka istti bantta yuushon diza kawoteththata kaallida; istti ooththontta mala GODAY diggidayssa polida attiin aggibeettenna." 
2Kings17:16 GODAY istta Xoossay istta azazidayssa ubbaa polibeettenna; mara misle nam7atanne asheeri misle ooththida. Salo xoolinttessinne ba7aales goynnida. 
2Kings17:17 Hessaththoka ba attuma naytanne ba macca nayta taman xuuggiza yarshos shiishshida; maroththidanne muurennida; GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththanaas banttanateththa bayzida; izakka hanqos denththeththida. 
2Kings17:18 Hessa gishshas GODAY istta bolla keehi hanqettides; Yuhuda qommoti xalla attaafe hankko Isra7eele deraa ba sinththafe haassides. 
2Kings17:19 Yuhuda qommoti gidikkoka kase Isra7eeleppe ekkida loseta kaallida attiin GODAA bantta Xoossa azazota naagibeettenna. 
2Kings17:20 Hessa gishshas GODAY Isra7eele asa ubbaaka aggides; un7eththidessinne ba sinththafe digganaashe gakkanaas di7izayta kushen aaththi immides. 
2Kings17:21 Izi Isra7eele asaa Dawite keeththafe shaakkidaappe guye istti Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aame kawoththida; Iyorba7aameykka Isra7eeley GODAA kaallontta mala baleththidi gita nagara oosisides. 
2Kings17:22 Isra7eele asaykka Iyorba7aame nagaran minni eqqides; hessafe simmibeenna. 
2Kings17:23 GODAY ba aylleta nabeta baggara isttas kase minththi yootida mala ba sinththafe istta diggana gakkanaas istti nagara ooso gujji gujji bida; hessa gishshas Isra7eele derey ba dereppe di7etti Asoore dere bides; ha7ikka heen dees. 
2Kings17:24 Asoore kawoy dereza Baabilooneppe, Kutappe, Awappe, Hamaateppenne Sefarwayme katamappe shiishshi ehidi kase Isra7eele asay dizason daana mala Samaariya katamatan woththides. Isttika Samaariya baas laattidi he katamatan duus oykkida." 
2Kings17:25 Istti heen duus doommida mala GODAAS goyno aggaagida; hessa gishshas GODAY gaammota istta bolla yeddides; gaammoti isttafe amardayta menththereththi wodhida. 
2Kings17:26 Asoore kawos, «Neni Samaariya katamatan efa woththida asay he kawoteththaa xoossay ay koyzaakko eribeenna; hessa gishshas Xoossi asaa menththereththi wodhiza gaammota yeddides» giza worey gakkides." 
2Kings17:27 Hessafe guye Asoore kawozi, «Intte Samaariyappe di7i ehida qeesetappe issaa guye he dere zaari efidi he dere xoossay ay koyzaakko dereza izi tamaarso» giidi azazides." 
2Kings17:28 Hessa gishshas Samaariyappe istti di7i efida qeesetappe issoy Beetele simmidi asay GODAAS wostti goynnanaakko tamaarsides. 
2Kings17:29 Gidikkoka asay ba zarkken zarkken ba diza kataman kataman baas xoos medhdhides; hessaka kase Samaariya dere asay zumbullata bolla goynnizasohotan efi efi essides. 
2Kings17:30 Baabilooneppe yidayti Sukoote-Benoote ooththida; Kutappe yidayti Nerigale ooththida; Hamaateppe yidayti Ashmaate ooththida; 
2Kings17:31 Aweti Elibazarenne Taritaqe geetettiza eeqa xoossata ooththida. Sefarwaymeppe yidayti Adiramelekenne Anameleke geetettiza eeqa xoossatas bantta nayta xuugettiza yarshos shiishshida. 
2Kings17:32 GODAAS goynnida; gido attiin issi issi qommoti kase ba yida deraa lose kaallida; zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata haggaziza qeeseta shuumida. 
2Kings17:33 Istti issi baggara GODAAS goynnishe hara baggara qasse kase bantta kawoteththa lose mala bantta eeqa xoossatas goynneettes. 
2Kings17:34 He loseza hach gakkanaas aggibeettenna; GODAAS bessiza mala goynnettenna; Isra7eele gi xeygida Yaaqoobe qommotas izi immida maaratanne zoreta, wogatanne azazota kaallettenna." 
2Kings17:35 GODAY kase Isra7eele asatara caaqo qaala geliza wode, «Intte hara xoossatas goynnofte, isttas yaynnofte; isttas haggazopitenne isttas yarshofte." 
2Kings17:36 Gido attiin intte goynnanaas bessizay ba gita wolqqaninne micettida ba kushen inttena Gibxe biittafe kessida GODAAS xalla gido. Intte izas xalla goynnitenne izas yarshite. 
2Kings17:37 Izi inttes xaafida maaratanne zoreta, wogatanne azazota ay wodekka lo7eththi naagite. Hara eeqa xoossatas goynnofte." 
2Kings17:38 Tani inttenara caaqettida caaqoza balopite; eeqa xoossas goynnofte. 
2Kings17:39 Intte morkketa ubbaa kusheppe inttena ashshizay iza gidida gishshas GODAA intte Xoossas goynnite» gi azazi woththides. 
2Kings17:40 Gido attiin istti kase bantta losen minni eqqida attiin simmibeettenna. 
2Kings17:41 Hayti ha dereti issi baggara GODAAS goynnikokka hara baggara qasse ba giigsida eeqa xoossatas haggazeettes. Istta naytinne isttas nayta naytikka kase istta aawati ooththida mala ha7ikka izaththo ooththeettes. 
2Kings18:1 Isra7eele kawo Eela naa Hose7ey kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Yuhuda kawo Akaaze naa Hizqiyaasi kawotides. 
2Kings18:2 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 29 layth haarides. Iza aayeya Zakaraasa naa Abiyo geetettawus. 
2Kings18:3 Iza aawa Dawiti GODAA sinththan ooththida mala izikka lo7o ooththides. 
2Kings18:4 Zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata menththereththi yeggides; asheeri misle tuussatakka qanxxereththi yeggides; qasse Musey xarqimalappe ooththida shooshshaaka menththereththides; gaasoykka he wodey gakkanaaska Isra7eele asay izas exaane cuwasishe gam7ida gishshassa; he shooshshaa sunththay Nahushttaan geetettees. 
2Kings18:5 Hizqiyaasikka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossan ammanettides; izappe kase gidiin woykko guyeppe kawotida Yuhuda kawota ubbatan iza malay deenna. 
2Kings18:6 Izi GODAARA oyketti uttides; izi GODAA kaaloppe guye gibeenna; GODAY Muses immida azazotakka naagides. 
2Kings18:7 GODAY izara diza gishshas izi ooththiza miish ubbay izas polettides; izi Asoore kawora eqettidi izas giira giirontta ixxides. 
2Kings18:8 Biidi Gaaza zawa gakkanaassinne Filisxeeme asay naagiza shakkoy dizaso gakkanaas gimbetti uttida katamayo xooni oykkides. 
2Kings18:9 Hizqiyaasi ba kawotida oydanththa layththan, Isra7eele kawo Eela naa Hose7ey kawotida laappunththa layththan Asoore kawo Saliminaasoorey Samaariya biidi katamayo giddoththides." 
2Kings18:10 Heedzdzanththo layththa wurseththan oykkides; Samaariyay oykettiday Hizqiyaasi kawotida usuppunththa layththan Hose7ey Isra7eele bolla kawotida uddufunththa layththanna. 
2Kings18:11 Asoore kawoy Isra7eele asaa di7i Asoore efidi Alahen, Gozaane giddon, Haboore shaafa achchaninne Meedoone katamatan woththides." 
2Kings18:12 Hessi istta bolla gakkida gaasoykka kase GODAA aylle Musey isttas yootida qaala ubbaa istti siyontta ixxidi caaqo qaala laallida gishshassa; iza azazotakka wozinan woththi siyibeettennanne polibeettenna. 
2Kings18:13 Hizqiyaasay kawotida tammanne oydanththa layththan Asoore kawo Senakireemey gimbetti diza Yuhuda katamata ubbaa bolla meto gaththi oykkides. 
2Kings18:14 Hessa gishshas Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasi, «Qohiday tana; ne taappe simmarkkii! Ta nees ne oychchida miishshi ubbaaka qanxxana» giidi Laakishen diza Asoore kawozas he kiitaa yeddides. Asoore kawozi Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasas, «Ne taas 10,000 kilo biranne 1,000 kilo worqqa yedda» gi zaarides." 
2Kings18:15 Hessa gishshas Hizqiyaasi Xoossa Keeththaninne ba kawoteththa keeththan diza bira ubbaa izas immides. 
2Kings18:16 He wode Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasi Xoossa Keeththa sanqqata bollanne qosilaththata bolla meeshettida worqqata Asoore kawos shoddi shoddi immides. 
2Kings18:17 Asoore kawoy Laakisheppe ba olanchchata azazizaytas waanna gadawaza, izappe kaalli diza gadawazanne olanchchata kaaleththiza gadawaza daro olanchchatara Yuhuda kawoy dizaso Yerusalaame kiitti yeddides. Isttika Yerusalaame biidi may7o meeccizayssa gade giddo efiza oge bolla ganna baggan diza eele haaththi yiza zaraa giddoththida." 
2Kings18:18 Kawozaakko yeddida; hessafe guye kawoteththa keeththan waanna azaziza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey, xaafezi Sheebinay, hessaththoka taarike xaafiza Aasaafe naa Yo7aahi izakko bida." 
2Kings18:19 Olanchchata kaaleththiza gadawazi isttas, «Intte Hizqiyaasas, ‹Gita Asoore kawoy nena, hayssa mala ne wozina minththiday aazee?" 
2Kings18:20 Neni taas ola erateththinne wolqqay dees gaasa; gido attiin hessi wore xalla; neni ta bolla makkalliday oonan ammanettadaa? 
2Kings18:21 Neni izin ammanettiza Gibxey izin zemppishin meqqi wodhdhidi kushen eqqiza dinccettida maqqa mala; Gibxe kawo Paarooneykka banan ammanettiza asa ubbaasikka hessa mala› giidi yootite. 
2Kings18:22 Qasseka neni, ‹Nu ammanettizay GODAA nu Xoossanna› gaada taas yootanaas koykko Hizqiyaasi Yuhudanne Yerusalaame, ‹Intte goynnanaas bessizay hayssa Yerusalaamen diza yarshosoza sinththana› giidi zumbullata bolla diza goynnizasohotanne yarshizasohota laalliday iza gidennee?" 
2Kings18:23 «Izi nees hankko ta godaza Asoore kawora mandetta; neni toganchchata demmana dandaykko ta nees 2,000 toga parata immana." 
2Kings18:24 Neni ceeqettizay Gibxe para-gaaretaninne Gibxe paratan gidikkoka ta godazappe garsara diza olanchchata shuumetappe haray attoshin issaa ne wostta zaarana dandayay? 
2Kings18:25 Hessafe bollara tani meto ne bolla gaththada hanno sohoyo dhayssanaas GODAA sheney baynda yidaa misatizee? Tani hanno dereyo worajja dhayssana mala taas yootiday GODAA» gides. 
2Kings18:26 Hessafe guye Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey, Sheebinaynne Yo7aahi olanchchata kaaleththizayssas, «Nuni eriza gishshas ne nuus Aaraame qaalara yoota; gimbeza bolla diza asati siyiza gishshas Ibraaweta qaalara nuus yootoppa» gida." 
2Kings18:27 Olanchchata gadawazi zaaridi, «Ta goday tana kiittiday inttessinne intte godaas xalla yootanaassee? Hankko asaykka intteyssaththo buro barkka ba shii maana malanne barkka ba sheesh uyanaas gimbeza bolla dizaytara yootanaas gidennee?» gides." 
2Kings18:28 Hessafe guye olanchchata gadawazi eqqidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi Ibraaweta qaalara, «Intte ha7i gita Asoore kawo qaala siyite!" 
2Kings18:29 Kawoy, ‹Hizqiyaasi inttena ta kusheppe ashshanaas dandayontta gishshas izi inttena baleththofo› gees." 
2Kings18:30 Qasseka Hizqiyaasi isttas, ‹GODAY nuna ashshanayssas sidhey deenna; hanna katamaya Asoore kawos aadhdha imettuku› giidi intte GODAAN ammanettana mala izi inttes yootidayssa ammani ekkofte." 
2Kings18:31 «Hizqiyaasi inttena gizayssa siyopite; Asoore kawoy, ‹Tanara inttes saroteth medhdhite; intte taas kushe immite; hessafe guye inttefe issoy issoy ba balase miththa ayfenne ba woyne miththa ayfe maana; ba haaththa ollafe haath uyana." 
2Kings18:32 Hessika hananay tani inttena gede intte biittayo misatiza soho kaththinne woyne ushshi, daabboynne woyne atakiltey, wogara miththinne eessi dizasota inttena gelththana gakkanaassa; intte hayqo aggidi de7o doorite› gees. Hizqiyaasi nuna GODAY ashshana giidi inttena baleththiza gishshas intte izi gizayssa siyopite." 
2Kings18:33 Asoore kawo kusheppe biitta bolla diza xoossatappe ba kawoteth ashshiday oonee? 
2Kings18:34 Hamaate eeqa xoossatinne Arfaade eeqa xoossati ane awan dizoo? Sefarwayme, Heena eeqa xoossatinne Iwa eeqa xoossati histtiin awa gakkidoo? Istti Samaariya ta kusheppe ashshidoo?" 
2Kings18:35 Hayta ha dereta eeqa xoossatappe ba dere ta kusheppe ashshana dandayday oonee? Histtiin GODAY Yerusalaame ta kusheppe wostti woththi ekkana dandayzee?» gides. 
2Kings18:36 Gido attiin derezi co7u gides; izas aykkoka zaaribeenna; kawozi, «Intte izas zaaro immontta mala» gi kase azazi woththides." 
2Kings18:37 Hessafe guye kawoteththa keeththa azaziza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey, xaafe Sheebinaynne taarike xaafe Aasaafe naa Yo7aahi bantta may7o daakki yeggida; Hizqiyaasakko biidi olanchchata gadawazi istti gidayssa izas yootida." 
2Kings19:1 Kawo Hizqiyaasi hessa siyidi ba may7o daakkides; maaqa may7idi Xoossa keeth gelides. 
2Kings19:2 Hessafekka kawoteththa keeththan azaziza Elyaaqeemey, xaafe Sheebinaynne waanna qeeseti maaqa may7idi Amoxe naa nabe Isayaasakko baana mala ubbaa kiitti yeddides." 
2Kings19:3 Isttika izas, «Hizqiyaasi, ‹Hanna gallassaya meto, miirenne kawushshateththa gallas; hanna gallassaya nay yelettanaas aaya keeha miixattashe yela yegganaas wolqqa dhayda gallassa." 
2Kings19:4 De7o Xoossaa kawushshanaas ba goda Asoore kawoy yeddida gadawaa qaala ubbaaka GODAA ne Xoossay siyidaa gidana; izi siyida qaalaa gishshas GODAA ne Xoossay iza hanqana mala neni shemppora paxa diza asaas Xoossa woossarkkii!› gides» gida. 
2Kings19:5 Kawo Hizqiyaasa shuumeti Isayaasakko yida wode," 
2Kings19:6 Isayaasi isttas, «Intte intte godaas, ‹GODAY nees Asoore kawo oosanchchati ta bolla cashsha qaala haasaydayssa siyada babbofa;" 
2Kings19:7 Tani iza bolla hessa mala ayana yeddana; izikka wore siyidi guye ba dere simmi baana; izi heen mashshan hayqqana mala ta iza ooththana› gi yootite» gides. 
2Kings19:8 Olanchchata gadawazikka Asoore kawoy Laakisheppe dendi bidayssa siyidi guye simmides; kawozi Libinara olettishin demmides. 
2Kings19:9 He wode Tophphiya dere yeleta gidida Gibxe kawo Tiraaqey iza olanaas yuussa bolla dizayssa Senakireemey siyides; hessa gishshas zaareththidi Hizqiyaasakko qasttanneta bolla dabdaabbe," 
2Kings19:10 «Intte biidi Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasas, ‹Ne izan ammanettiza Xoossay Yerusalaamey Asoore kushen kunduku› giidi nena baleththofo." 
2Kings19:11 Hayssafe kase aydekka Asoore kawoti dere ubbaa bolla ay ooththidaakko ne siyadasa; izi istta mulera dhayssides; histtiin neni kessa ekkada attanaaz nees misatizee? 
2Kings19:12 Kase ta aawati dhayssida kawoteththata Gozaanen, Kaaraanen, Erafaasen hessaththoka Talasaaren diza Edene asata istta eeqa xoossati istta ashshidoo?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamaate kawotinne Arfaade kawoti ha7i awan dizoo? Sefarwayme katama kawozi awan dizee? Qasseka Heena kawoynne Iwa kawoti ha7i awan dizoo?» gi kiittides. 
2Kings19:14 Hizqiyaasi Dabdaabeza qasttanneta kusheppe ekki nababides; hessafe guye pude GODAA Keeth kezidi dabdaabbeza GODAA sinththan miccides. 
2Kings19:15 Hessafe guye Hizqiyaasi GODAAKKO, «Kirube bolla ne araatan uttida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossoo! Biitta bolla diza ubbaa bolla Xoossi nena; salonne sa7a medhdhiday nena." 
2Kings19:16 GODAWU! Ha7i neni ne hayth yeggada hayssa siya; neni ne ayfetakka doyada xeella; Senakireemey de7o Xoossaa cayanaas kiittida qaala ezga. 
2Kings19:17 «Abeet GODAWU; Asoore kawoti hayta kawoteththatanne istti biitta tumukka dhayssida; 
2Kings19:18 Istta eeqa xoossatakka taman yeggi xuuggi dhayssida; isttika asa kushen miththafenne shuchchafe oosettidayta attiin xoos gidettenna. 
2Kings19:19 Ha7ikka GODAWU nu Xoossawu! Neni xalla Xoossa gididayssa ha biittaa bolla diza kawoteththati erana mala iza kusheppe nuna ashsha» gi woossides. 
2Kings19:20 Hessafe guye Amoxe naa Isayaasi kawo Hizqiyaasas hayssafe kaalli diza kiitaa yeddides. «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Asoore kawo Senakireeme bolla ne woossida woosaa tani siyadis› gides." 
2Kings19:21 Hessa gishshas GODAY iza bolla yootida qaalay hayssa. «Geela7o Xiyoone naya nena kadhadussinne kawushshadus; Yerusalaame naya ne izi bollara piradhdha bishin ba qoodhe ne bolla qaaththawus. 
2Kings19:22 Histtiin ne cayidaynne kawushshiday oonee? Neni ne qaala dhoqqu histtiday oona bollaa? ne otoreteththan dereqa xeellizay oona bollaa? Isra7eele geeshshaza bollayee! 
2Kings19:23 Neni qasttannidayta baggara Godaa bolla cash koradasa. Neni, ‹Tani taas diza daro para-gaaretan pude dhoqqa zumata bolla kezadis; Libaanoose zumaas xeera gakkadis; heeppe adussa ziga miththatanne doorettida xiidda miththatakka qanxxadasa; Tani izas wurseththa zawanne dhippi gida woran gakkadis." 
2Kings19:24 « ‹Tani hara deretankka haaththa olla bookkadis; isttafe haath uyadis; Tani ta toho caammatan yedhdhada Gibxe biitta pulttota melissadis› gadasa. 
2Kings19:25 «Daro wodeppe sinththan neni gimbettida katamata qoqofada, shuchcha keela kessana mala, tani qofa qachcha woththidayssa siyabeekkii? Beni halchcha woththidayssa ha7i polays." 
2Kings19:26 Heen diza asaa wolqqayka cingi wurides; istti dagammidi yeella may7ida; Coo mela demban mokkida atakilte mala, buro xapho yeddontta caarechcha mala, keeththa bolla mokkidi buro diccontta shullida maata mala gidida." 
2Kings19:27 «Ne awan uttizaakko, Ne ayde yaada ayde bizaakko ne ta bolla hanqettidayssa ta erays." 
2Kings19:28 Ne ta bolla hanqettida gishshassinne ne kadhey ta hayththan wodhdhida gishshas tani ne siidhen dafo yeggana; tani nena bixala barsana; ne yida ogera nena guye zaarana. 
2Kings19:29 «Hizqiyaasa! Hessas malatay hayssafe kaallizayssa; « ‹Ha layth wodhdhi maadhdhidayssa; yiza layth azabba maandeta; heedzdzanththa layththan zeridayssa maxandeta; woyne tura tokkidi iza ayfe maandeta. 
2Kings19:30 Ha7ikka Dawite keeththafe casha attidayti bantta xapho duge yeddana; bollarakka ayfe immana. 
2Kings19:31 Yerusalaamen shemppora paxa attidayti, Xiyoone zuman hayqoppe attidayti istti kezana. GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossaa zil7eteththi hessa ooththana.›" 
2Kings19:32 «GODAY Asoore kawo gishshas, « ‹Izi hanno ha katamayo mulekka gelenna; issi toorakka xongenna; gondalle oykkidi izikko shiiqenna; izo biitta dooren giddoththenna." 
2Kings19:33 Izi ba yida ogera simmi baana; ha katamayo mulera simmi gelenna. 
2Kings19:34 Ta gishshassinne ta aylle Dawite gishshas gaada hanno katamayo tani gondalla ashshana› gees.» 
2Kings19:35 He gallassa omars GODAA kiitanchchay kezidi Asoore asay dunkaani uttidasohon 185,000 as wodhides; wonteththa gallas asay dendishin heera ubbaan ahay kumides." 
2Kings19:36 Asoore kawo Senakireemey heeppe dendi bides; guye Nannawe simmi biidi heen uttides. 
2Kings19:37 Issi gallas Nisraake geetettiza ba eeqa xoossaa keeth gelidi izi heen goynnishin iza nayti Adiramelekeynne Sarsarey iza mashshan siifi wodhida; heeppe kessi ekkidi Araraate gakkanaas baqatida; iza naa Aseradooney izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings20:1 He wode Hizqiyaasi daro sakettidi shemppo bolla dishin Amoxe naa nabe Isayaasi izakko biidi, «GODAY nena, ‹Ne hayqqana; ne hayssafe guye shemppora paxa de7akka. Hessa gishshas neso giigsa› gees» gides." 
2Kings20:2 Hizqiyaasikka gede goda bagga simmidi GODAAKKO woossishe," 
2Kings20:3 «Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne sinththan ammaneteththan, kumeththa wozinappe hemettidayssanne nena ufayssizaaz ooththidayssa taas qoppa» giidi camo yeeho yeekkides." 
2Kings20:4 Isayaasi buro kawo keeththaa zago kanththi bishin GODAA achchafe izas," 
2Kings20:5 «Neni guye simmada ta dereza halaqa Hizqiyaasas, ‹Kase GODAY ne aawa Dawite Xoossay ta ne woosa siyadis; ne afunththaaka beyadis; tani nena paththana. Hachchife doommiin heedzdzu gallassatafe guye neni pude GODAA Keeth kezana." 
2Kings20:6 Ta ne layththaa bolla 15 layth gujjana; nenanne hanno katamayo Asoore kawo kusheppe ashshana; tani ta gishshassinne ta aylle Dawite gishshas gaada hanno ha katamayo naagana› ga» giza qaalay yides. 
2Kings20:7 Hessafe guye Isayaasi, «Taas balase miththa teera ekki yiite» gides; histtiin istti qina7idi izas kixaa bolla woththiin izi paxides." 
2Kings20:8 Hizqiyaasi, «GODAY tana paththanayssassinne heedzdzu gallassafe guye tani GODAA keeth kezanayssas malatay aazee?» giidi Isayaasa oychchides." 
2Kings20:9 Isayaasikka izas zaaridi, «GODAY ba gida qaalaa polanayssas malatay haytappe issaa; hayssi kuwazi 10 kech sinth bo gay? Woykko tammu kech guye bo gay?» gi oychchides." 
2Kings20:10 Hizqiyaasi izas, «Kuway 10 kech sinth buussi metenna; hessafe kuway guye simmana mala ooththa» gi yootides." 
2Kings20:11 Nabe Isayaasi hessafe guye pude GODAAS waassides; GODAYKKA Akaazey ooththida kechchaa bolla wodhdhida kuwaza 10 kech guye simmana mala ooththides. 
2Kings20:12 He wode Baabiloone kawo Balidaane naa Marodoke-Baldaane Hizqiyaasi sakettidayssa siyida gishshas Hizqiyaasas dabdaabbenne imota yeddides. 
2Kings20:13 Hizqiyaasikka qasttanneta mokki ekkidi ba miish ubbaa woththiza keeththan diza bira, worqqa, dumma qommo sawota, al7o zayte, ola massarata izan woththiza minjja keeththatanne hara attida minjja keeththan dizayta ubbaa istta bessides. Ba kawoteththa keeththaninne ba kawoteththan diza miish ubbaafe Hizqiyaasi bessontta aggidaazi deenna." 
2Kings20:14 Hessafe guye Isayaasi Hizqiyaasakko biidi, «Hayti asati awappe yidoo? Nees ay yootidoo?» gi oychchides. Hizqiyaasi, «Hayti haaho dere Baabilooneppe yida» gides." 
2Kings20:15 Nabezikka iza, «Ne kawoteththa keeththafe ay beydoo?» gi oychchides; Hizqiyaasikka izas, «Istti ta kawoteththa keeththan diza miish ubbaa be7ida; tani miish isttan woththiza keeththatappe ta bessontta ashshidasoy mulekka deenna» gides." 
2Kings20:16 Hessafe guye Isayaasi Hizqiyaasas, «Neni GODAA qaala siya;" 
2Kings20:17 GODAY, ‹Ne kawoteththa keeththan dizay ubbay kase ne aawati hanno gakkanaas shiishshiday ubbayka Baabiloone di7etti baana wodey yaanayssi attenna; issi miishshika attenna› gees." 
2Kings20:18 Neeppe yelettida ne naytappe baggati di7ettidi baananne Baabiloone deren istti kawo keeththan gundulata gidi daana» gides. 
2Kings20:19 Hizqiyaasikka, «Ne yootida GODAA qaalay lo7o» gides. Izi hessaththo giday, «Ta paxa diza wode taas saroteththinne woppay diikko hessafe guye ba dosaa hano» gi qoppida gishshassa." 
2Kings20:20 Hizqiyaasa kawoteththa layththatan hanida hara miishshati, izi ooththida ooso ubbay, haath katama gelththanaas izi zarissida zaray Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?" 
2Kings20:21 Hizqiyaasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Minaasey izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings21:1 Minaasey kawotiza wode izas layththay 12; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 55 layth haarides; iza aaya Hafeseebo geetettawus. 
2Kings21:2 Minaasey GODAY Isra7eele sinththafe gooddi kessida harassiza kawoteththata lose kaallidi GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides. 
2Kings21:3 Kase iza aawa Hizqiyaasi zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata keeth laallidayssa zaari keexxides; Isra7eele kawo Akaabey ooththoyssaththo izikka Ba7aales yarsho yarshizaso giigsides. Asheeri misle tuus essides; hessaththoka salo xoolinttetaska goynnides. 
2Kings21:4 GODAY, «Tani ta sunththaa Yerusalaamen woththana» gida Xoossa Keeththan yarshota yarshizasohota ooththides." 
2Kings21:5 Xoossa Keeththa zago nam7atan salo xoolinttetas goynnanasohota giigsides. 
2Kings21:6 Ba naaza xuugettiza yarsho histti shiishshides; histtidi muurennizayta, marota, moytille haasayssizaytanne ayana kaayizayta zore oychchides; GODAA hanqeththiza iita hanota iza sinththan ooththides." 
2Kings21:7 Izi ba massi giigsida Asheeri misleza Xoossa Keeththa giddon woththides. Hessika GODAY kase Dawite naa Solomoones, «Tani hayssa Xoossa Keeththaninne Isra7eele qommota ubbata garsafe doorida Yerusalaamen ta sunththaa mernaas heen woththana." 
2Kings21:8 Gidikkoka tani istta azazidayssa ubbaaka istti minni polettonne ta aylle Musey kase isttas immida wogaza istti poli naagetto attiin hayssafe guye Isra7eele asaa kase istta aawatas immida biittafe istti kezidi waayettana mala ta ooththike» gida qaalay hayssa ha sohoza gishshassa. 
2Kings21:9 Derezi gidikko hessa siyibeenna; kase GODAY dhayssida kawoteththatappekka bollara istti iita ooththana mala Minaasey asaa baleththides. 
2Kings21:10 GODAY ba aylle nabeta baggara hizgi yootides; 
2Kings21:11 «Yuhuda kawo Minaasey hayssa shuunniza iita nagara ooththides; izi kase baappe kase diza Amoore dere asaappeka bollara iita ooththides. Yuhuda asaakka eeqatan baleththides. 
2Kings21:12 Hessa gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay siyidaade hayththas iitiza meto tani Yerusalaame bollanne Yuhuda bolla yeddana. 
2Kings21:13 Tani Samaariyas giigsida wadha wodoro, tani Akaabeso izara ginasa xeellida tumbezakka Yerusalaame bolla yeddana; asi saane meecci gufanththiza mala tanikka Yerusalaame meecca dhayssana." 
2Kings21:14 Casha attida ta xinxxota tani aggana; tani istta istta morkketas aaththa immana; istti ba morkketas di7o miish gidana. 
2Kings21:15 Tani hessaththo ooththiza gaasoykka istti kase ba aawati Gibxeppe kezoosofe hanno gakkanaas istti ta sinththan iita ooso ooththidi tana hanqos denththeththida gishshassa» gides. 
2Kings21:16 Harappeka Minaasey Yuhuda asay Xoossa sinththan iita ooththana mala istti nagara oosisida nagaraappe harakka Yerusalaames ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas xillo gidida daro asaa suuth gussides. 
2Kings21:17 Minaase kawoteththa wode hanida hara miish ba ooththida nagaraa bolla gujjidi izi ooththiday ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee? 
2Kings21:18 Minaasey kase ba aawata mala hayqqides; izi Ooza atakilte giddon diza duufon moogettides; iza naazi Amooneykka izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings21:19 Amooney kawotishin izas layththay 22; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 2 layth haarides. Iza aaya Mesolamo geetettawus; iza Yaxiba dere as Haruse naa. 
2Kings21:20 Iza aawa Minaasey ooththoyssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides. 
2Kings21:21 Kase ba aaway bida ogezara izikka bides; kase ba aaway goynnida eeqa xoossatas goynnidessinne isttas hokki gulbatides. 
2Kings21:22 Kase ba GODAA Xoossa aggaagides; izi GODAA ogen bibeenna. 
2Kings21:23 Amoone dere shuumeti makkallida; kawozakka kawoteththa keeththa giddon wodhida. 
2Kings21:24 Hessafe guye he dere asay kawo Amoone bolla dendidi iza wodhides; iza naaza Iyosiyaasakka izasohon kawoththida. 
2Kings21:25 Amooney kawoti diza wode hanida hara oosoy izi poliday ubbayka Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafatan xaafetti dees gidennee? 
2Kings21:26 Izi Ooza atakilte giddon diza duufon moogettides; iza naazi Iyosiyaasi izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings22:1 Iyosiyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay 8. Izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 31 layth haarides; iza aaya Boxiqaate, dere as Adaya naa Yidido geetettawus." 
2Kings22:2 Iyosiyaasi GODAA sinththan lo7o ooththides; kase iza aawa Dawiti bida ogera bides; hadirsika ushachchika gibeenna. 
2Kings22:3 Izi kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan Iyosiyaasi Mashulaame naaza naa Axaaliya naaza xaafeza Saafaane GODAA Keeth kiittidi," 
2Kings22:4 «Neni qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasakko ba; baada penge naagizayti deraappe GODAA Keeththas shiishshidi gelththida miishshay ay keenakko Kilqiyaasi qoodana mala ooththa. 
2Kings22:5 Hessika GODAA Keeththa oosoza kaalli oosisana mala shuumettida asatas immetto; isttika GODAA Keeth ooraththiza oosanchchatas immetto. 
2Kings22:6 Istti miishshaa anaaxetas, gimbe gimbizaytassinne shuch massizaytas qanxxetto. Hessika Xoossa Keeththaa izara ooraxissana sanqqatanne masettida shuchchatakka shammetto." 
2Kings22:7 Asati ammanettidayta gidida gishshas isttas imettida miishsha kaallanaas koshshenna» gides. 
2Kings22:8 Qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasi xaafe Saafaanes, «Tani woga maxaafa GODAA keeththa giddon demmadis» giidi izas immides; izikka maxaafaza ekkidi nababides." 
2Kings22:9 Hessafe guye xaafezi Saafaaney kawozaakko biidi, «Ne shuumeti GODAA Keeththa giddon diza miishshaza kessidi GODAA Keeththa naagetti keexisiza asatas immida» gides." 
2Kings22:10 Hessafe guye xaafezi Saafaaney kawozas, «Qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasi taas maxaafa immides» gi yootides. Saafaaneykka he maxaafazappe kawozas nababides." 
2Kings22:11 Kawozikka woga maxaafaza qaala siyidi ba may7o daakkides. 
2Kings22:12 Hessafe guye qeese halaqa Kilqiyaasa, Saafaane naa Akiqaame, Mikkaya naa Akiboore, xaafe Saafaanenne kawozas mata oosanchcha Asaaya," 
2Kings22:13 «Intte biidi ta gishshas, deraa gishshassinne Yuhuda asaa gishshas hayssa maxaafan xaafettidayssi ay gizaakko GODAA oychchite; gaasoykka nu aawati hayssa maxaafaza qaalaas azazettontta ixxida gishshas, nu gishshas izan xaafettidayssa ubbaaka istti polontta aggida gishshas ha7i nu bolla GODAA hanqoy wolqqama» gi azazides." 
2Kings22:14 Qeese Kilqiyaasi, Akiqaamey, Akiboorey, Saafaaneynne Asaayay nabe Huldaano oychchana bida; Huldaana Haraase naaza Tequwe naa may7o naagiza Shaloome machcho; iza Yerusalaame giddon nam7anththo gutan dawus." 
2Kings22:15 Nabeyakka, «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay inttena taakko kiittida addezas," 
2Kings22:16 ‹GODAY Yuhuda kawozi nababida maxaafaan xaafettida bashshaa ubbaa tani hayssa ha sohoza bollanne deraa bolla ehana. 
2Kings22:17 Asay tana aggidi hara eeqa xoossatas exaane cuwasida gishshas, istti ba kushen ooththida eeqa xoossatan tana hanqeththida gishshas ta hanqoy hayssa ha sohozan tama mala eexxishe de7ana attiin to7enna› gees giidi yootite." 
2Kings22:18 GODAA oychchanaas inttena haa kiitti yeddida Yuhuda kawozas hayssafe kaallizayssa yootite; ‹Neni siyida yo7oza gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay," 
2Kings22:19 istti qanggettanayssanne dhayanayssa tani hayssa ha sohoza bollanne dereza bolla kase yootidayssa neni siyada ne wozinay meqqiin nenateththaa GODAA sinththan kawushshadanne ne may7oka daakkada ta sinththan ne yeekkida gishshas GODAY nena siyadis. 
2Kings22:20 Hessa gishshas tani nena ne aawatan gaththana; neni saron duufon gelana; tani hayssa ha deraa bolla ehana metoza ne ayfey be7enna› gees gi yootite» gadus. Hee bida qasttanneti zaaroza kawozas ekki bida. 
2Kings23:1 Hessafe guye kawozi Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen diza cima as ubbaa xeygides; 
2Kings23:2 Yuhuda asaynne Yerusalaamen diza asay ubbay qeesetinne nabeti ubbaafe naappe cima gakkanaas ubbaa GODAA Keeth ekki yides; GODAA Keeththafe beettida caaqo qaala maxaafa istti bantta hayththan siyana mala ubbaa nababides. 
2Kings23:3 Kawozi worqqa tuussa achchan GODAA sinththan eqqidi GODAA kaallanaas iza azazota, maaratanne wogata ba kumeththa wozinappe kumeththa shemppofe naaganaas hayssa maxaafazan xaafettida caaqoza minththanaas GODAA sinththan ooraxissides. Hessafe guye derezi ubbayka caaqo qaalazas bantta ammaneteththaa qonccisida." 
2Kings23:4 Kawozi Ba7aales, asheersinne salo xoolinttetas ubbaas oosettida miishshata GODAA keeththafe kessana mala qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasas, izappe kaalli nam7anththo maaran diza qeesetanne Xoossa Keeththa penge naagiza zabeta azazides. He miishshatakka Yerusalaameppe kare kessidi duge Qediroone shoobban diza demban xuuggides; bidinththaaka Beetele efides." 
2Kings23:5 Yuhuda katamataninne Yerusalaame yuushon diza zumbullata bolla exaane cuwasana mala kase Yuhuda kawoti eeqa xoossatas shuumida qeesetakka gooddides; hessaththoka ba7aales, awa arshes, aginas, uucetti diza xoolinttetassinne salo xoolintte ubbaas exaane cuwasizayta diggides." 
2Kings23:6 Asheeri misle GODAA Keeththafe kessidi Yerusalaameppe karera diza gede Qediroone shoobba efidi heen xuuggides; gaacci liiqisidi deraa duufon laallides. 
2Kings23:7 GODAA keeththa giddon goyno woga ooththidi addey addera parattiza kifiletanne maccassati Asheersi may7os suqiza kifileta laallides. 
2Kings23:8 Iyosiyaasi qeeseta ubbaa Yuhuda katama garsafe Yerusalaame kessides. Geebappe doommidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas qeeseti istta bolla exaane cuwasiza zumbullata tunisides. Katamays hadirsa baggara diza katamayo haariza Iyaaso penge achchara diza pengetan goynnizasohota laallides. 
2Kings23:9 Zumbullata bolla goynnizasota Yerusalaamen GODAAS yarshosohota haggazontta aggikokka qeese gidida ba ishatara irshoy bochchontta uketh meettes. 
2Kings23:10 Henoome naa shoobban diza Toofeete geetettiza goynnizasohoza tunisides; ay asikka attuma naa gidiin woykko macca naa Molookes taman xuuggi yarshontta malassa. 
2Kings23:11 Yuhuda kawoti GODAA Keeththe geliza sohon awa arshes goynnanaas immida parata heeppe diggides. Heytikka Naataan-Meleeke geetettiza issi shuumeza keeththa matan diza dubbushan deettes. Iyosiyaasikka awa arshes goynnana mala imettida para-gaareta taman xuuggides. 
2Kings23:12 Yuhuda kawoti pude Akaaze ilpinne achchan pooqe bolla ooththida yarshosohota, Minaasey GODAA Keeththa zago nam7atan oosisida yarshosohota diggides; tinchchereththi yeggides; he tinchcheththaaka denththi efidi Qediroone shoobban yeggides." 
2Kings23:13 Hessaththoka Yerusalaameppe arshey mokkiza baggara tunateththa zumaappe dugeha baggan Isra7eele kawo Solomooney Sidoonata tunateththa xoos Astarootes, Mo7aabeta tunateththa xoos Kamooshes, Amooneta tunateththa xoos Molookes zumbullata bolla oosisida goynnizasohota kawozi tunisides." 
2Kings23:14 Ha7ikka Iyosiyaasi asay isttas goynniza shuchcha hawulteta menththereththi yeggides; Asheeri misle tuussatakka qanxxereththi yeggides; he sohotakka asa meqeth kunththides. 
2Kings23:15 Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisida Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey ooththida yarshosohoza, Beetelen zumbulla bolla goynnizasohoza, yarsho yarshizasohoza iza bolla diza zumbullaa hessaththoka laallides; shuchchatakka menththereththi yeggides; dhiille malakka liiqisides; Asheeri misle tuussaaka xuuggides." 
2Kings23:16 Iyosiyaasi yuushshi xeelliza wode zumbulla bolla diza duufota be7ides; meqeththata duufotappe kessidi Xoossa asi kase yootida mala GODAA qaalay polettana mala yarsho yarshizasohoza tunisanaas iza bolla xuuggides. 
2Kings23:17 Kawozikka, «Sekki duufo bolla ta be7iza hawultezi oona hawultee?» gi oychchides. He katamayn diza asay, «Yuhudappe yiidi ha7i ne ooththidayssi ubbay Beetelen yarsho yarshizasohoza bolla gakkanayssa yootida Xoossa asa duufo» gida." 
2Kings23:18 Iyosiyaasikka, «Ane hessa bochchofte; he addeza meqeth izi dizasohoppe oonikka qaaththofo» gides. Hessa gishshas iza meqeththinne Samaariyappe yida nabeza meqeththi kase diza mala bochchontta aggaagida." 
2Kings23:19 Iyosiyaasi Beetelen ooththida mala Samaariya kataman zumbullata bolla Isra7eele kawoti kase oosisidaytanne GODAA hanqeththida eeqa xoossa keeththata ubbaa dhayssidessinne tunisides. 
2Kings23:20 Iyosiyaasi heyta zumbullata bolla goynnizasohotan ooththiza qeeseta ubbaa yarsho yarshizasohota bolla shukkides; he yarshosohota bollaka asa meqeth xuuggides; hessafe guye Yerusalaame simmides. 
2Kings23:21 Kawozi kumeththa deraas, «Hayssa iza caaqo maxaafan xaafettida mala GODAA intte Xoossa Paaziga ba7aale bonchchite» giidi azazides." 
2Kings23:22 Kase Isra7eele kaaleththida daannata wodeppe doommidi Isra7eele kawotanne Yuhuda kawota wode ubbaan hessa mala Paaziga ba7aaley bonchchetti erenna. 
2Kings23:23 Iyosiyaasi kawotidi tamman osppunththa layththan hayssi ha Paazigazi Yerusalaamen GODAAS bonchchettides. 
2Kings23:24 Hessafe bollara Iyosiyaasi moytille haasayssizayta, ayanata xeygizayta, asi ba hu7en hu7en goynniza xoossata, eeqa xoossata, Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen beettida hara shaattiza miish ubbaa dhayssides; izi hessaththo ooththidaykka qeese Kilqiyaasi GODAA Keeththa giddofe demmida maxaafan xaafeti diza wogay polettana malassa." 
2Kings23:25 Kase Muse wogan xaafettida mala ba kumeththa wozinappe, ba kumeththa shemppofe, ba kumeththa wolqqafe GODAAKKO simmida Iyosiyaasa mala kawoy izappe sinththan gidiin woykko izappe guyen mulekka dendibeenna." 
2Kings23:26 Gido attiin hayssi ubbay haniinkka Minaasey GODAA hanqeththanaas ooththida iita ooso ubbaa gaason GODAY Yuhuda bolla hanqettida tama mala babisiza hanqozappe irxxibeenna. 
2Kings23:27 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Tani Isra7eele ta sinththafe diggoyssaththo Yuhudakka ta sinththafe diggana; tani doorida Yerusalaame katamayo, ‹Ta sunththi heen de7ana› gaada tani kase yootida Xoossa keeththiyo ta yegga aggana» gides." 
2Kings23:28 Iyosiyaasa kawoteththa layththan oosettida oosoti, hanida hanotinne oosettida hara oosoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?" 
2Kings23:29 Iyosiyaasi kawoteththan diza wode Gibxe kawo Faroon-Nikay Asoore kawo maaddanaas gede Efiraaxise shaafa bides; kawo Iyosiyaasikka izara olettanaas kezides; gido attiin Faroon-Nikay izara tiran gayttidi iza Magiddon wodhides. 
2Kings23:30 Iyosiyaasa oosanchchati iza ahaza Magiddofe para-gaaren Yerusalaame ekki ehidi iza duufon moogida. Iza dere asay Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7akaaze efides; tiydi iza aawaa sohon iza kawoththida. 
2Kings23:31 Iyo7akaazi kawotiza wode izas layththay 23, izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 3 agina haarides; iza aaya Amxalo geetettawus. Iza Libina dere as Ermaasa naa." 
2Kings23:32 Kase iza aawati ooththoyssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides. 
2Kings23:33 Izi Yerusalaamen uttidi kawotontta mala Faroon-Nikay Hamaate deren Erebila geetettizason iza sansalatan qachchides. Yuhuda bolla 3,400 kilo biranne 34 kilo worqqa giira yeggides." 
2Kings23:34 Kawo Faroon-Nikay Iyosiyaasa naa Elyaaqeeme iza aawa sohon kawoththides; iza sunththaaka laammidi Iyo7aaqeme gi sunththides. Gido attiin Iyo7akaaze di7i Gibxe efides; histtiin izi heen hayqqides. 
2Kings23:35 Iyo7aaqemeykka Paaroon-Nikay iza oychchida biranne worqqa izas qanxxides; izi hessa ooththanaas biitta bolla giira yeggides; he dere asay ba wolqqa wolqqa mala biranne worqqa giirana mala ooththides. 
2Kings23:36 Iyo7aaqemey kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 11 layth haarides. Iza aaya Zebido geetettawus; iza Uruume dere as Paddaya naa. 
2Kings23:37 Iyo7aaqemey kase iza aawati ooththida mala GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides. 
2Kings24:1 Iyo7aaqemey kawotiza wode Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Yuhuda bolla worajjides; Iyo7aaqemeykka izas 3 layth giirides. Hessafe guye izi ba qofa laammidi Nabukadanaxoore bolla makkallides. 
2Kings24:2 GODAY Baabilooneppe, Aaraameppe, Mo7aabeppenne Amooneppe pangata Iyo7aaqeme bolla yeddides. GODAY ba oosanchchata nabeta baggara kase yootida qaala mala istti Yuhuda dhayssana mala hayta yeddides." 
2Kings24:3 Izi istta ba sinththafe haassana mala hayti ha yo7oti ubbay GODAY azazida mala Yuhuda bolla polettana dandayda; hessika Minaasey ooththida nagara gishshassinne izi polida hano ubbaa gishshassa; 
2Kings24:4 Qasseka izi xillo suuth gussida gishshassa. Yerusalaameykka xillo suuththan kumana mala izi ooththida gishshas GODAY iza maaranaas koyibeenna. 
2Kings24:5 Iyo7aaqeme kawoteththa layththan hanida hanotinne oosettida hara oosoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee? 
2Kings24:6 Iyo7aaqemeykka hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Iyo7aakiney izasohon kawotides. 
2Kings24:7 Baabiloone kawoy haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafatappe biidi Efiraaxise shaafa gakkanaas izi haariza dereta ubbaa iza kusheppe woththi ekkida gishshas Gibxe kawozi ba dereppe zaari ola olettanaas kezibeenna. 
2Kings24:8 Iyo7aakiney kawotiza wode izas layththay 18; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 3 agina haarides; iza aaya Nehishitto geetettawus; iza Yerusalaame as Elnataane naa. 
2Kings24:9 Kase iza aaway ooththoyssaththoka Iyo7aakiney GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides. 
2Kings24:10 He wode Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore ola gadawati Yerusalaame yiidi katamayo giddoththida. 
2Kings24:11 Ola gadawati katamayo giddoththiza wode Nabukadanaxoorey ba hu7era he katamayo yides. 
2Kings24:12 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakine aaya, iza azhabati, daannatinne shuumeti ubbay bantta kushe Baabiloone kawos immida; Baabiloone kawoy kawotida osppunththa layththan Iyo7aakine di7i ekki bides." 
2Kings24:13 GODAY kaseti yootida mala Nabukadanaxoorey Xoossa Keeththaninne kawo keeththan diza aqota ubbaa denththi efides. Isra7eele kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththas worqqafe oosisida miish ubbaa ekki bides. 
2Kings24:14 Qasseka Yerusalaame asaa ubbaa, ola gadawatanne olanchchata ubbaa, hiillanchchatanne wogaceta ubbaa issi bolla 10,000 as di7i ekki ba dere efides; heen derezan attidayti puuththa manqota xalla." 
2Kings24:15 Nabukadanaxoorey Iyo7aakine di7i ekkidi Baabiloone efides; hessaththoka kawoza aayeyo, iza machcheta, iza shuumetanne deren erettida gita asata Yerusalaameppe Baabiloone efides." 
2Kings24:16 Qasseka Baabiloone kawoy minonne olas gakkida 7,000 olanchchata, 1,000 hiillanchchatanne wogaceta issi bolla di7i ekkidi Baabiloone efides." 
2Kings24:17 Hessafe guye Iyo7aakine aawa isha Maataaniya izasohon kawoththides; iza sunththaa laammidi Sedeqiyaasa gi sunththides. 
2Kings24:18 Sedeqiyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay 21; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 11 layth haarides; iza aaya Amxalo geetettawus; iza Libina as Ermaasa biyo. 
2Kings24:19 Iyo7aaqemey ooththida mala izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides. 
2Kings24:20 Hayssi ubbay Yerusalaame bollanne Yuhuda bolla gakkanaas dandayday GODAA hanqo gaasonna; wurseththan izi istta ba sinththafe haassides. Sedeqiyaasi Baabiloone kawo bolla makkallides. 
2Kings25:1 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufunththa layththan tammanththa aginan tammanththa gallas Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba olanchchata ubbaa ekkidi Yerusalaame bolla worajjides; katamay gimbefe kare baggara yuuyi aadhdhi giddoththi uttida. 
2Kings25:2 Katamayakka Sedeqiyaasi kawoti diza tammanne issinththa layth gakkanaas hessaththo giddoththetta uttadus. 
2Kings25:3 Oydanththa aginan uddufunththo gallas katamay giddon dendida koshay daro minnida gishshas asaas doonan baadhizaazi dhaydes. 
2Kings25:4 Baabiloone olanchchati katamayo giddoththi uttidi issi baggara katamay gimbe menththi gelida; Yuhuda olanchchati ubbayka kawo atakilte achchan diza nam7u gimbeta giddora diza pengezara kanththidi omarsara duge Yordaanoose shoobba gakkanaas baqatida. 
2Kings25:5 Gido attiin Baabiloone olanchchati kawoza kaalettidi Iyarkko demban gakkida. Olanchchati ubbay kawoza aggaagi laalettida. 
2Kings25:6 Kawozikka heen oykettides; he wode iza Erebilan diza Baabiloone kawozaakko ehida; iza bolla pirday pirdettides. 
2Kings25:7 Sedeqiyaasi ba ayfen be7ishin iza nayta wodhida; hessafe guye iza ayfe nam7ata wooci kessidi xarqimala sansalatara qachchi Baabiloone dere efida. 
2Kings25:8 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida tammanne uddufunththa layththan ichchashanththa aginan laappunththa gallassan izas bonchcho zabeta azazizayssinne Baabiloone kawozas daro dhoqqa shuume gidida Nabuzaradaaney Yerusalaame yides. 
2Kings25:9 GODAA Keeth, kawoteththa keeththaanne Yerusalaamen diza keeththata ubbaa xuuggides; erettida gita keeththatakka taman xuuggides." 
2Kings25:10 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssa kaallida kumeththa Baabiloone olanchchati Yerusalaame yuushon diza gimbeza laalli yeggida. 
2Kings25:11 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssi he katamayn casha attidayta, ba kushe Baabiloone kawos immidayta ubbaa di7i ekkidi Baabiloone efides." 
2Kings25:12 Gidikkoka Nabuzaradaaney asaa garsafe putteesa manqotappe amardayta woyne tokkana malanne gade goyana mala heen aggides. 
2Kings25:13 Baabiloone dere asay xarqimalappe oosettida tuussata, GODAA Keeththa giddon diza miishshata istta bolla woththidi yaanne haa yuushshiza gaaretanne haath izan woththiza xarqimalappe oosettida gabateza menththereththi yeggidi Baabiloone ekki bida." 
2Kings25:14 Hessaththoka qeeri xaarota, tama oyseththiza miishshata, bidinth kaashiza miishshata, cilfata, Xoossa Keeththa giddon go7ettiza xarqimalappe oosettida miishshata ubbaa ekki bida." 
2Kings25:15 Kawo bonchcho naagiza zabeta azazizayssi muuruta worqqafenne birappe oosettida xuu7atanne wuxxiza miishshas go7ettiza shel7eta ekki bides. 
2Kings25:16 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththan go7ettanaas giidi xarqimalappe oosisida nam7u tuussati, haath oykkiza gita gabatenne miish istta bolla woththi yuushshiza gaareti keehi deexxizayta." 
2Kings25:17 Tuussati issoy issoy 18 wadha gidishin xarqimalappe oosettida qusttey dees; he qustteza adussateththay heedzdzu wadha gidishin Yuuyi aadhdhanaas xarqimalappe oosettida sansalatanne Oroomaane miththa ayfe misateettes; hankko attida tuussazikka koyroyssa mala. 
2Kings25:18 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssi qeeseta halaqa Saraya, izappe kaalli diza qeese Sofonaasanne penge naagiza 3 zabeta qachchi ekki bides." 
2Kings25:19 He wode gakkanaas katamay giddon attidaytappe olanchchata halaqanne kawo zoriza 5 asata ekki bides; qasse deraa giddofe olas asaa dooriza ola gadawaa xaafeza, xaafezas katamay giddon diza 60 asata ekki bides." 
2Kings25:20 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azaziza Nabuzaradaaney heyta ubbaa Erebilan diza Baabiloone kawozaakko efides. 
2Kings25:21 Kawozikka he asaa Hamaate biittan heen Erebilan woththisides. Yuhuday ba biittafe hessa malan di7etti bides. 
2Kings25:22 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Saafaanes naaza naa Akiqaame naa Godoliyaasa casha attida Yuhuda asaa bolla shuumides. 
2Kings25:23 Kumeththa olanchchata gadawatinne istta asati Baabiloone kawoy Godoliyaasa deraa ayssanaas shuumidayssa siyidi izi dizaso Mixiphpha gakkanaas yida; isttika Nataniya naa Isma7eele, Qaareeha naa Yohanaane, Naxoofe dere as Tanihumeeta naa Saraya, Ma7ikate dere as Ya7izaaneyanne istta asata." 
2Kings25:24 Gadoliyaasikka, «Intte Baabiloone dere shuumetas babbofte; intte hayssa ha derezan diite; Baabiloone kawos haggazite; histtiko inttes haniza miishshi ubbayka giiga gidana» gi he qaalan isttara caaqettides." 
2Kings25:25 Gido attiin laappunththa aginan kawo zereth gidida Elshamas naaza naa Nataniya naa Isma7eeley banara tammu asata ekki yiidi Godoliyaasa, izara Mixiphphan issife diza Yuhuda asatanne Baabiloone dere asata wodhides." 
2Kings25:26 Baabiloone asaas babbida gishshas gashey, gitay attontta ubbayka ola gadawatara bete Gibxe bida." 
2Kings25:27 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakiney di7ettida heedzdzu tammanne laappunththa layththan tammanne nam7anththo aginan nam7u tammanne laappunththa gallas Yori-Marodeeqey Baabiloonen kawotida layth Iyo7aakine qashoppe birshi yeddides. 
2Kings25:28 Lo7o qaalan iza haasayssides; kase izara issife Baabiloonen diza kawotappe bollara izas bonchcho soho immides. 
2Kings25:29 Iyo7aakineykka qasho keeththan dishe may7iza may7o qaari yeggides; hayqqana gakkanaas ubba wode kawoza maaddafe mishe gam7ides. 
2Kings25:30 Kawozi Iyo7aakines izi hayqqana gakkanaas hachchis hachchis gidiza qallaba izas immides. 
1Chronicles1:1 Addaamey Seete yelides; Seetey Heenoose yelides; Heenoosey Qaynaane yelides. 
1Chronicles1:2 Qaynaaney Malal7eele yelides; Malal7eeley Yaareede yelides. 
1Chronicles1:3 Yaareedey Heenooke yelides; Heenookey Maatusaala yelides; Maatusaalay Laameeke yelides. 
1Chronicles1:4 Laameekey Nohe yelides; Nohey Seeme, Kaamenne Yaafeete yelides." 
1Chronicles1:5 Yaafeetey, Goomere, Maagooge, Maadaye, Yaawaane, Tubaale, Mesheekenne Tiraase geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles1:6 Goomere nayti Ashkenaaze, Erefasitenne Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Yaawaane nayti Elishe, Tarseese, Kiitimenne Oroodahime." 
1Chronicles1:8 Kaame attuma nayti Kuushe, Mixirayme, Puuxenne Kanaane." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kuushe nayti Seeba, Hawila, Saaba, Eraa7imenne Sabiteka; Eraa7ime attuma nayti Saabanne Dadaane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuushey Namuruude yelides; Namuruudeyka alame bolla erettida wolqqama olanchcha gidides. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mixiraymey Luudimeta, Anaameta, Lahaabeta, Naftuheta," 
1Chronicles1:12 Phaxirooseta, Kaasiluhetanne Filisxeeme zareta yelida Kaftooreta yelides." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaaney bayra naa Sidoonassinne iza kaalo Hiites aawa; 
1Chronicles1:14 qasseka Kanaaney Yaabusetas, Amooretas, Gergesetas," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiiwetas, Arqetas, Siinetas," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arwaadetas, Xamaaretassinne Hamaatetas aawa." 
1Chronicles1:17 Seeme nayti, Elaame, Asoore, Arfaakiside, Luude, Aaraame, Uuxe, Huule, Geterenne Mesheeke;" 
1Chronicles1:18 Arfaakisidey Sheelahe yelides; Sheelahey Eboore yelides; 
1Chronicles1:19 Eboorey nam7u attuma nayta yelides; issoy yelettida wode sa7ay shaakettida gishshas iza sunththi Peeleege geetettides; nam7anththozi Yoqixaane geetettides. 
1Chronicles1:20 Yoqixaaney Almodaade, Shelefe, Haxarmaawete, Yerahe" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoraame, Uzaale, Diiqile" 
1Chronicles1:22 Eebaale, Abima7eele, Saaba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Hawilanne Yobaabe yelides; hayti wurikka Yoqixaane nayta." 
1Chronicles1:24 Seemeppe biidi Abrahaame gakkanaas diza yeleta zarkkey hayssafe kaalli dizayta oykkees; isttika Seeme, Arfaakiside, Sheelahe," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eboore, Peeleege, Era7e," 
1Chronicles1:26 Saruge, Naakoore, Taaranne" 
1Chronicles1:27 guyeppe Abrahaame geetettida Abraame. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahaamey Yisaaqanne Isma7eele yelides. 
1Chronicles1:29 Abrahaamey Aggaarippe Isma7eele yelides; Isma7eeley yelida bayra naaza sunththi Nebayoote gidishin iza kaaloti Qeedaare, Adibi7eele, Mibisaame, Mishima7e, Duuma, Maasa, Hadaade, Teema," 
1Chronicles1:30  
1Chronicles1:31 Yixure, Nafishaanenne Qeedima geetetteettes." 
1Chronicles1:32 Keexuray Abrahaames yelida usuppun attuma nayti Zimiraane, Yoqishaane, Maadda, Midiyaane, Yishibaaqenne Shuha geetetteettes. Yoqishaaney Saabanne Dadaane geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiyaaneykka Eefa, Efere, Heenooke, Abida7enne Elda7e geetettiza ichchashu attuma nayta yelides; hayti ubbay Keexura zereththata." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahaamey Saarappe Yisaaqa yelides; Yisaaqi Eesawenne Isra7eele yelides. 
1Chronicles1:35 Eesawey Elfaaze, Era7u7eele, Ya7uushe, Ya7ilaamenne Qoore yelides." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elfaazey Temaane, Omaare, Xaafe, Ga7itaame, Qenaaze, Teminaa7enne Amaaleeqe geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles1:37 Era7u7eeley Nahaate, Zaraahe, Shammahanne Miizahe geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles1:38 Eedoomen koyro de7ida Seyre attuma nayti Looxa, Shobaale, Xiba7oone, Aana, Diisho, Exeerenne Dishaane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Looxaane attuma nayti Hoorenne Homaame; Teminaa7a Looxaanes michcho. 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobaale attuma nayti Aliwa, Manahaate, Eebaale, Sheefenne Oonname. Xiba7oone attuma nayti Aayanne Aana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Aanay Dishoone yelides; Dishoone attuma nayti Hemda, Eshibaane, Yitiraanenne Kaaraane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Exeere attuma nayti Bilihaane, Za7iwaanenne Yaqine. Dishaane attuma nayti Uuxenne Araane." 
1Chronicles1:43 Isra7eelen ay kawoykka kawotanaappe kase Eedoome biittan kawotida kawoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. Bi7oore naa Beelay kawotides; iza katamaa sunththay Dinaabe. 
1Chronicles1:44 Beelay hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Booxira dere as Zaraahe naa Yobaabey kawotides. 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaabey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Temaane dere as Hushamey kawotides. 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Mo7aabe deren Midiyaameta xoonida Badaade naa Hadaadey kawotides; iza katamaya Awite geetettawus. 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadaadey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Maasireeqe dere as Sha7uley kawotides. 
1Chronicles1:48 Sha7uley hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Efiraaxise shaafa matan diza Erahoobote dere as Sa7ooli kawotides. 
1Chronicles1:49 Sa7ooli hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Akiboore naa Ba7aali-Hanaaney kawotides. 
1Chronicles1:50 Ba7aali-Hanaaney hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Paa7u dere as Hadaadey kawotides; iza machcheyakka Mahexabi7eela Mezahaabe naa Maxireeda biyo; hessafe guye Hadaadey hayqqides. 
1Chronicles1:51 Eedoomen keehi erettiza halaqati Teminaa7e, Aliwa, Yeteete," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibaame, Eela, Pinoone," 
1Chronicles1:53 Qenaaze, Temaane, Mibizaare," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidi7eelenne Iraame geetetteettes. 
1Chronicles2:1 Yaaqoobey 12 attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Oroobeele, Simoona, Lewe, Yuhuda, Yisakoore, Zaabiloone," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daane, Yooseefe, Biniyaame, Niftaaleme, Gaadenne Aaseere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuhuday Kanaane dere as Shu7a biype Eera, Oonaanenne Seela geetettiza heedzdzu attuma nayta yelides; izas bayra naazi Eeray GODAA sinththan iita as gidida gishshas GODAY iza boshan wodhides." 
1Chronicles2:4 Yuhudaykka ba naaza machcho Ti7imaarippe Paareesenne Zaraahe geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides; Yuhuday ichchash attuma nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles2:5 Paareeseykka Hexiroomenne Hamule geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zaraahey ichchashu attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Zimire, Etaane Hemaane, Kalkolenne Daara." 
1Chronicles2:7 Zaraahe zereththafe gidida Karme naa Akaaney Xoossas dummatida di7o miishshafe kaysotidi qottida gishshas Isra7eele deraa bolla meto ehides. 
1Chronicles2:8 Etaaneykka Azaariya geetettiza issi attuma naa yelides. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hexiroomey heedzdzu attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Yerahim7eele, Aaraamenne Kaalube." 
1Chronicles2:10 Aaraamey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Yuhuda naytas halaqa gidida Ne7asoone yelides. 
1Chronicles2:11 Ne7asooney Salamo yelides; Salamoykka Boo7eeze yelides. 
1Chronicles2:12 Boo7eezey Iyoobeede yelides; Iyoobeedeykka Isseye yelides. 
1Chronicles2:13 Isseye bayra naazi Elyaabe; Elyaabe kaaloti Abinadaabe, Shim7a," 
1Chronicles2:14 Natina7eele, Eraade," 
1Chronicles2:15 Oxeemenne Dawite. 
1Chronicles2:16 Istta michcheti Xuriyanne Abigaalo geetetteettes; Xuriyay Abisaye, Iyo7aabenne Asaheele geetettiza heedzdzu attuma nayta yeladus." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaala Isma7eele zereththafe gidida Yootores Amasa geetettiza attuma naa yeladus. 
1Chronicles2:18 Hexiroome naa Kaalebey Azubbo geetettizaaro machcho ekkidi Yir7aato geetettiza macca naa yelides; Yir7aatakka Yeshere, Shoobaabenne Ardoone geetettiza heedzdzu attuma nayta yeladus." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubba hayqqidaappe guye Kaalebey Efraato machcho ekkidi Huure geetettiza attuma naa yelides. 
1Chronicles2:20 Huureykka Uure geetettiza attuma naa yelides; Uurey Basli7eele yelides. 
1Chronicles2:21 Hexiroomey izas 60 layth kumishin Gala7aade aawa Maakire nayo machcho ekkidi Sagube yelides. 
1Chronicles2:22 Sagubeykka Ya7ire yelides; Ya7irey Gala7aade deren diza 23 katamata ayssees. 
1Chronicles2:23 Gido attiin Geeshureynne Aaraamey Qenaateninne izi heeran diza 60 qeeri katamatanne Ya7ire katamata oli oykkida; heyti ubbayka Gala7aade aawa Maakire zereththata. 
1Chronicles2:24 Hexiroomey Kaalebe Efraata geetettizason hayqqidaappe guye iza machcha Abiyay Tequhe aawa Ashihuure izas yeladus. 
1Chronicles2:25 Hexiroomes bayra naazi Yerahim7eeley 5 attuma nayta yelides; heytappe bayrazi Eraama, iza kaaloti Buna, Oore, Oxeemenne Akaya geetetteettes." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahim7eeles Axaaro geetettiza hara machcha dawus; iza Oonname aayo. 
1Chronicles2:27 Yerahim7eeles bayra naa Eraamay Maaxe, Yaaminenne Eqere geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles2:28 Oonnamey Shamayenne Yaadda geetettiza attuma nayta yelides; Shamayey Nadaabenne Abishuure geetettiza attuma nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuureykka Abihaylo geetettizaaro machcho ekkidi Ahibaanenne Moolide yelides. 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaabey Seledenne Afayme yelides; Seledey gidikko naa yelontta hayqqides. 
1Chronicles2:31 Afaymey Yushi7e yelides; Yushi7ey Sheshaane yelides; Sheshaaney Ahilaye yelides. 
1Chronicles2:32 Shamaye isha Yaadday Yootorenne Yoonataane yelides; Yootorey gidikko naa yelontta hayqqides. 
1Chronicles2:33 Yoonataaney Paletenne Zaaza geetettiza 2 attuma nayta yelides; heyti wurikka Yerahim7eele zereththata. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshaanes macca naytappe attiin hara attuma nay deenna; izas ooththiza Gibxe dere as Yaraha geetettiza oosanchchay dees. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshaaney ba macca nayo Yarahas machcho gidana mala immides; izakka izas Attaye geetettiza attuma naa yeladus. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attayey Naataane yelides; Naataaney Zabaade yelides; 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabaadey Efilaale yelides; Efilaaley Iyoobeede yelides; 
1Chronicles2:38 Iyoobeedey Iyu yelides; Iyuy Azaariyaasa yelides; 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaariyaasi Heleexe yelides; Heleexey El7aasa yelides; 
1Chronicles2:40 El7aasay Sismaye yelides; Sismayey Shaloome yelides; 
1Chronicles2:41 Shaloomey Yiqaamiyanne Elshama yelides. 
1Chronicles2:42 Yerahim7eele isha Kaalebey bayra naaza Mesha yelides; Meshay Ziife yelides; Ziifey Mareesha yelides; Mareeshayka Kebroone yelides. 
1Chronicles2:43 Kebrooneykka Qoore, Taaphphuhe, Ereqeemenne Shema7e geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema7eykka Erahaame yelides; Erahaamey Ereqeeme yelides; Ereqeemey Shamaye yelides. 
1Chronicles2:45 Shamayey Ma7oone yelides; Ma7ooneykka Beeti-Xuure yelides. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaalebes Eefo geetettiza laggeththo machcha dawus; Kaalebey izippe Kaaraane, Moozanne Gazaze geetettiza hara 3 attuma nayta yelides; Haaraaneykka Gazaze geetettiza hara attuma naa yelides." 
1Chronicles2:47 Yaahiday Ergeme, Iyo7aatame, Geshaane, Paleexe, Eefanne Sha7aafe geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaalebes Ma7ika geetettiza laggeththo machcha dawus; izakka Sheberenne Tirihaana geetettiza attuma nayta yeladus. 
1Chronicles2:49 Qasseka Ma7ika Sha7aafenne Shawa yeladus; Sha7aafey Madimaana yelides; Shaway Makibaanenne Gibi7a yelides. Kaalebes Akisa geetettiza macca nay dawus. 
1Chronicles2:50 Kaalebey yelida hara nayti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Kaalebey Efraatippe bayra naaza Uure yelides; Uurey Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime aawa Shobaale. 
1Chronicles2:51 Beeteliheeme aawaa Salamonne Beeti-Gadera aawaa Hareefe yelides. 
1Chronicles2:52 Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime aawa Shobaale zereththati, Heroheetenne Manahaate qommotappe baggata." 
1Chronicles2:53 Qasseka Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime zarkketi Yatireta, Puuteta, Shumaateta, Mishiirata, Xora7aatanne Eshtta7ooleta." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salamo nayti Beeteliheeme, Naxoofeta, Axiroota, Beet Iyo7aabe, Manahaatetappe baggatanne Haxooreta." 
1Chronicles2:55 Yaabexe katamaan diza xaafizayta zareti qasse Tir7ata, Shim7aatanne Sukoote; hayti Erekaabeta aawaa Hamaateppe yelettida Qenaaweta." 
1Chronicles3:1 Dawiti Kebroonen dishe yelida attuma nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayta; bayra naa Aminoone Izra7eele dere maccas Ahinahoomppe yelides; iza kaalo Daaneela Qarmeloose dere maccas Abigaalippe yelides. 
1Chronicles3:2 Heedzdzanththoza Abeseloome Geeshure kawo Talimaye naa Ma7ikippe yelides. Oydanththoza Adoniyaasa Hagitippe yelides. 
1Chronicles3:3 Ichchashanththoza Shafaaxiya Abixaalippe yelides Usuppunththoza Yitiraame Eglippe yelides. 
1Chronicles3:4 Hayti usuppunati Dawiti Kebroonen laappun layththinne bagga deraa ayssiza wode yelettida; Dawiti Yerusalaamen 33 layth kawotides. 
1Chronicles3:5 Izi heen dishe yelida attuma nayti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Am7eele naa Bersaabeha Shim7a, Shoobaabe, Naataanenne Solomoone geetettiza oyddu attuma nayta izas yeladus." 
1Chronicles3:6 Qasse hara uddufun attuma nayti izas deettes; heytikka Iyabeheere, Elsu7e, Elfaleexe" 
1Chronicles3:7 Nogahe, Nefege, Naafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elshama, El7aadanne Elfaleexe geetettizayta." 
1Chronicles3:9 Heytappeka hara Dawiti garadetappe yelida attuma nayti deettes; isttaskka Ti7imaaro geetettiza michcha dawus. 
1Chronicles3:10 Kawo Solonooney Erobi7aame yelides; Erobi7aamey Abiya yelides; Abiyay Aasa yelides; Aasay Iyoosaafixe yelides; 
1Chronicles3:11 Iyoosaafixey Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Akaziyaasa yelides; Akaziyaasi Iyo7aasa yelides; 
1Chronicles3:12 Iyo7aasi Amasiyaase yelides; Amasiyaasi Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi Iyo7aatame yelides; 
1Chronicles3:13 Iyo7aatamey Akaaze yelides; Akaazey Hizqiyaasa yelides; Hizqiyaasi Minaase yelides; 
1Chronicles3:14 Minaasey Amoone yelides; Amooney Iyosiyaasa yelides," 
1Chronicles3:15 Iyosiyaasi oyddu attuma nayta yelides; bayrazi Yohanaane, iza kaaloti Iyo7aaqeme, Sedeqiyaasanne Shaloome;" 
1Chronicles3:16 Iyo7aaqemey Ikoniyaanenne Sedeqiyaasa yelides. 
1Chronicles3:17 Baabiloone di7etti bida Ikoniyaane nayti Salatiyaale," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malikraame, Paddaya, Shenaxaare, Yiqaamiya, Hoshamenne Nadabiya geetettizayta." 
1Chronicles3:19 Paddayay Zerubaabelenne Shim7e yelides; Zerubaabeleykka Mashulaame, Hanaaniyanne istta michcho Shalomito yelides." 
1Chronicles3:20 Qasseka hara ichchash attuma nayti izas deettes; heytikka Hashube, Ohele, Baraakaye, Hasadiyanne Yoshaabi-Hesside." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanaaniyay Palaaxiyanne Yesha7iya geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides; Yesha7iyaykka Erafaya yelides; Erafayay Ornaane yelides; Ornaaney Abdiyu yelides; Abdiyuy Shakaaniya yelides. 
1Chronicles3:22 Shakaaniyaykka Shama7e yelides; Shama7ey Haxushe, Yigi7aale, Baaryahe, Narayanne Saafaaxe geetettizayta 5 attuma nayta yelides; Shakaaniya zereththati kumeththi usuppuna." 
1Chronicles3:23 Narayay Elyo7enaye, Hizqiyaasanne Azirqaame geetettiza 3 attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elyo7enayey Hoddaye, Elyaasheebe, Pelaaya, Aqube, Yohanaane, Dallayanne Anaane geetettiza 7 attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles4:1 Yuhuda zereththati Paareese, Hexiroome, Karme, Huurenne Shobaale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobaaley Era7aye yelides; Era7ayeykka Yahaate yelides; Yahaateykka Xora7aatas koyro aawa gididayta Ahumayenne Lahade yelides. 
1Chronicles4:3 Huurey ba aayo Efraatas bayra naa; Huurey Beeteliheeme yelides; Exaame attuma nayti Izra7eele, Yushimanne Yidibaashe; isttas michcha Haxilelipoono geetettawus; Panu7eeley Gadoore yelides. Ezeerey Huushe yelides; hayti Huure zareta." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Tequhe aawa Ashihuures Heelonne Na7iro geetettiza nam7u machcheti deettes. 
1Chronicles4:6 Ashihuurey Na7iro geetettiza ba machcheyfe Ahuzaame, Hefeere, Temenanne Ahashitaare geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles4:7 Qasseka Heelippe Xerete, Xoohaare, Etinanne Qoxe yelides." 
1Chronicles4:8 Haqoxey Anuube, Xobaabenne Haruume naa Aharheele zereththatas aawa." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabeexey ba ishata giddon keehi bonchchettida as gidides; iza aaya, «Tani iita miixan yelidayssa» gashe iza, «Yaabexe» ga sunththadus." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabeexeykka, «Abeet Godawu! Ne tana anjja; ne ta deraa aassa; ne kushey tanara de7o; tana metoppenne qohoppe ashsha» giidi Isra7eele Xoossaa woossides; Xoossika izi woossidayssa izas immides." 
1Chronicles4:11 Shuhaha isha Kaalubey Mahire yelides; Mahirey Eshtoone yelides. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshtooney Beeti-Rafa, Fasahenne Ir-Nahaashe aawa Tahina geetettiza attuma nayta yelides; Tahinay Na7aashe geetettiza katama essides; heyta zereththati kase Arakka geetettiza deren deettes." 
1Chronicles4:13 Qanaazey Otin7eelenne Saraya geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides; Otin7eeleykka Hataatenne Ma7onotaye geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles4:14 Ma7onotayey Oofira yelides. Sarayaykka kushe hiillanchchati diza Geharishimo geetettiza katamayo essida Iyo7aabe yelides. 
1Chronicles4:15 Yoofine naa Kaalebey Iro, Eelanne Na7ema geetettiza attuma nayta yelides; Eelay Qenaaze yelides." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yuhalel7eeley Ziife, Ziifa, Tiriyanne Asar7eele geetettiza attuma nayta yelides." 
1Chronicles4:17 Eziray Yootore, Mereede, Eferenne Yaloone yelides; Mereedey Gibxe kawo nayo Bityo machcho ekkidi Maaramo geetettiza macca nayo, Shamayenne Eshttamo7a aawa Yishiba yelides." 
1Chronicles4:18 Mereedey Gadoore aawa Yaareede, Sooko aawa Heebere, Zaanohe aawa Yiquti7eele Ayhuda dere maccassayfe yelides; heytikka Gibxe kawo nayo Bitya Mereedes yelida zareta." 
1Chronicles4:19 Hoddiyay Nahaamo michcho ekkides; iza Garimite dere as Qi7ila aawaanne Ma7ikate dere as Eshttamo7a aawa yeladus. 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimooni Aminoone, Eraane, Beeni-Hanaanenne Tilone yelides; Yishi7ey Zoheetenne Beeni-Zoheete yelides." 
1Chronicles4:21 Yuhuda naa Seela zareti Lekka aawaa Eera, Mareesha aawaa Laadanne Beeti-Ashibe7a katamaan de7iza layno daddizayta qommotas aawa." 
1Chronicles4:22 Harati qasse Yoqiime, Iyo7aasa, Yashubiliheeme, Mo7aabe biitta haarida Saraafanne Kozeebe katama asata; (ha yeletata taarike mazgabay beniisofe dees.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Istti kawo keeththa oosos urqqa medhdhizayta gididi kase Naxaamenne Gadeere geetettiza katamatan de7ida. 
1Chronicles4:24 Simooni Namu7eele, Yaamine, Yaribe, Zaraahenne Sha7ule yelides." 
1Chronicles4:25 Sha7uleykka Shaloome yelides; Shaloomey Mibisaame yelides; Mibisaamey Mishima7e yelides. 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishima7ey Hamu7eele yelides; Hamu7eeley Zakure yelides; Zakurey Shim7e yelides; 
1Chronicles4:27 Shim7ey tammanne usuppun attuma naytanne usuppun macca nayta yelides; iza ishati gidikko daro nayta yelibeettenna; hessa gishshas Simoona zarkketi Yuhuda zarkketa mala daribeettenna. 
1Chronicles4:28 Simoona zareti Bersaabehe katamaninne Molaade, Haxaare-Shu7aale," 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, Exeeme, Tolaade," 
1Chronicles4:30 Baatu7eele, Horma, Xigilaage," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markaboote, Haxaare-Susiime, Beeti-Baarenne Shaa7irayme katamatan de7ida; Dawiti kawotana gakkanaas heyti istta katamata gidida." 
1Chronicles4:32 Qasse istta mooththati Exaame, Ayine, Armoone, Tokeenenne Ashaane; istti mulera ichchash katamata." 
1Chronicles4:33 Ba7aala gakkanaas ha katamata yuushon diza mooththati ubbay istta bolla gujetteettes; heyti istti de7idasohotanne istta yeletata maaran mazgaban xaafi oykkida. 
1Chronicles4:34 Simoona zareta halaqati hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; isttika Mashobaabe, Yaamlaake, Amasiyaase naa Yooshsha," 
1Chronicles4:35 Iyu7eele, Yoshiibiya naa Iyu, (Saraya naa Yoshiibiya, Asa7eele naa Saraya,)" 
1Chronicles4:36 Elyo7enaye, Yaakoobe, Shohaaya, Asaaya, Adi7eele, Yashim7eele, Bannayanne Ziiza." 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziizay Shif7a naa, Shif7ay Aloone naa, Alooney Yeddaya naa, Yeddayay Shimire naa, Shimirey Shama7e naa." 
1Chronicles4:38 Hayssafe bollan xaafettida asati bantta zarkketas zarkketas korapinneta; isttaso asata zereththi keehippe coratti coratti bides. 
1Chronicles4:39 Istti bantta mehetas heenththasoho koyanaas Gadoore gelizaso matan diza shoobbaafe arshey mokkiza baggara dizasota gakkanaas bida. 
1Chronicles4:40 Istti heen keehippe araddanne lo7o heenththasoho demmida; he biittaya woppaynne saroy kumida aaho biitta; kase heen Kaame zereththati deettes. 
1Chronicles4:41 Hayssafe bollara istta sunththay xaafettida Simoona zareti Yuhuda Kawo Hizqiyaasa wode Gadoore biitta biidi heen diza Kaame zereththatanne Ma7uune asata olidi dhayssidayta; histtidi he biittan istta mehetas heemmizasohoy diza gishshas Simoona zareti hach gakkanaas heen uttida. 
1Chronicles4:42 Simoona zaretappe 500 asati Seyre zumaakko bida; istta halaqati Palaaxiya, Naraya, Erafayanne Uzi7eele; heytantti Yishi7e nayta." 
1Chronicles4:43 Kase baqati attida Amaaleeqe asata Simoona zareti dhayssida; istti hach gakkanaas he biittan deettes. 
1Chronicles5:1 Yaaqoobes koyro bayra naa Oroobeele zereththati hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Oroobeeley ba aawa hiixa tunisida gishshas iza bayrateththa maatay Yooseefe zereththatas imettides; hessafe dendoyssan iza zereththati bayrateththa maaran xaafettibeettenna. 
1Chronicles5:2 Bayrateththa maatay Yooseefe zereththatas imettikokka Yuhuday ba ishata giddon mino gidida gishshas dere ayssizaadey iza zereththafe kezides. 
1Chronicles5:3 Yaaqoobes bayra naa Oroobeele attuma nayti Heenooke, Paalu, Hexiroomenne Karme geetettizayta." 
1Chronicles5:4 Iyu7eele nay Shama7e, Shama7e nay Googe, Googe nay Shim7e," 
1Chronicles5:5 Shim7e nay Mikiyaasa, Mikiyaasa nay Era7aye, Era7aye nay Ba7aale," 
1Chronicles5:6 Ba7aale nay Be7eera. Oroobeele qommos korapinne gidida Be7eera Asoore Kawo Teligelitelifelisoorey di7i ekki bides. 
1Chronicles5:7 Ba7eera zareti bantta yeleta mazgaban xaafettida Oroobeele zereththata halaqati Yi7i7eele, Zakaraasanne Beela." 
1Chronicles5:8 Beelay Azaaza naa; Azaazi Shema7e naa; Shema7ey Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eele zareti Aaro7eereppe biidi Nebonne Ba7aali-Me7oone gakkanaas dunkaani uttida. 
1Chronicles5:9 Oroobeele zareta mehey Gala7aaden corattida gishshas istti heeppe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Efiraaxise Shaafappe biidi bazzaas gaxa gakkanaas dunkaani uttida. 
1Chronicles5:10 Sa7oole kawoteththa layththan Aggaari zareti Oroobeele zaretara olettiin Oroobeele zareti xoonida; histtidi Gala7aadeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Aggaari zareta biittan dunkaani uttida. 
1Chronicles5:11 Gaade zareti Oroobeele zaretappe pudeha baggara biidi Salaaka gakkanaas diza Baasaane biittan dunkaani uttida. 
1Chronicles5:12 Koyro zereththata halaqay Iyu7eele; nam7anththo zereththata halaqay Shafaame; qasseka Baasaanen dunkaani uttidayta halaqay Ya7inayenne Saafaaxe. 
1Chronicles5:13 Hankko attida laappun zarkketa halaqati, Mika7eele, Mashulaame, Sheba7e, Yooraye, Yikaane, Zi7anne Eboore." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hayti Abi7eele nayti Buuze zareta; Buuzey Yaahida yelides; Yaahiday Yeshishaaye yelides; Yeshishaayey Mika7eele yelides; Mika7eeley Gala7aade yelides; Gala7aadey Yaarooha yelides; Yaaroohay Huure yelides; Huurey Abihayle yelides. 
1Chronicles5:15 Istta zarkketa halaqay Gune naaza Abi7eele naa Ahi. 
1Chronicles5:16 Hayti wurikka Baasaaneninne Gala7aaden he dere katamataninne Lasharoone biitta mehe heemmizasoho ubbaan dunkaani uttida. 
1Chronicles5:17 Hayta ubbata zereththati Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aatame wodeninne Isra7eele Kawo Iyorba7aame wode zareta mazgaban xaafettida. 
1Chronicles5:18 Oroobeelesi, Gaade qommotassinne Minaase qommofe baggatas 44,760 mino olanchchati deettes; isttika gondalle oyth, mashsha oyththinne wondafen oleteth eriza mino olanchchata." 
1Chronicles5:19 Heytikka Aggaaretara, Yixuretara, Nafishaaneranne Nadaabe dere asaara olettanaas worajjida." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba ammano Xoossa bolla yeggidi izi istta maaddana mala Xoossa woossida. Xoossika istta woosaa siyidi Aggaaretanne isttara diza harata istta kushen aaththi immides. 
1Chronicles5:21 Istti bantta morkketa kusheppe 50,000 gaamella, 250,000 dorsinne 2,000 hareta di7ida; hessaththoka 100,000 as di7i ekkida." 
1Chronicles5:22 Olazi Xoossaafe gidida gishshas daroti hayqqida; xoonidayti guyeppe di7eteththa layththi wurana gakkanaas he asata soon uttida. 
1Chronicles5:23 Minaase qommotappe bagga zareti Baasaaneppe doommidi Ba7aali-Hermoone, Sanirenne Hermoone zumaa gakkanaas diza deren dunkaani uttida; istti heen coratti coratti bida." 
1Chronicles5:24 Istta zarkketa halaqati Efere, Yishi7e, El7eele, Azari7eele, Ermaasa, Hoddayenne Yahida7eele; heyti wurikka ba zarkken zarkken erettida asata, halaqatanne ola qarata." 
1Chronicles5:25 Gido attiin istti bantta aawata Xoossaas ammanettibeettenna; Xoossi istta sinththafe dhayssida he biitta asati goynniza eeqa xoossatas goynon laymatida. 
1Chronicles5:26 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele Xoossay Asoore kawo Puule woykko Teligelitelifelisoore denththeththidi Oroobeele qommota, Gaade qommotanne Minaase qommotappe baggaa di7i efana mala ooththides; izi heytantta Alahe, Haboore, Haaranne Gozaane shaafa heeran de7ana mala ooththides; istti hach gakkanaas heen deettes." 
1Chronicles6:1 Lewe nayti Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare." 
1Chronicles6:2 Qa7aate nayti Amiraame, Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amiraame nayti Aaroone, Musenne Maaramo. Aaroone attuma nayti Nadaabe, Abihu, El7ezeerenne Itamaare." 
1Chronicles6:4 El7ezeerey Finihaase yelides; Finihaasi Abishu7a yelides; 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishu7ay Buuqa yelides; Buuqay Uuze yelides; 
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzey Zarahiya yelides; Zarahiyay Marayoote yelides; 
1Chronicles6:7 Marayootey Amaariya yelides; Amaariyay Ahixuube yelides; 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahixuubey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Akimaase yelides; 
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaasi Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi Yohanaane yelides; 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaaney Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi kawo Solomooney Yerusalaamen keexisida Xoossa Keeththaan qeeseteththan ooththides. 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaariyaasi Amaariya yelides; Amaariyay Ahixuube yelides; 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahixuubey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Shaloome yelides; 
1Chronicles6:13 Shaloomey Kilqiyaasa yelides; Kilqiyaasi Azaariyaase yelides; 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaariyaasi Saraya yelides; Sarayay Iyosaadoqe yelides. 
1Chronicles6:15 GODAY Yuhuda asaanne Yerusalaame asaa Nabukadanaxooren di7issida wode Iyosaadoqeykka isttara di7etti bides. 
1Chronicles6:16 Lewe attuma nayti Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gershoone nayti Libinanne Shim7e; 
1Chronicles6:18 Qa7aate nayti Amiraame, Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele;" 
1Chronicles6:19 Meraare nayti Mahilenne Mushe; bantta aawa keeththan keeththan xaafettida Lewe zarkketi hayssafe kaalli dizayta; 
1Chronicles6:20 Gershoone zereththata; Gershooney Libina yelides; Libinay Yahaate yelides; Yahaatey Ziima yelides; 
1Chronicles6:21 Ziimay Yo7aaha yelides; Yo7aahi Iddo yelides; Iddoy Zaraahe yelides; Zaraahey Ye7atire yelides; 
1Chronicles6:22 Qa7aate zereththata; Qa7aatey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Qoore yelides; Qoorey Assire yelides; 
1Chronicles6:23 Assirey Hilqaana yelides; Hilqaanay Abiyaasaafe yelides; Abiyaasaafey Assire yelides; 
1Chronicles6:24 Assirey Tahaate yelides; Tahaatey Ur7eele yelides; Ur7eeley Ooziya yelides; Ooziyay Sa7oole yelides. 
1Chronicles6:25 Hilqaana zereththata; Hilqaanay Amasayenne Ahimoote yelides; 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimootey Hilqaana yelides; Hilqaanay Xoofaye yelides; Xoofayey Nahaate yelides; 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahaatey Elyaabe yelides; Elyaabey Yirohaame yelides; Yirohaamey Hilqaana yelides. 
1Chronicles6:28 Sameeli nam7u attuma nayta yelides; bayrazi Iyu7eele; iza kaalozi Abiya. 
1Chronicles6:29 Meraare zereththata; Meraarey Mahile yelides; Mahiley Libina yelides; Libinay Shim7e yelides; Shim7ey Uuzahe yelides; 
1Chronicles6:30 Uuzahey Shim7a yelides; Shim7ay Haggiya yelides; Haggiyay Asaaya yelides. 
1Chronicles6:31 Dawiti Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa Yerusalaame ehidaappe guye Godaa Xoossa Keeththan mazamure yexxizaytas halaqata shuumides. 
1Chronicles6:32 Kawo Solomooney Yerusalaamen Godaa Xoossaa Keeththa keexxanaashe gakkanawu Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen mazamure yexxishe gam7ida; baas imettida ooso maaran maaran ooththi polishe de7ida. 
1Chronicles6:33 Bantta naytara issife yexxizayti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Qa7aate zarkketappe yexxizay Hemaane; Hemaaney Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eeley Sameela naa; 
1Chronicles6:34 Sameeli Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Yirohaame naa; Yirohaamey El7eele naa; El7eeley Tooha naa; 
1Chronicles6:35 Toohi Zuufe naa; Zuufey Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Mahaate naa; Mahaati Amaasaye naa; 
1Chronicles6:36 Amaasayey Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eeley Azaariyaase naa; Azaariyaasi Sofonaasa naa; 
1Chronicles6:37 Sofonaasi Tahaate naa; Tahaatey Assire naa; Asirey Abiyaasaafe naa; Abiyaasaafi Qoore naa; 
1Chronicles6:38 Qoorey Yixihaare naa; Yixihaarey Qa7aate naa; Qahaatey Lewe naa; Lewey Isra7eele naa. 
1Chronicles6:39 Emaane dabbo Aasaafey izas ushachcha baggara eqqidi ooththees; Aasaafey Baraakaye naa; Baraakayey Shim7a naa; 
1Chronicles6:40 Shim7ay Mika7eele naa; Mika7eeley Ba7aseya naa; Ba7aseyay Malkiya naa; 
1Chronicles6:41 Malkiyay Etaane naa; Etaaney Zaraahe naa; Zaraahey Addaya naa; 
1Chronicles6:42 Addayay Etaane naa; Etaaney Ziima naa; Ziimay Shim7e naa; 
1Chronicles6:43 Shim7ay Yahaate naa; Yahaatey Gershoome naa; Gershoomey Lewe naa. 
1Chronicles6:44 Isttas hadirsa baggara istta dabbo Meraare zarkketi eqqeettes; Etaaney Qiisha naa; Qiishi Abide naa; Abdey Maallukke naa; 
1Chronicles6:45 Maallukkey Hashaabiya naa; Hashaabiyay Amasiyaasa naa; Amasiyaasi Kilqiyaasa naa; 
1Chronicles6:46 Kilqiyaasi Amoze naa; Amozey Baane naa; Baaney Shemere naa; 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemerey Mahile naa; Mahiley Mushe naa; Mushey Meraare naa; Meraarey Lewe naa. 
1Chronicles6:48 Isttas ishantta gidida hankko Lewe qommoti Xoossa Keeththan Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen oosettiza hara ooso ubbaas doorettida. 
1Chronicles6:49 Aarooneynne iza nayti gidikko Xoossa aylle Musey azazida mala Isra7eele deraa nagara wursanaas ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan oosettiza oosota ubbaas, yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuugettiza yarsho yarshanaassinne Exaane cuwasi yarshizasoza bolla exaane cuwasanaas isttas aawateththi imettides." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aaroone nayta zarkketi hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Aaroone nay El7ezeere; El7ezeere nay Finihaase; Finihaase nay Abishu7a; 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishu7a nay Buuqa; Buuqa nay Uuze; Uuze nay Zarahiya; 
1Chronicles6:52 Zarahiya nay Marayoote; Marayoote nay Amaariya; Amaariya nay Ahixuube; 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahixuube nay Saadooqe; Saadooqe nay Akimaase. 
1Chronicles6:54 Aaroone naytas imettida duussa sohoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettida; koyro saamay Qa7aate baggatas kezides; 
1Chronicles6:55 Isttas Yuhuda biittan diza Kebroonenne iza heeran diza mehe heemmizasohota immida. 
1Chronicles6:56 Kebroone yuushon diza goshsha gadetinne mooththati Yoofine naa Kaalebes imettida. 
1Chronicles6:57 Aaroone naytas shemppo wodhidaadey baqati biidi attiza katamata, Kebroone, Yetire, Libinanne mehe heemmizasohota, Eshttamo7anne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hiilenenne mehe heemmizasohota, Dabirenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashaanenne mehe heemmizasohota, Beeti-Shemishenne mehe heemmizasohota immida." 
1Chronicles6:60 Qasse Biniyaame qommota gadeppe Geebanenne mehe heemmizasohota, Alemeetenne mehe heemmizasohota, Anatootenne mehe heemmizasohota immida; Aaroone naytas imettida katamati mulera tammanne heedzdza." 
1Chronicles6:61 Arshey wulliza baggara diza Minaase zarkke baggati oykkida gadezappe 10 katamati hankko attida Qa7aate zarkketas imettida. 
1Chronicles6:62 Yisakoore zarkketa biittafe, Aaseere zarkketa biittafe, Niftaaleme zarkketa biittafenne Baasaanen diza Minaase zarkketa biittafe 13 katamata Gershoone zarkketas immida." 
1Chronicles6:63 Oroobeele zarkketa biittafe, Gaade zarkketa biittafenne Zaabiloone zarkketa biittafe 12 katamata Meraare zarkketas saaman immida." 
1Chronicles6:64 Hessaththo ooththidi Isra7eele asay Lewetas ha katamatanne istta heeran diza mehe heenththasohota immides. 
1Chronicles6:65 Hayssafe bollara sunththay isttas xeygettida katamata Yuhuda zarkketappe, Simoona zarkketappe, Biniyaame zarkketappe hara katamatan ooththoyssa mala Saama yeggidi istta gakkidayssa gisha immida." 
1Chronicles6:66 Qa7aate zarkketa giddofe issi keeththa asatas Efreeme zarkketa gakkida biittaafe katamatanne mehe heemmizasoho immida. 
1Chronicles6:67 Isttas shemppo wodhidaadey baqati biidi attiza katamata, Efreeme deren gezze biittan diza Seekeemenne mehe heemmizasohota, Gezeerenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yoqima7aamenne mehe heemmizasohota, Beeti-Horoonenne iza mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaaloonenne mehe heemmizasohota, Geet-Ermoonenne mehe heemmizasohota immida." 
1Chronicles6:70 Minaase zarkketa baggafe Aneerenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Balaamanne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi Qa7aate zarkketappe attidaytas immida. 
1Chronicles6:71 Minaase zarkketa baggafe Baasaanen diza Golaanenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Astarootenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi Gershoone zarkketas immida. 
1Chronicles6:72 Qasse Yisakoore zarkketappe Qaadeesenne mehe heemmizasohota, Dabiraatenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:73 Eramootenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Aneemanne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida.
