1Chronicles6:74 Aaseere zarkketappe Mashaalanne mehe heemmizasohota, Abdoonenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:75 Huqooqenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Erahoobenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida. 
1Chronicles6:76 Hessaththoka Niftaaleme zarkketappe Galilan diza Qaadeesenne mehe heemmizasohota, Hamoonenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Qiriyaataymenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida." 
1Chronicles6:77 Attida Meraare zarkketas Zaabiloone zarkketappe Armoonenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Taaboorenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi immida. 
1Chronicles6:78 Qasse Oroobeele zarkketappe Iyarkko ginan, Yordaanooseppe he pinththan arshey wulliza baggara, bazzon diza Baxiranne mehe heemmizasohota, Yahaaxenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:79 Qidimootenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Mefa7aatenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida. 
1Chronicles6:80 Gaade zarkketappe Gala7aaden diza Eramootenne mehe heemmizasohota, Mahanaymenne mehe heemmizasohota," 
1Chronicles6:81 Haseboonenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Iyaazeerenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida. 
1Chronicles7:1 Yisakoores oyddu attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Tola, Puuwa, Yaashubenne Shimiroone geetettizayta." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola nayti Uuze, Erafaya, Yiri7eele, Yahimaye, Yibisaamenne Sameela; isttika Tola zarkketa halaqata; istti wolqqamanne mino olanchchata; kawo Dawite wode istta qooday 22,600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uuzey Yiziraaheya yelides; Yiziraaheyay Mika7eele yelides; Mika7eeley Abdiyu yelides; Abdiyuy Iyu7eele yelides; Iyu7eeley Yishiya yelides; ha ichchashatikka baso asatas halaqa. 
1Chronicles7:4 Isttas daro machchetinne nayti diza gishshas isttaso asaa zarkketappe olas gakkida olanchchata qooday 36,000 gidides." 
1Chronicles7:5 Yisakoore zarkketappe olas gakkida olanchchati mazgaban qoodettidi 87,000 gidida." 
1Chronicles7:6 Biniyaames heedzdzu nayti deettes; isttika Beela, Bekerenne Yidi7eele." 
1Chronicles7:7 Beela nayti Exiboone, Uuze, Uzi7eele, Yarmootenne Iire; ha ichchashatikka baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 22,034 wolqqamanne mino olanchchati mazgabettida." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekere nayti Zimira, Iyo7aasa, El7ezeere, Elyo7enaye, Omire, Yarmoote, Abiya, Anatootenne Alemeete; hayti ubbati Bekere nayta." 
1Chronicles7:9 Istti ubbay baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 20,200 wolqqamanne mino olanchchati mazgabettida." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yidi7eele nay Bilihaane; Bilihaane nayti Ya7uushe, Biniyaame, Ehuude, Kin7aane, Zettaane, Tarseesenne Akishahoore;" 
1Chronicles7:11 hayti ubbati Yidi7eele nayta; istti baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 17,200 wolqqamanne mino olanchchati mazgabettida." 
1Chronicles7:12 Shufimeynne Huppiimey Ire zereththata; Hushimey Aheere zereththa. 
1Chronicles7:13 Niftaaleme nayti Yahixele, Gune, Yexirenne Shaloome; hayti Biliha zereththata." 
1Chronicles7:14 Minaase zareti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Minaasey Aaraame biittafe ekkida garadeya yelida attuma nayti Asira7eelenne Gala7aade aawa Maakire. 
1Chronicles7:15 Maakirey Huppimenne Shufime baggafe Ma7ikko machcho ekkides; iza michchey sunththika Ma7ikko geetettees; Maakire zare Xilofaadey macca nayta xalla yelides. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maakire machcha Ma7ikay attuma nayta yeladus; bayra naaza Pareesha, iza kaaloza Shereeshe ga sunththadus. Pereesha nayti Ulaamenne Ereqeeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulaame nay Badaane; hayti Minaase naa Maakire naa Gala7aade zareta. 
1Chronicles7:18 Gala7aade michchiya Hamoleketa Ishawu, Abi7eezerenne Mahile yeladus." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shamida nayti Ahiyaane, Seekeeme, Liiqihanne An7aame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efreeme nay Shutula; Shutula nay Baareede; Baareede nay Tahaate; Tahaate nay El7aade; El7aade nay Tahaate; 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahaate nay Zabaade; Zabaade nay Shutula. Efreeme naa Ezeereynne Elaadey mehe kaysana Geete dere biin he biitta asati istta wodhida. 
1Chronicles7:22 Hessa gishshas istta aawa Efreemey daro wode kayottides; histtiin iza dabboti yiidi iza minththeththida. 
1Chronicles7:23 Hessafe guye izi ba machcheyra gayttides; histtiin iza shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza keeththan gakkida iita metoza gaason naaza Barihe gi sunththides. 
1Chronicles7:24 Efreemes She7iro geetettiza macca nay dawus; izakka pude Beeti-Horoone, duge Beeti-Horoonenne Uuzen-She7ira geetettiza katamata essadus." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efreemes Erfaha geetettiza hara attuma nay dees; Erfaha nay Eresheefa; Eresheefa nay Telaahe; Telaahe nay Tahaane; 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahaane nay Laadaane; Laadaane nay Amihuude; Amihuude nay Elshama; 
1Chronicles7:27 Elshama nay Nawe; Nawe nay Iyaaso. 
1Chronicles7:28 Efreeme zareta duussasoynne istta biittay Beetele yuushon diza katamata, arshey mokkiza baggara Na7iraane, arshey wulliza baggara Gezeere, Seekeeme, Aayenne istta yuushon diza katamata." 
1Chronicles7:29 Qasseka Minaase zareta biitta zawan Beeti-Sha7aane, Ta7inaake, Magiddo, Doorenne istta yuushon diza katamata; Isra7eele naa Yooseefe zareti ha katamatan de7ida." 
1Chronicles7:30 Aaseere nayti Yimine, Yishiwe, Yishiwanne Barihe; istta michcha Seraho geetettawus." 
1Chronicles7:31 Barihe nayti Heeberenne Birizawaate aawa Malkki7eele. 
1Chronicles7:32 Heebere nayti Yaafaleexe, Shomerenne Hoottamo; istta michcha Shuu7o geetettawus." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yaafaleexe nayti Paasaake, Bimihaalenne Ashiwaate; hayti Yaafaleexe nayta." 
1Chronicles7:34 Yaafaleexe isha Shemere nayti Ahi, Erohiiga, Yahuubenne Aaraame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Iza isha Hoottamo nayti Xofaaha, Yimine, Sheleeshenne Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Xofaaha nayti Suuha, Harnefere, Shu7aale, Beere, Yimire," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bexere, Hooda, Shaama, Shilashe, Yitiraanenne Ba7eera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Yootore nayti Yoofine, Pispanne Aare." 
1Chronicles7:39 Uule nayti Arahe, Han7eelenne Erixiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Hayti ubbay Aaseere zareta; istti baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 26,000 wolqqamanne mino olanchchati mazgabettida." 
1Chronicles8:1 Biniyaames bayra naazi Beela; iza kaaloti Ashibeele, Ahirahe," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha, Erafe." 
1Chronicles8:3 Beela zareti Adaare, Geera, Abihuude," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishu7a, Na7imaane, Ahoowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Geera, Shafaamenne Huraame." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehuude zareti Na7imaane, Akayanne Geera; istti Geeban diza bantta keeththa asatas halaqata; hessafe guye istti Manahaate biitta di7etti bida; Oozanne Ahihuude aawa Geeray isttas halaqa." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaymey ba machcheta Hushimonne Ba7iro anjji yeddidaappe guye Mo7aabe biittan attuma nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles8:9 Shaharayme ba machcho Hodeeshippe Yobaabe, Ziibiya, Meeshe, Malkaame," 
1Chronicles8:10 Ya7uuxe, Saakiyanne Mirma yelides; iza nayti ubbay baso asatas halaqa gidida." 
1Chronicles8:11 Qasse ba machcho Hushimippe Ahixuubenne Elpa7eele yelides. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpa7eele nayti Eboore, Mishaamenne Shemede; Shemedi Oonno katamata, Looda katamatanne istta yuushon diza qeeri katamata essides." 
1Chronicles8:13 Bariheynne Shema7ey Ayaaloone katamaan diza bantta keeththa asatas halaqa gidida; istti Geete katamaan diza asaa yedeththida. 
1Chronicles8:14 Barihe zareti Ahiyo, Shaashaqe, Yarmoote," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zabaadiya, Araade, Edeere," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mika7eele, Yishiphanne Yooha geetetteettes." 
1Chronicles8:17 Elpa7eele zareti Zabaadiya, Mashulaame, Hizqa, Heebere," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yishimaraye, Yuzila7enne Yobaabe." 
1Chronicles8:19 Shim7e zareti Yaaqime, Zikire, Zabde," 
1Chronicles8:20 El7enaaye, Elnaye, El7eele," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Birayenne Shimiraate." 
1Chronicles8:22 Shaashaqe zareti Yishipha, Eboore, El7eele," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdoone, Zikire, Hanaane," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanaaniya, Elaame, Antooteya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifidayenne Panu7eele. 
1Chronicles8:26 Yirohaame zareti Shaamisharaye, Shahaariya, Attaaliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Ya7ireeshe, Eelaasanne Zikire." 
1Chronicles8:28 Hayti ubbati ba keeththa asatas halaqata; ba zereththa zarkketi xaafetti diza Yerusalaamen deettes. 
1Chronicles8:29 Geba7oone aawa Yi7i7eeley Geba7oone kataman dees; iza machchey sunththika Ma7ikko. 
1Chronicles8:30 Izas bayra naazi Abdoone geetettees; iza kaaloti Xuure, Qiise, Ba7aale, Neerey Nadaabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gadoore, Ahiyo, Zekurenne" 
1Chronicles8:32 Shime7e aawa Miqiloote; hayti ubbati ba dabbota matan Yerusalaamen deettes. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neerey Qiise yelides; Qiisey Sa7oole yelides; Sa7ooli Yoonataane, Malkeshu7a, Abinadaabenne Eshiba7aale yelides." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yoonataane nay Mariiba-Ba7aale; Mariiba-Ba7aaley Mikiyaasa yelides. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikiyaasa attuma nayti Pitoone, Meleeke, Tare7anne Akaaze." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akaazey Yaho7aade yelides; Yaho7aadi Alemeete, Azimootenne Zimire yelides; Zimirey Mooza yelides;" 
1Chronicles8:37 Moozay Bini7e yelides; Bini7ey Erafaye yelides; Erafayey El7aasa yelides; El7aasi Azeele yelides. 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeeles 6 attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Azirqaame, Bookere, Isma7eele, Sha7aariya, Abdiyunne Hanaane; hayti ubbay Azeele nayta." 
1Chronicles8:39 Azeele isha Esheeqes heedzdzu attuma nayti deettes; bayrazi Ulaame kaaloti Ya7uushenne Elfaleexe. 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulaame nayti wolqqamanne mino olanchchata; isttika wondafen duko erizayta; Ulaames 150 attuma naytinne nayta nayti deettes. Hayti ubbati Biniyaame zareta. 
1Chronicles9:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay ba yeleta zarkken zarkken xaafettides; ha taarikey Isra7eele Kawota Maxaafan xaafetti uttides. Yuhuda asay ba nagara gaason Baabiloone biitta di7etti bides. 
1Chronicles9:2 Di7etti bidasoppe Koyro simmidi bantta biittan uttidayti qeeseta, Leweta, Xoossa Keeththan wolqqa ooso ooththizaytanne Isra7eele asaappe guuththata." 
1Chronicles9:3 Yuhuda zaretappe, Biniyaame zaretappe, Efreeme zaretappenne Minaase zaretappe guuththati Yerusalaamen de7ida." 
1Chronicles9:4 Yuhuda naa Paareese zarkkefe Uutayey Yerusalaamen uttidaytas halaqa; Uutayey Amihuude naa; Amihuudey Imire naa; Imirey Baane naa. 
1Chronicles9:5 Yuhuda naa Seelo zaretappe Asaayaynne iza nayti Yerusalaamen dizaytas halaqata. 
1Chronicles9:6 Yuhuda naa Zaraahe zaretappe Yi7i7eeley Yerusalaamen dizaytas halaqa. Yuhuda zareti qoodiin mulera 690. 
1Chronicles9:7 Yerusalaamen de7ida Biniyaame zarkke halaqati hayssafe kaalli xaafettida; Halaqa Saaluy Mashulaame naa; halaqa Mashulaamey Hoddaye naa; halaqa Hoddayey Hasanu7e naa. 
1Chronicles9:8 Halaqa Yibenayey Yirohaame naa. Halaqa Eelay Uuze naa; Uuzi Mikire naa. Halaqa Mashulaamey Shafaaxiya naa; Shafaaxiya Era7u7eele naa; Era7u7eeley Yibinaye naa. 
1Chronicles9:9 Biniyaame zareta qooday mulera 956; heyti ubbay ba keeththa asatas halaqata. 
1Chronicles9:10 Yerusalaamen de7ida qeeseti hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayta; istti Yaddaya, Yoharibe, Yaakinenne" 
1Chronicles9:11 Xoossa Keeththan halaqatida Azaariyaasa; Azaariyaasi Kilqiyaasa naa; Kilqiyaasi Mashulaame naa; Mashulaamey Saadooqe naa; Saadooqey Marayoote naa; Marayootey Ahixuube naa. 
1Chronicles9:12 Harati qasse Yirohaame naa Adayanne Adi7eele naa Ma7isaya; Yirohaamey Pashkure naa; Pashkurey Malkiya naa. Adi7eeley Yahizeere naa; Yahizeerey Mashulaame naa; Mashulaamey Mashilemite naa; Mashilemitey Imere naa. 
1Chronicles9:13 Banttaso asatas halaqatida qeeseti 1,760; hayti Xoossa Keeththan oosettiza oosos gakkida asata." 
1Chronicles9:14 Yerusalaamen de7ida Leweti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Hashube naa Shama7ey Meraare zarkke; Hashubey Azirqaame naa; Azirqaamey Hashaabiya naa. 
1Chronicles9:15 Baqibaqire, Hereeshe, Galaalenne Maataaniya; Maataaniyay Mikka naa; Mikiyaasi Zikire naa; Zikirey Aasaafe naa." 
1Chronicles9:16 Harati qasse Naxoofeta mooththatan uttida Abdiyunne Barakaye. Abdiyuy Shama7e naa; Shama7ey Galaale naa; Galaaley Edotaane naa. Barakayey Aasa naa; Aasi Hilqaana naa. 
1Chronicles9:17 Xoossa Keeththa Penge naagiza zabeti Shaloome, Aqube, Xalmoone, Ahimaanenne istta dabbota; Shaloomey isttas halaqa." 
1Chronicles9:18 Ha zereththati arshey mokkiza baggara diza kawo Penge geetettizasoza naageettes; hayssafe kase istti Leweti dunkaani uttidaso gelththiza penge naageettes. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shaalumey Abiyaasaafe naaza Qoore naa; izi Qoraaha zarkke asa. Qoore zereththati kase Godaa Xoossa Dunkaane naagida mala Shaloomeynne Qoraaha zarkke gidida iza dabboti Xoossa Keeththa naageettes. 
1Chronicles9:20 El7ezeere naa Finihaasi beni wode Qoraaha zarkketa halaqa; GODAY izara dees. 
1Chronicles9:21 Qasseka Mashelemiya naa Zakaraasi Dunkaane penge naagees. 
1Chronicles9:22 Pengaa naaganaas doorettidayti mulera 212; haytanti bantta kataman kataman qoodettidi xaafettida; istta zaretas ha aawateththaa immiday kawo Dawitenne nabe Sameela. 
1Chronicles9:23 Hessa gishshas isttinne istta nayti Xoossa Keeththa dunkaane pengeza naageettes. 
1Chronicles9:24 Zabeti arshey wulliza baggara, mokkiza baggara, pudeha baggaranne dugeha baggara eqqidi naageettes." 
1Chronicles9:25 He katamatan diza istta dabboti laappunththa gallas laametti laametti naagishe istta maaddanaas bessees. 
1Chronicles9:26 Penge naagiza zabeta halaqatappe oyddu Leweti Xoossa Keeththaa, iza giddon diza kifiletanne minjja keeththa aawateththan naageettes." 
1Chronicles9:27 Xoossa Keeththa naagizaynne qasse maalado maalado kare doyzayti istta gidida gishshas heen aqeettes. 
1Chronicles9:28 Isttafe guuththati Xoossa Keeththa oosos go7ettiza miishshata aawateththan naageettes; he miishshata kare kessiza wodenne soo gelththiza wode istti qoodeettes. 
1Chronicles9:29 Qasse isttafe issoti issoti Xoossa Keeththa giddon go7ettiza hara miishshata, liiqo dhiilleza, woyne ushshaza, zayteza, exaanezanne sawota aawateththan naageettes." 
1Chronicles9:30 Gido attiin qeeseta naytappe issoti issoti sawoza geeddari geeddari walakkeettes. 
1Chronicles9:31 Qoore zarkkefe Shaloomes bayra naa Lewe Matitiyas yarsho uketh uukkanaas aawateththi dees. 
1Chronicles9:32 Qa7aate zarkke gidida istta dabbotappe guuththatas Sambatan Sambatan xaraphpheeza bolla woththiza yarsho giigsana aawateththi dees. 
1Chronicles9:33 Lewe zaretappe amarda halaqati Xoossa Keeththan yexxizayta; istti omarsinne gallas ooththiza gishshas hara ooso oosettenna; istti Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon diza keeththatan de7eettes. 
1Chronicles9:34 Hayti ubbay Lewe qommotas halaqati bantta zarkken zarkken xaafettidi Yerusalaamen deettes. 
1Chronicles9:35 Geba7oone aawa Yi7i7eeley Geba7oone kataman de7ides; iza keeththa aayey sunththi Ma7ikko. 
1Chronicles9:36 Izas bayra naazi Abdoone; iza kaaloti Xuure, Qiise, Ba7aale, Neere, Nadaabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gadoore, Ahiyo, Zakaraasanne Miqiloote." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miqilootey Shime7e yelides; isttika bantta dabbota matan Yerusalaamen de7ida. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neerey Qiise yelides; Qiisey Sa7oole yelides. Saa7ooley Yoonataane, Malkeshu7a, Abinadaabenne Eshiba7aale yelides;" 
1Chronicles9:40 Yoonataane nay Mariiba-Ba7aale; Mariiba7aaley Mikiyaasa yelides. 
1Chronicles9:41 Mikiyaasa nayti Pitoone, Meleeke, Tere7anne Akaaze." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akaazey Ya7ire yelides; Ya7irey Alemeete, Azimootenne Zimire yelides; Zimirey Mooza yelides;" 
1Chronicles9:43 Moozay Bini7e yelides; Bini7ey Erafaya yelides; Erafayay El7aasa yelides; El7aasi Azeele yelides. 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeeles usuppun attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Azirqaame, Bookere, Isma7eele, Sha7aariya, Abdiyunne Hanaane; hayti ubbay Azeele nayta." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filisxeeme asati Isra7eele asatara olettida; Isra7eele asati Filisxeeme asata sinththafe baqatida; Isra7eeletappe daroti Gilbo7a zuma hu7en hayqqida. 
1Chronicles10:2 Filisxeeme asati Sa7oolenne iza nayta yedeththi gakkidi iza nayta Yoonataane, Abinadaabenne Malkeshu7a wodhida." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olay Sa7oole yuuyi aadhdhidi un7eththides; olanchchati iza wondafen dukki madunththida. 
1Chronicles10:4 Sa7ooli ba ola massara tookkiza wottadaraza, «Ha qaxxarettontta Filisxeeme asati yiidi ta bolla kaa7ontta mala ne giththa mashshan tana wodha» gides. Gido attiin iza ola massaraa tookkiza wottadarazi keehi yayyida gishshas ixxides; histtiin Sa7ooli ba giththa mashsha bolla kundidi hayqqides." 
1Chronicles10:5 Iza ola massara tookkizayssi Sa7ooli hayqqidayssa be7idaappe guye izikka ba giththa mashsha sa7an essidi iza bolla kundi hayqqides. 
1Chronicles10:6 Hessaththo hanidi Sa7ooli, iza nayti heedzdzatinne izaso asati ubbay he gallas issife hayqqida." 
1Chronicles10:7 Zullezan de7iza Isra7eele asati ubbay bantta olanchchati baqatidayssa, Sa7oolinne iza nayti hayqqidayssa be7idi isttika bantta katamata aggidi gangida; Filisxeeme asati yiidi he katamata oykkida." 
1Chronicles10:8 Wonteththa gallas Filisxeemeti ola massarata hayqqidayta bollafe qaari ekkanaas yiidi Sa7oolinne iza nayti Gilbo7a zuma hu7en hayqqidayssa demmida. 
1Chronicles10:9 Histtidi istti Sa7oole hu7e qanxxi ekkidinne iza ola massara qaari ekkida; hessafe guye bantta eeqa xoossatassinne bantta deraas ha xoono mishiraachchoza awajjana mala Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas as kiitti yeddida. 
1Chronicles10:10 Istti Sa7oole ola massarata bantta eeqa xoossata keeththatan woththida; iza hu7eza bantta eeqa xoossaa Daagone Keeththan kaqqida. 
1Chronicles10:11 Filisxeeme asati Sa7oole bolla ooththidayssa ubbaa Gala7aaden diza Yaabuse katama asati siyida wode," 
1Chronicles10:12 mino asati biidi Sa7oole ahaanne iza nayta ahaa ekkidi Yaabuse katama ehida; histtidi Yaabusen diza gita miththa garsan moogida; hessafe guye 7 gallas xoomida. 
1Chronicles10:13 Sa7ooli GODAAS ammanettibeenna; iza qaalaakka naagontta ixxidi moytille xeygizayta zore oychchida gishshas hayqqides. 
1Chronicles10:14 Hessa gaason GODAY iza wodhidi iza kawoteththaa Isseye naa Dawites aaththi immides. 
1Chronicles11:1 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay ubbay issife Dawitekko Kebroone biidi, «Nuni issi ashonne issi meqeththa;" 
1Chronicles11:2 Kase Sa7oole kawoteththa wodekka Isra7eele asaa olas kaaleththiday nena; GODAA ne Xoossay nena, ‹Ta deraa Isra7eele neni heemmana; istta bollaka neni kawotana› gides» gida." 
1Chronicles11:3 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele cimati ubbay Kawo Dawitekko Kebroone katama yida; izi isttara Kebroonen GODAA sinththan caaqettides; GODAY Sameela baggara haasayda qaalaa mala Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawotana mala tiyda. 
1Chronicles11:4 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay Yerusalaame katama bida; he wode Yaabuse asati heen diza gishshas he katamaya Yaabuse geetettawus. 
1Chronicles11:5 Yaabuse asati Dawite, «Neni ha katama mulekka gelakka» gida; gidikkoka Dawiti Xiyoonen diza istta miixaa oykkides; histtiin iza Dawite Katama geetettadus." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dawiti, «Koyrotti biidi Yaabuse asata shocizaadey ola gadawa gidana» gides; histtiin Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey koyrotti bi olida gishshas ola gadawa gidides." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dawiti he miixayo baas duussaso histtida gishshas miixaya Dawite katama geetettadus. 
1Chronicles11:8 Dawiti he katamay yuushon kechchata keccidi katamayo zaari keexxides; attida katamaa qasse Iyo7aabey zaaridi keexxides. 
1Chronicles11:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY izara diza gishshas Dawiti minni minni bides. 
1Chronicles11:10 Mino gidida Dawite olanchchati hayssafe kaallidi xaafettida; isttika hankko Isra7eele asatara gididi GODAY izas immida hidota qaala mala iza kawoteththay aakkana mala keehi maaddidanne minththeththida. 
1Chronicles11:11 Mino gidida Dawite olanchchatappe koyroyssi Hakimoone zarkkefe gidida Yashobi7aame; izi ola gadawa heedzdzatas halaqa; izi issito olan 300 as wodhides. 
1Chronicles11:12 He heedzdzu mino olanchchatappe nam7anththozi Ahihohe zarkkefe Doode naa El7ezeere. 
1Chronicles11:13 Filisxeeme asati olettanaas Efsi-Deemime geetettizaso shiiqida wode Alazaarey Dawitera issife dees; banggay kumida goshsha gade giddon Isra7eele olanchchati Filisxeemeta sinththafe baqatida. 
1Chronicles11:14 Gido attiin izinne iza kaallizayti heen soho oykkidi Filisxeeme asatara eqettida; GODAY isttas wolqqama xoono immides. 
1Chronicles11:15 Filisxeeme olanchchati Erafayme shoobban dunkaani diza wode 30 halaqatappe heedzdzati Dawiti dizaso Adulaame gongolo matan diza zaallaako wodhdhida. 
1Chronicles11:16 He wode Dawiti miixaa giddon dees; Filisxeeme olanchchata buttey Beeteliheemen dees. 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawiti haath uyanaas amottidi, «Beeteliheeme katama penge lanqen diza pultto haaththaafe tana oonee ushshanay!» gides." 
1Chronicles11:18 Heedzdzu mino Dawite olanchchati Filisxeeme asati dunkaani uttidasohora kanththi biidi Beeteliheeme katamaa pengen diza pulttozappe haath duuqqidi Dawites ehida; gido attiin Dawiti uyontta ixxidi he haaththaa GODAA sinththan gussides. 
1Chronicles11:19 Histtidi, «Hayssa mala oosoppe tana Xoossi naago! Ta hayssa uykko ba shemppo bayzidi ehida asata suuth ushsha mala gidennee?» gides; hessa gishshas Dawiti he haaththaa uyibeenna; he heedzdzu mino olanchchati hessa ooththida." 
1Chronicles11:20 Iyo7aabe isha Abisayey heedzdzatas halaqa; izi ba tooran 300 asata oli wodhides; hessa gaason izikka heedzdzata mala erettides. 
1Chronicles11:21 Izi heedzdzatara qoodettontta aggikokka isttafe aadhdhida bonchcho demmides; isttaskka halaqa gidides. 
1Chronicles11:22 Qabxi7eeleppe yida Yoodahe naa Bannayay erettida olanchchanne wolqqama miish ooththida asa; izi nam7u erettida Mo7aabe biitta asata wodhides; qasse shachchi darida issi gallas gongolo giddo gelidi gaammo wodhides. 
1Chronicles11:23 Bannayay izas geesay ichchashu wadha gidiza Gibxe biitta as wodhides; he Gibxe addeza kushen shemmaane wondiraashe keena tooray dees; Bannayay gidikko guufe oykki biidi iza kushen diza tooraa dafi ekkidi iza tooran iza zaari wodhides. 
1Chronicles11:24 Yoodahe naa Bannayay haytantta ooththides; izikka heedzdzata mala erettida as gidides. 
1Chronicles11:25 Izi heedzdzatara qoodettontta aggikokka 30 olanchchatappe aadhdhi bonchchettides; Dawiti iza bana naagizayta bolla halaqa histti shuumides. 
1Chronicles11:26 Asaa giddon diza mino olanchchati hayssafe kaalli dizayta, Iyo7aabe isha Asaheele, Beeteliheeme as Doode naa Elyaane," 
1Chronicles11:27 Haroode as Shaamote, Piloone as Heleexe," 
1Chronicles11:28 Tequhe as Iqesha naa Ira, Anatoote as Abi7eezere," 
1Chronicles11:29 Huushe as Sibikaye, Ahihohe as Eelaye," 
1Chronicles11:30 Naxoofe as Mahiraye, Naxoofe as Ba7aana naa Heleede," 
1Chronicles11:31 Biniyaame zarkkefe Gibi7a as Eribaye naa Ittaye, Piraatoone as Bannaya," 
1Chronicles11:32 Ga7aashe shoobba as Huraye, Arabe as Abi7eele," 
1Chronicles11:33 Bahiruume as Azimoote, Shaalboone as Eliyaahibe," 
1Chronicles11:34 Gizoone as Hasheeme, Harare dere as Shaage naa Yoonataane," 
1Chronicles11:35 Harare dere as Sakkare naa Ahi7aame, Uure naa Elfaale," 
1Chronicles11:36 Makeere dere as Hefeere, Piloone dere as Akaya," 
1Chronicles11:37 Qarmeloose as Hexire, Ezbaye naa Na7iraye," 
1Chronicles11:38 Naataane isha Iyu7eele, Aggaare naa Mibihaare," 
1Chronicles11:39 Amoone as Zallaqa, Xuriya naa Iyo7aabe ola massara tookkiza Bi7oroote as Nahiraye," 
1Chronicles11:40 Yatire as Ira, Yatire as Gaareebe," 
1Chronicles11:41 Hiite as Ooriyo, Ahilaye naa Zabaade," 
1Chronicles11:42 Oroobeele zarkkefe Shiiza naa Adiine; izi Oroobeele zarkketassinne banara issife diza 30 asatas halaqa. 
1Chronicles11:43 Ma7ika naa Hanaane, Mitaane as Iyoosaafixe," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ashtaarote as Uuziya, Aaro7eere dere as Hoottamo nayta Shaamenne Yi7i7eele," 
1Chronicles11:45 Shimire naa Yidi7eelenne iza isha Tizeete dere as Yooha," 
1Chronicles11:46 Mahaawe as El7eele, Elnaame nayta Yiribayanne Yooshaya, Mo7aabe dere as Yitima," 
1Chronicles11:47 El7eele, Iyoobeedenne Xoobe dere as Ya7isi7eele." 
1Chronicles12:1 Dawiti Qiise naa Sa7ooleppe baqatidi Xigilaagen uttida wode izakko yida asati hayssafe kaallizayta; isttika kase iza ola wode iza maaddida ola qarata giddon deettes. 
1Chronicles12:2 Istti ushachcha kusheninne hadirsa kushen wondafe dukkanaassinne yanbarshe dhayqanaas dandayza olanchchata; isttika Biniyaame zare gidida Sa7ooles asho dabbota. 
1Chronicles12:3 Istta halaqay Gibi7a as Shama7e naa Ahi7ezeerenne Iyo7aasa. Harati qasse Azimoote naa Yizi7eelenne Paleexe, Baraake, Anatoote as Iyu," 
1Chronicles12:4 erettida 30 olanchchatas halaqanne erettida olanchcha Geba7oone dere as Yishima7e, Ermaasa, Yahazi7eele, Yohanaane, Gadeere dere as Yozabaade," 
1Chronicles12:5 El7uzaye, Yarmoote, Ba7aaliya, Shamaariya, Harife as Shafaaxiya," 
1Chronicles12:6 Qoore as Hilqaana, Yishiya, Azari7eele, Yo7eezerenne Yashobi7aame," 
1Chronicles12:7 Gadoore as Yirohaame naa Yo7eelenne Zabaadiya. 
1Chronicles12:8 Dawiti bazzon baqati attizason diza wode Gaade zarkketappe olanchchati izakko yida; isttika minonne olas giigettida asata; qasseka gondallenne toora oyth dandayzayta; istta ayfesoy gaammo mala babisees; istti zuma bolla guppiza genessa mala pilateettes. 
1Chronicles12:9 Istta halaqay koyroyssi Eezere, nam7anththozi Abdiyu, heedzdzanththozi Elyaabe," 
1Chronicles12:10 oydanththozi Mishimaane, ichchashanththozi Ermaasa," 
1Chronicles12:11 usuppunththozi Attaye, laappunththozi El7eele," 
1Chronicles12:12 osppunththozi Yohanaane; uddufunththozi Elzabaade; 
1Chronicles12:13 tammanththozi Ermaasa; tammanne issinththozi Makibaanaye. 
1Chronicles12:14 Hayti Gaade zarkketa garsan olanchchata halaqata; isttafe daroti shaalaqata mala, amardayti mato halaqata mala qoodettida." 
1Chronicles12:15 Yordaanoose shaafay kixa salo shempida koyro aginan pinnidi zullaafe arshey mokkiza baggaranne arshey wulliza baggara dunkaani uttida asaa ubbaa yedeththida. 
1Chronicles12:16 Biniyaame zarkketappenne Yuhuda zarkketappe amarda asati Dawiti dizaso miixa yida. 
1Chronicles12:17 Histtiin Dawiti isttara gayttana ke7idi, «Intte tana maaddanaas saron taakko yidaa gidikko ta inttena ufayssan mokka ekkana; gido attiin intte tana ta morkketas aaththi immanaas yidaa gidikko nu aawata Xoossay hayssa be7idi pirdo!» gides." 
1Chronicles12:18 Hessafe guye 30 asata halaqa Amasaye bolla Xoossa Ayanay wodhdhiin izi, «Dawitee! Nuni neyta! Isseye naa Dawitee! Nuni nenara issife doos! Neessinne nena maaddizaytas saroy gido! Ne Xoossay nena maaddana» gides. Hessa gishshas Dawiti mokki ekkidi ba olanchchata bolla halaqa histtides." 
1Chronicles12:19 Dawiti Filisxeemetara issife gididi Sa7oole olanaas bida wode Minaase zarkkefe amarda asati Dawitekko biidi iza qoommida; gido attiin, «Dawitinne iza olanchchati istta kawoza Sa7ooles aaththi immanaakko» gi hirgida gishshas Filisxeeme asati keehi zorettidaappe guyen istta guye Xigilaage zaarida." 
1Chronicles12:20 Dawiti Xigilaage katama simmishin iza maaddanaas Minaase zarkketappe kezi yida shaalaqati Adinahe, Yozabaade, Yidi7eele, Mika7eele, Yozabaade, Eelihunne Xiltaye." 
1Chronicles12:21 Istti ubbatikka erettida mino olanchchata gidida gishshas Dawite ola wottadarata bolla halaqata gidida; Dawite morkketa olidi iza maaddida. 
1Chronicles12:22 Dawite olanchchati Xoossa olanchchata mala corattana gakkanaas iza maaddiza asay gallas gallas gujettees. 
1Chronicles12:23 GODAY immida hidota qaalaa mala Sa7oole kawoteththaa Dawites zaaranaas Dawitekko Kebroone yida ola tamaarda wottadarata qooday hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
1Chronicles12:24 Gondallenne toora oykkidi olas giigettida Yuhuda zarkketi usuppun shiyanne osppun xeeta. 
1Chronicles12:25 Simoona zarkkefe olas giigida minonne wolqqama olanchchati laappun shiyanne issi xeet. 
1Chronicles12:26 Lewe zarkkefe oyddu shiyanne usuppun xeet," 
1Chronicles12:27 Aaroone zarkketa halaqa Yoodahe gujjiin heedzdzu shiyanne laappun xeet. 
1Chronicles12:28 Erettida olanchcha Saadooqe dabbota giddofe izara gujjiin nam7u tammanne nam7a. 
1Chronicles12:29 Biniyaame zarkkefe Sa7oole dabboti heedzdzu shiya. Gido attiin Biniyaame zarkkefe dariza baggati Sa7oole keeththa asaas he wodey gakkanaas ammanettizayta. 
1Chronicles12:30 Efreeme zarkkefe bantta aawata keeththan erettida minoti nam7u tammu shiyanne osppun xeet. 
1Chronicles12:31 Dawite kawoththanaas doorettida Minaase zarkke baggaafe tammanne osppun shiya. 
1Chronicles12:32 Isra7eele asay ay ooththanaas bessizaakko wodeza shaakki eriza aadho eranchchatinne Yisakoore zarkke halaqati nam7u xeet; isttara yida istta dabboti ubbay isttas azazetteettes. 
1Chronicles12:33 Ola meezetidayti, ola massara ubbaan olettanaas dandayzaytinne wozinay ballatontta Dawite maaddanaas yida Zaabiloone baggati ichchash tammu shiya." 
1Chronicles12:34 Niftaaleme zarkketas issi shiya halaqati deettes; gondallenne toora oykkida heedzdzu tammanne laappun shii asati isttara issife deettes. 
1Chronicles12:35 Daane zarkkefe olas giigettida asati nam7u tammanne osppun shiyanne usuppun xeet. 
1Chronicles12:36 Aaseere zarkkefe ola meezetidi giigettida olanchchati oyddu tammu shiya. 
1Chronicles12:37 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Oroobeele zarkketappe, Gaade zarkketappenne Minaase zarkke baggaafe dumma dumma qommo massara oykkidi yida asati xeetanne nam7u tammu shiya." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ha olas giigida olanchchati ubbay Dawite Isra7eele bolla kawoththanaas bantta qofaa issi bolla qachchidi Kebroone katama yida; qasse hankko attida Isra7eele dere ubbay Dawite kawoththanaas issi wozinan gidides. 
1Chronicles12:39 Istta dabboti isttas koshshizayssa giigsi woththida gishshas mishenne uyishe Dawitekkon heedzdzu gallas gam7ida. 
1Chronicles12:40 Isra7eele asaas gita ufays gidiza gishshas istta shooroppe doommidi haakon diza Yisakooreppe, Zaabilooneppenne Niftaalemeppe asay attontta kath, dhiille, balasenne zabibe kompa, woyne ushshinne wogara zayte haren, baqulon, gaamellaninne booran caanidi ehides; qasseka istti shukki maana mala miizatanne dorsata ekki yida." 
1Chronicles13:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti shaalaqatara, mato halaqataranne olanchcha halaqata ubbatara zorettides." 
1Chronicles13:2 Histtidi Isra7eele asaa ubbaas, «Inttes lo7o misatizayssa gidikkonne GODAA nu Xoossaa shene gidikko Isra7eele biittan mataninne haakon diza nu ishati qasseka bantta katamataninne bantta mehe heemmizasohotan diza qeesetinne Leweti nunara issife shiiqana mala ane kiita yeddoos." 
1Chronicles13:3 Sa7oole kawoteththa wode nuni yeggi aggida nu Xoossa Taabotaa ane zaaridi ehoos» gides. 
1Chronicles13:4 Dawiti yootidayssi ammanththizaaz gidida gishshas asay iza qofaa ekkides. 
1Chronicles13:5 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Xoossaa Taabotaa Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimeppe ehana mala Gibxe zawappe doommidi Hamaate purde gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asaa ubbaa shiishshides. 
1Chronicles13:6 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay kirubetappe giddon ba araata bolla uttida GODAA sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Taabotaa ehanaas Yuhuda biittan diza Ba7aala geetettiza Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime katama bida. 
1Chronicles13:7 Xoossa Taabotaza Abinadaabe sooppe ooraththa para-gaare bolla woththi ehida; para-gaareza laaggizayti Oozanne Ahiyo. 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay diiththan maasinqon, karaben, daalaninne xurumban bantta kumeththa wolqqan Xoossa sinththan ufayettidi bonchchida." 
1Chronicles13:9 Istti Kiidoona geetettizason diza kaththa balezakko gakkida wode caanida boorati bargagi dhuphettiin Oozay Taabotaza ashshanaas kushe yeddides. 
1Chronicles13:10 Iza kushey Taabotaza bochchida gishshas GODAA hanqoy Ooza bolla eexxi kezides; hessa gishshas izi heen GODAA sinththan hayqqides. 
1Chronicles13:11 GODAY hanqettidi Ooza wodhida gishshas Dawiti kayottides; hach gakkanaas he sohoy Ooza meqoso geetettees. 
1Chronicles13:12 He gallas Dawiti Xoossas yayyida gishshas, «Xoossa Taabotaa taakko wostta ehanaas dandayazinaa?» gides." 
1Chronicles13:13 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Taabotaza banara efanaappe Geete dere as Abidaareso efides. 
1Chronicles13:14 Xoossa Taabotay Abidaareson izaso asatara heedzdzu agina gam7ides; GODAY iza keeththa asaanne izas diza miish ubbaa anjjides. 
1Chronicles14:1 Xiroose Kawo Huraamey Dawites kawo keeth keexxana mala kiita asata, shuch massizaytanne anaaxeta ziga miththara Dawitekko yeddides." 
1Chronicles14:2 GODAY Isra7eele bolla iza kawoththidayssanne ba asaa Isra7eele gishshas iza kawoteththa dhoqqu histti bonchchidayssa Dawiti akeekides. 
1Chronicles14:3 Hessafe guye Dawiti Yerusalaamen hara machcheta gujji ekkidi attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides. 
1Chronicles14:4 Dawiti Yerusalaamen yelida attuma nayti Shaamu7e, Shoobaabe, Naataane, Solomoone," 
1Chronicles14:5 Iyabeheere, Elshu7e, Elpaleexe," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogahe, Nefege, Naafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elshama7e, Be7elyaadenne Elfaleexe." 
1Chronicles14:8 Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawo gididi tiyettidayssa Filisxeeme asay siyidi ubbay Dawite oykkanaas ke7ides; Dawiti hessa siyidi isttara olettanaas kezides. 
1Chronicles14:9 Filisxeeme asay Erafayme zulleza yiidi worajjides. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dawitikka, «Tani baada Filisxeemeta oloo? Neni istta ta kushen aaththa immanee?» gi Xoossaa oychchides. Histtiin GODAY izas, «Ee baada ola; tani istta nees aaththa immana» gides." 
1Chronicles14:11 Histtiin Dawitinne izara diza asay Ba7aali-Paraaxime geetettizaso biidi heen istta oli xoonida; Dawiti, «Di7o haaththi shoddi efiza mala Xoossi ta morkketi ta kushen shodettana mala ooththides» gides; hessa gishshas he sohoza sunththi Ba7aali-Paraaxime geetettides." 
1Chronicles14:12 Filisxeemeti bantta eeqa xoossata heen yeggi bida. Histtiin Dawiti istta eeqa xoossata taman xuuggana mala azazides. 
1Chronicles14:13 Filisxeeme asay nam7anththo yiidi he shoobbaa worajjides. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawiti Xoossaa nam7anththo zaari oychchides; histtiin Xoossi izas, «Neni istta bolla sitti gaada booppa. Istta giddoththada eththa miththas sinththa baggara istta olanaas giigetta." 
1Chronicles14:15 Eththaa miththaza xeeran salfe giiris neni siyida wode olanaas elle keza; gaasoykka hessi Filisxeeme olanchchata shocanaas Xoossay neeppe sinththan kezida gishshassa guussa» gides. 
1Chronicles14:16 Hessa gishshas Xoossay azazida mala Dawiti ooththides. Geba7ooneppe biidi Gezeere gakkanaas Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme olanchchata dippi histtides. 
1Chronicles14:17 Hessa gaason Dawite goobateththi biitta ubbaan nashettides. GODAY kawoteththati ubbay Dawites yayyana mala ooththides. 
1Chronicles15:1 Dawiti ba sunththan xeygettida kataman baas keeththata keexxides; Xoossa Taabotasikka soho giigsidi dunkaane essides. 
1Chronicles15:2 Hessafe guye Dawiti, «Xoossa Taabotaa tookkanaassinne mernaas Xoossaas haggazana mala GODAY doorida Lewetappe attiin hara asi oonikka Xoossa Taabotaa tookkofo» gi azazides." 
1Chronicles15:3 Dawiti GODAA Taabotaas giigsida soho Taabotaza ehana mala Isra7eele asaa ubbaa Yerusalaamen shiishshides. 
1Chronicles15:4 Qasseka Aaroone zaretanne Leweta xeygi shiishshides; 
1Chronicles15:5 Qa7aate zereththatappe halaqa gidida Ur7eelenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne nam7u tamma; 
1Chronicles15:6 Meraare zereththatappe halaqa Asaayanne iza dabbotappe nam7u xeetanne nam7u tamma; 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershoone zereththatappe halaqa Iyu7eelenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne heedzdzu tamma; 
1Chronicles15:8 Elxafaane zereththatappe halaqa Shama7enne iza dabbotappe nam7u xeeta; 
1Chronicles15:9 Kebroone zereththatappe halaqa El7eelenne iza dabbotappe osppun tamma; 
1Chronicles15:10 Uzi7eele zereththatappe halaqa Aminadaabenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne tammanne nam7a. 
1Chronicles15:11 Hessafe guye Dawiti qeeseta Saadooqenne Abiyaataare, qasse Leweta Ur7eele, Asaaya, Iyu7eele, Shama7e, El7eelenne Aminadaabe xeygides." 
1Chronicles15:12 Histtidi isttas, «Intte Lewe keeththa asatas halaqata gidida gishshas inttena geeshshite; hessafe GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa Taabotaa ta izas giigsidaso ehite." 
1Chronicles15:13 Kasekka intte Lewe qommoti Xoossa Taabotaa tookkontta aggida gishshassinne nunikka iza woga mala wostti efanaakko Xoossa oychchontta aggida gishshas GODAA nu Xoossay nuna qaxxaydes» gides. 
1Chronicles15:14 Hessa gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa Taabotaa ehanaas qeesetinne Leweti banttana geeshshida. 
1Chronicles15:15 GODAY Muse baggara kase azazida mala Leweti Xoossa Taabotaa tooho miththara bantta hashen tookkida. 
1Chronicles15:16 Hessafe guye diiththinne maasinqo diixxishe, daala qaaththishe, ufayssa mazamure yexxana mala Leweta kaaleththizayti bantta dabbota garsafe as doorana mala Dawiti azazides." 
1Chronicles15:17 Hessa gishshas Leweti Iyu7eele naa Hemaane, iza dabbotappe Baraakaye naa Aasaafenne istta ishanttafe Meraare zarkke Qiisiya naa Etaane shuumida." 
1Chronicles15:18 Qasse nam7anththo maaran Zakaraasa, Ya7izi7eele, Shamiramoote, Yihi7eele, Uune, Elyaabe, Bannaya, Ma7isaya, Matitiya, Elfaalehu, Miqineyanne penge naagizayta Obeed-Eedoomenne Yi7i7eele sunththida." 
1Chronicles15:19 Xarqimala daala dhoqqu histti giirissi sissana mala Hemaane, Aasaafenne Etaane sunththida." 
1Chronicles15:20 Qasse maasinqo kaa7ana mala Zakaraasa, Ya7izi7eele, Shamiramoote, Yihi7eele, Uune, Elyaabe, Ma7isayanne Bannaya sunththida." 
1Chronicles15:21 Diith ordera shocana mala Matitiya, Elfaalehu, Miqineya, Obeed-Eedoome, Yi7i7eelenne Azaaziya sunththida." 
1Chronicles15:22 Leweta halaqa Kanaaniya yeththas imotay izas diza gishshas yexxizayta tamaarsana mala sunththida. 
1Chronicles15:23 Baraakayeynne Hilqaanay Taabotaa dunkaane penge naaganaas doorettida. 
1Chronicles15:24 Qasse qeeseti Shebaaniya, Iyoosaafixey, Natina7eeley, Amasayey, Zakaraasi, Bannayaynne El7ezeerey Xoossa Taabotaa sinththan xurumba punnanaas doorettida; Obeed-Eedoomeynne Yihiyay Taabotaa naaganaas doorettida." 
1Chronicles15:25 Hessafe guye Dawiti, Isra7eele cimatinne shaalaqati GODAA Taabotaa Obeed-Eedoome sooppe ehanaas ufayettidi bida." 
1Chronicles15:26 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida Leweta Xoossay maaddida gishshas istti laappun korma booratanne laappun dharshota yarshida. 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawiti, Taabotaa tookkida Leweti ubbay, mazamure yexxizaytinne istta halaqa Kanaaniya qacinappe dadettida layno may7ida; qasseka Dawiti lee7e qacinappe dadettida eefude may7ides." 
1Chronicles15:28 Histtidi Isra7eele ubbay hombocishe xurumbanne zaye punnishe, daala giirissishe, diiththinne maasinqo diixxishe GODAA Taabotaa ehida." 
1Chronicles15:29 Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Dawite katama gelishin kawo Dawiti ufayettidi durishininne kaa7ishin Sa7oole naya Milkoola maskootera mokka xeellada kawo Dawite ba wozinara kadhadus. 
1Chronicles16:1 Istti Xoossa Taabotaa ehidi Dawiti Taabotaa woththanaas tolida dunkaaneza giddon woththida; histtidi xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho Xoossas yarshida. 
1Chronicles16:2 Dawiti xuugettiza yarshozanne issifeteththa yarsho yarshidaappe guye GODAA sunththan dereza anjjides. 
1Chronicles16:3 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asa ubbaas, maccassaassinne attumasaas, hu7en hu7en issi issi guuththa uketh, issi issi qanxxo ashonne issi issi zabibe kompa gishides." 
1Chronicles16:4 GODAA Taabotaa sinththan ooththana malanne GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa woossanaas, sabbanaassinne galatanaas Dawiti Lewe qommotappe guuththata sunththides." 
1Chronicles16:5 Leweta halaqay Aasaafe; izappe garsara Zakaraasa; Zakaraasara dizayti Yi7i7eele, Shamiramoote, Yihi7eele, Matitiya, Elyaabe, Bannayanne Obeed-Eedoomenne Yi7i7eele; heyti maasinqonne diith diixxana mala summida; Asaafi gidikko daala qaaththanaas summides." 
1Chronicles16:6 Qeese Bannayaynne Yahazi7eeley Xoossaa Taabotaa sinththan ubba wode zaye punnana mala summida. 
1Chronicles16:7 He gallas Dawiti kasetidi Aasaafessinne izara ooththiza laggetas GODAA galatiza mazamure immides. 
1Chronicles16:8 GODAA galatite; iza sunththaa xeygite; izi ooththida ubbaa kawoteththatas yootite. 
1Chronicles16:9 Iza sabbite; galata mazamurekka izas yexxite; izi ooththida malalisiza ooso ubbaa yootite. 
1Chronicles16:10 Iza geeshsha sunththaan bonchchite; GODAA koyzayta wozinay ufayetto. 
1Chronicles16:11 GODAANNE iza wolqqa xomosite; ubba wode iza koyite. 
1Chronicles16:12 Izi ooththida malalisiza oosota, malaatatanne iza pirdaa akeekite." 
1Chronicles16:13 Intteno Xoossa aylle Isra7eele zereththatoo! Intteno doorettida Yaaqoobe naytoo! 
1Chronicles16:14 Izi GODAY nu Xoossa; iza pirday ubbaa bollanna. 
1Chronicles16:15 Ba caaqqida qaalaa mernaas, ba azazidayssaka shii yeleta gakkanaas qoppees." 
1Chronicles16:16 Abrahaames caaqqida caaqaa, Yisaaqas immida hidota qaalaa," 
1Chronicles16:17 Yaaqoobes woga gidana mala, Isra7eelesikka mernaa caaqo qaala gidana mala minththides." 
1Chronicles16:18 «Kanaaney nees xinxxo gidana mala ta nena laatissana» gides. 
1Chronicles16:19 Istti qoodan guuth gidi diza wode, deraasikka imath gidi diza wode," 
1Chronicles16:20 issi dereppe hara dere, issi kawoteththafe hara kawoteth toylattida." 
1Chronicles16:21 Oonikka istta un7eththana mala aaththi immibeenna; istta gishshas kawota seerides; 
1Chronicles16:22 «Ta tiydayta bochchofte; ta nabeta qohopite» gides. 
1Chronicles16:23 Biitta ubbay GODAAS yexxite; izi ashshizayssa hach hach yootite. 
1Chronicles16:24 Kawoteththatas iza bonchcho awajjite; izi ooththida malalisiza miishshata dere ubbaas yootite. 
1Chronicles16:25 GODAY gita; izas bessiza galataykka dhoqqa; xoossata ubbaafe aadhdhees; izas yayyanaas bessees. 
1Chronicles16:26 Ayzaabeta xoossati ubbay eeqa xoossata; GODAY gidikko salota medhdhida Xoossa. 
1Chronicles16:27 Bonchchoynne teemay izas dees; minoteththinne ufayssi iza Keeththan dees. 
1Chronicles16:28 Intteno asa zare ubbatoo! GODAA sabbite; «Bonchchoynne wolqqay GODAASSA» gi yootite. 
1Chronicles16:29 GODAA sunththaas bessiza bonchcho immite; yarsho ekkidi iza sinth shiiqite; iza geeshshateththa bonchcho gishshas GODAAS goynnite. 
1Chronicles16:30 Biittan diza as ubbay iza sinththan kokkorite; Sa7ay minni eqqides; mulekka qaaxxenna. 
1Chronicles16:31 Saloti ufayetetto! sa7aykka hashshu go! Kawoteththata giddon isttas, «GODAY kawotides!» getto." 
1Chronicles16:32 Abbaynne iza giddon diza ubbay guummetto; dembatinne istta bolla diza ubbati ufayetetto. 
1Chronicles16:33 Izi biitta bolla pirdanaas yaana. He wode wora miththati Godaa Xoossaa sinththan ufayssan yexxana. 
1Chronicles16:34 GODAY kiya; iza maaroteththayka mernaassa; hessa gishshas GODAA galatite. 
1Chronicles16:35 «Abeet nuna ashshiza GODAWU! Nuna ashsha; ne geeshsha sunththaa nu galatana mala, nu nena galatan bonchchana mala kawoteththata giddofe nuna shiishshada ashsha» giite." 
1Chronicles16:36 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas galatetto! Hessafe guye dere ubbay, «Amiin» giidi GODAA galatides." 
1Chronicles16:37 GODAA Taabotaa sinththan hach hach goynos koshshizaaz ubba wode istti ooththana mala Dawiti Aasaafenne iza dabbota woththides. 
1Chronicles16:38 Qasseka Obeed-Eedoomenne iza dabbota usuppun tammanne osppunata isttara ooththana mala woththides; Edotaane naa Obeed-Eedoomenne Hoosa dirsaa penge naagana mala woththides. 
1Chronicles16:39 Qeese Saadooqenne izara ooththiza qeeseti Geba7oonen dhoqqasohon diza GODAA Dunkaaneza sinththan ooththana mala heen woththides. 
1Chronicles16:40 Gaasoykka GODAY Isra7eeles immida wogaa mala istti ubba wode xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizason maaladonne omars xuugettiza yarsho yarshanaassa. 
1Chronicles16:41 Iza maarotay mernaas gidida gishshas GODAA galatana mala Hemaane, Edotaanenne doorettida harata Dawiti isttara issife essides." 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemaanessinne Edotaanes xurumba punnanaas, daala giirissanaasinne mazamure yexxishe go7ettiza hara massarata bolla aawateththi isttas imettides; Edotaane nayti dirsa penge naagana mala alaafeteththi imettides." 
1Chronicles16:43 Hessafe guye ubba asay baso baso bides; Dawitikka baso asaa anjjanaas soo simmides. 
1Chronicles17:1 Dawiti ba kawoteththa keeththan de7ishe, nabe Naataanes, «Tani zigappe keexettida keeththan de7ays; gido attiin Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotay gidikko dunkaane giddon dees» gides." 
1Chronicles17:2 Naataaney qasse Dawites, «Ooththanaas ne wozinan ne qoppidayssa ubbaa ooththa; Xoossi nenara dees» gides." 
1Chronicles17:3 Gido attiin he gallassa omars Xoossa qaalay Naataanekko yiidi," 
1Chronicles17:4 «Ba; baada ta aylle Dawites GODAY nees gizayssi ta izan de7ana keeth keexxanay nena gidakka. 
1Chronicles17:5 Tani Isra7eeleta Gibxeppe kessida gallassaafe doommada hach gakkanaas, dunkaanaappe dunkaanen, qasse issi sohoppe hara soho yuuyada de7ays attiin keeththan de7abeekke." 
1Chronicles17:6 Tani Isra7eele asaa ubbaara yuuyida soho ubbaan ta deraa heemmanaas tani azazida Isra7eele daannatappe oonaska, ‹Taas ziga miththafe keeth ays keexxibeeketii?› gaada oychchida wodey dizee?" 
1Chronicles17:7 «Hessa gishshas ha7ikka neni ta aylle Dawites, Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossi nena, ‹Ta deraa Isra7eele ayssana mala neni dorsa heemmizasohoppe ta nena denththa ekkadis." 
1Chronicles17:8 Neni bida soho ubbaan tani nenara issife gidadis; ne morkketa ubbaa ne sinththafe diggadis; ha7ikka tani ha sa7an erettida gita asata sunththaa mala ne sunththaa gitasana. 
1Chronicles17:9 Tani ta asaa Isra7eeles daanasoho immana; isttas duussasoho immidaappe guye istti qaaxxontta mala ta ooththana; iita asati kase istta un7eththidayssaththo hayssafe guye istta un7eththettenna. 
1Chronicles17:10 Hayssafe kase ta deraa Isra7eele kaaleththizayta ta sunththida wode kase iitati un7eththidayssaththo hayssafe guye un7eththettenna; intte morkketa ubbaa ta kawushshana; tani Xoossay nees keeth keexxanayssa yootays. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ne cimmada kase hayqqida ne aawatan gayttiza wode tani ne naytappe issaa denththada ne sohon kawoththana; iza kawoteththaaka ta minththana. 
1Chronicles17:12 Taas keeth keexxanay iza; tani iza kawoteththa araataa mernaas minththa essana. 
1Chronicles17:13 Tani izas aawa gidana; izikka taas naa gidana; neeppe kase kawotida Sa7ooleppe tani ta maaroteththaa denththida mala izappe mulekka denththike. 
1Chronicles17:14 Tani iza ta asaa bollanne ta kawoteththaa bolla mernaas sunththana; iza kawoteththa araataykka mernaas minni eqqana› gaada yoota» gides. 
1Chronicles17:15 Naataaney Xoossay izas ajjuutan qonccisida qaala ubbaa Dawites yootides. 
1Chronicles17:16 Hessafe guye Kawo Dawiti dunkaanen gelidi GODAA sinththan uttides; histtidi, «Abeet GODAWU, Xoossawu! Neni hayssa ubbaa taas ooththanaas tani oonee? Taso asaykka aazee?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Abeet Xoossawu! Hayssi ne ayfe sinththan guuththa misatiin ne aylle zareti sinththafe yaana layththatan hananayssa yootadasa; neni tana gita asatappe dhoqqu histta xeelladasa. 
1Chronicles17:18 Neni tana ne aylleza bonchchida gishshas tani Dawiti hayssafe bollara ay gaana dandayazinaa? Neni tana ne aylleza eraasa. 
1Chronicles17:19 Abeet GODAWU! Ne aylleza gishshas ne wozina qofaa mala ha gita miishshata ubbaa ooththada ha gitateththaa ubbaa tana erisadasa. 
1Chronicles17:20 «Abeet GODAWU! Ne malay haray baawa; nuni nu hayththan siyida mala neeppe attiin hara Xoossi deenna. 
1Chronicles17:21 Neni Xoossi Gibxe biittafe kessida ne deraa sinththafe kawoteththata gooddada gitanne yashissiza miish ne sunththas ooththana mala, deraakka nees wozzana mala ne isttas ooththidayssaththo ne dere Isra7eele mala derey biitta bolla haray dizee?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Neni ne deraa Isra7eele mernaas nees histtadasa; abeet GODAWU nenikka istta Xoossa gidadasa. 
1Chronicles17:23 «Abeet GODAWU! Neni ne ayllezasinne iza zereththatas immida hidotaa mernaas minththa; neni immida hidota qaalaakka pola. 
1Chronicles17:24 Hessa ne ooththanay ne sunththi minni daana malanne mernaas gita gidana malassa; hessafe guye asay, ‹Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay tumukka Isra7eele Xoossa› gaana gees; ne aylle Dawite zareti ne sinththan minni eqqana." 
1Chronicles17:25 «Abeet ta Xoossawu, ‹Neni taas ne ayllezas keeth keexxana ga yootadasa; hessa gishshas tani ne aylley nena woossanaas xaladis." 
1Chronicles17:26 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tumu Xoossa; ha lo7o hidota qaala ne ayllezas immadasa. 
1Chronicles17:27 Ne sinththan mernaas daana mala ne aylleza keeth anjjanaas ne koyadasa; Abeet GODAWU! Neni anjjiday mernaas anjjettidaade gidana› gi woossees» gides. 
1Chronicles18:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Filisxeemeta xooni haarides; histtidi Geete katamanne iza yuushon diza mooththata Filisxeeme asata kusheppe woththi ekkides. 
1Chronicles18:2 Histtiin Mo7aabe dere asay izas haarettidi giira ehides. 
1Chronicles18:3 Hessafe guye Dawiti Efiraaxise shaafa heeran diza dereta oykkana bida wode Xoobba Kawo Hadaadi7eezere oli xoonidi Hamaate gakkanaas diza biitta oykkides. 
1Chronicles18:4 Dawiti Hadaadi7eezereppe 1,000 para-gaareta, 7,000 toga asatanne 20,000 tohon bi olettiza wottadarata di7ides; Dawiti 100 gaaretas gidiza parata ashshidi hara parata ubbaas gaade xapho gildaydes." 
1Chronicles18:5 Damasqo kataman diza Aaraame asati Xoobba dere Kawo Hadaadi7eezere maaddanaas yida wode Dawiti isttafe 22,000 as wodhides." 
1Chronicles18:6 Hessafe guye Aaraame biittan Damasqo kataman olanchchati dunkaani uttanaaso giigsides; histtiin Aaraame dere asati Dawites haarettidi giirida; Dawiti bidaso ubbaan GODAY izas xoono immides. 
1Chronicles18:7 Kawo Dawiti Hadaadi7eezere olanchchata halaqati oykkida worqqa gondalleta woththi ekkidi Yerusalaame efides. 
1Chronicles18:8 Qasseka Dawiti Hadaadi7eezerey haariza Xibahaaneppenne Kuna katamappe keehi daro xarqimala ekkides; Solomooney he xarqimalata gita gabate, tuussatanne dumma dumma miishshata medhissides." 
1Chronicles18:9 Dawiti Xoobba dere Kawo Hadaadi7eezere olanchchata ubbaa xoonidayssa Hamaate kawo Too7uyi siyides. 
1Chronicles18:10 Histtidi banara olettishe gam7ida Hadaadi7eezere Dawiti oli xoonida gishshas iza hashshu gaanaassinne sarokkanaas Too7uyi ba naaza Hadoraame kawo Dawitekko kiittides; Hadoraamey worqqafe, birappenne xarqimalappe oosettida miishshata izas ekki yides." 
1Chronicles18:11 Kawo Dawiti Eedoomeppe, Mo7aabeppe, Amoone asatappe, Filisxeemetappenne Amaaleeqe asatappe di7i ekkida biranne worqqa ha miishshatara issife gaththi GODAAS dummasides." 
1Chronicles18:12 Xuriya naa Abisayey Eedoome asaappe 18,000 as Maxine Shoobban wodhides." 
1Chronicles18:13 Hessafe guye Dawiti Eedoomen olanchchati dunkaani uttanaaso giigsides; histtiin he biitta asati ubbay Dawites haarettidi giiri aqida; Dawiti bidaso ubbaan GODAY izas xoono immides. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dawiti Isra7eele deraa ubbaa bolla kawotides; deraa ubbaa xilloteththaninne suure pirdan ayssides. 
1Chronicles18:15 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey ola gadawa; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey mazgaba keeththa alaafe. 
1Chronicles18:16 Ahixuube naa Saadooqeynne Abiyaataare naa Abimelekkey qeese; Susahay waanna xaafe; 
1Chronicles18:17 Yoodahe naa Bannayay Kelitetassinne Pelitetas halaqa; kawo Dawite attuma nayti iza kawoteththan dhoqqa shuumeta. 
1Chronicles19:1 Hessafe guye Amooneta kawo Na7oosey hayqqiin iza naazi izasohon kawotides. 
1Chronicles19:2 Dawiti, «Iza aawa Na7oosey taas lo7o ooththida mala tani iza naa Haanoones lo7o ooththana» gi qoppides; hessa gishshas iza aawaa hayqoza gishshas iza minththeththanaas Dawiti as kiittides. Dawiti kiittidayti Haanoone minththeththanaas Amoone biitta gakkida wode," 
1Chronicles19:3 Amoone dere shuumeti Haanoone, «Dawiti ha asata kiittiday ne aawa bonchchidi nena minththeththanaas misatizee? Izi ha asata kiittiday biittayo xomosi xeellanaassinne oli oykkanaassa» gida." 
1Chronicles19:4 Histtiin Haanooney Dawiti kiittida asata oykkidi istta buuchchaa meedides; istta may7oka istta kalloy beettanaashe gakkanaas daakkidi istta dere zaari yeddides. 
1Chronicles19:5 Istti keehi yeellatida gishshas Dawiti hessa siyidi isttara gayttana mala hara as isttako kiittidi, «Intte buuchchi diccana gakkanaas Iyarkko kataman de7iishshite; hessafe guye haa yiite» gides." 
1Chronicles19:6 Amooneti Dawite matan ba ixettidayssa erida wode Haanooneynne Amooneti Mesphexoomiyappe, Aaraame dere Ma7ikafenne Xoobbafe para-gaaretanne toganchchata qaxxaranaas 34,000 kilo giraame gidiza saqile bira yeddida." 
1Chronicles19:7 Histtidi 32,000 para-gaareta, toga asata, Ma7ika kawonne iza olanchchata qaxxarida; isttika yiidi Medeban dunkaani uttida; qasse Amooneti bantta katamatappe shiiqettidi olas kezida." 
1Chronicles19:8 Dawiti hessa siyidi Iyo7aabenne olanchchata ubbaa yeddides. 
1Chronicles19:9 Amooneti katamaa pengen ke7idi olas yaaddida; istta maaddanaas yida kawotikka banttarkka baas soho oykkidi demban dunkaanida. 
1Chronicles19:10 Iyo7aabey olay sinththaranne guyera dooddi uttidayssa be7idi Isra7eele asaa ubbaafe erettida ola qarata doori ekkidi Aaraame dere olanchchata sinththan salfissides. 
1Chronicles19:11 Attida asata iza isha Abisayey kaaleththana mala azazidi Amooneta sinththan salfisides. 
1Chronicles19:12 Iyo7aabey ba isha Abisayes, «Aaraame asati ta bolla minniko neni yaada tana maadda; Amoone asati ne bolla minnizaa gidikko tani yaada nena maaddana." 
1Chronicles19:13 Ha7i neni minna! Nu deraa gishshassinne nu Xoossaa katamata gishshas ane minni olettoos; GODAY bana lo7oyssa ooththo» gides. 
1Chronicles19:14 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabeynne izara diza olanchchati Aaraame wottadaratara olettanaas biin Aaraame wottadarati istta sinththafe baqatida. 
1Chronicles19:15 Aaraame wottadarati baqatidayssa Amoone wottadarati be7ida wode isttika iza isha Abisaye sinththafe guye baqatidi katama gelida; hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Yerusalaame simmides. 
1Chronicles19:16 Aaraame asati Isra7eele asatan xoonettoyssa erida wode qasttanne kiittidi Efiraaxise Shaafappe he pinththan diza Aaraame asata ehisida; Xoobba kawo Hadaadi7eezeres ola gadawa gidida Shobaakey istta kaaleththees. 
1Chronicles19:17 Dawiti hessa siyida wode Isra7eele olanchchata ubbaa shiishshidi Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi Aaraame asatara olettanaas istta sinththan salfides; histtiin istti izara olettida. 
1Chronicles19:18 Gido attiin Aaraame asati Isra7eeleta sinththafe baqatida; Dawiti 7,000 para-gaaretanne 40,000 tohon bi olettiza wottadarata wodhides; istta ola gadawa Shobaakekka wodhides." 
1Chronicles19:19 Hadaadi7eezere asay Isra7eeletan xoonettidayssa eridi Dawitera sigettidi izas haarettides; hessafe simmiin Aaraame asay Amoone asaa maaddanaas dosibeenna. 
1Chronicles20:1 Ofinththan kawoti olas keziza wode Iyo7aabey olanchchata kaaleththi biidi Amoone dere dhayssides; Eraabe katamaakka dooddi uttides; gido attiin Dawiti Yerusalaamen takkides; Iyo7aabey Eraaba katama oli laallides. 
1Chronicles20:2 Hessafe guye Dawiti yiidi istta kawoza hu7eppe worqqa kallachcha ekkides; kallachchazi 34 kilo giraame gidides; iza giddon inqqu geetettiza al7o shuchchi dees; he kallachchaa ekkidi Dawite hu7en goxxida; qasse Dawiti he katamaappe keehi daro miish di7i ekkides. 
1Chronicles20:3 Heen de7iza deraa kessidi magaaze, xoyllenne kaltta oyththi oosisides; Amoonen diza hara katamatan diza asatakka Dawiti hessaththo oosisides; hessafe guye Dawitinne iza olanchchati ubbay Yerusalaame simmida." 
1Chronicles20:4 Hessafe simmiin Filisxeeme asatara Gezeeren olay dendides; he wode Huushe dere as Sibikayey Erafayme zere gidida Sifaye wodhides; histtiin Filisxeemeti xoonettida. 
1Chronicles20:5 Hessafe guye Filisxeemetara hara olay dendides; he wode izi oykkiza tooraa toomay shammaane wondiraashe keena gidida Geete katamappe yida Golyaade isha Lahiime Ya7ire naa Elyaaney wodhides. 
1Chronicles20:6 Qasseka hara olay Geete kataman dendides; heen izas kusheninne tohon usuppun usuppun biradhdheti issi bolla 24 biradhdheti diza Erafaye zereththafe gidida gubbanne geesa adussa asi dees. 
1Chronicles20:7 He addezi Isra7eeleta bolla eqettida wode Dawite isha Shim7a naa Yoonataaney iza wodhides. 
1Chronicles20:8 Haytanti Geete kataman diza Erafaye zareta; istti ubbay Dawite kusheninne iza asaa kushen hayqqida. 
1Chronicles21:1 Xala7ey Isra7eele asaa bolla meto ehanaas koyidi Dawiti Isra7eele asaa qoodana mala denththeththides. 
1Chronicles21:2 Dawiti Iyo7aabenne olanchchata halaqata, «Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asaa qoodite; histtidi asaa qooday aappunakko tana erisite» gides." 
1Chronicles21:3 Iyo7aabey gidikko izas, «GODAY ha7i diza Isra7eele asaa bolla xeetu kushe gujjo! Ta godaa kawoo! istti ubbay ta godaa aylleta deettennee? Ta goday hayssa mala ooththanaas ays koyidee? Isra7eele kawoteththaa ays mooranchcha kessizee?» gides." 
1Chronicles21:4 Gido attiin kawoza qaalay Iyo7aabe xoonides; histtiin Iyo7aabey kezi Isra7eele biitta ubbaa yuuyi aadhdhi Yerusalaame simmides. 
1Chronicles21:5 Iyo7aabey qoodida asaa qooda Dawites immides; Isra7eeleppe 1,100,000 Yuhudappe 47,000 olanaas dandayzayta demmides." 
1Chronicles21:6 Iyo7aabey kawoza azazon harasettida gishshas Leweta qommotanne Biniyaame qommota qoodibeenna. 
1Chronicles21:7 He azazozi Xoossa matan iita gidida gishshas Xoossi Isra7eele asaa qaxxaydes. 
1Chronicles21:8 Hessafe guye Dawiti Xoossas, «Tani ha oosozan nena keeha qohadis; tani bala ooththida gishshas tana ne aylleza qoho atto gaana mala ta nena woossays» gides." 
1Chronicles21:9 GODAY Dawite nabe Gaades," 
1Chronicles21:10 «Baada Dawite, ‹GODAY nena tani ne doorana mala ne sinththan heedzdzu miishshata woththadis; tanikka ne dooridayssa ooththana› gides» gaada yoota." 
1Chronicles21:11 Histtiin Gaadey Dawitekko biidi, «GODAY ne sinththan woththoyssafe issaa doora;" 
1Chronicles21:12 heedzdzu layththa kosha, woykko heedzdzu agina kumeth ne morkketan goodeteth, woykko heedzdzu gallas iita harge ehiza Xoossa mashshay biitta bolla yiin Isra7eele ubbaa bolla hayqo ehiza Xoossa kiitanchcha yuus, hessa gishshas tana kiittida Xoossaas ta ay zaara yootanaakko heytanttafe ne dooroyssa taas yoota» gides." 
1Chronicles21:13 Dawiti Gaades, «Ta dooranaas keeha metotadis; gidikkoka Godaa Xoossa maarotay keehi gita gidida gishshas asa kushen kundanaappe Xoossa kushen kundeththi taas lo7o» gides." 
1Chronicles21:14 Hessa gishshas GODAY iita harge yeddiin Isra7eeleppe 70,000 asi hayqqides." 
1Chronicles21:15 Hessafe guye GODAY Yerusalaame dhayssanaas kiitanchcha kiittides; gido attiin kiitanchchazi Yerusalaame dhayssanaas shiiqi uttidaashin GODAY be7idi mishettides; dhayssana yida kiitanchchaa, «Agga! Istta bolla gakkida bashshay gidana» gides. He wode Godaa Xoossaa kiitanchchay Yaabuse dere as Orna bale matan eqqides." 
1Chronicles21:16 Kiitanchchazi ba giththa mashsha kushen oykkidi Yerusalaame dhayssanaas saloppenne sa7appe giddon eqqidayssa Dawiti dhoqqu gi be7ides; hessafe guye Dawitinne cimati maaqa may7idi biitta bolla gufannida. 
1Chronicles21:17 Dawiti Xoossaas, «Asay qoodettana mala ooththiday tana gidikkinaa? Nagara ooththidaynne qohiday tana; histtiin hayti dorsati ay ooththidoo? Abeet ta Godaa Xoossawu! Ne kushey ta bollanne ta keeththa asaa bolla gido attiin ha boshaza ne deraa bolla yeddofa» gides." 
1Chronicles21:18 Hessafe guye Godaa Xoossaa kiitanchchay Gaades, «Dawiti pude Yaabuse dere as Orna bale biidi Godaa Xoossaas yarsho yarshizaso ooththana mala yoota» gi azazides." 
1Chronicles21:19 Dawiti Gaadey Godaa Xoossaa sunththan yootoyssaththo ooththanaas bides. 
1Chronicles21:20 He wode Ornaynne iza nayti balen gistte bukkishe guye simmi xeellidi kiitanchchaa be7ida; histtidi izara diza oyddu attuma nayti qotettida. 
1Chronicles21:21 Dawiti Ornako yiin Ornay iza be7idi balezappe gaxa ke7idi Dawites ziggides. 
1Chronicles21:22 Hessafe guye Dawiti Ornas, «Deraa bolla yida boshay kichchana mala tani Godaa Xoossaas yarsho yarshizaso ooththanaas ne baleza taas bayzarkkii! Tani nees kumeththa waaga qanxxana» gides." 
1Chronicles21:23 Histtiin Ornay Dawites, «Nees ekka; ta goday kawoy bana ufayssizayssa ooththo; hekko xuugettiza yarshos boorata, eesos kath bukkiza lodata, kaththa yarsho gidana mala gistte immana; hayta ubbatakka ta nees immana» gides." 
1Chronicles21:24 Gido attiin kawo Dawiti Ornas, «Hessi hanenna! Tani kumeththa waaga qanxxada shammana; tani neyssa coo mela ekkada Godaa Xoossaas yarsho shiishshike; qasse ta shammontta miish xuugettiza yarsho ooththa shiishshike» gides." 
1Chronicles21:25 Hessa gishshas Dawiti he balezas 600 worqqafe oosettida bira immides. 
1Chronicles21:26 Hessafe guye Dawiti heen Godaa Xoossas yarsho yarshizaso ooththidi xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho shiishshides; izi Godaa Xoossaa woossiin xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoza bolla saloppe tama yeddidi iza oyshaa zaarides. 
1Chronicles21:27 Histtiin GODAY kiitanchchaa azaziin kiitanchchazi ba giththa mashshaa koohaan gelththides. 
1Chronicles21:28 Dawiti GODAY Yaabuse dere as Orna kaththa balen izas zaaridayssa be7idi heen yarsho shiishshides. 
1Chronicles21:29 Musey bazzon giigsida Godaa Xoossaa Dunkaaneynne xuugettida yarsho yarshizasozi Geba7oone zumbullaa bolla dees. 
1Chronicles21:30 Dawiti Xoossa kiitanchchay oykkida giththa mashshaas yayyida gishshas hee biidi GODAA oychchanaas dandaybeenna. 
1Chronicles22:1 Hessa gishshas Dawiti, «Godaa Xoossaa keeththinne Isra7eele asay xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoy hayssan dees» gides." 
1Chronicles22:2 Kawo Dawiti Isra7eele biittan diza hara dere asay issi bolla shiiqana mala azazides; istta giddofe Xoossa Keeththaa keexxanaas masettida shuch giigsanaas shuch qerizayta giigsides. 
1Chronicles22:3 Dawiti gimbaa pengetas misimaarenne maaxafa gidana mala daro biratanne meezaaneppe bolla gidida keehi daro xarqimala giigsides. 
1Chronicles22:4 Sidoona asaynne Xiroose asay daro ziga mith ehiza gishshas qooday baynda keehi daro ziga mith giigsides. 
1Chronicles22:5 Dawiti, «Ta naa Solomooney yelaganne oosaara meezetonttayssa; Godaa Xoossaas keexettana keeththay biitta ubbaan erettida lo7onne puula keeth gidanaas bessees; hessa gishshas izas koshshizayssa tani giigsana» gides; Dawiti hayqqanaappe sinththan daro miish giigsides." 
1Chronicles22:6 Hessafe guye Dawiti ba naa Solomoone xeygidi GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa Keeththaa keexxana mala azazides. 
1Chronicles22:7 Dawiti Solomoone, «Ta naazoo, tani GODAA ta Xoossaa bonchchos Keeththe keexxanaas ta wozinan qoppadis." 
1Chronicles22:8 Gido attiin Godaa Xoossaa qaalay tana, ‹Neni daro suuth gussadasa; daro olakka olettadasa; neni sa7a bolla ta sinththan daro suuth gussida gishshas neni taas Keeththe keexxana mala koykke› gides." 
1Chronicles22:9 Gidikkoka, ‹Saroninne woppan ayssiza naa ne yelana; ubbaa baggara diza morkketappe ta iza shempisana; iza sunththika Solomoone geetettana; iza kawoteththa layth ubbaan tani Isra7eeles saronne woppa immana." 
1Chronicles22:10 Izi ta bonchchos Keeththe keexxana; izi taas naa gidana; tanikka izas aawa gidana; iza kawoteththa araatay Isra7eele bolla mernaas minni daana› giidi hidota immides. 
1Chronicles22:11 «Ha7ikka ta naazoo! GODAY nenara gido; izi nees immida hidota qaalaa mala GODAA ne Xoossaa keeth keexxanaassinne polanaas nena gaththo. 
1Chronicles22:12 GODAY nena Isra7eele bolla kawoththida wode GODAA ne Xoossaa wogaa neni naagana mala Xoossi nees aadho erateththinne akeeka immo. 
1Chronicles22:13 GODAY Muse baggara Isra7eeles immida wogaanne maaraa ne naagikko ubbayka nees injje gidana; aykkoy baa, yayyofa, minna, murtta, hidota qanxxofa." 
1Chronicles22:14 «Tani ta wolqqay gaththida mala Godaa Xoossaa Keeththe keexxanaas 3,400 kilo giraame gidiza worqqanne 34,000 kilo giraame gidiza bira shiishshadis; qasseka keehi daro xarqimalanne birata, miththinne shuch giigsadis; hessa bolla gujissizayssa neni gujja." 
1Chronicles22:15 Ne matan dumma dumma ooso eriza hiillati deettes; shuch qerizaytinne massizayti, anaaxetinne ubba ooso ooththanaas dandayza hiillati deettes." 
1Chronicles22:16 Worqqa, bira, xarqimalanne birata ooson erettida dumma dumma hiillati nees deettes; ha7i neni oosoza doomma; GODAY nenara gido» gides." 
1Chronicles22:17 Dawiti Isra7eele deraa kaaleththizayta ubbaa ba naa Solomoone maaddana mala," 
1Chronicles22:18 «GODAA intte Xoossay hayssa gakkanaas inttenara dees gidennee? Izi inttena ubbasora shempisibeennee? Ha biittan diza asaa izi ta kushen aaththi immida gishshas ha biittaya Godaa Xoossassinne iza deraas haarettadus. 
1Chronicles22:19 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa koyanaas intte wozinanne intte shemppo immite; GODAA Xoossaa bonchchos keexettida keeththaan Xoossa Taabotaanne Xoossas dummatida miishshata ehidi woththana mala intte dendidi GODAA Keeththe keexxite» gi azazides. 
1Chronicles23:1 Dawiti ceeggida wode ba naa Solomoone Isra7eele bolla kawoththides. 
1Chronicles23:2 Dawiti Isra7eele kaaleththiza ubbata, qeesetanne Leweta issife shiishshides." 
1Chronicles23:3 Isttas layththay heedzdzu tammanne hessafekka bollara gidida attuma asata Lewetappe qoodides; istta qooday kumeth 38,000 gidides." 
1Chronicles23:4 Haytanttafe 24,000 Xoossaa Keeththa ooso kaaletti xeellana mala aawateth isttas immides; qasse 6,000 asatas shuumetanne pirda daannata histti woththides." 
1Chronicles23:5 Oyddu shiyatas gimbeza penge naagana mala aawateth immides; attida oyddu shiyatas ba ooththida yeththa massaratan GODAA Xoossa galatana mala sunththides. 
1Chronicles23:6 Dawiti Lewey yelida attuma nayta Gershoone, Qa7aatenne Meraare istta zarkken zarkken heedzdzu kessi shaakkides." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gershooney yelida attuma nayti Laadaanenne Shim7e. 
1Chronicles23:8 Laadaane attuma nayti heedzdza; isttika Yihi7eele, Zettaamenne Iyu7eele." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shim7e attuma nayti heedzdza; isttika Shalomite, Hazi7eelenne Haaraane; heyti Laadaane zarkketas halaqata." 
1Chronicles23:10 Shim7e attuma nayti, Yahaate, Ziina, Ya7uushenne Barihe." 
1Chronicles23:11 Bayrazi Yahaate, kaalozi Ziina; Ya7uushessinne Barihes daro attuma nayti baynda gishshas issi keeththa asa mala qoodettida." 
1Chronicles23:12 Qa7aates oyddu attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Amiraame, Yixihaare, Kebroonenne Uzi7eele." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amiraame attuma nayti Aaroonenne Muse; Aarooneynne iza zereththati Xoossa Keeththan go7ettiza miishshata mernaas dummasana mala, Xoossas yarsho shiishshana mala, Xoossa sinththan haggazana malanne iza sunththan deraa mernaas anjjana mala dummatida." 
1Chronicles23:14 Xoossa as Muse attuma naytikka Lewe qommota mala qoodettida. 
1Chronicles23:15 Muse nayti Gershoomenne El7ezeere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Gershoome naytas halaqay bayra naaza Shuba7eele. 
1Chronicles23:17 El7ezeeres issi attuma nay xalla dees; izikka Erahaabiya; Erahaabiyas gidikko daro attuma nayti deettes. 
1Chronicles23:18 Yixihaare naytas halaqay bayra naaza Shalomite. 
1Chronicles23:19 Kebroone naytappe bayrazi Yiriya, nam7anththozi Amaariya, heedzdzanththozi Yahazi7eele, oydanththozi Yoqima7aame." 
1Chronicles23:20 Uzi7eele attuma naytappe bayrazi Mikiyaasa, kaalozi Yishiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Meraare attuma nayti Mahilenne Mushe; Mahile attuma nayti El7ezeerenne Qiise. 
1Chronicles23:22 El7ezeerey macca naa xalla yelidi attuma naa yelontta hayqqides; hessa gishshas istti bantta aawa isha Qiise nayta gelida. 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushe attuma nayti heedzdza; heytikka Mahile, Edeerenne Yarmoote." 
1Chronicles23:24 Haytanti ubbay baso asataninne ba zarkketan xeygettida; Lewe zareti issoy issoy ba sunththan mazgabettida; isttas layththay nam7u tammanne hessafe bolla gididayti Xoossa Keeththan ooththeettes. 
1Chronicles23:25 Dawiti, «Isra7eele Godaa Xoossi ba asaa shempisides; Yerusalaamen mernaas de7ana." 
1Chronicles23:26 Hayssafe guye Leweti Dunkaanezanne iza giddon go7ettiza miishshata tookkanaas bessenna» gides. 
1Chronicles23:27 Dawiti wurseththan immida azazo mala isttas layththay nam7u tammanne hessafe bollara gidida Leweti qoodettida. 
1Chronicles23:28 Leweta oosoy Xoossa Keeththan Aaroone zereththata ooson ooththi maado, Xoossa Keeththa giddozanne gibbeza lo7eththi naago, Xoossa Keeththa oosos dummatida miishshata lo7eththi oyththinne Xoossa Keeththan diza hara oosotakka lo7eththi ooso." 
1Chronicles23:29 Qasseka Xoossa sinththan woththiza ukeththas, kaththa yarshos shiishshiza dhiilles, munuqanaas, irshoy baynda uukettiza uketh uukkanaas, makkizaazassinne meezaanizaazas alaafeteththi isttas imettides." 
1Chronicles23:30 Hessaththoka istti ubbaa gallas maaladonne omars Godaa Xoossa sinththan eqqidi galatanaasinne bonchchanaas," 
1Chronicles23:31 sambata gallas, aginay doommiza koyro gallassatan, ba7aale gallassatan wogaa qooda mala Godaa Xoossa sinththan ubba wode xuugetti shiiqiza yarsho shiishshanaas," 
1Chronicles23:32 Gaytoteththa Dunkaanenne Xoossa Keeth naaganaas, iza giddon oosettiza goyno wogata polishin ba dabbo Aaroone zereththata maaddanaas aawateththi imettides." 
1Chronicles24:1 Aaroone nayta cugay hayssafe kaallizayssa; Aaroone nayti Nadaabe, Abihu, El7ezeerenne Itamaare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadaabeynne Abihuy naa yelontta ba aawappe kaseti hayqqida; hessa gishshas El7ezeereynne Itamaarey qeese gidida. 
1Chronicles24:3 Dawiti El7ezeere zarkkefe Saadooqenne Itamaare zarkkefe Ahimelekera gididi Aaroone zareta istta ooson ooson maaddana mala shaakki woththides. 
1Chronicles24:4 El7ezeere zare halaqati Itamaare zare halaqatappe daro gidida gishshas El7ezeere zareti tammanne usuppun cugan shaakettiin, Itamaare zareti osppun cugan shaakettida." 
1Chronicles24:5 Xoossa Keeththaa kaaleththizaytinne Xoossa cimati El7ezeere zareta giddoninne Itamaare zareta giddon diza gishshas oonakka maaddontta oosoza saaman shaakkida. 
1Chronicles24:6 Lewe zare Natina7eele naa xaafezi Shama7ey kawoza sinththaninne iza shuumeta sinththan, qeese Saadooqe sinththaninne Abiyaataare naa Ahimeleke sinththan, qeeseta sinththaninne Lewetaso asaa halaqata sinththan istta sunththaa xaafides; histtiin El7ezeere keeththa asata halaqatappe issoynne Itamaare keeththa asata halaqatappe issoy bantta taran taran saama kessida." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ha asati saama kessiin koyro saamay Yoharibe gakkides; nam7anththozi Yaddaya gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:8 Heedzdzanththozi Harime gakkides; Oydanththozi Sa7oorime gakkides. 
1Chronicles24:9 Ichchashanththozi Malkiya gakkides; Usuppunththozi Miyaamine gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:10 Laappunththozi Haqoxe gakkides; osppunththozi Abiya gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:11 Uddufunththozi Iyaaso gakkides; tammanththozi Shakaaniya gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:12 Tamman issinththozi Elyaasheebe gakkides; tamman nam7anththozi Yaaqime gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:13 Tamman heedzdzanththozi Huppa gakkides; tamman oydanththozi Yasheba7aabe gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:14 Tamman ichchashanththozi Bilga gakkides; Tamman usuppunththozi Imere gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:15 Tamman laappunththazi Hezire gakkides; tamman osppunththozi Hafixeexe gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:16 Tamman uddufunththozi Pattaya gakkides; nam7u tammanththazi Hiziqeela gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:17 Nam7u tamman issinththozi Yaakine gakkides; nam7u tamman nam7anththozi Gaamule gakkides; 
1Chronicles24:18 Nam7u tamman heedzdzanththozi Dallaya gakkides; Nam7u tamman oydanththozi Ma7aaziya gakkides. 
1Chronicles24:19 Isra7eele GODAY istta azazida malanne kase istta aawa Aarooney isttas woththida waaga mala istti Xoossaa keeth geliza wode ooththana mala imettida wogay hayssa. 
1Chronicles24:20 Attida hara Lewe zareti Amiraame naytappe Shebu7eele, Shebu7eele naytappe Yehidaye." 
1Chronicles24:21 Erahaabiya naytappe bayra naaza Yishiya. 
1Chronicles24:22 Yixihaaretappe Shalomite; Shalomite naytappe Yahaate. 
1Chronicles24:23 Kebroone naytappe koyrozi Yiriya, nam7anththozi Amaariya, heedzdzanththozi Yahazi7eele, oydanththozi Yoqima7aame." 
1Chronicles24:24 Uzi7eele naytappe Mikiyaasa naa Shamire. 
1Chronicles24:25 Mikiyaasa isha Yishiya naytappe Zakaraasa. 
1Chronicles24:26 Meraare attuma nayti Mahile, Mushenne Yaa7ize." 
1Chronicles24:27 Yaa7ize attuma nayti Benno, Shohaame, Zakurenne Ibire." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahile attuma nayti El7ezeerenne Qiise; El7ezeeres attuma nay deenna. 
1Chronicles24:29 Qiises Yerahim7eele geetettiza issi attuma nay dees. 
1Chronicles24:30 Mushes Mahile, Edeerenne Yarmoote geetettiza heedzdzu attuma nayti deettes. Haytanti baso asan asan qoodettida Lewe zareta." 
1Chronicles24:31 Istta isha Aaroone nayti ooththoyssaththo kawo Dawite sinththan, Saadooqe sinththan, Ahimeleke sinththan, hessaththoka qeesetaso asata halaqatinne Lewetaso asata halaqati dizason saama yeggida; bayrazappe biidi wurseth gakkanaas dizaytas issi gina saama yeggida." 
1Chronicles25:1 Dawitinne ola gadawati Aasaafe naytappe, Hemaane naytappenne Edotaane naytappe maasinqon, diiththaninne daalan awajjishe tinbite yootizayta doori woththida; hayssa ha oosoza ooththana mala doorettida asata sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayssa." 
1Chronicles25:2 Aasaafe naytappe Zakure, Yooseefe, Nataniyanne Asher7eele; hayti Aasaafe nayti kawoy azaziin tinbite yootiza Aasaafeppe garsara azazetteettes." 
1Chronicles25:3 Edotaane naytappe Godoliyaasa, Xeere, Yesha7iya, Shim7e, Hashaabiyanne Matitiya; ha usuppunati maasinqon GODAA galatishenne bonchchishe tinbite yootiza ba aawa Edotaaneppe garsara azazetteettes." 
1Chronicles25:4 Hemaane naytappe Buuqiya, Maataaniya, Uzi7eele, Shuba7eele, Yarmoote, Hanaaniya, Hanaane, El7aata, Gidolte, Eromaamte-Eezere, Yoshibaqaashe, Maalota, Hotirenne Mahizi7oote." 
1Chronicles25:5 Hayti ubbatikka kawozas tinbite yootiza Hemaane nayta; Xoossay izas immana gida mala Hemaane dhoqqu dhoqqu histtanaas ha 14 attuma naytanne 3 macca nayta izas immides. 
1Chronicles25:6 Hayti ubbay GODAA keeththan daala giirissishe, maasinqonne diith diixxishe bantta aawappe garsara Xoossa Keeththan ooththeettes. Aasaafey, Edotaaneynne Hemaaney kawozappe garsara azazettishe deettes." 
1Chronicles25:7 Hayti ba dabbotara gididi GODAA sinththan shiiqiza mazamure tamaari loohidayta; istta qooday mulera nam7u xeetanne osppun tammanne osppuna. 
1Chronicles25:8 Istti bantta ooso shaakki eranaas cimanne naa, astamaarenne tamaare gi shaakkontta issi gina saama yeggida." 
1Chronicles25:9 Koyro saamay Aasaafe baggafe gidida Yooseefe naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12; nam7anththo saamay Godoliyaasas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:10 Heedzdzanththo saamay Zakures, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:11 Oydanththo saamay Yexires, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:12 Ichchashanththo saamay Nataniyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:13 Usuppunththo saamay Buuqiyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:14 Laappunththo saamay Asher7eeles, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:15 Osppunththo saamay Yesha7iyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:16 Uddufunththo saamay Maataaniyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:17 Tammanththo saamay Shim7es, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:18 Tammanne issinththo saamay Azari7eeles, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:19 Tammanne nam7anththo saamay Hashaabiyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:20 Tammanne heedzdzanththo saamay Shebu7eeles, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:21 Tammanne oydanththo saamay Matitiyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:22 Tammanne ichchashanththo saamay Yarmootes, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:23 Tammanne usuppunththa saamay Hanaaniyas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:24 Tammanne laappunththa saamay Yoshibaqaashes, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:25 Tammanne osppunththa saamay Hanaanes, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:26 Tammanne uddufunththo saamay Maalotas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:27 Nam7u tammanththo saamay El7aatas, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:28 Nam7u tammanne issinththo saamay Hotires, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:29 Nam7u tammanne nam7anththo saamay Gidoltes, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:30 Nam7u tammanne heedzdzanththo saamay Mahizi7ootes, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles25:31 Nam7u tammanne oydanththo saamay Eromaamte-Eezeres, iza naytassinne iza dabbotas kezides; isttas qooday 12." 
1Chronicles26:1 Xoossa Keeththaa penge naagizayti hayssafe kaallizayta. Qoore baggafe Aasaafe nayta garsan Qoore naa Mashelemiya. 
1Chronicles26:2 Mashelemiya nayti, koyroy Zakaraasa, nam7anththozi Yidi7eele, heedzdzanththozi Zabaadiya, oydanththozi Yaatin7eele," 
1Chronicles26:3 ichchashanththozi Elaame, usuppunththozi Yihohanaane, laappunththozi Elho7enaye." 
1Chronicles26:4 Xoossi Obeed-Eedoome anjjida gishshas izi osppun attuma nayta yelides; koyrozi Shama7e, nam7anththozi Yihozabaade, heedzdzanththozi Yo7aaha, oydanththozi Sakkare, ichchashanththozi Natina7eele," 
1Chronicles26:5 usuppunththozi Am7eele, laappunththozi Yisakoore, osppunththozi Pilate." 
1Chronicles26:6 Qasse Obeed-Eedoome naa Shama7eykka attuma nayta yelides; istti erettida mino as gidida gishshas bantta aawa keeththan halaqa gidida. 
1Chronicles26:7 Shama7e nayti Ootine, Erafa7eele, Iyoobeedenne Elzabaade; istta ishati Eelihuynne Samaakey erettida mino asata." 
1Chronicles26:8 Hayti ubbati Obeed-Eedoome zareta; isttas, istta naytinne istta dabboti oosos keehi mino asata; Obeed-Eedoome zareti mulera usuppun tammanne nam7a." 
1Chronicles26:9 Mashelemiyas erateththi kumida mino naytinne dabboti deettes; istti mulera tammanne osppuna. 
1Chronicles26:10 Meraare baggafe gidida Hoosaskka attuma nayti deettes; issoy Shimire; izi bayra gidontta aggikokka iza aaway iza bayrasides. 
1Chronicles26:11 Nam7anththozi Kilqiyaasa, heedzdzanththozi Xabaaliya, oydanththozi Zakaraasa; Hoosa naytinne iza dabboti mulera tammanne heedzdza." 
1Chronicles26:12 Xoossa Keeththa penge naagizayti bantta keeththa asaa halaqata garsan cugan cugan shaakettidi istta dabboti ooththoyssaththo Xoossa Keeththa ooso ooththanaas ba taran taran uttida. 
1Chronicles26:13 Pengeta ubbaa naaganaas bantta keeththan keeththan cimanne yooga gontta issi bolla saama kessida. 
1Chronicles26:14 Arshey mokkiza baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay Shelemiyas kezides; pudeha baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay lo7o zoriza iza naa Zakaraasas kezides. 
1Chronicles26:15 Dugeha baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay Obeed-Eedoomes kezides; minjja keeththaa naaganaas saamay iza nayta gakkides. 
1Chronicles26:16 Arshey wulliza baggara diza pengezanne ganna oge baggara diza Shelekete penge naaganaas saamay Shufimessinne Hoosas kezides. 
1Chronicles26:17 Issi baggara naagiza zabeta ginara hara zabey dees; hach hach arshey mokkiza baggara usuppun zabeti, pudeha baggara oyddu zabeti, minjja keeththa naaganaas nam7u zabeti," 
1Chronicles26:18 arshey wulliza baggara diza dubbusha demban nam7u zabe qasseka oge bolla oyddu zabe gididi naageettes. 
1Chronicles26:19 Qoore zaretasinne Meraare zaretas penge naaganaas imettida istta ooso gishay hessa. 
1Chronicles26:20 Lewe baggafe Akayay Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza minjja keeththanne Xoossas dummasi woththida imotata naaganaas aawateththi izas imettides. 
1Chronicles26:21 Yihi7eele aawa Laadaaney Gershoone baggafe gidida iza nayti baso keeththa asatas halaqata. 
1Chronicles26:22 Yihi7eele naa Zettaamessinne iza isha Iyu7eeles Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza minjja keeththaa naaganaas aawateththi imettides. 
1Chronicles26:23 Amiraame zaretas, Yixihaare zaretas, Kebroone zaretasinne Uzi7eele zaretas istta gisha oosoy imettides." 
1Chronicles26:24 Muse naa Gershoome zareppe gidida Shuba7eeles minjja keeththa naagizayta bolla alaafeteththi imettides. 
1Chronicles26:25 Izi Gershoome isha El7ezeere baggara Shalomites dabbotees; El7ezeerey Erahaabiya yelides; Erahaabiyay Yesha7iya yelides; Yesha7iyay Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Zikire yelides; Zikirey Shalomite yelides. 
1Chronicles26:26 Kawo Dawiti, izaso asata halaqati, shaalaqati, mato halaqatinne ola gadawati Xoossas dummasi woththida miishshata ubbaa naaganaas Shalomitessinne iza dabbotas aawateththi imettides." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kase olan di7i ehida miishshafe baggaa Xoossa Keeththa giigsanaas dummasi woththida. 
1Chronicles26:28 Qasse nabe Sameeli, Qiise naa Sa7ooli, Neere naa Abineerinne Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey kase dummasi woththida miish ubbaanne hara Xoossa Keeththa miishshata ubbaa Shalomiteynne iza dabboti naageettes." 
1Chronicles26:29 Yixihaare zaretappe Kanaaniyassinne iza naytas Xoossa Keeththafe kare baggara diza oosotan Isra7eele asaa aassanaassinne istta bolla pirdanaas aawateththi imettides. 
1Chronicles26:30 Kebroone zareppe Hashaabiyaynne iza dabboti 1,700 mino asati Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey wulliza baggara diza Isra7eele asaa bolla GODAA oososinne kawo oosos shuumettida." 
1Chronicles26:31 Kebroone zaretappe isttaso asaa mazgabezan xaafettida mala Yiiriyay isttas halaqa gidides; kawo Dawiti kawotida oyddu tammanththa layththan mazgabe pilggi xeellishin Gala7aade deren Iyaazeere geetettizason Kebroone asatappe mino asati beettida.
