Nehemiah9:18 Mara leemison baas eeqa xoos ooththidi, ‹Gibxe biittafe nuna kaaleththidi kessida Xoossi hayssako!› gida. Ne sunththaaka ay mala mooro mooridoo!" 
Nehemiah9:19 «Ne maarotay gita gidida gishshas istti heen bazzo biittan dhayi attana mala aggabeekka; gido attiin istti gallas tuussa mala shaaran omars tuussa mala taman istti baanaas bessiza ogera istta kaaleththo aggabeekka. 
Nehemiah9:20 Lo7o gidida ne Ayana istta tamaarsana mala immadasa; isttas maana mala manna, uyana mala haath immadasa." 
Nehemiah9:21 Oyddu tammu layth kumeth istta bazzo biittan maaddada isttas koshshiza miishshe issinokka diggabeekka; istti may7ida may7oy wuribeenna; qasse istta tohoykka puuribeenna. 
Nehemiah9:22 «Istta deraa yuuyi aadhdhi diza deretanne istti kawoteththata ubbaa xoonidi he biitta ekkana mala ooththadasa; hessa gishshas kawo Sihooney ayssiza Haseboone geetettiza biittanne kawo Aagey ayssiza Baasaane geetettiza biitta xoonidi laattida. 
Nehemiah9:23 Isttas qooday salo xoolintte mala darida nayta immadasa; kase istta aawatas ne immana ga qaala gelida biittaa istti xooni laattana mala ooththadasa. 
Nehemiah9:24 Istta nayti Kanaane biitta xooni laattida; he biittan diza asata neni xoonadasa; istta kawota bollanne Kanaane biittan diza asaa bolla ba dosida mala ooththana mala wolqqa immadasa. 
Nehemiah9:25 Qasse lo7i gimbettida katamatanne aradda biitta, lo7o miish isttan kumida keeththata, haaththa ollatanne woyne atakiltey tokettiza gade, wogara miththatanne daro ayfe ayfiza miththata laattida; Miidinne uyidi modhdhida; neni ne kiyateththan immida lo7o miishshan wuri ufayettida." 
Nehemiah9:26 «Gido attiin istti ne bolla makkallida; ‹Ne qaalaska azazettoko› gida; ne wogaa siyokko giidi nees zokko zaarida; qasse istti neekko zaarana giidi seeri tamaarsida nabeta wodhida; ubba wode ne bolla cashsha qaala haasayda. 
Nehemiah9:27 Hessa gishshas istta morkketi istta xoonidi haarana mala aaththa immadasa; morkketikka istta metoththida; istti banttana metida wode neekko waassida; nekka istta waasaa salon daada siyadasa; ne maaroteththa gitateththaafe dendidayssan istta morkketappe ashshana kaaleththizayta yeddadasa. 
Nehemiah9:28 «Gido attiin saro demmida wode qasseka simmi nagara ooththida; hessa gishshas ne istta morkketas aaththa immadasa; istta morkketikka istta haarida; gido attiin ne maaddana mala giidi neekko simmi woossida wode salon dashe istta woosaa siyadasa; neni ne qadheteththafe dendidayssan istta ubba wode maaddadasa. 
Nehemiah9:29 Ne qaalaakko simmana mala neni istta seeradasa; gido attiin ba otoroteththafe dendidayssan ne azazota kadhida; istti azazettidaakko isttas de7o immiza ne wogata bolla nagara ooththida. Istta wozinay muumida gishshas ba sinth haraso zaarida; qasse ba wozina muumisidi ne azazota ixxida. 
Nehemiah9:30 Daro layth ne istta dandayadasa; istta tamaarsana mala nabeta ne Ayanan isttas denththadasa; gido attiin istti lo7eththi siyibeettenna; hessa gishshas istta dere matan diza asati xoonana mala istta aaththa immadasa. 
Nehemiah9:31 Gido attiin ne maaroteththa gitateththaafe dendidayssan istta aggabeekka; Ne kiyanne atto giza Xoossaa gidida gishshas istta dhayssabeekka. 
Nehemiah9:32 Gita, wolqqamanne yashshiza nu Xoossawu! Neni ne caaqo qaalanne mernaa gakkanawu diza ne siiqo naagaasa; nu bolla, nu kawota bollanne nuna kaaleththizayta bolla nu qeeseta bollanne nu nabeta bolla nu aawata bolla, qasseka dere ubbaa bolla, Asoore kawotappe doommidi hach gakkanaas gakkida meto ubbaa ne qoppa." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ne nuna qaxxayana gaada ne ooththidayssi wuri likke; nuni nagara ooththikokka neni ne ammaneteththan minna eqqadasa. 
Nehemiah9:34 Kase nu aawatinne nu kawoti, nuna kaaleththizaytinne nu qeeseti ne wogaa naagibeettenna; qasse ne isttas immida azazotanne seera zore siyibeettenna." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ne istta kawoteththan isttas gita anjjo immadasa; araddanne aaho biitta isttas immadasa; gido attiin istti ba nagarappe simmidi nees goynnibeettenna. 
Nehemiah9:36 Hessafe dendidayssan ne nu aawati ayfeyo maana malanne lo7o miishshan ufayettana mala ne isttas immida biittan hach nu aylle gididos. 
Nehemiah9:37 Nuni nagara ooththida gaason neni nu bolla kawoththida kawoti nu biitta anjjo ubbaa istti go7etteettes; qasse nu bollanne nu meheta bolla ba koyida mala ooththeettes; hessafe dendidayssan nuni ha7i gita waaye bolla doos. 
Nehemiah9:38 «Hanida yo7o ubbaas nuni Isra7eele asay qaalan gaaggidayssa xaafi woththanaas qaala qachchidos; nu qachchiin xaafettida qaala bolla nuna kaaleththizayti, Lewe baggatinne nu qeeseti ba maatame shocida» gida." 
Nehemiah10:1 Maatame shocidayti Hakaaliya naa dere ayssiza Nahimiya, Sedeqiyaasa," 
Nehemiah10:2 Qeeseta baggafe Saraya, Azaariyaasa, Ermaasa" 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashkure, Amaariya, Malkiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Haxushe, Shebaaniya, Maallukke," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harime, Mermote, Abdiyu," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daaneela, Gintoone, Baaroke," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mashulaame, Abiya, Miyaamine," 
Nehemiah10:8 Ma7aaziya, Bilgayenne Shama7e." 
Nehemiah10:9 Lewe baggatappe Azaaniya naa Iyaaso, Henadaade zareppe Binuwe, Qadim7eele," 
Nehemiah10:10 istta ishatappe Shebaaniya, Hoddiya, Qalixa, Palaye, Hanaane," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mikka, Erahoobe, Hashaabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakure, Sherebiya, Shebaaniya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hoddiya, Baanenne Benine." 
Nehemiah10:14 Dere ayssizayta baggafe Paaroose, Pahaate-Mo7aabe, Elaame, Zaato, Baane," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buune, Azgaade, Bebaye," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniyaasa, Biguwaye, Adiine," 
Nehemiah10:17 Axare, Hizqiyaasa, Azuure," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hoddiya, Hashume, Bessaye," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harpe, Anatoote, Nebaye," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magipi7aashe, Mashulaame, Hezire," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshezabele, Saadooqe, Yaadu7e," 
Nehemiah10:22 Palaaxiya, Hanaane, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hose7e, Hanaaniya, Hashube," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haluheshe, Pilihe, Shobeqe," 
Nehemiah10:25 Erehuume, Hashabine, Ma7isaya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Akaya, Hanaane, Anaane," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maallukke, Harimenne Ba7aana." 
Nehemiah10:28 «Attida asay, qeeseti, Lewe baggati, Xoossa Keeththa gibbe naagiza zabeti, mazamure yexxizaytinne Xoossa Keeththa oosanchchati qasseka Xoossa wogas azazettana» giidi Ayzaabetappe bana shaakkida asati ba machchetara, ba attuma naytaranne macca naytara issife gididi erizaytinne akeekizayti ubbay caaqqida;" 
Nehemiah10:29 bana kaaleththizaytara issife gididi Xoossa aylle Muse baggara imettida azazota, pirdanne woga naagana giidi qaala gelida; «Hessaththo ooththontta aggiko nuna gomo;" 
Nehemiah10:30 nu dere heeran diza Ayzaabetappe machcho nu naytas ekkontta malanne nu macca nayta gede immontta mala caaqqoos. 
Nehemiah10:31 «Ayzaabeti ba dereppe Sambata gallas woykko hara ba7aaletan kath woykko ay miishshika zal7es ekki yiikko isttafe shammoko. Laappunththo layththan layththan nu gade shempisanaas goyokko; nu tal7e immida acozakka zaari ekkoko. 
Nehemiah10:32 «Layththan layththan Xoossa Keeththa oosos maaddiza bira heedzdzaafe issi kushe nu ehi immana. 
Nehemiah10:33 Hessaththoka Xoossa Keeththa oosos bessiza miishshata kunththidi shiishshana; heytikka dummatida uketh, gallas gallas shiiqiza yarsho kath, xuugettiza yarshos gidiza meheta, Sambata gallassatan, aginay gakkishininne hara ba7aale gallassatan shiiqiza hara geeshsha yarsho ubbaa, Isra7eele asaa nagara wursanaas shiiqana bessiza miishshinne Xoossa Keeththa oosos koshshiza miishshata ubbaa immana." 
Nehemiah10:34 «Yarsho gishshas Muse wogan xaafettida mala GODAA nu Xoossaas shiiqiza yarsho xuugganaas bessiza eeso mith shiishshana bessiza qommoti oonanttako eranaas nuni derey qeesetinne Lewe baggati layththan layththan saama yeggidi yo7oza qachchoos. 
Nehemiah10:35 «Layththan layththan nu kaththatanne miththa ayfeta maxi shiishshiza wode koyro gakkiza shachchas xeera Xoossa keeth efi immana. 
Nehemiah10:36 «Nuuppe issoy issoy koyro yelettida attuma nayta Xoossa wogay azaziza mala istta Xoossas dummasana; Xoossa Keeththan ooththiza qeesetas immana; qasse nu miizatappe, nu dorsatappe, nu deyshatappe koyro yelettiza maratanne laaqqata ubbaa Xoossas dumma shaakkana." 
Nehemiah10:37 «Nuni kath shiishshiza wode koyro gakkiza kaththa dhiillefe, dumma dumma meetettiza miththa ayfeppe, ooraththa woyne ushshafenne wogara zayte ubbaafe xeera Xoossa Keeththan ooththiza qeesetas ehi immana; nu goshsha gadey dizason dizason kaxxiza kaththaafe giira qanxxisiza Lewe baggatas tammaafe issi kushe immana." 
Nehemiah10:38 Asraatay shiiqiza wode Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesey Lewe baggatara issife ekkeettes; Lewe baggati Xoossa Keeththa oosos shiishshida asraatappe tammaafe issi kushe Xoossa Keeththa miishshi uttiza minjja keeththan woththeettes. 
Nehemiah10:39 Isra7eele asaynne Lewe baggati kath, woyne ushshunne wogara zayte imota Xoossa Keeththa miishshati uttizasoninne qeeseti, Xoossa Keeththa gibbe naagiza zabetinne mazamure yexxizayti shempiza minjja keeththan ehi woththetto. «Hessa gishshas, ‹Nu Xoossa Keeththa ooso nuna ay metidee!› gi aggoko!» giidi caaqqida." 
Nehemiah11:1 Deraa kaaleththizayti Yerusalaamen de7ida; qasseka hankko tammu keeththa asaappe issi keeththa asi geesh gidida Yerusalaame kataman daanaytas saama yeggi doorida; hankko attida asay gidikko dumma dumma katamata baas deeththaso ooththides; 
Nehemiah11:2 Asaykka, «Yerusalaamen daana» giidi ba shenen dendettida asaa ubbaa anjjides." 
Nehemiah11:3 Hara gutataninne katamatan de7iza Isra7eele asay, qeeseti, Lewe baggati, Xoossa Keeththa oosanchchatinne Solomoone aylleta zereththati ba haaroy dizason dizason de7ida; hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayti Yerusalaamen de7iza Yuhuda dere kaaleththiza asata." 
Nehemiah11:4 Yuhuda zarkkefe yida kaaleththizayti Paareese zereththafe gididayti Malal7eele naa, Shafaaxiya naa, Amaariya naa, Zakaraasa naa, Ooziya naa, Attayiya," 
Nehemiah11:5 Seelo zereththafe Zakaraasa naa, Yoyaaribe naa, Adaya naa, Ooziya naa, Koli-Hooze naa, Baaroke naa, Ma7isaya." 
Nehemiah11:6 Yerusalaamen uttida Paareese zereththatappe erettida wolqqama asati 468. 
Nehemiah11:7 Biniyaame zereththatappe, Yesha7iya naa, Itti7eele naa, Ma7isaya naa, Qolaaya naa, Paddaya naa, Yo7eede naa, Mashulaame naa, Saaluye," 
Nehemiah11:8 Saalus mata dabboti, Gabbayanne Sallaye, Yerusalaamen de7iza Biniyaame zereththati issi bolla 928." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikire naa Iyu7eeley istta kaaleththizayssa gidishin Hasanu7e naa Yuhuday izappe garsara katama ayssiza nam7anththo daanna. 
Nehemiah11:10 Qeeseta baggafe, Yoyaaribe naa, Yaddaya naa, Yaakine naa," 
Nehemiah11:11 Xoossa Keeththa halaqa gidida Ahixuube naa, Marayoota naa, Saadooqe naa, Mashulaame naa, Kilqiyaasa naa Saraya," 
Nehemiah11:12 Isttara issife Xoossa Keeththa ooso ooththida asay issi bolla 822; Malkiya naa, Pashkure naa, Zakaraasa naa, Amozaane naa, Palaliya naa, Yirohaame naa Adaya," 
Nehemiah11:13 Ha zereththata giddofe 242 korapinneta. Imere naa, Mashilemite naa, Ahizaya naa, Azari7eele naa, Amashisa," 
Nehemiah11:14 Ha zereththata giddofe erettida wottadarati 128; istta kaaleththizay Hagidoleme naa Zabdi7eele. 
Nehemiah11:15 Lewe baggafe, Buune naa, Hashaabiya naa, Azirqaame naa, Hashube naa Shama7e," 
Nehemiah11:16 Sabataynne Yozabaade geetettiza Ewe baggata kaaleththizayti Xoossa Keeththas kare baggara oosettiza ubbaa oosos alaafeta. 
Nehemiah11:17 Zabde naa, Mikka naa Maataaniya, mazamure yexxizayta halaqa gidida Aasaafe naa, ba ishatappe nam7anththoza Baqibuqiya, Shaamu7e naa gidida Abida naa, Galaale naa, Edotaane naa." 
Nehemiah11:18 Lewe zereththatappe 284 asati geeshsha katama Yerusalaamen de7ida. 
Nehemiah11:19 Xoossa Keeththa gibbe naagiza zabeti, Aqube, Xalmoonenne isttara issife ooththiza zabeti 172." 
Nehemiah11:20 Hankko Isra7eele asay, qeesetinne Lewe baggati wuri ba gaden gaden Yuhuda katama giddon de7ida." 
Nehemiah11:21 Xoossa Keeththa oosanchchati Yerusalaames issi baggara diza Ofeele geetettiza dhoqqasohon deettes; Xihaynne Gishafa geetettizayti isttas halaqata. 
Nehemiah11:22 Yerusalaamen Leweta bagga halaqa Mikka naa, Maataaniya naa, Hashaabiya naa, Baane naa, Uuzey Xoossa Keeththan mazamure yexxizayta halaqa gidida Aasaafe zereththa." 
Nehemiah11:23 Istti gallas gallas Xoossa Keeththan yexettiza mazamure maaran maaran tara oykki yexxana mala kawoppe izas imettida azazoy dees. 
Nehemiah11:24 Yuhuda zarkken Zaraahe zareppe Meshezabele naa Pattayay Paarise kawoteththa giddon diza Isra7eele deraa koshshiza yo7otas kawo indiraase. 
Nehemiah11:25 Yuhuda asaappe issoti issoti ba gade matan diza katamata Qiriyaate-Arba7eninne iza matan diza gutatan, Dibooninne iza heeran diza gutatan qasse Yiqibixe7eeleninne iza heeran diza gutatan uttida." 
Nehemiah11:26 Haray qasse Iyaaso, Molaade, Beeti-Phaleexe," 
Nehemiah11:27 Haxaare-Shu7aale geetettiza katamatan deettes; Bersaabeheninne izi heeran diza qeeri katamatikka isttas duussaso; 
Nehemiah11:28 Xigilaage kataman harappeka Mekoonnaninne izi heeran diza gutatan," 
Nehemiah11:29 En-Rimoonan, Xora7an, Yarmuuten," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zaanohen, Adulaameninne he katamata matan diza gutata ubbason deettes; qasse Laakisheninne izi matan diza gadetan, Azeeqeninne izi matan diza gutati wuri isttas duussaso; hessaththoka Yuhuda dere asay duge baggara Bersaabeheppe biidi pude bagga Henoome shoobbafe ha simmiin dizason uttida." 
Nehemiah11:31 Qasseka Biniyaame zereththati, Geeban, Makimaasen, Aayen, Beeteleninne izi heeran diza gutatan deettes;" 
Nehemiah11:32 Qasse Anatooten, Nooben, Anaaniyan," 
Nehemiah11:33 Haxooren, Eraaman, Geetime," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadiden, Xebo7imen, Nabalaaxen," 
Nehemiah11:35 Loodaninne, Oonnon hessaththoka «Kushe hiillanchchata shoobba» geetettizaso ubbay isttas duussaso." 
Nehemiah11:36 Yuhuda dere garsan diza Lewe baggatappe baggayti Biniyaame derera issife uttida. 
Nehemiah12:1 Salatiyaale naa Zerubaabelenne qeeseta halaqa Iyaasora di7eteththafe simmida qeeseta sunththinne Leweta sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Qeeseti, Saraya, Ermaasa, Izra," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaariya, Maallukke, Haxushe," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shakaaniya, Erehuume, Mermote," 
Nehemiah12:4 Iddo, Gintooye, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyaamine, Ma7adiya, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shama7e, Yoyaaribe, Yaddaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Saalu, Amooke, Kilqiyaasa, Yaddaya. Haytanti qeeseta halaqa Iyaaso woden ba bagga qeeseta kaaleththiza qeeseta." 
Nehemiah12:8 Leweta, Galata mazamure yexxissizaytas alaafe gididi leweti, Iyaaso, Binuwe, Qadim7eele, Sherebiya, Yuhudanne Maataaniya." 
Nehemiah12:9 Baqibuqiya, Uunenne hara Lewe baggafe gidida istta ishati isttara issife soreninne eedon issoy issaafe ekki yexxeettes." 
Nehemiah12:10 Iyaasoy Iyo7aaqeme yelides; Iyo7aaqemey Elyaasheebe yelides; Elyaasheebey Yoyada7e yelides. 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada7ey Yoonataane yelides; Yoonataaney Yaadu7e yelides. 
Nehemiah12:12 Iyo7aaqemey qeeseta halaqateththan diza wode qeesetinne istta halaqati hayssafe kaallizayta; Saraya zereththafe Maraaye, Ermaasa zereththafe Hanaaniya," 
Nehemiah12:13 Izra zereththafe Mashulaame, Amaariya zereththafe Yihohanaane," 
Nehemiah12:14 Maallukke zereththafe Yoonataane, Shebaaniya zereththafe Yooseefe," 
Nehemiah12:15 Harime zereththafe Adana, Marayoota zereththafe Hilqiya," 
Nehemiah12:16 Iddo zereththafe Zakaraasa, Gintoone zereththafe Mashulaame," 
Nehemiah12:17 Abiya zereththafe Zikire, Miniyaamineppenne Mo7aadiya zereththafe Pilxaye," 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga zereththafe Shama7e, Shama7e zereththafe Yoonataane," 
Nehemiah12:19 Yoyaaribe zereththafe Mataaniya, Yaddaya zereththafe Uuze," 
Nehemiah12:20 Sallaye zereththafe Qallaye, Amooke zereththafe Eboore," 
Nehemiah12:21 Kilqiyaasa zereththafe Hashaabiya, Yaddaya zereththafe Natina7eele," 
Nehemiah12:22 Qeesetaso asa sunththinne Lewe bagga asatas soo asaa sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; Elyaasheebe, Yoyada7e, Yohanaanenne Yaadu7e geetettiza qeeseta halaqati diza wode Lewe baggata soo asata halaqatinne qeeseta soo asata halaqati shaaketti erettiza mazgabey dees; hessika Paarise dere kawo Daariyoosi kawoti diza wodenna." 
Nehemiah12:23 Gido attiin Lewe baggata soo asata halaqatappe qonccen mazgabettidi erettidayti Elyaasheebes naaza naa Yohanaaney hayqqana gakkanaas diza woden xalla. 
Nehemiah12:24 Hashaabiyay, Sherebiyay, Iyaasoy, Binuweynne Qadim7eeley kaaleththiza Lewe baggati nam7u kezi shaakettida. He nam7u baggatikka Xoossa asi gidida kawo Dawiti azazida azazo mala Xoossas galata mazamure soreninne eedon issoy issaafe ekki yexxishe shiishshida." 
Nehemiah12:25 Xoossa Keeththaa gimbe penge achchan oosettida miish woththiza minjja keeth naagiza zabeti Maataaniya, Baqibuqiya, Abdiyu, Mashulaame, Xalmoonenne Aqube geetettizayta." 
Nehemiah12:26 Heyti Iyosaadoqe naaza naa Iyaaso naa Iyo7aaqeme dere ayssiza Nahimiya, qeesenne woga keehi eriza qeese Izranti diza wode doorettida oosanchchati deettes." 
Nehemiah12:27 Yerusalaame katama gimbey anjjettiza gallas Lewe baggati daalan, bagananinne maasinqon yexxidi bonchchana mala istti dizasoppe dizasoppe koyettidi yida." 
Nehemiah12:28 He ba7aaleza bonchchana Lewe baggafe yexxizayti wuri ba dizasoppe Yerusalaame heerappenne Naxoofe biittan diza heeratappe," 
Nehemiah12:29 Yerusalaame yuushon istti banttas duussaso ooththida gishshas yexxizayta Beeti-Galgalappe, Geebappenne Azimooteppe shiishshidi ehida." 
Nehemiah12:30 Qeesetinne Lewe baggati ba gishshas, deraa gishshas, katama gimbeza gishshassinne gimbeza pengeta gishshas geeshsho woga ooththida." 
Nehemiah12:31 Tani Nahimiyay Yuhuda dere kaaleththizayti gimbaa bolla kezana mala histtidaappe guye lo7eththi mazamure yexxizayti nam7u butten shaakettidi yexxana mala ooththadis; koyro buttezi gimbaas hu7e bolla kezidi ushachcha baggara diza, «Buura yessaso» aadhdhi bida." 
Nehemiah12:32 Isttaka Hosha7iyaynne Yuhuda dere kaaleththizaytappe baggati kaallida. 
Nehemiah12:33 Harati qasse isttara diza Azaariyaasi, Izray, Mashulaamey," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuhuday, Biniyaamey, Shama7ey, Ermaasi salfidi aadhdhida;" 
Nehemiah12:35 zaye punniza qeeseti, qasseka Aasaafe naa, Zakure naa, Mikkaya naa, Maataaniya naa, Shama7e naa, Yoonataane naa Zakaraasi isttara aadhdhida." 
Nehemiah12:36 Zakaraasa zereththi gidida Shama7ey, Azari7eeley, Milaalay, Gilalay, Ma7aday, Natina7eeley, Yuhudaynne Hanaaniyay Xoossa as Dawiti izan yexxiza yeththa miish ekki kaallida; he butteza kaaleththizay woga lo7eththi eriza qeese Izra." 
Nehemiah12:37 Pultto haaththa pengeeko gakkidaappe guye Dawite katama efiza oge oykkida; gimbaa bolla diza kechchata pude kezidi kawo Dawite kawoteththa keeththa achchara aadhdhidi he katamays arshey keziza baggara diza haaththa gimbe penge simmida. 
Nehemiah12:38 Hankko mazamure yexxiza buttezi gimbaa bollara hadirsa bagga aadhdhi bides; tanikka bagga asara ha butteza kaalladis; Itoone gimbe geetettizasora kanththidi gede aaho gimbezaakko gakkidos. 
Nehemiah12:39 Qasse nu hessafe aadhdhi Efreeme gimbe penge, Yishana gimbe penge, Mole gimbe penge geetettizasonne Hanani7eele gimbe, xeetu gimbetanne dorsata gimbe penge geetettizasota gakkidos; Xoossa Keeththa matan diza zabeta gimbe penge geetettizasoza gakkidi salfeza giigidos." 
Nehemiah12:40 Hayssaththo nam7u butte salfezi Xoossa yeththan galatishe tanara diza deraa kaaleththizaytara Xoossa keeththi dizaso zawa gakkidos; 
Nehemiah12:41 Ta diza salfezan xurumba punniza qeeseti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Elyaaqeeme, Ma7isaya, Miniyaamine, Mikkaya, Elyo7enaye, Zakaraasanne Hanaaniya;" 
Nehemiah12:42 Isttaka kaallizayti Ma7isaya, Shama7e, El7ezeere, Uuze, Yihohanaane, Malkiya, Elaamenne Eezere; heyti ba eqqizaso eqqizaso oykkida; yexxizayti Yiziraaheyay kaaleththiin ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi yexxida." 
Nehemiah12:43 He gallas asay daro yarsho shiishshides; Xoossay iza ufayssida gishshas derezi keehi ufayettides; Maccassaynne naytikka isttara issife ufayettida; Yerusalaamen hanida ililisa qaalay haahon siyettides. 
Nehemiah12:44 He wode Xoossa Keeththa oosos imettiza Asraatanne layththan layththan koyro gakkiza kaththa xeeranne meetettiza dumma dumma miththata ayfe xeera woththiza keeth naagiza zabeta doorida; he asati dumma dumma katamata matan diza goshsha gadeppe wogay azaziza mala qeesetassinne Lewe baggatas imettana bessizayssa shiishshana alaafeteth isttas dees; kumeththa Yuhuda asay qeeseta bollanne Lewe baggata bolla keehi ufayettida. 
Nehemiah12:45 Istti ufayettidaykka Xoossay istta azazida qeesetinne Leweti polanaas bessiza woganne geesho wogata ooththida gishshassa; Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytinne Xoossa Keeththa naagiza zabetikka Dawitinne iza naa Solomooney kase woththida woga mala isttafe naagettiza ooso ooththi polida. 
Nehemiah12:46 Kase kawo Dawitapenne Aasaafe wodeppe doommidi mazamure yexxizaytassinne galata mazamuren Xoossa bonchchiza asata kaaleththizayti deettes. 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubaabele wodeninne Nahimiya woden kumeththa Isra7eele asay Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytassinne naagiza zabetas gallas gallas imettana bessizayssa immeettes; hankko Lewe baggatayssa dumma immeettes; Lewe baggatikka Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetas bessizayssa immeettes. 
Nehemiah13:1 He wode asay wuri Muse maxaafay nababettiin siyishe, «Mo7aabe asaynne Amoone asay Xoossa asaara mernaa gakkanaas walakettofetto» gizaso gakki demmides." 
Nehemiah13:2 Ha azazozi imettida gaasoykka Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezi biza wode Mo7aabe dere asaynne Amoone dere asay kaththinne haath Isra7eele asaa diggida gishshassa; hessafe bollarakka Isra7eele asaa doqqana mala Balaame geetettizaades miish immida; gido attiin Xoossay he doqeththaza anjjon laammides. 
Nehemiah13:3 He woga qaalaza Isra7eele asay siyida wode allaga gidida asaa ba giddofe shaakki kessida. 
Nehemiah13:4 Xoossa Keeththa miishshata woththiza kifiletas alaafe gidida qeese Elyaasheebes daro layththafe doommidi Xoobbiyara mino gaytoteththi dees; 
Nehemiah13:5 Hessafe dendidayssan Kaththa muxuwaata, exaane, Xoossa Keeththan diza dumma dumma miishshatappe, kaththafe, woyne ushshafenne wogara zayteppe kessidi Lewe baggatas, Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytassinne naagiza zabetas imettiza asraataynne qeesetas imettiza muxuwaata woththanaas oosettida aaho kifileza Xoobbiyay izan daana mala Elyaashibey izas immides." 
Nehemiah13:6 Hayssi ubbay hanishin ta Yerusalaamen diikke; gaasoykka kawo Arxekisisi Baabiloonen kawotida heedzdzu tammanne nam7anththo layththan tani guye simma Baabiloone dere badis; gido attiin guuththa wodeppe guye kawoza piqaade oychchadis; 
Nehemiah13:7 oychchadakka Yerusalaame simmadis; ta hee gakkida mala Elyaasheebey Xoobbiyas Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon izi daana mala izas issi kifile immidayssa siyadis. 
Nehemiah13:8 Hessa gishshas hanqettada Xoobbiyas diza miish ubbaa izi gelththida kifilaappe kare kessa kessa oladis. 
Nehemiah13:9 Kifiletikka wogay gizayssaththo geeyana malanne Xoossa Keeththa miishshati, Kaththa muxuwaatatinne exaaneti simmi ba kase dizaso gelana mala azazadis." 
Nehemiah13:10 Qasse asay Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytassinne Lewe baggatas koshshizayssa immontta aggida gishshas Yerusalaameppe Xoossa oosaa aggidi kase ba diza goshsha gade goyi daanaas guye simmi bidayssa eradis. 
Nehemiah13:11 Hessa gishshas tani halaqata, «Xoossa Keeththa ooso ays aggidetii?» gaada hanqettadis; hessafe guye Lewe baggatanne yexxizayta xeygada kase istti Xoossa Keeththan ooththiza oosoza simmi ooththana mala zaara gelththadis." 
Nehemiah13:12 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay wuri ba kaththafe, woyne ushshafenne wogara zayteppe isttafe koyettiza tammaafe issi kushe kessidi Xoossa Keeththa miish woththiza minjja keeth eho doommides." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tani qeese Shelemiya, woga eranchcha Saadooqeynne Lewe baggafe Paddaya miish woththiza minjja keeththas alaafe histta dooradis; Maataaniya naaza naa Zakure naa Hanaaney istta maaddana mala woththadis; ha asati wuri ba ishatas koshshiza miishsheta shaakki shaakki immanaas ammanettidayta." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ta Godoo! Ne keeththaynne ne keeththa oosoy suure baana mala ta ammaneteththan ooththida lo7o oosoza qoppada ne taas kiyateth ooththa. 
Nehemiah13:15 He wode Yuhuda dere asay Sambata gallas woyne ayfeppe woyne gum7ishin beyadis; qasse kath, woyne ushshu, woyne ayfe, balase ayfenne hara miishshatakka haren caanidi Yerusalaame ehishin beyada nam7anththo Sambata gallas aykkoka zal7ontta mala gaada minththa yootadis." 
Nehemiah13:16 Yerusalaamen diza Xiroose dere asati Molenne hara hara zal7e miishshata ehidi Sambata gallas Yerusalaamen diza Yuhuda dere asaas bayzeettes; 
Nehemiah13:17 Hessa gishshas tani Ayhuda kaaleththizayta hanqettada «Hayssa intte ooththiza iita oosoza ubbaa be7ite! Hekko intte Sambata tunisishe deeta; 
Nehemiah13:18 Nu Xoossay nu bollanne ha katama bolla ehida hanqoy kase intte aawati hayssa mala iita ooso ooththida gishshas gidennee? Ha7ikka intte Sambata bonchchontta gishshas Xoossa hanqo Isra7eele deraa bolla denththeththeeta» gadis. 
Nehemiah13:19 Hessafe guye Sambatay gelanaappe sinththa gallas gadey lem7i lem7ishin Yerusalaame pengeti gordettidi Sambatay aadhdhana gakkanaas doyettontta mala tani azazadis; qasse Sambata gallas aykko miishshe zal7ana ekki yontta mala ta oosanchchatappe issota issota gimbaa penge naagana mala zabe woththadis. 
Nehemiah13:20 Dumma dumma miishshata ehi zal7iza zal7anchchati issito woykko nam7uto mala Arba omars Yerusalaame gimbes kare baggara aqida; 
Nehemiah13:21 Tanikka isttas, «Intte maalado wonttara gelanaas qoppidi gimbaafe kare baggara aqizayssi inttena maaddenna; qasse intte hessa mala ooso nam7anththo ooththizaa gidikko ta intte bolla ta wolqqa bessana» gaada minththa yootadis; hessafe doommidi Sambata gallas yuus aggida." 
Nehemiah13:22 Hessafe guye Leweti banttana geeshshidi Sambata gallas dummateththan naagettizayssa erisanaas gimbaa pengeta naagana mala istta azazadis. Ta Xoossawu! Hayssa ubbaa gishshas tana qoppa; qasse neni ne mino siiqozan tana maaddana mala ta nena woossays. 
Nehemiah13:23 He wode Ayhuda asaappe daroti Ashdoode, Amoonenne Mo7aabe dereppe maccassata machcho baas ekkidayssa eradis." 
Nehemiah13:24 Istta naytappe baggati Ashdoode dere qaalanne issi issi hara dere qaalan haasayeettes attiin Ayhuda dere qaalan haasayana dandaybeettenna. 
Nehemiah13:25 Tani he asata hanqada qanggadis; wadhdhadissinne istta hu7e binanakka buucadis; hessafe guye istta gidiin istta nayti allaga asatara ekettontta malanne gelettontta mala Xoossa sunththan caaqeththadis. 
Nehemiah13:26 Qasse isttas, «Isra7eele kawo Solomooney nagara ooththiday hayssa mala allaga asatappe machcho ekon gidennee? Daro kawoteththa giddon iza mala kawoy beettibeenna; Xoossay iza dosida gishshas Isra7eele dere bolla kawoththides; gido attiin allaga dere maccassati izi nagara ooththana mala kaaleththida." 
Nehemiah13:27 Histtiin intte allaga kawoteththa maccassata ekon hayssa mala gita mooro ooththoyssanne intte nu Godaaska ammanettontta aggoyssa nu siyana bessizee?» gadis. 
Nehemiah13:28 Qeese Elyaasheebe naytappe issoy Yoodahe geetettizayssi Beeti-Horoone katama asi Sanbalaaxe nayo baas machcho ekkides; Hessa gishshas Yoodahey Yerusalaame yeddi baana mala gooddadis. 
Nehemiah13:29 «Ta Xoossawu! Hayti qeeseteththa woga, qeesetaranne Lewe baggatara ne kase woththida caaqo qaala istti wostti tunisidaakko hayssa Xoossoo, ne xeella!» ga woossays." 
Nehemiah13:30 Istti allaga dere tunateththafe bana Geeshshana mala ta ooththadis, qeesetinne Lewe baggati ba ooso ooso eri ooththana mala woga giigsadis." 
Nehemiah13:31 Qasse yarsho xuugganaas eeso mith koshshiza woden ehana mala giigsadis; asaykka ba shiishshiza kaththafenne ayfiza miththa ayfeppe koyro gakkida xeera wostti shiishshanaas bessizaakko maara oyththadis; ta Xoossawu! Ne lo7eteththan hayssa ta ooththida lo7o oosoza gishshas tana qoppa. 
Esther1:1 Kawo Arxekisisi Hinde biittafe Tophphiya biitta gakkanaas diza 127 dereta haariza wode hayssafe kaallizayssi hanides; 
Esther1:2 he wode kawo Arxekisisi Suusa gimben diza kawoteththa araata bolla utti haarides. 
Esther1:3 Izi kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan, ba mokkonnetassinne shuumeta ubbaas gita gibira giigsides. He gibirason Meedoonenne Paarise dere ola gadawati, daannatinne Awuraajja mokkonneti beettida." 
Esther1:4 Isttas kawozi ba kawoteththa dureteththaa 180 gallas kumeth bessides. 
Esther1:5 He gallassatappe guye kawozi Suusa kataman guuththatappe biidi gita asata ubbaas, ba kawoteththa keeththan, yuuyi aadhdhanaas atakiltey diza zagozan 7 gallas kumeth gibira ooththides." 
Esther1:6 He zagozan booththinne salo misetiza laynoppe dadettida magalashati deettes. Isttika bira qalabaten, booththa laynoninne ochcha teera misatiza wodoretan daldach tuussata bolla kaqetti uttida. Booththinne zo7o qalamen wancarkati uttida daldachchafe, zuulla misatiza qalametappenne hara bonchcho shuchchatappe oosettida wuygen worqqafenne birappe oosettida dinke algati deettes." 
Esther1:7 Woyne ushshazikka issoy issaafe dummatiza worqqa wancan shiiqees. Kawoza kiyateththafe dendidayssan kawoteththa keeththan woyne ushshazi gidi palahides. 
Esther1:8 Kawozi issoy issoy koyida mala immana mala woyne ushshaa duuqqizayta ubbaa azazides. Kawozi azazida mala issoy issoy ba dandayda keena uyana mala imettides. 
Esther1:9 Godatteya Asxiina kawo Arxekisise kawoteththa keeththan hessaththoka maccassatas gibira giigsadus. 
Esther1:10 Gibirazi doomettida laappunththa gallas, kawo Arxekisisi woyne ushshan ufayettida gishshas izas ooththiza laappun gundulata Mahumaane, Bizaate, Harboone, Bigita, Abagita, Zettaarenne Karkase azazides." 
Esther1:11 Hessika godatteya Asxiina ufayssizaaronne mala lo7o gidida gishshas dereynne gita mokkonneti izo be7ana mala iza kallachcha ba hu7en woththada kawoza sinth yaana mala ooththida. 
Esther1:12 Gido attiin kawoza oosanchchati kawozi azazida mala izis yootiin godatteya Asxiina baana koyabeekku. Histtiin kawozi keehi hanqettides; daro yiillotides. 
Esther1:13 Suurenne tuma pirda pirdanaas eranchchatappe zore oyshoy kawozas lose gidida gishshas wode hanoteth eriza eranchchatara zorettides. 
Esther1:14 Heytikka Karshana, Shattaare, Adimaate, Tarseese, Mereese, Marsenanne Mamuka geetettiza Paariseninne Meedoonen erettida gita asati kawoteththa garsan dhoqqasohon dizayta." 
Esther1:15 Kawozikka isttas, «Tani, Kawo Arxekisisi, ta oosanchchata baggara ta kiittiin iza ta azazo polontta aggida gishshas wogay giza mala godatteyo Asxiini bolla ay ooththinoo?» gi oychchides." 
Esther1:16 Hessafe guye Mamukay kawozasinne mokkonnetas, «Godatteya Asxiina kawoza xalla gidontta mokkonneta ubbaanne kawo Arxekisise kawoteththa garsan diza deraa ubbaa qohadus." 
Esther1:17 Hayssi godatteya ooththidayssi harata hayththan seetettiko istti ba azinata kadhana; ‹Kawo Arxekisisi godatteya Asxiina izakko yaana mala xeygiin yontta ixxadus› gaana. 
Esther1:18 Hanno hachcha gallassayn godattey hano siyida Paarisetanne Meedoone dere mokkonneta machcheti ubbay kawozas mokkonneta ubbaas hessaththo zaarana. Izi hessaththo hankko pacey baynda gallassinne omars ooshshi medhettana. 
Esther1:19 «Hayssi yo7ozi kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko hayssafe guye Asxiina kawo Arxekisisekko mulekka gelontta mala kawo matappe awajjay kezo; hessika shaarettontta Paarisenne Meedoone woga mala xaafetto; hessaththoka kawozi godatteteththa bonchchoza izippe ekkidi izippe lo7iza hara maccassas immo. 
Esther1:20 Hessafe guye kawoza awajjay izi haariza kumeththa deraa bolla yootettiko guuththatappe biidi gitata gakkanaas diza maccassay ubbay ba azina bonchchana» gi zaarides. 
Esther1:21 Kawozinne mokkonneti ubbay he zorezan ufayettida; kawozikka Mamukay shiishshida qofaza polides. 
Esther1:22 Ubbayka baso as ayssana mala kiita yeddides; he kiitazikka ba dere qaala malanne xaafiza woga mala xaafettidi dere ubbaas gakkides. 
Esther2:1 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi iza hanqoy irxxidaappe guye Asxiina ooththidayssanne izikka izi bolla kessida awajja qoppides. 
Esther2:2 He wode kawoza achchan dosettida oosanchchati, «Kawozas lo7o geela7ota koyite." 
Esther2:3 Heyta lo7o geela7ota ubbata Suusa gimben diza maccassata duussaso ehana mala, kawozi ba haariza dereta ubbaan daannata shuumo; isttika macca ubbatas alaafe gidida kawoza gundula Hegge alaafeteththa garsan detto; istta malay iitontta mala naagetto." 
Esther2:4 Hessafe guye kawoza ufayssiza geela7oya Asxiini gishshas godatto gidu» gida. He zorezi kawoza ufayssides; istti gida malakka ooththides. 
Esther2:5 He wode Biniyaame qommofe Qiise naa, Shim7e naa, Ya7ire naa Mardikiyoosa geetettiza Ayhuda dere asaappe issaadey Suusa gimben dees." 
Esther2:6 Izikka Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey di7i efidaytappe Yuhuda kawo Ikoniyaanera Yerusalaameppe di7etti bida asatappe issaa. 
Esther2:7 Mardikiyoosa aawa ishas Hadeso geetettiza biya dawus; izis aawaynne aaya baynda gishshas izo dichchiday iza. Hanna Astero geetettizaara asateththan gidiin medhan keeha lo7o. Izi aawaynne izi aaya hayqqidaappe guye Mardikiyoosi izo ba naa mala dichchides. 
Esther2:8 Kawoza azazoynne awajjay kezida wode daro geela7ota efidi Suusa kataman naagiza Hegges immida; Asterokka kawo keeth efidi maccassata naagiza Hegges hadara imettadus. 
Esther2:9 Naya iza ufayssadus; izikka izo dosides; izikka izis mala lo7eththiza dumma qommo kath heerakka izis immides. Kawoteththa keeththafe doorettida laappun aylleta izis giigsidi izonne izi aylleta daro izan maccassata naagiza doorettidaso efides. 
Esther2:10 Mardikiyoosi izis kasetidi yootida mala Astera Ayhuda as gididayssa oosikka yootabeekku. 
Esther2:11 Qasseka Mardikiyoosi Asteri lo7eteththanne izis gidizayssa erana giidi, maccassa keeththa sinththara gallassan gallassan yaanne haa hemettees." 
Esther2:12 Geela7oti kawozaakko gelanaappe kasetidi issi layth kumeth dhiiketteettes; layththafe koyro usuppun agina kumeth istta bollay liiqi lo7ana mala karbbenne tiyettiza zayte go7etteettes; kaalliza usuppun aginatan dumma dumma shittotanne dumma dumma sinth tiyiza qalameta go7etteettes. 
Esther2:13 Hessafe guye issi geela7oya kawozaakko geliza wodey gakkiko, ba koyida ay miishshika ekkada maccassati naagetti diza keeththafe kezada kawozaakko gelawus." 
Esther2:14 Omars gelada kawozara aqidaappe wonteththa gallas harason maccassati naagetti dizaso efeettes. Heen kawoza laggeththotas alaafe gidida kawoza keeththan ooththiza gundula Shaashigaaze aawateththaa garsan naagettawus; kawozi izo dosidi izi sunththan xeygontta aggiko zaara kawozaakko gelukku. 
Esther2:15 Mardikiyoosi ba naa mala dichchida izas aawaa isha Abi7eele biya Astera kawozaakko geliza taray izo gakkiin maccassati naagetti diza keeththaa alaafe Heggey izis yootidayssafe attiin hara aykkoka oychchabeekku. Astera izo be7iza as ubbaa sinththan ayyotta beettadus. 
Esther2:16 Arxekisisi kawotida laappunththa layththan, Tebeete geetettiza tammanththa aginan Astero kawo keeth efida." 
Esther2:17 He wode kawozi hara maccassa ubbaafe Astero aaththi dosides; hara geela7ota ubbaafe bollara iza kawo matan ayyottadusinne dosettadus. Hessa gishshas izi hu7en godatteteththa kallachcha goxxides. Asxiini godatteteththaa izis immides. 
Esther2:18 Hessafe guye kawozi Asteri bonchcho gishshas ba mokkonnetassinne ba shuumeta ubbaas gita gibira giigsides. He ba7aalezi izi ayssizaso ubbaan bonchchettana mala awajjissides. Imotakka ba kiyateththa mala isttas immides. 
Esther2:19 Geela7oti nam7anththo shiiqetti uttidaashe Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththa penge naagishe uttides. 
Esther2:20 Astera Mardikiyoosi izis yootida mala ba qommonne ba dereza qottadus; iza hessa ooththida gaasoykka Mardikiyoosi kase izo dichchiza wode iza ooththiza mala ha7ikka iza zore ekkashe diza gishshassa. 
Esther2:21 Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththa penge naagiza olanchchata halaqa nam7ati Gabataynne Tereshay kawoza bolla hanqettidi kawoza wodhanaas duulatida. 
Esther2:22 Mardikiyoosi istti seeridayssa gakki eridi godatto Asteris yootides; izakka Mardikiyoosappe siyidayssa kawozas qonccisa yootadus. 
Esther2:23 Yo7oza pilggishin tumu gidi beettides; he nam7u shuumeti kaqetti hayqqana mala istta bolla pirdettides; hessi ubbay kawoza sinththan taarike maxaafan xaafettides. 
Esther3:1 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi Agaage dere as Hamadaate naa Haama dhoqqu dhoqqu histtidi hara shuumetappe bollara izas maata immidi bonchchides. 
Esther3:2 Asay iza bonchchana mala kawoy azazi woththida gishshas kawo keeththa pengen ooththiza shuumeti ubbay Haamas gulbatidi izas bonchcho saroka immeettes. Gido attiin Mardikiyoosi izas gufanni goynnibeennanne bonchcho saroka immibeenna. 
Esther3:3 Hessa gishshas kawo keeththa pengen ooththiza kawo oosanchchati Mardikiyoosa, «Kawo azazo ays menththay?» giidi iza oychchida." 
Esther3:4 Hessaka gallas gallas izas yootishe takkida; gido attiin izi istti yootizayssa ekkanaas koyibeenna. Izi Ayhuda as gididayssa isttas yootida gishshas, «Mardikiyoosa hanoy ayde gakkanaas hessaththo hananaakko be7ana» giidi hessa Haamas yootida." 
Esther3:5 Mardikiyoosi izas gulbati goynnonttayssanne iza bonchchonttayssa be7idi keehippe hanqettides. 
Esther3:6 Harappeka Mardikiyoosi oonantta baggakonne shaakki eridaappe guye Mardikiyoosa xalla wodhoy qeeri miishsha mala qoodides. Hessa gishshas Haamay Arxekisise kawoteththa garsan diza Mardikiyoosa bagga gidida Ayhudata ubbaa dhayssana oge koyides. 
Esther3:7 Kawo Arxekisisi kawotida tammanne nam7anththo layththan, Nisaane geetettiza koyro aginan, Ayhudata wodhana aginanne gallassa erana mala, Puurime geetettiza saama Haamay dizason yeggida. Saamazikka Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan yegettides." 
Esther3:8 Hessafe guye Haamay Kawo Arxekisises, «Ne kawoteththa garsan diza dere ubbaan laaletti gakkida issi derey dees; he deraasikka hara dereta ubbaafe dummatiza losey dees; kawo wogaska azazettettenna; hessa gishshas ha dereza co7u gi besoy kawozas kiyenna." 
Esther3:9 Hayssi yo7oy kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko istta dhayssana awajjay kezo; tanikka hayssa ha oosoza ooththana asatas 340,000 kilo meezaaniza bira kawo minjja keeththan gelththana» gides." 
Esther3:10 Hessa gishshas kawozi ba midiga maatameza biradhdhefe kessidi Ayhudatas morkke gidida Agaage dere as Hamadaate naa Haamas immides. 
Esther3:11 Kawozi Haama, «Ne immana gida miishshaa ne achchan oykka; deraakka ne dosida mala ooththa» gides." 
Esther3:12 Histtiin koyro aginan, tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassan Haamay kawo xaafeta ubbaa xeygides. Isttika Haama azazoza ubbaa awuraajjan awuraajjan xaafettiza pidaleninne deraa deraa qaala mala kawoza shuumetas dumma dumma awuraajja ayssizaytassinne dumma dumma dereta ayssiza mokkonnetas xaafida. Hayssi kawo Arxekisise sunththan xaafettidi iza maatamen shocettides." 
Esther3:13 Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan, tammanne heedzdzanththo gallas naateth, cima, maccanne yidha shaakkontta kumeththa Ayhudati he gallas dhayana mala, hayqqana malanne dippi gaana mala, istta aqotaykka bonqqettana mala, kawoteththa garsan diza awuraajjata ubbaa gakkana mala qasttanneta kushen imettides." 
Esther3:14 Ubbaa awuraajjan diza deraas erettana mala, isttika he gallassas giigetti uttana mala, koyro awajjazappe duuqettidi wogay kezana malanne kumeththa awuraajja gakkana mala kiitettides." 
Esther3:15 Qasttanneti kawoza azazon eesoti kezida; awajjazikka Suusa gimben awajettides; kawozinne Haamay uyanaas uttida; gido attiin Suusa katamaya shirotadus. 
Esther4:1 Mardikiyoosi ha hanida ubbaa eridaappe guye ba may7o daakkides; maaqa may7idi, ba hu7e bolla bidinth laallidi, ba qaala dhoqqu histti camo yeeho yeekkishe katamay giddo gelides." 
Esther4:2 Maaqa may7ida asi kawoteththa keeth gelanaas dandayontta gishshas izas penge gakkanaas bides. 
Esther4:3 Kawoza awajjaynne iza azazoy gakkida awuraajjata ubbaan Ayhudata garsan gita ceecey medhettides; histtiin xoomida; yeekkida; waassida; darotikka maaqa may7idi bidinththa bolla ichchida. 
Esther4:4 Godatto Asteri dangaxiretinne izo naagiza gundulati yiidi Mardikiyoosa gishshas izis yootiin iza keeha ceecadus; histtada maaqa qoodhe izi may7ana may7o yeddadus; gido attiin izi ekkibeenna. 
Esther4:5 Hessafe guye Astera izis ooththana mala kawoy woththida gundulatappe Hataka xeygada Mardikiyoosa ay metoy gakkidaakkonne ays hessaththo izi hanizaakko shaakki erana mala kiittadus. 
Esther4:6 Histtiin Hatakay kawo keeth geliza pengen diza katamay zago Mardikiyoosakko yides. 
Esther4:7 Mardikiyoosi ba bolla gakkidayssa ubbaa qonccisi izas yootides. Qasseka Haamay Ayhudata dhayssanaas kawo minjja keeth gelththanaas geppida miishshaa likkeka ashshontta geeshshi yootides. 
Esther4:8 Ayhudata dhayssanaas Suusa gimben kezida awajjaappe duuqettidayssa Astero bessanaassinne izis paatti yootana mala immides. Izakka kawozaakko gelada ba deraa gishshas maaroteth oychchana malanne gaannatana mala, izi minththi izis yootana mala iza qofsides." 
Esther4:9 Hatakay simmi yiidi Mardikiyoosi izas yootidayssa ubbaa Asteris yootides. 
Esther4:10 Izakka Hatakay Mardikiyoosas," 
Esther4:11 «Kawoza aylletinne iza awuraajjan diza asay ubbay macca gidiin, attuma gidiin, oonikka kawozi xeygontta dishin kawozi dizaso gelizaades kawozappe issi wogay dizayssa erees; he wogazakka menththidaadey hayqqees. Asi hessa mala hayqoppe attana dandayzay kawozi worqqa guufeza denththi bessishina. Tani kawozaakko gelanaas xeygettoosofe hach gakkanaas heedzdzu tammu gallassafe aadhdhides» gi yootana mala izas yootadus." 
Esther4:12 Asteri kiitay Mardikiyoosa gakkiin," 
Esther4:13 izi izis, «Neni kawo keeththan diza gishshas hankko Ayhuda asay dhayshin ne xalla attanaa nees misatoppo;" 
Esther4:14 Neni hayssa mala woden co7u giikko Ayhudatas maadoynne ashshanay harasoppe yaana. Neninne ne aawa keeththa asay gidikko dhayana; qasseka neni godatto gididay hayssa mala wodessakonne oonee erizay?» giza zaaro yeddides. 
Esther4:15 Hessafe guye Astera Mardikiyoosas," 
Esther4:16 «Baada Suusan diza Ayhuda asa ubbaa issiso shiishsha. Histtidi taas xoomite; heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu omars gakkanaas moopitenne uyopite. Taninne ta dangaxireti hessaththo xoomana; hessi polettidaappe guye hanozi wogappe karera gidikkoka tani kawozaakko gelana; tani hayqqikokka hayqqana» giza zaaro yeddadus. 
Esther4:17 Histtiin Mardikiyoosi simmi biidi Astera azazida ubbaa polides. 
Esther5:1 Heedzdzanththo gallas Astera ba bonchcho may7oza may7ada kawoza araataas sinththa baggara diza kawoteththa keeththas giddo dabaaban gela eqqadus. Kawozi gede keeththaa gelizaso ginara ba araata bolla utti dees. 
Esther5:2 Godatteya Astera dabaaban eqqidaaro kawozi be7idi ufayettides. Ba kushen oykkida worqqa guufeza izis denththides; Asterakka shiiqada guufeza xeera bochchadus. 
Esther5:3 Hessafe guye kawozi izo, «Godatto Asteree, Ays yadii? Qasse ta nees ay ooththana mala koyay? Ta kawoteththaafe baggaa gidikkoka ta nees immana» gides." 
Esther5:4 Astera zaarada, «Kawozoo! Nena ufayssizayssa gidikko, tani nees giigsida gibira maanaas neninne Haamay gibirason beetterketii» gadus." 
Esther5:5 Kawozikka, «Nuni Astera gidayssa polana mala Haama eeson xeygite» gides. Hessa gishshas kawozinne Haamay Astera giigsida gibiraaso bida." 
Esther5:6 Istti woyne ushshu uyishin qasseka kawozi Astero, «Ane ne koyzayssi aazee? Izi nees imettana; qasseka ne hara oychchizay aazee? Ta kawoteththaafe baggaa gidikkoka ta nees immana» gides." 
Esther5:7 Asterakka izas zaarada," 
Esther5:8 «Ta woosaynne ta oyshay hayssafe kaallizayssa; tani kawo matan ayyoteth demmidaa gidikkonne ta koyidayssa imoynne ta woosaa poloy kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko kawozinne Haamay ta giigsiza gibiraan wonto taas beettetto; histtiko tani kawozi oychchida oyshaas zaaro immana» gadus. 
Esther5:9 He gallas Haamay kawoza achchafe ufayettishe kezi bides; gido attiin izi Mardikiyoosa kawoza pengen be7ishin izi uttoosappe dendontta ixxidayssanne izas bonchcho immontta aggidayssa be7ida mala iza hanqoy Mardikiyoosa bolla tama mala eexxides. 
Esther5:10 Gidikkoka Haamay coo gencecidi baso bides. Ba laggetanne ba machcho Zosaara xeygisidi issi bolla shiishshidaappe guye," 
Esther5:11 Haamay ba dureteththaanne gitateththaa, ba nayta daroteththaa, kawozi iza ay mala bonchchidaakko, hankko mokkonnetappenne shuumetappe ay mala iza dhoqqisidaakko nashetti yootides." 
Esther5:12 Haamay, «Hessa xalla gidenna; godatteya Astera giigsida gibirason beettanaas taappe attiin haray xeygettibeenna. Wontos kawozara tana xalla xeygadus." 
Esther5:13 Gido attiin Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosi kawoza pengen uttidayssa ta be7ishin hayssi ubbayka tana ufayssenna» gides. 
Esther5:14 Iza machcheya Zosaaraynne iza laggeti ubbay, «Neni 50 wadha adussa koca esisa; histtada wonto wonttara Mardikiyoosi he kocaa bolla kaqettana mala kawozas yoota. Hessafe guye ufayettashe kawozara issife gibiraaso baandasa» gida. He qofazi Haama keehi ufayssiin kaqqanaasozakka giigsides." 
Esther6:1 He gallassa omars kawozi dhisko dhayi aqides; hessa gishshas ba kawoteththa layththan xaafettida Taarike maxaafati shiiqidi nababettana mala azazides. 
Esther6:2 Heen penge naagiza kawoza ola gadawatappe nam7ati Gabataynne Tereshay kawo Arxekisise wodhanaas zoretti uttidayssa Mardikiyoosi yootiin xaafetti uttidayssi beettides. 
Esther6:3 Kawozikka, «Histtiin izi hayssa ooththida gishshas izas imettida bonchchoynne sunththi aazee?» gi oychchides. Iza mata laggeti, «Izas aykkoyka oosettibeenna» gida." 
Esther6:4 Kawozi zaaridi, «Zagozan oonee dizay?» gi oychchides. He wode Haamay Mardikiyoosa iza bolla kaqqanaas kawozas yootana biidi kare baggara diza kawo keeththa zago buro gakeththa bolla dees." 
Esther6:5 Izas mata oosanchchati, «Hekko Haamay zagozan eqqides» gida. Kawozikka, «Haa gela giite» gides." 
Esther6:6 Haamay gelidaappe guye kawozi, «Kawoy bonchchana koyida asas ay ooththana bessizee?» gi oychchides. Haamay, «Kawoy bonchchanay taappe haray oonee?» gi ba wozinan qoppides." 
Esther6:7 Hessa gishshas kawozi izas zaaridi, «Kawoy bonchchana dosida asas," 
Esther6:8 kawozi iza mayziza kawoteththa may7oy, kawo kallachcha iza hu7en woththiin kawoy toggiza paray izas yo." 
Esther6:9 Hessafe guye may7ozinne parazi keehippe bonchchettida kawo shuumetappe issaa kushen imetto. Kawozi bonchchana dosidaade mayzetto; iza paraa togisidi katamays waanna waanna ogeta yuushshishe, ‹Kawoy bonchchana koyidaades hayssaththo oosettees› getto» gides." 
Esther6:10 Kawozi zaaridi Haama, «Ane eeson ba! May7ozanne paraa ekkada kawo pengen uttida Ayhuda as Mardikiyoosas ne gida mala ooththa; ne gidayssafe issinakka paccontta mala» gi azazides." 
Esther6:11 Hessa gishshas Haamay kawoteththa may7o mayzidi para togisides; wogga ogetan kaaleththishe, «Kawoy bonchchanaas dosida asas hayssi oosettides» gi iza sinththan awajjides." 
Esther6:12 Hessafe guye Mardikiyoosi kawoza penge simmides; gido attiin Haamay ceecishe ba hu7e gullunttidi eeson baso simmi bides. 
Esther6:13 Ba bolla gakkida ubbaa ba machcho Zosaarassinne ba laggetas ubbaas yootides. Iza zoranchchatinne iza machcho Zosaaray izas, «Ne iza sinththan kawush doommida Mardikiyoosas zereththay Ayhudata baggafe gidikko ne izara eqettada dandayakka; sidhey baynda ne dhayana» gida." 
Esther6:14 Istti izara buro hessa haasayan dishin kawo gundulati yiidi Astera giigsida gibiraas Haama eeson ekki bida. 
Esther7:1 Histtiin kawozinne Haamay godatteyo Asteri gibiraa maanaas bida. 
Esther7:2 He nam7anththo gallassa gibiraas biidi istti woyne ushshaa uyishin kawoy qasseka, «Godatteye Asteree! Neni woossizay aazee? Ta nees immana. Qasse neni tana oychchizay aazee? Haray atto ta kawoteththaafe baggaa gidikkoka tani nees immana» gides." 
Esther7:3 Godatteya Astera zaarada, «Kawoo! Neni tanan ufayettidaa gidikko, qasse ne gitateththaa ufayssidaa gidikko ta shemppoyonne ta dereza ashsha; ta woosaynne ta oyshay hayssa." 
Esther7:4 Gaasoykka taninne ta derey bashshas, shukassinne dhayssas bayzettidos. Nuni maccatinne addeti aylleteththas xalla bayzettidaakko tani doonakka phoqqike; hessi kawo metoththanaas bessontta yo7o» gadus." 
Esther7:5 Kawo Arxekisisi zaaridi, «Hessa ooththanaas xaliday oonee? He bitaney awan dizee?» giidi godatteyo Astero oychchides." 
Esther7:6 Asterakka, «Nu baalgaaranne nu morkke gidida ha iita as Haama» gadus. He wode Haamay kawoza sinththaninne godattey sinththan keehi dagammides." 
Esther7:7 Kawozi keehi hanqettidi ba uttidasohoppe dendi eqqides; ba ushsha aggaagidi kawo keeththa atakiltey dizasoza bides. Gido attiin Haamay kawoy iza bolla iita miish ehanaas qachchidayssa erida gishshas godatteya Astera iza hayqoppe ashshana mala woossanaas guye attides. 
Esther7:8 Kawozi kawo keeththa atakiltey dizasohoppe simmidi gibiraa keeth geliza wode Haamay godatteyo Asterippe maarettana giidi iza uttida arjetaa bollan gufannidayssa be7ides. Hessafe guye kawozi keehi hanqettides; ba qaalakka dhoqqu histtidi, «Hayssi addezi ta ayfey be7ishin ta keeththan godatteyo oykkana koyzee?» gides. Kawozi buro hessa haasaya bolla dishin kawo gundulati yiidi Haama ayfeso goozida." 
Esther7:9 Hessafe guye istta giddofe Harboone geetettiza gundulay, «Kawoo! Nena hayqoppe ashshida Mardikiyoosa kaqqana giidi Haamay essida ichchash tammu wadha kocay izason dees» gides. Kawozi zaaridi, «Haama efidi he kocaa bolla kaqqite!» gi azazides." 
Esther7:10 Hessa gishshas Mardikiyoosa kaqqana giidi giigsida koca bolla efidi Haama kaqqida; hessafe guye kawoza hanqoy irxxides. 
Esther8:1 Ayhudata morkke Haamay kaqettida gallas kawo Arxekisisi Haama haaro ubbaa godatteyo Asteris aaththi immides. Qasse Mardikiyoosi izis mata dabbo gididayssa Astera kawozas yootadus. Hessa gishshas he gallassafe doommidi Mardikiyoosi kawozaakko gelanawu dandaydes. 
Esther8:2 Kawozi Haamappe zaari ekkida ba maatame midigaza Mardikiyoosas immides. Histtiin Astera Haama aqota bolla Mardikiyoosas aawateth immadus. 
Esther8:3 Hessafe guye Astera yeekkashe kawoza toho bolla kundada Agaage zare Haamay Ayhudata bolla qachchida iita maqqoy ooson pe7ontta mala kawoza woossadus. 
Esther8:4 Histtiin kawozi ba worqqa guufe izis micciin iza denda eqqada," 
Esther8:5 izas, «Kawozoo! Ta ne sinththan ayyoteth demmida gidikko, qasse ta nena ufayssidaa gidikko, ta oychchida oyshay kawo sinththan ekettizaa gidikko, kawoy ayssiza dere ubbaan diza Ayhudata dhayssanaas Agaage zare Hamadaate naa Haamay kessida awajja shaaranaas hara awajja kessana mala ta nena woossays." 
Esther8:6 Ha boshay wuri ta deraa bolla gakkishin tani waana co7u ga xeellana dandayazinaa? Qasse ta dabbotikka dhayshin tani waana co7u ga xeellana dandayazinaa?» gadus. 
Esther8:7 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi godatto Asterissinne Ayhuda as Mardikiyoosas, «Haamay Ayhudata wodhanaas awajja kessida gishshas tani miththa koca bolla iza kaqissidayssanne iza haarokka ubbaa godatto Asteris immidayssa intte ereeta." 
Esther8:8 Gidikkoka kawo sunththan xaafettidi iza qalabate maatamen shocettida dabdaabbey shaarettana dandayontta gishshas intteka intte baggara Ayhudatas lo7o misati beettiza hara awajja kawoza sunththan xaafidi kawoza qalabate maatamen shocite» gides. 
Esther8:9 Siwaana geetettiza heedzdzanththo aginan, nam7u tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassan, Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththa xaafeta xeygidi Ayhudatas, Hindefe Tophphiya gakkana diza 127 dereta haariza daannatas, hara shuumetas biza dabdaabbe xaafissides. He dabdaabbeti istta qaalan qaalaninne xaafettiza maaran qasse Ayhudata qaalaninne istta xaafo maara mala xaafettana mala ooththides." 
Esther8:10 Mardikiyoosi he awajjata ubbaa kawo Arxekisise sunththan xaafissidi, iza qalabate maatamen shocides; histtidi kawos gara7ettida pilata parata toggiza qasttanneta bolla ubbaa deraas yeddides." 
Esther8:11 Kawoza awajjay ubbaa katamatan diza Ayhudati ba dizason dizason issi bolla shiiqana malanne bantta morkketara eqettana mala, hessaththoka ba bolla, ba machcheta bollanne ba nayta bolla meto gaththiza ay dere as gidiin woykko gixettida olanchchata woykko kawoteththata gidiin istti zaari wodhana mala, dhayssana malanne morkketa aqota bonqqana mala maata immides." 
Esther8:12 Kawo Arxekisisi haariza biitta ubbaan Ayhudati hessa ooththanaas qachchida gallassay Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassanna. 
Esther8:13 Ayhudati ba morkketa bollan halo kessanaas he gallas giigetti uttana mala kawoza awajjafe duuqettida wogay ubbaa deren asay erana mala awajettides. 
Esther8:14 Kiitettizayti kawo keeththa parata toggidi kawoza azazo gaththanaas eesotidi bida. Qasse Suusa gimbenkka ha awajjay asa ubbaas yootettides. 
Esther8:15 Mardikiyoosi salo misatizanne booththa qacinan dadettida kawo may7o may7idi, gita worqqa kallachcha goxxidi, lo7o puuttofenne ochcha teera misatiza puuttofe dadettida seelo may7o may7idi kawoza sinththafe kezides. Suusa katamaya ufayettada ililadus." 
Esther8:16 Hessi Ayhudatas ufayssa gallassinne kaassa gallas, galata gallassinne bonchcho gallas gidides." 
Esther8:17 Kawoza awajjay gakkida deretaninne katamata ubbaan Ayhudatas ufayssinne miichcha, gibira gallassinne kaassa gallas gidides; hara kawoteththati ubbay Ayhudatas babbida gishshas Ayhudateththan laamettida." 
Esther9:1 Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassay gakkides. He gallassay kawoy koyro kessida awajja wode Ayhudata morkketi istta xoonana gida gallassa. Gido attiin yo7ozi laamettiin Ayhudati bantta morkketa xoonida. 
Esther9:2 Kawo Arxekisise kawoteththa garsan diza Ayhudati wuri banttana qohanawu koyza ubbaa dhayssanaas bantta kataman kataman issife shiiqida. Hara dere kawoteththati ubbay isttas babbida gishshas isttara ay asikka eqettanawu dandaybeenna. 
Esther9:3 Dere haarizaytinne ayssiza gita asati, maatay dizaytinne shuumeti ubbay Mardikiyoosas babbida gishshas Ayhudata maaddida." 
Esther9:4 Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththan erettidaade gidides; iza goobateththi dere ubbaan seetettides; iza wolqqayka minni minni bides. 
Esther9:5 Ayhudati bantta morkketa ubbaa mashshan siifida, wodhida, dhayssida, banttana ixxizayta bolla banttana lo7ida mala ooththida." 
Esther9:6 Waanna katama Suusan 500 as wodhi dhayssida. 
Esther9:7 Qasse istti Parshandaate, Dalifoone, Asppaate," 
Esther9:8 Poraate, Adaaliya, Aridaate," 
Esther9:9 Parmmashite, Arsaye, Ardayanne Wayzaate geetettizayta wodhida." 
Esther9:10 Hayti Ayhudatas morkke gidida Hamadaate naa Haamay yelida tammu attuma nayta. Gido attiin Ayhudati istta aqotan bantta kushe gelththibeettenna. 
Esther9:11 Ayhudati Suusa kataman wodhida asaa qooday aappunakko he gallassika kawos yootettides. 
Esther9:12 Histtiin kawoy godatteyo Astero, «Ayhudati waanna katama gidida Suusan xalla 500 asatanne Haama nayta tammata wodhi dhayssida. Hankko attida kawoy haariza deretan ay ooththidooshaa! Ha7ich ne hara ay woossay? Izikka nees imettana; ne oyshay aazee? Izikka nees imettana» gides." 
Esther9:13 Astera zaarada, «Hayssi ha qofay kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko, Suusa kataman diza Ayhudati hach ooththida mala wontoka ooththetto. Qasse Haama nayta tammata ahakka miththa bollan kaqqana mala azaza» gadus." 
Esther9:14 Histtiin kawozi hessi hanana mala azazides; awajjayka Suusa kataman nam7anththo awajettin Haama nayta tammata ahay kaqettides. 
Esther9:15 Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththo gallas Suusa kataman diza Ayhudati qasseka issi bolla shiiqidi qasseka 300 as wodhida; gido attiin istta aqotan bantta kushe gelththibeettenna. 
Esther9:16 He wode kawoy hara deretan diza Ayhudatikka bana ashshanaasinne bantta morkketara eqettanaas issi bolla shiiqida. Isttika 75,000 as wodhida; gido attiin istta aqotan bantta kushe gelththibeettenna." 
Esther9:17 Hessi ubbay Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne heedzdzanththa gallas hanides; histtidi tammanne oydanththa gallas gibira gallassinne ufayssa gallas ooththidi shempida. 
Esther9:18 Gido attiin Suusa kataman diza Ayhudati tammanne heedzdzanththonne tammanne oydanththo gallassatan wodhishe pe7idi tammanne ichchashanththo gallas gibira gallassinne ufayssa gallas ooththidi shempida. 
Esther9:19 Hessa gishshas gaxare giddon diza Ayhudati hach gakkanaaska Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththo gallas gibira gallas, ufayssa gallassinne issoy issaas imota immiza gallas histti bonchcheettes." 
Esther9:20 Mardikiyoosi hayssa ha taarikeza xaafides; kawo Arxekisisi haariza dereta ubbaan, haahoninne matan diza Ayhuda ubbaas dabdaabbeza yeddides." 
Esther9:21 Mardikiyoosi yeddida dabdaabey Ayhudati layththan layththan Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththonne tammanne ichchashanththo gallassatan ba7aale bonchchanaassa. 
Esther9:22 He gallassati Ayhudati bantta morkketappe attidi shemppo demmida gallassata; qasse he aginaykka istta kayoteththaynne hidota qanxxoy ufayssaninne kaassan laamettida agina; he gallassatan ufayettishe gibira, issoy issaas kaththa imota immishenne manqota maaddishe bonchchana mala isttas dabdaabbe xaafides." 
Esther9:23 Hessa gishshas Ayhudati Mardikiyoosi immida azazo ekkidi istti bonchchanaas doommida ba7aale layththan layththan aggontta bonchchanaas qachchida. 
Esther9:24 Agaage zare Hamadaate naa Haamay Ayhudata ubbata morkkey istta dhayssanaas kase maqettidi istta ubbaa wodhana aginanne gallassa erana mala, «Puurime» geetettiza saama yegisides." 
Esther9:25 He maqqoy kawoza matan erettidaappe guye Haamay Ayhudata bolla maqettida iita maqqoy wuri guye simmidi iza bolla polettana mala izinne iza nayti miththa bolla kaqettana mala xuufen azazides. 
Esther9:26 Hessa gishshas ha gallassati Puurime geetetti xeygettida; hayssa dabdaabbezan isttas xaafettida ubbaa gaason istti ba ayfen be7idayssa gaasoninne istta bollan gakkidayssa gaason," 
Esther9:27 Ayhudati banttas, bantta zereththatassinne Ayhuda gidanaas koyza ubbatas, Mardikiyoosi istti azazida mala layththan layththan ha gallassatan qanxxontta bonchchana mala wogay wodhdhides." 
Esther9:28 Qasse ha Puurime gallassati yeletan yeletan, keeththan keeththan, deren dereninne kataman kataman bonchchettanaassinne qofettanaas bessees gi qachchida; gaasoykka gallassati bonchchettontta attontta malanne yeleta garsafe istta qofsiza miishshi dhayontta malassa." 
Esther9:29 Hessafe guye Abi7eele biya godatteya Astera Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosara issife kase Mardikiyoosi Puurime gishshas xaafida dabdaabbeza minththanaas baas diza maataa qonccisiza dabdaabbe xaafa yeddadus. 
Esther9:30 Arxekisisi haariza 127 deren diza Ayhudatas ubbaas saroynne woppay gido giza dabdaabbe sarokara gaththi yeddides. 
Esther9:31 Qasse istti kase xoomanaassinne kayottanaas woga kessida mala, isttanne istta zereththati hayssa Puurime gallassata layththan layththan woga histti bonchchana mala he dabdaabbeti qoncciseettes. Hessi Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosi godatteyo Asterira nam7as issi bolla giigsi kessida azazo." 
Esther9:32 Godatto Asteri awajjay Puurime ba7aale woga minththees; hessika mazgaban xaafettides. 
Esther10:1 Kawo Arxekisisi ba haariza dere ubbaa bolla biidi abba lanqe gakkanaas dizayta bolla giira yeggides. 
Esther10:2 Izi ooththida gitanne wolqqama oosoti ubbay qasse Mardikiyoosakka wostti dhoqqu histti bonchchidaakko qonccisiza taarikey Meedoonenne Paarise kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafettides. 
Esther10:3 Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosi kawo Arxekisiseppe bonchchon nam7anththo maaran dees; izi Ayhudati saroteththaninne hirgay baynda daana mala keehi daaburda as gidida gishshas izi Ayhudatankka keehi bonchchettidanne dosettida asa. 
Job1:1 Uuxe geetettiza deren issi Iyoobe geetettiza asi dees. Izikka iita ubbaafe haakkidaade; wosoy iza bolla bayndaade; Xoossas yayyizaadenne suure asa. 
Job1:2 Izas laappun attuma naytinne heedzdzu macca nayti deettes. 
Job1:3 Haaro baggarakka izas 7,000 dorsati, 3,000 gaamellati, 500 waaththa booratinne 500 hareti deettes; qasseka keehi daro aylleti deettes. Arshey mokkizaso baggara iza mala durenne gita asi haray deenna." 
Job1:4 Iyoobe attuma nayti issoy issoy bason taran taran diggisa giigsidi issife shiiqi ufayetteettes; heedzdzu michchetakka banttako xeygisidi isttara issife meettessinne uyeettes. 
Job1:5 Diggisa gallassati aadhdhidaappe guye Iyoobi wonttara dendidi ba nayta xeygisidinne issaa issaa sunththan yarsho shiishshees. Izi hessaththo ooththizay, «Ta nayti geelli gidaa Xoossa cayidi awukkora nagara ooththidaakkonne!» guussa hirgan nayta nagarappe geeshshanaas giidi ooththees. Iyoobi hayssa yarsho woga qanxxontta ubba wode ooththees." 
Job1:6 Gallassatappe issi gallas salo kiitanchchati GODAA sinth shiiqida wode Xala7eykka isttara issife shiiqides. 
Job1:7 Xoossika, «Awappe yadii?» giidi Xala7e oychchides. Xala7eykka, «Sa7a gaxa ubbaa yaanne haa yuuyerettada yadis» giidi GODAAS zaarides." 
Job1:8 GODAY Xala7eza, «Ta aylleza Iyoobe lo7eththa beyadii? Iza mala ammanettidanne suure as biitta bolla beettibeenna; izi iita ubbaafe haakkidi taas yayyiza suure asa» gides." 
Job1:9 Xala7eykka zaaridi, «Iyoobi nees Xoossaas coo yayyizee?" 
Job1:10 Izi nees yayyizay neni izanne iza nayta, izas diza haaro ubbaa lo7eththa naagida gishshassa; izi ooththiza oosoza kumeth anjjida gishshassinne daro wude meheta ne izas immida gishshas gidennee?" 
Job1:11 Ane ne kushe yeddada izas dizayssa ubbaa ne dhayssidaakko tuma izi nena qonccen cayana» gides. 
Job1:12 GODAYKKA Xala7es, «Ero ane Iyoobe bolla issi metokka gaththofa attiin izas diza haaroza bolla ne koyidaazi ooththanawu dandayaasa» gides. Hessafe guye Xala7ey Xoossa sinththafe ke7idi bides." 
Job1:13 Gallassatappe issi gallas Iyoobe nayti bayra ishason wuri shiiqidi miidinne woyne cajje uyidi ufayetteettes. 
Job1:14 He gallas issoy kiitetti yiidi, «Nuni boorata waaxidi goyishin; haretikka nu mata demban heemettishin," 
Job1:15 Saaba dere asati yiidi nu bolla ola denththidi ubbaaka di7i ekki bida; ne aylleta ubbatakka mashshan wodhida; tani xalala attada hanida ubbaa nees yootanaas yadis» gides. 
Job1:16 Koyro kiitanchchay ba haasayza haasaya buro ongontta dishin nam7anththo kiitanchchay yiidi, «Dorsatanne heemmiza heenththanchcha ubbaa wolqqanth saloppe wodhdhidi wodhides; tani xalla attada hanida ubbaa nees yootanaas yadis» gides." 
Job1:17 Hayssa kiitanchchay haasayi ongontta hara kiitanchchay yiidi, «Heedzdzu butten shaakettida bonqqiza Kaladaawe asati yiidi qoppontta dishin nu bolla iita meto gaththida; gaamellata ubbaa di7i efichchida; ne aylleta ubbaa mashshan wodhida; tani xalla attada hanida miish ubbaa nees yootanaas yadis» gides." 
Job1:18 Hayssa ha kiitanchchay haasayi ongontta hara kiitanchchay yiidi, «Ne nayti ubbatikka banttas bayra ishason shiiqidi mishenne woyne cajje uyishe ufayettiza." 
Job1:19 Bazzofe yida gote carkoy qoppontta dishin yiidi keeththa kumeth shirechchi yeggides; keeththazikka istta bolla wodhdhiin wurikka hayqqida; tani xalla attada hanida miish ubbaa nees yootanaas yadis» gides. 
Job1:20 Hessafe guye Iyoobi dendidi kayottidi ba may7oza daakkides; ba hu7e bulusides; biittan gufanni goynnides. 
Job1:21 «Tani ta aayey uloppe kallo yelettadis; hayqqiza wodekka kallo baana; GODAY immides; GODAY ekkides; GODAA sunththi galatettidaaz gido» gides. 
Job1:22 Ha paacey ubbay Iyoobe bolla gakkinkka izi ubbaaka nagara ooththibeenna; Xoossa bollaka camo qaala kessibeenna. 
Job2:1 Gallassatappe issi gallas salo kiitanchchati Xoossa sinth shiiqiza wode Xala7eykka isttara issife shiiqides. 
Job2:2 GODAYKKA, «Awappe yadii?» giidi Xala7e oychchides. Xala7eykka, «Biitta ubbaa bolla yaanne haa simerettada yadis» gides." 
Job2:3 GODAYKKA Xala7e, «Ta aylleza Iyoobe lo7eththa beyadii? Iza mala ammanettidaynne kiya as biitta bolla beettenna; izi iita ubbaafe haakkidi taas yayyiza suure asa; iza dhayssanaas ne dandayana mala ta nees aaththa immana mala ne tana denththeththiday hadanna. Beya Iyoobi gidikko hanno gakkanaas ba suureteththan minni eqqides» gides." 
Job2:4 Xala7eykka, «Galba gishshas galba» gizayssa mala «Asi ba asho ashshanaas gishe baas dizayssa ubbaa immees." 
Job2:5 Ha7i gidikko ne kushe iza bolla miccada izas kumeththa asateththa bolla qoho ne gaththidaakko tuma nena qonccera cayana» gides. 
Job2:6 GODAYKKA Xala7eza, «Ane lo7o; wodho wodhoppa attiin iza bolla ne koyidayssa ooththanaas dandayaasa» gides." 
Job2:7 Hessafe guye Xala7ey Xoossa sinththafe ke7idi Iyoobes hu7e binanappe doommidi toho xugunth gakkanawu wolqqama madunththan waayettana mala ooththides. 
Job2:8 Hessafe dendidayssan Iyoobi bidinththa bolla uttidi ba madunththa kon7an qaach doommides. 
Job2:9 Iyoobes machcheya, «Ha7ikka Xoossa bolla diza ne ammanozi mino dizee? Xoossa cayada hayqqa!» gadus." 
Job2:10 Iyoobikka, «Waanada eeya maccassa haasaya haasayay? Xoossi lo7o miish immiza wode ufayssan ekkoos; ha7i gidikko iita izi nu bolla ehishin iza bolla zuuzumanaas bessizee?» gides. Iyoobi ha ubbaa metoynne waayey iza bolla gakkinkka izi Xoossa bolla iita miish haasaydi nagara ooththibeenna." 
Job2:11 Temaane dere as Elfaaze, Shuha dere as Belidaadinne Na7imaane dere as Zoofaare geetettiza heedzdzu laggeti Iyoobes deettes. Isttika Iyoobe bolla gakkida metoza siyida wode izas istti qadhettoyssa qonccisanaassinne iza minththeththanaas bantta dereppe xeygettidi issife Iyoobekko yida." 
Job2:12 Buro haakora yishin Iyoobe be7ida; gido attiin izi Iyoobe gididayssa shaakki eranaas dandaybeettenna. Isttas wozinay meqqiin izas mishettidi bantta may7oza daakkida; gudullaza ekkidi pude salo laallida; bantta hu7enkka makkidi addafe waassidi yeeho doommida. 
Job2:13 Izas waayeza daraa be7ida gishshas aykko haasayontta izara laappun gallassanne laappun omars biitta bolla uttidi gam7ida. 
Job3:1 Hayssafe guye Iyoobi haasaya doommides; ba yelettida gallassaa," 
Job3:2 «Tani ta aayey ulon medhettida omarsayanne tani yelettida gallassaya qanggettidayta gidetto! 
Job3:3  
Job3:4 He gallassay dhuman laametto; Salo Xoossay iza qoppofo; Poo7oy mulekka izan beettofo. 
Job3:5 Shaarumaninne girdi gida dhuman kamettidayssa gido; shaaray kammiin dhumay iza poo7o mitto. 
Job3:6 He gallassa omarsayo girdi gida dhumay kammo; layththa gallassatara issife taybettofo; aginata qoodan geli qofettofo. 
Job3:7 He gallassa omarsay aykkoy bayndaaz gido; ufayssa qaalaykka izan seetettofo. 
Job3:8 Lewataane geetettiza do7a qaaseththanaas dandayzayti, gallassata qanggizayti, he gallassayo qanggetto." 
Job3:9 He gallassa omars bakkale xoolintteti dhumetto; poo7o hidotay izan beettofo; wontta xalqqey izan xalqqofo. 
Job3:10 Ta ayfetappe meto genththana, ta aayey ulo ta bolla gordontta aggida gishshas he gallassay qanggettidayssa gido." 
Job3:11 «Ta aayey ulon dashe haaththe gida attidaakko aazee! Ta aayey uloppe ke7ida mala ays hayqqabeekkinaa? 
Job3:12 Gulbateti tana mokki ekkanaas, dhanththatikka tana dhanththanaas ays beettidoo?" 
Job3:13 Ha7i tani saron ichchidaakko, dhiskadakka shemppo demmanakkoshin." 
Job3:14 Ha7i laaletti beettizayta baas keexxida biitta kawotaranne zorizaytara ta dhiskada shemppo demmanakkoshin. 
Job3:15 Ba keeththa worqqaninne biran kunththida; daannatara ta issife shempanakkoshin. 
Job3:16 Qasseka ays biitta garsan moogettida awucaya, woykko issi gallassa poo7o mulekka be7ontta naa mala ays gidabeekkinaa?" 
Job3:17 Heen iitata waayisoy attana; daabursiza ooson de7idayti shempana. 
Job3:18 Qashetti diza asatikka saro demmana; bana oosisiza asata hanqo qaala siyanayssafekka attana. 
Job3:19 Laafatinne gita asati issife beettana; aylletikka heen ba godatappe wozzettana. 
Job3:20 «Xoossi un7o bolla dizaytas poo7o, duussazi camo qofan kumidaades de7o ays immizee?" 
Job3:21 Hayqo laamotizaytassinne qotetti diza aqoppe aaththi koyidi demmonttaytas de7o ays immizee? 
Job3:22 Duge duufon gelishe ufayettizaytas de7oy ays imettizee? 
Job3:23 Izi biza ogey izaadefe geemettidaadessinne Xoossi gordi woththida asas poo7oy ays imettizee? 
Job3:24 Yeehoy taas kath gidides; waasoykka taas goggiza haaththa mala gidides. 
Job3:25 Ta yayyida miish ta bolla yides; ta dagammidayssika ta bolla gakkides. 
Job3:26 Ta giddon hirgay xalla diza gishshas saroy, woppaynne shemppoy deenna» gi qanggides." 
Job4:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgi zaarides; 
Job4:2 «Iyoobee! Issi asi ne bolla wolqqaththi haasaykko izaade ne dandayan ezganee? Haasayanaappe attiin ooni agganee? 
Job4:3 Neni daro asata tamaarsadasa; daaburda qesetakka minththadasa. 
Job4:4 Kase ne qaalati dhuphettizayta maaddeetteskoshin; neni kokkoriza gulbatetakka minththaasakkoshin. 
Job4:5 Ha7i gidikko metoy ne bolla gakkida gishshas hidotay bayndaade gidadasa; metoykka ne bolla minnida gishshas hidota qanxxadasa. 
Job4:6 Xoossaas ne yayyiza yashshay ammanththizaaz gidennee? Ne suure ogetikka nees hidotata deettennee? 
Job4:7 Xillo as gidi dishin iza metoy gakkidaadey, suure as gidi dishe tim7i gi dhaydaadey, diikko ane qoppa." 
Job4:8 Tani akeekida mala, iitateth goyidi meto zerizayti heytantti ba ooththooro shiishshana." 
Job4:9 Istti Xoossa peenon dhayana; iza hanqo dambalan istti dippi gi dhayana. 
Job4:10 Iitati gaammo mala xaaggana; ba qaala dhoqqu ooththidi waassana; Xoossi gidikko isttas achchaa menththereththana. 
Job4:11 Gaammoy shankkatidi mizaaz dhayda wode hayqqiza mala isttika hayqqana; gaammo maratikka laalettiza mala istta naytikka laalettana; 
Job4:12 Gallassafe issi gallas xuura gidida kiitay taakko yides; hessa he kiitaza saasukeththan ta siyadis. 
Job4:13 Asay omars wolqqama dhisko seerida wode, tana iita agumoy agunththides." 
Job4:14 Baboynne kokkorsi tana oykkiin, taas meqeththati ubbay kokkorana mala ooththides." 
Job4:15 Ayanay ta sinththara aadhdhides; dagamappe dendidayssan ta hasay eqqides. 
Job4:16 Heenkka issi miishshi eqqi dizayssa beyadis; tishshi ooththa xeelladis shin izi aazakko shaakka eranawu dandayabeekke. Hessafe guye co7u gidasohoppe hizgiza qaala siyadis," 
Job4:17 ‹Xoossa sinththan xillo gidi beettanaas dandayza asi dizee? woykko bana medhdhidayssa sinththan geeshsha asi beettanee? 
Job4:18 Xoossi baas ooththizaytan ammanettontta aggiko, ba kiitanchchata bollaka izi mooro miish demmizaaz gidikko," 
Job4:19 histtiin haradhdhoy montta dishin laalettiza istta yochchay biittafe gidida urqqafe oosettida keeththa giddon dizayta bolla waani ammanettanee? 
Job4:20 Maaladoppenne omarsafe giddon istti meqerettana; erettontta dishin istti mernaaskka dhayana. 
Job4:21 Tole dhishkey shodettichchida dunkaane mala istti erateththi baynda hayqqana.› 
Job5:1 «Iyoobee! Ne xeygiin nees koyanaadey diikko xeyga; nees maado immana mala kiitanchchatappe awayssako xeellay? 
Job5:2 Eeya as yiilloy wodhana; qanaateykka as dhayssana. 
Job5:3 Eeya asi minnidi dishin beyadis; gido attiin iza aqoy qoppontta dishin Xoossa hanqon laalettides. 
Job5:4 Iza naytikka ba de7ozas ammanththizaaz demmettenna; dubbushankka istta gishshas haasayza as istti demmontta gishshas istta bolla qohoy gakkana. 
Job5:5 Izi zerida kaththaaka koshattida asati maana; haray attiin agunththa giddon mokkidayssaka izas ashshettenna; Saametti uttida asati iza haaroza ekkanaas amotteettes. 
Job5:6 Metoy coo biittafe dendenna; waayeykka gadeppe coo kezenna. 
Job5:7 Tama finxeththi bonqofe dendidi pude finxiza mala, asikka waayes yelettees." 
Job5:8 «Tani nena gididaakko Xoossa woossana; ta meto ubbaa izas qonccisana. 
Job5:9 Izi qooday baynda malalisiza miish, pilggiin gakettontta gita miish ooththees." 
Job5:10 Biitta bolla ira bukisees; goshshatakka haaththan shugisees. 
Job5:11 Kawuyidayta bonchchon dhoqqu histtees; muuzottizayta minththeththidi ufayssees. 
Job5:12 Istta oosoy polettontta mala gene asata qofa hada ooththees. 
Job5:13 Cinccata istta gene oosozan zaari oykkees. Gene asata qofaakka eesora dhayssees. 
Job5:14 Gallassay isttas dhuma gidees; buro seeta gallassan omars dhuma giddon diza mala istti tattafettana. 
Job5:15 Manqota istta morkketa mashshafe ashshees; metotanchchatakka waayisizayta kusheppe kessi ekkees. 
Job5:16 Manqotas hidota immees; makkallateththika biitta bollafe dhayssees. 
Job5:17 «Xoossi seeriza asi anjjettidayssa; hessa gishshas Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa seera leqqofa. 
Job5:18 Xoossi madunththikokka zaaridi paththees; izi menththees; ba kushen zaaridi koolees. 
Job5:19 Usuppun qommo boshappe nena ashshi ekkana; laappunththazanka ay qohoykka ne bolla gakkenna. 
Job5:20 Kosha layththan izi nena shemppora paxa woththana; ola layththankka izi nena hayqoppe ashshana. 
Job5:21 Xoossi nena iita inxarsafe naagana; boshay ne bolla yiikkoka yayyaka. 
Job5:22 Wolqqamata qohoynne koshay nena daganththenna; biitta do7ataska ne yayyaka. 
Job5:23 Ne goyiza gaden nena shuchchi waayisenna; do7atarakka ne saron daana. 
Job5:24 Ne keeththan saroy kumanayssa ne shaakka erana; ne mehe xeellishin aqoppe paccenna. 
Job5:25 Ne zereththay daranayssa ne erana; ne zereththayka demban diza maata mala darana. 
Job5:26 Kaththi kaxxidi maxettizayssa mala nekka lo7eththa cimmada duufon baana. 
Job5:27 Nuni hayssa ubbaa pilggidi tumu gididayssa eridos; nenikka akeekada hayssa ooson peysha.» 
Job6:1 Hayssafe guye Iyoobi hizgi zaarides; 
Job6:2 «Ta muuzoteththi geeddaretti uttidaakko aazee dizay! ta metoy ubbay geeddaran geeddaretti uttidaakko aazee dizay! 
Job6:3 Abba lanqen diza aceppe aadhdhi deexxanakkoshin; hessa gishshas dandayay paccida ta haasayay nena malalisanaas bessenna. 
Job6:4 Ubbaa dandayza Xoossay tana ba yiishshatan caddides; istta marzetikka ta asateththa giddon laalettida; daganththiza Xoossa boshay ta yuushon yuuyi aadhdhides. 
Job6:5 Tumappe hardiday cilila maata demmidi caaggi erizee? Booraykka basso maata demmiko xaaggi erizee? 
Job6:6 Maxiney gelontta mal7ontta kaththi meetettizee? Phuuphphulle haaththi mal7izee? 
Job6:7 Hayssa mala kath maanaas koykke; muusi attiin kushenkka bochchike. 
Job6:8 «Ta amottizayssa Xoossi taas immidaakko aazee dizay! Izi ta waaso siyidaakko aazee dizay! 
Job6:9 Hayssa ubbaafe izas shene gidiin izi tana menththereththi yeggizaakko! Ba kusheza yeddidi izi tana dhayssidaakko! 
Job6:10 Shempo immontta ay hargey tana sakkikokka tani ufayssan guppana; tani Geeshshaza qaala ay wodenkka kaddabeekke; 
Job6:11 «De7on de7ana mala dandayza ay minoteththi taas dizee? Hidotay baynda aggiko ays de7azinaa? 
Job6:12 Tani shuchcha mala minoo? Ta asateththayka xarqimalaththo minoo? 
Job6:13 Tana maaddanaas taas aykko wolqqay deenna; taas diza wolqqay ubbay eketichchides. 
Job6:14 «Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossas yash aggidaadessinne daaburdaadeska iza laggey izas kiyateth bessanaas koshshees. 
Job6:15 Ta ishati gidikko haroy harotti wodhidaappe guye meliza ammanththontta shaafata mala baleththizayta. 
Job6:16 Shaafatan balgo balgo shachchi kumees. 
Job6:17 Bone aginatan gidikko maayi dhayees; shaafatikka haaththi baynda melata gideettes. 
Job6:18 Caana meheta laaggi ogera biza asati haath koshshas ogeppe ke7i bazzo biitta gelidi toylu toylishe dhayeettes. 
Job6:19 Teema biittafe biza mandara asati haaththe koyeettes; Saaba dere zal7anchchatikka haaththe demmanaas hidota ooththeettes. 
Job6:20 Banti ammanetti uttida shaafati melidayssa be7idi hidota qanxxeettes; haaththaako gakkiza wode yiilloteettes. 
Job6:21 Intteka taas hayta ha shaafata mala; ta bolla gakkida metoza be7idi gede guye baqatideta. 
Job6:22 Histtiin ta inttena hessa woykko hayssa taas immite, woykko intte haarozappe kessidi tana ashshite gadinaa?" 
Job6:23 Qasse ta morkketa kusheppe tana ashshite; woykko tana waayisizayta kusheppe tana kessi ekkite gadinaa? 
Job6:24 «Tana tamaarsite; tanikka co7u gaana; ta moorozakka tana bessite. 
Job6:25 Tuma qaalay camo gidikkoka ekettees; intte walassay gidikko aykkoska go7enna. 
Job6:26 Intte ta haasaya carko mala qoodeeta; histtiko hidota qanxxida taas zaaro immanaas ays koyeetii? 
Job6:27 Yi7o nayta bolla saama yeggeeta; intte intte siiqo laggeta bayzanaas miishshan marshetteetii? 
Job6:28 «Ane tana haa xeellite; intte sinththan ta wordotadinaa? 
Job6:29 Inttes qoho gidontta mala simmite, tani likke asakko!" 
Job6:30 Tumukka ta inxarsan qohoy beettanee? Ta doonaykka gene miish shaakki eranaas dandayennee? 
Job7:1 «Asas biitta duussay baaxe duus deennee? Isttas gallassayka une ooththiza oosanchchata gallassa mala gidennee? 
Job7:2 Isttika kuwa garsan shempanaas amottiza oosanchchatanne ba damoza ekkanaas naagiza une asa mala gidettennee? 
Job7:3 Ta daaburda aginati taas go7ay bayndayta gidida; meto omarsatikka taas qofa omars gidida. 
Job7:4 Ichchiza wode awude dendandinaasha gaada qoppays; omarsayka gidikko taas gede aduqqees; tanikka wonttana gakkanaas haa hee shirettashe aqays. 
Job7:5 Taas kumeththa asateththay guxunen kumides; taas ashoykka madunxi goggides; taas madunththayka dhuuqqidi uzazees. 
Job7:6 Ta layththata gallassati daththa mooqe xongeththafe eesoteettes; issi hidotay baynda wurseth gakkeettes. 
Job7:7 Ta Godawu! Ta shemppoya peeno mala gididayssa qoppa; hayssafe guye ubbaka lo7o miish demmike. 
Job7:8 Ha7i tana be7izayssi nam7anththo zaaridi beyenna; izi koyzaa gidikkoka tana demmanawu dandayenna. 
Job7:9 Shaaray laaletti dhayzayssa mala hayqqidi duufon biza asi haa simmidi yeenna. 
Job7:10 Nam7anththo zaaridi baso simmenna; izaade erizayti ubbay iza balettana. 
Job7:11 «Hayssafe guye co7u giikke! Taas ayanay ceecidayssafe dendidayssan ta haasayays; ta shemppoya irayettida gishshas zuuzumays. 
Job7:12 Hayssa likke naagettizaade ne tana ooththiday tani abbayee? Woykko abba giddon diza do7aayee? 
Job7:13 Ta hiixay tana minththeththees; ta ichchizasoy ta sakoza baleththees gaada ta qoppadis. 
Job7:14 Neni gidikko tana agumon yashissaasa; ajjuutankka daganththaasa. 
Job7:15 Hayssa metoy darida asateththa tookkada daanaappe ta cuuletta hayqqanayssa doorays. 
Job7:16 Hidota qanxxadis; daanaaska ta koykke; taas layththayka qaanth gidida gishshas tana aggaaga. 
Job7:17 «Ne soho immanaassinne qoppanaas asi aazee? 
Job7:18 Wonttan wonttan pilggana mala, woden wodenkka ne paaccana mala asi aazee?" 
Job7:19 Cuch mittiza guuththa wodekka taas immikii? 
Job7:20 Asa kaalettiza Godawu! Tani nagara ooththoyssan neni ay qohettadii? Ays ta bolla ne toora zaaradii? Ays hayssa keena ta nena deexxadinaa? 
Job7:21 Ubbaaka ta nagara atto giikkii? Ta ooththiza qoho taappe diggikii? Ta duufon gelana wodey gakkides; hayssafe guye ne tana koyidaakkoka ta beettike.» 
Job8:1 Shuha dere as Belidaade geetettizayssi hizgidi zaarides; 
Job8:2 «Ne doonappe ke7iza qaalati gote carko mala; awude gakkanaas hayssaththo ne haasayanee? 
Job8:3 Xoossi pirda bokkasi erizee? Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay xilloteth bokkasi erizee? 
Job8:4 Ne nayti Xoossa qohidaa gidikko, istti bantta pirda ekkida guussa." 
Job8:5 Gidikkoka ne Xoossako simmiko, Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa woossiko," 
Job8:6 suurenne geesh gidikko izi eesoti nees bessiza sohon nena zaarana. 
Job8:7 Ne doomeththay guuth misatikkoka, nees poloy keehi lo7o gidana." 
Job8:8 «Ane kase yeleta oychcha; kase aawati gakkidasoza pilgga xeella. 
Job8:9 Nu layththazi buro guuth gidida gishshas nuni aykkoka erokko; nu layththayka eesho mala aadhdhizaaza. 
Job8:10 Istti nees tamaarsizayssinne nees yootizayssi ba akeekizayssafe ekkidi gidennee? 
Job8:11 Tumukka carey bayndason shacca maatay mokki erizee? Haaththi bayndason marcoy cililizee? 
Job8:12 Hayssi hanontta aggiko diccidi buuch gakkanaappe sinththan buro cililan dishe melees. 
Job8:13 Xoossa dogiza asata ubbaa wurseththay hessa mala hanana; Xoossi baawa giza asata hidotay qanxxettana. 
Job8:14 Achcharo keeththa mala miishshan ammanetteettes; istti hidota ooththiza miishshi diikkoka kawushshara dhayana. 
Job8:15 Achcharo keeththa bolla istti zemppizaa gidikko izi minni eqqenna; achcharo keeththaza izi oykkiko duuxeretti wodhdhana. 
Job8:16 Haaththa kallida harumay ho7o demmidi daayees; 
Job8:17 Xaphoza shuchcha muuhe giddon yeddees; zaalla za7an xaphees. 
Job8:18 Ba dizasoppe shodettiza wode izi dizasozi erettenna. 
Job8:19 Iza wurseththi hessa mala gidees; hara maatati biittafe doleettes. 
Job8:20 «Xoossi wosoy baynda asata olenna; iita asata qese minththenna. 
Job8:21 Hessa gishshas nenikka ufayssan miiccana malanne ‹Ililana› mala izi ooththana. 
Job8:22 Nena ixxiza asati gidikko yeella may7ana; iita asata keeththika dhayana.» 
Job9:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides; 
Job9:2 «Ee! Tani hayssa tumu gididayssa erays; gido attiin asi Xoossa sinththan waani xillo gidanaas dandayzee? 
Job9:3 Izarakka ooni marshettanaas dandayzee? Izi issi shii oyshota oychchizaa gidikko isttafe issinokka zaaranaas dandayzaadey deenna. 
Job9:4 Xoossi eranchchanne wolqqama; oonee izara eqettidi xoonettonttay? 
Job9:5 Akeekontta zumata kokkorsana; ba hanqozankka shirechchi yeggana. 
Job9:6 Xoossi biitta dizasoppe kokkorsana; biitta tuussatakka qaaseththana. 
Job9:7 Awa arshey mokkontta mala ooththanawu dandayees; Xoolinttetikka poo7isontta mala ooththana. 
Job9:8 Oonikka maaddontta dishin salota micciday iza; izi abba dambala bolla hemettees. 
Job9:9 Zardo, Ooriyoninne Piliyaadise geetettiza Xoolintteta, qasseka duge baggara diza daro Xoolintteta, salo bolla medhdhi woththiday Xoossa." 
Job9:10 Izi ooththiza malalisiza miishshata nuni pilggidi akeekanawu dandayokko; izi poliza makkalla miishshata nuni qoodanawu dandayokko. 
Job9:11 «Xoossi ta matara aadhdhikokka ta demmike; haa taakko shiiqikkoka shaakkada erikke.
