Job9:12 Izi ba koyidayssa ekkiko oonikka iza diggenna; ‹Ays hayssaththo ooththay?› giidi iza oychchanaas xalizay deenna. 
Job9:13 Xoossay ba hanqozappe guye simmenna; Era7aabe geetettiza abba giddo do7ata maaddizaytikka iza toho garsan gulbatana. 
Job9:14 «Histtiin tani izas zaaro waana immana dandayazinaa? Izara marshettanaas ay qaala ta demmanee? 
Job9:15 Geesh gida ta beettidaakkoka; ta bolla pirdizaadey tana maarana mala woossana attiin izas zaaro immanaas xalikke. 
Job9:16 Ta iza sunththa xeygikko izi zaaro taas immizaa gidikkoka ta magana izi siyana gaada ta ammanettike. 
Job9:17 Izi tana gote carkon liiqisana; aykko gaasoykka baynda taas madunththaa ha darsana. 
Job9:18 Shempo ta zaarana wodey gakkanaaska taas shemppo immenna; ta shemppon waaye kunththides. 
Job9:19 Taas diza wolqqan ta izara baaxetana gontta mala wolqqan izara eqettidi dandayanay deenna; ta mootettada iza laththana gontta mala iza pirdiza asataakko shiishshanaas dandayza asi deenna. 
Job9:20 Tani geeshshinne xillokoshin ta haasayay tana qohanchcha kessees; ta haasayza haasayati ubbay ta bolla pirdeettes. 
Job9:21 «Aykkoka tani borey bayndaade gidikkoka ta gishshas qoppike; ta shemppoyokka harassetays. 
Job9:22 Xoossi xillozanne qohanchchazakka dhayssiza gishshas aykko dummateththika deenna ta giday hessa gishshassa. 
Job9:23 Asi iita meton wurshin izi geeshsha asa meto qidhees. 
Job9:24 Biittay iita asata kushen aadhdhi imettishin izi pirdiza asata ayfe goozees; hayssa ooththiday Xoossa gidontta aggiko haray oonee? 
Job9:25 «Ta layththati woxxizaytappe haa aadhdhi eesoteettes; aykko ufayssika ta demmontta aadhdheettes. 
Job9:26 Isttika sookke gizayssafe oosettida wogolo mala eesoteettes; baqqi ekkiza golle kafo mala eesoteettes. 
Job9:27 Tani ta zuuzunththaa balana; ‹Ta sinththaaka kareththo aggada ane poo7isa bessays› giikko," 
Job9:28 Xoossi tana geesh ooththidi qoodonttayssa tani eriza gishshas metoynne waayey ta bolla gakkana gaada yayyays. 
Job9:29 Histtiin ta qohanchcha geetetta qoodettidaa gidikko taas hada daaburay aazassee? 
Job9:30 Tani ta asateththa saamunan meeccizaa gidikko, ta kushezakka keeha geeshshizaa gidikko," 
Job9:31 ha ubbaa ooththiinkka neni duge iita ciimman tana olana; ta may7otikka tana shaatettana. 
Job9:32 Izi ta mala as gidontta gishshas, pirdiza asataakko biidi pirdettoos gaanawu dandaykke." 
Job9:33 Nu bolla ba kusheza gaththi woththidi pirdi nuna shaakkiza asi nu giddon dizaakko," 
Job9:34 iza teemateththi tana hirgisontta mala Xoossi ba guufeza ta bollafe denththidaakko," 
Job9:35 tani izas yayyontta haasayanakkoshin; ha7i gidikko ta diza hanon dashe haasayana dandaykke. 
Job10:1 «Duussi tana saleththides; ta de7iza camo de7oza qonccen sissana. 
Job10:2 Tani Xoossa hizgana; ta bolla nees lancey diikko taas qonccisa attiin ta bolla pirdofa! 
Job10:3 Hayssa likke ne tana metoththoyssi nees wogaa? Neni nerkka medhdhida asaa ne kadhanaas nees bessizee? Iita asata duulatay nena ufayssizee? 
Job10:4 Ne ayfey asa ayfe malaa? Woykko ne asaththo xeellay? 
Job10:5 Ne wodeti asayssa malaa? Woykko ne layththati asa layththa mala qaanththee? 
Job10:6 Ays ne ta qohoza xeellay? Ays ne ta nagarakka kaalla kaallada aggontta ixxay? 
Job10:7 Tani qohonttayssanne ne kusheppe oonikka tana ashshonttayssa ne eraasa. 
Job10:8 Taas medhanne mala immi medhdhiday ne kusheta; histtiin ha7i ha kusheti tana zaari laalli dhayssanee? 
Job10:9 Mana miishsha mala ne tana biittafe medhdhoyssa qoppa; histtiin ha7i ne tana gudulla mala liiqisanee? 
Job10:10 Tana maaththa mala tigada, meqo maaththa mala irkkisa ooththadasa." 
Job10:11 Ta asateththa galbaninne ashon kammadasa; meqeththaninne shayan gaththa oyththadasa. 
Job10:12 De7onne mernaa siiqo taas immadasa; ne naagoykka ta ayana minththides. 
Job10:13 «Hekko hayta ha miishshata ne wozinan qotta woththada daasa; ne qofaykka hayssa gididayssa ta eradis. 
Job10:14 Ta qohidaa gidikko ne ayfeti beyana; ta nagara gishshas tana qaxxayontta aadhdhaka. 
Job10:15 Ta nagara ooththidaakko eesora meto giddon kundana; lo7o miish ooththidaa gidikkoka galatetikke; ta gilqiin yeellay tana gakkides. 
Job10:16 Ta otorettidaakko ne tana gaammo mala shankkatada oykkana; ne tana qohanaas zaara zaara shankkatana. 
Job10:17 Ta bolla markkattiza asata ne ubbaa gallas demmana; ta bolla ne hanqoy gede dari dari baana; neni tana qohanaas ubba gallas ooraththa qofata ola asata mala ta bolla denththaasa. 
Job10:18 «Ta Godaa Xoossawu! Ays ta yelettana mala ooththadii? Oonikka tana be7ontta ta hayqqaychchidaakko lo7okkoshin! 
Job10:19 Ta medhettontta attarkina; tani ta aayey uloppe duufon bidaakko taas lo7o gidanakkoshin! 
Job10:20 Ta daana layththaya qaanth gidekkee? he qaanththa layththayn guuththara ta ufayettana mala tana aggarkkii! 
Job10:21 Hessika tani nam7anththo haa simmanaas dandayontta girdi gida dhumaso baanaappe sinththana. 
Job10:22 Ta baanaasozi dhuma kuwaynne shiroy kumida biitta; heen diza poo7ozi dhuma mala.» 
Job11:1 Na7imaane dere as Zoofaarey hizgides; 
Job11:2 «Hayssa ha hada qaalatas ubbaas zaaro immizay baye? Asi haasaya daron xillo gidana dandayzee? 
Job11:3 Iyoobee! Ne haasayda hada haasayatas zaaroy imettontta misatizee? Ne hayssa mala qilccishin nena seerana asi bayndaz misatizee? 
Job11:4 Ne qofan, ‹Tani xillo› gaasa; Xoossaska, ‹Ne sinththan tani geeshsha› gaasa." 
Job11:5 Xoossi nees haasaydaakkonne likke zaaro immidaakko aazee dizay! 
Job11:6 Erateththas ogey daro gidida gishshas, Xoossay nees erateththa xuura qonccisidaakko aazee dizay! Hessa gishshas Xoossi nena qaxxayizay nees bessizayssafe guuththara gididayssa era." 
Job11:7 «Neni Xoossas ciimma gidida xuura eranaas dandayay? Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa pilggada gakkanawu dandayay? 
Job11:8 Iza gitateththay saloppe bolla; neni ay ooththanawu dandayay? Iza ciimmateththayka si7ooleppeka ziqqa; neni ay eray? 
Job11:9 Xoossa gitateththay biittafe darees; abbafe aakkees. 
Job11:10 Xoossi yiidi qachchiko, gede pirda keeth shiishshidaakko oonee iza digganay?" 
Job11:11 Xoossi go7ontta asata erees; izi qoho beyishe co7u giidi xeellenna. 
Job11:12 Eeya asi eranchcha gidanaappe harey as gididi yelettanayssi kawuyana; 
Job11:13 Gidikkoka neni ne wozina suurisikko, ne kusheza miccada pude Xoossako woossiko," 
Job11:14 Neni nagarappe haakkiko, iita miishshika neson beettontta mala ne ooththiko," 
Job11:15 he wode dhoqqu gaada yeellay baynda ubbaa miish ne beyana; yeellay baynda minna eqqanawu dandayaasa. 
Job11:16 Ne metoza ubbaa ne dogana; ne akeekizaykka aadhdhi bichchida haro haaththa mala gidana. 
Job11:17 Ne shemppoya seeta gallassa awappe aadhdhada poo7ana; dhumaykka wontta poo7o mala gidana. 
Job11:18 Nees hidotay diza gishshas nenikka ammanettada daana; Xoossi nena naagiza gishshas neni hirgay baynda woppu gaada daana. 
Job11:19 Ne oonaska babbontta ichchana; daro asatikka ne sinththan bonchcho demmanaas koyana. 
Job11:20 Iitata ayfey qooqana; istti attana ogeti ubbay gorda gidana; istta wurseththayka hayqo.» 
Job12:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides; 
Job12:2 «Tumukka intte keehi eranchchata; intte hayqqishinkka erateththi inttenara issife hayqqana misatees. 
Job12:3 Gido attiin taaska intteyssa mala akeekay dees; tani inttefe ay miishshankka guuxxike; intte haasaydayssa asi ubbay erees. 
Job12:4 «Ta Xoossa xeygiin taas izi zaarida wodey dees; ha7i tani ta laggetas qidhes gidadis; mooroy baynda xillo tani asa ubbaas qidhes attadis. 
Job12:5 Metoy iza bolla gakkontta asa matan metotida asa meto leqqanayssi kawushsha miishsha; gido attiin kundanaas gandigarzaade sugi yeggeeta. 
Job12:6 Ba eeqa xoossata goynnizayti, kaysotinne xoossa kaddida asatikka saron deettes." 
Job12:7 «Gidikkoka medosata oychcha; istti nena tamaarsana; salo kafota oychcha; istti nees yootana. 
Job12:8 Woykko biittays yoota; izakka nena tamaarsana; abba giddo moletikka nees yootana. 
Job12:9 Hayssa ubbaa giddofe Xoossa kushey hayssa ooththidayssa eronttay oonee? 
Job12:10 Shemppora paxa diza medheteththi ubbaynne issi issi asa shemppoy Xoossa maata giddon dees. 
Job12:11 Inxarsi kaththa qaana shaakki erizayssa mala, hayththika haasaya qommota shaakki erees." 
Job12:12 Erateththay cimateththan, akeekaykka layththa adussateththan beetteettes." 
Job12:13 «Xoossas gidikko aadho erateththinne wolqqay dees; zoreynne akeekay iza matappe beetteettes. 
Job12:14 Xoossi laallidayssa oonikka zaari keexxanawu dandayenna; Xoossi qachchidayssa oonikka birshanawu dandayenna. 
Job12:15 Xoossi ira diggiko kosha gidana; ira bukisikko qasse biittay haron meecettana. 
Job12:16 Xoossi minonne xoonizaade; balettizaadeynne baleththizaadey, nam7atikka iza godateththa garsanna." 
Job12:17 Izi zorizayta erateth diggana; dere kaaleththizayta izi eeya ooththana. 
Job12:18 Izi kawota kawoteththa araataappe woththana; qasho asa mala dancco birshisana. 
Job12:19 Qeesetappe istta qeeseteththaa woththi ekkidi istta gooddana; godateththa bolla dizayta istta godateththafe diggana. 
Job12:20 Ammanettida asata co7u ooththana; cimatappeka akeeka diggana. 
Job12:21 Gita asata yeellachchana; wolqqamata wolqqa diggana. 
Job12:22 Dhumason qotettida xuura qonccisana; sakkanna dhuma poo7on laammana. 
Job12:23 Kawotakka gitasana; zaaridikka dhayssana; kawoteththaaka darsana; zaaridikka laallana. 
Job12:24 Kaaleththizaytas akeekay paccana malanne ogey baynda bazzo biittan toylattana mala izi ooththana. 
Job12:25 Poo7oy baynda dhumason istti dhuphettana malanne maththottida asa mala istti gadigadana mala ooththana. 
Job13:1 «Hekko hayssa ubbaa ta ayfey be7ides; ta hayththika siyidi akeekides. 
Job13:2 Intte erizayssa keena tanikka erays; ta aykkonka inttefe guuxxike. 
Job13:3 Gidikkoka ta haasayay ubbaa dandayza Xoossara; ta izarakka marshettana. 
Job13:4 Intte gidikko wordon kumideta; oonakka paththanawu dandayontta aakimeta mala. 
Job13:5 Hayssa ubbaafe intte co7u gidaakko eranchchata misati beettanakkoshin! 
Job13:6 Tani shiishshiza marshe qaala siyite; ta qohokka tani yootishin co7u giidi ezgite. 
Job13:7 Xoossa sunththan ays wordo haasayeetii? baleththon intte Xoossa ufayssana inttes misatizee? 
Job13:8 Iza bessontta ogera maaddeetii? Izas xabaqa eqqandetii? 
Job13:9 Xoossi inttena qoridaakko issi lo7o miish inttefe demmandeshaa? Intte asata eeysizayssa mala Xoossaka eeyssanawu dandayana inttes misatizee? 
Job13:10 Intte geemara wordo maaddiko tumappe Xoossi inttena hanqana. 
Job13:11 Iza bonchchoy inttena yashshennee? Iza teemaykka inttena daganththennee? 
Job13:12 Intte leemison haasayza haasayati bidinththa mala go7ay bayndayta; intte marsheteththayka mana miishsha mala meqerettana. 
Job13:13 Ane co7u giite! Tani haasayana mala taas gisha immite; hessafe guye ba dosoyssa hano. 
Job13:14 «Tani ach saxxada gencecashe dizay aazassee? Ta shemppoyakka ta kushen dawus. 
Job13:15 Hessa gishshas Xoossi tana wodhana koykkoka taappe attiza miishshi aykkoyka deenna; gidikkoka ta hanoza izas erisana. 
Job13:16 Nagaranchcha asi Xoossa sinththi shiiqanaas dandayontta gishshas oonee erizay hayssi ta xalateththi paxanaas gaaso gidanaas dandayees. 
Job13:17 Ane ta haasayza qaalata wogara ezgite; ta doonara ta markkattizayssa siyite. 
Job13:18 Ta marsheteththaa lo7eththa giigsada shiishshadis, izi taas pirdanayssaka ta erays." 
Job13:19 Tana mootizay diikko tani marshettontta co7u gaada hayqqana. 
Job13:20 «Godawu! Ta ne sinththafe qotettontta mala heyta nam7u miishshata taas ooththa. 
Job13:21 Heytikka ne hanqo qeseta ta bollafe denththa; yashissiza ne taman tana daganththofa. 
Job13:22 Xoossawu! Koyro ne haasaya; ta nees zaaro immana; tanikka haasayana; nekka zaaro imma. 
Job13:23 Ero gido ta ooththida nagaraynne qohoy ay likkee? Ane ta moorozanne ta nagara tana erisa. 
Job13:24 Ne sinththa taappe genththada tana ne morkke mala aazas qooday? 
Job13:25 Carkoy qoqofiza boncco malanne mela happa mala ne ays tana yashiseththan goodday? 
Job13:26 Ta bolla ne xaafida mootoy keehi camo; tani yelagateththan ooththida qohozakka taas aggabeekka. 
Job13:27 Ne ta tohota durumata giddon qachchadasa; ta tanggo ubba wode ne kaalettaasa; ta geedon ne eqqaasa. 
Job13:28 «Hessa gishshas tani wooqqida miishsha mala gidada attana; baday mida may7o malakka ta dhayana. 
Job14:1 «Asho may7ida asas layththay qaanththa; hessika meton kumides. 
Job14:2 Ciishsha mala beettidi heerakka qokkees; eesho mala daro gam7ontta heera aadhdhees. 
Job14:3 Histtiin neni hayssa mala asa medheteththa kaalettay? Ne sinththika pirdas shiishshanee? 
Job14:4 Tuna miishshafe geeshsha miish demmanaas dandayzaadey oonikka deenna. 
Job14:5 Asa layththas wodhida zaway dees; asi daana aginatikka ne matan qoodan deettes; nenikka woththida layththa zawappe aadhdhizaadey deenna. 
Job14:6 Uneti aqizaadey ba ooththana gallassa oosoyo polidi ufayettiza mala, asikka ba daabura gallassan ufayettana mala ne ayfe iza bollafe denththa." 
Job14:7 Qanxxettida miththa uththaska hidotay dees; nam7anththo simmi aacanaassinne haggata kessanaas dandayees. 
Job14:8 Aykkoka xaphoti biitta giddon cimmikokka, anoykka biitta giddon musikko," 
Job14:9 Irxxa demmiko nam7anththo aacees; oorath tokettida miththa mala haggata kessees. 
Job14:10 Asi gidikko hayqqidi kase baynda mala hanees; hayqqidaappe guye awan beettanee? 
Job14:11 Abba haaththi wuriza mala, shaafa haaththika meliza mala," 
Job14:12 asikka hessa mala hayqqidaappe guye haa simmenna; saloy aadhdhanaashe gakkanaas dendenna; dhiskofekka beeggenna. 
Job14:13 «Hayqqidayta giddon ne tana qottidaakko aazee dizay! Ne hanqozi aadhdhana wodey gakkanaas ne tana qottidaakko! Qaxaro gallas qachchada ne tana qoppidaakko! 
Job14:14 Asi hayqqidaappe guye ashora paxa daanaas dandayzee? Taas wodey laamettana gakkanaas, ta hayssa baaxe layththaa gencca aaththana." 
Job14:15 He wode neni tana xeygana; tanikka nees ‹Yee› gaana; ne medheta gidida tana beyanaas ne laamotana. 
Job14:16 Hekko ha7i ne ta hemeta kaalettaasa; gidikkoka ta nagara qoppaka. 
Job14:17 Ta qohoy karaxiiten xunttettana; ta nagarakka ne kammana. 
Job14:18 «Zumay harottiza malanne woddiza mala, zaallayka ba dizasoppe dhoqallettiza mala," 
Job14:19 haaththi shuch woocidi ongiza mala, di7oy biitta meecciza mala nenikka asa hidota dhayssaasa." 
Job14:20 Ne wolqqay mernaas izaade bolla minnees; izikka kase baynda mala hanees; ne iza medhaka laammada ne sinththafe dhayssaasa. 
Job14:21 Iza nayti bonchcho demmidaakkoka izi erenna; kawuyizaakokka izi xeellenna. 
Job14:22 Izas iza asateththa waayezi siyettees; izikka ba metoza gishshas xalla yeekkees.» 
Job15:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgides; 
Job15:2 «Tumu era asi carko mala kushen oykettontta miish haasayi erizee? Iza ulon qohiza qofay daanaas bessizee? 
Job15:3 Era asi aykko go7ontta qaalataninne go7ay baynda haasayan marshettizee? 
Job15:4 Neni Xoossas yayyizayssa aggadasa; Xoossas bessiza goynnozakka diggaasa. 
Job15:5 Ne qohanchcha gididayssi ne haasayan erettees; gido attiin cinccateththa haasayan kammanaas baaxetaasa. 
Job15:6 Ne bolla pirdizay ne doonappe attiin tana gidikke; ne haasayay nenateththaa qonccisees. 
Job15:7 «Asappe sinththan yelettiday nenee? Zumati medhettanaappe sinththan ne yelettadii? 
Job15:8 Tumu Xoossa xuura siyadii? Asa erateth erizay nena xalla nees misatizee? 
Job15:9 Nuni erizayssafe dumma miish ne erizayssi aazee? Nu erizayssafe nees qonccida dumma miishshi aazee? 
Job15:10 Yeletan ne aawappe cimmiza hu7ey pulumida cimati qofan nunara deettes. 
Job15:11 Nu baggara nees yootettiza Xoossafe imettida minththeththoy nees gidennee? 
Job15:12 Nena ne wozinay ays haraso efizee? Ays hanqon dereqa xeellay? 
Job15:13 Hayssaththo ooson Xoossa bolla ne ayana denththeththadasa. Hayssa mala hanqo qaala haasayanawu gakkadasa. 
Job15:14 «Asi geesh gidanaas dandayzee? Asho may7iday xillanaas dandayzee? 
Job15:15 Xoossay ba kiitanchchata bolla ammanettenna; saloykka iza sinththan geesh gidenna. 
Job15:16 Moorettidaynne tuniday nagarakka haaththa mala uyiza asi ay mala iitaa? 
Job15:17 «Istta aawati qottontta isttas ooththidayssa, eranchchati qonccisidayssa, tanikka pilggidayssa ta nena erisays; ta nees yootays." 
Job15:18  
Job15:19 Biittaya isttas xalla imettadus; imaththatikka istta giddon walakettibeettenna. 
Job15:20 As waayisishe de7iza iita asi ba layththa kumeththan waayettishe daana. 
Job15:21 Daganththiza giiris izi ba hayththan siyana; ubbaa miishshi saro misatidi izas beettiza wode iza dhayssiza miishshi iza bolla yaana. 
Job15:22 Izas qaaday mashshan hayqo gidida gishshas, dhumappe attana hidotay izas deenna." 
Job15:23 Kafos wora attida kaththa mala izi wora attana; izi dhayana dhuma gallassay izaakko matidayssa izi erees. 
Job15:24 Metoynne ceecey iza yashshana; olas giigettida kawo mala iza bolla minnana. 
Job15:25 Hayssi hananay Xoossa bolla ba kushe denththida gishshassa; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa bolla xalida gishshassa. 
Job15:26 Izi ba ordenne mino gondalle ekkidi Xoossara eqettana kezides. 
Job15:27 «Iza ayfey moodhen goozettides; iza xeessayka ordides. 
Job15:28 Hayssi ha addezi mulera kundidi dhayda katamatan, laalettanaas matida kayssa keeththata giddon dees." 
Job15:29 Duretenna; iza haaroykka daro wode gam7enna; biitta bollaka aakkenna. 
Job15:30 Dhumappe atti baanawu dandayenna; tama lacoy haggata melissidayssa malanne ciishshatikka carkon qokkida miththa mala gidana. 
Job15:31 Hada miishshan ammanettishe bana barkka baleththofo; hessankka izi go7ay bayndayssa gidi attana. 
Job15:32 Izi wodey gakkontta dishin uththay meliza malanne haggatikka cililontta miththa mala hanana. 
Job15:33 Izi buron kaxxontta dishe ayfezi qoqofettiza woyne miththa malanne ciishshay qoqofettiza wogara miththa mala gidana. 
Job15:34 Xoossa Xoossateththa erontta asatas zereththi de7enna; gubbon oosettida keeththatikka taman dippi gi xuugettana. 
Job15:35 Hayssa mala asati gene miish qoppeettes; metokka medhdheettes; istta wozinaykka baleththon kumides.» 
Job16:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides; 
Job16:2 «Tani hayssa mala haasaya daro wode siyadis; intte saleththiza zoranchchata. 
Job16:3 Hayssa intte hada haasayas wurseththi bayee? Hayssa lagge tanara marshettana mala inttena denththeththiday aazee? 
Job16:4 Intte ta sozan gidiin tani intte sohon gididaakko kadhen tani hu7e qaaththada ha7i intte gizayssa ubbaa intte bolla lo7eththa haasayanakkoshin. 
Job16:5 Hessa malakka ta doonan inttena minththeththananne minththanaas daro haasayanakkoshin. 
Job16:6 «Gido attiin daro haasaykkoka ta hargey haa lo7enna; co7u ga dandaykkoka ta waayey taappe kichchenna. 
Job16:7 Xoossawu! Tana asateththafe kare kessadasa, ta dere asaa ubbaa dhayssadasa." 
Job16:8 Ta asateththay gundoyssi ta bolla dendidi neni nagaranchcha giidi ta bolla markkattees. 
Job16:9 Xoossi tana hanqidi ta asateththa qanxxereththides; tana ixxidi ba ach ta bolla garccides; ta morkkey ba ayfe ta bolla maxi kessides. 
Job16:10 Asay ta yuushon shiiqettidi ta bolla ceeqettides; tana qidhe qaalan baqqida. 
Job16:11 Xoossi tana iita asatas aaththi immides; makkallanchchata kushen yeggides. 
Job16:12 Ta saron daysikoshin gidikkoka Xoossi ba hanqozan tana menththereththides; ta qoodhe cuulli oykkidi daaburissides; ba qofa ta bolla polides. 
Job16:13 Wondafanchchati tana giddoththida; qadheteththi baynda ta kilahota qanxxereththida; ta ciyezakka biitta bolla gussida. 
Job16:14 Izi tana zaari zaari madunxides; mino olanchcha mala ziizimi yiidi tana shocides. 
Job16:15 «Ta kayoteththas maaqa sikka may7adis; gudulla bolla gufannadis. 
Job16:16 Ta ayfesoy yekon zo7ides; sakkanna dhumay ta siphinth kammides. 
Job16:17 Hayssi ubbay hanshin ta ooththida qohoy deenna; tani ta woosa Xoossako shiishshizay wozina geeshshateththanna. 
Job16:18 «Biittazoo! Tana gakkida qohoza ne kammofa! Suure pirda gishshas ta shiishshiza maganay kametti attana mala ne ooththofa! 
Job16:19 Hekko taas markkattizaadeynne afakaato eqqizaadey salon dees. 
Job16:20 Ta laggeti tana leqon xeelleettes; tani gidikko pude Xoossas yeekkays. 
Job16:21 As asara gaththi haasayssidi maqayinththizaadey dizayssa mala; as Xoossara gaththi maqayinththiza asi didaakko aazee dizay? 
Job16:22 «Ta layththas wurseththay gakkees; ta haa simma yonttaso baanaas guuththa wodey xalla attides. 
Job17:1 «Ta ayanay daaburdes; ta daana layththayka polettanawu matides; duufoykka tana naagees. 
Job17:2 Tana qidhizayti tana yuuyi aadhdhida; ta ayfeykka istti ixxizayssa xeellees. 
Job17:3 Ta Xoossawu! Neeppe attiin taas eqqanay haray deenna; neni ne hu7era taas waase gida. 
Job17:4 Istti pilggidi akeekanawu dandayontta mala istta qofa gordadasa; hessa gishshas istti xoonana mala ooththofa. 
Job17:5 Miishshe demmanawu giidi ba laggeza aaththi immiza asa nayta bolla gomey gakkana. 
Job17:6 «Xoossi tana asas kaassa miish ooththides; asay izaade bolla cuttiza asa mala gidadis. 
Job17:7 Afunththafe dendidayssan ta ayfeti doljumida; kumeththa ta asateththayka eesho mala gidides. 
Job17:8 Xillo asati hayssan dagamettida; geeshshati Xoossa ammanontta asata bolla hanqettida. 
Job17:9 Gido attiin xilloti tuma ogeppe kare ke7ettenna; geeshshati minoteththa bolla minoteththi gujettees. 
Job17:10 «Intte ubbayka nam7anththo yiidi ta sinththan marshettiko; intte giddofe issi akeekara diza as demmike. 
Job17:11 Ta layththay wurides; ta qofaynne taas wozina amoy hada gidi attides. 
Job17:12 Hayti ha asati omarsa gallas geettes; poo7oza qasse dhumana hanees geettes. 
Job17:13 Hayssafe guye taas diza qaaday duge hayqqida asati dizaso duufon wodheththa; yaan dhumason tani ta hiixa ongana. 
Job17:14 Duufo, ‹Ta aawawu!› gaada ta xeygana; tana miza guxuneta tani, ‹Ta aayee, ta michcheyee!› gaada xeygana." 
Job17:15 Histtiin taas ay hidotay dizee? taas hidota gidiza miish oonee taas xeellanay? 
Job17:16 Tani duge si7oole wodhishin hidotay tanara issife wodhanee? Issifekka duge duufon nu gelanee?» 
Job18:1 Shuha dere as Belidaadi hizgi zaarides; 
Job18:2 Iyoobee! Ne ays hayssa mala haasaya darsay? Ane ezga; nunikka haasayoos. 
Job18:3 Neni nuna ays meheta mala qooday; neni ays nuna tulleta mala akeekontta as ooththa xeellay? 
Job18:4 Neni hanqettiko nena qohaasa attiin ne hanqozan biittay mela attenna. Zaallatikka ba dizasoppe qaaxxettenna. 
Job18:5 Nagaranchcha xomppey to7ana; tama lacoykka nam7anththo beettenna; 
Job18:6 Iza dunkaane giddon diza poo7oy to7ana; poo7ozikka dhumana. 
Job18:7 Izas mino tanggoy qaammi qaammi baana; gene qoppizaade qofay iza zaari kundisana. 
Job18:8 Izi barkka biidi woximaden gelana; iza tohoykka giten qaxettana. 
Job18:9 Woximadey iza qirphe oykkana; heenkka waaxi ashshana. 
Job18:10 Sa7a bolla yarde wodoroy micettides; iza ogenkka woximadey giigettides. 
Job18:11 «Yashshi iza giddoththides; guyera kaalli kaalli goodereththees. 
Job18:12 Iza wolqqay koshan wurides; boshaykka iza dhayssanaas giigettides. 
Job18:13 Hargey iza asateththa gilqisana; hayqoykka mulera ekki baana. 
Job18:14 Hirgay baynda ammanetti diza keeththafe izi goodettana; as ubbaa haariza hayqoy iza ekkana. 
Job18:15 Iza keeththan ay miishshika attenna; izi aqizasozankka diine tamay laalettana. 
Job18:16 Xaphoppe meliza miththa malanne haggatikka meqerettiza miththa mala gidana. 
Job18:17 Biitta bolla iza qoppiza asi deenna; iza goobateththika biittafe dhayana. 
Job18:18 Izi Poo7osoppe gede dhuman goodettana; biitta bollafe izi kichchana. 
Job18:19 Iza dabbota giddofe iza laattana yeletay beettenna; iza baachchanka zarey izas attenna. 
Job18:20 Ushachcha baggaranne hadirsa baggara diza asay; iza bolla gakkida metoza gishshas keehi babbidi kokkorana. 
Job18:21 Ay wodekka iita asata wurseththay hessa mala; Xoossas yayyontta asa qaaday hayssa.» 
Job19:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides; 
Job19:2 «Intte tana awude gakkanaas waayisandetii? Awude gakkanaas yo7on taas meqeth menththandetii? 
Job19:3 Hekko intte tana tammuto cayeeta; tana kawushshishekka yeellatekketa. 
Job19:4 Tumukka tani balettidaa gidikko ta balay tana xalla qohana. 
Job19:5 Tumu intte inttena dhoqqisidi ta kawushshateththaa inttes marshe miish ooththeeta. 
Job19:6 Gidikkoka hayssa ubbaa metoza ta bolla gaththidaynne, gite giddo tana yeggiday Xoossa gididayssa intte erana mala ta koyays." 
Job19:7 Ta qohettadis gaada woossiin tana siyiza as demmabeekke; ta qaala dhoqqu ooththada magannikokka suure pirda demmabeekke. 
Job19:8 Xoossi taas ogeza gordida gishshas aadhdhanaasoy deenna; ta baanaasozakka dhuman gordides. 
Job19:9 Ta bonchchoza ta hu7eppe qaaridi tana kawushshides. 
Job19:10 Ta asateththa Ubbasora qoxereththidi mulera laallides; taas diza hidota xaphoppe shodettidi kundiza miththa mala ooththides. 
Job19:11 Xoossi tana hanqettidi gita meto ta bolla gaththides; baas morkke mala tana qoodides. 
Job19:12 Tana dhayssanaas ba oosanchchata kiittides; taas dunkaaneza yuuyi aadhdhidi tana giddoththida. 
Job19:13 «Xoossi ta ishati taappe haakkana mala ooththides; tana eriza asati ubbay tana asa dere as kessida. 
Job19:14 Ta dabboti taappe haakkida; ta laggetikka tana balida. 
Job19:15 Tani tason imaththateth mokka ekkidayti ubbay tana balida; ta garadeti tana imaththa mala qoodida; allaga malakka xeellida. 
Job19:16 Tani ta oosanchchaza xeygishin izi taas koyenna; «tana maaddarkkii» ga ta waassishinkka ero geenna. 
Job19:17 Ta machcha taappe ke7iza peenoza shaatettadus; ta ishatikka hararettida. 
Job19:18 Qeeri naytikka tana kadheettes; tana be7iza wode ta bolla qilcceettes. 
Job19:19 Taas mata laggetikka tana shaatettida; ta siiqoti ta bolla morkke gidi dendida. 
Job19:20 Taas ashozi wuriin galbazi meqeththara oykettides; tana shiishshiin attadis. 
Job19:21 «Ta siiqotoo! Xoossa kushey tana shocida gishshas ane zay taas mishettite! Taas qadhettite! 
Job19:22 Xoossi tana gooddoyssa mala intteka tana aazas gooddeetii? Hayssa gakkanaas intte tana waayisidayssi gidennee? 
Job19:23 Hayssa gakkanaas ta haasayda qaala akeekizaynne maxaafan xaafiza asi dizaakko tana ay mala ufayssaneeshin! 
Job19:24 Iskirtoninne irsaasen xaafettidi woykko shuchcha bolla woocetti uttidi mernaas daana mala ooththidaakko ay mala tana ufayssandeeshin! 
Job19:25 Gido attiin tana ashshizayssi paxa de7iza mala wurseththa woden tana wozzanaas biitta bolla izi eqqanayssa tani erays. 
Job19:26 Taas galbazi meetetti wurikkoka tani ta asateththafe shaakettada tani Xoossaa beyanayssa erays. 
Job19:27 Hara as gidontta izakka tani ta hu7en ta ayfera beyana; ta wozinayakka he gallassayo keehi laamotees. 
Job19:28 «Ta siiqotoo! Tana walassidi waayisanaas ‹Hayssa metoza izi barkka baas ehides› gidi haasayeeta. 
Job19:29 Xoossa hanqoy mashshan qaxxayeteththan gaththiza gishshas mashshay inttena montta mala naagettite. Xoossa pirday dizayssaka erite.» 
Job20:1 Na7imaane dere as Zoofaarey hizgi zaarides; 
Job20:2 «Iyoobee! Tana yiillo qofay ne bolla zaaro immana mala sugides; hessa gishshassa ta haasayanawu eesotiday. 
Job20:3 Tani tana kawushshiza seera siyays; ta akeekiza akeekazi tana nees zaaro imma imma gees. 
Job20:4 «Asi biitta bolla beettoosofe doommidi kaseppe hayssa mala gidoyssa ne eray? 
Job20:5 Iita asa ceeqeteththi guuththa wodessa; Xoossa kaddiza asatas diza ufayssay qiphida ayfey xeellana gakkanaassa. 
Job20:6 Iita asi aykkoka otorettidi salo gakkikokka, iza hu7ey shaara gakki bochchiinkka," 
Job20:7 izi ba sheeshsha uteththa mala mulera pitettana; kase iza beyishe diza asatikka, ‹Izi awan dizee gaanee?›" 
Job20:8 Agumo mala tim7i gi dhayza gishshas beettenna; omarsa elunththa mala izi dhayana. 
Job20:9 Izi dizasoppe eeshora dhayza gishshas, issito iza be7ida as nam7anththo zaari beyenna." 
Job20:10 Iza nayti aadashidi istta aaway manqotappe genera bonqqida miishsha zaarana. 
Job20:11 Wolqqan kumida yelagateththa asateththay guuththa wodeppe guye biitta gidana. 
Job20:12 «Iitateththi iza doonan kaththa mala ay mal7ikkoka ba inxarsan izi laacci xeellikokka," 
Job20:13 wurontta mala doonan coommishe gam7ikokka," 
Job20:14 Iza ulo giddon camon laamettana; izas shooshsha marze mala gidana. 
Job20:15 Iita asi ba mida miishsha un7etti zaarana; ulo giddon dizayssaka Xoossi iza cooshshana. 
Job20:16 Iita asi mizayssi wuri izas shooshsha marze mala gidana; shooshsha marze mala gididi iza wodhana. 
Job20:17 Wogara zaytey di7o mala goggishin eessinne maaththi shaafa haaththa mala goggishin izi be7ontta hayqqana. 
Job20:18 Izi ba daaburda daabura ayfe zaareththi gede immana attiin ba hu7es meenna. Zal7idi izi shiishshida de7ozankka ufayettenna. 
Job20:19 Hayssika hanzayssi izi manqota un7eththida gishshassinne ba ooththontta keeththa genen ekkida gishshassa. 
Job20:20 «Iza hirgeteththazi izas shemppo dhayssides; izi shiishshida haaroykka iza ashshanawu dandayenna. 
Job20:21 Iza haaroy wuri qucetti wuriza gishshas izas doonan gelththanaazikka attenna. 
Job20:22 Aykokka izi dure as gidiinkka; iza yiilloy gakkana; daro metoykka izara gayttana. 
Job20:23 Izi ta maada kallana gishin Xoossi wolqqama hanqo iza bolla yeggana; ba hanqozakka iza bolla gussana. 
Job20:24 Izi birata mashshafe attiko xarqimala wondafen cadettana. 
Job20:25 Wondafezikka zokkaara kanththi ke7ana; xoxolqu giza xeerazi izas tireza duusereththidi aadhdhana; wolqqama hirgan iza wozinay dagammana. 
Job20:26 Izi shiishshida haarozi ubbay girdi gida dhuma giddon dhayana; asi oyththontta tamay xuuggana; izason attiza miish ubbaa dippi histtana. 
Job20:27 Izi ooththida nagara saloy qonccisana; sa7ayakka izas morkke gidada dendana. 
Job20:28 Xoossas hanqo gallas iza soon diza haaroy wuri di7on qucetti dhayana. 
Job20:29 Xoossi makkallanchchatas woththida qaaday, iita asati ekkana waagay hayssa.»" 
Job21:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides; 
Job21:2 «Ane ta haasaya wozinappe ezgite; hayssi intte tana minththeththida mala inttes qoodettana. 
Job21:3 Issito haasayana mala taas gishi immite; hessafe guye intte koyida mala tana qidhanawu dandayeeta. 
Job21:4 «Tani asho may7ida asa bolla mishettazinaa? Histtiin taas dandayontta aggiko izan aazi malalisizee? 
Job21:5 Ane taakko ha xeellite; haasayay inttena xoonanaashe gakkanaas ta hanozi inttena shaaphees. 
Job21:6 Tani qoppishin tanakka daganththees; ta asateththaaka yashshan kokkorisees. 
Job21:7 «Ays iita asata layththay aduqqidi istta haaroykka daridi biitta bolla dizee? 
Job21:8 Ays istta naytinne nayta nayti diccidi lo7i dishin beyizoo? 
Job21:9 Istti aykko hirgay baynda saron deettes; Xoossafe boshay istta bolla gakki erenna. 
Job21:10 Istta mehetikka issi metoy baynda yeletteettes; isttas miizatikka awucayontta yeleettes. 
Job21:11 Bantta nayta dorsa wude mala heemmeettes; istta naytikka guppi guppi kaa7eettes. 
Job21:12 Karabe baqqishe, diiththi diixxishe, dinke punnishe ufayssan yexxeettes." 
Job21:13 Bantta layththa wogeteththaninne ufayssan aaththeettes; waayettontta ha biittafe hayqon shaaketteettes. 
Job21:14 «Hessi hessaththo gidi dishin istti Xoossa, ‹Nuuppe haakka; ne oge eranaas nu koyokkon› geettes." 
Job21:15 ‹Nu izas goynnana mala Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay izi oonee? Nu iza woossiin izi nuna ay maaddanee?› geettes. 
Job21:16 Istti hessa gizay istta kushen diza haaroy wuri istta wolqqan isttas shiiqida misatiza gishshassa. Tani gidikko iita asata qofa ekkike. 
Job21:17 «Histtiin iita asatas xomppey to7i erizee? Boshay istta bolla gakki erizee? Xoossika istta bolla hanqetti erizee? 
Job21:18 Istti happa mala carkon bidasoy gudulla mala gote carkon istti pitetti dhayda wodey dizee? 
Job21:19 Intte, ‹Aawati qohida qohon Xoossi nayta hanqettees› geeta; ane Xoossi nagaranchchata qaxxayo; hessaththo hankko bantta qoho istti akeekanawu dandayeettes." 
Job21:20 Nagaranchchati bantti ooththida qohon bantta qixaate ekketto; ubbaa dandayza Xoossi ba hanqoza istta bolla eho. 
Job21:21 Asi hayqqidaappe guye ba naytas qoppi erizee? 
Job21:22 «Xoossi gita asata bollaka pirdana; histtiin asi iza pirda tamaarsana dandayzee? 
Job21:23 Issi issi asati bantta layththa wurseththi gakkanaas aykko metoy istta bolla gakkontta minotanne hargey bayndayta gididi 
Job21:24 istta bollay ordidi kayshida mala, istta meqeththaykka shicida mala hayqqeettes." 
Job21:25 Harati gidikko yiillonne camon kumida mala meton oykettida mala aykko lo7o miish be7ontta hayqqeettes. 
Job21:26 Ubbayka duge duufon gelidi biitta gideettes; guxuneykka istta laattana. 
Job21:27 «Be7ite! Intte tana qohanaas qoppidi intte qachchida geneza ta erays. 
Job21:28 Intte, ‹Hayssa gita addaasoy awanee? Nagaranchchaza duussasoy awanee?› geeta." 
Job21:29 Mandara asata oychchibeekketii? Istti inttes markkattida markkateththaa intte ekkeketii? 
Job21:30 Heyti, ‹Iita asata bolla boshay yiza wode qohoy istta gakkenna; Xoossa hanqoy qoncciza wode istti atti baana› giidi haasayda." 
Job21:31 Iita as iza iitateththaa gishshas walassizay oonee? Iza iita oosoza gishshas iza qaxxayanay oonee? 
Job21:32 Izi hayqqidaappe guye iza aha tookki ekkidi duufon efeettes; iza duufoykka naageettes. 
Job21:33 Shoobban diza biittay izas giiga gidees; asati ubbayka iza kaalleettes; addafe daro asatikka izappe sinththara beettes. 
Job21:34 «Histtiin intte hada gidida yo7ora tana minththeththanaas ays qoppeetii? Intte taas immiza zaaroti ubbay wordo.» 
Job22:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgi zaarides; 
Job22:2 «Asi Xoossa go7anawu dandayzee? Haray attoshin era as gidikkoka go7azi izaadesafe attiin Xoossas gidenna. 
Job22:3 Ne xilloteththi Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaa ay go7anee? Wosoy baynda ne de7ozi iza ay maaddanee? 
Job22:4 Histtiin ne bolla izi pirdidaynne hayssaththo nena hanqiday neni Xoos yayyiza gishshassee? 
Job22:5 Hayssi ubbay nena gakkiday ne iitateththi darida gishshassinne ne nagaray zaway bayndayssa gidida gishshas gidennee? 
Job22:6 Issi gaasoykka baynda ne ishatappe oyso ekkadasa; qasse istta may7o qaara ekkada istta kallo ashshadasa. 
Job22:7 Gafidinne saamettidi daaburdayta kaththinne haath diggadasa. 
Job22:8 Ne gadaadenne wolqqama as gidada izan diza bonchcho as gidikkoka," 
Job22:9 Neni am7e maccassata mela kushe yeddadasa; yi7o naytikka bana ayssana de7oza dhayssadasa. 
Job22:10 Hayssa gaason nena oykkana woximadey nena yuuyi aadhdhides; ne ezgontta metoy nena daganththana. 
Job22:11 Nena Xeeloy metana gakkanaas nees dhumides; di7o haaththika nena meeccides. 
Job22:12 «Xoossay dhoqqa salon dizayssa gidennee? Xoolintteti aykkoka dhoqqasohon diikkoka izi isttafe bollara diidi istta xeellees. 
Job22:13 Neni gidikko, ‹Xoossi ay erizee? Girdi gida dhuman izi waani nu bolla pirdanawu dandayzee?" 
Job22:14 Salo bollan izi simerettishin dhippi gida shaaray iza kammiza gishshas izi beyanawu dandayenna› gaasa. 
Job22:15 «Nagaranchchati simerettiza beni ogeza ne kaallay? 
Job22:16 Isttika wodey gakkontta sinththara boshan shocettida; di7onkka meecettidi xaphora dhayda. 
Job22:17 Isttika Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa, ‹Nuuppe ne haakka; ne nuus ay ooththanaas dandayay?› gida." 
Job22:18 Gidikkoka istta keeththa dureteththan kunththiday Xoossa. Hessa gishshas tani iita asata qofa ekkike. 
Job22:19 «Kiya asati iita asati qaxxayettishin be7idi ufayetteettes; suure asati istta bolla qilcceettes," 
Job22:20 ‹Tunkka nu morkketi dhayda; istta haarozi kumeth taman xuugettides.› 
Job22:21 «Hessa gishshas Iyoobe nenateththaa Xoossas haarisa; izarakka ne saron da; ne hayssa ooththiko lo7o miish demmana. 
Job22:22 Xoossi nees immiza timirtaa ekka; iza qaalakka ne wozinan woththa. 
Job22:23 Nenateththaa ne Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaako ne zaaridaakko, ne kase mala hanana; ne sooppe iita ooso digga." 
Job22:24 Worqqa gudullan ola; ofire worqqa shaafa shuchcha mala wora ola. 
Job22:25 He wode Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay nees worqqanne muuruta bira gidana. 
Job22:26 He wode Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaan neni ufayettana; izan ammanettada ne daana. 
Job22:27 Ne izakko woossiza wode izi ne woosaa siyana; ne adinettidayssa izas gaththana. 
Job22:28 Ne qofay ubbay nees polettana; nees oge ubbay poo7o gidana. 
Job22:29 Xoossi otoranchchata kawushshana; ashketa gidikko izi ashshana. 
Job22:30 Nenikka suure wozinay dizaade gidikko Xoossi iita ubbaafe nena naagana; ne kushetikka qoho oosoppe geesh gidikko Xoossi nena ashshi ekkana.» 
Job23:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides; 
Job23:2 «Ha7ikka ta wozinay camo qofaninne zuuzunththan kumides; gencecan ta woossiinkka iza kushey ta bolla deexxida mala dees. 
Job23:3 Izi dizasota eridaakko ay mala dosazinaashin; gede izi dizaso gakkidaakko ta ay mala ufayettaneeshin; 
Job23:4 ta maganaa ta izas shiishshanakkoshin; ta mishaza maarara ta izs shiishshanakkoshin. 
Job23:5 Taas imettiza zaarozakka ta eranakkoshin; tana izi ay gaanaakko ta eranakkoshin. 
Job23:6 Histtiin Xoossi ba gita wolqqara tana pirdandeshaa? Akkay; ta gizayssa izi ezgana. 
Job23:7 Heenkka suure asi izara marshettana; taas pirdiza Xoossay mernaas tana naxa kessana. 
Job23:8 «Gido attiin ta arshey mokkiza bagga biikko heen izi deenna; arshey wulliza baggaka simmiko iza demmanawu dandaykke. 
Job23:9 Izi gidikko pudehan ba oosaa ooththees; tani gidikko iza beyanawu dandayabeekke; duge bagga simmadakka iza demmanawu dandayabeekke. 
Job23:10 Izi ta tanggo ubbaa erees; tana izi paaccikokka tani worqqa mala geesh gida dishin izi tana demmana. 
Job23:11 Ta tohoti izi dosiza ogetara beettes; baleththon hadirsika ushachchika giikke. 
Job23:12 Tani iza azazotappe ke7ikke; iza qaalaakka ta miza qumappeka aaththada ta wozinan naagadis. 
Job23:13 «Izi barkka bana danday dees; izara eqettanay deenna; izi ba dosidayssa ubbaa ooso dandayees. 
Job23:14 Ta bolla izi qoppidayssa ubbaa polana; hayssa misatiza daro qofati deettes. 
Job23:15 Hessa gishshas iza sinththan eqoy keehi tana keehi yashshees; ta hayssa qoppada yayyadis. 
Job23:16 Xoossi taas wozinay daaburana mala ooththides; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay tana daganththides. 
Job23:17 Girdi gida dhumay ta ayfeta goozikkoka; sakkanna dhumay ta haasayontta mala tana diggibeenna. 
Job24:1 «Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay ays ba pirda immana gallassa baribeennee? Izas ammanettidayti awude gakkanaas iza pirda qaala naagettandettoo? 
Job24:2 Iita asati zawa laalleettes; kaysi ehida dorsata heemmeettes. 
Job24:3 Yi7ota hare bonqqeettes; am7e maccassaya boora oyththadus giidi banttas ekkeettes. 
Job24:4 Manqota shaatettidi coo ogeppe gooddeettes; istta sinththafe baqatidi qotettana mala ooththeettes. 
Job24:5 Manqoti bazzon diza hardida mala, bantta naytas kath koyana ke7idi daabureettes." 
Job24:6 Unetidi haratas kath shiishshizayta gideettes; iita asata haaro gidida woyne tokkizasohozan geedon attida pushulo maxeettes. 
Job24:7 Kumeththa omars kallo ichchi aqeettes; mooce ashshiza may7oy isttas deenna. 
Job24:8 Zuma bolla bukkiza iran istta asateththay musees; aqizasoy dhayiin zaalla gars shiiqi aqeettes. 
Job24:9 Aaway hayqqida nay isttas aylle gidana mala aayey dhanth diggidi bonqqeettes; metotidayssa naaza ba aco gishshas giidi oyso ekkeettes. 
Job24:10 Manqoti aykko may7oy baynda paxa kallo ooson geleettes. Kaththa shiisho wode mirqqeza tookki miiyishe banttas gafan hayqqeettes. 
Job24:11 Iita asata gaden wogara ayfeppe zayte kesseettes; woyne miththa ayfeppe cajje ageettesseshin istti gidikko saametteettes. 
Job24:12 Katamatan hayqqanaas tooqiza asati gootareettes; madunxida asatikka maado oyshon waasseettes. Xoossi gidikko istta bolla oosettida geneza beyibeenna. 
Job24:13 Poo7o ixxiza asati deettes; poo7oy aazakko erontta gishshas poo7o oge kaallettenna. 
Job24:14 Shempo wodhiza uray wonttontta dendidi manqotanne metotanchchata wodhees; omarsika kaysos kezees. 
Job24:15 Layma uray gadey omarsanayssa naagettees; oonikka be7ontta mala ba sinththa goozeettes. 
Job24:16 Kaysoti kaysotanaas omarsara keeth bookki geleettes; gallas gidikko qotetti pe7eettes. Poo7oka ixxeettes. 
Job24:17 Dhumara shiroteththi istta ufayssiza gishshas ubbaasikka girdi gida dhumay isttas wontta maalado mala. 
Job24:18 «Gidikkoka istti haaththa bolla beettiza hoomo mala guuththa wodes xalla istti beettana. Istta biittayka qanggettidayssa gidana; istti woyne miththa tokkizasohoza oonikka beenna. 
Job24:19 Shachchi ho7on maayidi dhayzayssa mala si7ooleykka nagaranchchata baakko bonqqa ekkana. 
Job24:20 Istta aayeti ubbay istta dogana; istta ashozakka guxuney maana; iita asati qofettokona; hessaththoka miththa mala meqerettana. 
Job24:21 Hayssi ubbay istta bolla gakkiday istti yelontta maynida maccassata bonqqida gishshassinne istta azinati hayqqida maccassatas aykko qadheteththika bessontta gishshassa. 
Job24:22 Gido attiin Xoossi ba wolqqan daannateththan diza asata diggana; isttas de7oy giiga misatikkoka istta duussas ammanththiza miishshi deenna. 
Job24:23 Xoossi istta saron daana mala ooththikokka, istti biza oge ubbaa tishshi histti xeellees" 
Job24:24 Iita asati guuththa wodes duretana; gido attiin eesora sharafa mala shulli dhayana; shulla kaththa mala buucettana. 
Job24:25 «Hayssa mala gidenna geetettiko tani wordanchchatanne ta haasayda qaalay likke gidonttayssa oonee ammanththanay?» 
Job25:1 Shuha dere as Belidaadey hizgi zaarides; 
Job25:2 «Maataynne yashshateththi Xoossassa; bollan ba haarizason salon saroteth medhdhana. 
Job25:3 Iza wottadarata tiripateththi qoodettanawu dandayzee? Xoossa poo7oy izas poo7isonttaadey oonee? 
Job25:4 Asi Xoossa sinththan waani xillo gidi beettanawu dandayzee? Asho may7ida medheta gididi waani geesh gidanawu dandayzee? 
Job25:5 Hekko Xoossa sinththan aginaykka muqqa booth gidenna; xoolinttetikka iza sinththan geeshshata gidettenna. 
Job25:6 Musanne guxune gidada hayqqiza asi hessafekka ay mala iita!» 
Job26:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides; 
Job26:2 «Hayssa ne haasayoyssan daaburanchchata maaddida nees misatizee? Qesey argacidaade minththida nees misatizee? 
Job26:3 Aadho erateththi paccidaades ne ay zore immadii! Ay erateththika izaades qonccisadi! 
Job26:4 Histtiin hayssa ne haasayana mala nena maaddiday oonee? Ne haasayana mala nena denththeththiday oona ayanaa!» 
Job26:5 «Wolqqama wogga gita abbaafe garsan diza hayqqidayta shemppoti wolqqama kokkorsan deettes. 
Job26:6 Si7ooleykka Xoossa sinththan qonccen dees; Abadoone geetettizasoza ay miishshika kammanawu dandayenna. 
Job26:7 Xoossi pudeha baggara diza saloza carko bolla miccides; biittaaka aykkoy bayndason kuulloti daana mala ooththides. 
Job26:8 Xoossi shaarati haath xunxi oykkana mala ooththees; haaththafe dendoyssan shaarati daaketettenna. 
Job26:9 Izi uttiza kawoteththa araata genththana; shaararakka kammana. 
Job26:10 Poo7onne dhuma shaakkanaas; wolqqama wogga gita abbaa sinththan saloza zawa ooththidi miccides. 
Job26:11 Izi hanqiza wode salo tuussati dagaman kokkoreettes. 
Job26:12 Izi ba wolqqan abbaa co7u ooththees; iza aadho erateththayka Era7aabe geetettizayssa dhayssana. 
Job26:13 Ba peenozan saloza geeshshana; xongettiza shooshshaa ba kushen caddana. 
Job26:14 Haytanti ubbay Xoossi ooththiza oosotappe guuththata; nu siyizayssi izas saasuketh xalla; wolqqama giirissa izayssa ooni akeekanawu dandayzee?» 
Job27:1 Iyoobikka ba haasaya sinththawu gujjidi hizgides; 
Job27:2 «Suure pirda diggidi ta shemppoyo addafe camo ooththida; Ubbaa Dandayza De7o Xoossa sunththan caaqqays; 
Job27:3 Xoossi tana shemppora woththida wodey gakkanaas," 
Job27:4 ubbaaka iita qaalay ta doonappe ke7enna; ta inxarsankka wordo haasaykke. 
Job27:5 Intte haasaydayssi wuri likke gaada mulekka ekkike; ta hayqqanaashe gakkanaas suureteththan minna eqqanayssa aggike. 
Job27:6 Tani ta xilloteththan minna eqqana attiin xilloteththa aggike; shemppora paxa diza layththa ubbaan ta wozinay ha miishshan sidhenna. 
Job27:7 «Nagaranchchata bolla pirdettiza mala ta morkketa bolla pirdetto; tana ixxizayta bollaka gene asata bolla pirdettiza mala pirdetto. 
Job27:8 Xoossi istta shemppoyo istta ashoppe shaakkidi istta layththa qanxxida wode Xoossa kaddida asatas ay hidotay daandee? 
Job27:9 Metoy istta bolla yiza wode Xoossi istta waasoza siyandee? 
Job27:10 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossan istti ufayettandettoo? Woden wodenkka Xoossa sunththa xeygandettoo? 
Job27:11 «Xoossa wolqqay ay mala gitakko ta inttena tamaarsana; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay qoppi woththoyssa ta inttefe qottike. 
Job27:12 Inttenikka hayssa ubbaa ereeta; histtiin hayssa hada miish ays haasayeetii? 
Job27:13 «Hekko Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay iita asinne genanchchati ekkana laatay hayssafe kaallizayssa. 
Job27:14 Iza nayti tiripikkoka olan wurana; iza zereththatikka kaththi dhayiin koshattana. 
Job27:15 Hessafe attidayti hargen wurana; am7etikka isttas yeekkettenna. 
Job27:16 Iita asi bira biitta mala shiishshanawu, may7oka mana biitta mala dooranawu dandayees." 
Job27:17 Gido attiin iita asi shiishshida may7oza xillo asi may7ana; izi shiishshida biraakka geeshshati gishetti ekkana. 
Job27:18 Izi keexxiza keeththatikka achcharo keeththa malanne kath naagizaadey aqiza gaabba mala laalettana. 
Job27:19 Iita asi wurseththa wode dure gididi ichchees; izi beeggiza wode gidikko iza aqotay ubbay dhaydes. 
Job27:20 Dagamay iza bolla di7o mala qoppontta dishin gakkana; giddoththika gote carkoy iza denththi efana. 
Job27:21 Arshey mokkizaso bagga carkoy izasoppe iza pitti dhayssana. 
Job27:22 Izi baqatidi atti baanaas baaxetikkoka carkozi qadheteththi baynda iza bolla gede minnana. 
Job27:23 Carkozi iza bolla kushe baqqides; izi dizasoppe wayqeththan pixiri yeggides. 
Job28:1 «Tumappe biitta garsan diza ma7idineti bookettidi bira ke7izasoynne worqqay seeri oosettizasoy dees. 
Job28:2 Biratay biittafe beettes; xarqimalay ma7idine shuchchafe seeridi ke7ees. 
Job28:3 Asay dhuma kanththidi, duge biitta giddo bookki gelidi haakki dizasoza duge wodhdhidi girdi gida dhuma giddon ma7idine shuchcha koyeettes." 
Job28:4 Asi dizasoppe haakkidi, asa tohoy yedhdhi eronttaso gakkeettes. Heenkka ciimma olla bookkeettes; wodoro bollara kuulloti kuulloti wodhidi asappe shaaketti barkka ooththeettes." 
Job28:5 Biittay meetettiza kath immees. Izas giddoy taman seeridi shiretti shiretti wodhdhees. 
Job28:6 Semppere geetettiza al7o shuchchay biittan diza shuchchata giddon beettees; he biitta giddonkka worqqay beettees. 
Job28:7 Gede ma7idinezakko efiza oge xilloyka erenna; ankkota ayfeykka beyibeenna. 
Job28:8 Iita do7ati he sohoza yedhdhibeettenna; gaammoyka iza baggara aadhdhibeenna. 
Job28:9 Asi gade goyishe mino shuchchata ba kushen denththees; zumatakka xaphoppe shiri yeggees. 
Job28:10 Zaallaka phalqidi iza giddora aadhdhanaas oge kessees; al7o gidida ma7idine shuchchatakka demmees. 
Job28:11 Shaafata pulttota teqqees; biitta giddon qotan diza miishshata qoncce kessees. 
Job28:12 Histtiin aadho erateththi awappe beettizee? Akeekasikka dizasoy awaa? 
Job28:13 Aadho erateththi shemppora paxa diza medhetati diza biittan beettuku; izis tuma waagakka eriza asi deenna. 
Job28:14 ‹Wogga gita abbayka ta giddon duukku; abbayka tanara duukku› gees. 
Job28:15 Erateththi geeshsha worqqan shamettuku; izi waagaykka biran heregettenna. 
Job28:16 Aadho erateththi ofire geetettiza worqqafe, margidenne semppere geetettiza al7o shuchchatappe aadhdha bonchchettidaaro." 
Job28:17 Worqqaynne geeshsha heregay izira ginattettenna; xintta worqqafe oosettida geexeykka izo laammana. 
Job28:18 Bonchchettida heleloynne almaaze geetettizayti aadho erateththara ginattettenna; aadho erateththa gatey luule geetettizayssafekka bolla. 
Job28:19 Tophaaziyoone geetettiza Tophphiya biitta inqquyka izira ginenna; keehi geeyida worqqafekka aadhdhawus. 
Job28:20 «Histtiko erateththi awappe yazee? Akeekaykka awappe beettazee? 
Job28:21 Shemppora paxa diza medhetatappe geemmidaaro; salora piradhdhiza kafotikka koyidi izo demmettenna. 
Job28:22 Dhayoynne hayqoy, ‹Nu izi gishshas erizay woren xalla› geettes." 
Job28:23 Aadho erateththako efiza ogezanne iza dizasoza erizay Xoossa xalla. 
Job28:24 Izikka sa7a gaxa kumeth demmees; saloppe garsan dizayssa ubbaa beyees. 
Job28:25 Izi carko wolqqa ooththida wode wogga gita abba izi makkida wode," 
Job28:26 irassinne wolqqanththara diza dadas woga woththida wode," 
Job28:27 Xoossi erateth be7ides; paacci xeellidi izo bonchchides; pilggi be7idi minththi woththides. 
Job28:28 He wode asas, ‹Hekko erateth guussi Xoossas yashshateththa; akeeka guussi iitappe haako› gides.»" 
Job29:1 Iyoobikka ba haasaya sinth gujjidi hizgides; 
Job29:2 «Taas ha7i de7ozi kase Xoossi tana naagiza wodeza mala gididaakko tana ay mala ufayssandeeshaa! 
Job29:3 He wode dhuma giddora ta bishin Xoossi taas poo7isishin tani poo7on hemettaysikoshin. 
Job29:4 Xoossa maadoy ta keeththaa kase naateteththa wode naagizayssaththo ha7ikka naagidaakko aazee dizay? 
Job29:5 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay tanara diza gishshas ta nayti ubbay ta yuushon deetteskoshin. 
Job29:6 Tani toho maaththan meecettanaashe gakkanaas daro maath demmayskoshin; wogara miththati mela biittankka tokettidi di7o mala goggiza daro zayte taas immeetteskoshin. 
Job29:7 Katama penge achchan diza dubbusha baada duulatan ta uttiza wode," 
Job29:8 naateththa nayti tana be7idi, bonchchos ta sinththafe issi bagga geettesishin; cimatikka ta bonchcho gishshas ba uttidasohoppe dendi eqqeettesishin." 
Job29:9 Haasayshe diza dere kaaleththizayti tana be7idi bantta kushetan ba doona doona oykkidi co7u geetteskoshin. 
Job29:10 Dere daannatikka tani dizason co7u geettesishin; isttas inxarsi oykettiin haasayaykka istta xooneeskoshin. 
Job29:11 Tana siyida ubbay nashshides; tana be7ida ubbay galatides. 
Job29:12 Hayssika haniday tani manqota woosa siyada istta ashshizayssanne yi7o nayta ta maaddiza gishshassa. 
Job29:13 Hayqqana matida asata ta maaddiza gishshas tana istti anjjida; am7e maccassata ta maaddiza gishshas ufayssan yexxida. 
Job29:14 Xilloteth may7o mala may7adis; suure pirdaka kaabba mala gopha may7adis; qoobe malakka hu7en woththadis. 
Job29:15 Qooqetas ayfe, wobbetaskka toho gidadiskoshin." 
Job29:16 Manqotas aawa, ta erontta asataskka apakatokoshin." 
Job29:17 Gene asa banqila menththadis, izi bonqqi ekkidayssaka iza doonappe yegisadis." 
Job29:18 «Tani, ‹Ta layththay ancco mala dariin tani tason diza mala bonchchon hayqqana› gadiskoshin." 
Job29:19 Xaphoti ubba wode haaththe demmiza malanne haggatikka xaazan cililiza miththa malakkoshin. 
Job29:20 Ubba wode ta bonchchettida mala dayskoshin; ta wolqqayka ubba wode ooraxeskoshin. 
Job29:21 Asay ta zoreza laamotan co7u giidi ezgees. 
Job29:22 Ta haasayay istta aliza gishshas taappe guyera haasayza asi deenna. 
Job29:23 Goshshanchchay badhdhesa ira demmanawu amottizayssa mala isttika ta haasaya siyanawu bantta doona doydi naageetteskoshin. 
Job29:24 Ta miicca bessishin istti ufayettetes; ta sinththay poo7ishin xirphotida istta sinththay birshettees. 
Job29:25 Kase ta istti koyida mala ayssayskoshin; ba ola asa kaaleththiza kawo mala ta istta kaaleththadiskoshin; istti muuzottishin tani istta minththeththayssikoshin. 
Job30:1 «Istta aawati taas dorsa wudeza heemmiza ta kanatara montta mala istti ta kadhiza asatakkoshin; ha7i gidikko layththan taappe naatiza asati ta bolla qilcceettes. 
Job30:2 Isttas wolqqay ixxida gishshassinne istta bollay gilqida gishshas aykkoka tana go7ettenna. 
Job30:3 Metoppenne kosha daroppe dendidayssan bazzo biitta bi biidi miththa xapho maxeththi gancceettes. 
Job30:4 Maxine mala mal7iza bazzon mokkiza dumma dumma miththa hayththata maxeettes; mal7ontta sankkara xapho qorereththi meettes. 
Job30:5 Asi kaysota waassidi gooddizayssa mala isttika deraa giddofe gooddeettes. 
Job30:6 Istti bantta duussaso haaththi baynda shaafa giddon, asi baynda bazzo biittaninne kelka giddon bookettida gongolotan dosay baynda de7ida." 
Job30:7 Woray dizaso yuuyi yuuyi wora do7ata mala waasseettes; wora garsan issi bolla shiiqetti aqeettes. 
Job30:8 Bantta biittafe xurqafen shocetti goodettida gishshas lo7o sunththinne wozinay bayndayta gididi deettes. 
Job30:9 Ha7i qasse istta nayti yeththan tana qidheettes; tani istta giddonkka miiceteththas attadis. 
Job30:10 Tana shaatettidi taappe haakkeettes; aykko yeellayka baynda ta sinththan cutetteettes. 
Job30:11 Xoossay ta wolqqa daabursidi tana kawushshida gishshas istti qasse bixalay baynda para mala ta bolla dhoodhu dhoodheettes. 
Job30:12 Taappe ushachcha baggara yeda diccidayti ta bolla dendida; tana oykkanaas woximade woththida; tana giddoththida. 
Job30:13 Taas aadhdhizaso dhayssidi tana wodhana koyeettes. Istti hayssaththo ooththanayssa digganaadey deenna. 
Job30:14 Di7oy menththi gelizayssa mala isttika tana cuggi gelida; ubbaaka menththereththidi ta bolla yida. 
Job30:15 Gita dagamay tana gakkides; taas diza bonchchoy carko mala aadhdhides; ta attana giza hidotay shaara mala dendi dhaydes. 
Job30:16 «Ta shemppoya keeha ceecadus; hayqoska matadus. 
Job30:17 Omars kumeth ta meqeththati hargen waayetteettes; sakozikka taas shemppo immenna. 
Job30:18 Tana sakkiza wolqqama sakoza gaason ta may7oy gundi moorettides; qoodhe xunththa shamize mala tana cuulli oykkides. 
Job30:19 Xoossi tana duge biittan olida gishshas tani gudullanne bidinth misatadis. 
Job30:20 Xoossoo, ta nena woossadis; gido attiin ne taas zaarabeekka; ta eqqada neekko woossadis; neni gidikko ne sinththa taakko zaarabeekka." 
Job30:21 Ne taas addafe menxe iitadasa; neni ne gita wolqqankka tana gooddadasa. 
Job30:22 Ne tana denththada carko bolla woththadasa; izi tana yuushshana malakka ooththadasa; gote carkoyka tana shirechchi shirechchi yeggees. 
Job30:23 Asa ubbaas qaada gidida hayqos ne tana aaththada immanayssa ta erays. 
Job30:24 «Issi metotida uray maado demmanaas ba kushe miccidi woossishin tumappe ay asikka iza qohenna. 
Job30:25 Tani metotida asatas yeekkabeekkinaa? Manqotaska mishettabeekkinaa? 
Job30:26 Lo7o miish demmana ga ta naagishin iita miishshi tana gakkides; poo7oy yaana ga ta naagettishin taas gallassay dhumides. 
Job30:27 Ta wozinay daro ceecides; ay saroka demmabeekke; meto gallassatikka ta bolla gakkida. 
Job30:28 Ta bollay awa xuussan gidontta muuzoteththan karexxides; duulata asa sinththan eqqada maado taas oychchays. 
Job30:29 Asappe shaakettada worakanatas isha, guttotas lagge gidadis." 
Job30:30 Taas galbazi karexxidi dendides; taas bollazikka mishan xuugettides. 
Job30:31 Tani ta ufays isttan qonccisiza bagananne zayey ha7i ta kayottada kessiza zilassa qaala sissiza miish gidida. 
Job31:1 «Lo7o maccassako xeellada amottontta mala; tani ta ayfetara caaqo geladis. 
Job31:2 Bollan de7iza Xoossay asas ay qaada immandeesha? Salon diza Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossafe asas imettida gishay aazeeshaa? 
Job31:3 Iita asa bolla qohoy, nagaranchcha asa bollaka dhayoy gakkanayssi erettidaaz gidennee?" 
Job31:4 Xoossay ta ooththizayssa ubbaa beyennee? Ta hemetakka shaakki erennee? 
Job31:5 Tani wordo haasaydaa gidikko, asakka baleththidaa gidikko;" 
Job31:6 Xoossi tana suure geeddaran geeddaro. Tani xillo gididayssa shaakki ero. 
Job31:7 Ta suure ogeppe ke7idaa gidikko, Ta ayfey be7ida ubbaa ta wozinay amottidaa gidikko, qasseka ta kushey nagaran tunidaa gidikko," 
Job31:8 tani zeridayssa hara asi mo. Ta caarechchazikka kumeththi shodetti oletto. 
Job31:9 «Ta wozinay hara macca amottidaa gidikko, ta shooroza machcho laymatanaas iza pengen ta zuggidaa gidikko," 
Job31:10 ta machcha hara asas gaaccu; qasseka hara addey izira zin7o. 
Job31:11 Hayssika keehi tuna; Wogankka qaxxayssiza nagara. 
Job31:12 Ha nagaray tama mala xuuggiza gishshas ta hayssa ooththidaakko ta aqota xuuggi dhayssanakkoshin. 
Job31:13 «Maccanne attuma gidida ta aylleti tana mootiin istta mootoza ta kadhada aggidaa gidikko," 
Job31:14 Xoossi tana pirdiza wode tani waananee? Qasse izi tana oychchiza wode tani ay zaaro immanee? 
Job31:15 Ta aayey ulon tana medhdhidayssi ta aylletakka medhdhiday iza gidennee? Nuna ubbatakka aayi ulon medhdhiday iza deennee? 
Job31:16 «Manqoti tana woossiin ta digga erikke; Qasseka am7e maccassata minththeththontta agga erikke. 
Job31:17 Yi7onne yitto nayta aggada ta kath tarkka mabeekke. 
Job31:18 Tani ta yelagateththafe doommada tani istta aawa mala dichchadis, ta de7o layth ubbaan am7e maccassata maaddadis." 
Job31:19 May7oy dhayiin meegoy wodhizaade; woykko metoppe dendidayssan kallo dizaade beyada," 
Job31:20 ta dorsata iskefe oosettida may7o ta mayziin, izaade ho7iin tana zaari galatontta aggida wodey deenna." 
Job31:21 Tani mooton istta laththanayssa erada aaway baynda nayta naaqqidaa gidikko," 
Job31:22 ta kushey hasheppe ke7o. Ta qeseykka kurezappe koldo. 
Job31:23 Tani Xoossa hanqos yayyiza gishshassinne iza teemateththaas yayyiza gishshas Hayssa mala yo7ota ooththanawu ta dandaykke. 
Job31:24 «Tani taas diza aqotan ammanettabeekke. Woykko payya worqqaka taas ammanettiza miish ooththabeekke. 
Job31:25 ‹Taas diza aqoy darides; Tani dureteththafe dendidayssan daro miish demmadis› gaada ufayetta erikke. 
Job31:26 Arshe poo7oza beyada, agina lo7eteththa beyada," 
Job31:27 ta wozinan istta geemara bonchchabeeke; qasseka ta kushe micca yeerada isttas goynnabeekke. 
Job31:28 Tani hayssa mala ooththidaakko salon diza xoossa kaddo gidida gishshas hayti ha oosoti ta bolla pirda ehiza nagarata. 
Job31:29 «Ta morkketa kundeththaan tani ufayettabeekke; iita miishshi istta bolla gakkishinkka miiccabeekke. 
Job31:30 ‹Ta morkketi dhayetto› ga qanggada nagara ooththabeekke. 
Job31:31 Tani ubba wode imaththa mokkizayssa taso aylleti ta gishshas markkatteettes. 
Job31:32 Tani ta keeththa kare ogera aadhdhi biza mandaras doya woththadis. Hessa gishshas gadey qammiin yida imaththi karen ayssa erikke. 
Job31:33 Tani ta mooro genththabeekke; hara asata mala ta nagaraakka qottabeekke. 
Job31:34 Tana asa daroy yashissininne soo asata kadhoy daganththiin tani tason co7u gaada qotettida wodey deenna. 
Job31:35 «Ta gizayssa siyizaadey beettereneshin! Tanikka teqe qaala shiishshanakkoshin! Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay ta gizayssa zaaro izi immo! Tana mootiza mootanchchay tana mootizayssa xaafi shiishshiin ta beyarkinaashin! 
Job31:36 Woyto mala tani ta hashen tookkanakkoshin; kallachcha malakka ta hu7e bolla goxxana. 
Job31:37 Daannateththi diza asa mala Xoossa sinththan yayyontta eqqada ta ooththida ubbaa qonccisa yootanakkoshin. 
Job31:38 «Asa gade wogay baynda bonqqa ekkada tani goyidaa gidikko," 
Job31:39 he gadaa godata ta mishisidaa gidikko, aykkoka isttas immontta dashe mokkida kaththa tani midaa gidikko," 
Job31:40 he ta goyiza goshshason diza gistte gishshas agunththi, bangga gishshas sharafay mokko» gides. Iyoobi ba haasaya hayssan polides." 
Job32:1 Iyoobi, «Tani xillo asa» giza qofa laammontta gishshas heedzdzu asati iza zorizayssa aggida." 
Job32:2 Eraama zereththafe Buuze dere as Barakele naa Eelihuy; Iyoobi bana Xoossafe aaththidi xillisida gishshas Iyoobe bolla keehi hanqettides. 
Job32:3 Qasseka Iyoobe lagge heedzdzati Iyoobe bolla pirdafe attiin iza ammanththiza qaala yooti ammanththontta gishshas istta bollaka hanqettides. 
Job32:4 Eelihuy hankkoytappe yelaga gidida gishshas hankkoyti banttas dizayssa haasayi wursanaashe gakkanaas Iyoobera haasayanawu ba tara naago bolla dees. 
Job32:5 Iyoobe lagge heedzdzati Iyoobes bessiza zaaro immanaas dandayontayssa be7idi keehi hanqettides. 
Job32:6 Buuze dere as Barakele naa Eelihuy, «Tani inttefe yelaga gidida gishshassinne intte cima gidida gishshas pokkoynne yashshi tana oykkiin hanno gakkanaas ta qofa qonccisontta gam7adis." 
Job32:7 ‹Cimati sinththati haasayetto; bantta layththan demmida aadho erateththafe tamaarsetto› ga qoppadis. 
Job32:8 Gido attiin asa giddon aqidi aadho erateth asas immizay Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa ayana. 
Job32:9 As aadho eranchcha kessizay cimateth gidenna; qasseka asi akeekanaas dandayzay izaades layththi aduqqida gishshas gidenna. 
Job32:10 «Hessa gishshas lo7eththi siyite; tanikka ta qofa inttes yootana. 
Job32:11 Intte haasayza wode tani co7u gaada ezgays; intte haasayana qaala qoppishinka tani naagays. 
Job32:12 Tani intte haasayzayssa lo7eththa siyadis; gido attiin inttefe oonikka Iyoobi mooranchcha gididayssa ammanththidaynne qasseka iza haasayas bessiza zaaro immiday deenna. 
Job32:13 Iyoobe haasayas bessiza zaaro immanaas dandayzay Xoossafe attiin as gidontta gishshas intte, ‹Nuni aadho erateth demmidos› giidi coo hada ceeqettofte." 
Job32:14 Iyoobi marshettiday inttenarappe attiin tanara gidenna; tanikka intte haasayzayssa malan izas zaaro immike. 
Job32:15 «Istti dagammidi haasayza qaalay dhayda gishshas aykko haasayanawu dandaybeettenna. 
Job32:16 Hekko! Istti haasayza miishshi dhayiin co7u giidi eqqida; histtiin tanikka co7u ga naaganaas taas bessizee? 
Job32:17 Akkay! Co7u giikke; tanikka ta baggara diza zaaroza immana; ta qofaakka qonccisana. 
Job32:18 Ta haasayanaas bessizaazi daroy diza gishshas; tanan diza ayanay tana wolqqara haasayssees. 
Job32:19 Be7ite! Tani haasayontta aggiko, woyne cajje woththiza ooraththa lukkamoy shempizaso dhaydi dhuuqqanaas puurizayssa mala ta giddoy puuridi dhuuqqana gakkides." 
Job32:20 Ane! Tani hayssafe haasayada shempays; ta doona doyada tani haasayanaas bessees. 
Job32:21 Hayssa ha yo7ozan tani oonakka maaddike; woykko ay asakka aadashikke. 
Job32:22 Tani as aadashoy mulekka hanenna; ta hessa mala ooththiko tana medhdhidayssi tana hanqana. 
Job33:1 «Iyoobee! Ta nees yootizayssa siya; ta nees gizayssaka akeekan ezga; 
Job33:2 ta nees zaaro immanaas giigetta uttadis; ta doonaykka haasayanaas giigetti uttides. 
Job33:3 Ta haasayza qaalati ta wozina suureteththa qoncciseettes; ta inxarsay ta eriza tuma haasayees. 
Job33:4 Tana medhdhiday Xoossa Ayana; taas de7o immiday Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa Ayana. 
Job33:5 Neni dandayzaa gidikko ta goyssas zaaro imma; ne gaanayssa giigsada tanara haasayeeta. 
Job33:6 Hekko! Tani Xoossa sinththan nenara gina; tanikka medhettiday urqqafe. 
Job33:7 Neni taas yayyanaas bessenna; tanikka nena naaqqanawu koshshenna. 
Job33:8 Neni haasayda ubbaa ezgashe ta gam7adis; ne inxarsafe ke7ida qaalata ta siyadis. 
Job33:9 Neni haasayashe, ‹Tani qohoynne borey baynda asa; tani nagara ooththonttaadenne xillo asa." 
Job33:10 Gido attiin Xoossi tana qaxxayanaas gaaso koyees; tanakka baas morkke mala qoodees. 
Job33:11 Ta tohota izi duruman duxxi qachchides. Ta bizaso ubbaan tana xeellees› gadasa. 
Job33:12 «Iyoobee! Hayssi ne haasayay bala gidides; tanikka nees qonccisanaas koyays; Xoossi asa ubbaafe aadhdhees. 
Job33:13 Histtiin, ‹Neni Xoossi asi maganiza magana siyenna› gaada ays Xoossa bolla zuuzumay?" 
Job33:14 Asi akeekennafe attiin Xoossi dumma dumma ogera haasayees. 
Job33:15 Omars asi hiixan ichchi diza wode asi koyro dhisko seeraagida wode; agumoninne ajjuutankka Xoossi haasayees. 
Job33:16 He wode asi iza qaala siyana mala hayththa doyees; izi ba immiza seerankka daganththees. 
Job33:17 Hessa mala ooson asi nagara ooththontta mala diggees; otoreteththaaka isttafe denththees. 
Job33:18 Xoossi asa shemppo dhayoppe ashshees; bashsha hayqoppeka wozzees. 
Job33:19 Woykko asi meqeththan gelida sakon dishin asi ba balappe simmana mala harge hiixan Xoossi zorees. 
Job33:20 Hayssa malan harganchcha kath lanqanaas iza iitees; lo7o kaththika harassees. 
Job33:21 Gilqateththappe dendoyssan izas ashozikka wurides; meqeththi xalla attides. 
Job33:22 Iza shemppoy kezanaassinne moogettanaas matides. 
Job33:23 «Asi suure oge bessanaas shiyan qoodettiza Xoossa kiitanchchatappe, issoy iza maaddanaas yidaakko," 
Job33:24 kiitanchchay izas qadhettidi, ‹Iza wozzizaade ta demmida gishshas izi duge duufon wodhdhontta mala aggaaga!› giidi hayqo oykkidaakko," 
Job33:25 hessa gishshas iza asateththay, qeeri naa asho mala zaari ooraxana; izas yelagateththa wode mala qasseka hanana." 
Job33:26 He wode Xoossako izi woossana. Iza woosaakka Xoossi siyana; Xoossa sinth izi be7idi ufayettana; Xoossika iza woosaas zaaro immana. 
Job33:27 Izi asa sinththan, ‹Tani nagara ooththadis; suure gididayssaka geellasadis. Xoossay gidikko ta moora mala taas ooththibeenna." 
Job33:28 Tani duufon gelontta mala tana ashshides; hekko ha7i paxa daada tani poo7o beyays› gi yexxides. 
Job33:29 «Hekko! Xoossi hayssa ubbaa miishsha asas zaari zaari ooththees. 
Job33:30 De7on diidi poo7o beyana mala iza shemppo hayqoppe ashshees. 
Job33:31 «Iyoobee! Ta nees yootizayssa lo7eththa siya; tani nees yootays ane neni co7u ga. 
Job33:32 Neni haasayanaas koyza miishshi diikko taas yoota, ta neni xillo gididayssa nena bessana koyays." 
Job33:33 Akkay giikko! Tani haasayzayssa co7u gaada siya; tani nena erateth tamaarsana» gides. 
Job34:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides; 
Job34:2 «Intteno aadho eranchchatoo! Ta inttes haasayzayssa siyite; intteno eranchchatoo ta haasaya ezgite. 
Job34:3 Inxarsi kaththa mal7o shaakki erees; hessaththoka hayththi yo7o shaakki erees. 
Job34:4 Tumu gidida yo7o ane shaakki eroos; lo7o gidida miishshika issife tamaaroos. 
Job34:5 «Iyoobi, ‹Tani xillo shin Xoossi tana suure pirda diggides." 
Job34:6 Tani tumanchchashin wordanchcha mala qoodettadis; ta aykkoka moorontta dashe paxontta madunththan waayettays› gides. 
Job34:7 Iyoobe mala Xoossa bolla qilccizaadey beettandeesha? 
Job34:8 Izi iita ooththizaytara laggetees; izas peyshayka iita laggetara. 
Job34:9 ‹Xoossa ufayssana giidi oosoy as aykkoka maaddenna› gees. 
Job34:10 «Akeekiza asatoo ane tana ezgite! Iita oosoy Xoossafe; bala oosoy Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossafe haakko! 
Job34:11 Xoossi asas izaade ooso mala immees; izas izaade hemeththa mala ooththees. 
Job34:12 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay mulekka iita miish ooththenna; ay asaska suure pirda geellasenna. 
Job34:13 Xoossasi biitta hadara immidaadey deenna; iza alame bollaka shuumidaadey deenna. 
Job34:14 Xoossi ba ayanazanne ba shemppoza; baakko zaari ekkana koyidaakko," 
Job34:15 asho may7iday kumeth dhayana; asa zereththika duge biittan simmana. 
Job34:16 Neni akeekizaa gidikko hayssa siya; ta nees haasayzayssa ezga. 
Job34:17 Suure pirda ixxizaadey dere ayssanaas dandayzee? Neni xillonne wolqqama Xoossa nagaranchcha kessay? 
Job34:18 Kawota intte dhalleketa; shuumetakka intte iita gaanay oonee? 
Job34:19 Ubbatikka iza medhetata gidida gishshas izi shuumeta shaakki maaddenna; duretakka manqotappe shaakkenna. 
Job34:20 Istti leela giddoth qoppontta hayqqana; ubbay kokkori dhayana; wolqqamatikka oona kusheykka bochchontta kichchana. 
Job34:21 «Xoossi asa ubbaa tanggoza xeellees; issaa issaa hemeth kaalleettes. 
Job34:22 Iita asati qotettana mala girdi gida dhumay deenna. 
Job34:23 Xoossi asa bolla pirdanaas bare immenna. 
Job34:24 Wolqqama daannata daannateththafe denththanaas, isttasohon hara woththanaas, aykko oyshay shiiqontta izi hessaththo ooththees." 
Job34:25 Izi istta oosaa eriza gishshas issi omars istta daannateththafe dhayssana. 
Job34:26 Istti ooththida makkallateththa gaason ubbaa asa sinththan makkallanchchata qaxxayees. 
Job34:27 Izi istta qaxxayizayssi istti iza kaallizayssa aggida gishshassa; iza azazotakka istti kadhida gishshassa. 
Job34:28 Istti manqota un7eththida; pude Xoossako waassana mala ooththida. Xoossika manqota waasoza siyides. 
Job34:29 Xoossi co7u giikko oonee iza bolla pirdanay? Izi ba zokko zaarikko oonee iza beyanay? 
Job34:30 Hessaththoka Xoossas yayyontta deraa un7eththiza kawoy deraa bolla dendiko iza oonee digganay? 
Job34:31 «Iyoobee! Neni ne nagara Xoossas paaxada zaara nagara ooththike ga qaala geladii? 
Job34:32 Ta ooththida nagaray awayssako tana tamaarsa; ta mooridaa gidikko zaarada izaththo ooththike! gadii? 
Job34:33 Histtiin neni maarettanaappe ixxis gaada neni shiishshiza qofa mala Xoossi ne amoza nees polana mala ne koyay? 
Job34:34 «Tana siyiza asati akeekiza eranchchatikka," 
Job34:35 ‹Iyoobi erateththi baynda haasayees; hu7ey baynda haasayata haasayees› geettes. 
Job34:36 Iita asata zaaro mala zaariza gishshas Iyoobi wurseththi gakkanawu paacettidaakko aazee dizay! 
Job34:37 Nu giddon wogappe kare ke7ides; Xoossa bolla kadhe darssides; ba nagara bollaka makkallateth gujjides» geettes. 
Job35:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides; 
Job35:2 «Iyoobe ne nena, ‹Tani Xoossa sinththan Xillo› gizayssi likkee?" 
Job35:3 ‹Nagara ooththontta aggiko ta ay go7ettanee? qasseka ay demmanee?› gaada neni oychchadasa. 
Job35:4 Tani neessinne nenara dizaytas zaaro immana. 
Job35:5 «Dhoqqu gaada pude salo xeella; neeppe dhoqqu giidi diza shaara akeeka. 
Job35:6 Neni nagara ooththiko Xoossa aazan qohay? Neni iza darsa darsa qohikko iza ay ooththanawu dandayay? 
Job35:7 Neni xillo gidikko izas ay immanee? Izi neeppe aykkoka koyenna. 
Job35:8 Ne nagara ooththiko qohanay ne mala asata xalla. Ne lo7o miish ooththikoka ne go7izay as xalla. 
Job35:9 «Asi haray darssi qohishin waassees; baappe wolqqatizaade kusheppe bana ashshi ekkanaades magannees. 
Job35:10 Gido attiin isttafe oonikka, ‹Tana medhdhida Xoossay awanee? Leela giddoth mazamure immizayssi awanee?" 
Job35:11 Mehetappe nuna aaththi tamaarsida; salo kafotappeka aadho eranchchata ooththiday iza› giday baawa. 
Job35:12 Istti waasseettes; izi gidikko istti otoranchchatanne iitata gidida gishshas isttas zaaro immenna. 
Job35:13 Xoossi tuma wozinappe gidontta waaso siyenna; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay hessa mala ezgenna. 
Job35:14 Iyoobee! Neni ta Xoossa aykkoka be7ikke giikkoka, ne metoy iza sinththan de7iza gishshas, neni dandayan naagana koshshees." 
Job35:15 Qasseka Xoossi nena ba hanqon hanqontta asa iitateththa co7u giidi aadhdhana nees misatizee? 
Job35:16 Iyoobee! Neni coo mela haasaya darsaasa; erateththi baynda coo gaada haasayaasa.» 
Job36:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides; 
Job36:2 «Xoossa gishshas tani haasayana haray diza gishshas guuth dandayada ta gizayssa siya. 
Job36:3 Tani darosoppe demmida erateththan, tana medhdhida Xoossi Xillo gididayssa tani nees erisays." 
Job36:4 Ta qaalay wordo gidonttayssa neni lo7eththa era; nenara haasayana taas kumeththa erateththi dizayssa era. 
Job36:5 «Tumukka Xoossi wolqqama; gido attiin oonakka kadhenna; izi ubbaaka akeekees. 
Job36:6 Izi iita asata paxa woththenna. Metotida asatas gidikko suure pirda pirdees. 
Job36:7 Xoossi xillo asata naagees; kawota mala bonchcho algan utisees; mernaas istta dhoqqu dhoqqu histtees. 
Job36:8 Gido attiin asi sansalatan qashettiko, woykko meto giten oykettiko," 
Job36:9 istti ba otoreteththan ooththida nagara qonccisees. 
Job36:10 Istti seera siyana mala istta hayththaa doyees; istti bantta iita oosaappe simmidi maarettana mala azazees. 
Job36:11 Istti Xoossas azazettidi ooththiko, banttas attida layththa dureteththaninne ufayssan ongana." 
Job36:12 Gido attiin iza siyontta ixxiko istti olan wurana; istti bantta eeyateththan dishe hayqqana. 
Job36:13 «Bantta wozinara Xoossa kaddizayti qaxxayettida mala daana; izi istta qaxxayshinkka istta kaaleththizayti woossettenna. 
Job36:14 Istti ba poliza iita laymateththa boshan dhayana; bantta yelagateththa layththankka mulqqetti hayqqana. 
Job36:15 Xoossi meton un7ettizayta istta metaappe ashshana; istta gakkida metaan isttas timirte immana. 
Job36:16 «Hayssa ha wodezan Xoossi nees qoppizay nena ne diza metaappe kessidi lo7o kaththi kumida maaddan efanaassa. 
Job36:17 Ha7i gidikko ne ooththida mooraappe dendoyssan ne bolla pirdettida gishshas, nees bessiza qixaate eko bolla daasa." 
Job36:18 Oonikka nena dureteththa daron cimontta mala; matta7enkka nena baleththontta mala naagetta. 
Job36:19 Nees diza aqotaynne godateththi daro gidikkoka nena metoppe ashshettenna. 
Job36:20 Deraa dizasoppe dhayssiza dhuma wodey yaana mala amottofa. 
Job36:21 Neni meto giddon paacettizay hessa gaason gidida gishshas simmada nagara ooththontta mala naagetta. 
Job36:22 «Xoossa wolqqay ay mala gitakko akeeka; Xoossi ubbaafe aadho astamaare. 
Job36:23 ‹Hayssa ooththa› giidi Xoossa azaziza asi woykko, ‹Iita ooso ooththadasa› giidi iza walassizay oonee?" 
Job36:24 Izi ooththiza oosaa gishshas asay ubba wode mazamuren galatizayssa mala, nenikka iza oosaas yeththan galata." 
Job36:25 Asa zereththi ubbay Xoossa oosaa be7ides; asay tishshi ooththi haakon be7ides. 
Job36:26 Xoossa gitateththa pilggidi gakkanaas nuni dandayokko; iza layththa qoodaykka nu erappe bolla. 
Job36:27 «Xoossi haaththa abbafe pude salo efees; zaaridikka ira saloppe duge bukisees. 
Job36:28 Ira shaarappe kessidi wolqqama ira asas bukisees. 
Job36:29 Gido attiin Xoossi shaara wostti miccizaakko, wolqqanththa giddon uttidi izi waani haasayzaakko ooni eranawu dandayzee?" 
Job36:30 Xoossi abba ciimmateththa kammidi izi ba yuushon wolqqanththa wostti laallizaakko xeella. 
Job36:31 Hayssa mala ooththidi Xoossi ba deraa ayssees; asay miza daro kaththaaka mokisees. 
Job36:32 Wolqqanththa izi ba kushen oykkees; oykkidi ba dosida bagga baana mala azazees. 
Job36:33 Daday wolqqama iray yaanayssa malatees; mehetikka ira uushoy yizayssa ereettes. 
Job37:1 «Wolqqama uushoppe dendoyssan ta wozinay kokkorides; Yashshateththafe dendoyssan piri baana gakkides. 
Job37:2 Iza doonappe ke7iza qaala siyite; Dada mala guummiza giirissa qaala siyite. 
Job37:3 Saloppe garsan wolqqanththi wolqqamees; biitta gaxa gakkanawu kiittees. 
Job37:4 Hessafe guye wolqqama ba giirissa sissees; yashissiza ba giirissa dada mala guunththees; Wolqqanththa poo7oykka zaari zaari beettees; ba yashissiza giirissan guummees; Izi ba giirissa sissiza wode wolqqanththa diggenna. 
Job37:5 Xoossa giirissa gunththay malalisiza gita guunth guummees; nuni eranawu dandayontta gita miishshata ooththees. 
Job37:6 Biitta bolla shachchi wodhdhana mala ooththees; wolqqama iraykka bukkana mala azazees. 
Job37:7 Izi medhdhida asati iza ooso erana mala; ubbaa asay bantta oosoza ooththontta mala teqqees. 
Job37:8 He wode wora do7ati, baqatidi bantta qoteteththaso geleettes; bantta gongolozan qoteteettes." 
Job37:9 Wolqqama carkoy pudehappe dendees; moociza carkoy pudehappe yees. 
Job37:10 Xoossa peenoy haaththa moocisees; izappe shach medhdhees. 
Job37:11 Shaaray haaththa tookkana mala ooththees; ba giddon wolqqanththi wolqqamana mala ooththees. 
Job37:12 Goda kaaleththon shaarati biitta yuushon yuuyeettes; banttana maaddiza azazotakka poleettes. 
Job37:13 Xoossi ira bukisizay biittaa irxxisanaas, asata qaxxayanaas woykko ba siiqo qonccisanaassa." 
Job37:14 Iyoobee! Neni takki gaada siya; Xoossi ooththiza malalisiza oosota wozinan woththada akeeka. 
Job37:15 Xoossi shaara wostti azazizaakko, wolqqanththaka wostti wolqqanththizaakko neni eray?" 
Job37:16 Shaara salo bolla wostti woththidaakko, malalisiza ubbaa eriza Xoossa oosoza ne eray?" 
Job37:17 Saloy xarqimala misatiza wode, wolqqama bazzo carkoy biitta bolla carkiza wode neni homben seerana." 
Job37:18 Xoossi salo seerida mastoote mala micciko, neni iza matan uttada maaddanawu dandayay?" 
Job37:19 «Nuus eray pace gidida gishshas nuni ay giidi Xoossas zaaranaakko neni nuna ane tamaarsa. 
Job37:20 Xoossara haasayana gaada oychchike; ta iza oychchada aazas izi tana dhayssana mala denththeththoo? 
Job37:21 Carkoy shaara saloppe qucci geeshshiza wode, oonikka xolqiza arshe tishshi histti xeellanaas dandayenna." 
Job37:22 Pudehappe worqqa mala xolqiza poo7oy yaana; Xoossi malalisiza teeman qonccana. 
Job37:23 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay nu qofappe bolla; iza wolqqay gita; izikka tumu pirdizaade. 
Job37:24 Bantta qofan, ‹Nuni aadho eranchchata› gizayta izi kadhees; hessa gishshas asay wuri izas yayyees.»" 
Job38:1 Hayssafe guye GODAY gote carko giddon gididi Iyoobes hizgides," 
Job38:2 «Hayssi eray baynda haasayan ta zoreza kadhizay izi baas oonee? 
Job38:3 Ane adde gidikko danccetta ta sinththan eqqa; tani nena oychchizayssa taas zaara. 
Job38:4 Tani hayssa alameza medhdhishin neni awan day? Ne erizanne akeekizaa gidikko ane taas yoota. 
Job38:5 Hayssi sa7ay ay keena gidanaakko qofa qachchiday oonee? Sa7a bolla izi mixe wodorota micciday oonakko ne eray? 
Job38:6 Biitta tuussati kundontta mala minththi oykkida wolqqay aazee? Alameza ooso doommishin yochcha shuch yeggiday oonee? 
Job38:7 Bakkale xoolintteti issi bolla yexxizaashe, kiitanchchati ubbay ililizaashe neni awan day?" 
Job38:8 «Abbay biittafe dhuuqqi ke7iza wode pultto ayfeta gordiday oonee? 
Job38:9 Abba shaaran kammiday Qasseka girdi gida dhuman gordiday tana. 
Job38:10 Abbas zawa medhdhiday pengenne zawa woththiday tana. 
Job38:11 Hayssa gakkanawu ya! Hayssafe aadhdhofa! Ne wolqqama dambalay, ‹Hayssan eqqo› gadis." 
Job38:12 «Iyoobee! Neni yelettoosofe wonttay wonttana mala azaza eray? Wontta poo7oska soho giigsa eray? 
Job38:13 Wonttay biitta bolla poo7o bessana mala iita asati qotettidasoppe qoncce kezana mala ne istta azaza eray? 
Job38:14 Wontta poo7oy biitta qalam7etti diza may7o mala beettana mala ooththees; mana miishsha bolla diza maatame mala qonccen bessees. 
Job38:15 Iitati poo7o digettida; istti makkallateththan denththida kusheykka meqqides. 
Job38:16 «Ne duge ciimma abban wodhdhadii? Wogga gita abba garsan simeretta eray? 
Job38:17 Hayqo pengeta nena bessidee? Girdi gida dhuma pengetakka beyadii? 
Job38:18 Sa7ay ay keena dalga gididaakko ne eray? Ane hayssa ubbaa erizaa gidikko ne taas yoota. 
Job38:19 «Poo7oy dizaso efiza ogey awanee? Qasseka dhumay de7izasoy awakko ne eray? 
Job38:20 Neni poo7onne dhuma istti dizaso dizaso efanaas dandayayii? Isttasoy dizaso efiza ogeza ne eray? 
Job38:21 Neni biittay medhettiza wode yelettida gishshassinne nees layththayka daro gidida gishshas ne erontta aggaka! 
Job38:22 Shachchi wodhdhiza keeththan geladiyee? Woykko uttida shachcha doore beyadii? 
Job38:23 Hayssa ha shachchaza ta ola gallassasinne meto gallassas go7ettanaas minjja woththidaaza. 
Job38:24 Wolqqanththi awappe dendizee? Woykko arshey mokkiza baggafe carkoy biitta bolla laalettizaso efiza ogey awanee? 
Job38:25 Iraththo wodhdhizaso giigsiday; daday walakettida uushos oge giigsiday oonee? 
Job38:26 Oonikka baynda biittan asikka dontta bazzon ashshizay," 
Job38:27 iray bukkana malakka ooththizay oonee? Asi baynda sohozanne bazzo biitta haath kalssiday biittayka maata mokkana mala ooththiday oonee? 
Job38:28 Iranne xaaza immizay oonee? 
Job38:29 Shachchinne kenchcho immizay oonee? 
Job38:30 Kenchcho haaththa shuchcha mala minththees; abba haaththika shachchaththo shuchchatana mala ooththees. 
Job38:31 «Piliyaadise geetettiza xoolintteta issi bolla qachchanaas dandayay? Ooriyo geetettiza xoolintteti issi bolla oykettida wodoroza duuththanawu dandayay? 
Job38:32 Xoolintteta ubbaa istta woden woden kessanawu dandayay? Zardo geetettiza do7a medhoy diza xoolinte, istta maaratara ne kaaleththanawu dandayay?" 
Job38:33 Saloti ay mala wogan a qizaakko eray? Hayssa ha wogazakka biitta bolla oosisana dandayay? 
Job38:34 «Daro ira nees bukisana mala shaara ne azazanawu dandayay? 
Job38:35 Wolqqanth ne azazon wolqqamizee? Wolqqanth ne yeddanaas dandayay? Isttika nees, ‹Hekko nu haan doos› gi erizoo?" 
Job38:36 Wozinas cinccateth qoppanaas kaha immiday oonee? 
Job38:37 Ba eran shaarata qoodanaas dandayzay oonee? saloppe haath duge tiganaas dandayzay oonee? 
Job38:38 Gudulla oyseththidi phashe kessanaas dandayzay oonee? 
Job38:39 «Macca gaammoy wora giddon zamada uttidaashin ne izis miza miish shankkatada immanaas dandayay? 
Job38:40 Woykko gafi uttida izi marata kalssanawu dandayay? 
Job38:41 Quuroti gafidi bichchariza wode istta ciyetikka miza miish dhaydi taakko waassiza wode isttas miza miish immizay oonee? 
Job39:1 «Genessati yeliza wode ne eray? Wusha geetettiza do7ay miixattidi yelishin beya eray? 
Job39:2 Istti seebbatidi ay lagge wode gam7izaakko awude yelizaakko ne eray? 
Job39:3 Gulbati miixattishe bantta marata istti yelizay awudekko ne eray? 
Job39:4 Istta marati woran diccidi minneettes; isttafe shaakettidi beettes; bidaappe guye bantta aayetakko simmettenna. 
Job39:5 Hardiday yeda daana mala ooththiday oonee? Istta qashoppe birshiday oonee? 
Job39:6 Bazzoza isttas dizaso histta immadis; maxiney diza demban istta woththadis. 
Job39:7 Kachchi dariza katamatappe haakkidi deettes; guyera laaggizayti qoodizayssa dosettenna. 
Job39:8 Zumata bollan pe7eettes; heen baas gidiza cilila maata koyeettes. 
Job39:9 «Menththi nees ooththanaas eeno gaandee? Woykko ne zedhen eeno gi eqqandee? 
Job39:10 Menth waaxada gosh goyanawu dandayay? 
Job39:11 Iza minoteththan ne ammanettay? Nees deexxiza oosoza izi ooththana mala izas agga eray? 
Job39:12 Izi neekko simmi yaana mala, ne kath bukkiza baley dizaso miiyanayssa ammanettay?" 
Job39:13 «Yanchchay ba qefe eeson miccawus; gido attiin sangano kafo mala piradhdhuku. 
Job39:14 Yanchchay ba phuuphphulle biittan yeggawus; biitta giddon uttidi ho7ana mala ooththawus. 
Job39:15 ‹Heera aadhdhizaadey ba tohon menththees; wora do7atikka yedhdhi liiqiseettes› gaada qoppuku. 
Job39:16 Ba ciyetas allaga mala menxe iitawus; izi daaburay hadan attikokka wuda guukku. 
Job39:17 Hayssaththo izis cinccateth dhayssada iza erontta mala ooththiday tana. 
Job39:18 Iza dendada woxxiza wode, banara gaade woxxiza togata bolla miiccawus." 
Job39:19 «Iyoobee! Paratas wolqqa immidaynne adussa gamma istta morgen mayziday nenee? 
Job39:20 Parata boole mala guppizay istti harbuqishe asata daganththana mala ooththizay nenee? 
Job39:21 Parati ola demba togetti bishe, bantta wolqqankka ceeqettishe, loddan adaraaso doommeettes." 
Job39:22 Yash giza miish mulekka erettenna; ay miishshika istta daganththenna; istta bolla giththa mashsha; denththidaakkoka guye simmettenna.
