Psalms45:17 Tani ne sunththi yeleta ubbaan hassa7ettana mala ooththana. Hessa gishshas asay mernaas nena sabbana. 
Psalms46:1 Xoossi nuni shiiqi attizasonne nuus wolqqa; nuna metoy gakkiza wode maaddanaas izi ubbato matan dees. 
Psalms46:2 Hessa gishshas biittay qaaxxiko, zumatikka duge abban gelikko nuni yayyoko." 
Psalms46:3 Abba dambalaykka guummidi hoomotikko, iza wolqqama hanon zumati kokkorkkoka nuni dagammoko." 
Psalms46:4 Xoossa katama, Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay dizason ufayssiza shaafati deettes." 
Psalms46:5 Xoossi izi giddon diza gishshas he katamaya qaaxxuku; wontta maaladora Xoossi izo maaddana. 
Psalms46:6 Kawoteththati makkallan dendida; kawotikka kundida; izi ba qaala dhoqqu histti sissides; biittayka seerides. 
Psalms46:7 Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAY nunara dees; Yaaqoobe Xoossi nu qotetti attiza qol7a. 
Psalms46:8 Haa yiite; GODAA ooso xeellite; izi sa7a wostti bulasidaakko be7ite. 
Psalms46:9 Izi sa7a gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas diza ola teqqees; wondafenne toora menththees; gondalleka taman xuuggees. 
Psalms46:10 Shempi uttite; tani Xoos gididayssa erite; kawoteththata bolla ta dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; biitta bollaka ta dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana. 
Psalms46:11 Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAY nunara dees; Yaaqoobe Xoossi nu qotetti attiza qol7a. 
Psalms47:1 Kawoteth ubbay intte kushe baqqite; intte qaala dhoqqu ooththidi Xoossas ilili giite. 
Psalms47:2 Biitta ubbaa bolla bayra kawoy Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay izi yashissiza Xoossa. 
Psalms47:3 Deraa nu gars aaththides; kawoteththatakka nu toho garsan haarisides. 
Psalms47:4 Izi nuus laata biitta doorides; he biittayn izi dosiza Yaaqoobey ceeqettees. 
Psalms47:5 Ililishin Xoossay ufayssan zaye punnishin GODAY pude ba araatan kezides. 
Psalms47:6 Yexxite, Xoossas yexxite; yexxite nu kawozas yexxite." 
Psalms47:7 Xoossi alame ubbaas kawo; hessa gishshas galata mazamure izas yexxite. 
Psalms47:8 Xoossi kawoteththata bolla kawotides; ba geeshsha araata bollaka uttides. 
Psalms47:9 Kawoteththata kaaleththiza daannati Abrahaame Xoossaa asaara issife shiiqida; dere ubbaa kawoti Xoossassa; izi ubbafekka bollara dhoqqa. 
Psalms48:1 GODAY gita; nu Xoossa kataman geeshsha zumazan gita galatay izas bessees. 
Psalms48:2 Biitta ubbaas ufays gididay, pudeha baggara beettizay dhoqqanne lo7o gidida Xiyoone zumay wogga kawoza katama." 
Psalms48:3 He katamaa gimbeza giddon, izi katamays ashshiza miixa gididayssa bessides." 
Psalms48:4 Kawoti bantta tooranchchatara issife shiiqida; histtidi Xiyoono olanawu yida. 
Psalms48:5 Gido attiin izo be7idi malalettida; dagammidi guye baqatida. 
Psalms48:6 Istti hessan de7ishin istta yashsha kokkorisi oykkides; miixay oykkida maccassa mala miixattida. 
Psalms48:7 Arshey mokkizaso bagga wolqqama carkon meqqiza Tarseese markabeta mala istta kokkorisadasa. 
Psalms48:8 Nuni siyida malakka, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA kataman, nu Xoossa kataman izi ooththidayssa nu be7idos. Xoossi he katamaa mernaas minththi essana." 
Psalms48:9 Abeet Xoossawu, ne Keeththa giddon ne mernaa siiqo qoppoos." 
Psalms48:10 Abeet Xoossawu, ne sunththa malakka ne galatay sa7a gaxa gakkides; ne ushachcha kushey xilloteththan kumides." 
Psalms48:11 Ne pirda gishshas, Xiyoone asay ufayettees; Yuhuda katamatikka ufayssan homboceettes." 
Psalms48:12 Xiyoone yuushon hemettite; izi gimbeta yuushon yaanne haa simerettite; izi shakkota qoodite. 
Psalms48:13 Yiza yeletas yootana mala, izi aaho gimbeza akeekitenne izi miixata xomosite." 
Psalms48:14 Intte, «Meri mernaas ha Xoossay nu Xoossa; nu hayqqana gakkanaas izi nuna kaaleththana» giidi yootite." 
Psalms49:1 Derezoo, intte ubbatikka hayssa siyite! Intteno sa7a bolla diza ubbatoo! Hayssa ezgite." 
Psalms49:2 Dhoqqaynne ziqqay, dureynne manqoyka siyite." 
Psalms49:3 Ta wozina qofay akeeka immees; Ta doonay aadho erateththa qaala haasayees; 
Psalms49:4 Tani ta hayth leemisotakko zaarana; istta birsheththaaka ta diiththan qonccisana. 
Psalms49:5 Meto gallassi yiza wodenne iitateththan tana labizayti dooddi uttiko ta ays babboo? 
Psalms49:6 Ba aqotan ammanettizaytassinne ba dureteththa daron ceeqettizaytas ta ays babboo? 
Psalms49:7 Asi barkka bana wozzenna; woykko ba shemppo gishshas Xoossas waaga qanxxanaas dandayenna. 
Psalms49:8 Asa shemppo waagay keehippe al7o; shemppo duuththiza waagay mulekka deenna. 
Psalms49:9 Ay waaga qanxxiinkka izi mernaas de7ana mala, woykko izi hayqqontta mala ooththanawu dandayenna." 
Psalms49:10 Eeyatinne dammati hayqqiza mala aadho eranchchatikka hayqqana; ubbayka ba aqota haras yeggi baana; hessa ubbayka be7ana. 
Psalms49:11 Daro gade istti ba sunththan haarikkoka isttas mernaa keeththay duufo; izikka isttas yeletappe yeleta gakkanawu duussaso gidana. 
Psalms49:12 Asi ay duretikkoka ba dureteththaara kanththenna; izi do7a mala hayqqana. 
Psalms49:13 Banan ammanettiza eeyata qaadaynne istta qaala kaallizayta wurseththa saamay hayssa. 
Psalms49:14 Shukas qorettida dorsata mala istti duufos doorettida; hayqoy istta heenththanchcha gidana; istti bantta yalliso keeththafe haakkidi duufon musana. Suure asati maaladora istta duufo bollara simerettana. 
Psalms49:15 Gido attiin Xoossi ta shemppo wozzana; izi tana hayqo wolqqafe ashshi ekkana. 
Psalms49:16 Asi duretiza wodenne iza aqotay dari dari biza wode izaades yayyofa. 
Psalms49:17 Gaasoykka izi hayqqishe aykkoka ekkidi beenna; iza aqotay izara issife duufon gelenna. 
Psalms49:18 Asi paxa diza woden, «Taas kumides» giikkoka, ubbay izas giigida gishshas galatettikokka," 
Psalms49:19 simmidi mulekka poo7o be7onttaso ba aawata maabaran gayttees. 
Psalms49:20 Asi erateththi baynda ay duretikkoka izi do7a mala hayqqana. 
Psalms50:1 Wolqqama GODAY, Xoossay haasayees; Arshey mokkizasoppe wullizaso gakkanaas sa7an diza asaa xeygees." 
Psalms50:2 Mulera lo7o gidida Xiyoonippe Xoossi poo7isees. 
Psalms50:3 Nu Xoossi yaana; izi co7u geenna. Miza tamay iza sinththana; wolqqama gotey iza yuushonna. 
Psalms50:4 Xoossi ba asaa pirdanaas salonne sa7a xeygees. 
Psalms50:5 «Tanara yarshon caaqettida geeshshata taakko shiishshite» gees. 
Psalms50:6 Xoossi barkka pirdiza Xoossa gidida gishshas saloti iza xilloteththa awajjeettes. 
Psalms50:7 «Ta asazoo ne siya! Tani nees yootays; Isra7eele asawu! Tani ne bolla markkattays. Tani Xoossay ne Xoossa. 
Psalms50:8 Ne yarsho gishshassinne neni ubbato shiishshiza xuugettiza yarsho gishshas tani nena borikke. 
Psalms50:9 Hessa malakka ne dirsafe kormata, woykko ne xarphphafe deyshata ekkanawu koykke." 
Psalms50:10 Woran diza do7a ubbati taassa; shii zumata bollan diza mehetikka tayta. 
Psalms50:11 Tani zumata bolla diza kafota ubbaa erays; demban diza medheteththati ubbay tayta. 
Psalms50:12 Salo gufanththon diza ubbay taassa; hessa gishshas ta gafikkoka nees yootikke. 
Psalms50:13 Tani kormata asho miikke; Woykko deyshata suuth uyikke. 
Psalms50:14 Xoossas galata yarsho shiishsha; ne adina Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossas gaththa. 
Psalms50:15 Meto gallas ne tana xeyga; ta nena ashshana; nekka tana bonchchana» gees. 
Psalms50:16 Gido attiin Xoossi nagaranchchas, «Ta woga neni zaara zaarada biddanaas woykko ta caaqo qaala ne yootanaas nees ay maatay dizee?" 
Psalms50:17 Ne ta seera ixxaasa; ta qaalatakka kadhaasa. 
Psalms50:18 Neni kayso be7ida wode izara dabbotadasa; laymatizayta maabarankka zuppetaasa. 
Psalms50:19 Neni ne doona iita haasayanaas doyadasa; ne haasayza haasayay wordo xalla. 
Psalms50:20 Aadhdhooson aadhdhooson ne ishaa zigiraasa; ne aayi naa sunththika mooraasa. 
Psalms50:21 Neni hayssa ubbaa ooththiza wode tani co7u gadis; hessa gishshas neni tana ne mala gaada qoppadasa; gido attiin ha7i tani nena walassays; qasseka ta nena qonccen seerays. 
Psalms50:22 «Intteno Xoossa dogizaytoo! Hayssa akeekite; intte ixxis giikko tani inttena menththereththana; he wode inttena oonikka ashshenna. 
Psalms50:23 Taas galata immiza asi tana bonchchees. Suure ogera biza as tani atoteththaa bessana» gees. 
Psalms51:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne mernaa siiqoza mala tana maara; ne qadheta daron ta mooroza qucca. 
Psalms51:2 Ta iitateththa ubbaa taappe meecca; ta nagarappeka tana geeshsha. 
Psalms51:3 Tani ta mooroza erays; ta nagaraykka ubbato ta sinththana. 
Psalms51:4 Ta nena xalla qohadis; qasseka ne sinththan iita ooththadis. Hessa gishshas ne qaxxayda qixaaten, ne ta bolla pirdida pirdankka ne xillo" 
Psalms51:5 Tani ta aayi uloppe doommada nagaranchcha; yelettoosofe haa simmadakka ta mooranchcha. 
Psalms51:6 Hekko neni asa wozinappe tuma koyaasa; hessa gishshas ta giddo asateththaa ne aadho erateth tamaarsa. 
Psalms51:7 Hisophphe bonccon neni tana pistta; tani geeyana; tana meecca; tani shachchafe aadhdhada booxxana. 
Psalms51:8 Neni tana ufayssinne hashshu giissiza miish sissa; ne menththereththida ta meqeththatakka paththa. 
Psalms51:9 Ne sinth ta nagarappe haraso zaara; ta qoho ubbaaka qucca digga. 
Psalms51:10 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne taas geeshsha wozina medhdha; mino ayana ta giddon woththa. 
Psalms51:11 Tana ne sinththafe oloppa; ne Geeshsha Ayana taappe ekkofa. 
Psalms51:12 Ne atoteththaa ufayssaa taas zaarada imma; eeno giissiza ayanan ne tana kunththa. 
Psalms51:13 Histtiko tani mooranchchata ne oge tamaarsana; he nagaranchchatikka neekko simmana. 
Psalms51:14 Abeet Xoossawu, tana ashshiza Xoossawu! Tani shemppo wodhontta mala tana maadda; ta inxarsayka ne xilloteththa gishshas ililisan yexxo." 
Psalms51:15 Abeet Godawu! Ta doona doya; histtiko ta inxarsay nena galatana. 
Psalms51:16 Neni yarshon ufayettizaakko ta nees yarsho shiishshana; ne gidikko yarshon ufayettaka; xuugettiza yarsho yarshikokka neni ufayettaka. 
Psalms51:17 Xoossas shiiqiza yarshoy ashke ayana; abeet Xoossawu! Meqqida wozina ne kadhakka. 
Psalms51:18 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne dosan Xiyoono duresa; Yerusalaame gimbeta gimba. 
Psalms51:19 He wode xilloteththa yarshoninne wuri xuugettiza yarshon neni ufayettana; kormatikka ne yarshizason yarshettana. 
Psalms52:1 Haysso wolqqamazoo! Xoossi nena kadhichides; ne ays iita ooson nashettay? Ays ubbaa gallas ceeqettay? 
Psalms52:2 Nenoo baleththon kumida genanchchawu! harata dhayssana qaxxaasa! Ne inxarsayka qara magalla mala. 
Psalms52:3 Neni lo7o aggada iita siiqaasa; tuma haasayanaappe wordo haasaya dosaasa. 
Psalms52:4 Nenoo baleththon kumida wordanchchazoo! Neni as madunththiza qaala siiqaasa. 
Psalms52:5 Gido attiin Xoossi nena mernaas dhayssana; izi nena ne keeththafe buuci kessana; paxa dizayta giddofekka dhoqalli diggana. 
Psalms52:6 Xilloti hayssa be7idi yayyana; istti iza bolla hizgi miiccana; 
Psalms52:7 «Xoossa baas zemppo ooththonttaade, ba dureteththa daron ammanettizaade ba iita ooson minnizaade hayssa be7ite!» gaana." 
Psalms52:8 Gido attiin aaciza wogara miththa mala tani Xoossa Keeththan aacays; iza mernaa siiqon tani meri mernaas ammanettays. 
Psalms52:9 Neni ooththida ubbaas tani nena mernaas galatays; ne lo7o gidida gishshas ta ne sunththan hidota ooththays; tani Xoossa deraa sinththan ne kiyateththaa sabbana. 
Psalms53:1 Eeyati bantta wozinan, «Xoossi baawa» geettes; istti moorettidayta; istta oosoykka harassizaaza; istta garsafe lo7o ooththizay deenna." 
Psalms53:2 Xoossa koyzaytinne akeekizayti de7izakko be7anawu Xoossi saloppe duge asa nayta xeellees. 
Psalms53:3 Istti ubbayka Xoossaafe haakkida; ubbayka issife tunida; lo7o ooththiza asi deenna; haray atto issaadeyka baawa. 
Psalms53:4 Xoossi, «Asi kath miza mala ta deraa bonqqi mizayti, Xoos woossi eronttayti, heyti iita ooththizayti yuushshi qoppettennee?» gees." 
Psalms53:5 Xoossi ba asaa morkkizayta meqeththaa laallana; istti kase dagammi erontta dagama dagammana. Xoossi istta kadhida gishshas istti yeellatana; 
Psalms53:6 Isra7eeles atoteththi Xiyooneppe yidaakko! Xoossi ba deraappe di7ettidayssa zaariza wode Yaaqoobe zareti ufayettana; Isra7eele asay ufayettana. 
Psalms54:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne sunththan tana ashsha; ne wolqqan taas pirda. 
Psalms54:2 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta woosa siya; ta haasayza qaala ezga. 
Psalms54:3 Otoranchchati ta bolla dendida; genanchchati tana wodhanaas koyeettes. Xoossaa wudu geettenna. 
Psalms54:4 Gido attiin Xoossi taas maado; Godaykka taas zemppo. 
Psalms54:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta morkketas istta iitateththaa mala isttas zaara. Ne ammaneteththan ne istta dhayssa. 
Psalms54:6 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ta dosan nees yarshana; nees bessiza gishshas tani ne sunththaa galatana. 
Psalms54:7 Ays giikko neni tana ta meto ubbaafe ashshadasa; ta morkketi kundishin ta ayfen beyadis. 
Psalms55:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta woosa siya; ta shoobbishin qelli gooppa. 
Psalms55:2 Ezga; ta woosa siya; ta qofan ta un7ettadis; maracey taas kokkorides. 
Psalms55:3 Ta morkketi mandiin hirgadis; iita asati qohiin dagammadis; istti ta bolla meto ehida; hanqon dendidi tana morkkida. 
Psalms55:4 Ta wozinay hirgees; hayqqanaakkonne giza dagamay ta bolla wodhdhides. 
Psalms55:5 Yashshinne dagamay tana oykkides; ta asateththay kokkorides. 
Psalms55:6 Tani, «Taas haraphphe mala qefey dizaakko piradhdha baada shempana." 
Psalms55:7 Tani beta baadakka bazzon de7ana shin. 
Psalms55:8 Tani goteppenne uushoppe attizaso eesotada gakkana shin» gadis. 
Psalms55:9 Abeet Godawu! Tani katamay giddon ooshshinne gene beyadis; iitata zore ne dhayssa; istta qofaakka bulakereththa yegga. 
Psalms55:10 Iitati gallassinne qamma katama gimbeza bollara yuuyeettes; iitateththinne geney izi giddon dees. 
Psalms55:11 Bashshi izi giddon dees; geneynne cimoy izi dubbushatappe shaakettenna. 
Psalms55:12 Ta morkkey tana cayidaakko ta iza dandaya aaththanakko, ta bolla ceeqettizay tana ixxizaade gididaakko tani izappe qotettana." 
Psalms55:13 Gido attiin hayssa ubbaa ta bolla ooththizay nena, ta laggeza, ta dabbozanne ta siiqoza." 
Psalms55:14 Nuni issoy issaara ufayssan haasayettidos; issifekka Xoossa soon simerettidos. 
Psalms55:15 Iitateththi istta wozina giddon diza gishshas ta morkketa bolla qoppontta hayqoy gakko; shemppora paxa dishe moogettetto! 
Psalms55:16 Tani gidikko ta Xoossa xeygays; GODAY tana ashshees. 
Psalms55:17 Maalado, gallassinne omars tani waassayssinne ta meto izas yootays; izi ta qaala siyees." 
Psalms55:18 Daroti tana eqettikokka, izi tana ola tooraappe ashshees." 
Psalms55:19 Beniisofe kawoteththa araatan utti diza Xoossay ta woosa siyidi ba oge laammonttaytanne Xoossas yayyonttayta kawushshana. 
Psalms55:20 Ta laggezi ba siiqota bolla ba kushe denththides; isttara caaqettida caaqo qaalaakka laallides. 
Psalms55:21 Iza doonappe keziza qaalay oyssa mala; gido attiin iza wozinay caddiza toora mala; iza qaalati zaytepekka aadhdhi shugo; gido attiin qanxxiza mashsha mala. 
Psalms55:22 Ne meto GODAA bolla woththa; izi nena minththi naagana; izi xilloti kundana mala ooththenna. 
Psalms55:23 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni gidikko iitata duge ciimma ollan yeggana. Suuth gussizaytinne baleththizayti ba daana layththas baggaka deettenna; gido attiin tani nenan ammanettays. 
Psalms56:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Asay tana un7eththees; ta morkketi tana ubba wode yedeththeettes; hessa gishshas ne taas qadhetta. 
Psalms56:2 Ta morkketi ubbaa gallas tana yedeththeettes; daroti otoreteththan tana oleettes. 
Psalms56:3 Tana babisiza wode ta nenan ammanettays. 
Psalms56:4 Tani Xoossan ammanettiza gishshas babbike; izi immida hidota qaala gishshassika iza galatays; ta Xoossan ammanettays; asi tana ay ooththanee? 
Psalms56:5 Ubbaa gallas ta morkketi taappe mooro demmanaas woxxeettes; istti ubba wode tana qohanaas zoretteettes. 
Psalms56:6 Shiiqidi ta bolla maqetteettes; zamadi uttidi tana kaaletteettessinne ta geedon eqqetteettes; tana wodhanaaska koyeettes. 
Psalms56:7 Xoossoo! Istta iitateththaa gishshas istta yeddofa; he kawoteththata ne hanqon kawushsha. 
Psalms56:8 Neni ta yeeho beyadasa; ta afunththaa makkadasa; ubbatikka ne mazgaban xaafettida. 
Psalms56:9 Tani nena xeygiza wode ta morkketi guye simmeettes; Xoossi tanara dizayssa tani hessan erays. 
Psalms56:10 Ta iza qaala galatiza Xoossan, ta iza qaala sabbiza GODAAN," 
Psalms56:11 tani he Xoossan ammanettiza gishshas babbike; asi tana ay ooththanee? 
Psalms56:12 Abeet Xoossawu! Tani nees adina adinettadis; ta adinettoyssa galata yarsho nees gaththana. 
Psalms56:13 Neni ta shemppoyo hayqoppe ta tohota dhupheppe ashshadasa. Hessa gishshas izi shemppora paxa dizaytas poo7isiza poo7on Xoossa sinththan ta simerettana. 
Psalms57:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne taas qadhetta; tana maara; ta shemppoya nenan zemppadus; bashshay aadhdhana gakkanaas tani ne qefeta garsan qotettana. 
Psalms57:2 Izi ba halchcho mala taas poliza Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossako waassays. 
Psalms57:3 Xoossi saloppe maado kiittidi tana ashshana; tana yedhdhizayta kawushshana; Xoossi ba mernaa siiqonne ba tumateththaa taas kiittana. 
Psalms57:4 Tani ta morkketa giddon, as puuzidi miza gaammo misatizayta giddon days. Istta achchay tooranne wondafe yiishshaa mala; istta inxarsayka qara mashsha mala." 
Psalms57:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni salotappe bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu ga; ne bonchchoy sa7a ubbaa kumo. 
Psalms57:6 Istti ta tohos woximade woththida; ta asateththaa kuunissida; istti ta ogen olla bookkida; gido attiin he ollan banttas kundida. 
Psalms57:7 Ta wozinay minni dees; abeet Xoossawu! Ta wozinay minnidi dees; tani nees yexxananne nena sabbana. 
Psalms57:8 Ta shemppoyee birkka! Diiththatinne maasinqoti beeggite! Tanikka wonttara dendana. 
Psalms57:9 Abeet Godawu, tani nena asa ubbaa sinththan galatana; qasse deraa giddon ta nena yeththan sabbana." 
Psalms57:10 Ne mernaa siiqoy pude salo gakkides; ne tumateththayka salo shaara gakkides. 
Psalms57:11 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni salotappe bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu ga; ne bonchchoy sa7a ubbaa kumo. 
Psalms58:1 Intteno dere haarizaytoo! Addaka intte doonappe xillo haasayay kezizee? Asa ubbaas xillo pirdeetii? 
Psalms58:2 Akkay! Intte wozinan iita miish halchcheeta; intte kushey biitta bolla makkalla ooso ooththees. 
Psalms58:3 Iitati ba aayi uloppe doommidi mooro oge beettes; yelettida gallassafe doommidi baletteettessinne wordoteettes. 
Psalms58:4 Istti shooshsha mala marzera deettes; tulle goppe shooshsha mala ba hayth tulliseettes. 
Psalms58:5 Muurennizayssi ay mala cincca gidikkoka goppe shooshshi iza cenggurssaa siyenna. 
Psalms58:6 Abeet Xoossawu! Istta achchaa menththa; abeet GODAWU! Gaammota banqila menththa. 
Psalms58:7 Istti gukkiza haaththa mala dhayetto; istti dukkiza wondafe yiishshay dun7o. 
Psalms58:8 Istti bishe muushiza dhaadhdhe mala gidetto; poo7o be7ontta awucaya yelettida naa mala gidetto. 
Psalms58:9 Agunththa tamay oto suulisontta dhayza mala nagaranchchata ne eeson dhayssa. 
Psalms58:10 Nagaranchchata bolla halo kessizayssa be7idi xilloti ufayettana. Iitata suuththan ba toho meecettana. 
Psalms58:11 He wode asay, «Addaka xilloti ooththida lo7o oosos woytoy dees; tumukka sa7a bolla pirdiza Xoossi dees» gaana." 
Psalms59:1 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Ta morkketappe tana ashsha; ta bolla dendizaytappe tana naaga. 
Psalms59:2 Iita ooththizaytappe tana maadda; suuth gussiza asatappe tana ashsha. 
Psalms59:3 Abeet GODAWU! Istti tana wodhanawu zamadidi naagizayssa be7a! menxe iita asati tani mooronne nagara ooththontta dishin ta bolla duulateettes. 
Psalms59:4 Aykko mooro ta ooththontta dishin tana dhayssanaas giigettida; hayssa neni be7ada tana maaddana denda. 
Psalms59:5 Abeet GODAWU! Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Neni Isra7eele Xoossa; kawoteththata ubbaa qaxxayanaas ne beegga; makkalla ooththizayta maaroppa. 
Psalms59:6 Istti kana mala hoskkattishe katama giddon yuuyi pe7idi omars simmana. 
Psalms59:7 Istta doonappe kezizayssa siyite! istta inxarsay mashsha mala; istti, «Oonee nuna siyanay?» gi qoppeettes." 
Psalms59:8 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! Neni istta bolla miiccaasa; kawoteththata ubbaa kadhaasa. 
Psalms59:9 Ta Xoossawu! Ne taas miixa gidida gishshas ta nenan ammanettays. 
Psalms59:10 Ta Xoossay ba mernaa siiqon tanara gayttana; ta morkketa kundeth izi tana bessana. 
Psalms59:11 Abeet nuus gondalle gidida Godawu! Ta asay neni halo kessizayssa balontta mala neni istta wodha dhayssofa; gido attiin ne wolqqan istta laallanne kawushsha. 
Psalms59:12 Istti bantta doonappe kessiza nagara gishshas, bantta inxarsaa qaala gishshas, istti qanggida qanggeththa gishshassinne wordotiza gishshas bantta otoreteththan oyketetto." 
Psalms59:13 Ne hanqon istta dhayssa; istta mulera dippi histta; he wode Xoossi Yaaqoobe zereththa ayssizaadenne sa7a gaxa gakkanaas diza deraa haarizaade gididayssa asi ubbay erana. 
Psalms59:14 Istti kana mala hoskkattishe katama giddon yuuyi pe7idi omars simmana. 
Psalms59:15 Istti miza miish hasishe yuuyeettes; kallontta aggiko kana mala laweettes. 
Psalms59:16 Gido attiin tani ne wolqqa sabbana; maalado maalado ne mernaa siiqo gishshas yexxana. Neni taas meto gallas zempponne baqata attiza miixa. 
Psalms59:17 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta wolqqay nena; ne taas miixa; ne mernaa siiqon tana siiqaasa; hessa gishshas galata yeththan ta nena sabbana. 
Psalms60:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni nuna aggadasa; nuna menththereththa yeggadasa; neni nuna hanqettadasa; ha7i gidikko simmada nuna giigsa. 
Psalms60:2 Neni biittayo qaaththada za7isadasa; iza kokkoriza gishshas neni izi za7a kunththa. 
Psalms60:3 Neni ne asaa meto bessadasa; neni nuna maththosiza woyne ushshu ushshadasa. 
Psalms60:4 Nees yayyizayti bantta morkketa wondafeppe attana mala malata immadasa. 
Psalms60:5 Neni siiqizayti attana mala ne wolqqan nuna ashsha; neni nuukko alla. 
Psalms60:6 Xoossi ba keeththan dishe, «Tani xoonada Seekeeme biitta shaakkana; qasse Sukoote shoobbaa gishana." 
Psalms60:7 Gala7aadeynne Minaasey tayta; Efreemey taas hu7e qoobe; Yuhuday taas kawoteththa guufe. 
Psalms60:8 Mo7aabey ta meecettizaso; Eedoomey taas caamma woththizaso; tani Filisxeeme xoonada gererana» gides. 
Psalms60:9 Gimbettida katamaakko tana oonee efanay? Eedoome gakkanaas tana oonee kaaleththanay? 
Psalms60:10 Abeet Xoossawu! Nuna aggiday nena gidikkii? «Neni nu tooranchchatara olas kezikke» gadasa. 
Psalms60:11 Asappe gidida maadoy hada; hessa gishshas nu morkketa bolla nuus xoono imma. 
Psalms60:12 Xoossa wolqqan nu morkketa nuni xoonana; izi nu morkketa yedhettana. 
Psalms61:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni ta waasoza siya; ta woosaakka ezga. 
Psalms61:2 Ta wozinay taahiin biitta gaxan dashe ta nena xeygays; taappe dhoqqiza zaallaako tana kaaleththa. 
Psalms61:3 Neni taas geemmizasonne tani ta morkketappe naagetta attiza mino miixa. 
Psalms61:4 Tani ne Dunkaanezan mernaas daana; ne qefe giddon kametta attana. 
Psalms61:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni ta adina siyadasa; ne sunththa yayyizayti laattiza laata taaska immadasa. 
Psalms61:6 Kawoza shemppo gam7isa; iza layththaa yeletappe yeleta gaththa. 
Psalms61:7 Izi Xoossa sinththan mernaas kawoto; ne mernaa siiqoninne ne tumateththan iza naaga. 
Psalms61:8 Histtiko tani ta adina gallas gallas gaththana; ne sunththaaka ubbato yeththan sabbana. 
Psalms62:1 Ta shemppoya Xoossan xalla shemppo demmawus; taas atoteththi izappe yees. 
Psalms62:2 Izi xalla taas zaallanne tana ashshizayssa; ta qotetta attizaso gidida gishshas mulekka hirgike. 
Psalms62:3 Cimmidi kundana matida goda malanne musida lasha mala wolqqay baynda as dhayssanawu sugishe awude gakkanaas de7andetii? 
Psalms62:4 Istti iza bonchcho sohoppe kawushshanaas xalla koyeettes; istti wordon ufayetteettes; bantta doonan anjjeettes; gido attiin bantta wozinan qanggeettes. 
Psalms62:5 Ta shemppoyee! Woppu gaada Xoossa xalla naaga; taas hidotay izappe yaana. 
Psalms62:6 Izi xalla taas zaallanne tana ashshizayssa; ta qotetta attizaso gidida gishshas mulekka hirgike. 
Psalms62:7 Taas atoteththinne bonchchoy beettiday Xoossafe; izi ta qotetta attizasonne taas mino zaalla. 
Psalms62:8 Asoo! Ubbaa wode Xoossan ammanettite; izi nuus qotetti attizaso gidida gishshas intte wozina qofa izas yootite. 
Psalms62:9 Bonchchosoppe yeleteththi maaddenna; kadhettidasoppe yeleteththika ubbay hada. Istti meezaane denththontta carko mala; istti issi bolla carko mala kawushsha. 
Psalms62:10 Bonqqan ammanettofte; kaysi shiishshida dureteththan hidota ooththofte. Inttes dureteththi darikkoka intte wozina iza bolla woththofte. 
Psalms62:11 Xoossay issito haasaydes; tani nam7u yo7ota siyadis; heytikka, «Wolqqay Xoossassa;" 
Psalms62:12 mernaa siiqoy Xoossassa.» Abeet Godawu! Neni as ubbaas iza ooso ooso mala immana. 
Psalms63:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni ta Xoossa; ta nena wozinappe koyays; ta ashoykka nena amottees. Haaththi baynda mela biittay haath koyza mala ta asateththay nena saamettees. 
Psalms63:2 Tani nena geeshshasohon xeelladis; ne wolqqanne ne bonchcho tani be7adis. 
Psalms63:3 Ne mernaa siiqoy de7oppe lo7ees; ta inxarsay nena galatees. 
Psalms63:4 Ta de7o layththankka tani nena galatana; ne sunththan ta kushe pude neekko denththana. 
Psalms63:5 Asi lo7o kath mi kallidi ufayettiza mala ta shemppoya nenan ufayettana; tani ta inxarsan ufayssa yeththan nena galatana. 
Psalms63:6 Tani ta hiixan dashe nena hassa7ays; omarsa kumeth ne ooso yuushsha qoppays; 
Psalms63:7 Neni tana maaddiza gishshas tani ne qefe kuwan uttada ufayssan yexxays. 
Psalms63:8 Ta shemppoya shiphphi ga kaalladus; ne ushachcha kusheykka tana minththi oykkides. 
Psalms63:9 Gido attiin tana wodhana koyzayti biitta garsan ciimma ollan moogettana. 
Psalms63:10 Istti mashshas aadhdhi imettana; istti godare kawo gidana. 
Psalms63:11 Gido attiin kawoy Xoossan ufayettana; Xoossa sunththan caaqqiza ubbay iza galatana; wordo haasayzayta doonay gidikko gordettana. 
Psalms64:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta magana neni siya; ta shemppoyo wodhanaas mandiza ta morkketappe tana ashsha. 
Psalms64:2 Pala asata maqqofenne makkallanchchata duulatappe tana genththa. 
Psalms64:3 Istti bantta inxarsaa mashsha mala leefida; qasse marze qaalata wondafe yiishsha mala dukkanaas giigsida. 
Psalms64:4 Istti qotettidi bantta wondafen xillo as dukkeettes; asi akeekontta dishin dukkanaas guye geettenna. 
Psalms64:5 Istti iita ooththanaas issoy issaara maqetteettes; geemara woximade woththanaas zoretteettes; istti, «Nuna ooni be7anee?» geettes." 
Psalms64:6 Istti gene maqettishe, «Nuni lo7o maqqo maqettidos» geettes; hessika asa wozinaynne kahay iitan kumidayssa bessees." 
Psalms64:7 Gido attiin Xoossay istta ba yiishshan dukkana; istti akeekontta madunththana. 
Psalms64:8 Izi istti haasayda qaala istta bolla zaarana; isttaka bashshan gaththana; istta be7ida ubbay aamusidi hu7e qaaththana. 
Psalms64:9 He wode asay ubbay Xoossas yayyana; Xoossa ooso qonccen yootana; izi ooththidayssaka yuushshi qoppana. 
Psalms64:10 Xilloti GODAAN ufayetetto; izakka baas baqati attizaso ooththetto; wozina suureti ubbay iza galatetto. 
Psalms65:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Xiyoonen nees galatay bessees; nuni nees adinettidayssa gaththana. 
Psalms65:2 Abeet woosa siyizayssoo! Asay ubbay neekko yaana. 
Psalms65:3 Nu nagaray nuna mittides; neni gidikko nu balaa atto ga wursadasa. 
Psalms65:4 Neni dooridaadeynne nenara daana mala ne dubbushaakko shiishsha ekkidaadey anjjettidaade; ne geeshshasozappenne ne dunkaane anjjozappe nu kallana. 
Psalms65:5 Abeet nuna ashshiza Xoossawu ne xillo ooson malalisiza miish nuus ooththa; Sa7aa gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas, haaho abbatappeka he pinththan diza asa ubbaas hidotay nena." 
Psalms65:6 Neni ne wolqqa gixettadasa; zumatakka ne minththa essadasa. 
Psalms65:7 Neni abba giirissanne dambala gunththa sirphi ooththaasa; qasse derey dendiza denththa irxxisaasa. 
Psalms65:8 Hessaththo neni ooththida malaata gishshas, sa7a gaxa gakkanaas de7iza asay ubbay nees, «Hoola!» gees. Arshey mokkizasoppe wullizaso gakkanaas diza asa ubbaa ufayssan ilili giissadasa." 
Psalms65:9 Neni biitta naagada haath ushshaasa; histtada daro duresaasa; Asas kaththay mokkana mala Xoossa shaafay haaththan kumides; hessaththo ooththada neni giigsadasa. 
Psalms65:10 Goshsha gadetas gidiza ira immaasa; Phasheta liiqisaasa; biittaaka puuse iran shugisaasa; caarechchati doli diccana mala anjjaasa. 
Psalms65:11 Layththaa kalo layth ooththaasa; neni aadhdhidaso ubbay kath xalla gidees. 
Psalms65:12 Mehe heemmizasohon cilila maatay kumides; zumbullati ufayssan kumida. 
Psalms65:13 Dembatan wude mehey kumides; shoobbatan kaththi kumides; ubbatikka ufayssan ililishe yexxeettes. 
Psalms66:1 Sa7an diza as ubbay intte qaala dhoqqisidi ililisan Xoossa galatite. 
Psalms66:2 «Xoossa sunththi bonchchetto!» giidi yexxite; bonchcho galata izas immite. 
Psalms66:3 Xoossas, «Ne oosoti ay keena malalisizoo! Ne wolqqay daro gidida gishshas ne morkketi yashshan ne sinththan kokkoreettes." 
Psalms66:4 Sa7an diza ubbay nees goynnees; nena sabbees; ne sunththas galata mazamure yexxees» giite. 
Psalms66:5 Haa yiite; Xoossi ooththidaaz be7ite; izi asa giddon malalisiza ooso ooththides. 
Psalms66:6 Izi abba haaththa shaakkides; qasse beni nu aawati shaafara mela biittara tohon pinnida; nunikka izi ooththida ooson ufayettidos. 
Psalms66:7 Izi ba wolqqan mernaas haarees. Kawoteththata ubbaaka ba ayfen xeellees; hessa gishshas makkallizayti iza bolla dhoqqu dhoqqu gooppetto. 
Psalms66:8 Asawu! Nu Xoossa galatite; intte galata cenggurssay siyetto. 
Psalms66:9 Izi nuna shemppora paxa woththides; nuni kundontta malakka naagides. 
Psalms66:10 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni nuna paacca xeelladasa; bira seerisi geeshshiza mala nuna geeshshadasa. 
Psalms66:11 Neni nuna woximaden gelththadasa; Nu zokkonkka deexo ba7o ba7isadasa. 
Psalms66:12 Nu morkketi nuna hu7era duge yedhdhana mala ooththadasa; nuni haaththa giddoranne tama giddora kanththidos; gido attiin ha7i nuna ishalo soho ehadasa. 
Psalms66:13 Tani xuugettiza yarshora ne geeshshasoho gelada ta adina nees gaththana. 
Psalms66:14 Tani metotida wode ta doonappe ta kessidayssa ta inxarsan ta adinettida adina ta gaththana. 
Psalms66:15 Tani nees xuugettiza yarshos modhdhota shiishshana; sawo yarshos dharshota, kormatanne korbeta shiishshana." 
Psalms66:16 Intteno Xoossas yayyizaytoo! Ubbati haa yiidi siyite; Xoossi taas ooththidayssa tani inttes yootana. 
Psalms66:17 Ta qaala dhoqqu histtada tani izakko waassadis; ta inxarsankka izas galata shiishshadis. 
Psalms66:18 Tani ta wozinan nagara genththidaakko, Goday ta woosa siyenna." 
Psalms66:19 Gido attiin Xoossi tumappe taas siyides; ta woosaakka ezgides. 
Psalms66:20 Ta woosa kadhontta, ba mernaa siiqo taappe haassontta Xoossay galatetto." 
Psalms67:1 Xoossi nuus qadhettonne nuna anjjo; ba ayfeso nu bolla poo7iso. 
Psalms67:2 Ne ogeti sa7a bollan, ashshiza ne wolqqayka kawoteththata ubbaa giddon erettetto." 
Psalms67:3 Abeet Xoossawu! Asay nena galato; kawoteth ubbay nees galata shiishsho. 
Psalms67:4 Neni asas suureteththan pirdiza gishshas sa7a bollaka ne deraa kaaleththiza gishshas kawoteththati ufayetetto; ililishekka nees yexxetto. 
Psalms67:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Asay nena galato; kawoteth ubbay nees galata shiishsho. 
Psalms67:6 Biittay kath immana; Xoossi, nu Xoossay nuna anjjana." 
Psalms67:7 Xoossi nuna anjjana; Sa7a gaxa gakkanaas diza asay ubbay izas yayyana. 
Psalms68:1 Xoossi dendo; iza morkketi laalettetto; iza ixxizayti iza sinththafe baqatetto. 
Psalms68:2 Cuway carkon laalettiza mala neni istta laalla; muqaadday taman seeriza mala, iitati Xoossa sinththafe seeri dhayetto." 
Psalms68:3 Xilloti gidikko ufayetetto; Xoossa sinththan ufayssan hombocetto; qasseka maguletto. 
Psalms68:4 Xoossas yexxite; iza sunththas galata mazamure yexxite. Shaara bollara hemettizayssa dhoqqu dhoqqu histtite; izas sunththay GODAA; intteka iza sinththan keehi ufayettite. 
Psalms68:5 Xoossi ba geeshshasohon dishe aaway bayndaytas aawa; qasse am7etaska pirdiza daanna. 
Psalms68:6 Xoossi barkka diza bizzatas soo as immees; qasho keeththan dizayta birshidi istta ishalon woththees. Makkallanchchati gidikko suulliza bazzon de7ana. 
Psalms68:7 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni ne asa kaaleththida wode, neni isttara bazzo kanththida wode," 
Psalms68:8 Siina Xoossa sinththan, Isra7eele Xoossa sinththan biittay qaaxxides; saloti ira duge tigida." 
Psalms68:9 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni koshshiza keena ira immadasa; ladda biittaaka araddisadasa. 
Psalms68:10 Ne derezikka izo baas duussaso histtida; abeet Xoossawu! Manqotas koshshizaaz neni kiyateththan immadasa. 
Psalms68:11 Goday qaala yeddides; he kiitaa daro maccassati deraas awajjida. 
Psalms68:12 Istti, «Kawoti ba olanchchatara di7o gishetti ekkida." 
Psalms68:13 Dorsata naaganaas guyen attidayti birappe oosettida qefeti bollara xolqiza worqqan tiyettida haraphphe misle demmida» gida. 
Psalms68:14 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay kawota laallida wode, Xalmoone Zuma bolla shach bukisides." 
Psalms68:15 Baasaane zumati wogga gita zumata; Baasaane zumata bolla daro poggonoti deettes. 
Psalms68:16 Daro poggonoti de7iza zumatoo! Xoossi daanaas doorida zumaza intte ays miqqaynen xeelleetii? GODAY izan mernaas de7ana. 
Psalms68:17 Xoossa para-gaareti daro shiyan qoodettizayta; Goday Siina zumaappe ba geeshshasoho yides. 
Psalms68:18 GODAWU! Di7o ekkada pude ne duussas kezadasa; asa ubbaafe imota ekkadasa; haray attoshin makkallanchchatappeka ekkadasa; 
Psalms68:19 Hach hach nu tooho tookkiza Goday, nuna ashshiza nu Xoossay galatetto." 
Psalms68:20 Be7ite! Nu Xoossi ashshiza Xoossa! Hayqoppe attana dandayettizay GODAY ashshiina. 
Psalms68:21 Xoossi tumappe ba morkketa hu7e kinchchana; nagara ogen hemettiza goofaranchchata hu7e qoo7ereththana. 
Psalms68:22 Goday, «Tani intte morkketa Baasaaneppe zaarada ehana; tani istta ciimma abba giddofe kessada guye zaarana." 
Psalms68:23 Neni ne morkketa suuth yedhdha aadhdhana; ne kanatikka morkketa suuththafe bantta gisha laaccana» gides. 
Psalms68:24 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne xoono cifray ubbaan beettees; ta Xoossanne ta kawoy azhaban ba geeshsha soo gelththishe qonccees. 
Psalms68:25 Yexxizayti sinththan, qasse karabe baqqiza geela7oti giddon, diixxizayti guyen azhabi beetteettes." 
Psalms68:26 Istti, «Xoossaa kumeththa shiiqon galatite; intteno Isra7eele zereththato GODAA galatite» geettes." 
Psalms68:27 He cifran ubbaafe kaalotiza Biniyaame zareti kaaleththeettes. Kaallidi Yuhuda daannati bantta butten butten beettes; wurseththan Zaabiloone daannatinne Niftaaleme daannati kaalleettes. 
Psalms68:28 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne wolqqa qonccisa. Hayssafe kase ne nuus ooththidayssaththo ha7ikka ne minoteth nuna bessa. 
Psalms68:29 Yerusalaamen diza ne Keeththa gishshas kawoti imota nees ekki yaana. 
Psalms68:30 Maqqa giddon diza do7ata neni seera. Booratanne marata wude misatiza kawota neni laalla; istti gulbatidi bantta bira nees giirana mala ooththa; olettanaas yeemottiza asata laalla. 
Psalms68:31 Gita asati Gibxeppe yaana; Tophphiyay ba kushe Xoossako miccana. 
Psalms68:32 Intteno sa7a kawoteththatoo! Xoossas yexxite; Godaas galata mazamure shiishshite. 
Psalms68:33 Beniisoppe doommidi diza salotappe bollara bizayssas yexxite; izi ba wolqqama cenggurssa guunththan yootishin ezgi siyite. 
Psalms68:34 Iza teemay Isra7eele bollana; iza wolqqayka salonna. Hessa gishshas Xoossa wolqqa awajjite. 
Psalms68:35 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni ne keeththafe qonccashe malalisaasa; Isra7eele Xoossay ba deraas minoteththinne wolqqa immees. Xoossi galatetto. 
Psalms69:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Haaththa kixay taas qoodhe gakkida gishshas ne tana ashsha. 
Psalms69:2 Tohoy eqqizasoy baynda caren mitettadis; ciimma haaththa giddo geladis; haaththa dambalay tana mittana hanees. 
Psalms69:3 Tani maado demmanaas waassashe daaburadis; taas qoodhe poorandeyka melides. Ta Xoossa naagon dishin ta ayfey baljumides. 
Psalms69:4 Tana mela coo ixxizayti ta hu7e binanappe daro. Wordora tana morkkizaytinne tana dhayssanawu koyzayti darida. Ta kaysa ekkontta miish tana qanxxa gida. 
Psalms69:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta eeyateththa neni eraasa; ta ooththida nagaray neeppe qotettibeenna. 
Psalms69:6 Abeet Godawu, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Nena hidota ooththidayti yeellatopetto; Abeet Isra7eele Xoossawu! Nena minththi koyzayti ta gaason kawuyofetto." 
Psalms69:7 Tani cash ne gishshas gaada dandayadis; ta ayfesoy yeellatides. 
Psalms69:8 Tani ta ishanttas imath, qasse ta aayey naytas allaga gidadis." 
Psalms69:9 Tani ne keeththas mishettiza mishoy tana tama mala xuuggees; Asay nena cayida cashshay tana gakkides. 
Psalms69:10 Ta xoomashe yeekkadis; hessankka ta qidhettadis. 
Psalms69:11 Tani kayo may7o may7adis; isttaskka tani tosses attadis. 
Psalms69:12 Tani katama geliza pengen uttizaytas zigirsas attadis; maththottizaytas yeththas gidadis. 
Psalms69:13 Abeet GODAWU! Tani gidikko nena woossays. Abeet Xoossawu! Ne doorida wode ta woosa siya; ne mernaa siiqon ne ashshiza ashoza tana bessa. 
Psalms69:14 Caren mitettontta mala tana ashsha. Tana ixxizaytappe tana naaga; ciimma haaththafekka tana ashsha. 
Psalms69:15 Di7o haaththi tana efoppo; ciimma abbay tana mittofo; ciimma ollay ta bolla woddofo. 
Psalms69:16 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaa siiqo kiyateththa mala taas zaaro imma; Ne qadheta daron taakko simma. 
Psalms69:17 Taappe ne ayllezappe ne sinththa genththofa; tani waayettiza gishshas taas eeson zaaro imma. 
Psalms69:18 Neni taakko shiiqada tana wozza; ta morkketappekka tana kessa la7a yedda. 
Psalms69:19 Ta bolla gakkida cashsha, yeellateththaanne kawushshateththaa ne eraasa; ta morkketakka hu7en hu7en ne demmaasa." 
Psalms69:20 Cashshi ta wozina madunththiin ta hidota qanxxadis. Taas qadhettiza as koyadis; gido attiin issi asikka deenna. Tana minththeththiza as koyadis; gido attiin issaadeka demmabeekke. 
Psalms69:21 Tani gafida wode taas cammiza kath immida. Tani saamettida wode taas caala phanqida ushshu immida. 
Psalms69:22 Istti miza maadday isttas woximade gido. Istti yarsho yarshidi miza maadday isttas gite gido. 
Psalms69:23 Xeellontta mala istta ayfey goozetto; istta zokkoy quunni atto. 
Psalms69:24 Neni ne hanqoza istta bolla gussa; istti qoppontta dishin ne boshay istta bolla gakko. 
Psalms69:25 Istta duussasoy kays gido; istta dunkaanen oonikka dooppo. 
Psalms69:26 Ays giikko neni qaxxaydayta istti yedeththeettes; qasse neni madunththida asata bolla meto darseettes. 
Psalms69:27 Istti nagara bolla nagara gujji gujji baana mala aggaaga; ne istta maaroppa. 
Psalms69:28 Istti de7o maxaafappe qucettetto; xillotara issife mazgabettofetto. 
Psalms69:29 Gido attiin tani sakettashenne waayettashe de7ays. Abeet Xoossawu! Ne tana ashshadanne naaga. 
Psalms69:30 Tani Xoossa sunththa yeththan galatana; galata yeththan iza gitateththaa qonccisana. 
Psalms69:31 Hayssi sangettontta boorappenne korma yarshofe aadhdhidi GODAA ufayssana. 
Psalms69:32 Qohettidayti tana Xoossay ashshidayssa be7idi ufayetetto. Intteno Xoossako shiiqizayto intte wozinay minetto. 
Psalms69:33 Ays giikko GODAY hiyeesata siyees; qasho keeththan de7iza ba asaakka kadhenna. 
Psalms69:34 Saloynne sa7ay, abbaynne iza giddon woxxi qaaxxiza ubbati Xoossaa galatetto." 
Psalms69:35 Gaasoykka Xoossi Xiyoone ashshana; Yuhuda katamata zaaridi essana. Iza derey he biitta laattidi heen de7ana. 
Psalms69:36 Iza oosanchchata zarey he biitta laattana; iza sunththa siiqizayti heen de7ana. 
Psalms70:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Tana ashshanawu taakko haa simma; abeet GODAWU! Tana maaddanawu eesota. 
Psalms70:2 Tana wodhanawu koyzayti yeellatettonne shirotetto; Tani qohettanayssa amottizayti, kawuyidi guye simmetto." 
Psalms70:3 Ta bolla, «Izas hashshu! Hashshu!» gidayti yeellatidi guye simmetto." 
Psalms70:4 Gido attiin nena koyza ubbati nenan ufayetettonne hashshu getto; qasse ne atoteththaa dosiza ubbati, «Xoossi dhoqqu dhoqqu go!» getto." 
Psalms70:5 Tani hiyeesanne metotanchcha; abeet Xoossawu! Eeson taakko gakka. Tana maaddizaynne ashshizay nena; abeet GODAWU! gam7ofa. 
Psalms71:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni taas ta baqata attizaso; mulekka ne tana yeellasoppa. 
Psalms71:2 Ne xilloteththan tana kessa ekka; ne hayththa taakko yeggada tana ashsha. 
Psalms71:3 Ne taas ubba wode geemetta attiza mino zaalla gida; tana ashshanaas ne azaza; taas mino miixaynne zaallay nena. 
Psalms71:4 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Iitata kusheppe, genanchchatappenne menxe iitatappe tana ashsha." 
Psalms71:5 Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Ta hidotay nena; yelagateththa wodeppe doommada ta ammanettizay nena. 
Psalms71:6 Tani yelettoosofe doommada ta nenan zemppadis; ta aayey uloppe ta yelettana mala ooththiday nena; ubba wode ta nena galatays. 
Psalms71:7 Daro asay tana dumma ayfen xeellides; neni gidikko ta baqata attiza wogga zaalla. 
Psalms71:8 Gallas kumeth ne bonchcho ta yootanaas, ta doonan galatay kumides." 
Psalms71:9 Tani cimmida woden tana oloppa; ta wolqqay ixxida woden tana aggofa. 
Psalms71:10 Ays giikko ta morkketi tana hilida; tana wodhanawu koyzayti ta bolla iita maqettida. 
Psalms71:11 Istti, «Xoossi iza aggides; iza ashshanaykka deenna; hessa gishshas ane iza gooddi oykkoos» gida." 
Psalms71:12 Abeet Xoossawu! Taappe haakkofa. Abeet ta Xoossawu! Tana maaddanaas elela. 
Psalms71:13 Tana mootizayti yeellatidi dhayetto. Tana qohanawu koyzayti yeellanne kawushshateth may7etto. 
Psalms71:14 Tani gidikko ubbato nena hidota ooththays. Tani galata bolla galata nees gujjana. 
Psalms71:15 Tani ay likke haasayanaakko erontta aggikokka gallas kumeth ta doonay ne xilloteththa gishshassinne ne atoteththa gishshas haasayees; 
Psalms71:16 Abeet Godawu, Xoossawu! Tani yaada ne wolqqama ooso awajjana; qasseka ne xilloteththaa xalla yootana." 
Psalms71:17 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni tana yelagateththafe doommada tamaarsadasa; tanikka hanno gakkanawu malalisiza ne oosoza awajjays. 
Psalms71:18 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne maataa guyeppe yaana yeletas, ne wolqqa guyeppe yaana dere ubbaas, ta qonccisana gakkanaassinne ta cimada puulumana gakkanaas ne tana aggofa." 
Psalms71:19 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne xilloteththay salo gakkides; Abeet Xoossawu! Neni gita miish ooththadasa; nena misatizay oonikka deenna. 
Psalms71:20 Neni ta bolla daro meto ehadasa; gidikkoka neni tana ciimma ollafe goochcha kessadasa; ta de7o zaara ooraththadasa. 
Psalms71:21 Neni ta bonchcho kaseyssafe darsana; neni tana zaareththadakka minththeththana. 
Psalms71:22 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Ne tumateththa gishshas tani nena diiththan galatana; abeet Isra7eele Geeshshawu! Tani maasinqon nena sabbana. 
Psalms71:23 Ta wozinay ufayssan kumidi nees yexxiza wode, neni wozzida ta shemppoya nees ililawus." 
Psalms71:24 Ta inxarsay ne xilloteththa gishshas gallas kumeth haasayees; ta qoheteth koyzayti yeellatidanne kawuyida. 
Psalms72:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Suure pirda kawos, ne xilloteththaka kawo naas imma." 
Psalms72:2 Histtiko izi ne deraas xilloteththan pirdana; naaqettidaytasikka suure pirdana. 
Psalms72:3 Zumati dureteth ehana; zumbullatikka xilloteth ne deraas ehana. 
Psalms72:4 Metotidayta gishshas izi mootettana; hiyeesata izi ashshana; un7eththizayssaka izi liiqisana. 
Psalms72:5 Awaynne aginay diza wode ubbaan yeletappe yeleta gakkanawu asay izas haaretto. 
Psalms72:6 Kawoy shooqan bukkiza ira malanne gade kalssiza puuse ira mala gidana. 
Psalms72:7 Izi diza layth ubbaan xilloy ciiyana; aginay dhayana gakkanaas biitta bolla saroteththi darana. 
Psalms72:8 Abbafe biidi abba gakkanaas, Efiraaxise Shaafaappe sa7a gaxa gakkanaas izi haarana." 
Psalms72:9 Bazzon mehe xalla haari aqizayti, iza morkketi gudulla laaccana." 
Psalms72:10 Tarseese kawotinne harurota kawoti izas giira ehana. Saabanne Saaba kawoti izas kushe genththo ehana. 
Psalms72:11 Kawoti ubbay izas gulbatana; kawoteththay ubbay izas haarettana. 
Psalms72:12 Metotanchchay waassiza wode, manqonne maadoy baynda as izi ashshana." 
Psalms72:13 Hiyeesatassinne manqotas izi qadhettees; metotanchchata shemppoka izi hayqoppe ashshees. 
Psalms72:14 Istta shemppo qohoppenne geneppe izi ashshana; istta suuththay iza sinththan al7o. 
Psalms72:15 Kawoy shemppo gam7o; Saaba biitta worqqay izas imetto. Pacey baynda izas woossetto; gallas ubbaan istti iza anjjetto. 
Psalms72:16 Biittan daro kaththay mokko; zumati kaththan kamettetto; Biittay Libaanoose mala kaththa biitta gido; maatay demba kumiza mala katama kumo. 
Psalms72:17 Kawoza sunththi mernaas minni de7o; arshey de7iza keena xeygettishe gam7o. Kawoteth ubbay iza baggara anjjetto; dere ubbay iza, «Ne anjjettidaade» gi anjjo." 
Psalms72:18 Malalisiza miish barkka ooththiza GODAY, Xoossay, Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto." 
Psalms72:19 Iza bonchcho sunththay mernaas galatetto; biitta ubbay iza bonchchon kumo. Amiin! Amiin! 
Psalms72:20 Isseye naa Dawite woosay hayssan polettides. 
Psalms73:1 Wozina geesh gidida Isra7eele asaas Xoossi ay mala kiya! 
Psalms73:2 Gido attiin ta tohoy dhuphettiin ta kundaychchada guuththason attadis. 
Psalms73:3 Ays giikko iita asatanne makkallanchchata dureteththaa be7ada tanikka istta mala hananaas amottadis. 
Psalms73:4 Isttas tuggay deenna; istta asateththay payyanne mino. 
Psalms73:5 Istti hara asay tuggatiza mala tuggatettenna; hara asa malakka metoti erettenna. 
Psalms73:6 Hessa gishshas istti otoreteth alleqo mala qoodhen aaththeettes; makkallateth afala mala may7eettes. 
Psalms73:7 Istta wozinappe iita qofay pulttees; bantta ayfe kessi dereqeettes. 
Psalms73:8 Istti qidheettessinne iita haasayeettes; istti bantta otoron harata un7eththanawu mandeettes. 
Psalms73:9 Istti salon diza Xoossaa bantta doonan cayeettes; Sa7an de7iza asaa bantta inxarsan dukkeettes. 
Psalms73:10 Hessa gishshas dere ubbay isttako goochchees; istti yootizayssaka ubbaa eeson ammaneettes. 
Psalms73:11 Istti, «Xoossi ay erizee? Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossas erateththi dizee?» geettes." 
Psalms73:12 Hekko iitati hayssa misateettes; istti ubbato wudu gonttayta; dureteththi qoodhe gakkidayta. 
Psalms73:13 Histtiin tani wozina geeshshateththan naagidayssi tana ay maaddidee! Ta kushe ta xilloteththan meeccidayssi coo tana dhallibeenna. 
Psalms73:14 Gallas kumeth tani meto beyadis; wontiin wontiin tani qaxxayettadis. 
Psalms73:15 Tani istti haasayzayssa mala haasayana qoppidaakko ne deraas ta ammanettontta as gidana. 
Psalms73:16 Tani ha yo7oza shaakka eranaas qoppadis gido attiin ta erappe bolla gidides. 
Psalms73:17 Hessika tani Xoossa Geeshshasoho gelana gakkanaassinne iitata wurseththa be7ana gakkanaassa. 
Psalms73:18 Addaka ne istta hallixizaason woththadasa; neni istta duge bashshaso yeddadasa. 
Psalms73:19 Istti hassa7ontta eeson dhayda; dagaman issoyka attontta dippi gida. 
Psalms73:20 Abeet Godawu! Neni dendiza wode asi dhiskofe beeggiin dhayza agumo mala istti dhayana. 
Psalms73:21 Tani yiillotida wodenne ta wozinaykka madunxida wode," 
Psalms73:22 tani qofay baynda dammadis; tani ne sinththan miiza mala gidadis. 
Psalms73:23 Gido attiin tani ubbatokka nenara days; ta ushachcha kushezakka neni oykkadasa. 
Psalms73:24 Ne zoren tana kaaleththadasa; hessafe guye neni tana bonchchos efana. 
Psalms73:25 Salon neeppe attiin taas haray ooni dizee? Sa7ankka neeppe hara oonakka koykke. 
Psalms73:26 Ta wolqqaynne ta wozinay daaburanaas dandayees; gido attiin Xoossi ta wozinas minoteththinne taas mernaa qaada. 
Psalms73:27 Neeppe haakkizayti dhayana; nees ammanettonttayta ubbaa neni dhayssana. 
Psalms73:28 Gido attiin taas Xoossako shiiqoy lo7o; ne ooso ubbaa yootana mala. Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAA ta baqata attizaso ooththadis. 
Psalms74:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni nuna mernaas ays yegga aggadii? Heenththasohon diza dorsata bolla ne hanqoy ays suullidee? 
Psalms74:2 Beni neni doorida ne deraa nees buzo histta wozzida zareta hassa7a; neni de7ida Xiyoone Zuma qoppa. 
Psalms74:3 Ane laalettida Xoossa Keeththaza yuuya xeella; Morkketi izan diza ubbaa miish dhayssida. 
Psalms74:4 Ne morkketi ne soon, «Nuni xoonidos» giidi gerereettes. Xoono malata giidi bantta bandira essida." 
Psalms74:5 Istti wora giddon mith qanxxanawu bantta kaltta dhoqqu histti oykkida as misatida. 
Psalms74:6 Hiillanchchati ooththida alleqota kalttaninne madooshan menththereththi yeggida. 
Psalms74:7 Xoossa Keeththaa taman xuuggidi dhayssida; ne xeygettizasoza tunisida. 
Psalms74:8 Istti bantta wozinan, «Istta nuni mulera un7eththana» giidi qoppida; Deraan Xoossi goynettizasohota ubbaa taman xuuggida." 
Psalms74:9 Nu shaakki eranaas malatay deenna; hayssafe guye nabey dendenna; Hayssi awude gakkanawu hananaakko eriza asi nu giddon deenna. 
Psalms74:10 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne morkketi awude gakkanawu ne bolla qilccanee? Istti ne sunththa mernaas kadhishe daanee? 
Psalms74:11 Ne kusheza miccada ays istta dhayssikii? Ne ushachcha kusheza ays shophpha garsan lokkoma uttadii? 
Psalms74:12 Abeet Xoossawu! Benippeka ta kawoy nena; neni biitta bolla atoteth ehadasa. 
Psalms74:13 Ne gita wolqqan abba shaakkadasa; iza giddon diza miimintteta hu7e qoo7ereththadasa. 
Psalms74:14 Lewataane geetettiza miimintte hu7eta dinccadasa; iza asho bazzon diza medhetatas quma ooththa immaasa. 
Psalms74:15 Neni pulttotanne kanchcheta doya yeddadasa; ubba wode goggiza shaafata qasse melissadasa. 
Psalms74:16 Gallassay neessa; qammayka neessa; qasse arshenne agina istti dizason minththa woththiday nena. 
Psalms74:17 Biittas zawa woththiday, balgonne bone medhdhiday nena." 
Psalms74:18 Abeet GODAWU! Ne morkketi ne bolla wostti qilccidaakko, qasse eeya asati ne sunththaa wostti kadhidaakko qoppa." 
Psalms74:19 Nees haarettizayta shemppo wora do7atas aaththa immofa; metotida ne deraa mernaas dogoppa. 
Psalms74:20 Biittan diza dhuma sohoti ubbay makkallanchchatan kumida gishshas neni nuus caaqqida caaqo qaala qoppa. 
Psalms74:21 Naaqettidayti yeellati simmofetto; manqotinne metotidayti ne sunththa galatetto. 
Psalms74:22 Abeet Xoossawu! Denda! Neni ne sunththas mootetta; eeyati gallas ubbaan nena kadhizayssa qoppa. 
Psalms74:23 Ne morkketi ne bolla waassiza waasoza, nena ixxizayti ne bolla ceeqettiza ceeqeteththaanne istta wocama dogoppa." 
Psalms75:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Nena galatoos; ne nuus mata gidida gishshas ne sunththas galata shiishshoos; asaykka malalisiza ne ooso ubbaa gishshas haasayees. 
Psalms75:2 Xoossi, «Ta bara woththida woden suure pirda pirdanay tana." 
Psalms75:3 Sa7aynne iza bolla diza medheta ubbay qaaxxiza wode sa7a tuussata minththa essiday tana. 
Psalms75:4 Otoranchchata, ‹Otorettofte› gays; iitatakka, ‹Intte makkallofte." 
Psalms75:5 Ne kace otoron dhoqqu dhoqqu histtofa; ne qoodhe qaaththa haasayoppa› gays» gees. 
Psalms75:6 Bonchchoy arshey mokkizasoppe woykko wullizasoppe woykko bazzofe yeenna. 
Psalms75:7 Gido attiin suure pirdizay Xoossa; izi issaa bolla pirdees; issaa xillisees. 
Psalms75:8 GODAA kushen wancay dees; izan hoommotiza hanqo woyne ushshi kumi uttides; he ushshaza gede kare gussides; sa7an diza makkallanchchati hessa uyida; istti orccoka ashshontta congorsida. 
Psalms75:9 Tani gidikko hayssa mernaas awajjana; Yaaqoobe Xoossaka mazamuren sabbana. 
Psalms75:10 Tani iitata kace ubbaa menththana; xillota kace gidikko dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana. 
Psalms76:1 Xoossi Yuhudan erettides; iza sunththika Isra7eelen gita. 
Psalms76:2 Iza dunkaaney Saleemen dees; izas duussasoyka Xiyoone. 
Psalms76:3 Izi hessan dukkiza wondafe yiishshaa, gondalle, giththa mashshatanne hara ola miishshata menththereththi yeggides." 
Psalms76:4 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni bonchcho may7ada phoollaasa; Ne teemateththi gita zumatappeka aadhdhees. 
Psalms76:5 Gooba olanchchati bonqqettida; isttafe issoyka ba kushe denththana dandaybeenna; istti wolqqama dhisko dhiskida. 
Psalms76:6 Abeet Yaaqoobe Xoossawu! Ne hanqo gaason toga asatinne toga parati kundi attida. 
Psalms76:7 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni yashshaasa! Ne hanqoy suullida wode ne sinththan oonee eqqanay? 
Psalms76:8 Neni saloppe pirda sissadasa; biittay yayyada sirphi gadus. 
Psalms76:9 Abeet Xoossawu! Hayssi sa7a bolla un7ettidayta ashshanaas neni pirdas dendiin handes. 
Psalms76:10 Neni as hanqikokka hessi ne bonchchos gidees; olappe attidayti ne ba7aale bonchchana. 
Psalms76:11 GODAA intte Xoossaas adinite; he adinettidayssaka gaththite; iza yuushon diza ubbati yashissiza izas imota ekki yiite. 
Psalms76:12 Izi otorettiza daannata kawushshana; wolqqama kawotakka izi yashissana. 
Psalms77:1 Tani ta qaala dhoqqu histtada Xoossako waassays; tana siyana mala ta iza woossays. 
Psalms77:2 Tani metotida gallas Xoossa koyays; omarsika shempontta ta kusheta izakko miccays; gidikkoka tani minettanaas dandayabeekke. 
Psalms77:3 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta nena qoppashe ceecays; ta yuushsha qoppashe keeha daaburdes. 
Psalms77:4 Ta ayfeppe dhisko dhayssadasa; taas gaanaazi dhayana gakkanaas ceecadis. 
Psalms77:5 Tani aadhdhida wodeta qoppadis; kase aadhdhida layththatakka hassa7adis. 
Psalms77:6 Ta yexxidayssa giddoth yuushsha qoppadis; tani wozinan akeekadis; ta ayanay tana denththeththiin," 
Psalms77:7 «Goday nuna mernaas yeggi agganee? Hayssafe guye nuna lo7o bessennee? 
Psalms77:8 Nuna siiqizayssa mulera aggidee? izi yootida hidotay shaarettidee? 
Psalms77:9 Xoossi ba maarizayssa aggidee? Hanqon ba qadheta aggidee?» ga oychchays. 
Psalms77:10 Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossawu! Tana qohiday, ne ushachcha kushey kaseyssaththo nuna maaddontta aggoyssa." 
Psalms77:11 GODAWU! Ne oosota tani qoppana; neni beni wode ooththida malalisiza oosota ubbaa ta yuushsha qoppana. 
Psalms77:12 Ne ooththida ubbaa tani zaara zaarada qoppana; ne wolqqama oosota ubbaa tani akeekana. 
Psalms77:13 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne ogey geeshsha; nu Xoossaa mala hara gita xoossi oonee? 
Psalms77:14 Neni malalisizaaz ooththiza Xoossa; dereta giddon ne wolqqa bessaasa. 
Psalms77:15 Yaaqoobenne Yooseefe zereth gidida ne dereta neni ne wolqqan wozzadasa. 
Psalms77:16 Abeet Xoossawu! Haaththati nena be7ida; Haaththati nena be7idi yayyida; ciimma abbatikka kokkorida. 
Psalms77:17 Shaarati ira immida; salon daday guummides; wolqqanththi wawaci gides. 
Psalms77:18 Ne dada gunththay gote carko giddon kooshimides; ne wolqqanththa phoolleththi sa7a poo7isides; biittayka qaaxxi kokkorides. 
Psalms77:19 Neni abba giddora hemettaasa; ciimma abba giddora kanththaasa; gidikkoka ne bida geedoy erettenna. 
Psalms77:20 Musenne Aaroone kushen neni ne dereza dorsa wude mala kaaleththadasa. 
Psalms78:1 Ta derezoo ta nena tamaarsizayssa siya; ta doonappe ke7iza qaala ezga. 
Psalms78:2 Tani haasayza haasaya leemison doommays; beniisofe qotan diza xuura yo7o qonccisays. 
Psalms78:3 Nu siyidayssinne nu eridayssi, nu aawatikka nuus yootidayssa." 
Psalms78:4 He yo7ota nuni istta naytappe qottoko; GODAAS bessiza galata, iza wolqqanne malalisiza iza ooso yiza yeletataskka nuni yootana." 
Psalms78:5 Izi Yaaqoobe zaretas azazo, Isra7eele asaas woga immides; kase nu aawati bantta nayta he wogata tamaarsana mala azazides." 
Psalms78:6 Hessika kaalliza yeletay istta eranaassa; qasseka buro yelettana nayti eranaassanne isttika bantta naytas yootanaassa. 
Psalms78:7 He naytikka Xoossan ammanettana; izi ooththida oosokka dogettenna; iza azazotakka istti naagana. 
Psalms78:8 Istti kase bantta aawata mala wozina muumenne makkallanchcha gidettenna; istti Xoossa sinththan suure gidettenna; Xoossaska ammanettibeettenna. 
Psalms78:9 Efreeme nayti olas wondafenne yiish giigsi kezida; gido attiin ola gallas guye simmida. 
Psalms78:10 Istti Xoossa caaqo qaala naagibeettenna; iza wogaa mala dontta ixxida. 
Psalms78:11 Istti izi ooththida ooso balida; izi istti bessida malalisiza hanotakka dogida. 
Psalms78:12 Izi istta aawati be7ishin Gibxe biittan Xaanoose demban malaata ooththides. 
Psalms78:13 Abba shaakkidi giddora istta pinththides; izi haaththa yaanne haa shaakkidi goda mala essides. 
Psalms78:14 Izi istta gallas shaaran, omars tama poo7on kaaleththides." 
Psalms78:15 Izi bazzon zaalla phalqidi abba mala daro haath istta ushshides. 
Psalms78:16 Zaallafe haath pulttisidi shaafa mala duge gogissides. 
Psalms78:17 Gido attiin istti iza bolla nagara ooso gede gujjida; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa bolla bazzon makkallida. 
Psalms78:18 Istti keehi amottida kath oychchida; erishe ba wozinan Xoossa paaccida. 
Psalms78:19 Istti Xoossa bolla, «Bazzon Xoossi nuus maana kath immana dandayzee?" 
Psalms78:20 Zaallaa shociin pulttoy ke7idi shaafa haaththi goggides; histtiin izi nuus miza kath immanawu dandayzee? Woykko ba asaas asho immanawu dandayzee?» gi haasayda. 
Psalms78:21 GODAY hessa siyida wode istta bolla daro hanqettides; Yaaqoobe zareta bolla tamay eexxides; Isra7eele bolla iza hanqoy dari dari bides. 
Psalms78:22 Ays giikko istti Xoossan ammanibeettenna; izi ashshizayssaka ammanettibeettenna. 
Psalms78:23 Izi gidikko bollafe shaara azazides; salo pengetakka doydes. 
Psalms78:24 Istti maana mala isttas manna bukisides; saloppe kath isttas immides. 
Psalms78:25 Kiitanchchata kath asay mides; Xoossi istti kalli miin tirpi attiza kath immides. 
Psalms78:26 Arshey mokkiza baggara saloppe carkoy carkana mala ooththides; ba wolqqan dugeha bagga carko denththeththides. 
Psalms78:27 Izi asaas asho gudulla biitta mala, abba doonan diza ace mala daro piradhdhiza kafota yeddides." 
Psalms78:28 Istti dunkaani uttidaso dunkaanaa yuushon wodhdhida. 
Psalms78:29 Istti amottidayssa isttas immides; isttika kalli mida. 
Psalms78:30 Gido attiin istti ba moosaa aaththontta buro muussa bolla de7ishin," 
Psalms78:31 Xoossa hanqoy istta bolla wodhdhides; istta giddofe mino asata wodhides; Isra7eeleppe payya naateththata mulqqides. 
Psalms78:32 Hayssi ubbay haniinkka istti nagara ooththizayssa aggibeettenna; malalisiza iza oosotakka be7idi ammanibeettenna. 
Psalms78:33 Hessa gishshas izi istta layththata peeno mala aaththides; istti diza wodeta hirgan wursides. 
Psalms78:34 Xoossi isttafe guuththata wodhiin attidayti ba nagara paaxida; wozinappe koyishe Xoossako simmida. 
Psalms78:35 Istti Xoossi isttas Zaalla gididayssanne Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossi istta wozzidayssa hassa7ida. 
Psalms78:36 Gido attiin istti bantta inxarsan izas wordotidi bantta doonan cimmida. 
Psalms78:37 Istta wozinay Xoossan minni eqqibeenna; izi isttara caaqettida caaqon ammanettibeettenna. 
Psalms78:38 Gido attiin izi istta maarizaade gidida gishshas istta iitateththaa atto gides; isttaka dhayssibeenna; daro wode ba hanqoza istta bollafe teqqides; ba hanqoza bosha ubbaa istta bolla yeddibeenna. 
Psalms78:39 Issino carki aadhdhidaappe guye simmontta carko mala asho may7ida as gididayssa akeekides. 
Psalms78:40 Istti bazzon aappunto iza bolla makkallidoo! Mela bazzon aappunto iza lancissidoo! 
Psalms78:41 Istti zaari zaaridi Xoossa paaccida; Isra7eele Geeshshaa madunththida. 
Psalms78:42 Izi istta morkketappe wozzida gallassatanne iza wolqqaa dogida. 
Psalms78:43 Izi Gibxe biittan malaata, Xaanoose demban malalisizaaz ooththidayssa qoppibeettenna." 
Psalms78:44 Istta shaafa haaththa suuththan laammides; hessa gishshas Gibxe asati he shaafatappe uyanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Psalms78:45 Istta olanaas udunxxetanne istta biitta dhayssanaas shodhdheta kiittides. 
Psalms78:46 Isttas mokkida kaththa gumbaros; istti ooththi daaburda kaththaa booles immides. 
Psalms78:47 Istta woyne tura shachchan, istta balase miththatakka kenchchon dhayssides." 
Psalms78:48 Istta miizata shachchan wodhides; istta meheta wolqqanththan xuuggi wursides. 
Psalms78:49 Ba mino hanqo, bosha, bashshinne dhayssiza kiitanchchatan istta bolla yeddides." 
Psalms78:50 Ba hanqozas oge giigsides; istta iita harges aaththi immides; gido attiin hayqoppe ashshibeenna. 
Psalms78:51 Gibxen yelettida bayra nayta ubbaa wodhides; Kaame dunkaanen koyro yelettida nayta wursides. 
Psalms78:52 Gido attiin izi ba asaa dorsa mala kessi heemmides; wude mala bazzon kaaleththides. 
Psalms78:53 Izi istta saron kaaleththides; isttika hirgibeettenna; istta morkketa gidikko abbay mittides. 
Psalms78:54 Histtidi ba geeshsha biitta, ba ushachcha kushen xooni oykkida zuma efides." 
Psalms78:55 Izi istta sinththafe kawoteththaa gooddidi istta biitta Isra7eele zaretas gishereththi immidi istta laatissides; Isra7eele asaa istta morkketa keeththan woththides. 
Psalms78:56 Istti gidikko Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa bolla makkallida; iza paaccidi iza wogatakka naagontta ixxida. 
Psalms78:57 Istti beni bantta aawata mala makkallanchchatanne kaddizayta gidida; ammanththontta bokka tooman eqqida toora mala gidida. 
Psalms78:58 Istti goynniza dhoqqasohotan iza yiillochchida; bantta eeqa xoossatan iza qanaatissida. 
Psalms78:59 Histtiin Xoossi hessa siyidi keehi hanqettides; Isra7eele mulera yeggi aggaagides. 
Psalms78:60 Asaa giddon izi tokkida dunkaana Seelon ba dizasoza yeggi aggides. 
Psalms78:61 Xoossa wolqqassinne bonchchos malaata gidida Taabotaa morkketa kushen aaththi immides. 
Psalms78:62 Izi ba deraa bolla hanqettides; istta giththa mashshas aaththi immides. 
Psalms78:63 Istta panththata tamay mides; histtiin istta geela7oti azina gelontta attida. 
Psalms78:64 Istta qeeseti mashshan wurida; istta machchetikka yeekkanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Psalms78:65 Hessafe guye Goday dhiskofe beeggiza mala beeggides; woykko woyne ushshu uyi maththottida qaray maththofe beeggiza mala dendides. 
Psalms78:66 Izi ba morkketa shocidi guye zaarides; istti mernaas yeellatana mala ooththides. 
Psalms78:67 Yooseefe dunkaane kadhides; Efreeme qommota dooribeenna. 
Psalms78:68 Gido attiin izi Yuhuda zarenne ba siiqiza Xiyoone zumaa doorides. 
Psalms78:69 Hessan izi Xoossa Keeththaa salo kessi dhoqqan keexxides; sa7a mala mernaas essides. 
Psalms78:70 Ba aylle Dawite dooridi dorsa wude heemmizasohoppe ekkides. 
Psalms78:71 Iza dorsata heemmizasohoppe kessidi ba dere Yaaqoobenne ba xinxxo Isra7eele heenththanchcha ooththides. 
Psalms78:72 Histtiin Dawitikka istta suure wozinan heemmides; qasseka hiillan istta kaaleththides. 
Psalms79:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Kawoteththati ne biitta worajjida; geeshsha gidida Xoossa Keeththa tunisida; Yerusalaame laalli yeggida. 
Psalms79:2 Istti ne aylleta aha salo kafotas quma ooththidi immida; qasse ne geeshsha asata asho sa7a do7atas immida. 
Psalms79:3 Istta suuth Yerusalaame yuushon haaththa mala gussida; istta aha moogiza asi dhaydes. 
Psalms79:4 Nu shoorotas nuni qilccas gididos; nu heeran dizaytas qidhessinne miichchas attidos. 
Psalms79:5 Abeet GODAWU! Hayssi awude gakkanaas hananee? Neni mernaas hanqettanee? Ne qanaatey tama mala eexxishe de7anee? 
Psalms79:6 Nena erontta dereta bollanne ne sunththa xeygontta kawoteththata bolla ne hanqoza gussa. 
Psalms79:7 Ays giikko istti Yaaqoobe zereththata wodhidanne istti de7izasozikka mulera dhayssida. 
Psalms79:8 Kase nu aawata nagara nu bolla qoodoppa; eeson ne maarotaa nuus kiitta; ays giikko nuni keehippe metotidos. 
Psalms79:9 Abeet nuna ashshiza Xoossawu! Ne sunththa bonchcho gishshas nuna maadda; ne sunththa gishshas nuna ashsha; nu nagarakka atto ga. 
Psalms79:10 Kawoteththati, Ays «Istta Xoossi awan dizee?» gaanee? Ne aylleta suuth istti gussidayssa neni halo kessizayssa nu ayfey be7ishin kawoteththata erisa." 
Psalms79:11 Qasho asata ooley ne sinth gakko; Hayqos pirdettidayta ne mino qesen ashsha. 
Psalms79:12 Abeet Godawu! Nu shooroti nena qidhidayssa halo laappun kushe isttas zaara. 
Psalms79:13 He wode nuni ne deretinne nees wude dorsati mernaas galata nees immana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas neni nuus ooththida oosoza nu yootana. 
Psalms80:1 Abeet Isra7eele heenththanchchawu! Yooseefe nayta wude mala kaaleththizayssoo! Neni nu woosa siya; Kirubeta bollara diza araatan uttidayssoo! Ne poo7on qoncca. 
Psalms80:2 Efreeme, Biniyaamenne Minaase sinththan qoncca beetta; Ne wolqqa denththada yaada nuna ashsha." 
Psalms80:3 Abeet Xoossawu! Nuna zaara; nuni attana mala ne ayfeso nuus poo7isa. 
Psalms80:4 Abeet GODAWU Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Ne asaa woosa bolla awude gakkanaas ne hanqettanee? 
Psalms80:5 Neni istta yeeho quma mala mizadasa; qasse afunththa haaththa mala ushshadasa. 
Psalms80:6 Nu shooroti nu biitta ekkanaas bantta giddon ooyettana mala ooththadasa; nu morkketikka nu bolla miiccida. 
Psalms80:7 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Nuna zaara; nuni attana mala ne ayfeso nuus poo7isa. 
Psalms80:8 Neni Gibxeppe woyne ano ehadasa; kawoteththata yedeththada istta biittan izo tokkadasa. 
Psalms80:9 Neni izis biittaa qeexa giigsadasa; histtiin xapho yeddada biitta ubbaa gakkadus. 
Psalms80:10 Zumati izi kuwan, Libaanoose zigati izi haggatan kamettida." 
Psalms80:11 Ba haggata Mediteraane Abba gakkanaas qasse ba xeerata Efiraaxise Shaafa gakkanaas yeddadus. 
Psalms80:12 Histtiin ogera aadhdhiza ubbay izi ayfe duuththi maana mala izi yuushozan diza gimbeza ays laalladii? 
Psalms80:13 Bazzo guddunththi izi bolla duri kaa7ees; qasse wora do7ati ubbay izo meettes. 
Psalms80:14 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Neni nuukko simma; salora duge xeellada nuna be7a; hanno woyne miththayo naaga. 
Psalms80:15 Iza ne ushachcha kushey tokkida puute; neni nees gaada dichchida aaca. 
Psalms80:16 Morkketi ne woyne qeexidi taman xuuggida; hessa gishshas neni istta ne hanqoza suulen dhayssa. 
Psalms80:17 Ne kushey ne ushachcha baggara diza asaa neni nees dichchida asa naago. 
Psalms80:18 Hayssafe guye nuni nena aggidi guye simmoko; nuna shemppora paxa woththa; nunikka nena galatana. 
Psalms80:19 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Nuna zaara; nuni attana mala ne ayfeso nuus poo7isa. 
Psalms81:1 Nuus wolqqa gidida Xoossas ufayssan yexxite; Yaaqoobe Xoossas ililite! 
Psalms81:2 Yeth doommite; karabe baqqite; diiththaninne maasinqon lo7o mazamure yexxite. 
Psalms81:3 Aginay xeeriza wodenne dhuman geliza wode ba7aales zaye punnite. 
Psalms81:4 Hayssi Isra7eeles woga; Yaaqoobe Xoossay immida azazo. 
Psalms81:5 Gibxe biitta izi yeddi kezida wode Yooseefe zaretas woga histti woththides; tani erontta qaalara izi taas," 
Psalms81:6 «Intte hasheppe tooho woththadis; intte kushe deexo gooshoppe shempisadis. 
Psalms81:7 Intte meto wode tana xeygideta; histtiin tani inttena ashshadis; tani shaara giddora dadan inttena alladis; Mariiba geetettiza pultto haaththa matan tani inttena paaccadis. 
Psalms81:8 «Ta derezoo! Tani nena seerizayssa siya! Isra7eele asawu! Ne tana ezga siyidaakko aazee dizay! 
Psalms81:9 Intte giddon allaga xoossi dooppo; hara xoossas goynnofte. 
Psalms81:10 Tani GODAA intte Xoossaa; inttena Gibxe biittafe kessada ehiday tana intte GODAA; ne doona keeha hanga; tani nena tuththana. 
Psalms81:11 «Gido attiin ta asati ta qaala siyibeettenna; Isra7eeleti taas kushe immibeettenna. 
Psalms81:12 Hessa gishshas tani istti ba wozina muumeteththaaththo ba dosoyssa hanana mala aggaagadis. 
Psalms81:13 «Ta derey tana siyidaakkoo! Isra7eele asay ta oge kaallidaakko! 
Psalms81:14 Tani istta morkketa isttas gulbatissana; istta baaligaaratakka ta shocanakkoshin. 
Psalms81:15 GODAA ixxizayti iza sinththan kundana; istti mernaas qaxxayettana. 
Psalms81:16 Gido attiin tani inttena muuruta gistte mizana; qasse zaallaafe inttena ees kalssana» gishin siyadis. 
Psalms82:1 Xoossi salon diza duulata kaaleththees; xoossati ubbay shiiqiin istta bolla pirdishe," 
Psalms82:2 «Intte awude gakkanawu geella pirda pirdanee? Iitatakka awude gakkanaas maaddanee? 
Psalms82:3 Wolqqay bayndaytassinne yi7otas tuma pirda pirdite; manqonne naaqettida asata maata naagissite. 
Psalms82:4 Daaburanchchatanne metotanchchata ashshite; iitata kusheppeka istta woththi ekkite. 
Psalms82:5 «Inttes aykko erateththinne akeekay deenna; intte dhuman simeretteeta; biitta yochchati ubbay qaaxxeettes. 
Psalms82:6 «Tani inttena, ‹Intte xoossata; intte ubbayka Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa nayta› gadis." 
Psalms82:7 ‹Gido attiin intte asi hayqqiza mala hayqqana; Qasse hara halaqati kundiza mala intteka kundana› gays» gees. 
Psalms82:8 Abeet Xoossawu! Denda! Sa7a bolla pirda; kawoteththi ubbay neessa. 
Psalms83:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Co7u gooppa! sirphi gooppa! Abeet Xoossawu! qelli gooppa! 
Psalms83:2 Be7a! Ne morkketi ne bolla dendida; nena ixxizayti ne bolla ba qoodhe qaaththida. 
Psalms83:3 Istti ne asa bolla geeman gene duulatida; neni siiqiza asata bolla maqettida. 
Psalms83:4 Istti, «Haa yiite! Istta kawoteththa dhayssoos; Isra7eele geetettiza sunththi mernaas hassa7ettontta mala ooththoos» gida." 
Psalms83:5 Istti issi wozina gididi issife maqettida; ne bolla dendanaas caaqettida. 
Psalms83:6 Isttika Eedoome asata, Isma7eele asata, Mo7aabe zareta, Aggaari zareta," 
Psalms83:7 Gebaale asata, Amoone asata, Amaaleeqe asata, Filisxeeme asatanne Xiroose asata." 
Psalms83:8 Asoore asati isttara issifeteth medhdhida; Looxe zaretaskka maado gidida. 
Psalms83:9 Neni Midiyaame asata bolla, Sisaaranne Yaabine bolla Qisoone Shaafan ooththida mala istta bolla ooththa." 
Psalms83:10 Istti En-Doore geetettizason dhayda; istta ahay moogettontta biitta bolla wooqqides. 
Psalms83:11 Oreebe bollanne Za7eebe bolla ooththida mala istta halaqata bolla ooththa; Zebahanne Xalmuna dhayssida mala istta haarizaytakka neni dhayssa. 
Psalms83:12 Heyti, «Nuni Xoossa asaa biitta nuus buzoththana» gidayta." 
Psalms83:13 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Istta gudulla mala laalla; carkoy efiza suulla mala ooththa. 
Psalms83:14 Xaragay wora miidi wursiza mala, tama lacoy zuma may7iza mala," 
Psalms83:15 goten ne istta daganththa; ne uushonkka istta yedeththa. 
Psalms83:16 Abeet GODAWU! Asay ne sunth koyana mala neni istta ayfeso yeella mayza. 
Psalms83:17 Istti mernaas yeellatetto; hirgettonne kawuyi dhayetto. 
Psalms83:18 Ne sunththay GODAA gididayssanne sa7a ubbaa bolla neni xalla Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa gididayssa istti eretto. 
Psalms84:1 Abeet medheteththa GODAWU! neni de7izasoy ay mala lo7osoo! 
Psalms84:2 Tani GODAA Keeththa zago laamotays; tani kumeththa wozinappe de7o Xoossas ufayssan yexxays. 
Psalms84:3 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Ta kawozo Xoossawu! Nees yarsho yarshizasoza matan siine kafoy baas de7izaso demmadus. Haraphpheyakka baas yelizaso keexxadus. 
Psalms84:4 Ne Keeththan de7izaytinne mernaas nena sabbizayti anjjettidayta. 
Psalms84:5 Banttas nena wolqqa ooththizayti, Xiyoone oge ba wozinan amottizayti anjjettidayta." 
Psalms84:6 Bakka geetettiza haaththi baynda shaafara istti kanththiza wode he sohon pulttoy dhuuqqana; Badhdhesa iraykka bukkidi biitta kalssana. 
Psalms84:7 Istti wolqqa bolla wolqqa gujji gujji baana; Istti Xoossa sinththan Xiyoonen beettana. 
Psalms84:8 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Ta woosa neni siya. Abeet Yaaqoobe Xoossawu! Ta gizaaz ezga. 
Psalms84:9 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni doora tiyda nu kawoza anjja; izi nuus gondalle gidida gishshas ne iza xeella. 
Psalms84:10 Harason shii gallas de7anaappe Xoossa Keeththan issi gallas duussi lo7o; Iitata dunkaanen daanaappe Xoossa Keeththa zagon zabe gideththi taas lo7o. 
Psalms84:11 GODAY nuus arshenne gondalle; izi ayoteththaninne bonchchon nuna naagees; Suureteththan hemettizayta izi lo7o miish diggenna. 
Psalms84:12 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Nenan ammanettizayti anjjettidayta. 
Psalms85:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni ne biittas kiyateth bessadasa; Yaaqoobe di7ettidasoppe zaaradasa. 
Psalms85:2 Neni ne asaa naaqo atto gadasa; istta nagara ubbaa kammadasa. 
Psalms85:3 Neni yiillotizayssa ubbaa aggadasa; suulliza ne hanqofekka simmadasa. 
Psalms85:4 Abeet nuna ashshiza Xoossawu! Ne nuna zaara; Neni nu bolla lanccettidayssa agga. 
Psalms85:5 Neni nuna mernaas hanqettanee? Ne hanqoy yeletappe yeleta gakkanawu gam7anee? 
Psalms85:6 Ne asay nenan ufayettana mala, ne nuna ooraxissikii!" 
Psalms85:7 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaa siiqoza nuna bessa; neni nuna ashsha. 
Psalms85:8 Tani GODAA Xoossi yootizayssa siyana; istti simmidi bala ogen bontta aggiko, ba geeshsha deraas Saroteth ehanaas hidota immides." 
Psalms85:9 Iza bonchchoy nu biittan daana mala atoteththay izas yayyizaytas matan dees. 
Psalms85:10 Siiqoynne tumateththi issife sigetteettes; Xilloteththinne saroteththi issife idimetteettes. 
Psalms85:11 Ammaneteththi sa7appe pude kezana; Xoossa Xilloteththi saloppe duge wodhdhana. 
Psalms85:12 Be7ite! GODAY lo7o miish immana; nu biittayka lo7o kath mokisana. 
Psalms85:13 Xilloteththi izappe sinththara baana; izi baanaasokka izas giigsana. 
Psalms86:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani hiyeesanne metotanchcha gidida gishshas ta waasoza siyada taas zaaro imma. 
Psalms86:2 Tani nees dumma as gidida gishshas ne ta shemppo naaga; neni ta Xoossa; nenan ammanettiza ne aylleza tana ashsha. 
Psalms86:3 Abeet Godawu! Kumeththa gallas ta neekko waassiza gishshas ne tana maara. 
Psalms86:4 Abeet Godawu! Tani wozinappe nena woossiza gishshas tana ne aylleza ufayssa. 
Psalms86:5 Abeet Godawu! Neni nuus kiyanne atto gizaade; nena woossiza ubbaas ne mernaa siiqo bessaasa. 
Psalms86:6 Abeet GODAWU! Ta woosa siya; ta shoobba woossizayssa ezga. 
Psalms86:7 Ne taas zaaro immiza gishshas tani meto gallassan neekko waassays. 
Psalms86:8 Abeet Godawu! Ne malay xoossata giddon baawa; ne oosora ginattiza oosoykka deenna. 
Psalms86:9 Abeet Godawu! Neni medhdhida kawoteththay ubbay neekko yiidi nees goynnana; ne sunththaaka bonchchana. 
Psalms86:10 Neni gita; malalisiza miish ooththaasa. Neni xalla Xoossa. 
Psalms86:11 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne tuman baana mala tana ne oge tamaarsa; tani ne sunththas yayyana mala taas issi wozina imma. 
Psalms86:12 Abeet Godaa ta Xoossawu! Tani nena ta kumeththa wozinappe galatana; Ne sunththaaka mernaas bonchchana. 
Psalms86:13 Ays giikko ne tana bessida mernaa siiqoy keehi gita; neni ta shemppoyo duufoppe ashshadasa. 
Psalms86:14 Abeet Xoossawu! Otoranchchati ta bolla dendida; tana wodhana koyidi pangati duulateettes; nena wudankka yeggibeettenna. 
Psalms86:15 Gido attiin abeet Godawu! Neni qadhettizaadenne maariza Xoossa; hanqettanaas gam7iza Xoossa; ne siiqoynne ne ammaneteththay keehi daro. 
Psalms86:16 Taakko simmada taas qadhetta; taas ne ayllezas wolqqa imma; ne aylley naaza tana ashsha. 
Psalms86:17 Abeet GODAWU! ne tana maaddizayssanne minththeththizayssa tana ixxizayti be7idi yeellatana mala ne kiyateththa malata tana bessa. 
Psalms87:1 GODAA katamay geeshsha zuma bolla keexettides. 
Psalms87:2 GODAY Xiyoone pengeta Yaaqoobey dizasota ubbaafe aaththi siiqees. 
Psalms87:3 Hanne Xoossa katamayee! Xoossay ne gishshas malalisiza miish," 
Psalms87:4 «Tana eriza kawoteththata giddofe Gibxenne Baabiloone gaththa mazgabashe Filisxeeme, Xiroosenne Tophphiya asaa gujjana» gees." 
Psalms87:5 Xiyoone gishshas, «Ubbaa asay izin yelettides; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossi izo minththi essana» geetettana." 
Psalms87:6 GODAY deraa ubbaa mazgabishe, «Hayssi Xiyoonin yelettides» giidi xaafana." 
Psalms87:7 Yexxizaytinne guppizayti, «Nu anjjo ubbay Xiyoonippe pulttees» gishe ufayssan yexxana." 
Psalms88:1 Abeet GODAWU! tana ashshiza Xoossawu! Tani gallassinne omars ne sinththan yeekkays. 
Psalms88:2 Ta waasoy ne sinththi gakko; ne hayth ta woosakko zaara. 
Psalms88:3 Ays giikko ta de7oy meton kumides; tani hayqqana matadis. 
Psalms88:4 Tani duufon geliza asatara qoodettadis; wolqqay baynda as gidadis. 
Psalms88:5 Tani ahata giddon olettida asa mala, hayqqidi duufon moogettida aha mala, tani ubbaaka neni dogida asa malanne ne maadoppe duuxxida asa mala gidadis." 
Psalms88:6 Neni tana ciimma ollan, duge dhuma sohon yeggadasa." 
Psalms88:7 Ne hanqoy tana deexxees; ne hanqoza dambalay tana mulera mittides. 
Psalms88:8 Neni ta laggeta taappe haassadasa; istti tana shuunettana mala ooththadasa; tana giddoththida; kessa ekkanawukka dandaykke. 
Psalms88:9 Abeet GODAWU! Kayo gaason ta ayfeti doljumida; Ubbaa gallas tani neekko waassays; ta kushetakka neekko miccays. 
Psalms88:10 Neni hayqqidaytas malalisiza miish ooththay? Istti dendidi nena galatanee? 
Psalms88:11 Ne mernaa siiqoy duufon ne ammaneteththayka bashshason yootettizee? 
Psalms88:12 Ne malalisiza oosoy dhuman erettizee? Woykko ne xilloteththay dogettida asata biittan beettanee? 
Psalms88:13 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana maaddana mala ta neekko waassays; maalado maalado ta woosay ne sinth gakko. 
Psalms88:14 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana ays ixxay? Ne sinththaa taappe ays genththay? 
Psalms88:15 Yelagateththasofe doommada, tani tuggatadissinne hayqqana matadis; neni tana daganththiin hidota qanxxadis." 
Psalms88:16 Suulliza ne hanqoy ta bolla gakkides; babisiza ne hanqoy tana dhayssides. 
Psalms88:17 Istti kumeththa gallas di7o haaththa mala tana giddoththida; issi bolla gididi tana dooddi oykkida. 
Psalms88:18 Neni ta laggetanne ta siiqota taappe haassadasa; dhumay xalla taas dabbo gidides. 
Psalms89:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaa siiqo gishshas tani mernaas yexxana; ne ammaneteththaa yeleta ubbaas ta awajjana. 
Psalms89:2 Tani ne mernaa siiqoy mernaas eqqidayssanne neni ne ammaneteththaa salon minththada essidayssa yootana. 
Psalms89:3 Neni, «Tani dooridayssara caaqo qaala geladis; ta aylle Dawites," 
Psalms89:4 ‹Tani ne zareta mernaas kawosana; ne kawoteththa algaa yeleta ubbaas minththana› ga caaqqadis» gadasa. 
Psalms89:5 Abeet GODAWU! Saloti neni ooththida malalisiza oosota awajjeettes; geeshshata duulatay ne ammaneteththaa sabbees. 
Psalms89:6 Salon GODAARA likkettanaas dandayzay oonee? Salo medheteththata giddonkka GODAA malay oonee? 
Psalms89:7 Geeshshata shiiqon Xoossi yashissizaade; Ba yuushon diza ubbaafe keehi yashissizaade. 
Psalms89:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Ne mala wolqqamay oonee? Abeet GODAWU! Neni ubbaa miishshan ammanettidaade. 
Psalms89:9 Ne bul7akettiza abba seeraasa; abba dambalakka co7u ooththaasa. 
Psalms89:10 Neni Era7aabe geetettiza abba do7aza qoxereththa wodhadasa; ne morkketa ne wolqqama qesen laalladasa. 
Psalms89:11 Saloti neyta; sa7aykka neessa; biittanne izan kumida ubbaa neni medhdhadasa. 
Psalms89:12 Pudehanne dugeha neni medhdhadasa; Taaboorenne Hermoone zumati ufayssan ne sunththan yexxeettes. 
Psalms89:13 Nees wolqqama qesey dees; ne qesey mino; ne ushachcha qesey yashshees. 
Psalms89:14 Xilloteththinne suure pirday ne kawoteththa araataas yochcha; maaroteththinne ammaneteththi neeppe sinththara beettes. 
Psalms89:15 Abeet GODAWU! Ililisan nena sabbizaytinne ne poo7on hemettizayti anjjettidayta. 
Psalms89:16 Ne sunththan kumeththa gallas ufayetteettes; ne xilloteththa gishshas istti nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histteettes. 
Psalms89:17 Istti ceeqettiza wolqqay nena; ne teeman istta kacey dhoqqu dhoqqu gees. 
Psalms89:18 Nu gondalley GODAA kushenna; nu kawoykka Isra7eele geeshsha kushenna. 
Psalms89:19 Beni neni ne ammanettida asatas ajjuutan, «Tani ola qaraa maaddadis; deraa giddofe doorettida yelaga dhoqqu dhoqqu histtadis." 
Psalms89:20 Ta aylle Dawite demmadis; ta geeshsha zaytenkka tiyada iza kawoththadis. 
Psalms89:21 Ta kushey iza maaddana; ta qeseykka iza minththana. 
Psalms89:22 Iza ay morkkey haaridi giirisenna; ay iita asikka iza qohenna. 
Psalms89:23 Tani iza morkketa iza sinththan tinchchereththana; iza ixxizaytakka shoca nififi histtana. 
Psalms89:24 Ta ammaneteththaynne ta mernaa siiqoy izara issife gidana; Ta sunththan iza kacey dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana. 
Psalms89:25 Tani iza kawoteththa Mediteraane Abba gakkanaas aassana. Iza zawakka Efiraaxisenne Xegroose Shaafata gakkanaas aassana. 
Psalms89:26 Dawiti tana, ‹Neni ta aawaa; ta Xoossanne tana ashshiza wogga zaalla› gi xeygana." 
Psalms89:27 Tani iza taas bayra naa histtana; sa7an diza kawota ubbaafe ta iza gitasana. 
Psalms89:28 Tani ta siiqo izas mernaas naagana; tani izas gelida caaqo qaala minththana. 
Psalms89:29 Tani iza zareta mernaas minththa essana; iza kawoteththa araataakka salo mala mernaas minththa tokkana. 
Psalms89:30 «Gido attiin iza zereththati ta woga aggiko, qasse istti ta azazokka naagontta ixxiko," 
Psalms89:31 istti ta woththida maara moorikko, ta azazokka bonchchontta ixxiko," 
Psalms89:32 tani istta nagara gishshas istta guufen qaxxayana; istta mooro gishshas istta xurqafen shocana. 
Psalms89:33 Gido attiin tani ta siiqo izappe haassike; woykko ta ammaneteth izas pacinchchike. 
Psalms89:34 Tani caaqqida caaqo qaala miikke; ta doonappe ke7ida qaala laammike. 
Psalms89:35 Tani issito ta geeshsha sunththan caaqqida qaala Dawites wordotikke. 
Psalms89:36 Iza zareti mernaas minnidi daana; iza kawoteththa algayka awa arshe mala ta sinththan mernaas daana. 
Psalms89:37 Salo bolla ammanettida markka gidada diza agina mala izi mernaas minni daana» gadasa. 
Psalms89:38 Gido attiin ha7i neni tiyada kawoththidayssa bolla keeha hanqettadasa; iza kadhadasanne yegga aggadasa. 
Psalms89:39 Neni ne ayllezas caaqqida caaqo qaala laalladasa; iza kallachcha baanan olada tunisadasa. 
Psalms89:40 Neni katamaa gimbeza ubbaa laalladasa; iza miixa ubbaa dhayssadasa. 
Psalms89:41 Ogera aadhdhiza ubbati iza bonqqida; izi ba shoorotas qidhes attides. 
Psalms89:42 Neni iza morkketas ushachchadasa; istta ubbaa ufayssadasa. 
Psalms89:43 Neni iza mashsha qaraza dun7isadasa; olankka iza maaddabeekka. 
Psalms89:44 Neni iza kawoteththa guufaa iza kusheppe woththa ekkadasa; qasse iza kawoteththa araataa biittan oladasa. 
Psalms89:45 Neni iza yelagateththa layththaa qaanththadasa; yeellaka mayzadasa. 
Psalms89:46 Abeet GODAWU! Awude gakkanaas nena genththanee? Neni mernaas geemmanee? Ne hanqoy tama mala awude gakkanaas eexxanee? 
Psalms89:47 Ta layththay ay keena qaanththako qoppa; ne asa naa coo hada medhdhadii! 
Psalms89:48 Asi hayqqontta mernaas shemppora paxa daanaas dandayzee? Qasse duufon gelontta mala bana ashshanaas dandayza asi dizee? 
Psalms89:49 Abeet Godawu! Dawites ne ammaneteththan caaqqida caaqoynne kase ne mernaa siiqoy awan dizee? 
Psalms89:50 Abeet Godawu! Tani ne aylley ay mala borettidaakko neni haasaya; tani asa ubbaa boreza wostta dandaydaakko ane ne qoppa. 
Psalms89:51 Abeet GODAWU! Ne morkketi ne doorada tiyda kawoza cayizayssa, izi bidaso ubbaan iza qilccizayssa qoppa." 
Psalms89:52 GODAY meri mernaas galatetto! Amiin! Amiin.
