Psalms139:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana pilgga eradasa. 
Psalms139:2 Tani awude uttizaakkonne awude eqqizakko neni eraasa; neni ta qofa ubbaa haakoppe akeekaasa. 
Psalms139:3 Tani bizaasonne shempizaso xomosaasa; ta ogeta ubbaa neni eraasa. 
Psalms139:4 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ta doonappe issi qaalakka haasayanaappe kasetada neni ta qofa ubbaa eraasa. 
Psalms139:5 Neni ta yuusho ubbaan daasa; ne kushezan tana naagaasa. 
Psalms139:6 Ne erateththay tana keehippe malalisees; tani akeekanaas dandayzayssafekka dhoqqees. 
Psalms139:7 Tani ne Ayanappe awa baanaas dandayazinaa? Woykko ne sinththafe awa baqatanaas dandayazinaa? 
Psalms139:8 Pude salo ke7ikko neni heen daasa! Duge si7oole wodhdhikokka neni heen daasa. 
Psalms139:9 Arshey mokkizaso bagga paalla biikko, woykko arshey wullizaso bagga haakka biikko," 
Psalms139:10 Tana heen ne kushey kaaleththees; ne ushachcha kusheykka tana minththi oykkees. 
Psalms139:11 Tani, «Dhumazoo! Tana genththa; poo7ozoo! Ta yuushon dhuma» giikko," 
Psalms139:12 dhumay nena xeelo diggenna; omarsi nees gallassa mala poo7ees; dhumaynne poo7oy nees issi mala. 
Psalms139:13 Neni ta asateththa ubbaa medhdhadasa; ta aayey ulonkka tana tila medhdhadasa. 
Psalms139:14 Neni tana keehi yegalththinne malalisizaaz histta medhdhida gishshas ta nena galatays; ne oosoti malalisizayta! Ta shemppoya hessa ubbaa erawus. 
Psalms139:15 Tani geemason medhettida wode ta meqeththati neeppe geemmibeettenna; tani ta aayey ulon ciimma giddon hiillan oosettiza wode," 
Psalms139:16 ta aayi ulon buro suuth gida ta dishin ne ayfeti be7ida; ta layththatappe issoynne doomettontta dishin taas neni barida gallassati ubbay ne mazgaban xaafettida. 
Psalms139:17 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne taas qoppiza qofay ay mala lo7oo! Izikka ay keena coraa! 
Psalms139:18 Tani iza qoodikko aceppeka daro; ta ichcha beeggiza wode ha7ikka nenara de7ays. 
Psalms139:19 Abeet Xoossawu! Neni iitata siifidaakko aazee dizay! Suuth gussana saamettiza asati taappe haakkite! 
Psalms139:20 Istti ne bolla iita miish haasayeettes; ne morkketi ne sunththaa mooreettes. 
Psalms139:21 Abeet GODAWU! Nena ixxizayta tani ixxikinaa? Ne bolla dendizayta tani harassettikinaa? 
Psalms139:22 Ta istta mulera ixxays; istta tani ta morkketa mala qoodays. 
Psalms139:23 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta wozina pilggada era; tana paaccada ta ceece qofaakka shaakka era. 
Psalms139:24 Ane tanan iitay de7ikko xeella; histtada mernaa ogera tana kaaleththa. 
Psalms140:1 Abeet GODAWU! Iita asatappe tana ashsha; makkallanchchatappeka tana naaga. 
Psalms140:2 Istti ubba wode iita ooththanaas maqetteettes; ubba gallassika oosh denththanaas yo7o piqqeettes. 
Psalms140:3 Istti haso shooshsha mala inxars qaraseettes; istta doonappe goppe marze mala qaalay kezees. 
Psalms140:4 Abeet GODAWU! iita asata kusheppe tana ashsha; ta toho qaxxanaas qoppiza makkallanchchatappeka tana naaga. 
Psalms140:5 Otoranchchati taas woximade woththida; gite giigsida; ta ogenkka diiza woththida. 
Psalms140:6 Tani GODAA, «Neni ta Xoossa» gays. Abeet GODAWU! Tani shoobbizayssa siya." 
Psalms140:7 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! tana ashshiza minozoo! ola gallas taas gondalle gidadasa! 
Psalms140:8 Abeet GODAWU! Iitata amoy polettofo; istta qofay polettana mala ooththofa! 
Psalms140:9 Ta morkketan tana xoonisoppa; istti qoppida iita qofay istta hu7en xaaxetto. 
Psalms140:10 Istta bolla tama bonqoy qoletto; istti taman olettetto; simmi kezanaas dandayontta ollan kundetto. 
Psalms140:11 Iita haasayzayta biittay tookkofo; makkallanchchata iita miishshi oykko. 
Psalms140:12 GODAY hiyeesatas pirdizayssanne metotanchchatas mootettizayssa ta erays. 
Psalms140:13 Xilloti tumuppe ne sunththaa galatana; suuretikka ne sinththan de7ana. 
Psalms141:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nena xeygays; tana maaddanaas elela. Tani neekko waassiza wode ta waaso siya! 
Psalms141:2 Ta woosay exaane cuwa mala ne sinth shiiqo; tani ta kusheza miccizayssi nees omarsa wode yarsho mala gido. 
Psalms141:3 Abeet GODAWU! Ta doona naaganaas zabe woththa; ta mettershata pengen naagizayssa essa. 
Psalms141:4 Mooro ooththiza asatara iita ooso ooththontta mala ta wozina iitakko zaaroppa; istta gibiraakka tana mizoppa. 
Psalms141:5 Xillo asi tana qaxxayo; hessika taas lo7o; izi tana seerikko hessi ta hu7en zayte tiyiza mala; hessaka ta ixxike; gido attiin tani ubbatokka iita asata ooso bolla woossays. 
Psalms141:6 Istta daannati aafora duge olettiza wode ta qaalay tuma gididayssa istti erana. 
Psalms141:7 Gadey goyettiza malanne phashey liiqiza mala istta meqeththika duufo doonan laalettana. 
Psalms141:8 Abeet GODAWU, Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Ta ayfey nena xeellees; ta zemppoy nena; tana hayqos aaththada immofa." 
Psalms141:9 Istti taas woththida woximadeppenne iita ooththizayta giteppe tana naaga. 
Psalms141:10 Ta saro aadhdhishin istti bantti woththida gitezan oyketetto. 
Psalms142:1 Ta qaala dhoqqu histtada tani GODAAKKO waassays. GODAAPPE maaroteth woossays. 
Psalms142:2 Ta qohoza ubbaa izas magannays; ta meto ubbaa izas yootays. 
Psalms142:3 Tani daaburda wode neni ta oge eraasa; ta hemettiza ogen tana oykkanaas woximade woththida. 
Psalms142:4 Tani ta yuusho simma xeelliza wode tana maaddanay oonikka deenna; ta baqata attanaasoyka deenna; ta shemppoys wudettiza asikka deenna. 
Psalms142:5 Abeet GODAWU! Ne tana maaddana mala ta neekko waassays; ta zemppoy nena; ta shemppora paxa dishin ta qaaday nena. 
Psalms142:6 Tani keehippe hidota qanxxida gishshas ne ta waaso siya! Tana gooddizayti taappe wolqqatida gishshas tana ashsha. 
Psalms142:7 Tani ne sunththaa galatana mala tana qashoppe birsha. Neni taas lo7o gidida gishshas xilloti ta yuushon shiiqana. 
Psalms143:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta woosa siya; ta shoobbizayssa ezga; neni xillonne ammanettizayssa gidida gishshas taas zaaro imma. 
Psalms143:2 Ne sinththan xillo gidana asi oonikka deenna; tana ne aylleza pirdas shiishshofa. 
Psalms143:3 Ta hayqqana gakkanaas ta morkketi tana yedeththida; tana dirxxidi biitta gars gelththida; kase hayqqida asata malakka tana dhuman woththida. 
Psalms143:4 Hessa gishshas tani daaburadis; ta wozinaykka hidota qanxxides. 
Psalms143:5 Tani beni wodeta hassa7ays; neni ooththida ooso ubbaa yuushsha qoppays; ne kushe oosotakka akeekays. 
Psalms143:6 Tani ta kusheza neekko miccays; mela biittay haath koyza mala ta shemppoya nena saamettadus. 
Psalms143:7 Abeet GODAWU! Tani daaburadis; ne taas zaaro immanaas elela! Tani hayqqida asataththo duge duufon gelontta mala ne sinththa taappe genththofa. 
Psalms143:8 Tani nena ammanettiza gishshas maalado maalado ne siiqo tana bessa; tani ta shemppo nees hadaradis; hessa gishshas ta baana oge tana tamaarsa. 
Psalms143:9 Abeet GODAWU! Ta ne garsan qotettadis; tana ta morkketappe ashsha. 
Psalms143:10 Neni ta Xoossa; tani ne shene polana mala tana tamaarsa; ne lo7o Ayanay tana suure oge kaaleththo. 
Psalms143:11 Abeet GODAWU! Ne sunththa gishshas tana ashsha; ne xilloteththan tana metoppe kessa. 
Psalms143:12 Ne tana siiqiza gishshas ta morkketa suppu histta wodha; tana ne aylleza un7eththizayta dippi histta dhayssa. 
Psalms144:1 Ta kusheta olas, ta biradhdhetakka xongeththas loohissida GODAY ta zaallay galatetto!" 
Psalms144:2 Izi tana siiqizanne genththiza Xoossa; izi taas miixanne tana ashshizayssa; izi ta gondallenne tani baqatada attizaso; kawoteththatakka izi taas haarisizayssa. 
Psalms144:3 Abeet GODAWU! Ne hayssa sire bonchchanaas asi aazee? Ne hayssaththo asas qoppanawu asa nay aazee? 
Psalms144:4 Asi issito carki aadhdhiza carko mala; iza layththatikka eeson dhayza kuwa mala. 
Psalms144:5 Abeet GODAWU! neni salaa daakkada duge wodhdha! zumata bochchada cuwasa! 
Psalms144:6 Wolqqanth yeddada ne morkketa laalla! Ne wondafe yiishshan dukkada yedeththa! 
Psalms144:7 Bollafe ne kushe yeddada, tana wolqqama haaththafe goochcha kessa; allaga asata kusheppe ne tana ashsha." 
Psalms144:8 Istta doonay wordo haasayees; istti ushachcha kushe denththidi wordo caaqqeettes. 
Psalms144:9 Abeet Xoossawu! Tani nees ooraththa mazamure yexxana; tammu shayan waaxettida diiththan nees yexxana. 
Psalms144:10 Kawotas xoono immaasa; ne aylle Dawite giththa mashshafe ashshaasa. 
Psalms144:11 Wordo haasayzaytappenne ba ushachcha kushe denththidi wordo caaqqizaytappenne allagatappe tana ashshanne naaga. 
Psalms144:12 Nu attuma nayti ba naateteththan dalqidalqidi dicciza miththa mala gidetto! Nu macca naytikka kawo keeththa gulan alleqos essida tuuqe mala gidetto. 
Psalms144:13 Nu gootaratan dumma dumma qommo kaththi kumo; nu dorsati shii laaqqa gakkanaas yeletto; heemettizason tammu shii gakkanawu daretto. 
Psalms144:14 Nu miizati yelizayta gidetto; istti awucayontta yelettidi corattetto. Nuna asi di7oppo; nu zagon waasoy siyettofo. 
Psalms144:15 Ha anjjoy iza gakkiza derey anjjettida dere; Xoossi izas GODAA gidida derey anjjettida dere. 
Psalms145:1 Abeet ta kawo Xoossawu! Tani nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana; ne sunththa mernaaskka galatana. 
Psalms145:2 Tani nena ubba gallas sabbana; ne sunththaaka mernaas galatana. 
Psalms145:3 GODAY gita; gita galatay izas bessees; iza gitateththay asa qofappe bolla. 
Psalms145:4 Issi yeletay kaalliza yeletas ne ooththida ooso yootees; malalisiza ne oosotakka qonccisana. 
Psalms145:5 Istti ne bonchchonne ne gita teema haasayana; tanikka malalisiza ne oosoza zaara zaara qoppana. 
Psalms145:6 Asay malalisiza ne oosoza gitateththa gishshas haasayettana; tanikka ne gitateththa awajjana. 
Psalms145:7 Istti ne kiyateththa daroza yootana; ne xilloteththaa ufayssan yexxana. 
Psalms145:8 GODAY qadhettizayssanne maarizayssa; izi hanqettanaas eesotonttayssanne siiqoy kumidayssa. 
Psalms145:9 GODAY ubbaas kiya; izi ba medhdhida ubbaas qadhettizayssa. 
Psalms145:10 Abeet GODAWU! medheta ubbay nena galatana; ne derey ubbayka nena sabbana. 
Psalms145:11 Istti ne kawoteththa bonchcho gishshas haasayana; ne wolqqa gishshas yootana. 
Psalms145:12 Hessan ne wolqqama oosotanne ne kawoteththa teema bonchchoza istti erisana. 
Psalms145:13 Yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas ne haarana; ne kawoteththay mernaassa. GODAY ba gida qaalan ammanettizayssa; izi ba ooso ubbaan kiya. 
Psalms145:14 GODAY gandigarzayta kaafees; kundidaytakka denththees. 
Psalms145:15 Ubbaa ayfey neekko xeellees; isttas koshshiza woden neni isttas quma immaasa. 
Psalms145:16 Neni ne kushe miccada shemppora paxa diza ubbaa amo kunththaasa. 
Psalms145:17 GODAY ba oge ubbaan xillo; izi ba ooso ubbaan kiya. 
Psalms145:18 GODAY bana xeygizaytas ubbaas mata; wozinappe xeygiza ubbaas matan dees. 
Psalms145:19 Izi baas yayyiza ubbaas amo kunththees. Qasse izi istta waasoza siyidi istta ashshees. 
Psalms145:20 GODAY bana siiqizayta ubbaa naagees; gido attiin iitata ubbaa dhayssana. 
Psalms145:21 Tani ta doonan GODAA galatana. Medheta ubbay iza geeshsha sunththa meri mernaas galato! 
Psalms146:1 GODAY galatetto! Ta shemppoyee, GODAA galata!" 
Psalms146:2 Ta de7o layththa ubbaan tani GODAA galatana; tani shemppora paxa diza wode ubbaan ta Xoossa sabbana. 
Psalms146:3 Dere ayssizaytan ammanettofte; As ashshanawu dandayontta asho may7ida medhetatan ceeqettofte. 
Psalms146:4 Istta shemppoy keziza wode istti biittan simmana; istta halchchoy ubbay he gallas attana. 
Psalms146:5 Yaaqoobe Xoossay maaddiza asi ba hidotakka ba GODAA bolla woththida asi anjjettidaade. 
Psalms146:6 GODAY salonne sa7a, gita abbanne istta giddon diza ubbaa medhdhidayssa; izi ba ammaneteththaa mernaas naagizayssa." 
Psalms146:7 Izi qohettidaytas pirdizayssa; gafidayta mizi kalssizayssa. GODAY qashettidayta birshi yeddizayssa; 
Psalms146:8 GODAY qooqeta xeelisees. GODAY kundidayta denththees; GODAY xillotakka siiqees. 
Psalms146:9 GODAY bete asata naagees. Am7etanne yi7o nayta maaddees; gido attiin iitata oge dhayssees. 
Psalms146:10 GODAY mernaas kawo; Xiyoone! Ne Xoossi yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas kawotana. GODAY galatetto! 
Psalms147:1 GODAY galatetto! Nu Xoossa mazamuren saboy ay mala lo7o! iza galatizayssi ufayssees; hessika izas bessees. 
Psalms147:2 GODAY Yerusalaame ooraxissana; Isra7eeleppe betidaytakka shiishshana. 
Psalms147:3 Wozinay meqqidayta izi koolees; istta madunththaaka izi paththees. 
Psalms147:4 Izi salo xoolintteta qooda erees; issaa issaa iza sunththan sunththan xeygees. 
Psalms147:5 Nu GODAY gita; izi keehippe wolqqama; iza erateththaas zaway deenna. 
Psalms147:6 GODAY kadhettidayta bonchchees; gido attiin iitata kawushshees. 
Psalms147:7 GODAAS galata mazamure yexxite; nu Xoossas maasinqo shocishe galatite. 
Psalms147:8 Izi salo shaara mayzees; sa7as ira bukisees; zumata bollaka maata mokisees. 
Psalms147:9 Medosassinne quuro yelotas miza miish izi immees. 
Psalms147:10 Izi ufayettizay parata wolqqaninne tooranchchata minoteththan gidenna. 
Psalms147:11 GODAY baas yayyizaytaninne iza siiqon ammanettizaytan ufayettees. 
Psalms147:12 Yerusalaame katamayee! GODAA galata! Hanne Xiyoonee! Ne Xoossa sabba! 
Psalms147:13 Izi ne penge kolata minththees; ne giddon diza ne nayta anjjees. 
Psalms147:14 Izi ne zawa saroteththan naagees; nena keehippe lo7iza gistte kalssees. 
Psalms147:15 Izi ba kiita sa7as kiittees; iza qaalaykka eeson gakkees. 
Psalms147:16 Izi shach afala mala miccees; kenchchoka bidinththa mala laallees. 
Psalms147:17 Izi shach shuchcha mala duge yeddana; he moocezan eqqanaas ooninne dandayenna. 
Psalms147:18 Izi ba qaala kiittidi shachchaa mayisees. Izi carko carkissiin haaththi goggees. 
Psalms147:19 Izi ba qaala Yaaqoobe zereththas ba maaraanne wogaa Isra7eele asaas qonccisees. 
Psalms147:20 Izi hessa mala hara kawoteththatas ooththibeenna; istti iza woga erettenna. GODAY galatetto! 
Psalms148:1 GODAY galatetto! Salon de7izaytoo! GODAA galatite; bolla dhoqqan de7izaytoo! Iza sabbite. 
Psalms148:2 Intteno iza kiitanchchatoo! Ubbay iza galatite; salon de7iza iza olanchchatoo! Ubbay iza galatite. 
Psalms148:3 Arsheynne aginay iza galatite; poo7isiza xoolinttetoo! Ubbay iza galatite. 
Psalms148:4 Intteno ubbaafe bolla dhoqqan diza salotoo! Iza galatite; Salo gufanththofe bollara diza haaththatoo! Iza sabbite. 
Psalms148:5 Izi azaziin istti ubbayka medhettida gishshas ubbati GODAA sunththaa galatetto! 
Psalms148:6 Izi istta istti dizason meri mernaas minththi woththides; Izi isttas laamettontta woga immides. 
Psalms148:7 Sa7an de7izaytoo! GODAA galatite! Abba giddon diza gita medheteththatinne wogga gita abba ciimmati ubbayka iza sabbite. 
Psalms148:8 Wolqqanththinne shachchi, kenchchoynne gubbanay, iza azazo poliza gote carkoti ubbatikka iza galatite." 
Psalms148:9 Zumatoo, zumbullatoo, ayfe ayfiza miththatoo, zigatoo ubbatikka iza galatite." 
Psalms148:10 Mehetoo, do7atoo, sa7ara gooshettiza medhetatoo! Paalliza kafotoo ubbatikka iza galatite." 
Psalms148:11 Sa7aa kawotoo, kawoteththatoo! Daannatoo, dere haarizaytoo! Ubbatikka iza galatite." 
Psalms148:12 Panththatoo, geela7otoo, cimatoo, naytoo! Ubbatikka iza galatite." 
Psalms148:13 Iza sunththi ubbaa bolla dhoqqa; iza bonchchoy sa7appenne saloppe bolla; hessa gishshas hayti ubbay iza sunth galatetto. 
Psalms148:14 Iza bagga gidida Isra7eele asati iza galatana mala izi istta kace kessides. GODAY galatetto! 
Psalms149:1 GODAY galatetto! GODAAS ooraththa mazamure yexxite! Geeshshata shiiqoson izas galata mazamure yexxite! 
Psalms149:2 Isra7eele asati bana medhdhidayssan ufayettetto; Xiyoone asati ba kawozan keehippe ufayettetto. 
Psalms149:3 Durishe karabe baqqishenne diith diixxishe iza sunth sabbetto. 
Psalms149:4 GODAY ba asan ufayettees; ashketa ashshidi bonchchon puulasees. 
Psalms149:5 He puulateththaan Xoossa asati ufayssan yexxetto; gadey wonttana gakkanaas ililishe yexxetto. 
Psalms149:6 Istta doonan Xoossa galatay, istta kushenkka qara giththa mashshay de7o." 
Psalms149:7 Istti hessan kawoteththata bolla halo kessana; asaakka qaxxayana. 
Psalms149:8 Istta kawota sansalatan, istta ola qaratakka biratan qachchana." 
Psalms149:9 Hessan istta bolla xaafettida pirda polidi Xoossa asati xoonana. GODAY galatetto! 
Psalms150:1 GODAY galatetto! Xoossa iza keeththan galatite; iza wolqqay diza salo gufanththon iza galatite. 
Psalms150:2 Izi ooththida wolqqama oosota gishshas iza galatite; izi keehi gita gidida gishshas iza galatite! 
Psalms150:3 Zayen iza galatite; bagananinne maasinqon iza galatite. 
Psalms150:4 Karabe baqqishenne durishe iza galatite; tammu shayan waaxettida diiththaninne susul7en iza sabbite. 
Psalms150:5 Daala qaaththishe iza galatite; daalaa shocishe iza galatite. 
Psalms150:6 Shemppora paxa diza ubbay GODAA galatite! GODAY galatetto! 
Proverbs1:1 Hayti Isra7eele Kawo Dawite naa Solomoone leemisota. 
Proverbs1:2 Leemisoti asay aadho erateththa, seeranne erateththa haasaya akeekanaas maaddeettes." 
Proverbs1:3 Isttika de7ana de7on aadho erateth, xilloteth, suure pirdanne suure hano tamaarsizayta." 
Proverbs1:4 Erateththi paccidaytas akeeka, naateththatas erateththinne wozinamateth immizayta." 
Proverbs1:5 Aadho eranchchati ha leemisota siyidi erateth gujjeettes; akeekanchcha asatikka lo7o zoreta ekkeettes. 
Proverbs1:6 Hessa malan leemisotanne istta birsheththata, aadho eranchchata haasayanne istta maaleththo akeekanaas dandayeettes." 
Proverbs1:7 Aadho erateththas koyroy GODAAS yashshateththa; eeyati gidikko aadho erateththinne seera kadheettes. 
Proverbs1:8 Ta naazoo! Ne aawa zore ezga; ne aaya tamaarsizayssaka aggofa. 
Proverbs1:9 Hessi ne hu7es bonchcho kallachcha; nees qoodhen aaththiza alleqo mala gidana. 
Proverbs1:10 Ta naazoo! Nena nagaranchchati baleththiko eeno gooppa. 
Proverbs1:11 Istti nena, «Ane haa ya; issife biidi suuth gussanaas zuggoos; xillotakka wodhanaas qotetti uttoos." 
Proverbs1:12 Duufoy mittiza mala nunikka ane istta paxa dishin mittoos; nuni istta ciimma ollan olettiza asa mala ane ooththoos. 
Proverbs1:13 Nuni al7o miish ubbaa demmana; histtidi nu keeththa bonqqi ekkida miishshan kunththana. 
Proverbs1:14 Nunara zuppeta; demmidaaz issife go7ettana» gaana. 
Proverbs1:15 Ta naazoo! Isttara issife oge hemettofa; istti biza oge baana gaada ne toho denththofa. 
Proverbs1:16 Gaasoykka istti iita miish ooththanaas woxxeettes; asaa suuth gussanaaskka jaameettes. 
Proverbs1:17 Kafoy xeellishin iza oykkanaas yarde woththiko aykkoka maaddenna. 
Proverbs1:18 Hayti ha asati bantta suuth gussanaas zuggeettes; bantta shemppo wodhanaas qotetti utteettes. 
Proverbs1:19 Bessontta ogera go7a demmanaas woxxiza ubbata wurseththay hayssa mala; istti shiishshida aqotay istta shemppo ekki baana. 
Proverbs1:20 Aadho erateththaya oge bolla de7ashe xeygawus; dubbushan ba qaala dhoqqu histtada waassawus. 
Proverbs1:21 Aadho erateththaya cora asi shiiqizason waassawus; katama geliza pengen eqqada," 
Proverbs1:22 «Intteno wozina pacetoo! Intte awude gakkanaas eeyateththa oge kaallanee? Qilccizaytoo! Intte qilccizayssan awude gakkanaas ufayetteetii? Eeyatoo! Erateththa awude gakkanaas ixxanee? 
Proverbs1:23 Ta seeran intte simmidaakko, tani ta qofa inttes qonccisanakkoshin; ta qaalakka inttena tamaarsanakkoshin." 
Proverbs1:24 Tani xeygida wode intte koyontta ixxideta; tani ta kusheza micciin oonikka wudu gibeenna. 
Proverbs1:25 Ta zore ubbaa kadhideta; ta seerakka ekkibeekketa. 
Proverbs1:26 Hessa gishshas inttena metoy gakkiza wode tani intte bolla miiccana; bashshi intte bolla gakkiza wode tani intte bolla qilccana. 
Proverbs1:27 Bashshi abba dambala mala inttena qaaththiza wode, metoy gote carko mala inttena denththiza wode, tuggaynne waayey inttena mittiza wode tani inttena qilccana." 
Proverbs1:28 «He wode istti tana xeygana; ta gidikko isttas koykke; istti tana minththi koyana; gido attiin tana demmettenna. 
Proverbs1:29 Istti erateth ixxida; GODAAS yashshateth dooribeettenna. 
Proverbs1:30 Ta zore ekkanaas koyibeettenna; ta seera ubbaa kadhida. 
Proverbs1:31 Hessa gishshas istti bantti ooththida ooso ayfeza maana; bantti qoppida qofa ayfekka kallana. 
Proverbs1:32 Wozinay paccidayta aadho erateththafe haakoy istta wodhana; balata wuda dhayoy istta dhayssana. 
Proverbs1:33 Gido attiin tana siyizayti ubbay saron daana; aykko hirgay baynda woppan daana» gawus. 
Proverbs2:1 Ta naazoo! Neni ta qaala siyikko, ta azazokka neni ne wozinan woththiko," 
Proverbs2:2 ne hayth aadho erateththaako zaarikko, ne wozina akeekakko ne zaarikko," 
Proverbs2:3 shaakki erisiza erateth ne koykko, ne qaala dhoqqu histtada akeeka xeygikko," 
Proverbs2:4 izokka bira koyza mala ne koykko, qotan diza aqota mala ne izo minththa koykko," 
Proverbs2:5 he wode neni GODAAS yashshateth akeekana; Xoossaaka lo7eththada erana. 
Proverbs2:6 GODAY aadho erateth immiza gishshas izappe erateththinne akeekay beettes. 
Proverbs2:7 Izi suuretas xoono minjjees; istta bolla wosoy bayndaytas gondalle gidees. 
Proverbs2:8 Suure pirda oge naagees; baas ammanettizayta hemeth minththees. 
Proverbs2:9 He wode neni xilloteth, suure pirda, geellay baynda pirdanne lo7o oge ubbaa shaakka erana." 
Proverbs2:10 Gaasoykka aadho erateththi ne wozinan gelana; erateththayka ne shemppo ufayssana. 
Proverbs2:11 Shaakki eroy nees gondalle gidana; akeekaykka nena naagana. 
Proverbs2:12 Aadho erateththi nena iita asata ogeppe ashshana; geella haasayzaytappeka nena naagana. 
Proverbs2:13 Istti dhuma ogen baanaas suure oge aggizayta; 
Proverbs2:14 Istti iita ooson ufayettizayta; geella ogen hombocizayta. 
Proverbs2:15 Istta ogey geella; istta hemetay mirqqeththa. 
Proverbs2:16 Aadho erateththi layma maccassafe naagana; ba inxarsan cimmizaarippe nena ashshana. 
Proverbs2:17 Iza ba yelagateththa azina aggidaaro; Xoossa sinththan gelida caaqo qaala kadhidaaro. 
Proverbs2:18 Izi soo beeththi hayqos gaththees; izi ogetikka moytilleta duulatan gaththeettes. 
Proverbs2:19 Izikko gelida oonikka guye simmenna; de7o ogekka demmenna. 
Proverbs2:20 Hessa gishshas neni lo7o asata leemiso kaalla; xillota ogen hemetta. 
Proverbs2:21 Suure asati biitta bolla gam7ana; wosoy baynda asatikka izi bolla minni daana. 
Proverbs2:22 Gido attiin iitati biittafe dhayana; ammanettonttaytikka dhoqallettana. 
Proverbs3:1 Ta naazoo! Tani nena tamaarsizayssa dogoppa; ta azazotakka ne wozinan woththa. 
Proverbs3:2 Istti ne layth adussana; ishalo de7onne saroteth nees gujjana. 
Proverbs3:3 Siiqoynne tumateththi neeppe haakkofetto; istta ne qoodhen qachcha; ne wozinankka xaafa. 
Proverbs3:4 Histtiko neni Xoossa sinththaninne asaa sinththan sabettananne lo7o sunth demmana. 
Proverbs3:5 Neni polo wozinan GODAAN ammanetta; neni ne akeekan zemppofa. 
Proverbs3:6 Neni biza oge ubbaan iza sinththasa; izikka ne biza oge suurisana. 
Proverbs3:7 Nerkka nena aadho eranchcha gooppa; GODAAS yayya; iitappeka haakka. 
Proverbs3:8 Hessi ne bollaa payya woththana; ne meqeththatakka xalisana. 
Proverbs3:9 GODAA ne aqotan bonchcha; biittay nees immiza ayfe ubbaafe xeeraa izas imon bonchcha. 
Proverbs3:10 Ne hessaththo ooththiko ne gootarati kumi palahana; neni woyne ushshu agizasoti cippi gi kumana. 
Proverbs3:11 Ta naazoo! GODAA seera kadhoppa; izi nena hanqiza wodekka lanccofa. 
Proverbs3:12 Aaway ba siiqiza naa seerizayssaththo GODAYKKA ba dosiza naa seerees. 
Proverbs3:13 Aadho erateth demmanaas woxxiza asi, akeekakka baas miishshe ooththiza asi anjjettidaade." 
Proverbs3:14 Gaasoykka izippe demmiza go7ay birappe demmiza go7appe aadhdhees; izippe beettiza go7ay worqqafe beettiza go7appe aadhdhees. 
Proverbs3:15 Aadho erateththi zo7o inqqufe keehi al7o; neni demmanaas amottiza ubbay izira ginattenna. 
Proverbs3:16 Iza ushachcha kushen adussa layth, hadirsa kushen aqotanne bonchcho oykkadus." 
Proverbs3:17 Izi ogeti ufayssiza ogeta; iza hemettiza oge ubbayka saro. 
Proverbs3:18 Iza bana idimmizaytas de7o miththa; izo oykkizaytikka anjjettana. 
Proverbs3:19 GODAY ba aadho erateththan sa7a medhdhides; ba akeekankka salota istti dizason minththides. 
Proverbs3:20 Shaafati iza erateththan goggeettes; shaarati ira immeettes. 
Proverbs3:21 Ta naazoo! Suure pirdanne shaakki ero naaga; istti ne sinththafe haakkofetto. 
Proverbs3:22 Istti nees de7o gidana; ne qoodheskka aleqo gidana. 
Proverbs3:23 He wode neni ogen hirgay baynda hemettana; ne tohoykka dhuphettenna. 
Proverbs3:24 Neni ichchida wode babbaka; ichchadakka mal7o dhisko dhiskana. 
Proverbs3:25 Akeekontta gakkiza metonne iitata bolla gakkiza dhayssas babbaka. 
Proverbs3:26 Ays giikko GODAY nees ammanettizaade gidana; ne tohoy woximaden oykettontta mala izi nena naagana. 
Proverbs3:27 Nees maaddana wolqqay dishin maado bessizaytas lo7o ooso aggofa. 
Proverbs3:28 Ha7i nees dishin ne shoorozas, «Simmada ya; tani nees wonto immana» gooppa." 
Proverbs3:29 Nenan ammanettidi ne matan dishin ne shooroza bolla iita miish ooththanaas halchchofa. 
Proverbs3:30 Nena qohontta as gaasoy baynda coo mootoppa. 
Proverbs3:31 Gene ooththiza asata qullofa; istta iita ogekka kaallofa. 
Proverbs3:32 Gaasoykka GODAY iita ooththizayta ixxees; gido attiin suuretas izi ba wozina qofa qonccisees. 
Proverbs3:33 GODAA qanggeththi iita ooththizayta keeththanna; gido attiin iza anjjoy xillotasonna. 
Proverbs3:34 Otoreteththan qilccizayta bolla GODAYKKA qilccees; gido attiin banttana kawushshizayta bonchchees. 
Proverbs3:35 Aadho eranchchati bonchcho laattana; eeyati gidikko kawushshateththas aadhdhi imettana. 
Proverbs4:1 Ta naytoo! Intte aawa zore siyite; wozinan woththi ezgite; akeekakka inttes miish histtite. 
Proverbs4:2 Tani inttes lo7o timirte immiza gishshas ta timirte aggofte. 
Proverbs4:3 Tani ta hu7enkka ta aawaas yelaga naa; ta aayeyska mexi issi naa. 
Proverbs4:4 Ta aaway tana tamaarsishe, «Ta qaala kumeththa wozinan oykka; ta azazotakka naaga; ne histtiko paxa de7ana." 
Proverbs4:5 Aadho erateththinne akeeka oykka; ta qaala dogoppa; izippeka kare kezoppa. 
Proverbs4:6 Aadho erateth aggofa; iza nees gondalle gidana; izo siiqa; izakka nena naagana. 
Proverbs4:7 Aadho erateththi bayra; hessa gishshas izo demma. Akeekay ne aqoza ubbaa ekkizaa gidikkoka iza demma. 
Proverbs4:8 Neni aadho erateth bonchcha; iza nena dhoqqu dhoqqu ooththana; neni izo idimma; iza nena bonchchana. 
Proverbs4:9 Iza ne hu7en saba akilile woththana; bonchcho kallachchaka immana» gees. 
Proverbs4:10 Ta naazoo! Ta gizayssa ezga; ta qaalaakka ne wozinan woththa; ne layththi aduqqana. 
Proverbs4:11 Tani nena aadho erateththa oge kaaleththana; suure ogekka bessana. 
Proverbs4:12 Ne hemettashe dhuphettaka; woxxikokka kundaka. 
Proverbs4:13 Ta timirte lo7eththa oykka; izo yeddofa; iza nees de7o gidida gishshas izo naaga. 
Proverbs4:14 Nagaranchchata oge yedhdhofa; iita asata ogenkka hemettofa. 
Proverbs4:15 Izippe haakka; izin hemettofa; izippe guye simma; histtada ne ogeyra ba. 
Proverbs4:16 Istti iita ooththontta dishe dhiski erettenna; as dhupheththontta dishin dhiskoy istta ayfen yeenna. 
Proverbs4:17 Istti iitateth kaththa mala meettes; genekka ushsha mala uyeettes. 
Proverbs4:18 Xillota ogey seeta gallas gakkanaas poo7i poo7i biza mallado xalqqe mala. 
Proverbs4:19 Gido attiin nagaranchchata ogey sakkanna dhuma mala; istti aazan dhuphettanaakkoka erettenna. 
Proverbs4:20 Ta naazoo! Ta gizayssa akeeka; ta qaalaakka lo7eththa ezga. 
Proverbs4:21 Ne ayfe sinththafe haassofa; ne wozinan woththa. 
Proverbs4:22 Gaasoykka istti demmiza asas de7o immeettes; istti asateththaska payyateth immeettes. 
Proverbs4:23 Ubbaafekka bollara neni ne wozina minththada naaga; ays giikko de7oy izappe pulttees. 
Proverbs4:24 Ne doonappe gene haasaya digga; iita haasaya ne metershafe haassa. 
Proverbs4:25 Ne ayfeti sitti giidi sinth xeelletto; tishshi histtada ne sinththan dizayssa xeella. 
Proverbs4:26 Ne tohos oge giigsa; suure oge xalla hemetta. 
Proverbs4:27 Ushach hadirsi gooppa; ne toho iitappe naaga. 
Proverbs5:1 Ta naazoo! Ta aadho erateththaa ne wozinan woththa; tani akeekan yootiza qaala lo7eththa ezga. 
Proverbs5:2 Hessika wozinamateththi nees miish gidana malanne ne metershati erateth naagana malassa. 
Proverbs5:3 Layma maccassa inxarsafe eessa ililoy xokkees; izi haasayay oyssafekka aadhdhi shuggees. 
Proverbs5:4 Gido attiin iza wurseththan godare uuththa mala cammawus; nam7u baggara qanxxiza qara mashsha mala. 
Proverbs5:5 Izi tohoti duge hayqoso beettes; izi tanggoy sitti histti duge duufon kaaleththees. 
Proverbs5:6 Iza de7o oges wudu guukku; izi ogeti geella; gido attiin geella gididayssaka iza erukku. 
Proverbs5:7 Ta naytoo! Tana ezgite; ta yootiza qaalaappe ke7opite. 
Proverbs5:8 Intte oge izippe haassite; izi pengerakka aadhdhofte. 
Proverbs5:9 Hessika intte intte goobateththa haratas, intte layththaaka menxe iitatas intte immontta malassa." 
Proverbs5:10 Allagati intte aqotan kaa7ontta malanne intte daaburankka hara asasoy duretontta malassa. 
Proverbs5:11 Intte ashoy wuriin, intte meqeththi gilqiin wurseththa layththan intte goottarana." 
Proverbs5:12 Qasseka neni, «Tani ays seera ixxadinaa! Ta wozinaykka zore ays kadhidee!" 
Proverbs5:13 Tana tamaarsizayti yootidayssa ekkabeekke; tana zorizayta zorezakka ezgabeekke. 
Proverbs5:14 Hessa gishshas tani shiiqida duulata sinththafe dhayana matadis» gaana. 
Proverbs5:15 Neni eelissida ne pultto haaththafe uyada aliza mala ne machcheys ammanettada izi siiqon ala. 
Proverbs5:16 Beetta beetta maccassi uyiza pultto haath gidoppa. 
Proverbs5:17 Nenateththaa ne machcheys naaga; hara maccassara zin7ofa. 
Proverbs5:18 Ne machcheya nees anjjettida pultto gidu; yelagateththan neni ekkida ne machcheyra ufayetta. 
Proverbs5:19 Lo7iza gaara malanne ufayssiza genessa mala, izi dhanththati ubba wode nena aletto; izi siiqoy nena ubbato oykko." 
Proverbs5:20 Ta naazoo! Layma maccassay siiqon ays maththottay? Hara asa machchira ays qoomettay? 
Proverbs5:21 Gaasoykka asi ooththiza ubbaa GODAY beyees; izi hemettiza hemetaa ubbaa pilggi xeellees. 
Proverbs5:22 Nagaranchcha izi ooththida nagaray zaari oykkees. Iza nagara gitey iza qachchees. 
Proverbs5:23 Izi ba eeyateththa daron oge balana; bana haarana dandayontta aggida gishshas izi hayqqana. 
Proverbs6:1 Ta naazoo! Neni ne shoorozas waase gelidaa gidikko, hara asa gishshas neni kushe baqqa caaqqidaa gidikko," 
Proverbs6:2 neni gelida qaalan oykettidaa gidikko, ne doonappe ke7ida qaalan ne oykettidaa gidikko," 
Proverbs6:3 ta naazoo! Neni ne shooroza kushen kundida gishshas nena ashshanaas baada iza sinththan kunda; ne shoorozakko baada shoobba. 
Proverbs6:4 Hessaththo ooththontta dashe dhiskofa; ne siphinththati liphopetto. 
Proverbs6:5 Shankkanchchatappe genessi kessi ekki attiza mala, yarden oykettontta attida kafo mala nena ashsha." 
Proverbs6:6 Nenoo azallazoo! Cunccalletaakko ba; histtada isttafe tamaarada aadho eranchcha gida. 
Proverbs6:7 Cunccalletas azazizay deenna; istta haarizay deenna. 
Proverbs6:8 Gido attiin banttas maana miish bone shiishsheettes; kath shiishshiza wode banttas kath shiishsheettes. 
Proverbs6:9 Nenoo azallazoo! Neni awude gakkanaas dhiskanee? Dhiskofekka ne awude beegganee? 
Proverbs6:10 «Tani guuththara dhiska ekkana; guuththara liipha dendana; ta kushe borkotada guuththara shempa ekkana» ne gishin," 
Proverbs6:11 he wode manqoteththi panga mala, pacey ola miishsha oykkida asa mala ne bolla puttu gaana." 
Proverbs6:12 Womaleynne menxe iita asi yuuyi yuuyidi iita qaala haasayzay," 
Proverbs6:13 ba ayfera qim7otizay, ba tohon bessizay, ba biradhdhetankka malatizay," 
Proverbs6:14 ba wozinan iita miish woththi denththi qoppizay ay wodekka oosh denththees. 
Proverbs6:15 Hessa gaason bashshi akeekontta iza bolla yaana; izi hassa7ay baynda meqqana; meqqidikka paxenna. 
Proverbs6:16 GODAY ixxiza usuppun yo7oti deettes; laappunththaza keehi harasettees. 
Proverbs6:17 Otoreteththan xeelliza ayfe, wordotiza inxars, xillo asata wodhiza kushe," 
Proverbs6:18 iita miish qoppiza wozina, iitaso eesotiza tohota," 
Proverbs6:19 wordo bolla wordo gujji gujjidi yootiza wordo markka, ishantta giddon oosh medhdhiza asa." 
Proverbs6:20 Ta naazoo! Ne aawa azazo pola; ne aaya tamaarsidayssaka aggofa. 
Proverbs6:21 Istta ubbato ne wozinan oykka; ne qoodhenkka qachcha. 
Proverbs6:22 Neni hemettiza wode istti nena kaaleththana; neni ichchiza wode istti nena naagana; neni beegottiza wodekka istti nena zorana. 
Proverbs6:23 Ays giikko ha azazoti nees xomppe; timirtetikka poo7o; qasse seeraykka de7okko efiza oge. 
Proverbs6:24 Ha azazoti iita maccassafe nena naagana; doonan cimmiza hawusha maccassafekka naagana. 
Proverbs6:25 Izi lo7eteththa ne wozinan amottofa; izi qim7oteththan oykettofa. 
Proverbs6:26 Issi addey bana bayza diza maccassayo guuththa miishshan demmanaas dandayees; asa machchi geedo kaaloy nees shemppo dhayssana. 
Proverbs6:27 Issi asi tama idimmiin iza may7oy meetettontta attanaas dandayzee? 
Proverbs6:28 Issi asi bonqo tama yedhdhi bishin iza tohoy xuugettontta attana dandayzee? 
Proverbs6:29 Asa machcho laggeththiza asi hessa mala; izo bochchiza ubbay qaxxayettontta attenna. 
Proverbs6:30 Kaysoy gafa attanaas kaysikko asay iza kadhenna. 
Proverbs6:31 Gido attiin izas diza aqota ubbaa oychchikokka izi oykettidaa gidikko laappun kushe qanxxana bessees. 
Proverbs6:32 Layma laymatiza asas wozinay pace; hessaadey barkka ba shemppo dhayssees. 
Proverbs6:33 Bukaynne kawushshateththi izas qaada; yeellateththi izappe mulekka qucettenna. 
Proverbs6:34 Qanaatey azina hanqettana mala denththeththees; izi halo kessiza wode izas qadhettenna. 
Proverbs6:35 Izi ay edakka ekkenna; ay keena imotaykka iza hanqo doshisenna. 
Proverbs7:1 Ta naazoo! Ta qaala naaga; ta azazokka ne wozinan qum7a oykka. 
Proverbs7:2 Ne paxa de7ana mala ta azazota naaga; ta timirtezakka ne ayfe ciro mala naaga. 
Proverbs7:3 Hayta ne biradhdhetan qachcha; ne wozinankka xaafa. 
Proverbs7:4 Aadho erateth ne taas michcho ga; akeekakka ne taas dabbo ga. 
Proverbs7:5 Istti nena layma maccassafenne ba qaalan baleththiza hawusha maccassafe naagana. 
Proverbs7:6 Issi gallas tani ta keeththa maskootezara kare xeelladis. 
Proverbs7:7 Akeekay paccida yelagata be7adis. Istta giddofe issoy keehi eeya. 
Proverbs7:8 He wodallay izi soo efiza oge baggara oykki bishe izi keeththa achchara aadhdhi bishin," 
Proverbs7:9 he wode sa7ay qammanaas lankilankishin, dhumay ayfe oykkishin," 
Proverbs7:10 issi maccassaya iza demmanaas kezadus; layma maccassa may7o may7ada baleththanaas murtta kezadus. 
Proverbs7:11 Iza xalanne yeellay baynda maccassa; sohon woppu gaada uttuku. 
Proverbs7:12 Iza issito ogen, issito gulan, issito dubbushan eqqada naagawus." 
Proverbs7:13 Iza he naaza shiishsha oykkada yeerawus; yeellay baynda iza ayfe tishshi histta xeellashe," 
Proverbs7:14 «Tani tason issifeteththa yarsho yarshanaas bessees; tani ta adina hach poladis. 
Proverbs7:15 Histtada nena xeellanawu ke7adis; nena keeha koyadis; ha7i beya nena demmadis. 
Proverbs7:16 Tani Gibxeppe yida alleqissiza ansolakka ta hiixan yeggadis. 
Proverbs7:17 Tani karbbe, almmuniyemenne qarafa geetettiza sawotappe oosettida shitto ta hiixan cacafadis." 
Proverbs7:18 Haa ya; ane wonttana gakkanaas siiqo aloos; qoomettidikka ufayettoos. 
Proverbs7:19 Ta keeththaaway soon deenna; haako dere bides. 
Proverbs7:20 Miish karaxiite kunththi ekki bida gishshas aginay dors daganththontta simmenna» gadus. 
Proverbs7:21 Histtada ba mal7o haasayan iza baleththadus; ba liiqo inxarsankka cimmadus. 
Proverbs7:22 Shukas laagetti biza boora mala, woximaden oykettana biza cofosho mala heerakka aamusontta izo kaallidi bides." 
Proverbs7:23 Wondafe yiishshi iza tire caddana gakkanaas, iza shemppo dhayssanayssa erontta dishe piradhdhidi yarden geliza kafo mala gidides." 
Proverbs7:24 Ta naazoo! Ane ha7i siya; ta doonappe keziza qaalaakka ezga. 
Proverbs7:25 Ne wozinay izikko booppo; iza biza bala ogen geloppa. 
Proverbs7:26 Iza kawushshada olidayti undenna; iza wodhidayta qooday keehi daro. 
Proverbs7:27 Izi soy duufon efiza oge; he ogey duge hayqoso gaththees. 
Proverbs8:1 Siyite! Aadho erateththaya ba qaala doqqu histta xeygekkee? Akeekaykka ba cenggurssaa dhoqqu histta sissekee? 
Proverbs8:2 Oge doonan de7iza zumbullata bollanne daggala ogetan eqqawus. 
Proverbs8:3 Gimbeza lanqen katamata geliza pengen eqqada ba qaala dhoqqu histtada," 
Proverbs8:4 hayto asatoo! Tani inttena xeygays; tani asa zereth ubbaa xeygays. 
Proverbs8:5 Intteno akeekay paccidaytoo! wozinama gidite; intteno eeyatoo akeeka demmite. 
Proverbs8:6 Tani go7iza miish yootiza gishshas ezgite; ta doonappe suure yo7oy kezees. 
Proverbs8:7 Ta doonay tuma haasayees; ta metershatikka iita miish ixxeettes. 
Proverbs8:8 Ta doonappe keziza qaalati ubbay tuma; geella woykko bokka gidettenna. 
Proverbs8:9 Akeekay diza asas ta haasayay likke; erateththi dizaytas ta haasayan wordoy deenna. 
Proverbs8:10 Birappe aaththidi ta zore ekkite; muuruta worqqafe aaththidi erateth doorite. 
Proverbs8:11 Ays giikko, «Tani aadho erateththi zo7o inqqufekka keeha al7ays; neni amottiza miish ubbayka tanara ginattanaas dandayenna." 
Proverbs8:12 Tani aadho erateththi akeekara days; erateththinne wozinamateththi ta miishshata. 
Proverbs8:13 Godaas yashshateththi iita ixo; tani otoronne hallaca, menxe iitateththinne geella haasaya ixxays." 
Proverbs8:14 Zoreynne lo7o pirday tayta; taas akeekaynne wolqqay dees. 
Proverbs8:15 Kawoti tanan kawoteettes; dere ayssizayti suure woga kesseettes. 
Proverbs8:16 Daannati tani maaddiin deraa aysseettes; deraa haariza gita asati ubbay haareettes. 
Proverbs8:17 Tana siiqizayta tani siiqays; minni koyzayti tana demmana. 
Proverbs8:18 Dureteththinne bonchchoy ta matan deettes; wurontta aqotaynne injjey ta matanna. 
Proverbs8:19 Intte taappe demmiza go7ay muuruta worqqafe aadhdhees; ta imotaykka seerisi kessida birappe darees. 
Proverbs8:20 Tani xilloteththa ogen hemettays; suure pirda kaallays. 
Proverbs8:21 Tana siiqizaytas tani dureteth immana; istta minjja keeththaaka tani kunththana. 
Proverbs8:22 «GODAY tana ba ooso ubbaafe koyro medhdhides; benippeka iza oosaas koyroy tana. 
Proverbs8:23 Saloynne sa7ay medhettanaappe kase Beni mernaasofe tani shuumettadis. 
Proverbs8:24 Wogga gita abbati baynda wode, haaththa pulttoti dhuuqqanaappe kase tani yelettadis." 
Proverbs8:25 Zumatinne zumbullati medhettanaappe kase tani yelettadis. 
Proverbs8:26 GODAY sa7anne sa7a bolla diza dembata woykko alame bolla diza gudullata medhdhanaappe kase tani yelettadis. 
Proverbs8:27 GODAY salota miccida wodenne gita abbatappe bollara salo gufanththo giigsida wode tani heen de7ays. 
Proverbs8:28 GODAY shaarata bollan woththida wode, gita abbaa pulttota dhuussida wode," 
Proverbs8:29 abbaa haaththati banttas imettida zawappe pinnidi aadhdhontta mala zawa woththida wode, sa7as yoch yeggida wode," 
Proverbs8:30 he wode tani iza matan waanna oosanchcha; ubbaa gallas tani ufayssan kumays; tanikka iza sinththan ufayettays. 
Proverbs8:31 Izas gidida alame ubbaan ta ufayettays; asaa naytankka ta ufayettays. 
Proverbs8:32 «Ha7ikka ta naytoo! Tani gizayssa ezgite; ta oge naagizayti anjjettidayta. 
Proverbs8:33 Ta timirte siyite; aadho eranchchata gidite; wuda dhayopite. 
Proverbs8:34 Tani yootizayssa siyiza asi, hach hach ta pengen beettiza asi, taso gelizasonkka naagiza asi anjjettidaade." 
Proverbs8:35 Tana demmiday de7o demmees; GODAAPPE izi saba demmees. 
Proverbs8:36 Gido attiin tana demmontta aggida asi bana qohees; tana ixxiza ubbati hayqo siiqeettes» gadus. 
Proverbs9:1 Aadho erateththaya baas keeth keexxadus; keeththas laappun tuussata essadus. 
Proverbs9:2 Iza modhdho mehe shukkadus; woyne ushshu aggadus; maaddaka giigsadus. 
Proverbs9:3 Histtada asaa xeyganaas ba macca aylleta kiittadus. Iza katamayppe dhoqqa soon eqqada xeygadus; 
Proverbs9:4 «Inttenoo! Eray paccidayto haa gelite!» gadus. Eeyatakka iza," 
Proverbs9:5 «Haa yiidi ta qumaa miite; tani aggida woyne ushshaaka uyite! 
Proverbs9:6 Intte eeyateththa ogeza aggite; intte shemppora paxa de7ana; akeeka ogen hemettite» gadus. 
Proverbs9:7 Qilcciza as seeriza asi ubbay baas cashshe kallana; iita as zorizaadeyka baas kawuyana. 
Proverbs9:8 Qilcciza as zoroppa; ne iza zorikko izi nena ixxana. Aadho eranchcha as seera; ne iza seerikko izi nena dosana. 
Proverbs9:9 Aadho eranchcha as tamaarsa; histtiko izi kaseyssafekka aadho eranchcha gidana. Xillo as tamaarsa; histtiko izi erateth gujjana. 
Proverbs9:10 Aadho erateththas koyroy GODAAS yashshateththa; Geeshshaza eroykka akeeka. 
Proverbs9:11 Ta gaason nees barey aduqqana; nees de7o layththayka gujettana. 
Proverbs9:12 Neni aadho eranchcha gidikko go7ettana; ne qilccizaade gidikko qohettana. 
Proverbs9:13 Eeya maccassi wocama darawus; iza bana haarukku; iza aykkoka erukku. 
Proverbs9:14 Iza ba karen utta pe7awus; katama giddon dhoqqaso keza uttawus. 
Proverbs9:15 Heera aadhdhi ba oge bizayta xeygawus. 
Proverbs9:16 Izakka wozina pacetas, «Inttenoo! akeekay paccidayto taakko haa yiite." 
Proverbs9:17 Kaysi uyiza haaththi mal7ees; geeman miza qumaykka suukesees» gawus. 
Proverbs9:18 Gido attiin hayqqida asay heen de7izayssa, izi imaththatikka duufo giddon dizayssa istti erettenna." 
Proverbs10:1 Hayti Solomoone leemisota. Aadho erateththi diza nay ba aawa ufayssees; gido attiin eeya nay ba aayo ceecisees. 
Proverbs10:2 Bessontta ogera yida aqotay go7enna; gido attiin xilloteththi hayqoppe ashshees. 
Proverbs10:3 GODAY xillota gafisenna; gido attiin nagaranchchata amo calqamissana. 
Proverbs10:4 Azallateththi manqisees; minni oosoy gidikko duresees. 
Proverbs10:5 Aadho eranchchay kath wodera shiishshees; kath shiishshiza wode dhiskiza asi gidikko kawuyees. 
Proverbs10:6 Xillo asi anjjettees; iita asa doona makkallateththi gordees. 
Proverbs10:7 Xillota sunththay anjjon xeygettishe daana; iitata sunththi gidikko dogettana. 
Proverbs10:8 Aadho eranchchay azazo ero gi ekkees; lom7ulom7iza eeyati gidikko bashshaso beettes. 
Proverbs10:9 Suure asi hirgay baynda dees; geella oge biza asi gidikko ba mooron oykettana. 
Proverbs10:10 Gene oosos qim7otiza asi meto ehees; lom7ulom7iza eeyaykka meto ehees. 
Proverbs10:11 Xillota haasayay de7o pultto; iitata haasayay gidikko makkallateth genththees. 
Proverbs10:12 Ixoy palama denththeththees; siiqoy gidikko bala ubbaa kammi aadhdhees. 
Proverbs10:13 Wozinama asay aadho eran haasayees; eeya zokkon gidikko xam7ay meqqees. 
Proverbs10:14 Aadho eranchchati erateth dagaseettes; eeya haasayay gidikko bash xeygees. 
Proverbs10:15 Dureta aqotay isttas gimbettida katama; manqota manqoteththi isttas dhayoso. 
Proverbs10:16 Xillo asa damozay de7o; iita asatas wodhey gidikko qixaate. 
Proverbs10:17 Seera ekkiza asi de7o ogen hemettees; seera ixxiza asi gidikko meto bolla wodhdhees. 
Proverbs10:18 Ixxishe ba ixxizayssa qottiza asi wordanchcha; zigirs zigirza asi gidikko eeya. 
Proverbs10:19 Daro haasaya giddon mooroy dhayenna; ba doona shiishshi ekkiza asi gidikko aadho eranchcha. 
Proverbs10:20 Xillota haasayati geeshsha bira mala; iita asa qofas gidikko go7ay deenna. 
Proverbs10:21 Xillota haasayay darota go7ees; eeyati gidikko ba wozina pacen hayqqeettes. 
Proverbs10:22 GODAA anjjoy dure kessees; izi he dureteththan meto gujjenna. 
Proverbs10:23 Eeya asi iita ooson ufayeettes; wozinama asi gidikko aadho erateththan ufayeettes. 
Proverbs10:24 Iita as hirgiza miish iza bolla gakkana; gido attiin xillo amoy izas polettana. 
Proverbs10:25 Gote carkoy dendishin iitati pitetti dhayana; xilloti gidikko mernaas minni daana. 
Proverbs10:26 Caalay ach zil7issiza malanne cuway ayfe qohiza mala azalla asi kiittidaadenttas hessa mala. 
Proverbs10:27 GODAAS yashshi layth adussees; iitata barey gidikko qaanththa. 
Proverbs10:28 Xillota hidotay ufayssan gaththees; iitata hidotay gidikko hada gidi attees. 
Proverbs10:29 GODAA ogey xillotas baqati attizasoho; iita ooththizaytas gidikko bashsha soho. 
Proverbs10:30 Xilloti mulekka dhoqallettettenna; iitati gidikko biitta bolla de7ettenna. 
Proverbs10:31 Xillota doonay aadho erateth haasayees; geellata inxarsi gidikko qanxxettana. 
Proverbs10:32 Xillota metershay bessiza yo7o haasayees; iita doonay gidikko bokka yootees. 
Proverbs11:1 GODAY wordo geeddara ixxees; gido attiin suure geeddaran ufayettees. 
Proverbs11:2 Otoroteththi kawushshateth kaaleththees; ashketeththi gidikko aadho erateth ehees. 
Proverbs11:3 Xillota istta suureteththi kaaleththees; gido attiin wordanchchata istta wordoteththi dhayssees. 
Proverbs11:4 Hanqo gallas dureteththi go7enna; gido attiin xilloteththi hayqoppe ashshees. 
Proverbs11:5 Borey baynda asata istta xilloteththi isttas oge suurisees; gido attiin iitati bantta iitateththan kundeettes. 
Proverbs11:6 Suureta istta xilloteththi ashshees; gido attiin malteti bantta iita amon oykettana. 
Proverbs11:7 Iita asi hayqqiza wode iza hidotay hada gidees; ba wolqqan izi ceeqettizaazi ubbayka dhayees. 
Proverbs11:8 Xilloy metoppe attees; gido attiin metoy iita asa bolla gakkees. 
Proverbs11:9 Iita asi ba doonan ba laggeza dhayssees; gido attiin xilloti erateththan kessi ekki atteettes. 
Proverbs11:10 Xillotas injjetiza wode katamay ufayettees; qasse iitati dhayza wode hashshu gees. 
Proverbs11:11 Suureta anjjo gaason katamay diccees; iita haasayan gidikko katamay dhayees. 
Proverbs11:12 Wozina pace asi ba shooroza kadhees; akeekanchcha asi gidikko ba doona shiishshi ekkees. 
Proverbs11:13 Zigirza asi xuura laallees; ammanettiza asi gidikko xuura naagees. 
Proverbs11:14 Kaaleththo pacen kawoteththi kundees; daro zoranchchati de7ikko saroy dees. 
Proverbs11:15 Erontta asas waasettizay meton gelees; waase gelanaas caaqqonttaade aykkoyka bochchenna. 
Proverbs11:16 Ulo kiya maccassaya bonchchettawus; wolqqaththiza asati dureteth xalla duretteettes. 
Proverbs11:17 Kiya asi bana go7ees; menxe iita asi gidikko ba bolla meto ehees. 
Proverbs11:18 Iita asi demmiza wodhey deenna; xilloteth zeriza asi gidikko suure woyto ekkana. 
Proverbs11:19 Xilloy de7o demmana; gido attiin iitateth kaalliza asi hayqqana. 
Proverbs11:20 GODAY iita qofay de7iza asata shaatettees; gido attiin suure hemettizaytan ufayettees. 
Proverbs11:21 Iita asi qaxxayettontta attenna; gido attiin xilloti qaxxayettettenna. 
Proverbs11:22 Akeekay paccida maccassa puulateththi guddunththa siidhen aaththida worqqa mala. 
Proverbs11:23 Xillota amos wurseththi lo7o xalla; gido attiin iitata amos wurseththi hanqo xalla. 
Proverbs11:24 Issi issi asati coo kiyateth immeettes; gido attiin isttas aqoy haa haa darees. Baggati keehi uuzetteettes; gido attiin istti manqi manqi beettes. 
Proverbs11:25 Kiya asi durettana; haratas immizay baas woppa demmees. 
Proverbs11:26 Geemara kath dagasizaade derey qanggees; kessi bayzizaadey gidikko anjjettees. 
Proverbs11:27 Lo7o miish minththi koyzaade lo7o miishshi naagees; gido attiin iita miish koyzaade iita miishshi gakkees. 
Proverbs11:28 Ba dureteththan ammanettiza asi kundana; xilloti gidikko lo7o miththa mala cililana. 
Proverbs11:29 Soo asaa bolla shiro denththiza asi go7ay baynda attana; Eeyatikka aadho eranchchatas aylle gidana. 
Proverbs11:30 Xillo asi de7o ayfe ayfiza miththa mala; shemppota ashshizay aadho eranchcha. 
Proverbs11:31 Xilloti sa7an bantta ooso waaga ekkizaa gidikko, iitatinne nagaranchchati bantta oosos ekkana waagay waani darandeeshaa!" 
Proverbs12:1 Seera dosiza asi erateth dosees; gido attiin seera ixxiza asi damma. 
Proverbs12:2 Lo7o asi GODAAPPE saba demmees; gido attiin GODAY genanchchata pirdees. 
Proverbs12:3 Asi iitateththan eqqidi minni kanththanawu dandayenna; xilloti gidikko ba dizasoppe qaaxxettenna. 
Proverbs12:4 Wozinama maccassaya ba keeththaawas kallachcha mala; yeellachchiza machcha ba azinaas meqeththa garsan diza woyzazire harge mala. 
Proverbs12:5 Xillota qofay suure; iitata zorey gidikko cimo. 
Proverbs12:6 Iitata haasayay as wodhees; xillota haasayay gidikko as ashshees. 
Proverbs12:7 Iita asati kundana; isttas zereththika attenna; xillota zereththi gidikko minni daana. 
Proverbs12:8 Asi ba aadho erateththa mala galateettes; gido attiin geella qofay de7iza asi kadhettees. 
Proverbs12:9 Aykkoy baynda dishin dure asa mala ceeqettiza asappe bana ziqqi histti baas ooththi aqiza asi kiya. 
Proverbs12:10 Xillo asi ba mehes qadhettees; iita asi kiyattees giikkoka menxe iita. 
Proverbs12:11 Ba biittaa minththi ooththiza asi kath kallees; akeekay paccida asi go7ay baynda hidota gooddees. 
Proverbs12:12 Nagaranchchati iitati di7i ehidayssa amotteettes; xillota zereththi gidikko daayana. 
Proverbs12:13 Iita asi ba haasayda iita haasayan oykettees; xilloy gidikko metoppe kessi ekki attees. 
Proverbs12:14 Asi ba doonappe ke7iza qaalan lo7o miish kallees; ba ooththida ooso waagakka demmees. 
Proverbs12:15 Eeya asas izi biza ogey izas lo7o misatees; aadho eranchchay zore siyees. 
Proverbs12:16 Eeya asa hanqoy heerakka erettees; cincca asi gidikko cashshe wudu geenna. 
Proverbs12:17 Suure markkay tuma markkattees; wordoy gidikko wordo markkattees. 
Proverbs12:18 Akeekontta haasayza haasayay toora mala caddees; aadho eranchcha inxarsi gidikko paththees. 
Proverbs12:19 Wordo haasayay guuththa wodessa; tuma haasayay gidikko mernaassa. 
Proverbs12:20 Iita qoppizayta wozinan baleththoy dees; gido attiin saro miish qoppizayta wozinan ufayssi dees. 
Proverbs12:21 Xillota qohoy gakkenna; iitati gidikko meto kallana. 
Proverbs12:22 GODAY wordo haasaya harasettees; tumanchchatan gidikko ufayettees. 
Proverbs12:23 Akeekara diza asi ba erateth qottees; wozinay baynda asi ba eeyateththaa nashshees. 
Proverbs12:24 Minni ooththiza asi dere haarees; azallay aylle gidees. 
Proverbs12:25 Hirgan kumida wozinay as ceecen yeggees; shongara diza haasayay gidikko ufayssees. 
Proverbs12:26 Xillo asi ba lagge lo7o zore zorees; iitata zorey gidikko tuma ogeppe haassees. 
Proverbs12:27 Azalla asi shankkatidi ehida ashoza xiixenna; minni ooththiza asi gidikko ba aqotas mishettees. 
Proverbs12:28 Xilloteththa ogen de7oy dees; he ogen hayqoy deenna. 
Proverbs13:1 Era nay ba aawa zore wozinappe siyees; qilccizay gidikko seera siyenna. 
Proverbs13:2 Asi ba doonappe ke7iza qaalan lo7o miish demmees; ammanettonttayti gidikko makkallateth amotteettes. 
Proverbs13:3 Ba doona naagiza asi ba shemppo naagees; doonan yida mala haasayza asi bana dhayssees. 
Proverbs13:4 Azallay keehi amottees shin aykkoka demmenna; minni ooththizayta amoy gidikko kumana. 
Proverbs13:5 Xillo asati wordo haasaya ixxeettes; iita asata haasayay gidikko yeellaseessinne kawushshees. 
Proverbs13:6 Xilloteththi Suure as naagees; iitateththi gidikko nagaranchcha dhayssees. 
Proverbs13:7 Aykkoy baynda bana dure misatissiza asi dees; hara baggara baas daro aqotay dishin manqo misati beettiza asi dees. 
Proverbs13:8 Asi ba dureteththan ba shemppo wozzana gidana; manqoy gidikko hirgay baynda uttees. 
Proverbs13:9 Xillota poo7oy keehi poo7ees; iitata xomppey gidikko to7ana. 
Proverbs13:10 Otoroy oosh yelees; aadho erateththi gidikko zore ekkizayta matan dees. 
Proverbs13:11 Bessontta ogera demmida miishshi dhayi dhayi bees; ba cawa gussidi demmida aqotay dari dari bees. 
Proverbs13:12 Hidotay polettontta gam7iko wozinay meqqees; gido attiin amottidayssi polettishin ufayssees. 
Proverbs13:13 Zore kadhiza asi meton gelees; azazo bonchchiza asi gidikko ba waaga ekkana. 
Proverbs13:14 Aadho eranchchay immiza timirtey de7o pultto; hessi asi hayqo woximaden gelontta mala naagees. 
Proverbs13:15 Akeekay de7iza asi bonchchettees; ammanettontta agoy bashsha oge efees. 
Proverbs13:16 Akeekiza asi eran ooththees; eeyay gidikko ba eeyateththa qonccisees. 
Proverbs13:17 Iita asi kiitettiko meton gelees; ammanettida asi kiitettiko saroteth ehees. 
Proverbs13:18 Seera ixxiza asi manqeessinne kawuyees; hanqo siyiza asi gidikko bonchchettees. 
Proverbs13:19 Amoy polettiko keehi ufayssees; eeyati gidikko iitappe haakkanaas koyettenna. 
Proverbs13:20 Aadho eranchchatara hemettiza asi aadho eranchcha gidees; gido attiin eeyatara hemettiza asi meton gelees. 
Proverbs13:21 Nagaranchchata iita qaaday kaallees; dureteththi gidikko xillotas imettiza woyto. 
Proverbs13:22 Lo7o asi baas naa nayta gakkanaas laatisees; nagaranchcha aqotay gidikko xillotas dagattees. 
Proverbs13:23 Manqo gadey daro kath immana dandayees; gido attiin suure pirday dhaykko pitetti dhayees. 
Proverbs13:24 Seerontta dichchizay ba naa ixxees; gido attiin seeri dichchizay ba naa dosees. 
Proverbs13:25 Xilloy kallanaashe gakkanaas mees; iitati gidikko gafida mala daana. 
Proverbs14:1 Aadho erateththi diza maccassaya ba keeth keexxawus; eeyaya gidikko ba keeth ba kushen laallawus. 
Proverbs14:2 Suure hemettiza asi GODAAS yayyees; geella oge hemettizay gidikko iza kadhees. 
Proverbs14:3 Eeya haasayay iza zokkos gatuma ehees; aadho eranchchata inxarsay gidikko istta naagees. 
Proverbs14:4 Booray bayndason gootaray mela dees; gido attiin nees boorata wolqqan daro kaththi beettees. 
Proverbs14:5 Ammanettiza markkay ubbato tuma markkattees; wordo markkay gidikko wordo markkattees. 
Proverbs14:6 Qilccizay aadho erateth koykkoka demmenna; akeekay diza asi waayettontta erateth demmees. 
Proverbs14:7 Eeya asappe haakka; ays giikko neni iza haasayappe erateth demmaka. 
Proverbs14:8 Akeekanchcha asas aadho erateththi ba oge naago; eeyata eeyateththi gidikko istta cimmees. 
Proverbs14:9 Eeyati nagara ooththidi modhettanayssa aggidi qilcceettes; suure asatappe gidikko lo7o qofay beettees. 
Proverbs14:10 Issoy issoy ba wozinan diza ceece erees; iza ufayssaa oonikka izara koxxenna. 
Proverbs14:11 Iitata keeththay laalettana; suureta keeththay gidikko minni de7ana. 
Proverbs14:12 Asas likke misatiza ogey dees; wurseththan gidikko hayqos gaththees. 
Proverbs14:13 Miichchankka wozinay meqqi erees; muuzoteththan ufayssi polettana dandayees. 
Proverbs14:14 Ba wozina xilloteththafe haassizayti ba ooso waaga ekkana; lo7o asikka ba lo7o ooso waaga ekkana. 
Proverbs14:15 Eeya asi ubbaa miish ammanees; cinccay gidikko akeekidi tanggees. 
Proverbs14:16 Aadho eranchchay GODAAS yayyeessinne saatti tanggees; iitappeka haakkees; eeyay gidikko wuday baynda bichcharees. 
Proverbs14:17 Elle hanqettiza asi eeya ooso ooththees; yo7o qachchiza asi dosettenna. 
Proverbs14:18 Wozina paceti eeyateth laattana; akeekanchchati gidikko erateth kallachcha mala goxxana. 
Proverbs14:19 Iitati lo7ota sinththan gulbatana; nagaranchchati xillota pengen hokkana. 
Proverbs14:20 Manqota istta laggetikka ixxeettes; duretas gidikko daro laggeti deettes. 
Proverbs14:21 Ba shooro kadhiza asi nagara ooththees; gido attiin manqo maaddizay anjjettidayssa. 
Proverbs14:22 Iita halchchizayti suure ogeppe kare kezeettes dettenee? Lo7o qoppizayti gidikko siiqonne ammaneteth eheettes. 
Proverbs14:23 Minni ooson ubbaan wodhey dees; hada yo7oy gidikko manqisees. 
Proverbs14:24 Aadho eranchchatas istta dureteththi isttas kallachcha; eeyata eeyateththi gidikko coo hada. 
Proverbs14:25 Tumu markkay shemppo ashshees; wordo markkay gidikko baleththees. 
Proverbs14:26 GODAAS yayyiza asas mino miixay dees; iza naytaska baqati attiza sohoy dees. 
Proverbs14:27 GODAAS yashshi de7o pultto; hayqo woximadeppe as ashshees. 
Proverbs14:28 Dere corateththay kawos bonchcho; dere guuththateththi kawos bash gidees. 
Proverbs14:29 Dandayanchcha asas gita akeekay dees; elle hanqettiza asi gidikko ba eeyateth qonccisees. 
Proverbs14:30 Woppu gida wozinay bollas payyateth immees; qanaatey gidikko meqeththa giddon gelida woyzazire mala. 
Proverbs14:31 Manqota naaqqiza asi istta medhdhidayssa cayees; metotanchchatas qadhettizaa gidikko Xoossa bonchchees. 
Proverbs14:32 Iitati bantta iita ooson kundana; gido attiin xilloti hayqo wodekka baqati attizasoy dees. 
Proverbs14:33 Akeekanchcha asaa wozinan aadho erateththi kumides; gido attiin eeyati aadho erateththa gishshas aykkoka erettenna. 
Proverbs14:34 Xilloteththi kawoteththaa dhoqqu dhoqqu ooththees; gido attiin nagaray ay asikka kawushshees. 
Proverbs14:35 Aadho erateththi diza aylley kawo ufayssees; gido attiin yeellachchiza aylley ba bolla hanqo ehees. 
Proverbs15:1 Liiqo zaaroy hanqo irxxisees; pordolo qaalay gidikko hanqo denththeththees. 
Proverbs15:2 Aadho eranchcha inxarsafe erateththi pulttees; gido attiin dogata doonappe eeyateththi pulttees. 
Proverbs15:3 GODAA ayfeti ubbaso xeelleettes; iitatanne lo7ota ubbaa lo7eththi be7eettes. 
Proverbs15:4 Shongay de7iza lo7o haasayay de7o miththa mala; gido attiin baleththo haasayay ayana qohees. 
Proverbs15:5 Eeyay ba aawa seera kadhees; gido attiin zore ekkizay ba akeekateththaa qonccisees. 
Proverbs15:6 Xillo asa keeththan daro aqotay dees; gido attiin iitatas geliza miishshi meto ehees. 
Proverbs15:7 Aadho eranchchata doonay erateth zerees; eeyata wozinay gidikko hessa mala deenna. 
Proverbs15:8 GODAY iitata yarsho shaatettees; suureta woosay gidikko iza ufayssees. 
Proverbs15:9 GODAY iita asata oge shaatettees; gido attiin xilloteth kaallizayta dosees. 
Proverbs15:10 Suure oge aggidi kare ke7idaade hanqoy naagees; seera ixxiza asi hayqqees. 
Proverbs15:11 Duufoninne dhayo giddon dizayssi GODAA sinththan qoncce; histtiin asa wozina qofay waani izappe geemmanee? 
Proverbs15:12 Qilcciza asi seera dosenna; aadho eranchchatappekka zore oychchenna. 
Proverbs15:13 Wozina ufayssi sinth poo7isees; wozina ceecey gidikko ayana qohees. 
Proverbs15:14 Akeekiza wozinay erateth koyees; gido attiin dogata doonay eeyateth banchikees. 
Proverbs15:15 Manqota de7oy ubbaa gallassika baaxe. Ufayettiza asati ubbatokka bantta de7on ufayetteettes 
Proverbs15:16 Ooshshi dizason diza gita aqotappe GODAA yashshateththara diza guuththa aqotay aadhdhees. 
Proverbs15:17 Ooshshi dizason modhdho asho maanaappe siiqoy dizason santh muusi aadhdhees. 
Proverbs15:18 Eeson hanqettiza asi oosh kessees; dandayza asi gidikko oosh irxxisees. 
Proverbs15:19 Azalla asa ogey agunththan diretti uttides; suure asa ogey gidikko baasa gidees. 
Proverbs15:20 Aadho erara diza nay ba aawa ufayssees; gido attiin eeya nay ba aayo kadhees. 
Proverbs15:21 Wozina pace asi ba eeyateththan ufayettees; gido attiin akeeki suure oge kaallees. 
Proverbs15:22 Zorey dhaykko halchchoy ogen attees; daro zoranchchati dizason halchchoy polettees. 
Proverbs15:23 Asi bessiza zaaro immidi ufays demmees; koshshiza woden imettida qaalay ay mala lo7oo! 
Proverbs15:24 Duge duufon woththiza oge bontta mala de7o ogey aadho eranchcha pude kaaleththawus. 
Proverbs15:25 GODAY otoranchchata keeththa laallees; gido attiin am7ey zawa naagees. 
Proverbs15:26 GODAY iitata qofa shaatettees; geeshshata qofay gidikko iza ufayssees. 
Proverbs15:27 Uuze asi baso asa bolla meto ehees; gido attiin matta7e ixxiza asi paxa daana. 
Proverbs15:28 Xillo asi haasayanaappe kasetidi qoppees; gido attiin iita asa doonappe iita qaalay goggees. 
Proverbs15:29 GODAY iitatappe haakon dees; gido attiin xillota woosa siyees. 
Proverbs15:30 Pashka hanoy wozina ufayssees; mishiraachcho qaalay meqeth cililisees. 
Proverbs15:31 De7o immiza seera ekkiza asi aadho eranchchatara issife daana. 
Proverbs15:32 Seera ixxiza asi bana kadhees; seera ekkiza asi gidikko akeeka demmees. 
Proverbs15:33 GODAAS yashshi aadho erateth tamaarssees; bonchchettana koyida asi koyro bana kawushshanaas koshshees. 
Proverbs16:1 Asi ba wozinan halchchees; gido attiin zaaroy GODAAPPE beettees. 
Proverbs16:2 Asi biza oge ubbay izas lo7o misatees; GODAY koyro denththa qofaa caddi xeellees. 
Proverbs16:3 Ne ooththiza ubbaa hadara GODAAS imma; histtiko ne halchchoy polettana. 
Proverbs16:4 GODAY ubbaa miish medhdhida gaasoykka dees; makkallanchchata gidikkoka bashsha gallassas giigsi woththides. 
Proverbs16:5 GODAY otorettiza ubbaa shaatettees; istti qaxxayettontta attettenna. 
Proverbs16:6 Siiqoninne ammaneteththan nagaray atto geetettees; GODAAS yashshateththan asi iitappe haakkees. 
Proverbs16:7 Asa hemetay GODAA ufayssizaaz gidikko iza morkketi izara saro daana mala ooththees. 
Proverbs16:8 Xilloteththan beettiza guuththa miishshi wordora demmiza daro wodheppe aadhdhees. 
Proverbs16:9 Asi ba wozinan ba ooththana miish halchchees; halchchozi GODAY giikko polettees. 
Proverbs16:10 Kawo metershati Xoossafe ekkida maatan haasayeettes; iza inxarsi pirda geellasanaas bessenna. 
Proverbs16:11 Suure geeddaratinne maka miishshati GODAAPPE; karaxiite giddon diza geeddarati ubbay iza oosota. 
Proverbs16:12 Kawoti iita ooso harassetteettes; ays giikko kawoteththa araatay xilloteththan eqqees. 
Proverbs16:13 Xillo haasayan kawoti ufayetteettes; tuma haasayzaytakka doseettes. 
Proverbs16:14 Kawo hanqoy hayqo kiitanchcha mala; aadho eranchchay gidikko hanqo irxxisees. 
Proverbs16:15 Kawoy pashki gishin de7oy dees; izas kiyateththi ira tookkida badhdhesa shaara mala. 
Proverbs16:16 Aadho erateththa demoy worqqa demmizayssafe aadhdhees; akeeka demoy bira demoppeka aadhdhees. 
Proverbs16:17 Suureta ogey iitatappe haakon dees; ba hemeta naagiza asi ba shemppo naagees. 
Proverbs16:18 Otoro geedo bashshi kaallees; hallaca geedokka kundeththi kaallees. 
Proverbs16:19 Otoranchchatara zuppetidi di7i ehida miish shaaketti ekkanaappe manqotara manqeteththan duussi kiya. 
Proverbs16:20 Zore ekkiza asi duretees; GODAAN ammanettiza asi anjjettidaade. 
Proverbs16:21 Wozinan aadho eranchcha gidida asati akeekanchcha geetetteettes; lo7o qaalay erateth gujjees. 
Proverbs16:22 Baas miish ooththidaades akeekay de7o pultto; dogatas gidikko eeyateththi hanqo ehees. 
Proverbs16:23 Aadho eranchcha wozinay iza doona kaaleththees; iza metershatikka erateth gujji gujji beettes. 
Proverbs16:24 Lo7o qaalay eessa ililo mala mal7ees; bollaka maaddeessinne paththees. 
Proverbs16:25 Asas suure misatiza ogey dees; gido attiin wurseththan hayqos gaththees. 
Proverbs16:26 Kaththa koshshi asi minni ooththana mala denththeththees; gafaykka oosos minththeththees. 
Proverbs16:27 Iita asi iitateth qoppees; iza haasayaykka xuuggiza tama mala. 
Proverbs16:28 Geella asi oosh denththees; zigirsi ammanettiza laggeta shaakkees. 
Proverbs16:29 Gene asi ba shooroza cimmees; lo7o gidontta oge iza kaaleththees. 
Proverbs16:30 Ayfera qim7oti bessiza asi geellateth qoppees; ba mettershaa saxxiza asi iitaso bees. 
Proverbs16:31 Pulunththi bonchcho kallachcha; hessi xilloteththa duussan beettees. 
Proverbs16:32 Wolqqama as gidanaappe dandaya as gideth lo7o; bana haarizaadey katama wolqqan haarizaadefe aadhdhees. 
Proverbs16:33 Asi saama yeggees; gido attiin wurseththa polo immizay GODAA. 
Proverbs17:1 Ooshshi de7izason de7iza gita gibira maanaappe saroynne woppay de7izason ukeththa mela meeththi kiya. 
Proverbs17:2 Akeekanchcha aylles shufuro gidida ba goda naa bolla maatay dees; histtidi ishantta mala isttara issife laattees. 
Proverbs17:3 Worqqaynne biray taman paacettizayssa mala GODAY asaa wozina pilggi xeellees. 
Proverbs17:4 Iita asi iita haasaya siyees; wordanchchayka genanchcha haasaya ezgees. 
Proverbs17:5 Hiyeesata bolla qilcciza asi istta medhdhidayssa cayees; hara as gakkiza meton ufayettiza asi qaxxayettontta attenna. 
Proverbs17:6 Nayta nayti cimmida asatas kallachcha; yelidayti bantta naytas bonchcho. 
Proverbs17:7 Lo7o haasayay eeyas giigenna; wordo haasayay dere ayssizaades ay mala deexo! 
Proverbs17:8 Matta7ey immizaades bita mala; izi bida soho ubbaan izas injjetana misatees. 
Proverbs17:9 Qohettidi ba qohoza genththiza asi siiqo koyees; gido attiin yo7o zaari zaaridi piqqiza asi ammanettiza laggeta shaakkees. 
Proverbs17:10 Eeyay xeetuto lisson shociin erizayssafe akeekay de7iza asi coo seeriin erizayssi aadhdhees. 
Proverbs17:11 Iita asi makkalla miish xalla koyees; hessa gishshas iza bolla menxe iita asi kiitettana. 
Proverbs17:12 Eeya asara iza eeyateththa mala gayttanaappe marata bonqqi ekkichchida maaheyra gayteththi kiya. 
Proverbs17:13 Lo7o ooththidaades iita zaarizaadesoppe iitay mulekka dhayenna. 
Proverbs17:14 Oosh doomeththi eele haath pogi yeddo mala; hessa gishshas ooshshi medhettanaappe kasetada kichchaycha. 
Proverbs17:15 Wordanchcha xillo xilloza wordo guussi nam7ayka GODAA sinththan ixettida ooso. 
Proverbs17:16 Aadho erateththi demmanaas izi koyontta gishshas eeya kushen gelida miish iza ay go7anee? 
Proverbs17:17 Laggey ay wodekka lagge; ishaykka meto wodes yelettees. 
Proverbs17:18 Akeekay paccida asi baqqi caaqqidi hara asas waase gelees. 
Proverbs17:19 Oosh dosiza asi nagara dosees; ubbato bana dhoqqu histtizaadey ba bolla bash xeygees. 
Proverbs17:20 Geella qofay de7izaades injjetenna; wordo haasayza asikka meton gelees. 
Proverbs17:21 Eeya naa yeloy ceecisees; eeya naa aawaas ufayssi deenna. 
Proverbs17:22 Ufayettiza wozinay lo7o dhale; gido attiin meqqida wozinay asas wolqqa dhayssees. 
Proverbs17:23 Iita asi pirda geellasanaas geeman matta7e ekkees. 
Proverbs17:24 Akeekay de7iza asi aadho erateth ba sinththafe dhayssenna; gido attiin eeya ayfey sa7a gaxa gakkanaas yuuyees. 
Proverbs17:25 Eeya nay ba aawa ceecisees; bana yelida aayokka xuuggees. 
Proverbs17:26 Xillo as qaxxayo bessenna; suure as shocoy lo7o gidenna. 
Proverbs17:27 Amarda qaala haasayza asi aadho eranchcha; woppa ayanay de7iza asikka akeekanchcha. 
Proverbs17:28 Eeya asi co7u giikko aadho eranchcha misatees; ba doonakka shiishshi oykkiko akeekanchcha misatees.

Proverbs18:2 Eeyay ba qofa qonccisanaaro xalla dosees; gido attiin hara asappe era ekkanaas dosenna. 
Proverbs18:3 Iitateththi kadhe kaaleththees; yeellateththi yishin kawushshateththi yees. 
Proverbs18:4 Asa doonappe ke7iza haasayay ciimma haaththa mala; aadho erateththa pulttoyka xongettiza piissa haaththaa mala.

Proverbs18:6 Eeya asa doonay iza bolla oosh denththees; iza doonappe ke7iza qaalay iza bolla durqqa xeygees.

Proverbs18:9 Azalla asi dhayssiza asas isha.

Proverbs19:3 Issi issi asay ba eeyateththan ba de7o moorees; histtidi GODAA bolla yiillotees. 
Proverbs19:4 Dureteththi daro lagge medhdhees; gido attiin manqoteththi kase diza lagge haassees. 
Proverbs19:5 Wordo markkay qaxxayettontta attenna; wordo puukkizaykka qaxxayettontta attenna.

Proverbs19:7 Manqo iza dabbo ubbay ixxees; histtiin iza laggeti ay keena izappe baqatanee! Kaalli aadashidikka izi istta demmenna. 
Proverbs19:8 Aadho erateth baas miish ooththizay bana siiqees; akeeka siiqizaades injjetees. 
Proverbs19:9 Wordo markkay qaxxayettontta attenna; wordo puukkizaykka dhayana.

Proverbs19:17 Manqos kiyiza asi GODAAS tal7ees; GODAY he lo7o ooso waaga qanxxana. 
Proverbs19:18 Wodera ne naa seera; izi hayqos bishin co7u ga xeellofa. 
Proverbs19:19 Eeson yiillotiza asi qaxxayettanaas bessees; neni agga aadhdhiko hara wodekka nees hessaththo oosoy attenna. 
Proverbs19:20 Zore siya; seerakka ekka. Histtiko neni wurseththan aadho eranchcha gidana. 
Proverbs19:21 Asa wozinan daro halchchoy dees; gido attiin GODAA qofay polettees. 
Proverbs19:22 Asappe koyettizay mino siiqo; wordanchcha gidanaappe manqoteththi lo7o. 
Proverbs19:23 GODAAS yashshi de7os kaaleththees; hessa mala asi woppan dees; iitaykka iza bochchenna. 
Proverbs19:24 Azallay ba kushe maaddan yeddees; gido attiin pude ba doonan zaaranawu waayettees. 
Proverbs19:25 Qilccizaade shocikko wozina pacey akeeka taamarana; akeekanchcha asa seerikko izi erateth demmana.

Proverbs20:2 Kawo hanqoy gaammo xaago mala; iza yiillochchizay ba shemppo bolla pirdees. 
Proverbs20:3 Palamappe haakoy izaades bonchcho; gido attiin eeya asi ubbay ooshshas eesotees. 
Proverbs20:4 Azalla goshshanchchay wodera goyenna; kath shiishshiza wode shiishshanaas koyees; gido attiin aykkoka demmenna. 
Proverbs20:5 Asa wozina halchchoy ciimma ollan de7iza haaththa mala; gido attiin wozinama asi heeppe duuqqi kessees. 
Proverbs20:6 Daro asati bantta kiyateththa yooteettes; gido attiin ammanettiza as ooni demmanaas dandayzee? 
Proverbs20:7 Xillo asi borey baynda de7o dees; izappe kaallidi iza naytikka anjjettidayta. 
Proverbs20:8 Kawoy pirdanaas ba kawoteththa algan uttiza wode iita ubbaa ba ayfetan harqidi kessees. 
Proverbs20:9 «Ta wozinaa geeshshadis; ta geeshsha; tanan nagaray baawa» gaanay oonee? 
Proverbs20:10 GODAY wordo meezaanenne nam7u qommo geeddara miish ixxees. 
Proverbs20:11 Nay geeshshinne suure gidizayssi izi ooththiza ooson erettees. 
Proverbs20:12 Siyiza hayththinne xeelliza ayfe, isttaka GODAY medhdhides." 
Proverbs20:13 Dhisko siiqoppa! Ne histtontta aggiko ne manqana. Minnada ooththa; histtiko neni kath kallana. 
Proverbs20:14 Shammiza asi, «Hayssi al7o! Qohees!» gees; gido attiin shammi simmidaappe guyen, «Hiraysson shammadis» giidi ceeqettees." 
Proverbs20:15 Eray kumida qaala haasayza metershati worqqafenne zo7o inqqufekka aadho geexe. 
Proverbs20:16 Erontta asas waase geliza asa may7o qaari ekkite; hawusha maccassas waase geliza as oykkite. 
Proverbs20:17 Wordon demmida kaththi mal7ees; gido attiin aqi pe7idi doonan ace gidees. 
Proverbs20:18 Zore ekkada halchcho halchcha; zore ekkontta de7ashe olas booppa. 
Proverbs20:19 Zigiranchchay xuura laallees; hessa gishshas lom7ulom7a asappe haakka. 
Proverbs20:20 Ba aawa woykko ba aayo cayizaades, xomppey sakkanna dhuman to7ana." 
Proverbs20:21 Koyrora eeson beettida aqotas wurseththan anjjoy deenna. 
Proverbs20:22 Neessi iita ooththida asas, «tani izas halo kessana» gooppa; GODAAN ammanettada naaga; izi nena ashshana." 
Proverbs20:23 GODAY wordo meezaanen ufayettenna nam7u qommo geeddara miish ixxees. 
Proverbs20:24 Asay baanaas bessiza oge GODAY kaaleththees; histtiin asi barkka ba baana oge wostti akeekanaas dandayzee? 
Proverbs20:25 Issi miish Eesotidi, «Hayssa tani Xoossas immana» giidi adinettidaappe guye zil7eteththi as oykkiza yarde." 
Proverbs20:26 Aadho erateththi diza kawoy makkallanchchata shaakki erees; izi istta qadhettontta qaxxayees. 
Proverbs20:27 Asa ayanay GODAA xomppe; hessa gishshas giddo asateth ubbaa izi pilggi xeellees. 
Proverbs20:28 Kiyateththinne tumateththi kawo naagettees; iza kawoteththa araataykka siiqon minnees. 
Proverbs20:29 Yelagata wolqqay isttas bonchcho; cimata pulunththi isttas bonchcho. 
Proverbs20:30 Mino qixaatey iitateth diggees; wadhay iita wozina laammees. 
Proverbs21:1 Kawo wozinay GODAA kushen dees; izi iza wozinaa goggiza haaththa mala ba dosidaso zaarees. 
Proverbs21:2 Asi biza ogey izaades suure misatees; GODAY gidikko wozinaa pilggi xeellees. 
Proverbs21:3 Yarshofe bollara xillonne suure pirda GODAY dosees. 
Proverbs21:4 Otoroynne hallacay iita asata bessiza malata; hessika nagara. 
Proverbs21:5 Mino oosanchcha halchchoy duresees; gido attiin bichcharisi manqisees. 
Proverbs21:6 Wordotidi dagasida aqotay dhayza pentta mala; qasseka wodhiza woximade mala. 
Proverbs21:7 Iitati suure ooso dosontta gishshas iitata istta makkallateththi dhayssana. 
Proverbs21:8 Mooranchchati geella ogera hemetteettes; gido attiin geeshshati suure haneettes. 
Proverbs21:9 Duunama machchira daanaappe keeththa daaranchchan aqoy lo7o. 
Proverbs21:10 Iitati iita miish ooththanaas keehi amotteettes. Iza laggey izappe qadheta demmenna. 
Proverbs21:11 Qilccizaadey qaxxayettida wode wozinay paccida asi aadho erateth tamaarees; wozinama asikka tamaardi erateth demmees. 
Proverbs21:12 Xillo Xoossay iitatason oosettiza ubbaa caddi xeellees; istta mulera dhayssees. 
Proverbs21:13 Manqo waaso siyanaappe giidi ba hayth tucciko izikka waassiza wode alliza asi dhayana. 
Proverbs21:14 Geeman immiza imotay hanqo doshisees; afala giddora immida matta7ey suule hanqo irxxisees. 
Proverbs21:15 Suure pirday xillota ufayssees; iita ooththizayta gidikko shirosees. 
Proverbs21:16 Akeeka ogeppe kare keziza asi moytille duulatan shemppees. 
Proverbs21:17 Hallaca duus daana koyza asi manqees; ushshinne muus gooddiza asi durettenna. 
Proverbs21:18 Xillota bolla yida metoy iitata bolla simmana; suure asata bolla yida metoy ammanettonttayta bolla gakkana. 
Proverbs21:19 Wocamizanne doonatiza machchira daanaappe bazzon duussi kiya. 
Proverbs21:20 Wozinama asa soon mal7o qumaynne zaytey dagatti dees; gido attiin eeya asi baas dizayssa, bayndaa ubbaa dippi histti mees." 
Proverbs21:21 Xilloteththinne siiqo kaallizaadey de7o, dureteththinne bonchcho demmees." 
Proverbs21:22 Wozinama asi wolqqama olanchchati diza katama menththi gelees; istti ammanettida miixatakka laalli yeggees. 
Proverbs21:23 Ba doonanne ba inxars naagiza asi bana boshappe naagees. 
Proverbs21:24 Otoranchchaynne hallaca asi qidhanchcha geetettees; izi otoro hano hanees. 
Proverbs21:25 Azalla amoy wodhees; ays giikko izi ooththanaas koyenna. 
Proverbs21:26 Azallay gallas kumeth amottishe pe7ees; xilloy gidikko uuzettontta immees. 
Proverbs21:27 Iita asa yarshoy harassees; iita qofan shiishshizaa gidikko ay mala iita gidanee? 
Proverbs21:28 Wordo markkay dhayana; gido attiin tumu markkattizay minnidi de7ana. 
Proverbs21:29 Iita asi bessonttaz xala xalees; gido attiin suure asi yuushshi qoppees. 
Proverbs21:30 Asi ba eran, akeekaninne halchchon GODAARA eqettanaas dandayenna." 
Proverbs21:31 Ola gallassas para giigssees; gido attiin xoonoy GODAAPPE yees. 
Proverbs22:1 Lo7o sunththi daro dureteththafe aadhdhees; asa matan bonchcheteththika birappenne worqqafe aadhdhees. 
Proverbs22:2 Durenne manqo ubbaa GODAY medhdhides; hessan istta naykka issi gina. 
Proverbs22:3 Akeekanchcha asi iita be7idi attanaas baqatees; gido attiin akeekay paccida asi meton gelidi qohettees. 
Proverbs22:4 Ashketeththinne GODAAS yashshi, dureteth, bonchchonne de7o immees." 
Proverbs22:5 Iita asa ogen agunththinne yardey dees; gido attiin bana naagiza asi hessafe haakkees. 
Proverbs22:6 Nayi waanidi de7ana bessizaakko tamaarsa; histtiko izi cimmidikka hessafe haakkenna. 
Proverbs22:7 Durey manqo haarees; tal7e ekkidaadey tal7e immidaades aylle gides. 
Proverbs22:8 Iitateth zeriza asi waaye cakkees; iza hanqo guufey dhayana. 
Proverbs22:9 Kiya asi anjjettees; ba qumappeka hiyeesas immees. 
Proverbs22:10 Qilcciza as digga; histtiko palamay attana; ooshshinne cashshika dhayana. 
Proverbs22:11 Wozina geeshshateth dosiza asinne doonappe lo7o haasayza asara kawoy laggetees. 
Proverbs22:12 GODAA ayfeti erateth naagettees; gido attiin wordanchchata qaala hada kessees. 
Proverbs22:13 Azalla asi, «Gaammoy karen dees; tana ogen wodhana» gees." 
Proverbs22:14 Layma maccassa doonay ciimma olla mala; GODAY hanqettida asi izin wullees. 
Proverbs22:15 Naa wozina eeyateththi baqqi oykkees; gido attiin seera shoch izappe haassees. 
Proverbs22:16 Baas aqota gujjana giidi hiyeesa naaqqizaynne duresi imota immizay naykka manqana. 
Proverbs22:17 Aadho eranchcha zore wozinappe siya; ne wozinaykka ta timirtekko simmo! 
Proverbs22:18 Ays giikko istta ne wozinan woththiko, ne doonanka istta ubbaa haasaykko ne ufayettana." 
Proverbs22:19 Ne ammanoy GODAAN gidana mala tani nena hach tamaarsays. 
Proverbs22:20 Tani neessi zorenne erateth immiza lo7o timirteta xaafabeekkinaa? 
Proverbs22:21 Nena kiittidayssas bessiza zaaro zaarana mala, tani nena tumanne ammanettida qaalata tamaarsana mala gidennee?" 
Proverbs22:22 Hiyeesatasi aykkoyka baynda gishshas istta bonqofa; shilotankka metotanchchata waayisoppa. 
Proverbs22:23 Ays giikko GODAY istta gishshas mootettana; istta bonqqidaytakka izi bonqqana. 
Proverbs22:24 Hanqettiza asara laggetoppa; hanqettanaas eesotiza asarakka zuppetoppa. 
Proverbs22:25 Neni iza hanoza meezetikko, guyeppe agganawu dandayakka." 
Proverbs22:26 Waase gelanaas caaqqofa; asa aco qanxxanaas waase geloppa. 
Proverbs22:27 Neessi qanxxizaazi dhaykko, ne ichchiza algayka attontta ekettana." 
Proverbs22:28 Ne aawati essida beniisofe diza zawaa shoddofa. 
Proverbs22:29 Ba ooson loohida as beyadii? Izi kawotas ooththeesippe attiin bessontta asatas ooththenna. 
Proverbs23:1 Neni dere haarizayssara kath maanaas uttida wode, ne sinththan de7izayssa lo7eththada akeeka." 
Proverbs23:2 Neni daro yora as gidikko, keehippe naagetta." 
Proverbs23:3 Izi nena paaccanaas dandayza gishshas, shiiqida mal7o qumas yiiqetoppa." 
Proverbs23:4 Duretana gaada daaburoppa; hayssa mala qofa agganaas akeekanchcha gida. 
Proverbs23:5 Hessa mala dureteththa bolla neni ne ayfe woththiko heera dhayana; qefe kessida golle kafo mala salora paallana. 
Proverbs23:6 Uuze asa kath mooppa; mal7iza iza kath maanaas amottofa. 
Proverbs23:7 Qoodheppe qommon izi nena, «Ma; uya» geesippe attiin iza wozinay nenara de7enna." 
Proverbs23:8 Neni mida guuththa kaththayka nena cooshshana; ne galataykka hada gidana. 
Proverbs23:9 Eeyara haasayoppa; ays giikko ne aadho era haasaya izi kadhana. 
Proverbs23:10 Beniisofe diza dhassaa shoddofa. Qasse yi7o nayta gade sugoppa; 
Proverbs23:11 ays giikko istta ashshiza GODAY mino; izi istta gishshas nenara mootettana. 
Proverbs23:12 Ne wozina zores, ne hayththaka erateththa qaalaakko zaara." 
Proverbs23:13 Ne naa seeranaappe guye gooppa; neni qircunchchan shocikko izi hayqqenna. 
Proverbs23:14 Neni qircunchchan shoca; iza shemppo hayqoppe ashsha. 
Proverbs23:15 Ta naazoo! Ne wozinay aadho eranchcha gidikko ta wozinaykka ufayettees. 
Proverbs23:16 Ne inxarsay suure haasayza wode ta wozinay ufayettees. 
Proverbs23:17 Nagaranchchata bolla qanaatoppa; gido attiin ubbato GODAAS yashshateth aggofa. 
Proverbs23:18 Histtiko nees sinththafe kiyana; ne hidotay hada gidenna. 
Proverbs23:19 Ta naazoo! Siya; wozinama gida; ne wozinay suure ogeppe kare kezoppo. 
Proverbs23:20 Daro woyne ushshu uyizaytaranne asho muussas yaaretizaytara zuppetoppa. 
Proverbs23:21 Ays giikko maththottizaytinne yorati manqana; dhisko daroy carqqa mayzees. 
Proverbs23:22 Nena yelida aaway yootizayssa siya; ne aayiyakka ceeggida wode kadhoppa. 
Proverbs23:23 Tumaa shammafe attiin mulekka bayzoppa; aadho erateth, seeranne akeeka nees miishshe ooththa." 
Proverbs23:24 Xillo naa aaway keehippe ufayettees; wozinama naa yelida asikka izan ufayettees. 
Proverbs23:25 Ne aawaynne ne aaya ufayettetto; nena yelidaarakka ufayettu. 
Proverbs23:26 Ta naazoo! Ne wozina ha taakko zaara; ne ayfeti ta ogeppe kare kezoppetto. 
Proverbs23:27 Ays giikko layma maccassaya ciimma olla mala; laggeththo machcha xunththa olla mala. 
Proverbs23:28 Iza panga mala zamada naagawus; ammanettontta addeta dere giddon darsawus. 
Proverbs23:29 «Woo!» giza waasoy oossee? Ceecey oossee? Ooshshi oossee? Zuuzunththi oossee? Gaasoykka baynda madunththi oossee? Ayfey zo7izay oossee? 
Proverbs23:30 Woyne ushshu uyishe gam7izaytas gidennee? Walakettida woyne ushshu yuuyi yuuyi ganxizaytas gidennee? 
Proverbs23:31 Woyne ushshi zo7ida wode, iza medhay birille giddon phoolliza wode, duuqqishin cororu gi geliza wode iza tishshi histta xeellofa." 
Proverbs23:32 Wurseththan izi shooshsha mala dukkees; goppe shooshsha malakka ba yiishsha puukkees. 
Proverbs23:33 Ne ayfey beyi eronttaaz beyana; ne wozinaykka elumettana. 
Proverbs23:34 Neni abbaa giddon diza markabe xeeran ichchida asa mala gidana. 
Proverbs23:35 Neni, «Istti tana dechchida; gido attiin tani qohettabeekke; istti tana wadhdhida; gido attiin taas erettibeenna. Hara ushsha uyanaas tani awude dendandinaashaa?» gaana." 
Proverbs24:1 Ta naazoo! Iita asata mala gidarkina gooppa; Isttara laggeteththika nena lo7oppo. 
Proverbs24:2 Istti ubbato makkalla miish maqetteettes; bantta inxarsankka gene haasayeettes. 
Proverbs24:3 Keeththi aadho erateththan keexettees; akeekankka minnees. 
Proverbs24:4 Eray de7ikko, keeththi al7oninne lo7o miishshan kumees." 
Proverbs24:5 Wozinama asas gita wolqqay dees; eranchcha asikka minoteth gujjees. 
Proverbs24:6 Ola olettanaas nees lo7o zore xoono demmanaaskka daro zoranchchata koshshees. 
Proverbs24:7 Eeya asi aadho erateththafe keehi haahon dees; duulata sinththan eqqidi haasayana dandayenna. 
Proverbs24:8 Iita ooththanaas halchchiza asi «Genanchcha» geetettees. 
Proverbs24:9 Eeyateththa qofay nagara; qilccizaade asi ixxees. 
Proverbs24:10 Neni meto gallas laafikko, ne wolqqay ay mala guuththee?" 
Proverbs24:11 Hayqos laagetti bizayta ashsha; shukettanaas gooshetti bizayta ashsha. 
Proverbs24:12 Neni, «Ta hayssa erikke» giikko, wozina pilggi erizayssi izi akeekennee? Ne shemppo naagizayssi erennee? As ubbaas iza ooso ooso mala immennee?" 
Proverbs24:13 Ta naazoo! Lo7o gidida gishshas eessa ma; ililo eessi doonan mal7ees. 
Proverbs24:14 Aadho erateththika hessa mala; izi ne shemppos mal7o gididayssa era. Neni izo demmizaa gidikko wonto nees zemppo gidana; ne hidotaykka hada gidenna. 
Proverbs24:15 Xillo asa keeth bonqqanaas panga mala zamadoppa; iza keeththa bolla meto gaththofa. 
Proverbs24:16 Xillo asi laappunto kundikokka dendees; gido attiin iitati meton dhayeettes. 
Proverbs24:17 Ne morkkey kundiza wode ufayettofa; izi dhuphettiza wodekka ne wozinan, «Hashshu!» gooppa." 
Proverbs24:18 Ne histtontta aggiko GODAY hessa be7idi ufayettenna; izi ba hanqoza ne morkkeza bollafe zaarana. 
Proverbs24:19 Iita asata ooson ceecoppa; istta mala gidarkina gooppa. 
Proverbs24:20 Iita asas hidotay baawa; iitata xomppey tippi giidi to7ana. 
Proverbs24:21 Ta naazoo! GODAASSINNE kawaas yayya; makkallizaytarakka zuppetoppa. 
Proverbs24:22 Ays giikko hessa mala asata qoppontta metoy gakkees; kawoppenne GODAAPPE yaana meto oonee erizay? 
Proverbs24:23 Aadho eranchchati gujjidikka hayssaththo gida; Pirdishe maado pirday lo7o gidenna. 
Proverbs24:24 Mooranchcha, «Neni xillo» gizaade derey qanggees; kawoteththatikka iza hileettes."
