Isaiah3:16 GODAY, «Xiyoone maccassati otorettida; bantta qoodhe warxi histtishe, bantta ayfen som7i bessishe, bantta duca qaaththishe, bantta tohon diza sagayo giirissishe hemetteettes." 
Isaiah3:17 Hessa gishshas tani GODAY Xiyoone maccassata hu7e citton goo7issana; tani GODAY istta hu7e bo7asana» gees. 
Isaiah3:18 He gallas GODAY Xiyoone maccassata alleqo miishshata, heytikka toho sagayota, hu7e alleqota, qoodhe gozdata," 
Isaiah3:19 hayththa gutichchata, kushe sagayota, ayfeso kammiza quraaceta," 
Isaiah3:20 hu7e goosseta, sagayota, hu7e alleqota, xeessan dancciza danccota, shitto bilqaaxeta, ashenkitaabeta," 
Isaiah3:21 siidhe midigata, biradhdhe midigata," 
Isaiah3:22 seelo may7ota, garsara may7iza may7ota, kaabbata, kushe karaxiiteta," 
Isaiah3:23 Heregata, laynota, giddora may7iza may7ota, binana qachchiza alleqotanne ayfeso kammiza qolleta ubbaa dafi ekkana." 
Isaiah3:24 Shitto xinqqon, dancco wodoron, goofare bo7an, seelo may7o maaqan, puulateth pigen laammana." 
Isaiah3:25 Inttes attuma asati giththa mashshan, olanchchati olan hayqqana." 
Isaiah3:26 Xiyoone pengeti kallo gaden wodhdha uttada yeekkiza maccassa mala yeekkananne zilalana. 
Isaiah4:1 He wode laappun maccassati issi adde oykkidi, «Maana kath gidiin may7ana may7o nuni nurkka nuna dandayana; ne sunththan xalla xeygettana mala histtada nu kawushshateththaa nuuppe diggarkkii!» gi woossana." 
Isaiah4:2 He wode GODAA miththa haggay lo7ananne bonchchettana; Isra7eele asaappe dhayshe attidaytas he biitta kaththay ceeqossinne bonchchos gidana. 
Isaiah4:3 Xiyoonen attidayti, Yerusalaamen dhayontta attidayti, Yerusalaamen shemppora paxa dishe xaafettida ubbatara, «Istti geeshshata» geetettana." 
Isaiah4:4 GODAY Xiyoone maccassata qitaa meeccana; maadhetti uttida suuththaafe Yerusalaame pirda ayananinne xuuggiza ayanan geeshshana. 
Isaiah4:5 GODAY Xiyoone zuma bollanne heen shiiqiza ubbata bolla gallas shaaranne cuwa, omars eexxiza tama poo7o kiittana; Xoossa bonchchoy katamayo dunkaane mala kammi naagana." 
Isaiah4:6 Izi gallassa awa suuleppe ashshiza kuwa, uushoppenne irappe baqati attizasoho gidana." 
Isaiah5:1 Tani ta siiqo laggeza gishshassinne iza woyne turaa tokkizasoho gishshas siiqo mazamure yexxana. Tani siiqiza laggezas aradda zumbullan woyne turaa tokkizasohoy dees. 
Isaiah5:2 Biitta bookkidi, shuchchaa qori kessidi, ubbaafe lo7iza woyne turaa tokkides; histtidi iza naaganaas shakko giigsides; woyne ushshu gum7izasoho olla bookki giigsides. Hessafe guye lo7o ayfe ayfana giidi naagides; gido attiin caala phanqida ayfe ayfides." 
Isaiah5:3 Histtiin ta siiqoy, «Intteno Yerusalaamen de7izaytoo! Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Taappenne ta woyne turaa tokkiza sohozappe giddon de7iza yo7oza ane ha7i intte pirdite." 
Isaiah5:4 Tani ta woyne turaa sohozasi ooththidayssafe hara ay ooththanayssi attidee? Izi lo7o ayfe ayfana gaada ta naagishin ays caala phanqida ayfe ayfidee? 
Isaiah5:5 Ha7i tani ta woyne tokkiza gadeza bolla ooththanaaz inttes yootays. Dirsaa shoddana; izikka dhayana mala ooththana; Tani gimbeza laallana; he sohoykka durettana. 
Isaiah5:6 Tani he sohoza mago biitta ooththana. He turay xunqqettenanne bul7ettenna; Histtiin kindichchoynne agunththi izan mokkana. Iray izan bukkontta mala, tani shaarata azazana» gides." 
Isaiah5:7 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA woyne tokkiza gadey Isra7eele asaa. Yuhuda asay izi ufayettiza atakilte. Istti suure pirda pirdana giidi naagides; gido attiin suuth gussishin be7ides. Izi xilloteth koyides; gido attiin meto waaso siyides. 
Isaiah5:8 Haratas sohoy dhayanaashe gakkanaas, keeth keeththa bolla gujjizaytoo! Gade gadera gaththi oyththidi, intterkka xalla biittaa bolla aakki de7izaytoo! Inttes aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY tani ta hayththara siyishin, «Gita keeththati kayzi attana; he lo7o keeththatan de7anaas asi dhayana." 
Isaiah5:10 Tammu waaxa booratan tokkida woyne ayfeppe issi oto gidiza woyne ushshi xalla ke7ana; tammu qun7a kath zeriin issi qun7a kaththi xalla ayfana» gides. 
Isaiah5:11 Maththosiza ushshu koyanaas maalado guurara dendidi woyne ushshan xuugettana gakkanaas, sa7aa qamisizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:12 Istta gibirasohon maasinqoy, diiththi, karabey, susul7eynne woyne ushshi dees; gido attiin istti GODAA oosozas wudettibeettenna; izi ba kushen ooththida oosokka bonchchibeettenna." 
Isaiah5:13 Histtiin ta Derey akeeka dhayda gishshas di7etti baana; istta shuumeti koshan hayqqana; istta dere asaykka haaththa saamon xuugetti hayqqana. 
Isaiah5:14 Duufoy ba gomppa aassadus; ba doonaakka zawappe bollara doyadus; Yerusalaamen de7iza gita asatinne hankko derey, wocamizaytanne guppizayta issi bolla mittana." 
Isaiah5:15 Asi ubbay tooshettananne kawuyana; otoranchchati ubbay yeellatana. 
Isaiah5:16 Gido attiin Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, suure pirdan dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; geeshsha Xoossay ba geeshshateththaa ba xilloteththan bessana." 
Isaiah5:17 He wode dorsati bantta qooron heemettiza mala heemettana; dorsa laaqqati laalettida dureta keeththata sohon maata maana. 
Isaiah5:18 Cimo wodoron nagaraa goochchizaytas, para-gaare wodoron iitateth goochchizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:19 «Nuni nu ayfera be7ana mala ane Xoossi elelo! Ba oosokka eesoso! Nuni erana mala Isra7eele Geeshshay qoppida qofay matan poletto» gizaytas aayye ana! 
Isaiah5:20 Iitaa lo7o, lo7oza iita gizaytas, dhumaa poo7o poo7oza dhuma ooththizaytassinne cammizayssa mal7o, mal7izayssa camo ooththizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:21 Banttana barkka, «Tani aadho eranchcha! Tani qara gidikkinaa!» gi qoppizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:22 Woyne ushshan erettidaytassinne maththosiza ushshu walakkanaas goobizaytas aayye ana! 
Isaiah5:23 Matta7e ekkidi, mooranchchata xillisizaytassinne xillo asatasi suure pirdaa diggizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:24 Istti Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA wogaa ixxida gishshas, Isra7eele Geeshshaa qaalaakka kadhida gishshas, tama lacoy buuxa oykkiza malanne mela maatay eexxi dhayza mala istta xaphoy wooqqana; istta ciishshayka buhe mala laaletti dhayana;" 
Isaiah5:25 GODAA hanqoy iza deraa bolla eexxi ke7ides; izi ba kushe denththidi istta shocides. Zumati qaaxxida; hayqqida asaa ahay oge bolla pitti yeggida buura mala gidides; histti pe7iinkka iza hanqoy simmibeenna; iza kushey ha7ikka dendida mala dees. 
Isaiah5:26 GODAY haakon de7iza kawoteththatas malaata dhoqqan essees; sa7a gaxan de7iza morkketaska wayqees; isttika eeson bichcharishe puttu gaana. 
Isaiah5:27 Istta giddon daaburanchchaynne wobbey deenna; Isttafe issoynne dhiskennanne ichchenna. Xeessan gixxida qabattoyka birshettenna; Istta caammaa dafoykka duuxxenna. 
Isaiah5:28 Istta yiishshay hoxe; istta wondafeykka waaxetti uttides. Istta parata qinccafilley zaalla shuchcha mala; istta para-gaareta erzoykka gote mala. 
Isaiah5:29 Istta xaagoykka gaammo xaago mala; wodalla gaammota mala xaaggeettes; banttas miza miish shankkati oykkidi xaaggeettes; istti oykkidayssa tookki ekki beettes; isttafe woththi ekkanay oonikka deenna. 
Isaiah5:30 He gallas istti gita abba dambala mala, Isra7eele bolla guummana; oonikka duge zaari biittaa xeelliko dhumanne meto be7ana; poo7oykka shaaran kamettana." 
Isaiah6:1 Kawo Ooziyay hayqqida layth GODAY dhoqqa araata bolla uttidayssa beyadis; izi may7ida afala macaray Xoossa Keeth kumi uttides. 
Isaiah6:2 Suraafeele geetettiza kiitanchchati izappe bollara deettes; issi issi suraafeeles usuppun qefeti deettes; nam7u qefetan ba ayfeso ayfeso kammeettes; nam7u qefetan ba toho toho kammeettes; nam7u qefetan piradhdheettes. 
Isaiah6:3 Issoy issaara, «Geeshshawu, geeshshawu, geeshshawu Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossawu! Sa7a ubbay iza bonchchon kumides» gida." 
Isaiah6:4 Istta qaala cenggurssafe dendidayssan Xoossa Keeththas yochchay qaaxxides; qasseka Xoossa Keeththaa cuway dhippi gi kumides. 
Isaiah6:5 Histtiin tani, «Tani doonay tunida asa; qasse doonay tunida asata giddon de7ays; tani Kawoza, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossa ta ayfen be7ida gishshas taas aayye ana! Ta dhayadis» gadis." 
Isaiah6:6 Histtiin suraafeeletappe issoy yarshizasozappe qaphen tama bonqqo ekkidi piradhdhishe taakko yides. 
Isaiah6:7 Tamaa bonqqozan ta doonaa bochchidi, «Be7a; hayssi tamaa bonqqozi ne doonaa bochchides; ne mooroy neeppe kichchides; ne nagaraykka qucetti kichchides» gides." 
Isaiah6:8 Hessafe guye GODAY, «Oona kiittoo? Nuus oonee kiitettanay?» gishin siyadis. Tanikka zaarada, «Hekko, tana kiita» gadis." 
Isaiah6:9 Histtiin GODAY; «Ba; baada ha asaas, ‹Intte sissi siyeeta; gido attiin yuushshi qoppeketa; ayfen xeelleeta shin akeekkeketa› gaada isttas yoota." 
Isaiah6:10 Hayssa deraa wozinaa dammisa; istta hayththaka tullisa; istta ayfezakka qooqisa; histtontta aggiko istti bantta ayfen be7ana; bantta hayththan siyana; bantta wozinankka akeekana; histtidi istti taakko simmidi paxana» gides. 
Isaiah6:11 Tanikka, «Abeet Godawu! Hayssi ayde gakkanaas hananee?» gadis. Izikka zaaridi taas, «Katamati isttan de7iza asi dhayiin istti laalettana gakkanaas, keeththatikka ubbay kayzana gakkanaassinne biittayka mulera aykkoy baynda bula gidana gakkanaassa." 
Isaiah6:12 Tani GODAY asaa haassana gakkanaassa; biittaaka aykkoy baynda bazzo kessana gakkanaassa. 
Isaiah6:13 Tammu asaappe issi asi biittaa bolla attiko, izikka dhayana; qanxxi yeggiin attida wolaa duruma mala gidana; geeshsha zarey hessaththo he duruma mala gidana» gides." 
Isaiah7:1 Ooziya naa Iyo7aatamey yelida Akaazey Yuhuda biittan kawotida wode Aaraame biitta kawo Eraasooninne Isra7eele biitta Kawo Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey Yerusalaame olanaas kezida; gido attiin xoonanaas dandaybeettenna. 
Isaiah7:2 Aaraame dereynne Efreeme derey issi bolla gididi olas ke7idayssa Dawite zareppe kawotida kawoy siyida wode wora mith carkoy qaaththiza mala Akaaze wozinaynne deraa wozinay qaaxxides. 
Isaiah7:3 Histtiin GODAY Isayaasas, «Neni ne naa Sha7aari-Yaashube ekkada Akaazera gayttanaas baada may7o meeccizayta goshshaakko efiza oge matan ganna baggara de7iza eele haaththa zaraa xeeran neni iza demmana." 
Isaiah7:4 Histtada izas, ‹Naagetta; woppu ga; babbofa; hayta tamay mishin attidi cuwattiza duruma nam7atappe Aaraames, Eraasoonessinne, Eromeliyo naa hanqos shabarettofa› ga yoota." 
Isaiah7:5 Aaraame biitta asay Efreeme asaaranne Eromeliyo naara ne bolla iita miish ooththanaas," 
Isaiah7:6 ‹Ane Yuhuda biittan worajjoos; ane laalloos; ane nuus nuus shaaketti ekkidi Xaabi7eele naa kawoththoos› gi maqettida» gides. 
Isaiah7:7 Gido attiin Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Hayssi ha istta maqqozi minnenna; mulekka polettenna." 
Isaiah7:8 Gaasoykka Damasqoy Aaraame biittas hu7e; kawo Eraasooney Damasqos hu7e. Usuppun tamman ichchash layththa garsan Efreeme derey laalettana; simmidi dere gidana dandayenna. 
Isaiah7:9 Qasse Samaariyay Efreeme biittaas hu7e; Eromeliyo nay Samaariyas hu7e; intte intte ammanon minnidi eqqontta ixxiko mulekka eqqanaas dandayekketa» gees. 
Isaiah7:10 Qasseka GODAY Akaazes," 
Isaiah7:11 «GODAY ne Xoossa nees bolla saloppe, woykko sa7appe, gars ciimmafe issi malata immana mala oychcha» gides." 
Isaiah7:12 Akaazey gidikko, «Oychchike; GODAAKKA paaccike» gides." 
Isaiah7:13 Isayaasi, «Intteno Dawite zaretoo, siyite! Intte asaa saleththizayssi guuxxiin Xoos saleththanaas dendidetii?" 
Isaiah7:14 Histtiko GODAY barkka inttes malata bessana; geela7oy shaarana; attuma naa yelana; iza sunththaaka, ‹Amanu7eele› gaada sunththana." 
Isaiah7:15 Izi iitanne lo7o shaakki eriza wode hangara maaththinne ees maana. 
Isaiah7:16 Gido attiin naazi iitanne lo7o shaakki eranaappe sinththan neni keehi yayyida nam7u kawota biittati aykkoy baynda bula gidana. 
Isaiah7:17 «Efreeme biittay Yuhuda biittafe shaakettoosofe doommiin hayssafe sinththan hani erontta wode GODAY ne bolla, ne deraa bollanne ne aawaa keeththa bolla ehana; izi ne bolla ehanayssika Asoore kawo» gides." 
Isaiah7:18 He wode GODAY haako biittan diza Gibxe shaafappe udunxxeta, Asoore biittafe maththata wayqeththan xeygana." 
Isaiah7:19 Istti ubbayka yiidi bazzo shoobban, shuchcha gongolon, agunththa tushaninne haaththa ollatan gawu7ana." 
Isaiah7:20 He wode GODAY Efiraaxise Shaafa pinththafe garxxi ehida magallan, hessika Asoore kawoy yiidi inttes hu7e binanaa, intte buuchchinne intte bolla diza iske ubbaa meedana." 
Isaiah7:21 He wode issi asas issi ussa miizinne nam7u deyshati xalla attana. 
Isaiah7:22 Gidikkoka istti maaxxiza maaththi keehi daro gidida gishshas izi oys maana; he biittan attida asay ubbayka hangaranne ees maana. 
Isaiah7:23 He wode issi shii biran washettiza issi shii woyne turati tokettidasohoti ubbay agunththinne kindichcho xalla gidana. 
Isaiah7:24 Biitta ubbaan kindichchoynne agunththi kumida gishshas asay hee biza wode wondafenne yiish oykki baana. 
Isaiah7:25 Kase xoyllen goyettidi kath immiza zumbullati kindichchoninne agunththan kumida gishshas yayyidi issi asikka hee beenna; meheynne dorsi la7ettizaso gidana. 
Isaiah8:1 GODAY tana, «Gita xaaththa waraqata ekkada, ‹Maher-shalal hash-baaz› gaada nababettiza pidalen xaafa." 
Isaiah8:2 Qeese Ooriyanne Baarakiyo naa Zakaraasa taas ammanettida markkata gidana mala ta istta xeygana» gides. 
Isaiah8:3 Hessafe guye ba machcho nabeyra aqides; izakka shaarada attuma naa yeladus; histtiin GODAY tana, «Iza sunththaa, ‹Maher-shalal hash-baaz› gaada sunththa." 
Isaiah8:4 Naazi, ‹Aabboo! Aayee!› gi xeys eranaappe kase Asoore biitta kawoy Samaariyanne Damasqo aqota di7i efana» gides." 
Isaiah8:5 Qasseka GODAY taas," 
Isaiah8:6 «Ha derey co7u gi goggiza Selihoome haaththata aggidi Eraasooneninne Eromeliyo naazan ufayettides. 
Isaiah8:7 Hessa gishshas tani GODAY minonne wolqqama gidida Efiraaxise haaththa haro, Asoore kawo iza teemaranne bonchchozara istta bolla ehana; haaththazi shaafaza kumi polchchidi shaafa doonan diza biitta ubbaa mittana." 
Isaiah8:8 Buuri ekkidi duge Yuhuda wodhdhana; biittaa kumidi aadhdhana; qoodhe gakkanaas mittana» gides. Gido attiin Amanu7eelee! Micettida iza qefey ne biittaa gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas kammi oykkides. 
Isaiah8:9 Intteno kawoteththatoo! Olas dendidi waassite; intte dippi gaana; haaho deren dizayti ezgite! Olaska giigettite! Intte dippi gaana; Olaska giigettite! Intte meqerettana; 
Isaiah8:10 Olas zorettite; gido attiin inttes suurenna; halchcho kessite; gido attiin inttes minnenna. Gaasoykka Xoossay nunara dees. 
Isaiah8:11 GODAY ba mino kushe ta bolla woththidi tani ha asaa oge kaallontta mala seerides; 
Isaiah8:12 «Hayssi asay, ‹Iita maqqo› gi xeygiza miish intte aykkoka, ‹Iita maqqo› goopite; istti babbizayssas intte babbofte; izas yarkiyarkofte." 
Isaiah8:13 Intte dummasana bessizay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA xalla; intte yayyanaassinne kokkoranaas bessizay iza. 
Isaiah8:14 Izi geeshshasoho gidana; gido attiin izi Yuhuda biittaa asaassinne Isra7eele keeththaa asaas dhuphiza shuchchinne kundisiza zaalla gidana; Yerusalaamen diza asaas izi gitenne woximade gidana. 
Isaiah8:15 Isttafe daroti dhuphettana; kundidikka meqqana; woximaden geli oykettana» gides. 
Isaiah8:16 Markkateththaa lo7eththa oykka; ta tamaareta giddon wogaa maatamen shoca. 
Isaiah8:17 Tani ba sinth Yaaqoobe zaretappe genththida GODAA naagana; izakka hidota ooththana. 
Isaiah8:18 Tananne taas GODAY immida nayta be7ite. Nuni Xiyoone zuman diza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAPPE Isra7eeles malatanne markka. 
Isaiah8:19 Asay inttena, «Bessonttaaz tattafettishenne Saasukettishe haasayettiza bitizaytanne moytille xeygizayta oychchite» giikko derey ba GODAA oychchanaas bessennee? De7o Xoossaa aggidi hayqqidayta oysho ays koshshizee?" 
Isaiah8:20 Wogaakkonne markkateththa qaalaakko biite! Istti hayssa mala qaala inttes yootontta aggiko wontta poo7oy isttas poo7enna. 
Isaiah8:21 Istti ceecishenne gafishe biitta bolla toylattana; istti keehi gafida wode hanqettana; pude xeellidi bantta kawaanne bantta Xoossaa qanggana. 
Isaiah8:22 Hessafe guye istti duge biitta xeellana; istti xeellanayssika waaye, dhumanne dhippi gida babisiza miish xalla; istti girdi gida dhuman yegettana." 
Isaiah9:1 Ceecishe dizaytas hayssafe guyen hidotay dhayenna; beni wode Zaabiloone biittanne Niftaaleme biitta kawushshides; sinththafe yaana woden gidikko Mediteraane abbaa ogen de7iza biittanne Yordaanoose Shaafappe he pinththan de7iza, «Ayzaabeti de7iza Galila biitta» izi bonchchana." 
Isaiah9:2 Dhuman de7iza derey wolqqama poo7o be7ides; hayqo kuwa garsan diza deretas poo7oy poo7ides. 
Isaiah9:3 Neni kawoteththaa darsadasa; isttas ufayssaa bolla ufays gujjadasa; asay kath shiishshishenne di7i ekkida miish gishettishe ufayettiza mala isttika ne sinththan ufayettana. 
Isaiah9:4 Kase neni Midiyaame biitta xoonida mala istta deexxiza qambara, istta hashe bolla wodhida durqqanne istta waayisi haarida guufe menththadasa." 
Isaiah9:5 Olanchchata caammay ubbay, suuththan moorettida may7o ubbayka taman dunne gidi eexxana." 
Isaiah9:6 Hekko nuus nay yelettides! Attuma naykka nuus imettides! Halaqateththi iza hashe bolla gidana; iza sunththi, «Malalisiza zoranchcha, Wolqqama Xoossa, Mernaa Aawa, Saroteththa Halaqa» geetettana." 
Isaiah9:7 Iza kawoteththa aakoteththaassinne iza saroteththaas zaway deenna; hachchife doommidi mernaa gakkanaas ba kawoteththaa, suure pirdaninne xilloteththan essana; lo7eththi oykkidi minththana; Dawite kawoteththa araatan izi uttana; deraa ubbaa haarana; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA qanaatey hessa polana." 
Isaiah9:8 GODAY Yaaqoobe zareta bolla pirda qaala kiittides; izikka Isra7eele bolla polettana. 
Isaiah9:9 Efreemeninne Samaariyan de7iza derey ubbay hessa Xoossi ooththidayssa erana; otoroninne moodheteththan dendidi," 
Isaiah9:10 «Xuubeppe oosettida gimbetti laalettida; nuni gidikko masettida shuchchan zaari gimbana; eththati qanxxettida; nuni gidikko isttasohon ziga laammana» gida. 
Isaiah9:11 Hessa gishshas GODAY Eraasoone morkketa minththana; istta morkketa istta bolla denththeththidi ehana. 
Isaiah9:12 Arshey mokkiza baggafe Aaraame biittaa asatinne arshey wulliza baggafe Filisxeeme biitta asati bantta doona hangidi Isra7eele mittana. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna. 
Isaiah9:13 Derezi gidikko bana shocida GODAAKKO simmibeenna; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAKKA koyibeenna. 
Isaiah9:14 Hessa gishshas GODAY hu7enne goyna, zamba hagganne maqqa Isra7eeleppe issi gallas qeexana." 
Isaiah9:15 Cimatinne bonchchettidayti hu7e; wordo tamaarsiza nabeti goyna. 
Isaiah9:16 Hayssa deraa kaaleththizayti baleththeettes; kaalliza dereykka ogeppe kare kezidi toylattees. 
Isaiah9:17 Hessa gishshas GODAY naateththa naytan ufayettenna; yi7otassinne am7etas qadhettenna; ubbayka iita ooththizaytanne Xoossa yashshateth bayndayta; ubbaa asaa doonappe harassiza qaalay kezees; hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna. 
Isaiah9:18 Deraa iitateththi kindichchonne agunth xuuggiza tama mala; dhippi gida woray xuugettishin keziza cuwa tuussa mala sitti giidi pude kezees. 
Isaiah9:19 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA hanqon biittay xuugettana; dereykka taman geliza miththa mala gidana; ishay ishas qadhettenna. 
Isaiah9:20 Ushachcha baggara tuxxana; gido attiin gafa teqqenna. Hadirsa baggara maana; gido attiin kallettenna. Issoy issoy ba yelida nayta maana. 
Isaiah9:21 Minaasey Efreeme maana; Efreemeykka Minaase maana; istti issife gididi Yuhuda bolla dendana. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna. 
Isaiah10:1 Geella woganne as un7eththiza awajja kessizaytas aayye ana! 
Isaiah10:2 Manqota pirda geellasizaytas, un7ettida ta dereza pirda bokkasizaytas, am7eta aqota bonqqizaytas, yi7ota aqota dhechchi mizaytas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah10:3 Inttena xomosiza wode intte awa gelandetii? Haakoppe bashshi yiza wode ay hanandetii? Maado demmanaas oonakko baqatandetii? Intte aqota awan qottandetii? 
Isaiah10:4 Qashettida asaara issife qasheteththafe shukettiza asaara issife shuketeththafe attiin haray inttes attanaasoy deenna. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy dochchibeenna; qaxxayanaas izi ba kushe denththi woththides. 
Isaiah10:5 GODAY, «Ta hanqos guufe, ta ehiza bashshas xam7a gidida Asoore biitta asaas aayye ana!" 
Isaiah10:6 Istta aqota bonqqana mala, banttas di7o buuri shiishshana mala, istti oge urqqaththo yedhettana mala, Xoos erontta kawoteththa bolla kiittana. Tana hanqeththida asaa bolla tani Asooreta yeddana." 
Isaiah10:7 Gido attiin Asoore kawoy hayssa halchchibeenna; iza wozinan hayssa mala qofay deenna; iza halchchoy daro kawoteththata bashshanaassinne mulera dhayssanaassa. 
Isaiah10:8 Izi, ‹Ta ola gadawati ubbati kawo gidettennee?› gi ceeqettees." 
Isaiah10:9 ‹Kalnnoy Karkamishe mala, Hamaatey Arfaade mala, Samaariyaykka Damasqo mala gidettennee?" 
Isaiah10:10 Yerusalaameninne Samaariyan de7iza eeqa misletappe dariza misleta goynniza kawoteththata seeranaas tani ta kushe yeddadis. 
Isaiah10:11 Samaariya bollaninne izi misleta bolla ta ooththoyssaththo Yerusalaame bollanne izi misleta bolla ta ooththikinaa?› gees» gides. 
Isaiah10:12 GODAY Xiyoone zuma bollanne Yerusalaame bolla ba ooththana ooso ubbaa polidaappe guye, «Asoore kawo iza wozina otoreteththaa gishshassinne izi kadhe ayfen xeelliza gishshas ta iza qaxxayana» gees." 
Isaiah10:13 Asoore kawoy, «Hayssa ubbaa tani mino qesen ooththadis; qasseka tani aadho eranchchanne akeekanchcha; tani kawoteththata zawa laalladis; tani istta aqota bonqqa ekkadis; ta qarateththan istta kawota kawushshadis." 
Isaiah10:14 Asi ba kushe kafo keeththan yeddiza mala tanikka ta kushe kawoteththata aqotan yeddadis. Qasse asi dogetti attida phuuphphulleta shiishshiza mala tanikka dere ubbaa shiishshadis. Paallanaas ba qefe micciday deenna; waassanaas ba doona doyday deenna» gides. 
Isaiah10:15 Kalttay banan qanxxizaade bolla ceeqettizee? Magaazey bana goochchizaade bolla otorettizee? Xam7ay bana oykkida asa bolla ba hu7e qaaththana dandayzee? guufey asi baynda barkka hemetti erizee? 
Isaiah10:16 Hessa gishshas GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, modhdhida iza olanchchata bolla gilqisiza harge yeddana; iza bonchchozappe garsara laciza tama yeddana." 
Isaiah10:17 Isra7eele Poo7oy tama gidana; Geeshshazikka tama laco gidana; issi gallassan iza agunththaanne kindichchoza tamay maana. 
Isaiah10:18 Harganchchay gilqidi hayqqiza mala ba woraa bonchchonne aradda biitta, ashonne shemppo mulera dhayssana." 
Isaiah10:19 Iza woran guuththa miththati casha attana; heytakka qeeri nay qoodi wursana dadayees. 
Isaiah10:20 He wode Isra7eele zareppe casha attidayti, Yaaqoobe keeththafe attidayti hayssafe guye banttana shocidayta bolla zemppettenna; gido attiin GODAAN Isra7eele Geeshshan tumappe ammanettana." 
Isaiah10:21 Casha attidayti simmana; Yaaqoobe keeththafe casha attidayti Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossaako simmana. 
Isaiah10:22 Nenoo Isra7eele! Ne asay abba shaamintta mala gidikkoka casha attidayti xalla simmana. Xilloteththan kumida gita bashshi awajettides. 
Isaiah10:23 GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY sa7a ubbaa bollan ehana qachchida bash ehana." 
Isaiah10:24 Hessa gishshas GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Xiyoonen diza ta derezoo! Gibxeti ne bolla ooththidayssaththo guufe ne bolla denththidayta durqqan nena qoxxida Asoore asaas babbofa." 
Isaiah10:25 Ta ne bolla ehida qixaateza guuththa wode garsan ta essana; ta istta bollaka bosha ehana» gees. 
Isaiah10:26 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Midiyaame asaa Hereebe zaalla achchan shocoyssaththo izi istta xurqafera wadhdhana; izi Gibxeta bolla ooththidayssaththo ba guufeza abba bolla denththana." 
Isaiah10:27 He gallas istta toohoy ne hasheppe, istta qambaray ne morgefe kichchana; ne ordeteththafe dendidayssan iza qambaray meqqana» gees." 
Isaiah10:28 Istti Ayaatera biidi Migeroone kanththi beettes; baas diza miishshaa Makimaasen shiishsheettes. 
Isaiah10:29 Istti pinnizasora aadhdhi biidi, nuni Geeban dunkaani aqana; Eraamay dagammadus; Sa7oole katama Gibi7ay baqatadus." 
Isaiah10:30 Gaalime nayee ne waassa! Laysha ezga siya! Manqo gidida Anatoote, ne izis zaaro imma." 
Isaiah10:31 Madimeenaha baqata bolla dawus; Geeba derey qotettana woththan dees. 
Isaiah10:32 Istti hach Noobe gakkana; istti bantta kushe Yerusalaame zumbulla bolla, Xiyoone macca nay zuma bolla ceeqeteththan mandana." 
Isaiah10:33 Be7ite GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY ba gita wolqqan haggata qanxxereththana; adussa miththatikka shiretti wodhdhana; dhoqqu dhoqqu gidaytikka kundana." 
Isaiah10:34 Girdi gida woraakka kalttara qeexana; Libaanoose zigatikka Wolqqamaza sinththan kundana. 
Isaiah11:1 Isseye durumappe aacay purccana; iza xaphotappe issi haggay ayfe immana. 
Isaiah11:2 GODAA Ayanay, aadho erateththinne akeeka Ayanay, zore Ayanaynne wolqqa Ayanay, erateththa Ayanaynne GODAAS yashissiza Ayanay iza bolla shemppana." 
Isaiah11:3 GODAAS yashshan izi ufayettana; ba ayfen be7ida malanne ba hayththan siyida mala pirdenna. 
Isaiah11:4 Gido attiin hiyeesatas xillo pirdana; sa7a bolla manqotas suure pirdana; ba inxarsaa xam7an sa7a shocana; ba doona peenon iitata wodhana. 
Isaiah11:5 Xilloteththi izas xeessa dancco gidana; ammaneteththay izas dabala dancco gidana. 
Isaiah11:6 Kana suytey dorsa laaqqara issife daana; maaheykka deysha laaqqara issife ichchana; miiza mari, gaammo marinne modhdho mehey issife heemettana; guuththa nay istta heemmana." 
Isaiah11:7 Miizinne zardoy issife heemettana; istta maratikka issife ichchana; gaammoy boora mala happa maana. 
Isaiah11:8 Dhammiza nay iita shooshsha ollan kaa7ana; dhanth duuththontta nay ba kushe goppe shooshsha ollan yeddana. 
Isaiah11:9 Geeshshi gidida ta zumaa bolla qohettenna woykko oonikka dhayenna; haaththi abba kumiza mala sa7a ubbay GODAA eron kumana. 
Isaiah11:10 He wode Isseye zereththi kawoteththatas malaata gidi eqqana; kawoteththati izakko yaana; iza shemposoy bonchchettana. 
Isaiah11:11 He wode GODAY nam7anththo ba kushe miccidi attida asaa Asooreppe, pudeha Gibxeppe, dugeha Gibxeppe, Tophphiyappe, Elaameppe, Sana7ooreppe, Hamaateppenne abba gaxan diza deretappe shiishshana." 
Isaiah11:12 Kawoteththatas malaata essana; dhoqqu ooththidi denththana; Isra7eeleppe goodetti bidayta zaari ehana; laalettida Yuhuda asaa oyddu bagga biitta gaxappe izi shiishshana. 
Isaiah11:13 Efreeme qanaateteththi eqqana; Yuhuda morkketikka qanxxettana; Efreemey Yuhuda bolla qanaatenna; Yuhudaykka Efreeme ixxenna. 
Isaiah11:14 Istti arshey wulliza baggara Filisxeemeta dugunththaa wodhdhana; nam7ayka issife gididi arshey mokkiza dereza bonqqana; istti Eedoome bollanne Mo7aabe bolla bantta kushe denththana; Amoone asay isttas haarettana. 
Isaiah11:15 GODAY iita carkon Gibxe abba melissana; izi ba kushe Efiraaxise shaafa bolla yeddana; laappun kessi shaakereththi yeggana; hessa gishshas asay tohoppe caamma kessontta pinnana. 
Isaiah11:16 Kase Isra7eeley Gibxeppe kezishin hanidayssaththo Asooren attida asay kezana oge isttas giigsana. 
Isaiah12:1 He wode neni, «Abeet GODAWU, kase ne ta bolla hanqettadasa; ha7i gidikko neni ne hanqozappe simmada tana minththeththida gishshas ta nena sabbays." 
Isaiah12:2 ‹Be7ite, Xoossay ta atoteththa; tani izan ammanettiza gishshas babbike; GODAY, Xoossay taas minoteththinne yeththa; ta atoteththay iza› gaandasa." 
Isaiah12:3 Paththiza ta pulttotappe haath ufayssan duuqqandeta. 
Isaiah12:4 He wode intte GODAA galatite! Iza sunththaaka xeygite. Izi ooththidayssa kawoteththata giddon erisite. Iza sunththay dhoqqu dhoqqu gidayssa awajjite. 
Isaiah12:5 GODAY gita ooso ooththida gishshas izas yexxite. Hessi kumeththa alames eretto. 
Isaiah12:6 Intte giddon diza Isra7eele Geeshshay gita gidida gishshas Xiyoone asawu ilili giite; ufayssankka yexxite» gaandeta. 
Isaiah13:1 Amoxe naa Isayaasas GODAY Baabiloone gishshas qonccisiin izi be7idayssi hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Isaiah13:2 aykkoy baynda mela diza zumbulla bolla malata essite; intte qaala dhoqqu histti waassite; istta shuumeta pengera gelana mala malata bessite. 
Isaiah13:3 Ta xoonon ufayettizayta ta geeshshata azazadis; ta hanqo istti polana mala ta olanchchata xeygadis. 
Isaiah13:4 Daro derey wocamiza mala zumata bolla wocamiza wocamaa siyite! Kawoteththata giddon metottida derey gugumiza gugunththaa siyite! Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY olanchchata olas salfisides. 
Isaiah13:5 GODAYNNE izi ba hanqo polisanaas go7ettiza miishshati biitta ubbaa dhayssanaas haaho biittafe salota gaxappe yida. 
Isaiah13:6 GODAA gallassi matida gishshas yeekkite! He gallas Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaa matappe bashshi yaana. 
Isaiah13:7 Hessa gishshas kushe ubbay silana; asa ubbaa wozinaykka seerana. 
Isaiah13:8 Istti shirotana; istta waayeynne metoy gakkana; miixay oykkida maccassa mala istti miixattana; issoy issaara dagaman xeelettana; istta ayfesoy dagaman shaala may7ides. 
Isaiah13:9 Be7ite GODAA gallassay menxe iita; biitta mela ashshanaas izin diza nagaranchchata dhayssanaas bashsharanne gita hanqora yaana. 
Isaiah13:10 Salo xoolinttetinne istta butteti poo7o immettenna; arshey buro mokkida mala dhumana; aginaykka ba poo7o immuku. 
Isaiah13:11 GODAY, «Tani alame izi iitateththaa gishshas qaxxayana; iitatakka istta nagara gishshas qaxxayana. Tani otoranchchata otoreteth shaarana; menxe iitata otoreteth ta kawushshana." 
Isaiah13:12 Attida asati muuruta worqqafe bollara al7o gidana; ofire worqqafekka al7o gidana. 
Isaiah13:13 Hessa gishshas tani Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, ‹Tani ta hanqo qonccisiza wode salo qaaththana; sa7akka izi de7izason kokkorsana› gees." 
Isaiah13:14 Shankkatizaadefe baqatiza genessa mala, heemmizaadey baynda dorsa wude mala, asi ubbay ba asaakko asaakko simmana; issoy issoy ba dere baqatana." 
Isaiah13:15 Di7ettida ubbay cadettana; oykettida ubbay mashshan hayqqana. 
Isaiah13:16 Istta ayfey be7ishin istta nayta busakkana; istta keeththatikka bonqqettana; istta machchetakka haray gayttana» gees. 
Isaiah13:17 Be7ite, biras wudu gonttayta, worqqankka ufayettonttayta Meedoone dere asaa ta istta bolla denththana." 
Isaiah13:18 Istta wondafeti wodallata wursana; qeeri naytakka maarettenna; istta wozinaykka naytas mishettenna. 
Isaiah13:19 Kawoteththatas bonchcho, Kaladaawetas ceeqo gidida Baabiloone GODAY Sodoome malanne Gamoora mala izo shiri yeggana." 
Isaiah13:20 He biittan mulekka asi de7enna; izin uttiza asikka deenna; Arabe asikka heen ba dunkaane tokkenna; mehe heemmizaytikka bantta wude heen shempisettenna. 
Isaiah13:21 Gido attiin bazzo do7ati heen ichchana; izi keeththan worakanati kumana; heen guttoti de7ana; bazzon deysh misatiza daydanththati izi bolla guppana. 
Isaiah13:22 Izi miixan godareti waassana; lo7iza izi kawoteththa keeththaankka worakanati waassana; izi wodey matides; izi gallassayka aduqqenna. 
Isaiah14:1 GODAY Yaaqoobes nam7anththo qadhettana; Isra7eelekka zaareththidi doorana. Istta istta biittan woththana; imaththati yiidi Yaaqoobeso asaara walakettana. 
Isaiah14:2 Kawoteththati efidi istta istta biitta zaarana. Isra7eele asay kawoteththata baas oykkidi maccassaanne attumasaa aylle histtidi GODAA biittan haarana. Bana di7idayta zaari di7ana; bana un7eththidayta zaaridi haarana. 
Isaiah14:3 GODAY inttena intte waayeppe, metoppenne un7eteththafenne iita aylleteththafe nena shemppisida gallassi," 
Isaiah14:4 intte Baabiloone kawo bolla qilccishe, «Un7eththizayssas wodey waani wuridee? izas giirissizayssi waani eqqidee!" 
Isaiah14:5 GODAY iita xam7anne haarizayta kawoteththa guufe menththides. 
Isaiah14:6 Kawoteththata pacey baynda shocidayssa qadhetay baynda gooddi gooddi qoxxidayssa menththides. 
Isaiah14:7 Biittaya saronne shempo demmadus; ufayssa mazamure yexxawus. 
Isaiah14:8 Haray attiin zigatikka, Libaanoose xiiddatikka ufayettida; Nekka kundadasa; mith qanxxizaadeyka hayssafe guye kaltta nu bolla denththenna." 
Isaiah14:9 «Neni yiza wode Si7ooley nena mokkanaas giigettadus; nena mokki ekkana mala moytilleta, alame bolla dere haarizayta ubbata denththeththadus; qasse kawoteththata bolla kawotida kawota istta araataappe denththa essadus." 
Isaiah14:10 Istti nees, ‹Nekka nu mala daaburadasa; nu malakka gidadasa." 
Isaiah14:11 Ne bonchchoy diiththaa giirissara duge si7oole wodhdhides; badati nees garsara hiixettida; guxuneti nees bollara may7o gidana› gaana» geeta. 
Isaiah14:12 Nenoo wontta naazoo, torojje xoolinttezoo, ne waanada saloppe duge kundadii? Kawoteththata kawushshida neni waanada duge yegettadii!" 
Isaiah14:13 Neni ne wozinan, «Tani pude salo kezana; ta kawoteththaa araataakka Xoossaa xoolinttetappe bollara dhoqqan woththana; zuma bolla shiiqizason anjjettida zumaa bolla dhoqqasohon ta kawoteththa araata bolla uttana." 
Isaiah14:14 Tani shaarati diza dhoqqasohoppeka pude aadhdhana; tani tana Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa mala ooththana» gadasa. 
Isaiah14:15 Gido attiin neni si7oolen duge ciimma ollan yegettadasa. 
Isaiah14:16 Nena be7izayti ubbay tishshi histti xeellidi nena, «Biitta qaaththidayssinne kawoteththata kokkorisidayssi hayssee?" 
Isaiah14:17 Sa7a bazzo kessidayssi, katamatakka laalliday, di7ettidayti ba dere simmi bontta mala diggiday hayssee?» gaana." 
Isaiah14:18 Kawoteththata kawoti ubbay bonchchon dhiskida; ba duufon duufon shempida. 
Isaiah14:19 Ne gidikko koyettontta hagga mala duufoppe wora olettadasa; mashshan cadettidaytan, duge ciimma shuchcha ollan wodhdhidaytan, asa kushen hayqqidaytan kamettadasa; neni tohon yedhettida aha mala gidadasa." 
Isaiah14:20 Neni isttara duufon daakka; gaasoykka ne biittaa bashshadasa; ne dereza ne dhayssadasa; iita ooththizayta zereththi mulekka akeekettenna. 
Isaiah14:21 Istti dendidi biitta laattontta mala, alamen ba katama istti kunththontta mala kase istta aawata nagara gaason attuma nayti siifettanaasoho giigsite." 
Isaiah14:22 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Tani istta bolla dendana; histtada istta sunththaa, isttafe attidayta, istta zereththaanne yeletaa Baabilooneppe dhayssana." 
Isaiah14:23 Tani Baabiloone quxarsa aqosonne care kessana; bashsha peyxan tani izo pitta dhayssana» gees. 
Isaiah14:24 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Tani halchchida mala polettana; ta qoppida malakka hanana." 
Isaiah14:25 Tani Asoore ta biitta bolla liiqisana; tani iza ta zuma bolla yedhdhana; iza qambaray ta dereza bollafe dendana; iza toohoykka istta hasheppe kichchana» gi caaqqides. 
Isaiah14:26 Sa7a ubbaas qofettida qofay hayssa; kawoteththata ubbaa bollan micettida kushey hayssa. 
Isaiah14:27 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY hayssa qoppides; hessa iza oonee digganay? Izi ba kushe denththides; hessa zaaranay oonee? 
Isaiah14:28 Kawo Akaazey hayqqida layth hizgiza qaalay yides; 
Isaiah14:29 Intteno Filisxeeme asatoo, inttena shocida guufey meqqida gishshas ubbati ufayettofte; shooshshaa garsafe haso shooshshi kezana; iza zereththika xongettiza marzera diza haso shoosh gidana." 
Isaiah14:30 Putteesa manqoti duussaso demmana; metotanchchati woppu giidi ichchana. Gido attiin tani ne zare koshan wursana; qasse neeppe attidaytakka dippi histtana. 
Isaiah14:31 «Nenoo pengezoo! Wuu! Wuy ga; Nenoo katamazoo! Waassa; Intteno Filisxeeme asatoo! Intte ubbayka hirgan seerite! Gaasoykka pudeha baggafe cuway intte bolla yides; he cifraappe duuxxi attanay deenna. 
Isaiah14:32 He kawoteththatappe kiitetti yiza qasttannetas ay gi zaaranee? ‹GODAY Xiyoone minththi essides; waaye ekkida derey izi garsan shemposo demmides› gi zaaro.» 
Isaiah15:1 Mo7aabe biitta gishshas GODAY yootida qaalay hayssa; Qiire-Mo7aaben diza Eerey laalettadus; issi gallassa omarsan dippi gadus; qasse Qiire-Mo7aaben diza Qiirey laalettadus; issi gallassa omars dippi gadus. 
Isaiah15:2 Diboone asay Xoossa keeth kezides; yeekkanaas pude zumbullata bolla kezides; Mo7aabe asay Nebo gishshassinne Medeba gishshas waassees; hu7eynne buuchchay milxi gi meedettides. 
Isaiah15:3 Ogey dizaso ubbaan maaqa may7eettes; pooqeta bollaninne dabaabay dizason yeekkeettes; afunth gusseettes. 
Isaiah15:4 Hasebooneynne El7eeley waassida; istta waasoykka Yahaaxe gakkanaas seetettides. Hessa gishshas Mo7aabe olanchchati waassida; istta wozinaykka kokkorides. 
Isaiah15:5 Ta wozinay Mo7aabe gishshas yeekkides; izippe goodettida asati Zo7aare gakkanaas, Egilaate-Shalishiya gakkanaas baqatida; istti afunth gussishe pude Luhite kezida; qasse Horonayme efiza ogera bishe bantti dhayanayssas waassida." 
Isaiah15:6 Nimiriime haaththati miccida; maatay shullides; caarechchayka dhaydes; cilila miishshika beettenna. 
Isaiah15:7 Hessa gishshas istti haarida aqotanne istti shiishshida haaro Ahaya shaafa tookki pinththeettes. 
Isaiah15:8 Istta waasoy Mo7aabe zawa gakkanaas seetettees; istta waasoy Egilayme gakkanaas istta zilasaykka Bi7eeri-Eelime gakkees. 
Isaiah15:9 Dimoona shaafati suuththan kumida; gidikkoka tani Dimoona bolla hessafe aadhdhizaaz ehana. Mo7aabeppe baqatizayta bolla biittayn casha attidayta bolla gaammo yeddana. 
Isaiah16:1 Bazzo biittafe he pinththan diza Seelappe Xiyoone macca nay zuman deraa haarizayssas dorsa laaqqa yeddite. 
Isaiah16:2 Bantta keeththafe goodettidi waayettiza kafota mala Mo7aabe maccassati Arnoone shaafa purden hessaththo hanana. 
Isaiah16:3 Mo7aabe asay Yuhuda asaas, «Nuus zore immite; nuus pirdite; seeta gallas intte eeshon omarsa dhuma mala nuna kammite. Baqatidayta qottite; goodettidaytakka aaththi immofte." 
Isaiah16:4 Mo7aabeppe goodettidayti inttekon takketto; istta dhayssizaytappe istti qotetti attizasoho gidite» gees. Un7eththizayssas wurseththi yaana; bashshi attana; otoranchchay biitta bollafe dhayana. 
Isaiah16:5 Araatay siiqon minnees; he araatan Dawite keeththafe gididay, suure pirda amottizay, xilloteth eesosizay issi asi ammaneteththan iza bolla uttana." 
Isaiah16:6 Yuhuda asay, «Mo7aabeta hallaca, otoreteththaanne moodheteththa, ceeqeteththaanne kadheza siyidos; gido attiin istta otoreteththi hada» gaana." 
Isaiah16:7 Hessa gishshas Mo7aabeti waassana; issi bolla Mo7aabes yeekkana; Qiire-Hereesete katama asaa gishshas yuushshi qoppidi kayottishe yeekkana. 
Isaiah16:8 Haseboone goshsha gadeti Seebama woyne miththati shullida; kawoteththata haarizayti Iyaazeere aadhdhi biidi bazzo biitta kanththidi bantta xapho abba gakkanaas yeddidayta doorettida woyne miththata yedhettida. 
Isaiah16:9 Seebama woyne miththaa gishshas Iyaazeera yeekkiza mala tanikka yeekkays; Haseboonee! El7eelee! Tani ta afunththan inttena looxikissays. Gaasoykka inttes miththa ayfeti gakkida wode diza hombocaynne kath shiishshiza wode diza ufayssi attides. 
Isaiah16:10 Ufayssaynne ililisay ne atakiltey dizasoppe kichchides; woyne tokkizasohon yexxiza yeththay deenna; ilisikka attides. Woyne teera gum7izasohoy deenna; gum7izayta hombocaakka ta dhayssadis. 
Isaiah16:11 Hessa gishshas ta wozinay Mo7aabe gishshas qadheta milas sissawus; Qiire-Hereeseta gishshas ta maraceya yeekkawus. 
Isaiah16:12 Mo7aabey pude ba zumbulla bolla kezikkoka daabura xalla; iza woosas ba eeqa keeth gelikkoka go7ay deenna. 
Isaiah16:13 GODAY Mo7aabe gishshas kaseti yootida qaalay hayssa. 
Isaiah16:14 Ha7i gidikko GODAY, qaxxaretti ooththiza oosanchchay gallas qoodiza mala Mo7aabe bonchchoynne asaa corateththay heedzdzu layththa giddon kawuyana; heen attida asati guuththatanne wolqqay bayndayta gidana." 
Isaiah17:1 Damasqo gishshas, «Be7ite, hayssafe sinththan Damasqo katamateththi attana; laaleththa doore gidana." 
Isaiah17:2 Aaro7eere katamati kays gidana; mehe heenththasoho gidana; istta babisiza miishshika deenna. 
Isaiah17:3 Gimbettida katamay Efreemeppe, kawoteththa maatay Damasqofe dhayana; Aaraameppe casha attidayta bonchchoy Isra7eeletayssa mala kawuyana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY." 
Isaiah17:4 «He wode Yaaqoobe bonchchoy shaarumatana; iza modhdhoteththaykka shuumana. 
Isaiah17:5 Kath maxizaadey eqqida kaththaa shiishshidi modhe ba kushen maxiza mala Erafayme shoobbafe maxettiza pushulo mala gidana. 
Isaiah17:6 Wogara mith shociin nam7u woykko heedzdzu ayfeti hagga xeera bolla attiza mala oyddu woykko ichchash ayfeti dhippi gida haggata bolla attiza mala guuththa haggati attana» gi GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay haasaydes. 
Isaiah17:7 He wode asay bana Medhdhidayssako xeellana; istta ayfey Isra7eele Geeshshaako xeellana. 
Isaiah17:8 Istti bantta kushen ooththida yarshosohota xeellettenna; istti bantta eeqatas exaane cu7asizasohotassinne Asheeris goynnana essida tuussatas bonchcho imettenna. 
Isaiah17:9 He wode Isra7eele asaa gaason boshettontta attida mino katamati woranne aykkoy bayndaso gidana. 
Isaiah17:10 Nena ashshiza Xoossaa baladasa; ne izan qotetta attiza ne zaallaka akeekabeekka; hessa neni doorettida atakilte tokkikokka, ooraththa zereth ne zerikkoka," 
Isaiah17:11 ne tokkida gallas izi mokkana mala ne ooththikokka, ne zerida wonteththa gallas izi ciiyana mala ne ooththikokka he kaththay hargeninne paxontta sakon mulera dhayana." 
Isaiah17:12 Be7a, daro asaa hanqo giirissi abba dambala mala giirees; be7a, asaa waaso daroy wolqqama haaththa mala guummees." 
Isaiah17:13 Asay wolqqama haaththa mala guummikkoka, izi istta seerikko zumbulla bollara carkon biza gudulla mala gote carkoy laalliza happa mala laalettana." 
Isaiah17:14 Hekko Sa7ay qammishin qofay baynda shiro gidides; sa7ay wonttanaappe kasetidi oonikka beettibeenna. Nu aqota bonqqidayta, ubbaa wolqqan ekkizayta qaaday hessa." 
Isaiah18:1 Tophphiya shaafata matan diza giirettiza qefey diza biittays aayye ana! 
Isaiah18:2 He biittaya qasttanneta shaccafe oosettida wogolon abba bollara shaafappe he pinth kiita yeddizaaro. Intteno pilata qasttannetoo! Adussanne bolla shugo asataakko, haakoninne matan dizay isttas yayyiza deretakko, wolqqamanne qaalay erettontta deretakko, shaafa haaththati iza dere shaakki biza kawoteththaako biite." 
Isaiah18:3 Intteno sa7a bolla diza as ubbatoo! zumata bolla malatay kaqettishin intte be7ana; zayey punettishin intte siyana. 
Isaiah18:4 GODAY taas, «Ta co7u ga uttana; seeta gallas awa seelan xolqettiza misha mala bone hombe mala, shaarappe bukkiza ira mala gidada ta xeellana» gides." 
Isaiah18:5 Kath maxiza wodeppe kase ciishsha wodey aadhdhishin, ciishshay gakkidi woyney ayfe ayfana gishin, woyne bolla diza koshshonttayssa xunqqana; daayida haggatakka qanxxereththi diggana." 
Isaiah18:6 Istti ubbayka zuma bolla diidi baqqi miza kafotassinne bazzo do7atas attana; kafoti bone kumeth mishe shaaccana; bazzo do7ati balgo ubbaan mishe shaaccana. 
Isaiah18:7 He wode GODAAS Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossaas adussanne liiqo asaappe, matappe haahoppe yayyiza dereppe, wolqqamanne iza qaalay erettontta dereppe, shaafati shaakki biza kawoteththafe imotay yaana; medheteththa GODAY dizaso pude Xiyoone zuma bolla yaana." 
Isaiah19:1 Gibxe gishshas yootettida qaalay, «Be7ite, GODAY eesotiza shaara toggidi Gibxe yees. Gibxe eeqa xoossati iza sinththan kokkoreettes; Gibxe wozinay istta giddon seerees» gees." 
Isaiah19:2 «Tani Gibxeta issaa issaa bolla denththana; ishay ishara, shooroy shoorora, katamay katamara, kawoy kawora olettana." 
Isaiah19:3 Gibxeta wozinay labettana; tani istta halchcho hada ooththana. Istta eeqa xoossatanne moytilleta, tuna ayana xeygizaytanne marota zore oychchana." 
Isaiah19:4 Qasse menxe iita asa kushen ta Gibxeta aaththa immana; babisiza kawoy istta haarana» gees GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay." 
Isaiah19:5 Abbaye shaafa haaththi paccana; haaththi guuxxi guuxxi melana. 
Isaiah19:6 Zara haaththati xinqqana; Gibxe kanchcheti micci dhayana; shaccatinne care maatati shullana. 
Isaiah19:7 Abbaye shaafa lanqen haaththa matan diza miththati shullana; shaafaa matan zerettida kath ubbay carkon pitetti dhayana; aykkoyka attenna. 
Isaiah19:8 Mole oykkizayti ceecana; Abbaye shaafan gaattile yeggizayti ubbay yeekkana; haaththa bolla bantta gite yeggizayta ubbaa wolqqay ixxana. 
Isaiah19:9 Paatettida talbba suqizayti dhayana; qasse booththa puuttofe may7o dadizayti hidota qanxxana. 
Isaiah19:10 May7o dadizayti ceecana; damozan aqizayta wozinay meqqana. 
Isaiah19:11 Xaanoose biitta halaqati keehi eeya; aadho eranchcha gidida kawo Paaroone aadho eranchchata zorey hada. Paaroones, «Tani aadho eranchchatappe issaa; tani kase kawota kaallizaade» waanidi geetii?" 
Isaiah19:12 Intte aadho eranchchati ha7i awan dizoo? Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY Gibxe bolla ooththana qoppidayssa ane inttena bessettonne erisetto. 
Isaiah19:13 Xaanoose halaqati eeyda; Memppisa shuumeti balettida; izi dere kaaleththiza erettidayti Gibxe asaa baleththida. 
Isaiah19:14 GODAY istta bolla dochchiza ayana gussides; maththottida asi ba cooshshan gandigarza mala Gibxey ba ooso ubbaan gandigarana mala ooththida. 
Isaiah19:15 Kace woykko goyna, zamba woykko shacca heyti ubbay Gibxes aykkoka maadettenna." 
Isaiah19:16 He wode Gibxe asay maccassa mala gidana. Qasse Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY istta bolla ba qese denththiza wode istti yashshan kokkorana. 
Isaiah19:17 Yuhuda asay Gibxe asaa bolla shiro denththeththana; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY istta bollan ooththana halchchida halchchofe dendidayssan Yuhuda gishshas siyida ubbay shirotana. 
Isaiah19:18 He wode Gibxe biittan diza ichchash katamati Kanaane qaalan haasayana; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA bagga gidanaas caaqqana. He katamatappe issiniya Bashsha Katama geetetta xeygettana. 
Isaiah19:19 He wode Gibxe biittan GODAAS yarshosoy oosettana; qasse Gibxe biitta zawan GODAAS tuussi eqqana. 
Isaiah19:20 Hessi Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAS Gibxe biittan malatanne markka gidana; istti banttana un7eththizaytappe dendidayssan GODAAKKO waassiza wode izi istta ashshizaadenne maaddizaade kiittidi istta ashshana. 
Isaiah19:21 GODAY bana Gibxetas qonccisana; isttika he gallas GODAA erana; yarshoninne kaththa yarshon iza goynnana. Istti GODAAS adinettana; ba adinettidayssaka gaththana. 
Isaiah19:22 GODAY Gibxe boshan shocana; zaaridikka istta paththana; isttika GODAAKKO simmana; izikka istta woosa siyidi istta paththana. 
Isaiah19:23 He wode Gibxeppe Asoore gakkanaas wogga ogey oosettana; Asooreti Gibxe, Gibxe asay Asoore baana; qasse Gibxetinne Asooreti issi bolla goynnana." 
Isaiah19:24 He wode Isra7eeley biittas anjjo gidanaas heedzdzanththo maaran Gibxeranne Asoorera issife qoodettana. 
Isaiah19:25 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY isttas, «Ta dere Gibxey, ta kushey medhdhida Asoorey, ta xinxxo Isra7eeley anjjettidayta gidetto» gi anjjana." 
Isaiah20:1 Asoore kawo Sarggooney ola gadawaa kiittiin Ashdoode geetettiza Filisxeeme katama oli oykkida layth," 
Isaiah20:2 he wode GODAY Amoxe naa Isayaasa, «Maaqa ne bollafe qaara; ne caammaa tohoppe kessa» gi yootides; izikka hessaththo ooththides; kallonne caammay baynda simerettides." 
Isaiah20:3 Hessafe GODAY, «Ta aylle Isayaasi Gibxe bollanne Tophphiya bolla gakkanayssas malata gidana mala heedzdzu layth may7o may7onttanne caamma aaththontta de7ida mala," 
Isaiah20:4 Asoore kawoy Gibxeppe di7ettida cimatanne yelagata, Tophphiyappe beti yidayta kallonne caamma aaththontta ekki baana; istti duca kallo qaari yeggidi yedereththishe Gibxeta kawushshana." 
Isaiah20:5 Tophphiya hidota ooththidaytinne Gibxen ceeqettizayti babbananne kawuyana. 
Isaiah20:6 He wode abbaa matan de7iza derey, ‹Kase istti ceeqettidayti, Asoore kawoppe attanaassinne la7a kezanaas nu istta giddon qotettidayta aazi gakkidaakko ane xeellite; histtiin nuni waani kessi ekki attanee? gaana› » gides." 
Isaiah21:1 Abba lanqen diza bazzo biittas yootettida GODAA qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa. Dugeha baggafe gote carkoy pitti ekki yiza mala worajjizay shiro denththeththiza bazzo biittafe yees. 
Isaiah21:2 Yashshiza ajjuuta ta be7adis; aaththi immizayssi aaththi immees; di7izayssi di7ees. Elaame denda! Meedoone giddoththa! iza gaththida waaye ubbaa ta essana. 
Isaiah21:3 Hessa gishshas ta xeessay sako xalala gidides; miixay oykkida maccassa mala tana leessoy oykkides; tani siyida yo7oy tana gadigadissides; ta be7ida yo7on shirotadis. 
Isaiah21:4 Ta wozinay poddu gides; tana yashshi kokkorisides; ta ufayssan naagida omarsay ta bolla hirga yeggides. 
Isaiah21:5 Istti maadda giigsida; uttizaso giigsida; midanne uyida. Intteno shuumetoo dendite! gondalleza zayten quccite! 
Isaiah21:6 GODAY tana, «Ba; wochchiza as woththa; izi ba be7idayssa yooto." 
Isaiah21:7 Paran gooshettiza para-gaareta be7iza wode hare toggizayta gaamella toggizayta be7iza wode izi yuushshi qoppo; lo7eththi wochcho» gides. 
Isaiah21:8 Naagizayssika waassishe, «Godawu, tani gallas gallas pacey baynda shakko bolla eqqadis; omars ubbaan ta naagizasohon eqqadis." 
Isaiah21:9 Be7ite, issi asi paratan gooshettiza para-gaaretan yides; histtidi, ‹Baabilooney kundadus! Kundadus! izi eeqa xoossa misletikka meqeretti gaden kundida› gi zaarides» gi waassides." 
Isaiah21:10 Balen bukettida ta derezoo! Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossafe ta siyida qaala nees yootays. 
Isaiah21:11 Eedoome gishshas yootettida mino yo7o; issi asi Seyreppe tana xeygidi «Naagizayssoo! Gadey wonttanaas ay keena saatey attidee? Naagizayssoo! Gadey wonttanaas ay keena saatey attidee?» gides. 
Isaiah21:12 Naagizayssi zaaridi, «Wonttana; gido attiin simmidi qammana; oychchana koykko oychchite; gido attiin simmidi haa yiite» gides." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabe gishshas yootettida mino yo7o; Intteno Dadaane zal7anchchatoo! intte intte caana gaamellatara Arabe bazzon aqana. 
Isaiah21:14 Saamettidaytas haath ehite; intteno Temaanen dizaytoo! Bete asatas kath ehite. 
Isaiah21:15 Istti giththa mashshafenne koohoppe shodettida giththa mashshafe, waaxettida wondafeppenne suullida olappe baqatida." 
Isaiah21:16 GODAY tana, «Konttiraate oosanchcha ooso gallassi wuriza mala issi layththa giddon Qeedaare bonchchoy ubbay wurana." 
Isaiah21:17 Qeedaare biittan wondafen dukkiza wolqqama olanchchatappe guuththati attana; hessa GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay yootides» gides. 
Isaiah22:1 Ajjuuta zulle bolla yootettida mino yo7o; Inttena aazi metiin ubbay pooqe bolla kezidetii? 
Isaiah22:2 Hanne wocamay kumida katamayee! Shiroynne dirbbay kumida katamayee! Neeppe hayqqidayti mashshan hayqqibeettenna; woykko olan hayqqibeettenna. 
Isaiah22:3 Nena ayssizayti ubbay issife baqatida; wondafe denththontta dishe di7ettida; morkkey haahon dishin baqatida ubbatoo! Intte oykettidi issi bolla qashettideta. 
Isaiah22:4 Hessa gishshas tani, «Taappe haakkite; ane camo yeeho ta yeekkays; dhayda ta asaa gishshas tana minththeththana qoppofte» gadis." 
Isaiah22:5 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay Ajjuuta Zullen wocama, dirbbanne shiro, dirsata laaleththinne zumatakko waaso gallassi dees." 
Isaiah22:6 Elaamey wondafe yiishsha kooho, ba paratanne para-gaareta giigsides; Qiireykka ba gondalle oykkides." 
Isaiah22:7 Lo7o zulleti para-gaaretan kumida; toga asati katamay pengen eqqida. 
Isaiah22:8 Yuhuda miixata laallida; he wode wora giddon minjja keeththan diza ola massara ne xeelladasa. 
Isaiah22:9 Dawite katamay daro laalettidayssa be7ideta; duge baggara haath eelissideta. 
Isaiah22:10 Yerusalaamen diza keeththata qoodideta; dirsaa ooraththanaas keeththata laallideta. 
Isaiah22:11 Kase gal7a eele haaththaa zaaridi, iza minjjizaso nam7u gimbetappe giddon giigsideta. Gido attiin intte hessa ooththiday oonakko eribeekketa; koyro halchchi ooththidayssa akeekibeekketa." 
Isaiah22:12 He gallas GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay intte yeekkana malanne waassana mala, intte hu7e binana buucana malanne maaqa may7ana mala xeygides." 
Isaiah22:13 Gido attiin injjenne ufays, booranne dharsho shukay, asho muussinne woyne ushshi dees; «Nuni wonto hayqqana gishshas ane moossinne uyoos» gideta." 
Isaiah22:14 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay hayssafe kaallizayssa taas qonccisides; izakka ta hayththan siyadis; «Hayssi ha nagarazi intte hayqqana gakkanaas wursiin wurenna.» 
Isaiah22:15 GODAY, GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «Baada kawo keeththa alaafe Sheebina," 
Isaiah22:16 Hayssan ay ooththay? Hayssa nees duufo giigsanaas, dhoqqasohon ne moogettanaaso woocanaas, ne ahay uttanaaso zaalla woocanaas ooni nena azazidee?" 
Isaiah22:17 Haysso mino addezoo! Naagetta; GODAY nena minththi oykkidi ba kushen cuucumi oykkidi olana hanees. 
Isaiah22:18 Nena yanbarsha mala yuushshidi aako biittan olana; ne godaa keeththas ne yeella gidadasa; ne heen hayqqana; ne bonchcho para-gaaretikka heen attana. 
Isaiah22:19 Ne bonchchettidasoppe ta nena kawushshana; alaafeteththaafekka ne goodettana» ga. 
Isaiah22:20 «He gallas tani Kilqiyaasa naa ta ashkara Elyaaqeeme xeygana. 
Isaiah22:21 Ne seeloza ta iza mayzana; ne giththaa iza gixissana; ne daannateththaaka ta izas aaththa immana. Izi Yerusalaamen diza asaassinne Yuhuda asaas aawa gidana. 
Isaiah22:22 Tani Dawite keeththa qulpe iza hashen woththana; izi doyiin oonikka gordenna; izi gordiin oonikka doyenna. 
Isaiah22:23 Tani iza ammanettizasohon dhishke mala essana; izi ba aawa keeththas bonchcho araata gidana. 
Isaiah22:24 Qeeri xaaroppe biidi baath gakkanaas soon diza miish ubbaa kocan kaqqiza mala iza aawa keeththa bonchcho ubbay naytappe biidi naa naa gakkanaas iza bolla qaaphettana» gides. 
Isaiah22:25 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «He gallas ammanththizason eqqida dhishkey shodettana; meqqi wodhdhana; iza bolla kaqettida ubbay kundidi meqerettana» gides; hayssa GODAY yootides." 
Isaiah23:1 Xiroose bolla yootettida mino yo7o; Xiroosey dippi gi dhayda gishshas Tarseese markabetoo waassite; keeththinne wodebey bayndaso gidadus. Qophiroose biittafe worey kezides. 
Isaiah23:2 Intteno harurotoo! Intteno duretida Sidoona zal7anchchatoo! Co7u giite! 
Isaiah23:3 Gita abbaara Shihooreppe Xirooses kaththi yees; Xiroose aqotay Abbayeppe beettees; iza kawoteththatas zal7e baach gidadus. 
Isaiah23:4 Hanne Sidoona katamayee! Hanne abba miixaye neni yeellata; abbay, «Tani miixatabeekke; naakka yelabeekke; attuma naytanne macca nayta dichchabeekke» gides." 
Isaiah23:5 Xirooseppe keziza paapunththay Gibxe biittan siyettiza wode istti ceecana. 
Isaiah23:6 Intteno harurotoo! Zilalite; Tarseese pinnite. 
Isaiah23:7 Izi tohoy izo haako dere efidaara heen iza uttana mala ooththidaara, kase beni katamaya injjenne ufayssa katamaya hannii?" 
Isaiah23:8 Kallachcha goxissidaari bolla, ba zal7anchchata daannasidaari bolla, biitta bolla bonchchettidi bayzizaytinne laammizayti izin diza Xiroosi bolla hayssa qoppiday oonee?" 
Isaiah23:9 Otorettizayta ubbaa bonchcho kawushshanaas qasse biittaa bolla dhoqqu dhoqqu gidayta ziqqi histtanaas GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay halchchides. 
Isaiah23:10 Intteno Tarseese biitta asatoo! Inttena teqqizay baynda gishshas Abbaye shaafa mala intte biitta bollan kumidi goggite. 
Isaiah23:11 GODAY ba kusheza abba bolla miccides; izi kawoteththatakka daganththides; Kanaane miixati laalettana mala azazides. 
Isaiah23:12 Qasseka, «Hanne qoxettida Sidoona geela7oyee! Hayssafe guye ufayettofa; denda Qophiroose pinna; heenkka ne saro demmaka» gides." 
Isaiah23:13 Ane Baabiloone biitta be7ite; he biitta asay paththontta as gidides; Asoore asay izo bazzo do7as gufaso kessides; istti bantta shakkota izi bolla gimbida; izi miixata laallida; budhettoyssi doore gidides. 
Isaiah23:14 Intteno Tarseese markabetoo, waassite! Intte miixay laalettides." 
Isaiah23:15 He wode Xiroose katamay issi kawos de7o layththa keena laappun tammu layth dogettana; hessafe guye layma maccassay gishshas yexettida yeththi Xiroose bolla yexettana. 
Isaiah23:16 Istti, «Hanne dogettida layma maccassayee! bagana denththa; katamay giddon yuuya; ne hassa7ettana mala baganaa lo7eththa shoca; daro mazamure yexxa» gaana." 
Isaiah23:17 Laappun tammu layththi polettidaappe guye GODAY Xiroose qoppana; gido attiin iza kase ba layma ooson simmana; sa7a bolla kawoteththata ubbaara ba laymateththa zal7e zal7ana. 
Isaiah23:18 Gidikkoka iza demmida ubbaynne wodhey GODAAS dummatana; dagattennanne suuddenna; izi wodhey GODAA sinththan de7izaytas palahida kaththinne lo7o may7o gidana. 
Isaiah24:1 Be7ite! GODAY biittaa bula kessana; mulera dhayssana; budheththa doore histtana; izin diza asaa laallana. 
Isaiah24:2 Ubbaa miishshika issi mala gidana; dereza bolla hanzayssi qeeseza bolla hanana; aylle bolla hanzayssi godaa bolla hanana; ashkaray bolla hanzayssi godattey bolla hanana; shammizayssa bolla hanzayssi bayzizayssa bolla hanana; tal7e ekkizayssa bolla hanzayssi tal7e immizayssa bolla hanana; aco ciggizayssa bolla hanzayssi aco cigissizayssa bolla hanana. 
Isaiah24:3 Biittay mulera bula gidana; mulera bonqqettana; ha qaalaa GODAY haasaydes. 
Isaiah24:4 Biittaya melana; izin diza ubbay qokkana; alamey daaburana; biitta bolla erettida gita asati daaburana. 
Isaiah24:5 Biittay ba asaan tunadus; istti woga menththida; maaraa moorida; mernaa caaqo qaala menththida. 
Isaiah24:6 Hessa gishshas qanggeththi biittaa mees; izin de7iza dereti bantta mooron qaxxayettana bessees; Hessa gishshas sa7a bolla diza asati xuugettida; isttafe qoodan guuththa asati attida. 
Isaiah24:7 Woyne turay meliin woyne ushshi wurides; kase ufayettiza ubbay ceecides. 
Isaiah24:8 Ufayssan karabe baqay co7u gides; kaa7izayta hombocaykka eqqides; ufayssiza diiththa giirissi co7u gides. 
Isaiah24:9 Hayssafe guye istti yexxishe woyne ushshu uyettenna; ushshayka uyizayta cammana. 
Isaiah24:10 Laalettida katamaya kayzadus; keeththa pengetikka gordettida. 
Isaiah24:11 Woyne ushsha gishshas dubbushan waasseettes; ufayssi ubbay ceecen laamettana; homboca kaassi biitta bollafe dhaydes. 
Isaiah24:12 Katamaya mulera laalettadus; pengetikka meqeretti kundida. 
Isaiah24:13 Wogara miththa ayfe shoci qoqofiin woyne miththa qanxxi ekkiin attiza attida pushulo mala biittaa bolla, kawoteththata bolla hessaththo hanana." 
Isaiah24:14 Istti bantta qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi ufayssan yexxana; arshey wulliza baggafe GODAA gitateththa yootana. 
Isaiah24:15 Hessa gishshas arshey mokkiza baggara dizaytoo, abban diza haruroti GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa, sunththaa dhoqqu dhoqqu histtite." 
Isaiah24:16 Biittaa gaxaappe, «Xillozas bonchchoy gido» giza mazamure nu siyidos; «Tani gidikko gilqada meqeth attadis; Tana aayye ana! Kaddizayti kaddeettes; aaththi immizayti aaththi immeettes» gadis." 
Isaiah24:17 Intteno sa7a bollan diza asatoo, dagamay, ollaynne woximadey inttena naagees." 
Isaiah24:18 Salo maskooteti doyettida gishshas, biitta yochchatikka qaaxxida; shiroppe baqatizay ollan kundana; ollafe kessi ekkidaykka woximaden oykettana." 
Isaiah24:19 Biittay qaaxxides; za7idessinne phalqetti wodhdhides. 
Isaiah24:20 Biittay maththottida asa mala yiicotides; carkoy sugida gaabba mala gidadus. Biitta makkallateththay deexo gidida gishshas kundana; nam7anththoka simmi dendenna. 
Isaiah24:21 He gallas GODAY bolla salon diza wolqqamata gars biitta bolla diza kawotakka qaxxayana. 
Isaiah24:22 Istti ollan diza qasho asa mala issi bolla uucettana; istti qasho keeththan gordetti uttana; daro wodeppe guye istti pirda ekkana shiiqana. 
Isaiah24:23 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY Xiyoone zumaninne Yerusalaamen cimata sinththan bonchchon kawotana; he wode aginay shaaphettana; awa ayfeykka yeellatana. 
Isaiah25:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni ta Xoossaa. Tani nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana; ne sunththaaka sabbana. Gaasoykka benippe qofettidayssa malalisiza hano kumeththa ammaneteththan ooththadasa. 
Isaiah25:2 Neni katamayo shuchcha doore ooththadasa; gimbettida katamayokka laalladasa; hayssafe sinththan gimbettida allagata katamati deettenna; Simmidi mulekka oosetettenna. 
Isaiah25:3 Hessa gishshas mino dereti nena bonchchana; menxe iita kawoteththati nees yayyana. 
Isaiah25:4 Neni hiyeesatas zemppo; Metotanchchatas meto wode neni zemppo; gote carkofe geemmi attizaso; awa seelappe kuwattizaso gidadasa. Gaasoykka menxe iitata peenoy keeththa godara icettiza gote carko mala. 
Isaiah25:5 Bazzo biitta seela mala. Allaga otoreteththa waaso co7u ooththaasa. Awa seelay shaaraa kuwan irxxiza mala menxe iitata mazamure sirphi gaana. 
Isaiah25:6 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay hayssa zumaa bolla dere ubbaas gidiza gita gibiraa, lo7i kaxxida woyne ushshu, lo7o ashonne doorettida woyne ushshu giigsana." 
Isaiah25:7 Hayssa ha zumaan dere ubbaa bollan wodhdhida magalasha, kawoteththata ubbaa goozi oykkida goossaa izi dhayssana." 
Isaiah25:8 Hayqo izi mernaas mittana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY asa ubbaa ayfeppe afunththu quccana; ba deraa kawushshateth biitta ubbaafe diggana. Hayssa GODAY haasaydes. 
Isaiah25:9 He gallas isttas, «Be7ite nu Xoossay hayssa; nuni izan ammanettidos; izikka nuna ashshides; Hayssi GODAA; nuni izan ammanettidos; izi ashshidayssan ufayettoos; ufayssan hombocoos» gaana." 
Isaiah25:10 GODAA kushey ha zumaa bolla shemppana. Gido attiin uttulay urqqan yedhettiza mala Mo7aabeykka yedhettana. 
Isaiah25:11 Haaththa wadhdhizay ba kushe micciza mala iza giddon dizayti bantta kushe miccana; Xoossi istta gene ooso balettontta istta otoreteththaa kawushshana. 
Isaiah25:12 Istti dhoqqu histti gimbida gimbeza izi duge ziqqi histtana; duge woththana; kawushshidi duge sa7an woththidi gudulla bolla yeggana. 
Isaiah26:1 He gallas ha yeththay Yuhuda biittan yexettana. Nuus mino katamay dees; Xoossi iza gimbetanne miixata atoteththas ooththides. 
Isaiah26:2 Ba ammano naagida, xillo kawoteththati gelana mala pengeta doyte." 
Isaiah26:3 Nenan ammanettida gishshas nenan zemppida shemppoyo neni kumeththa saroteththan naagaasa. 
Isaiah26:4 Mernaas GODAAN ammanettite; GODAY nuus mernaa Zaalla. 
Isaiah26:5 Dhoqqasohon dizayta ziqqi ooththana; dhoqqu gida katama kawushshana; duge biittan olana; gudullara walakkana. 
Isaiah26:6 Tohon yedhettana; un7ettidayta tohoynne manqota tohoy iza yedhdhana. 
Isaiah26:7 Xillota ogey moole. Nenoo Suurezoo, neni xillota oge moolisaasa." 
Isaiah26:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ne woga ogera hemettishe nuni nena hidota ooththidos; ne sunththinne ne gitateththi nu wozinas amo. 
Isaiah26:9 Ta shemppoya omarsi nena laamotawus; ta ayanay maalado nena koyawus; ne pirday biitta bolla yida wode sa7an de7iza asay xilloteth tamaarees. 
Isaiah26:10 Iita asatas kiya ooththikokka, istti xilloteth tamaarettenna. Suure biittan iita ooththeettes; GODAA gitateththaaka akeekettenna." 
Isaiah26:11 Abeet GODAWU! Ne qesey dhoqqu dhoqqu gides. Istti gidikko be7ettenna; Ne asaas ne mishettizayssa be7ettonne yeellatetto; Ne morkketas giigida tamay istta mo. 
Isaiah26:12 Abeet GODAWU! Neni nuus saroteth yoch ooththadasa; nu ooso ubbaa neni ooththadasa. 
Isaiah26:13 Abeet GODAWU Nu Xoossawu! neeppe hara allaga xoossati nuna haarida; nuni gidikko ne sunththaa xalla bonchchoos. 
Isaiah26:14 Istti hayqqida; simmidi shemppora paxa de7ettenna; istta shemppoy simmi yeenna; neni istta qaxxayadasanne dhayssadasa; istta hassa7issiza miish ubbaa pitta dhayssadasa. 
Isaiah26:15 Abeet GODAWU! Neni kawoteththaa darsadasa; Neni deraa darsadasa. Neni bonchchettadasa; biittaa zawa ubbaaka aassadasa. 
Isaiah26:16 Abeet GODAWU! Istti metotida wode neekko yida; Neni istta seerida wode, saasuki nena woosseettes." 
Isaiah26:17 Abeet GODAWU! Shaara maccassi miixan metotiza malanne waassiza mala nunikka ne sinththan metotidi waassoos. 
Isaiah26:18 Nuni shaaridos; miixankka un7ettidos; gido attiin carko yelidos. Nuni sa7as atoteth ehibookko; sa7an diza deraakka yelibookko. 
Isaiah26:19 Gido attiin hayqqida ne asay paxana; istta ahaykka dendana. Intteno biitta garsan dizaytoo! Dendite ufayssan yexxite; ne xaazay biitta yakkissiza maalado xaaza mala sa7ay mittidayta zaara cuttana. 
Isaiah26:20 Ta derezoo! Ba ne keeth gela; ne penge ne bolla gorda; iza hanqoy aadhdhana gakkanaas guuththa wodes qotetaashsha. 
Isaiah26:21 Biittaa bollan diza asaa istta nagaraa gishshas qaxxayanaas, GODAY ba de7izasoppe kezidi yees. Biittayka ba bollan gukkida suuththaa qonccisana; hayqqidaytakka hayssafe guye qottuku." 
Isaiah27:1 He gallas GODAY lewataane geetettiza xongettiza shooshshaanne xaaxettiza shooshshaa ba mino, gitanne wolqqama giththa mashshan qaxxayana; abban diza wogga do7aa qanxxereththi yeggana." 
Isaiah27:2 He gallas, «Woyne mith tokkiza lo7osozas yexxite!" 
Isaiah27:3 Tani GODAY iza naagays; tani ubbaa gallas haath ushshays; omarsinne gallas iza naagays; hessa gishshas ooninne iza qohenna. 
Isaiah27:4 Tani hanqettike; tanara olettanaas agunththinne kindichchoy kezidaakko ta istta issi bolla xuuggana! 
Isaiah27:5 Woykko taakko yiidi tana banttas qotettizaso kessetto; tanara giigetto; ee tanara giigetto» geetettana. 
Isaiah27:6 Yaana gallassatan Yaaqoobey xapho yeddana; Isra7eeley aacananne ciiyana; histtiin istta ayfey sa7a kumana. 
Isaiah27:7 Izo shocidayta shocida mala GODAY izo shocidee? Izo wodhidayta izi wodhida mala izo wodhidee? 
Isaiah27:8 Olaninne di7on ne izo qaxxayadasa; arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy carkiza mala wolqqama gote carkon ne izo gooddadasa. 
Isaiah27:9 Yaaqoobey yarsho yarshizaso shuchchata booqintta shuchcha mala gaacci liiqisishin Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossay mislenne exaane cuwasiza sohota istti dizasohotappe shoddi olishin he gallas mooroy atto geetettana; hessi izi ba nagara diggoyssas kumeththa ayfe gidana. 
Isaiah27:10 Gimbettida katamaya kayzadus; bazzo biitta mala olettidaso gidadus; marati heen heemettidi heen ichchana; izi haggatakka poqqi maana. 
Isaiah27:11 Izi xeeray melidi meqqana; maccassatikka mixi eeththana; akeekay baynda dere gidida gishshas iza medhdhiday izas qadhettenna; ooththidayssika iza maarenna. 
Isaiah27:12 He gallas Efiraaxise shaafappe haaththi baynda Gibxe Shaafa gakkanaas GODAY ba kaththaa bukkana; intteno Isra7eele asatoo, intte issoy issoy shiiqana." 
Isaiah27:13 He gallas gita zayey punettana; Asooren di7ettidaytinne Gibxen un7ettidayti guye Yerusalaame simmi yiidi geeshsha zumaa bolla GODAAS goynnana. 
Isaiah28:1 Efreemen diza maththottizaytas, otoreteththas, kallachcha gididaaris, cilila shoobba hu7en kippi ga uttida, izas bonchcho seelo gidida shulla ciishshays, woyne ushshay istta zereththas otoreteththas gidida katamays aayye ana!" 
Isaiah28:2 Be7ite, Godaas wolqqamanne mino gidida issoy dees; hessika shachcha uusho mala, dhayssiza gote carko mala, wolqqama dambala malanne wolqqama ira mala wolqqan izi izo duge biittan yeggana." 
Isaiah28:3 Maththottiza Efreeme asata otoro kallachchay tohon yedhettana. 
Isaiah28:4 Cilila shoobba hu7en kippi ga uttida izas bonchcho seelo gidida shulla ciishshaya, kaththa shiishoppe sinththan gakkiin asi be7ida mala xuphi ekkidi heerakka mittiza balase mala gidana." 
Isaiah28:5 He gallas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY ba asaappe casha attidaytas bonchcho kallachchanne puula akilile gidana. 
Isaiah28:6 Izi pirdizaytas suure pirda pirdiza ayana olaa katama pengefe zaarizaytas wolqqa gidana. 
Isaiah28:7 Hayti woyne ushshu uyidi yiicoteettes; maththosiza ushshan gandigareettes. Qeesetinne nabeti maththosiza ushshan gandigarda; woyne ushsha gaason yo7oy isttafe balettides; maththosiza ushshan gandigarda; ajjuutaa likkera be7ettenna; pirda pirdishe dhuphetteettes. 
Isaiah28:8 Istta maadda ubbay coosh xalla; cooshshan moorettonttasoy deenna. 
Isaiah28:9 Istti, «Izi oona tamaarsizee? Kiitaakka oos qonccisizee? Maath aggida naytasseyee dhanththa duuso naytassee?" 
Isaiah28:10 Azazo bolla azazo, azazo bolla azazo woga bolla woga, wogaa bolla woga, haankka guuththara, heenkka guuththara ooththees» gaana." 
Isaiah28:11 Histtiko sinththafe Xoossay allagata qaalaninne imaththata doonan ha asaas haasayana. 
Isaiah28:12 Izi isttas, «Hanna shemposo; daaburday shemppo; hanna shemposo» giday oonassee? Istti gidikko siyana koyibeettenna." 
Isaiah28:13 Hessa gishshas GODAA qaalay istti biidi guye kundana mala, madunxana malanne woximaden oykettana mala, di7ettana mala azazo bolla azazo, azazo bolla azazo, woga bolla woga, woga bolla woga gididi, haan guuththara, heen guuththara hanana." 
Isaiah28:14 Hessa gishshas intteno Yerusalaamen diza asaa haariza qilccizaytoo! GODAA qaalaa siyite. 
Isaiah28:15 Intte, «Nuni hayqora caaqettidos; duuforakka sigettidos; wordo nuus zempposonne qotettizaso ooththidos; wolqqama boshay pitti ekki bishe nuna bochchanaas dandayenna» gi otorettideta." 
Isaiah28:16 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Be7ite! Tani Xiyoonen paacettida shuch, yochcha shuch, mino yochchas gidiza bonchchettida gula shuch woththana; izan ammanizay yeellatenna." 
Isaiah28:17 Tani suure pirda wadha wodoro, xilloteththika tumbe mala ooththana; intte wordo zempposo ooththidayssa shachcha iray meeccana; intte qotetti attizasozakka haaththi mittana» gees." 
Isaiah28:18 Intte hayqora caaqettida caaqoy attana; intte duufora sigettida sigay laalettana; wolqqama boshay pitti ekki bishe inttenakka pitti ekki baana. 
Isaiah28:19 Izi yida wode wode inttena ekki baana; maalado maalado, qammanne gallas inttena pitti efana; ha qaalaa intte akeekizaa gidikko shiro bolla shiro ehana." 
Isaiah28:20 Toho cogotti ichchontta mala hiixay qaanththa; gaththi may7anaas afalaykka guuththa. 
Isaiah28:21 GODAY Paraaxime zuman ooththida mala, ba ooso, ba imaththa ooso, hessika ba ooraththa ooso ooththanaas dendana. Qasse Geba7oone zullen ooththida malakka ooththana." 
Isaiah28:22 GODAY, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY izi boshaa biitta ubbaa bolla ehanaas awajjidayssa tani siyida gishshas ha7i intte qilccizayssa aggite; akkay giikko intte bolla qashoy minnana." 
Isaiah28:23 Ezgidi ta yootizayssa siyite; akeekidi ta qaala siyite. 
Isaiah28:24 Goshshanchchay kath zeranaas ubba wode he soho goyishe de7izee? Qasse izi hem7e liiqisishenne ubbato pixishe de7izee? 
Isaiah28:25 Goshshaa liiqisidi aasutanne aanuga zerennee? Gistteza izas giigidasohon, banggaa izas giigidasohon arddaa izas giigidasohon zerennee?" 
Isaiah28:26 Iza Xoossay iza tamaarssees; suure ogekka iza bessees. 
Isaiah28:27 Aasutay lodan bukettenna; aanugay para-gaaren bukettenna; aasutay guufen, aanugay qeeri lodan bukettees." 
Isaiah28:28 Sollo uukkanaas kaththi gaacettees; hessa gishshas issi asi mernaas kath bukkenna; kath bukkiza para-gaareta iza bollara laaggikokka kaththaa gaacettenna. 
Isaiah28:29 Hayssi ubbay ba zoren malalisizaaz, ba aadho erateththan malalisizaaz gidida Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAPPE hanees." 
Isaiah29:1 Hanne Dawiti nenan de7ida Ar7eele katamayee! Nena aayye ana! Layththa bolla layth gujja; ba7aaletakka zaara zaarada bonchcha. 
Isaiah29:2 Gido attiin tani Ar7eele katamayo giddoththana; iza yeekkananne waassana; iza taas yarsho yarshizaso gidana. 
Isaiah29:3 Tani ne yuushon dunkaanana; ta ne yuushon gimbe yuushsha aaththana; ne yuushon shakko ooththada ta nena un7eththana. 
Isaiah29:4 Neni duge wodhdhana; biitta garsafe pude haasayana; ne haasayay gudullaa giddofe kezana; ne cenggurssi moytille cenggurssa mala biitta garsafe pude kezana; ne haasayaykka gudulla giddofe saasukettana. 
Isaiah29:5 Gido attiin daro ne morkketi gudulla suulla mala, menxe iitati carkon biza happa mala gidana; qofay baynda dishin," 
Isaiah29:6 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY dadan, biittaa qaaththan, gita cenggurssan, gote carkoninne wolqqama abba dambalan ubbaa miza tama lacon yaana." 
Isaiah29:7 Ar7eele oliza kawoteththata ubbaa wudey izi bollanne izi shakko bolla daafa yeggizaytinne dooddizayti, agumo malanne omars beettiza ajjuuta mala gidana." 
Isaiah29:8 Gafida asi agumora mishe aqees; gido attiin izi dhiskofe dendishin gafay aggonttayssa mala, saamettida asi agumora uyishe aqees; gido attiin beeggishin daaburaynne saamoy iza aggonttayssa mala Xiyoone zuma oliza kawoteththata ubbaa wudey hessaththo hanana." 
Isaiah29:9 Dammattidi malalettite; inttena intterkka qooqisidi qooqe gidite. Gido attiin woyne ushshu uyontta coo maththottite; maththosiza ushshu uyontta dishe gandigarite. 
Isaiah29:10 GODAY intte bolla wolqqama dhisko yeggides; intte nabeta ayfe goozides; ajjuuta be7izayta hu7e gullunttissides. 
Isaiah29:11 Ha ajjuutay isttas xaaththa maxaafa giddon gordetti diza qaala mala gidides. Ha xaaththa maxaafa nababanaas dandayza asi, «Shoobbe nuus nababa» giidi intte immiko, izi inttes, «Gordettida gishshas tani nababanaas dandaykke» gaana." 
Isaiah29:12 Qasse xaaththa maxaafaa nababo dandayontta asas, «Shoobbe nuus nababa» giidi intte izas immiko izi inttes, «Ta nababo dandaykke» gaana." 
Isaiah29:13 GODAY, «Hayssi derey doonan xalla taakko shiiqees; ba metershan xalla tana bonchchees; gido attiin iza wozinay taappe haakon dees. Istti asi tamaarsidanne asi woththida wogan taas goynneettes." 
Isaiah29:14 Hessa gishshas tani ha asaa bolla malalisiza miishsha bolla malalisiza miish ooththashe zaara zaara istta malalissana; aadho eranchchata erateththi dhayana; akeekanchchata akeekaykka pentti baana» gides. 
Isaiah29:15 Bantta halchcho GODAAPPE genththanaas duge ciimma ollan wodhdhizaytas bantta ooso dhuman ooththizaytas «Nuna ooni be7anee? Nuna ooni eranee?» gizaytas aayye ana! 
Isaiah29:16 Intte yo7ota laammi yeggeeta; manata urqqa mala xeelleeta! Medhettidayssi medhdhidayssa, «Izi tana medhdhibeenna» gizee? Mana miishshi bana medhdhidayssa, «Izi aykkoka erenna» gizee?" 
Isaiah29:17 Libaanoosey laamettidi aradda gade gidanaas, aradda biittay laamettidi wora gidanaas guuththa wodey attides gidennee?" 
Isaiah29:18 He gallas tulley xaaththa maxaafa qaala siyana; qooqe ayfetikka shaarumappenne dhumappe shaakettidi xeellana. 
Isaiah29:19 Ashketi GODAAN, hiyeesati Isra7eele Geeshshan zaari zaari ufayettana." 
Isaiah29:20 Menxe iitati ubbay wurana; qilccizayti tim7i gaana; Iita ooththanaas zamadi uttidayti dhayana. 
Isaiah29:21 As yo7on mooranchcha kessizayti, shilotan mootettizayssa bolla woximade waaxizayti, wordo markkan tumateththa xillotappe bonqqizayti dhayana." 
Isaiah29:22 Hessa gishshas Abrahaame wozzida GODAY Yaaqoobesos, «Yaaqoobey hayssafe guye yeellatenna; iza sinththika laamettenna." 
Isaiah29:23 Bantta giddon ta kushe ooso gidida bantta nayta be7ishe ta sunththaa geeshshateththan naagana; istti Yaaqoobe Geeshshaza geeshshateth erana; Isra7eele Xoossaa sinththan yashshateththan eqqana. 
Isaiah29:24 Ayanan balidayti simmidi akeekana; zuuzumizaytikka timirte ekkana» gees. 
Isaiah30:1 GODAY, «Makkallanchcha gidida naytas aayye ana! taappe gidontta qofa kaalleettes; ta Ayanappe gidontta caaqo caaqqeettes; nagara bolla nagara gujjeettes." 
Isaiah30:2 Tana zore oychchontta Gibxe wodhdheettes; kawo Paarooney isttas gondalle gidana mala Gibxe kuwan attana koyeettes. 
Isaiah30:3 Gido attiin Paaroone gondalleteththi isttas kawushshateth gidana; Gibxe kawon ateththi istta bolla yeella ehana. 
Isaiah30:4 Istta shuumeti Xaanoosen diikkoka, istta kiittidayti Haneesen diikkoka," 
Isaiah30:5 isttas yeellateththinne kawushshateth xalla gidana attiin maado woykko wodhe isttas ehontta aykko go7akka isttas immontta asata gaason ubbayka yeellatana» gees. 
Isaiah30:6 Negeben diza medosata gishshas GODAY yootida qaalay wodalla gaammotinne macca gaammoti dizason, marzera diza shooshshatinne xongettiza shooshshati dizason, metoynne ceecey kumida biittara aadhdhi biidi, istti go7ontta deretakko," 
Isaiah30:7 izi maados mulekka go7ay baynda dere istti Gibxe baana; hessa gishshas tani izi sunththaa «Aykkoka go7onttaaro Era7aabe» ga xeygana. 
Isaiah30:8 Ha7i ba; saleedan isttas xaafa; xaaththa maxaafa bollaka cadda; hessi buroppe yaana wodetan mernaas markka gidana. 
Isaiah30:9 Hayti GODAA azazo siyana koyonttayti, makkallanchcha derenne baleththiza nayta." 
Isaiah30:10 Ajjuuta be7izayta, «Hayssafe guye ajjuuta be7opite» gaana; nabeta, «Hayssafe guye nuus tuma tinbite yootopite; nuna ufayssizaazinne miichchizaaz yootite." 
Isaiah30:11 Hayssa ogaappe kichchite; ha wogga ogaappe haakkite; Isra7eele Geeshshaara nuna tiran gaththofte» gaana. 
Isaiah30:12 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele Geeshshay, «Intte ha qaala kadhida gishshas, genen intte ammanettida gishshassinne baleththon zemppida gishshas," 
Isaiah30:13 hayssi ha nagarazi phalqetti kundananne qoppontta dishin kundiza gita gimbe mala isttas gidana. 
Isaiah30:14 Meqerettoyssa giddofe tama bonqqo kaashiza kon7ay, haaththe duuqqiza kon7ay dhayanaashe gakkanaas, aykkoyka attontta tiifettiza mana miishsha mala tiifettana» gees." 
Isaiah30:15 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, Isra7eele Geeshshay, «Intte taakko simoninne tanan shempon attana; woppaninne ammanon intte minnana; intte gidikko hessaththo ooththibeekketa." 
Isaiah30:16 Qasseka, ‹Chii! Nuni paran utti baqatana› gideta; hessa gishshas intte baqatana. Zaaridikka intte, ‹Nuni pilata paran kessi ekki baana› gideta; hessa gishshas inttena yedeththizayti pilatata gidana." 
Isaiah30:17 Intte zuma hu7en eqqida bandira mala zumbullata xeeran eqqida malata mala gidi intte attanaashe gakkanaas issi asa mandeththan 1,000 asi baqatana; ichchash asa mandeththan intte ubbay baqatana» gees." 
Isaiah30:18 Gido attiin GODAY inttes kiya ooththanaas naagees; inttena ba qadheteththa bessanaas dendees; GODAY tumu pirdiza Xoossa gidida gishshas ammanettidi iza naagizayti anjjettidayta. 
Isaiah30:19 Intteno Yerusalaamen de7iza Xiyoone derezoo! Hayssafe sinththan intte yeekkeketa; intte izakko waassishin izi inttena waani maarennee? Intte waaso izi siyidi inttes eeson zaaro immana. 
Isaiah30:20 GODAY inttes waaye kaththinne meto haath immikokka hayssafe guye intte astamaarey inttefe qotettenna; intte ayfetikka intte astamaareza be7ana. 
Isaiah30:21 Intte hadirs woykko ushach giikko intte guyera, «Ogezi hayssa; izara biite» gizayssa intte hayththi siyana." 
Isaiah30:22 Hessafe biran meeshettida intte eeqa xoossatanne worqqan meeshettida misleta intte moorana; «Nuuppe haakkite» giidi tuna carqqa mala intte wora yeggana. 
Isaiah30:23 Ne zerida kaththas izi ira immana; biittafe mokkida kaththay muurutanne daro gidana. He wode intte mehey aaho demban heemettana. 
Isaiah30:24 Goshsha booratinne hareti bakkan bukki suragettida harqqonne basso maana. 
Isaiah30:25 Asay wuriza wolqqama gallassan miixati laalettishin gita zumata ubbata bollafenne zumbullata ubbata bollafe duge haaththi goggana. 
Isaiah30:26 GODAY meqqida ba deraa koolishin, madunththidayssa paththishin, aginay arshe mala poo7ana. Arshes issi gallassa poo7oykka laappun gallassa poo7o mala gidana." 
Isaiah30:27 Be7ite, GODAA sunththay eexxiza hanqora, shaara mala dhippi gida cuwara haakoppe yaana; iza metershati hanqon kumida; iza inxarsayka xuuggiza tama mala." 
Isaiah30:28 Iza peenoykka qoodhe gakkidi meecci efiza kixa haaththa mala; kawoteththatakka dhayso zayzaren zayzarees; asaa doonan oge baleththiza bixala barssees. 
Isaiah30:29 Omars geeshsha ba7aale intte bonchchishe yexxizayssaththo intte yexxana; GODAA zumaakko Isra7eele Zaallaako asay susul7e susul7ishe ufayssan kezizayssaththo intte wozinay ufayettana. 
Isaiah30:30 GODAY eexxiza hanqoninne miza taman, gote carkoninne dadan, shachcha shuchchan, teemay kumida ba cenggurssaa asaa sissana; wodhdhishe ba qesaa izi bessana." 
Isaiah30:31 GODAA cenggurssi Asoore daganththana; iza guufeykka istta shocana. 
Isaiah30:32 GODAY istta bolla yeddiza qixaate guufe ubbay karabe giirissaninne diiththa giirissan azhabettidayssa; izi ba wolqqa olan bessidi istta shocides. 
Isaiah30:33 Beni wodeppe doommidi Toofeete geetettiza xuuggizasoy giigetti uttides; kawozasikka giigetti uttides; xuuggana gongolozikka aahonne ciimma; iza giddon daro tamaynne eexxana miththi dees; GODAA peenoy diine tama mala eeththi kessana. 
Isaiah31:1 Pude Isra7eele geeshshaako xeellonttaytas, GODAAPPE maado koyonttaytas, maado demmanaas duge Gibxe wodhdhizaytas, para-gaareta daroteththaninne ba para minoteththan ceeqettizaytas aayye ana." 
Isaiah31:2 Izi gidikko aadho eranchcha; izi bash ehana; ba qaalakka laammenna; iita ooththizayta bollanne qoho ooththizayta maaddizayta bolla izi dendana. 
Isaiah31:3 Gibxe asay asappe attiin Xoos deettenna; istta paratikka ashoppe attiin ayana gidettenna. GODAY ba kushe micciza wode iza maaddizaadey dhuphettana; maadettizaadeyka kundana; nam7ayka issife dhayana. 
Isaiah31:4 GODAY taas, «Gaammoy woykko wodalla gaammoy mehe oykkidi daro heenththanchchati xeygetti shiiqidi iza bolla yiikko istta waasoy iza yashisonttayssa istta waasoy iza daganththonttayssa mala Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY zumaa bollanne zumbullata bolla olas wodhdhana." 
Isaiah31:5 Kafoy bollara aalanththiza mala Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY Yerusalaame kammana, naagananne ashshana; izi bollara aadhdhidi izo ashshana» gees." 
Isaiah31:6 Intteno Isra7eele asazoo! Intte keehippe makkallidayssaako simmite. 
Isaiah31:7 He wode nagaray kumida intte kusheti birappenne worqqafe ooththida eeqa xoossata intte ubbayka wora yeggana. 
Isaiah31:8 «Asoorey asa mashsha gidontta mashshan hayqqana; asho may7idaade mashsha gidontta hara mashshay iza maana; izi giththa mashsha sinththafe baqatana; naateththati dosay baynda wolqqaththon ooththana. 
Isaiah31:9 Mino miixay shiro gaason kundana; ola gadawatikka ola bandira be7idi dagaman kumana» gees tamay Xiyoonen, tama coocey Yerusalaamen diza GODAY." 
Isaiah32:1 Be7ite, kawoy xilloteththan kawotana; haarizaytikka suure pirdan haarana." 
Isaiah32:2 Asi hu7en hu7en carkofe geemmizasoho, goteppeka baqati attizasoho gidana; bazzo biittan haaththa pultto mala, saamettida biittan wogga zaalla kuwa mala gidana." 
Isaiah32:3 Xeelliza asata ayfey hayssafe guye qilim7enna; siyizayta hayththi beeggidi ezgana. 
Isaiah32:4 Tapitapizayta wozinay erananne akeekana; Deddotizayta inxarsika birshettana; geeshshidikka haasayana. 
Isaiah32:5 Hayssafe guyen eeyay gita as geetettenna; wogay baynda asi bonchchettenna.
