Isaiah32:6 Eeyay eeyateth haasayees; iza wozinay iitateth yuushshi qoppees; Xoossas yashshateththi baynda miish ooththees; GODAA bolla bala qaala haasayees; gafidayssas kath immenna; saamettidayssas haath immenna. 
Isaiah32:7 Wogay baynda asata hiillateththi iita; metotanchchata maganay suure gidikkoka hiyeesata wordora dhayssanaas iitateththan yuushshi qoppees. 
Isaiah32:8 Gita asas qofaykka gita; ba gitateththa ooson minni de7ees. 
Isaiah32:9 Intteno otoroy tuccida maccassatoo! Dendite; ta gizaaz siyite; intteno badhdhi gi uttida macca naytoo! tani inttes yootizayssa ezgite. 
Isaiah32:10 Layththay buro aadhdhida mala, intte badhdhi gi uttidayti kokkorana; woyne turay ayfe immenna dumma dumma ayfe intte shiishshiza wodey yeenna." 
Isaiah32:11 Intteno otoroy tuccida maccassatoo! Kokkorite. Intteno badhdhi gida macca naytoo! Hirgan gajigajite. Intte may7ida may7o qaari yeggite; intte xeessan maaqa danccite. 
Isaiah32:12 Aradda biitta gishshas intte tiraa iccite; ayfiza woyne miththaa gishshas ceecite; 
Isaiah32:13 Ta deraa biittaa gishshas, agunththinne kindichchoy mokkida biittaa gishshas, homboceththan isttan guppiza keeththata ubbaa gishshas, homboceththan izin guppiza katamays yeekkite." 
Isaiah32:14 Miixati kayzana; daro shirotiza katamaya dimmi gaana; miixatinne qatoti mernaas gongolo, hardidati guppizasohonne wudey heemettizaso gidana." 
Isaiah32:15 Hessika hananay Ayanay nuus bollafe gukkanaashe, bazzo biittay aradda gidanaashe, aradda biittay wora misatanaashe gakkanaassa." 
Isaiah32:16 Hessafe guye bazzo biittan suure pirday de7ana; aradda biittankka xilloteththi daana. 
Isaiah32:17 Xilloteththa ayfey saroteth; xilloteththa oosoy woppanne mernaas ammaneteth gidana. 
Isaiah32:18 Ta derey saroy dizason, ammanththizason, woppay dizason woppu gi daana." 
Isaiah32:19 Shachchi woraa kurakkiko, katamaykka mulera kundiko," 
Isaiah32:20 shaafay dizason dizason kath zerizaytoo, intte booratanne hareta hirgay baynda heemmizaytoo, intte ay mala anjjettidayta gidandetii!" 
Isaiah33:1 Nees dhayontta dashe hara dhayssizayssoo! Nees aayye ana! Nena aaththi immontta dishin hara aaththa immizayssoo! Nees aayye ana! Neni dhayso aggida wode ne dhayana; neni aaththa imo aggida wode nena aaththi immana. 
Isaiah33:2 Abeet GODAWU! Nuna maara; nuni nena hidota ooththidos; maalado maalado nuus wolqqa gida; meto wodekka nuna ashshizaade gida. 
Isaiah33:3 Ne cenggurssay dada mala guummiza wode derey baqatees; neni denda eqqiza wode kawoteththati laaletteettes. 
Isaiah33:4 Kawoteththatoo! Booley shiiqiza mala inttefe di7ettidayssi shiiqana; gumbaroy guppiza mala asay iza bolla dirbbatana. 
Isaiah33:5 GODAY bolla salon de7iza gishshas, dhoqqu dhoqqu gides; izi Xiyoono suure pirdaninne xilloteththan kunththana." 
Isaiah33:6 Izi ne diza layth ubbaan ammanththiza yoch, atoteth, aadho erateththinne erateth gidana; GODAAS yashshateththi hayssa ha aqotatas qulpe gidana." 
Isaiah33:7 Be7ite, istta gooba asati ogetan waasseettes; sigateththas kiitettidaytikka camo yeeho yeekkeettes." 
Isaiah33:8 Wogga ogeti samida; ogera kanththizay deenna. Qachchida qaalay laalettides; zorizayti kadhettida; bonchchettizaykka deenna. 
Isaiah33:9 Biittaya yeekkadussinne gilqadus; Libaanoosey yeellatidi shullides; Lasharooney Arabe mala bazzo gidadus; Baasaaneynne Qarmeloosey bantta hayth qoqofida. 
Isaiah33:10 GODAY kawoteththatasi, «Ha7i tani dendana; ha7i tani bonchchettana; ha7i tani dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana." 
Isaiah33:11 Intte uttula shaaridi suulla yelideta. Intte shemppiza shemppoy inttena miza tama. 
Isaiah33:12 Derey booqintta keziza shuchcha mala taman xuugettana; qasseka agunththa tusha mala taman eexxana. 
Isaiah33:13 Intteno haakon de7izaytoo! tani ooththidayssa siyite; matan dizaytoo! Ta wolqqaa erite» gees. 
Isaiah33:14 Xiyoonen diza nagaranchchati dagammida; Xoossi isttas bayndayti babbidi, «Nu garsafe xuuggiza tamara daana dandayzay oonee? Mernaa tamara daana dandayzay oonee?» gida." 
Isaiah33:15 Xilloteththan hemettizay, suure haasayzay, baleththon beettiza wodhe kadhizay, gubbo ekkenaappe ba kushe shiishshi ekkizay, as wodhana zuppetizayta zore siyanaappe ba hayth tuccizay, iita beyanaappe ba ayfe qilim7izay," 
Isaiah33:16 Hessaadey dhoqqasohon daana; zuma miixay izas shiiqi attizaso gidana; izas qumay imettana; haaththika izas paccenna. 
Isaiah33:17 Ne ayfeti kawoza puulateth be7ana; haakon micetti diza biittaaka be7ana. 
Isaiah33:18 Beni waayey nees qofettishin neni, «Waanna halaqazi awa bidee? Giira ekkizayssi awa bidee? Shakkoza alaafezi awan dizee» gaana." 
Isaiah33:19 Heytantti qadhetay baynda asa; istta haasayay asas gelonttaytanne istta inxarsi deddotizayta; hayssafe guye intte istta beyekketa. 
Isaiah33:20 Nu ba7aaleta izin bonchchiza Xiyoone katamayo be7ite! Saron dizasohoyo, qaaxxontta dunkaane gididaaro, izi toley shodettonttaaro, izi wodorotappe issinakka duuxxonttaaro Yerusalaame katamayo ne ayfey be7ana." 
Isaiah33:21 Heen GODAY nuus wolqqa gidana; he sohoy dalga shaafanne kanchche gidana; wogoloy iza bollara baanaas dandayenna; gita markabetikka iza bollara beettenna. 
Isaiah33:22 GODAY nuus pirdiza daanna; GODAY nuus woga immizaade; GODAY nuus kawo; nuna ashshanaykka iza. 
Isaiah33:23 Ne tole wodoroy leppides; tuussay minni eqqibeenna; sharazi tolettibeenna; he wode di7ettida gita miishshi gishettana; wobbeyka attontta di7o ekkana. 
Isaiah33:24 Xiyoonen dishe, «Ta sakettadis» gaana asi deenna; heen de7iza asata nagaray atto geetettana." 
Isaiah34:1 Intteno kawoteththatoo shiiqidi siyite! Neni derezi akeeka! Biittaynne biittan diza ubbay, alameynne alameppe yida ubbay siyo!" 
Isaiah34:2 GODAY kawoteth ubbaa hanqettides; iza hanqoyka iza olanchchata ubbaa bollana. Izi istta mulera dhayssana; shukaska aaththi immana. 
Isaiah34:3 Isttafe hayqqidayti kare olettana; istta ahay xinqqana. Zumati suuth xalla gidana. 
Isaiah34:4 Salo xoolintteti ubbay seerana; saloy galba mala xaaxettana; cora xoolintteti ubbay, shullidi qoqofettiza woyne hayththa malanne melidi sa7an wodhiza balase hayththa mala gidana." 
Isaiah34:5 Ta giththa mashshay salota giddon baas gidana gakkanaas uyadus; be7ite; Eedoome bolla, tani qanggida asaa bolla pirdanaas wodhdhadus." 
Isaiah34:6 GODAA giththa mashshay suuth may7adus; modhdhoka kalladus; dorsa laaqqa suuththaninne deysha suuththan goozettadus; dharsho kilaho moodhen goozettadus; GODAY Booxira kataman yarsho, Eedoomen wolqqama shuka giigsida gishshassa." 
Isaiah34:7 Qasse Isttara menththi, kormay wofanora issife kundana; biittaya suuththan caphana; istta biittay modhdhon araddana." 
Isaiah34:8 Hessika GODAY halo kessiza gallassinne Xiyoone gishshas morkketa oliza layth gidana. 
Isaiah34:9 Eedoome kanchcheti shida gidana; izi biittay xuugettiza diine gidana; izi biittay shida mala eexxana. 
Isaiah34:10 Izo miza tamay qammanne gallas to7enna; cuwaykka mernaas tullu gaana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas kays gidana. Oonikka nam7anththo heera aadhdhenna. 
Isaiah34:11 Xiloynne quxarsi izo laattana; guttoynne quuroy izin keeth keexxana; Xoossi Eedoome bolla izo laallana wodoronne izo dhayssana tumbe yeddana. 
Isaiah34:12 Izi daannati kawo geetetti xeygettanaas dandayza miishshi deenna; izi halaqati mulera pitetti dhayana. 
Isaiah34:13 Gimbetti yuuyida katamata, izi miixata doyoynne okkay laattana; worakanata ollanne guttota duussaso gidana." 
Isaiah34:14 Bazzo do7ati godaretara issife daana; bazzo deysh misatiza daydanththati bantta giddon xeygettana; omarsa medhetati heen shemppana; banttas duussaso heen demmana. 
Isaiah34:15 Guttoy he keeththan phuuphphulleta yeggana; zaaradakka phuqissana; ba ciyetakka haphphana; woleti waaththan waaththan heen shiiqana. 
Isaiah34:16 GODAA maxaafan xeellite; nababite. Haytappe issoyka paccenna; issoy issoy baas waaththa lagge dhayenna; hayssi ha azazozi iza doonappe kezides; iza ayanay istta issi bolla shiishshana. 
Isaiah34:17 Istta gisha gisha isttas woththana; iza kushey meezaanen meezaanen gishana; iza mernaas isttas gidana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas istti izin de7ana. 
Isaiah35:1 Bazzoynne mela biittay ufayettana; aykkoy baynda bazzoy ufayettana; ciishsha malakka ciiyana. 
Isaiah35:2 Izi daro ufayettananne miiccana; Libaanoose bonchchoy izas imettana; Qarmeloosenne Lasharoone teema izi may7ana; nu GODAA bonchchonne Xoossaa gitateththaa istti be7ana. 
Isaiah35:3 Daaburda qeseta minththite; argacida gulbatata minththite. 
Isaiah35:4 Wozinan yashshay dizayta «Minnite! Yayyofte! Intte Xoossi yiidi halo kessana; izi inttena ashshanaasinne halo kessanaas yaana» giite. 
Isaiah35:5 He wode qooqeta ayfey xeellana; tulleta hayththi siyana. 
Isaiah35:6 Wobbey genessa mala guppana; duude doonay ufayssan yexxana; bazzofe haaththi kezana; pulttoy bazzo biittafe pulttana. 
Isaiah35:7 Xuuggiza biittan eele haaththi kumana; mela biittati haath pulttana; worakanati aqiza ollan maatay, maqqaynne shaccay mokkana." 
Isaiah35:8 Heen wogga ogey oosettana; izikka, «Geeshshateththa Oge» geetettana. Tunati he ogera beettenna; ogezi he ogera bizaytas xalla gidana; geellati he ogaara baana dandayettenna." 
Isaiah35:9 Heen gaammoy de7enna; dafi miza do7aykka izan kezenna; heytantti heen beettettenna; wozzettidayti xalla heera baana. 
Isaiah35:10 GODAY maaddidayti simmana; istti yexxishe Xiyoone gelana; mernaa ufayssa kallachcha mala goxxana; injjenne ufays demmana; ceeceynne kayoy heeppe baqatana. 
Isaiah36:1 Kawo Hizqiyaasi kawotida tammanne oydanththo layththan, Asoore kawo Senakireemey gimbettida Yuhuda katamata ubbaa oli oykkides." 
Isaiah36:2 Asoore kawoy Laakishe geetettiza katamappe ola gadawa cora olanchchatara kawo Hizqiyaasakko Yerusalaame yeddides. Ola gadawazi May7o meeccizaadeza gadekko efiza ogeppe qommo baggara diza eele haaththaako iza zara lanqen eqqides. 
Isaiah36:3 Kawo keeth ayssiza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey, xaafezi Sheebinaynne taarike xaafezi Aasaafe naa Yo7aahii izakko kare kezida." 
Isaiah36:4 Ola gadawazi isttas, «Hizqiyaasasi, ‹Wolqqama Asoore kawo, neni hayssa mala ne ammanettiday aazanee?" 
Isaiah36:5 Neni ola erateththinne mino olanchchati taas deettes gaasa; gido attiin neni go7ay baynda qaala xalla haasayaasa; histtiin ne oonan ammanettada ta bolla makkallay? 
Isaiah36:6 Hekko neni asi iza oykki darttiin meqqidi madunththiza maqqa misatiza Gibxen ammanettadasa; Gibxe kawo Paarooneykka izan ammanettiza ubbaas hessa mala.› 
Isaiah36:7 «Neni taas, ‹Nuni GODAAN, nu Xoossan ammanettoos› giikko, izas goynniza dhoqqasohotanne yarshosohota Hizqiyaasi laallidi Yuhuda asaanne Yerusalaame asaa, ‹Intte goynnanaas bessizay hayssa mala issi yarshoson xalla gidanaas bessees› gibeennee?" 
Isaiah36:8 «Ane ha7i haa yaada ta godaa Asoore kawora giigana mala haasaya; nees toga dandayza asati diikko 2,000 parata tani nees immana." 
Isaiah36:9 Neni Gibxe para-gaaretaninne toganchchatan ammanettizaa gidikko ta godaa olanchchatappe issi laafa butteza ne wostta zaaranee? 
Isaiah36:10 Qasse hayssa biitta dhayssanaas GODAA azazoy baynda ta yidaa nees misatizee? GODAY ba hu7era hayssa deraa tani ola dhayssana mala taas yootides» gides. 
Isaiah36:11 Elyaaqeemey, Sheebinaynne Yo7aahi ola gadawaza, «Nu eriza Aaraame qaalara nuus ne aylletas yoota; gimbeza bolla diza derezi eriza, Ibraaweta qaalan nuus yootoppa» gida." 
Isaiah36:12 Gido attiin ola gadawazi zaaridi, «Ta goday tana kiitti yeddiday hayta ha yo7ota ne godaassinne nees xalla yootanaassee? Intte mala bantta shiya maanaassinne bantta sheesh uyanaas gimbe bolla uttida asaassara yootana mala gidennee?» gides." 
Isaiah36:13 Hessafe guye ola gadawazi Ibraaweta qaalara ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi, «Wogga wolqqama Asoore kawo qaala siyite!" 
Isaiah36:14 Kawozi, ‹Hizqiyaasi inttena cimmofo; izi inttena ashshana dandayenna." 
Isaiah36:15 GODAY tuma nuna ashshana; ha katamayakka Asoore kawos imettuku› giidi intte GODAAN ammanettana mala ooththofo» gides. 
Isaiah36:16 «Hizqiyaasi gizayssa siyopite. Asoore kawoy inttena, ‹Tanara sigettite; haa taakko kezite. Hessafe guye intte ubbayka intte woyneppenne intte balaseppe maandeta; intte bookkida ollafe haath uyandeta." 
Isaiah36:17 Hessa intte hananay tani yaada inttena intte biitta misatiza dere denththa efana gakkanaassa. He biittay kaththinne woyne ushshi, kaththa biittanne woyne atakiltey kumida biitta› gees." 
Isaiah36:18 «Hizqiyaasi, ‹GODAY nuna ashshana› giidi inttena cimmofo. Hanno gakkanaas kawoteththata xoossatappe ba deraa Asoore kawo kusheppe ashshida xoossi dizee?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamaate xoossatinne Arfaade xoossati awan dizoo? Sefarwayme xoossati awan dizoo? Hayti Samaariya ta kusheppe ashshidoo? 
Isaiah36:20 Hayta ha dereta xoossata ubbaafe ba deraa ta kusheppe ashshana dandayday awayssee? Histtiin GODAY Yerusalaame ta kusheppe wostti ashshana dandayzee?» gides. 
Isaiah36:21 Gido attiin kawozi isttas, «Izas aykkoka zaaropite» gi azazida gishshas asay issi qaalakka qaattontta co7u gides." 
Isaiah36:22 Hessafe guye kawo keeth ayssiza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey, xaafe Sheebinaynne taarike xaafezi Aasaafe naa Yo7aahi bantta may7o daakkidi Hizqiyaasakko bida; histtidi Asooreta ola gadaway gidayssa ubbaa izas yootida." 
Isaiah37:1 Kawo Hizqiyaasi hessa siyida mala ba may7o daakkides; hessafe guye maaqa may7idi GODAA Keeth gelides. 
Isaiah37:2 Kawo keeth ayssiza Elyaaqeemey, xaafe Sheebinaynne qeesetappe erettidayti ubbay maaqa may7idi Amoxe naa nabe Isayaasakko baana mala kiittides." 
Isaiah37:3 Isttika Isayaasas biidi, «Hizqiyaasi, ‹Ha gallassay ceece, qixaatenne kawushshateththa gallassa; hessika nay yelettana hanishin abbey ixxiza gallassa mala gidides." 
Isaiah37:4 De7o Xoossaa cayana mala iza godaa Asoore kawoy kiittida ola gadawa qaala GODAA ne Xoossay siyontta aggenna. Qasse GODAA ne Xoossay he siyida qaalaa gaason iza qaxxayontta aggenna. Hessa gishshas neni shemppora paxa attida cashata gishshas woossa› gees» gida. 
Isaiah37:5 Kawo Hizqiyaasi kiittidayti Isayaasakko yida wode," 
Isaiah37:6 Isayaasi isttas zaaridi, «Intte godaassi biidi, ‹GODAY nena, Asoore kawo ashkarati tana cayishin neni siyida cashsha qaalaas hirgofa." 
Isaiah37:7 Beya, ta iza bolla ayana kiittana; izi wore siyidi ba dere simmi baana; heen ba deren mashshan hayqqana mala ta ooththana› giite» gides." 
Isaiah37:8 Asoore kawoy Laakishe katamappe dendi bidayssa ola gadawazi siyidi guye simmides. Histtidi kawozi Libina katama olishin demmides. 
Isaiah37:9 Kawo Senakireemey, Tophphiya Kawo Tiraaqey iza olana yizayssa siyides; hessa siyida mala Hizqiyaasas kiita yeddidi," 
Isaiah37:10 «Yuhuda Kawo Hizqiyaasas, ‹Yerusalaamey Asoore kawo kushen gelenna› giin ne ammanettida Xoossi nena cimmofo." 
Isaiah37:11 Hekko Asoore kawoti biitta ubbaa bolla istti ooththidayssanne mulera istta dhayssidayssa ne siyadasa. Histtiin ne kessa ekka attana misatizee? 
Isaiah37:12 Kase ta aawati dhayssida Gozaanen, Kaaraaneninne Erafesen hessaththoka Talasaaren de7iza Edene asaa istta xoossati he biittata ashshidoo?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamaate kawoy, Arfaade kawoy, Sefarwayme kawoy, Heena kawoynne Iwa kawoy awan dizoo?» gides." 
Isaiah37:14 Hizqiyaasi dabdaabbeza kiitettida asatappe ekkidi nababides. GODAA Keeth ekki efidi GODAA sinththan miccides. 
Isaiah37:15 Histtidi GODAA woossishe," 
Isaiah37:16 «Abeet GODAWU, Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu, kirubetappe giddon uttiza Isra7eele Xoossawu, sa7aa kawoteththata ubbaa bolla ne xalla Xoossaa. Salonne sa7a neni medhdhadasa." 
Isaiah37:17 Abeet GODAWU, ne hayth haa yeggada ezga. Abeet GODAWU, ne ayfe pogada haa xeella. Nena De7o Xoossaa cayanaas Senakireemey kiittida qaala siya." 
Isaiah37:18 «Abeet GODAWU tumakka, Asoore kawoti ha kawoteththatanne istta biitta ubbaa bazzo kessida." 
Isaiah37:19 Istta xoossata taman xuuggida; istta xoossati wonikka miththafenne shuchchafe asa kushen masetti kezida misleppe attiin xoossata gidettenna. 
Isaiah37:20 Ha7ikka abeet GODAWU, nu Xoossawu neni GODAY xalla Xoossa gididayssa sa7a kawoteththati ubbay erana mala nuna iza kusheppe ashsha!» gi woossides." 
Isaiah37:21 Hessafe guye Amoxe naa Isayaasi kawo Hizqiyaasasi, «GODAY Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Neni Asoore Kawo Senakireemey mandida mandeththa gishshas woossida woosaa ta siyadis› gees." 
Isaiah37:22 «GODAY Senakireeme gishshas yootida qaalay, «Geela7oya Xiyoone naya nena kadhadussinne leqqadus. Yerusalaame naya ne baqatishin be7ada ba qoodhe qaaththadus." 
Isaiah37:23 Ne oona cayaynne kawushshay? Oona bolla ne qaala dhoqqu histta haasayay? Otoro ayfen oona xeellay? Isra7eele Geeshshaa bolla gidennee! 
Isaiah37:24 Neni kiittida asata baggara Godaa bolla daro cashsha qaala haasayadasa. Qasseka, ‹Tani cora para-gaaretan zumata kaara, Libaanoose hu7e kezadis. Histtada adussa zigatanne ubbaafe lo7iza xiiddata qanxxadis. Tani keehi dhoqqasohotaninne keehi kayshiza woran gakkadis." 
Isaiah37:25 Tani allaga biittatan haaththa ollata bookkadis, isttafekka haath uyadis. Gibxe biittan diza pultto haaththata ubbaa ta tohon yedhdha melissadis› gadasa." 
Isaiah37:26 «Tani daro wodeppe kase qachchidayssa, ta beni halchchidayssa ne siyabeekkii? Ha7i gidikko polettana mala ooththadis; nenikka gimbettida katamata laallada shuchcha doore kessana." 
Isaiah37:27 Istta deraas wolqqay ixxides; isttika dagammidanne kawuyida. Istti gaden diza doozata mala, mul7o caarechchata mala, keeththa kaaran mokkida maata malanne kessontta qooyda kaththa mala gidida." 
Isaiah37:28 «Gido attiin neni uttizaso, ne ayde yaada ayde baanaakko, ne ta bolla waana hanqon dendanaakko ta erays." 
Isaiah37:29 Neni ta bolla hanqon dendettida gishshassinne, ne hallacizayssi ta hayththan wodhdhida gishshas, tani ne siidhen dafo aaththana; ne doonankka bixala barsana; ne yida ogerakka ta nena guye zaara yeddana» gides." 
Isaiah37:30 «Hessafe guye Isayaasi kawo Hizqiyaasas, hayssi nees malata gido; ha layth intte azabba mokkida kath maana; yiza layththika azabbaafe wodhdhi mokkidaaz maana. Gido attiin heedzdzanththo layth intte zerananne maxana; woyne tokkananne iza ayfekka shiishshana." 
Isaiah37:31 Yuhudappe attida cashati xapho duge yeddidi bollan ayfe ayfana. 
Isaiah37:32 Attida cashati Yerusalaameppe, shemppora paxa attidayti Xiyooneppe kezana. Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA zil7eteththi hessa ooththana." 
Isaiah37:33 «Asoore kawo gishshas GODAY, ‹Asoore kawoy ha katamaa gelenna; izi bolla ba wondafe dukkenna; izi bolla ba gondalle oykkidi yeenna; qasse katamaa yuushon biitta dooren gordenna." 
Isaiah37:34 Ba yida ogera guye simmana; izi ha katamayo gelenna› gees. 
Isaiah37:35 Tani ta bonchcho gishshassinne ta ashkara Dawite gishshas, ha katamayo kamma ashshana» gides." 
Isaiah37:36 He gallassa omarsi GODAA kiitanchchay ke7idi, Asoore asay dunkkaani dizason, 185,000 attumasata wodhides. Histtiin asay maalado suuridi be7iza wode hayqqida asaa ahay heen kumides." 
Isaiah37:37 Hessa gishshas Asoore Kawo Senakireemey kessi ekkides; guye simmi biidikka Nannawe kataman uttides. 
Isaiah37:38 Sanaakireemi ba xoossaa Nisraake keeththan goynnishe de7ishin, iza nayti Adiramelekeynne Sarsarey mashshan iza wodhida. Histtidi Araraate biitta baqatida. Iza naa Aseradooney izasohon kawotides." 
Isaiah38:1 He wode Kawo Hizqiyaasi hargidi, hayqqana matides. Histtiin Amoxe naa nabe Isayaasi izakko biidi, «GODAY nena, ‹Neni hayqqanaappe attiin hargezappe paxakka; hessa gishshas ne keeththaa giigsa› gees» gides." 
Isaiah38:2 Histtiin Hizqiyaasi keeththa godaakko simmidi GODAA woossides. 
Isaiah38:3 Woossishe, «Abeet GODAWU, tani ne sinththan ammaneteththaninne kumeththa wozinappe nena ufayssiza miish ooththashe ta waana de7idaakko neni akeekana mala tani nena woossays» gi woossides; Hizqiyaasikka keehi camo yeeho yeekkides." 
Isaiah38:4 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay Isayaasakko yides. 
Isaiah38:5 Histtidi, «Neni baada Hizqiyaasa, ‹GODAY ne aawaa Dawite Xoossay, Tani ne woosaa siyadis; ne afunththaaka be7adis. Ne layththa bolla tani nees tammanne ichchashu layth gujjana." 
Isaiah38:6 Nenanne ha katamayo Asoore biitta kawoza kusheppe ashshana; tani ha katamay bolla yizayssa teqqana› gees» gides. 
Isaiah38:7 Isayaasi gujjidikka, «GODAY nees gida qaala polanayssas malatay hayssafe kaallizayssa;" 
Isaiah38:8 beya, Akaazey pude ke7anaas giigsida kechchata bolla wodhdhiza awa kuway tammu kech guye simmi baana mala tani ooththana» gides. Histtiin kuway tammu kech guye simmidi bides." 
Isaiah38:9 Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasi hargi paxidaappe guyen xaafida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Isaiah38:10 tani, «Ta de7o layththas buron bagga gakkiza wode, hayqo pengera gelana bessizee? Taas attida layththay taappe bonqqettanaas bessizee?» gadis." 
Isaiah38:11 Qasseka, «Tani shemppora paxa de7izayta biittan nena GODAA zaara be7ikke; hayssafe guyen ta asa zereth be7ikke; ha sa7an de7izayta giddonkka de7ikke." 
Isaiah38:12 Ta keeththi heenththanchchata dunkaane mala shodettides; taappeka ekettides; Shemmaaney afala wondiraashen xaaxiza mala, tani ta de7o xaaxadis; izikka tana wondiraasheppe duuththides. Malladoppe omars gakkanaas, neni tana dhayssanaas eesotadasa." 
Isaiah38:13 Sa7ay wonttana gakkanaas tani nena dandayan naagadis; Gido attiin gaammo mala ta meqeththaa ubbaa menththereththides. Qasse maaladoppe omarsi gakkanaas neni tana dhayssanaas eesotadasa. 
Isaiah38:14 Tani cirashanne haaththa kafo mala waassadis; haraphphe malakka guugumadis. Ta ayfeti pude salo xeellidi daaburda. Abeet Godawu, tani un7ettadis; neni tana hannife kessa!» gadis." 
Isaiah38:15 Histtiin ta ay gaanee? Izi ba hu7era taas yootides; qasseka ba hu7era hayssa ooththides; Ta shemppoya keehippe ceecida gishshas, ta de7o layth ubbaan ashketeththan baana." 
Isaiah38:16 Abeet Godawu heytantta mala yo7otan asay paxa dees. Ta ayanaykka heytanttan de7o demmana. Ne tana paththadasa, tana shemppora paxa woththadasa!" 
Isaiah38:17 Hekko ta meton ceecidayssi taas go7as gidides. Neni ta shemppo bashsha ollafe ne siiqon naagadasa; neni ta nagara ubbaa neeppe guye zaarada oladasa. 
Isaiah38:18 Duufoy nena galatenna; hayqoykka nena sabbenna. Duge ollan wodhdhizayti ne ammaneteth hidota oosettenna. 
Isaiah38:19 Tani hach nena galatizayssa mala shemppora paxa de7izayti xalla nena galatana; ne ammaneteththa gishshas aawati ba naytas yooteettes. 
Isaiah38:20 GODAY tana ashshana; hessa gishshas nuni nu de7iza layththata ubbaan, GODAA keeththan waaxettida diiththan yexxana." 
Isaiah38:21 Isayaasi kase, «Balase miththa ayfe daaxxidi, iza kixaa bolla woththite. Histtiko izi paxana» gi woththides." 
Isaiah38:22 Hizqiyaasikka, «Tani paxada GODAA Keeth pude kezanayssas malatay aazee?» giidi Isayaasa oychchi woththides." 
Isaiah39:1 He wode Baabiloone kawoy Balidaane naa, Marodoke-Baldaaney Hizqiyaasi hargi paxida gishshas dabdaabbenne imota izas yeddides." 
Isaiah39:2 Hizqiyaasi kiitettidayta ufayssan mokki ekkides; histtidi kawo minjja keeththan diza biraa, worqqaa, dumma dumma sawota, doorettida zayte, qasse ola miishshaa, izas diza miish ubbaa issinokka ashshontta dishe bessides. Iza minjja keeththan diza miish gidiin iza kawoteththa garsan diza miish ubbaa bessontta ashshida miishshi deenna." 
Isaiah39:3 Hessafe guye nabe Isayaasi kawo Hizqiyaasakko yiidi, «Ha asati nena ay gidoo? Istti neekko awappe yidoo?» gi oychchides. Hizqiyaasikka zaaridi izas, «Ha asati taakko haako biittafe Baabilooneppe yida» gides." 
Isaiah39:4 Isayaasi qasseka, «Ne kawoteththa keeththafe ay be7idoo?» gides. Hizqiyaasi, «Ta kawoteththa keeththan diza ubbaa be7ida; ta bessontta ashshida issi miishshika deenna» gides." 
Isaiah39:5 Hessafe guye Isayaasi Hizqiyaasas, «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY gizayssa siya;" 
Isaiah39:6 ‹Ne kawoteththa keeththan diza ubbay, kase ne aawati hach gakkanaas shiishshida ubbay di7ettidi Baabiloone baana wodey yaana; issinokka ashshontta maxi efiza wodey yaana› gees GODAY." 
Isaiah39:7 Neeppe yelettidaytinne ne zereththafe yelettidayti di7etti biidi Baabiloone kawo keeththan gundula gididi ooththana» gides. 
Isaiah39:8 Hizqiyaasi zaaridi, «Neni yootida GODAA qaalay lo7o» gides. Hizqiyaasi, «Tani de7ida layththan taas saronne woppa gido» gi qoppida gishshassa." 
Isaiah40:1 Intte Xoossay, «Minththeththite! Ta dereza minththeththite!" 
Isaiah40:2 Yerusalaameskka shugo qaalara yootite; izis awajjite; iza aylleteththan ooththiza wodey wurides; izi nagara waagay cigettides; iza ba nagara ubbaa gishshas GODAAPPE nam7u kushe qixaate ekkadus» gees. 
Isaiah40:3 Awajja yootizaade cenggurssi, «Bazzon GODAA oge giigsite; nu Xoossaas Aaraba bazzon aako oge giigsite." 
Isaiah40:4 Shoobbay ubbay pude dhoqqu gaana; zumaynne zumbullay ziqqi gaana; kundukurcco biittay issi gina gidana; kurppoti demba gidana. 
Isaiah40:5 He wode GODAA bonchchoy qonccana; asho may7ida ubbay hessa issife be7ana. GODAA doonay hessa haasaydes» gees. 
Isaiah40:6 Cenggurssi tana, «Waassa!» gides. Tanikka, «Ay ga waassoo?» gadis. Izikka, «Asi ubbay maata mala; iza bonchcho ubbayka demba ciishsha mala." 
Isaiah40:7 GODAY ba shempo iza bollan shempishin maatay melees; ciishshika qokkees; tumappe derey maata mala. 
Isaiah40:8 Maatay melees; ciishshayka qokkees; gido attiin nu Xoossaa qaalay mernaas minni dees» gaada waassa gides. 
Isaiah40:9 Nenoo mishiraachcho Xiyoones yootizaysso, dhoqqa zuma bolla keza; nenoo mishiraachcho Yerusalaames yootizaysso, ne cenggurssaa dhoqqu histta waassa; dhoqqu histta, babbofa; Yuhuda katamatas, «Hekko intte Xoossaa» gaada yoota." 
Isaiah40:10 Hekko Ubbaa Haariza GODAY wolqqara yees; iza qesey iza gishshas haarana. Be7ite iza woytoy izara dees; izi ciggana ooso waagaykka izara dees. 
Isaiah40:11 Izi ba wude heenththanchcha mala heemmees; ba laaqqatakka ba qesen tookkees; ba ki7onkka idimmees; dhanththizaytakka loddara kaaleththees. 
Isaiah40:12 Haaththata ba kushe kuphphen makkiday, salota tadhdhakiday, baana daachchon makki oykkiday, zumata ba meezaanen, zumbullatakka meezaanen woththiday oonee?" 
Isaiah40:13 GODAA Ayana shaakki eriday, iza zorizaade gidi tamaarsiday oonee?" 
Isaiah40:14 Erateth demmanaas GODAY oona zore oychchidee? Suure oge iza tamaarsiday oonee? Erateth iza tamaarsiday, akeeka ogekka iza bessiday oonee?" 
Isaiah40:15 Be7ite kawoteththati gombo giddon xokkida haaththa mala; istti meezaane bolla diza gudulla mala qoodetteettes; harurota liiqo biitta mala geeddarees. 
Isaiah40:16 Libaanoosey yarshosoho tamas gidukku; izi medosata qoodaykka xuugettiza yarshos guuththa. 
Isaiah40:17 Kawoteththati ubbay iza sinththan aykkoka gidettenna; istti aykkorakka gakki qoodettontta hada miishsha mala. 
Isaiah40:18 Histtiin intte Xoossaa oonara giniseetii? Ay mislera gaththi giniseetii? 
Isaiah40:19 Eeqa misley gidikko hiilla kushen masettides; hessa worqqa ooththizaadey bollara worqqan meeshees; bira sansalatakka izas giigssees. 
Isaiah40:20 Hessa mala yarsho shiishshanaas dandayontta manqo asi musontta mith doorees; kundontta misle essanaas erettida hiilla koyees. 
Isaiah40:21 Intte hessa erekketii? Woykko siyibeekketii? Beni beni inttes yootettibeennee? Sa7ay medhettoosofe doommiin intte akeekibeekketii? 
Isaiah40:22 Izi biitta yuushoppe bollara ba araatan uttees; biitta bolla diza derey boole mala; salota magalasha mala miccees; duussaso dunkaane mala tokkees. 
Isaiah40:23 Halaqata hada histtana; ha biittaa ayssizaytakka pitti dhayssees. 
Isaiah40:24 Istti tokettidi gam7ontta dishin, zerettidi takkontta dishin, buro xapho yeddontta dishin istta bolla carko yeddiin melida; gotey istta suulla mala pitti efides." 
Isaiah40:25 Geeshshazi isttas, «Tana oonara giniseetii? Tanara ginattizay oonee?» gees." 
Isaiah40:26 Intte ayfe dhoqqu histtidi pude salo xeellite; haytantta ubbaa medhdhiday oonee? Salo xoolintteta issaa issaa kessizay, istta sunththan sunththan xeygizay iza. Izi ba gitateththaninne ba erateththa minoteththaafe dendidayssan isttafe issoyka dhayenna." 
Isaiah40:27 Yaaqoobe ne ays hessaththo gay? Isra7eele ne ays hessaththo haasayay? «Ta ogey GODAAPPE geemmides; ta pirday Xoossa achchan wudu geetettibeenna» ays gay? 
Isaiah40:28 Ne erabeekkii? Ne siyabeekkii? GODAY mernaa Xoossa; izi biittaa ubbaaka medhdhidayssa. Izi daaburenna; azallenna; iza akeekaykka oonankka pilggettenna. 
Isaiah40:29 Minoteththi bayndaades minoteth immees; Daaburdayssas wolqqa gujjees. 
Isaiah40:30 Yelagatikka daabureettessinne azalleettes; naateththatikka dhuphettidi kundeettes; 
Isaiah40:31 Gido attiin GODAA hidota ooththizayti bantta wolqqa ooraxisseettes; istti golle mala piradhdhana; istti daaburontta woxxana; istti baana; argacettenna. 
Isaiah41:1 GODAY, «Intteno harurotoo, co7u giite; kawoteththati ba wolqqa ooraththetto; shiiqidi haasayetto; ane pirda shilota sinththan gayttoos." 
Isaiah41:2 Arshey mokkiza baggafe issaa denththiday, xilloteththan baas haggazissana xeygiday oonee? Izi kawoteththata izas aaththi immees; izi istta giththa mashshan biitta kessides; ba wondafen carkoy laallida suulla mala kessides." 
Isaiah41:3 Istta gooddi yeddidi metoy baynda aadhdhi bides; iza tohoy kase yedhdhontta ogera hemettides; 
Isaiah41:4 Hayssa ooththidaynne poliday yeletaa beniisofe xeygiday oonee? GODAY koyroytarakka wurseththaytarakka dizay tana» gees. 
Isaiah41:5 Haruroti be7idi yayyida; sa7a gaxatikka kokkorida; issi bolla shiiqidi sinth yida. 
Isaiah41:6 Issoy issaara maadettees; ba ishaakka, «Aykkoy baa minna» gees." 
Isaiah41:7 Hiillanchchay worqqa ooththizayssa minththeththees; naariqan qoxxi le7issizaadey birata marcon seerisizayssa minththeththees; birata seerisi oyseththoy, «Lo7o» gees; eeqa xoossaa misley kundontta mala misimaaren torggees." 
Isaiah41:8 GODAY, «Gido attiin nenoo ta ashkara Isra7eele, ta doorida Yaaqoobe, ta laggeza Abrahaame zereththazoo," 
Isaiah41:9 tani nena biitta gaxappe ehidayssoo, saloy danxxoosoppe xeygidayssoo, ‹Ta nena ta ayllezoo› gidayssoo ta nena dooradis attiin olaagabeekke." 
Isaiah41:10 Tani nenara diza gishshas yayyofa; tani ne Xoossa gidida gishshas dagammofa. Tani nena minththananne maaddana. Ta xilloteththa ushachcha kushen zemppisa oykkana. 
Isaiah41:11 «Be7a ne bolla hanqettida ubbay keehi yeellatananne kawuyana; nenara eqettizayti tim7i gi dhayana. 
Isaiah41:12 Neni ne morkketakka koyadakka demmaka; nena olizayti pitetti dhayana. 
Isaiah41:13 Gaasoykka tani GODAA ne Xoossay, ta nena maaddana; yayyofa ta ne ushachcha kusheza oykkana." 
Isaiah41:14 Nenoo guxunezoo Yaaqoobe, nenoo qeeri Isra7eele, ‹Yayyofa tani nena maaddana› gees. Nena wozzizay Isra7eele Geeshshaza." 
Isaiah41:15 Be7a tani nena oorath, qaranne achchara diza kath bukkiza loda ooththana; neni zumata goya liiqisana; zumbullatakka yedhdha happa kessana." 
Isaiah41:16 Neni istta suraggana; carkoy istta pitti efana; goteykka istta laallana. Gido attiin neni GODAAN ufayettana; qasse Isra7eele Geeshshan bonchchettana. 
Isaiah41:17 Hiyeesatinne metotanchchati haath koyana; gido attiin aykkoka demmettenna; haaththa saamon isttas poorandey melides; Gido attiin tani GODAY isttas zaaro immana; tani Isra7eele Xoossay istta yegga aggike. 
Isaiah41:18 Tani bulattida zumbullata bolla shaafata, shoobbatan pulttota dhuussana; bazzo biitta eele haath, saamettida biittaan haaththa pultto kessana." 
Isaiah41:19 Bazzo biittan ziga, odoro, barseneetenne, wogara mith moyzana; aykkoy baynda bazzon xiidda, guunththanne oonth tokkana." 
Isaiah41:20 Hessa gishshas asay hessa be7ananne erana; GODAA kushey hayssa ooththidayssa, Isra7eele Geeshshay medhdhidayssa istti issife yuushshi qoppananne akeekana» gees." 
Isaiah41:21 GODAY, «Ane intte mooto ekkidi haa shiiqite» gees. Yaaqoobe Kawoy, «Ane intte mooto daafaa haa ehite» gees." 
Isaiah41:22 Buroppe hananayssa yootana mala intte eeqa xoossata haa ehite; nu akeekana malanne istta wurseththaaka erana mala kase yo7oti aazakko nuus yootite; buroppe hanana miishshata erite. 
Isaiah41:23 Intte xoossata gididayssa nu erana mala, sinththafe hanana miishshata nuus yootite; nuni dagammana malanne yayyana mala, lo7o gidiin woykko iita miish ooththite." 
Isaiah41:24 Hekko intte aykko qoodan gelonttayta; intte oosoy mulekka hada; inttena dooridayti harassizayta. 
Isaiah41:25 «Tani pudeha baggafe issaa denththadis; izikka yees. Arshey mokkiza baggara yizayssi ta sunththaa xeygizayssa; manay urqqa yedhdhiza mala izi kaaleththizaytakka yedhdhees. 
Isaiah41:26 Nuni erana mala koyrotti nuus awajjiday, ‹Izi likke› nu gaana mala nuus kaseti yootiday oonee? Oonikka yootibeenna; sinththatidi yootiday deenna; inttefe ay qaala siyidaykka deenna." 
Isaiah41:27 Koyrottada, ‹Hekko tani be7adis› gaada Xiyoones awajjiday tana; Yerusalaames mishiraachcho yootizaade immadis." 
Isaiah41:28 Tani xeelliza wode oonikka deenna; istta giddon zoranchchay baawa; ta oychchida wode zaaro immizaykka deenna. 
Isaiah41:29 Be7ite istti ubbayka hada; istta oososka go7ay deenna; istta misletikka aykkoy baynda carko mala» gees. 
Isaiah42:1 GODAY, «Tani kaafa oykkida ta ashkaray, ta izan ufayettiza muurutay hayssa; tani ta Ayana iza bolla woththadis; izi kawoteththatas suure pirda ehana." 
Isaiah42:2 Waassenna; ba qaala dhoqqisenna; ba cenggurssaaka oge bolla keehi sissenna. 
Isaiah42:3 Dinccettida maqqa izi menththenna; cuwattiza muqaadda izi toyssenna; ammaneteththan izi suure pirda ehana. 
Isaiah42:4 Izi biitta bolla suure pirda ehana gakkanaas daaburenna; hidotakka qanxxenna; haruroti iza wogan ammanettana» gees. 
Isaiah42:5 Salota medhdhiday, istta miccidaykka, sa7anne izin diza ubbaa giigsiday, ba deres peeno izin de7iza asatas shemppo immiza GODAA Xoossay," 
Isaiah42:6 «Tani GODAY nena xilloteththan xeygadis; ta ne kushe oykkana; ta nena naagana. Tani nena kawoteththaas caaqo qaala, ayzaabetaska poo7o histtana" 
Isaiah42:7 Ne qooqeta ayfe doy7ana; di7ettidayta qasho keeththafe birshana; dhuman uttidaytakka karchchallefe kessana. 
Isaiah42:8 «Tani GODAA; hayssi ta sunththa; ta bonchcho haras aaththa immike; ta galataakka eeqa xoossatas sheedhdhike. 
Isaiah42:9 Be7ite beni yo7oti polettida; ha7i tani ooraththa miish awajjays; izi mokkanaappe sinth ta inttes yootays» gees. 
Isaiah42:10 Intteno duge abban wodhdhizaytoo, heen diza ubbatoo! Intteno harurotoo! Heenkka diza ubbatoo! GODAASSI ooraththa mazamure yexxite; biittaa gaxaappe doommidi izas galata mazamure shiishshite." 
Isaiah42:11 Bazzoynne katamati bantta cenggurssaa dhoqqu histtetto; Qeedaarey de7iza gutay ufayetto; Seela dere asati ufayssan yexetto; zuma xeerankka ililetto. 
Isaiah42:12 Istti bonchcho GODAAS immetto; iza galataykka harurotan awajjetto. 
Isaiah42:13 GODAY ola qara mala kezana; olanchcha mala ho7etti dendana. Ceeqeteththa gayro sissana; ba morkketakka oli xoonana. 
Isaiah42:14 GODAY, «Tani adussa wodeesofe co7u gadis; sirphi gadis; tana qum7a oykkadis; ha7i gidikko miixa oykettida maccassa mala waassays; sheenottayssinne bannakays." 
Isaiah42:15 Tani zumatanne zumbullata woddisana; doozata ubbaa melissana. Shaafata haruro biitta kessana; eele haaththatakka micinchchana. 
Isaiah42:16 Tani qooqeta istti erontta oge kaaleththana; istti meezetontta ogerakka ta istta efana; dhumaza ta istta sinththan poo7isana; kundukurcco sohota ta giigsana; haytantta ubbaa ta ooththontta aggike. 
Isaiah42:17 Eeqa xoossatan ammanettizayti gidikko misletakka, ‹Intte nu xoossata› gizayti guye simmana; istti mulera kawuyana» gees." 
Isaiah42:18 GODAY, «Intteno tulletoo siyite! intteno qooqetoo be7itenne xeellite!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ta ashkaraappe attiin hara qooqey oonee? Tani kiittidaadefe attiin hara tulley oonee? taas ammanettidaade mala qooqey, GODAA ashkara mala qooqey oonee?" 
Isaiah42:20 Daro miish be7ideta shin akeekibeekketa; intte hayththay doya dees shin siyekketa» gees. 
Isaiah42:21 GODAY ba xilloteththaa gishshas giidi, ba wogaa gitanne bonchcho kessida gishshas ufayettides." 
Isaiah42:22 Ha derey bogettidanne bonqqettida, olla giddon wodhdhida, woyne keeththay iza bolla gordettida dere; istti bogettida; istta ashshizaadey deenna; istti di7ettida; «Istta zaarite» gizaykka baawa." 
Isaiah42:23 Intte giddofe hayssa siyizay, sinththafe yaana wodes akeeki siyizay oonee?" 
Isaiah42:24 Yaaqoobey bogettana mala, Isra7eeley di7ettana mala ooththiday oonee? Nagara ooththidi nu qohida GODAA gidennee? Istti iza oge kaallanaassinne iza wogaas azazettana koyontta aggida gishshassa." 
Isaiah42:25 Hessa gishshas eexxiza ba hanqoza, iita ola istta bolla yeddides; tama lacon istta giddoththides; istti gidikko hessa akeekibeettenna; istta xuuggides shin istti wozinan woththibeettenna." 
Isaiah43:1 Ha7i gidikko Yaaqoobe, nena medhdhiday, Isra7eele! Nena giigsida GODAY, «Tani nena wozzida gishshas yayyofa. Tani nena ne sunththan xeygadis; neni taassa." 
Isaiah43:2 Neni haaththa giddora pinniza wode, tani nenara gidana. Neni pinnishin shaafay nena mittenna; neni tama giddora bishin nena xuuggenna; tama lacoykka nena meenna." 
Isaiah43:3 Gaasoykka tani GODAA ne Xoossay, Isra7eele Geeshshay nees dhale; Ta ne gishshas Gibxe wozzo immana; Tophphiyanne Seeba ne gishshas aaththa immana." 
Isaiah43:4 Neni ta sinththan al7onne bonchcho gidida gishshas, tani nena siiqiza gishshas, asaa ne gishshas, kawoteththata ne shemppo gishshas laame immana." 
Isaiah43:5 «Tani nenara diza gishshas yayyofa; tani ne nayta arshey mokkiza baggafe ehana; nena arshey wulliza baggafe shiishshana. 
Isaiah43:6 Tani pudeha bagga, ‹Hamma› dugeha baggaka, ‹Yedda› gaana; ta attuma nayta haahoppe, ta macca naytakka biitta gaxappe," 
Isaiah43:7 ta sunththan xeygettida ubbaa, ta bonchchos ta medhdhidayta, tani giigsidayssanne ta ooththidayssa hammite» gaana." 
Isaiah43:8 Ayfey dishin qooqidayta, hayththika dishin tullidayta kessa." 
Isaiah43:9 Kawoteththati ubbay issife shiiqetto; asaykka issi bolla shiiqo; isttafe kasetidi hayssa nuus yootiday oonee? Beni miish nuus awajjiday oonee? Harati siyidi, «Hayssi tuma» gaana mala, istta tumateththayka qonccana mala bantta markkata ehetto." 
Isaiah43:10 «Intte tana erana malanne ammanana mala, izi tana gididayssa intte akeekana mala, ta markkatinne ta doorida ta aylleti inttena. Taappe kase hara xoossi oosettibeenna; taappe guyenkka hara xoossi deenna." 
Isaiah43:11 Tana; tani GODAA; Taappe attiin hara ashshizay deenna. 
Isaiah43:12 Tani qonccisadis; ashshadissinne yootadis; intte giddon hara allaga xoossi de7ibeenna. Tani Xoossa gididayssas intte ta markkatta. 
Isaiah43:13 Beniisofe doommada tani tana; ta kusheppe kessi ekkanay deenna; ta ooththizayssa laammanawu dandayzay oonee?» gees GODAY. 
Isaiah43:14 GODAY inttena wozziza Isra7eele Geeshshay, «Intte gishshas Baabiloone bolla olanchchata kiittana; istti ceeqettiza markabetan, Baabilooneta ubbaa beettana mala ooththana." 
Isaiah43:15 Tani GODAY intte Geeshshay, Isra7eele medhdhida intte kawo» gees." 
Isaiah43:16 Abbaa giddora oge, wolqqama haaththa giddora aadhdhizaso kessida GODAY," 
Isaiah43:17 para-gaaretanne parata, olanchchatanne mino asata ubbaa ehidi, istti zaari dendontta mala zaqullisida GODAY, muqaadda bidntha mala istta dhayssida GODAY," 
Isaiah43:18 «Beni yo7ota hassa7opite; kase aadhdhidayssa balite. 
Isaiah43:19 Hekko ta ooraththa miish ooththana; izikka ha7i hanana; intte yuushshi qoppeketii? Tani bazzon oge giigsana; tani aykkoy baynda bazzonkka shaafata kessana. 
Isaiah43:20 Bazzo do7ati, worakanatinne guttoti tana bonchchana. Tani bazzo biittan haath, aykkoy baynda bazzonkka pultto immana; ta doorida ta deraas haath immana." 
Isaiah43:21 Tani taas giigsida derey ta galataa awajjana mala ta hayssa ooththana. 
Isaiah43:22 «Yaaqoobe, ne tana xeygabeekka; Isra7eele, ne tana salettadasa." 
Isaiah43:23 Neni taas xuugettiza yarshos dors ehabeekka; ne yarshonkka tana bonchchabeekka. Tani nena kaththa yarshon waayisabeekke; exaane yarshonkka saleththabeekke. 
Isaiah43:24 Neni taas lo7o sawiza exaane shammabeekka; modhdho yarshon tana kalssabeekka. Gido attiin ne nagara tooho tana toossadasa; qohon tana daaburissadasa. 
Isaiah43:25 «Ta gishshas gaada ne qohoza dhayssizay tani tana; ne nagaraa ta qoppike. 
Isaiah43:26 Ane kase aadhdhidayssa tana qofsa; ane issife shiiqidi qoodhettoos; ne tumateththaa ane erisa. 
Isaiah43:27 Ne aawa koyroyssi nagara ooththides; ne astamaaretikka ta bolla makkallida. 
Isaiah43:28 Hessa gishshas tani ne Xoossa Keeththa halaqata kawushshana; Yaaqoobe bashshas, Isra7eelekka cashshas aaththa immana» gees." 
Isaiah44:1 GODAY, «Gido attiin ta ashkara Yaaqoobe, ta doorida Isra7eele, siya." 
Isaiah44:2 Nena medhdhiday, ne aayey ulon ooththiday, nena maaddiza GODAY, ‹Ta ashkara Yaaqoobee! Tani doorida Yishuruune! Yayyofa." 
Isaiah44:3 Tani saamettida biittan haath gussana; mela biittankka shaafa gogisana. Tani ta Ayana ne zereththa bolla, ta anjjo nees naa naa bolla gussana." 
Isaiah44:4 Istti demban cilila maata mala, shaafa doonan diza miththa mala mokkana› gees." 
Isaiah44:5 Issoy, ‹Tani GODAASSA› gaana; haray bana Yaaqoobe sunththan xeygana; haray qasse ba kushe bolla, ‹Tani GODAASSA› gi xaafana; izi bana Isra7eele sunththan xeygana» gees." 
Isaiah44:6 Isra7eele kawoynne istta wozzizay, GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «Koyroy tana; wurseththika tana. Taappe hara Xoossi baawa." 
Isaiah44:7 Ta malay ooni dizee? Ane yooto; koyro ta deraas ta yoch yeggishin aazi hanidaakko, sinththafekka aazi hananaakko yooto; ane taas qoncciso; buro hanana miishsha gishshas sinththati yooto; buro yaanayssa kaseti yooto." 
Isaiah44:8 Yayyofte; dagammofte. Hayssa tani inttes yootabeekkinaa? Beniisofe ta inttena erisabeekkinaa? Hessas intte ta markkata. Taappe attiin hara xoossi dizee? Mulekka deenna; woykko hara Zaallay dizee? Deenna; ta oonakka erikke» gees. 
Isaiah44:9 Eeqa misleta medhdhizayti ubbati hada; misleta isttafe ooththiza miishshatikka hada; isttas yootizaytikka qooqe; Isttas erateththi deenna; istti yeellatana. 
Isaiah44:10 Aykkoka go7ontta eeqa xoossa massi giigsizay oonee? 
Isaiah44:11 Eeqa xoos medhdhizay as attiin hara gidenna; izinne iza misatizayti yeellatana; ubbayka shiiqidi issi bolla eqqetto; istti dagammananne yeellatana. 
Isaiah44:12 Birata qoxxizay naariqa oykkees; xiifa bonqqo bolla woththi ooththees; eeqa xoos naariqan qoxxidi misle giigssees; ba mino qesen giigssees. Hessafe guye gafees; wolqqa dhayees; haath saamettees; daaburees. 
Isaiah44:13 Massizay wodoron wadhdhees; chokken malata woththees; maarssara woocees; irsaasen iza bolla malata woththees; asa misatissi giigssees; asa mala puulasees; goynoson efi woththees. 
Isaiah44:14 Ziga mith qanxxees; wola woykko moqoththa doorees; woran diza miththatara issife diccana mala aggees; woykko xiidda tokkees; izakka iray dichchees. 
Isaiah44:15 Asi eesos go7ettees; izappe guuth ekkidi taman eeththi ho7ees; ukeththika izan uukkees; izappe massidi eeqa xoos giigssees; izaskka goynnees. Eeqa xoos ooththees; kundidikka izas ziggees. 
Isaiah44:16 Bagga miththaa eeththees; iza bollaka quma kaththees; asho izan xiixidi kalli mees; tamaza ho7ishe, «Eroshsho tana ho7ides; tamazikka taas beettees» gees." 
Isaiah44:17 Qasse attida miththaza baas eeqa xoos giigssees; hokkidi izas ziggees; izakka goynnees; iza woossishe, «Neni ta xoossaa gidida gishshas tana ashsha» gees." 
Isaiah44:18 Istti aykkoka erettennanne akeekettenna; istti xeellontta mala istta ayfey goozettides; istti yuushshi qoppontta mala istta wozinay gordettides. 
Isaiah44:19 Oonikka takki gi qoppibeenna; erateththi woykko akeekay baynda gishshas, «Baggaa taman eeththadis; iza bonqqon kath kaththadis; izan asho xiixada madis; histtiin attidayssan wosttada tani harassiza miish ooththanee? miththa anos tani goynnana bessizee?» gaanaas dandaybeenna." 
Isaiah44:20 Eeya wozinay iza baleththiin izi bidinth qam7ees; bana ashshana dandayenna; «Hayssi taas ushachcha kushen dizay wordo gidennee? gaanaas dandaybeenna.» 
Isaiah44:21 GODAY, «Isra7eele neni ta ashkara gidida gishshas, ‹Yaaqoobe hayssa qoppa; tani nena ooththadis; neni ta ashkara. Isra7eele tani nena dogikke." 
Isaiah44:22 Tani ne mooro shaara mala, ne nagarakka maalado tulala mala qucca dhayssadis; tani nena wozzida gishshas ha taakko simma› » gees." 
Isaiah44:23 GODAY hayssa ooththida gishshas Salotoo yexxite; ciimma biittatoo ufayssan ililite. Intteno zumatoo, intteno woratoo, miththatoo ubbay ililite; gaasoykka GODAY Yaaqoobe wozzides; ba bonchcho Isra7eele bolla qonccisides." 
Isaiah44:24 Nena aayi ulon medhdhidi wozzida GODAY, «Ubbaa medhdhada salota tarkka piddisiday, sa7akka micciday tana GODAA." 
Isaiah44:25 Tani wordo nabeta malata hada ooththana; bitizaytakka eeya kessana. Tani aadho eranchchata shira yeggana; istta erateththaaka hada ooththana. 
Isaiah44:26 Ta ashkaraza qaala ta polana; ta kiittidayta zore ta minththana; tani Yerusalaame, ‹Neni asi dizaso gidana›, Yuhuda katamatakka, ‹Istti keexettana›, istta laaleththaaka, ‹Tani ooraxissana› gaana." 
Isaiah44:27 Tani ciimma haaththaaka, ‹Ne mela gida! Ne shaafatakka ta melissana› gaana." 
Isaiah44:28 Qiroosekka, ‹Izi ta heenththanchcha; izi ta shene polana› gaana; Yerusalaameykka, ‹Simma eqqu› gaana; Xoossa Keeththaas, ‹Iza yochchi yegetto› gaana» gees." 
Isaiah45:1 «Ta tiydayssas, ushachchaa ta oykkidayssas, kawota gith birshana malanne kawoteththati iza sinththan haarettana mala, pengeti gordettontta mala iza sinththan pengeta doyanaas Qirooses GODAY," 
Isaiah45:2 Tani ne sinththara baana; zumata baasa ginasana; xarqimala pengeta menththana; birata kolatatakka qanxxana. 
Isaiah45:3 Nena ne sunththan xeygida GODAY, Isra7eele Xoossay tana gididayssa ne erana mala, geemason dagattida aqota, dhumason diza haaro ta nees immana." 
Isaiah45:4 Ta ashkara Yaaqoobe gishshassinne tani doorida Isra7eele gishshas, ne tana erontta aggikokka tani nena ne sunththan xeygadis; bonchcho sunththika nees immadis." 
Isaiah45:5 Tani GODAA; taappe haray oonikka deenna; taappe hara Xoossi deenna; ne tana erontta aggikokka ta nena minththana. 
Isaiah45:6 Hessika asay arshey mokkizasoppe biidi arshey wullizaso gakkanaas taappe haray bayndayssa erana malassa. Tani GODAA; taappe haray oonikka deenna. 
Isaiah45:7 Tani poo7o ooththadis; dhumakka medhdhadis; ta duresayssinne manqisays; hayssa ubbaa ooththiza GODAY tana. 
Isaiah45:8 Intteno salotoo, bollafe xilloteth bukisite; shaaratikka duge xokisite; biittay doyetto; atoteththi mokko. Xilloteththika izara issife dicco. Tani GODAY hessa medhdhadis." 
Isaiah45:9 «Mana miishshata giddofe bana medhdhidayssara marshettizayssas aayye ana! Urqqay bana medhdhidayssa, ‹Ne ay ooththay?› gi erizee? Ne ooththiza oosoy, ‹Nees kushey baa› gi erizee?" 
Isaiah45:10 Ba aawa, ‹Ays tana hayssaththo yeladii?› ba aayo, ‹Ays ne hayssaththo miixattadii?› gizaades aayye ana!" 
Isaiah45:11 «Isra7eele Geeshshay, iza medhdhida GODAY sinththafe hanana hanota gishshas, ‹Ta nayta gishshas tana oychcheetii? Ta kushe oosota gishshas azazeetii?" 
Isaiah45:12 Sa7a ooththiday tana; asikka izi bolla medhdhadis. Salota tani ta kushen toladis; istta bolla salo medhetata woththadis. 
Isaiah45:13 Tani Qiroose xilloteththan denththana; iza oge ubbaa giigsana; ta katamayo izi zaari essana; di7ettida ta asaa miish qanxxisontta coo izi mela yeddana› » gees GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay. 
Isaiah45:14 GODAY, «Gibxe dureteththinne Tophphiya zal7ey, qasse geesan adus gidida Saaba asatikka neekko yaana; neyta gidana. Istti nena kaallana; sansalatan qashetti neekko yiidi nees goynnana; isttas, ‹Tumappe GODAY nenara dees; izappe attiin hara Xoossi deenna› giidi woossana» gees." 
Isaiah45:15 Ashshiza Isra7eele Xoossawu, tumappe neni nena genththiza Xoossa." 
Isaiah45:16 Eeqa xoossata medhdhizayti ubbay yeellatana, guuxxana issi bolla kawuyana." 
Isaiah45:17 Isra7eeley gidikko GODAAN mernaa atoteth attana; intteka mernaas yeellatekketanne kawuyekketa. 
Isaiah45:18 Salota medhdhiday izi GODAA; biitta giigsidi medhdhiday, sa7as yoch yeggiday, iza asa duussaso gidana mala attiin coo mela woththanaas medhdhontta GODAY, Tani GODAA; taappe haray deenna." 
Isaiah45:19 Ta dhuma biittan geeman yootabeekke; Yaaqoobe zereththatas, «Tana coo hada koyite» gabeekke. Tani GODAY tuma haasayays; suure yo7o awajjays." 
Isaiah45:20 «Intteno kawoteththatappe beettidaytoo! issife shiiqidi haayite; mata shiiqite. Miththaafe oosettida eeqa xoossaa tookkizaytassinne, ashshanawu dandayontta xoossaa woossizaytas erateththi deenna." 
Isaiah45:21 Ane intte mooto yootite; shiishshite; istti ane issife shiiqidi zoretetto. Hayssa koyrottidi awajjiday oonee? Beni yootiday oonee? Tana GODAA gidikkinaa? Xilloynne Ashshiza Xoossi taappe attiin haray deenna. 
Isaiah45:22 «Intteno biittaa gaxan de7iza ubbatoo! taakko simmidi attite. Tani Xoossa; taappe attiin haray deenna. 
Isaiah45:23 Gulbatey ubbay ta sinththan gulbatana; inxars ubbayka tanan caaqqana; Tani tarkka ta hu7en caaqqadis; guye simmontta qaalay ta doonappe xilloteththan kezides. 
Isaiah45:24 «Istti ta gishshas haasayshe, ‹Xilloteththinne wolqqay GODAAN xalla dees› gaana» gees. Iza bolla hanqon dendidayti ubbay izakko yiidi yeellatana." 
Isaiah45:25 Gido attiin Isra7eele zereth ubbay GODAAN xillana; bonchchoka demmana. 
Isaiah46:1 Beeley kawuyides; Neboy keehi guuxxides; istta eeqa xoossati caana mehetan caanettida; istti oykki yuuyiza misleti tooho; daaburda medosatas deexo ba7o. 
Isaiah46:2 Isttika issi bolla duge gufannana; caanaakka ashshana dandayettenna; isttika di7ettidi baana. 
Isaiah46:3 GODAY, «Intteno Yaaqoobe soo asatoo! Isra7eeleppe attida ubbatoo! Intte intte aayi ulon shaara attoosafe haa simmiin inttena ta oykkidaytoo! Intte yelettoosofe doommada ta tookkidaytoo! Ta gizaa siyite." 
Isaiah46:4 Intte cimmidi puulumana gakkanaaska inttena tookkizay tana; tani tana; tani inttena medhdhadis; tani inttena tookkana; tani inttena kaafana; ta inttena ashshana. 
Isaiah46:5 «Tana oonara giniseetii? Tana oonara likkiseetii? Nuni issino misatana mala tana oonara geeddareetii? 
Isaiah46:6 Amarda asati worqqa bantta karaxiiteppe qoleettes; biraakka meezaanen geeddareettes; istti seerisi tigiza hiillanchcha qaxxareettes; izikka isttas xoossa histti medhdhees. Isttika izas goynneettessinne yaynneettes. 
Isaiah46:7 Denththidi bantta hashen tookkeettes; zaaridi he denththida sohon woththeettes; izikka heen eqqaa gees; heeppe awakka qaaxxenna; oonikka izakko waassiko zaaro immenna; metoppeka iza ashshenna. 
Isaiah46:8 «Intteno mooranchchatoo! Hayssa akeekite; yuushshika qopite; intte wozinan qum7i oykkite. 
Isaiah46:9 Kase beni wode hanida yo7ota akeekite; tani Xoossa; taappe haray deenna; tani Xoossa; ta malay oonikka deenna. 
Isaiah46:10 Wurseththan hananayssa koyrotta, buroppe yaanayssa beni yootadis; ‹Ta halchchoy mino; tana ufayssizaaz ubbaa ta ooththana› gadis." 
Isaiah46:11 Arshey mokkiza baggafe bonqqiza arganth, haaho biittafe ta qofa poliza as tani xeygana. Ta yootidayssa ta ooththana; ta halchchidayssa ta polana." 
Isaiah46:12 «Intteno wozina shuchchatoo, xilloteththafekka haakkidaytoo, tana siyite." 
Isaiah46:13 Tani ta xilloteththaa ehon days; haaho gidenna. Ta atoteththay gam7enna; tani Xiyoone atoteth. Isra7eele bonchcho mayzana» gees. 
Isaiah47:1 GODAY, «Hanne Baabiloone geela7oyee, gudulla bolla wodhdha utta; hanne Baabilooneta nayee, ne araataappe wodhdha; biittan utta; hayssafe guye neni mala lo7onne dalqidalqa geetetta xeygettaka." 
Isaiah47:2 Woxa ekkada kath gaacca; Ne goossaa qaara; ne qamisaza qaara; ne xifaa bessa; gadigadashe shaafaa pinna. 
Isaiah47:3 Ne kalloteththi qoncco; yeellachchiza ne kalloy beetto; tani halo makkana; ta oonakka aggike» gees. 
Isaiah47:4 Nuna Wozziza Isra7eele Geeshshaas, sunththay Godaa Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa." 
Isaiah47:5 «Hanne Baabilooneta nayee, dhumaso gelada co7u ga utta; hayssafe guye ne kawoteththata godatteyo geetetta xeygettaka." 
Isaiah47:6 Tani ta deraa hanqettadis; tani xinxxozakka tunisadis; tani istta ne kushen aaththa immadis. Neni gidikko isttas qadhettabeekka; cimmidayta bollaka keehi deexo qambara woththadasa. 
Isaiah47:7 Neni, ‹Tani mernaas godatto gidana› gadasa. Gido attiin haytantta akeekabeekka; istta wurseththi ay gidanaakko qoppabeekka." 
Isaiah47:8 «Hanne ishalo duus dizaaree! Nerkka nenan ammanetta uttidaaree! Ne wozinan, ‹Tana; taappe attiin haray baa. Hannife guye tani am7o gidikke; yelada dhoommidaaro gidikke› gizaaree siya!" 
Isaiah47:9 Ha nam7u yo7oti, am7eteththinne yeli dhonththi qofay baynda issi gallas ne bolla gakki wodhdhana; ne ay keena bitikkoka, ne ay keena muurennikokka istti ne bolla kumeththa wolqqara yaana." 
Isaiah47:10 Neni ne iitateththan ammanettada, ‹Tana ooninne be7enna› gadasa. Qasse, ‹Tana; taappe attiin haray deenna ne gida wode ne aadho erateththaynne cinccateththi nena baleththida› gadasa." 
Isaiah47:11 Bashshi ne bolla yaana; neni wostta muurenna zaaranaakko erakka; ne qanxxo immada ne dandayontta qohoy ne bolla gakkana. Ne qoppontta metoy ne bolla dingate yaana. 
Isaiah47:12 Hekko be7a; neni naateththafe doommada ooththashe daaburda bitatanne daro muurennota gujja gujja ooththa; oonee erizay nees hananaakko, oonee erizay neni ne morkketa shirosanaakko?" 
Isaiah47:13 Ne ekkida zore ubbay nena daaburara ashshides; aginappe agina gakkanaas xoolintte xeelli kaayizayti, xoolintte taybizayti ane haa yetto; nena gakkiza metoppe ane istti nena ashshetto." 
Isaiah47:14 Hekko istti happa mala; tamay istta maana. Tamaa lacoppe dendidayssan bana ashshanaas dandayettenna. Asi ho7ana bonqqoy deenna; uttidi ho7ana tamaykka deenna. 
Isaiah47:15 Naateththafe doommada ne isttara daaburdayti, ne isttara zal7idayti, istti ooththana dandayzay hayssa xalla; issoy issoy ba mooro gujji gujji baana; gido attiin nena ashshanay deenna» gees." 
Isaiah48:1 GODAY, «Intteno Isra7eele sunththan xeygettida, Yaaqoobeso asatoo! Yuhuda zareppe beettidaytoo! Intteno GODAA sunththan caaqqizaytoo! tumateththaninne xilloteththan gidontta, Isra7eele Xoossaa xeygizaytoo! Hayssa siyite." 
Isaiah48:2 ‹Nuni geeshsha katamayn dizayta› giidi intterkka inttena xeygizaytoo! Isra7eele Xoossan ammanettizaytoo! GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay gizayssa siyite. 
Isaiah48:3 «Kase hanida miishshata tani daro wodeppe sinththan yoota woththadis; ta doonappe kezides. Istti erettana malakka tani ooththadis; ta dingate ooththiin isttika polettida. 
Isaiah48:4 Ne ay mala simmontta as gididaakko ta erays; ne morge shayay birata mala, ne konkkey xarqimala misatees." 
Isaiah48:5 Hessa gishshas hayta ha yo7ota beni ta nees yootadis; istti polettanaappe sinththan ta nena erisa woththadis; hessika, ‹Ta eeqa xoossati hayssa ooththida; miththafe masettida misletinne biratappe oosettida ta xoossati hayssa taas azazida› gontta malassa." 
Isaiah48:6 «Hayta ha yo7ota ne siyadasa; ane ubbaaka xeella; istti likke gididayssa neni ne hu7era markkattikii? Ha7ippe doommada ooraththa miishshata, neeppe geemmidaytanne ne erontta yo7ota ta nees yootana." 
Isaiah48:7 Heyti ha7i medhettida attiin kase gidenna; istta gishshas ne hachchife attiin kase siyabeekka; hessa gishshas, ‹Ee, ta istta gishshas erays› gaana dandayakka." 
Isaiah48:8 Neni siyabeekka woykko erabeekka; ne hayththi benippeka doyettibeenna. Gaasoykka neni kasekka cimmizaadenne naateththafe doommada ne makkallanchcha geetettidayssa ta eradis. 
Isaiah48:9 «Ta sunththaa gishshas gaada tani ta hanqo gam7isana; ta galata gishshas gaada ta neeppe teqqana; ta nena qanxxontta aggana malassa. 
Isaiah48:10 Be7a bira mala gidontta aggikokka nena gaccadis; tama mala meton paaccadis; 
Isaiah48:11 Ta gishshas gaada, tani ta gishshas gaada ooththays. Tarkka tana wostta kawushshateththas aaththa immoo? Ta bonchcho oonaska immike." 
Isaiah48:12 «Nenoo Yaaqoobe, tani xeygida Isra7eele tani gizaa siya. Tani iza; koyroykka tana; wurseththayka tana." 
Isaiah48:13 Biittaas yoch yeggiday ta kushe; salota micciday ta ushachcha kushe. Ta istta xeygiza wode istti ubbayka issi bolla eqqeettes. 
Isaiah48:14 «Intte ubbayka issi bolla shiiqidi siyite; eeqa xoossatappe kase haytantta yootiday oonee? GODAAS doorettida laggey izi Baabiloone bolla halchchidayssa polana; iza qeseykka Baabilooneta bolla gidana. 
Isaiah48:15 Tani tarkka yootadis; tumukka ta xeygadis; ta iza ehana; iza oosoykka izas polettana. 
Isaiah48:16 «Taakko haa shiiqidi hayssa siyite; tani koyroppe doommadakka geeman haasayabeekke; izi polettishin ta heen days» gees. Ha7ikka Ubbaa Haariza GODAYNNE iza Ayanay tana kiittida. 
Isaiah48:17 GODAY nena Wozzida Isra7eele Geeshshay, «Tani GODAA ne Xoossay, nena go7izaaz tamaarsizayssa, baanaas bessizaa ogera nena kaaleththizay tana." 
Isaiah48:18 Neni ta azazo siyidaa gididaakko, nees saroteththi shaafa mala, nees xilloteththika abba dambala mala gidanashin." 
Isaiah48:19 Ne zereththi abba shaamintta mala, ne naytikka qooday baynda gudulla mala gidanashin; istta sunththi qucettenna; ta sinththafe dhayettennashin» gees." 
Isaiah48:20 Baabiloone biittafe kezite; Baabiloone asaappe baqatite! Hayssa ililisan erisite; awajjite; biitta gaxa gakkanaas yootite; «GODAY ba ashkaraa Yaaqoobe wozzides» giite. 
Isaiah48:21 Izi istta bazzo biittara kaaleththishin istti saamettibeettenna. Izi isttas zaallafe haath pulttisides; izi zaallaa phalqides; haaththika dhuuqqi kezides. 
Isaiah48:22 «Iitatas saroy baa» gees GODAY. 
Isaiah49:1 Intteno harurotoo, ta gizayssa siyite. Intteno haahon diza kawoteththatoo, hayssa ezgite. Tani ta aayi ulon dishin GODAY tana xeygides; ta yelettontta dishin tana ta sunththan xeygides." 
Isaiah49:2 Ta inxarsaa giththa mashsha mala qarasides; ba kushe kuwan tana genththides; izi tana hoxe yiishsha mala ooththides; histtidi ba kooho giddon tana qottides. 
Isaiah49:3 Izi tana, «Isra7eele ne ta aylle, tani ta bonchcho nenan qonccisana» gides." 
Isaiah49:4 Gido attiin tani, «Tani mela coo daaburadis; go7ay baynda coo hada miishshan ta wolqqa wursadis; gidikkoka ta oosozas kushe zaaranay GODAA; ta waagaykka ta Xoossa matanna» gadis." 
Isaiah49:5 Ha7i tani GODAA ayfe sinththan bonchchettadis; Xoossay taas wolqqa gidides; tani Yaaqoobe izakko zaarana mala, Isra7eele izakko shiishshana mala ooththida GODAY ha7ikka zaaridi," 
Isaiah49:6 «Neni taas oosanchcha gideththi, Yaaqoobe qommota ne zaaranayssinne ta naagida Isra7eele zaarada ne ehanayssi hessi nena deexxenna; qasseka ta atoteththaa biitta gaxa ne gaththana mala, tani nena kawoteththatas poo7o histtana» gees." 
Isaiah49:7 Kadhettidayssassinne kawoteththan ixettidayssas, dere haarizayta ashkara gidida nees, GODAY, Isra7eele ashshiza Geeshshay, «Kawoti nena be7idi dendi eqqana; kawo nayti nena be7idi nees ziggana; gaasoykka nena doorida GODAY, Isra7eele Geeshshay ammanettidaade» gees." 
Isaiah49:8 GODAY, «Tani doorida wode ne oyshaa zaarana; atoteththa gallas tani nena maaddana; deraas caaqo qaala gidana mala, biittayokka ne zaara essana mala, kase biitta yeggi dhaydaytas istta xinxxo ne zaara immana mala, ta nena maaddana; ta nees ooththana." 
Isaiah49:9 Neni di7ettidayta, ‹Haa kezite!› dhuman dizayta, ‹Poo7on kezite› gaana mala ta ooththadis. Istti ogey dizason dizason kath maana; aykkoy baynda zumbulla bolla heemettizaso demmana." 
Isaiah49:10 Istti gafettettenna woykko saamettettenna; istta bazzo biitta seelay woykko awa seelay qohenna. Isttas qadhettizay istta kaaleththana; haaththa pulttoy dizason istta heemmana. 
Isaiah49:11 «Ta zumata ubbaa oge kessana; ta wogga ogetikka dhoqqu gaana. 
Isaiah49:12 Hekko istti haaho dereppe yaana; issi issineti pudehappe, baggayti arshey wulliza baggafe, hankko attidayti Sinimeppe yaana» gees." 
Isaiah49:13 Salotoo intte, ilili giite; biittayee neni ufayetta. Intteno Zumatoo ufayssan yexxite; gaasoykka GODAY ba deraa minththeththees; metotanchchatas qadhettees." 
Isaiah49:14 Xiyoona gidikko, «GODAY tana aggides; GODAY tana balides» gadus." 
Isaiah49:15 GODAY, «Aaya ba dhanththiza naa balanaas dandayazee? ba yelida naas qadhettekee? oonee erizay iza balana dandayawus; tani gidikko nena balikke." 
Isaiah49:16 Hekko tani nena ta kushe qaa7an xaafadis; ne dirsa gimbetikka ubbatoo ta sinththan deettes. 
Isaiah49:17 «Ne attuma naytikka eeson simmana; nena laallidayti neeppe baqatana. 
Isaiah49:18 Ane dhoqqu gaada ne yuusho xeella; ne nayti ubbay issife shiiqidi neekko yaana. Tani GODAY ta de7on caaqqays; neni istta ubbaa alleqo mala may7ana; ne istta mishira may7o mala may7ana» gees. 
Isaiah49:19 «Ne laalettada bula gidikkoka, ne biittay mulera dhaykkoka, hach neni ne derezas xunth gidikkoka, nena mittidayti neeppe haakkana." 
Isaiah49:20 Ceece wode ne yelida nayti, ne hayththi siyishin, ‹Hayssi gadey nuus keehi xuummides; nu daanaas nuus gidizaso imma› gaana." 
Isaiah49:21 Neni ne wozinan, ‹Hayta taas yeliday oonee? Tani ceecizaadenne maynne; tani goodettidaadenne ixettidaade gida dishin haytantta dichchiday oonee? Tani tarkka attadis shin histtiin haytanti awappe yidoo?› gaasa» gees." 
Isaiah49:22 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Be7a, tani kawoteththata malatan xeygana; tani ta bandira asaas dhoqqu histta essana; ne attuma nayta istti idimmi ehana; ne macca naytakka bantta hashen tookkidi ehana." 
Isaiah49:23 Kawoti nena dichchiza aawata gidana; istta machcheti nena dichchiza aayeta gidana; istti gufannidi nees goynnana; ne toho bollafe baanaakka laaccana; nekka tani GODAA gididayssa erana; tanan hidota ooththizayti yeellatettenna» gees. 
Isaiah49:24 Di7i ekkida miish olanchchatappe guye zaaranaas, di7etti bidayta menxe iitata kusheppe ashshanaas dandayettizee?" 
Isaiah49:25 Gido attiin GODAY, «Tumukka olanchchati di7i efida miish kessi ekkanaas, menxe iitata kusheppe di7ettidayta ashshanaas dandayettees; nenara olettizaytara ta olettana; ne naytakka tani ashshana." 
Isaiah49:26 Nena un7eththizayti banttarkka ba asho maana; woyne ushshan maththottiza mala banttarkka ba suuththan maththottana; hessafe guye asa zereth ubbay, tani GODAA, nena Ashshizayssa, nena wozzizayssanne Yaaqoobe Wolqqama gididayssa hessan erana» gees." 
Isaiah50:1 GODAY, «Tani intte aayo anjja yeddida waraqatay awan dizee? woykko ta inttena ay tal7a ekkidaades bayzadinaa? Be7ite intte intte nagara gishshas bayzettideta; intte mooro gishshas intte aaya anjjetta badus." 
Isaiah50:2 Tani yiza wode heen asi ays dhaydee? Ta xeygiza wode zaaro immiza asi heen waani dhaydee? Inttena wozzana miish cigganaas ta kushey qaammadee? Woykko inttena ashshanaas taas wolqqay guuththee? Be7ite ta hanqon abba melissays; shaafatakka bazzo kessays; isttan diza moleti saamon hayqqidi zeeqqeettes. 
Isaiah50:3 Tani salo dhumisana; tani iza maaqa mayzana» gees. 
Isaiah50:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY taas inxarsa erateth immides; hessa gishshas daaburanchchatas ta ay gaana bessizaakko ta erays; maalado maalado tana beegoththees; tamaarshe diza tamaare mala siyanaas ta hayth doyees. 
Isaiah50:5 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY ta hayth doydes; tani makkallanchcha diikke; guyekka baqatabeekke. 
Isaiah50:6 Ta zokko shocizaytas, ta buuchcha shoddizaytas aaththa immadis; Ta ayfeso cuchchafe genththabeekke." 
Isaiah50:7 Ubbaa Haarizaa GODAY tana maaddiza gishshas tani kawuykke; hessa gishshas ta ayfeso daldacha shuchcha mala ooththadis; tani yeellatonttayssa erays. 
Isaiah50:8 Ta xilloteththa qonccisizaadey ta matan dees; histtiin tana mootana dandayzay izi oonee? Ane issife tiran gayttoos! Ta baalgaaray oonee? Ane haayo! 
Isaiah50:9 Be7ite, Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tana maaddees; histtiin ta bolla pirdanay oonee? Be7ite, istti ubbayka may7o mala ceeggana; bilay istta maana." 
Isaiah50:10 Intte giddofe GODAAS yayyizay, iza ayllaa qaalas azazettizay oonee? Hessaadey dhuman bizaa gidikkonne poo7oy izas baynda aggiko izi GODAA sunththan ammanetto; ba Xoossankka zemppo." 
Isaiah50:11 Ha7i gidikko intte tama eeththidi, laciza intte xomppe xomppe oykkida ubbati intte poo7on biite; intte oyththida xomppe poo7on simerettite; Intte ta kusheppe ekkanayssi hayssa; intte iita meton kundana." 
Isaiah51:1 «Intteno xilloteth kaallizaytoo, GODAA koyzayto siyite. Intte izappe phalqetti kezida zaallazanne intte booketti kezida ollaa xeellite." 
Isaiah51:2 Intte aawa Abrahaamekko, inttena yelida Saarakko xeellite. Izi barkka dishin tani iza xeygadis; tani iza anjjadissinne darssadis." 
Isaiah51:3 «GODAY Xiyoono tumu minththeththana; izi laaleteththaa qadhetan xeellana; izi bazzo biittaza Edene mala, izi bazzo biittaza GODAA atakiltesoho mala ooththana; ishaloynne ufayssi, galataynne yeththa cenggurssi izin seetettana." 
Isaiah51:4 «Ta baggatoo ta gizayssa siyite; ta derezoo ta gizaa ezga; wogay taappe kezana; ta pirday kawoteththatas poo7o gidana. 
Isaiah51:5 Ta xilloteththay eesoti yeeththa bolla, ta atoteththay matishe dees; ta qesey kawoteththatas tuma pirda ehana; haruroti taakko xeellana; ta qesekka hidota ooththana." 
Isaiah51:6 Pude dhoqqu giidi salota xeellite; ziqqi giidi duge sa7aakka xeellite. Saloti cuwa mala tim7i gi dhayana; sa7aykka afaladan ceeggana; izin de7iza asay udunxxe mala eeson dhayana; ta atoteththay mernaas daana; ta xilloteththaaska wurseththi deenna.» 
Isaiah51:7 GODAY, «Intteno xilloteth erizaytoo, ta wogaa intte wozinan woththida asatoo ta gizaa siyite. Asay inttena kadhishin babbofte; istti inttena cayishin dagammofte." 
Isaiah51:8 Bilay may7o miza mala istta maana; istti guxuney mida suufe mala gidana; ta xilloteththi gidikko mernaas, ta atoteththi yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas daana» gees." 
Isaiah51:9 Abeet GODAA qesey denda; wolqqa may7a; kase aadhdhida wodetan, miimintte qanxxereththiday, gita daweza caddiday nena gidikkii?" 
Isaiah51:10 Wozzetti attidayti pinnana mala, abbaanne ciimmaa haaththaa melissiday, ciimma giddora oge giigsiday nena gidikkii?" 
Isaiah51:11 GODAY wozzidayti simmana; yexxishekka Xiyoone gelana; mernaa ufayssa kallachcha hu7en goxxana; istti injjenne ufayssa duus demmana; ceeceynne yeehoy isttafe baqatana. 
Isaiah51:12 GODAY, «Inttena minththizay Tani xalla Iza; hayqqiza asa zereth, maata mala shulliza asa naas ays babbay?" 
Isaiah51:13 Nena medhdhidayssa, salota tolidayssa, sa7as yoch yeggidayssa ne baladasa; nena dhayssanaas giigettida menxe iitaza gaasoppe dendidayssan ubbaa gallas shiron daasa; histtiin he menxe iitaza hanqoy ha7i awan dizee?" 
Isaiah51:14 Qashettidayti eeson birshettana; istti ba qashettida olla giddon hayqqettenna; kaththi isttas paccenna. 
Isaiah51:15 Gaasoykka dambalay dendana mala abba qaaththiza Tani GODAY ne Xoossa; ta sunththi GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa. 
Isaiah51:16 Tani ta qaala ne doonan woththadis; ta kushe kuwan kammadis; salota istti dizason woththiday, biittas yoch yeggiday, Xiyoono, ‹Ne ta dere› giday Tana» gees." 
Isaiah51:17 GODAA kusheppe hanqo ushshu uyidaaree, orccoka ashshontta, as gandigarssiza ushshu xixxi histta uyidaaree, hanne Yerusalaame denda! denda, denda eqqa!" 
Isaiah51:18 Iza yelida nayta ubbaafe kaaleththizay issoyka baawa; qasse iza dichchida nayta ubbaafekka izi kushe oykkizay issoyka baawa. 
Isaiah51:19 Be7a bashsha bolla bashshi ne bolla yides; histtiin nena oonee minththeththanay? isttika laaleteththinne dhays, koshanne mashsha." 
Isaiah51:20 Ne attuma nayti daaburda; woximaden oykettida genessa mala oge gaxan ubbaan ichchida. GODAA hanqoynne ne Xoossa seeray istta bolla kumides. 
Isaiah51:21 Hessa gishshas woyne ushshan gidontta coo maththottizaare hayssa siya 
Isaiah51:22 Ba deraa ashshiza ne GODAY Ubbaafe wolqqama Xoossay, «Be7a; nena gandigarssiza ushshaa ne kusheppe ta ekkadis, ta hanqo xuu7aappe nam7anththo uyakka." 
Isaiah51:23 Tani hessa nena un7eththizayta kushen woththana. Istti nena, ‹Nuni ne bollara hemettidi aadhdhana mala zaqulla› gida. Histtiin istti aadhdhana gakkanaas ne zokko isttas biitta malanne oge mala ooththadasa» gees." 
Isaiah52:1 Hanne Xiyoone denda; denda; wolqqa may7a; geeshsha katamaye Yerusalaamee! Ne bonchcho may7o may7a; hayssafe guye qaxxarettonttaynne tunay ne giddo gelenna. 
Isaiah52:2 Hanne Yerusalaame, denda; gudullaa pitta; ne araatan utta. Di7ettida Xiyoone nayee, ne qoodhen qashettida sansalata kessa yegga." 
Isaiah52:3 GODAY, «Intte coo hada bayzettideta; ha7ikka miishshi baynda coo intte wozzettana» gees." 
Isaiah52:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Koyro ta derey de7anaas duge Gibxe wodhdhides; guyeppe Asoorey gaasoykka baynda un7eththi haarides." 
Isaiah52:5 ‹Histtiin ta derey gaasoykka baynda di7etti biichchiin taas haan aazi dizee?› Istta haaridayti istta bolla qilccida; gallas kumeth ta sunththaa pacey baynda cayeettes. 
Isaiah52:6 Hessa gishshas ta derey ta sunththaa erana; he gallas kasekka yootiday tana gididayssa istti erana. Ee hessi tana» gees. 
Isaiah52:7 Zuma bolla eqqida tohoti, mishiraachcho ekki yiza tohoti, saroteth yootizayti, lo7o mishiraachcho yootizayti, atoteth awajjizayti, Xiyoonokka, «Ne Xoossay kawotides» giza tohoti ay mala lo7o!" 
Isaiah52:8 Hanne siya! Nena naagiyzayti bantta qaala dhoqqu histtida. Issi bolla ililishe yexxeettes; GODAY Xiyoone simmiza wode, istti iza bantta ayfera be7ana." 
Isaiah52:9 Intteno Yerusalaamen qolettida sohotoo! Intte issi bolla ililisan yexxite; GODAY ba deraa minththeththides; Yerusalaame katamaakka wozzides. 
Isaiah52:10 GODAY ba geeshsha qesaa kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan qonccisana; qasse biittaa gaxan diza ubbayka nu Xoossaa atoteththaa be7ana. 
Isaiah52:11 Intteno GODAA keeththa miishshata tookkizaytoo! Shaakettite, shaakettite; heeppe kezite. Tuna miish bochchofte; heeppe kezite; intte hu7esikka geeyte." 
Isaiah52:12 Gidikkoka eeson kezekketa; woykko beti beekketa; GODAY inttefe sinth aadhdhidi inttena kaaleththana; Isra7eele Xoossayka guyera inttena naagana. 
Isaiah52:13 GODAY, «Be7ite, ta ashkaray akeekan ooththana; izi erettidaade gidana, izi dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; izi keehi bonchchettana." 
Isaiah52:14 Daro asay izan dagamanaashe gakkanaas as ubbaafe qohettida gishshas iza medhay asa medhappe laamettides. 
Isaiah52:15 Hessa gishshas izi daro kawoteththata malalisana; iza gaason kawoteththati bantta doona oykkana; isttas yootettonttayssa istti be7ana; istti siyi erontta miish akeekana» gees. 
Isaiah53:1 Derezi, «Nuni yootidayssa oonee ammaniday? GODAA qesey oonas qonccidee?" 
Isaiah53:2 Izi iza sinththan caarechcha mala, mela biittafe mokkiza xapho mala mokkides; nu iza xeellanaas shicateththi woykko teemay deenna; nu iza dosanaas iza malay lo7enna." 
Isaiah53:3 Izi asan kadhettidaadenne ixettidaade; izi hargefenne metoppe shaaketti erontta asa; Izi asi iza be7anaappe ba ayfeso haraso zaariza asa mala kadhettidaade gidides; nunikka iza bonchchibeekko. 
Isaiah53:4 «Tumukka Izi nu harge baas ekkides; qasse nu sakokka izi tookkides. Nuni gidikko iza gakkida metoy, desheteththaynne waayey Xoossafe izas imettidaaza giidi qoppidos." 
Isaiah53:5 Gido attiin izi nu mooro gishshas cadettides; nu qoho gishshas liiqides; iza bolla wodhdhida qixaatey nuus saro ehides; iza madunththan nu paxidos. 
Isaiah53:6 Nuni ubbay dorsa mala toylatti dhaydos; nuni issoy issoy nu oge bidos; GODAY nu ubbaa qoho iza bolla woththides. 
Isaiah53:7 «Izi un7ettidessinne waayettides; gido attiin doonakka pogibeenna. Dorsa laaqqa mala shukettanaas laagettides; ba iske qanxxizayta sinththan co7u giza dorsa mala izi doonakka phoqqibeenna. 
Isaiah53:8 Iza metoththoninne pirdan efida; Izi ta deraa mooro gishshas deshettidi, paxay diza biittafe digettidayssa iza zereththafe akeekiday oonee?" 
Isaiah53:9 Izi aykko gene haasayontta, ay moorokka ooththontta, iza hayqoy iitatara issife qoodettides; gido attiin izi dureta duufon moogettides." 
Isaiah53:10 «Iza liiqeththinne waayezi GODAA shene gidides; GODAY iza shemppo nagara yarsho ooththikoka izi ba zereththaa be7ana; GODAA sheney iza kushen polettana. 
Isaiah53:11 Iza shemppoy waayettidaappe guye izi de7o poo7o be7ananne ufayettana. Ta xillo ayllezi ba erateththan darota xillisana; istta moorokka tookkana. 
Isaiah53:12 Hessa gishshas iza gakkiza gisha gita asata gishara issife histtana; di7i ehidayssa wolqqamatara izi issife gishettana; izi ba shemppo hayqos aaththi immidi, iita ooththizaytara issife qoodettida gishshas, darota nagara tookkides; qohidayta gishshas gaannatides» gaana." 
Isaiah54:1 GODAY, «Hanne maynne maccassayee, naa yela eronttaare yexxa; ilili gaada ufayssan waassa; hanne miixatta eronttaare, ba azinara dizaari naytappe azinay aggidaari nayti darana» gees." 
Isaiah54:2 Ne dunkaane essanaaso aassa; ne dunkaane magalashatakka aassa tola; xuunththofa; ne wodorota adussa; dhishketakka minththa essa. 
Isaiah54:3 Neni ushachcha baggaranne hadirsa baggara aakkana; ne zareti kawoteththata laattana; histtidi aykkoy baynda istta katamatan istti daana. 
Isaiah54:4 «Aykkoy baa babbofa; ne yeellatakka; hirgofa; ne kawuyaka; ne yelagateththa yeellaa neni dogana; ne am7eteththaa borokka hayssafe sinththan hassa7akka. 
Isaiah54:5 Nena medhdhidayssi nees azina; iza sunththayka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA. Nena wozziday Isra7eele Geeshsha; izi biitta ubbaa Xoossa geetettees. 
Isaiah54:6 Naateththan ekkidi kadhida machchi mala; neni wozina meqqidanne kadhettida machchi mala; gido attiin GODAY nena guye zaari xeygana» gees Xoossay. 
Isaiah54:7 «Guuththa wode tani nena aggadis; gido attiin gita qadhetan ta nena zaara shiishshana. 
Isaiah54:8 Ta guuththa wodes keeha hanqettida gishshas, ta ayfeso neeppe genththadis; gido attiin ta mernaa kiyateththan nees qadhettana» gees nena Wozziza GODAY." 
Isaiah54:9 «Hayssi taas Nohe wode haaththi biitta zaari dhayssontta mala ta caaqqoyssaththo ha7ikka ne bolla zaarada hanqettontta malanne seerontta mala ta caaqqadis. 
Isaiah54:10 Zumati qaaxxiko, zumbullati ba dizasoppe kichchikokka, nees diza ta siiqoy qaaxxenna; nenara ta caaqqida saroteththa qaalay laalettenna» gees nena maariza GODAY." 
Isaiah54:11 GODAY, «Hanne un7ettida katamayee! Gote carkon shocettidaaree! minettonttaaree! Be7a, tani nena bonchchettida shuchchatan alleqissa keexxana; semppere shuch nees yoch yeggana." 
Isaiah54:12 Tani ne qustte zo7o inqqun, ne pengeta xolqiza inqqutan, ne dirsata bonchchettida shuchchatan ooththana." 
Isaiah54:13 Ne attuma nayti ubbay GODAAPPE tamaardayta gidana; ne nayta saroteththika darana. 
Isaiah54:14 Neni xilloteththan minna eqqana; gene ogera aysoy neeppe haakkana. Nena babisiza miishshi deenna; shiroteththi neeppe haakkana; ne matakka shiiqenna. 
Isaiah54:15 Oonikka nena qohikko, hessi taappe gidenna; nena qohiday diikko ne sinththan kundana;" 
Isaiah54:16 «Be7a, xiifay taman bonqqana mala womppiina punnizayssa, ola miish qoxxiza wogace medhdhiday tana. Qasse bash gaththana mala medhdhidaykka tana; bashshizayssa medhdhidaykka tana." 
Isaiah54:17 Nena qohanaas oosettida miishshi ooththenna. Nena mootiza inxars ubbaa ne laththana; hessa gishshas GODAA aylleta xinxxoy hayssa; istti taappe demmana anjjoy hessa» gees. 
Isaiah55:1 GODAY, «Intteno saamettidaytoo ubbayka haa yiite! Haaththaako haa yiite; Intteno miishshi bayndaytoo shammite; miite. Haa yiite; miishshi bayndanne qanxxontta woyne ushshinne maath shammite." 
Isaiah55:2 Go7ontta kaththas ays intte miish dhaysseetii? inttena kalssontta miishshas ay ekkanaas intte wolqqa wurseetii? Siyite; ta gidaaz siyite; lo7o gididaaz miite; lo7o quman inttena ufayssite. 
Isaiah55:3 Intte hayth doydi haa taakko shiiqite; intte shemppora paxa daana mala ta gizaa ezgi siyite; kase ta Dawitera caaqqida mino siiqon inttenarakka mernaa caaqo caaqettana. 
Isaiah55:4 Be7ite, tani iza deraas markka, kaaleththizaadenne ola gadawa ooththadis." 
Isaiah55:5 Be7a, neni erontta kawoteththata xeygana; nena erontta kawoteththati neekko eeson yaana. Gaasoykka GODAA ne Xoossay Isra7eele Geeshshay ba bonchchon nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides» gees." 
Isaiah55:6 GODAY beettiza wode iza koyite; matan diza wode iza xeygite. 
Isaiah55:7 Iita asi ba oge, qohizaykka ba qofa aggo; GODAAKKO simmo. Izikka iza maarana; iza maaroteththay daro gidida gishshas izi nu Xoossako simmo." 
Isaiah55:8 GODAY, «Ta qofay intte qofa mala, intte ogeykka ta oge mala gidenna." 
Isaiah55:9 Saloti sa7appe dhoqqida mala, ta ogey intte ogeppe, ta qofaykka intte qofappe dhoqqees." 
Isaiah55:10 Iraynne shachchi saloppe wodhdhidi biitta kalssidi, biittay mokisana malanne ayfe immana mala, zerizaades zereth, mizaades kath immontta dishe guye simmonttayssa mala," 
Isaiah55:11 ta doonappe keziza qaalaykka coo hada haa taakko simmenna; gido attiin izi tani koyidayssa ooththees; ba kiitettida waanna qofaakka polees. 
Isaiah55:12 Intte ufayssan kezana; saron moyzettana. Zumatinne zumbullati intte sinththan ililisara yexxana; demban diza miththati ubbayka bantta kushe baqqana. 
Isaiah55:13 Agunththa gishshas xiidday, kindichcho gishshas barsineete geetettiza miththi mokkana; hessika GODAA hassa7issiza miishshi dhayontta mala mernaas malata gidana» gees." 
Isaiah56:1 GODAY, «Tumu pirda naagite; lo7o ooththite; gaasoykka ta atoteththay matan dees; ta xilloteththayka eeson qonccana." 
Isaiah56:2 Sambata tunisontta bonchchizay, iita oosoppe ba kushe shiishshizaynne naagizay, haytantta polizay anjjettidaade» gees." 
Isaiah56:3 GODAAKKO shiiqida betey, «GODAY tana ba asaappe tumu shaakkana» gooppo. Gundulaykka, «Tani melida miththa» gooppo." 
Isaiah56:4 GODAY, «Ta Sambatata bonchchiza gundulatas, tana ufayssiza miish doorizaytas, ta caaqo qaala naagizaytas," 
Isaiah56:5 ta Keeththaninne ta gimbeta giddon attuma naytappenne macca naytappe aadhdhiza hassa7issiza miishshinne sunth isttas immana; mernaas dhayontta sunth ta isttas immana. 
Isaiah56:6 GODAAS haggazanaas, bana GODAARA gaththi waaxida bete asata GODAA sunth siiqizaytanne izas goynnizayta, sambata tunisontta bonchchiza ubbatanne caaqo qaala naagizayta," 
Isaiah56:7 tani ta geeshsha zumaa bolla istta ehana; ta woosa keeththa giddon ta istta ufayssana. Taas yarsho yarshizasoza bollan istti shiishshiza xuugettiza yarshonne hara yarshota ta ekkana; gaasoykka ta keeththay ubbaa asaa woosa keeth geetettana» gees. 
Isaiah56:8 Laalettida Isra7eele shiishshiza, Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Shiiqidayta bolla gujja, tani haratakka zaara shiishshana» gees." 
Isaiah56:9 Intteno do7atoo, intteno wora do7atoo ubbayka haa yiite; intte achchaarakka puuzereththite." 
Isaiah56:10 Isra7eele asaa naagizayti qooqe; isttas erateththi deenna istti ubbay boccontta kana mala; boccanaas dandayettenna; istti ichchidi agumetteettes; istti dhiskanchcha. 
Isaiah56:11 Istti ganjama kana mala; miidi kalli erettenna. Istti akeekay baynda heenththanchchata; istti ubbay bantta oge oge beettes; issoy issoy ba go7a xalla xeellees. 
Isaiah56:12 Istti issoy issaara, «Haa yiite; woyne ushshu ane uyoos. Ane maththottana gakkanaas uyoos! Wontoyka hachcha mala gidana; woykko hachchifekka aadhdhi lo7o gidana» geetettana." 
Isaiah57:1 Xillo asi hayqqees; hessa oonikka wozinan woththenna; Xoossaas aqiza asata shemppoy ekettees; xilloti iitappe attana mala ekettidayssa oonikka akeekenna. 
Isaiah57:2 Suureteththan bizayti saron gelana; hayqqidikka ba hiiththan saron shemppana. 
Isaiah57:3 GODAY, «Intteno maro naytoo, intteno laggeththizayssanne laymatizaari zereththatoo, intte haa yiite." 
Isaiah57:4 Intte oona bolla qilcceetii? Intte inxarsi oona bolla kesseetii? Intte makkallanchchata naytanne wordanchchata zare gidekketii? 
Isaiah57:5 Intte wola garsaninne daashsha miththata garsan ziitan xuugettizayta gidekketii? zulletaninne zaalla za7ata garsan intte nayta yarshizayta gidekketii? 
Isaiah57:6 Hanne zullen diza liiqo shuchchati nees eeqa xoossata; isttika ne qaadata; tumukka ne istta bolla ushsha yarsho gussadasa; kaththa yarshoka shiishshadasa; histtiin ha yo7ota gishshas ta co7u gaanee? 
Isaiah57:7 Ne hiixa dhoqqu gida adussa zumbulla hu7en hiixxadasa; heen ne yarsho shiishshana kezadasa. 
Isaiah57:8 Ne pengefenne qosilaththaafe soo baggara eeqa misleta essadasa. Tana aggada ne hiixaa qaaradasa; iza bolla kezada keeha qaaradasa; ne dosidaytara qaala giigadasa; istta kalloka be7adasa. 
Isaiah57:9 Wogara zayte ekkada, shitto iza bolla gujjada Molooke geetettiza eeqa xoossaako badasa; nees kiitettizayta haako dere kiittadasa; duge si7oole gakkanaas kanththadasa." 
Isaiah57:10 Ne oge daroppe dendidayssan daaburadasa; gido attiin, ‹Hidotay baawa› gabeekka. Ne wolqqay haa ooraxides; hessa gishshas argacabeekka." 
Isaiah57:11 «Neni taas wordotiday, oonas yayyadaa? Oonas hirgadaa? Ne tana qoppontta aggiday, hayssaka ne wozinan qum7ontta aggiday, taas ne yayyontta ixxiday, tani co7u gida gishshas gidennee?" 
Isaiah57:12 Tani ne xilloteththinne ne ooso qonccisana; isttika nena go7ettenna. 
Isaiah57:13 Neni maado demmanaas waassiza wode, ane ne shiishshida eeqa xoossati nena ashshetto! istta ubbaaka carkoy ekki efana; guuththa peenoy istta laalli dhayssana; gido attiin tana baas baqataso ooththida asi biittayo laattana; ta geeshsha zumayo baas miish ooththana» gees." 
Isaiah57:14 GODAY, «Baasite, baasite! Oge giigsite; ta deraa ogaappe dhuphiza miish ubbaa diggite» gees." 
Isaiah57:15 Dhoqqu gidayssi, Ubbaa haarizayssi, izas sunththayka Geesh geetettidayssi, mernaas de7izayssi, «kawuyidayta ayana denththeththanaas, wozinay meqqidayta minththeththanaas, dhoqqu gida geeshshasohon ta de7ays; qasseka wozinay meqqidaytaranne ayanan ashke gididaytara tani de7ana." 
Isaiah57:16 Asa ayanay ta sinththan daaburontta mala ta medhdhida asaas peenoy eqqontta mala ta mernaas walassike; ta ubbato hanqettike.
