Isaiah57:17 Iza nagara gishshassinne iza yiiqeteththa gishshas ta hanqettadis; ta iza qaxxayadis; ta sinththaaka hanqon izappe genththadis; gido attiin ha7ikka simmidi izi ba ogen bides. 
Isaiah57:18 Tani iza ogeta be7adis; gidikkoka ta iza paththananne kaaleththana; izassinne iza gishshas yeekkiza geeshshata ta minththeththana. 
Isaiah57:19 Isra7eele biittan yeekkizayta doonan ta galata woththana. Mataninne haahon dizaytas saroynne woppay gido. Tani istta paththana» gees. 
Isaiah57:20 Gido attiin iitati dambalay urqqanne buura kessiza mala co7u gaanaas dandayonttayssa mala bulakettiza abba mala. 
Isaiah57:21 Ta Xoossay, «Iitatas saroy baawa» gees." 
Isaiah58:1 GODAY, «Ne qaalaa dhoqqu histta waassa; aykkoka ashshofa. Ne cenggurssa zaye mala sissa. Ta deraas istta makkallateththa, Yaaqoobe keeththa asaasikka istta nagaraa yoota." 
Isaiah58:2 Istti tana hach hach koyeettes; ta ogeza eranaas laamotiza misateettes. Suure miish ooththida kawoteththa malanne ba Xoossaa azazo yeggi aggontta dere mala, istti tana suure pirda oychcheettes; Xoossi isttako shiiqanayssa istti dosiza misatees» gees." 
Isaiah58:3 Istti shiiqidi, «Ne ekkonttaashin nu aazas xoomidonii? Ne wudu gonttaashin ays nuna kawushshidonii?» gaana. GODAY zaaridi isttas, «Gidikkoka intte xoomiza gallas intte wozina qofa mala ooththeeta; inttes ooththizaytappe bonqqeeta." 
Isaiah58:4 Intte xoomay ooshshaninne palaman, gene oosoninne wadhetan polettees; hayssafe sinththan intte xoomizayssa mala hachchife guye intte woosay salon siyettana giidi hidota ooththofte." 
Isaiah58:5 Tani dooriday hayssa mala xoomaa? Asi bana kawushshanay hayssa mala gallas xallaa? Shacca mala bana ziqqi histteththee? woykko maaqa may7idi bidinththaa bolla bululeteththee? Histtiin ne xooma ga xeygizayssi hayssee? GODAY hessa malan ufayettizee? 
Isaiah58:6 «Be7ite tani doorida xoomay, un7ettidayta sansalata intte duuththana mala, qambara wodoro intte birshana mala, un7ettidayta intte la7a yeddana mala, tooho gidida qambara intte menththana mala gidennee?" 
Isaiah58:7 Qasseka ne qumaappe gafidaades shaakkanaas, toylattida manqoza neso gelththanaas, kallottida be7ada mayzanaas, nees asho dabbozas ne sinththi ne tukkontta mala gidennee?" 
Isaiah58:8 Ne hessaththo ooththiko ne poo7oy wontta xalqqe mala caarana; paxateththi nees eeson gakkana; xilloteththi neeppe sinththara baana; Xoossa bonchchoy nena garadana. 
Isaiah58:9 He wode neni xeygana; GODAYKKA nees koyana. Neni maado demmanaas waassana; izikka, ‹Ta nees days› gaana. «Ne neeppe metoththiza qambara, iita haasayanne biradhdhen malata bessizayssa aggiko," 
Isaiah58:10 gafidaades ne qadhettiko, qohettidayti kallana mala ne histtiko nees poo7oy dhuma giddon poo7ana; nees dhumidayssika seeta gallassa mala gidana." 
Isaiah58:11 GODAY nena ubbatoo kaaleththana; away xuuggida biittan ne amo izi kunththana; ne meqeththatakka izi minththana. Neni haath alada atakiltesohonne mulekka to7ontta pultto mala gidana. 
Isaiah58:12 Ne dabboti beni yochchata yeggana; kase laalettidayta zaari keexxana; neni laalettida gimbe zaari ooraxissizaade, wogga ogeti diza katamata zaari giigsizaade geetettana» gees." 
Isaiah58:13 Qasseka, «Ne tohoti sambata shaarontta mala ne shempisikko dummatida ta gallassaan ne wozina qofa ooththontta aggiko, sambata gallassaa ufays, GODAAS dummatida gallassa neni bonchcho gallas ga xeygikko, ne shene mala ne ooththizayssafenne hada yo7oppe ne naagettiko," 
Isaiah58:14 he wode ne GODAAN ufayettana. Biitta bollan dhoqqasohotan ta nena togisana; ne aawa Yaaqoobe xinxxo ne kalla maana mala ooththana» giidi GODAY hayssa ba doonan haasaydes. 
Isaiah59:1 Hekko GODAA kushey inttena ashshanaas qaammibeenna; iza hayththi siyanaappe tullibeenna. 
Isaiah59:2 Gido attiin intte qohoy inttena intte Xoossaafe shaakkides; intte nagaray iza ayfeso inttefe genththides. Hessa gishshas izi siyenna. 
Isaiah59:3 Intte kushey suuththan, intte biradhdheyka qohon muulettides; intte doonay wordo haasaydes; inxarsati iita yo7o sissida." 
Isaiah59:4 Xilloteththan mootizay baawa; tumateththan pirdizay oonikka deenna. Hada yo7on ammanetteettes; wordo haasayeettes; shiro qanththatidi iitateth yelida. 
Isaiah59:5 Istti shooshsha phuuphphulle haphphida; achcharo keeth keexxida; istta phuuphphulleta miza asi hayqqees; isttafe issoy meqqiko puukkiza shooshshi kezees. 
Isaiah59:6 Istta qacinay may7o gidenna; istti ooththidayssan bantta bolla kammana dandayettenna; istta oosoy iita; istta kushetan makkalla oosoy kumides. 
Isaiah59:7 Istta tohoti nagarakko woxxeettes; xillo suuth gussanaas eesoteettes; istti iita qofa qoppeettes. Bashshinne qohoy istti aadhdhida oge ubbaas malata. 
Isaiah59:8 Istti saroteththa oge erettenna; istti biza ogen suure pirday baawa; istti bantta oge geellasida; he ogera bizay saro demmenna. 
Isaiah59:9 Hessa gishshas suure pirday nuuppe haakkides; xilloteththika nuukko gakkenna. Nuni poo7o koyidos; gido attiin ubbay dhuma gidides; wagagga poo7o koyidos; gido attiin sakkanna dhuma gidides. 
Isaiah59:10 Qooqe mala gimbeza bolla gandigardos. Nu hemetay ayfey baynda asa mala tattafeteth gidides; arshey wullishin haniza seeta gallas dhuphettidos. Qasse mino asata giddon nuni hayqqida asa mala gididos. 
Isaiah59:11 Nuni ubbay zardo mala laawoos; haraphpheta malakka ceecishe guugumoos; nuni suure pirda koyidos; gido attiin demmibeekko; attana koyidos; gido attiin izi nuuppe haakkides. 
Isaiah59:12 Gaasoykka nu qohoy ne sinththan darides; nu nagaraykka nu bolla markkattides. Nu mooroy nuuppe shaakettibeenna; nu makkallateththaaka nuni eroos. 
Isaiah59:13 Nuni GODAA bolla makkallidi wordo haasaydos; nu Xoossaa kaalo aggidi sher7i gidos; makkallateththinne gene yo7o haasaydos. Nu wozinay shaari uttida wordo haasaydos. 
Isaiah59:14 Hessa gishshas suure pirday guye sugettides; xilloteththika nuuppe haakkides; tumateththi oge bolla dhuphettides; suureteththika gelanaas dandaybeenna. 
Isaiah59:15 Tumateththi awankka beettenna; iitateththaafe haakkizay qohettees; GODAY be7idi suure pirday dhayda gishshas ceecides. 
Isaiah59:16 Oonikka bayndayssa be7ides; izakko gaannatizay bayndayssa be7idi malalettides; Hessa gishshas iza qesey izas atoteth ehides; iza xilloteththi iza kaafi oykkides. 
Isaiah59:17 Izi xilloteththa xurure mala tiran may7ides; atoteththaa birata qoobe mala ba hu7e bolla woththides. May7o garsara may7iza mala halo keso may7ides; may7o gophi may7iza mala qanaate bollara gophides. 
Isaiah59:18 Istta ooso mala hanqo ba baalgaaratas, pirda ba morkketas izi qanxxana. Haruro biittatas istta ooso ooso mala immana." 
Isaiah59:19 GODAA peenoy sugi ekki biza wolqqama di7o mala yaana. Hessa gishshas arshey wulliza baggara dizayti GODAA sunththas yayyana; arshey mokkiza baggara dizayti iza bonchchos haarettana. 
Isaiah59:20 GODAY, «Wozzizaadey Xiyoonessinne Yaaqoobe zaretan bantta nagara paaxidaytakko yaana» gees." 
Isaiah59:21 Qasseka GODAY, «Ta baggara taassinne isttas diza caaqo qaalay hayssa; intte bolla diza ta Ayanaynne tani intte doonan woththida ta qaalay hachchife doommidi mernaa gakkanaas, intte doonappe, intte nayta doonappenne intte zereththa doonappe shaakettenna» gees." 
Isaiah60:1 GODAY, «Ne poo7oy yida gishshas dendada poo7isa; GODAA bonchchoy ne bolla poo7ides." 
Isaiah60:2 Be7a, dhumay sa7aa kammana; sakkanna dhumay deraa goozi oykkana; gido attiin GODAY nees gakkana; ba bonchchoka ne bolla poo7isana." 
Isaiah60:3 Kawoteththati ne poo7okko, kawotikka ne wontta xalqqeko yaana." 
Isaiah60:4 «Dhoqqu gaada ne yuusho xeella; istti ubbay issife shiiqidi neekko yaana; ne attuma nayti haahoppe, ne macca naytikka idimon neekko yaana." 
Isaiah60:5 He wode ne be7ananne phoollana; ne wozinay ufayssan kumana; abban diza aqotay neekko yaana; kawoteththata dureteththi nees gidana. 
Isaiah60:6 Gaamella marati, Midiyaameppenne Eefappe yida gaamella marati ne biittaa kammana. Worqqanne exaane ekkidi Saabappe yizayti GODAA galata awajjana." 
Isaiah60:7 Qeedaareppe dorsata wudey ubbay neekko shiiqana; Nebayoote dere dharshoti nena go7ana; haytanti taas yarsho yarshizasoza bolla ekettida yarshota gidana; tanikka ta bonchcho keeththaa puulasana. 
Isaiah60:8 «Haraphphey ba aqizaso biza malanne shaara mala bizayti haytanti oonee? 
Isaiah60:9 Tumukka haruroti tanan hidota ooththeettes; izi nena ba bonchcho mayzida gishshas, GODAA ne Xoossa bonchchos, Isra7eele Geeshshaas haakoppe ne attuma nayta, istta biraaranne worqqaara gaththi ehanaas Tarseese markabeti sinththati kezana." 
Isaiah60:10 «Allagati ne gimbe gimbana; istta kawoti nees haggazana; ta hanqon ta nena shocidaa gidikkoka, ta qadheta siiqo nena bessana." 
Isaiah60:11 Ne pengeti ubbatoo doya de7ana; gallas gidiin omars mulekka gordettettenna; hessika asay kawoteththata dureteththaa neekko ehanaassa; istta kawotikka xoonon neekko gelana malassa. 
Isaiah60:12 Nees haarettontta kawoteththinne derey mulekka dippi gaana. 
Isaiah60:13 Ta Keeththay dizaso alleqissanaas, Libaanoose bonchchoy guuganththi, xiiddaynne barseneetey neekko yaana; ta tohoy eqqizasoza ta bonchchana." 
Isaiah60:14 Nena un7eththidayta attuma nayti ziggishe neekko yaana; nena kadhida ubbati ne toho bolla kundana; ‹Hanne GODAA katamayee! Isra7eeles Geeshsha miish gidida Xiyoone› gi xeygana. 
Isaiah60:15 «Hanne ixettada yegettidaaree, oonikka ne giddora kanththi bizaaro gidontta aggikokka tani nena mernaa ceeqossinne yeleta ubbaas ufays histtana." 
Isaiah60:16 Neni kawoteththata maath uyana; kawota dhanththika dhammana. Hessafe guye tani GODAY nena Ashshizayssa, nena Wozzizayssanne Yaaqoobe Wolqqama gididayssa neni erana." 
Isaiah60:17 Xarqimala sohon worqqa, birata sohon bira ehana; miththa sohon xarqimala, shuchcha sohon birata ehana; saroteth nena ayssizaade, xilloteththika nees halaqa histtana." 
Isaiah60:18 Hayssafe guye ne biittan shiroy, ne zawankka laaleteththinne bashshi siyettenna. Gido attiin ne dirsaa gimbe atoteththi, ne pengetakka galata gaada ne xeygana." 
Isaiah60:19 «Hessafe guye gallas awa poo7oy nees koshshenna; omarsika aginay poo7enna; gaasoykka GODAY nees mernaa poo7o gidana; ne Xoossay nees bonchcho gidana. 
Isaiah60:20 Ne arshey hayssafe guye gelenna; ne aginaykka poo7o imo aggenna. GODAY nees mernaa poo7o gidana; ne ceecida gallassati gidana. 
Isaiah60:21 Ne asay ubbay xillo gidana; biittayokka mernaas laattana; istti ta bonchcho qonccisanaas tani tokkida puutetanne ta kushe oosota. 
Isaiah60:22 Neeppe kaalozi shii, ubbaafe wurseththa kaalozi wolqqama kawoteth gidana; Tani GODAA; wodey gakkiza wode tani hessa eeson polana» gees." 
Isaiah61:1 Ubbaa Haariza GODAA Ayanay ta bolla dees; hiyeesatas mishiraachcho yootana mala, GODAY tana tiydes. Izi tana wozinay meqqidayta koolana mala, di7ettidayta la7a kessana mala, qashettidaytas birsheth awajjana mala kiittides." 
Isaiah61:2 Dosettida GODAA layth, nu Xoossay halo kessiza gallassa awajjana malanne yeekkizayta ubbaa minththeththana mala tana kiittides." 
Isaiah61:3 Qasseka Xiyoonen kayottizayta doshisana mala, bidinththa gishshas puulateththa kallachcha; yeeho gishshas ufayssa zayte istta hu7en ta gussana mala, ceece ayana gishshas galata seelo ta istta bolla gophana mala tana kiittides; isttika iza bonchcho qonccisana mala GODAY tokkida xillo mith geetetti xeygettana." 
Isaiah61:4 Istti beni laalettidayta zaari keexxana; kase wode kundidaytakka zaari essana; daro yeletatappe kase kundidaytanne laalettida katamata zaari keexxana. 
Isaiah61:5 Imaththati intte dorsa wudeta heemmana; allaga biitta asati intte gadeninne intte woyne atakilte giddon ooththana. 
Isaiah61:6 Intte qasse, «GODAA qeeseta» geetetti xeygettana; asaykka inttena, «Nu Xoossaa oosanchchata» giidi xeygana; intte kawoteththata aqota maana; istta dureteththankka intte ceeqettana." 
Isaiah61:7 Ta derey yeellatidayssa qoodhe nam7u kushe ekkana; kawuyidayssa qoodhe bantta xinxxon ufayettana; bantta biittaas nam7u kushe laattana; mernaa ufayssi isttas gidana. 
Isaiah61:8 Tani GODAY suure pirda dosays; bonqqanne qoho ixxays. Ta ammaneteththan isttas bessizayssa immana; isttara mernaa caaqo qaala gelana. 
Isaiah61:9 Istta zareti kawoteththata giddon, istta nayti dere giddon erettidayta gidana; istti be7iza ubbay GODAY anjjida dere gididayssa erana;" 
Isaiah61:10 Tani GODAAN keehippe ufayettays; ta shemppoyakka ta Xoossan hombocawus; mishiray ba hu7en kallachcha goxxiza mala, mishirayakka bana inqqun seeleththiza mala atoteththa may7o tana mayzides; xilloteththa seelokka ta bolla gophides." 
Isaiah61:11 Biittay caarech caarissiza mala, atakiltesohoy puute puutisiza mala, Ubbaa Haariza GODAY kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan xilloteththinne galata caarissana." 
Isaiah62:1 Izi xilloteththi maalado poo7o mala phoollanaashe gakkanaas, izi atoteththi xomppe mala poo7anaashe gakkanaas ta Xiyooni gishshas co7u giikke; Yerusalaame gishshassika sirphi giikke." 
Isaiah62:2 Kawoteththati ne xilloteth, kawotikka ne bonchcho be7ana; GODAY ba doonan sunththida ooraththa sunththan ne xeygettana." 
Isaiah62:3 Neni GODAA kushe bonchcho akilile, ne Xoossa kushen kawota kallachcha gidana." 
Isaiah62:4 Hayssafe guye neni, «Azinay yeggi aggidaaro» geetettaka. Qasse ne biittayakka, «Yegetta attidaaro» geetettuku. Gido attiin, «Ta ufayssi izinna» geetettana; ne biittayakka, «Azinay dizaaro» geetettana; GODAY nenan ufayettana; ne biittayakka azinara dizaaro gidana." 
Isaiah62:5 Panththi geela7o ekkiza mala, ne nayti nena ekkana; mishirazi mishirayn ufayettiza mala, ne Xoossi nenan ufayettana." 
Isaiah62:6 Hanne Yerusalaamee! Naagizayta ne dirsata bolla essadis; istti gallassika omars guye geettenna; Intteno GODAAKKO waassizaytoo, mulekka shempofte;" 
Isaiah62:7 Izi Yerusalaame minththana gakkanaassinne biitta ubbaa bolla erettida katama ooththana gakkanaas izas shemppo immofte. 
Isaiah62:8 GODAY ba ushachcha kusheninne ba wolqqama qesen, «Hayssafe guye ta intte kath intte morkketas quma gidana mala immike; qasse intte daaburi kessida ooraththa ushshaa allagati uyettenna." 
Isaiah62:9 Gido attiin kaththaa shiishshidayti maana; GODAAKKA galatana; woyne teera maxi shiishshidayti ta keeththa pengen uyana» gi caaqqides. 
Isaiah62:10 Aadhdhite! Iza pengeta baggara kanththi biite; deraas oge baasite; giigsite; shuchchata diggite; kawoteththatas malaata essite. 
Isaiah62:11 Be7ite, GODAY sa7a gaxa gakkanaas, «Xiyoone macca nays, ‹Hekko nena Ashshizaadey yees; ne waagay iza kushen dees; ne qaaday izakkon dees› giite» giidi awajjides." 
Isaiah62:12 Istti, «GODAY Wozzida Geeshsha dereta; nekka Yegetta Attonttaaro koyettiza Katamayo» geetettana." 
Isaiah63:1 Eedoome biittan diza Booxira katamappe zo7o seelo may7o may7idi yizay hessi izi oonee? hayssi bonchcho may7idi ba wolqqa gitateththan hemettishe yizay izi oonee? «Xillo haasayzaynne ashshanaas wolqqay dizay tana gidikkinaa!» gees GODAY. 
Isaiah63:2 Ne seelo may7oy woyne gum7iza asata may7o mala ays zo7idee? 
Isaiah63:3 «Gum7izasohozan woyne tani tarkka yedhdhadis; kawoteththatappe oonikka tanara deenna; tani istta ta hanqon yedhdhadis; ta bashshankka istta dirxxereththadis; istta suuththi ta seelo may7o bolla dhacettides; ta may7oy ubbay moorettides. 
Isaiah63:4 Tani halo kessana gallassay ta wozinan dees; ta wozzana gallassayka gakkides. 
Isaiah63:5 Tani xeelladis shin maaddizay beettibeenna; maaddizaadey baynda gishshas tani malalettadis. Hessa gishshas ta qesey taas atoteth ehides; ta hanqoyka tana minththides. 
Isaiah63:6 Ta hanqon kawoteththata yedhdhadis; ta bashshan istta maththosadis; istta suuththaaka biittan gussadis» gaana. 
Isaiah63:7 GODAA kiyateththi, GODAY nuus ooththida ooso ubbaa gishshas, izi galatettiza oosoza gishshas, iza siiqozanne iza kiyateththa keena, Isra7eele keeththas izi ooththidayssa, ee izi ooththida lo7o oosota gishshas ta yootana." 
Isaiah63:8 GODAYKKA, «Tumukka; istti ta dereta; istti taas wordotontta attuma nayta» gides. Hessa gishshas izi istta Ashshizaade gidides." 
Isaiah63:9 Istta meto ubbaan ceecides; Iza duussaa erisiza kiitanchchay istta ashshides; izi ba siiqoninne ba maaroteththan istta wozzides. Kase aadhdhida wode ubbaan istta denththidesinne tookkides. 
Isaiah63:10 Istti gidikko makkallida; iza Geeshsha Ayanaakka mishisida hessa gishshas izi simmidi isttas morkke gidides; istta olides. 
Isaiah63:11 Hessafe guye asay beni wodezanne Muse wode yuushshi qoppides; Ba dorsata heenththanchchatara ubbaafe kessidayssi izi awan dizee? Ba Geeshsha Ayana istta giddon woththidayssi ha7i awan dizee? 
Isaiah63:12 Bonchchettida wolqqama qese, Muses ushachcha kushe bolla woththides; baas mernaas sunth kessanaas, haaththata istta sinththan shaakkides." 
Isaiah63:13 Paray aykkoy baynda bazzo biittara kanththi biza mala, isttaka ciimma giddora kaaleththi pinththides; hessa gishshas istti dhuphettibeettenna." 
Isaiah63:14 Duge zulle wodhdhiza mehe wude mala, GODAA Ayanay isttas shemppo immides; izi deraa hessaththo kaaleththiday, ne sunththaa bonchchisanaassa." 
Isaiah63:15 Abeet GODAWU, dummatida, bonchchettidanne dhoqqu gida ne araataappe saloppe duge xeella; ne wolqqaynne ne mishettiza mishoy awanee? ne ashketeththaynne ne qadheteththi nuuppe haakkides." 
Isaiah63:16 Abrahaamey nuna erontta aggiko, Isra7eeleykka nuna akeekontta aggikokka neni nuus aawa. Abeet GODAWU, neni nuus aawa; Beniisofekka doommidi ne sunththay nuna wozzizayssa." 
Isaiah63:17 Abeet GODAWU, nuni ne ogeppe kezana mala, nu wozina tullisada nees yayyontta mala ays ooththay? Ne aylleta gishshas gaada, nees xinxxo gidida qommota gishshas gaada nuukko simma." 
Isaiah63:18 Guuththa wodes ne derey geeshshasohoza laattides; ha7i gidikko nu morkketi ne Keeththaa yedhdhida. 
Isaiah63:19 Hekko beniisofe nuni neyta; gido attiin istta neni haarabeekka; istti ne sunththankka xeygettibeettenna. 
Isaiah64:1 Abeet GODAWU, neni salota daakkada duge wodhdharkkii! Zumati ne sinththan kokkoretto." 
Isaiah64:2 Qayxare tamay haath penttisiza mala, ne morkketa matan ne sunththi erettana mala wodhdha; kawoteththatakka ne sinththan kokkorssa." 
Isaiah64:3 Kasekka neni nu qoppontta yashissiza miish ne ooththida wode ne wodhdhiin zumati kokkorida. 
Isaiah64:4 Beniisofe doommidi hidota ooththi naagizaytas gakkiza malaata ooththiday neeppe attiin hara Xoos be7ida ayfeynne siyida hayththi mulekka deenna. 
Isaiah64:5 Suure miish ufayssan ooththizaytanne ne oge qoppizayta neni maaddaasa; gido attiin nuni istta bolla pacey baynda nagara ooththida gishshas hekko neni nu bolla hanqettadasa; histtiin nuni waani attana dandayzonii? 
Isaiah64:6 Nuni ubbayka tuna asa mala gididos; nu xilloteththa ooso ubbay tunida carqqa mala. Nuni ubbayka boncco mala qokkidos; nu nagaray nuna carko mala pitti efides. 
Isaiah64:7 Oonikka woosan ne sunth xeygenna; nena oykkana paaccizaykka deenna; neni ne ayfeso nuuppe genththadasa; nu nagaray nuna dhayssana mala aggadasa. 
Isaiah64:8 Gidikkoka abeet GODAWU, neni nuus aawa; nuni urqqata; neni nuna medhdhidayssa; nuni ubbayka ne kushen medhettidayta." 
Isaiah64:9 Abeet GODAWU, keeha hanqettofa; nu nagaraakka mernaas qoppofa; nuus woosetta; nu ubbay ne dere gidida gishshas ne ayfeso nuukko haa zaara." 
Isaiah64:10 Ne geeshsha katamati aykkoy baynda bazzo gidida; Xiyoonakka aykkoy baynda bazzo biitta gidadus; Yerusalaameykka yegetta attadus. 
Isaiah64:11 Nu aawati kase nena izan galatiza Xoossa Keeththay taman xuugettides; kase lo7osoti ubbatikka dhayda. 
Isaiah64:12 Abeet GODAWU, hayssi ubbay haniinkka ne simmikii? Neni co7u gaada nuna zaway baynda qixaate qaxxayay?" 
Isaiah65:1 GODAY, «Tana woossonttaytas ta qonccadis; tana koyonttaytas beettadis. Ta sunththaa xeygontta kawoteththas, ‹Yee! Yee!› ga koyadis." 
Isaiah65:2 Makkallanchcha deretas, iita ogera bizaytas, bantta wozina amo kaallizaytas, ta kushe gallas kumeth miccadis." 
Isaiah65:3 Atakiltesohon yarsho yarshizayti, urqqafe medhettida yarshosohota bolla exaane cuwasizayti, ubba wode tana hanqeththiza dereta." 
Isaiah65:4 Duufo giddon uttizayti, geemasohon aqizayti, guddunththa asho mizayti, istti bantta otota tunida asho camba kunththizayta." 
Isaiah65:5 Istti, ‹Ta geesh gidida gishshas kichcha; ta mata yooppa; taakko shiiqoppa› gizayta. Hayssa mala derey ta siidhen cuwa malanne gallas kumeth eexxiza tama mala." 
Isaiah65:6 «Be7ite, ta sinththan xaafetti uttides; ta co7u giikke; gido attiin iza ooso ooso mala ta izas immana; istta hano mala ta isttas ciggana." 
Isaiah65:7 Intte nagara halonne intte aawata nagara halo ta kessana. Istti zumata bolla xuugettiza yarsho shiishshida gishshas, zumbullata bolla tana cayida gishshas, istti makkida miishshan isttas zaari makettana; istti kase ooththida ooso kushe zaari ekkana» gees." 
Isaiah65:8 GODAY, «Woyne wurco giddon ililoy diza mala asaykka, ‹Iza giddon lo7o miishshi diza gishshas iza qanxxofte› giza mala, tanikka ta aylleta gishshas gaada hessaththo ooththana; mulera tani istta dhayssike." 
Isaiah65:9 Tani Yaaqoobe zereththatappenne Yuhuda zereththafe ta zumata laattanayta ta ehana; doorettida ta derey istta laattana; ta ashkaratikka heen daana. 
Isaiah65:10 Tana minththi koyza ta derezas, Lasharooney dorsa wudey heemettizaso, Akoore zulley wude mehey pe7izaso gidana." 
Isaiah65:11 Gido attiin GODAA aggida inttes, ta geeshsha zumaa dogida inttes, ‹Ta baso› geetettiza eeqa xoossas soho giigsida inttes, ‹Gaade› geetettiza eeqa xoossas walakettida woyne ushshu wancan kunththida inttes," 
Isaiah65:12 ta xeygiin zaarontta ixxida gishshas, ta yootiin siyontta ixxida gishshas, ta sinththankka iita ooththida gishshas, tana hanqeththiza miish intte doorida gishshas, ta inttena mashshas aaththa immana; intte ubbayka shukettanaas qoodhe immana» gees." 
Isaiah65:13 Hessa gishshas, Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Be7ite, ta ashkarati maana; intte gidikko gafana; ta ashkarati uyana; intte gidikko saamettana; Ta ashkarati ufayettana; intte gidikko yeellatana." 
Isaiah65:14 Ta ashkarati wozinappe ufayssan yexxana; intte gidikko wozinay meqqiin intte waassana; intte ayanay meqqida gishshas intte woo woo giidi waassana. 
Isaiah65:15 Intte intte sunththaa doorettida ta derey qanggana mala aaththi immana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY inttena wodhana; baas haggazizaytas gidikko izi hara sunth immana. 
Isaiah65:16 Hessa gishshas biittay bolla anjjo koyzaadey tuma Xoossa sunththan anjjettana; biittayn caaqqiza asi tuma Xoossa sunththan caaqqana; kase aadhdhida metoti dogettida; ta ayfeppekka geemmida» gees. 
Isaiah65:17 GODAY, «Hekko, tani ooraththa salotanne ooraththa sa7a medhdhana; kase aadhdhida miishshati qofettettennanne hassa7ettettenna." 
Isaiah65:18 Gido attiin tani medhdhizayssan ufayettite; mernaas hombocite; tani Yerusalaame ufayssas, izi deraakka homboceththas medhdhana." 
Isaiah65:19 Tani Yerusalaamen ufayettana; tani ta derezan hombocana; hayssafe guyen yeehoynne waasoy heen seetettenna. 
Isaiah65:20 Hayssafe guyen heen guuththa wodes shemppora paxa daana yidhay woykko wode kallontta cimay deenna; xeetu layth kumida asi hayqqiko wodey gakkontta mulqqetti hayqqida asa mala qoodettana; asi xeetu layth kumontta hayqqiko boshan hayqqida mala qoodeettes. 
Isaiah65:21 He wode asay keeth keexxana; izankka daana; woyne mith tokkidi iza ayfe maana. 
Isaiah65:22 Hayssafe guye hara asi izan daana keeth keexxettenna; woykko haray maana miishshi tokettenna; ta deraa layththi miththa layththa mala aduqqana; tani dooridayti bantta kushe ooson adussa layth ufayettana. 
Isaiah65:23 Istta daaburay hada attenna; qaada iita naakka yelettenna; isttinne istta zereththi GODAY anjjida dere gidana. 
Isaiah65:24 Istti buro tana xeyganaappe kaseta tani koyana; istti taas yooti wursontta ta siyana. 
Isaiah65:25 Kana suyteynne dorsa laaqqay issife maana; gaammoy boora mala maata maana; shooshshi gudulla laaccana; ta geeshsha zumaa bolla istti qohettettenna; bashshika istta bolla yeenna» gees. 
Isaiah66:1 GODAY, «Saloy taas araata; sa7aykka taas yedhdhizaso; histtiin intte taas keexxana keeththinne ta shemppana soy awayssee?" 
Isaiah66:2 Hayta ubbaa ta kushey ooththibeennee? Hayti beettana mala ooththiday tana gidikkinaa? Tani ashke; wozinay meqqidaadenne ta qaalaska kokkorizaadeko ta xeellays. 
Isaiah66:3 «Gido attiin taas boora yarshizaadey as wodhizaade mala, dorsa laaqqa yarshizaadey kana cuulli wodhiza asa mala; kaththa yarsho shiishshizaadey, guddunththa suuth shiishshizaade mala; qofsos exaane taas cu7asizaadey, eeqa xoos goynniza asa mala; istti bantta oge doorida; istta shemppoyakka istta tunateththan ufayettawus." 
Isaiah66:4 Hessa gishshas meto ta istta bolla gaththana; istti yayyida miishshika ta istta bolla ehana; gaasoykka ta xeygiza wode istti koyibeettenna; ta yootishin istti ezgibeettenna; ta sinththan iita miish ooththida; tana iitiza miish doorida» gees. 
Isaiah66:5 Intteno qaalaas kokkorizaytoo, hayssa GODAA qaala siyite; «Intte ishantti inttena ixxidaytoo, ta sunththa gishshas inttena kessi yeggidaytoo! Inttena, ‹Ane GODAY bonchchettoo! Ane intte ufayssaaka be7oos› gida; gidikkoka istti yeellatanayssi attenna." 
Isaiah66:6 Hessa kataman diza waasoza siyite; Xoossa keeththan diza caabba siyite; hessika GODAA cenggurssa; izi ba morkketas bessiza waaga qanxxana. 
Isaiah66:7 Miixattanaappe kaseta yelawus; miixa waaye be7ontta dashe attuma naa yelawus. 
Isaiah66:8 Hessa mala yo7o siyi erizay oonee? Hessa mala yo7o be7i erizay oonee? Derey issi gallas medhetti erizee? Woykko kawoteththati qiphida ayfey xeellanaashe gakkanaas beetti erizoo? Xiyoono buro miixay oykkishin heerakka ba nayta yelawus. 
Isaiah66:9 Yelettana matidayssa yelettontta mala tani diggazinaa?» gees GODAY. «Yelishin yeliza ulo ta gorda erazinaa?» gees ne GODAY. 
Isaiah66:10 «Intteno Yerusalaamo siiqiza ubbatoo, izira ufayettite; intte izira hombocite; izis yeekkida ubbati izira keehi ufayettite." 
Isaiah66:11 Minththeththiza izi dhanththaa intte dhammidi kallana; inttes gidanaashe gakkanaas intte uyana; keehippe daro gidida izi dureteththan intte ufayettana» gees GODAY. 
Isaiah66:12 GODAY, «Be7ite, tani izis saroteth gita shaafa mala gogisana; kawoteththata aqota shaafa haaththa mala gogisana intte izi ki7on idimetti dhammana; izi ki7on uttidi intte guppana." 
Isaiah66:13 Aaya ba naa al7isiza mala takka inttena al7isana; intte Yerusalaamen minettana» gees. 
Isaiah66:14 Intte hessa be7iza wode intte wozinay ufayettana; intte meqeththaykka maata mala cililana; qasse GODAA kushey iza aylleta bolla dizayssi erettana; iza hanqoy gidikko iza morkketa bolla qonccana. 
Isaiah66:15 Hekko GODAY tama lacon yaana; iza para-gaareti gote carko mala; izi ba yiillo hanqon, ba seera tama lacon qonccisana." 
Isaiah66:16 Tamaninne mashshan GODAY ba pirdaa asa ubbaa bolla ehana; daroti GODAA mashshan shukettana. 
Isaiah66:17 GODAY, «Atakiltey dizasoho biidi isttafe issaas goynnanaas bana geeshshizaytinne dummasizayti, guddunththa ashonne ecere asho, tunida miishshata miza ubbati ba pirda wurseththan issife ekkana» gees." 
Isaiah66:18 «Tani istta oosonne istta qofa eriza gishshas, kawoteththata ubbaanne dumma dumma qaalan haasayza ubbata issife shiishshanaas yaana; isttika yiidi ta bonchcho be7ana." 
Isaiah66:19 Tani istta giddon malata ooththana; isttafe attida issi issineta gede kawoteththatakko, Tarseese, Puuxe, wondafen olettiza erettida Luudetakko, Tubaalenne Yaawaane hessaththoka ta goobateththaa siyonttaytakkonne ta bonchcho beyonttaytakko haakon diza abba giddon diza harurotakko ta yeddana; ta bonchcho kawoteththata giddon yootana." 
Isaiah66:20 GODAAS yarsho gidana mala intte ishata ubbata kawoteththatappe bonchchettida ta zumaa Yerusalaame paran, para-gaareninne gaaren, baquloninne gaamellan istta ehana. Isra7eele asay kaththa yarsho wogan diza mala geeshsha miishshan woththidi GODAA Keeth shiishshiza mala haytakka shiishshana." 
Isaiah66:21 Tanikka isttafe baggayta qeesetanne Leweta gidana mala ta doorana» gees. 
Isaiah66:22 GODAY, «Tani medhdhana ooraththa salotinne ooraththa sa7ay ta sinththan minni daanayssaththo intte sunththinne intte zereththa sunththi hessaththo minni daana." 
Isaiah66:23 Agina xeeroppe biidi hara aginay xeerana gakkanaas, issi Sambatappe biidi hara Sambata gakkanaas, as gidida ubbay taas goynnana yaana." 
Isaiah66:24 Istti kezidi ta bolla makkallida asata aha be7ana. Istta miza guxuneykka hayqqenna; istta miza tamaykka to7enna. Istti asa zereth ubbaas harassizaaz gidana» gees. 
Jeremiah1:1 Biniyaame biittan Anatoote kataman diza qeesetappe issaa Kilqiyaasa naa Ermaasi yootida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa. 
Jeremiah1:2 Amoone naa Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasi kawotida tammanne heedzdzanththo layththan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides. 
Jeremiah1:3 Qasse Iyosiyaasa naa Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aaqemey kawotida layththatan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides. Hessafe guye Iyosiyaasa naa Sedeqiyaasi kawotiin tammanne issinththa layththan he wode ichchashanththa aginan Yerusalaame asay di7ettidi baana gakkanaas GODAA qaalay Ermaasa baggara izas yootettides. 
Jeremiah1:4 GODAA qaalay taakko hizgishe yides. 
Jeremiah1:5 «Ermaasa! Tani nena ne aayey ulon medhdhanaappe kase erays. Neni yelettanaappe sinththan ta nena dummasa woththadis. Qasseka kawoteththatas nabe gidana mala shuumadis.» 
Jeremiah1:6 Histtiin tani, «Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Tani buro naa gidida gishshas ay ga haasayanaakko ta erikke» gadis." 
Jeremiah1:7 Gido attiin GODAY tana, « ‹Tani naa› gooppa. Tani nena kiittiza asa ubbaakko ba. Tani azaziyssa ubbaaka yoota." 
Jeremiah1:8 Tani nena ashshanaas nenara diza gishshas ne isttas yayyofa; tani GODAY hayssa nees yootays» gides. 
Jeremiah1:9 GODAY ba kushe yeddidi ta metershata bochchidi, «Hekko ne yootana ta qaala ne doonan woththadis." 
Jeremiah1:10 Neni shoddanaassinne laallanaas, dhayssanaassinne shira yegganaas, keexxanaassinne tokkanaas dereta bollanne kawoteththata bolla tani hach nena shuumadis» gides." 
Jeremiah1:11 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi, «Ermaasaa! Ne ay be7ay?» gi oychchides. Tanikka, «Ochcholoone hagga be7ays» gadis." 
Jeremiah1:12 GODAY tana, «Neni likke be7adasa. Tanikka ta qaalay polettanayssa tishshi histta be7ays» gides." 
Jeremiah1:13 GODAA qaalay qasseka taakko yiidi, «Haray aazi nees beettizee?» gi oychchides. Tanikka zaarada, «Issi penttiza otoy pudeha baggafe haa geddi gi uttidayssi beettees» gadis." 
Jeremiah1:14 GODAY taas, «Pudeha baggafe bashshi dhuuqqidi ha biittan diza asaa ubbaa bolla gukkana." 
Jeremiah1:15 Tani pudeha baggan diza kawoteththata haa yaana mala xeygana; Yerusalaameninne izi yuushon diza Yuhuda katamata bolla meto gaththidi istta oykkana; hessafe guye Yerusalaame geliza pengeta bolla bantta araata miccana. 
Jeremiah1:16 «Yuhuda asay tana aggidi, hara eeqa xoossatas exaane cuwasida gishshas, ba kushen ooththi kessidayta goynnida gishshas ta deraa bolla pirdaa awajjadis." 
Jeremiah1:17 «Neni gidikko giigetta! Denda eqqada tani nena azazizayssa ubbaa isttas yoota; isttas yayyofa. Neni isttas yayyiko tani nena istta sinththan gujja yashissana. 
Jeremiah1:18 «Hach tani nena ha biitta ubbaa bolla, Yuhuda kawota bolla, halaqata bolla, qeeseta bollanne ha biitta asaa bolla ne eqetta dandayana mala gimbettida katama, birata tuussinne xarqimalappe oosettida birata dirsa mala ooththadis." 
Jeremiah1:19 Istti nenara olettana; gido attiin tani ashshanaas nenara issife diza gishshas nena xoonettenna. Tani GODAY hayssa nees yootays» gides. 
Jeremiah2:1 GODAA qaalay yiidi taas," 
Jeremiah2:2 «Ba! Baada waassa; Yerusalaame asaa hayththan sissa; GODAY, ‹Neni naateteththan ay keena ammanettidaakko, qasse neni buro mishiran dashe tana ay keena siiqidaakko, zereththi zerettontta bazzo biittan ne wostta kaallidaakko ta akeekays." 
Jeremiah2:3 He wode Isra7eeley GODAAS geeshsha, koyro shiishshiza xeera kaththa mala; izo mittidayti mooranchcha gidida; istta bolla bashshi yides› » gees." 
Jeremiah2:4 Intteno Yaaqoobe keeththa asatoo! Isra7eele zare ubbatoo! GODAA qaala siyite! 
Jeremiah2:5 GODAY, «Kase intte aawati taappe haakkiday, hada yo7o kaalliday, ba hu7esikka go7ay bayndayta gididay taappe ay mooro demmidii?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Isttika, ‹Nuna Gibxeppe kessiday, bazzon samida ogera, kundukurcco biittara, melanne dhuma biittara, asi aadhdhonttasora nuna kaaleththi ehida GODAY awan dizee?› gi oychchibeettenna." 
Jeremiah2:7 Intte izi ayfenne izi anjjo maana mala tani inttena aradda biitta ehadis; gido attiin intte yiidi ta biitta tunisideta; ta xinxxoyo harasettana mala ooththideta. 
Jeremiah2:8 Qeesetikka, ‹GODAY awan dizee?› gi oychchibeettenna; Ta wogay istta kushen diza asatikka tana eribeettenna. Dere kaaleththizaytikka ta bolla makkallida. Nabeti Ba7aale sunththan tinbite yootida; go7ontta miishshatakka kaallida» gides." 
Jeremiah2:9 Qasseka GODAY, «Hessa gishshas tani inttenara buro pirdettana; intte nayta naytarakka mootettana." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kiitime pinni xeellite; Qeedaare kiittidi lo7eththi xomosite; Histtidi ane hayssa mala hanoy kase hani erizaakko be7ite. 
Jeremiah2:11 Istti tumu xoossata gidontta aggikokka ba eeqa xoossata laammida kawoteththi dizee? Ta derey gidikko isttas bonchcho gididayssa hada gidida eeqa xoossatan laammides» gees. 
Jeremiah2:12 Qasseka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Salotoo, ‹Hanno Poora!› giite; keehi dagammidi kokkorite!" 
Jeremiah2:13 Ta derey nam7u iita miishshata ooththides; de7o haaththa pultto gidida tana aggides; haaththa oykkanaas dandayontta lukettida ollata baas bookkida. 
Jeremiah2:14 Isra7eeley kareppe yida ayllee? woykko soon yelettida ayllee? Histtiin ays bonqqas aadhdhi imettidee? 
Jeremiah2:15 Gaammoti iza bollan xaaggida; istti bantta qaala dhoqqu histtidi iza bolla garmamida; istti iza biitta bula kessida; iza katamatikka xuugettidanne kayzida. 
Jeremiah2:16 Qasseka Memppisanne Xaafinaase asati ne hu7e bulusida. 
Jeremiah2:17 Oge nena kaaleththizayssa GODAA ne Xoossa aggada hayssa ne bolla ehiday nena gidikkii? 
Jeremiah2:18 Shihoore shaafappe haath uyanaas, ay ekkanaas duge Gibxe wodhdhadii? Woykko Efiraaxise shaafappe haath uyanaas duge Asoore beeth ays koshshidee?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ne iitateththi ne bolla qixaate gaththana; ne tana kaddoyssi ne bolla hanqo ehana. GODAA ne Xoossaa ne aggishin, taas yashshateth ne wudu gontta ixxishin ay mala iitaynne camo miishshi ne bolla gakkanaakko qoppa; ane akeeka» gees." 
Jeremiah2:20 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Benippe doommada tani ne qambara menththadis; nena qachchida miishshika duuththadis. Histtiinkka, ‹Tani nees ooththike› gadasa. Histtada dhoqqa zumbullata achchan miththa garsan laymatanaas ichchadasa." 
Jeremiah2:21 Tani nena muuruta zereththafe ekkada, lo7o woyne tura mala tokkadis. Histtiin neni waana guye simmada woran mokkidi moorettida woyne tura mala gidadii?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Neni hadinccen meecettikokka, woykko daro saamunan meecettikokka ne mooro qitay ha7ikka ta sinththan dees» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY." 
Jeremiah2:23 Neni waanada, «Tani tunabeekke; tani Ba7aale eeqatas goynnanaas woxxabeekke» gaanaas dandayay? Neni shoobban ooththidayssa ane qoppa; neni ooththidayssa ane akeeka; neni yaanne haa woxerettiza gaamella mala gidadasa." 
Jeremiah2:24 Neni bazzo biittan baas dose histtada ziita keza singeththashe woxxiza hardida mala gidadasa; Iza birassas kezaychchiko oonee izo teqqanaas dandayzay? Iza biras keziin izo koyzayti ubbati waayontta demmeettes. 
Jeremiah2:25 Ne tohoy argacana gakkanaas woxxofa; ne doonay saamon melana gakkanaas toylattofa; ne gidikko, «Coo daaburoppa; tani eeqa xoossata dosadis; tani istta kaallana» gadasa." 
Jeremiah2:26 «Kaysoy oykettidi yeellatiza mala Isra7eele asay yeellatides; isttika, istta kawoti, istta shuumeti, istta qeesetinne istta nabeti ubbay hessaththo yeellatana." 
Jeremiah2:27 Istti mith, ‹Neni ta aawaa› geettes; qasse shuch, ‹Neni tana yeladasa› geettes. Istti taas ba sinth zaaranayssa aggidi zokko zaarida; gido attiin istta metoy gakkida wode, ‹Yaada nuna ashsha› geettes." 
Jeremiah2:28 Histtiin ane intte inttes medhdhida xoossati awan dizoo? Yuhudaa, intte metotiza wode istti inttena ashshanaas dandaykko ane inttena yiidi ashshetto! Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Intte xoossati intte katamata mala cora» gides." 
Jeremiah2:29 GODAY, «Intte tanara ays mootetteetii? Intte ubbayka ta bolla makkallideta." 
Jeremiah2:30 Tani intte nayta coo mela qaxxayadis; istti gidikko baaybeettenna; gafida gaammo mala intte mashshay intte nabeta mides» gees. 
Jeremiah2:31 Intteno ha wode yeletatoo! GODAA qaala yuushshi qopite; «Tani inttes Isra7eele asaas bazzo mala woykko sakkanna dhumay diza biitta mala gidadinaa? Histtiin ays ta asay, ‹Nuni nu shene mala hanana; simmidikka neekko yookko› gizee?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Geela7oy ba alleqo woykko mishiraya ba mishirateththa may7o bala erazee? ta derey gidikko tana daro wode gakkanaas balides. 
Jeremiah2:33 Ziitan as oykkanaas ne ay mala eranchchaa? Huskku huskkiza iita maccassatikka ne hanoteththaafe daro iita miish tamaareettes. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ne istta kaysoteththan oykkontta xillo manqota suuththi ne may7o bolla beettides. Neni hayssa ubbaa ooththa woththadakka," 
Jeremiah2:35 ‹Tani xillo; tumappe iza hanqoy tana gakkenna› gaasa. Neni, ‹Tani nagara ooththabeekke› giza gishshas tani ne bolla pirdana." 
Jeremiah2:36 Histtiin ne oge laamma laamma ays woxxay? Kase nena Asoore biittay kawushshida mala Gibxe biittay nena kawushshana. 
Jeremiah2:37 Neni ammanettizayta GODAY kawushshida gishshassinne isttafekka maado demmontta gishshas hayssafekka ne hu7e kushen baqqa oykkada kezana. 
Jeremiah3:1 «Issi asi ba keeththaayo anjji yeddiin iza baada hara azina gelikko, kase anjji yeddidaadey simmi izikko bizee? izi biikko he biittaya mule tunekkee? Neni gidikko ne siiqiza cora laggetara laymatadasa; histtadakka ha7i neni taakko simmana koyay?» gees." 
Jeremiah3:2 «Ane dhoqqu gaada aykkoy baynda zumbullata xeella; neni laymas ichchonttasoy hessan dizee? Bonqqana bazzon uttida panga mala oge doonan uttada ne laggeththota naagadasa; histtada neni laymateththaninne iitateththan biittayo tunisadasa. 
Jeremiah3:3 Hessa gishshas puuseykka puusontta mala digettides; balgo iraykka bukkontta aggides; ne gidikko hanno gakkanaas laymateth aggabeekka; neni yeellatonttaka ixxadasa. 
Jeremiah3:4 Ha7i neni tana, ‹Ta aawawu, taas naateteththa laggezoo!" 
Jeremiah3:5 Neni ubbato ta bolla hanqettanee? Ne hanqoy mernaassee?› gadasa. Ee neni hizgaasa; gido attiin neni dandayda keena iita miish ubbaa ooththaasa» gees. 
Jeremiah3:6 Kawo Iyosiyaasi kawotida layth GODAY taas, «Hanna ammanoy baynda Isra7eeley ooththidayssa neni be7adii? Iza dhoqqa zumbullata bolla kezada daashsha miththata garsan laymatadus." 
Jeremiah3:7 Iza hayssa ubbaa ooththadakka taakko simmana gaada qoppadis shin simmabeekku. Qasse ammanettontta izi michcho Yuhudaykka hessa beyadus. 
Jeremiah3:8 Ammanoy baynda Isra7eele dereti laymatida gishshas anjjo waraqata imma yeddadis; Isra7eele michcho ammanettontta Yuhudaykka hayssa be7ashe yayyontta kezada laymatishin be7adis. 
Jeremiah3:9 Ba kawushshateththan biitta tunisadus; miththarakka shuchcharakka laymatadus. 
Jeremiah3:10 Hessan ubbaankka izi michchiya, ammanettontta Yuhuday coo simmidaa misatawusife attiin kumeththa wozinappe taakko simmabeekku» gides." 
Jeremiah3:11 GODAY taas, «Ammanettontta Yuhudappe ammanoy baynda Isra7eeley xilla beettadus." 
Jeremiah3:12 «Ba; baada pudeha baggas, ‹Hanne ammanoy baynda Isra7eelee simma! Tani maarotay kumidaade gidida gishshas nena iita ayfen xeellike; mernaaskka hanqettike› gees GODAY." 
Jeremiah3:13 Gidikkonne neni, ‹GODAA ne Xoossaa bolla makkallateththan, ne bonchchoka allaga xoossatas daashsha miththata garsan aaththa imoninne taas azazettontta ixon neni mooranchcha gididayssa xalla ammana› gees GODAY» gides." 
Jeremiah3:14 Qasseka GODAY, «Intteno ammanettontta asatoo, simmite; tani inttes azina; Tani intte giddofe issi katamappe issaa, issi qommofe nam7ata doorada Xiyoone ehana." 
Jeremiah3:15 «Hessafe guye tani ta wozina mala inttena erateththaninne akeekan heemmiza heenththanchchata inttes immana. 
Jeremiah3:16 Qasseka GODAY intte qooday biitta bolla corattiza wode, ‹GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa› gi xeygekketa. Izi isttas qofettennanne akeekettenna, dhayennanne haray oosettenna." 
Jeremiah3:17 He woden istti Yerusalaame, ‹GODAA araata› gi xeygana. Kawoteththa ubbaafe asay GODAA sunth bonchchanaas Yerusalaame shiiqana. Hessafe istti bantta iita wozina hanoteththaa kaallettenna." 
Jeremiah3:18 He gallassatan Yuhuda asati Isra7eele asatara gayttidi pudeha bagga biittafe tani kase intte aawatas xinxxo histta immida biitta issife yaana» gees. 
Jeremiah3:19 GODAY, «Tani nena attuma nayta mala wostta woththanaakko, doorettida biittayonne ay kawoteththika demmontta lo7o biittayo nena laatissana qoppadis. Qasse tana, ‹Ta aawawu!› gaada xeygana misatides; tana kaallizasoppe guye simmontta misatadasa;" 
Jeremiah3:20 Gido attiin Isra7eele asawu! Intte ba azinaas ammanettontta maccassa mala taas ammanettibeekketa» gees. 
Jeremiah3:21 Istti GODAA bantta Xoossaa balidi bantta oge geellasida gishshas Isra7eele deraa waasoy, misha yeehoy aykkoy baynda zumbullata bolla siyettees;" 
Jeremiah3:22 Istti, «Intteno ammanoy baynda asatoo! Taakko simmite. Intte ammanettana mala, tani inttena paththana» gides. Histtiin isttas, «Ero, nuni neekko simmana. Ays giikko neni GODAA nu Xoossa." 
Jeremiah3:23 Nuni zumbullata bollanne zumata bolla eeqa xoossatas goynoy tumappe nuus bala; tumappe nuus Isra7eeletas atoteththi GODAA nu Xoossaafe. 
Jeremiah3:24 Nuni yelagateththafe doommiin nu aawati daaburi demmida ayfeta, istta dorsatanne meheta, istta macca naytanne attuma nayta tuna xoossati mi dhayssida." 
Jeremiah3:25 Nuni yelagateththafe doommidi hach gakkanaas, nunikka nu aawatikka GODAA nu Xoossa bolla nagara ooththidos; GODAAS nu Xoossaas azazettibeekko; hessa gishshas ane nuni yeellateth gullunttidi ichchoos; qasse kawushshateththi nuna afala mala kammo» geettes." 
Jeremiah4:1 GODAY, «Isra7eele asawu! simmiko haa taakko simmite. Intte harassiza miishshata ta sinththafe diggiko, yayyontta minni eqqiko," 
Jeremiah4:2 intte tuman, suureteththaninne xilloteththan, ‹De7o GODAY beyiin!› giidi caaqqiko, he wode kawoteththati izan anjjettananne bonchchettana» gees." 
Jeremiah4:3 GODAY Yuhuda asaassinne Yerusalaamen dizaytas, «Oththa gade goyite; agunththa giddon zeropite." 
Jeremiah4:4 Intteno Yuhuda asatoo, Yerusalaamen dizaytoo! GODAAS intte qaxxarettite; intte wozina iitateththaa diggite; histtontta aggiko intte ooththida iitateththaa gishshas ta hanqoy tama mala eexxi kezana; oonikka iza toyssanaas dandayenna» gees." 
Jeremiah4:5 GODAY, « ‹Biitta ubbaan zaye punnite!› giidi Yuhudan yootite. Yerusalaamenkka awajjite; ‹Issife shiiqite! Ane gimbettida katamatakko baqatoos!› gi waassite." 
Jeremiah4:6 Xiyoone gelanaas bandira oykkite! eeson baqati attite; Ays giikko tani pudeha baggafe hanqonne bash ehana. 
Jeremiah4:7 Gaammoy ba dizasoppe kezides; kawoteththata dhayssizay kiitettides; ne biittayokka bulasanaas ba dizasoppe kezides; ne katamati laalettana; kundidikka kayzi attana. 
Jeremiah4:8 Hessa gishshas maaqa may7ite; kayottishe, ‹Wuu! Wuy› gi yeekkite. Ays giikko GODAA hanqo seelay nu bollafe simmibeenna» gees." 
Jeremiah4:9 Qasseka GODAY, «He gallas kawo wozinaynne shuumeta wozinay taahana; qeeseti dagammana; nabetikka kokkorana» gees." 
Jeremiah4:10 Histtiin tani, «Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Mashshay istta qoodhen wodhdhiin, ‹Inttes sa7ay saro gidana› gaada ha asaanne Yerusalaame ays keeha baleththadii?» gadis." 
Jeremiah4:11 He woden ha asaassinne Yerusalaames, «Bazzon diza aykkoy baynda zumbullatappe xuuggiza carkoy ta deraa bolla carkana; gido attiin hessi kath suragganaassinne geeshshanaas gidenna." 
Jeremiah4:12 Hessafekka keehi wolqqamiza carkoy ta azazon carkana; ha7i tani istta bolla pirdana» geetetti yootettana. 
Jeremiah4:13 Be7ite! Morkkey shaara mala biitta kumides; iza para-gaaretikka gote carko mala yeettes; iza paratikka golle kafota mala eesoteettes; aayye ana nu dhayana goos! 
Jeremiah4:14 Nenoo Yerusalaamee! Ne attana koykko ne wozina iitateththaa meecetta; Iita qofay ne wozinan ayde gakkanaas gam7anee? 
Jeremiah4:15 Cenggurssi Daaneppe seetettees; Efreeme zumata bolla bashshi awajjeettes. 
Jeremiah4:16 «Kawoteththatas yootite; Yerusalaameskka, ‹Dooddi un7eththizayti haaho biittafe yaana; Yuhuda katamata bollaka ceeqettana;" 
Jeremiah4:17 Iza ta bolla makkallida gishshas kath naagiza asa mala istti Yuhuda giddoththana› giite. 
Jeremiah4:18 Ne hanoynne ne oosoy hessa ne bolla ehides; hessi nees qixaate; hessika ay mala cammizaazee! ay mala wozina menththizaazee!» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah4:19 Waanoo tanii! Tani hayssa wostta dandayanee! Tana metides! Ta wozinay hirgees; tani co7u gaanaas dandaykke. Ays giikko tani zaye cenggurssinne ola cenggurs siyadis. 
Jeremiah4:20 Iita miishshi iita miish kaallees; mule biittay moorettides; ta dunkaanetinne magalashati eeson dhayda. 
Jeremiah4:21 Tani ayde gakkanaas ola malata xeellanee? ta ayde gakkanaas zaye giiris siyanee? 
Jeremiah4:22 GODAY, «Ta asay eeya; istti tana erettenna. Istti yuushshi qopponttayta; istti akeekay bayndayta; istti iita miish ooththanaas eranchchata; lo7o ooththanaas eray paccidayta» gees." 
Jeremiah4:23 Tani sa7a xeellada sa7ay lo7i giigonttayssanne coo mela dizayssa be7adis. Qasse salota xeellada isttan poo7oy bayndayssa be7adis. 
Jeremiah4:24 Tani zumata xeellada istti kokkorishininne zumbullati ubbay yon7iyon7ishin be7adis. 
Jeremiah4:25 Tani xeelladis shin ay asikka be7abeekke; salo kafotikka ubbay piradhdhidi dhayda. 
Jeremiah4:26 Aradda biittay bazzo gididayssa be7adis; GODAA sinththan, iza suule hanqo sinththan he katamatikka laalettida." 
Jeremiah4:27 GODAY, «Mule biittay bulattana; gido attiin tani izo mulera dhayssike." 
Jeremiah4:28 Hessa gishshas sa7ay yeekkana; saloykka dhumana. Ays giikko tani gadis; he qofaa ta laammontta mala qachchadis» gees. 
Jeremiah4:29 Para asatanne wondafe asata kachcha gaason asay katama ubbaafe baqatana. Baggay woxxidi wora gars gelana; baggay qasse zaalla bolla kezana; katamay ubbay asi baynda kayzi attana. 
Jeremiah4:30 Hanne bashshas uttidaaree! Neni ay ooththay? Ne zo7o may7o ays may7ay? Worqqa alleqokka ays aaththay? Ne ayfe ciro ays tiyay? Neni coo mela nena lo7eththaasa; Ne laggeththoti nena kadhida; istti nena wodhanaas koyeettes. 
Jeremiah4:31 Tani koyro bayra naa yelanaas miixattiza maccassa mala ne waassishin ta siyadis; Yerusalaame macca naya peenoy tucettanaashe gakkanaas waassishininne ba kushe miccada, «Ta waanoo! Hekko tana wodhana geettes!» gishin siyadis." 
Jeremiah5:1 GODAY, «Ane Yerusalaame ogeta bolla kezidi pudenne duge yuushshi xeellitenne akeekite; derey duulatizasotan xilloteth koyzaynne suure pirdiza kezidi intte issaadeka demmiko tani Yerusalaame maarana." 
Jeremiah5:2 Gido attiin isttas, ‹GODAY beyiin› gi caaqqikokka istti tumappe wordo caaqqeettes» gees." 
Jeremiah5:3 Abeet GODAWU! Ne ayfeti tumaa xeelettennee? Neni istta shocadasa shin istta sakkibeenna. Neni istta kinchchereththadasa; gido attiin istti simmibeettenna; istti bantta wozina shuchchafe aaththi minththida; bantta nagarappeka simmontta ixxida. 
Jeremiah5:4 Hessafe guye tani ta wozinan, «Hayti manqotanne eeyata; heyti GODAA ogenne bantta Xoossa woga eronttayta." 
Jeremiah5:5 Hessa gishshas tani gita asataakko baana; isttaskka yootana; gaasoykka GODAA ogenne bantta Xoossa woga ereettes» gaada qoppadis. Gido attiin istti ubbayka issife iza qambara menththida; qashozakka duuththida. 
Jeremiah5:6 Hessa gishshas gaammoy worappe kezidi istta menththereththana; kana suytey bazzofe kezidi istta puuzereththana; Maahey istta katamata yuusho zamadi naagana. He katamatappe keziza ubbaa izi puuzana. Gaasoykka istta makkallateththinne kaddoy darides. 
Jeremiah5:7 GODAY, «Tani intte nagara ays atto goo? Intte nayti tana aggida; eeqa xoossatankka caaqqida; Tani istta kalssa mizadis; istti gidikko laymatidanne layma keeth bida." 
Jeremiah5:8 Istti dhiikettida korma para mala gidida; istti issoy issoy asa machcho laggeththanaas kaallida. 
Jeremiah5:9 Tumuppe tani ha yo7ota gishshas istta qaxxayanaas bessennee? Tani ta hu7era hessa mala kawoteththa bolla halo kessana bessennee?» gees. 
Jeremiah5:10 Qasseka GODAY, «Woyne tura giddo biidi iza moorite; gido attiin mulera dhayssofte. Istti GODAAS gidontta gishshas izi haggata tarshi tarshi yeggite; Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay mulera tana kaddida» gees." 
Jeremiah5:11  
Jeremiah5:12 Istti GODAA bolla wordo haasayda; «Izi nuna aykkoka ooththenna; iita miishshika nu bolla gakkenna; olanne kosha nuni mulekka be7okko. 
Jeremiah5:13 Nabeti carko mala attiin istta giddon qaalay deenna; istti gizaazi ubbay istta bolla gakko» geettes. 
Jeremiah5:14 Hessa gishshas GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «Istti ha qaala haasayda gishshas tani ta qaala ne doonan tama kessana. Ha asaakka mith kessana; tamaykka istta mi dhayssana» gees." 
Jeremiah5:15 GODAY inttena, «Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Tani intte bolla haaho biittafe issi kawoteth ehana. Izi wolqqamanne beniisofe diza kawoteththa. Iza qaalay inttes erettenna; iza haasayay inttes gelenna." 
Jeremiah5:16 Istta mashsha koohoy doya diza duufo mala; istti ubbayka wolqqama olanchchata. 
Jeremiah5:17 Istti intte kaththaanne qumaa pitti maana. Intte attuma naytanne macca nayta wodhana. Intte dorsanne miizaa bonqqidi maana. Intte woyne teeranne balase teera bonqqidi maana. Intte ammanettiza gimbettida katamatakka istti bantta mashshan dhayssana» gees. 
Jeremiah5:18 GODAY Ermaasa, «Gido attiin he gallassatan tani inttena mulera dhayssike." 
Jeremiah5:19 Asay nena, ‹Nu GODAA nu Xoossay nu bolla hayssa ubbaa ays ooththidee?› giidi oychchiza wode neni isttas, ‹Intte tana GODAA aggidi intte biittan allaga xoossatas ooththida mala, intteka asa biittan allagatas hessaththo ooththana› ga» gides." 
Jeremiah5:20 Qasseka GODAY, «Hayssa Yaaqoobeso asatas yoota; Yuhuda biittankka hizga awajja;" 
Jeremiah5:21 Intteno Ayfey dishin demmonttaytoo! Hayththi dishin siyonttaytoo! Eeyanne yuushshi qopponttaytoo! Hayssa siyite! 
Jeremiah5:22 Intte taas yayyanaas bessennee? Intte ta sinththan kokkoranaas bessennee? Ays giikko izi mernaas kanththi bontta mala, tani ancco abbas zawa ooththadis. Dambalay bulakettikokka zawappe aadhdhenna; Izi guummikkoka pinnanaas dandayenna." 
Jeremiah5:23 Gido attiin ha deraas muumenne makkalla wozinay dees; Istti oge aggi wora bida. 
Jeremiah5:24 Istti bantta wozinan, ‹Nuus sila iranne gabba ira woden woden bukissiza, kaththa shiishsho wode nuus wodera ehiza GODAA nu Xoossaas ane yayyoos› gibeettenna." 
Jeremiah5:25 ‹Intte iita oosoy hayta inttena diggides. Intte nagaray inttena lo7o miishshafe ashshides› ga» gees. 
Jeremiah5:26 GODAY, «Ta asaa giddon iita asati deettes. Kafota oykkanaas naagiza asa mala istti woximade woththidi asaa oykkanaas naageettes." 
Jeremiah5:27 Kafo keeththan kafoy kumida mala istta keeththan baleththoy kumides. Hessa gishshas istti durenne wolqqama gidida. 
Jeremiah5:28 Istti ordidanne modhdhida; istta iitateththaas zaway deenna. Yi7oti suure pirda demmana mala isttas eqqibeettenna; manqota maata gishshassika mootettettenna. 
Jeremiah5:29 Histtiin tani hayta ha yoota gishshas, istta qaxxayanaas bessennee? Hessa mala kawoteththa bolla ta halo kessanaas bessennee?» gees." 
Jeremiah5:30 Qasseka GODAY, «Daro babisiza miishshinne daganththiza miishshi biitta bollan hanides." 
Jeremiah5:31 Nabeti wordo tinbite yooteettes; qeesetikka istta zoren aysseettes. Ta asaykka hessa mala miish dosees! Histtiin wurseththan intte ay ooththanee?» gees. 
Jeremiah6:1 GODAY, «Intteno Biniyaame zaretoo! Pudeha baggafe iita miishshinne bashshi yaana giza gishshas intte shemppo ashshanaas baqatite! Yerusalaameppe kezite! Tequhe kataman zaye punnite! Beeti-Hakarimen malata bessite!" 
Jeremiah6:2 Tani mala lo7onne ufayssiza Xiyoone nayo dhayssana. 
Jeremiah6:3 Heenththanchchati bantta wude ekkidi izi bolla yaana; histtidi izi yuushon bantta dunkaane tokkana; bantta wude bantta sohon sohon heemmana. 
Jeremiah6:4 Istti issoy issaa, ‹Yerusalaamera olettanaas giigettite! Dendite! Ane nuni izo seeta gallas oloos. Gido attiin aayye ana! Sa7ay qammees; omarsa kuway aduqqi aduqqi bees." 
Jeremiah6:5 Hessa gishshas dendite! Ane omars oloos; histtidi izi miixaakka ane laalloos› giidi maqettida» gees. 
Jeremiah6:6 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Miththata qanxxite. Yerusalaame gimbe lanqen biitta doorite; ha katamayn qohoy kumida gishshas izis qixaatey bessees." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ollafe haaththi pulttiza mala izakka ba iitateththaa pulttisawus; Makkalla miishshinne bashsha miishshi izi giddon seetettees; ubba wode izi sakoynne madunththi taas beettees. 
Jeremiah6:8 Hanne Yerusalaame naagetta; ne akkay giikko ta neeppe shaakettana; qasse ne biittaaka bulasana» gees. 
Jeremiah6:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Woyne teera issinokka ashshontta maxiza mala Isra7eele asaappe attidayta hessaththoka maxi shiishshite. Woyne teera maxiza asa mala intte kushe haggata giddo nam7anththoka yeddite» gees." 
Jeremiah6:10 Tani oonas yootoo? Oona seeroo? Ooni ta gizaaz siyanee? hekko istta hayththi tulle gidida gishshas istti siyettenna; GODAA qaalay isttas qidhes kezides; istti izan ufayettettenna. 
Jeremiah6:11 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy tanan kumi uttides; tani ha hanqoza ta ulon oykkana dandaykke. Histtiin GODAY tana, «Ta hanqoza ogen diza guuththa nayta bollanne shiiqida yelaga nayta bolla gussa; machchanne azinay, cimmida asatikka kessi ekki attettenna." 
Jeremiah6:12 Tani he biittan dizayta bolla ta kushe yeddiza wode istta keeththati, istta gadetinne istta machchetikka attontta ubbay haratas gidana» gees." 
Jeremiah6:13 Qasseka GODAY, «Guuththayka gitaykka ubbay ba go7as yiiqetees. Nabetinne qeeseti ubbay as baleththeettes." 
Jeremiah6:14 Istti ta deraa madunththaa qeeri miishsha mala xeellida; paxana mala koshshiza ooso ooththibeettenna; Saroy baynda, ‹Saro; saro› geettes." 
Jeremiah6:15 Ha harassiza oosoza gishshas istti yeellatidoo? Akkay mulekka yeellatibeettenna; istti yeellay aazakko erettenna. Hessa gishshas istti kundizaytara issife kundana; tani istta qaxxayiza wode istti kawuyana» gees. 
Jeremiah6:16 GODAY, «Daggala oge bolla eqqi xeellite; beni ogeyo oychchite; Lo7o ogey awaarii? Izira biite; intte intte shemppos shemppo demmana; intte gidikko, ‹Nu izira bookko!› gideta." 
Jeremiah6:17 Ta inttena naagizayta woththadis; ‹Zayey punettishin siyite› gadis; intte gidikko, ‹Nuni siyokko› gideta." 
Jeremiah6:18 Hessa gishshas kawoteththatoo, siyite! Intteno markkatoo! Istta bolla aazi gakkanaakko akeekite." 
Jeremiah6:19 Biittayee siya! Istti ta qaala siyontta ixxida gishshassinne ta wogaakka kadhida gishshas tani deraa bolla istta iita qofaa mala bash ehana. 
Jeremiah6:20 Exaaney Saaba biittafe sawiza qimamey haako biittafe yiikko tana ay gaanee? Xuugettiza intte yarshozakka ta ekkike; intte shiishshiza hara yarshoyka tana ufayssenna» gees. 
Jeremiah6:21 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Tani ha deraa sinththan dhuphiza miish woththana; aawatinne attuma nayti izan dhuphettana; shoorotinne laggeti dhayana» gees." 
Jeremiah6:22 Qasseka GODAY, «Hekko pudeha baggafe olanchchati yeettes; gita kawoteththi sa7a gaxappe denththa bolla dees." 
Jeremiah6:23 Istti wondafenne toora oykkida. Istti menxe iitatanne qadhetay bayndayta; istti bantta parata toggiza wode abbay guummiza mala guummeettes. Intteno Xiyoone macca naytoo! Istti giigettidi inttena olanaas yeettes» gees. 
Jeremiah6:24 Nuni he yo7o siyiin nu qesey kim7ilish gides. Maccas miixay oykkida mala nuna ceecey oykkides. 
Jeremiah6:25 Morkkey mashsha gixxides; ubbason shiroy kumides; hessa gishshas kare kezopite; ogenkka hemettofte. 
Jeremiah6:26 Ta deretoo maaqa may7ite; bidinththa bolla bululettite; mexi issi nay hayqqida asa mala camo yeeho yeekkite; gaasoykka nu qoppontta dishin dhayssizay nu bolla yaana. 
Jeremiah6:27 GODAY Ermaasa, «Ermaasaa! Birata paaccizaade mala neni ta dereza ogenne istta hemeta paaccana mala ta nena woththadis;" 
Jeremiah6:28 Istti ubbay zigirshe yuuyizaytanne yootiin ekkontta makkallanchchata; istti xarqimala malanne birata mala; istti ubbayka mooro ooththizayta. 
Jeremiah6:29 Birata seerisanaas womppiina lo7eththa punna; gido attiin iitati mulera pitetti kezontta gishshas hessi coo hada daabura. 
Jeremiah6:30 GODAY istta kadhida gishshas istti kadhettida bira geetetti xeygettana» gees. 
Jeremiah7:1 GODAAPPE Ermaasas yida qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; 
Jeremiah7:2 «Neni GODAA Xoossa Keeththa pengen eqqa; histtada ha qaala, ‹Intteno GODAAS goynnanaas ha pengetara geliza Yuhuda asatoo, ubbayka GODAA qaala siyite!› ga awajja." 
Jeremiah7:3 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Intte ogenne intte ooso lo7eththite; intte histtiko ta inttena hayssan daana mala ooththana› gees." 
Jeremiah7:4 Cimo qaalan, ‹Hayssi GODAA Xoossa Keeththa! Hayssi GODAA Xoossa Keeththa! Hayssi GODAA Xoossa Keeththa!› giidi ammanettofte." 
Jeremiah7:5 Intte intte ogenne intte ooso lo7eththiko, intte giddon suureteththi diikko," 
Jeremiah7:6 bete yida asatanne yi7ota, am7eta intte qohontta aggiko, hayssa ha biitta bolla xillo suuth gussontta aggiko, inttena qohiza eeqa xoossata intte kaallontta aggiko," 
Jeremiah7:7 tani intte aawatas mernaas xinxxo histta immida ha biittayn ta inttena woththana. 
Jeremiah7:8 Hekko intte hada gidida wordo qaalan ammanettideta.» 
Jeremiah7:9 GODAY, «Intte kaysoteeta, as wodheeta, laymateeta, wordo caaqqi markkatteeta, Ba7aale eeqa xoossas yarsho yarsheeta, hayssafe kase intte erontta eeqa xoossatas goynneeta." 
Jeremiah7:10 Histtidi ta sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Keeththaa yi ta sinththan eqqidi, ‹Nuni lo7o doos!› gishe hayta harassiza miishshata ooson deeta." 
Jeremiah7:11 Ta sunththan xeygettida ha Xoossa Keeththay inttes pangati qotettiza gongolo gididee? Intte ooththizayssa ubbaa tani ta ayfera be7adis» gees. 
Jeremiah7:12 GODAY, «Tani ta sunththay izan daana mala ta dooridaso Seelo biite; ta asaa Isra7eele iitateththaa gaason tani heen ooththidayssa biidi be7ite." 
Jeremiah7:13 Intte hessa ubbaa ooththishin tani inttes zaara zaarada yootadis; gido attiin intte siyontta ixxideta; tani inttena xeygadis shin intte taas koyibeekketa. 
Jeremiah7:14 Hessa gishshas tani Seelon ooththidayssa mala ha7ikka hayssan intte ammanettiza, ta sunththay izan xeygettiza ha Xoossa Keeththaa bollaka ooththana; inttessinne kase intte aawatas immida sohon hayssan tani Seelo bolla ooththidayssa mala zaarada ooththana." 
Jeremiah7:15 Intte ishata Efreeme zareta tani diggida mala ta sinththafe inttenakka diggana» gees. 
Jeremiah7:16 GODAY, «Ermaasa, ne woossiinkka ta siyontta gishshas ne hayssa deraas woossofa; isttas shoobbofa woykko isttas gaannatoppa." 
Jeremiah7:17 Istti Yuhuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan ay ooththizaakko ne be7ikkii? 
Jeremiah7:18 ‹Salo godatteyo› geetettiza xoossayssi uketh uukkanaas maccassati dhiille munuqeettes; Nayti mith mixeettes; aawati tama eeththeettes. Istti tana qohana giidi ushsha yarsho hara xoossatas yarsheettes. 
Jeremiah7:19 Istti hayssa ubbaa ooththizay tana qohanaasee? Hayssan qohettidi yeellatanay bantta hu7es istta gidettennee?» gides. 
Jeremiah7:20 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Ta yiilloynne ta hanqoy ha soho bolla, medosata bolla, gaden diza miththa bollanne kaththa bolla gukkana; histtidi eexxana; to7anaaska dandayenna» gees." 
Jeremiah7:21 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Intte xuuggi shiishshiza yarshoza gidiin hara yarshotara gujjidi ashozara inttes miite." 
Jeremiah7:22 Tani intte aawata Gibxe biittafe kessida wode xuugettiza yarsho gishshas gidiin, hara yarsho gishshas gidiin, ta isttas yootabeekke woykko istta azazabeekke." 
Jeremiah7:23 Gido attiin tani isttas, ‹Taas azazettite; histtiko tani intte Xoossa gidana; intteka ta dere gidana; inttes lo7ana mala tani inttena azaziza oge ubbaara biite› gaada azazadis." 
Jeremiah7:24 Istti gidikko ta gizaaz siyibeettenna; wozinan woththi siyanaaska koyibeettenna; istti bantta iita wozina qofaa minththi kaallida; istti sinththe buus aggidi guye guye bida. 
Jeremiah7:25 Intte aawati Gibxe biittafe kezida gallassafe doommidi hanno gakkanaas tani ta aylle gidida nabeta isttas kiittashe days. 
Jeremiah7:26 Derezi gidikko ta gizaaz siyibeenna; wozinan woththi siyanaaska koyibeenna; istti bantta morge minththidanne istta aawati ooththida iita miishshafe aadhdhiza iita miish ooththida. 
Jeremiah7:27 «Hayssa ubbaa neni isttas yootana; gido attiin istti ne gizayssa siyettenna; neni istta xeygana shin istti nees koyettenna. 
Jeremiah7:28 Hessa gishshas neni isttas, ‹Hayssi derezi GODAA ba Xoossaas azazettonttanne iza zore ekkontta dere; tumay deenna; istta inxarsafe dhaydes." 
Jeremiah7:29 Hanqoy iza bolla gakkida ha yeletaa GODAY kadhida gishshassinne aggida gishshas intte hu7e meedidi wora yeggite; aykkoyka baynda zumbullata bolla kezidi zilalite› ga» gees. 
Jeremiah7:30 Qasseka GODAY, «Yuhuda asati ta sinththan iita miish ooththida; harassiza eeqa xoossata ehidi ta sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Keeththaan woththidi tunisida." 
Jeremiah7:31 Istti bantta attuma naytanne macca nayta taman xuuggidi yarshanaas, Henoome naa shoobban Toofeete geetettiza yarshosoho gimbida. Gido attiin hessi tani istta azazonttayssanne ta qofan bayndayssa." 
Jeremiah7:32 Hessa gishshas he sohoy Henoome naa shoobba woykko Toofeete geetettizayssi attidi Shuka Zulle geetetti xeygettana gallassati yeettes. Gaasoykka moogosoy dhayana gakkanaas hayqqida asati Toofeeten moogettana. 
Jeremiah7:33 He wode he asata ahay salo kafotassinne sa7a do7atas quma gidana; istta babisidi gooddiza miishshi deenna. 
Jeremiah7:34 Tani ilisi, ufayssa cenggurssinne mishirata cenggurs Yuhuda katamatappenne Yerusalaame ogetappe dhayssana; biittayakka bula gida attana» gees." 
Jeremiah8:1 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «He woden Yuhuda kawota meqeththi, shuumeta meqeththi, qeeseta meqeththi, nabeta meqeththinne Yerusalaamen diza asata meqeththi ubbay duufoppe maxettidi kezana." 
Jeremiah8:2 Histtidi istti siiqida, kiitettida, kaallida, zore oychchidanne goynnida arshe sinththan, agina sinththaninne salo xoolintteta ubbaa sinththan micettana. Istta meqeththay shiiqenna woykko moogettenna; gido attiin biitta bolla olettida buura mala gidana." 
Jeremiah8:3 Ha iita asaa kusheppe attidayti ubbay ta istta goodda yeddidaso ubbaan de7oppe hayqo doorana» gees. 
Jeremiah8:4 GODAY tana, «Asaas, ‹Asi kundiko kundidasohoppe simmidi dendennee? Woykko asi balidaa gidikko guyeppe ba balaappe simmennee?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Histtiin hayssi derezi ays guye simmi bizee? Yerusalaamey ays ubbato guye simmazee? Istti gene ooso minththi oykkida; simmanaaska koyettenna. 
Jeremiah8:6 Tani istta lo7eththa ezgadis; istti suure haasayettenna; ta ay ooththadinaa?› gees. Gido attiin ba iita ooso paaxizay issoyka deenna; olas dirgiza para mala ubbayka baas baas woxxees. 
Jeremiah8:7 Shimela geetettiza kafoti bantti simmiza wode ereettes; haraphpheti, dagicetinne waalla geetettiza kafoti ba dendi biza wode ereettes; gido attiin ta derey GODAA woga eribeenna." 
Jeremiah8:8 Wordanchcha xaafeti bantta bi7iren ta wogaa wordora xaafida; histtiin waanidi, ‹Nuni aadho eranchcha; GODAA wogay nunara dees› geetii?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Aadho eranchchati yeellatana; istti kawuyananne woximaden oykettana. GODAA qaalara istti eqettichchiin isttas aaza erateththi dizee? 
Jeremiah8:10 Hessa gishshas tani istta machcheta hara azinatas, istta biittatakka allagatas immana; guuththayka gitaykka ubbay bantta go7as yiiqeteettes. Nabetinne qeesetikka ubbay as baleththeettes." 
Jeremiah8:11 Istti ta dereza madunththaa qeeri miishshan qoodidi maaddontta dhale immeettes; saroy baynda, ‹Saro, saro› geettes." 
Jeremiah8:12 Tuna ooso ooththidi yeellatidoo? Chii! Mulekka yeellatibeettenna. Istti yeellay aazakkoka erettenna. Hessa gishshas isttika kundidaytara issife kundana; ta istta qaxxayiza wode istti kawuyana» gees. 
Jeremiah8:13 GODAY, «Istti goyi kessida kath ubbaa ta isttafe ekkaychchana; istta woyne turan ayfey dhayana; balase miththika ayfe immenna; istta bonccotikka qokkana; tani isttas immidayssi isttafe ekettichchana» gees." 
Jeremiah8:14 Histtiin asati, «Nuni hayssan ays uttinoo? Ane issi bolla shiiqite; gimbetti uttida katamatan baqati biidi heen hayqqoos; GODAA nu Xoossay nuna hayqqana mala pirdides; nuni iza bolla nagara ooththida gishshas nu uyana mala marzera diza haath immides." 
Jeremiah8:15 ‹Saroy yaana› giidi hidota ooththidos; gido attiin lo7o miishshi yibeenna. ‹Nuni paxana› giidi amottidos; gido attiin dagama xalla gidides. 
Jeremiah8:16 Morkketa para peenoy Daane katamappe siyettees; istta wodalla parata caashan biittay ubbay qaaxxees; biittayonne biittay bolla diza ubbaa, katamayonne izin diza ubbaa mittanaas yida» geettes." 
Jeremiah8:17 GODAY, «Be7ite, tani marzera diza shooshshata, muurennizayta hiillateththi teqqanaas dandayontta haso shooshshata intte giddo yeddana; istti inttena dukkana» gees." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ta ceeciza wode tana minththeththizayssoo! Ta wozinay keehi meqqides. 
Jeremiah8:19 Ta asay haaho biittan dishe waassiza waaso siya. Istti, «GODAY Xiyoonen deennee? Izi kawoykka heen deennee?» giidi waasseettes. Histtiin GODAY izas, «Istti baas massida misletan, hada gidida eeqa xoossatan tana ays hanqeththidoo?» gees." 
Jeremiah8:20 Histtiin asay, «Hekko kaththa shiishsho wodey aadhdhides; boneykka wurides; nunikka attibeekko» giidi waasseettes." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ta derey madunxishin tanikka madunxadis; yeekkadissinne dagammadis. 
Jeremiah8:22 Gala7aaden tiyiza dhaley deennee? Woykko heen aakimey deennee? Histtiin ta deraa madunththi ays paxibeennee? 
Jeremiah9:1 Shukettida ta deraa gishshas omarsinne gallas ta yeekkana mala ta hu7ey haaththa olla, ta ayfetikka pultto mala afunth gogissidaakko ta ay mala dosandinaa!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Tani ta deraappe shaakettada haakka baana mala bazzon mandaray aqizasoho taas oonee immanay! Istti ubbayka laymatizaytanne baleththizayta gidida. 
Jeremiah9:3 GODAY, «Istti bantta inxars wordo haasayanaas wondafe mala giigsida; tuman gidontta wordora biittay bolla minnida; istti iita bolla iita gujji gujji bida; tanakka erettenna» gees." 
Jeremiah9:4 Qasseka GODAY, «Ishay isha baleththees; laggey ba lagge zigirees; hessa gishshas ishay ishaappe naagetto; laggey ba laggaan ammanettofo." 
Jeremiah9:5 Laggey ba lagge cimmees; tuma haasayzay deenna; istti bantta inxars wordo haasaya tamaarsida. Nagara ooson banttana daaburseettes. 
Jeremiah9:6 Neni baleththoy kumidason daasa; istti bantta cimo gaason tana erana koyibeettenna» gees. 
Jeremiah9:7 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Tani istta birata mala paaccada seerisa geeshshana. Ta deraa nagara gishshas ta hayssafe hara ay ooththana dandayazinaa?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Istta inxarsay wodhiza yiishsha mala; istti cimo haasaya haasayeettes. Ubbayka bantta laggetara siiqo qaalan haasayeettes; gido attiin bantta wozinara woximade giigsseettes. 
Jeremiah9:9 Histtiin hayta ha yo7ota gishshas ta istta qaxxayana bessennee? Tani ta hu7es hayssa mala kawoteththa bolla halo kessikinaa?» gees. 
Jeremiah9:10 Tani dhoqqa deretas yeekkananne waassana; bazzon heenththasohotas kayottana. Gaasoykka istti dhayda; heera issi asinne kanththenna. Mehe waasoy siyettenna; salo kafotinne do7ati baqatidi bichchida. 
Jeremiah9:11 GODAY, «Yerusalaame katama tani budhetti kayzidasonne worakanati kaa7izaso ooththana. Yuhuda katamatakka asi bayndaso bula kessana» gees." 
Jeremiah9:12 Hessa akeekanaas dandayza aadho eranchchay oonee? GODAY izas qonccisiin hayssa izas yootana dandayzay oonee? Biittaya asi baynda kays ays gidadee? 
Jeremiah9:13 GODAY, «Hayssi haniday isttas tani immida woga istti aggidi azazettontta gishshassinne ta maara kaallontta aggida gishshassa." 
Jeremiah9:14 Histtidi istti bantta wozina muumeteththan biidi bantta aawati tamaarsida malakka Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossa kaallida» gides. 
Jeremiah9:15 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Be7ite, tani ha asaa cammiza quma mizananne marzera diza haath ushshana." 
Jeremiah9:16 Istta woykko istta aawati erontta kawoteththata giddon tani istta laallana. Tani istta dhayssana gakkanaas mashshan yedeththana» gees. 
Jeremiah9:17 Qasseka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Ane yeeho yeekkiza maccassata xeygite; zilas lo7eththi eriza maccassata ehite." 
Jeremiah9:18 Istti eeson yetto; nu ayfera afunththi gogganaashe gakkanaassinne nu siphinththara afunththi pulttana gakkanaas nu gishshas zilaletto. 
Jeremiah9:19 Xiyoonen zilassaa cenggurssi siyettees; ‹Nuni dhaydos! Nuni keehi kawuyidos! Nu keeththi laalettichchida gishshas nu biittaa aggidi dendi boos› gi zilaleettes» gees. 
Jeremiah9:20 Intteno maccassatoo! GODAA qaala siyite! Intte hayththay iza doonappe keziza qaala ezgo. Intte macca nayta zilas tamaarsite; issiniya hankkooro yeeho tamaarsu. 
Jeremiah9:21 Hayqoy nayta ogeppe, naateththa nayta dubbushappe pitti dhayssides; nu maskootetara gelides; nu qol7a giddo kanththides." 
Jeremiah9:22 Hessa gishshas GODAY tana, « ‹Asa ahay buura mala demban laalettana; kath shiishshizayti guyen aggida pushulo mala attana; istta oonikka shiishshenna› ga» giidi azazides." 
Jeremiah9:23 GODAY, «Aadho eranchchay ba aadho erateththan ceeqettofo; wolqqamay ba wolqqan ceeqettofo; woykko durey ba dureteththan ceeqettofo." 
Jeremiah9:24 Gido attiin ceeqettiza oonikka tani GODAA gididayssa eroninne biitta bolla siiqo, suure pirdanne xilloteth ooththizay tana gidoyssa akeekon ceeqetto. Tani haytan ufayettays» gees." 
Jeremiah9:25 Qasseka GODAY, «Be7ite, bantta asho xalla qaxxarettida asaa tani qaxxayana wodey yees." 
Jeremiah9:26 Heytikka Gibxe, Yuhuda, Eedoome, Amoone, Mo7aabenne bantta hu7e ciiri meedidi bazzon diza asaa ubbata. Ha kawoteththatan diza asay ubbay tumukka qaxxarettibeenna; Isra7eele asaa ubbaa wozinaykka qaxxarettibeenna» gees." 
Jeremiah10:1 Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! GODAY inttes yootiza qaala siyite! 
Jeremiah10:2 GODAY, «Kawoteththata oge intte tamaaropite. Istti salo bolla malata be7idi shirotikkoka, intte shirotopite." 
Jeremiah10:3 Gaasoykka dereta wogay hada. Istti mith worappe qanxxeettes; hiillay massi giigssees. 
Jeremiah10:4 Istti biraninne worqqan alleqisseettes; qaaxxontta mala naariqara misimaaren dhishkidi oyththeettes. 
Jeremiah10:5 Istta eeqa xoossati istta kaththa giddon do7a daganththanaas essiza misle mala. Haasayanaas dandayettenna. Hemettanaas istti dandayontta gishshas asay istta tookkees. Istti iita gidiin woykko lo7o miish intte bolla ooththanaas dandayontta gishshas isttas mulekka yayyofte» gees. 
Jeremiah10:6 Abeet GODAWU! Ne malay oonikka deenna. Neni gita; ne sunththayka gitanne wolqqama. 
Jeremiah10:7 Abeet kawoteththatas kawoo! Nees yayyonttay oonee? Nees bonchchoy bessees; gaasoykka aadho eranchchata garsaninne istta kawoteththata ubbaa garsan ne malay deenna. 
Jeremiah10:8 Hada gidida miththafe masettida eeqa xoossatappe timirte tamaarza ubbay eeyanne damma. 
Jeremiah10:9 He eeqa xoossati Tarseeseppe yida biraninne Ufaazeppe yida worqqan alleqettida. Istti woyne ushshaninne ochcha teera misatiza medhara diza may7on kamettida. Istti ubbay kushe ooso hiillatan oosettida. 
Jeremiah10:10 Gido attiin GODAY tumu Xoossa; izi de7o Xoossanne mernaa Kawo. Izi hanqettiza wode biittay qaaxxees; kawoteththatikka iza yiillo dandayettenna. 
Jeremiah10:11 GODAY, «Intteka, ‹Heyti salonne sa7a medhdhontta xoossati sa7appenne salo garsafe dhayana› geeta» gees." 
Jeremiah10:12 Ba wolqqan sa7a medhdhiday, ba aadho erateththan alame essiday, ba akeekan salo micciday GODAA." 
Jeremiah10:13 Izi guummiza wode, salon diza ubbay qaaxxees. Izi shaara sa7a gaxappe pude denththees. Izi irara dada yeddees; carkoka ba minjjasoppe kessees." 
Jeremiah10:14 Asi ubbay era dhaydi dammides; worqqa seerisiza asi ubbay ba ooththida eeqa xoossatan yeellatides. Gaasoykka eeqa xoossati wordo; isttas shemppoy deenna. 
Jeremiah10:15 Istti coo qidhes medhettida miishsha. Pirday istta bolla gakkiza wode istti dhayana. 
Jeremiah10:16 Gido attiin Yaaqoobe qaaday heyta mala gidenna. Gaasoykka izi ubbaa medhdhidayssa; Isra7eeley doorettida dere. Iza dooridayssa sunththay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossa. 
Jeremiah10:17 Intteno morkkey giddoththidaytoo! Diza miish dizasoppe shiishshite. 
Jeremiah10:18 Gaasoykka GODAY, «Tani ha sa7a bolla diza asaa ha7i gede kare kessada gooddana. Isttas erettana mala ta istta bolla meto ehana» gees." 
Jeremiah10:19 Waanoo ay hanoo! Ta madunththay paxontta madunththa. Gido attiin ta tana, «Hayssi ta harge; tani dandayanaas bessees» gadis." 
Jeremiah10:20 Ta dunkaaney laalettides; iza wodoroy ubbay duuxerettides. Ta nayti ubbay taappe shaakettidi bichchida; hayssafe guye simmettenna; ta dunkaana zaaridi tolanaas woykko ta magalasha kaqqanaas ha7i issi asinne attibeenna. 
Jeremiah10:21 Heenththanchchati dammida; istti GODAA oychchibeettenna. Hessa gishshas isttas injjetibeenna; istta wude ubbay laalettides. 
Jeremiah10:22 Siyite! Iita yo7oy yuussa bolla dees; hessi, «Pudeha baggara diza kawoteththan gita bul7aketeththi yuussan dees» gizayssa. Iza olanchchati yiidi Yuhuda katamata bazzonne worakanata duussaso kessana." 
Jeremiah10:23 Abeet GODAWU! Asa de7oy izaade kushen donttayssanne ba hemetaakka barkka ba shene mala lo7eththana dandayonttayssa ta erays. 
Jeremiah10:24 Abeet GODAWU! Tana seera; gido attiin ginara gido. Tani mulera dhayontta mala neni hanqora ta bolla yooppa; 
Jeremiah10:25 Yaaqoobe mulera mi mittidayta bollanne ne sunththaa xeygontta asata bolla guussa. Iza duussasokka kayzisida gishshas neni ne hanqoza nena erontta dereta bollanne ne sunth xeygontta kawoteththata bolla gussa. 
Jeremiah11:1 GODAAPPE Ermaasas yida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Jeremiah11:2 «Ha caaqo qaalata siya; histtada Yuhuda asaassinne Yerusalaame kataman dizaytas yoota. 
Jeremiah11:3 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Hayssa caaqo qaalas azazettontta asi qanggettidaade gido." 
Jeremiah11:4 « ‹Hayssi azazozi beni intte aawata Gibxe biittafe, birata seerisiza cooceppe kessiza wode ta qaala siyidaakko, ta azazo naagidaakko istti ta nayta; tani istta GODAA gidana mala tani isttas immida qaala." 
Jeremiah11:5 Hessan maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta kase intte aawatas immanaas tani caaqqida caaqo polana› gadis» gees. Tanikka, «Ero, GODAWU, amiin» gadis." 
Jeremiah11:6 Hessafe guye GODAY taas, «Hayssa ta qaala ubbaa Yuhuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan, ‹Ha caaqo qaala siyite; siyidi iza kaallite." 
Jeremiah11:7 Kase intte aawata tani Gibxe biittafe kessoosappe hach gakkanaas, zaara zaarada, taas azazettite!› gaada seeradis." 
Jeremiah11:8 Istti gidikko ba wozina iitateththaa kaallida attiin taas azazettibeettenna; ba hayththika haa taakko yeggibeettenna; hessa gishshas istti kaallana mala ta azazida caaqo qaala polontta aggida gishshas ta istta bolla qanggeth ehadis» gides. 
Jeremiah11:9 Zaaridikka GODAY taas, «Yuhuda asaa giddoninne Yerusalaamen dizayta giddon iita maqqoy dees." 
Jeremiah11:10 Istti kase ta qaala siyontta ixxidi nagara ooththida bantta aawata malakka nagara ooththida; istti hara xoossatas goynnidanne istta kaallida; Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay tani kase istta aawatara caaqettida caaqo qaala laallida. 
Jeremiah11:11 Hessa gishshas GODAY isttas, ‹Istti baqatidi attanaas dandayontta meto ta istta bolla ehana. Istti taakko waassikokka ta siyikke." 
Jeremiah11:12 He wode Yuhuda katamata asatinne Yerusalaame asati biidi bantti exaane cuwasiza eeqa xoossatas waassana; gido attiin meto wode he xoossati mulekka istta maaddettenna. 
Jeremiah11:13 Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Intte xoossati intte katamata keena cora. Qasse Ba7aale geetettiza he yeellachchiza xoossas exaane cuwasanaas intte essida yarshizasohoti Yerusalaame ogeta keena cora› gees. 
Jeremiah11:14 «Ermaasa, istti metotidi tana woossiko ta siyontta gishshas ne istta gishshas tana woossofa; istta gishshas gaannatoppa woykko oychchofa." 
Jeremiah11:15 Ta siiqoya ba iitateththaa darotara qaxereththashe taassara izis aaza gaytoteththee dizay? Adineteththi woykko asho yarshoy nena qixaateppe ashshana dandayzee? Ne heytantta polada ufayettana dandayay? 
Jeremiah11:16 GODAY nena, ‹Dicciza, Lo7o ayfe ayfiza wogara mith› giidi sunththides. Gido attiin izi wolqqama gote carko giirissan xuuggana; izi haggatikka meqeretti wodhdhana." 
Jeremiah11:17 «Isra7eele asatinne Yuhuda asati Ba7aales exaane cuwasidi tana yiillosida gishshas inttena tokkida Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY intte bolla iita miish ehanaas awajjadis» gides. 
Jeremiah11:18 GODAY istta maqqo taas qonccisida gishshas tani eradis; he wode istti iita ooththizayssa izi tana bessides. 
Jeremiah11:19 Tani shukas kaaleththidi efiza dorsa laaqqa mala gidadis. Istti ta bolla, «Ane nuni miththaa qanxxidi iza ayfezara gaththi dhayssoos. Iza sunththay mulekka hassa7ettontta mala, ane nuni iza paxa dizayta giddofe dhoqallidi dhayssoos» giidi istti maqettidayssa tani erabeekke." 
Jeremiah11:20 Wozinanne kilaho paacca xeelliza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Ta yo7ota nees immadis; neni istta bolla halo kessishin ta beyana. 
Jeremiah11:21 Hessa gishshas, «GODAA sunththan tinbite yootoppa; ne yootikko nu kushen hayqqana» giidi nena wodhanaas koyza Anatoote asaa gishshas GODAY gizayssi hayssa." 
Jeremiah11:22 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Tani istta qaxxayana; istta naateththa nayti mashshan hayqqana; istta macca naytinne attuma nayti koshan hayqqana;" 
Jeremiah11:23 isttafe issoynne attenna; gaasoykka tani istta qaxxayiza layth Anatoote asaa bolla iita miish ehana» gees. 
Jeremiah12:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nenara palamettiza wode ubbaankka ne xillo. Iita asati ooththizayssi isttas ays injjetizee? Ammanettonttayti ays ishalo duus dizoo? 
Jeremiah12:2 Neni istta tokkadasa; histtiin xapho yeddida; diccidi ayfe ayfida. Istti nena doonappe yeggettenna; neni gidikko istta wozinappe haakon daasa. 
Jeremiah12:3 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! Neni tana eraasa. Tana be7aasa; tani nees ay qoppizaakko paaccaasa. Shukettana biza dorsata mala neni istta laagga! Shuka gallassas istta dumma shaakka woththa! 
Jeremiah12:4 Iray dhayiin biittay ayde gakkanaas melanee? Maataykka ayde gakkanaas melanee? Asaa iitateththaafe dendidayssan medosatinne kafoti dhayda. Hessa bollaka asay, «GODAY nuni ooththizayssa demmenna» gees." 
Jeremiah12:5 GODAY Ermaasas, «Neni tohon woxxiza asatara woxxada daaburkko parara waana gaadde woxxanee? Neni saro biittan dhuphettiko, Yordaanoose wora garsan waana hemettanee?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ne ishatinne ne soho asati nena hilida; ne bolla waassida; hessa gishshas istti nees lo7o haasaykkoka ne istta ammanoppa. 
Jeremiah12:7 Tani ta keeththaa aggana; ta xinxxoyokka yegga aggana; tani ta siiqiza asaa istta morkketa kushen aaththa immana. 
Jeremiah12:8 Ta xinxxoya wora giddon diza gaammo mala ta bolla dendadus; ta bollaka xaaggadus; hessa gishshas tani izo ixxadis. 
Jeremiah12:9 Ta xinxxoya phircoti maana giddoththida kafo mala gidabeekkee? Biidi wora do7ata ubbaa shiishshite; istti izo duuththeththi maana mala xeygite. 
Jeremiah12:10 Daro heenththanchchati ta woyne tura soho moorida; tani izan ufayettiza ta gadeza bulasida. 
Jeremiah12:11 He biittay ta sinththan bazzo, bulanne mela biitta gidana; izis qoppizay baynda gishshas biittaya bazzo gidana." 
Jeremiah12:12 Bazzon diza zumbullata bollafe dhayssizayti yaana; gaasoykka GODAA mashshay biitta ha gaxaappe he gaxa gakkanaas maana. Hessa gishshas oonikka attanaas dandayenna. 
Jeremiah12:13 Istti gistte zeridi agunth cakkana; istti daro daaburanaashin aykkoka demmettenna; daro zeridi GODAA hanqo gaason intte guuth demmidi yeellatana» gides. 
Jeremiah12:14 GODAY, «Tani ta dere Isra7eeles immida xinxxo biitta oykkiza iita shoorota tani istta istta biittafe dhoqallana. Qasse Yuhuda asatakka istta giddofe dhoqallana." 
Jeremiah12:15 Gido attiin tani istta istta biittafe dhoqallidaappe guye zaarada maarana; tani istta dereninne istta xinxxon xinxxon zaara ehana. 
Jeremiah12:16 Kase ta asaa Ba7aale sunththan caaqqana mala tamaarsoyssaththoka, ‹GODAY be7iin!› giidi ta sunththan caaqqiko istti ta asaa giddon xaphphidi daana." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ta gizaaz ekkontta kawoteththi diikko ta iza mulera dhoqalla dhayssana» gees. 
Jeremiah13:1 GODAY tana, «Baada laynoppe oosettida dancco shammada ne xeessan dancca; gido attiin haaththan boshisoppa» gides." 
Jeremiah13:2 Hessa gishshas tani GODAY azazida mala dancco shammada ta xeessan danccadis. 
Jeremiah13:3 GODAA qaalay nam7anththo taakko yiidi," 
Jeremiah13:4 «Neni shamma danccida danccoza ekkada Efiraaxise Shaafa ba; histtada zaalla za7a giddon qotta» gides. 
Jeremiah13:5 Histtiin tani GODAY taas yootida mala efada Efiraaxise Shaafa lanqen qottadis. 
Jeremiah13:6 Daro gallassafe guye GODAY, «Denda Efiraaxise Shaafa baada tani nena, ‹Heen qotta› gida danccoza kessa» gides." 
Jeremiah13:7 Histtiin tani Efiraaxise Shaafa ba bookkada danccoza ta qottidaasoppe kessadis; gido attiin he danccozi moorettidi mulera go7onttaaz gidides. 
Jeremiah13:8 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi,"
