Jeremiah13:9 «GODAY tani Yuhuda asaa otoreteththinne Yerusalaame asaa ceeqeteth hessa mala dhayssana. 
Jeremiah13:10 Ta qaala siyontta ixxidi, bantta wozina muumeteththa kaallidi, eeqa xoossatas ooththanaassinne goynnanaas biza ha iita asay hayssa danccoza mala mulekka go7onttayssa gidana." 
Jeremiah13:11 Danccoy asa xeessa baqqi oykkiza mala Yuhuda asay ubbaynne Isra7eele asay ubbay taakko shiphphi gaana malanne ta sunththas galatanne bonchcho immana mala ta ooththiin istti ta gizaaz siyibeettenna» gees. 
Jeremiah13:12 Qasseka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Ermaasa! Asaas, ‹Oto ubbaan woyne ushshay kumana› gees. Istti nees zaaridi, ‹Oto ubbaan woyne ushshi kumanayssa waani nu erokkonii?› giikko," 
Jeremiah13:13 neni isttas, ‹GODAY tani ha biittan diza asaa ubbaa, Dawite kawoteththa araatan uttiza kawota, qeeseta, nabetanne Yerusalaamen diza asaa ubbaaka ta woyne ushshan maththosana." 
Jeremiah13:14 Tani issi as hara asara, aawa naara ooshshana; tani istta dhayssana attiin isttas mishettike; qadhettikenne maarikke› gees ga» gides." 
Jeremiah13:15 GODAY yootides; wozinan woththi siyite; aggite otoranchcha gidopite. 
Jeremiah13:16 Izi dhuma ehontta dishin dhumida zumata bolla intte tohoy dhuphettontta dishin GODAAS intte Xoossas bonchcho immite; Intte, «Poo7oy yaana» giidi naageeta; gido attiin izi dhuman laammana; sakkanna dhuma ooththana." 
Jeremiah13:17 Intte siyontta ixxiko, intte otoreteththaa gishshas ta shemppoya geeman yeekkana; GODAA wudey di7etti bichchida gishshas tani camo yeeho yeekkays; ta ayfeppe afunththi haaththa mala goggees." 
Jeremiah13:18 GODAY tana, «Kawozasinne iza aayo godatteys, ‹Intte bonchcho kallachchay intte hu7eppe wodhdhana gishshas, intte kawoteththa araataappe duge wodhdhite." 
Jeremiah13:19 Negebe biittan diza katamati ubbay gordettana. Istta doyanaadeyka deenna; Yuhuda asay ubbay di7ettidi baana; istta ogeykka gordettana› ga» gides. 
Jeremiah13:20 Qasseka GODAY, «Ane dhoqqu giidi pudeha baggafe yizayta xeellite; inttes imettida wudey, intte ceeqettiza dorsati awan dizoo?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Neni nees dabbo gidana mala koyidayti nena xoonidi haariza wode ne ay gaanee? Yelo miixay oykkida maccassa mala nena miixay oykkennee? 
Jeremiah13:22 Neni ne wozinan, ‹Hayssi ubbay ta bolla ays gakkidee?› giikko, ne may7oy qaarettiin ne sugettiday, ne asa kushen waaye be7iday ne nagaray darida gishshassa." 
Jeremiah13:23 Tumu Tophphiya asi ba medha, woykko maahey ba masarateththaa laammanaas dandayzee? Intte iita ooththi meezetidayti lo7o ooththanaas dandayekketa» gides." 
Jeremiah13:24 GODAY, «Bazzo carkoy suulla laalliza mala tanikka inttena laallana." 
Jeremiah13:25 Intte tana dogida gishshassinne wordo xoossatan ammanettida gishshas intte saamaynne intte qaaday hayssa. 
Jeremiah13:26 Intte kalloy beettanaashe gakkanaas tani intte may7o qaarada intte sinth kammana. 
Jeremiah13:27 Intte zumbullata bollanne demban ooththida harassiza ooso tani be7adis; intte laymateththanne intte ziita hanota ta be7adis; Yerusalaame nees aayye ana! Neni ayde gakkanaas ne tunateththaafe geeyontta daanee?» gees. 
Jeremiah14:1 GODAY kosha gishshas Ermaasas yootida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa; 
Jeremiah14:2 «Yuhuda biittay yeekkees; katamatikka porqqu geettes; asay biitta bolla uttidi ceecees; Yerusalaameppeka waasoy seetettees. 
Jeremiah14:3 Dureti bantta aylleta haath duuqqanaas kiitteettes. Isttika haaththa ollay dizaso beettes; gido attiin haath demmettenna; bantta oto mela tookki ekkidi simmeettes. Yeellatidinne hidota qanxxidi bantta hu7e gulluntteettes. 
Jeremiah14:4 Iray bukkontta gishshas biittay melidi za7ees. Goshshanchchati yeellatidi bantta hu7e gulluntteettes. 
Jeremiah14:5 Maatay baynda gishshas qorkkey ba yelida mara demban yeggada bawus. 
Jeremiah14:6 Hardidati aykkoy baynda zumbullata bolla eqqida; worakanata mala haath koyidi leessotteettes. Isttas miza miishshi dhayda gaason istta ayfey xeellanaas daaburdes» gides. 
Jeremiah14:7 Asay, «Abeet GODAWU! ne sinththafe baqata darssidos; ne sunththaa gishshas nuus issi miish ooththa; nuni neeppe daroti guye simmidos; ne bollan nagara ooththidos." 
Jeremiah14:8 Abeet Isra7eele hidotawu! Meto wode ashshizayssoo! neni biittan imaththa mala, issi omars aqidi biza oge asa mala ays hanay?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Neni hanizaazi dhayda asa mala, ashshanaas wolqqay dhayda olanchcha mala ays giday? Abeet GODAWU! Neni nu giddon daasa; nunikka ne sunththan xeygettidos; nuna neni aggofarkkii!» gides." 
Jeremiah14:10 Ha asata gishshas GODAY, «Istti toylatteteth keehi doseettes; bantta toho naagettenna. Hessa gishshas GODAY isttan ufayettenna; ha7i izi istta qoho qoppees; istta nagara gaason istta qaxxayees» gees." 
Jeremiah14:11 Hessafe guye GODAY tana, «Ha deraa lo7oteththas woossofa." 
Jeremiah14:12 Istti xoomi woossikokka tani istta waaso siyikke; xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarshoza istti yarshikokka tani istta yarshoza ekkike. Tani istta mashshan, koshaninne iita hargen dhayssana» gides." 
Jeremiah14:13 Histtiin tani, «Abeet Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAWU! Aayye ana! Nabeti isttas, ‹Intte ola be7ekketa woykko koshay inttena demmenna; tani inttes wurseth gakkanaas saroteth immana› geettes» gadis." 
Jeremiah14:14 Histtiin GODAY taas, «Nabeti ta sunththan wordo yooteettes. Tani istta kiittabeekke, azazabeekke, isttaskka yootabeekke. Istti inttes wordo ajjuuta, muurenno yo7o, hada yo7onne bantta wozinan diza baleththo yo7o yooteettes." 
Jeremiah14:15 Hessa gishshas ta kiittontta dishin, ‹Olaynne koshay ha biittay bolla yeenna› giidi ta sunththan wordo tinbite yootiza nabeta tani olaninne koshan dhayssana." 
Jeremiah14:16 Qasse istti tinbite yootida dereykka koshaninne ola gaason Yerusalaame dubbushatan kundana; isttas, istta machcheta, istta attuma naytanne macca nayta aha moogizay dhayana; tani istta mooro mala istta bolla qixaate ehana» gides." 
Jeremiah14:17 Ha qaala isttas, « ‹Ta derey keehi deshettidi madunxida gishshas, ta ayfeti omarsinne gallas shempontta afunxxeettes." 
Jeremiah14:18 Tani gaxare biikko, mashshan hayqqidayta be7ays; katama gelikko koshay wursidayta be7ays. Nabetinne qeeseti ba erontta dere baqatida› gees GODAY» gides." 
Jeremiah14:19 Abeet GODAWU! Neni Yuhuda mulekka aggadii? Xiyoone asaa harassetadii? Neni nuna paxontta mala ooththada ays dechchadii? Nuni saroteth naagidos; gido attiin saroteth demmibeekko; «Paxana wodey yaana» giidi naagidos; gido attiin dagama xalla gidides. 
Jeremiah14:20 Abeet GODAWU! Nuni nu iitateththaa eridos; Nu aawata qohokka akeekidos; tumappeka ne bolla nagara ooththidos. 
Jeremiah14:21 Nuna ne sunththaa gishshas gaada kadhopparkkii! Ne bonchcho araata kawushshofa. Neni nunara caaqettida caaqoza qoppa; ne caaqqida qaala mooppa. 
Jeremiah14:22 Kawoteththata eeqa xoossati ira bukisana dandayzoo? Saloti ba shenen puuse duge yeddanaas dandayzoo? Dandayettenna; Abeet nu GODAWU! Hessa ubbaa ooththana dandayzay nena; hessa gishshas nuni nenan hidota ooththoos. 
Jeremiah15:1 Hessafe guye GODAY taas, «Museynne Sameeli ta sinththan eqqidaakkoka ta wozinay ha deraas mishettenna; istta ta sinththafe digga; istti betto." 
Jeremiah15:2 Qasse istti nena, ‹Nuni awa biinoo?› gi oychchiko, ne isttas, ‹Hayqos pirdettidayti hayqqana; mashshas pirdettidayti mashshan shukettana; koshas pirdettidayti koshan wurana; di7ettanaas pirdettidayti di7etti baana.›" 
Jeremiah15:3 «GODAY, ‹Tani oyddu qommo bash istta bolla ehana; heytikka istta wodhanaas mashsha, istta aha goochchanaas kanata, istta ashoza miidi dhayssanaas salo kafotanne sa7a do7ata." 
Jeremiah15:4 Hizqiyaasa naa, Yuhuda Kawo Minaasey Yerusalaamen ooththida pala gishshas tani istta bolla sa7a kawoteththata ubbaas daganththizaaz ooththana› gees gaada yoota» gides." 
Jeremiah15:5 «Hanne Yerusalaamee! Nees oonee qadhettanay? Nees mishettanay oonee? Ne lo7eteththa geli oychchanay oonee?» gees. 
Jeremiah15:6 «Ne tana aggadasa; guye guye baasa; hessa gishshas tani ne bolla ta kushe denththada nena dhayssana; hayssafe guye nees qadhettike. 
Jeremiah15:7 Tani istta kath suraggiza mala suraggada katamata pengen laallana; istti ba ogeppe simmontta aggida gishshas tani ta dereza kayon kunththana; istta bollaka bash ehana. 
Jeremiah15:8 Tani istta am7eta qooda abban diza aceppeka darsana; mino aayeta dhayssizaaz seeta gallas ta istta bolla ehana; istti qoppontta dishin dagamanne shiro ta istta bolla yeggana. 
Jeremiah15:9 Laappun nayti hayqqida aaya dagaman daaburana; peenora dhayana izis gallassay qammana; iza yeellatananne kawuyana; attidaytakka morkketa mashshas aaththa immana» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah15:10 Ta aayee! Hanno poora! Tani as ubbaas ooshshasinne palamas gidana mala ays tana yeladii? Tani oonaska tal7e immabeekke; oonappeka tal7e ekkabeekke; gido attiin asi ubbay tana qanggees. 
Jeremiah15:11 GODAY, «Tumappe tani nena lo7o miishshas ashsha ekkana; Tumappe ne morkketi meto wodenne waaye wode nena shoobbana mala tani ooththana." 
Jeremiah15:12 Asi birata, pudeha baggafe yida birata woykko xarqimala menththana dandayzee?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ne dere ubbaan oosettida nagara gishshas ne aqota ubbaa di7izaytas coo aaththa immana. 
Jeremiah15:14 Ta hanqoy intte bolla tama mala eexxana; hessa gishshas neni ne erontta biittan ne morkketas tani nena ayllesana» gides. 
Jeremiah15:15 Abeet GODAWU! Ne eraasa. Tana qoppa; mokkaka xeella; tana yedeththizayta bolla halo kessa; ne dandayanchcha gidida gishshas tana dhayssofa; ne gaason tana gakkiza kadheza ne qoppa. 
Jeremiah15:16 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! tani ne sunththan xeygettida gishshas ne qaalay taakko yiin madis; histtiin ne qaalay taas pashkanne wozina ufays immides. 
Jeremiah15:17 Guppizaytara uttabeekke; isttarakka guppabeekke. Neni ne kushe ta bolla denththida gishshassinne ne hanqo ta bolla yeddida gishshas tani tarkka uttadis. 
Jeremiah15:18 Ta bolla hargey ays minnidee? Ta madunththay ays dari dari bidee? Ays paxontta ixxidee? Neni taas baleththiza shaafa malanne cimmiza pultto mala ays gidadii? 
Jeremiah15:19 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Neni simmiko ta nena zaara essana; nekka taas ooththana. Hada yo7o aggada bonchcho qaala xalla haasaykko neni ta doona gidana. Istti neekko simmana attiin ne isttako simmaka." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ta nena ha deraas gimbe ooththana; xarqimalappe oosettida gimbe mala histtana; tani nena ashshanaassinne woththa ekkanaas nenara diza gishshas istti nenara olettana shin nena xoonettenna. 
Jeremiah15:21 Iitata kusheppe tani nena wozzana; menxe iitata qohoppeka ta nena ashshana» gees. 
Jeremiah16:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Jeremiah16:2 «Neni hayssan machcho ekkofa; attuma naakka, macca naakka yeloppa» gides." 
Jeremiah16:3 Ha biitta bolla yelettiza attuma naytanne macca nayta gishshas, istta yelida aayetanne aawata gishshas GODAY," 
Jeremiah16:4 «Istti iita hargen hayqqana; isttas yeehoy deenna; moogokka moogettettenna; istta ahay biitta bollan buura mala yegetti attana; istti mashshaninne koshan wurana; istta ahay salo kafotassinne wora do7atas quma gidana» gides. 
Jeremiah16:5 GODAY taas, «Tani ta anjjoza, ta siiqozanne ta maaroteththaa ha deraa bollafe denththadis; hessa gishshas yeeho keeth geloppa; yeekkanaassinne kayottanaas hee booppa." 
Jeremiah16:6 Duretinne manqoti ha biittay bolla hayqqana; istti moogettettenna. Istta yeehoykka yeekettenna; isttas ba bolla qaacanay deenna; ba hu7ekka buucanay deenna. 
Jeremiah16:7 Kayottizayta minththeththanaas shoch ehanay deenna; qasseka aaway hayqqida woykko aaya hayqqida as minththeththanaas shochcha ushshu ehanay deenna. 
Jeremiah16:8 «Gibiray diza keeththika geloppa; maanaassinne uyanaas isttara issife uttofa. 
Jeremiah16:9 Tani Isra7eele Xoossay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, ‹Hekko, tani ufayssinne ililisa cenggurs, mishiraza cenggurssinne mishiray cenggurssi hayssafe ta diggana; hessa intte woden intte intte ayfera be7ana› gees." 
Jeremiah16:10 «Neni ha qaala ubbaa ha asas yootiza wode istti nena, ‹GODAY ays hayssa mala gita bash nu bolla awajjidee? Nuni ay mooridonii? GODAA nu Xoossaas ay nagara ooththidonii?› gi oychchana." 
Jeremiah16:11 He wode neni isttas, ‹Kase intte aawati tana aggida gishshassa, istti eeqa xoossata kaallidi isttas ooththida gishshassinne goynnida gishshassa; tana aggi baqatidi ta wogaa naagontta ixxida gishshassa;" 
Jeremiah16:12 intte kase intte aawatappeka aadhdhida iita ooththida gishshassa; be7ite; intte issoy issoy intte wozina iitateththaa kaallideta; taaska azazettontta ixxideta. 
Jeremiah16:13 Hessa gishshas tani inttena ha biittayfe denththada intte woykko intte aawati erontta biitta efa olana; heen intte eeqa xoossatas gallassinne omars goynnana. Tani mulekka inttes qadhettike› gaana» gides. 
Jeremiah16:14 GODAY, «Hessa gishshas asay, ‹Isra7eele asaa Gibxe biittafe kessida GODAY beyiin› giidi caaqqontta wodey yaana." 
Jeremiah16:15 ‹Gido attiin Isra7eele asaa pudeha bagga biittafenne istta izi laallida biittata ubbaafe zaaridi ehida GODAY beyiin› giidi caaqqana wodey yaana; gaasoykka tani kase istta aawatas immida xinxxo biittan zaarada istta ehana» gees. 
Jeremiah16:16 GODAY, «Ha7i gidikko tani mole oykkiza daro asata kiittana; isttika oykkana. Hessafe guye tani daro shankkatiza asata yeddana; isttika zumati dizasoppe, zumbullati dizasoppenne, zaallata gongoloppe shankkatidi oykkana." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ta ayfey istta oge ubbaa be7ees; istti taappe geemmettenna; istta nagaraykka ta ayfeppe geemmibeenna. 
Jeremiah16:18 Istti ta biittaa aha mala gidida harassiza eeqa xoossatan tunisida gishshassinne ta xinxxoka yeellachchiza miishshatan kunththida gishshas tani istti ooththida qohoza gishshassinne nagara gishshas nam7u kushe qaxxayana» gees. 
Jeremiah16:19 Taas minoteththinne miixa gidada meto gallas ta shiiqa attizaso gidida GODAWU! Kawoteththati sa7a gaxaappe neekko yiidi, «Kase nu aawati bana aykkoka maaddontta eeqa xoossatas goynnida." 
Jeremiah16:20 Asi baas xoos medhdhanaas dandayzee? Ee dandayanashin istti medhdhizayti tumu xoos gidettenna!» gaana. 
Jeremiah16:21 GODAY, «Hessa gishshas ha7i ta istta ta wolqqanne ta gitateth tamaarsana; isttika ta sunththay GODAA gididayssa erana» gees." 
Jeremiah17:1 GODAY, «Yuhuda nagaray birata bi7ireninne hoxe almaaze xeeran xaafettides; istta wozina bollanne istti yarshizason diza kaceta bolla xaafettides." 
Jeremiah17:2 Isttas naytikka attontta cilila miththata garsaninne dhoqqa zumbullata bolla diza yarshosotanne Asheero geetettiza eeqa misleyo qoppeettes. 
Jeremiah17:3 Ne biittan oosettida nagara gaason zumata bollanne zumbullata bolla diza ne aqota, ne dureteththinne ne goynosota tani di7os aaththa immana." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ne mooro gaason ta nees immida xinxxozappe ne mela attana; nena tani ne erontta biittan ne morkketas ayllesana. Gaasoykka mernaas tama mala eexxiza ta hanqoza ne denththeththadasa» gees. 
Jeremiah17:5 GODAY, «Asan ammanettizay, asho may7ida asan ceeqettizay, ba wozina GODAAPPE haassizay qanggettidaade." 
Jeremiah17:6 Izi bazzon diza qeeri wora mala gidana; izi lo7o miish be7enna; izi asi baynda maxine biittan bazzon mela sohon uttana. 
Jeremiah17:7 Gido attiin GODAAN ammanettiza asi, izi ammanettizay GODAA gididaadey anjjettidaade." 
Jeremiah17:8 Izi haaththa lanqen tokettidi, ba xapho duge haaththan yeddida miththa mala. Awa seelaskka yayyenna; iza hayththay cililida mala daana; away darida layththika babbenna; ayfe imoppeka paccenna." 
Jeremiah17:9 Asa wozinay ubbaa miishshafekka gene; izas paxateththika deenna; iza eranaas ooni dandayanee? 
Jeremiah17:10 Tani GODAY as ubbaas iza oge malanne iza ooso mala immanaas asaa wozina pilggayssinne iza kaha paaccays» gees. 
Jeremiah17:11 Bessontta ogera aqota dagasiza asi ba phuqisontta ciye haphphiza kuracho mala. Iza layththay buro baggattishin izi aqota aggi baana; wurseththan iza eeyateththi qoncce kezana. 
Jeremiah17:12 Nu Xoossa Keeththi dizasoy benippe doommidi dhoqqu gida bonchcho araata. 
Jeremiah17:13 Isra7eeles hidota gidida GODAWU! nena aggi bida ubbay yeellatana; nena de7o haaththa pultto gidida GODAA aggida gishshas ba ayfeso neeppe haraso zaarizayti gudulla bolla xaafettidayssa mala gidana. 
Jeremiah17:14 Abeet GODAWU! Tana paththa; tanikka paxana; tana ashsha; tanikka attana; gaasoykka ta galatay nena. 
Jeremiah17:15 Asay tana zaari zaaridi, «GODAA qaalay awan dizee? Ane ha7i poletto!» geettes." 
Jeremiah17:16 Heenththanchcha gidada nees ooththanaappe guye gabeekke; ta isttas iita gallas amottonttayssa ne eraasa; ta doonappe kezizayssi ne sinththan qoncce. 
Jeremiah17:17 Tana daganththizaade gidoppa; neni taas meto gallas ta baqata attizasoho. 
Jeremiah17:18 Tana yedeththizayti yeellatetto; tana yeellasoppa; istti dagammetto; gido attiin tana dagamappe qotta; istta bolla iita gallas eha; istta bolla dakko bash eha. 
Jeremiah17:19 GODAY tana, «Yuhuda kawoti katama gelizaasoninne kezizaaso deraa pengeninne hara Yerusalaame pengeta ubbaan baada eqqa." 
Jeremiah17:20 Histtada isttas, ‹Ha pengetara geliza Yuhuda kawoto! Yuhuda asatoo! Yerusalaamen diza as ubbatoo GODAA qaala siyite!› ga» gees." 
Jeremiah17:21 GODAY taas, «Sambata gallas tooho tookkidi Yerusalaame pengetara gelontta mala inttes naagettite!" 
Jeremiah17:22 Sambata gallassan intte keeththafe tooho tookkidi kessofte; woykko aykko oosonne ooththofte. Kase intte aawata tani azazida mala, Sambata gallas dummasidi bonchchite." 
Jeremiah17:23 Istti gidikko siyibeettenna; wozinankka woththibeettenna; istti siyontta malanne simmontta mala ba wozina muumisida. 
Jeremiah17:24 Gido attiin intte tani GODAY yootizayssa naagetti azazettiko, Sambata gallassan ay miishshika tookkidi hanno ha katamay pengetara gelontta aggiko, Sambata gallas dummasidi izan ay oosonne ooththontta bonchchiko," 
Jeremiah17:25 Dawite kawoteththa araatan uttiza kawotinne istta shuumeti ha katamay pengera gelana; istti ba parataninne ba para-gaareta bolla uttidi Yuhuda asaynne Yerusalaame asay azhabiin yaana; ha katamaya mernaas asi diza katama gidana. 
Jeremiah17:26 Asay xuugettiza yarshonne hara yarsho, kaththa yarsho, exaanenne galata yarsho ekkidi, Yuhuda katamatappe, Yerusalaame yuushon diza mooththatappe, Biniyaame biittafe, gadhappenne gezzefe qasseka Negebe biittafe GODAA Keeth yaana." 
Jeremiah17:27 Gido attiin intte Sambata gallassata dummasontta ixxidi sambata gallas tooho tookkidi Yerusalaame pengetara gelidi ta azazo menththiko tani Yerusalaame pengeta bolla izi miixata miza to7ontta tama ta eeththana» gides. 
Jeremiah18:1 GODAA matappe Ermaasakko," 
Jeremiah18:2 «Dendada manaso ba; heen ta nees ta kiita yootana» giza qaalay yides. 
Jeremiah18:3 Tanikka duge manazaso badis; izi ba medhdhiza irzo bolla oto medhdhishin be7adis. 
Jeremiah18:4 Izi medhdhishin otozi iza kushen moorettides; histtiin izi he urqqaa zaaridi ba koyida mala medhdhides. 
Jeremiah18:5 He wode GODAA qaalay," 
Jeremiah18:6 «Isra7eele asawu! Manazi ooththizayssaththo ta inttena ooththanaas dandaykkinaa? Isra7eele asawu! Urqqay mana kushen dizayssaththo intteka ta kushen deeta. 
Jeremiah18:7 Tani issi derey woykko issi kawoteththi shodettana mala, laalettana malanne dhayana mala yootikko," 
Jeremiah18:8 he tani yootida kawoteththay ba iitateththaafe aggidi simmiko, tani istta bolla ehana gida iita miish ehontta aggaagana." 
Jeremiah18:9 Qasse hara wodekka tani issi dere woykko issi kawoteth minththa essanaas yootikko," 
Jeremiah18:10 ta sinththan iita miish ooththikonne taas azazettontta ixxiko, ‹Ta izas ooththana› gida lo7o miishsha ubbaa ooththontta aggaagana» gees." 
Jeremiah18:11 GODAY, «Hessa gishshas, Ermaasa ha7i Yuhuda asatassinne Yerusalaamen dizaytas baada, ‹Hekko tani intte bolla bash giigso bolla days; intte bolla iita miish medhdhashe days; hessa gishshas intte ubbayka intte biza iita ogeppe simmite; intte ogenne intte ooso suurisite› ga yoota." 
Jeremiah18:12 Gido attiin isttas, ‹Daaburoppa; nu halchchida ogera baana; nuni issoy issoy nu iita wozina qofa kaallana› geettes» gides." 
Jeremiah18:13 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Ane kawoteththata, ‹Hayssa mala miishshi intte giddon seetetti erizee?› gi oychchite. Geela7oya Isra7eeley harassiza iita miish ooththadus." 
Jeremiah18:14 Shuch xalla gidida Libaanoose zumata bollafe shachchi dhayi erizee? Ladde bollafe duge goggiza irxxa haaththi gogeth aggi erizee? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ta derey gidikko tana balides; istti go7ontta xoossatas exaane cuwaseettes; bantta ogera biidi dhuphettida; beni ogeppe kare kezida; baasettontta diza kundukurcco ogera bida. 
Jeremiah18:16 Istta biittay bulanne mernaas kadhettidaaz gidana; heera aadhdhiza ubbay malalettana; ba hu7ekka qidhishe qaaththana. 
Jeremiah18:17 Arshey mokkiza bagga carko mala tani istta istta morkketa sinththan laallana. Istti dhayza gallas ta isttas zokko zaarana attiin ta ayfeso bessike» gees. 
Jeremiah18:18 Isttika, «Ane haa yiite; Ermaasa bolla maqettoos; wogay qeeseta achchan, zorey aadho eranchchata achchan, qaalaykka nabeta achchan dhayenna; ane haa yiite; nu inxarsan iza toochchoos; izi gizayssaka ubbaa siyokko» gida." 
Jeremiah18:19 Abeet GODAWU! Ta gizaaz siya; ta morkketi ta bolla haasayzayssa ezga. 
Jeremiah18:20 Lo7o ooththidaades iita zaarizoo? Istti gidikko taas olla bookkida; ne hanqoy isttafe simmana mala ne sinththan eqqada istta gishshas ta yootidayssa qoppa. 
Jeremiah18:21 Hessa gishshas istta nayta koshassinne mashshas aaththa imma; istta maccassati maynnenne am7eta gidetto; istta attumasatikka para hayqon wuretto; istta naateththa nayti olason mashshas gidetto 
Jeremiah18:22 Istti tana kundisanaas olla bookkiza gishshassinne ta tohoska woximade woththida gishshas istti qoppontta neni istta bolla bonqqizayta yeddiin istta keeththan waasoy kezo. 
Jeremiah18:23 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! istti tana wodhanaas maqettidayssa ubbaa neni eraasa; neni istta iitateththaa atto gooppa, woykko istta nagara ne sinththafe quccofa; istti ne sinththan xoonettidi kundetto; Ne hanqo gallas ne istta maaroppa." 
Jeremiah19:1 GODAY Ermaasas, «Baada manappe gombo shamma; histtada nenara dere cimatappenne qeesetappe guuththata ekkada," 
Jeremiah19:2 Kon7a Meqo Penge achchara aadhdhada Henoome naa shoobba ba; heen tani nees yootiza qaala awajja. 
Jeremiah19:3 ‹Intteno Yuhuda kawoto! Yerusalaamen diza derezoo! GODAA qaala siyite! Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay: Siyanaas hayththas iitiza miish ha biitta bolla tani ehana. 
Jeremiah19:4 Gaasoykka asay tana aggidi hayssa ha sohoza eeqa goynnizasoho kessides; istti gidiin woykko kase istta aawati, woykko Yuhuda kawoti erontta eeqa xoossatas yarshida; hayssa ha sohozan xillo suuth gussida." 
Jeremiah19:5 Qasse tani istta azazonttayssa, woykko isttas yootonttayssa, woykko ta wozinan qopponttayssa bantta attuma nayta Ba7aales taman xuuggi yarshanaas goynnizasoho zumbullata ooththida." 
Jeremiah19:6 Hessa gishshas asay ha sohoza shuka shoobba gaanaappe attiin Toofeete woykko Henoome naa shoobba gi xeygontta wodey yaana. 
Jeremiah19:7 « ‹Ha sohon Yuhuda halchchonne Yerusalaame halchcho ta laallana; istti bantta morkketa mashshaninne banttana wodhanaas koyzayta kushen hayqqana mala tani ooththana; istta aha salo kafotassinne wora do7atas quma histta immana. 
Jeremiah19:8 Tani ha katamayo mulera dhayssana; miichchaska kessana; izi matara aadhdhiza asay ubbay hanno pala! gi qidhi kaa7ana. 
Jeremiah19:9 Istti bantta macca nayta ashonne bantta attuma nayta asho maana mala tani ooththana; istta wodhanaas koyza istta morkketi istta giddoththiin istti ubbay issoy issaa asho maana› gees. 
Jeremiah19:10 «Hessafe guye nenara issife bida asata sinththan he gomboza menththa. 
Jeremiah19:11 Histtidi isttas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay, ‹Manaza gomboy meqqidayssaththonne simmi koolettana dandayonttayssaththo tani ha kawoteththaanne ha katamaa hessaththo ooththana; asay aha moogizasoy baynda gishshas Toofeeten moogana." 
Jeremiah19:12 Tani ha sohozaninne izan diza asaa bolla hessaththo ooththana; tani ha katamayo Toofeete mala ooththana. 
Jeremiah19:13 Bantta keeththa kaara bolla salo medheteththatas exaane cuwasidinne eeqa xoossatas ushshu shiishshidayti Yerusalaame asaa keeththatinne Yuhuda kawota keeththati Toofeete mala tunana› gees. 
Jeremiah19:14 «Hessafe guye Ermaasi GODAY tinbite yootanaas kiittida Toofeeteppe simmi yiidi GODAA Keeththaa dubbushan eqqidi," 
Jeremiah19:15 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Siyite! Istti bantta wozina shuchchasidi ta qaala siyontta ixxida gishshas tani ha katamaa bollanne iza matan diza mooththata ubbaa bolla ehana gida iita miish ubbaa istta bolla ehana gays› gees» gides." 
Jeremiah20:1 He wode GODAA Keeththan Imere naa qeese Pashkurey Ermaasi tinbite yootishin siyidi," 
Jeremiah20:2 nabe Ermaasa shocides; Xoossa Keeththaafe pude baggara diza Biniyaame gimbe penge bolla agrimooqen qachchides. 
Jeremiah20:3 Wonteththa gallas Pashkurey Ermaasa qashoppe birshiin Ermaasi izas, «Hachchife doommiin GODAY ne sunth Maagormisaabibe gaana attiin Pashkure geenna." 
Jeremiah20:4 Gaasoykka GODAY, ‹Tani nenanne ne laggeta ubbaa dagamas aaththa immana; istti neni xeellishin bantta morkketa mashshan wurana; tani Yuhuda asaa ubbaa Baabiloone kawo kushen aaththa immana; izi istta di7idi Baabiloone efana; histtidi heen istta mashshan siifana." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ha katamay aqota, iza ooththa demmida ubbaa, Yuhuda kawota aqotanne isttas diza al7o miish ubbaa tani istta morkketas aaththa immana; isttika di7i ekkidi Baabiloone efana." 
Jeremiah20:6 Pashkure! Neninne ne sohon diza ubbayka di7ettidi Baabiloone baana. Neninne ne isttas wordo tinbite yootida ne laggeti ubbay heen hayqqananne moogettana› gees» gides. 
Jeremiah20:7 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana cimmadasa; tanikka cimettadis. Neni taappe keeha minnada tana xoonadasa. Gallas kumeth tani asas miichchas attadis; ubbayka tana qidhees. 
Jeremiah20:8 Tani haasayza wode ubbaan waassays; «Shironne bash» ga awajjays; Hessa gishshas GODAA qaalay taas kumeththa gallas ta bolla cashshenne qidhe ehides. 
Jeremiah20:9 Tani, «Hayssafe guye GODAA sunththaa denththike; iza sunththankka haasaykke» giikko iza qaalay ta wozina giddon tama mala, ta meqeththa giddonkka surquntto mala gidides; hessa gishshas ta kamma oykkanaas xoonides; mulerakka eqettanawu dandayabeekke." 
Jeremiah20:10 «Ubbason shiroy dees; hilite ane nunikka hiloos» giidi daroti saasukettishin ta siyadis; ta kundeth naagettishe diza ta laggeti ubbay, «Oonee erizay balettana dandayzaakko histtiko nuni iza xoonanakkonne nu halo kessanakko» geettes." 
Jeremiah20:11 Gido attiin GODAY yashissiza toora qara mala tanara dees; hessa gishshas tana yedeththizayti dhuphettana attiin tana xoonettenna; istti iita kawush kawuyana attiin isttas giigenna; istta kawushshateththay mulekka dogettenna. 
Jeremiah20:12 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! xilloza paaccizayssoo! wozinanne kaha pilgga xeellizayssoo! tani ta mooto nees aaththa immida gishshas neni istta bolla halo kessishin ta ayfen be7anaas tana gaththa. 
Jeremiah20:13 GODAAS yexxite! Izas galata shiishshite; izi metotanchchata shemppo iitata kusheppe ashshees. 
Jeremiah20:14 Tani yelettida gallassaya qanggettidaaro gidu! Ta aayeya tana yelida gallassaya anjjettufu! 
Jeremiah20:15 Ta aawaas, «Nees mishiraachcho; nees attuma nay yelettides!» gi yootiday qanggettidaade gido!" 
Jeremiah20:16 Hessaadey GODAY qadhetay baynda shirechchi yeggida katamata mala gido; maalado waaso, gallassa seetan ola shiro siyo." 
Jeremiah20:17 Ta aaya taas duufo gidana mala, izi uloy taas mernaa duussaso gidana mala tana heen ays wodhibeennee?" 
Jeremiah20:18 Tani metonne ceece be7anaassinne ta de7o layththaa ubbaa kawushshateththan wursanaas ta aayi uloppe ays kezadinaa? 
Jeremiah21:1 Yuhuda Kawo Sedeqiyaasi Malkiya naa Pashkurenne Ma7isaya naa qeese Sofonaasa Ermaasakko kiittida wode GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides. 
Jeremiah21:2 Kiitettidaytikka, «Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba olanchchatara ha katama giddoththida gishshas ane nuus GODAA oychcha. GODAY beniyssa mala malalisiza ooso nu gishshas ooththidi iza guye zaaranaakko ooni erizee» gi oychchida." 
Jeremiah21:3 Ermaasi gidikko isttas, «Biidi Sedeqiyaasas," 
Jeremiah21:4 ‹GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nena gimbezappe kare baggara dooddi uttida Baabiloone kawonne iza olanchchata olanaas intte kushen intte oykkida ola miishshaa tani intte bolla guye zaarana. Istta ha katamayo zaara gelththana. 
Jeremiah21:5 Tani ta hu7era qixaates denththida kusheninne mino qesen, hanqoninne bashshan, gita boshan ta inttena caddana." 
Jeremiah21:6 Tani ha katamayn diza asaanne mehaa shocana; isttika iita hargen wurana. 
Jeremiah21:7 Hessafe guye Yuhuda Kawo Sedeqiyaasanne iza shuumeta, iita hargefe, mashshafenne koshappe attida deraa Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxooressinne istta wodhanaas koyza morkketas tani GODAY aaththa immana. Izi istta qara mashshan wodhana; istta maarenna; isttas mishettenanne qadhettenna› gees» giite." 
Jeremiah21:8 GODAY Ermaasa, «Gujjadakka hayssa deraas, ‹GODAY hekko tani intte sinththan de7o ogenne hayqo oge woththadis." 
Jeremiah21:9 Hanno ha katamayn takkiza ubbay mashshan, koshaninne iita hargen hayqqana; gido attiin katamayppe kezi biidi katama dooddi oykkida Baabiloone asatas ba kushe immida asi ba shemppo ashshananne de7on daana." 
Jeremiah21:10 Tani ha katamaas lo7o ooththanaas gidontta iita ooththanaas qachchadis; iza Baabiloone kawos aadhdha imettana; izikka izo taman xuuggana› gees. 
Jeremiah21:11 «Qasseka Yuhuda kawo keeththa asaas, ‹GODAA qaala siyite!" 
Jeremiah21:12 Intteno Dawite soo asawu! Intte ooththida iita ooso gaason eexxiin oonikka toyssana dandayontta tama mala ta hanqoy intte bolla eexxontta mala wonttan wonttan suure pirdite; bonqqettidayta un7eththizayta kusheppe ashshite› gees ga. 
Jeremiah21:13 ‹Hanne shoobbaafe pude baggara shuchchi dari dizason diza Yerusalaame! Tani ne bolla dendadis; nu bolla oonee dendanay? Nu keeth oonee xali gelanay?› gizaaree! 
Jeremiah21:14 Tani nena ne ooso mala qaxxayana; tani ne woran tama yeddana; iza yuushon dizayssaka ubbaa xuuggana» gees. 
Jeremiah22:1 GODAY, «Duge Yuhuda kawo soo baada," 
Jeremiah22:2 ‹Nenoo Dawite kawoteththa araata bolla uttida Yuhuda kawoo! Neninne ne shuumeti, ha pengetara geliza as ubbay GODAA qaala siyite› ga» gees." 
Jeremiah22:3 GODAY, «Suure pirdanne xillo ooththite; bonqqettidayta un7eththizayta kusheppe ashshite; beteta, yi7otanne am7eta qohopite; ha sohonkka xillo suuth gussofte." 
Jeremiah22:4 Hayta azazota intte lo7eththi naagikko Dawite kawoteththa araata bolla uttiza kawoti ba shuumetaranne ba dere asaara para-gaarenne para toggidi hayssa kawoteththa keeththa pengera gelananne kezana. 
Jeremiah22:5 Gido attiin intte ta azazota naagontta ixxiko, ‹Ha kawoteththa keeththay mulera dhayana› gaada tani tarkka tanan caaqqays» gides." 
Jeremiah22:6 GODAY Yuhuda kawo keeththas, «Neni taas Gala7aade biittanne Libaanoose zuma xeera mala lo7ikkoka tani nena addafe bazzonne asi izan baynda katama ooththana." 
Jeremiah22:7 Tani nena olizayta hu7en hu7en ola miish oyththada ne bolla yeddana; istti zigappe masettida tuuqeta qanxxereththidi taman yeggana. 
Jeremiah22:8 «Dumma dumma kawoteththafe yida asay ha katamayra aadhdhi bishe, ‹GODAY hanno gita katamayo ays hayssaththo ooththidee?› giidi ba garsan haasayettana." 
Jeremiah22:9 «Istti, ‹GODAA bantta Xoossaara caaqettida caaqo aggidi eeqa xoossatas goynnida gishshassinne isttas ooththida gishshassa› gaana» gees." 
Jeremiah22:10 Hayqqida Kawo Iyosiyaasas yeekkofte woykko kayottofte; Hessa aggidi di7etti bida Shaalumes mishettidi yeekkite. Gaasoykka izi mulekka guye simmenna; ba yelettida biitta nam7anththo be7enna. 
Jeremiah22:11 Ba aawa sohon Yuhudan kawotidi dishe ha sohoppe bida Iyosiyaasa naa Shaalume gishshas GODAY, «Izi mulekka guye simmenna." 
Jeremiah22:12 Izi di7etti bida biittan heen hayqqana; simmi yiidi ha biittayo be7enna. 
Jeremiah22:13 «Ba kawoteththa keeththa genen keexxizayssas, pirda geellasidi pooqe keexxizayssas, as coo mela oosisizayssas, iza wolqqa waaga ciggonttaades," 
Jeremiah22:14 Izi, ‹Gita pooqenne aaho kawoteththa keeth taas keexxana› gizaades aayye ana! Izi ba keeththas gita maskooteta kessees; ziga miththan alleqissees; zo7o qalamekka tiyees." 
Jeremiah22:15 «Ne kawoteththa keeththa daro ziga miththan keexxidayssi nees kawotidaa misatizee? Ne aaway suure pirdanne xillo ooththida gishshas mizaazinne uyizaazi paccidee? Izas ubbaa miishshika injjetides. 
Jeremiah22:16 Izi manqotassinne metotanchchatas pirda geellasibeenna; hessa gishshas ubbaa miishshika izas eeno gides; taas ero guussi hessa gidennee? 
Jeremiah22:17 Gido attiin ne ayfeynne ne wozinay shempiday haa hee shocechchon demmiza go7an, xillota suuth gusson, asaa un7eththoninne gene oosonna» gees." 
Jeremiah22:18 Hessa gishshas GODAY Yuhuda Kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7aaqeme gishshas, «Woo ta ishawu! Waay waay ta michchee! Qasse, ‹Ta godawu woo woo! Ne gitateththaa woo woo!› giidi zilalettenna." 
Jeremiah22:19 Harey moogettiza mala izi moogettana; Iza ahay Yerusalaame pengetappe gooshettidi kare olettana» gees. 
Jeremiah22:20 GODAY Yerusalaame, «Pude Libaanoose baada waassa; Ne qaalakka Baasaanen sissa; Abaarimen eqqada waassa; gaasoykka nees ola laggeti ubbay wurida." 
Jeremiah22:21 Neni saro dishin ta nees minththa yootadis; gido attiin neni, ‹Siyikke› gadasa. Yelagateththafe doommiin ne ogey hayssa; neni taas azazettontta ixxadasa." 
Jeremiah22:22 Ne heenththanchchata ubbaa carkoy efana; ne laggeti ubbay di7etti baana; ne iitateththaa ubbaa gaason yeellatananne kawuyana. 
Jeremiah22:23 Hanne Libaanoosen dizaaree! Ne keeththaa ziga miththafe keexxidaaree! miixay oykkida maccassa mala metoy ne bolla yishin waana waassandii!» gees. 
Jeremiah22:24 GODAY, « ‹Tani ta de7on caaqqays› Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aaqeme naa Ikoniyaane neni taas ushachcha kushe qalabate maatame gididaakkoka ta nena kessa olana." 
Jeremiah22:25 Nena wodhanaas koyzaytas, neni yayyiza Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxooressinne iza olanchchatas tani nena aaththa immana." 
Jeremiah22:26 Tani nenakka nena yelida ne aayeyokka intte yelettontta allaga biittan ola aggana; intteka heen hayqqana. 
Jeremiah22:27 Intte simmanaas laamotiza biittayo mulekka simmeketa» gees. 
Jeremiah22:28 Hayssi Ikoniyaaney kadhettidi meqqida oto mala oonikka koyontta miishshe? Izinne iza nayti ays kare oletti attidoo? Istti ba erontta allaga biittan ays yegetti attidoo? 
Jeremiah22:29 Hanne biittayee, hanne biittayee! GODAA qaala siya!" 
Jeremiah22:30 GODAY, «Yuhuda ayssanaas asi baynda gishshas, Dawite araatan uttana issaadeyka ke7ontta gishshas, issi paxa asi kezontta gishshas izas de7o layththa ubbaan injjetontta dhonththa as giidi xaafte» gees." 
Jeremiah23:1 GODAY, «Ta heenththasohon diza ta dorsata dhayssizaytassinne laalliza heenththanchchatas aayye ana!» gees." 
Jeremiah23:2 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay ba asaa heemmiza heenththanchchatas, «Intte ta dorsata laallidi wora yeddida gishshassinne intte istta lo7eththi xeellontta aggida gishshas intte iitateththaas bessiza qixaate ta immana." 
Jeremiah23:3 Hessafe guye ta wudeppe attidayta kase ta goodda yeddida dere ubbaafe tani tarkka shiishshada kase ta heemmizasoho zaara ehana; isttika hessan yelettidi corattana. 
Jeremiah23:4 Tani lo7eththi heemmiza heenththanchchata isttas denththana; istti nam7anththo babbettennanne dagammettenna; isttafe issaadeyka dhayenna» gees. 
Jeremiah23:5 GODAY, «Tani Dawites xillo zare denththana wodey yaana; izi tumu pirdanne xilloteth ooththizaade, aadho erateththan haariza kawo gidana." 
Jeremiah23:6 Iza kawoteththa layththan Yuhuday attana; Isra7eeleykka saron daana; iza sunththi, ‹GODAY Nuus Xilloteththa› geetettana." 
Jeremiah23:7 Hessa gishshas asay hayssafe guye iza, ‹Isra7eele asaa Gibxe biittafe kessidi ehida GODAY be7iin› gi caaqqontta wodey yaana gees GODAY." 
Jeremiah23:8 Gido attiin, ‹Isra7eele zareta pudeha bagga biittafenne izi istta laallida hara deretappe kessida de7o GODAY be7iin› gi caaqqana wodey yaana; hessafe guye istti bantta deren daana» gees." 
Jeremiah23:9 Nabeta gishshas ta wozinay meqqides; ta meqeththati ubbayka kokkorida. GODAA gaasoninne iza geeshsha qaala gaason woyne ushshu uyidi maththottiza asa mala gidadis. 
Jeremiah23:10 Biittaya layman xalla kumadus; qanggettida gishshas yeekkawus; bazzon diza mehe heenththasohoti melida; nabetikka geella oge kaallida; baas imettida maataa wogay baynda go7ettida. 
Jeremiah23:11 GODAY, «Nabeti, qeeseti xilloteththa ogera beettenna; ta Keeththaa garsankka istti ooththiza iitateththaa ta be7adis." 
Jeremiah23:12 Hessa gishshas istta ogey hallixana; isttika dhuman kundana; istti gandigardi kundana; istti qaxxayettiza wode ta istta bolla pala miish ehana. 
Jeremiah23:13 Tani Samaariyan diza nabeta bolla ufayssontta miish be7adis; istti Ba7aale sunththan tinbite yootida; ta deraa Isra7eelekka baleththida. 
Jeremiah23:14 Yerusalaamen diza nabeta bolla deexxiza iita miish be7adis; istti laymateettes; wordoteththan de7eettes; oonikka ba iita oosoppe simmontta mala iitata minththeettes; ta matan istti ubbayka Sodoome mala, izin diza asaykka Gamoora mala» gees." 
Jeremiah23:15 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY hayta nabeta gishshas, «Yerusalaamen diza nabetappe tuna miishshi kezidi biitta ubbaan laalettida gishshas ta istta camo kath mizana; qasse marzettida haath ushshana» gees." 
Jeremiah23:16 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Hayti nabeti tinbite inttes yootizayssa siyopite; istti inttena wordo hidotan kunththeettes; istti GODAAPPE gidontta baappe medhdhi ekki yooteettes." 
Jeremiah23:17 Tana kadhizayta isttas, ‹GODAY inttes saro gidana gides› geettes; bantta wozina muumeteththa kaallizayta ubbaa isttas, ‹Iita miishshi inttena gakkenna› geettes." 
Jeremiah23:18 Iza qaala siyanaassinne azazettanaas GODAY de7iza shiiqon isttafe oonee eqqanay? Iza qaala ezgi siyiday oonee? 
Jeremiah23:19 GODAA hanqoy gote carko mala dendana; mino dambalay iita asata hu7e shocana. 
Jeremiah23:20 Iza wozina qofa mulera polontta dishe iza hanqoy coo hada simmenna; guyeppe yiza layththatan hayssa qonccen intte erana. 
Jeremiah23:21 Hayta ha nabeta ta kiittabeekke; gido attiin istti bantta kiita ekki woxxeettes; ta isttas yootontta tinbite yooteettes. 
Jeremiah23:22 Istti ta zoren eqqidaakko ta qaala ta deraa sissana; iita ogeppenne iita oosoppe istta zaarana. 
Jeremiah23:23 Tani matas xalla Xoossee? Haahoska Xoos gidikkinaa? 
Jeremiah23:24 Tani be7ontta mala geemason qotetti attana asi dizee? Salonne sa7a kumiday tana gidikkinaa!» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah23:25 GODAY, «Tani agumettadis; tani agumettadis» gishe ta sunththan wordo tinbite haasayza nabeta qaala siyadis." 
Jeremiah23:26 Ha yo7oy bantta wozina baleththon wordo tinbite haasayza nabeta wozinan ayde gakkanaas gam7anee? 
Jeremiah23:27 Istta aawati Ba7aale geetettiza eeqaza gaason ta sunththaa dogida mala, istti issoy issaas yootiza agumon ta asay ta sunththaa dogana mala ooththidaa isttas misatees." 
Jeremiah23:28 Agumettiza nabey ba agumaa yooto; ta qaalay izan dizaadey gidikko he qaala ammaneteththan yooto; happassinne kaththa ayfes ay gaytoteththi dizee? 
Jeremiah23:29 «Ta qaalay tama malanne shuch qeriza naariqa mala gidennee?» gees. 
Jeremiah23:30 GODAY, «Hessa gishshas qaala issoy issaafe kaysi kaysi ekkidi taappe ekkida mala yootiza nabetara ta eqettays." 
Jeremiah23:31 Bantta doona cinccateththan, ‹GODAY hizgees› giza nabetara ta eqettays» gees." 
Jeremiah23:32 GODAY, «Tani wordo agumo kaallidi tinbite yootiza nabetara eqettays; ta kiittontta dishin woykko ta shuumontta dishin xalateththan wordo yo7o yooteettes; ta derezakka baleththeettes; hayssa ha dereza aykkoka go7ettenna» gees." 
Jeremiah23:33 GODAY taas, «Ha derey, woykko nabey, woykko qeesey, ‹GODAAS tooho gididay aazee?› giidi oychchiko, ‹GODAAS toohoy inttena; hessa gishshas tani inttena wora olana› gees ga yoota." 
Jeremiah23:34 Nabey, woykko qeesey, woykko ay asikka, ‹Hayssi GODAA tooho› giidi haasaykko tani hessaadenne iza soho asaa qaxxayana." 
Jeremiah23:35 Issoy issoy ba lagge woykko ba dabbo, ‹GODAY ay zaaro immidee?› woykko, ‹GODAY yootiday aazee?› giidi oychchanaas bessees." 
Jeremiah23:36 Hayssafe guyen gidikko, ‹GODAA tooho› giidi intte haasayanaas bessenna. Gaasoykka as ubbaas izi haasayda qaalay izas tooho gidiza gishshas de7o Xoossa, Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA nu Xoossa qaala intte bokkiseeta." 
Jeremiah23:37 Hessa gishshas nabezas, ‹GODAY inttes ay zaaro immidee?› woykko, ‹GODAY yootiday aazee?› gaada oychchanaas bessees." 
Jeremiah23:38 Gido attiin intte, ‹Hayssi GODAA tooho› giikko, GODAY tani inttena, ‹Hayssi GODAA tooho› goopite giinkka intte, ‹Hayssi GODAA tooho› gideta." 
Jeremiah23:39 Hessa gishshas inttena, qasseka inttessinne intte aawatas ta immida katamayra gaththada yegga aggana; ta sinththafekka wora olana." 
Jeremiah23:40 Mernaas dogettontta mernaa yeellateththinne kawushshateth ta intte bolla ehana» gides. 
Jeremiah24:1 Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Iyo7aaqeme naa, Yuhuda kawo Ikoniyaanenne iza shuumeta, anaaxetanne wogaceta Yerusalaameppe di7idi Baabiloone efidaappe guye Xoossa Keeththaafe sinththa baggara balase teeray izan kumi uttida nam7u keesheta GODAY ajjuutan tana bessides." 
Jeremiah24:2 Issi keeshezan shachche gakkida keehi lo7iza balase teera misatizay dees. Nam7anththo keeshezan meetettontta mala moorettida keehi iita balase teeray dees. 
Jeremiah24:3 GODAY tana, «Ermaasa, hessi neni be7izay aazee?» giidi oychchides. Tanikka, «Balase teera be7ays; lo7o teeray keehippe lo7o; gido attiin iita teeray meetettontta mala moorettida keehi iita» gadis." 
Jeremiah24:4 Qasseka GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Jeremiah24:5 «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Hayssa lo7o balaseza mala tani hayssafe Baabiloone biitta yeddida Yuhudappe di7ettidayssa lo7on qoppana." 
Jeremiah24:6 Tani lo7o ayfen istta xeellana; qasse tani istta zaarada ha biitta ehana. Ta istta giigsana attiin laallike; ta istta tokkana attiin shoddike. 
Jeremiah24:7 Tani GODAA gididayssa eriza wozina isttas immana; istti bantta kumeththa wozinappe taakko simmana gishshas istti ta dere gidana; tanikka istta Xoos gidana. 
Jeremiah24:8 « ‹Gido attiin GODAY, meetettontta keehi iita balaseza mala Yuhuda Kawo Sedeqiyaasanne iza shuumeta, qasseka Yerusalaamen casha attidaytanne Gibxen dizayta ta hessaththo ooththana." 
Jeremiah24:9 Biitta bolla kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan harassettizaytanne cayettidayta gidana; istta laalla yeddizaso ubbaan istti qidhes, leemisos, kadhessinne qanggeththas ta istta ooththana." 
Jeremiah24:10 Tani isttassinne istta aawatas immida biittafe istti mulera dhayana gakkanaas, mashsha, koshanne iita harge istta bolla yeddana› gees» gides." 
Jeremiah25:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7aaqemey kawotida oydanththo layththan, Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida koyro layththan Yuhuda asaa ubbaa gishshas Ermaasakko yida qaalay hayssa." 
Jeremiah25:2 Nabe Ermaasi Yuhuda asaa ubbaassinne Yerusalaamen diza ubbatas," 
Jeremiah25:3 «Yuhuda kawo Amoone naa Iyosiyaasi kawotida tammanne heedzdzanththo layththafe doommidi hach gakkanaas nam7u tammanne heedzdzu layth kumeth GODAA qaalay taakko yides. Histtiin tanikka zaara zaarada inttes yootadis; gido attiin intte siyontta ixxideta. 
Jeremiah25:4 «GODAY ba aylle gidida nabeta ubbaa zaari zaaridikka intteko kiittides; gido attiin intte istta siyontta ixxideta; isttaskka wudu gontta ixxideta» gides. 
Jeremiah25:5 Istti, «Intte ubbayka intte iita ogeppenne intte iita oosoppe ha7i simmite. Histtiko GODAY inttessinne intte aawatas meri mernaas immida biittan intte daana." 
Jeremiah25:6 Eeqa xoossatas ooththanaassinne goynnanaas kaallofte; qasse intte kushey ooththida miishshan tana yiillosopite. Histtiko ta intte bolla iita ooththike» gida. 
Jeremiah25:7 GODAY, «Intte tana siyontta aggida gishshas intte kushey ooththida miish ubbaan tana hanqeththideta; histtidi intte bolla iita miish ehideta» gees." 
Jeremiah25:8 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY, «Intte ta qaalas azazettontta ixxida gishshas," 
Jeremiah25:9 tani pudeha bagga deraa ubbaanne ta aylle gidida Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore xeygana. Histtada istta ha biitta bolla, ha biittan diza asaa bollanne heeran diza kawoteththata ubbaa bolla ehana; tani inttena mulera dhayssana; qasse mernaas asi kadhizanne qidhiza bula kessana." 
Jeremiah25:10 Tani isttafe ufayssinne ililisa cenggurssa, mishirazanne mishiray cenggurssa, woxa giirissinne xomppe poo7o dhayssana." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ha biittay mulera bulanne kays gidana; ha kawoteththatikka Baabiloone kawos laappun tammu layth haarettana. 
Jeremiah25:12 «Laappun tammu layththay polettidaappe guye Baabiloone kawo, iza deraanne iza biittaa mooro gishshas tani qaxxayana; istta biittaaka mernaas bula ooththana." 
Jeremiah25:13 Tani he biitta bolla haasaydayssa ubbaa, ha maxaafazan xaafettidayssa, Ermaasi kawoteththata ubbaa bolla yootida tinbiteta ehana." 
Jeremiah25:14 Baabiloone derey daro kawoteththatassinne gita kawotas aylle gidana; istta kushe ooso mala ta isttas qanxxana» gees. 
Jeremiah25:15 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay taas, «Hayssa ta hanqo woyne ushshazi kumida wanca hey; efada tani nena kiittiza kawoteththata ubbaa ushsha." 
Jeremiah25:16 Istti uyida wode gandigarana; istta bolla ta yeddida olaa gaason istti gooyana» gides. 
Jeremiah25:17 Histtiin tani GODAA kusheppe wancaa ekkada izi tana kiittida kawoteththatakko baada istta ushshadis. 
Jeremiah25:18 Hach hanidayssa mala istti bula, asi harasettizayta, kadhizaytanne qanggettidayta gidana mala Yerusalaamenne Yuhuda katama asata, istta kawotanne istta shuumeta ubbaa," 
Jeremiah25:19 Gibxe biitta kawo, iza aylleta, iza shuumeta, iza deraa ubbaa," 
Jeremiah25:20 heen diza walaka deraa ubbaa, Uuxe biitta kawota ubbaa, Filisxeeme kawota, Asqeloonan, Gaazan, Aqarooneninne Azaxoonen atti diza deraa ubbaa," 
Jeremiah25:21 Eedoome, Mo7aabenne Amoone," 
Jeremiah25:22 Xiroosenne Sidoona abbafe he pinththa gaxan diza kawota," 
Jeremiah25:23 Dadaane, Teema, Buuzenne bantta hu7e gaamme meediza asaa ubbata," 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabiya biitta kawota ubbaanne bazzo biittan diza walaka dere kawota ubbaa," 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimire, Elaamenne Meedoone kawota ubbaa ushshadis." 
Jeremiah25:26 Haahoninne matan diza pudeha bagga kawota ubbaa, taran taran biitta bolla diza kawoteththata ubbaa ushshadis. Istta ubbaafe guye Baabiloone kawoykka uyana." 
Jeremiah25:27 Hessa gishshas GODAY tana, «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay inttena, ‹Uyite; maththottite; cooyite nam7anththo intte dendontta mala ta intte giddo yeddiza olaa sinththan kundite› gees." 
Jeremiah25:28 Gido attiin istti ne kusheppe wancaa ekkonttanne uyontta ixxiko isttas, ‹Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY intte dosontta uyana." 
Jeremiah25:29 Be7ite; ta sunththay xeygettida katamayo ta dhayso doommana; histtiin intte qaxxayettontta atti baanee? Tani sa7an diza ubbaa bolla ola xeygida gishshas intte qaxxayettontta atteketa› gees» gides. 
Jeremiah25:30 Hessa gishshas GODAY Ermaasas, «Ha qaala ubbaa istta bolla tinbite yoota; ‹GODAY bollafe waassana; ba diza geeshsha sohoppe dadattiza ba gunththaa sissana; izi ba biitta bolla keehi waassana; woyne maxishe yexxiza mala sa7an diza ubbaa bolla izi guummana." 
Jeremiah25:31 GODAY kawoteththata bolla pirdiza wode iza cenggurssay biitta gaxa gakkanaas siyettana; izi as ubbaa bolla pirdana; iitatakka mashshas aaththi immana› » gides. 
Jeremiah25:32 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «Be7a, iita miishshi kawoteththaafe kawoteth aakki aakki bides; sa7a gaxappe wolqqama gote carkoy dendides» gees." 
Jeremiah25:33 He woden GODAY wodhidayta ahay biitta gaxaappe biitta gaxa gakkanaas porccu gi kundana; isttas yeekettenna; istta ahay shiiqennanne moogettenna; biitta bolla buura mala olettana. 
Jeremiah25:34 Intteno heenththanchchatoo! Yeekkitenne waassite. Intteno wudaa heemmizaytoo! bidinththan genderettite. Intte shukettana wodey gakkida gishshas lo7i medhettida mana miishshi tinchchettiza mala intte kundi tinchchettana. 
Jeremiah25:35 Heenththanchchati baqatizasoy deenna; wude heemmizayti kessi ekki attizasoy baa. 
Jeremiah25:36 GODAY istti heemmizasoho dhayssida gishshas heenththanchchata waasonne wude heemmizayta yeeho siyite. 
Jeremiah25:37 GODAA hanqo seela gaason saro biittay bula gidana. 
Jeremiah25:38 Gaammoy ba aqizasoppe yeggi biza mala un7eththizayssa mashshafenne GODAA hanqofe dendidayssan istta biittaya bula gidana. 
Jeremiah26:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7aaqemey kawotida koyro layththan hayssafe kaalli diza qaalay GODAA achchafe yides. 
Jeremiah26:2 GODAY tana, «GODAA Keeththaa zagon eqqada GODAA Keeththan goynnanaas Yuhuda katamatappe yiza dere ubbaas yoota; tani nena, ‹Yoota› gaada azazida qaala ubbaafe issinokka ashshontta wursa yoota." 
Jeremiah26:3 Istti siyidi ba biza iita ogeppe simmanaakko oonee erizay? Tanikka istti ooththida iitateththaa gishshas istta bolla ehana gida qixaateza aggana. 
Jeremiah26:4 Ne isttas, ‹GODAY inttena intte ta gizaaz siyontta ixxiko, ta inttes immida ta wogaa naagontta ixxiko," 
Jeremiah26:5 intte siyana mala ta oosanchchata zaara zaara ta intteko yeddida nabeta qaala intte siyontta ixxiko," 
Jeremiah26:6 tani ha Keeththaa Seelo mala ooththana; ha katamayokka sa7a bolla diza kawoteththa ubbaa sinththan qanggettidaaro histtana› gees ga» gides. 
Jeremiah26:7 Ermaasi GODAA Keeththan ha qaala yootishin qeeseti, nabetinne derey wuri siyida." 
Jeremiah26:8 Gido attiin Ermaasi derezas yootana mala GODAY izas yootidayssa derezas yooti wursida mala qeeseti, nabetinne derezi wuri iza oykkidi, «Nena wodhanaas bessees!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Neni, ‹Hayssi Keeththazi Seelo mala gidana; qasse hanna katamaya bulanne kays gidana› gaada GODAA sunththan ays tinbite yootay?» gida. Histtidi GODAA Keeththan shiiqida asay ubbay Ermaasa giddoththides." 
Jeremiah26:10 Yuhuda shuumeti hessa ubbaa siyida mala kawoteththa keeththafe kezidi GODAA Keeth bida. Histtidi GODAA Keeththas, «Ooraththa Penge» geetettizaso pengezan bi uttida." 
Jeremiah26:11 Qeesetinne nabeti shuumetassinne dere ubbaas, «Intte intte hayththan siyida mala ha addezi hanno katamay bolla tinbite yootida gishshas izas hayqoy bessees!» gida." 
Jeremiah26:12 Ermaasikka shuumetassinne dere ubbaas, «Ha intte siyida qaala ubbaa ha Keeththaa bollanne hanno katamay bolla ta yootana mala GODAY tana kiittides." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ha7ikka intte ogenne intte ooso lo7eththite; GODAA intte Xoossas azazettite; intte histtiko GODAY intte bolla ehana gi yootida iita miishshaa izi aggaagana. 
Jeremiah26:14 «Tani gidikko hekko intte kushen days; inttes lo7onne suure misatizayssa ta bolla ooththite. 
Jeremiah26:15 Gido attiin hayssa intte siyida qaala ubbaa tani inttes yootana mala GODAY taas addafe yootida gishshas intte tana wodhikkoka intte xillo suuth gussidi intte intte hu7essinne hanno katamayn diza as ubbaa mooranchcha histtontta mala naagettite» gides. 
Jeremiah26:16 Histtiin shuumetinne derezi ubbay qeesetassinne nabetas, «Hayssi addezi GODAA nu Xoossa sunththan haasayda gishshas hayqqanaas bessenna!» gida." 
Jeremiah26:17 Dere cimatappeka issi issi asati dendi eqqidi shiiqida deraas," 
Jeremiah26:18 «Hizqiyaasi Yuhudan kawotidi diza wode Moresheteppe yida Mikiyaasi Yuhuda dere ubbaas, «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay, ‹Xiyooney goshsha gade mala goyettana; Yerusalaamey laalli korida keeththa mala gidana; Xoossa Keeththay iza bolla keexettida zumay wora may7ana› gides." 
Jeremiah26:19 «Histtiin, Yuhuda Kawo Hizqiyaasinne Yuhuda asay ubbay iza wodhidoo? Hizqiyaasi GODAAS yayyidi izappe maaro woossibeennee? GODAYKKA ba ehana gi qoppida qixaateza aggaagibeennee? Gido attiin nuni nurkka nu bolla pala iita miish ehana hanoos» gides." 
Jeremiah26:20 Qasseka beni wode Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime gizason diza Shama7e naa Ooriyoy dees; izikka Ermaasi yootida mala ha katama bollanne ha biitta bolla GODAA sunththan tinbite yootides. 
Jeremiah26:21 Kawo Iyo7aaqemey, iza olanchchati, iza oosanchchati Ooriyoy yootidayssa siyida wode kawozi iza wodhanaas koyides. Ooriyoy hessa siyidi babbida gishshas Gibxe biitta baqatides." 
Jeremiah26:22 Gido attiin Kawo Iyo7aaqemey Akiboore naa Elnataanenne hara asatakka iza bolla gujjidi Gibxe biitta kiittides. 
Jeremiah26:23 Istti Ooriyo Gibxeppe oykki ehidi kawo Iyo7aaqemekko efida. Kawozi iza mashshan wodhidi iza aha beettiday moogettizason efi yeggides. 
Jeremiah26:24 Gido attiin Saafaane naa Akiqaamey Ermaasa bagga gidida gishshas asay Ermaasa wodhana mala aaththi immibeenna. 
Jeremiah27:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Sedeqiyaasi kawotida koyro layththan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides. 
Jeremiah27:2 GODAY taas, «Miththafe qambara giigsada dafo izan gelththada ne morgen woththa." 
Jeremiah27:3 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasakko Yerusalaame yida asata bolla Eedoome kawos, Mo7aabe kawos, Amoone kawos, Xiroose kawossinne Sidoona kawos kiita yedda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Istti bantta godata erisana mala isttas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay intte godatas hayssa yootite. 
Jeremiah27:5 Ta gita wolqqaninne micettida ta kushen sa7anne sa7a bolla diza asinne mehe medhdhadis. Istta ta dosidaades immana. 
Jeremiah27:6 Ha7ikka hayta ha dereta ubbaa ta aylleza Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoores aaththa immana; wora do7atakka ta izas haarisana. 
Jeremiah27:7 Iza derey haras haarettana gakkanaas kawoteththati ubbay izas, iza naassinne izas naa naas haarettana. Hessafe guye daro kawoteththatinne gita kawoti iza haarana." 
Jeremiah27:8 «Gido attiin ay derey woykko ay kawoteththinne ha Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoores azazettontta ixxikonne iza qambaran gelontta ixxiko, tani GODAY he kawoteththa iza kushen dhayssana gakkanaas, olan, koshaninne iita hargen qaxxayana." 
Jeremiah27:9 Hessa gishshas inttena, ‹Baabiloone kawos haaretteketa› giza intte nabeta, muurennizayta, agumo agumettizayta, moytille xeygizayta siyopite." 
Jeremiah27:10 Gaasoykka intte intte biittafe shodettana mala, ta inttena gooddana malanne dhayssana mala istti inttes wordo tinbite yooteettes." 
Jeremiah27:11 Gido attiin ay kawoteththika Baabiloone kawo qambaran gelidi ba hu7e ziqqi histtidi izas ooththizaa gidikko tani GODAY he deraa heen ba deren attidi goyishe daana mala ooththana» gides. 
Jeremiah27:12 Tani Yuhuda Kawo Sedeqiyaasasika hayssa ha kiitaa yootadis; «Intte morge Baabiloone kawo qambara garsan ziqqi histtite; izassinne iza deraas haggazite; histtiko intte shemppora paxa daana. 
Jeremiah27:13 GODAY Baabiloone kawos haarettontta ixxiza kawoteththata bolla ehana gida olan, koshaninne iita hargen neninne ne derey ays wureetii?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Wordo nabeti inttes, ‹Intte Baabiloone kawos haaretteketa› giza wordo tinbite siyopite." 
Jeremiah27:15 ‹Tani istta kiittabeekke; istti ta sunththan wordo tinbite yooteettes; hessa gishshas tani inttenanne inttes nabeta goodda kessana; intteka dhayana› gees GODAY.» 
Jeremiah27:16 Hessafe guye tani qeesetassinne ha dere ubbaas, «GODAY, ‹GODAA Keeththaa miishshay Baabilooneppe elle simmana› giza nabeta qaala siyopite. Gaasoykka istti inttes wordo tinbite yooteettes." 
Jeremiah27:17 Hessa gishshas istti yootizayssa sissi aggidi Baabiloone kawos haarettite; intte shemppora paxa daana; ha katamaya ays laaletta attanee? 
Jeremiah27:18 Istti tumu nabeta gidikko, tumukka GODAA qaalay dizaa gidikko GODAA Keeththan, Yuhuda kawo keeththaninne Yerusalaamen attida miishshati Baabiloone di7etti bontta mala ane GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossaako shoobbi woossetto." 
Jeremiah27:19 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay ha kataman attida tuussata gishshas, xarqimalappe oosettida gita saaneza gishshas, gaareta gishshassinne hara attida ubbaa miishshata gishshas," 
Jeremiah27:20 hayti ha miishshati Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aaqeme naa Ikoniyaane, Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen diza shuumeta di7idi efiza wode attida gishshas," 
Jeremiah27:21 GODAA Keeththan, Yuhuda kawo keeththaninne Yerusalaamen attida miishshata gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay," 
Jeremiah27:22 ‹Istti Baabiloone biitta di7etti baana; tani istta xomosana gallassi gakkanaas heen daana; he wode ta istta zaara ehada kase isttasohon woththana› gees» gadis. 
Jeremiah28:1 He wode Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida oydanththo layththan ichchashanththo aginan Geba7oone as Azuure naa nabe Hanaaniyay GODAA Keeththan qeeseta sinththaninne dere ubbaa sinththan taas," 
Jeremiah28:2 «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Baabiloone kawoy inttena toossida qambara ta menththana." 
Jeremiah28:3 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey GODAA Keeththaafe di7i ekkidi efida miishshata ubbaa tani nam7u layththa giddon zaarada ha soho ehana. 
Jeremiah28:4 Qasse tani Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aaqeme naa Ikoniyaanenne Yuhudappe di7ettidi Baabiloone bida asaa ubbaa zaarada ha soho ehana. Gaasoykka Baabiloone kawoy inttena toossida qambara ta menththana› gees» gides. 
Jeremiah28:5 Histtiin GODAA Keeththaa giddon eqqida qeeseta sinththaninne deraa sinththan nabe Ermaasi nabe Hanaaniyas," 
Jeremiah28:6 «Amiin! GODAY ooththo! GODAA Keeththaa miishshatanne di7ettidi bida asaa ubbaa Baabilooneppe zaari ehidi GODAY ba yootida qaala polo! 
Jeremiah28:7 Gidikkoka ane ta neessinne ha asaas yootiza qaala siya. 
Jeremiah28:8 Neeppenne taappe kase sinththan de7ida nabeti daro dereta bollanne gita kawoteththata bolla ola gishshas, bashsha gishshassinne iita harge gishshas tinbite yootida." 
Jeremiah28:9 Gido attiin saroteththa gishshas tinbite yootida nabey izi yootida qaalay polettiza wode tumappe GODAY iza kiittidayssi hessan erettees» gides. 
Jeremiah28:10 Hessafe guye nabe Hanaaniyay nabe Ermaasa morgefe qambaraa ekkidi menththides. 
Jeremiah28:11 Histtidi Hanaaniyay asaa ubbaa sinththan, «GODAY, ‹Tani nam7u layththata giddon Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore qambara kawoteththata ubbaa morgefe denththada hayssaththo menththana› gees» gides. He wode nabe Ermaasi aggaagidi ba oge bides." 
Jeremiah28:12 Nabe Hanaaniyay nabe Ermaasa morgefe qambara menththida guuththa wodeppe guye GODAA qaalay nabe Ermaasakko yiidi," 
Jeremiah28:13 «Baada Hanaaniyas, ‹Neni miththa qambara menththadasa; tani gidikko iza gishshas birata qambara giigsana› gees GODAY gaada yoota." 
Jeremiah28:14 Qasseka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoores haggazana mala tani ha kawoteththata ubbaa morgen birata qambara woththana; isttika izas haarettana. Haray attoshin wora do7ata bollaka godateth izas immana› gees» gides." 
Jeremiah28:15 Hessafe guye nabe Ermaasi nabe Hanaaniyas, «Hanaaniya siya! GODAY nena kiittibeenna; gido attiin neni ha asay wordo miishshan ammanettana mala ooththadasa." 
Jeremiah28:16 Hessa gishshas GODAY, ‹Tani nena ha sa7a bollafe diggana; neni GODAA bolla makkalla haasayda gishshas ne ha layth hayqqana› gees» gides." 
Jeremiah28:17 Nabe Hanaaniyay he layth laappunththa aginan hayqqides. 
Jeremiah29:1 Nabe Ermaasi di7etti biidi hayqqontta shemppora paxa diza cimatas, qeesetas, nabetassinne Nabukadanaxoorey Yerusalaameppe di7idi Baabiloone efida hara as ubbaas Yerusalaameppe yeddida dabdaabbey hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssa." 
Jeremiah29:2 Hayssi haniday kawo Ikoniyaaney, godatteya iza aaya, kawo keeththa oosanchchati, Yuhudanne Yerusalaame kaaleththizayti, hiillanchchatinne wogaceti Yerusalaameppe di7etti bidaappe guyenna." 
Jeremiah29:3 Ermaasi Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoores kiittiza Saafaane naa El7aasa bollanne Kilqiyaasa naa Gamaariya bollan he dabdaabbeza yeddides. 
Jeremiah29:4 Dabdaabbezikka, «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay tani Yerusalaameppe Baabiloone di7isa yeddida asaas," 
Jeremiah29:5 ‹Keeth keexxidi uttite; doozata tokkidi istta ayfe miite; 
Jeremiah29:6 Ekettidi macca naytanne attuma nayta yelite; intte attuma naytinne macca nayti ekettana malanne gelettana mala ooththite; isttika attuma naytanne macca nayta yeletto; intte heen qoodan corattite attiin guuxxofte. 
Jeremiah29:7 Intte di7etti bida katamays saroteththinne dureteth koyite; he katamays GODAA woossite; iza duretikko intteka durettana› gees. 
Jeremiah29:8 Tumukka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Intte giddon diza nabetinne maroti inttena baleththofetto; istti intte gishshas agumettiza agumo siyopite." 
Jeremiah29:9 Istti ta sunththan wordo tinbite yooteettes ta istta kiittabeekke› gees. 
Jeremiah29:10 «GODAY, ‹Intte Baabiloonen daana laappun tammu layththi polettidaappe guye ta inttena mokka xeellana; tani inttena ha biitta zaara ehana gida lo7o qaalayokka inttes polana." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ta inttes halchchida halchcho erays; he halchchozas poloy lo7onne hidota immizaaza, inttena go7izaaza attiin qohizaaz gidenna." 
Jeremiah29:12 Intteka tana xeygana; shiiqidi tana woossana; tanikka siyana. 
Jeremiah29:13 Intte tana koyana; intte tana kumeththa wozinappe koykko demmana. 
Jeremiah29:14 Tanikka inttes beettana. Ta intte di7etti bida biittafe zaarana; tani inttena laalla yeddida kawoteththafenne soho ubbaafe shiishshana; histtada tani inttena di7os yeddanaappe kase intte de7ida soho guye zaarada ehana› gees. 
Jeremiah29:15 «Intteka, ‹GODAY nabe nuus Baabiloonen denththides› gaana." 
Jeremiah29:16 Gido attiin GODAY Dawite kawoteththa algan uttana kawo gishshas, inttenara di7etti bontta haan attida dabbota gishshassinne ha kataman attida deraa ubbaa gishshas," 
Jeremiah29:17 tumukka GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, ‹Tani istta bolla ola, koshanne iita harge yeddana; qasse tani istta maanaas giigontta moorettida balase teera mala ooththana." 
Jeremiah29:18 Tani istta mashshan, koshaninne iita hargen yedeththana; histtada tani istta sa7a kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan kadhessinne qidhes kessana; qasse tani istta yedeththa yeddida deraa giddon qanggeththassinne dagamas, boressinne kadhes malata gidana." 
Jeremiah29:19 Gaasoykka ta oosanchcha nabeta bolla tani isttas zaara zaarada kiittida ta qaala istti siyontta ixxida. Intteka di7etti bidayti siyontta ixxideta› gees. 
Jeremiah29:20 « ‹Tani Yerusalaameppe Baabiloone di7isa yeddida asatoo! Intte ubbayka GODAA qaala siyite› gees. 
Jeremiah29:21 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay ta sunththan wordo tinbite inttes yootiza Qolaaya naa Akaabe gishshassinne Ma7isaya naa Sedeqiyaasa gishshas tani istta Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoores aaththa immana; intte xeellishin izi istta wodhana. 
Jeremiah29:22 Hessafe guye Yuhudappe di7etti biidi Baabiloonen diza asay ubbay, ‹GODAY nena Baabiloone kawoy taman xuuggida Sedeqiyaasa malanne Akaabe mala ooththo› giidi qanggana." 
Jeremiah29:23 Istti ba laggeta machchetara laymateththan ta isttas yootontta qaala ta sunththan wordo yooton Isra7eele bolla qoho gaththida; hessa tani erays; tani hessas markka» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelaame dere as Shama7es," 
Jeremiah29:25 «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, ‹Yerusalaamen diza as ubbaas, Ma7isaya naa qeese Sofonaasassinne hara qeeseta ubbaas neni ne sunththan dabdaabbeta yeddadasa› gees. Ne Sofonaasas," 
Jeremiah29:26 GODAA Keeththan halaqa gidana mala nena GODAY Yoodahe sohon qeese ooththidi shuumides; ‹Tani nabe› gishe gooyidi tinbite yootiza ay asa toho agrimooqen, iza qoodhekka sansalatan zexxa qachchanaas bessees." 
Jeremiah29:27 Histtiin, ‹Tani nabe› Anatoote dere as Ermaasa ays seerabekkii?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Ha addezi, ‹Intte di7eteththan gam7ana wodey adussa gidida gishshas inttes keeth keexxidi izan diite; doozatakka tokkidi istta ayfe miite› giidi nuus Baabiloone kiita yeddides» gides." 
Jeremiah29:29 Qeese Sofonaasi nabe Ermaasas ha dabdaabbeza nababides. 
Jeremiah29:30 Histtiin GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko," 
Jeremiah29:31 «Hayssa ha kiitaa di7eteththan dizaytas ubbaas, ‹Nehelaame dere as Shama7ey tani kiittontta tinbite yootides; intte wordon ammanettana mala ooththides› ga kiita." 
Jeremiah29:32 GODAY, ‹Tani Nehelaame dere as Shama7enne iza soo asaa qaxxayana. Ta bolla izi makkalla miish haasayda gishshas ha deraa giddon izas zarey attenna; qasse tani ta deraas ooththana lo7o miishshaka gakki beyenna› gides» gishe yides." 
Jeremiah30:1 GODAAPPE Ermaasakko yida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa. 
Jeremiah30:2 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay Ermaasa, «Tani nees yootida qaala ubbaa maxaafan xaafa." 
Jeremiah30:3 Tani ta dere Isra7eelenne Yuhuda kase istta aawatas ta immida biitta isttas zaara ehana wodey gakkides; isttika laattana» gees. 
Jeremiah30:4 GODAY Isra7eelesinne Yuhudas yootida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa. 
Jeremiah30:5 GODAY, «Tani babonne shiro waaso siyays; saroykka deenna." 
Jeremiah30:6 Ane oychchitenne akeekite! Addey yelanaas dandayzee? Histtiin addey ubbaa miixay oykkida maccassa mala ba kushe ba ulo bolla woththiin asa ubbaa sinth karettiin ta be7izay aazassee? 
Jeremiah30:7 He gallassay ay mala daganththiza gallas gidanee! hessa mala gallassi deenna; he gallassay Yaaqoobe zereththatas meto gallas gidana; gido attiin istti he metozappe attana» gees. 
Jeremiah30:8 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay, «He gallas tani istta morgefe qambara menththana; istti qashettida sansalatakka duuththana; hayssafe guyen allagay istta haarenna." 
Jeremiah30:9 Gido attiin GODAAS bantta Xoossassinne tani isttas kawoththida kawo Dawite zares istti haarettana» gees. 
Jeremiah30:10 «Hessa gishshas ta aylle Yaaqoobe zareto yayyofte! Intteno Isra7eeleto dagammofte! Intte haahoson dishin tani inttena ashshana; intte zaretakka istti di7ettida biittafe kessa ekkana; Yaaqoobe zareti simmidi saroninne woppan uttana; istta yashissana ay miishshika deenna. 
Jeremiah30:11 Tani inttena ashshanaas inttenara days; tani inttena kawoteththata giddon laalladis; he kawoteththata mulera dhayssana; gido attiin inttena mulera dhayssike; tani qixaatey baynda coo aggike; gidikkoka tani inttena ginara qaxxayana» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah30:12 GODAY, «Intte meqoy koolettenna; intte madunththay paxenna." 
Jeremiah30:13 Intte gishshas mootettizay deenna; intte madunththaska dhaley beettenna; inttes paxoy deenna. 
Jeremiah30:14 Intte laggeti ubbay inttena dogida; istti intte gishshas wudettettenna; tani inttena morkke shociza mala shocadis; menxe iita asa mala ta inttena qaxxayadis. Gaasoykka intte qohoy gita; intte nagaraykka daro. 
Jeremiah30:15 Dhaley baynda intte hargessinne intte madunththaa gishshas ays waasseetii? Intte mooroy gitanne intte nagaray daro gidida gishshas hayta ubbaa ta intte bolla ooththadis» gees. 
Jeremiah30:16 «Gido attiin inttena dippi histti mida ubbati hessaththo meetettana; intte morkke ubbatikka di7etti baana; inttena bonqqidayti bonqqettana; inttena boggizayti bogettana. 
Jeremiah30:17 Inttena gidikko tani zaarada payyisana; intte madunththaaka paththana. Gaasoykka isttas, ‹Kadhettidaaro; oonikka koyontta Xiyoono› gida gishshassa» gees GODAY." 
Jeremiah30:18 GODAY, «Tani Yaaqoobe keeth zaara keexxana; izi dizasoskka qadhettana; katamayakka kase ba laalettidason simma keexettana; kawoteththa keeththayka kase ba dizason simmi keexettana." 
Jeremiah30:19 Isttafe galata mazamureynne ilili1sa cenggurssi siyettana; Tani istta darssana; istta qoodaykka paccenna; tani istta bonchchettida dere ooththana; istti kadhettidayta gidettenna. 
Jeremiah30:20 Istta zereththay beni wode diza mala daana; istta maabaraykka ta sinththan minni eqqana; istta un7eththiza ubbaaka tani qaxxayana. 
Jeremiah30:21 Istta kaaleththizay istta baggafe gidana; istta ayssizay istta giddofe dendana; tani iza taakko shiishshana; izikka taakko shiiqana. Ta shiishshontta dishin xalidi taakko shiiqanay oonee? 
Jeremiah30:22 Hessa gishshas intte ta dere gidana; tanikka intte Xoos gidana» gees. 
Jeremiah30:23 Be7ite GODAA hanqoy dambala mala dendees; bul7akettiza gote carkoy iitata wodhdhana. 
Jeremiah30:24 Iza wozina qofaa polontta GODAA hanqoy coo hada guye simmenna; hessa yiza wodetan intte akeekana. 
Jeremiah31:1 GODAY, «He wode tani Isra7eele qommo ubbatas Xoos gidana; isttika ta dere gidana» gees." 
Jeremiah31:2 GODAY, «Mashshafe attida derey bazzo biittan taappe kiyateth demmana; tanikka Isra7eeles shemppo immanaas yaana» gees." 
Jeremiah31:3 GODAY nuus haahosoppe qonccidi, «Tani inttena mernaa siiqon dosadis; hessa gishshas ta qadheteththan inttena taakko shiishshadis." 
Jeremiah31:4 Isra7eele derezoo! Tani inttena zaara keexxana; intteka keexettana. Intte karabe zaari denththidi ufayssan hombocizaytara intte hombocana. 
Jeremiah31:5 Intte zaaridi Samaariya zumbullata bolla woyne tokkana; goshshanchchati tokkana; istti ayfiza ayfezankka ufayettana. 
Jeremiah31:6 Efreeme zumbullata bolla naagizayti, ‹Haa yiite; GODAA nu Xoossaako pude Xiyoone ane kezoos› gi xeygana wodey yaana» gees." 
Jeremiah31:7 GODAY, «Yaaqoobe deraas ufayssan yexxite; kawoteththata halaqas ilili giite; intte galatakka sissite; ‹GODAWU Isra7eeleppe casha attida ne deraa ashsha› giite." 
Jeremiah31:8 Be7ite tani istta pudeha baggafe ehana; biitta gaxappeka tani shiishshana; istta giddon qooqetinne wobbeti, abbey baynda maccassatinne miixattizayti daana; keehi daridi bantta dere simmana." 
Jeremiah31:9 Tani istta zaarada ehiza wode istti yeekkishenne woossishe yaana. Tani istta pultto haaththa achchara suure ogera kaaleththana. Gaasoykka tani Isra7eeles aawa; Efreemeykka taas bayra naa. 
Jeremiah31:10 «Intteno kawoteththatoo GODAA qaala siyite! Haahon diza abba gaxatankka, ‹Isra7eele laalliday izi istta zaari shiishshana; ba wudezakka heenththanchcha mala izi heemmana› giidi awajjite." 
Jeremiah31:11 Gaasoykka GODAY Yaaqoobe wozzana; izappe minnizayta kusheppe iza kessi ekkana. 
Jeremiah31:12 Istti yiidi Xiyoone zuma bolla ufayssa mazamure yexxana; istti GODAA kiyateth gidida kaththan, woyne ushshan, zayten, deyshaninne dorsa laaqqatan, wofanotaninne ussatan ufayettana; istti haaththi paccontta atakilte soho mala gidana; hayssafe guye istti muuzottettenna." 
Jeremiah31:13 He wode geela7oti ufayettidi yexxana; wodallatinne cimati guppana; ta istta yeehoza ufayssan laammana; ta istta muuzoteththafe minththeththana; ta isttas ufays immana. 
Jeremiah31:14 Tani qeeseta keeha anjjana; ta derezakka kiyateththi kaallana» gees. 
Jeremiah31:15 GODAY, «Waasoynne camo yeehoy Eraama katamappe seetettides; izi nayti wurida gishshas Eraheela yeekkadus; minetonttaka ixxadus» gees." 
Jeremiah31:16 GODAY, «Yeekkofanne afunxxofa; ne daaburay coo hada attenna; morkketa biittafe istti simmana." 
Jeremiah31:17 Sinththafe nees hidotay diza gishshas ne nayti bantta biitta simmana» gees. 
Jeremiah31:18 «Efreemey camo milas milalishin addafe ta siyadis; ‹Loohontta wofano mala tana qaxxayadasa; tanikka qaxxayettadis; neni GODAA ta Xoossa; neni tana zaara; tanikka simmana. 
Jeremiah31:19 Ta neeppe haakka bidaappe guye simmada modhettadis; ta akeekida wode ta hu7e baqqadis; ta yelagateththaa kawushshateth tookkadis; yeellatada guuxxadis› gides. 
Jeremiah31:20 Efreemey ta dosada ufayettiza ta naaza gidennee? Daro wode ta izara eqetta haasaykkoka zaarada iza gishshas ta qoppays; ta maracey kokkorees; ta izas keeha qadhettays» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah31:21 GODAY, «Ogen malata essa; bizaso bessiza malata tokka; ne baana wogga ogeza akeeka; geela7oye Isra7eele simma; histtada ne katamata gela." 
Jeremiah31:22 Hanne kaddida nayee! Ne ayde gakkanaas toylattanee? GODAY sa7a bolla ooraththa miish medhdhana; hessika maccay adde dooddana» gees. 
Jeremiah31:23 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Tani isttafe di7ettida miishshaa ta isttas zaariza wode istti Yuhuda biittaninne izi katamatan, ‹Nenoo xilloteththi aqiza geeshsha zumazoo! GODAY nena anjjo!› giza qaala zaari go7ettana." 
Jeremiah31:24 Goshshanchchatinne mehe haaron aqizayti Yuhudaninne Yuhuda katamatan issife daana; 
Jeremiah31:25 Tani labbanida shemppoyo ooraxissana; daaburdaarokka minththana» gees. 
Jeremiah31:26 He wode tani dhiskofe beeggada yuushsha xeelladis; tani mal7o dhisko dhiskadis. 
Jeremiah31:27 GODAY, «Tani Isra7eele biittaninne Yuhuda biittan asinne mehe kunththiza wodey yaana." 
Jeremiah31:28 Istta dhoqallanaas, laallanaas, shira yegganaas, dhayssanaassinne bash istta bolla ehanaas keeha tani minnida mala istta zaara keexxanaassinne tokkanaas keeha minnana» gees." 
Jeremiah31:29 «He wode asay, ‹Aawati woyne miththa teera caalidayssa miin istta nayta achchi zil7ides› geetettiza leemiso nam7anththo haasayettenna." 
Jeremiah31:30 Gido attiin asay issoy issoy ba nagaran nagaran hayqqana; woyne teera qawu7e mida asa achchi ubbay zil7ana» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah31:31 GODAY, «Tani Isra7eele deraaranne Yuhuda deraara ooraththa caaqo caaqettana wodey yaana." 
Jeremiah31:32 He caaqozi tani istta Gibxeppe kessanaas istta kushe oykkada istta aawatara caaqettida caaqoza mala gidenna; tani isttas azina mala gida dishin istti tanara diza caaqo qaalaza laallida» gees. 
Jeremiah31:33 «Gido attiin tani GODAY he wodeppe guye Isra7eele deraara ta caaqettana caaqoy hayssa; tani ta woga istta wozinan xaafa woththana; tanikka isttas Xoossa gidana; isttika ta dere gidana. 
Jeremiah31:34 Hayssafe guye oonikka ba lagge woykko ba isha, ‹GODAA era› giidi tamaarsenna; gaasoykka guuththafe doommidi gita gakkanaas istti ubbay tana erana; tanikka istta qoho atto gaana; istta nagarakka nam7anththo zaara qoppike» gees GODAY." 
Jeremiah31:35 Gallassan poo7isana mala arshe woththiday, omarsan poo7isana mala aginanne xoolintteta azaziday, dambalay guummana mala abba qaaththizay iza sunththay GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa geetettizayssi," 
Jeremiah31:36 «Ha eqqidi diza medheta wogay ta sinththafe kichchiko he wode Isra7eele zereththati ta sinththan mernaas kawoteth gididi duussay attana» gees GODAY. 
Jeremiah31:37 GODAY, «Bollan diza salota gakki wadhdhanaas dandayettiko, woykko garsan diza biitta xapho gakki pilggi eranaas dandayettiko he wode tani Isra7eeley ooththida ooso ubbaa gishshas ta istta yegga aggana» gees." 
Jeremiah31:38 GODAY, «Hanani7eele Gimbefe doommidi gula penge gakkanaas katamaya taas GODAAS oosettana wodey yaana." 
Jeremiah31:39 Wadha wodorozi heeppe doommi sitti giidi Gaareebe zumbullatara aadhdhidi Go7aha gakkanaas micettana. 
Jeremiah31:40 Ahaynne bidinththi yegettiza shoobba ubbay arshey mokkiza Qediroone shoobbara biidi Para Penge gakkanaas diza tidhdhi gida dembay ubbay GODAAS dummatidaaz gidana; hessafe guye he katamaya shodettukunne laalettuku» gees. 
Jeremiah32:1 Yuhuda Kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammanththa layththan, Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides." 
Jeremiah32:2 He wode Baabiloone kawo olanchchati Yerusalaame giddoththida; nabe Ermaasi Yuhudan kawoteththa keeththa zagon diza zabeta keeththan gordetti uttides. 
Jeremiah32:3 Kase Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi iza, «Ne hayssa mala tinbite waana yootay? GODAY, ‹Tani hanno ha katamayo Baabiloone kawo kushen aaththa immana; izikka haarana." 
Jeremiah32:4 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi Baabiloone kawos aadhdhi imettana; kawoza sinththan eqqidi iza haasayssana; izikka ba ayfera be7ana attiin Baabilooneta kusheppe kessi ekki attenna. 
Jeremiah32:5 Hessafe guye istti Sedeqiyaasa Baabiloone efana; histtiin tani iza bolla pirdana gakkanaas izi heen daana; intte Baabiloone asatara olettiko inttes giigenna› gees gaasa» giidi hessa gishshas qashissides. 
Jeremiah32:6 Ermaasikka GODAA qaalay taakko," 
Jeremiah32:7 «Ne aawa ishaa Shaloome naa Hanaam7eeley neekko yiidi, ‹Anatoote kataman diza ta gadeza shamma; gaasoykka shammanaas dabboteththi gaththizay nena› gees» gishe yides." 
Jeremiah32:8 GODAY gida mala, ta aawa ishaa naa Hanaam7eeley taakko zabeti naagizaso zago yiidi, «Biniyaame biittan Anatooten diza ta gadeza wozzanaas bessizay nena gidida gishshas nees buzoththa shamma» gides; hayssika GODAA qaala gididayssa eradis." 
Jeremiah32:9 Histtiin Anatoote kataman diza gadeza ta aawa ishaa naa Hanaam7eeleppe tammanne laappun saqile bira immada shammadis. 
Jeremiah32:10 Histtada markkata sinththan wule waraqata paramada gordadis; miishshaakka meezaanen woththada qooda immadis. 
Jeremiah32:11 Hessafe guye nu haasayettida paateththa yo7ota oykkidi gordettidanne gordettontta wule waraqata ta kushen ekkadis. 
Jeremiah32:12 Histtada paramettida wule waraqataa ta aawa ishaa naa Hanaam7eele sinththan, paramida markkatta sinththaninne zabe naagiza keeththa zagon uttida ubbaa Ayhudata sinththan Ma7iseya naa, Neeriya naa Baarokes immadis." 
Jeremiah32:13 Hessafe guye istta sinththan tani Baarokes azazo immadis; 
Jeremiah32:14 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Gordettidayssanne gordettontta diza nam7u wule waraqatati moorettontta dishe daro wode gam7ana mala efada oto giddon woththa» gees." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay, «Ha biittan asay keeth, goshsha gadenne woyne tokkizasoho zaari shammana» gees." 
Jeremiah32:16 Tani Neeriya naa Baarokes gadeza shammida wule waraqata immidaappe guye GODAA," 
Jeremiah32:17 «Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Neni salotanne sa7a ne gita wolqqaninne micettida ne kushen medhdhadasa; nena xooniza issi miishshika deenna. 
Jeremiah32:18 Neni ne siiqonne kiyateth shii yeleta gakkanaas bessaasa; gido attiin aawata mooro istta nayta bolla zaaraasa. Abeet gitanne wolqqama Xoossawu! Ne sunththay GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa. 
Jeremiah32:19 Ne halchchoy gita; neni ne ooson mino; ne ayfeti asa oge ubbaa xeelleettes; issaas issaas iza oge malanne iza ooso mala ne immana. 
Jeremiah32:20 Neni Gibxen malaatatanne ooraththa miish ooththadasa; hach gakkanaaska ha ooraththa oosota Isra7eele asaa giddoninne hara kawoteththata ubbaa giddon ooththizayssa aggabeekka. Hessafe dendidayssan ne sunththay ubbason erettides. 
Jeremiah32:21 Neni malataninne ooraththa miishshan, ne mino qeseninne micettida kushen keehi yashissiza puulateththan ne dere Isra7eele Gibxeppe kessadasa." 
Jeremiah32:22 Istta aawatas neni immana gaada caaqqida maaththinne eessi izippe goggiza hanno ha biittayo ne isttas immadasa. 
Jeremiah32:23 Histtiin istti he biittaa gelidi laattida; gido attiin nees azazettibeettenna; ne wogaakka naagibeettenna; istti ooththana mala neni azazidayssa ubbaaka ooththibeettenna; hessa gishshas neni istta bolla ha bosha ubbaa ehadasa. 
Jeremiah32:24 «Hekko Baabilooneti katamayo oykkanaas gimbe yuushon biitta dooridi giddoththida; olappe, koshappenne iita hargefe dendidayssan katamaya isttara olettiza Baabilooneta kushen aadhdha imettana hanawus; neni ha7i be7izayssa mala ne yootida ubbay polettishe dees." 
Jeremiah32:25 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! Katamaya Baabiloonetas aadhdha imeteththa bolla dishin, ‹Gadaa biran shamma; shammashe markka sinththan shamma› gaasa» ga woossadis." 
Jeremiah32:26 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yiidi," 
Jeremiah32:27 «Tani GODAY as ubbaas Xoossa; tumappe tana xooniza miishshi dizee?» gides. 
Jeremiah32:28 Hessa gishshas GODAY, «Tani ha katamayo Baabiloonetassinne Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoores aaththa immana; isttika izo oykkana." 
Jeremiah32:29 Katamayo oliza Baabilooneti yiidi katamay giddo gelana; izokka taman xuuggana; tana hanqeththanaas asay bantta keeththa pooqe pooqe bolla Ba7aales exaane cu7asidasohotanne eeqa xoossatas ushsha yarsho shiishshida keeththata ubbaa istti xuuggana» gees. 
Jeremiah32:30 GODAY, «Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay bantta yelagateththafe doommidi ta sinththan iita miish ooththidaappe attiin hara issi lo7o miish ooththibeettenna; istti bantta kushen ooththida ooson tana hanqeththida." 
Jeremiah32:31 Hanna katamaya eqqidaasoppe hach gakkanaas tani izo ta sinththafe dhayssana mala ta hanqonne bash denththeththadus. 
Jeremiah32:32 Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay, istta kawotinne shuumeti, istta qeesetinne nabeti ooththida iita ooso ubbaan tana hanqeththida." 
Jeremiah32:33 Istti taas bantta sinth aggidi zokko zaarida; tani istta zaara zaarada tamaarsikokka istti siyettennanne seeraakka ekkettenna. 
Jeremiah32:34 Ta sunththi xeygettiza Keeththaa harassiza bantta eeqa xoossata essidi tunisida. 
Jeremiah32:35 Istti bantta attuma naytanne macca nayta Molookes yarshanaas Henoome naa shoobban Ba7aales goynniza dhoqqasohota giigsida; gido attiin istti Yuhuda nagara oosisanaas hayssa mala harassiza ooso ooththana mala ta istta azazabeekke; ta hessa mulekka qoppabeekke» gides. 
Jeremiah32:36 Intte, «Olan, koshaninne iita hargen Baabiloone kawo kushen aadhdha imettana» gida ha katamays GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay," 
Jeremiah32:37 «Ta mino hanqoninne gita boshan ta istta goodda yeddida biitta ubbaafe shiishshana; histtada hasoho zaara ehada saroteththan ta istta woththana. 
Jeremiah32:38 Istti ta dere gidana; tanikka istta Xoos gidana. 
Jeremiah32:39 Isttassinne isttafe guye istta naytas lo7o gidana malanne istti taas ubba wode yayyana mala tani isttas issi wozinanne issi qofa immana. 
Jeremiah32:40 Tani isttara mernaas gidiza caaqo caaqettana; tani isttas lo7o miish ooso aggike; istti taappe wora simmontta malanne istti taas yayyana mala ta ooththana. 
Jeremiah32:41 Ta isttas lo7o ooththada ufayettana; qasse tani ta kumeththa wozinappenne ta kumeththa shemppofe tumappe ha biittay bolla istta tokkana» gees. 
Jeremiah32:42 Qasseka GODAY, «Tani ha deraa bolla hayssa wolqqama bash ubbaa ehida mala tani isttas lo7o ooththana gaada caaqqida qaala ubbaa polana."
