Ezekiel16:20 «Qasseka ne taas yelida attuma naytanne macca nayta istti maana mala efada misletas yarshadasa. Hessa ne ooththizay ne laymatizayssi guuxxinee? 
Ezekiel16:21 Neni ta nayta shukkada eeqa xoossatas yarshadasa. 
Ezekiel16:22 Ha harassiza ne oosotaninne ne laymateth ubbaan ne aayey uloppe ne pixxinni kallo yelettida mala ne suuththan moorettada qakettashe diza yelagateththa wodeta ne qoppabeekka. 
Ezekiel16:23 « ‹Aayye ana! Hanne nees aayye ana!› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY; ne ooththida iita miishshata ubbaafekka bollara hara gujjada," 
Ezekiel16:24 nees poggono giigsadasa; he ubbaan nees goynnizasohota ooththadasa. 
Ezekiel16:25 Oyddu oge doonan ubbaan goynnizasohota giigsadasa; nenateththaa aadhdhi biza ubbaas laymateththas shiishshada ne puulateththaa tunisadasa. 
Ezekiel16:26 Ziita kezida ne shooro Gibxe asatara laymatadasa; buuteppe daro ne laymateththan tana hanqeththadasa. 
Ezekiel16:27 Hessa gishshas tani ta qese ne bolla denththada nees immiza go7atappe pacinchchadis; ne iita hanotappe dendidayssan, ne pokko ooson yeellatiza ne morkke Filisxeeme macca nayta amos aaththa immadis." 
Ezekiel16:28 Nena buro alontta gishshas Asooretarakka laymatadasa; hessafe guyekka alabeekka. 
Ezekiel16:29 Ne tunateththa zal7anchchata biitta Baabiloone gakkanaas darsadasa; histtadakka alabeekka. 
Ezekiel16:30 « ‹Yeellay baynda layma maccassa mala hessa ubbaa ne poliday ay mala laafa wozinay nees diinee?› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. 
Ezekiel16:31 Oyddu oge doona ubbaan nees poggonota goynnizasohota giigsadasa; gidikkoka hara layman aqiza maccassata mala miishshe qanxxisabeekka. 
Ezekiel16:32 « ‹Hanne layma maccassayee! Neni azinay de7ishin hara addera laymatiza maccassa mala. 
Ezekiel16:33 Ay layma maccassas imotay imettees; ne gidikko ne laggetas gede imota immaasa; awa baggarakka yidayti nenara laymatana mala baleththanaas mogota immaasa. 
Ezekiel16:34 Hessa gishshas ne laymateththay haratappe dumma; laymatanaas koyzaadey nenara giiganaas metotenna; neni izas imota immaasa attiin izi nees imota immenna; ne hanotay hankkoytappe dummatees› gees» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. 
Ezekiel16:35 Hanne layma maccassayee, ane GODAA qaala siya!" 
Ezekiel16:36 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Neni ne laymateththa amon ne may7o qaarada ne kalloteth ne laggeta bessida gishshas, harassiza eeqa xoossata ne goynnida gishshas isttas neni ne nayta suuth yarshida gishshas," 
Ezekiel16:37 neni isttan ufayettida ne laggeta ubbaa, ne siiqizaytanne ne ixxizayta ubbaa ta shiishshana; ubba baggafe ne yuushon shiishshada istta sinththan ne kalloteththaa ta qaarana; isttika ne kalloteththaa ubbaa be7ana." 
Ezekiel16:38 Tani laymatiza maccassata bollanne shemppo wodhiza maccassata bolla pirdiza mala ne bolla pirdana; ta hanqoninne mishonan shemppo wodhanaashe gakkanaas ta halo kessana. 
Ezekiel16:39 Tani nena ne laggetas aaththa immana; isttika ne poggonotanne ne zumbullaa bolla goynnizasohota laallana; istti ne may7o qaari ekkana; lo7o ne alleqota bonqqi ekkana; nena pixxinni kallonne kushe mela ashshana. 
Ezekiel16:40 Istti ne bolla dere denththana; shuchchara nena kurakkana; mashshara istti nena qanxxereththana. 
Ezekiel16:41 Ne keeththata taman xuuggana; daro maccassata sinththan ne bolla qixaate ehana; ne laymateththaa ta nena diggana; hayssafe guye ne siiqotas ne miish qanxxaka. 
Ezekiel16:42 Hessan ne bolla diza ta hanqoy irxxana; ta seela hanqoy neeppe haakkana; ta co7u gaana attiin hayssafe guye hanqettike. 
Ezekiel16:43 «Ne tana haytan hanqeththadasa attiin ne yelagateththa wodeta qoppabeekka; hessa gishshas ne ooso mala ta nees immana» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. Ne ooththida iita oosota bolla hara ziitateth gujjabeekkii? 
Ezekiel16:44 «Yerusalaame! As ubbay leemiso haasayshe, ‹Macca nay aayin kezees› gi ne bolla leemiso haasayees." 
Ezekiel16:45 Tumu neni ba azinaanne ba nayta shaatettiza ne aayey naa; neni bantta azinatanne bantta nayta shaatettiza ne michcheta mala. Intte aaya Hiite biitta asa; intte aaway qasse Amoore biitta asa. 
Ezekiel16:46 Nees bayra michchiya neeppe pudeha baggara ba macca naytara diza Samaariya; nees kaalo michchiya neeppe dugeha baggara diza Sodoomo. 
Ezekiel16:47 Neni istta oge buussinne istta iita oge kaalo xalla gidontta guuththa woden isttafe bollara iita ooththizaaro gidadasa. 
Ezekiel16:48 Ta Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays: Neninne ne macca nayti ooththidayssa mala ne michcho Sodoomanne izi macca naytikka ooththibeettenna. 
Ezekiel16:49 Ne michchiya Sodooma ooththida nagaray hayssa: izanne izi macca nayti otoranchcha, kallidaytanne injje duus dizayta; istti manqotanne metotettidayta maaddi erettenna." 
Ezekiel16:50 Istti otoranchcha gididi ta sinththan harassiza miish ooththida; hessa gishshas intte be7ida mala ta sinththafe dhayssadis. 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaariyay ne ooththida nagaraas bagga gidanayssaka ooththabeekku; neni gidikko izippe keehi iita gidida ooso ooson he ubbaan neni ne michcheta xillo asa mala misatissadasa. 
Ezekiel16:52 Neni ne michcheta xillo mala qoodida gishshas yeella may7a; ne nagaray isttayssafe keehi iita gidida gishshas istti neeppe xillo; neni ne michcheta xillisida gishshas yeella quma7a. 
Ezekiel16:53 «Tani gidikko Sodoomonne izi macca nayta, hessaththoka Samaariyappenne izi macca naytappe ekettida di7o ta zaarana; isttafe di7ettidayssa ta zaariza wode neeppe di7ettidayssaka zaarana." 
Ezekiel16:54 Ne ooththida ubbaan ne kawuyananne keeha yeellatana; hessan ne michcheti minettana. 
Ezekiel16:55 Ne michcho Sodoomanne izi macca nayti, qasseka Samaariyaynne izi macca nayti kase ba diza hanotan simmana; neninne ne macca naytikka kase intte diza hanotan simmana." 
Ezekiel16:56 Kase ne otorettiza wode ne michcho Sodoomis sunth xeyganaaskka koyabeekka. 
Ezekiel16:57 Hessi ne nagaray qonccanaappe sinththan hanides; ha7i gidikko ne yuushon dishe nena kadhiza Eedoome macca naytassinne izi shoorota ubbaas, qasse Filisxeeme macca naytas qidhes attadasa." 
Ezekiel16:58 Ne pokko hanossinne ne iita oosos bessiza qixaate ekkana» gees. 
Ezekiel16:59 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Ta qaala kadhida gishshas tanara gelida caaqo qaalaa laalladasa; hessas ne ooththida mala ta ne bolla ooththana." 
Ezekiel16:60 Gido attiin ne naateththan dishin ta nenara caaqqida qaala qoppana; qasse mernaas eqqi daana caaqo qaala ta nenara caaqettana. 
Ezekiel16:61 Neni nees bayra michchetanne kaalo michcheta mokka ekkiza wode ne hemeth qoppa ekkada yeellatana; istti nees macca nayta gidana mala ta nees immana; gido attiin ta nenara gelida caaqo qaala mala gidenna. 
Ezekiel16:62 Hessa gishshas ta nenara caaqo qaala ooraxissana; tani GODAA gididayssa ne he wode erana. 
Ezekiel16:63 Tani ne ooththida mooro ubbaa atto gida wode ne qohoy ne wozinan karppi gi geliza wode ne yeellatana; ne kawushshateththafe dendidayssan ne doona mulekka doyakka» gides. 
Ezekiel17:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel17:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele asaa maaleththo maaleththa; ne isttas leemison maaleththo yoota. 
Ezekiel17:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Wogga qefeynne adussinne cora baalley diza izas medhay masara gidida gita golley dees. Izikka Libaanoose yiidi ziga miththa xeeran uttidi unquloza xunqqides." 
Ezekiel17:4 He miththaza xeerappe unquloza xunqqi ekkidi zal7anchchata dere efides; zal7anchchata kataman tokkides. 
Ezekiel17:5 « ‹Hessafe guye he biittafe zereth efidi lo7o biittan haaththi kumidason haath naage miththa mala tokkides. 
Ezekiel17:6 Izi mokkida wode qanththinne daayida woyne tura gidides; haggati golleza bagga diccida; xaphoti gidikko iza garsan attida; hessa gishshas izi woyne tura gidides; haggata kessides; cilila hayththatakka kessides. 
Ezekiel17:7 « ‹Qasse wogga qefetinne cora baallen kamettida gita golley dees; he tokettida woyne miththazi haath demmanaas ba tokettidasoppe ba xaphoza gollezaakko yeddides; haggaaka izakko miccides. 
Ezekiel17:8 Gido attiin hagga kessana mala, ayfe ayfana malanne lo7o woyne mith gidana mala iza matan daro haaththi dizason aradda biittan kase tokettides› gees." 
Ezekiel17:9 «Neni isttas, ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: he turay diccanee? Koyro gollezi shullana mala xaphoza shoddiin iza ayfezi qoqofettenee? Unquloykka ubbay melana; iza xaphoppe shoddanaas mino qesenne daro asa wolqqa koshshenna." 
Ezekiel17:10 Izi harason tokettidi oykkandeeshaa? Arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy shocikko heen ba diccidason izi mulera melennee?› » gides. 
Ezekiel17:11 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel17:12 «Hayssa makkallanchcha keeththa asaas, ‹Hayta leemisota birsheththi aazakkonne intte erekketii?› Hessika Baabiloone kawoy Yerusalaame yiidi izi kawozanne izi daannata di7i ekki Baabiloone simmi bides." 
Ezekiel17:13 Qasse kawo keeththa asaappeka issaa ekkidi izara issife qaala gelides; izakka caaqeththides; biittay bolla erettiza asata di7i ekki bides. 
Ezekiel17:14 Izi hessa ooththiday he biittayn diza kawoteththaya kawuyada izara gelida qaala naagada daana mala attiin nam7anththo dendontta mala ooththanaassa. 
Ezekiel17:15 Gido attiin Yuhuda kawoy iza bolla makkallidi, paratanne daro olanchchata demmanaas qasttanneta Gibxe biitta kiittides. Izas hessi hanandee? Hayssa mala ooththiday kessi ekki attandee? Gelida caaqo qaala laallidaadey qaxxayettontta attandee?" 
Ezekiel17:16 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays: izi caaqoza kadhidi gelida qaala laallidason iza araata bolla utisida kawoza biitta Baabiloonen izi hayqqana." 
Ezekiel17:17 Baabiloone olanchchati as wodhanaas katamay gimbe yuushon biitta dooriza wodenne miixata giigsiza wode Gibxe kawo Paaroone olanchchataranne daro buttetara yiidi olan iza maaddana dandayenna. 
Ezekiel17:18 Kase izi caaqqida caaqoza kadhidinne kase ba gelida qaala laallidi ba kushe immidaappe guye haytantta ubbaa ooththida gishshas qaxxayettontta attenna› gees. 
Ezekiel17:19 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays; izi caaqqida caaqoza kadhidi gelida qaalaa laallida gishshas tani ta caaqo qaalaa iza hu7e bolla ehana." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ta gite iza bolla miccana; izi ta woximaden oykettana; izi taas ammanettontta aggida gishshas ta iza Baabiloone efada heen iza bolla pirdana. 
Ezekiel17:21 Baqatiza iza olanchchati ubbay mashshan hayqqana; casha attidayti dumma dummaso laalettana. Hayssa haasayday tana GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana› gees. 
Ezekiel17:22 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani hu7era adussa ziga xeerappe unquloza xunqqa ekkada ubbaafe dhoqqa zuma hu7en tokkana." 
Ezekiel17:23 Dhoqqu gida Isra7eele zuma hu7en tokkana; izi haggata kessana; ayfe ayfana; lo7o ziga gidana; dumma dumma qommo kafoti ubbay heen baas duussaso keexxana; iza haggata kuwan shempana. 
Ezekiel17:24 Wora mith ubbay, adussa miththata ziqqi histtizay, qaanththa miththata dhoqqu histtizay tana GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana; cilila miththata tani melissays; mela miththata tani cililissays› gees. «Tani GODAY Hayssa haasayadis; izakka ooththana» gides." 
Ezekiel18:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel18:2 «Isra7eele biitta gishshas, ‹Aawati qawu7e woyne miin nayta achchi zil7ides› giidi intte tosse yootizay aazee?" 
Ezekiel18:3 «Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY! Tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays: hayssafe guyen intte hayssa mala tosse Isra7eele biittan yootekketa. 
Ezekiel18:4 Be7ite asa ubbaa shemppoy taassa; yelidayta shemppoy taas gidida mala istta nayta shemppoyka taassa; nagara ooththida shemppoya hayqqana. 
Ezekiel18:5 «Suureteththaninne wogan ooththiza issi asi diikko," 
Ezekiel18:6 «zumbullata bolla eeqa xoossatas yarshettidayssa izi meenna; Isra7eele biittankka diza eeqa xoossatakko xeellenna; ba laggeza machcheyra laymatenna; maccassa wogay yishin maccassara aqenna. 
Ezekiel18:7 Oonakka un7eththenna; gido attiin oyso ekkida miishshaakka tal7e ekkidaades zaarees; gafidaades ba kath, kallottidaades ba may7o immees attiin wolqqara baas bonqqi ekkenna." 
Ezekiel18:8 Izi dichchas tal7enna; buute daro dichchika ekkenna; ba kushe mooroppe naagees; asas suure pirda pirdees. 
Ezekiel18:9 Ta maara kaallees; ta wogaakka suureteththan polees. Hessi xillo asa; izi shemppora paxa daana» gides. 
Ezekiel18:10 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Ha bitanezas shemppo wodhiza, woykko hayssafe kaalli dizaytappe issaa ooththiza issi makkallanchcha nay de7ikko," 
Ezekiel18:11 iza aaway heytappe issaaka ooththontta aggiko, naazi zumbullata bolla yarshos shiiqidayssa miikko, ba laggeza machcheyra laymatikko," 
Ezekiel18:12 hiyeesanne metotettidaade un7eththiko, wolqqara dafi ekkiko, oyso ekkidayssa zaarontta ixxiko, eeqa xoossatakko simmiko, harassiza oosota ooththiko," 
Ezekiel18:13 dichchas tal7iko, buute daro dich ekkiko, hessa mala asi shemppora paxa daanee? Mulekka deenna! Izi hayta harassiza miishshata ooththida gishshas izi tumukka hayqqana; ba suuththan barkka oyshettana; tumukka hayqqana." 
Ezekiel18:14 «Ha iita addeza naazi gakkidi naa yelikko iza naazi kase aaway ooththida nagara ubbaa be7idi izaththo ooththontta aggiko," 
Ezekiel18:15 zumbullata bolla yarsho shiishshidayssa izi montta aggiko, Isra7eele biittan diza eeqa xoossata goynnontta aggiko, ba laggeza machcheyra laymatontta aggiko," 
Ezekiel18:16 as un7eththontta aggiko, tal7e immanaas oyso oychchontta aggiko, wolqqara bonqqi ekkontta aggiko, gido attiin ba kath gafidaades, ba may7o kallottidaades immiko," 
Ezekiel18:17 ba kushe iita oosoppe shiishshi ekkiko, dich woykko buuteppe daro dich ekkontta aggiko, ta wogaa naagikko, ta maaraa kaalliko, izi shemppora paxa daana attiin ba aawa nagaran hayqqenna." 
Ezekiel18:18 Gido attiin iza aaway asa maata naaqqida gishshas, ba ishappe wolqqara bonqqi ekkida gishshas, deraa giddon bessontta miish ooththida gishshas izi ba nagaran hayqqana." 
Ezekiel18:19 «Intte gidikko, ‹Nay ba aawa nagaran ays qaxxayettennee?› geeta. Naazi suurenne tuma ooththida gishshas, ta maaraakka minththi naagida gishshas izi shemppora paxa daana." 
Ezekiel18:20 Hayqqanaas bessizay nagara ooththida shemppo. Nay bana yelidayta nagaran qaxxayettenna; hessa malankka yelidayti ba nayta nagaran qaxxayettettenna. Xilloy ba xilloteththa ayfe maana; nagaranchchayka ba nagaraa gate ekkana. 
Ezekiel18:21 «Gido attiin nagaranchchay ba ooththida nagara ubbaafe simmidi ta maara ubbaa naagikko, suurenne tuma gidida ooso ooththiko izi mulekka shemppora paxa daanaappe attiin hayqqenna." 
Ezekiel18:22 Iza qohoy ubbay qoodettenna. Izi xilloteththa ogen bida gishshas shemppora paxa daana. 
Ezekiel18:23 Tumappe nagaranchcha hayqon ta ufayettazinaa? gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. Hessafe bollara izi ba biza iita ogeppe simmidi shemppora paxa diikko tana ufayssennee? 
Ezekiel18:24 «Gido attiin xillo asi ba xilloteththafe simmidi nagara ooththiko, nagaranchchay ooththiza tuna miish ooththiko tumappe izaadey shemppora paxa daanee? Akkay; izi ooththida xilloteththaafe issoyka izas qoodettenna; izi ammanettontta ixxida gaasoninne izi ooththida nagara ubbaa gaason izi hayqqana." 
Ezekiel18:25 «Intte gidikko, ‹GODAA ogey suure gidenna› geeta. Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Ha7i siyite! Ta ogey suure gidennee? Geellay intte oge gidennee?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Xillo asi ba xilloteththaafe simmidi nagara ooththiza wode ba nagara gaason hayqqana; ba ooththida qoho gaason izi shemppora paxa deenna. 
Ezekiel18:27 Nagaranchchay gidikko ba iita oosoppe simmidi ammaneteththan diikko izi ba shemppo ashshana. 
Ezekiel18:28 Izi ba ooththida qoho ubbaa yuushshi akeekidi, ba ooththida iitateththa ooso ubbaafe simmida gishshas izi shemppora paxa daana attiin hayqqenna." 
Ezekiel18:29 Isra7eele asay gidikko, ‹GODAA ogey suure gidenna› gida. Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Ta ogey suure gidennee? Geellay intte oge gidennee?" 
Ezekiel18:30 «Hessa gishshas intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Hessa gishshas intte ooso ooso mala ta intte bolla pirdana; Ha7i maaroteththan gelite; intte nagaran dhayontta mala intte nagara ubbaafe simmite. 
Ezekiel18:31 Intte ta bolla ooththida qoho ubbaa wora olite; inttes ooraththa wozinaynne ooraththa ayanay de7o; intteno Isra7eele asatoo ays hayqqeetii? 
Ezekiel18:32 Oonikka hayqqanayssa ta koykke gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY; taakko haa simmidi shemppora paxa diite» gides. 
Ezekiel19:1 GODAY, «Isra7eele daannata gishshas zilas zilalana mala taas yootides;" 
Ezekiel19:2 izikka taas, « ‹Ne aaya kase gaammota giddon ay mala gaammoo! Wodalla gaammota giddon ichchadus; ba maratakka heen dichchadus." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ba maratappe issaa iza dichchiin, izi mino gaammo gidides; izi shankkateth tamaaridi as mides." 
Ezekiel19:4 Kawoteththati ubbay iza hano siyida; istti bookkida ollan gelidi oykettides; isttika iza siidhen dafo aaththi goochchidi Gibxe biitta efida. 
Ezekiel19:5 « ‹Iza hidota ooththidayssi calqamidayssa, iza naagidayssi polettonttayssa be7ida wode, ba marata giddofe nam7anththoza dichchada, mino gaammo kessadus." 
Ezekiel19:6 Izi gaammota giddon noochu gides; minni minnika bides; wodhi muus eridi asaakka mides. 
Ezekiel19:7 Izi istta miixa menththereththides; istta katamatakka kayzisides; Biittaynne biittan diza asay ubbay iza xaagoppe dendidayssan kokkorida. 
Ezekiel19:8 Iza yuushon diza kawoteththati ubbay iza bolla dendida; bantta dere ubbaafe iza bolla shiiqida; bantta gite iza oykkana yeggida; izi istta ollan gelidi oykettides. 
Ezekiel19:9 Siidhen dafo yeggidi kooththa giddon gelththida; Baabiloone kawookko efida; Nam7anththo iza cenggurssi Isra7eele zumata bolla seetettontta mala, istti iza qasho keeth gelththida." 
Ezekiel19:10 « ‹Ne aaya haaththa doonan tokettida woyne tura mala; goshsha gaden daro haaththi diza gishshas, daayida ayfida woyne tura misatadus." 
Ezekiel19:11 Izi haggati kawoteththas bessiza mino guufeta. Cippi gida hayththata giddon, ba adussateththaninne ba cora haggatan lo7a beettadus." 
Ezekiel19:12 Gido attiin hanqon dhoqallettadus; duge biittan olettadus; arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy izo melissides; iza ayfida ayfeza qoqofides; mino izi haggati dagammida; tamaykka istta mides. 
Ezekiel19:13 Ha7i haath saamettida mela biittan bazzon tokettadus. 
Ezekiel19:14 Izis wogga haggata issaafe tamay kezides; iza ayfida ayfeza mides; kawoteththas gidiza issi mino haggayka attibeenna; hayssi zilassa; ceece gallas milassas gidana› ga» gides. 
Ezekiel20:1 Nuni di7ettida laappunththa layththan, ichchashanththa aginan, tammanththa gallassan, Isra7eele cimatappe guuththati GODAA oychchanaas yiidi ta sinththan uttida." 
Ezekiel20:2 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel20:3 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele cimatas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte ta qofaa oychchana yidetii? Tani de7o Xoos gididayssan caaqqays; intte tana oychchidi erana mala koykke› gees gaada yoota» gides." 
Ezekiel20:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Haysso asa nawu! Haytantta ne pirdas shiishshanee? Tumappe ne istta pirdas shiishshanee? Harassiza kase istta aawata oosoza isttas qonccisa." 
Ezekiel20:5 Isttas, ‹Tani Isra7eele doorida wode, Yaaqoobe zaretas ta kushe denththada caaqqadis; Gibxe biittan tanateththaa isttas qonccisadis; ta kushekka denththa caaqqada GODAY tani intte Xoossa› gides." 
Ezekiel20:6 ‹Tani istta Gibxe biittafe kessada ubbaafe lo7o gidida maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta ta isttas giigsa woththida biitta gelththana› gaada caaqqadis. 
Ezekiel20:7 Qasse tani isttas, ‹Inttefe issoy issoy intte ayfeta shempisida tuna misleta diggite; Gibxe eeqa xoossatan inttena tunisopite. GODAY tani intte Xoossa› gadis." 
Ezekiel20:8 «Istti issoy issoy gidikko ta bolla makkallida; ta yootizayssaka siyana koyibeettenna; istti bantta ayfeta istta bolla woththida tuna misleta diggibeettenna; Gibxe eeqa xoossatakka aggibeettenna. Hessa gishshas istti Gibxen dishin tani ta hanqo istta bolla gussana; polana gakkanaashe istta bolla yeddanaas qachchadis. 
Ezekiel20:9 Gido attiin istti kase diza kawoteththa giddoninne Isra7eele asaa Gibxeppe wozzanaas tani qaala geliza wode istta matan ta qonccida kawoteththata sinththan ta sunththi tunontta mala ta sunththaa gishshas genccadis. 
Ezekiel20:10 «Hessa gishshas tani istta Gibxeppe kessada bazzo ehadis. 
Ezekiel20:11 Asi naagizaakko shemppora paxa woththiza maara ta isttas immadis; ta wogaakka ta istta erisadis. 
Ezekiel20:12 Qasse istta geeshshiday tana GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana mala taassinne isttas giddon malata gidana mala ta Sambata isttas immadis. 
Ezekiel20:13 «Gido attiin Isra7eele asay bazzo biittan ta bolla makkallida. Asi naagidaakko shemppora paxa woththiza ta wogaa naagibeettenna; ta maaraa menththida; ta Sambataakka mulera tunisida. Histtiin tani ta hanqo istta bolla gussada bazzo biittan istta dhayssanaas qachchadis. 
Ezekiel20:14 Gido attiin tani istta Gibxeppe kessishin be7ida kawoteththata sinththan ta sunththi tunontta mala ta sunththaa gishshas genccadis. 
Ezekiel20:15 Qasse tani istta ubbaafe lo7o gidida maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta ta isttas immida biittaa ta istta gelththike gaada ta kushe denththada bazzo biittan istta sinththan caaqqadis. 
Ezekiel20:16 Gaasoykka istti ta wogaa menththida; ta isttas immida maaraakka naagibeettenna; ta Sambataakka tunisida; istta wozinay istta eeqa xoossatara oykettides. 
Ezekiel20:17 Tani gidikko istta qadhetan xeelladis attiin bazzo biittan istta mulera dhayssabeekke. 
Ezekiel20:18 Bazzo biittan istta naytas, ‹Kase intte aawata maara kaallofte; istta wogaakka naagopite; inttena istta eeqa xoossatan tunisopite." 
Ezekiel20:19 GODAY tani intte Xoossa. Ta maara kaallite; ta wogaa naaganaas minnite. 
Ezekiel20:20 Taassinne inttes giddon malata gidana mala ta Sambata inttes dumma gallas histtite; GODAY tani intte Xoos gididayssa intte he wode erana› gadis. 
Ezekiel20:21 «Istta nayti ta bolla makkallida; asi naagidi shemppora paxa daana mala ta immida maara kaallibeettenna; ta wogaa minni naagibeettenna; ta Sambataakka tunisida. Histtiin tani ta hanqo bazzon istta bolla gussadis; ta hanqoy polettana gakkanaas istta bolla ehanaas qachchadis. 
Ezekiel20:22 Gido attiin tani istta Gibxeppe kessishin be7ida kawoteththata sinththan ta sunththi tunontta mala ta kushe shiishshadis. 
Ezekiel20:23 Qasseka tani istta kawoteththata giddon laallanayssanne dumma dumma dereta giddo dharccanayssa bazzo biittan ta kushe denththada istta sinththan caaqqadis. 
Ezekiel20:24 Gaasoykka istti maara kadhida; ta wogaa naagibeettenna; ta Sambata tunisida; istta ayfey istta aawata eeqa xoossatara shiddides. 
Ezekiel20:25 Hessa gishshas tani istta lo7o gidontta maarasinne istta shemppora paxa woththontta wogas aaththa immadis. 
Ezekiel20:26 Istta bayra nayta taman xuuggi yarshidi tunana mala ooththadis; ta hessa ooththiday istti dagammidi tani GODAA gididayssa erana malassa. 
Ezekiel20:27 «Hessa gishshas asa nawu! Isra7eele asaas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte aawati tanan ammanettontta aggidi hayssan tana cayida." 
Ezekiel20:28 Tani isttas immana caaqqida biittaa istta eha gelththida wode dhoqqu gida zumbullata ubbaanne cililo mith ubbata be7ida; heen bantta yarsho yarshida; bantta kaththa yarsho shiishshidi, sawo tunnu giza exaane cuwasidi, ushsha yarshoka shiishshidi ta hanqo denththeththida› gees." 
Ezekiel20:29 Tanikka, ‹Intte biza dhoqqasohozi izi aazee?› gadis. Hach gakkanaas iza sunththay Baama geetetti xeygettees; izas birsheththay goynniza dhoqqasohota guussa» gees." 
Ezekiel20:30 Hessa gishshas, «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Isra7eele asaas, ‹Intte aawati ooththida mala inttenikka inttenateththaa tuniseetii? Tunida istta eeqa misleta amoteththan ays xuugeteetii?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Intte yarsho shiishshiza wode ubbaan intte nayta taman xuuggi yarshishe eeqa xoossatan hach gakkanaas tunishe deeta; intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Intte ta qofa oychchana mala ta inttes ero goo? Tani de7o Xoos gididayssan tanan caaqqays; intte tana oychchana mala ta inttes eeno giikke› gees» gaada yoota. 
Ezekiel20:32 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Intte, ‹Nuni miththassinne shuchchas goynniza kawoteththa malanne alame bolla diza deraa mala gidana koyoos› giidi qoppeeta. Gido attiin intte qofay mulekka inttes hanenna." 
Ezekiel20:33 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani de7o Xoos gididayssan tanan caaqqays› Tani ta mino qeseninne micettida ta kushen hanqo gussashe ta intte bolla kawotana." 
Ezekiel20:34 Kawoteththata giddofe tani inttena kessana; intte laalettida biitta ubbaafe ta mino qeseninne micettida ta kushen hanqo gussashe intte laaletti bida dere ubbaafe ta inttena shiishshana. 
Ezekiel20:35 Tani inttena kawoteththatas diza bazzo biitta ehana; histtada heen ta inttena qonccen pirdana. 
Ezekiel20:36 Gibxe bazzon intte aawata kase ta pirdida mala inttenakka ta pirdana gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. 
Ezekiel20:37 Tani inttena ta kawoteththa guufe garsara aaththana; ta caaqo qaalarakka inttena gaththa oyseththana 
Ezekiel20:38 Ta bolla makkallidaytanne tana qohidayta tani intte giddofe diggana; ha7i istti diza biittafekka ta istta kessana; gido attiin istti Isra7eele biitta gelettenna. Tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana» gees. 
Ezekiel20:39 Isra7eele asatoo! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY inttena, «Intte ha7i tani yootizayssa siyontta ixxiko biidi ubbayka intte eeqa xoossaas goynnite! Gido attiin intte hayssafe guye zaaridi intte yarshoninne intte eeqa xoossatan ta geeshsha sunththaa tunisekketa." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla, dhoqqu gida Isra7eele zuma bolla heen Isra7eele asay ubbay taas Ubbaa Haariza GODAAS goynnana. Tanikka heen inttena mokka ekkana; intte kaththa yarsho, intte bayra imotanne geeyida intte yarshota ubbaa tani heen koyays." 
Ezekiel20:41 Intte laaletti diza kawoteththa giddofe tani inttena ehiza wodenne hara biittatappe tani inttena shiishshiza wode, sawo tongu giza yarsho ekkiza mala tani inttena ekkana. Tani intte giddon geesh gididayssa kawoteththata sinththan qonccisana." 
Ezekiel20:42 Tani kase intte aawatas immanaas ta kushe denththa caaqqida Isra7eele biitta inttena zaara gelththiza wode tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana. 
Ezekiel20:43 Heen intte intte ogenne inttenateththaa tunisida oosota ubbaa intte akeekana; intte polida iita ooso ubbaan intterkka inttena harasettana. 
Ezekiel20:44 Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Intte iita ogenne intte iita ooso mala gidontta ta sunththaa gishshas gaada ta inttena wochchiza wode Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani Xoos gididayssa intte erana» gees. 
Ezekiel20:45 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel20:46 «Haysso asa nawu! Dugeha bagga simmada xeella; dugeha bagga deraa bolla yoota; dugeha baggan diza woraa bolla tinbite yoota. 
Ezekiel20:47 Dugeha bagga woraas, ‹GODAA qaala siya!› ga; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani ne bolla tama oyththana; tamazikka cililanne mela mith ubbaa maana; popol7u giza lacozi to7enna; dugehappe biidi pudeha gakkanaas diza asa ayfeso ubbaa labana." 
Ezekiel20:48 Tani GODAY hessa oyseththidayssa asi ubbay be7ana; he tamaykka to7enna› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel20:49 Tanikka zaarada, «Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Aayye ana! Istti ta gishshas ubbaa gallas, ‹Izi leemiso xalla yootees› geettes» gadis." 
Ezekiel21:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel21:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne ayfeso gede Yerusalaamekko zaara; Xoossa Keeththa bolla qaala yoota; Isra7eele biitta bolla tinbite yoota. 
Ezekiel21:3 Isttas GODAY, ‹Ta ne bolla dendadis; tani ta mashsha koohoppe shoddada xillo asaanne iita asaa ne giddofe diggana." 
Ezekiel21:4 Xillonne wordo dhayssana ta mashshay dugehappe pudeha gakkanaas diza deraa ubbaa bolla koohoppe shodettana. 
Ezekiel21:5 Tani GODAY ta mashshaa kohozappe shoddidayssanne zaarada guye koohon guye gelththonttayssa asi ubbay erana.› 
Ezekiel21:6 «Hessa gishshas haysso asa nawu! Meqqida wozinan camo oole oola. 
Ezekiel21:7 Istti nena, ‹Ays oolay?› gi oychchiko, neni, ‹Sinththara yiza iita wore gishshas oolays; wozina ubbay taahana; kushe ubbay doccana; shemppo ubbay poodhu gaana; gulbate ubbay haaxxana› ga yoota. Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Be7ite hessi yaananne polettana› gees» gides." 
Ezekiel21:8 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel21:9 «Haysso asa nawu! Tinbite yoota; GODAY, ‹Mashsha! Mashsha, leefettidanne qucettida mashsha!" 
Ezekiel21:10 Leefettiday siifanaas, qucettiday wolqqanththa mala phoollanaassa. Histtiin hessi nuna waani ufayssana dandayzee? Iza mashshazi ta naaza kawoteththa guufe coo guufe mala kadhides." 
Ezekiel21:11 Kushen oykkana mala mashshay qucettidi imettides; wodhizayssi kushen oykkanaas mashshay leefettidi imettides. 
Ezekiel21:12 Haysso asa nawu! Hayssi ta dere bolla Isra7eele daannata ubbaa bolla yides; hessa gishshas yeehonne waaso sissa; istti ta derezara issife mashshas imettida; hessas ne gishshas ne tira icca. 
Ezekiel21:13 Tumappe paacey yaana; iza mashshay kadhida kawoteththa guufezas wurseththi baynda aggiko waananee?› gees. 
Ezekiel21:14 «Ha7ikka asa nawu! Tinbite yoota; ne kushekka baqqa. Mashshay nam7uto woykko heedzdzuto shoco; hessika keehi wodhiza, siifizanne ubbasora istta dooddi oykkida mashsha." 
Ezekiel21:15 Wozina ubbay taahana mala, kundizayti darana mala, tani istta pengeta ubbaan popol7u giza mashsha woththadis. Aayye ana, popol7u gaana mala qucettides; siifanaaska koohoppe shodettides." 
Ezekiel21:16 Haysso mashshazoo! Ne qarattida baggara hadirsinne ushach qanxxa. 
Ezekiel21:17 Tanikka ta kushe baqqana; ta hanqoyka irxxana gadis tani GODAY» gides. 
Ezekiel21:18 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel21:19 «Haysso asa nawu! Baabiloone kawoza mashshay yiza nam7u ogetan malata tuus essa. Nam7u ogetikka issi dereppe doommeettes. Katama efiza ogeti shaakettizason malata tuus essa. 
Ezekiel21:20 Amooneta katama Eraaba biza mashshaas issi ogezan malata tuus essa; qasse Yuhudanne gimbettida Yerusalaame katama biza mashshaas nam7anththo ogezan malata tuus essa. 
Ezekiel21:21 Baabiloone kawozi ba baanaaso maroththi demmanaas daggala ogetan eqqana; ba wondafeta qaaseththidi saama yeggana; ba eeqa xoossatakka zore oychchana; tire micci xeellana. 
Ezekiel21:22 Izi biidi gimbe penge laalliza durumata ehana mala, wodhanaas azazana mala, ceeqeteth sissana mala, gimbe pengeza laalliza durumata katamata pengen essana mala, biitta shiishshi doorana malanne miixata giigsana mala Yerusalaame saamay izas ushachcha kushen kezides." 
Ezekiel21:23 Hessika izara caaqettida asatas bala kaaleththo misatides. Izi gidikko istta qoho istta qofsana; istti di7i ekkidikka baana. 
Ezekiel21:24 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte ooththida miish ubbaan intte qonccera nagara ooththidi intte qohoza intte qofsida gishshassinne hessaththoka intte ooththida gishshas intte di7etti baana." 
Ezekiel21:25 « ‹Haysso genenne tuna gidida Isra7eele daannazoo! Ne qaxxayettiza wodey gakkides› gees; tunaninne iitateththan kumida Isra7eele daannazoo," 
Ezekiel21:26 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Ne hu7en diza goossaa birsha; ne kallachcha denththa. Hayssafe guye kaseyssa mala hanenna; ziqqi giday dhoqqu gaana; dhoqqu gidaykka ziqqi gaana." 
Ezekiel21:27 Bulasana! Bulasana! Aawateththi bessizaadey yaana gakkanaas iza beni mala hanukku; ta izas izo aaththa immana› gees. 
Ezekiel21:28 «Haysso asa nawu! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY nena Amooneta gishshassinne istta cashsha gishshas, ‹Mashsha! Mashsha! Wodhanaas shodettida dhayssanaas qucettida, wolqqanththa mala popol7u gaana qucettida mashsha." 
Ezekiel21:29 Ne gishshas be7ida wordo ajjuutay, nees yootettida muurennoy diikkoka, isttas gene xuu7ay kumishin, istta barey gakkishin siifettana bessiza iitata qoodhe bolla wodhdhana." 
Ezekiel21:30 Mashsha koohozan zaara; ne medhettida biittan, ne yelettida deren heen ta ne bolla pirdana." 
Ezekiel21:31 Tani ta hanqo ne bolla gussana; tani ta hanqo tamaa ne bolla eeththana; iitateththan erettida menxe iita asatas ta nena aaththa immana. 
Ezekiel21:32 Neni eeso mith gidana; ne deren ne suuththi gukkana; hayssafe guye nena qofsiza miishshi deenna; tani GODAY hayssa yootadis› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel22:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel22:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne izi bolla pirdikii? Hanno suuth gussiza katamay bolla pirdikii? Harassiza izi oosoza izis qonccen yoota. 
Ezekiel22:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY izis, ‹Hanne ne giddon shemppo wodhoninne eeqa xoossata giigson nena tunisidaaree! Ne bolla pirda eesosiza katamayee!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Neni gussida suuththan qohadasa; ne giigsida eeqa xoossan tunadasa. He gaason ne bare matissadasa; ne layththika qaanththadasa; ta nena kawoteththatas qidhes, dere ubbaas naachchas kessana." 
Ezekiel22:5 Hanne kawushshinne shiroy nenan kumidaaree! Mataninne haakon dizayti nena qidhana. 
Ezekiel22:6 « ‹Be7a, ne giddon diza Isra7eele daannati issoy issoy suuth gussanaas ba maatan go7etteettes." 
Ezekiel22:7 Aawatinne aayeti ne giddon kawuyida; bete asati un7ettida; yi7otinne am7eti tugga be7ida. 
Ezekiel22:8 Geeshsha miishshata tayta kawushshadasa; ta Sambatatakka tunisadasa. 
Ezekiel22:9 Shempo wodhanaas paapunth gaththizayti ne giddon deettes; zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossatas yarshettidayssa mizaytinne laymatizayti ne giddon deettes. 
Ezekiel22:10 Ba aawa machcheyra zin7izayti ne giddon deettes; maccassa wogay yiza wode woga mala geeyontta diza aginatan maccassata wolqqan oykkizayti ne giddon deettes. 
Ezekiel22:11 Ne giddon issoy ba laggeza machcheyra laymatees; haray ba naaza machcho tunisees; haray qasse ba aawa na7eyra wolqqan zin7ees. 
Ezekiel22:12 Ne giddon diza asati suuth gussanaas maganxo ekkeettes; nenikka yelonne buute daro dich ekkada ne laggezappe bessontta wodhe bonqqaasa; tanakka balettadasa› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. 
Ezekiel22:13 « ‹Neni nees bessontta ekkida go7a bollanne neni gussida suuththa bolla tani ta kushe baqqana. 
Ezekiel22:14 Tani nena qaxxayiza gallas ne wozinan ne murtta eqqanee? Woykko ne kushey he wode minnana dandayzee? Tani GODAY hayssa yootadis; izakka tani ooththana. 
Ezekiel22:15 Tani nena kawoteththata giddon laallana; dere ubbaa giddonkka laallana; ne tunateththaaka tani ne bollafe geeshshana. 
Ezekiel22:16 Kawoteththata giddon tunada tani GODAA gididayssa he wode neni erana› » gides. 
Ezekiel22:17 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel22:18 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele keeththay birata shi7a mala gidides; istti ubbayka tama giddon seeri attiza xarqimala, qorqoro, biratanne irsaase shi7a mala." 
Ezekiel22:19 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte ubbayka birata shi7a mala gidida gishshas tani inttena Yerusalaame shiishshana." 
Ezekiel22:20 Asay bira, xarqimala, birata, irsaasenne qorqoro seerisanaas taman yeggi womppiinan punniza mala, tanikka ta hanqoninne ta boshan inttena katamay giddo shiishshada heen ta inttena seerisana." 
Ezekiel22:21 Tani inttena shiishshada ta hanqo tama intte bolla ta peenon eeththana; intteka heen seeri attana. 
Ezekiel22:22 Biray tama coocen seeriza mala intteka katamay giddon seerana. Tani GODAY ta hanqo intte bolla gussidayssa he wode intte erana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel22:23 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel22:24 «Haysso asa nawu! ‹Hanne neni; hanqo gallassika ira demmontta biitta› ga yoota. 
Ezekiel22:25 Izi daannati ba wodhidayssa puuzishe xaaggiza gaammo mala izi giddon duulateettes; deraa wodheettes; istta aqotanne isttas diza al7o miishshata bonqqi ekkeettes; daro maccassata am7eta histteettes. 
Ezekiel22:26 Izi qeeseti ta wogaa bolla makkalleettes; ta geeshsha miishshatakka tuniseettes. Istti geeyidayssa tunappe shaakettenna; geeshshinne geesh gidonttayssa shaakki tamaarsettenna; ta sambatata yeggi aggida; hessa gaason ta istta giddon kadhettadis. 
Ezekiel22:27 Izi giddon diza gita asati hayqqidayssa puuziza kana suyte mala; istti bessontta dureteth shiishshanaas suuth gusseettes. 
Ezekiel22:28 Izi nabeti goda aannon tiyiza mala wordo ajjuutaninne muurennon isttas buuri shiishsheettes; isttas GODAY yootontta dishin, ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa mala gees› geettes." 
Ezekiel22:29 He biittan diza asay bonqqeettes; boggeettes; pirda geellasidi hiyeesanne metotanchchata un7eththeettes; bete asaakka qoheettes. 
Ezekiel22:30 «Tani biittayo dhayssontta mala dirsa dirizaade, laalettida baggara ta sinththan izi gishshas eqqizaade intte giddofe ta koyadis; gido attiin issaadeka demmabeekke." 
Ezekiel22:31 Hessa gishshas ta hanqo ta istta bolla gussana; ta wolqqama hanqozan ta istta xuuggana; istti ooththidayssa ta gede istta bolla zaarana gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY» gides. 
Ezekiel23:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel23:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Issi aayppe yelettida nam7u maccati deettes. 
Ezekiel23:3 Istti buro naateththan dishe Gibxe biittan laymateth doommida; heen istti dishin dhanththi tiran uttides; adde nayti izan kaa7ida; istta geela7oteththayka ekettides. 
Ezekiel23:4 Isttafe bayray sunththay Oholo; kaaloy sunththi Oholibo. Istta nam7aakka ta ekkiin taas macca naytanne attuma nayta yelida. Ohola Samaariya, Oholiba Yerusalaame qoncciseettes." 
Ezekiel23:5 «Ohola taas machcho gida uttada harara laymatadus; olanchcha gidida ba siiqo Asooretara laggeththanaas amottadus. 
Ezekiel23:6 Istti ochcha teera misatiza may7o may7ida dere ayssizaytanne azazizayta; istti ubbatikka mala lo7o, naateththinne pilata toganchchata." 
Ezekiel23:7 Iza banateththa laymateththas doorettida Asoore asaas aaththa immadus. Izira laymatida asata eeqaa xoossata ubbaan tunadus. 
Ezekiel23:8 Iza Gibxen doommida laymateththa aggabeekku; heen izi yelagateththa wode attumasati izira zin7ida; izi geela7oteththa dhanththaa gorpereththida; ba amottida amoteththaa izi bolla polida. 
Ezekiel23:9 «Hessa gishshas izira issife laymatana amottida Asoore laggeththotas tani izo aaththa immadis. 
Ezekiel23:10 Istti izo qaaridi kallo ashshida; izi attuma naytanne macca nayta izippe bonqqida; izokka mashshan siifida; izakka maccassata matan haysi7es attadus; pirday izi bolla pirdettides. 
Ezekiel23:11 «Izi michchiya Oholibay hessa be7ashe ziitaninne laymateththan ba michcheyfe aadhdha moorettidaaro gidadus. 
Ezekiel23:12 Qasseka haarizaytaranne azazizaytara, seelo may7o may7ida olanchchatara, pilata toganchchataranne mala lo7o gidida Asoore naateththatara laymatanaas amotta kaalladus." 
Ezekiel23:13 Izakka bana tunisidayssa be7adis; istti nam7ayka issi oge bida. 
Ezekiel23:14 «Iza ba laymateththan gujja gujja badus; iza goda bolla woocetti oosettida xeeqa zo7o qalamen tiyettida Kaladaawe dere addeta misle be7adus. 
Ezekiel23:15 Isttika bantta xeessan qabatto danccidaytanne bantta hu7e bolla quraace xaaxidayta. Istti ubbayka Kaladaaweppe yida Baabiloone dere daannata misateettes. 
Ezekiel23:16 Iza istta misleta be7ida mala ziita amon xuugettada Kaladaawetakko as kiittadus. 
Ezekiel23:17 Baabiloonetikka izikko yiidi izi hiixaakko gelida; bantta ziita amon izo tunisida; iza isttan tunidaappe guye iza istta ixxada isttafe haraso sher7i gadus. 
Ezekiel23:18 Iza qonccen laymatidaappenne ba kalloteththaa qaarida wode, tani izi michcheyfe haraso sher7i gida mala izo ixxada izippe sher7i gadis." 
Ezekiel23:19 Gido attiin kase Gibxen iza naateteththan laymatidayssi qofettiin kaseyssafe aadhdha laymatadus. 
Ezekiel23:20 Istta attumateththay hareyssa mala, isttafe keziza zereththay wodalla parayssa mala gidida ba laggeththotara laymatanaas amottadus." 
Ezekiel23:21 Neni Gibxe biittan diza wode ne geela7oteththaa immidayssaninne ne naateteththa dhanththan attumasati kaa7idayssan ne geela7oteththa tunateththaa amottadasa. 
Ezekiel23:22 «Hanne Oholibee! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Ne ixxada isttafe sher7i gida ne laggeththota ta ne bolla denththana; isttaka ubbaa baggafe ta ne bolla ehana." 
Ezekiel23:23 Isttika Baabiloonetanne Kaladaaweta; isttara Paqoode, Suhe, Qo7aynne Asooreti ubbay deettes; heytikka mala lo7onne mino gidishin ubbatikka para toggidi dere ayssizaytanne azazizayta, para-gaare azazizaytanne dhoqqa shuumeta." 
Ezekiel23:24 Istti ola massara, para-gaarenne gaare ekkidi daro derey ne bolla yaana; istti wogga gondallenne qeeri gondalle oykkidi, birata qoobe woththidi, ne yuushon salfana; istti ne bolla pirdana mala ta nena isttas aaththa immana; isttika ba wogan nena qaxxayana." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ta zil7eteththa hanqo ne bolla ehana; isttika ne bolla hanqon kezana; istti ne siidhenne ne hayth qanxxana; ne baggatappe attidayti mashshan siifettana; ne macca naytanne attuma nayta neeppe bonqqi ekkana; isttafe casha attidaytakka tamay maana. 
Ezekiel23:26 Istti ne may7o qaari ekkana; doorettida ne alleqota neeppe woththi ekkana. 
Ezekiel23:27 Neni Gibxen doommida laymateththaanne ziitaa ta neeppe diggana; nekka ne ayfeta heytanttako denththaka; hayssafe guye ne Gibxe qoppaka› gees. 
Ezekiel23:28 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Neni harasettada isttafe sher7i gidaytassinne ne ixxizaytas ta nena aaththada immana." 
Ezekiel23:29 Isttika nena ixxishe neekko shiiqana; ne daaburdayssa ubbaa neeppe istti bonqqana; ne aayey uloppe kezida mala kallo ashshana. Yeellachchiza ne ziita amoy qonccana; ne laymateththaynne zaway baynda tunateththay hayssa ne bolla ehides. 
Ezekiel23:30 Gaasoykka neni kawoteththatara laymatanaas amottada istta eeqa xoossatan tunadasa. 
Ezekiel23:31 Neni ne michchey ogen bida gishshas tani nena izi xuu7a oyththana› gees. 
Ezekiel23:32 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, « ‹Aakonne ciimma gidida xuu7a, ne michchey xuu7a ne uyana; xuu7azi daro oykkiza gishshas cashshenne naach ne kallana." 
Ezekiel23:33 Ne michcho Samaariya xuu7an, shirochchizanne laalliza xuu7an, maththoninne ceecen ne kumana." 
Ezekiel23:34 Neni congorsada uyana; histtada neni xuu7aza menththereththana; ne dhanththaaka gaarana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani hayssa yootadis› gees. 
Ezekiel23:35 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Neni tana dogida gishshassinne taas zokko zaarida gishshas neni ne laymateththaanne ziita gate tookkana› gees» gides." 
Ezekiel23:36 GODAY taas, «Haysso asa nawu! Oholi bollanne Oholibi bolla ne pirdanee? Histtiko harassiza istta oosoza ne isttas yoota." 
Ezekiel23:37 Istti laymatida; istta kusheykka suuththan moorettides. Istti bantta eeqa xoossatara laymatida; bantta eeqa xoossatas quma gidana mala haray attoshin istti taas yelida naytakka isttas taman xuuggi yarshida. 
Ezekiel23:38 Hessafekka hara miish istti ta bolla ooththida; he gallassika Xoossa Keeththaa tayssa tunisida; ta Sambataakka kawushshida. 
Ezekiel23:39 Istti bantta nayta eeqa xoossatas yarshida gallas ta keeththaa gelidi tunisida. Istti ta keeththan hessa mala ooththida. 
Ezekiel23:40 «Hessafekka bollara addeti haako biittafe yaana mala as kiittida; isttika yida; neni ne bolla meecettadasa; ne ayfeso puulasadanne alleqotan puulattada naagadasa. 
Ezekiel23:41 Lo7i giigida arjetan uttadasa; ta exaanezanne zayteza ne woththida xaraphpheeza arjetaa sinththan woththadasa. 
Ezekiel23:42 «Kaa7iza asata kachchi izi yuushon dees; shiro medhdhiza asatara bazzofe yida maththottizayti deettes; maccassay bollanne izi michchey bolla sagayo, istta hu7enkka kayshiza kallachcha woththida." 
Ezekiel23:43 Tanikka ta wozinan, ‹Izi bollay laymateththan gilqidaarira, ha7ikka izi de7oy hessa mala gididaarira layma maccassayra zin7etto› gadis." 
Ezekiel23:44 Isttika izira zin7ida; asi layma maccassara zin7iza mala ha yeellay baynda maccas Oholiranne Oholibara zin7ida. 
Ezekiel23:45 Geeshshati gidikko layma maccassata bollanne shemppo wodhiza maccassata bolla bessiza pirda pirdana; istti layma maccas gidida gishshas istta kushey suuththan moorettides. 
Ezekiel23:46 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY deraa istta bolla denththeththa eha; shirossinne bonqqas istta aaththa imma. 
Ezekiel23:47 Derey istta shuchchan kurakkana; istti giththa mashshan istta qanxxereththana; istta attuma naytanne macca nayta wodhana; istta keeththaaka xuuggana. 
Ezekiel23:48 Hessa tani maccassati ubbay naagettana malanne intte iita hano kaallontta mala ziitateththa qaaqqe ooththontta mala ta biittafe teqqana. 
Ezekiel23:49 Intte intte ziita gate ekkana; intte eeqa xoossata goynon ooththida nagara qixaate intte tookkana; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana» gides. 
Ezekiel24:1 Nuni di7ettida uddufunththa layththan, tammanththa aginan, tammanththa gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel24:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Hach hanno gallassayo dumma mazgaba; Baabiloone kawoy Yerusalaame ha gallassayn dooddi oykkides. 
Ezekiel24:3 Ha makkallanchcha keeththaas hayssafe kaalli diza leemisoza yoota; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, « ‹Birata distte tama bolla woththa; hessafe guye izan haath gujja." 
Ezekiel24:4 Gedappenne missafe qanxxada, lo7o lo7o asho muxada, doorettida meqeththata cukereththada izan yegga." 
Ezekiel24:5 Wudezappe modhdho dors ekka shukka; iza meqeththaa doyssanaas eeso mith darsa woththa; sudhdhu gaanaashe gakkanaas doyssa; meqeththazikka kaxxo› gees. 
Ezekiel24:6 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Shi7ida birata distteys, izi shi7i yeddonttaaris, suuth gussida katamays aayye ana! Shaakkanaas saama yeggontta issaa issaa kessada kays ashsha." 
Ezekiel24:7 Izi giddon asa suuththi dees; zaalla bolla qoncceson gussadus attiin biittay kammanaas dandayza gaden gussabeekku. 
Ezekiel24:8 Ta hanqoy eexxana malanne halo kessanaas taas injjetana mala, izi kammanaas dandayontta mala, izi suuththaa zaalla bolla qoncceson gussadis› gees." 
Ezekiel24:9 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Suuth gussida katamays aayye ana! Tani iza xuugettana mith guuppana." 
Ezekiel24:10 Eeso mith doora; tamaakka eeththa. Sawo gujjada ashoza lo7eththa doyssa; meqeththazikka micco. 
Ezekiel24:11 Shi7azi seerana malanne birata shi7azi taman xuugettana mala, mela disttey seellana gakkanaas, tamazi bonqqanaashe gakkanaas cooceza bolla woththa." 
Ezekiel24:12 Daro wolqqay wurikkoka doorettida birata shi7i tamankka yeddana dandayenna. 
Ezekiel24:13 « ‹Ne tuniday ne baalage oosonna; ta hanqoy ne bolla polettanaashe gakkanaas hayssafe guye ne geesh gidakka; gaasoykka tani nena ne tunateththaafe geeshshana koyiinkka ne geeyana dosabeekka. 
Ezekiel24:14 « ‹Tani GODAY hayssa yootadis; ta ooththanaas wodey gakkides; ta guye giikke; qadhettikenne sidhikke; ne oge malanne ne ooso mala ne bolla pirdettana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel24:15 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel24:16 «Haysso asa nawu! Neni ne ayfe shempisiza miish tani ta hanqon neeppe ekka diggana; neni gidikko waassofa; yeekkofa; afunththika gussofa. 
Ezekiel24:17 Ne qaala ziqqi histtada kayottashe milala attiin hayqqidayssas yeekkofa; ne hu7eppe quraace diggofa; ne tohoppe caamma kessofa; ne doona gaththa kammofa; shochchika mooppa» gides. 
Ezekiel24:18 Tanikka wonttara deraas hessa yootadis; he gallassa omarsa wode ta keeththa aayeya hayqqadus; wonteththa gallas maalado GODAY tana azazida mala ooththadis. 
Ezekiel24:19 Derezi tana, «Nuus ay kiita yootana koyada ne hayssa ooththidaakko nuus yootikkii?» gi oychchides." 
Ezekiel24:20 Tanikka deraas zaarada, «GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel24:21 Isra7eele keeththas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte ceeqettiza wolqqa, intte ayfe shempisizasozanne intte wozinas ufays gidida Xoossa Keeththaa tayssa ta tunisana. Intte yeggi bida intte macca naytinne attuma nayti mashshan wurana." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ta ooththida mala he wode intteka ooththana; intte doona gaththi kammeketa; shochchika meekketa. 
Ezekiel24:23 Intte hu7eppe quraace diggeketa; intte tohoppe caamma kesseketa; intte intte nagaran gilqana; issoy issaara tookki shempana attiin kayos utteketanne yeekkeketa. 
Ezekiel24:24 He woden Hiziqeeli inttes malata gidana; izi ooththida mala intteka ooththana› gides. Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tana gididayssa hayssi haniza wode intte erana» gees. 
Ezekiel24:25 GODAY tana, «Haysso asa nawu! Bantta wolqqa, bantta ufayssa, bantta bonchcho, istta ayfes shemposonne istta wozinas ufays gidida istta macca naytanne attuma nayta gaththa ta isttafe ekkiza wode," 
Ezekiel24:26 he gallas kessi ekki attida asi he paapunththaa yootanaas neekko yaana. 
Ezekiel24:27 He gallas ne doonay doyettana; nenikka izara haasayana; hessafe guye ne doona duude gidakka; ne isttas malata gidana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana» gides. 
Ezekiel25:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel25:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne sinth Amoone biittaako zaarada istta bolla tinbite yoota. 
Ezekiel25:3 Isttas, ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAA qaala siyite; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY ta Keeththay tunida wode, Isra7eele biittay bulattida wode, Yuhuda asay di7etti bida wode, intte isttas hashshu! gida gishshas," 
Ezekiel25:4 arshey mokkiza baggara diza derezas intte haarettana mala ta inttena aaththa immana. Isttika intte giddon bantta dunkaane tokkidi daana; intte miththata ayfe maana; intte maaththika istti uyana. 
Ezekiel25:5 Tani Eraaba katama gaamellati heemettizaso, Amoone dorsatikka heemettizaso kessana; tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana› ga yoota." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Intte wozina iitateththaa gaason Isra7eele kundeththaan intte ufayettidi kushe baqqida gishshassinne guppi kaa7idanne qidhida gishshas," 
Ezekiel25:7 tani ta qese intte bolla denththana; tani kawoteththati inttefe bonqqana mala ooththana; ta inttena kawoteththata giddofe shoddana; asaappeka shaakkada dhayssana; ta inttena dippi histtana. Tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana› gees. 
Ezekiel25:8 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Mo7aabeynne Seyrey: be7ite, Yuhuda asay hara kawoteththata mala gidides gida gishshas," 
Ezekiel25:9 istta biitta zawa bolla dizaytanne izis bonchcho gidida katamata Beeti-Yashimooteppe, Ba7aali-Me7ooneppenne Qiriyaataymeppe doommada Mo7aabe miixa qaara yeggana." 
Ezekiel25:10 Mo7aabetinne Amooneti isttas haarettana mala ta istta arshey wulliza baggara diza deraas aaththa immana; Amoone asaas hayssafe guye kawoteththata matan istta qofsiza miishshi deenna. 
Ezekiel25:11 Tani Mo7aabe qaxxayana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees. 
Ezekiel25:12 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Eedoomey Yuhuda bolla halo kessida gishshassinne hessan mooranchcha gidida gishshas," 
Ezekiel25:13 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: tani ta qese Eedoome bolla denththana. Iza asaanne mehaa ta wodhana; ta iza bula histtana; Temaaneppe biidi Dadaane gakkanaas istti mashshan wurana. 
Ezekiel25:14 Ta dere Isra7eele denththada Eedoome bolla halo kessana; isttika ta hanqo malanne ta bosha mala Eedoome deraa bolla ooththana; tani halo kessidayssa istti he wode erana› gees. 
Ezekiel25:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Filisxeemeti wozina iitateththan dendidi halo kessida gishshassinne Yuhudakka kase gam7ida morkketeththan kadhidi dhayssanaassa." 
Ezekiel25:16 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: tani ta qese Filisxeeme asaa bolla denththana; Kelite asaa qanxxana; abba gaxan attidaytakka dhayssana. 
Ezekiel25:17 Tani istta bolla wolqqama halo kessana; ta boshankka istta qaxxayana; ta istta qaxxayiza wode istti tani GODAA gididayssa erana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel26:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne issinththa layththan, aginas koyro gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel26:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroosi Yerusalaame gishshas, ‹Dereta pengey hashshu meqqadus; izi pengeti taas waqqi gi doyettida; ha7i iza laalettida gishshas ta izo durettana› gides," 
Ezekiel26:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: hanne Xiroose ta ne bolla dendadis; abba dambalay dendiza mala ta ne bolla daro dere denththana. 
Ezekiel26:4 Istti Xiroosi gimbeza mulera dhayssana; izi naage gimbetakka laallana; tani izi biittaa pitta dhayssada kallo diza zaalla kessana. 
Ezekiel26:5 Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootida gishshas iza abba giddon gite micci melissizaso gidana; kawoteththati izis dizaaz bonqqana. 
Ezekiel26:6 He biittan abbaafe haakki diza gutati mashshan wurana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana. 
Ezekiel26:7 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Kawotas kawo gidida Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore parataranne para-gaaretara, toganchchataranne daro olanchchatara pudeha baggafe Xiroosi bolla ta ehana." 
Ezekiel26:8 Izi deraas giddon diza ne gutata mashshan wursana; izi yuushon keela keelana; ne gimbes xeera gakkanaas biitta doorana; izi ba gondallezakka ne bolla denththana. 
Ezekiel26:9 Gimbeza laalliza miishshan dirsaa laallana; ola massaran naage gimbetakka laallana. 
Ezekiel26:10 Para daroteththafe dendidayssan gudullay nena goozi oykkana; asay gimbey laalettida katama mala izi ne pengetara geliza wode, parata, para-gaaretanne gaareta cenggurssafe dendidayssan ne gimbetti qaaxxana." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ne ogeti ubbay para tohon durettana; ne deraa mashshan wodhana; ne wolqqama tuussatikka sa7an kundana. 
Ezekiel26:12 Ne aqota istti bonqqana; ne shaqace istti bonqqi ekkana; ne dirsa istti laallana; ne lo7o keeththatakka ubbaa dhayssana; ne shuchchaanne ne miththa, ne dirsa laaleththaa duge abban yeggana." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ne yeththaa tani sirphi histtana; hayssafe guye ne diiththa giirissi seetettenna. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ta nena kallo diza lochcha zaalla ooththana; neni mole gite miccizaso gidana; nam7anththo simma oosettaka; hayssi hananay tani GODAY yootida gishshassa› gees. 
Ezekiel26:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Xiroosis, ‹Madunxidayti toqqishin, ne giddon shemppo wodhishin, ne kundeththaa giirissafe dendidayssan haruroti qaaxxettennee?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Abba gaxan diza halaqati ubbay bantta kawoteththa araataappe wodhdhana. Bantta seelo may7o yeggana; bantta xibabe may7oza qaari yeggana. Babon kumidi biitta bolla utti kokkorishe ne bolla gakkida hanoza gaason istti shirotana› gees. 
Ezekiel26:17 Ne gishshas zilalishe, « ‹Ne asay abba giddon dizaaree, erettida katamaye ne waana dhayadii! Nenan diza asaara ne abba giddon wolqqamakkoshin, heen diza asaa achchan ne yashissidaarokkoshin." 
Ezekiel26:18 Ha7i ne kundeththa gallas abba gaxan diza dereti hirgida; ne laalettida gaason harurotikka qaaxxida› gees. 
Ezekiel26:19 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Isttan asi baynda katamata mala tani nena kayzisishin, wogga gita abban tani nena yeggada kammishin," 
Ezekiel26:20 beni wode asati gelida ollan wodhdhizaytara ta nena duge woththana; duge ollan gelizaytara ta nena issife beni laalettidi diza biitta garsan ta nena woththana; hessafe guye neni biitta bolla shemppora paxa dizayta garsan nees de7oso demmaka; 
Ezekiel26:21 Tani ne wurseththaa miichchizaaz ooththana; hessafe guye ne de7akka; ne koyettanashin beettaka; gido attiin neni nam7anththo mulekka beettaka› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel27:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel27:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroosi gishshas zilala. 
Ezekiel27:3 Abban gelizaso pengen dizaarissinne daro abba gaxatan diza deretara zal7iza Xiroosis, Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Hanne Xiroosee! ‹Neni nena keehippe lo7o› gadasa;" 
Ezekiel27:4 Ne zaway abba giddon dees; nena ooththidayti keehi lo7eththi ooththida. 
Ezekiel27:5 Ne sanqqata ubbaa, Sanireppe yida xiiddan ooththida; markabe tuussati Libaanooseppe yida zigappe giigida." 
Ezekiel27:6 Baasaaneppe yida wolappe markabe laaggiza miish ooththida; Qophiroose zawappe yida ziga miththaa, danggarsa zaalen aleqessidi ne wuygeza ooththida." 
Ezekiel27:7 Ne Markabeza xibabey Gibxe biitta laynoppe oosettides; hessi nena bandira mala go7ides. Salo misatizanne ochcha teera misatiza ne sharati Qophirooseppe yida. 
Ezekiel27:8 Markabe sololissizayti Sidoonappenne Arwaadeppe yidayta; hanne Xiroose, ne markabe laaggizayti loohida ne asata." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebaaleppe loohida daannatinne hiillanchchati ne markabeta koolanaas ne giddon deettes; abba bollara biza markabetinne markabe laaggizayti ubbay heregettidi nenara zal7ettanaas neekko yeettes. 
Ezekiel27:10 «Paarise, Luudenne Puuxe asati wottadara gididi ne olanchchata giddon nena haggazeettes; nees teema gidana mala bantta gondallenne bantta birata qoobe ne godaa bolla kaqqida." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arwaadenne Heleeke asati ne gimbeta ubbasora naageettes; Gamaadeppe yida asati ne gimbe giddon deettes; istti bantta gondalle ne gimbeza yuushon kaqqida; ne puulateththaa kumeth ooththida. 
Ezekiel27:12 «Keehi daro gidida ne dureteththa gaason Tarseesey nenara zal7en gayttadus; iza biranne birata, qorqoronne irsaase ehada ne shaqaceta laame ekkawus." 
Ezekiel27:13 «Yaawaaney, Tubaaleynne Mesheekey nenara issife zal7eettes; aylletanne xarqimalappe oosettida miishshata shaqacera laammeettes." 
Ezekiel27:14 «Beeti-Togarma asati caana parata, ola paratanne baqulota shaqacen laammeettes." 
Ezekiel27:15 «Erodoose asati zal7en nenara gayttida; daro haruro dereti ne shaqaceta danggarsa zaaleninne Zophe geetettiza miththan laammeettes. 
Ezekiel27:16 «Keehi daro gidida ne aqota gaason Aaraamey nenara zal7en gayttadus; ne shaqacekka beluren, ochcha teera misatiza carqqan, xibaben, lo7o laynon, heleloninne zo7o inqqun laammeettes." 
Ezekiel27:17 «Yuhudaynne Isra7eeleykka attontta nenara zal7en gayttida; istti Miniteppe yida gistte, malido, ees, zaytenne balasaane geetettiza dhalliza zayte ne shaqacezara laammeettes." 
Ezekiel27:18 «Ne daro dureteththanne ishalo duussa gaason Damasqo asati Helboone woyne ushshinne Zahaare dere dorsa iske shiishshidi nenara zal7ettida. 
Ezekiel27:19 «Oozeelen diza Daaneynne Girke asay ne dumma dumma miishshaa shammida; istti ne miishshaara laammanaas aleqettida birata, dumma dumma sawotanne qarafa ehida." 
Ezekiel27:20 «Dadaaney ne shaqace gilaasera laammawus. 
Ezekiel27:21 «Arabiya halaqatinne Qeedaare halaqati ubbay ne laggeta; istti laaqqa, dharshonne deyshe ehidi nenara zal7eettes." 
Ezekiel27:22 «Saaba zal7anchchatinne Eraa7ime zal7anchchati nenara zal7etteettes; doorettida qimame ubbaa, al7o shuchchinne worqqa shiishshidi shaqacen nenara zal7etteettes." 
Ezekiel27:23 «Kaaraane, Kaane, Edene, Saaba, Asoorenne Kilmaade zal7anchchati nenara zal7etteettes." 
Ezekiel27:24 Heytikka ne giya giddon lo7o may7o, salo misatiza kaabba, xibabe, hessaththoka birata qalamen phoollizanne minni dadettida sigaajja ehidi nenara zal7etteettes." 
Ezekiel27:25 «Tarseese markabeti ne shaqace caani caani efida; neni abba giddon deexo caana caanettada daasa. 
Ezekiel27:26 Markabe sololissizayti ciimma abba giddon nena efida; gido attiin arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy abba giddon nena menththereththides. 
Ezekiel27:27 Markabe daafay ne bolla gakkiza gallas ne aqotay, ne shaqaceynne ne zal7e miishshay, ne markabeza sololissizayti, markabezan bizaytinne markabe oosanchchati, ne zal7anchchatinne ne wottadarati ubbay, markabezan dizayti ubbay, duge ciimma abban mitettana." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ne markabe sololissizayti waassishin, abba gaxan dizayti yarkiyarkeettes." 
Ezekiel27:29 Markabe sololissizayti ubbay bantta markabeta oli baana; markabe sololissizaytinne markaben dizayti ubbay wodhdhidi abbaa gaxan eqqana. 
Ezekiel27:30 Bantta qaala dhoqqu histtidi camo yeeho nees yeekkana; bantta hu7en gudulla qolidi bidinththa bolla bululettana. 
Ezekiel27:31 Ne gishshas kayottidi bantta hu7e bulusana; maaqaka may7ana; wozinappe ceecidi camo yeeho nees yeekkana. 
Ezekiel27:32 Ne gishshas istti waassishe yeekkana; istti nees zilalishe, ‹Abban mitetti co7u giday, Xiroose malay oonee?› gaana." 
Ezekiel27:33 Ne shaqacey abbaafe pinni kezida wode, daro dereta kalssaasa; neni ne gita aqotaninne ne shaqacezan biittan diza kawoteththata duresadasa." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ha7i gidikko ciimma haaththan abba giddon meqeretta kundadasa; ne caanaynne caanettida asay ubbay nenara abban mitettida. 
Ezekiel27:35 Abba gaxan de7iza asay ubbay ne bolla gakkidayssa be7idi dagammida. Istta kawotikka hirgan kokkorida; istta ayfesoy laamettides. 
Ezekiel27:36 Hara kawoteththata giddon diza zal7anchchati ne bolla ay keena wayqidoo! ne wurseththay daganththizaaz gidides; ne mernaas beettaka» gides. 
Ezekiel28:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel28:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroose halaqas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: «Ne wozinay otoron kumidi, ‹Tani xoossa; xoossa araatan abbaas giddo addan uttadis› gides. Aykkoska neni tani xoossa mala aadho eranchcha ga qoppikokka neni asa attiin xoos daakka." 
Ezekiel28:3 Neni Daaneelappe bollara aadho eranchchaa? Neeppe geemmida xuura yo7oy deennee? 
Ezekiel28:4 Ne aadho erateththaninne ne akeekan ne aqota dagasadasa; worqqanne bira ne minjja keeththan shiishshadasa. 
Ezekiel28:5 Ne zal7e ooso erateththan keeha bida gishshas, aqota bolla aqota dagasadasa; ne aqota daroteththafe dendidayssan ne wozinay otoron kumides gaada yoota." 
Ezekiel28:6 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani xoossa mala aadho eranchcha› gaada neni qoppiza gishshas," 
Ezekiel28:7 Kawoteththata giddon keehi menxe iita gidida allagata ta ne bolla ehana. Istti ne aadho erateththa puulateththa bolla bantta mashsha shoddana; gita ne bonchchozakka tunisana. 
Ezekiel28:8 Nena duge nena ollan yeggana; ciimma haaththan abba giddon iita hayqo ne hayqqana. 
Ezekiel28:9 Histtiin neni nena wodhizayta sinththan, ‹Tani xoossa› gaandii? Nena wodhizayta kushen ne gelashe neni asa attiin xoos daakka." 
Ezekiel28:10 Neni allagata kushen ammanontta asata hayqo mala hayqqana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani hayssa yootadis› gees» gides." 
Ezekiel28:11 Qasseka GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel28:12 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroose kawo gishshas zilalashe Ubbaa Haariza GODAY nena, « ‹Aadho erateththan kumada, kumeththa puulateth may7ada neni asas tumu leemiso gidadasa." 
Ezekiel28:13 Neni Edenen, Xoossa atakilte giddon de7adasa; bonchcho shuchchazi issoy issoy nena alleqissides; isttika sardiyoone, tophaaziyoonenne almaaze, margide, iyasphidenne simpere, belure, birillenne al7o inqqu; ne may7otikka xolqiza inqqunne worqqa; hayti neni medhettida gallas oosettida." 
Ezekiel28:14 Neni naagiza kirube gidada tiyettadasa; hessas ta nena shuumadis; neni kase geeshsha zumaan Xoossayssan de7adasa; tama mala shuchchata giddon simerettadasa. 
Ezekiel28:15 Neni medhettida gallassafe doommiin, iitateththi ne bolla beettida gallas gakkanaas, ne oge ubbaan borey baynda de7adasa." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ne zal7ey minnida gishshas, makkallateththan kumadasa; nagarakka ooththadasa. Hessa gishshas ta nena Xoossa zuma bollafe kawushshada yedeththadis; haysso naagiza kirubee! ta nena tama misatiza shuchchata giddofe kessadis." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ne puulateththaa gaason, ne wozinay otorettides; ne bonchcho gitateththaafe dendidayssan, ne aadho erateththaa tunisadasa; hessa gishshas tani nena duge biittan oladis; hara kawota seeranaas malata ooththadis." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ne nagaraninne ne cimo zal7e daroppe dendidayssan, ne goynniza keeththata tunisadasa. Hessa gishshas tani tamay ne giddofe kezana mala ooththadis; izikka nena mides. Nena be7iza ubbaa sinththan, biitta bolla nena bidinth kessadis." 
Ezekiel28:19 Nena eriza kawoteththati ubbay, ne bolla gakkidayssan dagammida. Ne wurseththi ceecissizaaz gidides; hayssafe guye nees de7oy deenna› gees» gides." 
Ezekiel28:20 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel28:21 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne ayfeso Sidoona bagga zaarada tinbite izi bolla yoota. 
Ezekiel28:22 Neni deraas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY nena, ‹Hanne Sidoona tani ne bolla dendadis; ne giddon tani bonchchettana; qixaate tani izi bolla ehishin, ta geeshshateththaaka ta izi giddon qonccisishin, tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana." 
Ezekiel28:23 Tani izi bolla iita harge ehana; izi ogetan suuththi gukkana mala ta ooththana; Ubbaa baggara yiza mashshan siifettidayti, izi giddon kundana; hessafe guye tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana." 
Ezekiel28:24 « ‹Hayssafe guye Isra7eele asaa un7eththiza kindichchoynne caddiza agunth gidida shooroti istta yuushon deettenna; hessan tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAA gididayssa istti erana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel28:25 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Ta Isra7eele deraa istti laalettida kawoteththata biittafe shiishshiza wode, kawoteththati xeellishin ta geeshshateththaa tani istta giddon qonccisana; hessafe guye istti tani ta aylle Yaaqoobes immida bantta biittan de7ana." 
Ezekiel28:26 Heen istti saron daana; keeththata keexxana; woyne tura tokkizasohota giigsana; istti kadhida shoorota ta qaxxayiza wode istti saron daana; hessafe guye tani GODAY istta Xoos gididayssa istti erana» gees. 
Ezekiel29:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanththa layththan, tammanththa aginan, tammanne nam7anththa gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel29:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne ayfeso Gibxe kawo Paaroonekko zaarada iza bollanne Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla tinbite yoota. 
Ezekiel29:3 Neni izas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Shaafa haaththa giddon ichchida haysso gita do7azoo! Gibxe kawo Paaroone! Ta ne bolla dendadis; ‹Abbaye shaafay tayssa; tani taas medhdhadis› gaasa." 
Ezekiel29:4 Gido attiin ne siidhen ta dafo aaththana; ne shaafatan diza moleta ne gogara oyseththana. Nees gogan shabbida moleta ubbaara ta nena ne shaafatappe goochcha kessana. 
Ezekiel29:5 Nenanne ne shaafatan diza moleta ubbaa, ta bazzo biittan yegga aggana; aykkoy baynda demban ne kundana; nena shiishshanaynne denththanay deenna; wora do7atassinne salo kafotas, neni quma gidana mala ta aaththa immana." 
Ezekiel29:6 «Hessafe guye Gibxen diza ubbay tani GODAA gididayssa erana. «Isra7eele keeththan neni asaas maqqa guufe gidadasa. 
Ezekiel29:7 Istti nena oykkida wode meqqada istta shophphaza caddadasa; istti nenan zemppida wode meqqada istta zokko duuththadasa. 
Ezekiel29:8 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani mashsha ne bolla ehana; ne asatanne istta meheta wodhana. 
Ezekiel29:9 Gibxey laalettida bula biitta gidana. Hessafe guye tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana. « ‹Abbaye shaafay tayssa; tani iza medhdhadis› gadasa. 
Ezekiel29:10 Hessa gishshas tani ne bollanne ne shaafata bolla dendadis; Gibxe biitta Migidooleppe biidi Asiwa gakkanaas, heeppeka biidi Tophphiya zawa gakkanaas laallada tani bulasana." 
Ezekiel29:11 As gidiin mehe gidiin heera aadhdhibeenna; oyddu tammu layth gakkanaas oonikka izin deenna. 
Ezekiel29:12 Tani Gibxe biittaa dhayda biittatappe issiney mala bulasana; izi katamatikka laalettida katamata giddon oyddu tammu layth gakkanaas kays gidana; Gibxetakka tani kawoteththata giddon laallana; dereta giddon ta istta zerana. 
Ezekiel29:13 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Oyddu tammu layththafe guye tani Gibxeta istti laaletti diza kawoteththata giddofe shiishshana." 
Ezekiel29:14 Tani isttas zaara ishalo de7o immana; kase istta aawata biitta Phaxiroose ta istta zaarana; izakka kawoteththata ubbaafe laafa gidana. 
Ezekiel29:15 Hara kawoteththatappe bollara iza bana dhoqqu histtana dandayukku; tani izo keeha laafa histtana; hessa gishshas iza hara kawoteththata zaara haarana dandayukku. 
Ezekiel29:16 Gibxey hayssafe guye Isra7eeley izin zemppiza dere gidukku; maado demmanaas izikko istti simmida wode istti ooththida nagaraa istti qofsiza dere gidana; hessafe guye tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAA gididayssa istti erana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel29:17 Nuni di7ettida nam7u tammanne laappunththa layththan, koyro aginan, koyro gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel29:18 «Haysso asa nawu! Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey wolqqama ola Xiroose bolla denththeththides; ubbaa hu7ey bo7atides; ubbaa hasheykka gaarettides; gidikkoka izinne iza olanchchati Xiroose bolla istti worajjidi demmida wodhey deenna. 
Ezekiel29:19 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani Gibxe biitta Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoores aaththa immana; izis diza aqota ubbaa izi baas miiyana; iza olanchchatas damoza gidana mala biittayn diza miish ubbaa bonqqananne pitti efana." 
Ezekiel29:20 Izinne iza olanchchati taas daaburda gishshas izas daabura gate gidana mala Gibxe ta izas immadis› gees. 
Ezekiel29:21 «He gallas tani Isra7eele keeththas kace moyzana; istta giddon ta ne doona doyana; hessan tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana» gides. 
Ezekiel30:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel30:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Hayssa mala gaada tinbite yoota: Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, « ‹Wu! Wuy› ga waassa; ‹He gallassays aayye ana!› ga." 
Ezekiel30:3 Gallassay matides! GODAA gallassay gakkides! He gallassay shaara gallassa; kawoteththata ubbaas bashsha gallassa. 
Ezekiel30:4 Gibxe bolla olay yaana; Tophphiya bollaka tuggay yaana. Daroti Gibxen shuketti kundana; izi aqotay bonqqettana; izi yochchatikka laalettana. 
Ezekiel30:5 «Tophphiyaynne Puuxey, Luudeynne Arabey, Liibiyaynne caaqo qaala biitta asay Gibxera issife mashshan wurana." 
Ezekiel30:6 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Gibxera zuppetizayti kundana; iza otorettiza minoteththay dhayana; Migidooleppe biidi Asiwa gakkanaas, istti mashshan hayqqana› gees." 
Ezekiel30:7 Bula biittata giddon istti aadhdhi bula gidana; istta katamatikka laalettida katamata giddofe issaa gidana. 
Ezekiel30:8 Tani Gibxen tama oyththiza wode, izo maaddizayti ubbay kundiza wode, tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana." 
Ezekiel30:9 «He gallas ta qasttanneti markaben biidi badhdhi ga uttidasohoppe kessanaas Tophphiya daganththana; Gibxey dhuman mitettiza wode istta ceecey oykkana; tumappe he gallassay yaana». 
Ezekiel30:10 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore kushen qooday baynda Gibxe dere asaa ta dhayssana." 
Ezekiel30:11 Kawoteththata ubbaafe menxe iita gidida izinne iza oosanchchati biittayo dhayssanaas yaana mala ooththana; bantta mashsha Gibxe bolla shoddidi biittayo aha xalla histtana. 
Ezekiel30:12 Abbaye shaafa tani melissana; biittayokka iita asatas bayzana; allagata kushen biittayonne izin diza ubbaa ta bula histtana; tani GODAY hayssa yootadis. 
Ezekiel30:13 «Eeqa xoossata ta dhayssana; Memppisan diza misleta ta dippi histtana; hayssafe guye Gibxen halaqatanay deenna; biittay bolla ta yashshateth kiittana. 
Ezekiel30:14 Tani Phaxiroose biitta bula histtana; Xaanoose bolla tama yeddana; Teebeese bolla qixaate yeggana. 
Ezekiel30:15 Gibxes miixa gidida Siina bolla ta bashshaa gussana; qooday baynda Teebeese asaa ta dhayssana. 
Ezekiel30:16 Tani Gibxe bolla tama eeththana; Siiney ceecen bul7akettana; Teebeesey dambalan mitettana; Memppisay duuxxontta ceece giddo gelana. 
Ezekiel30:17 Heeliyootenne Buubastte naateththati mashshan siifettana; he katamatikka di7ettana. 
Ezekiel30:18 Tani Gibxe qambara menththiza wode Xaafinaasen gallassay qammana; hessafe guye iza otorettida izi minoteththay kundana; iza shaaran kamettana; izi gutatikka di7ettana. 
Ezekiel30:19 Hessa gishshas ta Gibxe bolla ta qixaate ehana; isttika tani GODAA gididayssa he wode erana» gides. 
Ezekiel30:20 Nuni di7ettida tammanne issinththa layththan, koyro aginan, laappunththa gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel30:21 «Haysso asa nawu! Tani Gibxe kawo qese menththadis; izi paxana mala iza qesey koolettibeenna; woykko izi mashsha oykki dandayana mala iza kushey maqqan koolettibeenna. 
Ezekiel30:22 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Tani Gibxe kawo Paaroone bolla dendadis; izas paxa qesezaranne meqo qesezara nam7aa gaththa menththana; iza mashshay iza kusheppe kessi ekki wodhdhana mala ta ooththana." 
Ezekiel30:23 Tani Gibxe asaa kawoteththata giddon laallana; hara dereta giddonkka zerana. 
Ezekiel30:24 Tani Baabiloone kawo qese minththada ta mashshaaka iza oyththana. Gido attiin Paaroone qeseza ta menththana; izikka ba morkkeza sinththan iita madunxida asa mala toqqana. 
Ezekiel30:25 Baabiloone kawo qese ta minththana; gido attiin Paaroone qesey daaburana; tani ta mashshaa Baabiloone kawo kushen oyththiin izikka qaaththishin tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana. 
Ezekiel30:26 Ta Gibxeta kawoteththata giddon laallana; dereta giddonkka zerana; hessafe guye tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees» gides. 
Ezekiel31:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne issinththa layththan, heedzdzanththa aginan, koyro gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel31:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe kawo Paaroonessinne qooday baynda iza deraas, « ‹Gitateththan nenara ginattanay oonee?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Iza haggay woraas kuwa gididi daro luule gididi iza xeeray salo gakki diichiza Libaanoose ziga misatiza Asoore xeellite. 
Ezekiel31:4 Haaththati iza caarissida; ciimma pulttotikka iza dichchida; istta kanchche haaththati goggida; istta xaphoy dizaso ubbaa irxxisida; demban diza miththata ubbaakko zara haath yeddida. 
Ezekiel31:5 Haath kallida gishshas wora giddon diza mith ubbaafe, keehi aduqqides; iza haggati daayida; unquloti aduqqida." 
Ezekiel31:6 Salo kafoti ubbay iza haggata bolla bantta keeth keexxida; wora do7ati ubbay iza haggata garsan marata yelida; gita kawoteththati ubbay iza kuwa garsan de7ida. 
Ezekiel31:7 Daayida iza haggatara izas puulazi keehi lo7o; iza xaphoti haaththi dari dizaso bida. 
Ezekiel31:8 Xoossa gannaten diza zigatikka izara ginattana dandaybeettenna; xiiddatikka iza haggatara ginattettenna; wolatikka iza haggara ginattettenna; Xoossa gannaten diza ay miththika lo7eteththan iza gakkenna. 
Ezekiel31:9 Tani iza daro haggatara gaththa puulasa medhdhadis; Xoossa gannaten diza miththati ubbay iza amottana mala ooththadis› gees ga. 
Ezekiel31:10 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, ‹Cuppu gida bonccota bolla xeeraa dhoqqu histtidi bana zaradhissida gishshas, ba adussateththan izi otorettida gishshas," 
Ezekiel31:11 tani iza iitateththaa keena iza ooso gate immana mala kawoteththata haarizayssas ta iza aaththa immadis. Ta iza kessa wora oladis. 
Ezekiel31:12 Kawoteththata garsan keehi menxe iita allagati iza qanxxereththi yeggida; iza unquloti zumataninne zulletan kundida; iza haggatikka meqeretti haaththa zaratan wodhdhida; biittan diza kawoteththati ubbay iza kuwa garsafe kezidi yeggi bida. 
Ezekiel31:13 Salo kafoti yiidi kundida miththaa bolla uttida; wora do7atikka ubbay kundida miththaa haggata bolla uttida. 
Ezekiel31:14 Hessa gishshas haaththa lanqen diza ay miththika ba xeera cuppu gida bonccotappe bollara dhoqqu histtidi hayssafe guye bana otoron zaradhissenna; qasseka ay miththika lo7eththidi hayssaththo aduqqenna; ubbayka hayqqidi duge duufon gelizaytara issife hayqqana mala pirdettides› gees. 
Ezekiel31:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, izi duge duufon gelida gallas ciimma pulttota iza gishshas kayon kammadis; shaafata teqqadis; goggiza haaththatikka eqqida; ta iza gaason Libaanoose dhuma mayzadis; wora miththati ubbay melida." 
Ezekiel31:16 Duge duufon gelizaytara ta iza gelththiza wode izi kundishin siyettida giirissay kawoteththata daganththides; hessafe guye Edene miththati, dummanne doorettida Libaanoose miththati, haath kallida miththati ubbay biitta garsan dishe minettida." 
Ezekiel31:17 Kawoteththata giddofe izara zuppetidayti, iza kuwa garsan de7idayti, mashshan siifettidaytara gayttanaas duge duufon wodhdhida." 
Ezekiel31:18 «Edenen miththatappe puulateththaninne adussateththan nenara ginattanay oonee? Gido attiin nenikka hessaththo Edene miththatara issife biitta gars gelana; mashshan hayqqidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issi bolla ichchana. «Paaroonenne qooday baynda iza deraa gakkanayssi hayssa; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootadis» gides. 
Ezekiel32:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne nam7anththo layththan, tammanne nam7anththo aginan, koyro gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel32:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe kawo Paaroones zilalashe, « ‹Neni kawoteththa giddon gaammo mala; abba giddonkka miimintte mala; neni shaafatan bobolccu gaasa; haaththata ne tohon wadhdhaasa; pulttota uullosaasa." 
Ezekiel32:3 « ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: daro dere shiishshada, ta giteza ne bolla yeggana; istti nena ta gitezara goochchi kessana." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ta nena biitta bolla yeggana; demba bollaka miccana; salo kafoti ubbay ne bolla uttana mala ta ooththana; wora do7ati ubbay nena yiiqeti mi kallana. 
Ezekiel32:5 Tani ne asho zumata bolla laallana; zulletakka ne ahan kunththana. 
Ezekiel32:6 Biittaa ne suuththan ta caphisana; neeppe goggizayssi zulleta kumidi zumata gakkanaas diza oge ubbaa kammana. 
Ezekiel32:7 Ta nena dhayssiza wode salota goozana; istta xoolinttetakka dhumisana; awakka shaaran kammana; aginaykka ba poo7o diggana. 
Ezekiel32:8 Salon poo7isiza poo7ota ubbaa, ne bolla ta dhumisana; ne biittaa bolla ta dhuma ehana› gees." 
Ezekiel32:9 «Ne bolla yida bashshaa ta sissiza wode ne erontta biittan kawoteththata giddon, daro asata wozina ceecisana." 
Ezekiel32:10 Daro asay ne bolla gakkida meton dagammana mala ta ooththana; tani ta mashshaa istta sinththan shodda seessishin ne bolla gakkida hanoza gaason istta kawoti dagaman nozhzhu gaana; neni kundiza gallas issoy issoy ba shemppos yashshan ayfe qiphon kokkorana. 
Ezekiel32:11 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Gibxe kawos, ‹Baabiloone kawo mashshay ne bolla yaana." 
Ezekiel32:12 Kawoteththata ubbaafe keehi menxe iita gidida, wolqqama asata mashshan ne shiishshida olanchchati kundana mala ta ooththana; Gibxe otoreteththaa istti kundisana; izis cora olanchchatakka dhayssana." 
Ezekiel32:13 Daro haaththa matan diza izi wudeta ta dhayssana; hessafe guye asa tohon yedhettettenna; mehe tohoy uullosenna. 
Ezekiel32:14 Histtada ta izi haaththata xillisana; izi shaafata zayte mala ta gogisana. 
Ezekiel32:15 Ta Gibxe bulasishin biittayn dizay ubbay dhayshin, heen diza ubbaa tani shocishin, tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees» gides." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY, «Hessi ubbay izi gishshas zilalettiza zilassa; kawoteththata macca nayti zilalana; Gibxessinne izi cora olanchchata gishshas zilalishe koyzana» gees." 
Ezekiel32:17 Nuni di7ettida tammanne nam7anththo layththan, he aginan, tammanne ichchashanththo gallassan GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel32:18 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe olanchcha corata gishshas yeekka! Izonne wolqqama kawoteththata macca nayta duge duufon gelizaytara issife duge biitta gars gelththa. 
Ezekiel32:19 Neni isttas, ‹Intte haratappe aadhdhidi lo7eetii? Duge wodhdhada ammanonttaytara issife ichcha› ga yoota." 
Ezekiel32:20 Istti mashshan siifettidayta giddon kundana; mashshay shodettides; iza ba daro oosanchchatara issife gooshettu. 
Ezekiel32:21 Duufo giddon wolqqama halaqati Gibxe gishshassinne izira zuppetizayta gishshas istti duge wodhdhidi, ‹Mashshan hayqqidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issi bolla ichchida› gaana." 
Ezekiel32:22 «Asoorey ba kumeththa olanchchatara dawus; izippe mashshan kundidaytanne siifettidayta duufon doodetta uttadus. 
Ezekiel32:23 Istta duufoy ciimma olla giddon dees; izi olanchchati izi duufo yuushon korettida; paxa dizayta biittan shiro denththidayti ubbay shukettida; mashshankka wurida. 
Ezekiel32:24 «Elaama heen dawus; izi olanchchati ubbay izi duufo yuuyi aadhdhi deettes; ubbatikka shukettida; mashshankka hayqqida; paxa dizayta biittan shiro denththida ubbati ammanontta biitta gars gelida; duge biitta gars gelidaytara issife yeella may7i gelida. 
Ezekiel32:25 Izi duufo yuushon diza kumeththa olanchchatara shukettidayta giddon hiixay izis giigettides. Istti ubbay ammanonttaytanne mashshan siifettidayta; istta shiroy shemppora paxa dizayta biittan worekettida gishshas duge duufon gelizaytara issi bolla yeella may7ana; shukettidayta giddon istti ichchana. 
Ezekiel32:26 «Mesheekeynne Tubaale duufoy bantta olanchchata duufon doodetti uttana; istti ubbayka ammanonttayta gidi uttidi shemppora paxa dizayta biittan ba shiro denththeththida gishshas mashshan hayqqida. 
Ezekiel32:27 Daro layththafe kase hayqqida ola qarati bantta mashsha borkotidi, bantta gondalle bantta tira bolla oykkidi, bantta kumeththa ola miish ubbaara duufon gelidayta mala bonchchon moogettibeettenna. Ha olanchchati shemppora paxa dizayta biittan diza wolqqama asata bolla shiro denththida gishshas istta nagara qixaatey istta meqeththa bolla shempana." 
Ezekiel32:28 «Paaroone! Nenikka hessaththo meqqana; mashshan siifettidaytaranne ammanonttaytara ne issi bolla ichchana. 
Ezekiel32:29 «Eedooma heen de7awus; izi kawotinne izo haarizayti ubbay heen deettes; istti wolqqara dizayta gidikkoka mashshan siifettidaytara, duge duufon gelidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issi bolla ichchida." 
Ezekiel32:30 «Pudeha bagga haarizaytinne Sidoonati ubbay heen deettes; hayssafe kase istti ba wolqqan ammanettidi shiro denththidayta gidikkoka shukettidaytara issife yeellan kundida; mashshan siifettidayta ammanonttaytaranne duge duufon wodhdhidaytara issife yeella may7i ichchana. 
Ezekiel32:31 «Paarooneynne iza olanchchati ubbay istta be7ana; mashshan siifettida ba olanchchata ubbaa kayoppe izi minettana. 
Ezekiel32:32 Tani hayssafe kase kawoteththati ubbay Gibxe kawos yayyana mala shemppora paxa dizayta biittan shiroy aakkana mala koykkoka Paarooneynne iza olanchchati ubbay mashshan siifettidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issife ichchana; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootadis» gides. 
Ezekiel33:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi," 
Ezekiel33:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne dere asaas yoota; neni isttas, ‹Tani biitta bolla mashsha ehishin he dere asay asaa giddofe woshe as dooridi woththiko," 
Ezekiel33:3 izikka biittay bolla mashshay yishin be7idi deraa minththi erisanaas zaye punniko," 
Ezekiel33:4 hessafe guye oonikka zayeza siyidi naagettontta aggiko, mashshazi yiidi iza shemppo dhayssiko, suuththa acoy iza bolla de7ees." 
Ezekiel33:5 Zayeza siyidi naagettontta aggiko iza suuththay iza bolla gidana; izi naagettidaakko bana ashshana 
Ezekiel33:6 Gido attiin woshe addezi mashshay yizayssa be7idi deraa erisanaas zaye punnontta aggiko istta giddofe issi asa shemppo mashshay wodhikko izaadey ba nagara gishshas hayqqana; gido attiin iza suuththaa gishshas woshe addezi oyshettana mala tani ooththana› ga yoota. 
Ezekiel33:7 «Haysso asa nawu! Tani nena Isra7eele keeththas woshe as histta dooradis; hessa gishshas ta nees yootiza qaala siya; ta seerakka istta erisa. 
Ezekiel33:8 Tani iitaza, ‹Haysso iitazoo, neni tumappe hayqqana› tani gida wode, izi ba ogeppe simmana mala ne ooththontta aggiko he iita addezi ba nagaran hayqqana; neni gidikko iza suuththaa gishshas oyshettana."
